Genesis1:1 Ekuqaleni uThixo wadala izulu nomhlaba. 
Genesis1:2 Kwakuselubala nje emhlabeni, kungekho nto ikhoyo. Inzonzobila yamanzi eyayigubungele konke yayithiwe gqume sisithokothoko sobumnyama. UMoya kaThixo wafukama phezu kwaloo manzi." 
Genesis1:3 Wathi uThixo makubekho ukukhanya. Kwabakho ukukhanya. 
Genesis1:4 Wakholwa ke uThixo koko kukhanya, waza wakwahlula ukukhanya nobumnyama." 
Genesis1:5 Wathi ukukhanya yimini; wathi ubumnyama bona bubusuku. Kwahlwa, kwasa; yangumhla wokuqala ke lowo." 
Genesis1:6 Wabuya uThixo wathi makubekho amajukujuku, awahlule kubini amanzi." 
Genesis1:7 Abakho ke amajukujuku. Wawenza ke uThixo amajukujuku, wawahlula amanzi angaphantsi kwawo kumanzi angaphezu kwawo." 
Genesis1:8 Wathi uThixo amajukujuku lawo sisibhakabhaka. Kwahlwa, kwabuya kwasa; yaba ngumhla wesibini ke lowo." 
Genesis1:9 Wandula uThixo ukuthi amanzi angaphantsi kwesibhakabhaka makaqokeleleke ndawonye, kuze kuvele indawo engenamanzi. Kwaba njalo ke." 
Genesis1:10 Wathi uThixo loo ndawo ingenamanzi ngumhlaba, waza wathi loo manzi andawonye wona lulwandle. Wakholwa ke yiloo nto uThixo." 
Genesis1:11 Ubuye wathi umhlaba mawuvelise zonke iintlobo zezityalo, ezo zithwala iinkozo kwanezithwala iziqhamo, zonke ngokweendidi zazo. Kwaba njalo ke." 
Genesis1:12 Umhlaba ke wavelisa zonke iindidi zezityalo, ezo zithwala iinkozo kwanezo zithwala iziqhamo ngokweendidi zazo. UThixo ke wakholwa yiloo nto." 
Genesis1:13 Kwahlwa ke, kwaza kwasa. Lowo ke yaba ngumhla wesithathu." 
Genesis1:14 Kwakhona uThixo wathi: “Makuvele izikhanyiso esibhakabhakeni, zahlukanise imini nobusuku, zibe yimiqondiso yamathuba, imihla, neminyaka.”" 
Genesis1:15 Wathi: “Mazivele esibhakabhakeni, zikhanyise elizweni.” Kwaba njalo ke." 
Genesis1:16 UThixo wênza izikhanyiso ezibini ezikhulu: esikhulu sibe sesasemini, esincinane sibe sesasebusuku. Wênza neenkwenkwezi." 
Genesis1:17 UThixo wazibeka esibhakabhakeni ezo zikhanyiso, ukuze zikhanyise elizweni," 
Genesis1:18 zongamele imini kunye nobusuku, nokuze zahlule ukukhanya nobumnyama. Wakholwa uThixo nazizo." 
Genesis1:19 Kwahlwa, kwasa, yaba ngumhla wesine." 
Genesis1:20 UThixo wathi: “Makubekho inyambalala yeendidi zezinto ezinobomi emanzini, kubekho neentaka eziphaphazelayo esibhakabhakeni.”" 
Genesis1:21 Wabadala ke uThixo oominenga nezinye iintlobo-ntlobo zezilo zamanzi, neentlobo zonke zeentaka. Wakholwa ke uThixo zizo." 
Genesis1:22 Wazithamsanqelisa zonke, wathi: “Mazande izilo zamanzi, zinyakazele elwandle. Neentaka nazo mazande emhlabeni.”" 
Genesis1:23 Kwahlwa, kwasa, yaba ngumhla wesihlanu lowo." 
Genesis1:24 Kwakhona uThixo uthe umhlaba mawuvelise iintlobo zonke zezinto ezinobomi: oozinkomo, izinto ezirhubuluzayo nezinambuzane, nazo zonke iindidi zamarhamncwa. Kwaba njalo ke." 
Genesis1:25 Wazenza zonke ke uThixo izilo ngokweendidi zazo, noozinkomo ngokweendidi zazo, nezilwanyane ezirhubuluzayo nezinambuzane ngokweendidi zazo. Waza ke uThixo wakholwa zezo zinto." 
Genesis1:26 Waza ke uThixo wathi: “Masenze umntu abe ngumfuziselo wethu, afane nathi. Makabe negunya, alawule iintlanzi elwandle, iintaka ezibhabha esibhakabhakeni, iinkomo, nazo zonke izilo nezinambuzane elizweni.”" 
Genesis1:27 Wamdala ke uThixo umntu. Wamenza wangumfuziselo wakhe. Wadala umntu oyindoda kwakunye nomntu obhinqileyo. 
Genesis1:28 Wabathamsanqelisa uThixo wathi: “Yandani, inzala yenu ilizalise ilizwe, nilongamele. Ndininika igunya phezu kweentlanzi, iintaka, nazo zonke izilo elizweni." 
Genesis1:29 Ndininika zonke izityalo ezithwala iinkozo elizweni, kunye nemithi ethwala iziqhamo. Zoba kukutya kwenu ezo zinto." 
Genesis1:30 Ke zona iintaka nezilo zonke ziya kutya uhlaza.” Kwaba njalo ke. 
Genesis1:31 UThixo wakholwa kakhulu yiyo yonke indalo yakhe. Kwahlwa, kwasa; yaba ngumhla wesithandathu ke lowo." 
Genesis2:1 Aba ke ngoko agqityiwe ukudalwa amazulu nehlabathi liphela. 
Genesis2:2 Ngomhla wesixhenxe uThixo wayeselekugqibile konke awayekwenza, waza ke waphumla." 
Genesis2:3 Wawuthamsanqelisa umhla wesixhenxe, wawumisa wangumhla okhethekileyo, kuba ngaloo mhla wayeselegqibile ukudala." 
Genesis2:4 Nanga amagqabantshintshi ngokudalwa kwezulu nehlabathi: Ekudalweni kwezulu nehlabathi nguThixo *uNdikhoyo 
Genesis2:5 kwakungekho zityalo emhlabeni. Kwakungekho nambewu intshulayo, kuba kaloku wayengekayinisi emhlabeni imvula uNdikhoyo; kwakungekho namntu wakuwulima umhlaba lowo." 
Genesis2:6 Kwagqabhuka amanzi emhlabeni, awunyakamisa umhlaba." 
Genesis2:7 UNdikhoyo uThixo wacaphula umhlaba emhlabeni, wabumba umntu ngawo. Waphefumlela umoya obubomi emathatheni akhe, yaba ngumntu ophilayo lowo." 
Genesis2:8 Emva koko uNdikhoyo uThixo wenza umyezo eIdeni empumalanga, wambeka apho loo mntu wayemenzile." 
Genesis2:9 Wahlumisa iindidi zemithi emihle eneziqhamo ezinomtsalane apho eIdeni. Phakathi esidikidikini somyezo kwakukho umthi onika ubomi, nomthi wokucalula okubi nokuhle." 
Genesis2:10 Kwakukho umlambo owawuphuma apho eIdeni, unyakamisa umyezo lowo. Wawusahlukana ube yimilambo emine wakuyishiya i-Ideni." 
Genesis2:11 Owokuqala umlambo, okuthiwa yiPishoni, ngulo ujikeleze ilizwe lakwaHavila." 
Genesis2:12 Kulapho kufunyanwa khona igolide, kunye namakha avumba limnandi, kwakunye namatye exabiso." 
Genesis2:13 Owesibini umlambo yiGihoni; wona ujikeleze ilizwe lakwaKushe. 
Genesis2:14 Owesithathu umlambo yiTigre; wona ucanda ngasempumalanga yeAsiriya. Owesine yiEfrati. 
Genesis2:15 Umntu wabekwa nguNdikhoyo uThixo emyezweni waseIdeni ukuze awulime, awulondoloze." 
Genesis2:16 UThixo wathi kuye: “Ungatya nakuwuphi na umthi osemyezweni; 
Genesis2:17 kodwa uze ungatyi kumthi wokucalula okubi nokuhle. Mhla watya kuwo ngenene uya kufa.” 
Genesis2:18 Uthe ke uNdikhoyo uThixo emva koko: “Akukuhle ukuba le ndoda ihlale ililolo. Kuhle ndiyenzele umlingane onokuncedisana nayo.” 
Genesis2:19 UNdikhoyo uThixo wayethathe umhlaba wabumba zonke iinyamakazi neentaka, wazisa kuloo ndoda ukuba izithiye amagama. Zawafumana njalo ke amagama azo ezo zinto." 
Genesis2:20 Yazithiya amagama zonke iintaka neenyamakazi loo ndoda, kodwa akubangakho nanye kuzo eyafanela ukuba ngumlingane wayo." 
Genesis2:21 Usuke uNdikhoyo uThixo wayihlisela obunzulu bona ubuthongo obu indoda leyo. Ithe isalele njalo wakhupha ubambo kuyo, wabuya wayivala loo ndawo." 
Genesis2:22 UNdikhoyo uThixo udale umfazi ngolo bambo waluthathayo endodeni, wamsa kuyo." 
Genesis2:23 Ithe ke indoda: “Nanku ke oyena-yena! Lithambo lamathambo am, nenyama yeenyama zam. Kuya kuthiwa ngumfazi, kuba uthathwe kumfo.”" 
Genesis2:24 Yiyo ke loo nto indoda imshiya uyise nonina, inamathele kumkayo, baze babe mntu mnye." 
Genesis2:25 Loo ndoda nomkayo babehamba ze, bengenazintloni." 
Genesis3:1 Inyoka yayisesona sidalwa sinobuqhetseba kunazo zonke izidalwa *zikaNdikhoyo uThixo. Yambuza umfazi inyoka yathi: “Ngaba kuyinyani na ukuba uThixo uniyalele ukuba ningatyi kuyo yonke imithi ekulo myezo?” 
Genesis3:2 “Hayi, singatya nakuwuphi na umthi osemyezweni,” utshilo umfazi ukuphendula." 
Genesis3:3 “Ngumthi ophaya esidikidikini somyezo qha esingenakutya kuwo. UThixo uthe maze singazityi iziqhamo zawo, singaziphathi nokuziphatha oku, ukuba asifuni kufa.”" 
Genesis3:4 Ithe ukuphendula inyoka: “Hayi, anisoze nife." 
Genesis3:5 Nto nje uyazi uThixo ukuba xa nizityileyo iziqhamo zawo novuleka amehlo, nibe njengaye, nikwazi ukucalula okuhle kokubi.”" 
Genesis3:6 Watsho waqonda umfazi ukuba singamnandi eso siqhamo: siyanqweneleka, yaye sifanele ukunika ulwazi. Wakha, watya; wanika nomyeni wakhe owayekho, naye watya." 
Genesis3:7 Bathi bakugqiba ukutya kwatsho kwee dlwe, avuleka amehlo, baziqonda ukuba bahamba ze. Bathunga amagqabi omkhiwane, bazambhathisa." 
Genesis3:8 Emva koko beva isandi sokuhamba kukaThixo uNdikhoyo emyezweni ukujika kwelanga. Bazimela ematyholweni emyezweni apho. 
Genesis3:9 UNdikhoyo uThixo wayibiza indoda, wathi: “Ùphi?”" 
Genesis3:10 Yaphendula yathi: “Ndive isandi sokuza kwakho, ndaza ndoyika ndazimela, kuba ndihamba ze.”" 
Genesis3:11 Uthe uThixo: “Ùve ngabani ukuba uhamba ze? Utyile kulaa mthi bendithe uze ungatyi kuwo?” 
Genesis3:12 Ithe indoda ukuphendula: “Ngulo mfazi ùndinike yena lo úndiphileyo, nam ke ndatya.”" 
Genesis3:13 UNdikhoyo uThixo wambuza umfazi esithi: “Ùyenzele ntoni into enje?” Uphendule umfazi wathi: “Ndikhohliswe yinyoka, nam ke ndatya.”" 
Genesis3:14 *UNdikhoyo uThixo uthe kuyo inyoka: “Ngenxa yesi senzo uqalekisiwe wena kuzo zonke izilo. Ukususela ngoku uya kurhubuluza ngesisu, utye uthuli bonke ubomi bakho." 
Genesis3:15 Ndiza kudala ubutshaba phakathi kwakho nomfazi. Inzala yakho neyakhe ziya kuhlala zithiyene. Yona yokucumza intloko; wena woyiluma isithende.” 
Genesis3:16 Waza wathi kuloo mfazi: “Wena uza kuthwala ubunzima ngakumbi xa ukhulelwe, udliwe yinimba xa uzalayo. Noko kunjalo umyeni wakho ùya kumlangazelela, lo gama ayinkosi yakho.”" 
Genesis3:17 Uthe endodeni uThixo: “Wena uve umkakho, watya kumthi ebendithe kuwe uze ungatyi kuwo. Ngenxa yento oyenzileyo ke úqalekisiwe ngoku umhlaba. Ùya kusebenza nzima bonke ubomi bakho, ukuze umhlaba uvelise ukutya." 
Genesis3:18 Kohluma ukhula nenkunzane. Uya kufa yindlala, utye umfino." 
Genesis3:19 Uya kutya ukubila kwakho ude ubuyele kwakuloo mhlaba wawuthathwe kuwo. Wênziwa ngomhlaba; ke uya kubuya ube ngumhlaba.” 
Genesis3:20 UAdam wamthiya igama umkakhe, wathi nguEfa, kuba kaloku luzalwa nguye lonke uluntu." 
Genesis3:21 UNdikhoyo uThixo wabenzela izambatho zesikhumba senyamakazi, wabambesa zona ooAdam noEfa." 
Genesis3:22 Wathi ke *uNdikhoyo uThixo: “Umntu ngoku unjengathi, uyakwazi ukucalula okuhle kokubi. Kuya kuthini ke xa athe wakha, watya kumthi wobomi, aze aphile angaze afe?”" 
Genesis3:23 UNdikhoyo uThixo wamgxothela ngaphandle komyezo umntu, wamenza umlimi womhlaba avele kuwo." 
Genesis3:24 Kwicala elingasempumalanga lomyezo uThixo wabeka *izithunywa ezimaphiko nekrele elidangazelayo, elijika-jika lijonge kwiimbombo zonke. Zazilinde ukuba kungabikho bani usondelayo kumthi wobomi." 
Genesis4:1 UAdam wadibana nomkakhe uEfa, waza wakhulelwa. Wazala umntwana oyinkwenkwe, waza wathi: “Ndifumene inkwenkwe ngoncedo *lukaNdikhoyo.” Wamthiya igama ke, wathi nguKayen." 
Genesis4:2 Uphinde wazala inkwenkwe: uAbheli. UAbheli wayengumfuyi weempahla, yena uKayen engumlimi." 
Genesis4:3 Emva kwethuba uKayen wenzela uNdikhoyo umnikelo ngenxalenye yesivuno sakhe. 
Genesis4:4 Yena ke uAbheli wathatha amanqatha kumazibulo omhlambi weegusha zakhe, wenza idini. UNdikhoyo wakholiswa nguAbheli, waneliseka nangumnikelo wakhe," 
Genesis4:5 kodwa akanelanga nguKayen nomnikelo wakhe. Waqumba uKayen, waba ntshingi-ntshingi ngumsindo." 
Genesis4:6 Wathi ke uNdikhoyo kuKayen: “Uqumbeleni? Kutheni wantshingi-ntshingi? 
Genesis4:7 Ukuba ubulungisile, ngewamkelekile; kodwa ke, kuba wenze ububi, isono sesikungxangele emnyango. Isono sifuna ukukulawula, kodwa uze usilwe usoyise.”" 
Genesis4:8 UKayen wathetha nomninawa wakhe uAbheli. [“Makhe siye endle, mfondini.”] Bathi bakuba besendle, uKayen wajikela umntakwabo, wambulala." 
Genesis4:9 UNdikhoyo uthe kuKayen: “Uphi uAbheli umntakwenu?” Wathi uKayen ukuphendula: “Andazi. Ndingumalusi womntakwethu mna kakade?” 
Genesis4:10 Uthe ke uNdikhoyo: “Uyenzele ntoni into embi kangaka, Kayen? Igazi lomntakwenu oliphalazele emhlabeni liyakhala, likhalela impindezelo." 
Genesis4:11 Uqalekisiwe! Akusobe uphinde uwulime umhlaba. Kaloku úlifunxile umhlaba igazi lomntakwenu ngokuya ubumbulala. 
Genesis4:12 Uya kuthi wakulima, usuke umhlaba ungavelisi kutya konke. Uya kuba sisibhadu-bhadu esijikeleza elizweni.”" 
Genesis4:13 Waphendula wathi uKayen: “Esi sohlwayo siqatha; andinako ukusinyamezela. 
Genesis4:14 Uyandigxotha ngoku emhlabeni, ndibe kude nawe. Ngoku ndiza kuba ngudingezweni, yaye wonke ubani odibana nam uya kundibulala.”" 
Genesis4:15 Uphendule wathi uNdikhoyo: “Hayi, akunjalo; ukuba kubekho mntu ukubulalayo, ndomohlwaya ngokuphindwe kasixhenxe.” Waza ke uNdikhoyo wamphawula uKayen khon' ukuze nabani na odibana naye angambulali." 
Genesis4:16 Wemka ke uKayen kuNdikhoyo, waya kuhlala eNodi, empuma yeIdeni." 
Genesis4:17 UKayen nomkakhe bafumana umntwana oyinkwenkwe, uInoki. Wakha isixeko uKayen, wasithiya ngegama lonyana wakhe." 
Genesis4:18 UInoki wazala unyana, wathi igama lakhe nguHiradi. Yena uHiradi wazala uMehuyali; uMehuyali wazala uMethusali; uMethusali yena wazala uLameki." 
Genesis4:19 ULameki wayenabafazi ababini, uAda noZila." 
Genesis4:20 UAda wazala uYabhali, ongukhokho kwabo babehlala ezintenteni, bengabafuyi." 
Genesis4:21 Umntakwabo-Yabhali yayinguYubhali, ongukhokho wazo zonke iimvumi ezidlala iihapu neefleyiti." 
Genesis4:22 UZila wazala uThubhali-kayen, owayengumkhandi wezixhobo zokusebenza ezenziwa ngobhedu nangentsimbi. Wayenodade wabo uNama." 
Genesis4:23 Wathi uLameki kubafazi bakhe: “Ada noZila, khanive bethu; bafazi bakaLameki, bekani iindlebe. Ndombulala umntu ondibethayo, umfana ondenzakalisayo." 
Genesis4:24 Ke ukuba umntu wohlwaywa kasixhenxe ngokubulala uKayen, ngamashumi asixhenxe anesixhenxe ngokubulala uLameki.”" 
Genesis4:25 UAdam nomkakhe baba nomnye unyana. Wathi uEfa: “UThixo undiphe omnye unyana endaweni ka-Abheli owabulawa nguKayen.” Wathi ke igama lakhe nguSeti. 
Genesis4:26 USeti wazala unyana, wathi nguEnoshe. Baqala ngoko ke abantu ukunqula igama *likaNdikhoyo." 
Genesis5:1 Nanga amagqabantshintshi ngoAdam. (Kaloku uThixo ukudala kwakhe abantu, wabenza bafana naye." 
Genesis5:2 Wadala indoda nomntu obhinqileyo, wabathamsanqelisa, wathi bangabantu.)" 
Genesis5:3 Akuba nekhulu elinamashumi mathathu uAdam, wazala unyana owayefuze yena ncakasana, wathi igama lakhe nguSeti." 
Genesis5:4 UAdam wahlala amakhulu asibhozo eminyaka emva koko. Waba nabanye oonyana neentombi. 
Genesis5:5 Ubhubhe enamakhulu asithoba namashumi mathathu ubudala. 
Genesis5:6 Uthe akuba nekhulu elinesihlanu uSeti, wazala unyana uEnoshe." 
Genesis5:7 Yena uhleli amakhulu asibhozo anesixhenxe, wazala abanye abantwana." 
Genesis5:8 Wabhubha enamakhulu asithoba aneshumi elinambini leminyaka. 
Genesis5:9 UEnoshe yena wayenamashumi asithoba eminyaka ukuzala kwakhe unyana, uKenan." 
Genesis5:10 Uhleli amakhulu asibhozo aneshumi elinesihlanu, wazala nabanye abantwana." 
Genesis5:11 Ubhubhe enamakhulu asithoba anesihlanu. 
Genesis5:12 UKenan yena uzele uMahalaleli xa enamashumi asixhenxe ubudala. 
Genesis5:13 Wahlala amakhulu asibhozo namashumi mane; wazala abanye abantwana. 
Genesis5:14 Yena ubhubhe enamakhulu asithoba aneshumi leminyaka ubudala. 
Genesis5:15 UMahalaleli uzele unyana wakhe uJerede xa wayenamashumi amathandathu anesihlanu ubudala. 
Genesis5:16 Uhleli amakhulu asibhozo anamashumi mathathu emva koko, wazala nabanye abantwana." 
Genesis5:17 Yena ubhubhe emakhulu asibhozo namashumi asithoba anesihlanu. 
Genesis5:18 UJerede wayeneminyaka elikhulu elinamashumi amathandathu anambini ukuzala kwakhe unyana wakhe uInoki. 
Genesis5:19 Emva koko uhleli amakhulu asibhozo eminyaka, wazala abanye abantwana." 
Genesis5:20 Ubhubhe xa emakhulu asithoba anamashumi amathandathu anesibini ubudala. 
Genesis5:21 UInoki uzele unyana, uMethusela, xa wayenamashumi mathandathu anantlanu eminyaka." 
Genesis5:22 Emva koko uInoki wahlala amakhulu amathathu eminyaka edlelana noThixo. Uphinde wanabanye abantwana. 
Genesis5:23 Ubomi ubudle amakhulu mathathu namashumi mathandathu anesihlanu eminyaka. 
Genesis5:24 Wayesoloko enobudlelane noThixo ngalo lonke elo xesha. Kamva ke wathi shwaka akaziwa apho akhoyo, kuba wayethathwe nguThixo." 
Genesis5:25 UMethusela wazala unyana, uLameki, enekhulu linamashumi asibhozo anesixhenxe." 
Genesis5:26 Wahlala amakhulu asixhenxe anamashumi asibhozo anambini. Wazala nabanye abantwana. 
Genesis5:27 Wabhubha emakhulu asithoba namashumi mathandathu anesithoba ubudala. 
Genesis5:28 ULameki wayenekhulu linamashumi asibhozo anambini ukuzala kwakhe unyana. 
Genesis5:29 Wathi yakuvela loo nkwenkwe: “Lo mntwana uza kusithuthuzela ekubulalekeni kulo mhlaba uqalekisiweyo *nguNdikhoyo.” Wathi ke igama lakhe nguNowa. 
Genesis5:30 ULameki wahlala amakhulu amahlanu anamashumi asithoba anesihlanu emva koko. Wazala nabanye abantwana. 
Genesis5:31 Ubhubhe emakhulu asixhenxe mashumi asixhenxe anesixhenxe ubudala. 
Genesis5:32 Akuba makhulu mahlanu eminyaka uNowa wazala oonyana babathathu; yayinguShem, noHam, noYafete." 
Genesis6:1 Lwakuba lwandile uluntu, luthe saa elizweni, kuzelwe namantombazana," 
Genesis6:2 oonyana bakaThixo baphandlwa bubuhle beentombi zabantu, bazikhethela abafazi kuzo ngokuzithandela." 
Genesis6:3 Ngoko ke *uNdikhoyo wathi: “Andisayi kubayeka babe zizimakade abantu. Kaloku bangabantu abafayo. Ukususela ngoku abayi kuhlala ngaphezu kwekhulu elinamashumi amabini eminyaka.” 
Genesis6:4 Ngezo mini, ukanti nangasemva koko, kwakukho iingxilimbela zabafo elizweni ababezalwa ziintombi zabantu noonyana bakaThixo. Yayingamakroti neendwalutho zamandulo ezo." 
Genesis6:5 Uthe ke uNdikhoyo akukuphawula ukuba ngamatshijolo kwabantu elizweni, nokuthi rhoqo kwabo ukuyila ububi," 
Genesis6:6 weva into embi ngenxa yokuba wabadala wababeka elizweni. 
Genesis6:7 Wathi: “Ndiza kubacima kuphele, bangabikho konke emhlabeni abantu endibadalileyo. Nditsho nkqu neenyamakazi, neentaka, kuba ndiyazisola ngento endabadalela yona.”" 
Genesis6:8 Kodwa uNowa wamkeleka kuNdikhoyo. 
Genesis6:9 Nanga amagqabantshintshi ngoNowa. Lo Nowa wayelilunga lomfo. Kwakungekho siphene kuye phakathi kwabantu bemihla yakhe. Wayehlala enobudlelane noThixo. 
Genesis6:10 UNowa wayenoonyana abathathu: uShem, noHam, noYafete." 
Genesis6:11 Lonke uluntu lwalonakele phambi koThixo. Abantu babeziindlobongela zezijama-nkungwini ezigqibe lonke ilizwe. 
Genesis6:12 Walibona lonakele ilizwe uThixo, kuba abantu babeziphethe kakubi." 
Genesis6:13 Wathi ke uThixo kuNowa: “Ndifikelele ekubeni ndilubhangise lonke uluntu. Ndiza kulutshabalalisa luphele tu, kuba ilizwe lizele zizenzo zobundlobongela." 
Genesis6:14 Wena zenzele inqanawa ngamaplanga, ibe namagumbi, uyiqabe itha ngaphandle nangaphakathi." 
Genesis6:15 Uzuyenze ibe likhulu leemitha namashumi mathathu anantathu ubude, ibe ngamashumi mabini anambini eemitha ububanzi, zibe lishumi elinesithathu iimitha ukuphakama." 
Genesis6:16 Uzuyifake uphahla inqanawa, ushiye isithuba esingamashumi amane anane eesentimitha sibe phakathi kophahla namacala eendonga zenqanawa. Yenze ibe nemigangatho emithathu, ibe nomnyango ecaleni." 
Genesis6:17 Ndiza kuthumela izantyala-ntyala zemvula elizweni, zibhubhise yonke into ephilayo. Kuza kufa yonke into," 
Genesis6:18 kodwa wena ndiza kukwenzela umnqophiso. Ngena enqanaweni nomkakho kunye noonyana bakho nabafazi babo," 
Genesis6:19 ungenise enqanaweni inkunzi nemazi kwiindidi zonke zezilwanyana neentaka, zona eziya kuza kuwe ukuze zisinde." 
Genesis6:20  
Genesis6:21 Uze uphathe iindidi zonke zokutya kwabantu nezilo.” 
Genesis6:22 Wayenza yonke loo nto wayixelelwa nguThixo uNowa. 
Genesis7:1 Wathi ke *uNdikhoyo kuNowa: “Ngena enqanaweni nomkakho kunye nosapho lwakho. Ndiphawule ukuba nguwe wedwa kwesi sizukulwana olilungisa. 
Genesis7:2 Uze ungenise enqanaweni iinyamakazi ezityiwayo zibe ngasixhenxe, ibe yinkunzi nemazi, kodwa kwezingatyiwayo ibe yinkunzi nemazi zibe ngambini," 
Genesis7:3 kwaneendidi zeentaka zibe ngasixhenxe, inkunzi nemazi. Loo nto yenzelwa ukuze zonke ezi ndidi zeenyamakazi neentaka zibuye ziqhame kwakhona elizweni." 
Genesis7:4 Emva kweentsuku ezisixhenxe ndiza kunisa imvula eya kutsho iintsuku nobusuku ezingamashumi mane, ukuze itshabalalise yonke into ephilayo endayidalayo.”" 
Genesis7:5 UNowa wayenza yonke into ayiyalelwa nguNdikhoyo. 
Genesis7:6 Wayemakhulu mathandathu ubudala uNowa ukufika kwezantyala-ntyala zemvula kanogumbe elizweni. 
Genesis7:7 Yena nomkakhe noonyana bakhe kunye nabafazi babo babalekela enqanaweni ukufika kwaloo mvula. 
Genesis7:8 Kwangena kuloo nqanawa inkunzi nemazi yazo zonke iindidi zeenyamakazi neentaka ezityiwayo nezingatyiwayo ngokomyalelo kaThixo. 
Genesis7:9  
Genesis7:10 Zagaleleka izandyondyo zemvula emva kweentsuku ezisixhenxe. 
Genesis7:11 Wayemakhulu mathandathu ubudala uNowa, ingumhla weshumi elinesixhenxe kwinyanga yesibini xa kwakugqabhuka imithombo yamanzi angaphantsi komhlaba, kuvuleka nemivalo yemisinga esesibhakabhakeni." 
Genesis7:12 Yatsho izandyondyo imvula iintsuku ezimashumi mane nobusuku bazo. 
Genesis7:13 Ngaloo mini kanye uNowa nomkakhe bangena enqanaweni kunye noonyana babo bobathathu, uShem, noHam, noYafete, kwakunye nabafazi babo." 
Genesis7:14 Bangenisa kunye nabo nezilwanyana zonke, ezasekhaya nezasendle, ezinkulu nezimfutshane, nazo zonke iindidi zeentaka." 
Genesis7:15 Kweza inkunzi nemazi yazo zonke izinto eziphilayo, zangena apho enqanaweni ngokomyalelo kaThixo. *UNdikhoyo waluvala ucango akungena uNowa." 
Genesis7:16  
Genesis7:17 Yatsho izandyondyo imvula iintsuku zamashumi mane, athi ngokuya esanda amanzi ayifunqula inqanawa." 
Genesis7:18 Aye enyuka amanzi, yadada phezu kwawo yona inqanawa." 
Genesis7:19 Aphakama amanzi, ada agubungela nezona ziphakamileyo iintaba kulo lonke elimiweyo;" 
Genesis7:20 anyuka ada aziimitha ezisixhenxe ukusuka encochoyini yeentaba. 
Genesis7:21 Kwafa yonke into ephilayo elizweni. Kwafa iintaka, kwafa imfuyo, kwafa iinyamakazi, kwafa nabantu." 
Genesis7:22 Kwafa yonke into ephefumlayo elizweni. 
Genesis7:23 Kwatshatyalaliswa yonke into ephilayo elizweni: abantu, neenyamakazi, neentaka. Kwasala uNowa kunye nabo babesenqanaweni kunye naye." 
Genesis7:24 Kwada kwaba likhulu linamashumi mahlanu eentsuku engathothi loo manzi. 
Genesis8:1 UThixo wayengabalibalanga ooNowa nezilwanyana nezilo ezazisenqanaweni kunye nabo. Wavelisa umoya, aza andula ukuthotha amanzi." 
Genesis8:2 Yavalwa imithombo yamanzi engaphantsi komhlaba nesesibhakabhakeni, yapheza imvula." 
Genesis8:3 Aya ethotha amanzi kwada kwaziintsuku ezilikhulu linamashumi mahlanu. 
Genesis8:4 Ngomhla weshumi elinesixhenxe wenyanga yesixhenxe inqanawa yaya kuma phezu kweentaba zeArarati. 
Genesis8:5 Aya ephela amanzi, kwathi ngomhla wokuqala wenyanga yeshumi zathi thu iincopho zeentaba." 
Genesis8:6 Emva kwamashumi amane eentsuku uNowa wavula ifestile yenqanawa," 
Genesis8:7 wakhupha ihlungulu. Lona lamana ukuphaphazela libheka ngapha nangapha, ada atshona amanzi emhlabeni." 
Genesis8:8 UNowa wandulula ihobe ukuya kuhlola ukuba atshile na amanzi. 
Genesis8:9 Kodwa alizanga lifumane ndawo yakuhlala ihobe, laza labuyela kuye enqanaweni, kuba umhlaba wawusagqunywe ngamanzi. Wolula isandla uNowa, walibamba, walingenisa enqanaweni." 
Genesis8:10 Walinda iintsuku zasixhenxe, waphinda walikhupha ihobe." 
Genesis8:11 Labuya ngokuhlwa seliphethe igqabi lomnquma ngomlomo, elalisandul' ukulikha. Waqonda ke uNowa ukuba amanzi athothile." 
Genesis8:12 Walinda ezinye iintsuku ezisixhenxe, waza walikhupha kwakhona ihobe. Alizanga liphinde libuye ngesi sihlandlo." 
Genesis8:13 Kuthe ke xa uNowa wayemakhulu mathandathu ananye ubudala, ngomhla wokuqala kwinyanga yokuqala, aba seletshonile amanzi emhlabeni. Wawuvula umnyango wenqanawa uNowa, wakhangela ngaphandle macal' onke, wawubona umhlaba womile." 
Genesis8:14 Ngomhla wamashumi mabini anesixhenxe, ngenyanga yesibini, laliselome khonkqo ilizwe." 
Genesis8:15 UThixo wathi kuNowa: 
Genesis8:16 “Phuma enqanaweni kunye nomkakho, noonyana bakho, kunye nabafazi babo." 
Genesis8:17 Zikhuphe zonke izidalwa ezisenqanaweni, iintaka neenyamakazi, nezinto ezirhubuluzayo, ukuze ziqhame, zande, zizalise ihlabathi.”" 
Genesis8:18 Waphuma ke uNowa enqanaweni kunye nomkakhe, noonyana bakhe, kunye nabafazi babo." 
Genesis8:19 Zonke izidalwa ezishukumayo, iintaka nezilwanyana nezinto ezirhubuluzayo, zaphuma enqanaweni ngokweendidi zazo." 
Genesis8:20 Wenza iqonga lamadini *kaNdikhoyo uNowa. Wathatha isilwanyana ngasinye nentaka nganye, kwezo zodidi olutyiwayo, wazinikela zangumbingelelo phezu kwelo qonga." 
Genesis8:21 Lamkeleka ivumba lazo kuNdikhoyo, waza wathi: “Andisobe ndiliqalekise ilizwe ngenxa yezenzo zabantu. Kaloku ndiyazi ukuba umntu uneengcinga ezigwenxa kwaeselula. Andisobe ndizitshabalalise izinto eziphilayo njengoko sendenjenjalo." 
Genesis8:22 Kuya kusoloko kukho amaxesha okulima namaxesha okuvuna wonke lo gama lisemiyo ilizwe; kuya kubakho ingqele nobushushu, ihlobo nobusika, ubusuku nemini.”" 
Genesis9:1 UThixo wamthamsanqelisa uNowa kunye noonyana bakhe, esithi: “Qhamani nande, nizalise ihlabathi ngenzala yenu." 
Genesis9:2 Izilo zonke, kwaneentaka neentlanzi, mazinoyike. Zonke ziphantsi kwegunya lenu." 
Genesis9:3 Yonke into ephilayo yoba kukutya kwenu. Njengoko ndaninikayo uhlaza, ndininika into yonke ngoku." 
Genesis9:4 Into eningayi kuyitya yinyama yento engophanga. Andiyivumeli loo nto, kuba igazi libubomi." 
Genesis9:5 Umntu obulala omnye umntu unetyala. Nasiphi na isilwanyana esibulala umntu ndiya kusibulala. 
Genesis9:6 Umntu wenziwa wangumfuziselo kaThixo, nabani na ke obulala omnye umntu naye uya kubulawa kwangomnye umntu." 
Genesis9:7 “Ze nichume nande, ukuze inzala yenu ilizalise ilizwe.”" 
Genesis9:8 Uqokele wathi uThixo kuNowa nakoonyana bakhe: 
Genesis9:9 “Ngoku ndiza kwenza umnqophiso nani kwakunye nenzala yenu," 
Genesis9:10 nazo zonke izinto eziphilayo: izilo zonke, kunye nempahla efuyiweyo, neentaka zonke; nditsho yonke into ebisenqanaweni kunye nani." 
Genesis9:11 Ndithi andisobe ndizitshabalalise ngemvula kwakhona izinto eziphilayo. Ilizwe alisobe liphinde lipheliswe ngemvula. Ngumnqophiso wam lowo. 
Genesis9:12 Umqondiso walo mnqophiso endikwenzela wona kunye nazo zonke izinto eziphilayo, ngumnyama oya kubakho esibhakabhakeni. Nguwo lowo umqondiso womnqophiso ongasoze ujike endiwenzela abantu nalo lonke elimiweyo." 
Genesis9:13  
Genesis9:14 Nanini na xa lisibekele, amafu eziingqimba, ndowukhumbula lo mnqophiso wam kwakuvela umnyama. Nditsho lo mnqophiso ndiwenzele wena nazo zonke izinto eziphilayo, ndisithi andisobe ndilitshabalalise ilizwe kwakhona ngemvula." 
Genesis9:15  
Genesis9:16 Wakuvela umnyama emafini, ndiwubone, ndokhumbula umnqophiso ongasoze ujike endiwuthembise zonke izinto eziphilayo elizweni." 
Genesis9:17 Nguwo ke lowo umqondiso womnqophiso endiwenzela yonke into ephilayo.” 
Genesis9:18 UNowa waphuma enqanaweni noShem noHam noYafete oonyana bakhe. (UHam nguyise kaKanana.) 
Genesis9:19 Oonyana bakaNowa bobathathu ngookhokho babo bonke abantu elizweni. 
Genesis9:20 UNowa owayengumlimi waqala ngokulima umdiliya. 
Genesis9:21 Akuba esele iwayini uNowa wanxila, wakhulula, walala ze egumbini lakhe." 
Genesis9:22 UHam, uyise kaKanana, uthe akumbona eze uyise, waphuma waya kuxelela abantakwabo phandle." 
Genesis9:23 Ke bona ooShem noYafete bathatha ingubo, baya ngomva kuyise egumbini lakhe, bamambathisa bengamjonganga, ukuze bangamboni ehamba ze." 
Genesis9:24 Akuqabuka uNowa, wayiva into eyenziwe ngunyana wakhe oligqibelo," 
Genesis9:25 wathi: “Uqalekisiwe uKanana! Uya kuba lixhoba labantakwabo. 
Genesis9:26 Mdumiseni *uNdikhoyo uThixo kaShem. UKanana uya kuba likhoboka likaShem. 
Genesis9:27 Wanga uThixo angawandisa umhlaba kaYafete; yanga inzala yakhe ingaxhamla amathamsanqa kunye nekaShem; uKanana yena abe likhoboka likaYafete.” 
Genesis9:28 UNowa wahlala amakhulu amathathu namashumi amahlanu emva kwemvula kanogumbe," 
Genesis9:29 wabhubha emakhulu alithoba namashumi mahlanu ubudala. 
Genesis10:1 Nanga amagqabantshintshi ngoonyana bakaNowa, uShem noHam noYafete. Kaloku nabo bazala oonyana emva kwemvulakazi kanogumbe." 
Genesis10:2 Oonyana bakaYafete naba: nguGomere, uMagogi, uMadayi, uJavan, noTubhali, uMesheki, noTisari." 
Genesis10:3 Inzala kaGomere ngama-Ashkenezi, amaRifati, namaTogarma." 
Genesis10:4 Inzala kaJavan yona ngamaElisha, amaTashishe, amaKiti, namaDodan." 
Genesis10:5 Ngabo abangookhokho babantu ababegudle unxweme nabo babeseziqithini. Yinzala kaYafete ke leyo, eyayimi izizwe ngezizwe kwiindawo ngeendawo, isizwe ngasinye sithetha olwaso ulwimi." 
Genesis10:6 Oonyana bakaHam nguKushe, uMizerayim, uPuti, noKanana." 
Genesis10:7 Inzala kaKushe yaba ngamaSebha, amaHavila, amaSabheta, amaRama, namaSabheteka. Inzala kaRama ngamaShebha namaDedan." 
Genesis10:8 UKushe wayenonyana ogama linguNimrodi, owaba lelona kroti libalaseleyo elizweni." 
Genesis10:9 Ngoncedo *lukaNdikhoyo waba lichebesha lezingela. Yiyo ke loo nto kuthiwa xa kuthethwayo: “Wanga uNdikhoyo angakupha amandla, ube lizingela, ufuze uNimrodi.”" 
Genesis10:10 Lwaqala eBhabheli, e-Ereki, naseAkadi ulawulo lwakhe. Zontathu ezo ndawo zikwelaseBhabheli." 
Genesis10:11 Ukusuka apho waya eAsiriya apho wakha isixeko saseNiniva, esaseRehobhoti-ire, nesaseKala," 
Genesis10:12 kunye neRezen emi phakathi kweNiniva nesixekokazi iKala. 
Genesis10:13 Inzala kaMizerayim yaba ngamaLudi, ama-Anam, amaLehabhi, amaNafetuyi," 
Genesis10:14 amaPatrusi, namaKaseluyi, apho kwakuvela khona amaFilistiya namaKafto." 
Genesis10:15 Oonyana bakaKanana nguSidon owamazibulo, kunye noHeti," 
Genesis10:16 noJebhusi, noAmori, noGirgashi," 
Genesis10:17 noHivi, noAreki, noSini," 
Genesis10:18 noArvadi, noZemari, noHamati. Izizwe ngezizwe zakwaKanan zathi saa," 
Genesis10:19 yada imida yazo yaya kuthi xhaxhe ngeSidon, yada yaya kutsho eGerari ngaseGaza, yenjenjeya ukuya eSodom naseGomora, eAdama naseZebhoyim kufuphi neLasha." 
Genesis10:20 Yinzala kaHam ke le eyayimi izizwe ngezizwe kwiindawo ngeendawo, sizwe ngasinye sithetha olwaso ulwimi." 
Genesis10:21 UShem, umkhuluwa kaYafete, waba ngukhokho wamaHebhere." 
Genesis10:22 Oonyana bakhe nguElam, uAsuri, uArpakishadi, uLudi, noAram." 
Genesis10:23 Inzala ka-Aram yaba ngamaUzi, amaHuli, amaGetere, namaMahi." 
Genesis10:24 UArpakishadi wazala uShela, owazala uHebhere." 
Genesis10:25 UHebhere wazala oonyana ababini. Omnye nguPelege, kuba ngexesha lakhe abantu babahlulelene elizweni, omnye yayinguJoketan." 
Genesis10:26 Inzala kaJoketan yaba ngama-Alemodadi, amaShelefe, amaHazare-mavete, amaJera," 
Genesis10:27 amaHadoram, amaUzali, amaDikela," 
Genesis10:28 amaObhali, ama-Abhimayeli, amaShebha," 
Genesis10:29 amaOfire, amaHavila, namaJobhabhi. Zonke ezi zizwe yinzala kaJoketan." 
Genesis10:29 amaOfire, amaHavila, namaJobhabhi. Zonke ezi zizwe yinzala kaJoketan." 
Genesis10:30 Umhlaba ababemi kuwo wawusuka eMesa uye kuthi xhaxhe ngeZefara kweleentaba empumalanga. 
Genesis10:31 Yinzala kaShem ke leyo, eyayimi izizwe ngezizwe kwiindawo ngeendawo, isizwe ngasinye sithetha olwaso ulwimi." 
Genesis10:32 Yinzala kaNowa yonke ke le, izizizwe ngezizwe ngokwemilibo yazo. Emva kwemvula kanogumbe zonke izizwe elizweni zavela koonyana bakaNowa." 
Genesis11:1 Ngelo xesha abantu elizweni babethetha ulwimi olunye, besebenzisa namagama afanayo ezinto." 
Genesis11:2 Ke ekubhaduleni kwabo kwelasempumalanga bada baya kutsho kumathafa aseBhabheli, bema apho." 
Genesis11:3 Bathethana bathi: “Masenze izitena, sizitshise ziqine.” Baza ke basebenzisa ezo zitena endaweni yamatye, netha endaweni yodaka." 
Genesis11:4 Bathi ke: “Masakhe isixeko, senze nenqaba enencopho eya kutsho esibhakabhakeni, ukuze sibe negama nathi, singathi saa elizweni.”" 
Genesis11:5 *UNdikhoyo wehla weza kusibona eso sixeko babesakhile nenqaba leyo," 
Genesis11:6 waza wathi: “Xa aba bantu beluhlanga olunye, bekwantetho-nye, sebeqala ngokwenjenje, abanakuxakwa nayintoni na abafuna ukuyenza." 
Genesis11:7 Yizani sihle, ulwimi lwabo silwenze lube yingxuba-kaxaka, khon' ukuze bangevani ngentetho.”" 
Genesis11:8 Wabathi saa elizweni uNdikhoyo, àbasakha neso sixeko." 
Genesis11:9 Kwathiwa eso sixeko yiBhabheli, kuba kaloku uThixo wasuka wayenza ingxuba-kaxaka intetho yabantu. Ukusuka apho abantu bathi saa elizweni." 
Genesis11:10 Nanga amagqabantshintshi ngoShem. Kudlule iminyaka yamibini emva konogumbe, uShem wazala unyana uArpakishadi selenekhulu leminyaka ubudala." 
Genesis11:11 Uhleli amanye amakhulu amahlanu emva koko, wazala abanye abantwana." 
Genesis11:12 Akuba namashumi mathathu anantlanu uArpakishadi, wazala unyana uShela." 
Genesis11:13 Emva koko uhleli amakhulu mane anantathu, wazala nabanye abantwana." 
Genesis11:14 Akuba namashumi mathathu uShela, wazala unyana uHebhere." 
Genesis11:15 Wahlala amakhulu mane anantathu emva koko, wazala nabanye abantwana." 
Genesis11:16 Wayenamashumi mathathu anane uHebhere ukuzala kwakhe unyana uPelegi. 
Genesis11:17 Uhleli amakhulu mane anamashumi mathathu emva koko, wazala abanye abantwana." 
Genesis11:18 UPelege uzele unyana, uRewu, emashumi mathathu ubudala." 
Genesis11:19 Uhleli amakhulu mabini anethoba emva koko, wazala nabanye abantwana." 
Genesis11:20 URewu uzele unyana, uSerugi, emashumi mathathu anambini ubudala." 
Genesis11:21 Uhleli amakhulu mabini anesixhenxe emva koko, wazala nabanye abantwana." 
Genesis11:22 Akuba mashumi mathathu ubudala uSerugi, wazala uNahore." 
Genesis11:23 Uhleli amakhulu mabini eminyaka emva koko, wazala nabanye abantwana." 
Genesis11:24 Wayenamashumi mabini anethoba uNahore ukuzala kwakhe unyana wakhe uTera. 
Genesis11:25 Emva koko uhleli ikhulu lineshumi elinethoba leminyaka, waza wazala nabanye abantwana." 
Genesis11:26 UTera wayeselenamashumi asixhenxe ukuzala kwakhe uAbram noNahore noHaran. 
Genesis11:27 Nanga amagqabantshintshi ngoTera uyise ka-Abram noNahore noHaran. UHaran wazala uLothe," 
Genesis11:28 waza kwayena uHaran watshabela kwakweso sixeko sakubo, iUre kwelamaKaledi. Uyise wayesadla amazimba." 
Genesis11:29 UAbram wathatha uSarayi, waza uNahore yena wathatha uMilika, intombi kaHaran uyise kaIska." 
Genesis11:30 Ke kaloku uSarayi wayengenabantwana, kuba wayengazali." 
Genesis11:31 UTera wafuduka eUre, ehamba noAbram unyana wakhe, kunye nomzukulwana wakhe uLothe, unyana kaHaram, kwakunye noSarayi umolokazana wakhe, umka-Abram. Wemka kwelamaKaledi, wafudukela welaseKanana. Bahamba bada baya kutsho eHaran, bafika bema apho." 
Genesis11:32 Wabhubhela apho eHaran uTera emakhulu mabini anantlanu ubudala. 
Genesis12:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuAbram: “Lishiye ilizwe lakowenu, izizalwana kunye nekhaya lakho, umke uye kwilizwe endiza kukwalathisa lona." 
Genesis12:2 “Ndiza kukunika inzala eninzi, eya kuba sisizwe esikhulu; ndikunike amathamsanqa, libe nodumo igama lakho, ube lithamsanqa nakwabanye." 
Genesis12:3 Abo bakuthamsanqelisayo nam ndobathamsanqelisa, ndibaqalekise abo bakuqalekisayo. Zonke izizwe zothamsanqeliswa ngawe.”" 
Genesis12:4 Wanduluka ke uAbram eHaran ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo. Wayemashumi asixhenxe anantlanu ubudala. ULothe naye wahamba kunye noAbram. 
Genesis12:5 UAbram wemka nomkakhe uSarayi, kunye noLothe unyana womninawa wakhe. Wathatha bonke ubutyebi bakhe, kunye nezicaka zakhe azifumene eHaran, wenjenjeya ukubheka eKanana. Bakufika eKanana," 
Genesis12:6 uAbram wenjenjeya wada waya kugaleleka eShekem kwindawo enomthi kaMore. Ayesemi kwelo zwe ngelo xesha amaKanana. 
Genesis12:7 UNdikhoyo wabonakala kuAbram, wathi: “Nali ke ilizwe eliya kumiwa yinzala yakho.” UAbram ke wenza iqonga apho, wanqula uNdikhoyo owabonakala kuye." 
Genesis12:8 Ukusuka apho wabheka ngasemazantsi kweleentaba kwicala langasempuma yesixeko saseBhetele. Wazigxumeka apho iintente, ephahlwe yiBhetele ngasentshona neAyi ngasempumalanga. Nalapho wenza iqonga, wanqula uNdikhoyo." 
Genesis12:9 Wanduluka nalapho, egqitha kwiindawo ngeendawo, ejonge emazantsi eKanana." 
Genesis12:10 Kwakukho indlala eKanana. Yayinkulu kangangokuba uAbram wehla waya eJiputa, wakha wahlala apho ixeshana." 
Genesis12:11 Akufika emideni, wathi kumkakhe uSarayi: “Ndiyazi ukuba umhle gqitha," 
Genesis12:12 yaye akukubona amaJiputa, aza kuthi ungumkam, aze andibulale mna, akushiye wena." 
Genesis12:13 Uze uthi ke ungudade wethu. Aya kundiphatha kakuhle ke ngenxa yakho, angandibulali.”" 
Genesis12:14 Akugqitha emideni engena eJiputa, amaJiputa akhangwa bubuhle bomka-Abram." 
Genesis12:15 Amaphakathi kakumkani athi nawo akumbona abuncoma ubuhle bakhe kukumkani. Wathathwa ke, waya kuhlala ebhotwe kwakumkani." 
Genesis12:16 Ukumkani wamphatha kakuhle uAbram ngenxa yomkakhe, wamphawulela imihlambi yeegusha neebhokhwe, iinkomo needonki, izicaka neenkamela." 
Genesis12:17 Kodwa ngenxa yokuthathwa kukaSarayi ngukumkani, uNdikhoyo wathumela izibetho zezifo kukumkani nakubantu bonke bakomkhulu." 
Genesis12:18 Waza ke ukumkani wabiza uAbram, wathi: “Yintoni le nto undenze yona? Kutheni ungandixelelanga nje ukuba ngumkakho lo?" 
Genesis12:19 Kutheni usithi ngudade wenu nje, undiyeke ndimenze umkam? Nanko ke umkakho; mthathe umke naye.”" 
Genesis12:20 Ukumkani wayalela amadoda ukuba uAbram makakhutshelwe ngaphandle kwemida yelo zwe, emke nomkakhe, nayo yonke impahla yakhe." 
Genesis13:1 Ukuphuma kwakhe eJiputa uAbram wabheka ngasentla emazantsi aseKanana, ehamba nomkakhe, nemfuyo yakhe yonke, uAbram, eneegusha neebhokhwe kwakunye noLothe." 
Genesis13:2 Wayefumile neenkomo, enayo nesiliva negolide." 
Genesis13:3 Nalapho wemka, edlula kwiindawo ngeendawo, esingise eBhetele." 
Genesis13:4 Wafika kulaa ndawo wakha wagxumeka kuyo iintente kuqala, leya iphahlwe yiBhetele neAyi, apho wayenzele khona uThixo iqonga, wanqula khona *uNdikhoyo." 
Genesis13:5 ULothe naye wayeneegusha neebhokhwe neenkomo, nentsapho nezicaka zakhe." 
Genesis13:6 Ngoko ke amadlelo akazange ayanele impahla yabo eninzi, nomhlaba wokuhlala awabanela." 
Genesis13:7 Kwabakho ingxwaba-ngxwaba phakathi kwamadoda alusa impahla ka-Abram namadoda alusa ekaLothe. AmaKanana namaPerezi ayesahlala kwelo zwe. 
Genesis13:8 UAbram wathi kuLothe: “Siyazalana, mfondini; masingabhidani, namadoda ethu makangalwi." 
Genesis13:9 Kungcono sahlukane; umhlaba uphangalele. Zikhethele nayiphi na indawo, uye kwelo cala, mna ndiye kwelinye.”" 
Genesis13:10 Wakhangela uLothe, waphawula ukuba yonke loo ntili yeJordan ukuya kuma ngeZoware, yayingumhlaba onamanzi. Wawufana nomyezo kaNdikhoyo, ufana nqwa nelaseJiputa. Ngeli xesha kwakungaphambi kokutshatyalaliswa kweSodom neGomora." 
Genesis13:11 ULothe wayithatha yonke loo ntili yeJordan, wenjenjeya ukubheka ngasempumalanga. Aba ayahlukana njalo loo madoda mabini." 
Genesis13:12 Wasala kwilizwe laseKanana uAbram, uLothe yena wagxumeka iintente kuloo ntili iphakathi kwezo zixeko zingaseSodom." 
Genesis13:13 Abantu baseSodom babegwenxa, bemona gqitha uNdikhoyo." 
Genesis13:14 Akuba emkile uLothe, *uNdikhoyo wathi kuAbram: “Bheka-bheka ukhangele kakuhle macal' onke ukuloo ndawo umi kuyo." 
Genesis13:15 Wonke loo mhlaba uwubonayo ndiza kuwunika wena kunye nenzala yakho. Niya kuwuma ngalo lonke ixesha. 
Genesis13:16 Ndiza kukunika inzala eninzi, ibe yinyambalala engaphezu kwentlabathi, engenakubalwa mntu." 
Genesis13:17 Hamba ke, uye kuwuhlola macal' onke loo mhlaba, kuba ndikunika wona.”" 
Genesis13:18 UAbram ke wazikhulula iintente, wemka waya kuma ngakwimithi yaseMamre eHebron, apho wamenzela khona uNdikhoyo iqonga lamadini." 
Genesis14:1 Kwaqubisana emfazweni iikumkani ezine: uAmrafele waseBhabheli, uAriyoki wase-Elazare, uKedor-lahomere wase-Elam, kunye noTidali waseGoyi." 
Genesis14:2 Yayilidabi neekumkani ezintlanu: uBhera waseSodom, uBhisha waseGomora, uShinabhi waseAdama, uShenebhere waseZebhoyim, nekumkani yaseBhela ekwakusithiwa yiZoware." 
Genesis14:3 Zontlanu ezi kumkani zaqukanisa imikhosi yazo entilini yeSidim, ngoku eluLwandle oluFileyo." 
Genesis14:4 Zaziphantsi koKedor-lahomere ishumi elinambini leminyaka. Zamvukela kodwa kulo weshumi elinantathu. 
Genesis14:5 Kunyaka weshumi linane uKedor-lahomere namakholwane akhe badibanisa imikhosi yabo, bawachitha amaRafa eAshtaroti-karnayim, amaZuzi eHam, namaEma ethafeni laseKiriyatayim." 
Genesis14:6 AmaHori bawadudula kwezo nduli zaseSeyire, bawasukela aya kutsho e-Elparan ngasentlango." 
Genesis14:7 Babuyela eKadeshe, ekwakusithiwa yiEn-mishpati ngoko. Balihlutha lonke ilizwe lama-Amaleki nama-Amori awayemi eHazezon-tamare." 
Genesis14:8 Zaphuma iikumkani zaseSodom, eGomora, eAdama, eZebhoyim, naseBhela, le kuthiwa yiZoware, zayikhupha imikhosi yazo ukusinga edabini kuloo ntili yaseSidim." 
Genesis14:9 Zaqubisana apho ezi kumkani zintlanu neekumkani ezine: ooKedor-lahomere wase-Elam, noTidali waseGoyi, noAmrafele waseBhabheli, noAriyoki wase-Elasare." 
Genesis14:10 Kuloo ntili kwakukho imihadi enetha. Zithe xa zibalekayo edabini iikumkani zaseSodom naseGomora, amanye amajoni eyela kuloo mihadi. Asindileyo abalekela ezintabeni." 
Genesis14:11 Iikumkani ezine zathimba yonke into eSodom naseGomora, zemka kunye nokutya." 
Genesis14:12 ULothe unyana womninawa ka-Abram wayehlala eSodom, zamthimba kunye nempahla yakhe." 
Genesis14:13 Kwabakho ndoda ithile yasindayo, eyabaleka yaya kuxelela uAbram umHebhere owayehlala ngakwimithi kaMamre umAmori. UMamre nabantakwabo uEshkoli noAnere babengamakholwane ka-Abram." 
Genesis14:14 Akuva uAbram ukuba isizalwane sakhe sithinjiwe, wabiza onke amadoda akhe. Ayengamakhulu amathathu aneshumi elinesibhozo ewonke. Wazisukela zone ezo kumkani, wada waya kutsho kwaDan." 
Genesis14:15 Wawahlula angamaqela ngamaqela amadoda akhe, wawuhlasela loo mkhosi kwakuhlwa. Wawoyisa, wawusukela waya kufika eHobha entla kweDamasko." 
Genesis14:16 Wabuya nawo amaxhoba ababewahluthile. Wabuya naye noLothe nempahla yakhe, kunye nabafazi nezicaka." 
Genesis14:17 Ukubuya kwakhe uAbram ekulweni noKedor-lahomere namakholwane akhe, wahlangatyezwa ngukumkani waseSodom entilini yaseShawe, ekuthiwa yiNtili kaKumkani." 
Genesis14:18 UMelkizedeki owayengukumkani waseSalem ekwangumbingeleli woThixo uPhezukonke, weza nesonka newayini." 
Genesis14:19 Wathamsanqelisa uAbram esithi: “UThixo uPhezukonke, owênza izulu nomhlaba, wanga angakuthamsanqelisa, Abram!" 
Genesis14:20 UThixo uPhezukonke okoyiseleyo iintshaba zakho, makadunyiswe.” Waza ke uAbram wakhupha izishumi zamaxhoba emfazwe, wanikela kuMelkizedeki." 
Genesis14:21 Wathi ukumkani waseSodom kuAbram: “Wathathe onke amaxhoba, undinike nje abantu bam.”" 
Genesis14:22 Wathi uAbram: “Ndiyafunga, uThixo uyazi, *uNdikhoyo uPhezukonke, umenzi wezulu nelizwe!" 
Genesis14:23 Andiyi kuthatha nto yakho konke, nditsho nokuba ngumsonto lo okanye umtya wembadada. Ndifuna ungaze utsho ukuthi: ‘UAbram watyetyiswa ndim.’" 
Genesis14:24 Mna andiyi kuthatha nto konke, ngaphandle nje kokutya okutyiwe ngabantu bam. Kodwa wona amakholwane am, uAnere noEshkoli noMamre, mabayifumane bona eyabo inxaxheba.”" 
Genesis15:1 Emva koku uAbram waba nombono apho weva *uNdikhoyo esithi: “Uze ungoyiki, Abram, ndim oya kukukhusela; ikwandim oya kukubonelela kanobom.”" 
Genesis15:2 Uphendule wathi uAbram: “Mhlekazi Ndikhoyo, iya kundinceda ntoni loo nto? Yintoni ongandibonelela kuyo ndingenabantwana nje? Nàlo uza kuba yindlalifa yam nguElizere waseDamasko.”" 
Genesis15:3 Kwakhona uAbram uthe: “Akukho nzala undinike yona; ke sisicaka sam esiza kuba yindlalifa yam.” 
Genesis15:4 Uthe ke uNdikhoyo ebhekisa kuAbram: “UElizere akayi kuba yindlalifa yakho. Ngunyana wakho nqo oya kuba yindlalifa yakho.” 
Genesis15:5 UNdikhoyo wamkhuphela ngaphandle kwendlu uAbram, wathi: “Khangela esibhakabhakeni, uzibale iinkwenkwezi ezilapho, ukuba ungaba nako. Boba baninzi kangako abazukulwana bakho.”" 
Genesis15:6 UAbram walibeka kuNdikhoyo ithemba lakhe, waza ngenxa yoko wenziwa ilungisa." 
Genesis15:7 Waqokela wathi kuye uNdikhoyo: “NdinguNdikhoyo owakukhupha kwilizwe lakowenu eUre yelamaKaledi, ukuze uze kuma kulo mhlaba, ube ngowakho.”" 
Genesis15:8 Ke yena uAbram wabuza wathi: “Mhlekazi Ndikhoyo, ndingaqonda njani ukuba lo mhlaba woba ngowam?”" 
Genesis15:9 Uthe uNdikhoyo: “Ndizisele ithokazi lenkomo, nemazi yebhokhwe, nenkunzi yegusha, zonke zibe minyaka mithathu, kunye nehobe nevukuthu.”" 
Genesis15:10 Weza nazo uAbram ezo zinto, wazahlula kubini, waza wazidwelisa, icala ngalinye lamelana nelinye. Iintaka zona akazange azahlule kubini." 
Genesis15:11 Kwandanda amaxhalanga phezu kwaloo nyama yezo zinto, kodwa uAbram wawagxotha." 
Genesis15:12 Ukutshona kwelanga wehliwa bobunzulu ubuthongo uAbram. Wangenwa luvalo naluloyiko. 
Genesis15:13 UNdikhoyo wathi kuye: “Inzala yakho iya kuba ngabangeneleli kumhlaba wasemzini, uze uyazi loo nto. Apho baya kuba ngamakhoboka, baphathwe gadalala amakhulu amane eminyaka." 
Genesis15:14 Kodwa ndosohlwaya eso sizwe sibaphethe kakubi; baya kuthi xa bemkayo apho bahambe namaxhoba. 
Genesis15:15 Wena ke kambe uza kuhlala udle ubomi ude ukhokhobe, amathambo akho afihlwe ngakookhokho bakho." 
Genesis15:16 Inzala yakho yobuyela apha emva kwezizukulwana ezine. Kaloku andiyi kuwakhupha kwangoku ama-Amori, bude buzaliseke ubugwenxa bawo.”" 
Genesis15:17 Kuthe kwakurhatyela, kwathi gqi imbiza iqhuma, nesikhuni esivuthayo, zadlula phakathi kwaloo mkrozo wenyama." 
Genesis15:18 Waza ke uNdikhoyo wathi kuAbram esenza umnqophiso: “Ndiyathembisa ukuba wonke lo mhlaba, ukususela kwimida yeJiputa kuye kuthi xhaxhe ngomlambo iEfrati, ndiza kuwunika inzala yakho," 
Genesis15:19 ndawonye nomhlaba wamaKeni, amaKinazi, amaKadimon," 
Genesis15:20 amaHeti, amaPerezi, namaRafa; ama-Amori, amaKanana, amaGirgashi, kunye namaJebhusi.”" 
Genesis16:1 Umka-Abram uSarayi wayengazali. Wayenesicakazana somJiputakazi esigama linguHagare. 
Genesis16:2 Wathi ke uSarayi kuAbram: “Ndiyabona ukuba *uNdikhoyo akandiphanga inzala. Ungangeni uHagare nje, isicakakazi sam? Mhlawumbi angandizalela unyana yena.” UAbram wavuma." 
Genesis16:3 USarayi ke wamnikezela uHagare abe ngumfazi omncinci ka-Abram. Le nto yehla selehleli ishumi leminyaka uAbram eKanana. 
Genesis16:4 UAbram wadibana noHagare, waza uHagare wakhulelwa. Uthe ke akuziqonda ukuba ukhulelwe, waqhosha wamdela uSarayi." 
Genesis16:5 USarayi ke uthe kuAbram: “Endidela nje uHagare lo, kungenxa yakho. Kanti ke wawumnikwe ndim lo, seleqhosha nje akuzibona ekhulelwe. Ngamana uNdikhoyo angahlula oyena unyanisileyo phakathi kwam nawe.”" 
Genesis16:6 Uphendule wathi uAbram: “Kulungile kaloku, sisicakazana sakho; uphantsi kwakho uHagare. Yenza into oyibonayo kaloku.” USarayi ke wamphatha gadalala uHagare, wada wabaleka wemka." 
Genesis16:7 Isithunywa sikaNdikhoyo sadibana noHagare ngasemthonjeni osentlango ngasendleleni ebheka eShure. 
Genesis16:8 Sathi kuye: “Hagare, sicakazana sikaSarayi, uvela phi, usiya phi?” Waphendula wathi: “Ndibaleka uSarayi inkosikazi endikhonza yona.”" 
Genesis16:9 Sithe ke kuye isithunywa: “Buyela kwakuye ke, umthobele.”" 
Genesis16:10 Siphinde sathi: “Ndokunika abantwana abangenakubalwa mntu ngenxa yobuninzi babo.” 
Genesis16:11 Isithunywa sikaNdikhoyo saqokela sathi: “Ukhulelwe nje uza kuzala inkwenkwe. Uze uthi nguIshmayeli igama layo, kuba kaloku uNdikhoyo uyivile intlungu yakho." 
Genesis16:12 Kodwa yena unyana wakho uya kuziphatha okweqwarha; uya kuchasa wonke ubani, angafunwa ngumntu wonke naye. Uya kuhlala elikheswa phakathi kwabantu bakowabo.”" 
Genesis16:13 UHagare wathi khumnqa, wathi ke ukumbiza loo Ndikhoyo ambonileyo nguThixo obonayo, kuba esithi: “Ngoku ndimbonile ondibonayo.”" 
Genesis16:14 Yiyo ke loo nto abantu bathi loo mthombo uphakathi kweKadeshe neBherede ngumthombo kaPhila-endibonile. 
Genesis16:15 UHagare wazala inkwenkwe, wathi ke uAbram igama layo nguIshmayeli. Wayemashumi asibhozo anesithandathu ubudala uAbram ukuzala kwakhe unyana." 
Genesis17:1 Akuba mashumi asithoba anethoba ubudala uAbram, wabonakala kuye *uNdikhoyo, wathi: “Mna ndinguThixo uSomandla. Uze undithobele, uhlale ungasoleki." 
Genesis17:2 Ndowugcina umnqophiso wam, ndikunike inzala eninzi.”" 
Genesis17:3 Wakhahlela uAbram, ubuso baya kuthi ngqu phantsi; waza uThixo waqhuba wathi:" 
Genesis17:4 “Ndikunika lo mnqophiso; ndithi uya kuba ngukhokho wezizwe ezininzi. 
Genesis17:5 Akusayi kuthiwa Abram kuwe; uya kuba nguAbraham, kuba uza kuba ngukhokho wezizwe ngezizwe." 
Genesis17:6 Ndiza kukupha inzala eninzi; abanye kuyo boba ziikumkani; kuya kuvela izizwe kuwe. 
Genesis17:7 “Andiyi kuwujika umnqophiso wam endiwenze nawe kunye nenzala yakho; uya kuhlala uhleli. Ndoba nguThixo wakho nenzala yakho. 
Genesis17:8 Lo mhlaba ungumfiki kuwo, ndiza kukunika wona uwume kunye nenzala yakho. Wonke umhlaba waseKanana uya kumiwa yinzala yakho ngalo lonke ixesha, mna ndibe nguThixo wabo.”" 
Genesis17:9 Waqokela wathi uThixo kuAbraham: “Nawe ke, kwakunye nenzala yakho ngokunjalo, ze niwugcine umnqophiso wam nakwizizukulwana ezizayo." 
Genesis17:10 Nantsi into emaniyenze nina ukuwugcina kwenu umnqopiso wam: Wena kufuneka waluke, kwaluke lonke iduna phakathi kwabantu bakho." 
Genesis17:11 Ukususela ngoku wonke umntwana oyinkwenkwe kufuneka aluke eneentsuku ezisibhozo ubudala; nditsho nkqu nezicaka ezizalelwe phantsi kwakho kwanezo zingeneleleyo. Lowo ke uya kuba ngumqondiso womnqophiso phakathi kwakho nam. 
Genesis17:12  
Genesis17:13 Makwaluke wonke umntu, oyinzalelwane kwanothengiweyo, ube ngumqondiso obonakalayo lowo wokuba umnqophiso wam nawe awusoze uphele." 
Genesis17:14 Nawuphi na umntu oliduna ongalukanga uya kuhlanjwa ngamawabo, kuba kaloku uwutyeshele umnqophiso wam.”" 
Genesis17:15 Uqhube wathi uThixo kuAbraham: “Uze ungabuye uthi Sarayi kumkakho, yithi Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Ndiza kumthamsanqelisa, ndimenze akuzalele unyana. Ndiza kumsikelela abe ngunina wezizwe ngezizwe. Uya kuzala neekumkani.”" 
Genesis17:17 Waqubuda uAbraham, waya kuthi ngqu ngobuso phantsi. Wasuka waphela yintsini akucinga ukuba umntu onekhulu leminyaka angazala umntwana. Yena uSara enamashumi alithoba nje, angamfumana umntwana?" 
Genesis17:18 Wathi uAbraham kuThixo: “Kutheni ungaseluyeka nje ibe nguIshmayeli indlalifa yam?” 
Genesis17:19 Uthe uThixo: “Hayi, uSara umkakho uza kuzala inkwenkwe. Uzuthi nguIsake igama layo. Umnqophiso wam ndowugcina kuye nakwinzala yakhe ngalo lonke ixesha, ingumnqophiso ongayi kujika nanini na." 
Genesis17:20 Ndikuvile ucelela uIshmayeli, naye ndiza kumthamsanqelisa abe nabantwana abaninzi nesizukulwana esikhulu. Uya kuba nguyise weenkosi ezilishumi elinambini. Inzala yakhe iya kuba sisizwe esikhulu." 
Genesis17:21 Kodwa wona umnqophiso wam ndiya kuwugcinela unyana wakho uIsake, oya kuzalwa nguSara malunga neli xesha kunyaka ozayo.”" 
Genesis17:22 Akuba etshilo kuAbraham uThixo wemka. 
Genesis17:23 Kwangaloo mini uAbraham wamthobela uThixo, wamalusa uIshmayeli nawo onke amanye amaduna emzini wakhe. Walusa izicaka ezazalelwa kwakhe, kwanezo zazithengiwe." 
Genesis17:24 Ukwaluka kwakhe uAbraham wayemashumi alithoba anethoba ubudala. 
Genesis17:25 Ukwaluka kwakhe uIshmayeli unyana ka-Abraham wayeneshumi elinesithathu leminyaka ubudala. 
Genesis17:26 Bobabini baluka ngamini-nye," 
Genesis17:27 kwakunye nezicaka zika-Abraham zonke. 
Genesis18:1 *UNdikhoyo wabonakala kuAbraham ngakwimithi kaMamre. UAbraham wayehleli ngasemnyango wentente emini emaqanda. 
Genesis18:2 Nako kusithi thu amadoda amathathu. Uthe ke ukuwabona kwakhe wakhawuleza ukuwahlangabeza, wafika waqubuda ekhahlela." 
Genesis18:3 “Bahlekazi,” utshilo kuwo, “noko sanukudlula emzini wam ningakhanga nikhe nithule imithwalo. Kaloku ndikholo nina apha." 
Genesis18:4 Ndinganiphathela amanzi, nikhe nihlambe iinyawo, lo gama nisaphumle phantsi kwalo mthi." 
Genesis18:5 Ndiza kuniphathela nento etyiwayo, ukuze nifumane amandla endleleni. Nakuthi ke nandule ukuhamba loo ndlela yenu inidlulise ekhaya apha.” Athe ke wona amadoda: “Ngxatsho ke, ungénjenjalo.”" 
Genesis18:6 UAbraham wakhawuleza ukungena ententeni, wafika wathi kuSara: “Khawuthathe izitya ezithathu zomgubo wengqolowa, uxove wenze amaqebengwana, ukhawulezise.”" 
Genesis18:7 Watsho ekhawulezile uAbraham ukuya ezinkomeni, wafika wakhetha elona lityebileyo ithole, wathi malixhelwe ngokukhawuleza." 
Genesis18:8 Wathatha amasi anengqaka nenyama leyo, wabeka phambi kwaloo madoda, azenzela apho phantsi kwaloo mthi, emi apho yena ngakuwo." 
Genesis18:9 Ambuza athi: “Uphi na umkakho uSara?” Wathi: “Usendlwini.” 
Genesis18:10 Lwathi olunye undwendwe: “Malunga neli xesha kunyaka ozayo ndobe ndibuye. USara umkakho woba enomntwana oyinkwenkwe.” USara wabavela emi emva kwabo ngasemnyango. 
Genesis18:11 Bobabini, uAbraham noSara, babesebaluphele kakhulu, uSara selegqithile kwixabiso lokuzala." 
Genesis18:12 Wahleka yedwa ke uSara, wathi: “Sendigqithile kwixabiso lokuzala, kanti nomyeni wam selaluphele.”" 
Genesis18:13 Uthe uNdikhoyo kuAbraham: “Uhleka ntoni uSara, ade athi: ‘Ndingamfumana njani umntwana sendaluphele nje?’" 
Genesis18:14 Niba kukho into enokuxaka uNdikhoyo? Bendithe ngeli xesha kunyaka ozayo ndobe ndibuye; uSara woba enomntwana oyinkwenkwe.” 
Genesis18:15 USara wakhanyela, kuba wayesoyika, wathi: “Andikhange ndihleke.” Wathi yena: “Hayi, uhlekile.”" 
Genesis18:16 La madoda anduluka, ayivelela iSodom. UAbraham wayehamba nawo ewakhapha." 
Genesis18:17 Uthe *uNdikhoyo: “Mandingayifihli kuAbraham into endifuna ukuyenza. 
Genesis18:18 Inzala yakhe yoba sisizwe esikhulu, yaye ndozithamsanqelisa ngaye zonke izizwe." 
Genesis18:19 Ndimtyumbele ukuze aqeqeshele abantwana bakhe kunye nabazukulwana bakhe ekundithobeleni nasebulungiseni. Xa besenjenjalo ndozizalisekisa izithembiso zam kuAbraham.” 
Genesis18:20 Uqhube wathi kuAbraham uNdikhoyo: “Iyakhalazelwa iSodom neGomora ngenxa yobubi besono sayo. 
Genesis18:21 Ngako oko ndiza kukhe ndihle ndiye kuzibonela ukuba kunjalo na. Ndobona ngoko ukuba akunjalo.” 
Genesis18:22 Emka ke loo madoda, abheka ngaseSodom. Wasala noNdikhoyo yena uAbraham." 
Genesis18:23 Uthe uAbraham kuNdikhoyo: “Ngaba ngenene, *Mhlekazi, uza kutshabalalisa amalungisa ndawonye nezibhoja?" 
Genesis18:24 Ukuba kukho amashumi amahlanu amalungisa, ngaba ungasibhangisa eso sixeko? Akungesisindisi ngenxa yamashumi amahlanu lawo?" 
Genesis18:25 Hayi kaloku, akunakuyenza into enjalo ukutshabalalisa abangenatyala ndawonye nabagwenxa, ube njalo wohlwaya amalungisa ngesohlwayo esinye naboni. Ngunongekhe lowo. UMgwebi welizwe liphela akamele kugweba ngobulungisa na?”" 
Genesis18:26 Uthe uNdikhoyo: “Ukuba kungakho amashumi amahlanu abantu abamsulwa eSodom, ndingasisindisa eso sixeko sonke ngenxa yabo.”" 
Genesis18:27 Uthe kwakhona uAbraham: “Ndinyamezele, Mhlekazi, ndiyintw' engento, andifanele nakuthetha oku nawe." 
Genesis18:28 Ukuba ngaba kukho amashumi amane anantlanu endaweni yamashumi amahlanu, ungátshabalalisa isixeko sonke ngenxa yokuba bengaphantsi nje ngesihlanu abantu abamsulwa?” Uthe uNdikhoyo: “Nokuba ngamashumi mane anantlanu abantu abamsulwa, ndosisindisa isixeko.”" 
Genesis18:29 Ubuye wathi uAbraham: “Ukuba ngamashumi mane nje kuphela?” Uthe uNdikhoyo: “Sosinda nokuba kunjalo.” 
Genesis18:30 Wathi ke uAbraham: “Mhlekazi, ungakhathazeki, ndisafuna ukuqonda. Kuya kuthini ke xa bengamashumi amathathu?” “Nokuba ngamashumi amathathu, sosinda,” utshilo uNdikhoyo." 
Genesis18:31 “Ndinyamezele, Mhlekazi,” utshilo uAbraham. “Ukuba bangamashumi mabini kuphela, kothini?” “Nokuba bangamashumi mabini, ndosisindisa isixeko,” utshilo uNdikhoyo." 
Genesis18:32 Wathi uAbraham: “Mhlekazi, selundinyamezela oku kokugqibela! Kuya kuthini ukuba lishumi linye kuphela abantu abamsulwa abalapho?” “Nokuba lishumi nje qha, andiyi kusitshabalalisa isixeko,” utshilo uNdikhoyo." 
Genesis18:33 Wemka ke uNdikhoyo akugqiba ukuthetha noAbraham, naye uAbraham wagoduka." 
Genesis19:1 Ukufika kwezithunywa ezibini eSodom ngorhatya lwaloo mini, uLothe wayehleli ngasemasangweni edolophu. Uthe khwasululu ukuwabona kwakhe, wawahlangabeza. Ufike waqubuda ekhangele phantsi ekhahlela, wathi:" 
Genesis19:2 “Zinkosi zam, khanikhe niye kwam, nihlambe oku kweenyawo, nilalise khona. Ningavuka ke ngentsasa, nithabathise uhambo lwenu.” Zithe zona izithunywa ukuphendula: “Hayi noko wena, siza kuhlala phaya ebaleni kude kuse.”" 
Genesis19:3 Wazithundeza, ezicenga-cenga uLothe, zada zoyisakala, zaya naye kwakhe. Wazilungiselela ukutya, wenza namaqebengwana ngentlama engenagwele. Kuthe ke kwakulunga ukutya zatya." 
Genesis19:4 Ngaphambi kokuba ziye kulala, kwafika amadoda nabafana baseSodom, bevela kumacala ngamacala, bayingqonga indlu kaLothe." 
Genesis19:5 Bakhwaza bebuza kuLothe ukuba aye phi na laa madoda ayeze kulala kwakhe ngobo busuku. Batsho besithi makawakhuphe, kuba babefuna ukulala nawo." 
Genesis19:6 Waphuma endlwini uLothe, waluvala ucango ukuphuma kwakhe." 
Genesis19:7 Ufike wathi kuloo madoda: “He, zinkosi, sanukuyenza into enje ukuba mbi." 
Genesis19:8 Ndineentombi zimbini apha, ziseziintombi nto; kubhetele ndininike zona, nizenze ukuthanda kwenu endaweni yale nto nifuna ukuyenza. La madoda ziindwendwe zam; aphantsi kokhuselo lwam.”" 
Genesis19:9 Kodwa loo madoda athi: “Suka endleleni, mfikindini! Ungubani wena? Ucinga ukuba singagwetywa nguwe? Singajikela wena thina, kube kubi nangaphezu kwawo.” Atsho emsunduza uLothe, etyhala ezama ukuluqhekeza ucango." 
Genesis19:10 Kodwa la madoda ayengaphakathi amtsalela endlwini uLothe, aluvala ucango," 
Genesis19:11 awabetha ngobumfama onke loo madoda ayengaphandle, atsho akalubona ucango apho lukhoyo." 
Genesis19:12 Athe kuLothe la madoda mabini: “Ngaba kusekho mntu wumbi na apha – nokuba ngoonyana, nokuba ziintombi zakho, nabayeni beentombi, nasiphi na isizalwana sakho? Yitsho bemke apha." 
Genesis19:13 Kaloku le dolophu siza kuyitshabalalisa. Isikhalo esivakele ngayo sibi kangangokuba sithunywe *nguNdikhoyo ukuba size kuyibhubhisa iSodom.” 
Genesis19:14 ULothe ke waya kuxelela amasoka eentombi zakhe ukuba makumkiwe eSodom, kuba uNdikhoyo wayeza kuyibhubhisa. Kodwa wona aba uyaqhula nje." 
Genesis19:15 Ngentseni izithunywa zamxhesha uLothe, zathi: “Gxabha-gxabhisa, ndoda, umke apha neentombi zakho kunye nomkakho. Kungenjalo uya kutshabalala xa kusohlwaywa le dolophu.”" 
Genesis19:16 Unge angazila-zila, suka zambamba ngesandla, zamkhuphela ngaphandle kwedolophu kunye nomkakhe neentombi zakhe. Kaloku uNdikhoyo wamenzela inceba uLothe." 
Genesis19:17 Bakuba bengaphandle kwedolophu, esinye isithunywa sathi: “Balekani ukuze nisinde. Ze ningakhangeli ngasemva, ningemi nokuma phaya entilini. Balekelani phaya endulini, kungenjalo nani nakutshabalala.”" 
Genesis19:18 “Hayini noko, nkosi,” utshilo uLothe, “sanukundenjenjalo." 
Genesis19:19 Sele undincedile kakade ngokundisindisa; noko kukude kakhulu phaya endulini. Le ntlekele isenokundifumana, ndife singekafiki nalapho." 
Genesis19:20 Uyayibona laa dolophana? Ikufuphi noko yona. Yidolophana nje engenkulu. Mna ndithi ngesele ndisiya khona ukuze ndikhuseleke.” 
Genesis19:21 Sithe isithunywa: “Kulungile ke. Andiyi kuba sayitshabalalisa loo dolophana uthetha ngayo. 
Genesis19:22 Kodwa ke khawuleza ukuya apho, kuba akukho nto ndinokuyenza de ube ulapho.” Yiyo ke loo dolophu kuthiwa yiZoware." 
Genesis19:23 Laliseliphumile ilanga ukufika kukaLothe eZoware. 
Genesis19:24 *UNdikhoyo wathobela isalfa evuthayo phezu kweSodom neGomora," 
Genesis19:25 wazibhubhisa kunye naloo ntili yonke, kunye nabo bonke abantu ababelapho, nento yonke ehlumayo." 
Genesis19:26 Umka-Lothe wajonga ngasemva, suka wajika waba yintsika yetyuwa." 
Genesis19:27 UAbraham wavuka kwakusasa, waya kulaa ndawo wayemi noNdikhoyo kuyo." 
Genesis19:28 Wakhangela ezantsi eSodom naseGomora nakuloo ntili, wabona kukho ukuqhuma okungathi ngumsi ophuma eziko." 
Genesis19:29 Kodwa uThixo wasikhumbula isicelo sika-Abraham ukubhubhisa kwakhe loo ntili, wamsindisa uLothe." 
Genesis19:30 ULothe woyika ukuhlala eZoware. Uthe ngenxa yoko wenyukela ezintabeni kunye neentombi zakhe, wahlala emqolombeni." 
Genesis19:31 Yathi intombi enkulu kudade wayo: “Ubawo uyaluphala, yaye akukho madoda apha kule ndawo angasitshatayo sizale." 
Genesis19:32 Yiza simseze anxile, khon' ukuze simambathe, sifumane abantwana bakhe.”" 
Genesis19:33 Ngobo busuku bamntyintya ngewayini, yaza ke intombi enkulu yamambatha. ULothe wayenxile kangangokuba akazange akuqonde okwaqhubekayo." 
Genesis19:34 Ngosuku olulandelayo yathi intombi enkulu kwencinci: “Bendikunye naye phezolo. Masiphinde nanamhlanje ngokuhlwa, ukuze nawe ulale naye. Sobabini ke soba nabantwana bakabawo osizalayo.”" 
Genesis19:35 Baphinda ke bamntyintya nangobo busuku, yamambatha nencinci intombi. Wayenxile engayazi into eqhubekayo." 
Genesis19:36 Yaba njalo ke into yokumitha kweentombi zikaLothe, zimithiswe nguyise." 
Genesis19:37 Intombi enkulu yazala inkwenkwe, eyathi igama layo nguMowabhi. Nguye lo ungukhokho wamaMowabhi." 
Genesis19:38 Intombi encinci yazala inkwenkwe nayo, yathi igama layo nguBhenami. Yena ngukhokho wama-Amon." 
Genesis20:1 UAbraham wafuduka kwelo lizwe, wajonga emazantsi eKanana, apho wafika wamisa khona phakathi kweKadeshe neShure. Waya kutsho naseGerare," 
Genesis20:2 wafika wathi apho uSara ngudade wabo. Ukumkani walapho, uAbhimeleki, wathi uSara makasiwe komkhulu." 
Genesis20:3 Kodwa uThixo wavela kuAbhimeleki ephupheni, wathi: “Abhimeleki, usisisulu sokufa, ngenxa yokuba lo mfazi umthathileyo ngumka-mtu.”" 
Genesis20:4 UAbhimeleki ke wayengekamambathi uSara, waza wathi: “Mhlekazi, ungathini ukutshabalalisa isizwe esingenatyala?" 
Genesis20:5 Andibi kanene yilaa ndoda ngokwayo ethe kum ngudade wayo lo, waza naye wathi ingumnakwabo? Le nto ndiyenze ndingenasazela, yaye andonanga bani.”" 
Genesis20:6 Uphendule uThixo kwasephupheni apho: “Ewe, ndiyazi ukuba le nto uyenze ungenabubi konke. Yaye ikwandim lo okuncedileyo ukuba ungandoni; yiyo loo nto ndingakuvumelanga ukumambatha." 
Genesis20:7 Kodwa ke mbuyisele kumyeni wakhe ngoku lo mfazi. *Ngumshumayeli laa mfo; uya kunithandazela nisinde. Kodwa ukuba akumbuyiseli umkakhe, ngenene uya kuba lilifa lokufa kunye nabantu bakho bonke.”" 
Genesis20:8 Wavuka kwangentseni uAbhimeleki, wazibiza zonke izicaka zakomkhulu, waza wazilawulela iphupha lakhe. Othuka kakhulu loo madoda." 
Genesis20:9 UAbhimeleki ubize uAbraham, wathi kuye: “Yintoni le nto usenza yona? Ndakwenza ntoni le nto undizisela ishwangusha elingaka kunye nabantu bam? Wenze into engenziwayo ke kambe." 
Genesis20:10 Bekutheni ukuze wenze into enje?” 
Genesis20:11 Uthe uAbraham: “Ndibe akukho mntu umoyikayo kweli lizwe uThixo, ndaba ke ndingábulawa apha ngenxa yomkam." 
Genesis20:12 Únguye udade wethu ngenene. Singabantwana bendoda enye, nakuba sahlukile ngoomama. Ngumkam noko kunjalo." 
Genesis20:13 Uthe akundindulula kwilizwe loobawo uThixo, ndathi kumkam uya kubonakala ukuba uyandithanda ngokuthi ebantwini ungudade wethu.”" 
Genesis20:14 UAbhimeleki wambuyisela kuAbraham uSara, wabuya wamnqoma ngeegusha neenkomo, wamnika nezicaka." 
Genesis20:15 Wathi kuAbraham: “Ngumhlaba wam lo; ungema apho uthanda khona.” 
Genesis20:16 Ubuye wathi kuSara: “Umntakwenu ndiza kumnika iwaka leesiliva, ukuze wonke ubani azi ukuba akunatyala.”" 
Genesis20:17 Ngenxa yale nto yehlela uSara, uThixo wabavala bonke abafazi bakomkhulu, ababi nanzala. UAbraham ke wathandazela uAbhimeleki kuThixo, waza wamphilisa uThixo. Kwaphila nomkakhe kunye nezicakazana zakhe, bonke bakhululeka." 
Genesis21:1 *UNdikhoyo wamenzela isisa uSara ngokuthi asizalisekise isithembiso sakhe. 
Genesis21:2 USara wakhulelwa, waza wazala umntwana oyinkwenkwe, sele aluphele uAbraham. Wamzala kanye ngelaa xesha wayelixelile uThixo." 
Genesis21:3 Wamthiya igama loo mntwana uAbraham, wathi nguIsake." 
Genesis21:4 Uthe ke akuba ntsuku zisibhozo ezelwe, wamalusa uAbraham ngokomyalelo kaThixo." 
Genesis21:5 UAbraham wayeselenekhulu leminyaka ukuzalwa kukaIsake. 
Genesis21:6 Wada wathi uSara: “UThixo undenze ndakwazi ukuhleka, yaye wonke ubani oyivayo le nto wohleka kunye nam.”" 
Genesis21:7 Uqokele wathi: “Ibingubani kakade obenokuthi kuAbraham ndiza kuba ngumdlezana owanyisayo? Naku ke kodwa ndizele umntwana wakhe, eyinkothovu yexhego enjalo!”" 
Genesis21:8 Lwakhula usana lwada lwalunyulwa. Wenza elikhulu lona itheko uAbraham ukulunyulwa kwaloo mntwana. 
Genesis21:9 Ngaminazana ithile uSara wabona umntakaHagare umJiputakazi, lowa uHagare wamfumana kuAbraham, edlala ngoIsake." 
Genesis21:10 Waya kuthi kuAbraham: “Wethu, sikhuphele ngaphandle esi sicakazana kunye nomntwana waso. Andiyi kuyivumela yona into yokuba lo mntwana wesi sicakazana sahlulelane ngelifa kunye noIsake umntwana wam!”" 
Genesis21:11 Le nto yamkhathaza gqitha uAbraham, kuba noIshmayeli lowo wayengumntwana wakhe." 
Genesis21:12 Wavakala esithi uThixo kuye: “Hayi, sukuzikhathaza ngenxa yalo mntwana nesicakazana sakho. Yenza loo nto ithethwa nguSara wena, kuba kaloku abazukulwana bakho boba yinzala kaIsake." 
Genesis21:13 Ewe, nonyana wesicakazana lo uya kuzala isizwe esikhulu, kuba kaloku naye ngumntwana wakho ncam.”" 
Genesis21:14 Kwakusasa ngengomso uAbraham wavuka wathatha ukutya kunye nentsuba ezele ngamanzi, wazinika uHagare, wamthwalisa, wathi makahambe nomntwana wakhe. Wemka ke uHagare, wahamba ebhadula kuloo ntlango iyiBheshebha." 
Genesis21:15 Akuphela amanzi awayewaphethe, wamqhusheka etyholweni umntwana," 
Genesis21:16 wemka wathi qelele, wahlala phantsi. Watsho esithi: “Andinakuyinyamezela into yokubona umntwana wam esifa.” Uthe ehleli apho zehla iinyembezi." 
Genesis21:17 UThixo wamva ekhala umntwana, kwavakala ilizwi lesithunywa livela ezulwini, lisithi kuHagare: “Ukhathazwa yintoni, Hagare? Sukoyika. UThixo umvile umntwana wakho kulaa ndawo umbeke kuyo." 
Genesis21:18 Hamb' uye kumthatha umthuthuzele. Úya kuba ngunozala wesizwe esikhulu.” 
Genesis21:19 UThixo wawavula amehlo kaHagare, nako kubonakala umthombo. Waya kuzalisa loo ntsuba, waseza nomntwana wakhe." 
Genesis21:20 UThixo wamgcina loo mntwana, wakhula ehlala kuloo ntlango yaseParan. Waba yincutshe yomzingeli. Unina wamthathela intombi engumJiputakazi." 
Genesis21:21  
Genesis21:22 Ngelo xesha kwafika uAbhimeleki ehamba noPikoli umphathi-mkhosi, wathi kuAbraham: “Yonke into oyenzayo inesandla sikaThixo kuyo, Abraham." 
Genesis21:23 Ngoko ke khawufunge ngoku apha phambi koThixo ukuba akusokuze undixokise mna nabantwana bam kunye nabazukulwana bam. Mna ndinyanisekile kuwe, nawe ke ndithembise ukuba uya kunyaniseka kum nakubemi beli lizwe uhlala kulo.”" 
Genesis21:24 UAbraham wathi ukuphendula: “Ndiyathembisa.” 
Genesis21:25 UAbraham wavakalisa kwanesikhalazo awayenaso kuAbhimeleki, esiphathelele nomthombo owahluthwa zizicaka zika-Abhimeleki." 
Genesis21:26 Wathi uAbhimeleki: “Bendingazi ukuba ukho owenze loo nto; nawe ngokwakho akuzange wandixelela nokundixelela. Ndiyaqala namhlanje ukuyiva into enjalo.” 
Genesis21:27 UAbraham ke wakhupha iinkomo neegusha, wazinika uAbhimeleki, baza benza imvumelwano." 
Genesis21:28 UAbraham wakhetha amatakane asixhenxe kuloo mhlambi," 
Genesis21:29 waza uAbhimeleki wathi kuAbraham: “Ngawantoni la matakane asixhenxe uwakhethileyo?” 
Genesis21:30 Wathi uAbraham: “Wathathe la matakane asixhenxe. Ngokwenjenjalo ungqina ukuba lo mthombo wembiwa ndim.” 
Genesis21:31 Yaba ke loo ndawo kuthiwa yiBheshebha ukubizwa kwayo, kuba kaloku kulapho loo madoda avumelana khona efunga." 
Genesis21:32 Emva koko uAbhimeleki noPikoli babuyela kwakwelamaFilistiya. 
Genesis21:33 UAbraham watyala umthi apho eBheshebha. Apho ke wamnqula *uNdikhoyo uThixo uSonini-nanini. 
Genesis21:34 Wahlala kwelo lizwe lamaFilistiya ixesha elide. 
Genesis22:1 Ekuhambeni kwexesha uThixo wamvavanya uAbraham. Wambiza wathi: “Abraham!” Wasabela uAbraham wathi: “Ndim lo, Mhlekazi!”" 
Genesis22:2 Uthe uThixo: “Thatha unyana wakho uIsake, lo kanye usenyongweni kuwe, uye naye eMoriya. Uya kufika apho ke, kuloo nduli ndiza kukubonisa yona, umnikele khona abe lidini elitshiswayo.”" 
Genesis22:3 Kwakusasa ngengomso uAbraham wavuka, wabopha idonki yakhe, wabiza izicaka zazibini kunye noIsake, bacanda iinkuni zokubasa umlilo wedini, banduluka baya kuloo ndawo bekuthiwe ze baye kuyo nguThixo." 
Genesis22:4 Ngosuku lwesithathu wayibona isekude loo ndawo uAbraham. 
Genesis22:5 Wathi kuloo madoda wayehamba nawo: “Salani apha nina nale donki, mna nale nkwenkwe siza kuya phaya. Sakuthi sakugqiba ukunqula, sibuye.”" 
Genesis22:6 UAbraham wamthwalisa emagxeni uIsake ezo nkuni, yena waphatha amalahle nemela. Benjenjeya bobabini." 
Genesis22:7 Endleleni uthe uIsake kuyise: “Tata!” UAbraham wathi: “Thetha, nyana!” UIsake wathi: “Nanku umlilo, nanzi neenkuni; liphi ke lona ixhwane ledini?”" 
Genesis22:8 Uthe ukuphendula uAbraham: “Iya kubonwa nguThixo loo nto, mfo wam.” Batsho bahamba besiya kuloo ndawo yayalathwe nguThixo. Bakufika apho, uAbraham wenza iqonga lamadini, wabeka iinkuni ezo phezu kwalo, wambopha uIsake unyana wakhe, wambeka phezu kwezo nkuni." 
Genesis22:9  
Genesis22:10 Uthathe imela ukuze ambulale unyana wakhe. 
Genesis22:11 Suka kwavakala isithunywa *sikaNdikhoyo simemeza sisezulwini sisithi: “Abraham! Abraham!” Yena ke uthe: “Ndim lo!” Sathi isithunywa kuye: 
Genesis22:12 “Uze ungayenzakalisi loo nkwenkwe, ungayithi cha nakancinci! Ngoku ndiyazi ukuba uThixo uyamoyika; kaloku akwalanga nonyana wakho oyintandane ekuphela kwakhe.”" 
Genesis22:13 UAbraham wabheka-bheka, wabona inkunzi yegusha ibambeke ngeempondo etyholweni. Waya kuyirhola, wenza ngayo idini endaweni yonyana wakhe." 
Genesis22:14 UAbraham wathi loo ndawo yiYawe-yire. Unangoku kusathiwa xa kuthethwayo: “UNdikhoyo uyabonelela endulini yakhe.” 
Genesis22:15 Siphindile savakala sithetha ezulwini isithunywa, sisithi kuAbraham:" 
Genesis22:16 “Uthi uNdikhoyo: ‘Mna ngokwam ndiyafunga; ndithi ngenxa yale nto uyenzileyo, akwala ukuncama intandane ekuphela kwayo," 
Genesis22:17 ndiza kukuthamsanqelisa kanobom, ndikuphe inzala eninzi, ibe ngangeenkwenkwezi ezisesibhaka-bhakeni nentlabathi eselunxwemeni lolwandle ubuninzi bayo. Abazukulwana bakho boyithimba imihlaba yeentshaba zabo." 
Genesis22:18 Zonke izizwe emhlabeni zothamsanqeliswa ngenzala yakho. Iyonke loo nto kungenxa yokundithobela kwakho.’ ” 
Genesis22:19 UAbraham wabuyela kwizicaka zakhe, bonke baphindela eBheshebha apho waba ngummi khona." 
Genesis22:20 Emva kwexesha uAbraham weva ukuba uMilika uzalele uNahore umninawa wakhe abantwana abasibhozo. 
Genesis22:21 Yayingu-Uzi izibulo, yaba nguBhuzi, kweza uKamweli uyise ka-Aram." 
Genesis22:22 Kulandele uRhesedi, noHazo, noPildashe, noJidelafu, kunye noBhetuweli." 
Genesis22:23 UBhetuweli wazala intombi uRabheka. Aba bantwana basibhozo bazalwa nguMilika umka-Nahore umninawa ka-Abraham. 
Genesis22:24 Iqadi likaNahore, uRewuma, lazala uTebha, noGaham, noTahashe, kunye noMahaka." 
Genesis23:1 USara uhleli wade wanekhulu elinamashumi amabini anesixhenxe ubudala. 
Genesis23:2 Ubhubhele eKiriyati-arbha, ekuthiwa yiHebron, kwelaseKanana. Waba buhlungu uAbraham, wamzilela umkakhe." 
Genesis23:3 UAbraham wesuka apho wafela khona umkakhe, waya kumaHeti. Ufike wathi kubemi balapho:" 
Genesis23:4 “Ndingumfiki nomhambi apha; ndinikeni indawo apho ndingamngcwabela khona umkam.” 
Genesis23:5 Athe ukuphendula uAbraham amaHeti: 
Genesis23:6 “Phulaphula, mhlekazi, kuthi uyinkosi. Siyakukhululela; ungamngcwaba umfikazi kweyona ndawo uyithandayo.”" 
Genesis23:7 Waphakama uAbraham, wakhahlela kumaHeti," 
Genesis23:8 wathi: “Ukuba niyavuma ndimngcwabe apha umfikazi, ndiceleleni kuEfron unyana kaZoware" 
Genesis23:9 ukuba andithengisele laa mqolomba useMakapela; nankuya emdeni womhlaba wakhe. Ze nithi makandinike ngexabiso lawo, ukuze ndiwuthenge, ndingcwabe kuwo.”" 
Genesis23:10 UEfron wayehleli namanye amaHeti enkundleni yembizo yedolophu kuthe nqwadalala. Wenjenje ukuphendula, eviwa ngumntu wonke owayelapho:" 
Genesis23:11 “Hayi, mhlekazi, mandithi ndiyakunika laa mhlaba ndawonye naloo mqolomba ulapho. Loo nto ndiyithetha apha phambi kwamawethu, la athe thande apha; ndithi ndiyakunika laa mhlaba wakuthi; ungamngcwaba khona umfikazi.”" 
Genesis23:12 UAbraham wakhahlela kubantu balapho. 
Genesis23:13 Waza wathi kuEfron, eviwa ngumntu wonke: “Ndiyakucela, ndiphe indlebe! Ndiza kukunika ixabiso lemali yalaa mhlaba. Yithathe le mali, ukuze nam ndixole, ndingcwabe khona umfikazi.”" 
Genesis23:14 Uthe uEfron: 
Genesis23:15 “Mhlekazi, laa mhlaba ziisiliva ezimakhulu mane kuphela; asinto loo nto kuwe nakum. Hamba uye kumngcwaba umkakho.”" 
Genesis23:16 UAbraham wavuma, waza wayibala loo mali yayifunwa nguEfron apho phambi kwabantu. Yaba ngamakhulu amane eesiliva ngokomlinganiselo wabarhwebi." 
Genesis23:17 Wawufumana ngolo hlobo ke uAbraham umhlaba kaEfron owawuseMakapela ngasempumalanga yeMamre. Yayiyintsimi, umqolomba, kunye nemithi eyayikho. Yangqinwa loo nto ngawo onke amaHeti awayekuloo mbizo." 
Genesis23:18  
Genesis23:19 UAbraham wamngcwaba ke umkakhe uSara kuloo mqolomba eMakapela ngaseMamre eseHebron kwelaseKanana. 
Genesis23:20 Loo mhlaba ke owawungowamaHeti kunye naloo mqolomba waba ngoka-Abraham, wangcwabela kuwo." 
Genesis24:1 Wayeseleyinkothovu yexhego uAbraham ngeli xesha, waye *uNdikhoyo emthamsanqelisa kuyo yonke into ayenzayo." 
Genesis24:2 Ngenye imini wathi kwisicaka sakhe esithembekileyo esasiyinduna emzini wakhe: “Khawufunge! 
Genesis24:3 Ndifuna ufunge phambi kukaNdikhoyo uThixo wezulu nomhlaba ukuba akusayi kumfunela umfazi unyana wam apha kwezi ntombi zaseKanana. 
Genesis24:4 Kufuneka uye kwilizwe lakowethu, apho ikhoyo inkaba yam. Kulapho uya kumfunela khona umfazi uIsake, phakathi kwezizalwane zam.”" 
Genesis24:5 Sibuzile sathi isicaka sika-Abraham: “Ukuba loo ntombi ayivumi ukulishiya ikhaya layo ize apha kweli lizwe, ze ndithini? Ze ndimse apho kwelo zwe unyana wakho uIsake?”" 
Genesis24:6 Uthe uAbraham: “Uze ungakhe umse apho unyana wam. 
Genesis24:7 NguNdikhoyo uThixo wezulu nomhlaba ngokwakhe owandisusa kwilizwe lakowethu, naphakathi kwezizalwane zam, wandithembisa efunga ukuba lo mhlaba uya kumiwa ngabazukulwana bam. Nguye oya kuthumela isithunywa sakhe apho, ungekafiki wena. Ke wofika apho uyifumane intombi eyoba ngumfazi wonyana wam." 
Genesis24:8 Ukuba ke loo ntombi ayifuni kuza kweli lizwe, woba ke ukhululekile wena kwesi sifungo. Kodwa nokuba sekutheni, uzungakhe ulinge ukumsa kwelo zwe unyana wam.”" 
Genesis24:9 Sasenza ke isifungo saso isicaka, sithembisa ukwenza loo nto asiyalela yona uAbraham." 
Genesis24:10 Induna ka-Abraham yahamba neshumi leenkamela, yaphatha neendidi ngeendidi zezipho. Yanduluka ukuya kwisixeko esasiseAram-narayim apho wayemi khona uNahore." 
Genesis24:11 Yafika ukutshona kwelanga apho, ngexesha kanye iintombi ziya kukha amanzi. Iinkamela yaziphumza ngakumthombo owawusekungeneni kwesixeko eso." 
Genesis24:12 Wathandaza loo mfo wathi: “Ndikhoyo, Thixo wenkosi yam uAbraham, khawundincede namhlanje usikhumbule isithembiso owasenza kuAbraham." 
Genesis24:13 Naku ndilapha ngakulo mthombo, apho iintombi zalapha zikha khona amanzi." 
Genesis24:14 Maze kuthi ke xa ndithi kuzo mazindikhelele amanzi ndisele, ithi leyo ithe yandipha yaza yathi iza kupha neenkamela zam zisele, ndiqonde ngaloo nto ke ukuba yile uyikhethele ukuba yendele kuIsake isicaka sakho. Ndokwazi kananjalo ukuba usigcinile isithembiso owasenza enkosini yam uAbraham.”" 
Genesis24:15 Uthe engekaphezi nokuthandaza kwafika uRabheka emthonjeni, ethwele ingqayi yamanzi. Yena ke yintombi kaBhetuweli unyana kaNahore umninawa ka-Abraham. Unina kaBhetuweli nguMilika." 
Genesis24:16 Wayeyinzwakazi, eseyintombi nto engayaziyo indoda. Wehla waya emthonjeni, wayizalisa ingqayi, wabuya." 
Genesis24:17 Loo mfo wakhawuleza ukumhlangabeza, wathi: “Khawundiphe amanzi ndisele kuloo ngqayi yakho.”" 
Genesis24:18 Wathi uRabheka: “Ungasela, mhlekazi.” Watsho eyithoba ingqayi, wambambela lo gama aselayo." 
Genesis24:19 Akugqiba ukusela loo mfo, uthe uRabheka: “Ndiza kuzikhelela neenkamela zakho, zisele zanele.”" 
Genesis24:20 Wawagalela loo manzi ayesengqayini kwindawo yokuselela iinkamela, waquqa esiya kukha amanye, zada zasela zanela." 
Genesis24:21 Lo mfo wayebukele ethe cwaka, ecinga ukuba ngaba lwaluphumelele na uhambo lwakhe." 
Genesis24:22 Zakugqiba ukusela iinkamela loo mfo wakhupha ijikazi legolide, waliqhoboshela empumlweni kaRabheka, wamfaka nezacholo zegolide ezingalweni." 
Genesis24:23 Wabuza wathi: “Uyintombi kabani? Phofu singayifumana indawo yokulala kowenu, sikhe siphumle ngokuhlwanje?”" 
Genesis24:24 “Ndiyintombi kaBhetuweli, ozalwa nguNahore noMilika,” yatsho ukuphendula." 
Genesis24:25 “Kukho iindiza nehabile eninzi ekhaya, ikwakho nendawo yokulala.”" 
Genesis24:26 Loo ndoda yaguqa yathandaza yathi: 
Genesis24:27 “Makabongwe uNdikhoyo, uThixo ka-Abraham inkosi yam, othe wanyaniseka ekugcineni isithembiso sakhe. NguNdikhoyo ondikhokelele ngqo emzini wezizalwana zenkosi yam.”" 
Genesis24:28 Loo ntombi yabaleka ukuya kowayo, yafika yabalisa." 
Genesis24:29 URabheka wayenomnakwabo ekuthiwa nguLabhan. Yena wasukela ukuya emthonjeni apho kwakukho isicaka sika-Abraham. 
Genesis24:30 ULabhan wayelibonile ijikazi nezacholo zodade wabo, eyivile nento eyathethwa nguloo mfo kuye. Ufike wathi kweso sicaka sika-Abraham sasimi ngasemthonjeni neenkamela zaso:" 
Genesis24:31 “Mhlekazi, wena uNdikhoyo ukuthamsanqelisile; yiza siye ekhaya; mus' ukum' apha. Kukho indawo ekhaya, nditsho neyokugcina iinkamela zakho.”" 
Genesis24:32 Yahamba naye ke loo ndoda, yaya kowabo, uLabhan wazithula imithwalo iinkamela, wazipha nokutya. Weza namanzi, aza loo madoda ahlamba iinyawo." 
Genesis24:33 Kweziswa nokutya, sathi isicaka sika-Abraham: “Andikazi kutya ndide ndiluthethe udaba endihambele lona.” Uthe uLabhan: “Thetha sive.”" 
Genesis24:34 “Mna ndisisicaka sika-Abraham,” utshilo lo mfo." 
Genesis24:35 “UNdikhoyo wamthamsanqelisa uAbraham, wamenza isityebi. Uneenkomo, neegusha, neebhokhwe, kunye nemali yesiliva negolide. Unazo nezicaka ezingamadoda nezibhinqileyo, ukwanazo neenkamela needonki." 
Genesis24:36 USara inkosikazi yenkosi yam wazala unyana sele aluphele. Nguloo nyana indlalifa ka-Abraham. 
Genesis24:37 Inkosi yam uAbraham yathi mandifunge ukuba andiyi kumthathela umfazi unyana wakhe phakathi kweentombi zaseKanana apho akhoyo. 
Genesis24:38 Wathi kufuneka ndiye kowabo, ndimthathele umfazi unyana wakhe phakathi kwezizalwane zakhe." 
Genesis24:39 Ndathi ke mna kuye: ‘Ukuba loo ntombi ayifuni kumka kowayo, ze ndithini?’" 
Genesis24:40 Wathi yena uNdikhoyo amkhonzayo wothumela isithunywa sakhe phambi kwam, khon' ukuze uphumelele umcimbi endiwuhambelayo. Mna kufuneka ndithathe umfazi kowabo, phakathi kwezizalwana zakhe." 
Genesis24:41 Wathi ukuba ndiyenzile loo nto, zaza izizalwana zakhe azavuma ukundinika intombi yazo, ndoba ke mna ndikhululekile esifungweni sam." 
Genesis24:42 “Ndithe ke ndakufika kulaa mthombo namhlanje, ndamcela uNdikhoyo uThixo wenkosi yam uAbraham ukuba ze lo mcimbi ndiwuhambeleyo uphumelele." 
Genesis24:43 Ndathi: ‘Ndim lo, ndimi apha ngakulo mthombo. Ze kuthi ke xa kukho ntombi ifikayo apha, ndithi ndakucela amanzi" 
Genesis24:44 indiphe, ivume ukuseza neenkamela zam, ndiya kuqonda ngaloo nto ke ukuba yile uyikhethele unyana wenkosi yam.’" 
Genesis24:45 Ndithe ndingekaphezi noko kuthandaza wee gqi uRabheka ethwele ingqayi, wehla waya kukha amanzi emthonjeni. Ndicelile ukuba andiphe amanzi ndisele." 
Genesis24:46 Kwangoko uyithule ingqayi abeyithwele, wathi mandisele, watsho esithi neenkamela zam uza kuzithuthela amanzi zisele. Ndisele ke, neenkamela zam zasela." 
Genesis24:47 Ndibuze ukuba uyintombi kabani na. Wathi yena uyintombi kaBhetuweli ozalwa nguNahore noMilika. Ndimfake elaa jikazi ahombe ngalo, ndamnxiba nezacholo ezingalweni." 
Genesis24:48 Ndiguqile, ndinqula ndibulela uNdikhoyo uThixo ka-Abraham inkosi yam, lo undizise ngqo apha kwintombi engumzukulwana womtakwabo wenkosi yam engendela kunyana wayo." 
Genesis24:49 Yitshoni ke ngoku ukuba nizimisele ukuyenzela le mbeko inkosi yam, ninyaniseke kuyo; naxa kungenjalo ndixeleleni, khon' ukuze ndibone cebo limbi.”" 
Genesis24:50 Bathe ukuphendula ooLabhan noBhetuweli: “Asingethi: ‘Hayi,’ okanye: ‘Ewe;’ kuba sijongile nje ngathi le nto ayiyodwa, inomnwe kaNdikhoyo kuyo." 
Genesis24:51 Nanku uRabheka, ukho; mthathe uhambe naye, aye kwendela kunyana wenkosi yakho, njengoko ebonile uNdikhoyo.”" 
Genesis24:52 Yakuyiva loo nto induna ka-Abraham yaguqa yathandaza ibonga uNdikhoyo. 
Genesis24:53 Ikhuphe izambatho ezihle, nezacholo zegolide nezesiliva, yazinika uRabheka. Iphe nomnakwabo kunye nonina izipho zexabiso." 
Genesis24:54 Emva koko loo nduna ka-Abraham yaya kutya naloo madoda yayihamba nawo. Balala apho ngobo busuku. Bathe bakuvuka ngengomso, yathi induna ka-Abraham: “Siza kucela indlela sigoduke namhlanje.”" 
Genesis24:55 Umnakwabo-Rabheka nonina bathe: “Ubungeyishiyi na intombi okweentsukwana nokuba zilishumi, ize ibuye ilandele?”" 
Genesis24:56 Ithe induna: “Hayi, sanukundibambezela; uNdikhoyo ewuqabelisile nje umcimbi ebendiwuhambele, yini ngoku? Ndiyekeni ndibuyele ekhaya kwinkosi yam.”" 
Genesis24:57 Bathe ke makhe kubizwe uRabheka, khe kuviwe kuye." 
Genesis24:58 Ubiziwe ke, wabuzwa ukuba uyahamba na kunye nalo mfo. Uphendule ngelithi: “Ewe, ndiyahamba.”" 
Genesis24:59 Bamkhulula ke uRabheka ukuba ahambe naloo nduna ka-Abraham kunye naloo madoda yayihamba nawo. Waphelekwa sisicakakazi sakowabo awayekhulela phantsi kwaso. 
Genesis24:60 Bamndulula ngentsikelelo, besithi: “Hamba ke, ntombi! Unga ungazala waphule uluthi, ube nenyambalala yabantwana. Banga bangazoyis' iintshaba zabo, baziphange nemihlaba yazo.”"
