Genesis24:61 URabheka kunye nabafazana ababemkhapha bazilungiselela ukukhwela iinkamela, baza banduluka kunye nesicaka sika-Abraham." 
Genesis24:62 UIsake wayeselefudukile waya kutsho ngakumthombo kaPhila-endibonile, selemi emazantsi eKanana." 
Genesis24:63 Ngamhla uthile ngorhatya uIsake wayehamba-hamba endle, wabona kusithi gqi iinkamela, zisiza ngakuye." 
Genesis24:64 URabheka akubona uIsake wehla enkameleni yakhe," 
Genesis24:65 wabuza kwinduna ka-Abraham wathi: “Ngubani lowa ucanda emasimini esihlangabeza?” Ithe ukuphendula: “Yinkosi yam leya.” Kwangoko uRabheka uthathe iqhiya yakhe, wazigquma ubuso." 
Genesis24:66 Yambalisela konke induna uIsake. 
Genesis24:67 UIsake umngenise uRabheka kulaa ntente yayiyekanina uSara, wamenza umkakhe. UIsake wayemthanda kakhulu uRabheka, kangangokuba savaleka nesikroba esabangwa kukusweleka kukanina uSara." 
Genesis25:1 UAbraham wathatha omnye umfazi ogama linguKetura. 
Genesis25:2 UKetura wazala uZimran noYokeshan, uMedan noMidiyan, uIshbhaki noShuwa." 
Genesis25:3 UYokeshan wazala uShebha noDedan. Ama-Ashuri la yinzala kaDedan, kunye namaLetushi namaLewumi." 
Genesis25:4 Oonyana bakaMidiyan nguHefa noEfere, noHanoki, uAbhida noElda. Ngabazukulwana bakaKetura bebonke ke abo." 
Genesis25:5 UAbraham walishiya kuIsake lonke ilifa lakhe. 
Genesis25:6 Kodwa ke ngaphambi kokuba abhubhe wabaphawulela noonyana bezindlu ezincinci. Emva koko wabandulula baya kuma kwimihlaba engasempumalanga. 
Genesis25:7 Ubhubhe seleyinkothovu yexhego elinekhulu linamashumi asixhenxe anesihlanu uAbraham. 
Genesis25:8  
Genesis25:9 Wangcwatyelwa kulaa mqolomba useMakapela ngoonyana bakhe uIsake noIshmayeli. Wawungasempumalanga yeMamre entsimini awayeyifumene kuEfron unyana kaZoware umHeti. 
Genesis25:10 Yilaa ntsimi uAbraham wayeyithenge kumaHeti. Wangcwatyelwa apho ke kuloo ndawo wayengcwatywe kuyo uSara umkakhe. 
Genesis25:11 Akubhubha uAbraham, uThixo wamthamsanqelisa uIsake unyana wakhe owayemi ngasemthonjeni kaPhila-endibonile." 
Genesis25:12 Naba oonyana bakaIshmayeli unyana ka-Abraham owazalwa nguHagare umJiputakazi owayesisicakakazi sikaSara. Badweliswe ngokuvela kwabo. NguNebhayoti, noKedare, noAdebhele; uMibhesam," 
Genesis25:13  
Genesis25:14 uMishma, noDuma, noMasa;" 
Genesis25:15 uHadadi, noTema; uJeture, noNafishe, noKedama." 
Genesis25:16 Ngoonyana bakaIshmayeli ke abo, izizwana ezilishumi linambini. Iilali zabo nezikhululo zabo zathiywa ngamagama abo." 
Genesis25:17 UIshmayeli wabhubha enekhulu linamashumi mathathu anesixhenxe ubudala. 
Genesis25:18 Isizukulwana sakhe saya kuma kulaa mhlaba uphakathi kweHavila neShure, ngasempumalanga yeJiputa xa ujonge eAsiriya. Babemi bethe geqe kwabanye abazukulwana baka-Abraham." 
Genesis25:19 Nanga amagqabantshintshi ngoIsake unyana ka-Abraham. 
Genesis25:20 UIsake wayeselemashumi mane eminyaka ubudala ukuthatha kwakhe uRabheka, intombi kaBhetuweli, umAram wasePadan-aram, ekwangudade boLabhan." 
Genesis25:21 URabheka wayengazali; uIsake wamthandazela *kuNdikhoyo. Weviwa umthandazo wakhe nguNdikhoyo, wathatha uRabheka." 
Genesis25:22 Wayekhulelwe amawele, ekwathi engekaveli avukelana esesesizalweni sikanina. Wathi uRabheka: “Sisimanga sini esi sindihlelayo?” Wabhenela kuNdikhoyo ukuba amkhanyisele. Wathi kuye uNdikhoyo:" 
Genesis25:23 “Uthwele izizwe ezibini; uya kuzala iintlanga ezahlukeneyo, olunye longamele olunye, omkhulu abe phantsi komncinci.”" 
Genesis25:24 Lakufika ixesha lakhe lokukhululeka, wazala amawele." 
Genesis25:25 Iwele elikhulu lalibomvana linga lambeswe ngengubo yoboya, kwathiwa ke nguEsawu igama lalo." 
Genesis25:26 Elincinci lavela libambelele nkqi esithendeni sikaEsawu, kwathiwa ke lona nguYakobi. Ukuzalwa kwala mawele uIsake wayeselemashumi mathandathu ubudala." 
Genesis25:27 Akukhula la makhwenkwe, uEsawu waba lizingela lomfo othanda ukusoloko esendle. UYakobi yena wathanda ukusoloko esekhaya, ephila ubomi obuzinzileyo." 
Genesis25:28 UIsake wayethanda uEsawu, kuba wayemana emzisela inyama yeenyamakazi. URabheka yena wayethanda uYakobi." 
Genesis25:29 Ngamini ithile uYakobi esapheka, wafika uEsawu evela kuzingela. Wayefile yindlala." 
Genesis25:30 Wathi kuYakobi: “Mfo, andilambe ngako! Khawundiphe kuloo nto ibomvu uyiphekileyo.” Yiyo loo nto uEsawu ekwabizwa ngokuthi nguEdom." 
Genesis25:31 Uphendule wathi uYakobi: “Kulungile, ukuba nje unganikezela ngamalungelo akho obuzibulo.”" 
Genesis25:32 Uthe uEsawu: “Mfondini, ndiyafa! Buza kundenzela ntoni obu buzibulo uthetha ngabo?”" 
Genesis25:33 Uthe uYakobi: “Funga kuqala ukuba uza kundinika ubuzibulo.” Wafunga ke uEsawu, enikezela ngobuzibulo bakhe kuYakobi." 
Genesis25:34 Wandula ke uYakobi ukumpha isonka nesophu leyo yeentlumayo. Watya, wasela; wasukuma, wemka. Kwakukangako ke ukungawaxabisi kwakhe uEsawu amalungelo akhe obuzibulo." 
Genesis26:1 Kwafika indlala kwelo zwe, ngaphandle kwaleya yakhe yabakho ngexesha lika-Abraham. UIsake ke waya kuAbhimeleki, ukumkani wamaFilistiya, owayemi eGerare." 
Genesis26:2 *UNdikhoyo wavela ephupheni kuIsake esithi: “Uze ungayi eJiputa; yima kumhlaba endithi hlala kuwo. 
Genesis26:3 Uze uhlale apha; ndoba nawe, ndikuthamsanqelise. Lo wona umhlaba uza kuwuma nenzala yakho. Isifungo endasenza kuyihlo ndiza kusifezekisa." 
Genesis26:4 Inzala yakho iza kuba ngangeenkwenkwezi ezisesibhaka-bhakeni, ndiyinike wonke lo mhlaba. Zonke iintlanga ziya kuthamsanqeliswa ngenzala yakho." 
Genesis26:5 Ndiza kukuthamsanqelisa, kuba uyihlo uAbraham wandithobela, wahamba ngokwemithetho nemiyalelo yam.”" 
Genesis26:6 Wema apho eGerare ke uIsake. 
Genesis26:7 Wayesithi akubuzwa ngomkakhe ngamadoda alapho, athi ngudade wabo. Wayesoyika ukuthi uRabheka ngumkakhe, hleze ambulale athathe uRabheka, kuba wayemhle kakhulu." 
Genesis26:8 Wayeselenethuba elide elapho uIsake. Ngamhla uthile uAbhimeleki wabona uIsake ngefestile esanga uRabheka. 
Genesis26:9 UAbhimeleki wambiza uIsake, wathi: “Ingumkakho nje lo, kutheni le nto uhamba usithi ngudade wenu?” Uthe uIsake: “Ndoyika ukubulawa ngenxa yakhe.”" 
Genesis26:10 Uthe uAbhimeleki: “Imbi le nto uyenzileyo. Enye indoda ibisenokulala nomkakho, loo nto ke isifake etyaleni.”" 
Genesis26:11 Wabayala ke bonke abantu uAbhimeleki ukuba bangabakhathazi ooIsake nomkakhe, esithi owenjenjalo wobulawa." 
Genesis26:12 UIsake walima amasimi akhe ngaloo nyaka, isivuno sakhe saba sikhulu ngokuphinda-phindeneyo, kuba kaloku uNdikhoyo wayemthamsanqelisa." 
Genesis26:13 Waya ehluma wada wasisinhanha somfo. 
Genesis26:14 AmaFilistiya ammonela ngenxa yemihlambi awayenayo yeegusha neenkomo, nezicaka ezininzi." 
Genesis26:15 Asuka ayidiba yonke imithombo eyembiwa zizicaka zikayise uAbraham. 
Genesis26:16 UAbhimeleki weza kuIsake, wathi makemke kwilizwe labo, kuba wayebaluleke ngaphezu kwabo." 
Genesis26:17 Wemka ke uIsake, waya kumisa umzi wakhe kuloo ntlambo yaseGerare. Wakha wathi vu apho okwexeshana." 
Genesis26:18 Wabuya wayimba imithombo eyayimbiwe nguyise, kwaleya ayidibayo amaFilistiya akuba efile uAbraham. Wayibiza kwangalaa magama yayibizwa ngawo nguyise." 
Genesis26:19 Izicaka zikaIsake zemba kuloo ntlambo, zafumana iliso lomthombo." 
Genesis26:20 Abelusi baseGerare baxambulisana nabakaIsake, bebanga loo mthombo, besithi ngowabo. UIsake wawuthiya igama loo mthombo esithi yiMbambano, kuba kwabakho imbambano ngawo." 
Genesis26:21 Wemba omnye umthombo uIsake, kwaza kwaxanjuliswana nangawo. Wathi igama lalowo buButshaba." 
Genesis26:22 Wemka apho, wemba omnye umthombo kwenye indawo ephangaleleyo. Akubangakho mbambano ngalowo, uthe ke ukuwubiza nguPhangalele. Wathi: “Ngoku uNdikhoyo usinike indawo ephangaleleyo. Siza kuba nenkqubela apha.”" 
Genesis26:23 Wanduluka nalapho uIsake, wasinga eBheshebha." 
Genesis26:24 UNdikhoyo wavela kuye emathongweni ngobo busuku, wathi: “Mna ndinguThixo kayihlo uAbraham. Uzungoyiki, kuba ndinawe. Ndiza kukuthamsanqela, ndikuphe inzala eninzi, kuba ndandimthembisile uyihlo, uAbraham isicaka sam.”" 
Genesis26:25 Wenza iqonga lamadini kuloo ndawo uIsake, wanqula uNdikhoyo khona. Wemisa umzi apho, wemba omnye umthombo." 
Genesis26:26 UAbhimeleki weza evela eGerare, ehamba kunye noAwuzati, iphakathi lakhe, kunye noPikoli, umphathi-mkhosi, behambele uIsake." 
Genesis26:27 Wabuza ke uIsake wathi: “Ngaba nindihambele ngantoni ngoku, nakuba benindiphethe kakubi ndada ndalishiya ilizwe lenu?”" 
Genesis26:28 Bathe: “Siyaqonda ngoku ukuba *uNdikhoyo unawe. Saye ke sicinga ukuba kufuneka kukho isibhambathiso esisenzayo nawe. Sifuna ufunge 
Genesis26:29 ukuba akuyi kusenza nto, njengoko nathi singekhe sikwenze nto imbi. Kucacile kuthi ngoku ukuba wena uyathamsanqeliswa nguNdikhoyo.”" 
Genesis26:30 UIsake wabenzela isidlo, kwatyiwa, kwaselwa." 
Genesis26:31 Ngengomso bavuka kwakusasa, bazenza izifungo zemvumelwano, banduluka, bahlukana bevana." 
Genesis26:32 Ngaloo mhla izicaka zikaIsake zeza kumxelela ngomthombo ezawufumanayo, zawemba." 
Genesis26:33 Wathi igama laloo mthombo yiShebha. Lavela apho ke igama lesixeko ekuthiwa yiBheshebha. 
Genesis26:34 Akuba mashumi mane ubudala uEsawu, wathatha iintombi zamaHeti zambini. YayinguJuditi intombi kaBheri, noBhasemati intombi kaElon." 
Genesis26:35 Aba bafazi babahlalisa kabuhlungu ooIsake noRabheka. 
Genesis27:1 Akwaluphala uIsake, namehlo akhe selenorhatyazo, ubize unyana wakhe omkhulu, wathi kuye: “Nyana wam!” Uthe ke yena: “Ndim lo, tata.”" 
Genesis27:2 Uthe uIsake: “Ndiyabona ukuba sendaluphele ngoku, ndaye ndingazi nokuba ndingafa nini na." 
Genesis27:3 Thatha utolo lwakho, uye kuzingela, undiphathele inyama yenyamakazi." 
Genesis27:4 Ndifuna undiphekele ukutya okunencasa, okona ndikuthandayo; undizisele nditye, ze ndikusikelele ndingekafi.”" 
Genesis27:5 URabheka wayephulaphule wonke lo gama uIsake athetha noEsawu. Uthe akuya kuzingela uEsawu," 
Genesis27:6 waya kuYakobi uRabheka, wathi: “Ndive uyihlo esithi uEsawu" 
Genesis27:7 makamphathele inyama yenyamakazi, amphekele ukutya okunencasa, atye, khon' ukuze amsikelele ngoku engekafi." 
Genesis27:8 Ke, mfo wam, uze wenze le nto ndiza kukuxelela yona." 
Genesis27:9 Yiya phaya kulaa mhlambi, uze namatakane amabini atyebileyo eebhokhwe. Ndiza kuphekela uyihlo ukutya akuthanda kakhulu." 
Genesis27:10 Kuya kusiwa nguwe kuyihlo, ukuze akusikelele engekafi.”" 
Genesis27:11 Kodwa uYakobi yena uthe kunina: “Usazi nje ukuba uEsawu lixhonti, ndibe mna ndimpuluswa!" 
Genesis27:12 Ukuba ubawo undivile ngesandla, waqonda ukuba ndiyamkhohlisa, ayiyi kundizisela isiqalekiso loo nto endaweni yeentsikelelo?”" 
Genesis27:13 Uthe unina: “Siya kuba phezu kwam eso siqalekiso, mfo wam. Yenza le nto ndithi yenze wena; yiza nalaa matakane.”" 
Genesis27:14 Waya kuwathatha ke uYakobi, wawasa kunina, wapheka okona kutya kunencasa kuthandwa nguIsake." 
Genesis27:15 URabheka wakhupha ezona zintle iimpahla zikaEsawu awayezigcinile, wazinxiba uYakobi." 
Genesis27:16 Wamgquma izandla ngofele lwebhokhwe, wamthandela nasentanyeni." 
Genesis27:17 Wamnika oko kutya kunencasa kunye nesonka awayesibhakile. 
Genesis27:18 UYakobi wafika kuyise, wathi: “Tata!” Usabele wathi uyise: “Thetha; ungubani, mfo wam?”" 
Genesis27:19 Uthe uYakobi: “NdinguEsawu, unyana omkhulu. Ndiyenzile into obundithume yona. Nantsi inyama. Vuka utye, uze undisikelele.”" 
Genesis27:20 Uthe uIsake: “Wakhawuleza kangaka ukufumana inyamakazi? Wenze njani, mfo wam?” Uphendule wathi uYakobi: “Ndincedwe *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, wayizisa ngqo kum.”" 
Genesis27:21 Uthe ke uIsake kuYakobi: “Khawusondele ke, mfo wam, ndikuve ngesandla ukuba unguye na unyana wam uEsawu.”" 
Genesis27:22 UYakobi ke wasondela kuyise owamphampathayo ngezandla esithi: “Ilizwi lona lelikaYakobi, kodwa izandla zezikaEsawu.”" 
Genesis27:23 Akazange amqonde uYakobi, kuba kaloku izandla zazixhonti njengezikaEsawu. Uthe seleza kumsikelela," 
Genesis27:24 wabuya wabuza wathi: “Ngaba ngenene ungunyana wam uEsawu?” Waphendula uYakobi esithi: “Ndinguye.” 
Genesis27:25 Uthe ke uIsake: “Zis' apha ke inyama leyo ndikhe nditye, mfo wam. Ndakuthi ke ndakugqiba ukutya, ndikusikelele.” Wamnika ke uYakobi, wamphathela newayini yokuthoba." 
Genesis27:26 Uthe ke uyise: “Khawusondele kaloku undange, mfo wam.”" 
Genesis27:27 Esasondela ukuya kumanga uIsake, waliva ivumba leempahla ezazinxitywe nguYakobi, watyibela ngentsikelelo esithi: “Ngxatsho ke ivumba lonyana wam! Linjengevumba lomhlaba ogalelwe iintsikelelelo nguNdikhoyo." 
Genesis27:28 Wanga ke uThixo angakugalela ngombethe, nomhlaba wakho uchume ube linqatha, uvelise nentabalala yengqolowa newayini." 
Genesis27:29 Unga ungabuswa zizizwe, neentlanga zikhahlele kuwe. Yiba yinkosi kubantakwenu, ukhonzwe nangabantwana bakanyoko. Mabaqalekiswe abo bakuqalekisayo, basikelelwe abo bakusikelelayo.”" 
Genesis27:30 UIsake wayesandul' ukusikelela uYakobi, naye esandul' ukusuka kuyise, wagaleleka uEsawu, evela kuzingela." 
Genesis27:31 Wapheka ukutya okumnandi, naye wakusa kuyise, wathi: “Vuka, tata, utye. Nantsi inyama endikuphathele yona. Uze undisikelele.”" 
Genesis27:32 “Ungubani wena?” watsho uIsake. “Ndingunyana wakho omkhulu, uEsawu,” utshilo." 
Genesis27:33 Wothuka wagubha uIsake. Ubuze wathi: “Ngubani ke lo ubeye kuzingela wandiphathela inyama, ndayitya? Ndisandul' ukugqiba ukuyitya ngaphambi kokuba ungene. Ndiziphelelisele kuye iintsikelelo, kunjalonje ziya kuhlala zizezakhe.”" 
Genesis27:34 Akuyiva loo nto uEsawu, wakhala kabuhlungu, wathi: “Ndisikelele nam, tata!”" 
Genesis27:35 Wathi uIsake: “Umninawa wakho undikhohlisile, wemka nazo iintsikelelo zakho.”" 
Genesis27:36 Uthe uEsawu: “Sekukokwesibini eyenza le nto yokundidla izithende. Yiyo le nto negama lakhe linguYakobi. Kokwesibini ngoku endikhohlisa. Wathatha ilungelo lam lobuzibulo. Ngoku uthatha iintsikelelo zam. Tata, akundigcinelanga ntsikelelo konke na?”" 
Genesis27:37 Uthe ke uIsake: “Sendimenze inkosi yakho, nezizalwane zakhe zaba zizicaka zakhe. Ndithe uya kuphila ngengqolowa newayini. Yintoni ke ngoko enokuba isasalele wena, mfo wam?”" 
Genesis27:38 Uthe uEsawu: “Tata, kuphela kwentsikelelo obunayo leyo? Akusekho yimbi? Tata, nam ndisikelele!” Watsho ekhala uEsawu." 
Genesis27:39 Wahlabeka uyise, wenjenje: “Wena uya kuba kude lee nenqatha lokuchuma komhlaba; uya kuba kude lee kumbethe ovuza ezulwini." 
Genesis27:40 Uya kuphila ngekrele uphantsi komninawa wakho; kambe ke liya kufika ithuba apho uya kudinwa khona, uyaphule loo dyokhwe yakhe isentanyeni yakho.”" 
Genesis27:41 UEsawu wamzonda uYakobi ngenxa yeentsikelelo awazifumana kuyise. Wadumzela wathi: “Iya kuze ifike yona imini yokuba angabikho utata; ndakuze ndimbulale uYakobi lo.” 
Genesis27:42 Akuyixelelwa into ethethwe nguEsawu, uRabheka wabiza uYakobi, wathi kuye: “UEsawu ufuna ukukubulala." 
Genesis27:43 Ke, nyana wam, uze wenze le nto ndiza kukuxelela yona. Zimela, ubalekele kumnakwethu uLabhan eHaran." 
Genesis27:44 Uze uhlale khona ude udambe umsindo womkhuluwa wakho," 
Genesis27:45 ayilibale nento omenze yona. Ndothumela ukuba uphuthunywe. Andinakuyithwala into yokulahlekelwa nini nobabini noyihlo ngaxesha-nye.” 
Genesis27:46 Uthe uRabheka kuIsake: “Ndidiniwe mna ngoku ngaba bafazi bakaEsawu. Ukuba uYakobi angathatha intombi yomHeti, ayenze umfazi, ndingakhetha ukufa kube kanye.”" 
Genesis28:1 UIsake wabiza uYakobi, wamsikelela, wathi kuye: “Uze ungathathi nanye kwezi ntombi zaseKanana." 
Genesis28:2 Hamba uye kulonyoko ePadan-aram, kwaBhetuweli, uzithathele umfazi apho phakathi kweentombi zikanyokolume uLabhan." 
Genesis28:3 Wanga uThixo uSomandla angakusikelela, akunike inzala, yande, ibe zizizwe ezininzi." 
Genesis28:4 Wanga uThixo angawagqithisela kuwe nakwinzala yakho amathamsanqa ka-Abraham, niwume loo mhlaba uThixo wayemise kuwo uAbraham kuqala.”" 
Genesis28:5 Wenjenjalo ke uIsake ukundulula uYakobi, emthumela ePadan-aram kuLabhan unyana kaBhetuweli umAram. Lo Labhan ngumnakwabo-Rabheka unina kaYakobi noEsawu." 
Genesis28:6 UEsawu weva ukuba uYakobi usikelelwe wathunyelwa ePadan-aram, ukuba aye kufuna umfazi. Weva nokuba xa wayesikelelwa wayalelwa ukuba angaze athathe umfazi eKanana." 
Genesis28:7 Weva nokuba uYakobi wamthobela uyise nonina, waya ePadan-aram." 
Genesis28:8 Waqonda ke uEsawu ukuba uyise wayengazithandi iintombi zaseKanana. 
Genesis28:9 Waya kwaIshmayeli ke, unyana ka-Abraham, wathatha intombi yakhe uMahalati, udade boNebhayoti." 
Genesis28:10 Wenjenjeya ukusuka eBheshebha uYakobi, esinga eHaran." 
Genesis28:11 Wafika ndaweni ithile, walalisa apho, kuba laliselitshonile ilanga. Uthathe ilitye, waqamela ngalo, walala." 
Genesis28:12 Waphupha ngathi ubona ileli esuka emhlabeni, yaya kuthi xhaxhe ngesibhakabhaka. Izithunywa zikaThixo zazisihla zinyuka ngayo." 
Genesis28:13 Wabona *uNdikhoyo emi ngakuye esithi: “NdinguNdikhoyo, uThixo kayihlo-mkhulu uAbraham noyihlo uIsake. Lo mhlaba ulele kuwo uya kumiwa nguwe nayinzala yakho." 
Genesis28:14 Inzala yakho iya kuba ngangentlabathi ubuninzi bayo. Yaye iya kuxanda, inabe kumacala onke. Zonke izizwe ziya kuthamsanqeliswa ngenxa yakho nenzala yakho." 
Genesis28:15 Ndiza kusoloko ndinawe, ndikukhusele naphi na apho uya khona, ndibuye ndikubuyisele kwakule ndawo. Andiyi kukushiya ndide ndizenze zonke izinto endizithembisileyo.”" 
Genesis28:16 Akuphaphama uYakobi, wathi: “Ngenene uNdikhoyo ukho kule ndawo; ndibe bendingayazi loo nto.”" 
Genesis28:17 Wangenwa luvalo kwaoko, wathi: “Hayi ukoyikeka kwayo le ndawo! Yindlu kaThixo le! Lisango lezulu eli!”" 
Genesis28:18 Wavuka kwangentseni uYakobi. Wathatha elo litye wayeqamele ngalo, wenza ngalo isikhumbuzo; waligalela amafutha." 
Genesis28:19 Wathi loo ndawo yiBhetele. Kodwa ke isixeko salapho kwakusithiwa yiLuzi. 
Genesis28:20 UYakobi ke yena wenza esi sifungo: “Ukuba uThixo undigcinile wandilondoloza kolu hambo, andiphe ukutya nezambatho" 
Genesis28:21 ndide ndibuyele ekhaya, ngenene ndiya kumkhonza uNdikhoyo, abe nguThixo wam." 
Genesis28:22 Eli litye lesikhumbuzo ndilimise apha liya kuba yindawo yokunqulela uThixo. Ndiya kumahlulela isishumi kwizinto andipha zona.” 
Genesis29:1 Wenjenjeya uYakobi kuhambo lwakhe, wada waya kufika kwilizwe leentlanga zasempumalanga." 
Genesis29:2 Wafika kumthombo owawusendle, kukho imihlambi emithathu yeegusha, zithe ncwaba zingqengqe kufuphi nawo. Le mihlambi yayikhelelwa amanzi kuloo mthombo uliso ligqunywe ngelitye." 
Genesis29:3 Yayisithi yakuthontelana apho imihlambi, abelusi baliqengqe elo litye, bayikhelele amanzi, babuye balibuyisele elo litye, livale umthombo lowo." 
Genesis29:4 Wafika wababuza abelusi uYakobi, wathi: “Bafondini, nisuka phi?” Bathe: “Sivela eHaran.”" 
Genesis29:5 Uthe: “Niyamazi uLabhan, umzukulwana kaNahore apho?” “Siyamazi,” batshilo ukuphendula." 
Genesis29:6 “Usaphila kodwa?” “Ewe, usaphila. Nantso selisiza intombi yakhe uRakeli kunye nomhlambi wakhe.”" 
Genesis29:7 Uthe uYakobi: “Ingekabi loxesha lakuphethula imihlambi emadlelweni nje eli, kutheni ningazisezi nje ezi gusha, niziyeke zitye?”" 
Genesis29:8 Baphendula bathi: “Asinakuyenza loo nto ingekapheleli imihlambi. Kufuneka yonke ibekho, ukuze siwuvule umthombo, siyiseze.”" 
Genesis29:9 URakeli wafika nowakhe umhlambi esathetha nâbo belusi uYakobi. 
Genesis29:10 UYakobi akubona uRakeli eqhuba imihlambi kaninalume uLabhan, waya kuliqengqa ilitye, wazipha amanzi iigusha." 
Genesis29:11 Wandula wamanga uRakeli, elila luvuyo." 
Genesis29:12 Wathi kuRakeli: “Ndiyazalana noyihlo; ndizalwa nguRabheka kaloku.” Wabaleka waya kuxelela uyise uRakeli; 
Genesis29:13 wathi noyise akuziva ezi ndaba zingomtshana wakhe uYakobi, waya kumhlangabeza wamgona, wamanga, wamngenisa endlwini. Uthe uLabhan akubaliselwa nguYakobi izinto ezenzekileyo," 
Genesis29:14 wayingqina into yokuba bayazalana. Wahlala apho inyanga yonke uYakobi. 
Genesis29:15 Wathi uLabhan kuYakobi: “Akunako ukusebenza nje simahla apha kum ngenxa yokuba sizalana. Ufuna ndikunike malini?” 
Genesis29:16 ULabhan wayeneentombi ezimbini, inguLeya igama lenkulu, encinci inguRakeli." 
Genesis29:17 ULeya wayetsho ngamehlo angathi anengcume; uRakeli yena eyinzwakazi kanobomi. 
Genesis29:18 UYakobi wayencwase uRakeli, waza wathi kuLabhan: “Ndokusebenzela iminyaka esixhenxe ukuba unokundivumela ndizeke intombi yakho encinci uRakeli.”" 
Genesis29:19 ULabhan uthe: “Ndikhetha ukumendisela kuwe kunokuba aye kwendela komnye umntu.” Watsho esithi makaselehlala apho kwakhe uYakobi. 
Genesis29:20 UYakobi waphangela isixhenxe sonke seminyaka, esebenzela ukufumana uRakeli. Lonke elo xesha laba ngathi ziintsuku nje ezimbalwa kuye, kuba wayemthanda uRakeli." 
Genesis29:21 “Lifikile ixesha; ndikhululele umkam,” watsho uYakobi kuLabhan." 
Genesis29:22 ULabhan wenza isidlo somtshato, wamema bonke abantu balapho." 
Genesis29:23 Ngobo busuku uLabhan wasa uLeya kuYakobi endaweni kaRakeli, uYakobi walala naye." 
Genesis29:24 ULabhan wakhupha uZilipha isicakakazi, wayimpelesi kaLeya." 
Genesis29:25 UYakobi akazange aqonde ukuba nguLeya lo wayelele naye, kude kwakusasa. Uye kuLabhan uYakobi, wafika wathi: “Yintoni le undenze yona? Bendisebenzela ukufumana uRakeli nje, undiqhathele ntoni?”" 
Genesis29:26 Uthe uLabhan: “Asilosiko lethu ukwendisa intombi encinci, ingekendi endala." 
Genesis29:27 Linda ke khe kudlule le veki yomtshato, ndikwendisele uRakeli ke xa uya kuphinda usebenze iminyaka esixhenxe.”" 
Genesis29:28 Wavuma ke uYakobi, yathi yakudlula loo veki yomtshato uLabhan wamendisela kuYakobi noRakeli." 
Genesis29:29 ULabhan wakhupha isicakakazi uBhiliya waba yimpelesi kaRakeli. 
Genesis29:30 Wamambatha uRakeli uYakobi, wamthanda nangaphezu koLeya. Wasebenza eminye iminyaka esixhenxe." 
Genesis29:31 Akubona *uNdikhoyo ukuba uLeya akathandwa, wampha inzala, wamvala yena uRakeli." 
Genesis29:32 Wakhawula uLeya, wazala umntwana oyinkwenkwe, wathi nguRubhen igama lakhe, kuba wayesithi: “UNdikhoyo ulubonile usizi lwam; ngoku ndiza kuthandwa ngumyeni wam.”" 
Genesis29:33 Waphinda wazala omnye umntwana oyinkwenkwe, wathi yena nguSimon, esithi: “UNdikhoyo undiphe lo mntwana ngenxa yokuba evile ukuba andithandwa.”" 
Genesis29:34 Uphinde wazala enye inkwenkwe, wathi le nguLevi, kuba wayesithi: “Ndiya kudityaniswa nendoda yam ngakumbi kuba ndizele amakhwenkwe amathathu.”" 
Genesis29:35 Uphinde ngenye inkwenkwe kwakhona, wathi yona nguJuda, kuba wayesithi: “Ndiyambonga uNdikhoyo kwesi sihlandlo.” Emva koko wapheza ukuzala." 
Genesis30:1 URakeli wayengekazali mntwana wonke lo gama. Waba nobukhwele ngodade wabo, wavakala esithi kuYakobi: “Ndiphe abantwana; kungenjalo ndisuke ndife kunale nto.”" 
Genesis30:2 Wacaphuka uYakobi, wathi ukuphendula: “NdinguThixo kakade mna? Uvalwe ndim, ungazali nje?”" 
Genesis30:3 Uthe uRakeli: “Nanku uBhiliya impelesi yam; ungamngeni nje, andizalele umntwana, nowam umzi wande?”" 
Genesis30:4 Wayikhulula ke impelesi yakhe, wayinika umyeni wakhe, wayambatha." 
Genesis30:5 Wakhulelwa uBhiliya, wazala umntwana oyinkwenkwe." 
Genesis30:6 Wathi uRakeli: “UThixo undigwebele; usivile isicelo sam, wandipha unyana.” Wathi ke igama laloo mntwana nguDan." 
Genesis30:7 Waphinda wakhawulwa uBhiliya, wazala enye inkwenkwe kwakhona." 
Genesis30:8 Wathi uRakeli: “Ndizamene gqitha nodade wethu, kodwa ngoku ndimoyisile.” Wathi ke igama laloo nkwenkwe nguNafetali." 
Genesis30:9 Uthe ke uLeya akuziqonda ukuba akasazali, wanika uYakobi impelesi yakhe uZilipha ukuba ibe liqadi lakhe." 
Genesis30:10 Wazala inkwenkwe uZilipha. 
Genesis30:11 Wathi uLeya: “Ndisikelelekile.” Wathi ke igama layo nguGadi. 
Genesis30:12 UZilipha wazala enye inkwenkwe. 
Genesis30:13 Wathi uLeya: “Andisavuyi ngako! Nabanye abafazi baza kuthi ndiyavuya.” Kwathiwa ke loo nkwenkwe nguAshere. 
Genesis30:14 Xa kwakuvunwa ingqolowa, uRubhen wafumana imithuma yentando emasimini, wayisa kuLeya unina. URakeli wathi kuLeya: “Khawundiphe emithumeni leyo ifunyenwe ngumntwanakho.” ULeya wathi:" 
Genesis30:15 “Yho! Hleli nje, kanti akwanelanga kukuhlutha indoda yam! Ngoku selufun' ukundihlutha nemithuma le yomntwanam!” Wathi uRakeli: “Kanti ungalala naye ngokuhlwanje uYakobi, ukuba uyandipha.”" 
Genesis30:16 Ukufika kukaYakobi, evela emasimini ngokuhlwa, uLeya wamkhawulela, wafika wathi: “Uza kulala nam ngokuhlwanje, kuba ndikuthenge ngemithuma yomntwanam.” Walala noLeya ke ngoko kuhlwa uYakobi." 
Genesis30:17 UThixo wayiva imithandazo kaLeya, wakhawula, waphinda wazala enye yesihlanu inkwenkwe." 
Genesis30:18 Wathi: “UThixo uyandibuyisela kuba impelesi yam ndiyinikele kumyeni wam.” Wathi ke loo nkwenkwe nguIsakare. 
Genesis30:19 Wakhulelwa, waphinda wazala enye inkwenkwe uLeya, eyesithandathu ngoku." 
Genesis30:20 Wathi: “UThixo undiphe isipho esihle; umyeni wam kuya kunyanzeleka ukuba andixabise, ndizele amadoda amathandathu nje.” Wathi ke loo nkwenkwe nguZebhulon." 
Genesis30:21 Emva koko wazala intombi, wathi yona nguDayina." 
Genesis30:22 UThixo wamva uRakeli, wayiphendula imithandazo yakhe, wamvula wazala." 
Genesis30:23 Wakhawula, wazala inkwenkwe. Wathi: “UThixo ulisusile ihlazo lam.”" 
Genesis30:24 Wathi ke igama layo nguJosefu, esithi: “Wanga uNdikhoyo angandongezela kwaenye inkwenkwe.”" 
Genesis30:25 Emva kokuvela kukaJosefu, uYakobi wathi kuLabhan: “Ndikhulule, khon' ukuze ndibuyele kowethu." 
Genesis30:26 Ndinike abafazi bam nabantwana bam endibasebenzeleyo, ndihambe. Uyakwazi ukubulaleka kwam ndikusebenzela.”" 
Genesis30:27 Wathi uLabhan: “Mandiyithethe yona into yokuba ndityhilelwe ukuthi ndihlumé ndatsho ndasisinhanha ngenxa yokuba *uNdikhoyo ekusikelele. 
Genesis30:28 Ndixelele umvuzo owufunayo nje wena, ndikunike.”" 
Genesis30:29 Uthe uYakobi: “Wazi kakuhle indlela ebendisebenza ngayo, nento yokuba yande kangakanani na imfuyo yakho ebisaluswa ndim lo." 
Genesis30:30 Laa mbinana wawunayo ukufika kwam, yande kakhulu, yaye noNdikhoyo ebekuthamsanqelisa ngenxa yam. Nam ngoku ndifuna ukusebenzela intsapho yam.”" 
Genesis30:31 “Ndikuhlawule ntoni?” ubuzile uLabhan. Uthe uYakobi: “Andifuni ntlawulo. Ndiza kuhlala ndiyaluse imihlambi yakho, ukuba nje siyavumelana ngale ndawo." 
Genesis30:32 Namhlanje ndiza kuya phaya emhlambini, ndifike ndiwakhethe onke amatakane amnyama nazo zonke iibhokhwe ezingcitha. Kuphela komvuzo endiwufunayo ke lowo." 
Genesis30:33 Kuya kuba lula ke kamva ukuqonda xa ndibile. Uya kuthi uqonde ngaloo nto ke xa uze kuhlola ukuba ndibile na: xa uthe wafika ndingenazo iibhokhwe ezingcitha, kungekho nagusha imnyama, uya kwazi ukuba ndibile.”" 
Genesis30:34 Uthe uLabhan: “Sivene ke, mfo. Masenjenjalo ke.”" 
Genesis30:35 Kwangaloo mhla uLabhan wazahlula emihlambini zonke iinkunzi zeebhokhwe ezingcitha, kwakunye nezeegusha ezimnyama. Wathi mazaluswe ngoonyana bakhe," 
Genesis30:36 bemka nawo loo mhlambi umgama owawunokuthathwa ngeentsuku ezintathu. UYakobi yena wasala neminye imihlambi kaLabhan. 
Genesis30:37 UYakobi wagawula iipali ezisemanzi zepampiri, nezom-almondi, kunye nompleyini. Wazixoza amaxolo, kwavela iindawo ezimhlophe." 
Genesis30:38 Wazigxumeka emijelweni kwezo ndawo kusela kuzo imihlambi. Loo nto wayenza kuba iinkunzi zazikhwela xa zize kusela. 
Genesis30:39 Ezo mazi zeebhokhwe zazikhwelwa ngaphambi kwezo pali zazala amatakane angcitha. 
Genesis30:40 UYakobi wazahlula iigusha ezibhokhweni, wazijongisa ngakweziya zingcitha. Wawenza ngolu hlobo ke owakhe umhlambi, wawahlula kokaLabhan." 
Genesis30:41 Xa zikhwelwa iimazi ezomeleleyo, uYakobi wayedla ngokumisa ezo pali phambi kwazo kuloo ndawo yokusela, ukuze zizalele phantsi kwezo pali." 
Genesis30:42 Kodwa imigqutsuba wayengayizisi yona phantsi kwezo pali. Kungekudala ekaLabhan imihlambi yaba yile iyimigqutsuba, ekaYakobi yona yaba yile yomeleleyo." 
Genesis30:43 Wahluma, watyeba ngaloo ndlela ke uYakobi. Waba nemihlambi emininzi, nezicaka, iinkamela, needonki." 
Genesis31:1 UYakobi weva ukuba oonyana bakaLabhan bathi uzithathe zonke izinto zikayise, yaye nobu butyebi bakhe ubuzuze ngezinto zikayise." 
Genesis31:2 Waphawula nokuba akasathandwa nguLabhan. 
Genesis31:3 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuYakobi: “Buyela kwilizwe looyihlo-mkhulu, kumawenu. Mna ndiya kuba nawe.”" 
Genesis31:4 UYakobi ke wathumela ukuba kubizwe uRakeli noLeya ukuba beze kuye endle apho wayesalusa khona imihlambi. 
Genesis31:5 Uthe kubo: “Ndiyabona ukuba uyihlo akasandithandi ngoku; ukanti uThixo kabawo ubesoloko enam. 
Genesis31:6 Nazi kakuhle nobabini indlela ebendimsebenzela ngayo uyihlo. 
Genesis31:7 Kodwa yena wandiqhatha, wawuguqu-guqula umvuzo wam kalishumi. Kodwa uThixo akavumanga ukuba andenzakalise." 
Genesis31:8 Ubesakuthi uLabhan akuthi ezinamachaphaza ziya kuba zezam, zisuke zonke zizale amatakane anamachaphaza. Kuthi akuthi ziya kuba zezinemizila ezam, zisuke zonke zizale amatakane anemizila." 
Genesis31:9 UThixo uyihluthile imfuyo kayihlo, wayinika mna." 
Genesis31:10 “Ngexesha ekwakukhwelwa iimazi ndaba nephupha: ndaphakamisa amehlo, ndabona iinkunzi zeebhokhwe ezazikhwela iimazi, zingcitha, zingcaka." 
Genesis31:11 Sathi kum isithunywa sikaThixo ngephupha: ‘Yakobi!’ Ndasabela ndathi: ‘Ndim lo.’ 
Genesis31:12 Sithe ke sona: ‘Phakamisa amehlo, ubone zonke iinkunzi zeebhokhwe ezikhwelayo zingcitha, zingcaka. Ndiyibonile yonke into akwenze yona uLabhan; kungoko ndisenza le nto." 
Genesis31:13 Mna ndingulaa Thixo wabonakala kuwe eBhetele, apho wathambisa khona ngamafutha ilitye lesikhumbuzo, apho wawenze khona isifungo. Ngoku ke lishiye eli lizwe, ubuyele kwelakowenu.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Bathe ukuphendula ooRakeli noLeya: “Asisenabango thina kwizinto zikatata. 
Genesis31:15 Usiphethe okwabantu basemzini. Wasithengisa, wayitya yaphela naloo nto wayifumana ngathi." 
Genesis31:16 Ngoko ke seliyeyethu nabantwana bethu yonke loo nto uThixo asihluthele yona kutata. Yenza loo nto wena uThixo akuyalela yona.” 
Genesis31:17 Kwangoko uYakobi wabakhwelisa ezinkameleni abafazi bakhe noonyana bakhe. 
Genesis31:18 Wayiqhuba yonke loo mihlambi wayifumana ePadan-aram, wenjenjeya ukusinga kuyise uIsake eKanana." 
Genesis31:19 ULabhan wayeye kucheba iigusha zakhe. Lo gama angekhoyo uRakeli waya kuba *imilonde-khaya kuyise. 
Genesis31:20 UYakobi yena wamkhohlisa uLabhan ngokungamazisi uLabhan ukuba uyemka. 
Genesis31:21 Wathatha konke okwakhe, wemka ngokungxama. Waya kuwela umlambo iEfrati, wenjenjeya ejonge kweleenduli eGiliyadi." 
Genesis31:22 Emva kweentsuku ezintathu uLabhan weva ukuba uYakobi ubalekile. 
Genesis31:23 Wahamba nezihlobo zakhe, basukela iintsuku zada zasixhenxe, bamfumana kwezo nduli zeGiliyadi." 
Genesis31:24 Ngobo busuku uThixo wavela ngephupha kuLabhan, wathi: “Uze ulumke, ungathethi nto kuYakobi konke, nenjani na.”" 
Genesis31:25 ULabhan wafika uYakobi emise kwezo nduli zeGiliyadi, waza yena namadoda awayehamba nawo wemisa kwalapho." 
Genesis31:26 ULabhan wathi kuYakobi: “Yintoni le uyenzileyo? Kutheni undikhohlisa nje, ude uqhube neentombi zam oku kwabathinjwa emfazweni?" 
Genesis31:27 Kutheni le nto usuka uzimele, ungatsho xa umkayo? Ukuba ubuxelile ngendikukhulule kakuhle, wenzelwa iingoma ngamagubu nangeehapu." 
Genesis31:28 Akukhange undinike nethuba lokuba khe ndange abazukulwana bam neentombi zam, ndithi ndlela-ntle kubo. Hayi noko, bubudenge into oyenzileyo!" 
Genesis31:29 Ndingakwenza into embi ngoku. Kodwa phezolo uThixo kayihlo uthe ze ndingathethi nto kuwe. 
Genesis31:30 Ndiyazi ukuba umkiswe kukukhumbula ikhaya, kodwa ke uyibele ntoni yona *imilonde-khaya yam?”" 
Genesis31:31 Uthe uYakobi: “Ndoyike ukuba undihluthe iintombi zakho. 
Genesis31:32 Kodwa ke ukuba kukho umntu apha onayo imilonde-khaya yakho, maze abulawe lowo. Ngoku sikhoyo sonke khangelani nantoni na eyeyenu, niyithathe.” UYakobi wayengazi ukuba imilonde-khaya kaLabhan ibiwe nguRakeli." 
Genesis31:33 ULabhan waya kukhangela ententeni kaYakobi, wadlulela nakwekaLeya, waya nakweyeempelesi zeentombi zakhe, akafumana nto apho. Wesuka apho waya ententeni kaRakeli." 
Genesis31:34 URakeli wayeseleyithathile imilonde-khaya wayifaka engxoweni, wahlala phezu kwayo. Wakhangela wagqogqa yonke indawo uLabhan, akayifumana noko." 
Genesis31:35 URakeli uthe kuyise: “Akuyi kukhathazeka, mhlekazi, xa ndingasukumiyo. Kaloku ndiya exesheni.” Wagqogqa uLabhan, wabuya ze nalapho engayifumananga imilonde-khaya yakhe." 
Genesis31:36 UYakobi wangcangcazela ngumsindo, wathi: “Uthi yintoni le imbi ndiyenzileyo? Mthetho wuphi lo ndiwaphuleyo ukugunyazisa ukuba uzingelane nam?" 
Genesis31:37 Kukho nto yendlu yakho oyifumeneyo apha wakugqiba ukugqogqa umzi wam? Yirhole ibonwe ngala madoda uhamba nawo nala am, khon' ukuze alathe oyena wonileyo: indim, inguwe." 
Genesis31:38 “Bendihleli nawe iminyaka engamashumi mabini. Ngalo lonke elo xesha bezizala rhoqo iibhokhwe zakho, yaye andizange nditye nanye igusha yakho." 
Genesis31:39 Bendisoloko ndiyihlawula igusha nganye eqwengwe zizilwanyana. Andizange ndize nayo kuwe ndisithi asilotyala lam. Wawudla ngokuthi mandibuyise yonke into ebiweyo, nokuba kusemini, nokuba kusebusuku." 
Genesis31:40 Ndanditshiswa ngamalanga emini, ndidliwa naziingqele ebusuku, kungehli nobuthongo obu," 
Genesis31:41 kule minyaka imashumi mabini ndinawe. Ndasebenza ishumi elinane leminyaka, ndifuna iintombi zakho. Ndabuya ndasebenza eminye emithandathu, ndisebenzela imfuyo. Kanti ke phezu koko uwuguqu-guqule kwada kwakalishumi umvuzo wam." 
Genesis31:42 Ukuba ebengenam uThixo woobawo, uThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, ngewandigxotha ndemka ndingaphethe nto. Kodwa ke uThixo ububonile ubunzima ebendikubo nomsebenzi wam, waza ke phezolo wandigwebela.”" 
Genesis31:43 Wenjenje ukuphendula uLabhan: “Ziintombi zam ezi; naba bantwana bazo ngabam; nale mihlambi yeyam; nditsho yonke le nto ilapha. Kodwa ngenxa yokuba ndingenako ukubanqanda abantwana bam," 
Genesis31:44 ndingáyenza imvumelwano kunye nawe. Masithathe amatye, siwafumbe ndawonye, abe sisikhumbuzo saloo mvumelwano.”" 
Genesis31:45 UYakobi ke wathatha ilitye, walimisa ukuba libe sisikhumbuzo." 
Genesis31:46 Wathi amadoda makaqokelele amatye, awafumbe apho. Enjenjalo ke, aza ahlala phantsi apho ngakuloo matye, atya." 
Genesis31:47 ULabhan wathi loo ndawo yiJegare-saduta, uYakobi wathi yiGaledi." 
Genesis31:48 ULabhan wathi kuYakobi: “Le ngqumba yamatye iya kuba sisikhumbuzo kuthi.” Yiyo loo nto loo ndawo kwathiwa yiGaledi. 
Genesis31:49 ULabhan wabuya wathi: “Wanga *uNdikhoyo angasijonga naxa sesahlukene.” Yaza loo ndawo kwathiwa yiMizpa. 
Genesis31:50 Waqhuba wathi uLabhan: “Ukuba ukhe wabaphatha kakubi abantwana bam, okanye wathatha bafazi bambi, nokuba andiyazanga loo nto, uzukhumbule ukuba uThixo usijongile." 
Genesis31:51 Nanga la matye afunjwe apha, phakathi kwethu; nali nelitye lesikhumbuzo." 
Genesis31:52 Zizombini ke ezo zinto zisisikhumbuzo. Andisoze ndidlule apha ndize kukuhlasela; nawe ungaze uzidlule uze kundihlasela. 
Genesis31:53 NguThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaNahore, oya kusigweba.” Waza ke uYakobi wafunga egameni loMhlonitshwa kayise uIsake." 
Genesis31:54 Waxhela, wenza idini apho, wamemela izihlobo zakhe esidlweni. Bakugqiba ukutya bahlala kuloo ntaba ubusuku bonke." 
Genesis31:55 Kwakusasa ngengomso uLabhan wanga abazukulwana bakhe neentombi zakhe, esithi ndlela-ntle kubo, wajika wagoduka." 
Genesis32:1 UYakobi uhambile naye, waza wahlangana nezithunywa zikaThixo endleleni." 
Genesis32:2 Uthe akuzibona wavakala esithi: “Ngumkhosi kaThixo lo,” waza wathi loo ndawo yiManayim igama layo." 
Genesis32:3 UYakobi wathumela izigidimi ngaphambili ukuba ziye kumntakwabo uEsawu eSeyire, e-Edom." 
Genesis32:4 Wathi ze zithi kuye: “Mna, Yakobi, sicaka sakho, ndazisa wena, nkosi yam Esawu, ukuba bekhe ndahlala kwaLabhan, ndaza ndabambezeleka apho kwada kwakalokunje." 
Genesis32:5 Ndiza neenkomo neegusha, iidonki neebhokhwe, kwakunye nezicaka. Ndithumela lo myalezo ke, mhlekazi, ndinethemba lokuba uya kundamkela.”" 
Genesis32:6 Ukubuya kwazo izigidimi zikaYakobi, zafika zathi: “Simbonile uEsawu umntakwenu; selesendleleni ekukhawulelayo. Uza namakhulu amane amadoda.”" 
Genesis32:7 Wothuka wakhathazeka uYakobi; waza wabahlula bangamaqela amabini abantu bakhe, ngokunjalo neegusha, neenkomo, neebhokhwe, kwaneenkamela." 
Genesis32:8 Icebo lakhe lalikukuba kusinde eli lesibini iqela, xa athe wahlasela elokuqala uEsawu." 
Genesis32:9 Uye wathandaza emva koko uYakobi esithi: “Thixo kabawo-mkhulu uAbraham, Thixo kabawo wam uIsake, ndive. Nguwe, *Ndikhoyo, othe mandibuyele ezweni lakowethu naphakathi kwezizalwana zam. Watsho usithi uya kuyenza mhlophe indlela yam, konke kulunge." 
Genesis32:10 Ububele ondenzele bona, nokunyaniseka kwakho, akundifanele, Nkosi. Ndayiwela iJordan ndingenanto, ndiphethe umsimelelo kuphela. Ngoku ndibuya ndihamba nala maqela mabini." 
Genesis32:11 Ndihlangule ke kumntakwethu uEsawu, ndiyakubongoza. Ndinoloyiko hleze asihlasele asitshabalalise sonke, umntwana nonina." 
Genesis32:12 Khumbula ke ukuba wathembisa ukuba konke kondilungela, wathembisa nokuba wondipha inzala engenakubalwa bani, ebuninzi bungangobentlabathi elunxwemeni lolwandle.”" 
Genesis32:13 Ngengomso uYakobi wakhetha kuloo mhlambi wakhe ezo wayeza kuzipha umntakwabo uEsawu: 
Genesis32:14 iimazi zeebhokhwe zaba ngamakhulu mabini, iinkunzi zangamashumi mabini; amakhulu mabini eemazi zeegusha, namashumi mabini eenkunzi zeegusha," 
Genesis32:15 amashumi amathathu eemazi zeenkamela namankonyane azo; kunye namashumi mane eemazi zeenkomo, kunye neshumi leenkunzi; namashumi mabini eemazi zeedonki; kunye neenkunzi ezilishumi." 
Genesis32:16 Wazahlula-hlula zayimihlambi, waza umhlambi ngamnye wakhokelwa sisicaka. Wathi mazihambe ngaphambili, zishiye isithuba phakathi komhlambi ngamnye." 
Genesis32:17 Wathi kwisicaka esasingaphambili, ze sithi xa ebuza uEsawu ukuba ngaba ngubani na inkosi yaso, besiya ngaphi na, wona umhlambi lo ungokabani:" 
Genesis32:18 “ZezikaYakobi, isicaka sikaEsawu. Wenza ngazo isipho kuEsawu inkosi yakhe. Yena uYakobi uyalandela ngasemva.”" 
Genesis32:19 Wabaxelela loo nto bonke abakhokela imihlambi, owesibini nowesithathu njalo-njalo, esithi: “Nakuhlangabezana noEsawu ze nithi:" 
Genesis32:20 ‘Ewe, isicaka sakho uYakobi siyeza ngasemva.’ ” Icebo likaYakobi lalikukuba amenze athambe ngezo zipho uEsawu, aze xa efika yena Yakobi kuye axolelwe." 
Genesis32:21 Wazindulula ke ezo zipho, waza yena walalisa apho esikhululweni ngobo busuku." 
Genesis32:22 Ngobo busuku wavuka uYakobi, wahamba nabafazi bakhe bobabini, namaqadi abo, kunye nabantwana bakhe abalishumi nanye, wawuwela umlambo iJabhoko." 
Genesis32:23 Akubaweza waweza nempahla yakhe yonke," 
Genesis32:24 kodwa yena wasala ngasemva. Kwafika umntu, wajijisana naye kwada kwasekuzeni kokusa." 
Genesis32:25 Wathi loo mntu akubona ukuba akamngquli uYakobi, wamchukumisa enyongeni, yatsho yagungxuka endaweni yayo." 
Genesis32:26 Watsho esithi: “Ndiyeke ndihambe, kuyasa.” UYakobi wathi: “Andisobe ndikuyeke, de undithamsanqelise.”" 
Genesis32:27 “Ungubani igama lakho?” ubuzile loo mntu. “NdinguYakobi,” uphendule watsho yena." 
Genesis32:28 Uthe ke loo mntu: “Akusokubuya kuthiwe unguYakobi, kuba kaloku wena ujijisene noThixo kwakunye nabantu, waphumelela. Ngoko ke kuya kuthiwa unguSirayeli igama lakho.”" 
Genesis32:29 Uthe yena uYakobi: “Nawe ndixelele elakho igama.” Uthe loo mfo: “Uza kulenzani igama lam?” Watsho esikelela uYakobi. 
Genesis32:30 UYakobi wathi: “UThixo ndimbonile ubuso ngobuso, ndibe naku ndisaphila.” Wathi ke loo ndawo yiPeniyeli." 
Genesis32:31 Laphuma ilanga xa uYakobi emkayo apho ePeniyeli. Wayeqhwalela ngenxa yenyonga egungxulekileyo. 
Genesis32:32 AmaSirayeli akawutyi umsipha kasikrotyana unanamhlanje, kuba kaloku wachukunyiswa kuloo ndawo uYakobi." 
Genesis33:1 UYakobi wambona uEsawu esiza namakhulu amane amadoda, waza abantwana wabahlula-hlula phakathi koLeya noRakeli namaqadi abo omabini." 
Genesis33:2 Wabeka amaqadi nabantwana bawo ngaphambili, weza noLeya nabantwana bakhe, kwaza ekugqibeleni yanguRakeli noJosefu." 
Genesis33:3 UYakobi wayengaphambi kwabo, ekhahlela kwada kwakasixhenxe njengokuba wayesiya esondela kumntakwabo." 
Genesis33:4 UEsawu wakhawuleza ukuya kuye, waziphosa kuye, wamgona, wamanga. Balila bobabini." 
Genesis33:5 Akusinga-singa uEsawu, wabona abo bafazi nabo bantwana, wabuza wathi: “Ngoobani aba uhamba nabo?” “Mhlekazi, ngabantwana endibaphiwe nguThixo,” utshilo uYakobi." 
Genesis33:6 Eza amaqadi nabantwana bawo, afika akhahlela." 
Genesis33:7 Kwalandela uLeya nabakhe abantwana, kwaza kwagqibela uJosefu noRakeli, nabo bakhahlela." 
Genesis33:8 UEsawu uthe: “Yona laa mihlambi ndihlangene nayo endleleni?” Uthe ukuphendula uYakobi: “Bendiyithumela ukuza kundicengela kuwe, mhlekazi.”" 
Genesis33:9 Uthe uEsawu: “Ndinemfuyo ngokwaneleyo, mfo wethu; gcina izinto zakho.”" 
Genesis33:10 UYakobi wathi: “Ndincede, zithathe ukuba uyasamkela isicengo sam. Xa ndibona ubuso bakho, ngathi ndibona ubuso bukaThixo, ingakumbi ngoku sowundamkele ngobubele." 
Genesis33:11 Zithathe kaloku ezi zipho ndikuphathele zona. UThixo undenzele ububele, wandipha yonke into ebendiyifuna.” UYakobi wamcenga uEsawu, wada woyisakala wazithatha ezo zipho." 
Genesis33:12 Uthe uEsawu: “Masilungiselele ukunduluka ngoku. Mna ndiza kukukhapha.” 
Genesis33:13 UYakobi uthe: “Kaloku abantwana bam baselula, yaye kufuneka ndicingele neegusha kunye namatakane azo, kuba ukuba zikhe zaxheshwa usuku nje olunye, zingafa zonke." 
Genesis33:14 Hamba ngaphambili wena, mna ndolandela, ndicothoza kunye nabantwana kunye nemihlambi, de ndikufumane e-Edom.”" 
Genesis33:15 Wathi uEsawu: “Xa kunjalo ke makushiyeke namanye amadoda kula ndihamba nawo.” Kodwa wathi uYakobi: “Hayi, akukho mfuneko; kwanele xa ndamkelekile kuwe.”" 
Genesis33:16 Wanduluka ke ngaloo mini uEsawu ukusinga e-Edom. 
Genesis33:17 Kodwa yena uYakobi wenjenjeya esiya eSukoti. Apho wazakhela indlu, nemihlambi yakhe wayenzela uthango. Yiyo loo nto loo ndawo kuthiwa yiSukoti." 
Genesis33:18 Ekubuyeni kwakhe ePadan-aram, uYakobi wahamba kakuhle, waya kufika kwidolophu iShekem kwelaseKanana, wamisa apho kufuphi nedolophu leyo." 
Genesis33:19 Wawuthenga loo mhlaba kubazukulwana bakaHamore uyise kaShekem ngekhulu leesiliva. 
Genesis33:20 Wenza iqonga lamadini apho, wayithiya loo ndawo ngoThixo, uThixo wamaSirayeli." 
Genesis34:1 Ngamhla uthile uDayina intombi kaYakobi noLeya waya kubutha kwezinye iintombi zaseKanana. 
Genesis34:2 UShekem, unyana kaHamore umHivi inkosi yaloo mmandla, wambona, wemka naye, wazithathel' isondo kuye." 
Genesis34:3 Wasuka wathi ti yiloo ntombi uShekem, wayithanda, wazama ukuzicengezela kuyo." 
Genesis34:4 Waxelela uyise ukuba makamthathele yona ibe ngumkakhe. 
Genesis34:5 Weva uYakobi ukuba intombi yakhe yonakele. Kodwa ngenxa yokuba babengekho oonyana bakhe, besemadlelweni, akazange enze nto kwada kwabuya bona." 
Genesis34:6 Uyise kaShekem uHamore waya kuthetha noYakobi. 
Genesis34:7 Kwakuxa kanye babuyayo emadlelweni oonyana bakaYakobi. Bothuka, bakhathazeka kakhulu bakuyiva into embi kangaka eyenziwe nguShekem yokunyelisa amaSirayeli ngokulala nentombi kaYakobi, nto leyo ingenziwayo kwaSirayeli." 
Genesis34:8 UHamore wenjenje ebhekisa kuYakobi: “Unyana wam uShekem uyayithanda le ntombi yakho. Ndiyakucela ke, mvumele ayithathe." 
Genesis34:9 Masivane thina kwinto yokuba abantu bethu bendiselane. 
Genesis34:10 Nawe ke ungema naphi na kulo mhlaba wakowethu, urhwebe nokurhweba kangangoko uthanda, ufuye nempahla.”" 
Genesis34:11 Uthe ke yena uShekem kuYakobi noonyana bakhe: “Ndikhululeleni le ntombi. Ndiya kuhlawula nantoni na eniyifunayo. 
Genesis34:12 Ndixeleleni ikhazi emandilikhuphe, libe likhulu kangangoko nifuna; nixele namabhaso eniwafunayo, ndininike. Nantoni na eniyifunayo ndingayikhupha, ukuba nje niyavuma ndimthathe uDayina.”" 
Genesis34:13 Ngenxa yokuba uShekem wayeselemhlazisile udade wabo uDayina, oonyana bakaYakobi babaphendula ngelibaqhathayo ooShekem noyise uHamore," 
Genesis34:14 benjenje: “Asinakumendisela kumntu ongalukanga udade wethu. Into enjalo ingalihlazo. 
Genesis34:15 Singavuma xa nina, kunye nawo onke amadoda alapha, nisaluka, nifane nathi." 
Genesis34:16 Nolwendiselwano olu nina nithetha ngalo singalwamkela phantsi kwaloo mqathango kuphela, sihlale phakathi kwenu, sibe ngabantu abanye." 
Genesis34:17 Kodwa ke ukuba anivumelani nathi ngale ndawo, siya kumthatha udade wethu, sifuduke apha.”" 
Genesis34:18 Yavakala ilungile imihle le miqathango kuHamore nakunyana wakhe uShekem. 
Genesis34:19 UShekem akapholisanga maseko, ngenxa yokuba wayemthanda uDayina intombi kaYakobi. UShekem wayexatyiswe kakhulu kowabo." 
Genesis34:20 UHamore noShekem babizela amawabo embizweni ngasesangweni ledolophu, babhekisa kuwo benjenje:" 
Genesis34:21 “Abaya bantu ngabahlobo bethu. Masibavumele bahlale bazive besekhaya apha kowethu. Mkhulu lo mhlaba; ungasanela sonke. Singendiselana nokwendiselana nabo. 
Genesis34:22 Kodwa abaya bantu bathi bohlala phakathi kwethu, sibe ngabantu abanye, ngaphantsi komqathango omnye: lo wokuba onke amadoda aluke, afane nabo." 
Genesis34:23 Anithi ke izinto zabo nemfuyo yabo yonke ayingebi yeyethu xa kunjalo? Masivumelane ke nabo, bahlale nathi.”" 
Genesis34:24 Laba linye kumntu wonke kubemi baloo dolophu, aza onke amadoda aluka." 
Genesis34:25 Emva kweentsuku ezintathu, xa kanye onke amadoda aqhanile ziintlungu, oonyana ababini bakaYakobi, abanakwabo-Dayina, uSimon noLevi, bathatha amakrele abo, bangena esixekweni, bengarhanelwa bani, bafika bawabulala onke amadoda" 
Genesis34:26 kunye noHamore noShekem. Baya kuthatha uDayina kwaShekem, bemka naye." 
Genesis34:27 Emva koko abanye oonyana bakaYakobi bangena edolophini, bayiphanga, bekhupha isixhiba ngenxa yokunyeliswa kodade wabo." 
Genesis34:28 Bemka neegusha, neenkomo, needonki, babutha konke esixekweni nasemadlelweni." 
Genesis34:29 Yonke into enexabiso bahamba nayo, bathatha bonke abafazi nabantwana kunye nempahla yezindlu." 
Genesis34:30 UYakobi wathi kuSimon noLevi: “Nina nindibangela ingxwaba-ngxwaba ngale nto. Ngoku ndiza kucatshukelwa ngabantu bonke, amaKanana kunye namaPerezi. Andinamadoda maninzi mna. Ukuba bona banokudibana bandihlasele ungatshabalala wonke umzi wam.”" 
Genesis34:31 Bamphendula ngelithi: “Besingenakuyeka udadethu aphathwe njengehenyukazi.” 
Genesis35:1 Wathi uThixo kuYakobi: “Hamba ngoku uye kuhlala eBhetele. Uze ufike undenzele iqonga lamadini apho. Mna ndingulaa Thixo wavela kuwe xeshikweni wawubaleka umkhuluwa wakho uEsawu.” 
Genesis35:2 UYakobi ke wayalela intsapho nezicaka zakhe wathi: “Yahlukanani *noothixo basemzini abaphakathi kwenu, nihlambuluke, ninxibe mpahla zimbi." 
Genesis35:3 Siza kumka apha, sifudukele eBhetele, apho ndiya kumisa khona iqonga lamadini loThixo owandikhulula engxakini nobesoloko enam naphi na apho ndikhoyo.”" 
Genesis35:4 Bazikhupha ke *izithixo zasemzini, bazinika uYakobi kunye naloo macici babewafakile. Ezo zinto wazimbela ngaphantsi komthi wom-oki ongakwidolophu yaseShekem." 
Genesis35:5 Ukumka kukaYakobi noonyana bakhe, abantu beedolophu ezikufuphi baba noloyiko olukhulu, ababasukela." 
Genesis35:6 Waya kugaleleka eBhetele eKanana uYakobi nentsapho yakhe yonke. IBhetele ke yayaziwa ngokuba yiLuzi. 
Genesis35:7 Wamisa iqonga lamadini apho uYakobi, wayithiya loo ndawo ngoThixo waseBhetele. Kaloku kulapho uThixo wazibonakalisayo kuYakobi xa wayebaleka umkhuluwa wakhe." 
Genesis35:8 UDibhora impelesi kaRakeli, wabhubhela khona apho, wafihlelwa phantsi komthi wom-oki owawusezantsi kweBhetele. Kwathiwa ke loo ndawo nguM-oki weeNyembezi." 
Genesis35:9 UThixo wabuya wavela kuYakobi ukubuya kwakhe ePadan-aram, wabuya wamthamsanqelisa." 
Genesis35:10 Wenjenje ukuthetha uThixo: “Kuthiwa igama lakho unguYakobi, kodwa ukususela ngoku kuya kuthiwa unguSirayeli.” Kwaba ke njalo uThixo umthiya igama elinguSirayeli." 
Genesis35:11 Wabuya wathi uThixo: “Mna ndinguThixo uSomandla. Ndithi chuma wande. Uya kuba nguyise wesizwe – nditsho izizwe ngezizwe – ube ngukhokho weekumkani. 
Genesis35:12 Umhlaba endawunika uAbraham noIsake ndiwunika wena kunye nabazukulwana bakho emva kwakho.” 
Genesis35:13 UThixo wamshiya ke apho akugqiba ukuthetha naye. 
Genesis35:14 Apho kanye kuloo ndawo uThixo wayethetha kuyo noYakobi, wemisa ilitye uYakobi, walinikela kuThixo ngokuligalela iwayini namafutha." 
Genesis35:15 Loo ndawo wathi yiBhetele. 
Genesis35:16 Wafuduka uYakobi nentsapho yakhe eBhetele. Kwathi xa babekude kufuphi ne-Efrata, kwabonakala ukuba lifikile ixesha lokuba uRakeli abeleke. Kwaba nzima kakhulu." 
Genesis35:17 Kwathi egcuma ziintlungu, wavakala esithi umbelekisi wakhe: “Uzungoyiki, Rakeli, uzele enye inkwenkwe.”" 
Genesis35:18 Ngelo xesha ke uRakeli wayeseleqhawuka. Uthe kanye xa uphumayo umphefumlo wathi igama laloo mntwana nguBhenoni. Uyise yena wathi nguBhenjamin. 
Genesis35:19 Waza ke uRakeli wafa, wangcwatywa ecaleni kwendlela eya e-Efrata, ekuthiwa yiBhetelehem." 
Genesis35:20 Wemisa ilitye lesikhumbuzo apho uYakobi. Liselapho; nangoku lisaqondisa ingcwaba likaRakeli. 
Genesis35:21 Wahambela mganyana uYakobi, wafika wemisa malunga neMigdali-edere." 
Genesis35:22 Ngethuba wayesekuloo mmandla uSirayeli, uRubhen walala noBhiliya, elinye lamaqadi abafazi bakayise uSirayeli. Wayiva loo nto uSirayeli. UYakobi wayenoonyana abalishumi elinambini." 
Genesis35:23 Oonyana abazalwa nguLeya yayinguRubhen, izibulo likaYakobi, noSimon, noLevi, noJuda; uIsakare noZebhulon." 
Genesis35:24 Oonyana abazalwa nguRakeli yayinguJosefu noBhenjamin. 
Genesis35:25 Oonyana bempelesi kaRakeli uBhiliya yayinguDan noNafetali. 
Genesis35:26 Oonyana bempelesi kaLeya uZilipha yayinguGadi noAshere. Aba nyana bazalelwa ePadan-aram. 
Genesis35:27 UYakobi waya kuyise eMamre kufuphi neHebron, ekwakusithiwa yiKiriyati-arbha, apho babemi khona ooAbraham noIsake." 
Genesis35:28 UIsake uhleli iminyaka elikhulu linamashumi asibhozo. 
Genesis35:29 Ubhubhe seleyinkothovu yexhego, wangcwatywa ngoonyana bakhe uEsawu noYakobi." 
Genesis36:1 Nanga amagqabantshintshi ngoEsawu okwanguEdom. 
Genesis36:2 UEsawu watshata iintombi zaseKanana. Wathatha uAda, intombi kaElon umHiti, noHolibhama intombi ka-Ana unyana kaZibheyon, umHivi," 
Genesis36:3 kunye noBhasemati, intombi kaIshmayeli, engudade boNebhayoti." 
Genesis36:4 UAda wazala uElifazi, uBhasemati wazala uRuweli," 
Genesis36:5 waza uHolibhama wazala uJewushe noJalam kunye noKora. Bonke aba nyana bakaEsawu bazalelwa eKanana. 
Genesis36:6 UEsawu wathatha abafazi bakhe, noonyana bakhe, iintombi zakhe, nabo bonke abantu bakhe, kunye nemfuyo yakhe, nayo yonke impahla awayifumana kwilizwe laseKanana, wemka wamshiya umntakwabo uYakobi." 
Genesis36:7 Unobangela wokuba emke kukuba lo mhlaba wawungasabaneli; imfuyo yabo yayiselininzi kakhulu. 
Genesis36:8 UEsawu ke waya kuma kweleentaba e-Edom. 
Genesis36:9 Nantsi inzala kaEsawu, ukhoko wamaEdom:" 
Genesis36:10 Umka-Esawu, uAda, wazala unyana uElifazi. UElifazi yena wazala uTeman, no-Omare, uZefo, uGatam, noKenazi. Omnye umfazi kaElifazi, uTimna, wazala uAmaleki. UBhasemati, umka-Esawu, yena wazala uRuweli. Yena uRuweli wazala uNahati, uZera, uShama, kunye noMiza." 
Genesis36:11  
Genesis36:12  
Genesis36:13  
Genesis36:14 Umka-Esawu onguHolibhama intombi ka-Ana lo ungunyana kaZibheyon, yena wazala uJewushe, uJalam, noKora." 
Genesis36:15 Nazi ke izizwe ezingumlibo kaEsawu: UElifazi izibulo likaEsawu, nguyise-mkhulu wezi zizwe zilandelayo: amaTema, amaOmare, amaZefo, amaKenazi," 
Genesis36:16 amaKora, amaGatam, nama-Amaleki. Bonke aba ngabomlibo ka-Ada umka-Esawu." 
Genesis36:17 URuweli, unyana kaEsawu, yena nguyise-mkhulu wezi zizwe: amaNahati, amaZera, amaShama, namaMiza. Bonke aba ngabomlibo kaBhasemati umka-Esawu." 
Genesis36:18 Ezi zizwe zilandelayo zingumlibo kaEsawu ngoHolibhama intombi ka-Ana: amaJewushe, amaJalam, namaKora." 
Genesis36:19 Zonke ezi zizwe yinzala kaEsawu. 
Genesis36:20 Abemi bemveli belase-Edom yayizizizwe ezimlibo ulandwa ngaba bazukulwana bakaSeyire umHori: uLotan, uShobhali, uZibheyon, uAna, uDishon, uEzere, noDishan." 
Genesis36:21  
Genesis36:22 ULotan wayengukhoko wamaHori namaHeman. ULotan wayenodade wabo uTimna. 
Genesis36:23 UShobhali wayengukhoko wama-Alvani, namaManahati, amaEbhali, amaShefo, namaOnam." 
Genesis36:24 UZibheyon wazala uAya noAna. Ngulo Ana lo wabhaqa imithombo yamanzi ashushu entlango esalusa iidonki zikayise. 
Genesis36:25 UAna wazala uDishon, lo ungukhokho wamaHemdan, amaEshbhan, amaItran, namaKeran. UAna wayekwanentombi egama linguHolibhama." 
Genesis36:26  
Genesis36:27 UEzere wayengukhokho wamaBhilehan, amaZavan, nama-Akane." 
Genesis36:28 UDishan yena ungukhokho wamaUzi nama-Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Nazi izizwe zamaHori ezimi e-Edom: ngamaLotan, amaShobhali, amaZibheyon, ama-Ana, amaDishon, amaEzere, namaDishan." 
Genesis36:30  
Genesis36:31 Kwangaphambi kokuba zibekho iikumkani kwaSirayeli, ezi zilandelayo yayiziikumkani ezalawula kwaEdom, ngokulandelelana kwazo: uBhela unyana kaBhehore waseDinabha; uJobhabhi unyana kaZera waseBhozera; uHusham wakummandla wakwaTeman; uHadadi unyana kaBhedadi waseHaviti, owawachitha edabini amaMidiyan kwelamaMowabhi; uSamla waseMasereka; uShawule waseRehobhoti phezu komlambo iEfrati; uBhali-hanani unyana ka-Akibho; uHadadi wasePawu omkakhe wayenguMetabheli intombi kaMatredi nomzukulwana kaMezabhi." 
Genesis36:31 Kwangaphambi kokuba zibekho iikumkani kwaSirayeli, ezi zilandelayo yayiziikumkani ezalawula kwaEdom, ngokulandelelana kwazo: uBhela unyana kaBhehore waseDinabha; uJobhabhi unyana kaZera waseBhozera; uHusham wakummandla wakwaTeman; uHadadi unyana kaBhedadi waseHaviti, owawachitha edabini amaMidiyan kwelamaMowabhi; uSamla waseMasereka; uShawule waseRehobhoti phezu komlambo iEfrati; uBhali-hanani unyana ka-Akibho; uHadadi wasePawu omkakhe wayenguMetabheli intombi kaMatredi nomzukulwana kaMezabhi." 
Genesis36:32 UEsawu wayengukhokho wezi zizwe zamaEdom: amaTimna, ama-Aleva, amaYetete, amaHolibhama, amaEla, amaPinon, amaKenazi, amaTeman, amaMibhezare, amaMagediyeli, namaIram. Ummandla wesizwe ngasinye wathiywa ngegama lentloko yeso sizwe." 
Genesis37:1 UYakobi wayehlala eKanana, kwelo lizwe wayemi kulo uyise ngaphambili." 
Genesis37:2 Nanga amagqabantshintshi ngoYakobi. Akuba yinkwenkwe eneshumi linesixhenxe leminyaka ubudala, uJosefu wayedla ngokuhamba nabakhuluwa bakhe abangoonyana bakaBhiliya noZilipha, amaqadi kayise, baye kwalusa impahla. Wayedla ngokubaxela kuyise ngezinto ezingekho mgaqweni ababezenza." 
Genesis37:3 USirayeli wayemthanda ngaphezu kwabo bonke abantakwabo uJosefu, kuba yena wavela selaluphele uSirayeli. Wamenzela ingubo embeje-mbeje." 
Genesis37:4 Bathi abantakwabo bakuphawula ukuba uyise umthanda ukugqitha bona uJosefu, bamthiya kangangokude bangakwazi nokuthetha kakuhle naye." 
Genesis37:5 Ngabusuku buthile uJosefu waba nephupha, athe akulilawula kubakhuluwa bakhe, bamthiya ngakumbi." 
Genesis37:6 Wathi kubo: “Khanive ndinixelele iphupha lam. 
Genesis37:7 Ndiphuphe sisemasimini, sibopha izithungu zengqolowa. Suka esam isithungu sema nkqo, zaza ezenu zeza kusingqonga, zakhahlela kuso.”" 
Genesis37:8 Bathe abakhuluwa bakhe: “Ngaba uba uza kuba yikumkani, size thina silawulwe nguwe?” Loo nto yelo phupha yamenza wanetyheneba kubo, nangenxa yeentetho zakhe." 
Genesis37:9 Uphinde wanelinye iphupha uJosefu, wabuya wabalawulela abantakwabo, esithi: “Kweli iphupha ndibone ilanga, nenyanga, neenkwenkwezi ezilishumi elinanye, zikhahlela kum.”" 
Genesis37:10 Ulilawule nakuyise eli phupha. Wamngxolisa uyise, esithi: “Suk' apha, phupha lini eli athi unyoko nabantakwenu kunye nam sikhahlele wena!”" 
Genesis37:11 Abakhuluwa bakaJosefu bammonela, kodwa yena uyise wamana elijika-jika engqondweni eli phupha." 
Genesis37:12 Ngamini ithile abakhuluwa bakaJosefu babeseShekem besalusa impahla," 
Genesis37:13 wathi uSirayeli kuJosefu: “Ndifuna ukukuthuma kubantakwenu eShekem apho bayalusela khona impahla.” Uthe uJosefu: “Kulungile, tata.”" 
Genesis37:14 Uthe uYakobi: “Khawuye kukhangela ukuba abantakwenu basahleli kakuhle na, nokuba akukho monakalo ukhoyo na empahleni, ubuye uze kundazisa.” Wanduluka ke uJosefu kuloo ntili yeHebron, ethunywe eShekem. Wahamba waya kufika eShekem uJosefu." 
Genesis37:15 Kuthe esabhadula kwelo zwe, kwavela ndoda ithile, yambuza yathi: “Ufuna ntoni?”" 
Genesis37:16 “Ndifuna abantakwethu abalusa impahla; ungandixelela apho bakhoyo?” utshilo uJosefu. 
Genesis37:17 “Sebemkile,” itshilo loo ndoda. “Ndibavele besithi baza kuya eDotan.” Wenjenjeya ke uJosefu ukulandela abantakwabo, wada waya kugaleleka eDotan, apho wafika bekhona." 
Genesis37:18 Bambona esekude, waza wathi efika kubo baba sebenze iyelenqe lokumbulala." 
Genesis37:19 Bathi bakumbona: “Nanku esiza laa mphuphi. 
Genesis37:20 Masimbulale, size isidumbu sakhe sisifake kwelinye lala maqula atshileyo, sithi uqwengwe ngamarhamncwa, sibone ke ukuba aya kuthini na loo maphupha akhe.”" 
Genesis37:21 URubhen wabavela kuloo nto, wafuna ukumsindisa uJosefu, wathi: “Hayini, madoda," 
Genesis37:22 masingambulali siphalaze igazi lomntakwethu. Makaphoswe nje kweli qula lilapha entlango, kodwa ningamenzakalisi.” Ethetha loo nto nje wayeceba ukumhlangula kubo, aze amgoduse amse kuyise." 
Genesis37:23 Akufika kubantakwabo uJosefu, bamkhulula loo ngubo imbeje-mbeje," 
Genesis37:24 baza bamthatha bamphosa equleni elingenamanzi. 
Genesis37:25 Kuthe ke besatya, kwee gqi igqiza lamaIshmayeli, evela eGiliyadi, esinga eJiputa. Ayeqhuba iinkamela ezithwele intlaka yesiqhumiso, namafutha anamakha, nentlaka yokuqhola." 
Genesis37:26 UJuda wabhekisa kubantakwabo, wathi: “Iza kusenzela ntoni into yokubulala umntakwethu, khona sesibufihlile obo bugwinta?" 
Genesis37:27 Masithengise ngaye kula maIshmayeli. Ngaloo ndlela asiyi kumenzakalisa. Andithi gxebe ligazi lethu eliya?” Bavumelana naye abanye. 
Genesis37:28 Kwathi xa kwakudlula iqela labarhwebi bamaMidiyan, bamkhupha uJosefu kuloo mhadi, bamthengisa ngamashumi amabini eesiliva kumaIshmayeli, awamthathayo amsa eJiputa." 
Genesis37:29 Akuya kuvela kwelo qula uRubhen, wafika engekho uJosefu, wasuka wakrazula izambatho zakhe ngenxa yosizi awayenalo." 
Genesis37:30 Wabuyela kubaninawa bakhe, wathi: “Madoda, laa nkwenkwe ayikho phaya; ndiza kuyithini le nto?”" 
Genesis37:31 Banqumla ibhokhwe, baza ingubo kaJosefu bayityikila ngelo gazi layo." 
Genesis37:32 Bayithatha loo ngubo, bayisa kuyise, bafika bathi: “Sichole le nto; khawufanise ukuba ngaba asiyiyo eyonyana wakho na?”" 
Genesis37:33 UYakobi wayifanisa kwangoko, wathi: “Yingubo yomntwanam le! Kwowu, uqwengwe ngamarhamncwa! Hayi, amqwenga-qwengile umntwanam uJosefu!”" 
Genesis37:34 Wazikrazula izambatho zakhe uYakobi, elusizi; wanxiba ezamarhonya, ezila. Wamzilela ithuba elide unyana wakhe." 
Genesis37:35 Beza kumthuthuzela bonke oonyana neentombi zakhe, kodwa wala, akavuma ukuthuthuzeleka. Uthe kubo: “Ndiya kude ndife ndisamzilele umntwana wam.” Wazila rhoqo ke, ezilela unyana wakhe uJosefu." 
Genesis37:36 Ngelo xesha amaMidiyan ayeselemthengisile uJosefu eJiputa kuPotifare, elinye lamagosa okumkani waseJiputa, elaliyinduna yabalindi bebhotwe lakomkhulu." 
Genesis38:1 Ngelo xesha ke uJuda wabashiya abantakwabo, waya kuhlala nomfo ogama linguHira, owayehlala kwidolophu iAdulam." 
Genesis38:2 UJuda wabona apho intombi yomKanana ogama linguShuwa. Wayithatha yaba ngumkakhe," 
Genesis38:3 yazala inkwenkwe ekwathiwa nguEre igama layo. 
Genesis38:4 Uphinde wazala enye inkwenkwe, kwathiwa igama layo nguOnan." 
Genesis38:5 Uzele enye inkwenkwe kwakhona, yona kwathiwa nguShela. Wayehlala eKezibhi uJuda ukuzalwa kwale nkwenkwe." 
Genesis38:6 UJuda wamfunela umfazi uEre unyana wakhe omkhulu. Igama lakhe lalinguTamare. 
Genesis38:7 UEre wayeziphethe kakubi, loo nto yabangela ukuba *uNdikhoyo abunqamle ubomi bakhe." 
Genesis38:8 UJuda uthe uOnan, umninawa kaEre, makadibane nomka-mkhuluwa wakhe, khon' ukuze azalele umkhuluwa wakhe abantwana ngokwesiko." 
Genesis38:9 UOnan, esazi ukuba wayengazi kuzizalela abo bantwana, wathi rhoqo ukumane eyichithela phantsi imbewu yakhe ngalo lonke ixesha adibana noTamare, khon' ukuze angathathi, angamzaleli bantwana umkhuluwa wakhe." 
Genesis38:10 Loo nto wayithiya kakhulu uNdikhoyo, waza wabunqamla ubomi bukaOnan." 
Genesis38:11 Uthe ke uJuda kumolokazana wakhe uTamare makakhe agoduke, aye kuhlala kowabo engumhlolokazi, de kukhule uShela unyana omncinci. Watsho kuba esoyika hleze afe noShela kwanjengabakhuluwa bakhe. Wagoduka ke uTamare." 
Genesis38:12 Emva kwethuba umka-Juda intombi kaShuwa wabhubha. Akuba ephumile ehlathini uJuda, wahamba nogxa wakhe uHira waseAdulam, baya eTimna, apho kwakuchetywa khona iigusha zakhe." 
Genesis38:13 Kwabakho mntu uthile uhlebela uTamare ukuba uyisezala wayesiya kucheba iigusha zakhe eTimna. 
Genesis38:14 UTamare wazikhulula iimpahla zokuzila awayezinxibile, wafihla nobuso bakhe ngesigqubuthelo, waza wahlala phantsi ngasesangweni lase-Enayim, eyayiyidolophu esendleleni eya eTimna. Wayesazi ukuba uShela unyana omncinci kaJuda wayeselekhulile, kodwa yena Tamare wayengekanikezelwa kuye." 
Genesis38:15 Akumbona uTamare, uJuda waba lihenyukazi nje, kuba wayebufihlile ubuso bakhe." 
Genesis38:16 Wawela indlela, waya kuye, wafika wathi: “Khawutsho, ufuna ndikunike ntoni?” Esitsho nje wayengaqondi ukuba ubhekisa kumolokazana wakhe. UTamare ke waphendula wathi: “Yintoni ongandinika yona wena?”" 
Genesis38:17 Uthe uJuda: “Ndakuthumela itakane lebhokhwe.” UTamare uthe: “Kulungile ukuba undinika isibambiso ndisigcine kude kufike elo takane.” 
Genesis38:18 “Ndikunike sibambiso sini?” ubuze watsho uJuda. Uthe uTamare: “Ndinike eso siphawulo sakho kunye nomtya waso, naloo msimelelo wakho.” Wamnika ke uJuda. Balala, wathatha uTamare." 
Genesis38:19 Wagoduka, wafika wothula eso sigqubuthelo wayesithwele, wanxiba impahla yakhe yokuzila." 
Genesis38:20 UJuda wathumela uHira ugxa wakhe ukuba ase elo takane, aze athathe ezo zinto wayebambise ngazo kuloo mfazi. Kodwa akazange amfumane loo mfazi uHira." 
Genesis38:21 Wabuza kubafo abathile base-Enayim wathi: “Liye phi elaa henyukazi laliba secaleni kwendlela?” Bathi ke bona: “Akuzange kubekho henyukazi apha.” 
Genesis38:22 Wabuyela kuJuda, wathi: “Andimfumananga; yaye namadoda alapho athi akuzange kubekho henyukazi apho.”" 
Genesis38:23 Wathi uJuda: “Akukho nto; masezihlala kuye ezo zinto zam. Nto nje andifuni kuba yintlekisa ebantwini. Kambe mna ndilingile ukuhlawula, kodwa lona ihenyukazi alifumaneki.”" 
Genesis38:24 Emva kweenyanga ezintathu waxelelwa uJuda kwathiwa: “UTamare umolokazana wakho ubeziphethe kakubi, ngoku ke umithi.” UJuda wathi: “Mkhupheleni ngaphandle, atshiswe ngomlilo ade afe.”" 
Genesis38:25 Kuthe xa bamqhubayo, wathumela abantu kuyisezala ukuba bamxelele bathi: “UTamare uthi: ‘Ndimithiswe ngulo mntu ezizezakhe ezi zinto: isiphawulo nomtya waso, nomsimelelo. Khawuzijongisise, ukhangele ukuba ngaba zezikabani na.’ ”" 
Genesis38:26 UJuda wazazi kwangoko, wathi: “Akanatyala. Ndim ongahambanga ngesiko. Bendimelwe kukumnikezela kunyana wam uShela.” Waba uqale wagqibelisa uJuda ukulala noTamare." 
Genesis38:27 Kuthe xa kusondela ilixa lokubeleka, kwabonakala ukuba wayeza kuzala amawele." 
Genesis38:28 Xa alunywayo elinye iwele lavelisa isandla, waza umfazi owayembelekisa wasibamba, wasibopha ngomsonto obomvu eso sandla, wathi: “Lo uvele tanci.”" 
Genesis38:29 Kodwa sabuya satshona isandla, kwaza kwavela elinye iwele kuqala. Wathi ke loo mfazi: “Wenjenje kanti ukuzivulela indlela!” Kwathiwa ke igama lalo nguPerezi." 
Genesis38:30 Ke yena umntakwabo wavela enalaa msonto ubomvu, kwathiwa yena nguZera." 
Genesis39:1 Ke kaloku amaIshmayeli aya naye eJiputa uJosefu, afika amthengisa kuPotifare, owayengomnye wamaphakathi okumkani waseJiputa, owayenguyena nduna yabalindi basebhotwe." 
Genesis39:2 *UNdikhoyo waba naye uJosefu, wamphumeza kwinto yonke. Wayehlala endlwini yenkosi yakhe yomJiputa," 
Genesis39:3 eyaqondayo ukuba uJosefu wayephantsi kogcino lukaNdikhoyo, yaye yayinesandla sikaNdikhoyo yonke into ayenzayo." 
Genesis39:4 Wakholiseka nguJosefu uPotifare, wamenza intonga yakhe yasekhosi. Ngoko ke wamenza induna yomzi wakhe nomlawuli wempahla yakhe yonke." 
Genesis39:5 Ukususela ngoko uNdikhoyo wawuthamsanqelisa umzi waloo mJiputa, kunye nemfuyo yakhe, namasimi akhe, nayo yonke into awayenayo, ngenxa kaJosefu." 
Genesis39:6 Yonke into yakhe ke uPotifare wayinikela elulawulweni lukaJosefu, akwabikho nto yimbi azikhathaza ngayo ngaphandle nje kokuthatha icephe atye. UJosefu wayemile kakuhle, eyinzwana yomfana." 
Genesis39:7 Kwakuba mzuzu umka-Potifare wafikelwa ngumnqweno ngoJosefu, wazicelela isondo kuye." 
Genesis39:8 UJosefu wala, esithi: “Inkosi yam ijonge kum, mna Josefu, ngento yonke yayo; ayisazikhathazi nganto, kuba ithembe mna." 
Genesis39:9 Yaye indinike lonke igunya emzini wayo; nguwe kuphela endingenagunya kuye. Ke ndingathini mna ukwenza into embi kangako, ndimone uThixo?”" 
Genesis39:10 Naxa wazingayo lo mfazi ukucela isondo kuJosefu mihla le, uJosefu yena wala ukuyenza loo nto." 
Genesis39:11 Kwathi ngenye imini, uJosefu engene endlwini kaPotifare, eye kusebenza, wafika kungekho nasinye isicaka." 
Genesis39:12 Umka-Potifare wambamba, emtsala ngengubo, wathi: “Yiza kaloku!” Kodwa waphuncula uJosefu, wabalekela ngaphandle, washiya loo ngubo yakhe eyiphethe ngesandla loo mfazi." 
Genesis39:13 Uthe loo mfazi akuphawula ukuba uJosefu uyishiyile ingubo yakhe, wabalekela ngaphandle," 
Genesis39:14 wabiza izicaka zakhe, wazibonisa loo ngubo. Watsho esithi: “Laa mHebhere ungeniswe ngumyeni wam emzini wam uyasihlazisa, kuba ungene egumbini lam efuna ukundidlwengula. Kodwa mna ndizincede ngokutsho esikrakra esi isikhalo." 
Genesis39:15 Wothuswe seso sikhalo, wabalekela ngaphandle, eshiya loo ngubo yakhe ngakum.”" 
Genesis39:16 Wayigcina ke loo ngubo kaJosefu kwada kwabuya inkosi yakhe. 
Genesis39:17 Ithe yakufika nayo wayenzela eli bali: “Laa mHebhere umngenise ekhaya apha ungene egumbini lam, efun' ukundihlazisa." 
Genesis39:18 Ndizincede ngokutsho esikrakra sona isikhalo, ukuze abalekele ngaphandle. Washiya nale ngubo yakhe ngakum.”" 
Genesis39:19 Waqumba kakhulu uPotifare akuyiva loo nto ithethwa ngumkakhe," 
Genesis39:20 wathi uJosefu makabanjwe, avalelwe entolongweni ekwakuvalelwa kuyo amabanjwa kakumkani. Wahlala apho." 
Genesis39:21 Kodwa nalapho uNdikhoyo waba ngakuJosefu, wamthamsanqelisa, watsho wathandwa ngujela." 
Genesis39:22 Ujela wamnyusela uJosefu, wangumphathi wamanye amabanjwa. Yonke into eyenziwa entolongweni yajonga yena." 
Genesis39:23 UNdikhoyo wamphumeza uJosefu kangangokude ujela angabi sajongana nemisebenzi eyayijongwe nguJosefu, kuba uNdikhoyo wayemthamsanqelisa." 
Genesis40:1 Emva kwexesha injoli kakumkani waseJiputa, kunye nombhaki oyintloko, bayona inkosi yabo ukumkani." 
Genesis40:2 Wacaphuka ukumkani zizenzo zala madoda," 
Genesis40:3 wawafaka ke entolongweni kumzi wenduna yabalindi, apho kwakugcinwe khona uJosefu." 
Genesis40:4 Bahlala ke entolongweni apho, yaza induna yenza uJosefu umququzeleli wabo." 
Genesis40:5 Ngabusuku buthile bakuba besentolongweni ithutyana, injoli yaba nephupha, kwanaye nombhaki waba nelakhe iphupha. Amaphupha abo ayethetha izinto ngezinto." 
Genesis40:6 Akufika kubo uJosefu ngentsasa, wababona bematshekile." 
Genesis40:7 Ubuze wathi: “Kutheni ingathi nikhathazekile nje namhlanje?” 
Genesis40:8 Bathe bona: “Sibe namaphupha phezolo, yaye akukho namnye umntu apha okwaziyo ukuwachaza into ayithethayo.” “NguThixo otyhila inkcazelo yamaphupha,” utshilo uJosefu. Watsho esithi: “Ndilawuleleni amaphupha enu.”" 
Genesis40:9 Kuqale injoli, yathi: “Mna ndiphuphe kukho umdiliya ngaphambi kwam," 
Genesis40:10 unamasebe amathathu. Kuthe nje kuvele amagqabi, kwantshula iintyatyambo, neediliya zavuthwa." 
Genesis40:11 Bendiphethe indebe kakumkani, ndazikha iidiliya ezo, ndazikhamela endebeni, ndazinika ukumkani.”" 
Genesis40:12 Uthe uJosefu: “Nantsi into ethethwa leli phupha lakho: Amasebe amathathu ziintsuku ezintathu. 
Genesis40:13 Ngeentsuku ezintathu ukumkani uza kukukhulula, akuxolele, akubuyisele emsebenzini wakho. Uza kubuya ube yinjoli yendebe yakhe njengoko ubuyiyo ngaphambili." 
Genesis40:14 Uzuncede ke kodwa, ungandilibali xa izinto sezikulungele, uncede uthethe ngam kukumkani, ndikhululwe kule ntolongo." 
Genesis40:15 Ikakade mna ndebiwa kwilizwe lamaHebhere, ukanti nalapha eJiputa akukho nto ndiyenzileyo ibinokundingenisa entolongweni.”" 
Genesis40:16 Uthe naye umbhaki wezonka, akubona ukuba into iphupha lenjoli eliyithethayo iyanandipheka, naye walilawula kuJosefu iphupha lakhe, esithi: “Mna, kwelam iphupha bendithwele ngentloko iibhaskiti ezintathu." 
Genesis40:17 Kwephezulu ibhaskiti bekukho zonke iindidi zokutya kukakumkani okwenziwa ngumbhaki, kwafika iintaka zakuxhola.”" 
Genesis40:18 UJosefu uthe: “Nantsi into ethethwa liphupha lakho: Iibhaskiti ezintathu zithetha iintsuku ezintathu. 
Genesis40:19 Ukumkani uza kukukhulula ngeentsuku ezintathu, kodwa uza kunqunyulwa intloko, uze uxhonywe esibondeni, zize iintaka zikuxhole.”" 
Genesis40:20 Ngomhla wokukhunjulwa kokuzalwa kukakumkani, ngemva kweentsuku ezintathu ukususela koku, ukumkani wenzela iindedeba zasebhotwe itheko. Wayikhulula injoli nombhaki, beziswa phambi kwezo ndedeba." 
Genesis40:21 Injoli yabuyiselwa kumsebenzi wayo ebikade iwenza," 
Genesis40:22 kodwa yena umbhaki wanqunyulwa intloko. Kwaba njengokutsho kukaJosefu. 
Genesis40:23 Kodwa injoli yamlibala kwaphela uJosefu. 
Genesis41:1 Kwadlula iminyaka yamibini, ukumkani waseJiputa waphupha emi ngakumlambo iNayile," 
Genesis41:2 apho kwathi gqi iimazi zeenkomo ezityebileyo ezisixhenxe, ziphuma emlanjeni, zigramza apho phezu komlambo." 
Genesis41:3 Kuthe thu ezinye iimazi ezinqinileyo, ezikwasisixhenxe. Zafika zema ngakwezo zaziphezu komlambo." 
Genesis41:4 Zaza ezo mazi zinqinileyo zazithi bimbilili ezo zityebileyo. Kwesi sithuba waphaphama ukumkani. 
Genesis41:5 Uphinde walala, wabuya waphupha kwakhona. Ubone izikhwebu ezisixhenxe zengqolowa, zizihle, zivuthiwe, zikhula kwisikhondo esinye." 
Genesis41:6 Kusuke kwantshula ezinye izikhwebu zengqolowa. Ezo zazintshwenyile, zimbatshiswe lulophu lwasempumalanga." 
Genesis41:7 Ezo zikhwebu zazintshwenyile zazithi bimbilili eziya zihle izikhwebu. Uphaphamile ukumkani, waza waziqonda ukuba ubephupha." 
Genesis41:8 Kwasa ekhathazekile yile nto, waza wathi makubizwe zonke izanuse noosiyazi baseJiputa. Wabalawulela amaphupha akhe, kodwa bonke batsho phantsi, ababi nako ukuwachaza." 
Genesis41:9 Kuvele injoli, yathi kukumkani: “Mandiyivume namhla into yokuba ndenze impazamo." 
Genesis41:10 Ngokuya wawukhathazekile ngenxa yam nombhaki, wasivalela entolongweni emzini womphathi-balindi bebhotwe," 
Genesis41:11 kwathi ngabusuku buthile saphupha. Elowo waba nelakhe iphupha, engathethi nto inye loo maphupha." 
Genesis41:12 Apho kwakukho umfana womHebhere, evalelwe nathi, engumququzeleli womphathi-balindi. Sathi sakumlawulela wasichazela sobabini amaphupha ethu." 
Genesis41:13 Kwenzeka kanye njengoko wayetshilo: mna ndabuyiselwa emsebenzini wam, waxhonywa yena umbhaki.”" 
Genesis41:14 Ukumkani wathi makabizwe uJosefu, waza ngoko nangoko wakhululwa entolongweni. Akuba etshevile, wanxiba kakuhle, wasiwa kukumkani." 
Genesis41:15 Waza wathi ukumkani kuJosefu: “Ndinephupha ekungekho bani ube nako ukulichaza. Ke ndivile ukuba uyakwazi ukuchaza amaphupha.” 
Genesis41:16 UJosefu uphendule ngelithi: “Mhlekazi, andikwazi kuchaza maphupha, koko nguThixo oya kuchazela ukumkani iphupha lakhe.”" 
Genesis41:17 Ulilawule ke iphupha lakhe ukumkani wenjenje: “Ndiphuphe ndimi phezu komlambo iNayile. 
Genesis41:18 Ndabona kuvela iimazi zeenkomo ezisixhenxe ezityebileyo emlanjeni apho, zigramza." 
Genesis41:19 Kuvele esinye isixhenxe seemazi ezinqinileyo. Zaziyeyona migqutsuba ndakha ndayibona kwelaseJiputa. 
Genesis41:20 Loo migqutsuba ke yazithi bimbilili ezo mazi zityebileyo. 
Genesis41:21 Kambe ke ayikhange ibonakale loo nto, kuba zasala ziyiloo migqutsuba kwanjengangaphambili. Ndaphaphama ke." 
Genesis41:22 Emva koko ke ndibuye ndaphupha ndibona izikhwebu ezisixhenxe ezihle zengqolowa, zintshula sikhondweni sinye." 
Genesis41:23 Kuphinde kwantshula nezinye ezisixhenxe izikhwebu zizibi ngathi zitshazwe lulophu lwasempumalanga," 
Genesis41:24 zazithi ginyi-ginyi eziya zikhwebu zihle. Ndiwalawule la maphupha kwizanuse zalapha, kodwa akwabikho namnye unokundichazela.”" 
Genesis41:25 Uthe ukuphendula uJosefu: “Omabini la maphupha athetha into enye, mhlekazi. UThixo ebekuxelela into aza kuyenza." 
Genesis41:26 Iimazi ezityebileyo ezisixhenxe yiminyaka esixhenxe, ukanti nezikhwebu ezihle ezisixhenxe zikwayiminyaka esixhenxe. Athetha into enye omabini la maphupha." 
Genesis41:27 Zona iimazi ezisixhenxe ezinqinileyo, ezivele mva, kwakunye nezikhwebu ezisixhenxe ezibi, ezitshaziswe lulophu lwasempumalanga, yiminyaka esixhenxe yendlala." 
Genesis41:28 Kunjengokuba besenditshilo, mhlekazi, uThixo ubekuxelela into aza kuyenza." 
Genesis41:29 Kuza kubakho iminyaka esixhenxe yendyebo kulo lonke elaseJiputa," 
Genesis41:30 emva koko kubekho iminyaka esixhenxe yendlala; yaye yonke loo minyaka yendyebo iya kuba ngathi ayizange yabakho ngenxa yendlala eya kuligqiba lonke ilizwe. 
Genesis41:31 Koba ngathi akuzange kubekho ntlutha, kuba indlala eyolandela yoba yeyoyikekayo." 
Genesis41:32 Ukuphinda-phindwa kwephupha lakho kuthetha ukuthi uThixo selesenzile isigqibo, yaye uselembovu ukuyenza le nto." 
Genesis41:33 “Ngoko ke, mhlekazi, khetha indoda elumkileyo, enamava, uyenze umphathiswa kweli lizwe." 
Genesis41:34 Kufuneka utyumbe nabanye abaphathi abaza kugcina isihlanu sesivuno kule minyaka isixhenxe yendyebo. 
Genesis41:35 Kufuneka bakuqokelele ukutya kule minyaka izayo yendyebo, babe negunya lokuvula oovimba ezixekweni, kugcinwe apho." 
Genesis41:36 Kukutya okugciniweyo kaloku okuya kondla abantu kwiminyaka yendlala eya kulandela kweli laseJiputa. Ngale ndlela ke abasayi kulamba abantu.” 
Genesis41:37 Ukumkani namaphakathi akhe balivuma eli cebo likaJosefu," 
Genesis41:38 watsho esithi kubo: “Ngaba singafumana ndoda yimbi ngaphandle koJosefu, umfo owambathiswe ngoMoya kaThixo?”" 
Genesis41:39 Ubhekise kuJosefu ke ukumkani, wathi: “Nguwe oyiboniswe nguThixo le nto yonke. Kucacile ke ukuba asinakubuya sifumane mntu wumbi onobulumko namava, ingenguwe." 
Genesis41:40 Ndiza kwenza wena ube ngumphathiswa elizweni lam. Bonke abantu bam baya kuthobela wena. Igunya lakho liya kuba ngaphantsi kwelam qha. 
Genesis41:41 Ngoko ke ndithi ungumphathiswa kulo lonke elaseJiputa.” 
Genesis41:42 Watsho ukumkani wakhulula emnweni wakhe umsesane owawukrwelwe uphawu lokumkani, wawufaka emnweni kaJosefu. Wamthi wambu ngomnweba owenziwe ngelinen entle, watsho emgaxela entanyeni ngesidanga esenziwe ngegolide." 
Genesis41:43 Wamnika enye yeenqwelo zakhe ukuba ajikeleze ngayo njengesekela likakumkani. Wamnika namaphakathi okuhamba emgabulela izigcawu endleleni esithi: “Shenxani nikhahlele!” Wamiselwa ke uJosefu, waba ngumphathiswa waseJiputa." 
Genesis41:44 Wathi ukumkani kuye: “Ukumkani ndim, ndithi ke akukho bani kulo lonke elaseJiputa oya kwenza nto engakhululelwanga nguwe.”" 
Genesis41:45 Watsho ke ethiya uJosefu igama abizwa ngalo eJiputa elinguZafenati-paneya, wamzekela nomfazi, uAsenati intombi kaPotifare umbingeleli waseOni. Ukuqala kwakhe ukungena kwakumkani waseJiputa wayemashumi mathathu ubudala uJosefu. Wemka ebhotwe, walijikeleza lonke elaseJiputa." 
Genesis41:46  
Genesis41:47 Ngale minyaka isixhenxe yendyebo saba sikhulu kakhulu isivuno. 
Genesis41:48 Wasivalela koovimba isivuno uJosefu kuzo zonke iidolophu. Kwidolophu nganye wayeqokelela ukutya okuvunwe kumasimi alapho. 
Genesis41:49 Ingqolowa yayiyintaphane kangangokuba wada wayeka ukuyiveyisha uJosefu. Yayingangentlabathi ukuba ninzi kwayo. 
Genesis41:50 UAsenati intombi kaPotifera, umbingeleli waseOni, wazalela uJosefu oonyana ababini ngaphambi kwendlala." 
Genesis41:51 Unyana olizibulo wathi igama lakhe nguManase, kuba esithi: “UThixo undiphumzile ndatsho ndazilibala iinkxwaleko zam, andawakhumbula namawethu.”" 
Genesis41:52 Owesibini unyana wathi nguEfrayim, kuba esithi: “UThixo undiphe inzala kwilizwe endihlupheke kulo.”" 
Genesis41:53 Yaphela ke yona iminyaka yendyebo eJiputa," 
Genesis41:54 yagaleleka iminyaka yendlala, kanye njengoko wayetshilo uJosefu. Kwalanjwa kuwo onke amanye amazwe, kodwa kulo lonke elaseJiputa kwakukho intlutha." 
Genesis41:55 Athe akulamba amaJiputa, aya kuzicelela ukutya kukumkani. Wathi ke yena makaye kuJosefu, aze enze loo nto awayalela yona." 
Genesis41:56 Yakhula indlala, yaligqiba lonke elaseJiputa. Wabavula ke oovimba uJosefu, wawathengisela ingqolowa amaJiputa." 
Genesis41:57 Babevela ngeenkalo zonke abantu elizweni, beze kuthenga ingqolowa kuJosefu, kuba indlala yayiligqugqisile lonke." 
Genesis42:1 UYakobi akuva ukuba iyafumaneka ingqolowa eJiputa, uthe koonyana bakhe: “Kutheni ninyabile nje?" 
Genesis42:2 Ndivile mna ukuba iyafumaneka eJiputa ingqolowa. Yiyani kuyithenga khona, singafi yindlala.”" 
Genesis42:3 Banduluka ke abakhuluwa bakaJosefu abalishumi ukuya kuthenga ingqolowa eJiputa. 
Genesis42:4 Kodwa uYakobi akazange amthume kunye nabo uBhenjamin umninawa kaJosefu, kuba esoyika hleze ahlelwe yinto." 
Genesis42:5 Oonyana bakaSirayeli bagaleleka kunye nabanye abathengi, kuba kwakukho indlala kulo lonke eKanana." 
Genesis42:6 UJosefu, umphathiswa waseJiputa, wayethengisela abantu beendawo ngeendawo ingqolowa. Bafika ke nabantakwabo, bakhahlela bequbuda ngobuso emhlabeni." 
Genesis42:7 Wathi akubabona abantakwabo uJosefu, wabanakana kwangoko, kodwa wazenza ongabaziyo. Wababuza rhabaxa wathi: “Nivela phi?” Bona bathi: “Sivela eKanana. Size kuthenga ukutya.”" 
Genesis42:8 Ngalo lonke eli xesha uJosefu wayebazi abantakwabo, kodwa bona babengamazi." 
Genesis42:9 Wakhumbula nalaa maphupha wayewaphupha ngabo, wathi kubo: “Nina niziimpimpi! Nizele nje ukuza kuhlola iindawo ezibuthathaka kwilizwe lethu.”" 
Genesis42:10 Bathe bona: “Hayi, nkosi, thina sizizicaka zakho nje ezize kuthenga ukutya." 
Genesis42:11 Singoonyana bomntu omnye sonke. Asizizo konke iimpimpi, mhlekazi. Singamadoda anyanisekileyo.”" 
Genesis42:12 Uthe uJosefu: “Hayi bo, andivumi! Ndithi kuni nina nize kuhlola eli lizwe lethu.”" 
Genesis42:13 Bathe bona: “Mhlekazi, thina kutata singamadoda alishumi linambini. Simi kwilizwe laseKanana. Omnye umntakwethu akasekho; untondo yena usele nexhego ekhaya.”" 
Genesis42:14 “Benditshilo, niziimpimpi nina!” utshilo uJosefu." 
Genesis42:15 “Niyabona ke, ndiza kunivavanya ngolu hlobo: ndifung' ukumkani, anisayi kube nimke apha kude kuze loo mninawa wenu." 
Genesis42:16 Omnye wenu uza kuya kumphuthuma. Bonke abanye aba baza kuvalelwa elugcinweni, kude kuvele inyaniso yale nto niyithethayo. Ndifung' ukumkani, mna ndithi niziimpimpi nina.”" 
Genesis42:17 Uthe ke mabavalelwe entolongweni iintsuku ezintathu. 
Genesis42:18 Ngolwesithathu usuku uJosefu wathi kubo: “Ndingumntu omoyikayo uThixo. Ke ndiza kunisindisa, kodwa phantsi kwalo mqathango:" 
Genesis42:19 Ukuze ndiqonde ukuba ninyanisile omnye wenu uza kuhlala apha kule ntolongo benigcinwe kuyo, abanye bona bagoduke nengqolowa le niyithengileyo, bayise kuloo mawenu alambileyo." 
Genesis42:20 Kodwa kufuneka nimzise apha kum loo mninawa wenu yena. Loo nto iya kundibonisa ukuba beninyanisile, ndinganibulali ke.” Bavuma," 
Genesis42:21 kambe bethetha bodwa besithi: “Kunje-nje-nje kungenxa yento esayenza kumninawa wethu uJosefu. Asizange simhoye esibongoza ukuba simncede kwimbandezelo awayekuyo. Yiyo loo nto nathi sibandezelekile nje.” 
Genesis42:22 Uthe uRubhen: “Ndandingatshongo kuni ukuba ningayenzakalisi laa ntwana? Ke nina aneva. Nasi ke ngoku isiphumo: igazi lakhe liyathetha.” 
Genesis42:23 UJosefu wayeyiva into ababeyithetha, nto nje bona babengayazi loo nto, kuba yena wayethetha nabo ngetoliki." 
Genesis42:24 Wee guququ uJosefu, wakha walila. Uthe akuba nako ukuthetha kwakhona, walatha uSimon, wathi makabotshwe bejongile." 
Genesis42:25 Wathi uJosefu mazizaliswe ngengqolowa iingxowa zabantakwabo, kufakwe nemali yomntu ngamnye engxoweni yakhe, banikwe nomphako wendlela. Yenziwa yonke loo nto." 
Genesis42:26 Abakhuluwa bakhe bazilayisha ezimbongolweni iingxowa zabo, banduluka." 
Genesis42:27 Kwindawo ababekhulule kuyo ukuchitha ubusuku, omnye kubo wayivula ingxowa yakhe, eza kupha idonki yakhe ukutya, wafika imali ibekwe ngaphezulu." 
Genesis42:28 Ubhekise kubantakwabo wathi: “Imali yam ibuyisiwe; nantsi engxoweni!” Bothuka kakhulu, bangcangcazela, bathi: “Yintoni le uThixo asenza yona!”" 
Genesis42:29 Bakufika kuyise eKanana, bambalisela konke okwabehlelayo, besithi:" 
Genesis42:30 “Laa mphathiswa waseJiputa wathetha rhabaxa nathi, esithi siziimpimpi ezaziye kuhlola ilizwe labo." 
Genesis42:31 Samphedula sathi: ‘Asizizo konke iimpimpi, koko singamadoda anyanisekileyo." 
Genesis42:32 Singoonyana bomntu omnye abalishumi elinambini bebonke. Nto nje omnye akasekho; yena untondo usele noyise eKanana.’ ”
