Genesis42:33 Baqokela bathi kuyise: “Yathi loo ndoda iphetheyo ukuphendula: ‘Ukuze ndiqonde ukunyaniseka kwenu, makasale abe mnye, bagoduke abanye, baphathele amawenu alambayo ukutya." 
Genesis42:34 Kodwa ze nize nomninawa wenu kum. Nantso ke into eya kwenza ndiqonde ukuba ngenene anizizo iimpimpi. Ndomkhulula umntakwenu, nani namkeleke kweli lizwe.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Bathi bakuzivula iingxowa zabo, bonke ngabanye bafumana kukho imali ezingxoweni. Bothuka, noyise wothuka." 
Genesis42:36 Wathi kubo uYakobi: “Kutheni ngathi nifuna ndilahlekelwe ngabantwana bam bonke nje? Waya ngaphi uJosefu; ephi yena uSimon? Ngoku nifuna uBhenjamin! Kuyo yonke loo nto ndim obulalekayo.” 
Genesis42:37 URubhen uthe kuyise: “Ukuba andibuyanga noBhenjamin, uze ubabulale bobabini oonyana bam. Myeke ahambe nam; ndiza kubuya naye.”" 
Genesis42:38 Wala uYakobi, esithi: “Hayi, akanako ukuhamba nani umntwanam. Umntakwabo wasweleka; selinguye yedwa ngoku oseleyo. Usenokuhlelwa yinto endleleni. Noko sendaluphele ngoku; ingandibulala loo nto.”" 
Genesis43:1 Yathath' unyawo yona indlala eKanana. 
Genesis43:2 Kuthe kwakuba kuphele ingqolowa kwaYakobi eyayize noonyana bakhe eJiputa, wathi kubo uyise: “Buyani niye kusithengela into etyiwayo.”" 
Genesis43:3 UJuda wathi: “Laa mfo wasinqonqozisa, esithi akafuni nokusibona oku ukuba asizanga naye uBhenjamin." 
Genesis43:4 Asikuya kuthenga kutya thina singahambi naye uBhenjamin. 
Genesis43:5 Ukuba ke uyala, nathi asiyi kuya, kuba laa mfo walitsolisa, wathi singaze sivele phambi kwakhe singahambi noBhenjamin.”" 
Genesis43:6 USirayeli wathi: “Nindenzele ntoni into embi kangaka ngokuxelela laa mfo ukuba ninomnye umninawa?” 
Genesis43:7 Bathi: “Laa mfo wayesibuza, esigocagoca ngekhaya lethu, efuna ukwazi ukuba ubawo usaphila na, nokuba ngaba sinaye na omnye umntakwethu. Saza ke thina sayiphendula le mibuzo. Besiya kwazi njani ukuba wayeza kuthi makuziwe noBhenjamin?”" 
Genesis43:8 UJuda wathi kuyise uSirayeli: “Yithi mayihambe nam le nkwenkwe, sinduluke kwangoku, siye kuthenga ukutya, ukuze thina neentsapho zethu singafi yindlala." 
Genesis43:9 Ukuba kukho nto yenzeka kuyo woyibuza apha kum. Ukuba andibuyanga nayo isaphila, ndiya kuthwala ityala bonke ubomi bam." 
Genesis43:10 Ukuba besingalibazisanga kangaka ngesiye sabuya, nditsho sada saphinda okwesibini.”" 
Genesis43:11 Uyise wathi kubo: “Xa kunjalo ke kulungile, phathani ezona ziphambili izinto ezivela kulo mhlaba, nise kumphathiswa lowo. Thathani intwana yentlaka yokuqhola, ubusi, intlaka emhlope, amakha, neembotyi zepistako, kunye neeamangile." 
Genesis43:12 Ze niphathe nemali ngokuphindiweyo, kuba kufuneka niyibuyisele leya beniyifumene ezingxoweni zenu. Mhlawumbi yayifakwe ngempazamo." 
Genesis43:13 Hambani naye ke umntakwenu, niye kuloo ndoda." 
Genesis43:14 Wanga uThixo uSomandla angayenza mhlophe indlela yenu, ize loo ndoda inenzele inceba, imbuyisele kuni uBhenjamin nalaa mntakwenu useleyo. Ukuba mna kufuneka ndilahlekelwe ngabantwana bam, kulungile.”" 
Genesis43:15 Bazithatha ke izipho oonyana bakhe kunye nemali eyaneleyo, bahamba baya eJiputa kunye noBhenjamin. Bafika bazazisa kuJosefu." 
Genesis43:16 UJosefu akubabona behamba noBhenjamin, wathi kwisicaka esiyintloko: “La madoda wase endlwini yam. Uze uxhele nokuxhela, khon' ukuze batye nam isidlo sasemini.”" 
Genesis43:17 Senjenjalo ke isicaka ngokomyalelo kaJosefu. 
Genesis43:18 Ngeli xesha basiwa endlwini babesoyika, besithi: “Sibanjwa ngenxa yemali eyayifakwe ezingxoweni zethu. Uza kusihlasela, asibambe, sibe ngamakhoboka, athimbe needonki zethu.”" 
Genesis43:19 Bathe ke, xa besesemnyango, babhekisa kwisicaka esiphetheyo, bathi:" 
Genesis43:20 “Mhlekazi, bekhe seza kuthenga ukutya apha." 
Genesis43:21 Sithe sakumisa ngokuhlwa endleleni egodukayo, safumana loo mali besithenge ngayo isesezingxoweni zethu ngaphezulu. Size nayo ke loo mali." 
Genesis43:22 Siphethe nenye imali yokuthenga ukutya. Asazi ukuba yafakwa ngubani le mali ezingxoweni zethu.” 
Genesis43:23 “Khululekani, ningoyiki,” sitshilo isicaka. “Kunokuba loo mali yinyhweba evela kuThixo wenu, uThixo kayihlo. Mna ndayifumana intlawulo yenu.” Saza sakhupha uSimon, samzisa kubo." 
Genesis43:24 Sabangenisa endlwini kaJosefu isicaka. Sabanika amanzi, bahlamba iinyawo. Sapha needonki zabo into etyiwayo." 
Genesis43:25 Balungiselela ukunika uJosefu izipho ukufika kwakhe ngexesha lesidlo sasemini, kuba babesebexelelwe ukuba uza kutya kunye nabo." 
Genesis43:26 Akufika basa kuye izipho, bakhahlela, bawa ngobuso emhlabeni." 
Genesis43:27 Wababuza impilo, waza wathi: “Linjani na ixhego uyihlo enanindixelele ngaye? Usaphila na?”" 
Genesis43:28 Bathi bona: “Mhlekazi, ubawo isicaka sakho, usaphila.” Batsho baguqa bezithoba phambi kwakhe." 
Genesis43:29 UJosefu uthe akubona uBhenjamin umninawa wakhe: “Ngulo mninawa wenu ke lo benithetha ngaye? Lwanga ufefe lukaThixo lunganawe, mfo wam.”" 
Genesis43:30 UJosefu, esikwa yimfesane kukubona umninawa wakhe, ukhawuleze waphuma, waya kungena egumbini lakhe, kuba wayeseleza kulila. Wafika apho wakhe wagixa." 
Genesis43:31 Akuba ebuhlambile ubuso, ubuyile, wazibamba, wathi makuphakwe." 
Genesis43:32 Wayetyela etafileni yakhe yedwa, bona abantakwabo bekweyabo bodwa. NamaJiputa awayelapho ayesitya odwa, kuba kwakungekho sikweni ukutya kunye namaHebhere." 
Genesis43:33 Oonyana bakaYakobi babehleli kwitafile ejongene nekaJosefu, bebekwe ngokuzana kwabo. Bathe bakuyibona indlela ababekwe ngayo etafileni, bajongana bethe manga." 
Genesis43:34 Babesitya ukutya okuvela etafileni kaJosefu. UBhenjamin yena waphiwa kakhulu kunabanye, ephindwe kahlanu. Batya ke, basela kunye noJosefu, bada bamnandi." 
Genesis44:1 UJosefu wathi kwisicaka esiyintloko emzini wakhe: “Zalisa ezi ngxowa zala madoda zithi ntli, uze ufake nemali yomntu ngamnye engxoweni yakhe," 
Genesis44:2 ufake nendebe yam yesiliva ngaphezulu engxoweni yomninawa wabo, kwakunye nemali yengqolowa.” Senjenjalo isicaka." 
Genesis44:3 Kwangentseni wabakhulula abantakwabo, bangena endleleni egodukayo, beqhuba iidonki zabo." 
Genesis44:4 Kwathi besekude kufuphi nedolophu, wathi uJosefu kwisicaka sakhe: “Khawuleza usukele laa madoda, uthi: ‘Kutheni nibuyisa ubuhle ngobubi?" 
Genesis44:5 Niyibele ntoni indebe yesiliva yenkosi yam? Yile kanye isela ngayo, ikwayile ivumisa ngayo. Ilihlazo le nto niyenzileyo.’ ”" 
Genesis44:6 Siwathethile ke la mazwi isicaka sakufika kubo. 
Genesis44:7 Bathe bona: “Ungathini, mhlekazi, ukuthetha ngolu hlobo? Asikhange siyenze into enjalo konke-konke." 
Genesis44:8 Uyazi nawe ukuba nemali esayifumana ezingxoweni zethu ekhaya siyibuyisele kwakuwe. Singathini ke ngoku ukûba isiliva okanye igolide yenkosi yakho? 
Genesis44:9 Ukuba kukho onayo apha kuthi makabulawe, baze abanye babanjwe babe ngamakhoboka.”" 
Genesis44:10 Sithe isicaka: “Ewe, kulungile, kodwa ngulo ifunyenwe kuye qha oya kubanjwa abe likhoboka; bonke abanye bangakhululeka.”" 
Genesis44:11 Bazithule kwangoko iingxowa zabo, bazibeka phantsi, elowo wavula eyakhe." 
Genesis44:12 Sakhangelisisa isicaka sikaJosefu, siqala komkhlu sada saya kutsho koyena mncinane. Loo ndebe yafunyanwa engxoweni kaBhenjamin." 
Genesis44:13 Baba lusizi kakhulu abantakwabo, batsho bakrazula nezambatho zabo, bayilayisha kwakhona imithwalo yabo, babuyela edolophini." 
Genesis44:14 Ukufika kwabo ooJuda nabantakwabo, bafika esesekhaya uJosefu. Bafika bakhahlela," 
Genesis44:15 wathi kubo uJosefu: “Niyenzeleni le nto? Beningazi kakade ukuba umntu okwesi sikhundla ndikuso uyakwazi ukuvumisa?” 
Genesis44:16 UJuda uthe: “Singathini kuwe, mhlekazi, ukukubonisa ukuba asazani nale nto? Singathini ukuzihlamba? NguThixo olaziyo ityala lethu. Thina sonke ngoku singamabanjwa, asinguye kuphela lo ifunyenwe kuye indebe yakho.”" 
Genesis44:17 Uthe uJosefu: “Unongekhe; andiyivumi loo nto! Kuza kubanjwa lo ifunyenwe kuye indebe yam qha. Bonke abanye bangagoduka ngoxolo, babuyele kuyise.”" 
Genesis44:18 UJuda wasondela kuJosefu, wafika wathi: “Ngxe, mhlekazi! Ndivumele ndithethe, nakuba ungangokumkani ngokwakhe." 
Genesis44:19 Wasibuza, mhlekazi, ukuba ngaba ubawo usaphila na, nokuba ngaba sinaye na umntakwethu ongomnye." 
Genesis44:20 Sathi ubawo usadla amazimba, phofu selaluphele. Satsho nokuthi sinaye nomninawa ovele selemdala ubawo. Umkhuluwa wale ntwana akasekho; yiyo yodwa ke ngoko esaphilayo kubantwana bakanina. Uyise uyithanda kakhulu." 
Genesis44:21 Wathi ke, mhlekazi, ze size nayo le ntwana khon' ukuze uyibone." 
Genesis44:22 Sathi thina ayinako ukwahlukana noyise; angafa. 
Genesis44:23 Wathi ke wena thina zicaka zakho ze singezi apha singahambi nale ntwana. 
Genesis44:24 “Sathi sakufika kubawo samxelela konke owakuthethayo. 
Genesis44:25 Ubawo ubuye wasithuma ukuba siphinde size kufuna into etyiwayo. 
Genesis44:26 Samxelela sathi asinakuza apha, singenakwamkelwa, singezanga nayo le ntwana. Besingeza apha kuphela xa ngaba siza nayo." 
Genesis44:27 Wathi ubawo: ‘Niyazi ukuba umkam uRakeli wandizalela oonyana ababini kuphela. 
Genesis44:28 Omnye unyana akasekho; kunokuba waqwengwa zizilwanyana, kuba akazange abonwe oko wemkayo." 
Genesis44:29 Xa ke nifuna ukuhamba naye nalo, aze angabuyi, ingandixhela loo nto ngoku sendimdala.’" 
Genesis44:30 “Ke ngoko, mhlekazi,” utshilo uJuda, “ukuba ndingabuyela ekhaya ingekho le ntwana, ubawo angafa zisuka nje xa aphawula ukuba ayikho. Akasenako ukwahlukana nale nkwenkwe. Selaluphele kangangokuba angafa." 
Genesis44:31  
Genesis44:32 Ngaphezu koko ndafunga kubawo ndathi kungafa mna kunokuba kwenzeke into kule ntwana. Ndathi, ukuba andibuyanga nayo, ityala aze alibeke kum." 
Genesis44:33 Ke, mhlekazi, ndim oza kuhlala apha abe libanjwa endaweni yale ntwana. Yiyeke yona ibuyele ekhaya kunye nabakhuluwa bayo." 
Genesis44:34 Ndingathini ukubuyela ekhaya ngaphandle kwale ntwana? Andinako ukukubukela ukudandatheka kukabawo.” 
Genesis45:1 UJosefu akabanga saba nako ukuzibamba. Wathi izicaka zakhe maziphume. Kwasala yena nabantakwabo. Wabaxelela ukuba ungubani na. 
Genesis45:2 Watsho ngesikhalo esaviwa ngamaJiputa, lwaza olo mingi-mingi lwaya kutsho nakomkhulu." 
Genesis45:3 Wenjenje uJosefu ukuthetha nabantakwabo: “NdinguJosefu. Nithi ubawo usaphila?” Bakukuva oko abantakwabo bothuka, ababi nako nokuthetha." 
Genesis45:4 Uthe uYosefu: “Sondelani.” Basondela, wathi: “Ndingumntakwenu uJosefu enamthengisa eJiputa." 
Genesis45:5 Sanukukhathazeka okanye nizohlwaye ngenxa yokuba nandithengisa apha. NguThixo owathi mandinandulele, ukuze kusinde abantu." 
Genesis45:6 Lo isengowesibini unyaka wendlala; kuseza eminye emihlanu, kungàlinywa, kungàvunwa." 
Genesis45:7 NguThixo owathi mandize ngaphambi kwenu apha, ukuze nisinde ngale ndlela imangalisayo, kusinde nenzala yenu ngangokuba ingako." 
Genesis45:8 Ayinini ke ngoko abandizisa apha, nguThixo. Nguye ondenze umphathiswa kakumkani ophethe lonke eli lizwe nolawula iJiputa iphela." 
Genesis45:9 “Ngoku ke khawulezani niye kubawo, nithi ndithi, mna Josefu unyana wakhe, uThixo undenze umlawuli weJiputa iphela. Makakhawuleze eze kum." 
Genesis45:10 Angema kulaa mmandla waseGoshen, apho aya kuba kufuphi nam. Makeze nabantwana bakhe, abazukulwana, iigusha, iibhokhwe, iinkomo, konke okwakhe." 
Genesis45:11 Ndombonelela elapho, kuba kusasele eminye iminyaka emihlanu yendlala, yaye andifuni afe yindlala, yena nendlu yakhe, nento yonke anayo.”" 
Genesis45:12 Uqhube wathi uJosefu: “Niyaqonda ke nonke ngoku ukuba ndinguJosefu, nditsho nawe Bhenjamin." 
Genesis45:13 Ze nimxelele ubawo ngamagunya endinawo apha eJiputa, nimbalisele ngayo yonke into eniyibonileyo. Nikhawuleze ke, nize naye apha.”" 
Genesis45:14 Wawola uBhenjamin umntakwabo, walila, noBhenjamin walila emgonile." 
Genesis45:15 Esalila njalo wabagona abantakwabo, wabancamisa. Baqala ukuncokola naye ke abantakwabo emva koko." 
Genesis45:16 Zakuvakala komkhulu iindaba zokuba uJosefu ufikelwe ngabantakwabo, ukumkani namaphakathi bavuya." 
Genesis45:17 Wathi kuJosefu: “Xelela abantakwenu ukuba balayishe ukutya kwabo, baye eKanana," 
Genesis45:18 bafike apho baxelele uyihlo kunye neentsapho zenu ukuba bafudukele eJiputa. Ndobanika eyona ndawo ilungileyo kwelaseJiputa ukuba bahlale khona, babe nenxaxheba kwindyebo yalapha.”" 
Genesis45:19 Wathi mabathathe neenqwelo zokufudusa iintsapho zabo, beze naye noyise." 
Genesis45:20 Watsho esithi: “Ze ningazixhamli ngezinto eziya kusala eKanana; niza kuzuza ezona zixabisekileyo apha eJiputa.” 
Genesis45:21 Benza njengoko babeyalelwe oonyana bakaSirayeli. Banikwa iinqwelo nguJosefu ngokomyalelo kakumkani, kwakunye nomphako." 
Genesis45:22 Elowo wamnika iimpahla ezintsha zokunxiba, kodwa yena uBhenjamin wamnika amakhulu amathathu eesiliva neempahla zaphindwa kahlanu kwezabanye." 
Genesis45:23 Wathumela uyise ishumi leedonki lithwele ezona mpahla zodidi zaseJiputa, neshumi leemazi zeedonki zithwele ingqolowa, izonka, nokunye ukutya komphako." 
Genesis45:24 Wabandulula abantakwabo, bemka. Wabayala esithi: “Ze ningalwi endleleni.”" 
Genesis45:25 Banduluka eJiputa, baya kufika eKanana kuyise." 
Genesis45:26 Bafika bathi: “UJosefu uyaphila! Nguye umphathiswa waseJiputa!” Wathi nqa yiloo nto uYakobi, engakholwa." 
Genesis45:27 Bakumxelela konke okwathethwa nguJosefu, wazibona neenqwelo awayezithumele, watsho wahlaziyeka emphefumlweni." 
Genesis45:28 USirayeli wathi: “Usaphila uJosefu umntwanam! Nantso nje qha into endiyifunayo: mandiye kumbona ndingekafi.” 
Genesis46:1 USirayeli wathatha konke okwakhe wahamba, waya kutsho eBheshebha, apho wafika wenzela uThixo kayise uIsake idini." 
Genesis46:2 UThixo wathetha naye ngephupha wathi: “Yakobi!” Wasabela uYakobi wathi: “Ndim lo!” Wenjenje uThixo ukuthetha naye: 
Genesis46:3 “Mna ndinguThixo kayihlo. Uzungoyiki ukuya eJiputa; kulapho inzala yakho ndiya kuyenza isizwe esikhulu. 
Genesis46:4 Ndiya kuya nawe eJiputa, ndibuye ndiyibuyisele kwalapha inzala yakho. UJosefu uya kukucima amehlo ukubhubha kwakho.”" 
Genesis46:5 Wanduluka eBheshebha uYakobi. Yena, nabantwana boonyana bakhe, kunye nabafazi babo, babekhwele kwiinqwelo ezazithunyelwe ngukumkani waseJiputa." 
Genesis46:6 Baqhuba iinkomo zabo nako konke okwabo abakufumana eKanana, bahamba nako, baya eJiputa. UYakobi wahamba nosapho lwakhe lonke:" 
Genesis46:7 oonyana bakhe, abantwana babo, iintombi zakhe, kunye nabazukulwana bakhe." 
Genesis46:8 Ngawo la amagama amaSirayeli, inzala kaYakobi, eyangenayo eJiputa kunye naye." 
Genesis46:9 YayinguRubhen, izibulo, kunye noonyana bakhe: uHanoki, noPalu, noHezeron, noKarmi." 
Genesis46:10 USimon noonyana bakhe: uJemuweli noJamin, uOhadi noJakin noZoware, kwakunye noShawule, owayezelwe ngumKananakazi." 
Genesis46:11 ULevi noonyana bakhe: uGershon noKohati kunye noMerari. 
Genesis46:12 UJuda kunye noonyana bakhe: uShela, noPerezi, noZera. Abanye oonyana bakaJuda, uEre no-Onan, batsahabalala eKanana. UPerezi wanoonyana abanguHezeron kunye noHamuli." 
Genesis46:13 UIsakare yena wangena noonyana bakhe: uTola, noPuwa, noYashubhi, kunye noShimron." 
Genesis46:14 UZebhulon naye wangena noonyana bakhe: uZerede, noElon, kunye noYaleli." 
Genesis46:15 Ngoonyana abazalwa nguLeya aba, kunye nodade wabo uDayina, besesePadan-aram. Bebonke abantwana abangumlibo kaLeya babengamashumi mathathu anantathu." 
Genesis46:16 UGadi naye wangena noonyana bakhe: uZefon noHagi noShuni, uEzebhon noEri noArodi, kunye noAreli." 
Genesis46:17 UAshere wangena noonyana bakhe: uImna noIshwa, kunye noIshvi noBheriya, kwakunye nodade wabo uSera. Oonyana bakaBheriya yayinguHebhere kunye noMalekiyeli." 
Genesis46:18 Aba bantwana abalishumi linantandathu ngabomlibo kaZilipha, impelesi kaLeya awayeyinikwe nguLabhan." 
Genesis46:19 URakeli umka-Yakobi wayezele oonyana ababini, uJosefu noBhenjamin." 
Genesis46:20 UJosefu eJiputa wayenoonyana ababini, uManase noEfrayim. Babezelwe nguAsenati intombi kaPotifare umbingeleli waseOni." 
Genesis46:21 Oonyana bakaBhenjamin yayinguBhela noBhekere, uAshbhele noGera noNaman, uEli noRoshe, uMupim noHupim kunye noArdi." 
Genesis46:22 Eli shumi linane ke ngumlibo kaRakeli. 
Genesis46:23 Wayekho noDan kunye nonyana wakhe uHushim; 
Genesis46:24 noNafetali kunye noonyana bakhe uJazeli noGuni, uYezere kunye noShilem." 
Genesis46:25 Aba basixhenxe ngumlibo kaBhiliya, impelesi kaRakeli awayinikwa nguyise uLabhan." 
Genesis46:26 Inani lenzala kaYakobi nqo elaya eJiputa ngamashumi mathandathu anantandathu, ngaphandle koomolokazana bakhe." 
Genesis46:27 UJosefu wayezele oonyana ababini eJiputa. Loo nto yenza amashumi asixhenxe abantu bomzi kaYakobi abaya eJiputa. 
Genesis46:28 UYakobi wathi uJuda makaye kuxelela uJosefu ukuba makabahlangabeze eGoshen. Bakuba befikile eGoshen," 
Genesis46:29 uJosefu wakhwela enqwelweni, waya kukhawulela uyise uSirayeli. Uthe akubona uyise, uJosefu waziphosa kuye, wamanga, walila ithuba elide." 
Genesis46:30 Uthe uSirayeli kuJosefu: “Nokuba ndingafa ngoku ndikubonile usaphila, kulungile.”" 
Genesis46:31 UJosefu ubhekise kubantakwabo nakumawabo wathi: “Ndiza kukha ndiye kuxelela ukumkani ukuba ubawo nabantakwethu ababefudula beseKanana, bafikile," 
Genesis46:32 ndithi kuye: ‘Bangabathandi bemfuyo, yaye ke beze nayo yonke impahla yabo nako konke okwabo.’" 
Genesis46:33 Ke nina xa nibizwe ngukumkani, wanibuza ngomsebenzi eniwenzayo," 
Genesis46:34 ze nithi: ‘Singamathanda-mfuyo kwasebuncinaneni bethu, kanye njengookhokho bethu.’ Ukuba nitshilo, ukumkani woniyeka nime eGoshen. Kaloku abantu abathanda imfuyo abazelwe nto apha eJiputa.”" 
Genesis47:1 UJosefu ke waya kumbikela ukumkani, wathi: “Ubawo ufikile; uze nabo bonke abantakwethu, evela eKanana. Uze nako konke okwakhe, yaye nanko elinde eGoshen.”" 
Genesis47:2 UJosefu uthathe abahlanu kubakhuluwa bakhe, wabasa kukumkani." 
Genesis47:3 Ukumkani wababuza wathi: “Msebenzi mni na eniwenzayo?” Bathe bona: “Thina zicaka zakho singamathanda-mfuyo, mhlekazi, kanye njengookhokho bethu.”" 
Genesis47:4 Baza bathi: “Imbangi yokufudukela kwethu eJiputa yimbalela eyatsho angumqwebedu amadlelo eKanana. Ngako oko izicaka zakho ziyacela ukuba uzivumele zime apha eGoshen.” 
Genesis47:5 Ukumkani ubhekise kuJosefu wathi: “Uyihlo nabantakwenu 
Genesis47:6 beseJiputa nje, bakowabo; bangahlala apho eGoshen, eyona ndawo inomhlaba otyebileyo. Ukuba kukho amadoda angamachule phakati kwenu, uzuwenze abelusi bemihlambi yam.”" 
Genesis47:7 UJosefu ke weza noyise, wamazisa kukumkani, waza uYakobi wamthamsanqelisa ukumkani." 
Genesis47:8 Ukumkani wabuza wathi: “Umdala kangakanani na?” 
Genesis47:9 Uthe uYakobi: “Ubomi bam ndihamba-hamba kulo mhlaba bube yiminyaka elikhulu limashumi mathathu. Loo minyaka imbàlwa ibiyiminyaka enzima, engafaniyo neminyaka emininzi ababengabahambi ngayo kulo mhlaba ookhokho.”" 
Genesis47:10 UYakobi ubuye wamthamsanqelisa ukumkani, waza ke wemka." 
Genesis47:11 UJosefu ke wabakhethela indawo etyebileyo ooyise nabantakwabo phaya ngakulaa dolophu iRamesi njengokutsho kukakumkani. 
Genesis47:12 Wabazisela ukutya uJosefu xa bebonke ngokwenani labantwana babo: uyise, abantakwabo, nayo yonke intsapho." 
Genesis47:13 Yaligqugqisa indlala, kwaphela ukutya, bafa yindlala abantu baseJiputa naseKanana." 
Genesis47:14 UJosefu wayeyiqokelela yonke imali ekwakuthengwa ngayo ingqolowa, ayise ebhotwe. Yaphela yonke imali eJiputa naseKanana. AmaJiputa ayesiya kuJosefu athi: “Siphe ukutya. Ungathini ukusiyeka sife yindlala, sibe singenayo nemali?”" 
Genesis47:15  
Genesis47:16 UJosefu wayesithi: “Yizani nemfuyo yenu, nananise ngayo xa imali yenu iphelile.”" 
Genesis47:17 Babeyisa ke imfuyo yabo kuJosefu, aze yena abanike ingqolowa endaweni yamahashe, neegusha, neebokhwe, neenkomo, kunye needonki. Kuloo nyaka wabanceda ngokutya, bona besananisa ngayo yonke imfuyo yabo." 
Genesis47:18 Kunyaka olandelayo baya kuye bathi: “Sitsho phandle, mhlekazi, ukuthi imali yethu iphelile, nemfuyo yethu iphelele kuwe, yaye asinanto ngaphandle kweziqu zethu namasimi ethu." 
Genesis47:19 Singathini ukutshabalala ujongile, mhlekazi, thina namasimi ethu? Sananisa ngeziqu zethu namasimi ethu ukuze sifumane ukutya. Njalo ke thina namasimi ethu soba ngabakakumkani. Sinike ingqolowa ukuze sitye siphile, sibe nembewu yokuhlwayela.”" 
Genesis47:20 UJosefu wawathenga ke onke amasimi aseJiputa aba ngakakumkani. UmJiputa wonke wathengisa ngentsimi yakhe ngenxa yendlala, aba ke ngakakumkani onke loo masimi abo." 
Genesis47:21 Bonke abemi baseJiputa wabenza izicaka uJosefu kulo lonke elo. 
Genesis47:22 Ngumhlaba wababingeleli kuphela angazange awuthenge. Bona kwakungekho mfuneko yokuba bawuthengise owabo umhlaba, kuba babefumana inkxaso eyaneleyo ngokommiselo kakumkani." 
Genesis47:23 UJosefu wathi ebantwini: “Ngoku ningabakakumkani, kuba ndinithengile kunye namasimi enu. Nantsi ke imbewu; yiyani kulima." 
Genesis47:24 Ngexesha lokuvuna ze ninikele isihlanu sesivuno senu kukumkani. Okuseleyo ze nikusebenzisele imbewu nokutya kokondla iintsapho zenu.” 
Genesis47:25 Bathe ke bona: “Mhlekazi, usincedile, wasisindisa ekufeni; siya kumsebenzela ukumkani.”" 
Genesis47:26 Wawisa umthetho uJosefu wokuba isihlanu sesivuno eJiputa sibe sesikakumkani. Loo mthetho usekho unanamhla oku. Ngamasimi ababingeleli angazange abe ngakakumkani. 
Genesis47:27 AmaSirayeli ayemi eGoshen eJiputa. Apho aba nendyebo, anda kakhulu." 
Genesis47:28 Wahlala apho eJiputa uYakobi, wada wanekhulu linamashumi mane anesixhenxe eminyaka, selegqibe ishumi linesixhenxe leminyaka eJiputa." 
Genesis47:29 Kuthe xa seleza kubhubha, uSirayeli wabiza uJosefu unyana wakhe, wathi kuye: “Ukuba uyandithanda beka isandla sakho phantsi kwethanga lam ufunge ukuba akusayi kundingcwabela eJiputa." 
Genesis47:30 Uze undithwale uye kundingcwabela apho bangcwatywe khona ookhokho bam.” Wathi uJosefu: “Ndiya kwenjenjalo.” 
Genesis47:31 Wathi uSirayeli: “Funga.” Wafunga uJosefu, waza uSirayeli wanqula uThixo ebambelele kumsimelelo wakhe." 
Genesis48:1 Emva kwexesha uJosefu waxelelwa ukuba uyise wayengaphilanga. Uthathe oonyana bakhe bobabini, uManase noEfrayim, waya nabo kuYakobi." 
Genesis48:2 Akuva uSirayeli ukuba unyana wakhe uJosefu wayeze kumbona, wazomeleza wavuka wahlala emandlalweni." 
Genesis48:3 UYakobi ubalisele uJosefu wathi: “UThixo uSomandla wavela kum ndiseLuzi kwilizwe laseKanana, wandithamsanqelisa." 
Genesis48:4 Wathi: ‘Ndiya kukupha inzala eninzi, ize loo nzala ibe zizizwe ngezizwe. Ndokunika lo mhlaba, ube lilifa lenzala yakho naphakade.’ ”" 
Genesis48:5 Uqokele wathi uYakobi: “Naba nyana bakho ke babini, Josefu, aba bazalelwe apha eJiputa ndingekafiki, ngabam. UEfrayim noManase ngoonyana bam ncam njengoRubhen noSimon." 
Genesis48:6 Xa uthe wazala nyana bambi, abo ke abayi kuba ngabam. Elabo ilifa bolizuza ngoManase noEfrayim." 
Genesis48:7 Le nto ndiyenza ngenxa kanyoko uRakeli. Ndaba buhlungu kakhulu ukubhubha kwakhe eKanana, kufuphi ne-Efrata, xa ndandivela ePadan. Ndamngcwaba apho ngakuloo ndlela iya e-Efrata.” (IEfrata yaziwa ngokuba yiBhetelehem.)" 
Genesis48:8 Uthe uSirayeli akubona oonyana bakaJosefu: “Ngoobani la makhwenkwe?” 
Genesis48:9 Uthe kuyise uJosefu: “Aba ngoonyana bam, andiphe bona uThixo apha eJiputa.” Uthe yena: “Basondeze kum, ndibathamsanqelise.”" 
Genesis48:10 USirayeli wayeselebona luzizi, kuba wayeselaluphele, engasaboni kakuhle ke ngoko. Wabasondeza ke uJosefu oonyana bakhe, uSirayeli wabanga." 
Genesis48:11 Uthe uYakobi kuJosefu: “Bendingasatsho ukuba ndingabuya ndikubone, kodwa uThixo wenze ukuba ndibone nabantwana bakho.”" 
Genesis48:12 UJosefu ubasusile kuyise, waqubuda phambi koyise eqondele phantsi." 
Genesis48:13 UJosefu wambeka uEfrayim ngasekhohlo kuyise, waza uManase yena wambeka ngasekunene." 
Genesis48:14 Kodwa uSirayeli waziphambanisa izandla zakhe, wabeka isandla sakhe sokunene phezu koEfrayim, nakuba wayengomncinane yena; esokhohlo sona wasibeka kuManase, oyena wayengomkhulu." 
Genesis48:15 Wandula ke uSirayeli ukumthamsanqelisa uJosefu wenjenje: “Makawathamsanqelise la makhwenkwe uThixo ka-Abraham noIsake. UThixo ondaluse kwada kwayile mini, makawathamsanqelise." 
Genesis48:16 Ewe, osithunywa esandisindisa kuzo zonke iingozi makawathamsanqelise. Igama lam, nelika-Abraham noIsake, malihlale lihleli ngawo la makhwenkwe. Anga anganda achume ehlabathini.”" 
Genesis48:17 Wakhathazeka uJosefu akubona uyise ebeka isandla sokunene kuEfrayim. Waza wasisusa wasibeka phezu koManase. 
Genesis48:18 Watsho esithi: “Musukwenza loo nto, bawo. Nanku omkhulu; sibeke kuye isandla sokunene.”" 
Genesis48:19 Wala uyise, esithi: “Mfo wam, ndiyayazi loo nto. Nayo inzala kaManase iya kuba sisizwe abaluleke. Kodwa ke yena umninawa wakhe uya kuba mkhulu kunaye, ize yona eyakhe inzala ibe zizizwe ngezizwe.”" 
Genesis48:20 Wabathamsanqelisa ke ngaloo mini, esithi: “Xa athamsanqelisa, amaSirayeli aya kunqula athi: ‘Wanga uThixo angakwenza ufuze uEfrayim noManase.’ ” Wenjenjalo ke uYakobi ukumisela uEfrayim abe ngaphezu koManase." 
Genesis48:21 Wandula wathi kuJosefu uSirayeli: “Uyabona ke, mna sendiza kufa, kodwa uThixo uza kuba nani, anibuyisele kwilizwe lookhokho." 
Genesis48:22 IShekem, endayihlutha kuma-Amori ngekrele nangotolo, ndiyinika wena; iya kumiwa nguwe, ingengabo abakhuluwa bakho.”" 
Genesis49:1 UYakobi wabiza oonyana bakhe, wathi: “Sondelani ndinixelele ngekamva lenu:" 
Genesis49:2 “Ndingqongeni nibek' iindlebe, zinto zikaYakobi; mbekeleni iindlebe uyihlo uSirayeli." 
Genesis49:3 “URubhen lizibulo lam; ndazibon' amandla ngaye; ubudoda bam ndabuqonda ngaye. Ngoyena unamandla; ngoyena unewonga koonyana bam bonke. 
Genesis49:4 Kambe ke akasayi kutshatshela. Yintw' efan' igqabhuke okomsinga wamanzi, kuba yangena iqadi likayise, yasixabhel' isilili soyise." 
Genesis49:5 “USimon noLevi ngoonyongande kuzalana; zizibhoja ezixhel' abantu ngezixhobo zazo. 
Genesis49:6 Andiwangeni amayelenqe abo; andinanxaxheba kwigqugula labo. Kaloku bagwint' abantu ngenxa yephuku; bangxwelerh' iinkomo ngenxa yemfeketho. 
Genesis49:7 Linelishw' iphuku labo, kuba liyankwantyisa; unelishw' umsindo wabo, kub' ukhohlakele. Bona ndobabhacisa kulo lonke elakwaYakobi, babe ziintsalu kwelakwaSirayeli." 
Genesis49:8 “UJuda yintw' edunyiswa ngamawayo; yintw' ezithe xhakamfu ngesixhanti iintshaba zayo, intw' ekhahlelwayo ngabantakwayo." 
Genesis49:9 UJuda ndithi yintw' enga yingonyama, yintw' echwechwel' ixhoba, ibuy' ibuthume esikhundleni sayo; buthuthu izolile, ingabe iphazanyiswe nto." 
Genesis49:10 NguJuda opheth' umsimbithi wokulawula. Uya kuhlala elawula njalo, ade afike umniniwo, izizwe zikhahlele kuye ngentobeko." 
Genesis49:11 Sisinhanha esibhuqisa kungekavunwa, esindyebo ixhanyulwa naziidonki. Nguhlamba ngewayini," 
Genesis49:12 intw' emehlo aligazi kukumfimfith' iwayini, le ntw' imazinyo amhlophe zizapholo." 
Genesis49:13 “UZebhulon uye kuma phezu kolwandle; yintw' emanxweme azizikhululo zeenqanawa; yintw' emhlaba uye kuthi xhaxhe ngeSidon. 
Genesis49:14 “UIsakare akayidluli nganto imbongolo; yint' ofik' ilele isoyiswa yimithwalo. 
Genesis49:15 Kambe ke weva ukuba kumnandi ukubuthuma, nelizwe liyaphumza. Yintw' egob' umqolo, ithwalisw' imithwalo, intw' enyanzelwa okwesicaka emsebenzini." 
Genesis49:16 “UDan ngomnye wezindlu zikaSirayeli; nguye umgwebi wabantu bakhe. 
Genesis49:17 UDan yinyoka esecaleni lendlela; yinyoka enobuhlungu elalel' ukuluma ihashe esithendeni, khon' ukuze umkhweli limphose phantsi." 
Genesis49:18 “*Ndikhoyo, ndilindele ukukhululwa nguwe!" 
Genesis49:19 “UGadi yena uya kuhlaselwa liqela lezihange, kodwa wojika aziswantsulise." 
Genesis49:20 “Umhlaba ka-Ashere uya kuchuma, uvelise ukutya okulungele nkqu neekumkani." 
Genesis49:21 “UNafetali yena lixhama lasendle; intw' ezala amaduna namathokazi. 
Genesis49:22 “UJosefu ngumdiliya omi ngasemthonjeni; intw' emaseb' afukufuku, aqabel' ezindongeni." 
Genesis49:23 Yintw' ehlaselwa ziintshaba zayo, ziyisukele ngeentolo nezaphetha." 
Genesis49:24 Kodwa olwakhe utolo alugungqi, neengalo zakhe zomelezwa ngamandla oThixo kaYakobi, yena malusi nomkhuseli kaSirayeli." 
Genesis49:25 NguThixo kayihlo okuncedayo; nguThixo uSomandla okuthamsanqelisayo ngeemvula zaphezulu, nangamanzi aphuma enzulwini ngaphantsi komhlaba. Nguye okuthamsanqelisa ngabantwana nangemfuyo." 
Genesis49:26 Amathamsanqa owanikwe nguyihlo aya kuqina kuneentaba ezisisimakade, achume kunendyebo yeenduli zaphakade. Konke oku makuwe phezu kwentloko kaYosefu, yena ukhethiweyo kubantakwabo." 
Genesis49:27 “UBhenjamin lithole lengcuka elinoburhalarhume. Kusasa uqwenga ixhoba; ngokuhlwa waba okuphangiweyo.” 
Genesis49:28 Zizo ke ezi izizwe ezilishumi elinambini zakwaSirayeli. Lo ke ngumyolelo kayise koonyana bakhe ngabanye. 
Genesis49:29 UYakobi uqokele wathi ukuyolela: “Njengoko sendiza kuya kookhokho, nize nindingcwabe koobawo, kulaa mqolomba ukulaa ntsimi kaEfron umHeti," 
Genesis49:30 eMakapela ngasempumalanga yeMamre eKanana. Loo mqolomba wathengwa nguAbraham kuEfron ukuze kungcwatyelwe kuwo. 
Genesis49:31 Kulapho angcwatyelwe khona uAbraham kunye noSara umkakhe. Kulapho angcwatyelwe khona uIsake kunye noRabheka umkakhe. NoLeya ukwangcwatyelwe apho. 
Genesis49:32 Loo ntsimi yathengwa kunye naloo mqolomba ukuyo kumaHeti. Nam ke nize nindingcwabele apho.” 
Genesis49:33 Akuwugqiba umyolelo wakhe uYakobi koonyana bakhe, wabuya wangqengqa, waphuma umphefumlo." 
Genesis50:1 UJosefu waziphosa phezu koyise ekhala, wamanga." 
Genesis50:2 Emva koko wayalela oogqirha ukuba bawuqhole umzimba kayise, ukuze ungonakali. Benjenjalo ke, bamqhola uSirayeli," 
Genesis50:3 yaza loo nto yathatha amashumi amane eentsuku ukwenziwa. Kambe ke lixesha eliqhelekileyo laloo nto elo. AmaJiputa amzilela amashumi asixhenxe eentsuku uYakobi. 
Genesis50:4 Lakuba lidlule ilixa lenzila, uJosefu wanikela oomaqhuzu bakomkhulu umyalezo oya kukumkani." 
Genesis50:5 Wathi maze bathi kukumkani: “Xa wayeza kubhubha ubawo wayalela mna Josefu, endifungisa ukuba maze ndimngcwabe kwingcwaba awazilungiselela lona eKanana.” Wathi makancede ke ukumkani amvumele aye kungcwaba uyise, uya kubuya abuye." 
Genesis50:6 Ukumkani wathi kuJosefu: “Hamba uye kungcwaba uyihlo njengoko wawumthembisile ngesifungo.” 
Genesis50:7 Wahamba uJosefu ukuya kungcwaba uyise. Waphelekwa ngoomaqhuzu basebhotwe, amaphakathi, nabo bonke abantu abaphambili kubemi baseJiputa." 
Genesis50:8 Kwahamba usapho lwakhe, abantakwabo, kwakunye nomzi kayise wonke. Kwasala abantwana kuphela eGoshen kunye nemfuyo yabo." 
Genesis50:9 Kwakuziinqwelo zamahashe, kunye nabakhwele amahashe, isisihlwele." 
Genesis50:10 Bathi bakufika kwisanda sika-Atadi kufuphi neJordan, batsho ngesijwili esikrakra ithuba elide. Apho uJosefu wachitha iintsuku ezisixhenxe ezilile." 
Genesis50:11 Abantu baseKanana, bakubabona bezilile kwisanda sika-Atadi, bayincoma inkqubo ezukileyo yenzila eyayisenziwa ngamaJiputa. Yiyo ke loo nto loo ndawo kwathiwa igama layo yiAbheli-mizerayim." 
Genesis50:12 Benjenjalo ke oonyana bakaYakobi ukuthobela umyolelo kayise. 
Genesis50:13 Bawuthwala umzimba wakhe, bawusa eKanana, bafika bawungcwaba kumqolomba owawuseMakapela, ngasempuma yeMamre, kulaa mhlaba uAbraham wawuthenga kuEfron umHeti, ube yindawo yokungcwabela." 
Genesis50:14 Akuba emngcwabile uyise, uJosefu wabuyela eJiputa, kunye nabantakwabo kwakunye naloo nginginya yayimkhaphile." 
Genesis50:15 Emva kokubhubha kukayise abantakwabo-Josefu baphathwa lixhala lokuba hleze kuthi kanti uJosefu usababambe isixhiba ngento embi abamenza yona. 
Genesis50:16 Bathumela isigidimi ke kuJosefu ukuba sise umlomo othi: “Ubawo wathi ze sithi kuwe, Josefu, uze usixolele ngesenzo esakwenza sona. Sixolele ke ngoko, thina zicaka zikaThixo kabawo.” Zehla iinyembezi kuJosefu akuwuva loo mlomo." 
Genesis50:17  
Genesis50:18 Bathi ke, abantakwabo beze buqu, bafika bakhahlela, bathi: “Thina sizizicaka zakho.”" 
Genesis50:19 Suka uJosefu wathi: “Musani ukuxhala, andingoThixo mna." 
Genesis50:20 Ewe, nanizimisele ukundenzakalisa, kodwa uThixo yena walijika elo yelenqe labubuhle, khon' ukuze kusinde abantu abaninzi abaphilayo ngoku ngenxa yeso senzo senu.”" 
Genesis50:21 Watsho esithi: “Musani ukoyika, ndiza kunigcina nina kunye nabantwana benu.” Wabathuthuzela ngamazwi atsho laphela ixhala." 
Genesis50:22 UJosefu wahlala eJiputa kunye nosapho lukayise, wada wabhubha enekhulu lineshumi leminyaka." 
Genesis50:23 Wahlala wada wabona nabantwana bakaEfrayim kwakunye nabantwana babo. Wahlala wada nabantwana bakaMakire unyana kaManase wabangenisa baba yimilowo. 
Genesis50:24 Wayolela kubantakwabo uJosefu wathi: “Sendiza kubhubha, kodwa yena uThixo uza kunigcina ade anikhuphe kweli lizwe, anise kwilizwe awalithembisa oobawo uAbraham noIsake noYakobi.”" 
Genesis50:25 Uthe ke uJosefu abantakwabo mabafunge, wathi: “Mhla uThixo wanisa kwelo lizwe, nize niwathathe amathambo am, nimke nawo.”" 
Genesis50:26 UJosefu ke watshabela eJiputa enekhulu lineshumi leminyaka. Bawuqhola umzimba wakhe, bawufaka emkhumbini apho eJiputa." 
Exodus1:1 Nanga amagama oonyana bakaSirayeli abâfuduka kunye naye baya eJiputa nezindlu zabo: 
Exodus1:2 uRubhen, uSimon, uLevi, noJuda;" 
Exodus1:3 uIsakare, uZebhulon, noBhenjamin;" 
Exodus1:4 uDan, uNafetali, uGadi, noAshere." 
Exodus1:5 Bebonke abayinzala kaYakobi babengamashumi asixhenxe. Kaloku yena uJosefu wayeseleseJiputa kakade. 
Exodus1:6 Ekuhambeni kwexesha wafa uJosefu nabantakwabo, naso sonke eso sizukulwana." 
Exodus1:7 Kambe ke yona inzala yabo, amaSirayeli, yaqhama yanda kakhulu. Ewe, yanda yaphinda-phindana, yakhula nangamanani, futhi iluqilima, yada yalizalisa elaseJiputa." 
Exodus1:8 Ke kaloku kwavela kumkani wumbi owayengazi nto ngoJosefu, wangumlawuli kwelaseJiputa." 
Exodus1:9 Wabhekisa kubantu bakhe, wathi: “Niyawabona na ukwanda kwawo la maSirayeli, niqonda na ukuba aluqilima?" 
Exodus1:10 Ngoko ke masihlale sivundlile, hleze athi akwanda ngaphezu koku adibane neentshaba zethu ngexesha lemfazwe, asihlasele, afumane ithuba lokubaleka emke kweli lizwe.”" 
Exodus1:11 Ngoko ke, ukuwaphul' iimpondo amaSirayeli, amaJiputa awamisela iinduna, khon' ukuze asetyenziswe nzima. Zakhiwa ngolu hlobo ke izixeko zokumkani, iPitom neRamesi, ezazingoovimba." 
Exodus1:12 Kambe ke, okukhona bawatshutshisayo amaSirayeli, yaba kokukhona andayo, alizalisa lonke ilizwe. Le meko ke yawenza ahlala exhaleni elingathethekiyo amaJiputa ngenxa yamaSirayeli." 
Exodus1:13 Ngoku ke aphatheka kabuhlungu amaSirayeli, akhohlakalelwa, enziwa amakhoboka ngamaJiputa. Latsho laxubayela ke ngakumaSirayeli, kuba asetyenziswa ekwenzeni izitena, nasemasimini, nakuyo yonke imisebenzi enzima. Aye ke ebhexeshwa kungekho lusini tu!" 
Exodus1:14  
Exodus1:15 Ukumkani waseJiputa wathetha noShifra noPuwa ababelekisi bamaHebhere, wathi:" 
Exodus1:16 “Xa ninceda amaHebherekazi, aze afumane abantwana abangamakhwenkwe, babulaleni; kanti ke ningabayeka abangamantombazana baphile.”" 
Exodus1:17 Kodwa ke ababelekisi abo yayingabafazi abamoyikayo uThixo. Basuka bawaphula umyalelo kakumkani, àbawabulala amakhwenkwe lawo." 
Exodus1:18 Ukumkani ke wababiza ababelekisi abo, wababuza wathi: “Ngani ukuba nibayeke abantwana bamaHebhere abangamakhwenkwe ningababulali?”" 
Exodus1:19 Ababelekisi baphendula bathi: “AmaHebherekazi akafani namaJiputakazi; wona akufikelwa yinimba abeleka lula, singekafiki nokufika thina.”" 
Exodus1:20 Ngenxa yokuba ababelekisi bemoyika uThixo, uThixo wabavuza ngeentsapho. Ke wona amaSirayeli aya esanda ngokwanda, aba luqilima." 
Exodus1:21  
Exodus1:22 Ekugqibeleni ke ukumkani wayalela bonke abantu bakhe wathi zonke iintsana ezingamakhwenkwe zamaHebhere maziphoswe emlanjeni iNayile, ke zona ezingamantombazana ziyekwe." 
Exodus2:1 Ke kaloku indoda ethile yendlu kaLevi yathatha umfazi ezintombini zamawayo," 
Exodus2:2 waza wanzima wayizalela unyana. Umfazi lowo ke wathi akubona indlela olwaluthandeka ngayo olo sana, walufihla lwada lwaneenyanga ezintathu." 
Exodus2:3 Uthe akuba engasenako ukulufihla, walwenzela ibhaskiti ngemizi, waza wayityabeka ngetha, walufaka kuyo usana olo, waya kulubeka phakathi kweengcongolo elunxwemeni lomlambo." 
Exodus2:4 Ke yena udade walo wayemi mganyana elugcinile. 
Exodus2:5 Yesuka ke intombi kakumkani yeza kuhlamba apho emlanjeni. Ngeli thuba ke zona iintombi ezaziziimpelesi zenkosazana leyo zazizula-zula apho elunxwemeni lomlambo. Ithe ke, isahlamba njalo, yabona ibhaskiti eyayiphakathi kweengcongolo. Kwangoko yathuma enye yezo ntombi ukuba iye kuyithatha ize nayo." 
Exodus2:6 Ifikile ke nayo ibhaskiti leyo, inkosazana yayivula. Tyhini! Kuthe kanti lusana! Ngeli xesha ke usana lona lwalulila. Ithe ke yakuba ilondele usana olo inkosazana leyo, kwatsho kwasika kuyo, yathi: “Olu sana luya kuba ngomnye wabantwana bamaHebhere.”" 
Exodus2:7 Udade bosana olo wadanduluka wabhekisa apho kwinkosazana wathi: “Akungethandi na ndiye kukufunela ineni phakathi kwabafazi bamaHebhere izokukugcinela olu sana?” 
Exodus2:8 Ithe ke inkosazana: “Kulungile; hamba uze nayo.” Ke yona intombazana leyo yaya kubiza unina wosana olo. 
Exodus2:9 Uthe ke akufika inkosazana yathetha naye yathi: “Ndigcinele olu sana; ndokunika isondlo.” Bavumelana ke; waza umfazi lowo wamkhulisa loo mntwana. 
Exodus2:10 Akuba ekhulile umntwana lowo, unina wambuyisela kwinkosazana apho, yaza ke yona yamenza unyana wayo. Yamthiya igama elinguMosis, kuba isithi: “Ndimonyule emanzini.”" 
Exodus2:11 UMosis uthe akuba mdala wakhe watyelela amawabo, wawabukela esebenza nzima eqhutywa. Kwangelo xesha wabona umJiputa elimaza umwabo umHebhere." 
Exodus2:12 Akuba elaqazile waqonda ukuba akukho mntu ubukeleyo, wahlasela umJiputa lowo, wambulala, waza wamngcwaba entlabathini." 
Exodus2:13 Ngemini elandelayo wabona amaHebhere amabini esilwa, waza wathi kulo uvuyelela omnye: “Kutheni na nisilwa, nizalana nje?”" 
Exodus2:14 Ke yena wambuza wathi: “Sekungathi uyinduna nomgwebi nje, umiselwe ngubani? Ucinga ukuba ndingulaa mJiputa umbuleleyo – nam uza kundigebenga?” Akuweva la mazwi uMosis woyika, wathetha yedwa esithi: “Ithe kanti le nto iyaziwa!”" 
Exodus2:15 Akuyiva le nto ukumkani watsho wafuna ukumbulala uMosis. Kambe ke yena uMosis wasaba, waya kuhlala kwelaseMidiyan. Ke kaloku umbingeleli waseMidiyan wayeneentombi ezisixhenxe. Ngenye imini wathi uMosis esahleli ngasequleni, zafika zize kuthutha amanzi, ziwagalela emikhumbini ezaziselela kuyo iigusha zikayise." 
Exodus2:16  
Exodus2:17 Kusenjalo kwafika abanye abelusi, bazigxotha iintombi ezo, kodwa ke uMosis waba ngakuzo iintombi ezo, wazilungiselela zasela iigusha zakowazo." 
Exodus2:18 Zithe ke zakufika ekhaya iintombi ezo, uyise uRuweli wabuza wathi: “Kutheni nikhawuleze kangaka nje namhlanje?”" 
Exodus2:19 Ke zona zaphendula zathi: “Kukho umJiputa osihlanguleyo kubelusi. Ude wasikhelela namanzi, waziseza iigusha zakuthi.”" 
Exodus2:20 Kwakhona wabuza uyise wathi: “Uphi? Kungani na ukuba ningezi naye? Yizani naye, aze afumane into etyiwayo.”" 
Exodus2:21 UMosis waba selehlala apho kwambingeleli, owada wendisela intombi yakhe uZipora kuye." 
Exodus2:22 Yona ke yazala unyana, waza uMosis wamthiya igama elinguGershom, esithi: “Ndiyimbacu kwelasemzini.”" 
Exodus2:23 Emva kwexesha elide ukumkani waseJiputa wafa. AmaSirayeli ayesancwina phantsi kwedyokhwe yobukhoboka. Isimbonono sawo, ecela ukukhululwa ebukhobokeni, sada saya kufikelela kuThixo." 
Exodus2:24 Ewe, wasiva isingqala sawo, wawukhumbula umnqophiso wakhe noAbraham noIsake noYakobi." 
Exodus2:25 UThixo wayibona imeko yamaSirayeli, wawavelela." 
Exodus3:1 Ngoku ke uMosis wayesalusa imihlambi kaJetro umbingeleli waseMidiyan, uyise womkakhe. Wayikhokela ke imihlambi leyo, wanqumla entlango, wada waya kufika eHorebhe intaba kaThixo." 
Exodus3:2 Apha kulapho sabonakalayo kuye isithunywa *sikaNdikhoyo etyholweni elidangazela umlilo. Uthe ke akuqwalasela uMosis wabona ukuba okunene ityholo liyavutha, kodwa alide litshe." 
Exodus3:3 Wathetha yedwa wathi: “Makhe ndisondele ndibone lo mhlola! Ngani ukuba ityholo lingatshi?” 
Exodus3:4 *UNdikhoyo wathi akubona ukuba uMosis uyasondela efuna ukuqonda lo mbono, wamkhwaza esetyholweni apho, wathi: “Mosis! Mosis!” Wasabela ke yena wathi: “Ewe, ndim lo.”" 
Exodus3:5 UThixo wathi kuye: “Sukusondela; khulula iimbadada ezo, kuba le ndawo umi kuyo yindawo eyodwa.” Wandula wathi uThixo kuye:" 
Exodus3:6 “Mna ndinguThixo wookhokho bakho; uThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi.” UMosis ke wabugquma ubuso bakhe, kuba esoyika ukujonga uThixo." 
Exodus3:7 Waqhuba ke *uNdikhoyo wathi: “Ngenene ndiyibonile imbandezelo yabantu bam eJiputa. Ndisivile nesimbonono sabo ngenxa yâbo babatshutshisayo. Ewe, ndiyayiqonda intlungu yabo;" 
Exodus3:8 ngoku ke ndihlile ukuze ndibahlangule esandleni samaJiputa, ndibakhulule baphume kwelo lizwe, baye kwilizwe elihle eliphangaleleyo, eliphuphuma ubisi nobusi. Elo ke lelamaKanana, amaHiti, ama-Amori, amaPerezi, amaHivi, namaJebhusi." 
Exodus3:9 Kaloku isikhalo samaSirayeli side saza kufikelela kum, ibe ke ndiyibonile nengcinezelo aphantsi kwayo esandleni samaJiputa." 
Exodus3:10 Hamba ke; ndikuthuma kukumkani waseJiputa, ukuze ubakhokele baphume eJiputa abantu bam amaSirayeli.”" 
Exodus3:11 UMosis wathi kuThixo: “Kuxa ndingubani mna ukuba ndingade ndiye kukumkani ukuze ndikhuphe amaSirayeli eJiputa?” 
Exodus3:12 UThixo waphendula wathi: “Ndiya kuba nawe. Nanku umqondiso wokuba uthunywa ndim: mhla wabakhupha abo bantu eJiputa noza kundinqula mna Thixo apha kule ntaba.” 
Exodus3:13 UMosis wabuza wathi: “Ukuba ndiyile ke kumaSirayeli, ndawaxelela ukuba ndithunywe kuwo nguThixo wookhokho bawo, aza wona andibuza ukuba ngubani igama lakhe, ze ndithini?”" 
Exodus3:14 UThixo waphendula wathi: “Ndinguye uNdikhoyo. Uze uwaxelele amaSirayeli ukuba uthunywa nguNdikhoyo.” 
Exodus3:15 UThixo waqhuba wathi: “Uze uthi kumaSirayeli: ‘Ndithunywa *nguNdikhoyo, uThixo wookhokho benu: uThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi.’ Kaloku eli ligama lam nanini nanini; ndaye ke ndiya kubizwa ngalo nazizizukulwana ezizayo." 
Exodus3:16 Ngoko ke hamba uwaqokelele amadoda amakhulu amaSirayeli, uthi kuwo: ‘Ndimbonile uNdikhoyo, uThixo wookhokho benu, uThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi; uthe: “Ndinijongile ndayibona imeko enikuyo apha eJiputa;" 
Exodus3:17 ngoku ke ndizimisele ukunikhulula kule mbandezelo yaseJiputa, ndinise kwilizwe lamaKanana, amaHiti, ama-Amori, amaPerezi, amaHivi, namaJebhusi; nditsho ilizwe elivuza ubisi nobusi.” ’" 
Exodus3:18 “Ukuba ke utshilo kubo baya kukuphulaphula. Wena ke uya kuthatha amadoda amakhulu amaSirayeli, niye kukumkani waseJiputa, nithi kuye: ‘Sibonene noNdikhoyo uThixo wamaHebhere; ngoku ke siyakubongoza ukuba ukhe usikhulule, sithathe uhambo lweentsuku ezintathu, siye entlango, sibingelele simenzele idini uNdikhoyo Thixo wethu.’" 
Exodus3:19 Kambe ke ndiyazi ukuba ukumkani waseJiputa akayi kunivumela ngaphandle kokuba ndide ndimnyanzele. 
Exodus3:20 Ngoko ke mna ndiya kuwaqwakanisa amaJiputa, ndenze imimangaliso eya kuwarhwaqelisa; emva koko ke uya kunikhulula." 
Exodus3:21 “Ngaphezu koko ke amaSirayeli ndiya kuwenza axatyiswe ngamaJiputa, khon' ukuze ningahambi ningaphathanga nto." 
Exodus3:22 Kaloku wonke umfazi uya kucela kummelwane nakundwendwe olusendlwini yakhe, bamnike izinto zexabiso zesiliva negolide kwakunye nempahla yokunxiba. Ezo zinto ke ziya kuthwalwa ngoonyana neentombi zamaSirayeli. Ngalinye ke amaSirayeli aya kuyiphanga impahla yamaJiputa.”" 
Exodus4:1 UMosis waphendula wathi: “Ndiya kuthini ke ukuba abakholwa yile nto ndiyithethayo? Xa besithi: ‘Hayi, *uNdikhoyo khange abonakale kuwe.’ ”" 
Exodus4:2 UNdikhoyo wabuza wathi: “Yintoni na le isesandleni sakho?” UMosis waphendula wathi: “Yintonga.” 
Exodus4:3 Waza ke uNdikhoyo wathi: “Yiphose phantsi.” Eyiphosile ke uMosis, yajika yaba yinyoka. UMosis wee jaju phaya," 
Exodus4:4 uNdikhoyo wathi: “Yibambe ngomsila.” Ngenene ke wayibamba, yaza yajika yayintonga kwakhona." 
Exodus4:5 Ke uNdikhoyo wathi: “Uya kwenjenjalo ke ukuze amaSirayeli aqonde ukuba ubonene noNdikhoyo uThixo wookhokho bawo: uThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi.”" 
Exodus4:6 Waphinda wathetha naye uNdikhoyo wathi: “Qhusheka isandla sakho ngaphantsi kwesambatho sakho.” Wasifaka ke, wabuya wasikhupha, suka saphuma simhlophe qhwa liqhenqa." 
Exodus4:7 Waza wathi uNdikhoyo kuye: “Phinda usiqhusheke.” Akuba ephindile, wabuya wasikhupha, sabuya siphilile sifana nenxalenye yomzimba wakhe." 
Exodus4:8 Waqhuba wathi uNdikhoyo kuye: “Ukuba abakholwanga ngumqondiso wokuqala, noko baya kwanela ngulo wesibini." 
Exodus4:9 Xa ke benganeliseki yile miqondiso mibini, bengafuni nokukuphulaphula, uze ukhe amanzi emlanjeni iNayile, uwagalele emhlabeni; uya kubona ke aya kujika abe ligazi.”" 
Exodus4:10 Kambe ke uMosis waphendula uNdikhoyo wathi: “Hayi, Mhlekazi, kaloku andizange ndibe liciko ekuthetheni; ibe ke nangoku okoko wathethayo nam, andikwazi ukuthetha; ndilithintitha.”" 
Exodus4:11 UNdikhoyo ke wathi kuye: “Kanti ngubani owenza umntu akwazi ukuthetha; ingubani omenza angakwazi, okanye abe sisithulu? Ngubani omenza abone, okanye abe yimfama? Asindim na, mna Ndikhoyo?" 
Exodus4:12 Hayi bo! Hamba, kaloku ndiya kukunceda ukwazi ukuthetha, ndiya kukufundisa oko ufanele ukukuthetha.”" 
Exodus4:13 UMosis uphinde wathi: “Hayi, Mhlekazi, ndiyakubongoza, thuma mntu wumbi.”" 
Exodus4:14 Kwesi sithuba ke uNdikhoyo wacaphuka nguMosis, wathi: “Andithi kanene unomkhuluwa onguAron umLevi? Ndiyazi ukuba yena uyakwazi ukuthetha; nangoku nanko esiza kukuhlangabeza; futhi uya kuvuya gqitha akukubona." 
Exodus4:15 Wena ke uya kubhekisa kuye, abe ngumlomo wakho. Mna ndiya kuninceda nobabini ekuthetheni, ndinazise emanikwenze." 
Exodus4:16 Ke yena uya kuba ngumlomo wakho ebantwini, wena ke ube nguthixo kuye, athethe egameni lakho." 
Exodus4:17 Kambe ke sukuyishiya le ntonga; kaloku uya kuyenza ngayo imimangaliso.” 
Exodus4:18 Ke kaloku uMosis wagoduka waya kwaJetro uyise womkakhe, wafika wathi: “Ndikhulule ndiye eJiputa kumawethu, khon' ukuze ndive impilo yawo.” Wathi uJetro: “Hamba. Ndlela-ntle!”" 
Exodus4:19 *UNdikhoyo ke wathetha noMosis kwalapho eMidiyan, wathi: “Hamba uphindele eJiputa, kuba abantu ababezungula ubomi bakho abasekho.”" 
Exodus4:20 UMosis ke wakhwelisa umkakhe nabantwana edonkini, waphindela kwelaseJiputa, ephethe intonga awayeyiyalezwe nguThixo." 
Exodus4:21 UNdikhoyo wamyaleza uMosis, wathi: “Wakufika eJiputa uzuyenze phambi kokumkani yonke imimangaliso endikunike amandla okuyenza. Kodwa ke ndiya kuyiqaqadekisa intliziyo yakhe, angavumi ukuwakhulula amaSirayeli.”" 
Exodus4:22 Waqhuba wathi: “Uze uthi apho kukumkani: ‘UNdikhoyo uthi: USirayeli ngunyana wam wamazibulo; 
Exodus4:23 ngoko ke mkhulule aye kundikhonza; kuba ukuba ngaba uyala, ndiya kubulala unyana wakho wamazibulo. ’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Kwathi apho babelalise khona uNdikhoyo wamvunukela uMosis, efuna ukumbulala," 
Exodus4:25 koko wesuka uZipora wathatha intshengeca yelitye lenyengane, wolusa unyana wakhe, waza ngokunjalo wachukumisa iinyawo zikaMosis, esithi: “Ngenene kum ungumyeni wegazi.” Wayesitsho exela ulwaluko. Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo wamyeka uMosis." 
Exodus4:26  
Exodus4:27 Wathi ke uNdikhoyo kuAron: “Yiya entlango, uhlangabeze uMosis.” Wanduluka ke uAron, baza bahlangana entabeni kaThixo, wamanga." 
Exodus4:28 UMosis ke wabalisela uAron onke amazwi awawathethayo kuye uNdikhoyo, ngokunjalo nemiqondiso awamnika yona." 
Exodus4:29 Bahamba bobabini ke, bafika bawaqokelela amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli." 
Exodus4:30 Ke uAron wawaphalaza kuwo onke amazwi awayethethwe nguNdikhoyo kuMosis, ngokunjalo nemiqondiso leyo wayeyinikiwe wayenza phambi kwabo." 
Exodus4:31 Bathi ke abantu, bakuba bevile, bebonile nokubona, baneliseka, baqonda ukuba uthe kanti uNdikhoyo usivile isimbonono samaSirayeli, wayiqonda nembandezelo akuyo. Ngoko ke besuka bee guqaqa banqula." 
Exodus5:1 Ke kaloku uMosis noAron baya kukumkani waseJiputa, bathetha naye bathi: “Wenjenje ukuthetha *uNdikhoyo uThixo wamaSirayeli: ‘Khulula abantu bam bahambe baye kundenzela itheko entlango.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Ukumkani ke yena waphendula wathi: “Kanti kuxa engubani uNdikhoyo ukuba ndingade ndimthobele ndiwakhulule amaSirayeli? Hayi bo! Andazani naye mna; ngoko ke amaSirayeli àkahamb' apha.” 
Exodus5:3 Ke bona bathi: “Sibonene naye uThixo wamaHebhere. Siyakubongoza ke ngoko ukuba usivumele sithathe uhambo lweentsuku ezintathu, siye entlango, siyokwenzela uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu idini; kungenjalo úya kusihlasela ngezibetho okanye ngekrele.”" 
Exodus5:4 Ukumkani wabaphendula ooMosis noAron wathi: “Kutheni ke ngoku nibaphazamisa nje aba bantu emsebenzini wabo? Buyelani emsebenzini!” 
Exodus5:5 Waza ukumkani waleka ngelithi: “Niyabona ukuba olu hlanga lwenu selwande kakhulu, kodwa nina nithi maluyeke lungasebenzi!”" 
Exodus5:6 Kwangaloo mini ukumkani wabhekisa kwiinduna kunye namagosa abasebenzi," 
Exodus5:7 wathi: “Ze ningabi sabanika ingca yokwenza izitena abasebenzi njengangaphambili, koko mabazizabalazele ngokwabo," 
Exodus5:8 kodwa lona inani lezitena abazenzayo lingabi ngaphantsi nakancinci kwelesiqhelo, kuba bangenwe bubuvila, yiyo le nto sebekhala ngokuya kubingelela kuThixo wabo." 
Exodus5:9 Ngamampunge lawo; baqhubeni basebenze bathi nca, khon' ukuze bangabi nalo ithuba lokuphulaphula imbudede yobuxoki.”" 
Exodus5:10 Ngoko ke iinduna namagosa zabaxelela abasebenzi zathi: “Ukumkani uthi anisazukuyinikwa ingca yokwenza izitena," 
Exodus5:11 koko noyichola-chola ngokwenu naphi na apho ninokuyizuza khona; kambe ke lona inani lezitena akufuneki lihle nakancinci.” 
Exodus5:12 Abasebenzi ke bathi saa kulo lonke elaseJiputa, berhugula ingca." 
Exodus5:13 Ke zona iinduna zazingabaphi thuba, zisithi: “Wugqibeni umsebenzi wosuku ngalunye ngokwesiqhelo, njengangokuya beniyinikwa ingca.”" 
Exodus5:14 Amagosa angamaSirayeli awayemiselwe ziinduna ezingamaJiputa ayekatswa zizo, kusithiwa: “Kutheni izitena zingafikeleli nje kwinani lesiqhelo?”" 
Exodus5:15 Kwesi sithuba ke amagosa lawo aya kukhalaza kukumkani, athi: “Mhlekazi, ngani ukuba uziphathe ngolu hlobo izicaka zakho?" 
Exodus5:16 Awusasiniki ingca yokwenza izitena, kodwa siyaqhutywa, kusithiwa masenze izitena. Ewe, siyabethwa, kanti isizathu sisebantwini bakho.”" 
Exodus5:17 Ukumkani waphendula wathi: “Niyanqena, mavilandini! Yiyo le nto nibhomboloza ngokuya kubingelela kuNdikhoyo." 
Exodus5:18 Hambani nimk' apha! Emsebenzini! Anizukunikwa nangca apha, ibe ke zona izitena enimiselwe ukuba nizenze soze ziwe phantsi.”" 
Exodus5:19 Amagosa lawo athe akuva kusithiwa inani lezitena soze lihle, aqonda ukuba lixubayele." 
Exodus5:20 Athi ke akudibana noMosis noAron, bevela kwakumkani:" 
Exodus5:21 “Wanga uNdikhoyo wayibona le nto wanigweba, kuba nisigqwalisile kukumkani neenduna zakhe; ngoku bafumene isizathu sokusibulala.”" 
Exodus5:22 UMosis ke waya kukhala *kuNdikhoyo, wathi: “Awu, Mhlekazi, ngani ukuba aba bantu ubazisele ishwangusha elinje? Wawundithumela ntoni kakade?" 
Exodus5:23 Kuba ke oko ndaya kuthetha nokumkani ngenxa yakho, wabaphatha gadalala, ibe ke nawe awubahlanguli konke.”" 
Exodus6:1 Wathi ke uNdikhoyo kuMosis: “Uza kuyibona ke ngoku into endiza kuyenza kukumkani waseJiputa. Ngamandla am ndomnyanzela abakhulule aba bantu; enyanisweni ndiza kumenza abagxothe ngokwakhe emhlabeni wakhe.” 
Exodus6:2 UThixo wathetha noMosis wathi: “*NdinguNdikhoyo. 
Exodus6:3 Ndabonakala kuAbraham nakuIsake nakuYakobi njengoThixo uSomandla, kodwa ke andizange ndizazise kubo ngegama lam uNdikhoyo." 
Exodus6:4 Ngaphezu koko ndênza umnqophiso nabo, ndathi ndobanika ilizwe laseKanana, apho boma khona baxhwarhe okwabahambi." 
Exodus6:5 Ngoku ke ndisivile isingqala samaSirayeli ngenxa yokukhotyozwa ngamaJiputa, ndaye ke ndiwukhumbule loo mnqophiso." 
Exodus6:6 Ngoko ke yithi kumaSirayeli: ‘NdinguNdikhoyo, ndaye ke ndiza kunikhupha kwingcinezelo yamaJiputa, ndinikhulule kwiimbophelelo zawo. Ndiya kunihlangula ngesandla esigadalala nangezigwebo ezingqongqo." 
Exodus6:7 Ndiya kunenza abantu bam, mna ndibe nguThixo wenu. Nani ke niya kuqonda ukuba mna Ndikhoyo ndinguThixo wenu onikhulule ebukhobokeni eJiputa." 
Exodus6:8 Ndiya kunikhokela, ndinise kwilizwe endafungayo ukuba ndolinika uAbraham, uIsake, noYakobi. Ndiya kunipha lona, libe lelenu; kaloku mna ndinguNdikhoyo.’ ”" 
Exodus6:9 La mazwi uMosis wawaxela kumaSirayeli, kodwa ngenxa yokudakumba nangenxa yenkohlakalo yasebukhobokeni akamphulaphulanga." 
Exodus6:10 Wathi ke uNdikhoyo kuMosis: 
Exodus6:11 “Hamba uye kukumkani waseJiputa, uthi ndithi kuye makawakhulule amaSirayeli, aphume emhlabeni wakhe.”" 
Exodus6:12 UMosis waphendula wathi: “Njengokuba engandiphulaphuli nje amaSirayeli, uya kundiphulaphula njani ke ukumkani? Ibe ke andililo naciko.”" 
Exodus6:13 Naxa kunjalo uNdikhoyo wathetha nabo ooMosis noAron, wabathumela kumaSirayeli nakukumkani, esithi amaSirayeli makakhutshwe aphume eJiputa." 
Exodus6:14 Nazi iintloko zezindlu. Oonyana bakaRubhen amazibulo kaSirayeli, nguHanoki, noPalu, noHezeron, noKarmi. Ezo ke zizindlu zakwaRubhen." 
Exodus6:15 Oonyana bakaSimon nguJemuweli, noJamin, no-Ohadi, noJakin, noZoware, kunye noShawule unyana womKananakazi. Ezi ke zizindlu zakwaSimon." 
Exodus6:16 Oonyana bakaLevi ngokuzana kwabo nguGershon, noKohati, noMerari. ULevi ke wahlala iminyaka elikhulu elinamashumi amathathu anesixhenxe." 
Exodus6:17 Naba oonyana bakaGershon ngokwezindlu zabo: nguLibheni noShimeyi. 
Exodus6:18 Oonyana bakaKohati nguAmram, noIzare, noHebron, noUziyeli. Ke yena uKohati wahlala iminyaka elikhulu elinamashumi amathathu anantathu." 
Exodus6:19 Oonyana bakaMerari nguMalin Mushi. Ezi ke zizindlu zakwaLevi ngokokuzana kwazo. 
Exodus6:20 UAmram wathatha udade boyise uJokobhedi, owamzalela uAron noMosis. UAmram wahlala iminyaka elikhulu elinamashumi amathathu anesixhenxe." 
Exodus6:21 Oonyana bakaIzare nguKora, noNifege, noZikri." 
Exodus6:22 Oonyana bakaUziyeli nguMishayeli, noElifazan, noSitri." 
Exodus6:23 UAron wathatha uElishebha intombi ka-Aminadabhi, udade boNashon, owazala uNadabhi, noAbhihu, noElazare." 
Exodus6:24 Oonyana bakaKora nguAsire, noElikana, noAbhiyasafu. Ezo ke zizindlu zakwaKora." 
Exodus6:25 UElazare unyana ka-Aron wathatha enye yeentombi zikaPutiyeli eyazala uFineyasi. Ezi ke ziintloko zezindlu zakwaLevi. 
Exodus6:26 Ngulaa Aron ke lo wathi benoMosis bathunywa nguNdikhoyo wathi: “Hambani niyokukhupha amaSirayeli eJiputa.” 
Exodus6:27 Ngabo abâthetha nokumkani waseJiputa ngokukhululwa kwamaSirayli eJiputa, lo Mosis nalo Aron." 
Exodus6:28 Mhlenikwezeni uNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis kwelaseJiputa," 
Exodus6:29 wathi kuye: “NdinguNdikhoyo; ukumkani waseJiputa mxelele yonke into endiyithetha kuwe.” 
Exodus6:30 Kambe ke uMosis wathi: “Uyandazi ukuba andilociko lokuthetha; angandiphulaphula njani ukumkani?” 
Exodus7:1 *UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi: “Uyabona ke, wena ndiza kukwenza ube ngathi unguThixo kukumkani waseJiputa, yena umkhuluwa wakho abe *ngumshumayeli wakho." 
Exodus7:2 UAron uze umxelele konke endikuyalela kona, ke yena uya kubhekisa kukumkani, atsho akhulule amaSirayeli aphume emhlabeni wakhe." 
Exodus7:3 Kambe ke ndiya kumqaqadekisa ukumkani, angavumi ukuwakhulula amaSirayeli noba sendiyiphinda-phinda kangakanani na imiqondiso nemimangaliso yam kwelaseJiputa." 
Exodus7:4 Ngoko ke ndiya kuba ngqongqo kwelaseJiputa, ndilohlwaye. Ke bona abantu bam amaSirayeli ndiya kubakhupha ngendlu yabo." 
Exodus7:5 Igunya endiya kuwakhupha ngalo amaSirayeli eJiputa liya kubetha aqonde amaJiputa ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo.” 
Exodus7:6 Ke uMosis noAron bênza kanye ngendlela ababeyalelwe ngayo nguNdikhoyo. 
Exodus7:7 Ukuthetha kwabo nokumkani waseJiputa uMosis wayenamashumi asibhozo eminyaka, ke yena uAron emashumi asibhozo nantathu." 
Exodus7:8 *UNdikhoyo wabayala ooMosis noAron, wathi:" 
Exodus7:9 “Xa ukumkani esithi: ‘Ndibonise ummangaliso,’ uze uthi kuAron: ‘Phosa induku yakho phambi kokumkani.’ Yojika ke ibe yinyoka.”" 
Exodus7:10 Bahamba ke uMosis noAron, baya kukumkani, benza njengoko babeyalelwe nguNdikhoyo. UAron wayiphosa phambi kokumkani namaphakathi akhe induku yakhe, yaza yajika yayinyoka." 
Exodus7:11 Kuthe ke kwakuba nje, ukumkani wabiza oosiyazi namaqili elaseJiputa, nabo bazijika ezabo iinduku ngemilingo yabo." 
Exodus7:12 Ewe, baziphosa phantsi, yayileyo yajika yaba yinyoka; koko ke yona eka-Aron yasuka yaziginya zonke." 
Exodus7:13 Kodwa ke ukumkani wenza njengoko wayetshilo uNdikhoyo, intliziyo yakhe yaqaqadeka, akabaphulaphula." 
Exodus7:14 Ke kaloku *uNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Ukumkani uneenkani; akavumi ukubakhulula abantu bam. 
Exodus7:15 Ngoko ke, phumani kusasa xa aya emlanjeni, niyokumlindela elunxwemeni lomlambo, niphethe laa nduku yayijike yaba yinyoka." 
Exodus7:16 Thethani naye nenjenje: ‘UNdikhoyo uThixo wamaHebhere wandithuma esithi: “Khulula abantu bam, baye kundinqula entlango!” Kambe ke awukayenzi loo nto unangoku." 
Exodus7:17 Ngoku ke uNdikhoyo uthi: “Nantsi ke into eza kukwenza ukuba uqonde ukuba mna ndinguNdikhoyo” – la manzi omlambo iNayile ndiza kuwabetha ngale nduku isesandleni sam, atsho ajike abe ligazi." 
Exodus7:18 Iintlanzi ziya kufa, umlambo utsho unuke, amaJiputa atsho awacekise amanzi eNayile.’ ”" 
Exodus7:19 UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis ukuba athi kuAron: “Thatha induku yakho, uwalekuze ngayo amanzi aseJiputa, emilanjeni, ezintlanjeni, emachibini, nasemaquleni, atsho ajike abe ligazi. Koba ligazi ke kulo lonke elaseJiputa; nditsho nasezityeni zomthi nakwezamatye.”" 
Exodus7:20 UMosis noAron benza njengoko babeyalelwe nguNdikhoyo. UAron wayiphakamisa induku yakhe ekho ukumkani namaphakathi akhe, wawabetha amanzi omlambo iNayile, aza ke onke amanzi omlambo lowo ajika aba ligazi." 
Exodus7:21 Zafa ke iintlanzi apho emlanjeni, aza amanzi awo anuka kangangokuba amaJiputa angabi nako ukuwasela; yaba ligazi nje konke kwelaseJiputa." 
Exodus7:22 Ngemilingo yawo amaqili aseJiputa nawo ayenza loo nto yayisenziwa ngooMosis. Ngenxa yoko ukumkani waqaqadeka, akavuma ukubaphulaphula ooMosis noAron njengoko wayetshilo uNdikhoyo." 
Exodus7:23 Ndaweni yaloo nto wasuka wee khwitshi wangena ebhotwe, akayikhathalela le nto ihlileyo." 
Exodus7:24 AmaJiputa wona azigrumbela amanzi apho kufuphi nomlambo, kuba la omlambo ayengaseleki." 
Exodus7:25 Kwadlula iintsuku ezisixhenxe emveni kwesibetho saseNayile. 
Exodus8:1 *UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi: “Yiya kukumkani, uthi ndithi kuye: ‘Khulula abantu bam baye kundinqula." 
Exodus8:2 Ukuba uyala ukubakhulula, ilizwe lakho ndiya kulihlasela ngesibetho samasele." 
Exodus8:3 Umlambo iNayile uya kuphuphuma ngamasele; oda aye kufika nakwakho. Aya kutaka-taka endlwini yakho yokulala, emandlalweni, ezindlwini zamaphakathi, nasezindlwini zabo bonke abantu bakho. Amasele aya kugxalathelana kumaziko okubhaka, nakwizitya zokuxovela;" 
Exodus8:4 aya kuxhumela kuwe, kubantu bakho, nakumaphakathi akho.’ ”" 
Exodus8:5 UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi makathi kuAron: “Yolula isandla sakho, uwalekuze ngenduku leyo amanzi emilambo, aweentlambo, nawamaqula, khon' ukuze kunyakazele amasele kulo lonke elaseJiputa.”" 
Exodus8:6 Ngenene ke uAron wawalekuza amanzi aseJiputa ngenduku yakhe, kwaza kwavela amasele, anyakazela kulo lonke." 
Exodus8:7 Ngemilingo yawo amaqili aseJiputa âkwazi nawo ukuyenza loo nto yayisenziwa nguAron, aza anyakazela amasele kwelaseJiputa." 
Exodus8:8 Ke ukumkani wabiza uMosis noAron, wathi kubo: “Khanimbongoze uNdikhoyo awasuse la masele kum nakubantu bam, ukuze mna ndibakhulule abantu bakowenu, baye kubingelela kuNdikhoyo.”" 
Exodus8:9 UMosis waphendula wathi: “Loo nto ndingayenza ngovuyo, nto nje wena misa ixesha ofuna ndikuthandazele ngalo wena namaphakathi akho nabo bonke abantu bakho, ukuze nahlukane namasele, asale emlanjeni iNayile kuphela.”" 
Exodus8:10 Ukumkani ke waphendula wathi: “Makaphele ngomso.” Wathi ke uMosis: “Kuya kuba njengokuba uthetha, khon' ukuze uqonde ukuba akakho onjengoNdikhoyo uThixo wethu." 
Exodus8:11 Amasele aya kumka kuwe nasezindlwini zakho, kumaphakathi nakubantu bakho, asale emlanjeni iNayile kuphela.”" 
Exodus8:12 UMosis noAron bamshiya ke ukumkani. UMosis wambongoza uNdikhoyo ngokubhekisele kumasele awayenyakazela kwakumkani. 
Exodus8:13 Naye uNdikhoyo wenza ngokwesicelo sikaMosis; aza ke amasele afa ezindlwini, ezinkundleni, nasemasimini." 
Exodus8:14 Aqokelelwa ke, aba ziinqumba; yeka ke iphunga!" 
Exodus8:15 Njengoko wayetshilo uNdikhoyo, ukumkani uthe akubona ukuba kukho isiqabu, waqal' emva ukuqaqadeka, akavuma ukubaphulaphula ooMosis noAron." 
Exodus8:16 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Yitsho kuAron avuse uthuli ngenduku yakhe, ukuze kuvele iimbuzane kulo lonke elaseJiputa.”" 
Exodus8:17 UAron ke waphakamisa induku yakhe, wabetha ngayo emhlabeni, kwaza kwavela iimbuzane, zabahlasela abantu kunye nezilwanyana. Kulo lonke elaseJiputa kwaphithizela iimbuzane." 
Exodus8:18 Athe ke amaqili aseJiputa, akuzama ukwenza kwaloo nto, suka azavela iimbuzane. Kambe ke zaphithizela iimbuzane kulo lonke, zahlasela umntu kwakunye nesilwanyana." 
Exodus8:19 Ke wona amaqili angqina athi kukumkani: “Ngumnwe kaThixo lo.” Kambe ke, njengoko uNdikhoyo wayetshilo, yena ukumkani wankaniza, akaphulaphula." 
Exodus8:20 Waphinda *uNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Vuka kusasa ngomso, uhlangabeze ukumkani xa aya emlanjeni, uthethe naye uthi: ‘UNdikhoyo uthi: “Khulula abantu bam, baye kundikhonza;" 
Exodus8:21 okanye xa ungayenzi loo nto, ndiya kukuthumela ngamabubu eempukane, zikuhlasele wena namaphakathi akho, nabantu bakho. Ziya kuzalisa ezindlwini zakho, nakwezabantu bakho, nakuwo wonke umhlaba waseJiputa." 
Exodus8:22 Kodwa ke eGoshen, apho kukho abantu bam, aziyi kubakho, khon' ukuze uqonde ukuba mna Ndikhoyo ndikho apha kweli lizwe." 
Exodus8:23 Ndiya kubakhetha abantu bam kubantu bakho ngokubakhusela. Loo mqondiso ke úya kuzibonela ngokwakho kusasa kusile.” ’ ” 
Exodus8:24 Ngenene ke uNdikhoyo wathumela amabubu eempukane komkhulu nakwimizi yamaphakathi. Lonke elaseJiputa laba semngciphekweni wentshabalalo ngenxa yeempukane. 
Exodus8:25 Ukumkani wababiza ooMosis noAron, wathi kubo: “Hambani niye kubingelela kuThixo wenu, kodwa ningaphumi kweli lizwe.”" 
Exodus8:26 UMosis waphendula wathi: “Ayinakulunga loo nto. Kaloku isilwanyana esiza kwenza ngaso idini likaNdikhoyo uThixo wethu, silisikizi kumaJiputa. Ngoko ke singathi, siyenzile loo nto phambi kwamaJiputa, asixulube ngamatye, sife." 
Exodus8:27 Kufuneka sithathe uhambo lweentsuku ezintathu, siye entlango, simenzele khona idini uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu ngokomlomo wakhe.”" 
Exodus8:28 Ukumkani waqhuba wathi: “Ndiyanikhulula nihambe niye kubingelela kuNdikhoyo uThixo wenu entlango, kodwa ke ze ningayi kude kakhulu. Ndithandazele ke!”" 
Exodus8:29 UMosis wathi: “Ndakuba ndimkile ke ndiya kumbongoza uNdikhoyo. Wona ke amabubu eempukane aya kumka aphele ngomso, angabi sakuhlupha wena namaphakathi akho, ngokunjalo nabantu bakho. Kambe ke, wena kumkani, ungaphindi usiqhathe ubalele abantu ukuya kubingelela kuNdikhoyo.”" 
Exodus8:30 Ephumile ke uMosis kwakumkani, watarhuzisa kuNdikhoyo," 
Exodus8:31 waza wazisusa iimpukane ezo kukumkani, kumaphakathi, nasebantwini bakhe, akwasala nale inye." 
Exodus8:32 Nakwesi isihlandlo ukumkani waphinda waqaqadeka, wankaniza, akawakhulula amaSirayeli." 
Exodus9:1 *UNdikhoyo wabhekisa kuMosis wathi: “Yiya kukumkani waseJiputa, uthi kuye: ‘UNdikhoyo uThixo wamaHebhere uthethe wenjenje: “Khulula abantu bam, baye kundikhonza.”" 
Exodus9:2 Ukuba uyala ukubakhulula," 
Exodus9:3 uNdikhoyo uya kukohlwaya ngokuthumela isibetho esoyikekayo kwimfuyo yakho: amahashe, iidonki, iinkamela, iinkomo, iigusha, neebhokhwe." 
Exodus9:4 Uya kuyikhetha imfuyo yamaSirayeli kweyamaJiputa. EyamaSirayeli imfuyo soze ife. 
Exodus9:5 Le nto ke iya kwenzeka ngomso.’ ” 
Exodus9:6 Ngengomso ke uNdikhoyo wenza njengoko wayethethile. Yonke imfuyo yamaJiputa yafa, kodwa kweyamaSirayeli zange kufe nob' ibe nye." 
Exodus9:7 Ukumkani wathuma amadoda aye kukhangela ukuba kube njani na kwimfuyo yamaSirayeli, waza waxelelwa ukuba akufanga nale inye. Naxa kunjalo wankaniza, akavuma ukuwakhulula amaSirayeli." 
Exodus9:8 *UNdikhoyo wabiza uMosis noAron, wathi kubo: “Yikhani uthuthu ngezandla, nize niye kwakumkani, uMosis aluphose phezulu ukumkani ebukele." 
Exodus9:9 Luya kuphephetheka njengothuli kulo lonke elaseJiputa. Luya kudala amathumba aya kubhidla abe zizilonda ebantwini nasezilwanyaneni kulo lonke elaseJiputa.” 
Exodus9:10 Baluthatha ke uthuthu eziko, baya kwakumkani, waza uMosis waluphosa phezulu ekho nokumkani. Lwaphephetheka ke, lwaza lwadala amathumba asuka abhidla aba zizilonda ebantwini nasezilwanyaneni." 
Exodus9:11 Ngenxa yamathumba abo abemilingo bona abazange babe nako ukumelana noMosis. Kaloku onke amaJiputa ayenamathumba. 
Exodus9:12 Kambe ke uNdikhoyo, njengoko wayetshilo kwangaphambili, wamenza waneenkani ukumkani, akavuma ukuphulaphula ooMosis noAron." 
Exodus9:13 *UNdikhoyo waphinda wathetha noMosis wathi: “Vuka kusasa ngomso, uye kukumkani, umxelele ukuba uNdikhoyo uThixo wamaHebhere uthi: ‘Khulula abantu bam, baye kundikhonza." 
Exodus9:14 Kwesi sihlandlo ndiya kukuhlabanisela ngezibetho, wena namaphakathi nabantu bakho, nitsho niqonde ukuba ehlabathini liphela akakho onjengam." 
Exodus9:15 Ukuba bendithanda ngesendisolule isandla sam, ndanitshayela ngesibetho, nanyamalala emhlabeni." 
Exodus9:16 Kodwa ke ndisaniyekile, kuba ndifuna ukunibonisa ubungangamsha bam, luze luthi nodumo lwam lunwenwe ehlabathini liphela." 
Exodus9:17 Njengokuba usazingca nje, ungavumi ukubakhulula abantu bam," 
Exodus9:18 uyabona ke, ngomso ngeli xesha ndiya kuthumela isitshu sesichoto esingazanga sabonwa nanini na ezimbalini zeJiputa." 
Exodus9:19 Ngoko ke thumela iye kuqokelelwa yonke imfuyo yakho, ivalelwe, khon' ukuze isinde. Kaloku ukufika kwaso yonke into ephandle, umntu kwanesilwanyana, iya kutshabalala.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Ke kaloku loo maphakathi kakumkani ayenevuso ngenxa yomlomo kaNdikhoyo, athumela amakhoboka, yaqokelelwa imfuyo yawo, yavalelwa." 
Exodus9:21 Kambe ke lawo angazange alikhathalele ilizwi likaNdikhoyo awayeka emadlelweni amakhoboka kunye nemfuyo yawo. 
Exodus9:22 UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Phakamisela isandla sakho esibhakabhakeni, ukuze kuwe isichotho kulo lonke elaseJiputa, sibethe abantu, izilwanyana, nako konke okuntshula emhlabeni.”" 
Exodus9:23 UMosis ke wayiphakamisa induku yakhe, waza uNdikhoyo wayivulela imibane, iindudumo, nesichotho, zatsho kwakubi kwelaseJiputa." 
Exodus9:24 Wasithulula isichotho, yalenyeza imibane, zatsho ngenzwinini eyayingazange yabonwa ezimbalini zeJiputa." 
Exodus9:25 Eso sichotho sageqa konke okwakuphandle, abantu, izilwanyana, izityalo, kunye nemithi, kulo lonke elaseJiputa." 
Exodus9:26 Kanti ke eGoshen, umhlaba wamaSirayeli, zange sifike isichotho." 
Exodus9:27 Ukumkani ke wathumela buphuthu-phuthu, wathi makubizwe uMosis noAron, waza wathi kubo: “Ngoku ndiyavuma, ndonile mna nabantu bam; uNdikhoyo yena akaphazamanga." 
Exodus9:28 Khawuncede umbongoze uNdikhoyo. Kwanele ngoku – ezi ndudumo nemibane zisongamele! Ndiza kunikhulula ndingaphozisanga maseko!” 
Exodus9:29 Waphendula uMosis wathi: “Nje ukuba ndiphume apha esixekweni, ndiya kuzolulela kuNdikhoyo izandla zam, sitsho sithothe isiphango, sinqamke isichotho, khon' ukuze uqonde ukuba lelikaNdikhoyo ihlabathi liphela." 
Exodus9:30 Kambe ke wena namaphakathi akho ndiyanibona ukuba anikamqondi uNdikhoyo uThixo.” 
Exodus9:31 Umqhaphu nerhasi zavuthuluka zatshabalala. Kaloku irhasi yona kwakuxa ihlanzayo; umqhaphu ke wona kuxa udubulayo. 
Exodus9:32 Kanti ke ingqolowa nehabile zange zonakale, kuba zazisephantsi." 
Exodus9:33 Akumka ke uMosis kwakumkani, ephumile nasesixekweni, waphakamela kuNdikhoyo ngomthandazo. Ngoko nangoko sathotha isiphango, yapheza nemvula." 
Exodus9:34 Uthe ke ukumkani akubona ukuba sithothile isiphango nemvula inqamkile, waphindela ukona oku; kuba waphinda waqaqadeka, wankaniza, yena ngokunjalo namaphakathi akhe." 
Exodus9:35 Ewe, wankaniza wala ukuwakhulula amaSirayeli ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis." 
Exodus10:1 *UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis wathi: “Yiya kwakumkani. Kaloku yena namaphakathi akhe ndibaqaqadekisile, ukuze ndifumane ithuba lokwenza le miqondiso phakathi kwabo," 
Exodus10:2 nokuze nibe nako ukubalisela abantwana nabazukulwana benu. Niya kubanika ingcombolo yendlela endabonisa ngayo ubungangamsha bam kumaJiputa, nangemiqondiso endiyenzileyo phakathi kwawo, khon' ukuze nani niqonde ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo.”" 
Exodus10:3 UMosis noAron ke baya kwakumkani, bathi kuye: “UNdikhoyo uThixo wamaHebhere uthi: ‘Koda kube nini ungavumi ukuzithoba kum? Khawubakhulule abantu bam, baye kundikhonza." 
Exodus10:4 Ukuba uyala, ngomso ndiza kuthumela iinkumbi emhlabeni wakho." 
Exodus10:5 Ziya kuba yinyambalala eya kuwugquma tu umhlaba wakho xa uwonke. Yonke into esinde kwesiya sichotho ziya kuyinqunqutha iphele tu! Nditsho nomthi lo wembala. 
Exodus10:6 Ziya kunyakazela ezindlwini zakho, kwezamaphakathi, nakuzo zonke izindlu zamaJiputa. Lowo iya kuba ngumbono ongazange walanywa ngooyihlo ngokunjalo nooyihlo-mkhulu ezimbalini zeli lizwe.’ ” Akuba etshilo waphuma, wemka kwakumkani." 
Exodus10:7 Amaphakathi kakumkani abhekisa kuye athi: “Yaz'ba kode kube nini na lo mfo elukhwembe-khwembe kuthi? Nceda, khulula aba bantu baye kukhonza uNdikhoyo uThixo wabo. Ngaba awukaqondi ukuba iJiputa itshabalele?”" 
Exodus10:8 Babizwa ke ooMosis noAron, babuyela kukumkani, waza wathi kubo: “Hambani niye kukhonza uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu. Kodwa ke ngoobani kanye abaza kuhamba?”" 
Exodus10:9 UMosis wathi: “Kuza kuhamba abadala nabanci, oonyana neentombi, iigusha neenkomo. Kaloku kufuneka senzele uNdikhoyo itheko.”" 
Exodus10:10 Kambe ke ukumkani waphendula wathi: “Ndifung' uNdikhoyo, soze ndinikhulule nihambe neentsapho zenu. Kakade, nithi andiniboni ukuba nindenzela iyelenqe?" 
Exodus10:11 Hayi, makuhambe amadoda odwa aye kukhonza uNdikhoyo, njengoko nanitshilo kakade.” Baza ke bakhutshwa buphuthu-phuthu apho kwakumkani." 
Exodus10:12 Kwesi sithuba ke uNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi: “Phakamisa ingalo yakho, uwangawangise kulo lonke elaseJiputa, ukuze kuvele iinkumbi eziya kunqunqutha zonke izityalo nayo yonke into eyasinda esichothweni.”" 
Exodus10:13 UMosis ke wayiphakamisa induku yakhe, wawangawangisa ngayo, waza ke uNdikhoyo wathumela umoya wasempuma, wabhudla loo mini yonke nobusuku bayo. Kwathi kusisa kwaye sekunyakazela ziinkumbi kulo lonke elaseJiputa." 
Exodus10:14 Zafika zilibubu, zanyakazela kulo lonke elaseJiputa neziphaluka zalo. Ezingako zona zazingazange zabonwa ngaphambili, zaye zingasoze zibonwe nanini na!" 
Exodus10:15 Zaba lukhoko olwawambathisa wonke umhlaba; kwatsho kwamnyama nje! Zanqunqutha zonke izityalo nemithi yeziqhamo, nako konke okwasinda mhla ngesiphango, zatsho akwasala nempunde le yegqabi eliluhlaza kulo lonke elaseJiputa." 
Exodus10:16 Ukumkani ke wababiza ngobungxamo ooMosis noAron, wathi kubo: “Ndimonile uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, ngokunjalo nani." 
Exodus10:17 Ndicela uxolo ngesono sam; ndiyanibongoza, okwesi isihlandlo khaninditarhuzisele kuNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, ayisuse le ntshabalalo!”" 
Exodus10:18 Waphuma ke uMosis, waya kuthandaza uNdikhoyo." 
Exodus10:19 UNdikhoyo ke wathumela umoya wasentshona, wazitshayela zonke iinkumbi, waya kuzeyelisela kuLwandle oluBomvu, akwasala nob' ibe nye inkumbi kwelaseJiputa." 
Exodus10:20 Kambe ke uNdikhoyo wamqaqadekisa ukumkani waseJiputa, akavuma ukuwakhulula amaSirayeli." 
Exodus10:21 Waphinda *uNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis ukuba aphakamisele isandla sakhe esibhakabhakeni, ukuze kubekho isithokothoko sobumnyama kulo lonke elaseJiputa, esatsho baziimpumputela abantu." 
Exodus10:22 Wasiphakamisa ke uMosis isandla sakhe, kwaza kwakho isithokothoko sobumnyama esabetha kwathi thsu iintsuku ezintathu kulo lonke elaseJiputa." 
Exodus10:23 Obo bumnyama ke batsho amaJiputa akabi nako nokubonana oku, engenako nokuphuma endlwini ezo ntsuku zontathu. Kanti ke kwisiphaluka samaSirayeli kwakukhanya." 
Exodus10:24 Waza ke ukumkani wabiza uMosis, wathi kuye: “Ngoku ningahamba niye kukhonza uNdikhoyo kunye nabafazi nabantwana benu, nishiye imfuyo yenu kuphela.”" 
Exodus10:25 UMosis waphendula wathi: “Kofuneka ke usinike izinto esobingelela ngazo, ngokunjalo nezokwenzela uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu amadini atshiswayo." 
Exodus10:26 Hayi bo! Asinakuyishiya imfuyo yethu; asinakushiya nob' ibe nye! Kaloku kufuneka sizikhethele ngokwethu leyo siza kuyisebenzisa xa sinqula uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu, ibe ke asinakuyazi esiza kubingelela ngayo side sifike apho siya khona.”" 
Exodus10:27 Kambe ke uNdikhoyo wamqaqadekisa ukumkani, akavuma ukubakhulula." 
Exodus10:28 Ukumkani wamgxotha uMosis, wathi: “Phuma! Zichithe! Mandingaze ndiphinde ndikubone! Mhla ndakubona ndokucim' igama!”" 
Exodus10:29 UMosis waphendula wathi: “Uthethe kakuhle! Soze uphinde undibone!” 
Exodus11:1 *UNdikhoyo wabhekisa kuMosis wathi: “Uyabona ke, ukumkani lo ndawonye nabantu bakhe ndiya kumzisela isibetho sokugqibela. Emva kweso ke uya kunikhulula nihambe. Enyanisweni uya kunigxotha niphume niphele." 
Exodus11:2 Ngoku ke yitsho ibe ngulowo nalowo kumaSirayeli acele isiliva negolide kummelwane wakhe.” 
Exodus11:3 UNdikhoyo ke wawenza axatyiswa amaSirayeli ngamaJiputa. Ngenene uMosis wayehlonitshwe gqitha ngamaphakathi kakumkani ndawonye nawo onke amaJiputa. 
Exodus11:4 UMosis waxelela ukumkani wathi: “UNdikhoyo uthi: ‘Ndiya kuphuma ezinzulwini zobusuku, ndilijikeleze lonke elaseJiputa." 
Exodus11:5 Ndiya kuwathi qwaka afe onke amazibulo, kuqalela kwelokumkani ongqendeve ebhotwe, kuye kwelekhoboka elisebenzayo, kuye kuthi xhaxhe kwizibulo lemfuyo." 
Exodus11:6 ElaseJiputa liya kuhlahlamba ngesijwilikazi esingazange seviwa ngaphambili, esingayi kuze siviwe nanini na." 
Exodus11:7 Kanti ke wona amaSirayeli nemfuyo yawo sobe abe nawo nowempumlo umkrwelo.’ Ngaloo ndlela ke niya kutsho niqonde ukuba uNdikhoyo uyahlula phakathi kwamaJiputa namaSirayeli.” 
Exodus11:8 UMosis waqukumbela ngelithi: “Ke wona la maphakathi akho aya kuza kum akhahlele endibongoza esithi: ‘Thatha abantu bakho, niphume niphele kweli.’ Kwakuba njalo ke ndiya kunduluka.” Akukhov' ukutsho ke, uMosis waphuma efuthekile." 
Exodus11:9 Ke kaloku uNdikhoyo wayethethe noMosis wenjenje: “Ukumkani waseJiputa akayi kukuphulaphula, khon' ukuze ndiyandise imimangaliso yam phakathi kwamaJiputa.”" 
Exodus11:10 Le mimangaliso ke uMosis noAron bayenza phambi kokumkani. Kambe ke uNdikhoyo wamqaqadekisa ukumkani waseJiputa, akavuma ukuwakhulula amaSirayeli emke eJiputa." 
Exodus12:1 *UNdikhoyo wabayalela ooMosis noAron kwelaseJiputa, wathi:" 
Exodus12:2 “Le iya kuba yinyanga yenu yokuqala enyakeni. 
Exodus12:3 Thetha namaSirayeli, uthi ngomhla weshumi kule nyanga umzi ngamnye mawuzifunele ixhwane." 
Exodus12:4 Kambe ke ukuba umzi lowo unabantu abambalwa, awunako ukulitya uligqibe ixhwane, mawudibane nommelwane, yomibini ihlanganyele ixhwane elinye ngokobubanzi beentsapho zayo. Ngoko ke umzi ngamnye uya kulinganiselwa ixhwane kwangaphambili." 
Exodus12:5 Ixhwane elo lichongwayo malingabi nasiphako, libe nonyaka ubudala. Ingalelegusha okanye elebhokhwe." 
Exodus12:6 Maligcinwe kude kube ngumhla weshumi elinesine wenyanga, apho liya kuthi lonke ibandla lamaSirayeli liwaxhele amaxhwane alo ngorhatya." 
Exodus12:7 Ngaloo mini ke baya kuthatha igazi lexhwane elo, bayidyobhe ngalo imigubasi yaloo ndlu batyela kuyo, ngapha nangapha naphezulu." 
Exodus12:8 Ngobo busuku inyama leyo ze bayose, bayifake umthi womkrakriso, bayitye, bayidibanise nesonka esenziwe ngentlama engenagwele." 
Exodus12:9 Ningakhe nilinge niyitye iluhlaza, okanye iphekiwe. Mayosiwe xa iyonke; nditsho nentloko namanqina nezibilini." 
Exodus12:10 Le nyama ke ize ingabekelwa ingomso. Xa kwenzekile yasala, ize itshiswe ngomlilo kusasa." 
Exodus12:11 Uyabona ke ze nenjenje: Yityeni seningxamele ukuhamba; nifinyezile, iimbadada zisezinyaweni, induku isesandleni. Kaloku esi sisidlo sePasika kaNdikhoyo." 
Exodus12:12 “Kanye ngobo busuku ndiya kulityhutyha elaseJiputa, ndihambe ndiwabulala onke amazibulo, ndiqalele kwawabantu, ndiyokutsho nakwawemfuyo. Mna Ndikhoyo ndiya kuba ngumgwebi phezu *koothixo bamaJiputa." 
Exodus12:13 Izindlu enikuzo ndiya kuzibona ngegazi; lona loba ngumqondiso endininika wona. Ndiya kuthi ndakubona igazi ndigqithe, angafiki kuni ubhubhani xa nditshabalalisa amaJiputa." 
Exodus12:14 Le mini ke ize ibe sisikhumbuzo kuni. Ze ningayilibali, ngayo nibhiyozele uNdikhoyo, niyenze ibe ngummiselo olisiko nakwizizukulwana.”" 
Exodus12:15 Waqhuba *uNdikhoyo wathi: “Uyabona ke, niya kuthatha iintsuku ezisixhenxe nisitya isonka esenziwe ngentlama engenagwele. Ngosuku lokuqala ze niligqogqe nilikhuphe lingabikho igwele ezindlwini zenu. Kwezi ntsuku ke umntu okhe watya into enegwele uya kuhlanjwa kwibandla lamaSirayeli." 
Exodus12:16 Umhla wokuqala nomhla wesixhenxe uya kuba ngumhla owodwa wenkonzo; akukho msebenzi uya kwenziwa ngayo ngaphandle kokupheka. 
Exodus12:17 Lo msitho ke ze niwugcine, kuba ngawo nokhumbula umhla endanikhupha ngawo eJiputa ningamabutho ngamabutho. Ngoko ke wenzeni ube ngummiselo kammiselo." 
Exodus12:18 Ukususela kurhatya lomhla weshumi elinesine, kuye kutsho kurhatya lomhla wamashumi amabini ananye, ze ningasityi isonka esinyusiweyo." 
Exodus12:19 Ngezo ntsuku zisixhenxe malingabikho igwele ezindlwini zenu, kuba okhe watya into enegwele uya kuhlanjwa ebandleni likaSirayeli, noba uyinzalelwane, okanye ngumngeneleli. Naphi na apho nikhoyo ze nitye isonka esinganyuswanga; esinegwele ze ningasifaki emlonyeni.”" 
Exodus12:20  
Exodus12:21 UMosis ke wawabiza amadoda amakhulu amaSirayeli, wathi kuwo: “Hambani ngoku nizifunele amaxhwane ngokwemizi yenu, nixhelele *iPasika." 
Exodus12:22 Umntu makathathe amahlamvu ehisopu, awathi nkxu kwigazi lexhwane elisesityeni, afefe imigubasi yomibini naphezu kwayo. Akuyi kuphuma mntu ke apho kuloo ndlu kude kube kusasa ngengomso." 
Exodus12:23 Kaloku xa *uNdikhoyo ejikeleza, ehamba ebulala amaJiputa, uya kuthi akubona igazi emigubasini, awugqithe loo mnyango, angamvumeli umtshabalalisi angene anibulale." 
Exodus12:24 Ze niyilulamele le miyalelo ibe ngummiselo kuni nakwizizukulwana. 
Exodus12:25 Naxa senide nafika nakwelo lizwe nathenjiswa ngalo nguNdikhoyo ze ningayilibali. 
Exodus12:26 Niya kuthi ke xa nibuzwa ngabantwana benu ngalo msitho, besithi ngaba uthetha ntoni na," 
Exodus12:27 nibaxelele nithi: ‘Ngalo msitho sitya idini lePasika lokudumisa uNdikhoyo, sikhumbula mhla wazigqitha izindlu zamaSirayeli eJiputa, mhlenikwezeni watshabalalisa amaJiputa, wasisindisa ke thina.’ ” AmaSirayeli ke asuka athi guqaqa, anqula uNdikhoyo." 
Exodus12:28 Ahamba ke amaSirayeli aya kwenza ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis noAron. 
Exodus12:29 Kwathi ke ezinzulwini zobusuku *uNdikhoyo walihlasela elaseJiputa, wawabulala onke amazibulo, kuqalela kwelikakumkani lowo wayengqendeve ebhotwe, kuye kuqhina kwelombanjwa owayengaphaya kwezitshixo, ngokunjalo nawemfuyo." 
Exodus12:30 Ke kaloku ngobo busuku ukumkani, amaphakathi, nawo onke amaJiputa, baphaphama, bevuswa sisimbonono sesijwili. Kaloku kwakungekho mzi ungafelwanga." 
Exodus12:31 Kwangobo busuku ukumkani waseJiputa wathumela buphuthu-phuthu ukuba kubizwe uMosis noAron. Befikile ke, wathi kubo: “Vukani nihambe, niphume phakathi kwabantu bam; nditsho nina namaSirayeli jikelele. Hambani niye kukhonza uNdikhoyo njengoko nanicelile." 
Exodus12:32 Thathani konke okwenu, ningayishiyi imihlambi yenu yeenkomo, neegusha, neebhokhwe, niphel' emehlweni – nam nindithamsanqelise!”" 
Exodus12:33 AmaJiputa athundeza amaSirayeli ukuba emke, esithi: “Singabafileyo xa enokungahambi amaSirayeli.”" 
Exodus12:34 Ngoko ke amaSirayeli azalisa izitya zawo zokuxovela ngentlama engenagwele, aza azisongela ngeempahla, azixway' emagxeni." 
Exodus12:35 Bayenza nento ababeyiyalelwe nguMosis, kuba bacela izinto zesiliva nezegolide, kunye nempahla yokunxiba, kumaJiputa." 
Exodus12:36 UNdikhoyo wawenza axatyiswa amaSirayeli ngamaJiputa, aza awaxhobisa ngako konke awayekufuna. Ngaloo ndlela ke amaSirayeli awaphanga amaJiputa." 
Exodus12:37 Ke kaloku anduluka amaSirayeli eRamesi, aya kutsho eSukoti. Inani lamadoda ngaphandle kwelabafazi nabantwana lalingamakhulu amathandathu amawaka." 
Exodus12:38 Kanti ke kwabakho nengxubevange yabantu ehamba namaSirayeli, ngokunjalo nemihlambi yeenkomo, neebhokhwe, neegusha." 
Exodus12:39 Babhaka izonka ngaloo ntlama inganyuswanga babemke nayo eJiputa. Kaloku lalingekho igwele, ibe ke ukuphuma kwabo eJiputa bagxagxanyiswa kangangokuba bangabi nako nokuzenzela nomphako lo." 
Exodus12:40 KwelaseJiputa amaSirayeli ahlala iminyaka engamakhulu amane anamashumi amathathu. 
Exodus12:41 Kwathi kanye ke ngosuku lokugqibela lokuphela kwaloo minyaka uhlanga lukaNdikhoyo lwaphuma eJiputa lungamabutho ngamabutho. 
Exodus12:42 Ngenxa yokuba uNdikhoyo walinda ngobo busuku, elindele ukuwakhupha eJiputa, nangoku amaSirayeli anesiko lokulinda ngobu busuku, esenza isikhumbuzo sikaNdikhoyo."
