Exodus12:43 *UNdikhoyo wabayalela uMosis noAron, wathi: “Nantsi imimiselo emaniyigqale xa kubhiyozelwa *iPasika: Umntu wolunye uhlanga akavumelekanga ukuba abe nenxaxheba." 
Exodus12:44 Ke lona ikhoboka elithengiweyo livumelekile lakuba lalukile. 
Exodus12:45 Umhambi okanye umqeshwa makangabi nanxaxheba. 
Exodus12:46 Inyama leyo yotyelwa kuloo ndlu iphekelwe kuyo, kungàphunywa nayo phandle. Amathambo ayo makangakrotyozwa." 
Exodus12:47 Lo msitho uya kubhiyozelwa ngamaSirayeli ephela. 
Exodus12:48 Umngeneleli omi phakathi kwenu, xa enqwenela ukuthatha inxaxheba kulo msitho, makuqale koluswe onke amadoda kuloo ndlu yakhe. Xa kunjalo ke woba nelungelo njengabo bonke abomthonyama." 
Exodus12:49 Umntu ongalukanga akanalungelo kuloo msitho, nokuba uyinzalewane okanye ngumngeneleli.”" 
Exodus12:50 AmaSirayeli ke ayithobela yonke loo miyalelo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis noAron. 
Exodus12:51 Ngaloo mini kanye uNdikhoyo wawakhupha amaSirayeli eJiputa engamabutho ngamabutho. 
Exodus13:1 *UNdikhoyo wabhekisa kuMosis wathi: 
Exodus13:2 “Ndiphawulele onke amazibulo azalwayo kwaSirayeli abe ngawam, nditsho awabantu nawemfuyo.”" 
Exodus13:3 UMosis wathetha nabantu wathi: “Ze ningaze niwulibale lo mhla wokukhululeka kwenu ebukhobokeni kwelaseJiputa. Kaloku nikhululwe bubungangamsha *bukaNdikhoyo. Ngawo makungatyiwa sonka sinyusiweyo. 
Exodus13:4 Lo mhla wale nyanga inguAbhibhi yimini yokunduluka kwenu. 
Exodus13:5 UNdikhoyo wabathembisa ookhokho benu ukuba uya kubanika ilizwe lamaKanana, amaHiti, ama-Amori, amaHivi, namaJebhusi. Nakufika kwelo lizwe lihle liyinzwakazi, livuza ubisi nobusi, ze nenze isikhumbuzo ngawo wona lo mhla wale nyanga minyaka le." 
Exodus13:6 Niya kutya isonka esinganyuswanga iintsuku zibe sixhenxe. Ngolu lwesixhenxe ke niya kwenza itheko lokuwonga uNdikhoyo. 
Exodus13:7 Niya kutya isonka esinganyuswanga iintsuku zibe sixhenxe; into evutyelweyo okanye igwele lingakhe lifumaneke kummandla wenu. 
Exodus13:8 Xa nisenza eli theko ke, ze nibaxelele abantwana benu, nithi: ‘Ngalo mhla siwonga uNdikhoyo ngokusikhupha kwakhe eJiputa.’" 
Exodus13:9 Lo mbhiyozo ke uya kufana nomqondiso osesandleni okanye ebunzi, ukuze ningalibali ukubalisa ngommiselo kaNdikhoyo. Kaloku kwaba ngesandla sakhe ukuphuma kwenu eJiputa." 
Exodus13:10 Ngoko ke eli siko lenzeni ngexesha lalo minyaka le.” 
Exodus13:11 “Ke kaloku xa *uNdikhoyo ede wakufikisa kwelaseKanana njengoko wakuthembisayo wena nooyihlo," 
Exodus13:12 uze umphawulele onke amazibulo azalwayo. Onke amazibulo emfuyo yakho angamaduna ngakaNdikhoyo. 
Exodus13:13 Ke lona izibulo ledonki uya kulikhulula ngokulihlawulela ngexhwane; ungayenzanga loo nto uze ulophule ilungu lentamo. Nonyana wakho wamazibulo uze umkhulule ngentlawulo. 
Exodus13:14 Kuya kuthi ke xa oonyana bebuza ukuba lithetha ntoni na elo siko, uthi: ‘Sisikhumbuzo sokuba saphuma ebukhobokeni baseJiputa ngokusebenza kwamandla kaNdikhoyo." 
Exodus13:15 Kaloku wathi ukumkani waseJiputa akungavumi ukusikhulula, uNdikhoyo wawabulala amazibulo abantu nawemfuyo kwelaseJiputa. Ngesi sizathu ke amazibulo angamaduna kwimfuyo ndenzela ngawo uNdikhoyo idini. Ke wona amazibulo oonyana ndiwakhulula ngokuwahlawulela." 
Exodus13:16 Eli siko ke liya kufana nomqondiso osesandleni okanye ebunzi, lihlale lisikhumbuza ukuba kukusebenza kwamandla kaNdikhoyo okwasikhupha eJiputa.’ ”" 
Exodus13:17 Wathi ukumkani waseJiputa akuwakhulula amaSirayeli, uThixo akawakhokela ngendlela ecanda kwelamaFilistiya, nakuba yayiyeyona imfutshane. Kaloku uThixo wathi: “AmaSirayeli akuzibona egaxeleka emfazweni, angafuna ukubuyela eJiputa.”" 
Exodus13:18 Ngoko ke uThixo wawakhokela ngendlela yasentlango esinga kuLwandle oluBomvu. AmaSirayeli ke aphuma eJiputa exhobele imfazwe. 
Exodus13:19 Ke kaloku uMosis wawathatha wahamba nawo amathambo kaJosefu, kuba uJosefu wayethe kumaSirayeli: “Ngenye imini uThixo uya kuze anivelele, anikhuphe nimke apha; ngoko ke fungani ukuba niya kuhamba nawo amathambo am.”" 
Exodus13:20 AmaSirayeli ke anduluka eSukoti, aya kuphumla e-Etam enyeleni yentlango." 
Exodus13:21 Apho ke eluhambeni *uNdikhoyo wayewakhokela ngomqulu welifu emini, aze ebusuku awakhokele ngesithatha somlilo." 
Exodus13:22 Lo mqulu welifu ke wawuhlala uhamba phambi kwawo emini, nesithatha somlilo sisenjenjalo ebusuku." 
Exodus14:1 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi: 
Exodus14:2 “Yitsho kumaSirayeli abuye umva, afike athi xha phambi kwePi-hahiroti phakathi kweMigdoli noLwandle oluBomvu ngaseBhali-zefon." 
Exodus14:3 Yena ukumkani waseJiputa uza kucinga ukuba niyabhadula, nivalelwe yintlango." 
Exodus14:4 Ndisaza kumqaqadekisa anisukele, ndize ndithi ndakumoyisa ndawonye nemikhosi yakhe ndizuze udumo. NamaJiputa aya kutsho aqonde ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo.” Okunene ke amaSirayeli enza ngokomyalelo lowo." 
Exodus14:5 Ukumkani ndawonye namaphakathi akhe bathi, bakuva ukuba ngenene amaSirayeli emkile, bajibilika. Ewe, suka bazisola, bathi: “Besingenwe yini kakade, ukuze senze into enje? Bekutheni ukuze siwayeke amakhoboka ethu emke?”" 
Exodus14:6 Ngoko ke ukumkani waxhoba, wabopha iinqwelo zakhe zokulwa, waphuma nomkhosi wakhe." 
Exodus14:7 Wakhupha nezona nqwelo zithembekileyo zimakhulu omathandathu, zibhexeshwa ziingqwayi-ngqwayi ezaziwayo. Akashiyanga nanye kwiinqwelo zaseJiputa." 
Exodus14:8 UNdikhoyo wamenza waneenkani ukumkani waseJiputa, wawasukela amaSirayeli; aye wona phofu ehamba ngesibindi." 
Exodus14:9 Yaphuma imikhosi yamaJiputa, yasukela ngeenqwelo zamahashe. Yayiziinqwelo nabeenyawo. Yabafumana bephumle ngakuLwandle oluBomvu, kufutshane nePi-hahiroti neBhali-zefon." 
Exodus14:10 AmaSirayeli athi akubona umkhosi wokumkani waseJiputa ugaleleka, ankwantya, abhenela kuNdikhoyo." 
Exodus14:11 Abhekisa kuMosis athi: “Kungokuba kungekho mangcwaba na eJiputa, le nto usizisa entlango, ukuze sifele khona? Uyayibona ke into oyenzileyo ngokusikhupha eJiputa? Asiyiyo le nto sasiyithetha kuwe phambi kokuba sinduluke?" 
Exodus14:12 Ewe, sasitshilo kuwe sathi siyeke sibe ngamakhoboka amaJiputa. Bekubhetele ukuba sibe ngamakhoboka awo endaweni yokuba size kufela kule ntlango!”" 
Exodus14:13 Ke yena uMosis wathi kuwo: “Sanukoyika; qinani! Niza kubona; uNdikhoyo uza kunihlangula namhlanje! Ke wona la maJiputa niwabonayo namhlanje soze niphinde niwabone kwakhona! 
Exodus14:14 Zolani nina; uNdikhoyo uza kunilwela!” 
Exodus14:15 UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi: “Sesani ke esi sikhalo nisenzayo? Yitsho amaSirayeli ahambele phambili." 
Exodus14:16 Wena yolula ingalo yakho, uphakamise induku phezu kolwandle. Amanzi aya kuhlukana kubini, aze amaSirayeli awele ehamba emhlabeni owomileyo." 
Exodus14:17 AmaJiputa ndiya kuwenza abe neenkani, atyhudise emva kwamaSirayeli. Ke mna olwam uloyiso luya kuqaqamba phezu kokumkani nemikhosi yakhe, ngokunjalo neenqwelo zakhe." 
Exodus14:18 Ndiya kuthi ndakumoyisa ukumkani wamaJiputa nomkhosi wakhe, abantu bakhe batsho bandazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo.”" 
Exodus14:19 Kwesi sithuba ke isithunywa sikaThixo esasiwakhokele amaSirayeli sajikela ngasemva salandela. Ngokunjalo nomqulu welifu owawuwakhokela 
Exodus14:20 wajika wema phakathi kwamaSirayeli namaJiputa. Ilifu elo lasitha kwatsho kwasebusuku kumaJiputa, kodwa kwakukhanya kumaSirayeli. Loo nto ke yatsho ayabi nakuhlangana loo mikhosi mibini bonke obo busuku." 
Exodus14:21 Ngenene ke uMosis wasolula isandla sakhe phezu kolwandle, waza uNdikhoyo wathumela umoya onzima wasempuma, walududula ulwandle, kwavela umhlaba owomileyo. Umoya lowo wabhudla ubusuku bonke, aza ahlukana kubini amanzi." 
Exodus14:22 AmaSirayeli awela emhlabeni owomileyo, amanzi eziindonga ngapha nangapha." 
Exodus14:23 Ke kaloku amaJiputa xa ewonke, neenqwelo kunye namahashe okumkani, axhabasha angena elwandle esukela amaSirayeli." 
Exodus14:24 Ekuzeni kokusa uNdikhoyo ekwelo lifu neso sithatha somlilo wayijonga imikhosi yamaJiputa, yatsho yaphithizela." 
Exodus14:25 Amavili eenqwelo amomana, baza baba ngathini abaqhubi zaxinga. AmaJiputa akhala athi: “UNdikhoyo uyawalwela amaSirayeli; masiwayeke sisabe.”" 
Exodus14:26 Ke kaloku uNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi: “Yolula isandla sakho phezu kolwandle kwakhona, ukuze amanzi awagubungele amaJiputa kunye neenqwelo zawo.”" 
Exodus14:27 UMosis wenza ngokomyalelo lowo, kwaza kwathi ke ngomsobomvu amanzi athi wayi-wayi abuyela endaweni yawo. Athi ke esaduntsuza ezama ukubaleka amaJiputa, uNdikhoyo wawagubungela ngolwandle." 
Exodus14:28 Ewe, amanzi adibanisa abuyela kwindawo yawo yesiqhelo, aza ke wona amaJiputa neenqwelo zawo nawo wonke umkhosi kakumkani owawuleqa amaSirayeli wantywiliselwa lulwandle, akwasala nomnqongo lo!" 
Exodus14:29 Kanti ke wona amaSirayeli awela emhlabeni owomileyo, amanzi aludonga ngapha nangapha." 
Exodus14:30 Ngaloo mini ke uNdikhoyo wawasindisa amaSirayeli kumaJiputa. AmaSirayeli ayibona imizimba yamaJiputa iqungquluze elunxwemeni lolwandle. 
Exodus14:31 Athi amaSirayeli akukubona ukusebenza kwamandla kaNdikhoyo ngokoyisa amaJiputa, angenelwa luloyiko, amhlonela. Ewe, azinikela kuNdikhoyo, akholelwa kwisicaka sakhe uMosis." 
Exodus15:1 Kwesi sithuba ke uMosis namaSirayeli bahlabela le ngoma, bedumisa *uNdikhoyo: “Ndosuka ndintyiloze ndiculele uNdikhoyo; kaloku yena woyise wada watshatshela. Ihashe ngokunjalo nophezu kwalo ulintywilisele phakath' elwandle." 
Exodus15:2 UNdikhoyo yinqaba negwijo lam; ndinje-nje-nje ndisindiswe nguye. Nanko ke uThixo wam, ndiyamdumisa; nguThixo woobawo, ndotshila ngaye." 
Exodus15:3 “*UMhlekazi yena ulijoni; igama lakhe *nguNdikhoyo. 
Exodus15:4 Umkhosi wamaJiputa neenqwelo zawo wasuka waziphos' elwandle; iingqwayi-ngqwayi zomkhosi ezinamagama uzigubungele ngoLwandl' oluBomvu. 
Exodus15:5 Ngoku zambathiswe yinzonzobila; suka zazika ngathi lilitye. 
Exodus15:6 “Hayi kamb' isandla sakho, Ndikhoyo, yingwanyalal' etshatsheleyo! Ewe, isandla sakho, wena Ndikhoyo, siyaluvikiva utshaba lwakho." 
Exodus15:7 Ngangamsh' engatshonelwa langa, ezikhahlela phants' izibhoja; umavulel' umsindo ozayo, uzithi lenye ngathi kutsh' ingca!" 
Exodus15:8 Ngokuphefumla kwakho nje qha suka ulwandle lwaba ziingqimba, amanzi asuka aba ludonga, inzonzobila yolwandle yakhenkceza." 
Exodus15:9 Utshaba lwathi: ‘Mandisukele ndibabambe. Ndiya kuxhaphaz' amaxhoba, ndizanelise. Ndiya kuxhoba ndif' amacala, nditshayele nditshabalalise ngekrele.’" 
Exodus15:10 Suka ke uNdikhoyo wafutha, kwaba kanye antywiliseleka amaJiputa. Ewe, azika nywam emanzini, kwanga kukweyela kwesinyithi." 
Exodus15:11 “Kodw' angavela ph' onjengawe, Ndikhoyo, obalasele kangaka ngobunyulu, omiqondiso ikhamnqisa kangaka, ozenzo zimangalisa ngokuncamisayo?" 
Exodus15:12 Wathi wakusolula esakho isandla, umhlaba wazithi bimbilili iintshaba zethu." 
Exodus15:13 Thembekil' othando lungatshitshiyo, uyabakhokel' abant' obahlawuleleyo; ngobungangamsha bakho ubathundezile, bagaleleka kwikhaya lakho elingcwele." 
Exodus15:14 Izizwe zithe zingeva zaphithizela liphaphu, atshw' amaFilistiy' arhwaqela luvalo." 
Exodus15:15 Iinkosi zakwaEdom zibamb' ongezantsi; izinxiba-mxhaka zakwaMowabhi ziyatyhwatyhwa. Asisathethi ke ngezima-mhlaba zaseKanana, kuba zona ziya kunyibilika." 
Exodus15:16 Suka zazibhija-bhija zinkwantya; ngobungangamsha bakho zaw' isiduli. Baz' abakaNdikhoyo bagqitha bengcambaza; nditsho abakhululwa awabathengayo. 
Exodus15:17 Wabathatha wabemisa entabeni yakho, ndawo leyo ilikhaya lakho, Ndikhoyo; ewe, endlwini yakho, Ndikhoyo, leyo wazakhela yona." 
Exodus15:18 Hayi ke bethu, yena uNdikhoyo uya kulawula ngonaphakade kanaphakade.”" 
Exodus15:19 Kaloku kwathi esakungena elwandle amahashe okumkani neenqwelo nabaqhubi, *uNdikhoyo wawagubungela ngamanzi, atshona. Kanti ke wona amaSirayeli aluwela ulwandle ehamba emhlabeni owomileyo." 
Exodus15:20 Ke kaloku umshumayelikazi uMiriyam, udade boAron, waqubula igubu lakhe, baza bonke ababhinqileyo bamlandela namagubu abo, batsho ngentsholo bengqungqa." 
Exodus15:21 UMiriyam ke wahlabela ingoma wenjenje: “Hoyina! Memelelani nitsholoze! UNdikhoyo woyise wada watshatshela! Ihashe ngokunjalo nophezu kwalo ulintywilisele phakath' elwandle.” 
Exodus15:22 UMosis ke wawakhokela amaSirayeli, balushiya uLwandle oluBomvu, baya kungena kwintlango iShure. Baba ntsuku-ntathu behamba kuloo ntlango; bengafumani manzi." 
Exodus15:23 Ngelikade baya kufika kwindawo ekuthiwa yiMara. Apha ke bawafumana amanzi, koko ayekrakra engaseleki. Kungenxa yeso sizathu kwakusithiwa nguKrakrayo nje igama layo." 
Exodus15:24 Ke kaloku amaSirayeli amkhalazela uMosis, athi: “Uthi siza kusela ntoni ke?”" 
Exodus15:25 UMosis wakhala *kuNdikhoyo, waza ke yena wathi makakhe ihlamvu lomthi othile, alifake emanzini apho. Akuba enjenjalo ke, baphela ubukrakra emanzini, aba nokuselwa. Apha ke kulapho wabanika imimiselo yokuziphatha uNdikhoyo, wabavavanya." 
Exodus15:26 Wenjenje ukuthetha: “Ukuba nithe nandithobela ngokupheleleyo, nenza okuhle nokufanelekileyo ngokuhamba ngemimiselo yam, soze ndinohlwaye ngezibetho nezifo endaziwisela amaJiputa. Kaloku mna ndinguNdikhoyo, ugqirha wenu.”" 
Exodus15:27 Kamva ke bafika e-Elim, apho kwakukho imithombo elishumi elinambini, nemithi yesundu engamashumi asixhenxe. Bahlala ke bakhe baphumla kufuphi naloo manzi." 
Exodus16:1 Ke kaloku amaSirayeli anduluka e-Elim, aza athi ngenyanga yesibini kusuku lweshumi elinesihlanu andulukayo eJiputa, agaleleka kwintlango iSin. Yona ke iphakathi kwe-Elim neSinayi." 
Exodus16:2 Kanye ke apho kuloo ntlango amaSirayeli abakhalazela ooMosis noAron," 
Exodus16:3 athi kubo: “Akwaba *uNdikhoyo wayesibulalele eJiputa. Kaloku noko khona sasisitya inyama; kanti ke nokunye ukutya sasikutya side sikushiye. Kuba kucacile nisizise kule ntlango ukuze eli bandla xa lilonke nilichane ngendlala life.” 
Exodus16:4 UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis wathi: “Uyabona ke ndiza kuthoba ukutya kune njengemvula, ukuze nonke nitye. AmaSirayeli makaphume aye kuzicholela ukutya okulingene imini mihla le. Ndizimisele ukukhe ndiwavavanye ndiwaqonde ukuba azimisele na ukuwuthobela umyalelo wam." 
Exodus16:5 Kodwa ke ngomhla wesithandathu makaqokelele azilungiselele ukutya kwemihla emibini.” 
Exodus16:6 Ngoko ke uMosis noAron bathetha nawo amaSirayeli, bathi: “Ngokuhlwanje niza kuqonda ukuba nguNdikhoyo owanikhupha eJiputa," 
Exodus16:7 kuba ngomso kusasa niya kukubona ukuqaqamba kobukho bukaNdikhoyo. Kaloku yena uzivile izikhalazo zenu; gxebe besingoobani ukuba ningade nisikhalazele thina?” 
Exodus16:8 UMosis waqhuba wathi: “UNdikhoyo uza kunipha inyama, nitye ngokuhlwa, kanti nakusasa uza kunipha isonka, nitye nihluthe, kuba uzivile izikrokro zenu enimkhalazela ngazo. Kakade ke besingoobani thina? Hayi bo! Anikrokreli thina, nikrokrela uNdikhoyo!”" 
Exodus16:9 UMosis wayalela uAron ukuba axelele amaSirayeli aphume aye kubonana noNdikhoyo njengoko ezivile izikhalazo zawo. 
Exodus16:10 Esathetha nje uAron, athe amaSirayeli akukhangela ngasentlango abubona ubuqaqawuli bukaNdikhoyo bubengezela efini." 
Exodus16:11 Wathi ke uNdikhoyo kuMosis: 
Exodus16:12 “Xelela amaSirayeli ukuba ndizivile izikhalazo zawo; ngoko ke ngokuhlwa ndiya kuwanika inyama atye, ndize ngentsasa elandelayo ndiwaphe intaphane yesonka, khon' ukuze andiqonde ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wawo.”" 
Exodus16:13 Kwathi ke ngongcwalazi kwagaleleka igquba lwezagwityi, lwathi khakhalala kuyo yonke loo ndawo ayemise kuyo amaSirayeli. Kanti ke ngengomso kwasa kulele umbethe." 
Exodus16:14 Kuthe ke wakuvuthuluka umbethe lowo kwasala uqweqwe olungathi yiqabaka, lwawambathisa umhlaba." 
Exodus16:15 AmaSirayeli athe akuyibona le nto angayaziyo, abuzana athi: “Yintoni le?” UMosis ke wathi kuwo: “Oku kukutya enikuphiwa nguNdikhoyo." 
Exodus16:16 Uthe umntu ngamnye kuni makathathe kangangesisu sakhe. Lowo uthathela umzi wonke wolinganisela ukuba umntu ngamnye afumane iilitha ezimbini.” 
Exodus16:17 Ke kaloku amaSirayeli enza ngokomyalelo lowo, abanye bathatha kakhulu, baza bambi bathatha kancinci." 
Exodus16:18 Kodwa ke athe akukufaka emlinganisweni ukutya oko afumanisa ukuba othathe kakhulu akagqithisanga, kanti ke nothathe kancinci akalambathi. Umntu ngamnye wathatha ngokwentswelo yakhe." 
Exodus16:19 UMosis wayalela ukuba kungabikho mntu ushiya mbeko. 
Exodus16:20 Kambe ke abanye abamphulaphulanga bakubeka. Ngengomso ke kwasa kubolile kuneempethu, waza ke uMosis wakhathazeka." 
Exodus16:21 Ngazo zonke iintsasa babethatha kangangezisu zabo. Kwakusithi ke lakuba shushu ilanga kunyibilike kuphele oko kutya kwabo. 
Exodus16:22 Ngomhla wesithandathu ke ukutya bakuthatha ngokuphindwe kabini, umntu ngamnye waneelitha ezine. Ke iinkokheli le nto zayixela kuMosis" 
Exodus16:23 owathi yena kuzo: “UNdikhoyo usiyale wathi ngomso ngumhla owodwa wokuphumla, lusuku oluphawulelwe yena. Ngoko ke bhakani namhlanje xa nifuna, futhi nipheke kwanamhlanje, okuseleyo ke nikugcinele ingomso.”" 
Exodus16:24 Okuseleyo ke bakugcinela ingomso ngokokutsho kukaMosis. Kona ke zange konakale. 
Exodus16:25 UMosis ke wathi kubo: “Yityani namhlanje, kuba olu lusuku lokuphumla oluphawulelwe uNdikhoyo; ngalo aniyi kukufumana ukutya phandle phaya." 
Exodus16:26 Oku kutya ningakuqokelela iintsuku zibe ntandathu, kodwa ke ngolwesixhenxe *nguMhla wokuPhumla; ngawo ke akukho.”" 
Exodus16:27 Kambe ke nangoMhla wokuPhumla bambi abantu baphuma baya kufuna ukutya, nto nje abakufumananga." 
Exodus16:28 UNdikhoyo wabhekisa kuMosis wathi: “Koda kube nini ningandithobeli, bantundini?" 
Exodus16:29 Kaloku ndaninika uMhla wokuPhumla; kungenxa yaloo nto ke ndininika ukutya kweentsuku ezimbini nje ngomhla owandulela owokuphumla. NgoMhla wokuPhumla wonke umntu makangenzi nto, angaphumi ekhaya.”" 
Exodus16:30 Ngenene ke abantu baphumla ngoMhla wokuPhumla. 
Exodus16:31 Oku kutya ke amaSirayeli akuthiya igama athi yimana. Yona ke yayifana nembewu yekoriyanda imhlophe, emlonyeni ingathi ngamaqebengwana enziwe ngobusi." 
Exodus16:32 UMosis wabaxelela umyalelo kaNdikhoyo, wathi: “UNdikhoyo uthe: ‘Thathani iilitha zibe mbini zemana, nizigcinele izizukulwana ezizayo, ukuze nazo zikubone ukutya endanondla ngako entlango ukunikhupha kwam eJiputa.’ ”" 
Exodus16:33 UMosis wayalela uAron wathi makathathe iilitha zibe mbini zemana, azifake engqayini, azibeke *esibingelelweni phambi koNdikhoyo, ibe nokubonwa nazizizukulwana ezizayo." 
Exodus16:34 Ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo ke uAron wayithatha, wayibeka kwityesi yomnqophiso, ukuze igcinakale." 
Exodus16:35 Ke kaloku yaba yiminyaka emashumi mane amaSirayeli esitya imana leyo, ada afika eKanana, apho ema khona." 
Exodus16:36 (Umlinganiselo ovunyiweyo ke waloo maxesha wawuyiefa, engangamashumi amabini eelitha. Isishumi sayo yayiyioma, engangeelitha ezimbini.)" 
Exodus17:1 Ekuphumeni kwintlango iSin onke amaSirayeli ahamba amabanga ngamabanga ngokuyalelwa *nguNdikhoyo, ada aya kufika eRefidim, akhe aphumla khona. Kule ndawo ke ayengekho amanzi." 
Exodus17:2 AmaSirayeli asuka ke alwa noMosis, athi: “Sinxaniwe; siphe amanzi!” UMosis wathi kuwo: “Kutheni nisilwa nam nje? Nimlingelani uNdikhoyo?”" 
Exodus17:3 Kambe ke amaSirayeli akayekanga ukumkhalazela uMosis, kuba ayenxaniwe. Athi: “Kodwa kodwa, ungathini ukusikhupha eJiputa, ukuze uze kusichana ngonxano, thina nentsapho nemfuyo yethu?”" 
Exodus17:4 UMosis wazibika kuNdikhoyo, wathi: “Kodwa ndiza kubathini aba bantu? Bangasuka bandixulube ngamatye.”" 
Exodus17:5 UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis, wathi: “Thatha amadoda amakhulu, uhambe nawo, uwashiye amaSirayeli; ungayishiyi induku yakho owabetha ngayo umlambo iNayile." 
Exodus17:6 Ke mna uya kufika ndikulinde eliweni eHorebhe. Libethe iliwa elo. Kuya kumpompoza amanzi, amaSirayeli abe nokusela.” Yonke ke le nto uMosis wayenza ekunye namadoda amakhulu." 
Exodus17:7 Le ndawo ke yathiywa igama kwathiwa yiMasa neMeribha, kuba kaloku apha amaSirayeli alwa noMosis, amvavanya uNdikhoyo, esithi: “Ukho na phakathi kwethu uNdikhoyo, nokuba hayi?”" 
Exodus17:8 Apha eRefidim ke ama-Amaleki eza ahlasela amaSirayeli. 
Exodus17:9 UMosis ke wayalela uYoshuwa wathi: “Khetha amadoda athile, niphume niye kulwa nama-Amaleki. Ngomso mna ndiya kuma phezu kwentaba ndiphethe laa nduku ndiyinikwe nguThixo.”" 
Exodus17:10 UYoshuwa wenza ngokomyalelo kaMosis, baphuma baya kulwa nama-Amaleki. Ke yena uMosis, enoAron noYuri, benyukela phezu kwentaba." 
Exodus17:11 Ngalo lonke ixesha uMosis eziphakamisile izandla zakhe, amaSirayeli ayewagxotha ama-Amaleki; kodwa athi akuzithoba izandla, oyiswe amaSirayeli." 
Exodus17:12 Wathi akudinwa uMosis, uAron noYuri bamhlalisa elityeni, bamxhaka, baphakamisa iingalo zakhe lada latshona ilanga." 
Exodus17:13 Ngale ndlela ke uYoshuwa wawaswantsulisa ama-Amaleki. 
Exodus17:14 *UNdikhoyo ke wathetha noMosis, wathi: “Yibhale ingcombolo yale mfazwe, khon' ukuze ingaze ilibaleke. Xelela uYoshuwa ukuba ndizimisele ukuwacim' igama ama-Amaleki kwelimiweyo.”" 
Exodus17:15 UMosis wenza iqonga lamadini, wathi igama lalo nguNdikhoyo intshinga yam," 
Exodus17:16 esithi: “Yiphakamiseni intshinga kaNdikhoyo. UNdikhoyo uya kulwa naye uAmaleki kude kube ngunaphakade.” 
Exodus18:1 Ke kaloku uyise womka-Mosis uJetro, owayengumbingeleli waseMidiyan, weva ngezinto awayezenzelwe nguThixo uMosis kunye namaSirayeli, ukubakhupha kwakhe eJiputa." 
Exodus18:2 Wasuka weza kuMosis, ehamba noZipora umka-Mosis," 
Exodus18:3 noGershom noElizere oonyana bakhe, kuba kaloku bona wayebabuyisele ebukhweni bakhe. UMosis wathi xa ethiya omnye woonyana bakhe wathi nguGershom, kuba esithi: “Ndandingumbhaceli kwelasemzini.”" 
Exodus18:4 Waza ke omnye wathi nguElizere, kuba esithi: “UThixo woobawo wandinceda wandihlangula kwikrele lokumkani waseJiputa.”" 
Exodus18:5 OoJetro ke badibana noMosis entlango, emise ngasentabeni kaThixo." 
Exodus18:6 Lafika ke ilizwi kuMosis, livela kuJetro, esithi: “Ndiyeza nomkakho noonyana bakho bobabini.”" 
Exodus18:7 Waphuma ke uMosis, wabahlangabeza. Akufika kuyise womkakhe wakhahlela wamanga. Babuzana impilo ke, baya kungena endlwini kaMosis." 
Exodus18:8 UMosis wabalisela uJetro ngazo zonke izenzo *zikaNdikhoyo kumaJiputa, ngokunjalo nangamasuka-ndihlala amaSirayeli ekuphumeni kwawo eJiputa ekhokelwa nguNdikhoyo." 
Exodus18:9 UJetro wavuya kakhulu akuziva ezo ndaba zimnandi zokuhlangulwa kwamaSirayeli nguNdikhoyo kumaJiputa. 
Exodus18:10 Wadanduluka wathi: “Makabongwe uNdikhoyo onihlangule kukumkani waseJiputa nabantu bakhe. 
Exodus18:11 Ngoku nam ndiyangqina ukuba ehlabathini akakho olingana noNdikhoyo, kuba yena amaSirayeli uwahlangule kolungaka lona ulunya lwamaJiputa.”" 
Exodus18:12 Ngoko ke uJetro wenzela uThixo idini elitshiswayo neminye imibingelelo. Ke uAron, ekunye namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, beza baxhamla izidlo ezo kunye noJetro umkhwe kaMosis, bekhonza uThixo." 
Exodus18:13 Kwangentseni ngomhla olandelayo uMosis waba sisinxadanxada, echophele amatyalala, esombulula iingxaki zamaSirayeli kwada kwahlwa." 
Exodus18:14 Uthe ke uJetro akuyibona le meko yokuxakeka kukaMosis, wabuza wathi: “Khawutsho, yintoni kanye le niyenzayo naba bantu bakho? Khona, ngani ukuba ube wedwa, bona beze bengumngcelele, bafike bakuphahle kwangentseni kude kuhlwe?”" 
Exodus18:15 UMosis waphendula wathi: “Kaloku aba bantu beza kum khon' ukuze ndibabeke emkhondweni mayela nentando kaThixo," 
Exodus18:16 kuthi xa benembambano beze kum ukuze ndibalamle ndibachazele imimiselo nemiyalelo kaThixo.” 
Exodus18:17 Ke yena uJetro wathi kuMosis: “Hayi, nyana, olu hlobo wenza ngalo alulunganga." 
Exodus18:18 Ngale ndlela uqhuba ngayo uyaziqoba. Uya kuxhwaleka uphel' amandla; naba bantu baya kudinwa yile nto. Kaloku umsebenzi onje awukulingananga uwedwa. 
Exodus18:19 Khawuphulaphule ke ndikucebise; ngamana wakunceda ke uThixo. Into ofanelwe kukuyenza kukuzakuzelela abantu kuThixo, use imicimbi yabo kuye." 
Exodus18:20 Wena kufuneka ubafundise imimiselo nomthetho kaThixo, ubacacisele indlela yokuziphatha, nako konke okulindelekileyo kubo." 
Exodus18:21 Ngaphezulu khetha amadoda aziinkokheli ezifanelekileyo, uwamisele phezu kwamaqela ahlulwa-hlulwe angamawaka, amakhulu, namashumi angamahlanu njalo-njalo. La madoda ke mayibe ngabantu abamthobelayo uThixo, abathembekileyo, abantu abanganyobekiyo." 
Exodus18:22 Wona isigxina sawo mayibe kukuchophela imicimbi yaba bantu. Imicimbi elula makayiphicothe ayilungise ngokwawo, ke yona imicimbi ewaxakayo ayizise kuwe. Ngale ndlela ke nawo aya kuba nenxaxheba kulo msebenzi wakho, akuphungulele umthwalo." 
Exodus18:23 Ukuba wenjenje ke ngokuvuma kukaThixo, awuyi kuqobeka, futhi ke nabantu aba baya kutsho bavisisane.”" 
Exodus18:24 Ngenene ke uMosis wenza ngokwecebo likaJetro," 
Exodus18:25 wawakhetha amadoda afanelekileyo kumaSirayeli, wawamisela aziinkokheli phezu kwamaqela ahlulwa-hlulwe angamawaka, amakhulu, namashumi ngamahlanu njalo-njalo." 
Exodus18:26 Wona ke aba ngabalamli abavunyiweyo bokuphicotha imicimbi yamaSirayeli. Yonke imicimbi elula yayisonjululwa ngawo, ithi ke ewaxakayo ayigqithisele kuMosis." 
Exodus18:27 Ke kaloku uMosis wamkhulula uJetro, waphindela kwelakowabo." 
Exodus19:1 Kanye ukuphela kwenyanga yesithathu amaSirayeli aphumayo eJiputa, amaSirayeli anduluka eRefidim, aya kugaleleka kwintlango yeSinayi, emisa phantsi kwentaba iSinayi." 
Exodus19:2  
Exodus19:3 Ke yena uMosis wenyuka intaba, waya kuThixo. *UNdikhoyo wambiza wathi: “Thetha namaSirayeli, inzala kaYakobi, uthi:" 
Exodus19:4 ‘Niyibonile imimangaliso endiyenzileyo mna Ndikhoyo kumaJiputa, nokuba nani ndanisondeza ndanithwala ngokokhozi luthwele amathole alo." 
Exodus19:5 Ngoku ke, ukuba niyandithobela, nenze ngokomnqophiso wam, niya kuba ngabantu bam ncakasana. Kaloku lelam ihlabathi liphela," 
Exodus19:6 kambe ke nina niya kuba ngababingeleli basebhotwe, nibe luhlanga olulodwa.’ Ngawo la ke amazwi omawuwabhekise kumaSirayeli.”" 
Exodus19:7 UMosis wehla ke entabeni, wawadibanisa amadoda amakhulu, wawaneka umyalelo kaNdikhoyo phambi kwawo." 
Exodus19:8 Aphendula ke amaSirayeli xa ewonke athi: “Zonke izinto azithethayo uNdikhoyo siya kuzenza.” UMosis wawugqithisa ke umlomo wamaSirayeli kuNdikhoyo. 
Exodus19:9 UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Ndiza kuza kuwe ndikwilifu elingqingqwa, ukuze ndithethe nawe amaSirayeli ekho, khon' ukuze angaze akuthandabuze.” UMosis waxelela uNdikhoyo akuthethileyo amaSirayeli." 
Exodus19:10 UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi: “Yitsho bonke abantu bazenze nyulu, bacoceke ngokupheleleyo namhlanje nangomso, balungiselele ukunqula. Impahla yabo mabayihlambe" 
Exodus19:11 ukuze ngomsomnye babe sebelungile. Ngaloo mini ke ndiya kuhla ndize apha eSinayi, nabantu bebukele." 
Exodus19:12 Jikeleza intaba le, wenze umda ongayi kutsitywa ngamaSirayeli. Ngokunjalo baxelele abantu ukuba mabangasondeli okanye benyuke entabeni apho. Umntu okhe wathi cakatha entabeni apho makabulawe." 
Exodus19:13 Ewe, umntu onjalo makagityiselwe ngamatye, okanye achanwe ngotolo, afe engachukunyiswanga ngasandla. Nesilwanyana esisondeleyo ke masibulawe kwangaloo ndlela. Kuya kuthi ke wakuvakala umntyangampo wokukhala kwexilongo, abantu benyuke beze entabeni.”" 
Exodus19:14 UMosis wehla ke entabeni, wabaxelela abantu ukuba mabalungele ukunqula. Ngenene ke bahlamba bacoceka." 
Exodus19:15 Ngaphezu koko ke wabayala ukuba babe sebelungile ngomsomnye; ngelo thuba ke amadoda angahlangani nababhinqileyo. 
Exodus19:16 Ngentsasa yomhla wesithathu ke zavakala izabhokhwe zeendudumo, yabe yona ke imibane itshawuza, kwaza kwabonakala nelifu elingqingqwa apho entabeni. Asisathethi ke ngomtyangampo wexilongo owabetha kwathi nkxwee, kangangokuba abantu bagubha luloyiko esikhululweni." 
Exodus19:17 Ke kaloku uMosis waphuma nabo besiya kuThixo, baza ke bema emazantsi entaba." 
Exodus19:18 Yonke intaba iSinayi yambathiswa sisithokothoko somsi, kuba uNdikhoyo wehlela kuyo engathi ungumlilo. Umsi lowo ke wanyuquza ngathi uphuma eziko, yaza intaba yanyikima ngamandla." 
Exodus19:19 Kanti ke nesandi sexilongo saya sikhula ngakumbi. Waza wathetha ke uMosis, naye uThixo waphendula ngeendudumo." 
Exodus19:20 Ke kaloku uNdikhoyo wehla wathi ngcu phezu kwencochoyi yentaba iSinayi, wathi kuMosis makenyukele khona naye," 
Exodus19:21 waza ke wathuma uMosis, wathi: “Yihla ufike ubayale abantu hleze bawutsibe umda, beze kundibuka, kuba xa beyenzile loo nto luya kufa uninzi lwabo." 
Exodus19:22 Nkqu nababingeleli abasondelayo kum mabahlambuluke, hleze ndibatshabalalise.”" 
Exodus19:23 UMosis waphendula wathi: “Kaloku, *Mhlekazi, abantu abanako ukunyuka beze entabeni, kuba ubusiyalile wathi intaba masiyahlule siyijikeleze ngomda, khon' ukuze kungabikho nto isondelayo kuyo.”" 
Exodus19:24 UNdikhoyo wathi kuye: “Hamba uye kuthatha uAron, uze naye apha. Kodwa ke bona ababingeleli kunye nabanye abantu bangàkhe balinge bawutsibe umda, hleze ndibatshabalalise.”" 
Exodus19:25 Ngenene ke uMosis wehla, wafika wabaxelela abantu into ethethwe nguNdikhoyo." 
Exodus20:1 Ke kaloku uThixo wathetha wenjenje: 
Exodus20:2 “Mna *ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho owakukhulula eJiputa apho wawulikhoboka khona. 
Exodus20:3 “Ungaze unqule *thixo wumbi ngaphandle kwam. 
Exodus20:4 “Ungaze uziqingqele umfanekiso wothixo, nditsho nokuba ngowantoni na esesibhakabhakeni phezulu, okanye esemhlabeni phantsi, okanye nokuba yeyasemanzini aphantsi komhlaba." 
Exodus20:5 Ungaze ukhahlele unqule umfanekiso oqingqiweyo; kuba mna Ndikhoyo Thixo wakho ndinguThixo onekhwele. Ndiyabohlwaya abandithiyileyo; ewe, ndohlwaya ooyise ndide ndiye kuqhina kwesesithathu nakwesesine isizukulwana sabo." 
Exodus20:6 Kodwa ke ndiphuphuma izibele kumawaka-waka abo bandithandayo, beyithobela imiyalelo yam." 
Exodus20:7 “Ungaze ulikhankanye ngelize igama lam; kaloku mna Ndikhoyo Thixo wakho andiyi kumxolela ofumana alibize igama lam. 
Exodus20:8 “Hlala uwukhumbula *uMhla wokuPhumla, uwugcine ulusuku olulodwa lukaNdikhoyo." 
Exodus20:9 Sebenza imihla emithandathu, uwenze wonke umsebenzi wakho." 
Exodus20:10 Ke wona umhla wesixhenxe lusuku lwam olulodwa lokuphumla. Ngoko ke makungabikho mntu usebenzayo ngalo mhla; nditsho nawe, umntwana wakho, nesicaka sakho, nemfuyo yakho, ngokunjalo nomngeneleli ohlala phakathi kwenu." 
Exodus20:11 Kaloku mna Ndikhoyo ndênza umhlaba, nesibhakabhaka, nolwandle, nako konke okulapho kwezo zinto, ngeentsuku ezintandathu, ndaza ke ndaphumla ngomhla wesixhenxe. Ngenxa yaloo nto ke lo mhla ndawukhetha ukuze ube lusuku olulodwa lokuphumla." 
Exodus20:12 “Mhlonele uyihlo ndawonye nonyoko, khon' ukuze ube nokuzinza kwelo lizwe ndikunika lona mna Ndikhoyo Thixo wakho." 
Exodus20:13 “Musa ukuba sisibulala-mntu. 
Exodus20:14 “Musa ukukrexeza. 
Exodus20:15 “Musa ukûba. 
Exodus20:16 “Musa ukungqina ubuxoki ngomnye umntu. 
Exodus20:17 “Musa ukunqwenela umzi womnye umntu, nokuba ngumfazi wakhe, nokuba sisicaka sakhe okanye isicakakazi sakhe, nokuba yinkomo yakhe, nokuba yidonki yakhe, okanye nantoni na eyeyomnye umntu.”" 
Exodus20:18 Athi ke amaSirayeli akuziva iindudumo, nokuhlokoma kwexilongo, akubona nemibane itshawuza, nentaba ilitsili ngumsi, suka angcangcazela kukoyika, angcachela phaya." 
Exodus20:19 Abhekisa kuMosis, athi: “Mayibe nguwe othetha nathi; siya kukuva. Mayingabi nguThixo ngokwakhe othetha nathi, hleze sife.”" 
Exodus20:20 UMosis wathi ebantwini: “Sanukoyika, kuba uThixo uyanivavanya nje, khon' ukuze nihlale nimhlonele, ningawexulwa kukona.”" 
Exodus20:21 Kambe ke abantu bona bahlala bechasele, àbavuma ukusondela, yanguMosis yedwa okufuphi kwelo lifu limnyama lingumqondiso wobukho bukaThixo." 
Exodus20:22 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis, wathi: “Yithi kumaSirayeli: ‘Ngoku ke nindivile, mna Ndikhoyo, xa bendithetha nani ndisezulwini." 
Exodus20:23 Ngoko ke, indim nje uThixo wenu, sanukundidibanisa nezithixo ezenziwe ngesiliva okanye igolide." 
Exodus20:24 Mna ndenzeleni iqonga lamadini ngomhlaba, nize nithathe iinkomo, iigusha, okanye iibhokhwe, nenze ngazo amadini atshiswayo ngokunjalo namadini obudlelwane. Naphi na apho ndininike khona indawo yokunqula ndiya kuza ndinithamsanqelise." 
Exodus20:25 Xa nindenzela iqonga lamadini ngamatye sanukuwaqingqa, kuba xa nisebenzisa izixhobo niwaqingqa selexabhelekile kum." 
Exodus20:26 Xa nindakhela iqonga lamadini makungayiwa ngezinyuko kulo, hleze nithi xa ninyukayo zihlubeke izambatho zenu, nibe ze.’ ”" 
Exodus21:1 “Nantsi ke imimiselo oya kuyinika amaSirayeli: 
Exodus21:2 Umntu othe wathenga ikhoboka elingumHebhere liya kumkhonza iminyaka ibe mithandathu, lize ngowesixhenxe likhululwe lingahlawulelwanga nto." 
Exodus21:3 Ukuba langena ebukhobokeni lilisoka, liya kumka lilodwa. Kanti ke ukuba langena ebukhobokeni linomfazi, liya kukhululeka kunye naye." 
Exodus21:4 Xa lifike lingenamfazi, yaza inkosi yalo yalinika umfazi, waza wazala abantwana, abo bantwana nalo mfazi ngabenkosi yalo; xa likhululekayo liya kubashiya apho." 
Exodus21:5 Kodwa ke xa lithe ngokuphandle: ‘Hayi, ndiyakholwa yinkosi yam, ndiyamthanda nomkam, ngokunjalo nabantwana bam, ngoko ke ndikhetha ukungakhululeki,’" 
Exodus21:6 inkosi yalo ke iya kulithatha ilise *esibingelelweni phambi kukaThixo; apho ke iya kulayamisa elucangweni okanye emgubasini, ize iligqobhoze indlebe ngenyatyhoba. Yakuba ilenjenjalo ke, liya kuba ngumkhonzi wayo bonke ubomi balo." 
Exodus21:7 “Xa umntu ethengise intombi yakhe yalikhoboka, yona ayinakukhululeka okwekhoboka eliyindoda." 
Exodus21:8 Ukuba indoda leyo ibiyithengile ukuba ibe ngumfazi wayo, ize ithi kamva inganeliseki yiyo, kufuneka ivumele abantu bakowayo ukuba bayikhulule ngokuyithenga. Akuvumelekanga ukuba isuke iyithengise kwabasemzini; kaloku izaphule izigqibo." 
Exodus21:9 Ukuba iyithengele unyana wayo, mayiyiphathe njengentombi yayo." 
Exodus21:10 Xa indoda ithatha umfazi wesibini, mayingayeki ukumondla nokumnxiba nokumenza umfazi lo wokuqala." 
Exodus21:11 Ukuba ayiwafezi la malungelo mayimkhulule angahlawulelwa.” 
Exodus21:12 “Umntu obethe omnye wamenzakalisa wafa, makabulawe." 
Exodus21:13 Kodwa ke ukuba umbulele ngengozi, makabalekele endaweni endiyimisele abasabi." 
Exodus21:14 Kambe ke yena umntu obulele omnye ngolunya, nokuba angade abalekele eqongeni lamadini, makasuswe apho abulawe." 
Exodus21:15 “Umntu ohlasela uyise nokuba ngunina, makabulawe." 
Exodus21:16 “Umntu oqweqwedisa omnye aze amthengise okanye abanjwe esenaye, makabulawe." 
Exodus21:17 “Umntu othuka uyise nokuba ngunina, makabulawe." 
Exodus21:18 “Ukuba amadoda amabini axabene, yaza enye yabetha ngelitye okanye ngenqindi yayenzakalisa leyo ibisilwa nayo, kwaza kwafuneka ukuba khe ilale ngandletyana-nye," 
Exodus21:19 ukuba ibuye yakwazi ukuhamba-hamba isimelela, mayingohlwaywa le yenzakalisileyo, nto nje mayihlawule eli xesha liyilahlekeleyo ngokulala igula, futhi iyinyange ide iphile." 
Exodus21:20 “Ukuba umntu ulibethe ngentonga ikhoboka lakhe eliyindoda noba libhinqile, laza lafa ngoko nangoko, makohlwaywe." 
Exodus21:21 Kambe ke ukuba ikhoboka elo life emva kosuku okanye iintsuku ezimbini, akayi kohlwaywa. Kaloku ikhoboka belilelakhe." 
Exodus21:22 “Xa ababini bethe besilwa baya kuphoseka kumfazi okhulelweyo, waza ngenxa yaloo nto akenzakala kodwa sona isisu saphuma, lo usisizekabani sale ntlekele uya kudliwa ngokubona kwendoda yaloo mfazi, yakuba icetyiswe ngabalamli." 
Exodus21:23 Kodwa ke ukuba umfazi lowo uthe wenzakala, ubomi mabubuyekezwe ngobomi," 
Exodus21:24 iliso ngeliso, izinyo ngezinyo, isandla ngesandla, unyawo ngonyawo," 
Exodus21:25 umlilo ngomlilo, uduma ngoduma, umvumbo ngomvumbo." 
Exodus21:26 “Xa umntu elibethe walityhaphaza ikhoboka lakhe, liyindoda okanye libhinqile, makalikhulule ukuhlawula elo liso." 
Exodus21:27 Kanti ke nokuba ulibethe kwapoq' izinyo wolikhulula ukuhlawula elo zinyo.” 
Exodus21:28 “Xa inkunzi yenkomo yomntu othile ithe yahlaba umntu wafa, mayixulutywe ngamatye ide ife, inyama yayo ingàtyiwa. Ke yena umnini wayo akanatyala." 
Exodus21:29 Kambe ke ukuba inkomo leyo ibiqhelile ukuhlaba abantu, abe nomniniyo eyaliwe, kodwa akayigcina, yaza yahlaba umntu yambulala, mayixulutywe ngamatye ife, ngokunjalo nomniniyo abulawe." 
Exodus21:30 Phofu ke ukuba kubonakala ukuba umniniyo lowo makamiselwe umdliwo ukusindisa ubomi bakhe, kofuneka akhuphe loo nto ibizwayo njengoko injalo." 
Exodus21:31 Nokuba inkomo leyo ihlabe yabulala inkwenkwe okanye intombazana, logwetywa kwangaloo ndlela elo tyala." 
Exodus21:32 Xa ke inkomo leyo ihlabe yabulala ikhoboka eliyindoda okanye elibhinqileyo, umniniyo wokhupha intlawulo yeesiliva ezingamashumi amathathu, ke yona inkomo leyo ixulutywe." 
Exodus21:33 “Ukuba umntu ushiye umngxuma uvulekile, okanye umbe umngxuma akawugquma, kwaza kweyela inkomo noba yidonki kuwo, ummbi-mngxuma lowo" 
Exodus21:34 makayihlawule loo nto yeyeleyo, kodwa ke lona ixhoba elo loba lelakhe." 
Exodus21:35 “Ukuba ke iinkuzi zeenkomo zabantu ababini zenzakalisene, yaza enye yazo yafa, aba babini mabathengise le iphilayo, ize ixabiso layo bahlulelane ngalo, ngokukwanjalo bahlulelane ngayo nale ifileyo." 
Exodus21:36 Xa le nkomo ibulele enye ibe iqhelile ukwenza lo mkhwa, kodwa akayigcina umniniyo, makavuse le ifileyo ngephilayo; ke yona le ifileyo yoba yeyakhe.”" 
Exodus22:1 “Xa umntu ebe inkomo okanye igusha, waza wayixhela okanye wayithengisa, makahlawule iinkomo ezintlanu ngenkomo enye, aze ahlawule iigusha ezine ngegusha enye." 
Exodus22:2 “Ukuba ngaba isela libhaqwe liqhekeza ebusuku, laza labulawa, akanatyala lowo ulibuleleyo." 
Exodus22:3 Kambe ke ukuba le nto yenzeke emini, woba netyala lokubulala lowo ulibuleleyo." 
Exodus22:4 “Into umntu ayibileyo makayihlawule. Ukuba kuthe kanti ungumntu ongenanto, makathengiswe abe likhoboka ukubuyekeza ubusela obo. Ukuba ke inkomo, idonki, okanye igusha, leyo ayibileyo, ifunyenwe kuye isaphila, wohlawula zibe mbini ngenye." 
Exodus22:5 “Ukuba umntu uthe ebhuqisa intsimi yakhe yaza impahla yaphumela kweyomnye, umonakalo lowo makawuhlawule ngemveliso yentsimi yakhe." 
Exodus22:6 “Xa umntu etshisa entsimini yakhe, waza umlilo lowo wanwenwela entsimini yomnye umntu, watshisa ukutya osekuvuniwe okanye okungekavunwa, loo monakalo mawuhlawulwe nguloo mntu uqale umlilo." 
Exodus22:7 “Xa umntu egcinise omnye impahla ethile okanye imali, yaza ke yebiwa apho kuye, xa libanjiwe isela eliyibileyo liya kuyihlawula ngokuphindiweyo;" 
Exodus22:8 kanti ke xa lingafumaneki, umgciniswa lo uya kusiwa *esibingelelweni phambi kukaThixo, afunge ukuba ngenene le nto ibiweyo ayikho kuye." 
Exodus22:9 “Kuyo yonke imicimbi yembambano nokuba inxulumene neenkomo, iidonki, iigusha, impahla yokunxiba, okanye nantoni na elahlekileyo, abo babangisanayo mabasiwe esibingelelweni phambi kukaThixo. Lowo uthe wagwetywa ke nguThixo uya kumhlawula ngokuphindiweyo ogwetyelweyo." 
Exodus22:10 “Xa abantu ababini begcinisene iidonki, iinkomo, iigusha, okanye nasiphi na isilwanyana, saza safa okanye senzakala, kungenjalo sibiwe, kungabikho ngqina," 
Exodus22:11 umgciniswa lowo makaye kufunga esibingelelweni phambi kukaThixo ukuba umsulwa kule nyewe. Ukuba ke le mfuyo kubanjenwe ngayo ayibiwanga ngumgciniswa, umniniyo makaselexola, umgciniswa angayivusi." 
Exodus22:12 Kodwa ke ukuba imfuyo leyo ibiwe nguye, makayihlawule." 
Exodus22:13 Kambe ke ukuba kufumanisekile ukuba iqwengwe ngamarhamncwa, lo iqwengwe ikuye makezise ixhwayela, ibe bubungqina; xa kunjalo ke akayi kuyivusa." 
Exodus22:14 “Ukuba ababini babolekene ngemfuyo, yaza ke yenzakala okanye yafa engekho umniniyo, lo ubebolekiwe makayivuse." 
Exodus22:15 Kanti ke ukuba ebekho umniniyo, umbolekwa lowo akanakude ayihlawule. Phofu ke ukuba ibiqeshiwe kohlawulwa imali yengqesho yodwa.”" 
Exodus22:16 “Xa umntu one intombi nto engekabonwa lisoka, makayilobole batshate." 
Exodus22:17 Ukanti ke xa uyise wayo engavumi ukuyendisela kuye, makakhuphe intlawulo elingana nekhazi lentombi." 
Exodus22:18 “Ke lona igqwirha malibulawe. 
Exodus22:19 “Umntu olala nesilwanyana makabulawe. 
Exodus22:20 “Umntu obingelela nakwisiphi na *isithixo ngaphandle *kukaNdikhoyo makagwetyelwe ukufa. 
Exodus22:21 “Ningaze nimphathe kakubi nimcinezele umntu obhacele kwelakowenu. Kaloku nani ngokwenu naningababhaceli kwelaseJiputa. 
Exodus22:22 Ningaze nimphathe kakubi umhlolokazi nenkedama. 
Exodus22:23 Ukuba niyenzile loo nto, mna Ndikhoyo ndiya kusiva isikhalo sabo," 
Exodus22:24 ndikhathazeke, nina ndiniyekele nife emfazweni, ukuze abafazi benu babe ngabahlolokazi, abantwana bona babe ziinkedama." 
Exodus22:25 “Xa uboleke omnye kubantu bam abahlelelekileyo imali, mayingabi ngathi ùngumbolekisi-mali; ngoko ke sukumbiza nzala." 
Exodus22:26 Ukuba ke umntu úbambise ngengubo yakhe kuwe, ze uyibuyisele kwakuye lingekatshoni ilanga," 
Exodus22:27 kuba kaloku yena kuphela kwesambatho anaso sokumfudumeza. Kakade ke ùthi úya kulala ngani? Ukuba ke úthe wakhala kum, ndiya kumphendula, kuba kaloku mna ndinovelwano." 
Exodus22:28 “UThixo ungaze umnyelise; ngokunjalo ungayithuki nenkokheli yesizwe sakho. 
Exodus22:29 “Ungathandabuzi ukuthatha kwisivuno nakwiwayini yakho, wenze ngazo umnikelo kum. “Unyana wakho wamazibulo nikela ngaye kum." 
Exodus22:30 Namazibulo enkomo okanye igusha makabe ngumnikelo kum. Makahlale nonina iintsuku zibe sixhenxe qha, aze ngolwesibhozo anikelwe kum." 
Exodus22:31 “Ningabantu bam ncakasana; ke ngoko sanukuyitya inyama yemfuyo eqwengwe ngamarhamncwa asendle – ndaweni yaloo nto yinikeni izinja.” 
Exodus23:1 “Ungaze uhlwayele iindaba zolwimi. Sukuncedisana netshijolo ngokulingqinela ngobuxoki. 
Exodus23:2 Sukuvuma ukona ngenxa yokukhukuliswa sisihlwele. Ungaze uyigqwethe inyaniso ngenxa yefuthe lesihlwele. 
Exodus23:3 Sukuba negobe ngakwihlwempu xa kuthethwa ityala lalo. 
Exodus23:4 “Xa ubhaqe inkomo okanye idonki yotshaba lwakho ilahleka, yithathe uyigoduse." 
Exodus23:5 Ukuba ubona umntu okuthiyileyo eqhuba idonki ebuthisayo isoyiswa ngumthwalo, sukumyekela; mncedise niyivuse." 
Exodus23:6 “Musa ukugqwetha umthetho xa kuthethwa ityala lehlwempu. 
Exodus23:7 Bucezele ubuqhophololo bokutyhola umntu ongenatyala, ungabi sisizekabani sokufa kwelungisa elimsulwa, kuba iqhophololo ndiyaligweba." 
Exodus23:8 Sukuvuma ukunyotywa, kuba unyobo luyamfamekisa, luwawexule amalungisa." 
Exodus23:9 Ungamcinezeli umbhaceli. Kaloku uyazi ukuba kunjani na ukuba ngumbhaceli, kuba wawukhe wangumbhaceli kwelaseJiputa.”" 
Exodus23:10 “Amasimi akho walime uwavune iminyaka ibe mithandathu. 
Exodus23:11 Ke ngowesixhenxe wayeke alale. Into evelayo kuwo yoba yeyamahlwempu; eseleyo ke ibe yeyeenyamakazi. Yoba seso nakwisidiliya nesinquma sakho. 
Exodus23:12 “Sebenza iintsuku zibe ntandathu, kodwa ngolwesixhenxe ungawuphathi umsebenzi, ukuze izicaka nababhaceli ngokunjalo nemfuyo yakho ifumane ikhefu ihlaziyeke." 
Exodus23:13 “Wanyamekele amazwi endiwathethileyo kuwe. Ungazinquli *izithixo, ungaze uzikhankanye nokuzikhankanya oku.”" 
Exodus23:14 “Ndenzeleni itheko kathathu ngonyaka. 
Exodus23:15 Ngenyanga uAbhibhi enaphuma ngayo eJiputa, yenzani itheko lesonka sentlama engenagwele njengoko ndaniyalelayo. Kwithuba leentsuku ezisixhenxe zeli theko ze nitye sona sodwa. “Sanukuza phambi kukaThixo ningaphathanga mnikelo." 
Exodus23:16 “Yenzani itheko lolibo ukuqala kwenu ukuvuna. “Yenzani itheko lesivuno xa niqokelela iziqhamo zomsebenzi wenu emasimini. 
Exodus23:17 Minyaka le ngexesha lala matheko mathathu amadoda makeze kundinqula mna *Ndikhoyo iNkosi yenu. 
Exodus23:18 “Xa niphalaza igazi, nisenza idini, ze ninganikeli ngaxa-nye ngesonka sentlama enegwele. Ngala mathuba ke amanqatha edini elo makangabekwa mbeko." 
Exodus23:19 “Minyaka le zisa ulibo lwesivuno sakho endlwini kaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. “Uze ungaze ulipheke itakane lebhokhwe ngobisi lukanina.” 
Exodus23:20 “Uyabona ke, ndiya kukuthumela isithunywa sam, sikulondoloze endleleni yakho, sikuse kuloo ndawo ndikulungiselele yona." 
Exodus23:21 Uze usithobele, ungasivukeli, kuba simele mna; ibe ke asiyi kuba nalusini kulowo usivukelayo." 
Exodus23:22 Kambe ke ukuba uyayiphulaphula ngenyameko into ethethwa siso, wenze ngokomyalelo wam, iintshaba zakho ziya kuba zezam, ndibachase abakuchasayo." 
Exodus23:23 Isithunywa sam siya kukukhokela, sikuse kwilizwe lama-Amori, amaHiti, amaPerezi, amaKanana, amaHivi, namaJebhusi, ndize mna ndiwatshabalalise." 
Exodus23:24 Ungakhe ulinge uguqe unqule *izithixo zawo; ungazingeni neendlela zawo zonqulo. Ndaweni yaloo nto uzuzikhiqe izithixo zawo; uyiqhekeze uyiqethule imifanekiso yazo yamatye. 
Exodus23:25 Ukuba ke uthe wanqula mna *Ndikhoyo uThixo wakho, ndiya kukuthamsanqela ngokutya namanzi, ndikutshayele ukufa kungabikho phakathi kwenu." 
Exodus23:26 Kwelo lizwe lenu akukho mfazi uya kuphuma sisu, kungayi kubakho mfazi ungaphathiyo. Ewe, ndiya kunenza niphile nide nikhokhobe." 
Exodus23:27 “Ndiya kubenza barhwaqele bonke abantu abakuchasayo, ndizenze zidideke zonke izizwe olwa nazo. Ewe, ndiya kuba ngakuwe, utsho uziswantsulise zonke iintshaba zakho." 
Exodus23:28 Ndozithumela ngoonomeva iintshaba zakho, atsho asabe ungekafiki amaHivi, amaKanana, namaHiti." 
Exodus23:29 Andiyi kuwagxotha ngonyaka omnye, khon' ukuze kungabi senkangala kwelo lizwe, uthi wena ufika abe amarhamncwa selegunyile." 
Exodus23:30 Ndaweni yaloo nto ndiya kuthi chu ukuwafifinga oku, ude wena wande ngokwaneleyo, ube nako ukulithatha elo lizwe ulimé." 
Exodus23:31 Imida yakho iya kusuka kuLwandle oluBomvu, iye kuthi xhaxe kulwandle iMeditera; isuke kumlambo iEfrati, iye kuthi gaa ngentlango. Ndiya kubanikezela kuwe abemi belo zwe, ubagxothe phambi kwakho." 
Exodus23:32 Uze ungenzi mnqophiso nabo, okanye *nezithixo zabo." 
Exodus23:33 Uze ungabavumeli beme emhlabeni wakho, hleze bakulukuhle undivukele. Mhla wazinqula izithixo zabo, woba ungenile emgibeni.”" 
Exodus24:1 Ke kaloku *uNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis wathi: “Nyuka, wena noAron, uNadabhi noAbhihu, kunye namashumi asixhenxe amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli. Nothi ke nisemgama nikhahlele." 
Exodus24:2 Yoba nguwe Mosis wedwa ke oya kuza kufika kum; abanye ke abo basale; ke wona umndilili awuyi kunyuka nokunyuka entabeni.” 
Exodus24:3 UMosis ke wawugqithisela ebantwini loo mlomo kaNdikhoyo, ngokunjalo nemiyalelo. Ke amaSirayeli atsho ngazwi-nye athi: “Konke akuthethileyo uNdikhoyo siya kukwenza.”" 
Exodus24:4 UMosis wayibhala yonke imiyalelo kaNdikhoyo. Kusasa ngengomso wakha iqonga lamadini emazantsi entaba, waza wamisa ishumi elinambini leentsika zamatye ngokwezindlu ezilishumi elinambini zikaSirayeli." 
Exodus24:5 Kamva ke wathuma abafana, baya kwenzela uNdikhoyo amadini atshiswayo, babingelela ngeenkomo, benza amadini obudlelwana." 
Exodus24:6 UMosis wathatha isiqingatha segazi elo, waligalela ezityeni, waza isiqingatha wasifefa eqongeni lamadini." 
Exodus24:7 Ngoku ke wathatha umqulu ekubhalwe kuwo imiqathango yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, wafundela amaSirayeli. Ke wona aphendula athi: “Siya kumthobela uNdikhoyo, sikwenze konke asiyalele kona.”" 
Exodus24:8 Ke kaloku uMosis wathatha elaa gazi lalisesityeni, wafefa ngalo abantu, esithi: “Eli gazi litywina umnqophiso awenze nani uNdikhoyo mhla waninika le miyalelo.”" 
Exodus24:9 UMosis, uAron, uNadabhi, noAbhihu, kunye namashumi asixhenxe amadoda amakhulu, benyuka intaba," 
Exodus24:10 baza bambona uThixo kaSirayeli. Iinyawo zakhe zaziphezu komgangatho welitye elibuglasirha eliluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka. 
Exodus24:11 Kambe ke uThixo zange awase sandla la matshawe akwaSirayeli; bambona baza batya basela. 
Exodus24:12 *UNdikhoyo wabhekisa kuMosis, wathi: “Nyuka uze kum apha entabeni, uhlale; ndiza kukunika amacwecwe amatye endiyibhale kuwo imithetho nemiyalelo omawuyifundise amaSirayeli.”" 
Exodus24:13 UMosis wanduluka ke nehlakani lakhe uYoshuwa; ke yena uMosis wenyuka intaba kaThixo. 
Exodus24:14 Wathi kumadoda amakhulu: “Lindani kule ndawo side sibuye. Nâba uAron noYuri; wonke umntu onomcimbi makawandlale phambi kwabo bawuphicothe.” 
Exodus24:15 Ngenene ke uMosis wenyuka intaba, laza lona ilifu layambathisa intaba leyo." 
Exodus24:16 Baza ke ubuqaqawuli bukaNdikhoyo bahlala phezu kwentaba iSinayi. KumaSirayeli kwakungathi ngumlilo ovuthayo apho phezu kwentaba. Ilifu elo layifukama intaba leyo iintsuku zantandathu, waza ngolwesixhenxe uNdikhoyo wabiza uMosis esefini apho." 
Exodus24:17  
Exodus24:18 Ke kaloku uMosis wenyuka intaba, waya kungena apho efini. Wahlala apho iintsuku ezimashumi mane." 
Exodus25:1 *UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi:" 
Exodus25:2 “Xelela amaSirayeli ukuba bonke abaziva beqhutywa yintliziyo mabakhuphe umnikelo, bawuzise kum." 
Exodus25:3 Lo mnikelo ke mawube kwezi ndidi: igolide, isiliva, ubhedu," 
Exodus25:4 nelaphu elizuba, nelimsobo, nelibomvu, nelaphu elicikizekileyo, neloboya bebhokhwe," 
Exodus25:5 nofele olubomvu lwenkunzi yegusha, nofele olusukiweyo, nomngampunzi," 
Exodus25:6 neoyile yesibane, nobulawu bokuqhola, ioyile yesiqhumiso," 
Exodus25:7 namatye ekarneli, namanye amatye okuhombisa *isidanga sombingeleli omkhulu ngokunjalo nesikhuselo-sifuba sakhe." 
Exodus25:8 Mabandakhele indawo eyeyam ndodwa, ukuze nam ndihlale phakathi kwabo." 
Exodus25:9 Ke yona nempahla engaphakathi mayakhiwe ibe matwa nomzekelo endokubonisa wona. 
Exodus25:10 “Thatha umngampunzi, wenze ityesi ngawo. Mayibe ziisentimitha ezilikhulu elineshumi ubude bayo, ibe ngamashumi mathandathu nantandathu ububanzi, ngokunjalo nokuphakama." 
Exodus25:11 Yityabeke ngegolide ngaphandle nangaphakathi, futhi uyiphethe kwangegolide jikelele." 
Exodus25:12 Thatha igolide wenze amakhonkco abe mane, uwanxibelele emanqineni etyesi abe mabini cala-nye." 
Exodus25:13 Yenza imiqobo ngomngampunzi, uyityabeke ngegolide;" 
Exodus25:14 yona ke yongena kuloo makhonkco, iphathwe ngazo ityesi." 
Exodus25:15 Mayingakhutshwa, koko mayihlale ngolo hlobo lonke ixesha." 
Exodus25:16 Ngaphakathi ke faka amacwecwe abubungqina bomnqophiso endiza kukunika wona. 
Exodus25:17 “Kwakhona ke thatha igolide, wenze isivalo sibe ziisentimitha ezilikhulu elineshumi ubude, ububanzi zibe ngamashumi amathandathu anesithandathu." 
Exodus25:18 Thatha igolide ubumbe imifanekiso *yezithunywa ezimaphiko ibe mibini; yenze ibe nto-nye nesivalo eso," 
Exodus25:19 imiswe ngapha nangapha phezu kwaso, ijongene; athi ke loo maphiko athe naa asigubungele isivalo eso." 
Exodus25:20  
Exodus25:21 Faka loo macwecwe mabini abubungqina bomnqophiso, uvale." 
Exodus25:22 Kulapho ndiya kuhlangana nawe ke, apho phezu kwesivalo setyesi yomnqophiso, phakathi kwemifanekiso yezithunywa ezimaphiko, ndikunike yonke imiyalelo yamaSirayeli.”" 
Exodus25:23 “Thatha umngampunzi, wenze itafile ngawo. Mayibe ngamashumi asibhozo anesibhozo eesentimitha ubude; ibe ngamashumi mane anane ububanzi, kanti ke ukuphakama ibe ngamashumi amathandathu anesithandathu." 
Exodus25:24 Yityabeke ngegolide, futhi uyiphethe kwangayo jikelele." 
Exodus25:25 Mayijikelezwe lungqameko olububanzi bungangesandla, oluphethwe ngegolide jikelele." 
Exodus25:26 Yenza amakhonkco egolide abe mane, abe sezikoneni phezu kwemilenze." 
Exodus25:27 Amakhonkco okubamba imiqobo yokuthwala itafile makasondele kungqameko. 
Exodus25:28 Yenza imiqobo leyo ngomngampunzi, uyityabeke ngegolide." 
Exodus25:29 Yenza iipleyiti, iikomityi, iindebe, nezitya zokusetyenziswa xa kusenziwa idini lewayini. Kambe ke zonke ezi zinto mazenziwe ngegolide." 
Exodus25:30 Kule tafile makusoloko kukho isonka esinikelwa kuThixo.” 
Exodus25:31 “Thatha igolide engangxengwanga, wenze isibane ngayo. Amazantsi kunye nesiqu sesibane masibunjwe ngegolide. Izihombiso ezifana neentyatyambo, nemidumba, namagqabi eentyatyambo, mazibe nto-nye nesibane." 
Exodus25:32 Kwalapho kuso isiqu sesibane nxibelela amasebe aso abe mathandathu, oko kukuthi abe mathathu ngapha nangapha." 
Exodus25:33 La masebe mathandathu makahonjiswe ngomhombiso ofana neentyatyambo zealmondi, ibe nemidumba namagqabi eentyatyambo." 
Exodus25:34 Sona isiqu saso naso masihonjiswe ngomhombiso ofana neentyatyambo zealmondi enemidumbu namagqabi eentyatyambo. 
Exodus25:35 Onke amasebe ngambini makasekelwe ngumdumba. 
Exodus25:36 Imidumba namasebe makabe nto-nye nesiqu sesibane esenziwe ngegolide engangxengwanga. 
Exodus25:37 Kwesi siqu sesibane ke kofakwa izibane ezisixhenxe ngohlobo lokuba ziphose ilitha ngaphambili. 
Exodus25:38 Umcephe wokucima isibane nezithetyana zaso mazenziwe ngegolide. 
Exodus25:39 Iyonke igolide yokwenza esi sibane nobuxhaka-xhaka baso mayibe ngamashumi amathathu nantlanu eekhilogram ubunzima. 
Exodus25:40 Xa iyonke le nto uzuyenze ngokomzekelo endakubonisa wona entabeni.” 
Exodus26:1 “Thatha imiqulu yelaphu elisontwe ngobona buchule ibe lishumi, wenze ngayo umkhusane *wesibingelelo. La malaphu makabe yile mibala: ozuba, omsobo, nobomvu. Makahonjiswe ngemifanekiso *yezithunywa ezimaphiko yenziwe ngobugcisa nobunono." 
Exodus26:2 Yonke imikhusane mayilingane, ibe ziimitha ezilishumi elinambini ubude, zibe mbini ububanzi." 
Exodus26:3 La malaphu wadibanise abe mahlanu ngamahlanu. 
Exodus26:4 Thatha ilaphu elizuba, wenze amarhintyelo phaya emphethweni ngapha nangapha." 
Exodus26:5 Loo marhintyelo ke makabe ngamashumi amahlanu kweli cala; kanti ke nakweliya icala makabe kwangako, alungelelane." 
Exodus26:6 Kwangokunjalo ke thatha igolide, wenze amahaki angamashumi amahlanu, khon' ukuze la macala mabini adityaniswe, intente yesibingelelo ibe yinto enye." 
Exodus26:7 “Isibingelelo eso ke masambathiswe ngentente eyenziwe ngoboya bebhokhwe. Yona ke mayibe yimiqulu elishumi elinanye. 
Exodus26:8 Nayo ke mayilingane ibe ziimitha ezilishumi elinantathu, zibe mbini ke ububanzi." 
Exodus26:9 Dibanisa imiqulu ibe mihlanu kwelinye icala, uze uphinde uyidibanise nale mithandathu iseleyo; kambe ke lo wesithandathu wona uze uwuphinde ngaphambili." 
Exodus26:10 Yenza amarhintyelo angamashumi amahlanu emphethweni weli cala, kanti ke abe kwangako emphethweni weliya icala." 
Exodus26:11 Thatha ubhedu, wenze amahaki angamashumi amahlanu, ukuze la macala mabini adityaniswe abe yinto enye." 
Exodus26:12 Ke sona esi siqingatha siseleyo masijinge ngasemva phaya. 
Exodus26:13 La mashumi mahlanu eesentimitha alabalabayo kobu bude makagqume intente macala. 
Exodus26:14 “Kwakhona yaleke ngofele lwenkunzi yegusha olubomvu nangesikhumba esisukiweyo ngaphandle. 
Exodus26:15 “Yenza izakhelo zokuxhasa intente leyo ngezibonda zomngampunzi. 
Exodus26:16 Isakhelo ngasinye masibe ziimitha ezine ubude neesentimitha ezingamashumi amathandathu anesithandathu ububanzi. 
Exodus26:17 Uze uzenze ziphume ngapha nangapha, khon' ukuze zibe nokuhlanganiswa. Ewe, zonke izakhelo mazenziwe ngolu hlobo." 
Exodus26:18 Yenza izakhelo zangezantsi zibe ngamashumi amabini. 
Exodus26:19 Isakhelo ngasinye masibanjwe ziziseko ezibini zesiliva, zibe ngamashumi amane zizonke." 
Exodus26:20 Mayibe zizakhelo ezingamashumi amabini ngasentla," 
Exodus26:21 zixhaswe ngamashumi amane eziseko zesiliva, zibe zibini esakhelweni esinye." 
Exodus26:22 Ngasentshona izakhelo mazibe zithandathu," 
Exodus26:23 zibe zibini ezikoneni. 
Exodus26:24 Ezi zakhelo zeekona maziqhagamshelwe emazantsi, ziye kuqhina phezulu. Kunjalo ke okwezi zakhelo zibini zeekona." 
Exodus26:25 Ngoko ke zoba sibhozo zixhaswe lishumi elinesithandathu leziseko zesiliva, zingambini kwenye." 
Exodus26:26 “Yenza imiqadi ngomngampunzi; mayibe mihlanu ngapha nangapha," 
Exodus26:27 ngokunjalo nakwicala lasentshona ngasemva. 
Exodus26:28 Lo mqadi uphakathi mawube sesizikithini sesakhelo, unqamleze usuke ngapha uye kuthi ngqu ngaphaya." 
Exodus26:29 Izakhelo zityabeke ngegolide, uzenzele amakhonkco ngegolide apho iya kungena khona imiqadi; kambe ke nayo uya kuyityabeka ngegolide." 
Exodus26:30 Esi sibingelelo senze ngokomzekelo endakubonisa wona entabeni. 
Exodus26:31 “Thatha imiqulu yelaphu elisontwe kakuhle, wenze umkhusane. Malibe yile mibala: ozuba, omsobo, nobomvu. Lo mkhusane mawuhonjiswe ngemifanekiso *yezithunywa ezimaphiko, yenziwe ngobugcisa nobunono." 
Exodus26:32 Lo mkhusane ke mawuxhonywe kwiintsika zomngampunzi ezityatyekwe ngegolide ezinamahaki, zixhaswe ngeziseko ezine zesiliva." 
Exodus26:33 Lo mkhusane wuxhome kulaa mahaki aphezulu, uze emva kwawo ubeke laa tyesi inobungqina bomnqophiso. Umkhusane lo ke uya kwahlula igumbi elingcwele kwingcwele kangcwele." 
Exodus26:34 Ityesi yomnqophiso yivale ngesivalo sayo. 
Exodus26:35 Apha nganeno komkhusane beka itafile kwicala elingasentla, ize isibane sona sibe ngasezantsi." 
Exodus26:36 “Esangweni xhoma umkhusane welaphu elisontwe kakuhle elizuba, elimsobo, nelibomvu. Maliqhoqhonywe lihonjiswe ngobugcisa nobunono." 
Exodus26:37 Lenzele iintsika ezintlanu ngomngampunzi. Mazityatyekwe ngegolide, zifakwe amahaki egolide. Ke zona mazisekelwe ngeziseko zobhedu ezihlanu.”" 
Exodus27:1 “Ke lona iqonga lamadini uze ulenze ngomngampunzi lilingane macala, libe ziimitha ezimbini neesentimitha ezimashumi mabini ubude ngokunjalo nobubanzi, ukuphakama kube yimitha enye neesentimitha ezimashumi mathathu." 
Exodus27:2 Izibonda zeekona zalo zone mazilabalabe phezulu phaya, zenze iimpondo, futhi ke zityatyekwe ngobhedu." 
Exodus27:3 Lenzele iimbiza zokukhongozela olo thuthu lunamafutha, wenze neefotsholo, izitya, iifolokhwe, neepleyiti zomlilo. Zonke ke ezi zixhobo mazenziwe ngobhedu." 
Exodus27:4 Thatha ubhedu, wenze isisefu, uze usenzele amakhonkco ezikoneni zone." 
Exodus27:5 Esi sisefu sifake phantsi kongqameko olujikeleze iqonga, ngohlobo lokuba sithathe isiqingatha sokuphakama kwalo." 
Exodus27:6 Yenza imiqobo yokubamba ngomngampunzi, uyityabeke ngobhedu." 
Exodus27:7 Yifake macala kuloo makhonkco, ibe ziindawo zokuphatha." 
Exodus27:8 Lenze libe ngumhaba-haba nje wamaplanga, ngokwalaa ndlela ndandikubonise ngayo entabeni.”" 
Exodus27:9 “Esi *sibingelelo ke senzele inkundla ngomkhusane owenziwe ngelaphu elisontwe ngobuchule. Ngezantsi malibe ziimitha ezingamashumi amane anesine ubude. 
Exodus27:10 Umkhusane lo mawume ngeentsika zobhedu ezimashumi mabini, ezixhaswe ziziseko zobhedu ezimashumi mabini, zibe namahaki nemiqadi eyenziwe ngesiliva." 
Exodus27:11 Uya kwenza kwangolu hlobo ke nakwicala langasentla. 
Exodus27:12 Kwicala lasentshona umkhusane mawube lilaphu eliziimitha ezimashumi mabini nambini ubude, ube neentsika ezilishumi ezixhaswe ziziseko ezikwalishumi." 
Exodus27:13 Ngasempuma kwicala lesango umkhusane mawube kwaziimitha ezimashumi mabini nambini ububanzi. 
Exodus27:14 Ngapha nangapha esangweni ilaphu malibe ziimitha ezintandathu neesentimitha ezimashumi mathandathu, ime ngeentsika ezintathu ezixhaswe ziziseko ezithathu." 
Exodus27:15  
Exodus27:16 Inkqu yesango ke yona yovalwa ngelaphu eliziimitha ezilithoba ubude, elisontwe ngobuchule. Malibe yile mibala: ozuba, omsobo, nobomvu; liqhoqhonywe ngobugcisa nobunono. Loxhaswa ziintsika ezine ezimi ngeziseko ezine." 
Exodus27:17 Xa zizonke iintsika zenkundla le zodityaniswa ngemiqadi yesiliva, aze namahaki enziwe ngesiliva; ke zona iziseko zibe zezobhedu." 
Exodus27:18 Ubude bale nkundla mabube ziimitha ezingamashumi amane anesine, ububanzi zibe ngamashumi amabini anambini, ukuphakama ke kona ibe ziimitha ezimbini neesentimitha ezimashumi mabini. Umkhusane mawenziwe ngelaphu elisontwe ngobuchule, ke zona iziseko zenziwe ngobhedu." 
Exodus27:19 Xa zizonke izixhobo zesibingelelo ngokunjalo nezenkundla, nditsho nesikhonkwane sembala, mazenziwe ngobhedu.”" 
Exodus27:20 “Yitsho amaSirayeli eze neyona icwengileyo ioyile yomnquma, khon' ukuze isibane sihlale sivutha njalo-njalo." 
Exodus27:21 Kweli cala linganeno phambi komkhusane wetyesi yomnqophiso, uAron noonyana bakhe mabasoloko bejonge ukuba izibane ziyavutha phambi *koNdikhoyo, ukususela ngorhatya kude kube kusasa. Lo mmiselo ke mawuhlale uthotyelwe nanini na ngamaSirayeli nezizukulwana zawo.”" 
Exodus28:1 “Ke wena biza umkhuluwa wakho uAron noonyana bakhe: uNadabhi, uAbhihu, uElazare, noItamare. Bakhuphe kumaSirayeli, ubamisele babe ngababingeleli bam." 
Exodus28:2 Umntakwenu uAron menzele izivatho zobubingeleli eziya kumtsho abe nesidima nomfaneleko. 
Exodus28:3 Yalela abantu abanesiphiwo sobugcisa nobuchule, utsho benzele uAron izinxibo, khon' ukuze amiselwe umsebenzi wobubingeleli." 
Exodus28:4 Mabenze isikhuselo-sifuba, *isidanga, umnweba, ihempe ehonjisiweyo, iqhiya, kunye nomxwayo. Ezo mpahla ke mabazenzele uAron nooyana bakhe, ukuze bangene kulo msebenzi uwodwa wobubingeleli." 
Exodus28:5 Kulo msebenzi ke mabasebenzise igolide, nelaphu elizuba, elimsobo, nelibomvu; ibe ngamalaphu asontwe ngobuchule." 
Exodus28:6 “Isidanga mabasenze ngolu hlobo: umbala ozuba, omsobo, nobomvu, basebenzise igolide nelaphu eliqhoqhonywe lahonjiswa ngobugcisa." 
Exodus28:7 Masibe nemixwayo eqabela emagxeni, idibanise amacala aso omabini." 
Exodus28:8 Masibe nebhanti eyenziwe kwangelo laphu layo, sibe yinto enye nje, ithungwe ngobugcisa nobuchule obukhulu." 
Exodus28:9 Thatha amatye ekarneli abe mabini, ukrole kuwo amagama oonyana bakaSirayeli," 
Exodus28:10 ngokokuzana kwabo, abe ngamathandathu ngamathandathu." 
Exodus28:11 La magama oonyana bakaSirayeli ke makabhalwe ligcisa lomkroli. La macwecwe anala magama makaqhotyoshelwe ngesipeliti segolide kule mixwayo isemagxeni esidanga, ukuze ahlale esisikhumbuzo ngoonyana bakaSirayeli. Ngale ndlela ke uAro uya kuhlala ewathwele emagxeni la magama, ukuze abe sisikhumbuzo *kuNdikhoyo." 
Exodus28:12  
Exodus28:13 Thatha igolide, wenze izipeliti zokubamba la matye zibe zibini." 
Exodus28:14 Mazibe namatsheyini amabini aphothwe ngemingqa yegolide.” 
Exodus28:15 “Yenza isikhuselo-sifuba esiya kunceda umbingeleli omkhulu xa efuna ukuqonda intando kaThixo. Masenziwe kwangezaa zinto senziwe ngazo *isidanga, nangobugcisa obukwanjalo." 
Exodus28:16 Masibe ngumphindo olinganayo, ubude bube ziisentimitha ezingamashumi amabini nambini, nobubanzi bube kangako." 
Exodus28:17 Masihonjiswe ngemiqolo emine yamatye exabiso. Kuludwe lokuqala ibe yirubhi, itopazi, negarneti;" 
Exodus28:18 kolwesibini ibe yiemeraldi, isafire, nedayimani;" 
Exodus28:19 kumqolo wesithathu ibe yitekoyisi, iagati, neamatiste;" 
Exodus28:20 kowesine ibe yibherile, ikarneli, nejaspa. Onke ke makabanjwe ngesipeliti segolide." 
Exodus28:21 Kuya kubakho amatye alishumi elinambini. Kwilitye ngalinye ke kokrolwa igama lomnye woonyana bakaYakobi abamele izindlu zakwaSirayeli. 
Exodus28:22 Isikhuselo-sifuba masibe namatsheyini amabini aphothwe ngemingqa yegolide. 
Exodus28:23 Kwiikona zaso zangasentla nxibelela amakhonkco amabini egolide," 
Exodus28:24 uze ke uqhinele la matsheyini mabini kuwo. 
Exodus28:25 Kambe ke la macala mabini amatsheyini aseleyo orhintyela kwezaa zipeliti zibini, ukuze ngolo hlobo abhijele ngaphambili aye kuqhagamshela kwimixwayo yesidanga." 
Exodus28:26 Kwakhona ke yenza amakhonkco amabini ngegolide, uwanxibelele phaya kwezaa kona zaso zingezantsi ngaphakathi phezu kwesidanga." 
Exodus28:27 Ngokukwanjalo yenza amanye amakhonkco abe mabini ngegolide, uwanxibelele kumazantsi emixwayo yesidanga ngaphambili, kude kufuphi kodwa ngaphezu kwalaa bhanti ithungwe ngobugcisa nobuchule." 
Exodus28:28 Amakhonkco esikhuselo-sifuba wadibanise namakhonkco esidanga ngomtya ozuba, ukuze isikhuselo-sifuba sihlale phezu kwesidanga singabhakuzeli." 
Exodus28:29 “Ngoko ke xa uAron engena egumbini elingcwele makanxibe esi sikhuselo-sifuba sinamagama ezindlu zikaSirayeli, ukuze mna *Ndikhoyo ndingaze ndibalibale abantu bam." 
Exodus28:30 Kwalapho kwisidanga faka *iiurim neethumim, ukuze uAron ahambe nazo xa esiza kum. Ewe, ngala maxesha makanxibe isikhuselo-sifuba, ukuze asoloko enako ukuyiqonda intando yam mayela namaSirayeli.”" 
Exodus28:31 “Ke wona umnweba ophezu *kwesidanga mawulukwe ube lilaphu elizuba. 
Exodus28:32 Mawugqojozwe indawo yokungena intloko, ize iqukunjelwe iqine, ukuze ingakrazuki." 
Exodus28:33 Kumazantsi awo uze wenze imifanekiso yeerharnati ibe zuba, emsobo, nebomvu. Ezi zihombiso ke mazibolekisane neentsinjana ezenziwe ngegolide." 
Exodus28:34  
Exodus28:35 Lo mnweba ke uAron uya kuwufaka xa ekumsebenzi wakhe wobubingeleli. Iintsimbi ezo ke ziya kukhenkceza xa angenayo egumbini elingcwele, ngokunjalo naxa aphumayo. Ngokwenjenjalo uya kusinda ekufeni." 
Exodus28:36 “Thatha igolide ecocekileyo, wenze icwecwe elihle. Uze ukrole amagama kulo athi: ‘*OkaNdikhoyo pheleleyo.’" 
Exodus28:37 Liqhagamshele ngomsonto ozuba eqhiyeni yakhe ebunzi. 
Exodus28:38 Eli cwecwe ke liya kuthi nca ebunzi kuAron, khon' ukuze mna *Ndikhoyo ndiwamkele amadini amaSirayeli, nangona angade abe nempazamo xa anikelayo. Ewe, eli cwecwe malibe sebunzi kuye lonke ixesha. Ngokwenjenjalo abantu bam amaSirayeli baya kuhlala bamkelekile kum." 
Exodus28:39 “UAron uze umthungele ihempe ngelaphu elisontwe ngobugcisa. Uze umenzele iqhiya kwangelo laphu, ngokunjalo nomxwayo ohonjiswe waqhoqhonywa ngobona bugcisa." 
Exodus28:40 “Oonyana baka-Aron benzele iminweba nemixwayo neminqwazi, ukuze babe nesidima nomfaneleko." 
Exodus28:41 Ezi zivatho ke zinxibe uAron ngokunjalo noonyana bakhe. Wakukhov' ukwenjenjalo ke bathambise ubamisele ukuze bangene emsebenzini wobubingeleli. 
Exodus28:42 Kwakhona thatha ilaphu, ubenzele iibhulukhwe zangaphantsi ezisuka esinqeni zime emathangeni, ukuze bangahambi ze." 
Exodus28:43 UAron ndawonye noonyana bakhe mabasoloko bezinxibile xa bengena *esibingelelweni, noba bakwezamadini okwababingeleli, hleze bafe ngenxa yokuba behamba ze. Lo ke ngummiselo ongasoze washukunyiswa kuAron ndawonye nezizukulwana zakhe.”" 
Exodus29:1 “Nantsi ke imigqalisela omawuhambe ngayo xa umisela uAron noonyana bakhe kumsebenzi wabo wobubingeleli. Thatha inkunzana yenkomo kunye neenkunzi ezimbini zeegusha, zonke ke zibe zezingenasiphako." 
Exodus29:2 Thatha umgubo wengqolowa wodidi oluphambili, wenze isonka sentlama engenagwele, namaqebengwana anamafutha, nemiqathane yentlama engenagwele ethanjiswe ngamafutha." 
Exodus29:3 Ezo zonka zifake ebhaskitini, wenze ngazo umnikelo xa ubingelela ngezaa nkunzi, eyenkomo nezeegusha ezimbini." 
Exodus29:4 “UAron noonyana bakhe mabeze esangweni lesibingelelo, ubahlambe ngamanzi." 
Exodus29:5 UAron ke makanxibe ezobubingeleli: ihempe, *isidanga, umnweba, isikhuselo-sifuba, nebhanti;" 
Exodus29:6 umthwalise iqhiya, ulebele ngelaa cwecwe libhalwe ukuthi: ‘*OkaNdikhoyo pheleleyo.’" 
Exodus29:7 Wakukhov' ukwenjenjalo ke, mthi jize ngamafutha entloko, umthambise." 
Exodus29:8 “Thatha oonyana bakhe, ubafake iminweba;" 
Exodus29:9 bafake imixwayo, bathwale iminqwazi yabo. Le ke yindlela oya kummisela ngayo uAron noonyana bakhe; ububingeleli iya kuba ngummiselo wabo nanini nanini." 
Exodus29:10 “Uze uthathe inkunzi yenkomo, uze nayo ngasesangweni lesibingelelo. UAron noonyana bakhe mababeke izandla zabo phezu kwentloko yayo." 
Exodus29:11 Yixhelele phambi koNdikhoyo apho ngasesangweni lesibingelelo. 
Exodus29:12 Yithi nkxu igazi ngomnwe, uqabe iimpondo zeqonga lamadini ngalo. Inxalenye yegazi ke yigalele emazantsi eqonga elo." 
Exodus29:13 Ngoku thatha umhlehlo, nenxalenye yesibindi, izintso zombini, ndawonye namanqatha azo, uzitshise phezu kweqonga lamadini." 
Exodus29:14 Ke yona inyama yenkunzi leyo, ufele, ndawonye nezibilini, uya kuzitshisela ngaphandle komzi. Eli ke lidini lokususa izono." 
Exodus29:15 “Kwakhona thatha enye yeenkunzi zegusha, aze uAron noonyana bakhe babeke izandla zabo phezu kwentloko yayo." 
Exodus29:16 Yixhele, uze uthathe igazi layo uliphose macal' omane kwiqonga lamadini." 
Exodus29:17 Inyama leyo yihlahle, ke zona izibilini uzihlambe ndawonye namanqina. Ezi ndawo ndizibalileyo ke, nenyama xa iyonke, ngokunjalo nentloko, zidibanise uzitshisele phezu kweqonga lamadini. Eli ke lidini elitshiswayo. Litsho ngevumba elimyoli kuNdikhoyo." 
Exodus29:18  
Exodus29:19 “Kananjalo thatha enye inkunzi yegusha leyaa, utsho uAron noonyana bakhe babeke izandla zabo phezu kwentloko yayo." 
Exodus29:20 Yixhele, uthathe kwigazi layo, uqabe isithinzi sendlebe yasekunene kuAron nakoonyana bakhe. Kwakhona qaba oobhontsi babo basekunene ezandleni, ngokunjalo noobhontsi basekunene beenyawo zabo. Igazi eliseleyo ke lisarhaze macal' onke apho kwiqonga lamadini." 
Exodus29:21 Thatha kwigazi elilapho phezu kweqonga lamadini, ndawonye neoyile yokuthambisa, ufefe uAron noonyana bakhe ndawonye neempahla zabo. Xa bebonke ke, ngokunjalo neempahla zabo, baya kumiselwa banikezelwe emsebenzini wam." 
Exodus29:22 “Thatha amanqatha enkunzi yegusha leyo ke, iketelele lomsila, umhlehlo, inxalenye yesibindi, izintso zombini, ndawonye namanqatha azo, nomlenze wasekunene." 
Exodus29:23 Phaya ebhaskitini caphula kwiintlobo zonke: isonka, iqebengwana, nomqathane." 
Exodus29:24 Zibeke ezandleni zika-Aron noonyana bakhe, baziwangawangise, bandenzele ngazo umnikelo owodwa." 
Exodus29:25 Kamva ke uya kuzithatha kubo, uzitshise ndawonye nedini elitshiswayo. Elo ke lidini elivumba liyolileyo kuNdikhoyo – kaloku lidini elitshiswayo." 
Exodus29:26 “Ke kaloku uya kuthatha incum yale nkunzi yegusha, uyiwangawangise, uyenze umnikelo kum. Kambe ke esi iya kuba sisabelo sakho." 
Exodus29:27 “Xa kumiselwa umbingeleli incum nomlenze waloo nkunzi yegusha isetyenzisiweyo zingumnikelo kum, omawubekelwe bucala, ube sisabelo sababingeleli." 
Exodus29:28 Lo ke ngummiselo wam ongasoze uthini. Nanini na abantu bam besenza idini lobudlelwane, incum nomlenze sisabelo sababingeleli; ngoko sisipho esinikelwa kuNdikhoyo." 
Exodus29:29 “Xa engasekho uAron, izivatho zakhe zobubingeleli ziya kunikwa oonyana bakhe, banxitywe zona mhla bethanjiswa bemiselwa." 
Exodus29:30 Lo nyana ka-Aron ungena esikhundleni sakhe asebenze *esibingelelweni endaweni engcwele, wonxitywa ezi zivatho iintsuku zibe sixhenxe." 
Exodus29:31 “Inyama leyo yenkunzi yegusha amiselwa ngayo uAron noonyana bakhe wòyiphekela endaweni enyulu. 
Exodus29:32 Baya kuyithatha ke bayitye kunye nesaa sonka besisele ebhaskitini, bayityele apho esangweni lesibingelelo." 
Exodus29:33 Ke zona eziya ndawo ziseleyo xa bekusenziwa idini lokungxengxeza ekumiselweni kwabo, baya kuzitya. Kambe ke ngababingeleli bodwa abanelungelo lokukutya oku kutya, kuba kunyulu." 
Exodus29:34 Inyama okanye isonka esiseleyo kwada kwakusasa, mazitshiswe, zingàtyiwa; kaloku zinyulu." 
Exodus29:35 “Uyabona ke lo msitho wokumisela uAron noonyana bakhe mawube ziintsuku ezisixhenxe njengoko ndakuyalelayo. 
Exodus29:36 Mini nganye ke uya kwenza idini lokungxengxezela izono ngenkunzi yenkomo ibe nye. Ngokwenjenjalo uya kuhlambulula iqonga lamadini, uze ke ngokunjalo ulithambise ngeoyile libe nyulu." 
Exodus29:37 Uya kwenjenjalo ke iintsuku zibe sixhenxe. Xa kunjalo ke iqonga lamadini liya kuba nyulu ngokugqibeleleyo, aze athi nabani na okanye nantoni na elichukumisayo ibe nyulu nayo.”" 
Exodus29:38 “Ukusukela ngoku, yonke imihla yenza idini ngamaxhwane amabini phaya kwiqonga lamadini." 
Exodus29:39 Thatha elinye kusasa, lize eli liseleyo libe lelasemalanga." 
Exodus29:40 Kweli lakusasa nikela nomgubo wengqolowa wodidi oluphambili, ube yikhilogram enye ubunzima, uwudibanise nelitha enye yamafutha omnquma acwengileyo. Yenza idini ngelitha yewayini." 
Exodus29:41 Nakweli lasemalanga idini sebenzisa umgubo, amafutha, kunye newayini, kwangalaa ndlela wenze ngayo kusasa. Eli ke lidini elitshiswayo – litsho ngevumba eliyolileyo *kuNdikhoyo." 
Exodus29:42 Ukusukela ngoku eli dini litshiswayo mandilenzelwe phaya esangweni *lesibingelelo. Kaloku apho kulapho ndiya kuhlangana khona nabantu bam, ndithethe nawe khona." 
Exodus29:43 Ewe, ndiya kuhlangana khona namaSirayeli; baye ubuqaqawuli bam buya kuyitsho loo ndawo ibe yekhethekileyo." 
Exodus29:44 Ndiya kusenza nyulu isibingelelo ndawonye neqonga lamadini. Ke yena uAron noonyana bakhe ndiya kubachonga ukuze babe ngababingeleli bam. 
Exodus29:45 Ndiya kuhlala phakathi kwamaSirayeli, ndibe nguThixo wawo." 
Exodus29:46 Kananjalo ke aya kundiqonda ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wawo owawakhulula eJiputa, ukuze ndihlale phakathi kwawo. Ngenene ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wawo.”" 
Exodus30:1 “Thatha umngampunzi, wenze iqonga lesiqhumiso." 
Exodus30:2 Amacala alo makalingane, abe ziisentimitha ezingamashumi amane nantlanu ubude, ngokunjalo nobubanzi; umphakamo ke wona zibe ngamashumi asithoba. Izibonda zeekona mazilabalabe zenze iimpondo." 
Exodus30:3 Eli qonga ke lityabeke lonke ngegolide: umphezulu, amacala, neempondo; futhi ke uliphethe ngegolide jikelele." 
Exodus30:4 Lenzele amakhonkco amabini ngegolide, uwanxibelele apha phantsi komphetho macala, khon' ukuze apho kuwo kungene imiqobo yokuliphatha." 
Exodus30:5 Nayo le miqobo yenze ngomngampunzi, uyityabeke ngegolide." 
Exodus30:6 Eli qonga malibe nganeno komkhusane ophambi kwetyesi enobungqina bomnqophiso evalwe ngesivalo sokungxengxezela, apho ndiya kuhlangana nawe khona." 
Exodus30:7 Miso le xa uAron eze kulungisa izibane, uya kufaka isiqhumiso esivumba limnandi kweli qonga." 
Exodus30:8 Nasemalanga ke, xa eze kulumeka izibane, makenze kwangolo hlobo. Lo mnikelo ke wesiqhumiso mawungatyeshelwa kude kube zizizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Exodus30:9 Kweli qonga ke ungaze uqhumise ngasiqhumiso simbi, okanye idini elitshiswayo, kungenjalo idini lokutya; phezu kwalo ungenzi mnikelo uthululwayo." 
Exodus30:10 Kanye ngonyaka uAron makalihlambulule eli qonga ngokwenza idini lokucamagusha. Uya kuthatha igazi lelo dini lesono, aqabe iimpondo zalo. Lo mmiselo ke mawenziwe minyaka le, ungaze uyekwe. Ngokwenjenjalo ke eli qonga liya kuba nyulu ngokugqibeleleyo kuNdikhoyo.”" 
Exodus30:11 *UNdikhoyo ke wathi kuMosis: 
Exodus30:12 “Ngexesha lobalo lwamaSirayeli umntu ngamnye aze akhuphe umrhumo wokucamagushela ubomi bakhe, khon' ukuze kungabikho shwangusha elubalweni apho." 
Exodus30:13 Wonke umntu obalwayo makakhuphe iqhekeza lesiliva liqulunqwe ngokomlinganiselo ovunyiweyo. Ewe wonke ubani makahlawule le mali, ibe ngumnikelo wakhe kum." 
Exodus30:14 Lilonke ke, mntu wonke ubalwayo ukuqalela kominyaka ingamashumi amabini ukunyuka, makawukhuphe loo mrhumo." 
Exodus30:15 Uyabona ke, kuloo mrhumo wobomi babo akukho sityebi nahlwempu, koko bonke baya kukhupha ngokulinganayo umlinganiselo lowo umisiweyo." 
Exodus30:16 Le mali ke yiqokelele kuwo onke amaSirayeli, ize isetyenziswe ekuxhaseni *isibingelelo. Lo mrhumo ke sisicamgushelo sobomi babo, khon' ukuze ndihlale ndibakhumbula ndibakhusele.”" 
Exodus30:17 *UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis wathi: 
Exodus30:18 “Yenza isitya sokuhlambela ngobhedu, usihlalise phezu kwesiseko sobhedu. Masime phakathi kwegumbi elingcwele neqonga lamadini, usigalele amanzi." 
Exodus30:19 UAron noonyana bakhe baya kuhlamba izandla neenyawo kuloo manzi 
Exodus30:20 xa bangenayo egumbini elingcwele okanye besiya kwenza idini elitshiswayo kwiqonga lamadini, ukuze bangafi." 
Exodus30:21 Ewe, mabahlambe izandla neenyawo ukuze bangafi. Lo ke ngummiselo amabawuthobele bona nezizukulwana zabo.”" 
Exodus30:22 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi: 
Exodus30:23 “Thatha obona bulawu bodidi: iikhilogram ezintandathu zemore engamanzi, iikhilogram ezintathu zesinamon evumba limnandi, iikhilogram ezintathu zezele elivumba limnandi, neekhilogram ezintandathu" 
Exodus30:24 zekasiya; zonke mazilinganiswe ngokomlinganiselo ovunyiweyo. Xa zizonke ke zidibanise neelitha ezine zamafutha omnquma," 
Exodus30:25 wenze isiqholo esingamafutha anyulu avumba limnandi, axutywe lichule." 
Exodus30:26 Ngawo ke thambisa intente *yesibingelelo, ityesi enobungqina bomnqophiso," 
Exodus30:27 itafile namasolotya ayo, isibane nobuxhaka-xhaka baso, iqonga lesiqhumiso," 
Exodus30:28 iqonga lamadini nokwalo, kunye nesitya sokuhlambela nesiseko saso." 
Exodus30:29 Wakuba uzihlambulule ngolu hlobo ke ezi zinto ziya kuba nyulu ngokupheleleyo, ngokunjalo ke nantoni na ezichukumisayo iya kuba nyulu." 
Exodus30:30 Thambisa uAron noonyana bakhe, ubamisele babe ngababingeleli bam." 
Exodus30:31 Waxelele amaSirayeli ukuba la mafutha ngawam kuphela kude kube zizizukulwana ngezizukulwana. 
Exodus30:32 Umntu nje ongomnye angàze athanjiswe ngawo. Kwaye futhi ungàze uthathe le migqalisela axutywe ngayo wenze amafutha nje. Kaloku anyulu; ngoko ke wahloniphe. 
Exodus30:33 Nabani na owenza amafutha afana nawo, okanye osebenzisa la mafutha mntwini wumbi ungengombingeleli, uya kusikwa phakathi kwabantu bam.”" 
Exodus30:34 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi: “Thatha umlinganiselo ofanayo wezi ntlobo zobulawu: isitakate, ionirha, igalbhano, nentlaka yokuqhumisa yoqobo." 
Exodus30:35 Yenza ngazo umxube wesiqhumiso esivumba liyolileyo. Sithi saa ityiwa, sihlambuluke sibe nyulu." 
Exodus30:36 Thatha inxalenye yaso, uyicole ibe ngumgubo, ungene nayo *esibingelelweni, uyibeke phambi kwetyesi yomnqophiso apho ndiya kuhlangana khona nawe. Esi siqhumiso masihlonipheke; sinyulu." 
Exodus30:37 Ningaze nithathe imigqaliselo yalo mxube waso nizenzele esenu. Siphatheni ngentlonipho, sibe sesam ndedwa." 
Exodus30:38 Nabani na ozenzele isiqhumiso esifana naso, okanye osebenzisa esi njengesiqholo, uya kusikwa phakathi kwabantu bam.”" 
Exodus31:1 *UNdikhoyo waxelela uMosis wathi: 
Exodus31:2 “Uyabona ke, uBhezaleli unyana kaUri umzukulwana kaYuri wendlu kaJuda, ndimnyule." 
Exodus31:3 Ndimzalise ngoMoya wam, ndamthi jize ngokuqonda, ubuchule, nabo bonke ubugcisa;" 
Exodus31:4 ukucwangcisa nokuyila esebenza ngegolide, isiliva, nobhedu;" 
Exodus31:5 ukukrola nokuqingqa amatye, nokuchwela, nawo wonke umsebenzi wobugcisa." 
Exodus31:6 Kanti ke noHoliyabhi, unyana ka-Ahisamaki wendlu kaDan, ndimtyumbile ukuba ancedisane noBhezaleli. Naye ke ngokunjalo bonke ubuchule nobugcisa ndimphile, khon' ukuze babe nako ukuyenza yonke into endiyalela ukuba yenziwe:" 
Exodus31:7 *isibingelelo, ityesi yomnqophiso nesivalo sayo, nezixhobo nako konke okuhamba nesibingelelo;" 
Exodus31:8 itafile namasolotya ayo, isibane esenziwe ngegolide yoqobo nokwaso, iqonga lesiqhumiso," 
Exodus31:9 iqonga lamadini atshiswayo nezixhobo zalo, isitya sokuhlambela nesiseko saso;" 
Exodus31:10 ezo zivatho zingayiwayo zobubingeleli zika-Aron noonyana bakhe, abaya kuzisebenzisa xa befezekisa umsebenzi endibanike wona;" 
Exodus31:11 amafutha okuthambisa, neso siqhumiso sivumba limnandi segumbi elingcwele. Zonke ke ezi zinto mabazenze matwa nendlela endikuyalele ngayo.”" 
Exodus31:12 *UNdikhoyo wathi uMosis 
Exodus31:13 makayalele amaSirayeli athi: “Wuhloneleni *uMhla wokuPhumla, uyimini yam; ewe, ungumqondiso phakathi kwam nani kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana, uxela ukuba mna Ndikhoyo ndanenza naba ngabam ncakasana." 
Exodus31:14 Ngoko ke wuhloneleni uMhla wokuPhumla, kuba kuni ungumhla owodwa. Umntu ongawuhloneliyo, koko osebenzayo ngawo, makabulawe." 
Exodus31:15 Kaloku zikho iintsuku ezintandathu ukuba nenze wonke umsebenzi wenu, kodwa ke wona umhla wesixhenxe ngumhla onendili wokuphumla olibango lam. Nabani na ke owenza umsebenzi wakhe ngawo makabulawe." 
Exodus31:16 AmaSirayeli makaluhlonele olu suku, lube ngumqondiso ngokomnqophiso kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Exodus31:17 Lona lungumqondiso ongasoze ujike phakathi kwam namaSirayeli. Kaloku mna Ndikhoyo ndênza izulu nehlabathi liphela ngeentsuku ezintandathu, ndaza ke ndaphumla ngomhla wesixhenxe.”" 
Exodus31:18 Akukhov' ukuthetha uThixo noMosis entabeni yeSinayi, wamnikezela amacwecwe amatye amabini, apho uThixo ngenkqu wayeyibhale khona imimiselo." 
Exodus32:1 AmaSirayeli akubona ukuba uMosis akabuyi entabeni, asuka amgungela uAron, athi: “Senzele *uthixo oza kusikhokela. Okokwakhe yena laa Mosis wasikhupha eJiputa, asiyazi into emhleleyo.”" 
Exodus32:2 UAron wayalela ukuba bathathe amacici ebafazini, koonyana, nasezintombini zabo, beze nawo kuye." 
Exodus32:3 Bawakhulula ke amacici lawo, beza nawo kuAron." 
Exodus32:4 Wawathatha ke, wawanyibilikisa, waza igolide leyo enziwe ngayo wayibumba ngezixhobo zokubumba, wenza inkunzana yenkomo ngayo. AmaSirayeli ke athi: “Sirayeli, nanku uThixo wakho owakukhupha eJiputa!”" 
Exodus32:5 Akuyibona le nto uAron wakha iqonga lamadini apho phambi kwaloo nkunzana yenkomo, waza wenza isaziso esithi: “Ngomso kobhiyozelwa uNdikhoyo.”" 
Exodus32:6 Kwangentseni ngomhla olandelayo benza amadini atshiswayo kwanatyiwayo. Ke kaloku abo bantu batya, basela, bahakaza, bada barheletya." 
Exodus32:7 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi: “Khawuleza uhle! Aba bantu bakho wabakhupha eJiputa babhatyazile; 
Exodus32:8 sebekhawuleze bawushiya umyalelo endabanika wona. Ngoku bazibumbele inkunzana yenkomo, bayinqula; futhi banikela amadini kuyo. Bathi: ‘MaSirayeli, lo nguThixo wethu owasikhupha eJiputa.’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 UNdikhoyo waqhuba wathi: “Ngoku ndiyabaqonda aba bantu inkani yabo – nqwa neyesele! 
Exodus32:10 Ngoko ke wena ndiyeke, kuba ndiza kubacim' igama, wena ndikwenze ube sisizwe esikhulu.”" 
Exodus32:11 Kambe ke uMosis watarhuzisa kuNdikhoyo uThixo wakhe, wathi: “Awu, *Mhlekazi, ungathini kaloku ukusuka ulwe kanjalo nabantu bakho owabahlangula wabakhulula ngobungaka bona ubungangamsha kwelaseJiputa?" 
Exodus32:12 Xa kunjalo amaJiputa angatsho ngakhona athi: ‘UThixo wamaSirayeli wawakhupha eJiputa eneenjongo zokuwatshabalalisela ezintabeni, awatshayele angabikho ehlabathini.’ Awu, ndiyakubongoza, Mhlekazi, lala ngenxeba, uxole, ungabi sabahlisela le ntlekele abantu bakho."
