Exodus32:13 Khawukhumbule izicaka zakho, uAbraham, uIsake, noSirayeli. Kaloku wazifunga kwawena siqu, usithi: ‘Inzala yenu ndiya kuyandisa, ibe ninzi njengeenkwenkwezi ezisesibhaka-bhakeni. Eli lizwe ndinithembise ngalo liya kuba lilifa lezizukulwana zenu ngonaphakade.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Ngenene ke *uNdikhoyo wabuya nganeno kuloo ntlekele wayethe uza kubahlisela yona abantu bakhe. 
Exodus32:15 UMosis ke wehla apho entabeni, ewaphethe loo macwecwe mabini amatye abhalwe ubungqina bomnqophiso macal' omabini." 
Exodus32:16 La macwecwe ke ayengumsebenzi kaThixo ncakasana, nombhalo lowo wawukrolwe nguye ngenkqu." 
Exodus32:17 Akuyiva ingxolo yabantu bekhwaza, uYoshuwa wabhekisa kuMosis wathi: “Ndiva intsholo esikhululweni ngathi lifile.”" 
Exodus32:18 UMosis waphendula wathi: “Kum le ntsholo ingathi asiyiyo eyoloyiso, okanye ukoyiswa; ivakala ngathi yeyeziyolo nje.”" 
Exodus32:19 Uthe ke uMosis akuba kufuphi, ebone loo nkunzi yenkomo, ngokunjalo nabantu beduda bexhentsa, suka wasisifu ngumsindo. Apho kanye phantsi kwentaba wasuka wawalahla phantsi loo macwecwe wayewaphethe, aphuka." 
Exodus32:20 Wayithatha loo nkunzi babeyibumbile, wayiphosa emlilweni, waza wayicola yangumgubo, wawugalela emanzini aselwa ngamaSirayeli." 
Exodus32:21 UMosis wabuza kuAron wathi: “Aba bantu bakwenze ntoni na ukuze ubafake kwesinje sona isono?” 
Exodus32:22 UAron waphendula wathi: “Ungakhathazeki, mntakwethu; kaloku nawe uyabazi aba bantu ukuba baqinel' enyaleni ngesono." 
Exodus32:23 Basuka bathi kum: ‘Senzele uThixo oza kusikhokela, kuba asiyazi into emhleleyo laa Mosis osikhuphe eJiputa.’" 
Exodus32:24 Ndithe ke kubo: ‘Ndinikeni izinto zegolide eninazo,’ baza ke benjenjalo. Ndasuka ke ndaziphosa emlilweni, kwee gqi le nkunzi.”" 
Exodus32:25 UMosis ke waqonda ukuba uAron uvule zabhuqa, baza abantu benza unothanda, bazenza intlekisa nasezintshabeni." 
Exodus32:26 Ngoko ke wasuka wema esangweni, wathi: “Bonke *abangakuNdikhoyo mabaphume ngapha!” Ke kaloku kwaphuma yonke indlu kaLevi," 
Exodus32:27 waza wathi kubo: “Utsho uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli ukuthi: ‘Umntu ngamnye kuni makathathe ikrele, aqale kweli sango, aye kuphuma kweliya lingaphaya, ebinza elalis' ugodo, kumtakwabo, isihlobo, ngokunjalo nommelwane wakhe.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 AbaLevi abo ke benza ngokwaloo myalelo, baza ke babulala amawaka amathathu amadoda ngaloo mini." 
Exodus32:29 UMosis ke wathi kubaLevi: “Niyabona ke, namhlanje, ngokubulala abantakwenu noonyana benu, niye naba ngababingeleli bokubusa uNdikhoyo. Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo unithamsanqele.”" 
Exodus32:30 Ngengomso ke uMosis wathi ebantwini: “Nenze isono esilumezayo. Naxa kunjalo ndiza kuphinda ndiye entabeni kuNdikhoyo, ukuze ndenze isingxengxezo ngenxa yesono senu.”" 
Exodus32:31 UMosis waya kuNdikhoyo, wafika wathi: “Aba bantu benze isono esilumezayo. Basuke bazibumbela isithixo ngegolide, basinqula." 
Exodus32:32 Ngoku ke ndiyakubongoza, baxolele; ukuba akunakuba njalo wosewulicima igama lam encwadini yakho oyibhalileyo.”" 
Exodus32:33 UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Abantu abamagama ndiwacimayo encwadini yam, ngabo bandonileyo bodwa." 
Exodus32:34 Ngoko ke hamba, ukhokele aba bantu, ubase kulaa ndawo ndandithethe ngayo kuwe. Ke sona isithunywa sam siya kukukhokela. Kambe ke lakufika ixesha ndiya kubohlwaya aba bantu ngenxa yesi sono.”" 
Exodus32:35 Ke kaloku uNdikhoyo wawabetha ngobhubhani wesifo amaSirayeli ngenxa yokuba amnyanzelayo uAron ukuba awenzele inkunzi yenkomo yegolide. 
Exodus33:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Hamba apha, wena nabo bonke abantu owabakhokelayo waphuma nabo eJiputa, usingise kwilizwe endabathembisa lona ngesifungo uAbraham, uIsake, noYakobi, ndisithi: ‘Loba lelezizukulwana zenu.’" 
Exodus33:2 Ndiya kuthumela isithunywa sinikhaphe, siwagxothe amaKanana, ama-Amori, amaHiti, amaPerezi, amaHivi, namaJebhusi." 
Exodus33:3 Hambani niye kwelo lizwe lendyebo nentlutha. Kambe ke mna andizukuhamba nani, hleze ndisuke ndinitshabalalise ningekafiki, kuba niluhlanga oluneenkani.”" 
Exodus33:4 Athe ke amaSirayeli akuziva ezi ndaba zibuhlungu, asuka azila, azikhulula iintsimbi awayehomba ngazo." 
Exodus33:5 Kaloku uNdikhoyo wayethe kuMosis: “Xelela amaSirayeli: ‘Niluhlanga oluneenkani, ngoko ke andizukuhamba nani, kuba xa bendinokuhamba nani nomzuzwana lo, bendiya kusuka ndinitshabalalise. Zikhululeni iintsimbi zesihombiso; ndisaza kuyibona into endiza kunenza yona.’ ”" 
Exodus33:6 Ngoko ke amaSirayeli azikhulula iintsimbi nezinye izihombiso zawo ukunduluka kwawo kwintaba iHorebhe. 
Exodus33:7 Ke kaloku kolu hambo lwawo amaSirayeli ayesithi apho emise khona, uMosis agxumeke iintente, emise enye intente mganyana nje nendawo leyo bahlala kuyo. Le ke yayiyintente yokuhlangana; nabani na owayefuna ukuva *kuNdikhoyo wayesiya kuyo." 
Exodus33:8 Wayesithi uMosis xa esiya ententeni yokuhlangana amaSirayeli wona eme emnyango ezintenteni zawo, ambukele ade aye kungena." 
Exodus33:9 Wayesithi nje ukuba angene uMosis, umqulu welifu uhle ufike uhlale emnyango ententeni apho, aze ke yena uNdikhoyo athethe noMosis." 
Exodus33:10 AmaSirayeli ayesithi akuwubona umqulu welifu usemnyango apho ententeni yokuhlangana, asuke ee guqaqa anqule." 
Exodus33:11 Ke yena uNdikhoyo wayeye athethe noMosis ubuso ngobuso, njengaye nabani na othetha nomhlobo wakhe. UMosis ke wayesithi akugqiba agoduke, kodwa yena uYoshuwa umfana olihlakani lakhe, unyana kaNune, wayesala apho ententeni yokuhlangana." 
Exodus33:12 UMosis wathetha *noNdikhoyo, wathi: “Kaloku undiyalele ukuba ndikhokele aba bantu, ndibase kwelo lizwe, kodwa akutshongo ukuba kolu hambo ndokhatshwa ngubani na. Ewe, utshilo nokuthi: ‘Ndikwazi ngokupheleleyo; kwaye futhi ndikholisekile nguwe.’" 
Exodus33:13 Ngoko ke, xa kunjalo, ndazise intando yakho, ukuze ndikwazi, ndihlale ndikholisekile kuwe. Kwakhona khumbula ukuba olu hlanga ngabantu bakho ncakasana.”" 
Exodus33:14 UNdikhoyo waphendula wathi: “Hayi kaloku, ndiza kuhamba nani ngenkqu, ndinithi jize ngokuphumla.”" 
Exodus33:15 Ke yena uMosis waleka ngelithi: “Ukuba akuhambi nathi, sukuba sasindulula simke apha." 
Exodus33:16 Xa ungahambi nathi kuya kwaziwa njani ukuba ukholisekile ndim naba bantu? Kanti ke xa ukho phakathi kwethu, siya kutsho sahluke kulo lonke uluntu.”" 
Exodus33:17 UNdikhoyo wathi: “Ndiza kwenza kanye ngokwesicelo sakho, kuba kaloku ndikholisekile nguwe, futhi ke ndikwazi kakuhle.”" 
Exodus33:18 UMosis waphinda wenza isicelo, wathi kuNdikhoyo: “Ke ngoku khawundivelele ngobuqaqawuli bakho.”" 
Exodus33:19 UNdikhoyo wathi: “Ndiza kukubonisa isidima sam njengoko sinjalo, futhi ndilikhankanye igama lam ezindlebeni zakho, mna Ndikhoyo. Kaloku ndiya kuba nenceba kwabo ndinenceba kubo, ndibe novelwano kwabo ndinovelwano kubo." 
Exodus33:20 Andizukukubonisa ubuso bam; kaloku akukho mntu unokububona aphinde aphile. 
Exodus33:21 Kambe ke nantsi indawo ecaleni kwam apho ungema khona phezu kweliwa. 
Exodus33:22 Ndiya kuthi ke xa ndidlula khona ngobuqaqawuli bam, ndikufihle emfanteni yeliwa, ndize ndikugqume ngesandla ndide ndidlule." 
Exodus33:23 Ndakuba ndidlule ke, ndiya kusisusa isandla, ukuze ube nokundibona ndifulathele, hayi ebusweni.”" 
Exodus34:1 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi: “Qingqa amanye amacwecwe amatye amabini afana nalawa okuqala, ukuze mna ndiwabhale kuwo amazwi awayebhalwe kulawa wawaphulayo." 
Exodus34:2 Ngomso kusasa uze unyuke intaba iSinayi, apho uya kundibona nam khona." 
Exodus34:3 Makungabikho mntu uhamba nawe okanye usondelayo nakuliphi na icala lentaba; nditsho kwaiigusha neenkomo mazingasondeli entabeni.” 
Exodus34:4 UMosis ke wawaqingqa amacwecwe amabini amatye, waza ngengomso kusasa wenyuka nawo entabeni iSinayi ngokokutsho kukaNdikhoyo, ewaphethe ngezandla." 
Exodus34:5 Ke kaloku uNdikhoyo wehla ngelifu, waza wema noMosis apho entabeni, walikhankanya igama lakhe – uNdikhoyo." 
Exodus34:6 Waza ke wadlula phambi kwakhe, wandula wathi: “UNdikhoyo nguThixo onemfesane nesisa, oza kade umsindo, ophuphuma izibele nokunyaniseka." 
Exodus34:7 Ukunyaniseka kwakhe akujiki nakwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana; abakhohlakeleyo nabanxaxhayo nabonayo uyabaxolela. Kambe ke abanetyala ubohlwaya ade ohlwaye nesizukulwana sabo, aye kufikelela kwesesithathu nakwesesine ngenxa yeziphoso zooyise.”" 
Exodus34:8 UMosis wasuka wee guqaqa wakhahlela; 
Exodus34:9 wambongoza wathi: “Ukuba ngenene ukholisekile ndim, Mhlekazi, sikhaphe. Nakuba siluhlanga oluneenkani nje, buxolele ubugwenxa nesono sethu, samkele sibe lilifa lakho.”" 
Exodus34:10 UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Ngoku ke ndenza umnqophiso nani. Ndiya kwenza imimangaliso engazange yenziwe ehlabathini liphela, ngokunjalo nakwizizwe zalo. Kaloku mna Ndikhoyo ndiza kwenza into erhwaqelisayo phakathi kwenu." 
Exodus34:11 Yithobeleni imithetho endininika yona namhlanje. Xa ningenayo ndiya kuwagxotha ama-Amori, amaKanana, amaHiti, amaPerezi, amaHivi, namaJebhusi." 
Exodus34:12 Ningakhe nilinge nenze izivumelwano naba bantu ningena emhlabeni wabo, kuba ngokwenjenjalo ningazifaka esigwini." 
Exodus34:13 Ndaweni yaloo nto wadilizeni amaqonga abo amadini, niyifohloze imifanekiso yabo; ke sona *isithixo sabo uAshera ze nisityoboze." 
Exodus34:14 “Ningaze ninqule thixo wumbi, kuba mna Ndikhoyo ndinguSobukhwele; ndinguThixo onekhwele." 
Exodus34:15 Sanukwenza zivumelwano nabantu belo lizwe; kuba hleze bathi, xa benqula besenzela izithixo zabo amadini amanyumnyezi, banimeme nani, nilukuhleke, nitye loo madini azo." 
Exodus34:16 Nani ningasuka nibathathele oonyana benu abafazi kwezo ntombi zabo, zithi ke ngaloo ndlela zibahende banqule izithixo." 
Exodus34:17 “Ningaze niziqingqele izithixo. 
Exodus34:18 “Ningaze niyeke ukwenza itheko lesonka sentlama engenagwele. Yenzani njengoko ndaniyalelayo, nitye isonka esinganyuswanga iintsuku zibe sixhenxe kwinyanga ka-Abhibhi. Kaloku leyo yinyanga enaphuma ngayo eJiputa." 
Exodus34:19 “Unyana wamazibulo ngokunjalo neduna lemfuyo lamazibulo lelam. 
Exodus34:20 “Ke lona iduna lamazibulo ledonki nolihlawulela ngedini letakane. Kungenjalo ke niya kulaphula ilungu lentamo. Wonke unyana wamazibulo makahlawulelwe. “Akukho mntu makeze kum engaphathanga mnikelo. 
Exodus34:21 “Iintsuku ezintandathu evekini zezokwenza wonke umsebenzi wenu. Kodwa ke ngosuku lwesixhenxe ze niphumle; nditsho nkqu nangamaxesha okulima nokuvuna. 
Exodus34:22 “Xa nivuna ingqolowa yenzani itheko lolibo; kanti ke ningalityesheli netheko lesivuno ngexesha lokuvuna iziqhamo. 
Exodus34:23 “Onke amadoda makeze kunqula mna Ndikhoyo Thixo kaSirayeli kathathu ngonyaka. 
Exodus34:24 Ndiya kuzigxotha izizwe phambi kwenu, itsho inabe imida yenu, kungabikho namntu uya kuzama ukulihlutha elo lizwe kuni xa nisiya kundinqula mna Ndikhoyo Thixo wenu ngazo zozithathu ezi zihlandlo enyakeni." 
Exodus34:25 “Xa nindenzela idini ze ningasisebenzisi isonka sentlama enegwele. Ngexesha letheko *lePasika inyama yedini ize ingabekwa mbeko. 
Exodus34:26 “Minyaka le zisani ulibo lwesivuno endlwini kaNdikhoyo. “Ningaze nilipheke ngobisi lukanina itakane lebhokhwe.” 
Exodus34:27 UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi: “Wabhale la mazwi. Kaloku umnqophiso wam nani uxhomekeke kuwo.” 
Exodus34:28 Ke kaloku uMosis wahlala apho iintsuku ezingamashumi amane engatyi engaseli. Amazwi omnqophiso wawabhala apho emacwecweni, oko kukuthi imithetho elishumi." 
Exodus34:29 Ukubuya kwakhe entabeni uMosis ephethe loo mithetho ilishumi, ubuso bakhe babukhazimla, kuba ethethe *noNdikhoyo; kambe ke yena wayengayiqondi loo nto." 
Exodus34:30 UAron namaSirayeli onke babubona ukuba ubuso bakhe buyakhazimla, batsho boyika ukusondela kuye." 
Exodus34:31 Kodwa uMosis wababiza, waza uAron nazo zonke iinkokheli zamaSirayeli beza kuye, waza wathetha nabo." 
Exodus34:32 Kamva ke onke amaSirayeli aqokelelana kuMosis, waza ke wawaxelela yonke imiyalelo ayinikwe nguNdikhoyo entabeni iSinayi." 
Exodus34:33 Wathi ke akugqiba ukuthetha nabo uMosis, wabufaka isigqubuthelo ubuso bakhe." 
Exodus34:34 Wayesithi xa eza kuthetha noNdikhoyo asisuse isigqubuthelo. Ekubuyeni kwakhe ke wayewaxelela konke akuyalelwe nguNdikhoyo amaSirayeli. 
Exodus34:35 Wona ke ayebubona ukuba ubuso bakhe buyakhazimla. Kambe ke wayeye afake isigqubuthelo, ade aphinde kwakhona aye kuthetha noNdikhoyo." 
Exodus35:1 UMosis waliqokelela lonke ibandla lamaSirayeli, wathi: “Nantsi imiyalelo *kaNdikhoyo:" 
Exodus35:2 iintsuku zokusebenza imisebenzi yenu zintandathu evekini, kodwa lona usuku lwesixhenxe ngumhla owodwa okhethekileyo; ngumhla kaNdikhoyo, umhla wokuphumla. Nabani na ke owenza nawuphi na umsebenzi ngawo wobulawa." 
Exodus35:3 Ngawo akunakubaswa nomlilo lo emizini yenu.” 
Exodus35:4 UMosis waliyalela lonke ibandla lamaSirayeli, wathi: “*UNdikhoyo uthi" 
Exodus35:5 wonke umntu oziva elangazelela ukunikela kuye makathathe kwinto anayo: igolide, isiliva, ubhedu," 
Exodus35:6 nelaphu elihle, elizuba, elimsobo, nelibomvu, nelaphu loboya bebhokhwe," 
Exodus35:7 nofele lwenkunzi yegusha olubomvu, nesikhumba esisukiweyo; nomngampunzi," 
Exodus35:8 neoyile yezibane, nobulawu bokuqhola ioyile nokuqhola isiqhumiso sitsho sibe nevumba elimnandi;" 
Exodus35:9 amatye ekarneli namanye amatye exabiso okuhombisa *isidanga nesikhuselo-sifuba sombingeleli omkhulu.” 
Exodus35:10 Waqhuba uMosis wathi: “Onke amagcisa omsebenzi wezandla akhoyo phakathi kwenu makeze azokwenza *isibingelelo nezinto ayalele ukuba zenziwe *uNdikhoyo: 
Exodus35:11 intente kunye nesigqubuthelo sayo, amahaki, uphahla lwentente, izakhelo, imiqadi, kunye neziseko;" 
Exodus35:12 ityesi yomnqophiso, inemiqobo yokuyiphatha, nesivalo, kunye nomkhusane;" 
Exodus35:13 itafile, inemiqobo namasolotya ayo, kunye nesonka esingumnikelo kuThixo;" 
Exodus35:14 isibane nobuxhaka-xhaka baso, neoyile;" 
Exodus35:15 iqonga lesiqhumiso nemiqobo yokuliphatha, amafutha okuthambisa, isiqhumiso esivumba limnandi, umkhusane wesango lesibingelelo;" 
Exodus35:16 iqonga lamadini linxityelelwe isisefu esenziwe ngobhedu, imiqobo yalo nako konke okwalo; isitya sokuhlambela nesiseko saso;" 
Exodus35:17 umkhusane wenkundla neentsika neziseko zayo; umkhusane wesango lenkundla; 
Exodus35:18 izikhonkwane neentsontela zomphakathi ngokunjalo nenkundla; 
Exodus35:19 kunye nezo zivatho zingayiwayo zinxitywa ngababingeleli xa bebusa kwigumbi elingcwele, ngokunjalo nezivatho ezizodwa zika-Aron kunye noonyana bakhe.”" 
Exodus35:20 Ke kaloku lonke ibandla lamaSirayeli lamshiya uMosis," 
Exodus35:21 waza uwonke-wonke kulo owayeziva elangazelela ukunikela *kuNdikhoyo khon' ukuze kwakhiwe *isibingelelo, weza ephethe umnikelo. Beza nayo yonke into eyayiyimfuneko kwezonqulo nasekwenzeni izivatho zababingeleli." 
Exodus35:22 Amadoda nabafazi ababeziva belangazelela ukunikela beza nezipeliti zokuhombisa, amacici, imisesane, amaso, nazo zonke iintlobo-ntlobo zobunewu-newu begolide, bazenza umnikelo owodwa kuNdikhoyo." 
Exodus35:23 Bezisa amalaphu amahle, azuba, amsobo, nabomvu; ilaphu loboya bebhokhwe, ufele olubomvu lwenkunzi yegusha, nesikhumba esisukiweyo." 
Exodus35:24 Kanti ke nabathanda ukunikela ngesiliva okanye ubhedu benjenjalo. Abanye banikela ngomngampunzi, khon' ukuze usetyenziswe nakuwuphi na umsebenzi." 
Exodus35:25 Onke amakhosikazi angamagcisa okusonta ezisa amalaphu amahle nemisonto ezuba, emsobo, nebomvu, awayeyisontile." 
Exodus35:26 Benza umsonto ngoboya bebhokhwe. 
Exodus35:27 Iinkokheli zona zeza namatye ekarneli namanye amatye okuhombisa *isidanga nesikhuselo-sifuba," 
Exodus35:28 iziqholo neoyile yesibane, neziqholo zeoyile, neziqhumiso ezivumba limnandi." 
Exodus35:29 Onke amaSirayeli awayeziva enolangazelelo ezisa iminikelo kuNdikhoyo, khon' ukuze kufezekiswe umsebenzi owawuyalelwe uMosis." 
Exodus35:30 UMosis wathi kumaSirayeli: “Niyabona, *uNdikhoyo unyule uBhezaleli unyana kaUri umzukulwana kaYuri wendlu kaJuda." 
Exodus35:31 Umzalisile ngoMoya wakhe, wamthi jize ngobugcisa nobuchule nengqiqo ephangaleleyo," 
Exodus35:32 ukuze akwazi ukucwangcisa nokuyila nokusebenza ngegolide, isiliva, nobhedu," 
Exodus35:33 ukukrola nokuqingqa amatye, nokuchwela, nawo wonke umsebenzi wobugcisa." 
Exodus35:34 Yena enoHoliyabhi unyana ka-Ahisamaki wendlu kaDan ubaphile ubuchule bokufundisa abanye ubugcisa. 
Exodus35:35 Ubaphe ubuchule beendidi zonke kumsebenzi wabakroli nabayili, nomsebenzi wokusonta amalaphu azuba, amsobo, nabomvu, nazo zonke iindidi zamalaphu. Ewe, bangamachule angawo kuyo yonke imisebenzi yobugcisa nokuyila." 
Exodus36:1 “Ngoko ke uBhezaleli noHoliyabhi, nawo onke amagcisa anikwe ezi ziphiwo nokuqonda, anabo ubuchule bokuzenza zonke ezi zinto zifunekayo ekwakhiweni *kwesibingelelo, makazenze zonke zibe matwa nomyalelo kaNdikhoyo.”" 
Exodus36:2 Ke kaloku uMosis wathetha noBhezaleli noHoliyabhi, nabo bonke abaphiwe ubugcisa nababelangazelela ukunceda, wathi mabaqalise ukusebenza." 
Exodus36:3 UMosis wazigqithisela kubo zonke izinto zokusebenza ezazingumnikelo ovela kumaSirayeli ngeenjongo zokwakha *isibingelelo. Baza abantu bathi rhoqo ukuzisa iminikelo yabo ngeentsasa zonke. 
Exodus36:4 Amagcisa lawo ayesebenza awuyeka umsebenzi," 
Exodus36:5 aya kuMosis, athi: “Lo mnikelo bawuzisayo aba bantu ngoku mninzi ngaphezu kwemfuneko yomsebenzi esiwuyalelwe *nguNdikhoyo.”" 
Exodus36:6 Ngoku ke uMosis wakhupha umyalelo, kwaza kwavakaliswa kumzi wonke kwathiwa: “Makungabikho bani, nokuba yindoda okanye obhinqileyo, ozisa omnye umnikelo esibingelelweni.” Ngoko ke abantu banqumama ekunikeleni." 
Exodus36:7 Lo mnikelo wawuselugqithisiwe wawungaphezu kwemfuneko. 
Exodus36:8 Awona madoda angamagcisa kulawo ayesebenza, enza *isibingelelo ngemikhusane elishumi yelaphu elihle kunene, linombala ozuba, omsobo, nobomvu; lihonjiswe laqhoqhonywa ngemifanekiso *yezithunywa ezimaphiko, ezenziwe ngobugcisa nobunono." 
Exodus36:9 Le mikhusane yayilingana, iziimitha ezilishumi elinambini ubude, nesibini seemitha ububanzi." 
Exodus36:10 Imikhusane leyo ke bayithunga bayidibanisa ngamihlanu ngamihlanu. 
Exodus36:11 Benza amarhintyela ngelaphu elizuba phaya emphethweni ngapha nangapha. 
Exodus36:12 Bafaka amarhintyela angamashumi amahlanu kuloo macala omabini, bawenza alungelelana." 
Exodus36:13 Benza namashumi amahlanu amahaki ngegolide, khon' ukuze la macala mabini emikhusane ahlanganiswe abe yinto enye." 
Exodus36:14 Baza ke benza intente yangaphandle ngemiqulu elishumi elinanye eyenziwe ngoboya bebhokhwe. 
Exodus36:15 Bayenza yalingana yaziimitha ezilishumi elinantathu ubude, zambini ke ububanzi." 
Exodus36:16 Isihlanu sayo ke basithunga basidibanisa sayinto enye; ngokunjalo nesithandathu eso basithunga basidibanisa sayinto enye naso. 
Exodus36:17 Bafakela amarhintyela angamashumi amahlanu emphethweni wecala ngalinye. 
Exodus36:18 Bathatha ubhedu, benza ngalo amahaki angamashumi amahlanu, khon' ukuze la macala mabini adityaniswe." 
Exodus36:19 Baza intente bayenzela izigqubuthelo ezibini, esangaphantsi senziwe ngofele olubomvu lwenkunzi yegusha, esangaphezulu ngesikhumba esisukiweyo." 
Exodus36:20 Benza izakhelo zokuxhasa intente leyo ngomngampunzi. 
Exodus36:21 Isakhelo ngasinye sasiziimitha ezine ubude neesentimitha ezingamashumi amathandathu nesithandathu ububanzi. 
Exodus36:22 Bazenza ke zalabalaba ngapha nangapha, ukuze zibe nokuhlanganiswa. Zonke ke izakhelo zenziwa ngale ndlela." 
Exodus36:23 Izakhelo ezo zaba ngamashumi amabini ezangezantsi. 
Exodus36:24 Ngokunjalo bazenzela iziseko ngesiliva zamashumi mane, zazibini esakhelweni, ukuze zibambe nale ndawo ilabalabayo." 
Exodus36:25 Amantla bawenzela izakhelo ezingamashumi amabini," 
Exodus36:26 ngokunjalo neziseko zesiliva ezingamashumi amane, zazibini esakhelweni." 
Exodus36:27 Kwicala langasemva entshona benza izakhelo zazithandathu," 
Exodus36:28 baza benza izakhelo zazibini ezikoneni. 
Exodus36:29 Ezi zakhelo zeekona zaziqhagamshelwe emazantsi, zaya kuqhina phezulu. Kunjalo ke okwezi zakhelo zibini zeekona." 
Exodus36:30 Ngoko ke zazisibhozo izakhelo, zixhaswe ngeziseko ezilishumi elinesithandathu – zizibini esakhelweni." 
Exodus36:31 Kwakhona benza imiqadi yezakhelo ngomngampunzi. Yayimihlanu ngapha 
Exodus36:32 nangapha, ngokunjalo nakwicala langasentshona ngasemva." 
Exodus36:33 Lo uphakathi bawubeka esizikithini, wasuka ngapha waya kuthi ngqu ngaphaya." 
Exodus36:34 Izakhelo ezo bazityabeka ngegolide, bazinxibelela amakhonkco enziwe ngegolide apho kwakungena khona imiqadi – miqadi leyo eyayityatyekwe ngegolide nayo." 
Exodus36:35 Baza ke bathatha imiqulu yelaphu elisontwe kakuhle, benza umkhusane. Wawuyile mibala: ozuba, omsobo, nobomvu. Futhi ke wawuhonjiswe ngemifanekiso *yezithunywa ezimaphiko, eyenziwe ngobugcisa nobunono." 
Exodus36:36 Lo mkhusane ke wawuxhonywe kwiintsika zomngampunzi, bezityabeke ngegolide, bazenzela amahaki; zona ke zazixhaswe ngeziseko ezine zesiliva." 
Exodus36:37 Esangweni lesibingelelo bafaka umkhusane owenziwe ngelaphu lisontwe kakuhle, linale mibala: ozuba, omsobo, nobomvu; baza ke baliqhoqhonya balihombisa ngobugcisa nobunono." 
Exodus36:38 Lo mkhusane ke bawenzela iintsika ezintlanu, bazifakela amahaki. Iintloko zeentsika, ngokunjalo nemiqadi, bayityabeka ngegolide, baza bazenzela iziseko ezihlanu ngobhedu." 
Exodus37:1 UBhezaleli wayenza ityesi yomnqophiso ngomngampunzi. Yayiziisentimitha ezilikhulu elineshumi ubude, zingamashumi amathandathu nantandathu ububanzi kwanomphakamo wayo." 
Exodus37:2 Wayityabeka ngegolide ngaphandle nangaphakathi, waza ke wayiphetha kwangayo jikelele." 
Exodus37:3 Kumanqina ayo omane wayifakela amakhonkco enziwe ngegolide, amabini kweli cala, amabini kweliya." 
Exodus37:4 Kwakhona wenza imiqobo yokuphatha, wayityabeka ngegolide," 
Exodus37:5 wayifaka kulaa makhonkco ngapha nangapha, ukuze ibe nokuthwalwa." 
Exodus37:6 Wathatha igolide, wenza isivalo setyesi. Sasiziisentimitha ezilikhulu elineshumi ubude, zingamashumi amathandathu anantandathu ububanzi." 
Exodus37:7 Wathatha igolide, wabumba *izithunywa ezimaphiko zambini, wazenza zaba yinto enye nesivalo eso, zamiswa ngapha nangapha phezu kwaso zijongene, athi ke naloo maphiko azo athe naa agubungela isivalo eso." 
Exodus37:8  
Exodus37:9  
Exodus37:10 Wathatha umngampunzi, wenza itafile. Yona yayingamashumi asibhozo anesibhozo eesentimitha ubude, zingamashumi amane anane ububanzi; kanti ke ukuphakama zazingamashumi amathandathu anesithandathu." 
Exodus37:11 Wayeyityabeka ngegolide ecwengileyo, futhi wayiphetha kwangayo jikelele." 
Exodus37:12 Ngokunjalo wayenzela ungqameko oluyijikelezileyo, lungangesandla ububanzi, waza waluphetha ngegolide jikelele." 
Exodus37:13 Wayifakela amakhonkco amane, enziwe ngegolide, wawanxibelela ezikoneni zone apho imilenze yayifakelwe khona." 
Exodus37:14 La makhonkco okungena imiqobo yokuphatha wawenza alungelelana nongqameko olo. 
Exodus37:15 Ke yona imiqobo leyo wayenza ngomngampunzi, wayityabeka ngegolide." 
Exodus37:16 Itafile leyo wayenzela izitya ngegolide: iipleyiti, iikomityi, iindebe, nezitya zokwenza idini lewayini." 
Exodus37:17 Wathatha igolide ecwengileyo, wenza isibane. Amazantsi kunye nesiqu saso wasibumba ngegolide naso. Wasenzela izihombiso ngeentyatyambo, imidumba, namagqabi eentyatyambo; zonke ke zaba yinto enye nesibane eso." 
Exodus37:18 Kwalapho kuso wanxibelela amasebe aso: amathathu ngapha nangapha. 
Exodus37:19 La masebe mathandathu aphuma esiqwini sesibane wawahombisa ngeentyatyambo zealmondi, nangemidumba, nangamagqabi eentyatyambo." 
Exodus37:20 Nesiqu sesibane wasihombisa ngeentyatyambo ezine zealmondi, wasivathisa ngemidumba namagqabi eentyatyambo." 
Exodus37:21 Onke amasebe lawo wawasekela ngomdumba. 
Exodus37:22 Imidumba namasebe lawo, ngokunjalo nesibane siphela, zazenzwe ngegolide ecwengileyo, kuyinto enye nje." 
Exodus37:23 Esi sibane ke uBhezaleli wasenza ngohlobo lokuba sibe zizibane ezisixhenxe. Umcephe wokusicima ngokunjalo nezithetyana zaso wazenza ngegolide. 
Exodus37:24 Ekwenzeni esi sibane ngokunjalo nobuxhaka-xhaka baso wasebenzisa igolide eziikhilogram ezingamashumi amathathu nantlanu ubunzima. 
Exodus37:25 UBhezaleli wathatha umngampunzi, wenza iqonga lesiqhumiso. Amacala alo wawenza alingana, aziisentimitha ezingamashumi mane nantlanu, zangamashumi alithoba ukuphakama. Iimpondo zalo zazintwinye nalo." 
Exodus37:26 Eli qonga lonke walityabeka ngegolide: umphezulu, amacala, neempondo; futhi waliphetha kwangegolide jikelele." 
Exodus37:27 Walenzela amakhonkco amabini ngegolide. Wawanxibelela apha phantsi komphetho macala, khon' ukuze apho kuwo kungene imiqobo yokuphatha." 
Exodus37:28 Wathatha umngampunzi, wenza imiqobo, waza wayityabeka ngegolide." 
Exodus37:29 Kananjalo wenza amafutha awodwa okuthambisa. Ngokukwanjalo wenza nesiqhumiso esivumba liyolileyo. Xa zizonke ke wazixuba okwechule. 
Exodus38:1 Ke kaloku uBhezaleli wenza iqonga lamadini ngomngampunzi. Lalilingana macala, liziimitha ezimbini namashumi amabini eesentimitha ubude nobubanzi; ukuphakama kuyimitha enye namashumi amathathu eesentimitha." 
Exodus38:2 Izibonda zalo ezikoneni phaya wazenza zalabalaba zenza iimpondo. Walityabeka ngobhedu jikelele. 
Exodus38:3 Ngokunjalo ke walenzela izixhobo zalo: iimbiza zokukhongozela uthuthu, iifotsholo, izitya, iifolokhwe, neepleyiti zomlilo. Zonke ezi zixhobo wazenza ngobhedu." 
Exodus38:4 Wenza isisefu ngobhedu, waza wasifaka phantsi kongqameko olujikeleze iqonga, ngohlobo lokuba sithathe isiqingatha sokuphakama kweqonga." 
Exodus38:5 Ezikoneni phaya wafakela amakhonkco okungena imiqobo yesisefu. 
Exodus38:6 Wenza nemiqobo yokuphatha ngomngampunzi, wayityabeka ngobhedu," 
Exodus38:7 waza wayifaka kulaa makhonkco ngapha nangapha. Iqonga elo ke walenza langumhaba-haba nje. 
Exodus38:8 Waza ke uBhezaleli wenza isitya sokuhlambela ngobhedu; nesiseko saso wasenza kwangobhedu. Olu bhedu ke baluthatha kwizipili zobhedu ezanikezelwa ngamakhosikazi awayelungiselela apho esangweni *lesibingelelo. 
Exodus38:9 *Isibingelelo ke uBhezaleli wasenzela inkundla ngomkhusane owenziwe ngelaphu elisontwe ngobuchule. Kwicala langezantsi lo mkhusane wawuziimitha ezimashumi mane nane ubude. 
Exodus38:10 Wawumisa ngeentsika zobhedu ezimashumi mabini, zixhaswe ziziseko zobhedu ezimashumi mabini, waza wenza namahaki nemiqadi ngesiliva." 
Exodus38:11 Nakwicala langasentla ke wayenza kwangolu hlobo. 
Exodus38:12 Ngasentshona ke umkhusane wawenza ngelaphu eliziimitha ezimashumi mabini nambini ubude, wawenzela neentsika ezilishumi, zaxhaswa ziziseko ezikwalishumi; wenza namahaki nemiqadi ngesiliva." 
Exodus38:13 Kwicala lasempuma, apho kwakukho isango, umkhusane wawuziimitha ezimashumi mabini nambini ububanzi." 
Exodus38:14 Ngapha nangapha esangweni umkhusane wawenza waziimitha ezintandathu mashumi omathandathu eesentimitha; wawenzela neentsika ezintathu, zaxhaswa ziziseko ezikwazithathu." 
Exodus38:15  
Exodus38:16 Umkhusane wenkundla jikelele wawenza ngelaphu elisontwe ngobuchule. 
Exodus38:17 Iziseko zeentsika wazenza ngobhedu; ke wona amahaki nemiqadi wayenza ngesiliva, futhi neentloko zeentsika wazityabeka kwangayo. Iintsika zenkundla zonke wazidibanisa ngemiqadi yesiliva." 
Exodus38:18 Umkhusane wesango lenkundla wawenza ngelaphu elisontwe ngobuchule, liyile mibala: ozuba, omsobo, obomvu, wawaqhoqhonya wawahombisa ngobunono. Umkhusane wawuziimitha ezilithoba ubude, zimbini ukuphakama, kwanjengalowo wenkundla." 
Exodus38:19 Lalixhaswe ziintsika ezine, zimi ngeziseko ezikwazine zobhedu. Iintloko zeentsika wazityabeka ngesiliva, futhi namahaki nemiqadi wayenza kwangayo." 
Exodus38:20 Zonke izikhonkwane zesibingelelo ndawonye nenkundla jikelele wazenza ngobhedu. 
Exodus38:21 Nabu ubungakanani bezinto ezasetyenziswayo ekwakhiweni *kwesibingelelo apho kwakuhlala khona amacwecwe amabini amatye ekwakubhalwe kuwo imithetho elishumi. Uludwe olu lwagunyaziswa nguMosis, lwenziwa ngabaLevi, bekhokelwa nguItamare unyana ka-Aron." 
Exodus38:22 UBhezaleli unyana kaUri, umzukulwana kaYuri wendlu kaJuda, wenza yonke into ngokomyalelo *kaNdikhoyo." 
Exodus38:23 Ugxa wakhe uHoliyabhi, unyana ka-Ahisamaki, wendlu kaDan, wayengumkroli nomyili, engumluki wamalaphu asontwe ngobugcisa: azuba, amsobo, nabomvu." 
Exodus38:24 Iyonke igolide eyanikelwa kuNdikhoyo ngenjongo yokwakha isibingelelo yayiliwaka leekhilogram ubunzima ngokomlinganiselo ovunyiweyo. 
Exodus38:25 Yona isiliva yomnikelo wababaliweyo yayingamawaka amathathu, makhulu omane anamashumi amathathu eekhilogram ubunzima." 
Exodus38:26 Le mali ke ngumrhumo owakhutshwa ngabo bonke abantu ababalwayo, bekhupha ngokomlinganiselo omisiweyo. Inani lamadoda abalwayo angaphezu kwamashumi amabini ubudala ayengamakhulu mathandathu nantathu amawaka, makhulu mahlanu, mashumi omahlanu." 
Exodus38:27 Kule siliva ke amawaka amathathu anamakhulu amane eekhilogram asetyenziswa ekwakheni ikhulu leziseko zesibingelelo nomkhusane. Iikhilogram ezingamashumi amathathu anane zaba zezesiseko ngasinye. 
Exodus38:28 Ke wona amashumi amathathu eekhilogram aseleyo esiliva uBhezaleli wenza ngawo imiqadi, amahaki eentsika, nokutyatyekwa kweentloko zazo." 
Exodus38:29 Ubhedu olwanikelwayo kuNdikhoyo lwaluziikhilogram ezimawaka mabini, makhulu omane, namashumi amabini anantlanu." 
Exodus38:30 Ngalo ke wenza iziseko zesango lesibingelelo, iqonga nesisefu salo, nazo zonke izixhobo zeqonga," 
Exodus38:31 iziseko zenkundla jikelele, kunye nesango layo, ngokunjalo nezikhonkwane zesibingelelo nenkundla." 
Exodus39:1 Ke kaloku ezo zivatho zingayiwayo zobubingeleli ooBhezaleli bazenza zayile mibala: ozuba, omsobo, nobomvu. Ezi mpahla ke ababingeleli babezinxiba xa besebenza endaweni engcwele. Izivatho zika-Aron ke bazenza ngokomlomo *kaNdikhoyo kuMosis." 
Exodus39:2 *Isidanga basenza ngelaphu elisontwe ngobunono. Laliyile mibala: ozuba, omsobo, nobomvu; ngokunjalo basebenzisa negolide xa bayenzayo." 
Exodus39:3 Bathatha igolide, bayibumba bayincwela, bakhupha imisonto, baza bayithungela ngobugcisa nobunono kweli laphu limabala-bala." 
Exodus39:4 Bayenzela imixwayo eqabela emagxeni, idibanise amacala ayo omabini." 
Exodus39:5 Ibhanti yayo entle kunene, eyenziwe kwangelo laphu, bayithungela ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis." 
Exodus39:6 Bathatha amatye ekarneli, bawalungisa bawafakela izipeliti zegolide. Kula matye ke kwakukrolwe ngobugcisa obukhulu amagama oonyana bakaYakobi abalishumi elinambini." 
Exodus39:7 Bawafakela kwimixwayo yesidanga ukuze abe sisikhumbuzo ngoonyana bakaSirayeli abalishumi elinambini ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis. 
Exodus39:8 Isikhuselo-sifuba basenza kwangezaa zinto senziwe ngazo *isidanga, nangobugcisa obukwanjalo." 
Exodus39:9 Basenza sangumphindo olinganayo, ubude nobubanzi baziisentimitha ezingamashumi amabini anambini." 
Exodus39:10 Basiqhoqhonya ngemiqolo emine yamatye exabiso. Kowokuqala yaba yirubhi, itopazi, negarneti;" 
Exodus39:11 kowesibini yaba yiemeraldi, isafire, nedayimani;" 
Exodus39:12 kuludwe lwesithathu yaba yitekoyisi, iagati, neamatiste;" 
Exodus39:13 kwaza kolwesine yaba yibherile, ikarneli, nejaspa. Onke ke bawaqhobosha ngesipeliti segolide." 
Exodus39:14 Kwilitye ngalinye ke bakrola amagama oonyana bakaYakobi abamele izindlu ezilishumi elinambini zikaSirayeli. 
Exodus39:15 Isikhuselo-sifuba basenzela amatsheyini amabini aphothwe ngemingqa yegolide. 
Exodus39:16 Benza izipeliti zazibini ngegolide, ngokunjalo namakhonkco amabini egolide, baza bawanxibelela kwiikona zesikhuselo-sifuba ezingasentla." 
Exodus39:17 La matsheyini mabini bawarhintyela kula makhonkco mabini egolide," 
Exodus39:18 baza baqhagamshela la macala mabini amatsheyini aseleyo kula makhonkco mabini, bawabamba ngezaa zipeliti zibini. Ngolo hlobo ke abhijela ngaphambili aya kuqhagamshela kwimixwayo yesidanga." 
Exodus39:19 Kwakhona benza amakhonkco amabini egolide, baza bawanxibelela phaya kwezaa kona zaso zingezantsi ngaphakathi phezu kwesidanga." 
Exodus39:20 Kwangokunjalo benza amanye amakhonkco amabini ngegolide. Bawanxibelela kumazantsi emixwayo yesidanga ngaphambili, kude kufuphi kodwa ngaphezu kwalaa bhanti ithungwe ngobugcisa nobuchule." 
Exodus39:21 Kanye ngokomlomo *kaNdikhoyo kuMosis amakhonkco esikhuselo-sifuba bawadibanisa namakhonkco esidanga ngomtya ozuba, ngohlobo lokuba isikhuselo-sifuba sihlale phezu kwesidanga singabhakuzeli." 
Exodus39:22 Ke wona umnweba onxitywa phezu *kwesidanga bawenza ngelaphu elizuba. 
Exodus39:23 Indawo yokungena intloko bayivula, baza bayiqukumbela yaqina, khon' ukuze ingakrazuki." 
Exodus39:24 Kumazantsi awo bawenzela imifanekiso yerharnati ezuba, emsobo, nebomvu. Ezi zihombiso ke bazenza zabolekisana neentsinjana ezenziwe ngegolide ngokomlomo *kaNdikhoyo kuMosis." 
Exodus39:25  
Exodus39:26  
Exodus39:27 UAron noonyana bakhe babathungela iihempe," 
Exodus39:28 iqhiya, umnqwazi, iibhulukhwe zangaphantsi," 
Exodus39:29 ngokunjalo nomxwayo osontwe ngelaphu elihle. Laliyile mibala: ozuba, omsobo, nobomvu. Balihombisa, baliqhoqhonya ngobugcisa ngokomyalelo." 
Exodus39:30 Bathatha igolide, benza icwecwe elihle, baza kulo bakrola umbhalo owodwa othi: “OkaNdikhoyo pheleleyo.”" 
Exodus39:31 Baliqhagamshela ngomsonto ozuba eqhiyeni ebunzi, kanye ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis." 
Exodus39:32 Ke kaloku umsebenzi wokwakhiwa *kwesibingelelo wada wagqitywa. AmaSirayeli ayenza yonke into ngokomlomo *kaNdikhoyo kuMosis. 
Exodus39:33 Zonke izinto ezaziyimfuneko azinikezela kuMosis: intente nezixhobo zayo, amahaki, izakhelo, imiqadi, iintsika, neziseko zayo;" 
Exodus39:34 isigqubuthelo esenziwe ngofele lwenkunzi yegusha olubomvu; kunye neso sesikhumba esisukiweyo; umkhusane; 
Exodus39:35 ityesi yomnqophiso enamacwecwe amatye, imiqobo yokuyiphatha, nesivalo sayo;" 
Exodus39:36 itafile nezinto ezibekwa phezu kwayo, isonka esinikelwa kuThixo;" 
Exodus39:37 ubuxhaka-xhaka besibane senziwe ngegolide nokwaso; ioyile yezibane; 
Exodus39:38 iqonga legolide; amafutha okuthambisa, isiqhumiso esivumba limnandi; umkhusane wesango;" 
Exodus39:39 iqonga lobhedu, nesisefu salo sobhedu, imiqobo yokuliphatha, nezixhobo zalo; isitya sokuhlambela, ngokunjalo nesiseko saso;" 
Exodus39:40 umkhusane wenkundla, iintsika neziseko zayo; umkhusane wesango lenkundla; iintsontela nezikhonkwane zentente; nazo zonke izixhobo zentente;" 
Exodus39:41 ngokunjalo nezo zivatho zingayiwayo zinxitywa ngababingeleli kwigumbi elingcwele – ezo zivatho zizodwa zika-Aron noonyana bakhe. 
Exodus39:42 Ewe, amaSirayeli ayenza yonke into kanye ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis." 
Exodus39:43 UMosis wawuhlola loo msebenzi, wafumanisa ukuba ngenene yonke into bayenze ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo. Ngoko ke wasuka wabathamsanqela." 
Exodus40:1 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi: 
Exodus40:2 “Ngomhla wokuqala ngenyanga yokuqala uze umise *isibingelelo. 
Exodus40:3 Uya kuthatha ityesi enobungqina bomnqophiso, uyifake esibingelelweni, uyivalele ngomkhusane." 
Exodus40:4 Uze ungenise itafile, ngokunjalo nezinto ezibekwa phezu kwayo, uyimise ngohlobo lwayo. Phezu kwayo uze ubeke nesibane nobuxhaka-xhaka baso." 
Exodus40:5 Ngoku ke faka iqonga lesiqhumiso, eliya lenziwe ngegolide, phambi kwetyesi yomnqophiso; uze ufake umkhusane wesango lesibingelelo." 
Exodus40:6 Apho ke phambi komnyango wesibingelelo misa iqonga lamadini. 
Exodus40:7 Faka isitya sokuhlambela phakathi kweqonga lamadini nesango lesibingelelo, usigalele amanzi." 
Exodus40:8 Ngoku ke twabulula uthango lwenkundla jikelele, ufake umkhusane esangweni." 
Exodus40:9 “Wakukhov' ukwenjenjalo ke, uya kuthatha amafutha, umisele isibingelelo ngokusithambisa ngawo xa sisonke ndawonye neempahla zaso. Wakuba uyenzile ke loo nto, siya kuba yindawo eyodwa ekhethekileyo." 
Exodus40:10 Kamva ke uya kuthambisa iqonga lamadini ndawonye nezixhobo zalo. Nalo ke liya kutsho libe yindawo ekhethekileyo. 
Exodus40:11 Kwangokunjalo ke uze uthambise nesitya sokuhlambela nesiseko saso. 
Exodus40:12 “Kwakhona ke uya kubiza uAron noonyana bakhe, beze esangweni lesibingelelo, ubahlambe ngamanzi." 
Exodus40:13 Ngoku ke uAron makavathe ezobubingeleli, umthambise ummisele abe ngumbingeleli." 
Exodus40:14 Noonyana bakhe bathi wambu ngeyabo iminweba. 
Exodus40:15 Kwanjengoyise nabo bathambise, ubamisele ebubingelelini. Ewe, ngokubathambisa uya kuba ubamisela ukuba babe ngababingeleli bona nazo zonke izizukulwana zabo.”" 
Exodus40:16 Ke kaloku yonke le nto uMosis wayenza kanye ngokomyalelo lowo kaNdikhoyo. 
Exodus40:17 Ngoko ke kwathi ngomhla wokuqala, kwinyanga yokuqala, ngonyaka wesibini bemkayo eJiputa, samiselwa isibingelelo." 
Exodus40:18 Ukumisa kukaMosis isibingelelo wenjenje: wazimisa iziseko eendaweni zazo, wazimisa izakhelo zaso, wafaka imiqadi, wamisa neentsika." 
Exodus40:19 Wasuka ke wayitwabulula intente yesibingelelo, wayambathisa nangesigqubuthelo sayo kanye ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Exodus40:20 Ngoko ke wathatha amacwecwe amabini anobungqina bomnqophiso, wawafaka kwityesi yomnqophiso. Wathatha nemiqobo, wayifaka kuloo makhonkco etyesi, waza wayivala ngesivalo sayo." 
Exodus40:21 Emva koko wathatha ityesi yomnqophiso leyo, wayingenisa esibingelelweni, wavala ngomkhusane. Ngale ndlela ke wayivalela ityesi yomnqophiso ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo." 
Exodus40:22 Ke kaloku wathatha itafile, wayingenisa esibingelelweni, wayibeka kwicala langasentla nganeno komkhusane," 
Exodus40:23 waza wathatha isonka esinikelwe kuNdikhoyo, wasibeka phezu kwayo ngokomyalelo." 
Exodus40:24 Wathatha nesibane, wangena naso, wasibeka kwicala langasezantsi, sajongana netafile." 
Exodus40:25 Zimi njalo phambi koNdikhoyo wazilumeka izibane ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo. 
Exodus40:26 Wangenisa iqonga legolide ngaphakathi, walibeka phambi komkhusane," 
Exodus40:27 watshisa eso siqhumiso sivumba limnandi ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo. 
Exodus40:28 Waxhoma umkhusane esangweni lesibingelelo," 
Exodus40:29 waza wemisa iqonga lamadini apho ngasesangweni. Belisenziwa apho ke idini elitshiswayo kunye nedini leenkozo ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo. 
Exodus40:30 Wabeka isitya sokuhlambela phakathi kweqonga lamadini nentente yesibingelelo, waza wasizalisa ngamanzi." 
Exodus40:31 UMosis, uAron, noonyana bakhe, babehlamba izandla neenyawo zabo apho kuloo manzi," 
Exodus40:32 ngalo lonke ixesha bengena esibingelelweni okanye besiya kwiqonga lamadini, ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo." 
Exodus40:33 Ke kaloku uMosis wabiyela inkundla yangqonga isibingelelo neqonga lamadini, waza walivala ngomkhusane isango layo. Waba ke ngoko uwufezile umsebenzi." 
Exodus40:34 Kwesi sithuba ke lasuka ilifu lasigubungela *isibingelelo, saza isibingelelo sathi qhakra bubuqaqawuli *bukaNdikhoyo." 
Exodus40:35 Ngenxa yale meko uMosis akabanga saba nako ukungena esibingelelweni. 
Exodus40:36 Kolu hambo lwawo ke amaSirayeli ayesithi apho lisuke khona ilifu esibingelelweni athabathise eluhambeni kwakhona. 
Exodus40:37 Kanti ke ayelinda anganduluki xa lisafukamile ilifu elo. 
Exodus40:38 Kaloku kolu hambo lwawo amaSirayeli ayesoloko elibona ilifu elalatha ubukho bukaNdikhoyo likhakhaba apho esibingelelweni xa kusemini, lisuke ke ebusuku lithi qhakra umlilo." 
Leviticus1:1 *UNdikhoyo wabiza uMosis, wathetha naye *esesibingelelweni, wathi" 
Leviticus1:2 makathethe namaSirayeli athi: “Xa umntu esenza umnikelo kuNdikhoyo makawenze ngento efuyiweyo, nokuba yinkomo, nokuba yimpahla emfutshane." 
Leviticus1:3 Xa anikela ngenkomo, esenza idini elitshiswayo, mayibe yinkunzi engenaso nasinye isiphako. Makayise esangweni lesibingelelo, khon' ukuze uNdikhoyo amamkele." 
Leviticus1:4 Loo mntu ke uya kubeka isandla sakhe entloko kuloo nkomo, yaye ke iya kwamkeleka ibe lidini lokumcamagushela." 
Leviticus1:5 Loo nkunzi iya kuxhelelwa apho phambi kukaNdikhoyo, baze ababingeleli bomlibo ka-Aron balisondeze kuNdikhoyo igazi layo, babuye batshize ngalo amacala onke eqonga lamadini elisekungeneni kwesibingelelo." 
Leviticus1:6 Loo mntu uya kubuya ayihlinze inkomo leyo, ayihlahle," 
Leviticus1:7 baze bona ababingeleli baphembe umlilo eqongeni, babekelele iinkuni phezu kwawo." 
Leviticus1:8 Baya kuthatha iinyama ezo, kunye nentloko, kwakunye namanqatha, bazibeke emlilweni apho." 
Leviticus1:9 Umntu lowo yena makahlambe izibilini namanqina enkomo leyo, aze yena umbingeleli alitshise lonke elo dini phezu kweqonga. Eli lidini elitshiswayo. Litshiswa ngomlilo, litsho ngevumba elithandekayo kuNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus1:10 “Ukuba into ekwenziwa umnikelo ngayo yigusha okanye yibhokhwe, mayibe liduna elingenasiphako." 
Leviticus1:11 Leyo makayixhelele kwicala elingasentla leqonga phambi kukaNdikhoyo, baze oonyana baka-Aron, ababingeleli, balitshize igazi kumacala onke eqonga." 
Leviticus1:12 Yakuba ihlahliwe, umbingeleli wozibeka emlilweni oseqongeni zonke ezo nyama, ndawonye nentloko kunye namanqatha." 
Leviticus1:13 Umntu onikelayo yena uya kuhlamba izibilini kwakunye namanqina elo dini, aze yena umbingeleli alitshise lonke apho eqongeni. Eli lidini elitshiswayo. Litshiswa ngomlilo, litsho ngevumba elithandekayo kuNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus1:14 “Ukuba yintaka ekwenziwa ngayo idini elitshiswayo, mayibe lihobe okanye ivukuthu." 
Leviticus1:15 Umbingeleli wolisondeza eqongeni, aliqhawule intamo, alitshise apho eqongeni. Igazi lona uya kulophisela apho ecaleni leqonga." 
Leviticus1:16 Wolikhupha indlelo, ayilahle kunye neentsiba kwicala elingasempumalanga kweqonga, apho kulahlwa khona uthuthu," 
Leviticus1:17 andule ukulibamba ngamaphiko, aliqhaqhe, kodwa angalikrazuli kubini; athi emva koko alitshise lonke apho eqongeni. Eli lidini elitshiswayo. Litshiswa ngomlilo, litsho ngevumba elithandekayo kuNdikhoyo.”" 
Leviticus2:1 “Xa kukho umntu onikela ukutya *kuNdikhoyo, makube ngumgubo. Makawudibanise namafutha omnquma, aze agalele intlaka yesiqhumiso," 
Leviticus2:2 awunikezele kubabingeleli bomlibo ka-Aron. Umbingeleli uya kukha kangangesandla kuloo mgubo, udityaniswe namafutha, aze athathe yonke intlaka yesiqhumiso, azitshise apho eqongeni, oku kube ngumqondiso wokuba yonke loo nto ngumnikelo kuNdikhoyo. Ivumba laloo mnikelo womlilo liyathandeka kuNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus2:3 Okushiyekileyo ke koko kutya kuya kuba koka-Aron noonyana bakhe. Kukutya okukodwa ke oku; kaloku kuthathwe kukutya okunikelwe kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo. 
Leviticus2:4 “Ukuba umnikelo wenziwa ngesonka sombhako, masibe sisonka somgubo, singabi nagwele. Kungaba sisonka esikhulu esenziwe ngomgubo oxutywe namafutha omnquma, okanye kube ngamaqebengwana aqatywe ngaloo mafutha." 
Leviticus2:5 “Ukuba umnikelo wenziwa ngesonka esojiwe ngepani, masibe sesomgubo oxutywe namafutha omnquma, kodwa singabi nagwele." 
Leviticus2:6 Masiqhekezwe eso sonka, sigalelwe amafutha. Ngumnikelo wokutya ke lowo." 
Leviticus2:7 “Ukuba umnikelo wenziwa ngesonka esiphekiweyo, masibe sesomgubo oxutywe namafutha omnquma." 
Leviticus2:8 “Umnikelo wokutya mawusondezwe kuNdikhoyo, unikwe umbingeleli, awuse eqongeni." 
Leviticus2:9 Uya kwandula umbingeleli ukuthatha intwana engumqondiso wokuba unikelwa kuNdikhoyo, ayitshise apho eqongeni. Lo ngumnikelo womlilo. Ivumba ledini lomlilo liyathandeka kuNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus2:10 Okuseleyo kuloo mnikelo kokuka-Aron noonyana bakhe; kaloku kukutya okukodwa, kuba kuthathwe kukutya okunikelwe kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo." 
Leviticus2:11 “Konke ukutya okunikelwa kuNdikhoyo makungabi nagwele. Ungaze ufake igwele okanye ubusi kukutya okunikelwa kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo. 
Leviticus2:12 Umnikelo wolibo lwesivuno sengqolowa ungásondezwa kuNdikhoyo yonke iminyaka, phofu ungàtshiswa eqongeni ngenjongo yokwenza ivumba elimyoli." 
Leviticus2:13 Ityiwa mayigalelwe kuwo wonke umnikelo wokutya, kuba kaloku ityiwa yalatha umnqophiso ophakathi kwenu noThixo. Ke ngoko yonke iminikelo mayigalelwe ityiwa." 
Leviticus2:14 Xa usondeza umnikelo wolibo lwesivuno sengqolowa yiza nomgrayo wengqolowa ogcadiweyo, okanye ingqolowa engqushiweyo." 
Leviticus2:15 Dibanisa amafutha omnquma, ugalele intlaka yesiqhumiso." 
Leviticus2:16 Umbingeleli woyitshisa inxalenye yomgubo namafutha kwakunye nentlaka leyo iyonke, oku kube ngumqondiso wokuba yonke loo nto ngumnikelo kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo.”" 
Leviticus3:1 “Xa kukho umntu onikela ngenkomo ukuba kwenziwe ngayo idini lobudlelane, loo nkomo mayibe yinkunzi okanye imazi engenasiphako." 
Leviticus3:2 Loo mntu unikelayo makabeke isandla phezu kwentloko yaloo nkomo, aze ayihlabe apho esangweni *lesibingelelo *sikaNdikhoyo. Ababingeleli bomlibo ka-Aron bona bothi tshize ngegazi elo kumacala onke eqonga." 
Leviticus3:3 Kweli dini lobudlelane mabenze umnikelo womlilo ngezi nyama: onke amanqatha enyama yangaphakathi," 
Leviticus3:4 izintso namanqatha azo, nomhlehlo oya kususwa kunye nezintso ezo." 
Leviticus3:5 Ababingeleli bowatshisa loo manqatha apho eqongeni ndawonye naloo minikelo itshiswayo. Lo ngumnikelo womlilo. Ivumba ledini lomlilo liyathandeka kuNdikhoyo. 
Leviticus3:6 “Ukuba yigusha okanye yibhokhwe ekwenziwa ngayo idini lobudlelane, nokuba yinkunzi nokuba yimazi, mayingabi nasiphako." 
Leviticus3:7 Xa iyigusha, loo mntu uyinikelayo makeze nayo phambi koNdikhoyo," 
Leviticus3:8 ayibeke isandla entloko, ayinqumlele apho phambi kwesibingelelo. Ababingeleli bothi tshize ngegazi layo macala onke eqonga," 
Leviticus3:9 baze ezi nyama zayo bazinikele kuNdikhoyo: amanqatha, nomsila wonke unqunyulelwe kufuphi nasekuqaleni komqolo, onke amanqatha agqume inyama yangaphakathi," 
Leviticus3:10 izintso namanqatha azo, nomhlehlo oya kususwa kunye nezintso ezo." 
Leviticus3:11 Umbingeleli wozitshisa zonke ezi nyama eqongeni, zibe lidini elinikelwa kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo." 
Leviticus3:12 “Xa ngaba yibhokhwe, loo mntu uyinikelayo makeze nayo phambi koNdikhoyo," 
Leviticus3:13 ayibeke isandla entloko, ayinqumlele apho ngaphambi kwesibingelelo. Ababingeleli bothi tshize ngegazi layo kumacala onke eqonga," 
Leviticus3:14 banikele ezi nyama zibe ngumnikelo kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo: amanqatha enyama yangaphakathi," 
Leviticus3:15 izintso namanqatha azo, umhlehlo oya kususwa kunye nezintso ezo." 
Leviticus3:16 Umbingeleli wozitshisa zonke ezi nyama eqongeni, zibe lidini lomlilo elivumba lithandekayo kuNdikhoyo. Onke amanqatha ngakaNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus3:17 Makungabikho mSirayeli utya nqatha nagazi. Lo mmiselo mawugcinwe rhoqo ngamaSirayeli nakwizizukulwana ezizayo.” 
Leviticus4:1 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis ukuba 
Leviticus4:2 makabhekise kumaSirayeli lo mlomo uthi xa kukho bani wonileyo, waphula imimiselo kaNdikhoyo engenzi ngabom, kufuneka alandele le miyalelo." 
Leviticus4:3 Xa ingumbingeleli othanjisiweyo lowo wenze isono, aze ngokwenjenjalo azisele abantu ityala, yena uya kunikela ngethole lenkunzi yenkomo elingenasiphako, enze ngalo idini lokungxengxezela isono sakhe kuNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus4:4 Loo nkunzi uya kuyisa ngasekungeneni *kwesibingelelo, ayibeke isandla entloko, aze ayihlabele apho phambi koNdikhoyo," 
Leviticus4:5 aze ke kwayena athathe igazi layo, angene nalo esibingelelweni." 
Leviticus4:6 Akuba ethe nkxu umnwe egazini, uya kutshiza ngalo kasixhenxe apho ngaphambi koNdikhoyo nganeno komkhusane wegumbi eliyingcwele kangcwele," 
Leviticus4:7 andule ukutyikila ngenxalenye yegazi elo iimpondo ezikwiikona zeqonga lesiqhumiso elilapho kwigumbi eliyingcwele, aliphalaze igazi eliseleyo emazantsi eqonga lamadini atshiswayo elisekungeneni kwesibingelelo." 
Leviticus4:8 Wothi ke athathe onke amanqatha enyama yangaphakathi yale nkunzi," 
Leviticus4:9 izintso namanqatha azo, kunye nomhlehlo," 
Leviticus4:10 kanye njengoko enzayo ngamanqatha edini lobudlelane. Loo manqatha uya kuwatshisa kwelaa qonga lamadini atshiswayo. 
Leviticus4:11 Kodwa sona isikhumba nayo yonke inyama, intloko namanqina, nezibilini kwakunye namathumbu, oko kukuthi yonke inyama enganikelwanga kuNdikhoyo," 
Leviticus4:12 uya kuyikhuphela ngaphandle kwelali, azise kulaa ndawo ikhethekileyo apho kulahlwa khona uthuthu, azitshisele apho ngomlilo weenkuni." 
Leviticus4:13 Xa kone ibandla lakwaSirayeli liphela, lize ke libe netyala lokwaphula ummiselo kaNdikhoyo lingaqondanga," 
Leviticus4:14 kuya kuthi nje ukuba sazeke eso sono, kufuneke umzi uze nethole lenkunzi yenkomo yedini lokungxengxeza. Loo nkomo iya kuqhutyelwa esibingelelweni," 
Leviticus4:15 apho ziya kuthi phambi koNdikhoyo iinkokheli zomzi ziyibeke izandla entloko, ize ihlatywe." 
Leviticus4:16 Umbingeleli othanjisiweyo uya kuthatha inxenye yelo gazi, angene nalo ngaphakathi esibingelelweni," 
Leviticus4:17 athi nkxu umnwe kulo, aze atshize ngalo kasixhenxe phambi koNdikhoyo nganeno komkhusane wegumbi eliyingcwele kangcwele." 
Leviticus4:18 Elinye igazi wolityikila kwiimpondo ezikwiikona zeqonga lesiqhumiso elingaphakathi kwegumbi eliyingcwele, aze aliphalaze eliseleyo emazantsi eqonga lamadini atshiswayo elingasekungeneni kwesibingelelo." 
Leviticus4:19 Uya kwandula ke asuse onke amanqatha, awatshise eqongeni apho." 
Leviticus4:20 Ngale nkomo uya kwenza kanye ngalaa ndlela adla ngokwenza ngayo ngenkomo yedini lokungxengxezela izono. Yiyo ke le indlela umbingeleli enza ngayo idini lokucamagushela izono zabantu, yaye bozixolelwa." 
Leviticus4:21 Andule ke ukuyikhuphela ngaphandle kwelali loo nyama, aye kuyitshisa kanye ngalaa ndlela atshisa ngayo eyokucamagushela ezakhe izono. Lilo ke elo idini lokucamagushela ibandla." 
Leviticus4:22 Xa kone umntu oyinkokheli, aphule ummiselo kaNdikhoyo uThixo engaqondanga," 
Leviticus4:23 kuya kuthi nje ukuba ayiqonde into ayenzileyo, kufuneke eze nenkunzi yebhokhwe engenasiphako." 
Leviticus4:24 Woyibeka isandla entloko, aze ayinqumlele phambi koNdikhoyo kuloo ndawo kwenzelwa kuyo amadini atshisayo. Eli lidini lokucamagushela isono." 
Leviticus4:25 Umbingeleli wofaka umnwe egazini lebhokhwe leyo, alityikile kwiimpondo ezisezikoneni zeqonga, aze eliseleyo aliphalaze emazantsi eqonga," 
Leviticus4:26 aze awatshisele apho eqongeni onke amanqatha, kanye njengoko esenza ngawamadini obudlelane. Wokwenjenjalo ke umbingeleli ukunikela idini lokucamagushela umntu oyinkokheli, aze axolelwe isono sakhe." 
Leviticus4:27 Xa kone umntu nje, abe netyala lokwaphula ummiselo kaNdikhoyo engaqondanga," 
Leviticus4:28 kuya kuthi nje ukuba asiqonde isono sakhe, kufuneke eze nemazi yebhokhwe engenasiphako, ukuze angxengxezele isono sakhe." 
Leviticus4:29 Woyibeka isandla entloko, aze ayinqumlele apho kuxhelelwa khona amadini atshiswayo." 
Leviticus4:30 Umbingeleli wothi nkxu umnwe wakhe egazini layo, alityikile kwiimpondo ezikwiikona zeqonga, aze elinye aliphalaze emazantsi eqonga apho," 
Leviticus4:31 andule ke athathe onke amanqatha, kanye ngalaa ndlela enza ngayo kumadini obudlelane, aze awatshise apho eqongeni, abe livumba elimnandi kuNdikhoyo. Wenjenjalo ke umbingeleli ukwenzela umntu idini, aze axolelwe izono zakhe." 
Leviticus4:32 Ukuba kukho umntu ozisa igusha ukuza kwenza idini, mayibe yimazi engenasiphako." 
Leviticus4:33 Woyibeka isandla entloko, aze ayinqumlele apho kuxhelelwa khona izinto zokwenza amadini atshiswayo." 
Leviticus4:34 Umbingeleli wothi nkxu umnwe wakhe kwelo gazi layo, alityikile kwiimpondo ezisezikoneni zeqonga, eliseleyo aliphalaze apho emazantsi eqonga," 
Leviticus4:35 andule athathe onke amanqatha, kanye njengoko esenza kumadini obudlelane, aze awatshise apho eqongeni kunye nokutya okunikelwa kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo. Wenjenjalo ke umbingeleli xa esenzela umntu idini, khon' ukuze loo mntu axolelwe izono zakhe." 
Leviticus5:1 Xa umntu ebizwe yinkundla ukuba anike ubungqina, aze anganiki nkcazelo ngento ayibonileyo nayivileyo, unetyala." 
Leviticus5:2 Xa umntu echukumise *into engàphathwayo, enjengesilo esifileyo, udyobhekile, unetyala, nokuba akaqondi. Ingasisilwanyana sasendle esingatyiwayo, nokuba yimfuyo engatyiwayo, okanye sisilwanyana esirhubuluzayo." 
Leviticus5:3 Xa umntu echukumise into engàphathwayo ephuma komnye umntu, loo mntu naye udyobhekile, unetyala nokuba akaqondi." 
Leviticus5:4 Xa umntu efumana afunge engacinganga, nokuba ufungela nantoni na, unetyala nokuba akaqondi." 
Leviticus5:5 Mayela nale micimbi, akuba umntu eziqondile ukuba wonile, makasivume isiphoso sakhe," 
Leviticus5:6 aze eze nemazi yegusha nokuba yeyebhokhwe *kuNdikhoyo, enze idini lokungxengxezela ityala lakhe. Umbingeleli wolinikela elo dini ngenxa yeso siphoso." 
Leviticus5:7 Ukuba loo mntu akanako ukunikela ngegusha okanye ibhokhwe, wozisa amahobe amabini kuNdikhoyo, nokuba ngamavukuthu, enze intlawulelo yesono sakhe ngawo. Elinye loba ngumnikelo wokucamagushela isono, elinye libe leledini elitshiswayo." 
Leviticus5:8 Wowasa kumbingeleli. Yena woqala anikele elinye libe ngumnikelo wokucamagushela isono. Wolaphula intamo, angayiqhawuli kambe intloko," 
Leviticus5:9 aze atshize ngenxalenye yegazi lalo apho ecaleni leqonga. Eliseleyo igazi woliphalaza emazantsi eqonga. Lo ngumnikelo wokucamagushela isono. 
Leviticus5:10 Eyesibini intaka woyenza idini elitshiswayo, njengokomyalelo. Wenjenjalo ke umbingeleli ukwenzela umntu idini, aze axolelwe iziphoso." 
Leviticus5:11 Ukuba loo mntu akanako ukunikela nangamahobe amabini, okanye amavukuthu, wozisa ikhilogram yomgubo wengqolowa, enze ngawo umnikelo. Akayi kugalela mafutha omnquma nantlaka yesiqhumiso kuwo, kuba asingomnikelo wakutya lo, koko eli lidini lokucamagushela isono." 
Leviticus5:12 Wowunika umbingeleli, yena athathe kangangesandla, eqondisa ukuba wonke unikelwa kuNdikhoyo, aze ke awutshise apho eqongeni phezu kweminikelo enikelwa kuNikhoyo ngomlilo. Lo ngumnikelo wokucamagushela isono." 
Leviticus5:13 Wokwenjenjalo ke umbingeleli ukwenzela loo mntu idini, aze axolelwe nasiphi na isiphoso esinjengezi sezikhankanyiwe. Umgubo oseleyo woba ngowombingeleli, kanye njengoko kunjalo xa kwenziwa umnikelo wokutya." 
Leviticus5:14 *UNdikhoyo wanika uMosis le miyalelo: 
Leviticus5:15 Xa umntu one engaqondanga ngokutyeshela iimfanelo zikaNdikhoyo, loo mntu makathathe emhlambini wakhe inkunzi yegusha engenasiphako, okanye eyebhokhwe, eze nayo kuNdikhoyo, ibe yintlawulelo. Ixabiso layo loba ngangomlinganiselo ovunyiweyo wesiliva." 
Leviticus5:16 Makahlawule neliya lokutyeshela iimfanelo zikaNdikhoyo, aze ongeze isinye esihlanwini. Ke yena umbingeleli womenzela idini ngenkunzi leyo ngenxa yesono sakhe, aze asixolelwe eso sono." 
Leviticus5:17 Xa umntu one engaqondanga ngokwaphula nayiphi na imimiselo kaNdikhoyo, loo mntu unetyala, yaye uya kuluthwala olo xanduva." 
Leviticus5:18 Kufuneka eze nenkunzi yegusha engenasiphako kumbingeleli, okanye ibhokhwe. Ixabiso layo loba ngangomlinganiselo ovunyiweyo. Umbingeleli wolinikela idini, aze loo mntu axolelwe isiphoso sakhe." 
Leviticus5:19 Eli lidini lokucamagushela ityala leziphoso zokwaphula ummiselo kaNdikhoyo. 
Leviticus6:1 UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: 
Leviticus6:2 “Xa umntu one uNdikhoyo ngokwala ukubuyisela into ebekubanjiswe ngayo kuye ngomnye umSirayeli, okanye xa ebe into yomnye umSirayeli, okanye amqhathe," 
Leviticus6:3 okanye axoke athi akayiboni into yomnye ekuye, ade athi akayazi, atsho efunga, okanye enze nasiphi na esinye isono esifana nezi, kufuneka kwenziwe idini lokungxengxezela elo tyala." 
Leviticus6:4 Xa enze isono esilolo hlobo, kufuneka ayibuyise into ayibileyo, okanye ayifumene ngobuqhetseba, okanye abeyigcinisiwe nayicholeyo," 
Leviticus6:5 nantoni na leyo athe akayazi exoka kufuneka ayivuse, ongeze nomdliwo osisinye esihlanwini, kanye ngalaa mhla eze kunikela ngawo idini lesono." 
Leviticus6:6 Kufuneka ase kumbingeleli inkunzi yegusha nokuba yeyebhokhwe, kodwa ingabi nasiphako, ibe lidini lentlawulo alenze kuNdikhoyo. Ixabiso layo loba ngangomlinganiselo ovunyiweyo." 
Leviticus6:7 Elo dini umbingeleli wolinikela phambi koNdikhoyo, libe lelokungxengxezela isono saloo mntu, aze asixolelwe.”" 
Leviticus6:8 *UNdikhoyo wathi uMosis 
Leviticus6:9 makagqithisele le miyalelo kuAron noonyana bakhe: Idini elitshiswayo kufuneka litshiswe eqongeni ubusuku bonke, umlilo usoloko ukhwezelwa." 
Leviticus6:10 Umbingeleli ethe wambu umnweba wakhe welinen nebhulukhwe yakhe emfutshane eyenziwe ngelinen, wolususa lonke olo thuthu luphezu kweqonga, aze alubeke apho ngasecaleni leqonga." 
Leviticus6:11 Aze ke ambathe zivatho zimbi, aluthuthele ngaphandle kwelali olo thuthu kwindawo yalo ekhethekileyo." 
Leviticus6:12 Umlilo weqonga wona kufuneka uhlale uvutha, ungaze uyekwe ucime. Mihla le kusasa umbingeleli kufuneka awukhwezele umlilo, abeke idini elitshiswayo, aze atshise namanqatha edini lobudlelane." 
Leviticus6:13 Lo mlilo kufuneka usoloko uvutha apho eqongeni, ungaze uyekwe ucime." 
Leviticus6:14 Le miyalelo ilandelayo iphathelele kwiminikelo ekukutya. Ngumbingeleli womlibo ka-Aron oya kwenzela *uNdikhoyo iminikelo yokutya phambi kweqonga. 
Leviticus6:15 Uya kuthatha umgubo wengqolowa kangangesandla, namafutha omnquma, athathe nentlaka yesiqhumiso ebekwa phezu kwazo, aze azitshise apho eqongeni, zibe ngumqondiso wokuba konke oko kutya kunikelwa kuNdikhoyo. Ivumba lalo mnikelo liyathandeka kuNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus6:16 Okuseleyo koba kokwababingeleli. Makwenziwe isonka sentlama engenagwele, sityelwe endaweni ekhethekileyo apho enkundleni *yesibingelelo. Le yinxaxheba uNdikhoyo ayinika ababingeleli kwiminikelo yokutya. Yinxaxheba eyodwa engcwele, efana kanye naleya yamadini okungxengxezela izono neminikelo yentlawulo." 
Leviticus6:17  
Leviticus6:18 Iya kutyiwa ngamadoda omlibo ka-Aron njengesabelo sawo sokutya okunikelwa kuNdikhoyo. Omnye umntu ochukumise oku kutya kungumnikelo woba nophawu lukaNdikhoyo, abe semngciphekweni." 
Leviticus6:19 Le yinkqubo eya kuhlala ihleli yokumisela umbingeleli womlibo ka-Aron eyanikwa uMosis nguNdikhoyo. Ngalo mhla kanye amiselwa ngawo loo mbingeleli kufuneka anikele kuNdikhoyo ikhilogram ibe nye yomgubo wengqolowa, ube ngumnikelo wokutya. Uya kuba sisiqingatha kusasa, ube sisiqingatha nangokuhlwa." 
Leviticus6:20  
Leviticus6:21 Kufuneka udityaniswe namafutha, uze ugcadwe, ugraywe, uze unikelwe. Ivumba lawo liyathandeka kuNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus6:22 Lo mnikelo kufuneka wenziwe ngumbingeleli ngamnye othanjiswayo womlibo ka-Aron. Uya kutshiswa tu, ube lidini elihlala lisenzelwa uNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus6:23 Akuyi kutyiwa nto kukutya okunikelwa ngumbingeleli; makutshiswe konke. 
Leviticus6:24 *UNdikhoyo wathi uMosis 
Leviticus6:25 makagqithisele le nkqubo ephathelele ekwenzeni amadini okungxengxezela isono kuAron noonyana bakhe: Loo nto yokwenza idini iya kuxhelelwa phambi koNdikhoyo apho kuxhelelwa khona izinto zokwenza amadini atshiswayo. Eli dini lelikaNdikhoyo lilonke. 
Leviticus6:26 Loo mbingeleli wenza elo dini wolityela kwindawo ekhethekileyo enkundleni *yesibingelelo sikaNdikhoyo. 
Leviticus6:27 Nantoni na echukumise oku kutya yoba nophawu lukaNdikhoyo. Xa isinxibo sitshizwe ligazi laloo nto ixheliweyo, kufuneka sihlanjelwe endaweni ekhethekileyo." 
Leviticus6:28 Imbiza yodongwe ekuphekwe loo nyama ngayo, kufuneka iqhekezwe; xa iyimbiza yesinyithi kufuneka ikrwelwe, ihlanjwe ngamanzi." 
Leviticus6:29 Nawuphi na umntu oyindoda ongowomlibo wezindlu zababingeleli angayitya loo nyama. Le yinyama eyodwa. 
Leviticus6:30 Kodwa xa igazi liziswe esibingelelweni, laza lasetyenziswa ukungxengxezela izono egumbini eliyingcwele, loo nyama mayingatyiwa, mayitshiswe yonke." 
Leviticus7:1 Le yinkqubo ephathelele kumadini awodwa entlawulo: 
Leviticus7:2 Ixhoba lokwenza eli dini kufuneka lixhelelwe apho kuxhelelwa khona amadini atshiswayo. Igazi lalo malitshizwe kumacala onke eqonga. 
Leviticus7:3 Onke amanqatha makakhutshwe abekwe eqongeni: umsila, namanqatha enyama yangaphakathi," 
Leviticus7:4 izintso kunye namanqatha azo, kwakunye nomhlehlo." 
Leviticus7:5 Onke loo manqatha umbingeleli makawatshise enzele ngawo *uNdikhoyo umnikelo ngomlilo. Eli ke lidini lokwenza intlawulo. 
Leviticus7:6 Nayiphi na indoda ephuma kumlibo wababingeleli ingayitya loo nyama. Kodwa kufuneka ityelwe kulaa ndawo ikhethekileyo, kuba kwayona ikhethekile." 
Leviticus7:7 Inye inkqubo ephathelele kumadini esono nakumadini entlawulo. Loo nyama iba yeyombingeleli owenza idini. 
Leviticus7:8 Kwanalo ufele lwento yedini elitshiswayo luba lolwaloo mbingeleli wenza idini. 
Leviticus7:9 Wonke umnikelo wento eziinkozo ebhakiweyo okanye eyenziwe ngepani, okanye egcadiweyo, uba ngowombingeleli lowo ubewunikela." 
Leviticus7:10 Umnikelo wokutya, nokuba uxutywe namafutha, nokuba womile, woba ngowababingeleli bebonke, yaye ke mabahlulelane ngako ngokulinganayo." 
Leviticus7:11 Nantsi inkqubo ephathelele kumadini obudlelane enzelwa *uNdikhoyo: 
Leviticus7:12 Xa umntu esenza idini lobudlelane ebulela, makeze naloo nto iza kuxhelwa kwakunye nesonka esingenagwele, nokuba sisonka esiqatywe amafutha omnquma, okanye amaqebengwana aqatywe amafutha omnquma, kungenjalo amaqebengwana enziwe ngomgubo oxutywe namafutha omnquma." 
Leviticus7:13 Kweli dini lobudlelane, elikwalidini lokubulela, kufuneka ongezelele ngezonka ezinegwele." 
Leviticus7:14 Makanikele ngodidi ngalunye kwezi zonka, azenze umnikelo kuNdikhoyo. Zoba zezombingeleli othe watshiza iqonga ngegazi lamadini obudlelane." 
Leviticus7:15 Inyama yedini lobudlelane kufuneka ityiwe kwangaloo mini inikelwa ngayo; makungabikho nyama isalayo kude kube ngengomso. 
Leviticus7:16 Xa umntu enikela idini lobudlelane, egcina isithembiso awasenzayo, okanye ethanda nje ukwenza umnikelo, leyo ke yona inyama akunyanzelekanga ukuba ityiwe iphele ngamini-nye, kodwa eseleyo ingátyiwa ngengomso." 
Leviticus7:17 Inyama esekhoyo ngosuku lwesithathu kufuneka itshiswe yona. 
Leviticus7:18 Ukuba ityiwe loo nyama ngosuku lwesithathu, uThixo akayi kulamkela elo dini laloo mntu, kuba lisuke *lanomlaza. Nabani na ke oya kuthi alitye uya kuluthwala uxanduva lwakhe." 
Leviticus7:19 Xa inyama yedini ithe yadibana nantoni na enomlaza, kufuneka itshiswe ingàtyiwa. Wonke ubani ongenamlaza angayitya inyama yedini elo." 
Leviticus7:20 Kodwa xa ithe yatyiwa nangumntu onomlaza, lowo makasikwe phakathi kosapho lukaNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus7:21 Kanti xa umntu athe waphatha into enomlaza, nokuba ngumntu, nokuba sisilwanyana esingatyiwayo, nantoni na enezothe, aze asuke aye kutya idini lobudlelane likaNdikhoyo, loo mntu makasikwe ebantwini bakaNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus7:22 Ubuye uThixo wanika uMosis le miyalelo 
Leviticus7:23 amakayigqithisele kumaSirayeli: Akukho manqatha ankomo nagusha nabhokhwe aya kutyiwa mntu. 
Leviticus7:24 Amanqatha ento efileyo, okanye ebulewe ngamarhamncwa, makangatyiwa. Kambe ke angásetyenziswa ekwenzeni ezinye izinto." 
Leviticus7:25 Wonke umntu othe watya amanqatha ento ekwenziwa ngayo idini kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo makasikwe kumaSirayeli. 
Leviticus7:26 Naphi na apho emi khona amaSirayeli makangaze alitye igazi, nokuba leleentaka, nokuba lelezilwanyana." 
Leviticus7:27 Nabani na olityayo igazi makasikwe kumaSirayeli. 
Leviticus7:28 Uphindile wathi uNdikhoyo uMosis 
Leviticus7:29 makagqithisele nale mimiselo kumaSirayeli: Umntu owenza idini lobudlelane makakhuphe isabelo esithile, asinikele kuNdikhoyo," 
Leviticus7:30 eze naso ngokwakhe, sibe ngumnikelo kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo. Makeze namanqatha aso kunye nencum, aziwanga-wangise zibe ngumnikelo owanga-wangiselwa uNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus7:31 Loo manqatha umbingeleli wowatshisa apho eqongeni, kodwa yona incum yeyababingeleli." 
Leviticus7:32 Umlenze wasekunene wona woba yinxaxheba yombingeleli obenikela igazi kunye namanqatha elo dini lobudlelane. 
Leviticus7:33  
Leviticus7:34 Incum ewanga-wangisiweyo nalo mlenze wasekunene yinxaxheba emayikhutshelwe ababingeleli ngamaSirayeli ngalo lonke ixesha. 
Leviticus7:35 Le yinxaxheba kaNdikhoyo eyaxhanyulwa nguAron nangoonyana bakhe mhla bamiselwa ebubingelelini. 
Leviticus7:36 Ngaloo mini yokuthanjiswa kwababingeleli uNdikhoyo wathi amaSirayeli makakhuphe eso sabelo sedini sibe yinxaxheba yabo. Lo ngummiselo omawuhlale uhleli. 
Leviticus7:37 Nantso ke imiyalelo yaxa kusenziwa amadini atshiswayo, nawokutya, nawokungxengxezela izono, kunye nawentlawulo, amadini okumisela ababingeleli, kwakunye nawobudlelane." 
Leviticus7:38 Kwakusentabeni iSinayi entlango ngamhla uNdikhoyo wayinika uMosis le miyalelo yokwenziwa kwamadini ngamaSirayeli. 
Leviticus8:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: 
Leviticus8:2 “Yiya noAron kunye noonyana bakhe ekungeneni *kwesibingelelo, uphathe nezivatho zababingeleli, kunye namafutha okuthambisa, nenkunzi yenkomo yedini lokungxengxezela izono, iinkunzi ezimbini zeegusha, kunye nebhaskiti enezonka ezingenagwele. Uze ke ubize umzi wakwaSirayeli uphela.”" 
Leviticus8:3  
Leviticus8:4 UMosis wenza njengoko wayeyalelwe nguNdikhoyo, waza wenjenje ukuthetha ebhekisa kwelo bandla elalithe nqwadalala ekungeneni kwesibingelelo:" 
Leviticus8:5 “Le nto ndiza kuyenza ngoku yinto endiyithunywe nguNdikhoyo.” 
Leviticus8:6 UMosis wathi uAron noonyana bakhe mabasondele, waza wabahlamba ngamanzi." 
Leviticus8:7 Unxibe uAron ihempe, wamthi wambu ngomnweba, wamfaka umxwayo, waza wamfaka *isidanga, wasiqhobosha esinqeni ngebhanti esontwe ngobunono." 
Leviticus8:8 Kweso sidanga sisesifubeni wafaka *iiurim neethumim. 
Leviticus8:9 Umthwalise iqhiya entloko, waza kuyo waqhoboshela isihombiso esenziwe ngegolide, esiluphawu lokwahlulelwa uNdikhoyo. Wenza kanye njengoko wayeyalelwe nguNdikhoyo uMosis." 
Leviticus8:10 UMosis uthathe amafutha, wathambisa isibingelelo nazo zonke izinto ezingaphakathi kwaso, waza ngokwenjenjalo wazahlulela uThixo." 
Leviticus8:11 Ufefe iqonga kasixhenxe ngamafutha aseleyo, kunye nempahla yalo yonke, nesitya sokuhlambela, kwanamazantsi aso, zonke ezo zinto ezahlulela uThixo." 
Leviticus8:12 Waza wammisela uAron, emahlulela uNdikhoyo, ngokumgalela inxenye yamafutha entloko." 
Leviticus8:13 Emva koko uMosis uthathe oonyana baka-Aron, wabanxiba iihempe, wabafaka imixwayo, wabathwesa iminqwazi, njengoko wayeyalelwe nguNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus8:14 UMosis usondeze inkunzi yedini lokucamagushela, waza uAron noonyana bakhe bayibeka izandla entloko." 
Leviticus8:15 Uyihlabile uMosis, waza wathi nkxu umnwe wakhe egazini layo, walityikila kwiimpondo zone zeekona zeqonga, waba ulahlulela uNdikhoyo ngokwenjenjalo. Eliseleyo ke igazi uliphalaze emazantsi eqonga. Waba ke ngoko uyalihlambulula iqonga." 
Leviticus8:16 Wawathatha onke amanqatha ezibilini uMosis, kunye nomhlehlo, kwakunye nezintso namanqatha azo, wawatshisa apho eqongeni lamadini." 
Leviticus8:17 Uyithathe yonke loo nyama yaloo nkomo ndawonye nesikhumba namathumbu waya kuzitshisa ngaphandle kwelali njengokutsho kukaNdikhoyo. 
Leviticus8:18 Emva koko uMosis usondeze inkunzi yegusha yedini elitshiswayo, baza uAron noonyana bakhe bayibeka izandla entloko." 
Leviticus8:19 Uyinqumle uMosis, waza igazi waliphosa kumacala onke eqonga." 
Leviticus8:20 Wayihlahla loo gusha, waza wahlamba izibilini nemilenze. Intloko yona, kunye namanqatha, kunye nayo yonke loo nyama, wazitshisa apho eqongeni, kanye njengoko kwatsho uNdikhoyo. Eli lidini elitshiswayo, idini elenzelwa uNdikhoyo ngomlilo. Ivumba lalo liyolile kuNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus8:21  
Leviticus8:22 Uze neyesibini inkunzi yegusha uMosis; le yona yayiyeyedini lokumiselwa kwababingeleli, waza uAron noonyana bakhe bayibeka izandla entloko." 
Leviticus8:23 Wayinqumla uMosis, waza wathatha intwana yegazi, watyikila ngalo indlebe yokunene ka-Aron, nosithupha wesandla sokunene, nobhontsi wonyawo lokunene." 
Leviticus8:24 Ngoku uMosis usondeze oonyana baka-Aron, nabo wabadyobha igazi iindlebe zasekunene, oosithupha basekunene, noobhontsi beenyawo zasekunene. Waza eliseleyo igazi waliphalaza kumacala onke eqonga." 
Leviticus8:25 UMosis uthathe amanqatha, nomsila, namanqatha ezibilini, umhlehlo, nezintso namanqatha azo, kunye nomlenze wasekunene." 
Leviticus8:26 Emva koko uthathe isonka sasinye esingenagwele kulaa bhaskiti iphambi koNdikhoyo, wathatha nesonka esenziwe ngamafutha, neqebengwana lalinye, waza wazibeka ngaphezu kwamanqatha nomlenze." 
Leviticus8:27 Uzithathe zonke, wazinika uAron noonyana bakhe, bona baziwanga-wangisa phambi koNdikhoyo zangumnikelo." 
Leviticus8:28 Uphinde wazithatha kubo uMosis, wazitshisa apho eqongeni, ngaphezu kwelaa dini litshiswayo, zalidini lokumisela. Lo ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, ovumba lithandekayo kuNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus8:29 UMosis uthathe incum wayiwanga-wangisa yangumnikelo kuNdikhoyo. Le yayiyinxaxheba kaMosis yedini lomiselo lwababingeleli. UMosis wenza kanye njengoko wayeyalelwe nguNdikhoyo. 
Leviticus8:30 UMosis uthathe inxalenye yamafutha okuthambisa, nenxalenye yegazi elaliseqongeni, watshiza uAron noonyana bakhe kwankqu nezivatho zabo. Wenjenjalo ukubahlulela uNdikhoyo kwanezambatho zabo nazo." 
Leviticus8:31 Uthe uMosis kuAron noonyana bakhe: “Le nyama yiseni ekungeneni kwesibingelelo, nize niyipheke apho, niyitye nesiya sonka sisebhaskitini yamadini okumisela ababingeleli, ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus8:32 Ze niyitshise yonke inyama eseleyo nesonka esiseleyo. 
Leviticus8:33 Ze ningemki apho ekungeneni kwesibingelelo kude kube ziintsuku ezisixhenxe, ude ube ke udlule umsitho wokumiselwa kwenu." 
Leviticus8:34 UNdikhoyo usiyalele ukuba senze le nto siyenzileyo namhlanje kuni ukususa isono senu. 
Leviticus8:35 Ze nihlale ke phaya ekungeneni kwesibingelelo ubusuku nemini, kude kube ziintsuku ezisixhenxe, nithobela umyalelo kaNdikhoyo. Niya kufa ukuba aniyenzi loo nto. Yinto ethethwe nguNdikhoyo leyo ke kum.”" 
Leviticus8:36 UAron noonyana bakhe ke bênza njengoko uNdikhoyo wayeyalele uMosis. 
Leviticus9:1 Ngomhla wesibhozo emva komsitho womiselo lwababingeleli uMosis wabiza uAron kunye noonyana bakhe, kwakunye namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli," 
Leviticus9:2 wathi kuAron: “Thatha inkunzana yenkomo kunye nenkunzi yegusha ezingenasiphako, wenzele ngazo *uNdikhoyo idini, inkunzi yenkomo ibe lidini lokucamagushela isono, ize eyegusha yona ibe lidini elitshiswayo." 
Leviticus9:3 Yitsho amaSirayeli eze nenkunzi yebhokhwe ibe lidini lokucamagusha, nethole elinonyaka, netakane elinonyaka, zingabi nasiphako, zona zibe ngamadini atshiswayo," 
Leviticus9:4 kwakunye nenkomo nenkunzi yegusha, zona zibe ngamadini obudlelane. Kufuneka kwenziwe amadini ngazo, kwakunye nokutya okuxutywe namafutha. Kufuneka niyenze le nto, kuba kaloku uNdikhoyo uza kunivelela namhlanje.”" 
Leviticus9:5 Zeziswa zonke ezo zinto wayethe maziziswe uMosis ngaphambili *kwesibingelelo, laza lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli lee thande apho phambi koNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus9:6 Wabhekisa ebantwini uMosis, wathi: “NguNdikhoyo lo uthe makwenziwe le nquleqhu yonke, khon' ukuze kutyhileke kuni ukubengezela kwesihomo sakhe.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Wandula ke uMosis ukuthi kuAron: “Yiz' aph' eqongeni lamadini, wenze idini lokucamagushela isono, kunye nedini elitshiswayo, ngenxa yezono zakho kunye nezabantu. Le nto yenze ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo.”" 
Leviticus9:8 UAron waya eqongeni, wafika walixhela ithole lenkomo elalilidini lokucamagushela izono zakhe." 
Leviticus9:9 Oonyana bakhe bazisa igazi kuye, waza uAron wathi nkxu kulo umnwe, waza watyikila ngalo iimpondo ezikwiikona zone zeqonga. Eliseleyo waliphalaza emazantsi eqonga." 
Leviticus9:10 Amanqatha nezintso nomhlehlo wedini lesono wazitshisa apho eqongeni ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis. 
Leviticus9:11 Kodwa yona inyama nofele wazitshisela ngaphandle kwelali. 
Leviticus9:12 UAron ubuye waxhela into yokuzenzela idini elitshiswayo. Beze negazi layo kuye oonyana bakhe, waza wafefa ngalo kumacala onke eqonga." 
Leviticus9:13 Bamnika intloko kunye nezinye iinyama, waza wazitshisa apho eqongeni." 
Leviticus9:14 Emva koko uthathe izibilini nemilenze, wazihlamba, waza wazitshisa apho eqongeni ngaphezu kwelaa dini litshiswayo." 
Leviticus9:15 Akugqiba unikele idini labantu. Uxhele laa bhokhwe yokucamagushela izono zesizwe, wayinikela njengoko enzile ngokuya ebenikela idini lezakhe izono." 
Leviticus9:16 Ubuye walisondeza ngokusesikweni kwanalo idini elitshiswayo. 
Leviticus9:17 Usondeze nomnikelo wokutya, wathatha kangangesandla kuwo, wawutshisa apho eqongeni. Yonke le nquleqhu yongeza kumadini atshiswa kusasa." 
Leviticus9:18 Waxhela inkomo nenkunzi yegusha, wenzela ngazo abantu amadini obudlelane. Oonyana bakhe bamzisela igazi, watshiza ngalo kumacala onke eqonga." 
Leviticus9:19 Uthathe amanqatha aloo nkomo naloo gusha uAron, – umsila, namanqatha, namanqatha ezintso, nomhlehlo –" 
Leviticus9:20 wawabeka phezu kweencum zazo, waza yonke loo nto wayisa eqongeni. Amanqatha uwatshisele apho eqongeni," 
Leviticus9:21 waza iincum zona kunye nemilenze yasekunene waziwanga-wangisa phambi koNdikhoyo ngokomnikelo, kanye njengoko ebetshilo uMosis." 
Leviticus9:22 Uthe uAron akugqiba ukwenza onke loo madini, waphakamisela izandla zakhe ngasebantwini ebasikelela, waza wasuka eqongeni." 
Leviticus9:23 Ubuye waya kungena esibingelelweni kunye noMosis, baza bathi bakuba bebuye baphuma, basikelela abantu. Suka kwatyhileka kubantu bonke ukubengezela kwesihomo sikaNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus9:24 Suka kwaphuma umlilo kuNdikhoyo, watshisa elo dini naloo manqatha ebephezu kweqonga. Bathi bakuyibona loo nto abantu, baduma bonke, bee qubudu bawa ngobuso." 
Leviticus10:1 UNadabhi noAbhihu, oonyana baka-Aron, elowo wathatha umcephe wakhe wamalahle, wagalela amalahle, wafaka nentlaka yesiqhumiso, bazisa phambi *koNdikhoyo. Kambe ke loo mlilo wabo wawunxamnye nomyalelo kaNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus10:2 Kusuke kwaphuma umlilo kuNdikhoyo owabatshisela khona apho, bafela apho phambi koNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus10:3 UMosis ke uthe kuAron: “Nantso ke into eyayixelwa nguNdikhoyo ngokuya wayesithi: ‘Kufuneka bandihlonele bonke abasondelayo kum; abantu bam ndobabonisa isihomo nesithozela sam.’ ” Yena uAron wasuka wathula tu. 
Leviticus10:4 UMosis ubize uMishayeli kunye noElizafan, oonyana bakaUziyeli, uyisekazi ka-Aron, wathi kubo mabaye kuthatha imizimba yabantakwabo, bayisuse phambi *kwesibingelelo, bayikhuphele ngaphandle kwelali." 
Leviticus10:5 Baya kuzithatha ezo zidumbu, bazithwala bezibambe ngezambatho, bazisa ngaphandle kwelali njengoko wayetshilo kubo uMosis." 
Leviticus10:6 UMosis ubhekise kuAron nakoonyana bakhe uElazare noItamare, wathi: “Musani ukubazilela aba bangasekhoyo. Musani ukuziyeka iinwele zenu zingachazwanga, ningazikrazuli nezambatho zenu hleze nife, abe ke uNdikhoyo angaliqumbela ibandla liphela. Kambe ke onke amanye amaSirayeli wona angayizilela le ntlekele yokufa kwaba bantu ngomlilo othunyelwe nguNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus10:7 Maze nina ningasuki esangweni lesibingelelo, hleze nife, kuba nâhlulelwa uNdikhoyo ngokuthanjiswa.” Benjenjalo ke." 
Leviticus10:8 *UNdikhoyo wabhekisa kuAron, wathi:" 
Leviticus10:9 “Wena noonyana bakho nize ningangeni *esibingelelweni xa benisele. Niya kufa ukuba niyenzile loo nto. Lo mthetho uze uthotyelwe nazizizukulwana. 
Leviticus10:10 Nize nicalule phakathi kwento eyahlulelwe uThixo nento engahlulelwanga yena, naphakathi kwento *enomlaza nento engenamlaza." 
Leviticus10:11 AmaSirayeli ze niwafundise yonke imimiselo endaninika yona ngoMosis.” 
Leviticus10:12 UMosis wabhekisa kuAron nakoonyana bakhe abaseleyo, uElazare noItamare, wathi: “Ukutya okuseleyo kumnikelo obusenzelwa uNdikhoyo ze nikuthathe nenze izonka ezinganyuswanga, nizityele phaya ngaseqongeni. Kaloku lo ngumnikelo ongcwele." 
Leviticus10:13 Nize nizityele endaweni ekhethekileyo; sisabelo senu eso esithathwa kwiminikelo eyenzelwa uNdikhoyo ngomlilo. Loo nto yathethwa kum nguNdikhoyo. 
Leviticus10:14 Nina noonyana neentombi zenu ningayitya incum ewanga-wangisiweyo kwanomlenze onikelwe kuThixo. Ningazityela naphi na apho kungekho *mlaza. Esi sabelo siyinxaxheba yenu kunye nabantwana benu evela kumadini obudlelane anikelwa ngamaSirayeli kuNdikhoyo. 
Leviticus10:15 Kufuneka le ncum nalo mlenze beze nazo kanye ngexesha kusondezwa iminikelo yamanqatha eyenzelwa uNdikhoyo ngomlilo. Ezi nyama ziya kusoloko zisisabelo senu, kunye nabantwana benu, njengoko etshilo uNdikhoyo.”" 
Leviticus10:16 UMosis watsho ebuza ukuba iye ngaphi na ibhokhwe yedini lokucamagushela isono. Waxelelwa ukuba nayo selitshisiwe. Loo nto yamcaphukisa," 
Leviticus10:17 watsho wathi kuElazare noItamare: “Kutheni ningayityelanga kule ndawo ikhethekileyo nje inyama yedini lokucamagusha? Kaloku yinyama engaphumiyo; niyinikwa nguNdikhoyo ukuze nicamagushele ibandla. 
Leviticus10:18 Kaloku igazi layo lingangeniswanga nje esibingelelweni phakathi, bekufuneka niyityele endaweni ekhethekileyo, njengoko bendiniyalele.”" 
Leviticus10:19 UAron waphendula wathi: “Kaloku namhlanje sizise idini lokucamagushela izono kunye nelethu elitshiswayo. Kambe ke uyayiqonda le ntlekele ihlileyo namhlanje! Xa besiyityile ke namhlanje inyama yeli dini ibingamkholisa njani uNdikhoyo loo nto?” 
Leviticus10:20 UMosis akuyiva loo nto waxola. 
Leviticus11:1 *UNdikhoyo wanika uMosis noAron le miyalelo," 
Leviticus11:2 ukuba bayigqithisele kumaSirayeli: “Kuzo zonke izilwanyana ezihamba emhlabeni zingátyiwa ezineempuphu ezicandekileyo kananjalo zisetyisa. 
Leviticus11:3  
Leviticus11:4 Kodwa zona iinkamela, neembila, nemivundla, mazingatyiwa. Ewe kambe ziyetyisa, kodwa iimpuphu zazo azicandekanga." 
Leviticus11:5  
Leviticus11:6  
Leviticus11:7 Inyama yehagu mayingatyiwa. Kaloku ihagu ineempuphu ezicandekileyo, kodwa ayetyisi." 
Leviticus11:8 Inyama yezinto ezinjalo maningayityi, ningazichukumisi naxa zifileyo, kuba *zinomlaza.”" 
Leviticus11:9 Kwezasemanzini ningazitya zonke iintlanzi ezinamaphiko okugwedla namaxolo. 
Leviticus11:10 Kodwa ke nantoni na engenamaphiko namaxolo ehlala emanzini ze ningayityi. 
Leviticus11:11 Ezinjalo azityiwa; musani ukuzichukumisa naxa zifile. 
Leviticus11:12 Nayiphi na into esemanzini engenamaphiko namaxolo inezothe. 
Leviticus11:13 Mazingatyiwa ezi ntlobo zeentaka: oomakhozi, oozikhova, oontloyiya, oozilwangangubo, oozintsikizi, oomaxhalanga, oonomyayi, oozinciniba, ookhwalimanzi, oozingwamza, oozintambanane, oozingcwangube, oomangaba-ngaba, oobhobhoyi, oomalulwane." 
Leviticus11:14  
Leviticus11:15  
Leviticus11:16  
Leviticus11:17  
Leviticus11:18  
Leviticus11:19  
Leviticus11:20 Zonke izinambuzane ezizitho zine eziphaphayo azityiwa," 
Leviticus11:21 ngaphandle kwezo zitaka-takayo. 
Leviticus11:22 Ezinjengeenkumbi, nootseki-tselu, nomqhathu, ziyatyiwa zona." 
Leviticus11:23 Kodwa zonke ezinye izinambuzane eziphaphayo, ezirhoqozayo, azityiwa." 
Leviticus11:24 Umntu ochukumise ezi zinto xa zifile woba nomlaza kude kutshone ilanga: iinyamakazi ezineempuphu, ngaphandle kwezo zineempuphu ezicandekileyo, zetyisayo nokwetyisa, kunye nezo zizitho zine zinamathupha. Umntu othe waphatha ezi zinto xa zifile, makahlambe impahla, kodwa woba nomlaza kude kube kutshone ilanga." 
Leviticus11:25  
Leviticus11:26  
Leviticus11:27  
Leviticus11:28  
Leviticus11:29 Kwezirhubuluzayo nazi ezingatyiwayo: iintuku, amabuzi, iimpuku, oomacikilishe, ooxam, noomalovane." 
Leviticus11:30  
Leviticus11:31 Umntu othe waziphatha nokuba zifile, woba nomlaza kude kutshone ilanga." 
Leviticus11:32 Xa kukho into ethe yawelwa zezo zinto xa zifile, yoba nomlaza nayo. Ndithetha nkqu nezinto ezenziwe ngamaplanga, ngamalaphu, ngethwathwa, okanye ngerhonya, nokuba isetyenziselwa ntoni na loo nto; kufuneka ifakwe emanzini, kodwa liya kude litshone ilanga ingekahlambuluki." 
Leviticus11:33 Ukuba into efileyo kwezi iwela engqayini, yonke into engaphakathi kuloo ngqayi ayinakutyiwa. Yona ingqayi kufuneka iqhekezwe." 
Leviticus11:34 Ukutya okugalelwe amanzi akule ngqayi makungatyiwa – kumdaka. Naloo nto iselwayo ibikuloo ngqayi nayo isuka isuleleke. 
Leviticus11:35 Nantoni na ekuwele kuyo into efileyo kwezi zibaliweyo iba nomlaza; isitovu sodaka, nokuba yimbiza, maziqhekezwe." 
Leviticus11:36 Kambe wona umthombo nequla azisuleleki xa ziwelwe zezi zinto. Ke yena umntu ozichukumisayo uba nomlaza. 
Leviticus11:37 Imbewu eza kulinywa ayisuleleki, nokuba idibene nento efileyo kwezi zixeliweyo." 
Leviticus11:38 Kodwa xa loo mbewu ifakwe emanzini iyasuleleka kukudibana nento efileyo. 
Leviticus11:39 Xa kufe isilwanyana esityiwayo, umntu osichukumisileyo uba nomlaza kude kutshone ilanga." 
Leviticus11:40 Nomntu otye inyama yaso, nokuba uyihlambile impahla yakhe, uba nomlaza kude kutshone ilanga. Umntu othe wasithwala sifile isilwanyana kufuneka ayihlambe impahla yakhe, kodwa uba nomlaza kude kutshone ilanga" 
Leviticus11:41 Zonke izinambuzane ezirhubuluzayo, nezirhoqozayo, nezinemilenze emine nangaphezulu, zinezothe; mazingatyiwa." 
Leviticus11:42  
Leviticus11:43 Ze ningazifaki umlaza ngokutya ezo zinto. 
Leviticus11:44 Mna ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu. Yibani ngcwele, kuba mna ndingcwele. Musani ukuzifaka umlaza nangasiphi na isidalwa esirhubuluzayo emhlabeni." 
Leviticus11:45 NdinguNdikhoyo owanikhupha eJiputa ukuze ndibe nguThixo wenu. Yibani ngcwele, kuba mna ndingcwele." 
Leviticus11:46 Nango ke umyalelo ophathelele kwizilwanyana, neentaka, nento yonke ehlala emanzini, nezinambuzane." 
Leviticus11:47 Kufuneka nicalule phakathi kwento ehlambulukileyo nenomlaza, nezinto ezityiwayo nezingàtyiwayo." 
Leviticus12:1 *UNdikhoyo wanika uMosis le miyalelo 
Leviticus12:2 ukuba ayigqithisele kumaSirayeli: Umdlezana emva kokubeleka inkwenkwe woba *nomlaza iintsuku ezisixhenxe, kanye njengoko aba njalo xa esexesheni." 
Leviticus12:3 Ngosuku lwesibhozo usana olo kufuneka lwaluswe.
