Leviticus12:4 Kodlula amashumi amathathu anantathu eentsuku ngaphambi kokuba loo mdlezane ahlambuluke ekopheni. Kufuneka angaphathi nanye into eyahlulelwe uThixo, angasondeli nokusondela *esibingelelweni kude kuphele ixesha lokuhlanjululwa kwakhe." 
Leviticus12:5 Umdlezana emva kokubeleka intombazana woba nomlaza iintsuku ezilishumi elinane, kanye njengoko aba njalo xa esexesheni. Kodlula amashumi amathandathu anantandathu eentsuku ngaphambi kokuba ahlambuluke ekopheni." 
Leviticus12:6 Lakufika ixesha lokuhlanjululwa kwakhe, nokuba ebebeleke inkwenkwe okanye intombazana, kufuneka ase itakane elinonyaka kumbingeleli ekungeneni kwesibingelelo, eliza kuba lidini elitshiswayo, kunye nevukuthu okanye ihobe lokwenza idini lokucamagushela isono." 
Leviticus12:7 Umbingeleli wolinikela idini elo kuNdikhoyo, aze loo mdlezane ahlambuluke ekopheni. Nantso ke into emayenziwe ngumdlezana, nokuba ubeleke inkwenkwe okanye intombi." 
Leviticus12:8 Ukuba loo mdlezana akanako ukuzisa itakane, makeze namahobe amabini okanye amavukuthu amabini. Elinye loba leledini elitshiswayo, elinye libe lelokucamagushela isono. Ngokwenjenjalo umbingeleli uya kumcamagushela, aze loo mdlezana ahlambuluke." 
Leviticus13:1 Nantsi inkqubo eyanikwa uMosis *nguNdikhoyo: 
Leviticus13:2 Xa kukho umntu onesilonda, nokuba lithumba, nokuba kukujaduka okungahle kube sisifo solusu esosulelayo, loo mntu kufuneka asiwe kumbingeleli womlibo ka-Aron." 
Leviticus13:3 Wosixilonga eso silonda umbingeleli. Ukuba ke ubhaqe uboya sebujike bamhlophe, ukanti nesilonda eso ukubhidla kwaso kube nzulu kunolusu olungaphandle, eso silonda ke senziwa sisifo esosulelayo, iqhenqa. Umbingeleli ke uya kwazisa ukuba loo mntu *unomlaza." 
Leviticus13:4 Ukanti ke ukuba eso sisilonda nje, saye singenzulu kunolusu, noboya bungajikanga baba mhlophe, umbingeleli womgcina bucala loo mntu iintsuku zibe sixhenxe angadibani nabanye." 
Leviticus13:5 Wophinda amxilonge emva kwezo ntsuku, kuthi ke xa umbingeleli ebona ukuba eso silonda asibhidlanga, sisenjengakuqala, aphinde amgcine bucala kwaesinye isixhenxe seentsuku." 
Leviticus13:6 Wobuya amxilonge umbingeleli kwakhona emva koko, kuthi ke ukuba eso silonda sirhawukile endaweni yokubhidla, azise ke ukuba loo mntu akanamlaza, uhlambulukile. Loo mntu ke kufuneka ahlambe impahla yakhe, ukuze angabi namlaza." 
Leviticus13:7 Kodwa ukuba emva koko isilonda sithe sabhidla, kufuneka aye kwakumbingeleli loo mntu kwakhona." 
Leviticus13:8 Wophinda amxilonge umbingeleli, kuthi ukuba eso silonda siyabhidla, umbingeleli azise ukuba loo mntu unomlaza, unesifo esosulelayo, iqhenqa." 
Leviticus13:9 Xa kukho umntu onesifo solusu esosulelayo, kufuneka asiwe kumbingeleli" 
Leviticus13:10 oya kuthi amxilonge. Xa eso silonda saloo mntu sivuthiwe, sinobubovu, sijike noboya baba mhlophe," 
Leviticus13:11 loo mntu unesifo esibi solusu. Uya kuthi ke umbingeleli azise ukuba lowo unomlaza. Onjalo akayi kuba saba phantsi komgqaliselo, kuba kwaziwa phandle ukuba unomlaza." 
Leviticus13:12 Xa eso sifo solusu sinwenwe sada sathi gqume wonke umzimba," 
Leviticus13:13 umbingeleli kufuneka amxilonge lowo. Xa ebona ukuba isifo simthe gqume wonke umzimba, uya kuvakalisa ebantwini ukuba loo mntu akasenawo umlaza ngoku. Ukuba ulusu lwakhe luthe lwajika lwamhlophe, loo mntu uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:14 Kodwa ukuba kuthe kwavela isilonda, usuka kwangoko abe nomlaza." 
Leviticus13:15 Kufuneka aphinde umbingeleli amxilonge, aze athi akufumana isilonda, azise ukuba loo mntu ubuye wanomlaza. Isilonda sixela isifo solusu esosulelayo; umntu onaso ke unomlaza." 
Leviticus13:16 Xa sibuye saphola ke isilonda eso, lwaba mhlophe ulusu, loo mntu kufuneka aye kumbingeleli." 
Leviticus13:17 Umbingeleli uphinda amxilonge. Ukuba ke isilonda eso sikhe samhlophe, umlaza uphelile, umbingeleli kufuneka ukuba azise ukuba loo mntu uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:18 Xa kukho umntu obe nethumba, laza laphila," 
Leviticus13:19 kuze kuthi kamva kubekho indawo emhlophe ethe fuku, okanye kuvele indawo ebubomvu-bumhlophe kulaa ndawo ibe inethumba, loo mntu kufuneka aye kumbingeleli." 
Leviticus13:20 Umbingeleli womxilonga, kuthi ke ukuba loo ndawo idumbileyo inzulu kunolusu lwangaphandle, noboya bujike baba mhlophe, kufuneke ke ukuba umbingeleli azise ukuba loo mntu unomlaza. Laa nto iqale ngethumba sisifo solusu esosulelayo." 
Leviticus13:21 Kodwa xa athe umbingeleli wabona ukuba kuloo ndawo idumbileyo abujikanga baba mhlophe uboya, yaye ayinzulu kugqitha ulusu lwangaphandle, yaye irhawukile, womgcina bucala loo mntu iintsuku zibe sixhenxe." 
Leviticus13:22 Ukuba loo ndawo ithe yabhidla, umbingeleli wokwazisa ukuba loo mntu unomlaza, kuba unesifo esosulelayo." 
Leviticus13:23 Kodwa ukuba loo ndawo ihlala injengoko ibinjalo, ingabhidli nokubhidla, isisiva nje sethumba, uya kwazisa ukuba loo mntu akanamlaza, uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:24 Xa umntu ebetshile, size isilonda sivuthwe sibe nobubovu, singarhawuki," 
Leviticus13:25 kufuneka loo mntu axilongwe ngumbingeleli. Ukuba kufumaneka ukuba uboya bumhlophe, yaye nesilonda sibhidle saba nzulu kunolusu lwangaphandle, loo nto ivele ngokutsha, sisifo esosulelayo solusu. Makazise umbingeleli ukuba loo mntu unomlaza." 
Leviticus13:26 Kambe ke xa uboya bungajikanga baba mhlophe, nesilonda singenzulu kunolusu lwangaphandle, yaye sirhawukile, loo mntu makagcinwe bucala iintsuku zibe sixhenxe." 
Leviticus13:27 Ngomhla wesixhenxe umbingeleli wobuya amxilonge, kuthi ke ukuba siyabhidla isilonda, kube ke loo mntu uneso sifo solusu soyikekayo, aze ke umbingeleli azise ukuba loo mntu unesifo esibangela umlaza." 
Leviticus13:28 Kodwa ukuba eso silonda asibhidlanga, sihleli sinjengoko besinjalo, yaye sirhawukile, ayisiso ke isifo solusu esosulelayo. Umbingeleli uya kwazisa ukuba loo mntu akanamlaza; into anayo sisilonda nje esenziwe kukutsha." 
Leviticus13:29 Ukuba kukho indoda nokuba ngumfazi othe wanesilonda entloko okanye esilevini," 
Leviticus13:30 eso silonda masixilongwe ngumbingeleli. Ukuba eso silonda sinzulu kunolusu lwangaphandle, yaye noboya bujike baba mhlophe-bumthubi, eso silonda sibangwa sisifo solusu esosulelayo. Loo mntu ke kuya kwaziswa ukuba unomlaza." 
Leviticus13:31 Xa kuthe akuxilongwa kwafunyanwa isilonda eso singenzulu kunolusu lwangaphandle, kodwa bona uboya bube bujikile ibala, kuya kufuneka agcinwe bucala iintsuku zibe sixhenxe." 
Leviticus13:32 Wobuya asixilonge ke eso silonda umbingeleli ngosuku lwesixhenxe, kuthi ke ukuba asibhidlanga, noboya bungajikanga ibala, yaye singenzulu kunolusu lwangaphandle," 
Leviticus13:33 loo mntu kufuneka achebe ashiye loo ndawo inesilonda. Aze ke umbingeleli aphinde amgcine bucala ezinye iintsuku ezisixhenxe. 
Leviticus13:34 Wobuya amxilonge ngosuku lwesixhenxe, sithi ke ukuba asibhidlanga isilonda, singenzulu kunolusu lwangaphandle, azise ke umbingeleli ukuba loo mntu uhlambulukile, akanamlaza. Loo mntu kufuneka ahlambe izambatho zakhe, ukuze ahlambuluke." 
Leviticus13:35 Xa sibhidla isilonda emva kokuba kuthiwe akanamlaza," 
Leviticus13:36 umbingeleli wobuya amxilonge. Xa sibhidlile isilonda akukho mfuneko yakukhangela ukuba ngaba noboya bujikile na; kucacile ukuba loo mntu unawo umlaza. 
Leviticus13:37 Xa umbingeleli ebone ukuba asibhidli isilonda, yaye noboya abujikanga bala, nesilonda sirhawukile, uya kwazisa ukuba loo mntu akanawo umlaza." 
Leviticus13:38 Xa kukho indoda nokuba ngumfazi onamaqhakuva amhlophe emzimbeni," 
Leviticus13:39 umbingeleli makamxilonge loo mntu. Ukuba loo maqhakuva akacacanga, olo lurhatshalala nje oluvelileyo; loo mntu akanawo umlaza." 
Leviticus13:40 Ukuba umntu ukhuthuke iinwele enqentsu, okanye ebunzi, asingomlaza loo nto." 
Leviticus13:41  
Leviticus13:42 Kodwa ukuba kuloo ndawo ikhuthukileyo kuvele isilonda esinobubovu, loo nto sisifo esoyikekayo solusu." 
Leviticus13:43 Umbingeleli akuba emxilongile, abone ulusu lufukukile, lunobubovu," 
Leviticus13:44 kufuneka azise ukuba loo mntu unesifo esosulelayo esisentloko, ngoko ke unomlaza." 
Leviticus13:45 Umntu onaso esi sifo sosulelayo solusu kufuneka anxibe iimpahla ezidlakadlaka, angazichazi iinwele, aze azigqume ubuso obungezantsi, ahambe ekhwaza esithi: “Ndinomlaza! Ndinomlaza!”" 
Leviticus13:46 Uhlala enomlaza wonke lo gama asagula seso sifo, yaye kufuneka ahlale ngaphandle kwelali, kude nabanye abantu." 
Leviticus13:47 Xa impahla yoboya nokuba yilinen," 
Leviticus13:48 okanye ilaphu loboya nokuba yilinen, nokuba lithwathwa okanye into eyenziwe ngethwathwa," 
Leviticus13:49 ithe yanyepha yaba luhlaza okanye sabubomvu, inomngundane loo nto, mayiboniswe umbingeleli." 
Leviticus13:50 Umbingeleli woyiphicotha, aze ayibeke bucala iintsuku ezisixhenxe." 
Leviticus13:51 Wobuya ayijonge ngosuku lwesixhenxe, kuthi ke ukuba kuye kwanwenwa ukungunda, athi loo nto inomlaza." 
Leviticus13:52 Woyitshisa ke umbingeleli, nokuba yeyiphi kwezi zinto zikhankanyiweyo, kuba kaloku isasaza ukungunda omakutshatyalaliswe." 
Leviticus13:53 Xa kubonakala ukuba umngundane awunwenwanga kuloo nto," 
Leviticus13:54 umbingeleli uya kuthi mayihlanjwe, ize ibekwe bucala iintsuku ezisixhenxe." 
Leviticus13:55 Kuya kuthi ke xa ngaba ukungunda akuphelanga naxa kunganwenwanga, loo nto inomlaza kufuneka itshiswe nokuba ingunde ngaphandle okanye ngaphakathi." 
Leviticus13:56 Xa athe akuyijonga umbingeleli wafika umngundane uthothile, wowukrazula awususe kuloo nto, nokuba lilaphu, nokuba lithwathwa." 
Leviticus13:57 Xa kuphinde kwavela ukungunda, umnini-nto makayitshise, kuba kuza kwanda umngundane." 
Leviticus13:58 Xa athe wayihlamba loo nto, kwaza kwaphela ukungunda, makaphinde ayihlambe, ukuze ingabi namlaza." 
Leviticus13:59 Nantso ke inkqubo ngokuphathelele empahleni engundileyo, nokuba yeyoboya, nokuba yeyelinen, nokuba yinto eyenziwe ngethwathwa." 
Leviticus14:1 *UNdikhoyo wanika uMosis le nkqubo 
Leviticus14:2 yokususwa *komlaza kumntu ophilileyo obesakuba nesifo esosulelayo solusu. Kuya kuthi ngomhla okuza kwaziswa ngawo ukuba akasenamlaza kufuneke adibane nombingeleli loo mntu. 
Leviticus14:3 Yena ke umbingeleli wophumela ngaphandle kwelali, apho aya kuthi amxilonge khona. Xa isifo siphelile," 
Leviticus14:4 umbingeleli uya kuthi makuziswe iintaka ezimbini ezityiwayo, kunye neceba lomthi womsedare, negqesha elibomvu, kwakunye nehlamvu lengcongolo ekuthiwa yihisopu." 
Leviticus14:5 Andule ke umbingeleli athi mayibulawe enye intaka, yophiselwe engqayini enamanzi asand' ukukhiwa emthonjeni." 
Leviticus14:6 Enye intaka le woyithatha ayithi nkxu egazini lale ifileyo, alenjenjalo neceba lomsedare, igqesha elibomvu, kunye nehlamvu elo lehisopu." 
Leviticus14:7 Emva koko womfefa kasixhenxe ngelo gazi loo mntu uphilileyo, andule ke azise ukuba akasenamlaza ngoku. Le ihleliyo intaka yona wophuma nayo elalini, ayiyeke ibhabhe imke." 
Leviticus14:8 Loo mntu ke kufuneka ahlambe impahla yakhe, achebe iinwele, ahlambe nomzimba, aze ke abe uhlambulukile. Angangena ngoku ngaphakathi kwelali, kodwa kufuneka angangeni endlwini yakhe kude kuphele iintsuku ezisixhenxe." 
Leviticus14:9 Wobuya azichebe iinwele kwakhona ngomhla wesixhenxe, achebe neendevu, neentshiya; bonke uboya obusemzimbeni abuchebe nabo, aphinde ahlambe impahla yakhe, ahlambe nomzimba, aze ke emva koko abe akanawo tu umlaza." 
Leviticus14:10 Ngosuku lwesibhozo kufuneka eze neenkunzi ezimbini zeegusha ezinonyaka omnye kwakunye nemazi yegusha enonyaka, zingabi nasiphako, aphathe kunye neekhilogram ezintathu zomgubo wengqolowa oxutywe namafutha omnquma, athathe namafutha anganeno kwesiqingatha selitha." 
Leviticus14:11 Umbingeleli owazisa ukuhlambuluka kwaloo mntu womsondeza naloo minikelo yakhe ekungeneni *kwesibingelelo phambi koNdikhoyo; 
Leviticus14:12 andule ke umbingeleli athathe enye inkunzi yegusha kunye nalaa mafutha anganeno kwesiqingatha selitha, enze ngazo idini lentlawulo. Wozinikela kuNdikhoyo zibe ngumnikelo owanga-wangiswayo." 
Leviticus14:13 Le nkunzi yegusha enonyaka woyinqumlela kulaa ndawo ikhethekileyo kuxhelelwa kuyo izinto zokwenza amadini okucamagushela isono natshiswayo. Kufuneka enjenjalo, kuba kaloku idini lentlawulo lidini elilodwa, elisisabelo sombingeleli, njengoko linjalo idini lokucamagushela isono." 
Leviticus14:14 Ngoku ke umbingeleli uthi nkxu umnwe egazini, aze atyikile ngalo indlebe yaloo mntu yasekunene, ubhontsi wasekunene, nosithupha wasekunene;" 
Leviticus14:15 abuye athathe inxenye yaloo mafutha, ayigalele esandleni sasekhohlo," 
Leviticus14:16 athi nkxu umnwe wesandla sokunene kuloo mafutha, aze afefe ngawo phambi koNdikhoyo kasixhenxe;" 
Leviticus14:17 ze aphinde acuntsule intwana kwakuloo mafutha asesandleni, atyikile eziya ndawo ebedyobhe igazi kuzo: indlebe yaloo mntu yasekunene, nobhontsi wasekunene, kwakunye nosithupha wasekunene." 
Leviticus14:18 Amafutha asele esandleni sakhe kufuneka athambise ngawo intloko yaloo mntu uhlanjwa umlaza. Uya kwenjenjalo ke umbingeleli ukucamagushela loo mntu. 
Leviticus14:19 Emva koko ke umbingeleli kufuneka anikele idini lokucamagushela isono, ukungxengxezela loo mntu unomlaza. Uya kwandula ke anqumle into yokwenza idini elitshiswayo," 
Leviticus14:20 aze ayinikele eqongeni kunye nomnikelo wokutya. Wokwenjenjalo ke umbingeleli xa ecamagushela umntu; abe ke loo mntu uhlambulukile. 
Leviticus14:21 Xa ngaba loo mntu ulihlwempu, yaye engenako ukwenza ngenye indlela, kufuneka eze nenkunzi yegusha yokwenza idini lentlawulelo. Eli lidini eliwanga-wangiswa phambi koNdikhoyo ukucamagushela umntu lowo. Kufuneka aphathe nekhilogram enye yomgubo wengqolowa oxutywe namafutha omnquma aza kuba ngumnikelo wokutya, kwakunye namafutha omnquma anganeno kwesiqingatha selitha." 
Leviticus14:22 Kufuneka kwakhona eze namahobe amabini okanye amavukuthu amabini. Elinye loba leledini lokucamagushela isono, elinye libe leledini elitshiswayo." 
Leviticus14:23 Uya kuza nazo ezi zinto ngomhla wesibhozo kumbingeleli, umhla wokuhlanjululwa kwakhe, ekungeneni kwesibingelelo phambi koNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus14:24 Umbingeleli wothatha igusha yedini lentlawulelo, kunye namafutha omnquma, aziwanga-wangise phambi koNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus14:25 Kufuneka ayinqumle igusha leyo, aze athi ngentwana yegazi layo atyikile indlebe yasekunene yaloo mntu, nobhontsi wasekunene, kunye nosithupha wasekunene," 
Leviticus14:26 aze agalele intwana yamafutha esandleni sakhe sasekhohlo," 
Leviticus14:27 athi nkxu kuwo umnwe wesandla sakhe sokunene, aze afefe isibingelelo ngalo kasixhenxe," 
Leviticus14:28 andule atyikile ngamafutha eziya ndawo ebedyobhe igazi kuzo: indlebe yasekunene, ubhontsi wasekunene, nosithupha wasekunene." 
Leviticus14:29 La mafutha asele esandleni sakhe sasekhohlo umbingeleli kufuneka athambise ngawo intloko yaloo mntu uhlanjwa umlaza, aze ke abe ucanyagushelwe phambi koNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus14:30 Emva koko wenza idini lokucamagushela isono ngelinye lamahobe okanye amavukuthu, aze ngelinye enze idini elitshiswayo, athathe nokutya oku. Uya kwenjenjalo ke ukumcamagushela kuNdikhoyo umntu onomlaza." 
Leviticus14:31  
Leviticus14:32 Yiyo ke leyo inkqubo malunga nomntu obesakuba nesifo solusu esosulelayo kodwa abe engenandlela yokufikelela kwiminikelo eqhelekileyo. 
Leviticus14:33 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis noAron: 
Leviticus14:34 “Nakufika kwilizwe laseKanana endininika lona ukuba nime kulo, ze nenjeje mayela nezindlu ezinomngundane: Ukuba kuvele umngundane endlwini ethile kwelo lizwe" 
Leviticus14:35 umnini-ndlu kufuneka aye kubika kumbingeleli esithi: ‘Ndibhaqe into engathi ngumngundane endlwini yam.’ 
Leviticus14:36 Uya kuthi umbingeleli makukhutshwe yonke impahla esendlwini, ngaphambi kokuba aye kuhlola ukungunda oko kusendlwini; kungenjalo yonke into ekuloo ndlu uya kuthi *inomlaza. Uya kuya ke endlwini apho," 
Leviticus14:37 afike ahlole ukungunda oko. Xa kukho amachaphaza abuluhlaza okanye abubomvu athe gongqo eludongeni," 
Leviticus14:38 wophuma kuloo ndlu, aze ayitshixe ithuba leentsuku ezisixhenxe." 
Leviticus14:39 Ngolwesixhenxe usuku wobuya abuye umbingeleli, aze kuyihlola kwakhona loo ndlu. Xa ukungunda kunwenwile," 
Leviticus14:40 umbingeleli uya kuthi loo matye angundileyo makakhutshwe aphoswe ngaphandle kwelali kwindawo yenkunkuma," 
Leviticus14:41 emva koko athi makuxotyulwe udaka eludongeni lwangaphakathi, luye kulahlwa ngaphandle kwelali kwindawo yenkunkuma." 
Leviticus14:42 Endaweni yalawa matye akhutshiweyo kofakwa amanye amatsha, kutyatyekwe nangodaka olutsha." 
Leviticus14:43 “Xa ukungunda kuphinde kwavela, naxa indlu leyo ibe ikhutshwe loo matye ebengundile yaza yatyatyekwa kutsha," 
Leviticus14:44 kufuneka aye kuyihlola kwakhona umbingeleli. Ukuba ukungunda kuye kwanwenwa, loo ndlu inomlaza." 
Leviticus14:45 Kufuneka ke ichithwe, aze amatye ayo, naloo maplanga, kunye nodaka, aye kulahlwa ngaphandle kwelali kwindawo yenkunkuma." 
Leviticus14:46 Umntu othe wangena kuloo ndlu lo gama itshixiweyo woba nomlaza kude kutshone ilanga. 
Leviticus14:47 Umntu othe walala kuyo, okanye watyela apho kuyo, kufuneka ahlambe impahla yakhe." 
Leviticus14:48 “Xa athe weza kuyihlola loo ndlu umbingeleli emva kokuba ihlaziyiwe, waza akabona kungunda kukhoyo, uya kuthi loo ndlu ayisenawo umlaza, kuba kaloku umngundane uphelile." 
Leviticus14:49 Ukuhlambulula le ndlu kufuneka athathe iintaka ezimbini, kunye neceba lomsedare, negqesha elibomvu, kunye nehlamvu lengcongolo ekuthiwa yihisopu." 
Leviticus14:50 Enye intaka uya kuyophisela engqayini enamanzi asand' ukukhiwa emthonjeni," 
Leviticus14:51 aze athathe elaa ceba lomsedare, nehlamvu lehisopu, negqesha elibomvu, kunye nalaa ntaka ihleliyo, azithi nkxu egazini laleya ntaka yophiselwe kulaa manzi asand' ukukhiwa, aze ke afefe loo ndlu kasixhenxe ngazo." 
Leviticus14:52 Uya kwenjenjalo ke umbingeleli ukuyisusa umlaza loo ndlu ngegazi lentaka, ngamanzi asand' ukukhiwa, ngentaka ehleliyo, nangeceba lomsedare, nehlamvu lehisopu, kwakunye negqesha elibomvu." 
Leviticus14:53 Loo ntaka ihleliyo makaphume nayo elalini ayiyeke ibhabhe imke. Wenjenjalo ke ukususa umlaza obukuloo ndlu, ukuze ihlambuluke.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Yonke le nquleqhu ingesifo esosulelayo solusu," 
Leviticus14:55 izilonda, amathumba, ukudumba, nokungunda kwezindlu nempahla." 
Leviticus14:56  
Leviticus14:57 Le nkqubo icalula phakathi kwento enomlaza nento engenawo. 
Leviticus15:1 *UNdikhoyo wabhekisa kuMosis nakuAron wathi 
Leviticus15:2 maze baxelele amaSirayeli ukuba xa kukho indoda evuza ububovu ngamaphambili, loo nto yenza *umlaza," 
Leviticus15:3 nokuba ukuvuza oko kuhlala kukho, okanye kumana kunqamka." 
Leviticus15:4 Umandlalo ethi ihlale okanye ilale phezu kwawo, nawo uyasuleleka ngumlaza." 
Leviticus15:5 Kanti ke nomntu othi achukumise loo mandlalo, okanye ahlale phezu kwento ebikhe yahlala phezu kwayo loo ndoda, kufuneka ahlambe impahla yakhe, azihlambe umzimba. Wohlala enomlaza kude kutshone ilanga." 
Leviticus15:6  
Leviticus15:7 Umntu othi ayichukumise loo ndoda naye kufuneka ahlambe impahla yakhe, azihlambe nomzimba, yaye uya kuhlala enomlaza kude kutshone ilanga." 
Leviticus15:8 Ukuba ithe yatshicela umntu loo ndoda ivuzayo, loo mntu yena kufuneka ahlambe impahla yakhe, ahlambe nomzimba, yaye uya kuba nomlaza de kutshone ilanga." 
Leviticus15:9 Isali nokuba sisihlalo ethi loo ndoda inomlaza ihlale kuso, iyasuleleka ngumlaza." 
Leviticus15:10 Umntu othe wachukumisa nantoni na ebithe yahlala phezu kwayo loo ndoda inomlaza, naye uyasuleleka de kutshone ilanga. Umntu othe waphatha into ebekuhleli kuyo loo ndoda kufuneka yena ahlambe impahla yakhe, ahlambe nomzimba, yaye usulelekile naye kude kutshone ilanga." 
Leviticus15:11 Xa laa ndoda inomlaza ithe yabamba umntu ingazihlambanga izandla zayo, loo mntu yena usulelekile. Kufuneka ahlambe impahla, ahlambe nomzimba. Wohlala enomlaza naye kude kutshone ilanga." 
Leviticus15:12 Kufuneka iqhekezwe ingqayi ethe yaphathwa nguloo mfo uvuzayo, size sona isitya esenziwe ngomthi sihlanjwe." 
Leviticus15:13 Yakuba le ndoda iphilile, kufuneka ilinde iintsuku zibe sixhenxe, yandule ke ukuya kuhlamba impahla, ize ihlambe nomzimba kumanzi abalekayo, ukuze usuke umlaza." 
Leviticus15:14 Ngosuku lwesibhozo kufuneka ise kumbingeleli amahobe amabini okanye amavukuthu ngasesangweni *lesibingelelo phambi koNdikhoyo. 
Leviticus15:15 Umbingeleli ke yena wonikela elinye libe lidini lesono, lize elinye libe lidini elitshiswayo. Uya kwenjenjalo ke ukucamagushela loo mntu." 
Leviticus15:16 Xa kukho indoda ethe yazingcolisa ngobudoda, kufuneka ihlambe umzimba. Yohlala inomlaza kude kutshone ilanga." 
Leviticus15:17 Impahla ethe yathontsizelwa yangcola, nokuba yeyesikhumba, kufuneka ihlanjwe, yaye yohlala inomlaza kude kutshone ilanga." 
Leviticus15:18 Xa indoda nomfazi bethe bahlangana, kufuneka bahlambe umzimba emva koko, yaye boba nomlaza kude kutshone ilanga." 
Leviticus15:19 Umntu obhinqileyo xa athe waba sexesheni uba nomlaza iintsuku ezisixhenxe; umntu othi amchukumise naye uyasuleleka de kutshone ilanga. 
Leviticus15:20 Nantoni na athi ahlale okanye alale phezu kwayo lo gama asexesheni nayo iyasuleleka ngumlaza. 
Leviticus15:21 Umntu ochukumisa umandlalo waloo mfazi, okanye into athe wahlala phezu kwayo, uyasuleleka ngumlaza kude kutshone ilanga, yaye kufuneka ahlambe impahla yakhe, ahlambe nomzimba." 
Leviticus15:22  
Leviticus15:23  
Leviticus15:24 Xa kukho indoda ethe yahlangana naye lo gama asexesheni nayo iyasuleleka ngumlaza. Yoba nawo de kube ziintsuku ezisixhenxe; yaye nomandlalo ethi ingqengqe kuwo uba nomlaza nawo. 
Leviticus15:25 Xa kukho umntu obhinqileyo ohlambayo naxa engekho exesheni lokwenza loo nto, okanye ohlamba naxa seligqithile ixesha lakhe, uba nomlaza ngaye wonke lo gama asahlambayo, kanye njengoko kuba njalo xa esexesheni." 
Leviticus15:26 Ngalo lonke ke elo xesha umandlalo alala kuwo, kwanento athi ahlale kuyo, iba nomlaza." 
Leviticus15:27 Umntu othi achukumise ezo zinto uyasuleleka, yaye kufuneka ahlambe impahla yakhe kwakunye nomzimba. Uba nomlaza de kutshone ilanga." 
Leviticus15:28 Akupheza ukuhlamba kufuneka loo mfazi alinde iintsuku zibe sixhenxe, aze ke ahlambuluke." 
Leviticus15:29 Ngosuku lwesibhozo kufuneka ase kumbingeleli amahobe amabini, okanye amavukuthu, ngasesangweni lesibingelelo." 
Leviticus15:30 Umbingeleli wonikela elinye libe lidini lesono, lize elinye libe lidini elitshiswayo. Yiyo ke leyo indlela yokumcamagushela phambi koNdikhoyo umfazi okuloo meko." 
Leviticus15:31 UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Wakhwebule amaSirayeli kwiimeko ezibangela umlaza, ukuze angasixabheli isibingelelo sam esisembindini welali, hleze afe.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Nguwo lowo ke umyalelo mayelana nendoda evuza ububovu, okanye ethe yazingcolisa ngobudoda," 
Leviticus15:33 kwakunye nomntu obhinqileyo osexesheni, okanye indoda ethe yahlangana nomfazi onomlaza, kwakunye nabani na ovuza ububovu." 
Leviticus16:1 Emva kokufa koonyana baka-Aron bobabini, abafa ngenxa yokwenzela *uNdikhoyo umlilo ongekho esikweni," 
Leviticus16:2 uNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Yithi kumntakwenu uAron makangafan' angene nje emva komkhusane kwelona gumbi lingcwele, kuba kulapho ndibonakala khona elifini ngaphezu kwesivalo sokucamagushela setyesi yomnqophiso. Ukuba uyenzile loo nto uya kufa." 
Leviticus16:3 Angangena kwelona gumbi lingcwele kuphela xa eza nenkunzana yenkomo yedini lesono kunye nenkunzi yegusha yedini elitshiswayo.” 
Leviticus16:4 Wathi uNdikhoyo uAron aze enze ezi zinto: UAron ngaphambi kokuba angene kwelona gumbi lingcwele kufuneka ahlambe umzimba, afake izivatho ezizodwa zobubingeleli: ihempe yelinen yangapantsi, ibhulukhwe emfutshane, umbhinqo esinqeni, aze athwale iqhiya." 
Leviticus16:5 Ibandla lakwaSirayeli lilonke lonikela uAron iinkunzi zeebhokhwe zibe mbini zokwenza idini lesono, kunye nenkunzi yegusha yedini elitshiswayo." 
Leviticus16:6 Uya kunikela ngenkunzi yenkomo yokungxengxezela izono zakhe kwakunye nomzi wakhe," 
Leviticus16:7 andule ke asondeze ezaa bhokhwe zimbini ngasesangweni *lesibingelelo phambi koNdikhoyo. 
Leviticus16:8 Khona apho ke uya kwenza *iqashiso ngamatye amabini, elinye ilitye libhalwe kuthiwe “ibhokhwe kaNdikhoyo” elinye “ibhokhwe ethwaliswa izono.”" 
Leviticus16:9 Iya kuthi ke loo bhokhwe ichongwe ngeqashiso ukuba yekaNdikhoyo uAron enze ngayo idini lokucamagushela isono," 
Leviticus16:10 ithi leya iyibhokhwe ethwaliswa izono isondezwe kuNdikhoyo ihleli, ibe sisicamagushelo ngokuthi ikhatshelelwe entlango ithwele izono zesizwe." 
Leviticus16:11 UAron uya kuza nenkunzi yenkomo yokucamagushela isono sakhe kunye nesomzi wakhe, aze ayixhele." 
Leviticus16:12 Uya kukha amalahle avuthayo ngomcephe eqongeni eliphambi koNdikhoyo, aze athathe kangangezandla ezibini zentlaka yesiqhumiso ecoliweyo, angene nazo kwelona gumbi lingcwele." 
Leviticus16:13 Apho ke ngaphambi koNdikhoyo wogalela intlaka yesiqhumiso kuloo malahle, khon' ukuze umsi wesiqhumiso usigubungele isivalo setyesi enobungqina bomnqophiso, ukuze angayiboni, hleze afe akuyibona." 
Leviticus16:14 Uya kwandula ke athi nkxu umnwe wakhe egazini laloo nkunzi yenkomo exheliweyo, ze atshize ngalo umphambili wesivalo setyesi, aze athi tshize kasixhenxe nangaphambi kwetyesi yomnqophiso." 
Leviticus16:15 Akugqiba ke uya kuxhela laa bhokhwe yedini lokungxengxezela izono zesizwe, azise igazi layo ngaphakathi kwelona gumbi lingcwele, aze atshize ngalo isivalo nomphambili wetyesi yomnqophiso njengoko ebenzile ngegazi lenkunzi yenkomo." 
Leviticus16:16 Ngokwenjenje ke uyalicamagushela elona gumbi lingcwele ekuxajelweni *ngumlaza wamaSirayeli nazizono zokungeva kwawo. Kufuneka ayenze le nto nasesibingelelweni siphela, kuba kaloku simi kanye embindini welali esuleleke ngumlaza." 
Leviticus16:17 Ukususela ekungeneni kuka-Aron kwelona gumbi lingcwele ukuya kwenza inkonzo yokucamagushela, de abe uphumile, makungangeni namnye umntu esibingelelweni. Akugqiba ukuzicamagushela yena kunye nomzi wakhe kwakunye nebandla likaSirayeli liphela," 
Leviticus16:18 kufuneka aphume aye kucamagushela iqonga eliphambi koNdikhoyo. Makathathe igazi lalaa nkunzi yenkomo nelalaa bhokhwe, aye kutyikila ngalo iimpondo ezikwiikona zeqonga," 
Leviticus16:19 aze atshize ngelo gazi kasixhenxe apho eqongeni. Wokwenjenjalo ke ukulicamagushela iqonga lamadini kumlaza wamaSirayeli, alahlulele uNdikhoyo libe ngcwele." 
Leviticus16:20 Akugqiba uAron ukulicamagushela elona gumbi lingcwele, *nesibingelelo siphela, kunye neqonga, uya kusondeza *kuNdikhoyo laa bhokhwe ihleliyo ibichongelwe ukuthwaliswa izono." 
Leviticus16:21 Woyibeka izandla entloko, avume phezu kwayo bonke ububi obenziwe ngamaSirayeli, nokungeva kwawo, kunye nezono zawo zonke. Loo bhokhwe ithwaliswe zonke izono iya kukhatshelwa entlango ngumntu otyunjelwe loo nto." 
Leviticus16:22 Yozithwala zonke izono zabantu loo bhokhwe, iye nazo apho kungahlali mntu khona." 
Leviticus16:23 Uya kwandula ke ngoku uAron aye esibingelelweni, apho aya kufika akhulule izivatho zobubingeleli abezinxibe ngaphambi kokuba angene kwelona gumbi lingcwele, azishiye apho." 
Leviticus16:24 Uya kuhlamba umzimba endaweni ekhethekileyo, aze anxibe impahla yakhe eqhelekileyo. Emva koko uya kuphumela ngaphandle, anikele idini elitshiswayo lokucamagushela izono zakhe nelokucamagushela izono zesizwe." 
Leviticus16:25 Amanqatha edini lesono makawatshisele apho eqongeni. 
Leviticus16:26 Laa mntu ubeyikhaphele entlango ibhokhwe ethwaliswe izono kufuneka ahlambe impahla yakhe, ahlambe nomzimba, ngaphambi kokuba abuyele ngaphakathi kwelali." 
Leviticus16:27 Laa nkunzi yenkomo kunye nalaa bhokhwe yokwenza idini lesono, ezigazi lazo belingeniswe kwelona gumbi lingcwele ukuze ngalo kungxengxezelwe isono, kufuneka zona zikhutshelwe ngaphandle kwelali, zitshiswe apho. Ufele, inyama, kunye nezibilini, kufuneka kutshiswe konke." 
Leviticus16:28 Umntu otyunjelwe loo msebenzi wokuzitshisa kufuneka ahlambe impahla yakhe, ahlambe nomzimba, ngaphambi kokuba abuyele ngaphakathi kwelali." 
Leviticus16:29 Ezi zithethe kufuneka zigcinwe ngalo lonke ixesha: Ngosuku lweshumi kwinyanga yesixhenxe kufuneka amaSirayeli, kwakunye nabangeneleli abaphakathi kwawo, bazile, bangenzi namsebenzi." 
Leviticus16:30 Ngaloo mini makucanyagushwe, khon' ukuze bangabi nasono *kuNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus16:31 Loo mhla mawube yimini eyodwa abaya kuthi bazile ngayo, bangenzi nomsebenzi lo. Esi mayibe sisithethe esiya kusoloko sigcinwa ngalo lonke ixesha." 
Leviticus16:32 Ucamagusho kufuneka lwenziwe ngumbingeleli omkhulu omiselwe watyunjelwa ukungena endaweni kayise. Wovatha ezizodwa zobubingeleli," 
Leviticus16:33 aze ke alicamagushele elona gumbi lingcwele, *isibingelelo siphela, iqonga, ababingeleli, kwakunye nebandla lakwaSirayeli lilonke." 
Leviticus16:34 Masingaze sityeshelwe esi sithethe. Kanye ngonyaka amaSirayeli makacanyagushelwe. UMosis ke wenza njengoko wayeyalelwe nguNdikhoyo. 
Leviticus17:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi uMosis 
Leviticus17:2 makagqithisele le mimiselo kuAron nakoonyana bakhe nakumaSirayeli ephela: 
Leviticus17:3 UmSirayeli oxhela inkomo nokuba yigusha nokuba yibhokhwe, eyixhelela elalini okanye nakuyiphi na enye indawo, waphula umthetho xa loo nto angayenzeli ngasesangweni *lesibingelelo. Umntu ongawuthobelanga lo mmiselo wofana nomntu ophalaze igazi, yaye uya kusikwa kumaSirayeli." 
Leviticus17:4  
Leviticus17:5 Intsingiselo yalo mthetho kukuba amaSirayeli awazise kuNdikoyo loo madini ebekade ewaxhelela naphi na. Onke amadini makaziswe kumbingeleli ngasesangweni lesibingelelo, abe ngamadini obudlelane." 
Leviticus17:6 Umbingeleli uya kutshiza ngegazi elo kumacala onke eqonga ekungeneni kwesibingelelo, aze amanqatha awatshise enzele uNdikhoyo ivumba elimyoli." 
Leviticus17:7 AmaSirayeli makangaphindi anganyaniseki kuNdikhoyo ngokuxhelela naphi na, esenzela iindimoni amadini. Esi sithethe amaSirayeli makangaze asityeshele." 
Leviticus17:8 UmSirayeli okanye umngeneleli othe wenzela uNdikhoyo idini elitshiswayo, okanye naliphi na elinye idini," 
Leviticus17:9 ongalenzelanga uNdikhoyo ngasesangweni lesibingelelo, loo mntu kufuneka asikwe ebantwini bakaThixo." 
Leviticus17:10 UmSirayeli okanye umngeneleli othe watya inyama yento engophanga, *uNdikhoyo womfulathela, angabi nabudlelane naye." 
Leviticus17:11 Igazi bubomi bayo nayiphi na into ephilayo. Yiyo ke loo nto uNdikhoyo ayalela ukuba kungxengxezelwe ngalo izono zabantu eqongeni. Igazi libubomi, licamagushela izono." 
Leviticus17:12 Yiyo ke loo nto uNdikhoyo athe amaSirayeli nabangeneleli maze bangayityi inyama yento engophanga. 
Leviticus17:13 Xa kukho umSirayeli okanye umngeneleli othe wazingela wabamba inyamakazi okanye intaka etyiwayo, kufuneka igazi layo alivuzisele emhlabeni, aze aligqumelele ngomhlaba." 
Leviticus17:14 Kaloku igazi libubomi bayo yonke into ephilayo. Kungenxa yoko ke uNdikhoyo athe kumaSirayeli makangayityi inyama yento engophanga, yaye nabani na oyityayo uya kusikwa ebantwini bakaThixo." 
Leviticus17:15 UmSirayeli okanye umngeneleli othe watya inyama yento efileyo, okanye ebulewe ngamarhamncwa, kufuneka ahlambe iimpahla, ahlambe nomzimba, alinde kutshone ilanga, ukuze uphele *umlaza." 
Leviticus17:16 Ukuba akayenzi loo nto, aze aqonde ukuba isala-kutyelwa sibona ngolophu." 
Leviticus18:1 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis 
Leviticus18:2 ukuba axelele amaSirayeli athi: “Mna ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu. 
Leviticus18:3 Sanukulandela imikhwa yabantu baseJiputa, apho benifudula nihlala khona, okanye eyabantu baseKanana, apho ndinisa khona ngoku." 
Leviticus18:4 Yithobeleni imithetho yam, nenze oko ndiniyalela kona. Ewe, ndim Ndikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Leviticus18:5 Nize nihambe ngemimiselo nangemithetho endiza kuniwisela yona; xa niyithobela niya kuphila ngayo. Kutsho mna Ndikhoyo.” 
Leviticus18:6 UNdikhoyo ke wawisa le mithetho: “Makungabikho ndoda ihlangana nomntu ezalana naye. 
Leviticus18:7 Uze ungamhlazisi uyihlo ngokuhlangana nonyoko; linyala ukuhlangana nonyoko. 
Leviticus18:8 Uze ungahlazisi uyihlo ngokuhlangana naye nawuphi na kubafazi bakhe. 
Leviticus18:9 Ungaze uhlangane nodade wenu, nokuba yintombi kayihlo, nokuba yintombi kanyoko, nditsho nokuba ingakhulelanga kowenu." 
Leviticus18:10 Ungaze uhlangane nomzukulwana wakho; linyala elo. 
Leviticus18:11 Ungaze uhlangane nentombi yeqadi; ngudade wenu lowo. 
Leviticus18:12 Ungaze uhlangane nodade boyihlo 
Leviticus18:13 okanye unyokokazi. 
Leviticus18:14 Ungaze uhlangane nomka-yihlo-mncinci okanye kanyokolume. 
Leviticus18:15 Ungaze uhlangane nomolokazana wakho," 
Leviticus18:16 okanye umka-mntakwenu. 
Leviticus18:17 Ungaze uhlangane nentombi okanye umzukulwana womfazi owakha wahlangana naye; kaloku bayazalana naye. Into enjalo yintlondi. 
Leviticus18:18 Ungaze umenze umkakho udade bomkakho lo gama asaphilayo umkakho. 
Leviticus18:19 “Ungaze uhlangane nomfazi osexesheni, kuba ùya kuxabheleka ngokwenjenjalo." 
Leviticus18:20 Ungaze uhlangane nomfazi wenye indoda, kuba linyala loo nto." 
Leviticus18:21 Unganikezeli namnye umntwana wakho abe yinto yokwenzela *uMoleki idini, kuba loo nto inyelisa igama loThixo wakho. Nditsho mna Ndikhoyo." 
Leviticus18:22 Indoda mayingahlangani nenye indoda iyenze umfazi, kuba lisikizi elo." 
Leviticus18:23 Makungabikho ndoda okanye umfazi ohlangana nesilwanyana; loo ntlondi ilisikizi. 
Leviticus18:24 Ze ningazingcolisi ngezi ntlondi, kuba iintlanga zazixabhela ngenxa yezi zinto. Nditsho iintlanga ezazimi kulo mhlaba, ezi ngoku mna Ndikhoyo ndizikhuphayo kuwo ukuze kuhlale nina." 
Leviticus18:25 Iintlondi zazo zada zaxabhela nomhlaba lo, ngoku ke ndiwenze ukuba ubabukule abantu ababewumile." 
Leviticus18:26 Bawenza la manyala onke, baza balingcolisa elo zwe; ke nina maze niwatyeshele. Nditsho kuni nonke, maSirayeli kunye nabangeneleli, kufuneka le miyalelo yam niyigcine," 
Leviticus18:27  
Leviticus18:28 khon' ukuze ningawuxabheli loo mhlaba ude unibukule njengoko wazibukulayo iintlanga ebezihlala kuwo ngaphambi kwenu. 
Leviticus18:29 Yazini ukuba uyasikwa ebantwini bakaNdikhoyo nabani na owenza la masikizi.” 
Leviticus18:30 “Thobelani imiyalelo yam,” utsho uNdikhoyo, “ningalinganisi imikhwa yabantu ababehlala apha ngaphambi kwenu. Ze ningazixabheli ngokwenza la manyala. Kutsho mna kaloku, Ndikhoyo, uThixo wenu.”" 
Leviticus19:1 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis ukuba makathi kwibandla lilonke lakwaSirayeli: 
Leviticus19:2 “Yibani ngabantu abangcwele, kuba mna Ndikhoyo, Thixo wenu, ndingcwele." 
Leviticus19:3 Hlonelani uyihlo nonyoko, nize *noMhla wokuPhumla niwugcine ngokomyalelo wam. Kaloku ndim uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:4 “Nize ningandifulatheli niye kunqula izithixo; ningaziqingqeli imifanekiso. Kaloku mna Ndikhoyo ndinguThixo wenu. 
Leviticus19:5 “Xa nixhele into yokwenza idini lobudlelane, ze nenze ngokommiselo endaninika wona, ukuze ndilamkele elo dini." 
Leviticus19:6 Inyama yalo kufuneka ityiwe kanye ngalo mhla yawiswa ngawo loo nto yedini, kungenjalo ngomhla olandelayo. Ngomhla wesithathu yonke inyama eseleyo kufuneka itshiswe." 
Leviticus19:7 Kaloku *selinomlaza, yaye ukuba kukho bani uyityileyo loo nyama, akayi kwamkeleka yena." 
Leviticus19:8 Nabani na oyityileyo loo nyama wolizeka ityala. Kaloku uxabhele into eyahlulelwe mna. Loo mntu kufuneka asikwe kubantu bam. 
Leviticus19:9 “Xa nivuna ze ningayisiki ingqolowa esemaphethelweni amasimi, ningakhwahlazi xa senivunile." 
Leviticus19:10 Nasesidiliyeni ze ningakhwahlazi, newileyo ningayicholi. Ze niyiyekele amahlwempu kunye nabantu basemzini. Ndim kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:11 “Ze ningebi, okanye nenze amaqhinga, okanye nixoke." 
Leviticus19:12 Ungafungi ngegama lam uxoka. Ngokwenjenjalo unyelisa igama lam. Kaloku mna Ndikhoyo ndinguThixo wakho. 
Leviticus19:13 “Ungaze umqhathe ummelwane wakho okanye umenzele ubuqhophololo. Musa ukuwubamba umvuzo womntu omqeshileyo, nditsho nobusuku obunye obu." 
Leviticus19:14 Ungasithuki isithulu, okanye ubeke umqobo osisikhubekiso phambi kwemfama. Ndihlonele; kaloku ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
Leviticus19:15 “Nize nigwebe ngobulungisa xa nichophele amatyala. Ze ningawenzeleleli amahlwempu, okanye nibe nomkhethe ngakwizityebi." 
Leviticus19:16 Ningasasazi ulwimi ngabanye abantu, ningenzi nantoni na eya kubeka ubomi bomnye umntu esichengeni. Kaloku ndinguNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus19:17 “Nize ningabi nanqala mntwini. Mkhalimele umntu owonayo, hleze nawe ube netyala." 
Leviticus19:18 Ze ningaziphindezeli mntwini, okanye nimbambe isixhiba, koko nina mthandeni ummelwane wenu, kanye ngale ndlela nizithanda ngayo. Kutsho mna Ndikhoyo." 
Leviticus19:19 “Yithobeleni imimiselo yam. Ze ningazekisi izilwanyana ezingelohlobo lunye, ningahlwayeli ndidi zahlukileyo zembewu ntsimini-nye, ningazambathi iimpahla ezilukwe ngemisonto eendidi zahlukileyo." 
Leviticus19:20 “Ukuba indoda ithe yalala nekhobokazana esekuvunyelwene ngalo ukuba lithengiswe komnye, phofu lingekahlawulelwa, kufuneka bohlwaywe ngokulingene isenzo eso, kodwa bangàbulawa – kaloku ibiselikhobokazana." 
Leviticus19:21 Loo ndoda kufuneka izisele uNdikhoyo inkunzi yegusha esangweni *lesibingelelo, ibe lidini lentlawulo." 
Leviticus19:22 Uya kuthi ke umbingeleli enze ngayo idini longxengxezelo, aze ke loo mntu axolelwe isono sakhe nguNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus19:23 “Nakufika eKanana ze nithi xa nityala imithi niyithathe njengemithi *enomlaza kwiminyaka emithathu yokuqala. Ngelo xesha ke ze ningatyi nto kuyo. 
Leviticus19:24 Kunyaka wesine zonke iziqhamo mazinikelwe kum, mna Ndikhoyo, zibe ngumnikelo wombulelo." 
Leviticus19:25 Kodwa kowesihlanu unyaka ningazitya iziqhamo. Xa nenjenjalo sochuma ngakumbi isivuno. Kutsho mna Ndikhoyo, Thixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:26 “Ningatyi nyama inegazi. Ze ningavumisi, ningenzi naluphi na uhlobo lwemilingo." 
Leviticus19:27 Xa nizilela abangasekhoyo ze ningazichebi iinwele ezisemacaleni entloko, neendevu ningaziphunguli. Ze ningavambi, ningenzi ntlanga emzimbeni. Kutsho mna Ndikhoyo." 
Leviticus19:28  
Leviticus19:29 “Ningazingcolisi iintombi zenu ngokuzenza amahenyukazi. Xa nenjenjalo ilizwe loba lilizwe lobuhenyukazi, lize ke lizale yinkohlakalo." 
Leviticus19:30 Nina ze niyigcine *iMihla yam yokuPhumla, nisihlonele isibingelelo sam. Kutsho mna Ndikhoyo." 
Leviticus19:31 “Ningathathi ntonga niye kuvumisa kubantu abeva ngababhubhileyo. Xa nenza loo nto noba nezothe. Kutsho mna Ndikhoyo, Thixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:32 “Bahloneleni abantu abadala, nibanike imbeko, nimhlonele uThixo wenu – ndinguNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus19:33 “Ze ningabacinezeli abantu basemzini abahlala phakathi kwenu. 
Leviticus19:34 Baphatheni ngokufanayo nabayinzala, nibathande kanye ngale ndlela nizithanda ngayo nani. Kaloku nani benikhe nangabantu basemzini eJiputa. Nditsho ke mna Ndikhoyo, Thixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:35 “Ze ningaqhathi bani ngokusebenzisa imilinganiselo engeyiyo, nditsho eyobude nobunzima neyesixa." 
Leviticus19:36 Sebenzisani imilinganiselo engenankqatho, nokuba yeyobude, nokuba yeyobunzima, nokuba yeyenani. Nditsho mna Ndikhoyo Thixo endanikhuphayo eJiputa." 
Leviticus19:37 Yithobeleni yonke imimiselo yam nemithetho yam; kaloku ndinguNdikhoyo.” 
Leviticus20:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis 
Leviticus20:2 makathi kumaSirayeli: “Nabani na kuni, nokuba ngumntu wasemzini ohlala phakathi kwenu, othe wanikela ngomntwana wakhe ukuba kunqulwe ngaye uMoleki, loo mntu makaxulutywe ngamatye ngumzi uphela." 
Leviticus20:3 Loo mntu ndiya kumchasa, ndingabi sambalela ebantwini bam, kuba umntu onikezela ngomntwana wakhe kunqulo lukaMoleki uxabhele *isibingelelo sam walinyelisa negama lam elingcwele." 
Leviticus20:4 Xa ke umzi uthe awayihoya loo nto ayenzilyo loo mntu, uze ke ungàmbulali," 
Leviticus20:5 mna okokwam ndomsukela loo mntu, kunye nendlu yakhe, kwakunye nabo bonke abazibandakanya naye ekungathembekeni kum banqule uMoleki. Ndobasika kubantu bam abo bantu." 
Leviticus20:6 “Umntu oya kuvumisa kubantu abeva ngababhubhileyo ndomfulathela, angabi saba ngumntu wam." 
Leviticus20:7 Hlalani nizahlulele mna, nibe ngcwele, kuba kaloku ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Leviticus20:8 Imimiselo yam yithobeleni, kuba kaloku ndinguNdikhoyo, ndaye ndinebango ngani, ndim onenza nahluke." 
Leviticus20:9 “Wonke umntu othuke uyise nokuba ngunina makabulawe; kaloku nguye ngenkqu unobangela wokubulawa kwakhe. 
Leviticus20:10 “Indoda ethe yakrexeza nomfazi womwayo ongumSirayeli mayibulawe kunye naloo mfazi. 
Leviticus20:11 Indoda ethatha isondo komnye wabafazi bakayise ihlazisa uyise, yaye mayibulawe kunye naloo mfazi. Ngabo ngokwabo unobangela wokubulawa kwabo." 
Leviticus20:12 Indoda ethatha isondo kumolokazana wayo kufuneka ibulawe kunye naloo molokazana wayo. Benze inyala kaloku; ke ngabo ngenkqu unobangela wokufa kwabo. 
Leviticus20:13 Indoda elala nenye yenza inyala kunye naloo ndoda ilala nayo. Mababulawe bobabini; yaye ityala lokubulawa kwabo likubo. 
Leviticus20:14 Indoda ethathe umfazi, ize ithathe nonina waloo mfazi imenze umkayo, benze isikizi bobathathu, yaye kufuneka batshiswe bonke; into enjalo mayingenzeki phakathi kwenu." 
Leviticus20:15 Umntu owenza amanyala kunye nesilwanyana kufuneka abulawe kunye neso silwanyana. 
Leviticus20:16 Umfazi olinga ukwenza inyala lokulala nesilwanyana makabulawe kunye neso silwanyana. Lityala labo ukubulawa kwabo. 
Leviticus20:17 “Indoda ethatha udade wayo imenze umfazi, nokuba yintombi kayise okanye yintombi kanina, kufuneka yona naloo mfazi bagxothwe phakathi kwabemi bomzi. Kaloku imnyelisile udade wayo; ke inetyala." 
Leviticus20:18 Indoda ecela isondo kumfazi osexesheni kufuneka ikhutshelwe ngaphandle komzi kunye naloo mfazi; kaloku bobabini benze intlondi, *banomlaza." 
Leviticus20:19 “Indoda mayingaceli isondo kudade boyise okanye kudade bonina; yakwenjenjalo yenza inyala elingumbulo kunye naye; bobabini banetyala. 
Leviticus20:20 Indoda ethatha isondo kunina omncinci inyelisa uyise-mncinci, yaye yona kunye naloo mfazi kufuneka bohlwaywe; abakuba nanzala bobabini." 
Leviticus20:21 Indoda ethatha umka-mntakwayo yenza amanyala; ayiyi kuba nanzala, naloo mfazi akayi kuzala; baya kufa benjalo. Kaloku indoda leyo imnyelisile umntakwabo." 
Leviticus20:22 “Ze niyigcine imimiselo nemithetho yam,” waqhuba watsho uNdikhoyo, “khon' ukuze ilizwe laseKanana, endinisa kulo, linganibukuli." 
Leviticus20:23 Amasiko ezo ntlanga endiza kuzikhupha kwelo zwe, ze kungene nina, maze ningawathathi. Zinezothe kum ngenxa yemikhwa yazo." 
Leviticus20:24 Ke nina ndanithembisa lo mhlaba wazo ulinqatha, uchumayo, ukuba ndoninika wona niwume. Kaloku ndim Ndikhoyo uThixo wenu, ndaye ndinahlule kwezinye izizwe." 
Leviticus20:25 Kufuneka ke ngoko nicalule phakathi kweenyamakazi ezityiwayo nezingatyiwayo, naphakathi kweentaka ezityiwayo nezingatyiwayo. Ningazityi ezo zingatyiwayo. Kaloku ndithe azityiwa; ke xa nithe nazitya noba nomlaza." 
Leviticus20:26 Kufuneka nizahlulele mna, nibe ngabam ndedwa, kuba kaloku ndim Ndikhoyo uThixo wenu, ndaye mna ndahlukile. Ndanahlula kwezi ntlanga, ukuze nina nibe ngabam ndedwa." 
Leviticus20:27 Indoda nokuba ngumfazi ovumisa ngabantu ababhubhileyo kufuneka axulutywe ngamatye afe. Loo mntu wenza loo nto ufa ngetyala lakhe.” 
Leviticus21:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi uMosis makayale ababingeleli bomlibo ka-Aron, athi: “Maze kungabikho mbingeleli uzingcolisa ngokusondela kwizidumbu zezizalwana," 
Leviticus21:2 ngele kokuba loo mntu ubhubhileyo ngunina okanye nguyise, nokuba ngunyana wakhe okanye intombi yakhe, umntakwabo" 
Leviticus21:3 okanye udade wabo ongendanga ohlala naye. 
Leviticus21:4 Aze angazingcolisi ngezidumbu zezalamane zakhe ngomtshato. 
Leviticus21:5 “Makungabikho mbingeleli ucheba intloko, okanye aphungule iindevu, okanye avambe enze neentlanga emzimbeni, ebonakalisa ukuba uzilile." 
Leviticus21:6 Yena makazahlulele uThixo wakhe, angalihlazisi igama loThixo wakhe. Nguye lo mbingeleli kaloku umenzela amadini ngomlilo uNdikhoyo; makahluke ke." 
Leviticus21:7 Umbingeleli akayi kuyitshata intombi eyoniweyo, okanye ebilihenyukazi, okanye umfazi oqhawule umtshato, kuba kaloku yena wahlulelwe uThixo." 
Leviticus21:8 Mhloneleni kuba engumntu owahlukileyo; kuba kaloku yena unikela amadini kuThixo wenu. Kaloku ndinguNdikhoyo, ndaye mna ndahlukile, ndibahlulela mna abantu bam." 
Leviticus21:9 Xa intombi yombingeleli ithe yazingcolisa ngokuba lihenyukazi, ihlazisa uyise; kufuneka itshiswe ide ife." 
Leviticus21:10 “Umbingeleli omkhulu, lowo uthanjiswe ngokugalelwa ioyile yomnquma entloko waza wamiselwa ukunxiba izivatho zobubingeleli, kufuneka angaziyeki zibe dlakadlaka iinwele zakhe, okanye akrazule izambatho zakhe ebonisa ukuzila akwenzayo." 
Leviticus21:11 Makangangeni kwindawo enesidumbu, angazingcolisi, nditsho nokuba lo ungasekhoyo nguyise nokuba ngunina." 
Leviticus21:12 Makangaphumi *esibingelelweni sikaThixo wakhe okanye asixabhele, kuba wahlulelwe uThixo wakhe ngokuthanjiswa ngamafutha. Ndim uNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus21:13 Makatshate intombi epheleleyo," 
Leviticus21:14 ingabi ngumfazi ongumhlolokazi, okanye oqhawule umtshato, okanye owayehambisana namanye amadoda. Mayibe yintombi epheleleyo yamawabo." 
Leviticus21:15 Ngokwenjenjalo inzala yakhe ayikuba nazothe ebantwini bakhe. Kaloku ndinguNdikhoyo, yaye ndim ozahlulele yena ndamenza umbingeleli omkhulu.”" 
Leviticus21:16 Wathi uNdikhoyo uMosis 
Leviticus21:17 makayalele uAron, athi: “Maze kungabikho namnye kwinzala yakho onesiphako emzimbeni oya kusondeza umnikelo kuThixo. Loo nto iya kuhlala injalo lonke ixesha." 
Leviticus21:18 Makungabikho mntu unesiphako oya kusondeza iminikelo: makungabikho mfama, siqhwala, mntu ulimeleyo okanye usisilima," 
Leviticus21:19 namntu wome isandla okanye unyawo," 
Leviticus21:20 nokuba sisifombo, okanye unqaphele, nokuba unesifo samehlo okanye solusu, okanye etyumke ubudoda." 
Leviticus21:21 Akukho mntwana ka-Aron unesiphako uya kusondeza iminikelo eyenziwe ngomlilo kum Ndikhoyo. Kaloku unesiphako; makangasondeli anikele kuThixo wakhe. 
Leviticus21:22 Umntu onjalo angadla kambe kukutya okwahlulelwe mna, nditsho kanye nokuya kokona kukokwam," 
Leviticus21:23 kodwa ngenxa yesiphako anaso akufuneki asondele emkhusaneni okanye aye eqongeni. Akufuneki azixabhele ezi zinto zahlulelwe mna; kaloku ndinguNdikhoyo, ndim ozahlulelele zona.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Nantso ke into eyaxelelwa uAron noonyana bakhe kwakunye namaSirayeli ephela nguMosis. 
Leviticus22:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: 
Leviticus22:2 “Xelela uAron noonyana bakhe ukuba maze bayiphathe ngembeko iminikelo eyodwa eyahlulelwe mna ngamaSirayeli, bangalihlazisi igama lam elingcwele; kaloku mna ndinguNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus22:3 Xa kuthe kwakho omnye kumlibo wenu othe lo gama *anomlaza wachukumisa iminikelo eyodwa eyahlulelwe mna ngamaSirayeli, kufuneka loo mntu angaze abuye alungiselele phambi kwam. Lo myalelo mawuhlale unjalo ngalo lonke ixesha. Kutsho mna Ndikhoyo." 
Leviticus22:4 “Makungabikho namnye kwinzala ka-Aron othe, lo gama anesifo esisulelayo solusu okanye evuza ubovu, atye kwiminikelo eyahlulelwe mna de abe uhlanjululwe umlaza. Umbingeleli nawuphi na uba nomlaza xa athe wachukumisa nantoni na ethe yagudlana nesidumbu, okanye yena uzingcolise ngokuzichamela ngobudoda," 
Leviticus22:5 okanye uchukumise umntu nokuba sisilwanyana esinomlaza. 
Leviticus22:6 Loo mbingeleli uba nomlaza kude kutshone ilanga. Kanti ke akakabi nakutya nakuwuphi na kule minikelo iyodwa de abe uwuhlambile umzimba. 
Leviticus22:7 Lakuba ilanga litshonile uyahlambuluka; angandula ke ukutya kwiminikelo eyahlulelwe mna. Kukutya kwakhe oko kaloku. 
Leviticus22:8 Akufuneki ayitye inyama yento efileyo okanye ebulewe ngamarhamncwa. Yomenza umlaza loo nto. Kutsho mna Ndikhoyo. 
Leviticus22:9 “Bonke ababingeleli kufuneka baqhube ngale migaqo ndiyimisileyo. Kungenjalo boba netyala, baze bafe ngenxa yokudelela le miyalelo iyodwa. NdinguNdikhoyo kaloku, ndim ozahlulela bona." 
Leviticus22:10 “Kuphela ngumntu ophuma kumlibo wababingeleli onako ukutya kwiminikelo eyodwa. Akukho mntu wumbi unako ukutya, nditsho nkqu nohambele umbingeleli, nkqu nomntu osisicaka esiqeshiweyo ngumbingeleli." 
Leviticus22:11 Kanti ke wona amakhoboka awathengileyo, okanye azalelwe kwakhe, angakutya ukutya okufunyanwa ngumbingeleli." 
Leviticus22:12 Intombi yombingeleli eyendele kumntu ongenguye umbingeleli, nayo ayinakuba sakutya oko kutya." 
Leviticus22:13 Kanti ke yona intombi engumhlolokazi okanye ebuya ekwendeni ingenabantwana, ize kuhlala kowayo, ixhomekeke kuyise, ingakutya ukutya okuza noyise ongumbingeleli. Ngumntu onelungelo kuphela onako ukutya oko kutya." 
Leviticus22:14 “Xa kukho umntu ongenguye owomzi wombingeleli othe watya koku kutya kwababingeleli ngempazamo, kufuneka loo mntu ambuyisele umbingeleli ngokuzeleyo, ongeze ngomdliwo ngaphezulu. (Lo mdliwo woba sisinye esihlanwini.)" 
Leviticus22:15 Ababingeleli oku kutya kunikelwe kuNdikhoyo ngamaSirayeli maze bangakuxabheli 
Leviticus22:16 ngokukunika abantu abangenalo ilungelo lokukutya. Loo nto kaloku imenzela ityala loo mntu, imzisele nesohlwayo. NdinguNdikhoyo kaloku; ndim ozahlulele ababingeleli.”" 
Leviticus22:17 *UNdikhoyo wathi uMosis maze 
Leviticus22:18 athethe noAron noonyana bakhe nakumaSirayeli ephela, athi: “Xa umSirayeli, okanye umntu wasemzini ohlala kwaSirayeli, esondeza kuNdikhoyo idini elitshiswayo, nokuba lelesithembiso asenzileyo, okanye lingumnikelo awenza eqhutywa yintliziyo," 
Leviticus22:19 loo nto yokuxhelelwa idini kufuneka ingabi nasiphako. Ukuze loo nkomo, gusha okanye bhokhwe yokwenza idini yamkeleke, kufuneka ibe liduna, ingabi nasiphako." 
Leviticus22:20 Xa loo nto ithe yanesiphako, ayikwamkeleka." 
Leviticus22:21 Xa umntu esondeza kuNdikhoyo idini lobudlelane, ezalisekisa isithembiso asenzileyo, okanye lingumnikelo awenza eqhutywa yintliziyo, kufuneka loo nto yokuxhelelwa idini ingabi nasiphako, ukuze yamkeleke." 
Leviticus22:22 Ningaze ninikele kuNdikhoyo ngento etyhaphakileyo, okanye eqhwalelayo, okanye eyenzakeleyo, nokuba yenesilonda esibhidlayo, okanye amaqhakuva. Into enjalo ningaze niyisondeze eqongeni nenze ngayo idini elitshiswayo." 
Leviticus22:23 Umntu owenza idini ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo anganikela ngenkomo okanye igusha engakhulanga okanye engamilanga kakuhle, kodwa ayinakwamkeleka xa ngaba uyinikela ukuzalisekisa isithembiso asenzileyo." 
Leviticus22:24 Into emasende enzakeleyo nakanjani na ze ningamenzeli ngayo idini uNdikhoyo. Loo nto ayivumelekanga apha kweli lakowethu ilizwe. 
Leviticus22:25 Kwaye ningaze nenzele uNdikhoyo idini elityiwayo ngento elolu hlobo efunyenwe kumntu welinye ilizwe. Izinto ezinjalo zithathwa njengezinto ezinesiphako; azamkeleki.” 
Leviticus22:26 UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: 
Leviticus22:27 “Xa kuzelwe ithole nokuba litakane legusha nokuba lelebhokhwe, malingathathwa kunina kude kube ziintsuku ezisixhenxe; emva koko ke lamkelekile, kungenziwa idini ngalo ngomlilo." 
Leviticus22:28 Ningalenzi idini ngemazi yenkomo kunye nethole layo ngemini enye, nditsho negusha kunye netakane layo, nkqu nebhokhwe netakane layo." 
Leviticus22:29 Xa nenzela uNdikhoyo idini lombulelo ze nilenze ngohlobo lokuba lamkeleke; 
Leviticus22:30 ze nilitye liphele kwangaloo mini, ningashiyeli ingomso. Kutsho mna Ndikhoyo." 
Leviticus22:31 “Ewe, yithobeleni imiyalelo yam; kaloku ndinguNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus22:32 Ze ningalihlazisi igama lam elahlukileyo. AmaSirayeli ephela kufuneka aqonde ukuba mna ndahlukile. Kaloku ndinguNdikhoyo; ndim ozahlulela nina ukuze nibe ngcwele. 
Leviticus22:33 Kaloku ndanikhupha eJiputa, ukuze ndibe nguThixo wenu. Kutsho mna Ndikhoyo.”" 
Leviticus23:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis 
Leviticus23:2 makathethe namaSirayeli, athi: “Nantsi imisitho kaNdikhoyo emiselweyo emayaziswe ebantwini njengemibhiyozo yonqulo:" 
Leviticus23:3 Zintandathu iintsuku eningenza ngazo umsebenzi, kodwa ze nikhumbule ukuba umhla wesixhenxe wona ngowokuphumla. Ze ningasebenzi ngaloo mhla, koko ze nihlanganisane ninqule. *UMhla wokuPhumla wona wahlulelwe uNdikhoyo, nditsho nokuba nihlala phi na.”" 
Leviticus23:4 “Nantsi imisitho *kaNdikhoyo emiselweyo, imibhiyozo yonqulo emayipapashwe ebantwini ngamaxesha ayo:" 
Leviticus23:5 *IPasika kaNdikhoyo iqala ukutshona kwelanga ngomhla weshumi elinesine kwinyanga yokuqala. 
Leviticus23:6 Ngomhla weshumi elinesihlanu kuqala umsitho wezonka ezinganyuswanga. Kufuneka ningatyi isonka esinyuswe ngegwele kude kuphele iintsuku ezisixhenxe. 
Leviticus23:7 Ngosuku lokuqala kwezi ntsuku zisixhenxe kufuneka niqokelelane nize kunqula, ningakhe nenze msebenzi." 
Leviticus23:8 Ze nenze iminikelo yomlilo kuNdikhoyo ngezi ntsuku zisixhenxe, niphinde ngosuku lwesixhenxe nibe nombhiyozo wokunqula, ningasebenzi nokusebenza.”" 
Leviticus23:9 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis 
Leviticus23:10 makathi kumaSirayeli: “Xa senifikile kwelo zwe ndininika lona, nize ngexesha lokuvuna nizise kumbingeleli intlahlela yezithungu zengqolowa." 
Leviticus23:11 Yena ke woziwanga-wangisa phambi koNdikhoyo, khon' ukuze namkeleke kuye. Loo mnikelo umbingeleli kufuneka awenze ngomhla olandela *uMhla wokuPhumla." 
Leviticus23:12 Ngale mini niwanga-wangisa ngayo isithungu sengqolowa kufuneka nenze nedini elitshiswayo ngexhwane leduna elimnyaka mnye elingenasiphako. 
Leviticus23:13 Kufuneka nenze nomnikelo womgubo wengqolowa oxutywe neoyile yomnquma ube bunzima obuziikhilogram ezimbini. Ivumba lalo mnikelo liyamkholisa uNdikhoyo. Kufuneka ninikele newayini engangelitha enye, ibe ngumnikelo othululwayo." 
Leviticus23:14 Nize ningayityi ingqolowa esand' ukuvunwa, nokuba ikrwada, nokuba igcadiwe, nokuba sisonka esibhakiweyo, de kube lo mnikelo niwenzile. Lo mmiselo maze ugcinwe nazizizukulwana zenu ngalo lonke ixesha.”" 
Leviticus23:15 “Ze nibale iiveki zibe sixhenxe ukususela ngalaa mini ilandela *uMhla wokuPhumla ebeniwanga-wangisa phambi *koNdikhoyo ngawo izithungu zengqolowa. 
Leviticus23:16 Kuya kuthi ke ngomhla wamashumi amahlanu, umhla osemva koMhla wokuPhumla wesixhenxe, nizise kuNdikhoyo omnye umnikelo wolibo lwengqolowa." 
Leviticus23:17 Imizi ngemizi kufuneka ize nezonka ezibini zinikelwe kuNdikhoyo, zibe ngumnikelo owanga-wangiswayo. Isonka ngasinye kufuneka senziwe ngomgubo wengqolowa obunzima buziikhilogram ezimbini, sinyuswe ngegwele, size sinikelwe kuNdikhoyo njengolibo lwesivuno sengqolowa." 
Leviticus23:18 Ezi zonka ziya kukhatshwa ngamaxhwane asixhenxe amnyaka mnye akhutshwa ngumzi wakwaSirayeli, kwakunye nenkunzi yenkomo eselula, kunye neebhokhwe ezimbini, kungabikho nanye inesiphako kuzo. Zoba lidini elitshiswayo elihamba kunye neminikelo yengqolowa neyewayini. Ivumba lalo mnikelo liyamkholisa uNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus23:19 Makwenziwe idini lesono ngeduna lebhokhwe, kunye nedini lobudlelane ngamaxhwane amabini angamaduna amnyaka mnye." 
Leviticus23:20 Umbingeleli wosondeza isonka kunye namaxhwane amabini, zibe ngumnikelo owanga-wangiswa kuNdikhoyo. Le yiminikelo eyenzelwa uNdikhoyo ize yahlulelwe ababingeleli." 
Leviticus23:21 Ngale mini nize ningasebenzi, koko ze nipapashe umbhiyozo wonqulo. Lo mmiselo kufuneka ugcinwe nazizizukulwana zenu naphi na apho zihlala khona." 
Leviticus23:22 “Xa nivunayo nize ningafikeleli kumlimandlela, ningakhwahlazi nandawoni na emasimini. Ukukhwahlaza kuyekeleni amahlwempu nabantu basemzini. Kaloku ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu.”" 
Leviticus23:23 “Umhla wokuqala wenyanga yesixhenxe mawube ngumhla owodwa eniphumlayo ngawo; kufuneka nibe nombhiyozo wonqulo lakuhlokoma ixilongo. 
Leviticus23:24  
Leviticus23:25 Ze nenzele *uNdikhoyo umnikelo ngomlilo, ningaphathi msebenzi konke.”" 
Leviticus23:26 “Umhla weshumi kwinyanga yesixhenxe ngumhla wokungxengxezela izono zabantu. Ngaloo mini ze ningatyi nto konke; ze nibe nentlanganiso yonqulo, ninikele umnikelo *kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo." 
Leviticus23:27  
Leviticus23:28 Ningakhe nisebenze ngaloo mini; kaloku ngumhla wokucamagushela izono kuNdikhoyo uThixo wenu. 
Leviticus23:29 Umntu oya kuthi atye ngaloo mini uya kusikwa phakathi kwabantu bakaThixo. 
Leviticus23:30 Xa kukho othe wasebenza ngaloo mini mna Ndikhoyo ngokwam ndomcima igama. 
Leviticus23:31 Lo mmiselo maze ugcinwe nazizizukulwana zenu, nditsho naphi na apho zihlala khona." 
Leviticus23:32 Ukususela ukutshona kwelanga ngomhla wesithoba kude kutshone ilanga ngomhla weshumi lo mhla ze niwuthathe njengomhla owodwa wokuphumla, ekungayi kutyiwa nto ngawo konke.”" 
Leviticus23:33 “Umsitho wamaphempe uqala ngomhla weshumi elinesihlanu wenyanga yesixhenxe, uqhube kude kuphele iintsuku ezisixhenxe." 
Leviticus23:34  
Leviticus23:35 Ngosuku lokuqala lwezi ntsuku nize nibe nombhiyozo wonqulo, ningasebenzi konke." 
Leviticus23:36 Yonke le mihla isixhenxe ze ninikele *kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo, niphinde nibe nombhiyozo wonqulo ngosuku lwesibhozo, nenze nomnikelo ngomlilo. Lo mhla ngumbhiyozo, yaye kufuneka ningasebenzi konke. (" 
Leviticus23:37 “Yiyo ke le imisitho emiselweyo eniya kuthi ngayo nipapashe imibhiyozo yonqulo, nisondeze kuNdikhoyo iminikelo yomlilo, namadini atshiswayo, neminikelo eziinkozo, nayo iminikelo yewayini. Konke oku kuya kuthi kufuneke ngemini nganye." 
Leviticus23:38 Le misitho yongezelelwe *kwiMihla yokuPhumla eqhelekileyo, futhi nale minikelo ixeliweyo yongezelelwe kwiminikelo yenu yesiqhelo, enidla ngokuyenza ngenxa yesithembiso, okanye eniyinikela kuNdikhoyo ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo.)" 
Leviticus23:39 “Xa senivunile lo msitho wenzeni iintsuku zibe sixhenxe ukususela kumhla weshumi elinesihlanu wenyanga yesixhenxe. Usuku lokuqala kufuneka lube ngumhla owodwa eniphumla ngawo. 
Leviticus23:40 Ngaloo mini khethani ezona zihle iziqhamo emithini, niphathe amasundu namasebe ahlakahlaka, nize nenzele uThixo uNdikhoyo umbhiyozo." 
Leviticus23:41 Minyaka le ze nibhiyoze iintsuku zibe sixhenxe. Ngummiselo omaze ugcinwe nazizizukulwana zenu. 
Leviticus23:42 Kufuneka onke amaSirayeli ncam ahlale emaphempeni iintsuku zibe sixhenxe," 
Leviticus23:43 khon' ukuze zazi izizukulwana zenu ukuba uNdikhoyo wawahlalisa emaphempeni amaSirayeli ukuwakhupha kwakhe eJiputa. Nguye kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu.” 
Leviticus23:44 Wenjenjalo ke uMosis ukuxelela amaSirayeli imimiselo yokugcina imisitho kaNdikhoyo. 
Leviticus24:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: 
Leviticus24:2 “Gqithisela lo myalelo kumaSirayeli, uthi kufuneka azise ioyile yomnquma ecwengileyo, ize isetyenziswe kwizibane *zesibingelelo ekufuneka zisoloko zivutha." 
Leviticus24:3 Yonke imihla ukutshona kwelanga kufuneka uAron azikhanyise zivuthe kude kuse phaya phambi komkhusane welona gumbi lingcwele, elo linetyesi enobungqina bomnqophiso. Lo mmiselo kufuneka ugcinwe rhoqo nakwixesha elizayo." 
Leviticus24:4 UAron kufuneka azinonelele izibane ezikwisiphatho esenziwe ngegolide ecwengileyo, zihlale zivutha qho ngaphambi koNdikhoyo.”" 
Leviticus24:5 “Kufuneka kwenziwe izonka ezilishumi elinambini ngomgubo ocoliweyo wengqolowa obunzima buziikhilogram ezilishumi elinambini. 
Leviticus24:6 Ezo zonka mazidweliswe ngemiqolo emibini, zibe zithandathu kumqolo ngamnye, zibekwe phezu kwetafile eqatywe ngegolide ecwengileyo emi phambi *koNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus24:7 Makubekwe iinkozo zesiqhumiso kuludwe ngalunye zibe ngumnikelo wokutya okunikelwa kuNdikhoyo endaweni yezonka. 
Leviticus24:8 Ezi zonka kufuneka zibekwe phambi koNdikhoyo qho *ngeMihla yokuPhumla. Kufuneka awenze rhoqo amaSirayeli lo mmiselo nakumaxesha azayo. 
Leviticus24:9 Ezi zonka ziya kuba zezika-Aron noonyana bakhe. Kufuneka bazityele endaweni eyodwa, kuba kaloku sisabelo sababingeleli esithathwe kwiminikelo enikelwa kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Kwakukho mfo uthile oyise wayengumJiputa, unina yena engumSirayeli ogama lalinguShelomiti owayeyintombi kaDibri wesizwe sakwaDan. Lo mfo ke waxabana nomSirayeli. Emsindweni wakhe wanyelisa *noNdikhoyo ngesithuko, waza ke wasiwa kuMosis," 
Leviticus24:11  
Leviticus24:12 wagcinwa ngabalindi, kwaza kwalindelwa kuNdikhoyo ukuba avakalise ebantwini into emayenziwe ngaloo mfo." 
Leviticus24:13 Wathi uNdikhoyo kuMosis: 
Leviticus24:14 “Yikhuphele ngaphandle komzi laa ndoda, aze wonke ubani oyivileyo inyelisa abeke isandla sakhe entloko yayo. Emva koko ke umnyelisi lo makaxulutywe ngamatye libandla liphela, ade afe." 
Leviticus24:15 Uze ke uwaxelele amaSirayeli, uthi: ‘Nabani na onyelisa uThixo uya kuyaleka," 
Leviticus24:16 kuba uya kubulawa. Wonke ubani onyelisa uNdikhoyo, nokuba ngumSirayeli, nokuba ngumntu wasemzini omi kwaSirayeli, kufuneka axulutywe ngamatye libandla liphela.’" 
Leviticus24:17 “Wonke ubani obulala omnye umntu kufuneka abulawe naye. 
Leviticus24:18 Umntu obulele imfuyo yomnye umntu kufuneka ayivuse. 
Leviticus24:19 “Umntu owenzakalisa omnye umntu, nokuba umenza ntoni na, naye uya kwenziwa kwaloo nto." 
Leviticus24:20 Ukuba umaphule ithambo, naye uya kwaphulwa ithambo. Ukuba umtyhaphaze iliso, naye uya kutyhatshazwa iliso. Ukuba umaphule izinyo, nelakhe izinyo lokwaphulwa. Nokuba umenzakalisa njani na omnye umntu, naye uya kwenziwa kwaloo nto ayenze komnye." 
Leviticus24:21 Umntu obulele imfuyo yomnye kufuneka ayivuse. Kodwa umntu obulala omnye umntu kufuneka abulawe naye. 
Leviticus24:22 Le miyalelo iniquka nonke, nditsho umSirayeli nomntu wasemzini ophakathi kwamaSirayeli. Kaloku ndim uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu.”" 
Leviticus24:23 Akuba enjenjalo ke uMosis, amaSirayeli amkhuphela ngaphandle komzi umnyelisi lowo, amxuluba ngamatye wada wafa. Enjenjalo ke amaSirayeli ethobela uNdikhoyo ngokomlomo kaMosis." 
Leviticus25:1 *UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis entabeni yeSinayi wamyalela 
Leviticus25:2 ukuba makanike amaSirayeli le mimiselo, athi: “Xa senifikile kwelo lizwe nilinikwa nguNdikhoyo, nomhlaba ngokwawo mawube nethuba lokuphumla ukuhlonela uNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus25:3 Kwiminyaka emithandathu nohlwayela, nithene imidiliya, nivune nokuvuna." 
Leviticus25:4 Unyaka wesixhenxe ke wona mayibe ngunyaka wokuphumza umhlaba, unyaka owahlulelwe uNdikhoyo. Ngawo ke nize ningalimi, ningayitheni nemidiliya." 
Leviticus25:5 Ingqolowa ezikhulelayo ingahlwayelwanga nize ningayivuni, neediliya ezivela ingathenwanga imidiliya ningayivuni. Kaloku lo ngunyaka wokuphumza umhlaba." 
Leviticus25:6 “Nokuba anilimanga ngaloo nyaka, umhlaba wona wovelisa ukutya okwanele nina, namakhoboka enu, kunye nezicaka zenu, nabantu basemzini abaphakathi kwenu," 
Leviticus25:7 nemfuyo yenu, kwakunye nezilwanyana zasendle. Kungátyiwa ke konke ukutya okuvelayo.”" 
Leviticus25:8 Ze nibale iminyaka yokuphumza umhlaba ibe sixhenxe – oko kukuthi iminyaka esixhenxe niyiphinda-phinde kasixhenxe. Loo nto yenza amashumi amane anethoba leminyaka. 
Leviticus25:9 Kuya kuthi ke ngomhla weshumi wenyanga yesixhenxe, uMhla wokuCamagusha, nithume indoda ilityhutyhe lonke, ivuthela ixilongo." 
Leviticus25:10 Niya kuwahlula ngale ndlela ke unyaka wamashumi amahlanu, nivakalise inkululeko kulo lonke ilizwe kubo bonke abemi. Ngalo nyaka umntu ngamnye makabuyele kumhlaba wakowabo nakubantu bakowabo." 
Leviticus25:11 Ze ningahlwayeli emasimini, ningayivuni ingqolowa nediliya ezikhulelayo." 
Leviticus25:12 Lo nyaka wonke mawube ngunyaka owodwa wenkululeko. Nokha nje into ezihlumelayo kuphela. 
Leviticus25:13 “Ngalo nyaka wobuyiselo yonke imihlaba ebithengisiwe kufuneka ibuyiselwe kumniniyo wokuqala. 
Leviticus25:14 Ngoko ke xa nithengisela amanye amaSirayeli umhlaba, okanye nithenga umhlaba wawo, ze nigenzi maqhinga." 
Leviticus25:15 Ngoko ke ixabiso enilibizayo malibalwe lifanelane neminyaka loo mhlaba uza kulinywa ngayo kude kube ngunyaka wobuyiselo ozayo. 
Leviticus25:16 Xa iminyaka eseleyo isemininzi, ixabiso kufuneka linyuke; kodwa ukuba imbalwa, kufuneka lihle ixabiso lawo. Kaloku eyona nto kuthengiswa yona linani lesivuno esinokuphuma kuloo mhlaba." 
Leviticus25:17 UmSirayeli angaze amqhathe uwabo, koko moyikeni *uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu.”" 
Leviticus25:18 “Yithobeleni yonke imimiselo nemithetho yam, khon' ukuze nihlale kweli lizwe ningenaxhala." 
Leviticus25:19 Wona umhlaba wovelisa iziqhamo zawo, nitye nihluthe, nihlale kakuhle." 
Leviticus25:20 “Ubani usenokuthi: ‘Kuza kutyiwa ntoni ngalo nyaka wesixhenxe xa kungalinywayo, kungavunwayo nokuvunwa?’" 
Leviticus25:21 Ndowusikelela umhlaba kunyaka wesithandathu, khon' ukuze uvelise ngokwanele iminyaka emithathu." 
Leviticus25:22 Xa nilimayo ngonyaka wesibhozo noba nisatya ukutya ebenikuvune ngonyaka wesithandathu. Yaye noba nokutya okwaneleyo kude kuvunwe izilimo zalowo nyaka.” 
Leviticus25:23 “Umhlaba wenu mawungathengiswa ngokupheleleyo, kuba kaloku awungowenu, ngowam; nina ningabantu basemzini nje abanemvume yokuwusebenzisa." 
Leviticus25:24 “Xa uthengisiwe umhlaba, umniniwo makabe nelungelo lokuphinda awukhulule." 
Leviticus25:25 Xa umSirayeli athe wahlwempuzeka, aze ke anyanzeleke ukuba awuthengise umhlaba wakhe, mawukhululwe sisizalwana sakhe ncam." 
Leviticus25:26 Umntu ongenasizalwana singawukhululayo angawukhulula ngokwakhe ukuba ubuye wahluma. 
Leviticus25:27 Xa kunjalo ke kufuneka ahlawule laa mntu ubewuthengile imali elingene neminyaka eseleyo ngaphambi kokufika konyaka wobuyiselo, aze abuyiselwe umhlaba kwangoko." 
Leviticus25:28 Xa engenamali ngokwaneleyo yokuwukhulula, uba ngowalaa mntu wayewuthengile kude kube ngunyaka wobuyiselo. Kufuneka ke ubuyiselwe kumniniwo ngaloo nyaka, aphinde aye kuhlala kuwo." 
Leviticus25:29 “Xa kukho umntu othengisa ngendlu esesixekweni esibiyelwe ngodonga, loo mntu unalo ilungelo lokuphinda awukhulule loo mzi wakhe kunyaka wokuqala." 
Leviticus25:30 Kodwa ke ukuba akaphindanga awukhulule ngaloo nyaka, ilungelo lakhe liyaphela, uze loo mzi ube ngowalaa mntu wayewuthengile, ube lilifa labantwana bakhe. Nangonyaka wobuyiselo awusokuze wona ubuyiselwe." 
Leviticus25:31 Yona imizi esezidolophaneni ezingabiyelwanga, iyafana nje naleya yomhlaba inkqubo yayo. Umnini-mzi unelungelo lokuphinda awukhulule, yaye kufuneka abuyiselwe ngonyaka wobuyiselo." 
Leviticus25:32 AbaLevi bona banelungelo nanini na lokuphinda bayikhulule imizi yabo esezidolophini zabo. 
Leviticus25:33 Xa kukho indlu ethengiswa ngumLevi edolophini yabo, ize ingakhululwa nguye kwakhona, kufuneka ibuyiselwe kumniniyo ngonyaka wobuyiselo; kaloku izindlu zabaLevi ezidolophini zabo zililifa labo." 
Leviticus25:34 Wona amadlelo angqinge imizi yabaLevi makangaze athengiswe; alilifa labantwana babo.” 
Leviticus25:35 “Xa umSirayeli wakuni omelene nawe ehlwempuzeka, kufuneka umxhase njengoko ufanele ukwenza kumngeneleli noxhwarhileyo, ukuze ahlale emelene nawe." 
Leviticus25:36 Uze ungambizi mdliwo; moyike uThixo wakho, khon' ukuze umSirayeli wakuni amelane nawe." 
Leviticus25:37 Ungamhlawulisi nzala ngemali omboleke yona, ungenzi mdliwo ngokutya omthengisele kona." 
Leviticus25:38 Lo ngumyalelo wam mna *Ndikhoyo uThixo wenu owanikhulula eJiputa, ndaza ndaninika ilizwe laseKanana, ndaba nguThixo wenu.”" 
Leviticus25:39 “Xa umSirayeli omelene nawe ehlwempuzeke kangangokude azithengise abe likhoboka lakho, uze ungamsebenzisi okwekhoboka." 
Leviticus25:40 Kufuneka ahlale nawe njengomqeshwa okanye njengoxhwarhileyo, akukhonze de kufike unyaka wobuyiselo." 
Leviticus25:41 Ngelo xesha ke womkhulula abuyele kowabo kunye nentsapho yakhe, aye kumhlaba wooyise." 
Leviticus25:42 AmaSirayeli zizicaka zam wona, ndim owawakhupha eJiputa; akufuneki ke athengiswe abe ngamakhoboka." 
Leviticus25:43 Ze ningawaphathi gadalala; kaloku mhloneleni uThixo wenu. 
Leviticus25:44 Amakhoboka wathengeni kwezinye iintlanga eziningqongileyo. 
Leviticus25:45 Ningabathenga abantu abaxhwarhe phakathi kwenu, ngokunjalo nabezizwe zasemzini abazalelwe kwilizwe lakowenu. Abanjalo ningabathenga," 
Leviticus25:46 nibashiye babe lilifa labantwana benu, babe ngamakhoboka abo bonke ubomi babo. Kodwa amaSirayeli wona ningawaphathi gadalala." 
Leviticus25:47 “Xa kukho umngeneleli okanye umxhwarhi othe wahluma, watyeba, ze umSirayeli abe lihlwempu azithengise kuloo mntu, okanye kwisizalwana sakhe," 
Leviticus25:48 naxa selethengiwe, ilungelo lakhe lokubuya akhululwe ngamawabo usenalo. Usenako ukubuya akhululwe ngumntakwabo," 
Leviticus25:49 okanye uyisekazi, okanye umzala wakhe, nasiphi na isihlobo sakhe. Ukanti naye xa athe waphinda wahluma angazikhulula." 
Leviticus25:50 Kufuneka adibane nalowo umthengileyo, baze babale iminyaka ukususela ekuzithengiseni kwakhe kude kube ngunyaka wobuyiselo, baze bagqibe ngexabiso elingangemali ehlawulwa umqeshwa yonke loo minyaka." 
Leviticus25:51 Ukuzikhulula kufuneka abuyise icandelo lexabiso awayethengwe ngalo lilingane neminyaka esaseleyo. Ukuba iminyaka eshiyekileyo ukuya kunyaka wobuyiselo mininzi, kufuneka intlawulelo inyuke, ize xa imbalwa ihle." 
Leviticus25:52  
Leviticus25:53 Kaloku makuthathwe ngathi yena ebengumqeshwa ohlawulwa ngonyaka. Nto nje inkosi yakhe mayingamphathi gadalala. 
Leviticus25:54 Ukuba akahlawulelwanga okanye azihlawulele, kufuneka yena nabantwana bakhe bakhululwe kunyaka wobuyiselo." 
Leviticus25:55 UmSirayeli akanakusoloko elikhoboka. Kaloku amaSirayeli zizicaka zam. Ndim owawakhupha eJiputa, mna Ndikhoyo uThixo wenu.”" 
Leviticus26:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi: “Ze ningazenzeli izinto nizinqule, ningaqingqi imifanekiso, okanye nimise iintsika zamatye, nikrole namatye, ze nijike nizinqule ezo zinto. Ndim uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Leviticus26:2 Nina gcinani *iMihla yam yokuPhumla, niyihlonele indawo endinqulwa kuyo. Kaloku ndim uNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus26:3 “Xa nisenza ngokwemimiselo yam, niyithobela imiyalelo yam," 
Leviticus26:4 ndiya kunipha imvula ngexesha, uze umhlaba wenu uvelise isivuno, nemithi ithwale iziqhamo." 
Leviticus26:5 Ngexesha enivuna iidiliya niya kuba nisabhula ingqolowa, kwaye iidiliya niya kuzivuna kude kufike ixesha lokuhlwayela ingqolowa kwakhona. Niya kutya nihluthe, nihlale ngokonwaba elizweni lenu." 
Leviticus26:6 “Ndiya kuzisa uxolo elizweni lenu, nilale ubuthongo obumnandi ningaxhalelanga bani. Amarhamncwa ndowaphelisa kwilizwe lenu, yaye akuyi kube kubekho mfazwe." 
Leviticus26:7 Utshaba lwenu noluswantsulisa, nilutyakatye ngekrele." 
Leviticus26:8 Isihlanu nje samadoda enu siya kulichitha-chitha ikhulu lamadoda; ukanti lona ikhulu lamadoda liswantsulise ishumi lamawaka. Ewe, iintshaba zenu nozibhuqa." 
Leviticus26:9 Ndiya kuba nani, ndinenze nichume nande, niwugcine umnqophiso endawenzayo nani." 
Leviticus26:10 Soba yintaphane isivuno senu, nikulahle ukutya okudala ukwenzela isivuno esitsha indawo koovimba benu." 
Leviticus26:11 Mna ndohlala ndihleli phakathi kwenu, ndingaze ndikruquke nini." 
Leviticus26:12 Ndoba nani, ndibe nguThixo wenu, nina nibe ngabantu bam." 
Leviticus26:13 Ndim mna Ndikhoyo uThixo wenu owanikhupha eJiputa ukuze ningabi ngamakhoboka ayo. Ndayaphula loo dyokhwe yobukhoboka, ndanenza abantu abaneqhayiya nebhongo.”" 
Leviticus26:14 Ubuye wathi *uNdikhoyo: “Xa ningandiphulaphuli, ningayithobeli imiyalelo yam," 
Leviticus26:15 naxa nisala ukuthobela imimiselo nemithetho yam, niwutyeshela nomnqophiso endawenza nani," 
Leviticus26:16 ndiya kunohlwaya. Ndonihlisela izibetho: izifo ezinganyangekiyo, nemikhuhlane eya kunitsho nityhaphake, ingcungcuthekise ubomi benu. Ewe, niya kulima, kodwa kungancedi nto, kuba utshaba luya kunifikela, lunichitha-chithe, lusidle isivuno eso." 
Leviticus26:17 Ndonishiya ukuze noyiswe, nize nilawulwe ziintshaba zenu ezithiyekileyo. Noba ngamaphaku-phaku abaleka engasukelwa bani." 
Leviticus26:18 “Xa ke, emva kwayo yonke loo nquleqhu, nithe anandithobela, ndosongeza isohlwayo ngokuphindwe kasixhenxe." 
Leviticus26:19 Ndozikhama ezo nkanana zenu. Izulu ndolivala: aniyi kufumana mvula; umhlaba wenu uya kutsha ube ngumqwebedu. 
Leviticus26:20 Niya kubila nisebenzela ilize; kaloku akuyi kuhluma nto kuloo mhlaba, nkqu nemithi ayiyi kuthwala nto." 
Leviticus26:21 “Xa ningagobiyo, ningeva nangoku, ndiya kuphinda ndizongeze ngokuphindwe kasixhenxe izibetho zenu." 
Leviticus26:22 Ndofaka amarhamncwa phakathi kwenu; aya kuqwenga abantwana benu, atshabalalise nemfuyo yenu, awathobe amanani enu, kutsho kungabikho mhambi ubonwa ehamb' indlela." 
Leviticus26:23 “Xa nisandidela ningeva nangoku, nazingisa ukundichasa," 
Leviticus26:24 ndophinda ndinohlwaye kakhulu kunakuqala ngokuphindwe kasixhenxe. 
Leviticus26:25 Ndonohlwaya ngokunizisela imfazwe ngokuwaphula kwenu umnqophiso, nithi xa nibalekela ezixekweni zenu nizimela khona, ndilandelise ngobhubhani, ndininikezele kwiintshaba zenu." 
Leviticus26:26 Xa ndikunciphisa ukutya kwenu, isonka sobhakwa ngabafazi abalishumi kwiziko elinye qha, size sicakacwe. Kanti nohlala nilambile naxa nityile." 
Leviticus26:27 “Xa nithe kuyo yonke le nto nazingisa ukundichasa ningeva," 
Leviticus26:28 ndiya kuthi ngomsindo ndinijikele ndinohlwaye ngokuphindwe kasixhenxe kunakuqala. 
Leviticus26:29 Niya kulamba, nilambe nide nidle abantwana benu yindlala." 
Leviticus26:30 Iindawo ezisezindulini eninqula kuzo ndozidiliza, ndiwachithe amaqonga enu esiqhumiso, izidumbu zenu ndizifumbe phezu kwaloo mifanekiso iqingqiweyo, kuba kaloku ndokruquka nini ngokupheleleyo." 
Leviticus26:31 Ndozidiliza ngomsindo zibe ngamabhodlo izixeko zenu, ndizichithe iindawo eninqulela kuzo, ndingawamkeli amadini eniwanikela kum." 
Leviticus26:32 Ilizwe lenu ndolitshabalalisa liphele tu, kude kothuke notshaba olwalihlutha kuni." 
Leviticus26:33 Ndonizisela imfazwe, inichithe nibe ziintsalu kumazwe ngamazwe. Ilizwe lenu loba yintlango, nezixeko zenu zibe ngamabhodlo." 
Leviticus26:34 Kuya kuthi ke emva koko kubekho kwelo zwe iminyaka yokuphumza umhlaba obe ungasaphunyuzwa. Kaloku uya kushiyeka uxhamle iminyaka yokuphumla, lo gama nina nithe saa kwamanye amazwe." 
Leviticus26:35  
Leviticus26:36 “Abo benu bathe saa emazweni ndobenza amaphaku-phaku aphaphathekiswa naligqabi liphetshethwa ngumoya. Bophaphatheka babaleke ngathi bayasukelwa edabini, babe zizinto eziwa kungekho tshaba luziwisayo." 
Leviticus26:37 Niya kugilana nibaleka ningasukelwa mntu, ningabi nako nokumelana notshaba." 
Leviticus26:38 Nofela emazweni, nibe lixhoba lomhlaba weentshaba zenu." 
Leviticus26:39 Elo qaqobana liseleyo lona longcungcutheka, livikiveke ngenxa yesono senu nesooyihlo-mkhulu." 
Leviticus26:40 “Ke yona intsalela yenu yozohlwaya ngesono sayo nesookhokho bayo abandidelayo, bandivukela," 
Leviticus26:41 bandenza ndabafulathela, ndabadingisa emazweni eentshaba zabo. Kuya kuthi ke xa aba bantu bezithobile, bazohlwaya ngesono sabo sokundivukela," 
Leviticus26:42 nam ndikhumbule umnqophiso wam kuYakobi, nakuIsake, nakuAbraham, ndize ke ndisihlaziye isithembiso sokubanika ilizwe elilelabo abantu bam." 
Leviticus26:43 Ngalo lonke eli xesha umhlaba woba ungenamntu, uze uxhamle iminyaka yawo yokuphumla. Kaloku abantu bekufuneka bohlwaywe ngesenzo sokudela imithetho yam nemimiselo yam." 
Leviticus26:44 Kanti ke nangoku beselizweni leentshaba zabo, andiyi kubancama okanye ndikruquke ngabo kangangokuba ndibatshabalalise kuphele. Loo nto ingawuphelisa kaloku umnqophiso wam kubo; ibe ke ndim uNdikhoyo uThixo wabo." 
Leviticus26:45 Kodwa ndowuhlaziya umnqophiso endawenzayo kookhokho babo, xa ndandibonisa iintlanga zonke amandla am ngokukhupha abantu bam eJiputa, ndisenzela ukuba mna Ndikhoyo ndibe nguThixo wabo.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Yonke ke le yimithetho nemimiselo nemigaqo eyanikwa uMosis nguNdikhoyo entabeni yeSinayi ukuba ayigqithisele kumaSirayeli. 
Leviticus27:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi uMosis 
Leviticus27:2 makathi kumaSirayeli: “Xa kukho umntu obenikelwe kuNdikhoyo ngenxa yesifungo esithile, loo mntu angakhululeka xa kuhlawulwe ixabiso elifanelekileyo." 
Leviticus27:3 Ngomntu oyindoda obudala buphakathi kwamashumi amabini namashumi amathandathu kukhutshwa iingqekembe zesiliva ngokomlinganiselo *wasesibingelelweni ezimashumi mahlanu. 
Leviticus27:4 Ngomntu obhinqileyo oyile ntanga ngamashumi amathathu. 
Leviticus27:5 Ngenkwenkwe eminyaka mihlanu kude kuye kumashumi amabini kukhutshwa amashumi amabini eengqekembe zesiliva. Ngentombazana lishumi leengqekembe elikhutshwayo. 
Leviticus27:6 Ngenkwenkwe elusana olungaphantsi kweminyaka emihlanu kukhutshwa isihlanu seengqekembe zesiliva. Ezikhutshwa ngomntwana oyintombazana ziba ntathu. 
Leviticus27:7 Ngendoda engaphezu kwamashumi amathandathu ubudala kukhutshwa ishumi elinesihlanu, kuthi ngomfazi okwangako zibe lishumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Ke xa loo mntu ubenze isifungo engenako ukukhupha ngokomlinganiselo ovunyiweyo, kufuneka eze naloo mntu kumbingeleli, aze ke umbingeleli alithobe ixabiso libe ngangamandla aloo mntu kufuneka ehlawule." 
Leviticus27:9 “Xa isifungo ebesenziwe siphathelele kwinto exhelwayo eyamkelekayo ukwenzela uNdikhoyo umnikelo, loo nto sisipho esisodwa," 
Leviticus27:10 yaye ke loo mntu wenze isifungo akanako ukunikela ngenye into exhelwayo endaweni yaleyo, nokuba yelungileyo endaweni yengalunganga, okanye engalunganga endaweni yelungileyo. Xa athe wayenza loo nto, ziya kuba zezikaNdikhoyo zombini ke ezo zinto." 
Leviticus27:11 Kodwa xa ebethembise ngokunikela ngento engàtyiwayo, kufuneka loo mntu ayise kumbingeleli loo nto inikelwayo." 
Leviticus27:12 Yena ke umbingeleli womisa ixabiso layo ngangokulunga nokungalungi kwayo. Elo xabiso ke aliyi kuphikiswa mntu. 
Leviticus27:13 Xa loo mntu uyizisileyo efuna ukuyikhulula, kufuneka ahlawule elo xabiso, ongezelele nomdliwo. (Lo mdliwo woba sisinye esihlanwini.)" 
Leviticus27:14 “Xa kukho umntu onikela ngendlu yakhe kuNdikhoyo umbingeleli uya kuyixabisa ngokulunga nokungalungi kwayo. Elo xabiso aliyi kujikwa mntu. 
Leviticus27:15 Xa lo mntu obenikele ngendlu yakhe efuna ukuyikhulula, wohlawula ixabiso layo nomdliwo ngaphezulu. (Lo mdliwo woba sisinye esihlanwini.)" 
Leviticus27:16 “Xa kukho umntu onikela kuNdikhoyo ngenxenye yomhlaba wakhe, ixabiso lawo loba ngangobunzima bembewu efakwa kuwo. Umlinganiselo woba ziingqekembe ezilishumi zesiliva ngeekhilogram ezingamashumi amabini zengqolowa." 
Leviticus27:17 Kodwa xa lo mhlaba ewunikela kanye ngonyaka wobuyiselo, kufuneka afumane ixabiso lawo elizeleyo." 
Leviticus27:18 Xa ewunikela emva koko ngumbingeleli oya kubala ixabiso lemali emayihlawulwe ngangeminyaka eseleyo ukuya kunyaka wobuyiselo ozayo, aze amise ixabiso elithotyiweyo." 
Leviticus27:19 Xa loo mntu ubenikele ngaloo mhlaba efuna ukuwukhulula, kufuneka ahlawule elo xabiso, abuye ongeze nomdliwo. (Lo mdliwo woba sisinye esihlanwini.)" 
Leviticus27:20 Xa athe wawuthengisa komnye umntu loo mhlaba, engekabuyi awukhulule, uya lahlekelwa lilungelo lakhe lokubuya awukhulule." 
Leviticus27:21 Ngonyaka wobuyiselo loo mhlaba uya kuba ngokaNdikhoyo, ube lilifa lababingeleli." 
Leviticus27:22 “Xa kukho umntu onikela ngentsimi abeyithengile ingelilo ilifa lakhe," 
Leviticus27:23 kufuneka ixabiso layo umbingeleli alibale ngeminyaka eseleyo ukuya kunyaka wobuyiselo, yaye loo mntu yena kufuneka loo mali ayihlawule kwangaloo mini. Kaloku loo mali yekaNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus27:24 Ngonyaka wobuyiselo loo ntsimi kufuneka ibuyiselwe kulaa mntu abeyithenge kuye. 
Leviticus27:25 “Onke amaxabiso kufuneka amiswe ngokomlinganiselo ovunyiweyo wasesibingelelweni. 
Leviticus27:26 “Izibulo layo yonke into efuyiweyo selilelikaNdikhoyo; ke makungabikho bani wenza umnikelo ngalo ngenxa yesifungo asenzileyo. Ithole, itakane, ixhwane, konke oko kokukaNdikhoyo," 
Leviticus27:27 kodwa lona izibulo lento engàtyiwayo lingáthengwa ngexabiso lomlinganiselo ovunyiweyo, kongezwe nomdliwo ngaphezulu. (Lo mdliwo woba sisinye esihlanwini.) Xa lingakhange lithengwe ngumninilo lingáthengiswa komnye umntu ngexabiso elivunyiweyo." 
Leviticus27:28 “Akukho bani unokuthengisa okanye unokukhulula into eyahlulelwe uNdikhoyo ngokupheleleyo. Nditsho nokuba loo nto ngumntu, nokuba yinto efuywayo, nokuba ngumhlaba. Loo nto yekaNdikhoyo qwaba." 
Leviticus27:29 Nditsho nomntu onikelweyo akanakubuya akhululwe; kufuneka abulawe. 
Leviticus27:30 “Isishumi sayo yonke imveliso yomhlaba, nokuba loo mveliso iziinkozo, nokuba ziziqhamo, yonke loo nto mayahlulelwe uNdikhoyo; yeyakhe." 
Leviticus27:31 Xa kukho umntu ofuna ukukhulula inxenye yesishumi sakhe kufuneka ahlawule ixabiso elivunyiweyo, abuye ongezelele nangomdliwo. (Lo mdliwo woba sisinye esihlanwini.)" 
Leviticus27:32 Kwimpahla efuyiweyo, nakanjani na enye kwezilishumi mayabelwe uNdikhoyo. Xa kubalwa imfuyo enye kwishumi ngalinye mayabelwe uNdikhoyo." 
Leviticus27:33 Umnini-mfuyo makangakhethi phakathi kwelungileyo nengalunganga imfuyo, okanye angatshintshisi. Xa enze loo nto ezo zinto zombini ziya kuba zezikaNdikhoyo; azinakube zikhululwe kuye.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Yiyo ke le imiyalelo awayinikwa nguNdikhoyo uMosis entabeni iSinayi ukuba ayigqithisele kumaSirayeli. 
Numbers1:1 Ke kaloku kwathi amaSirayeli eselapho kwintlango yeSinayi *uNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis *esesibingelelweni. Lo ke yayingumhla wokuqala wenyanga yesibini kunyaka wesibini amaSirayeli andulukayo eJiputa. Wamyalela wenjenje: 
Numbers1:2 “Wena noAron yenzani ubalo, niwabale onke amaSirayeli ngokwezindlu nemizi yawo. Ewe, balani onke amadoda ayintanga yokuphuma aye emfazweni, oko kukuthi lawo akumashumi amabini eminyaka nangaphezulu." 
Numbers1:3  
Numbers1:4 Kwindlu nganye thathani inkulu inincedise.”
