Numbers1:5 Nanga ke amagama ezo nkulu zakhethelwa lo msebenzi: Indlu Inkulu KwaRubhen uElizure kaShedeyure KwaSimon uShelumiyeli kaZurishadayi KwaJuda uNashon ka-Aminadabhi KwaIsakare uNataniyeli kaZuware KwaZebhulon uEliyabhi kaHelon KwaEfrayim (kaJosefu) uElishama ka-Amihudi KwaManase (kaJosefu) uGamaliyeli kaPedazure KwaBhenjamin uAbhidan kaGidiyoni KwaDan uAhiyezere ka-Amishadayi Kwa-Ashere uPagiyeli kaOkran KwaGadi uEliyasafu kaDuweli KwaNafetali uAhira kaEnan 
Numbers1:6 Ngawo ke la amadoda âkhethwáyo ebandleni beziinkulu zezindlu zakowawo, izindlu zakwaSirayeli ukutsho." 
Numbers1:7 UMosis noAron ke benala madoda 
Numbers1:8 bawaqokelela onke amaSirayeli ngomhla wokuqala kwinyanga yesibini, baza bawabala ngokwezindlu nemizi yawo. Bawabhalisa bawabala onke amadoda akumashumi amabini eminyaka nangaphezulu" 
Numbers1:9 ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis. Le nto ke yenzeka kwintlango yeSinayi. 
Numbers1:10 Ke kaloku onke amadoda ayintanga yokuya emfazweni, lawo aneminyaka emashumi mabini nangaphezulu, abhaliswa ngokwezindlu nemizi yawo, kuqalelwa kwaRubhen inkulu kaSirayeli. Ngokwamanani kwindlu nganye ayemi ngolu hlobo: Indlu Inani KwaRubhen 46 500 KwaSimon 59 300 KwaGadi 45 650 KwaJuda 74 600 KwaIsakare 54 400 KwaZebhulon 57 400 KwaEfrayim kaJosefu 40 500 KwaManase kaJosefu 32 200 KwaBhenjamin 35 400 KwaDan 62 700 Kwa-Ashere 41 500 KwaNafetali 53 400 Bebonke: 603 550" 
Numbers1:11 Yona indlu yakwaLevi zange ibalwe," 
Numbers1:12 kuba uNdikhoyo wayemyalile uMosis wathi: 
Numbers1:13 “Xa ubala amadoda afanele imfazwe uze ungababandakanyi abaLevi. 
Numbers1:14 Ndaweni yaloo nto bona uze ubamisele umsebenzi wesibingelelo. Kuya kuxhomekeka kubo ukufuduswa kwesibingelelo ndawonye nomsebenzi waso. Futhi ke apho simise khona siya kungqongwa kwangabo. 
Numbers1:15 Nanini na nifuduka, isibingelelo sona siya kuxhomekeka kubaLevi. Ngabo abaya kusichitha xa nindulukayo, baze baphinde basakhe apho nimise khona. Ngoko ke umntu ongomnye osondela esibingelelweni makabulawe." 
Numbers1:16 Amanye amaSirayeli la aya kuma ngokwezindlu zawo, amathile ephantsi kwembasa yawo." 
Numbers1:17 Ke bona abaLevi ukuma kwabo baya kuphahla isibingelelo esiqulethe ubungqina bomnqophiso, basaluse, khon' ukuze kungabikho bani usondelayo kuso, avusele amaSirayeli umsindo wam.”" 
Numbers1:18 Ngenene ke amaSirayeli enza ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis. 
Numbers2:1 Nantsi imiyalelo eyanikwa uMosis noAron *nguNdikhoyo: 
Numbers2:2 “Kolu hambo lwenu apho nimisa khona hlalani ngolu hlobo: Indoda nganye mayime kummandla wembasa yakowayo phantsi kwentshinga kayise. Ukuma kwawo amaSirayeli makajikeleze isibingelelo. 
Numbers2:3 “Kwicala lasempuma kuya kuma abembasa yendlu kaJuda ngokwemizi yabo, bephantsi kweenkulu zabo, ngolu hlobo: Indlu Inkulu Inani AbakwaJuda uNashon ka-Aminadabhi 74 600 AbakwaIsakare uNataniyeli kaZuware 54 400 AbakwaZebhulon uEliyabhi kaHelon 57 400 Bebonke: 186 400 AbakwaJuda ke baya kusuka kuqala." 
Numbers2:4 “Kwicala langasezantsi kuya kuma abembasa yendlu kaRubhen ngokwemizi yabo, bephantsi kweenkulu zabo, ngolu hlobo: Indlu Inkulu Inani AbakwaRubhen uElizure kaShedeyure 46 500 AbakwaSimon uShelumiyeli kaZurishadayi 59 300 AbakwaGadi uEliyasafu kaDuweli 45 650 Bebonke: 151 450 AbakwaRubhen ke baya kulandela." 
Numbers2:5 “Ke bona abakwaLevi baya kuhamba bephethe intente *yesibingelelo. Baya kuhamba phakathi embindini wezi zindlu xa zizonke. Onke amaqela aya kuhamba kwangalaa ndlela abemi ngayo, iqela ngalinye phantsi kwembasa yalo." 
Numbers2:6 “Kwicala lasentshona kuya kuma abembasa yendlu kaEfrayim ngokwemizi yabo, bephantsi kweenkulu zabo, ngolu hlobo: Indlu Inkulu Inani AbakwaEfrayim uElishama ka-Amihudi 40 500 AbakwaManase uGamaliyeli kaPedazure 32 200 AbakwaBhenjamin uAbhidan kaGidiyoni 35 400 Bebonke: 108 100 Kolo ludwe ke abakwaEfrayim boba ngabesithathu." 
Numbers2:7 “Kwicala langasentla kuya kuma abembasa yendlu kaDan ngokwemizi yabo, bephantsi kweenkulu zabo, ngolu hlobo: Indlu Inkulu Inani AbakwaDan uAhizere ka-Amishadayi 62 700 Abakwa-Ashere uPagiyeli kaOkran 41 500 AbakwaNafetali uAhira kaEnan 53 400 Bebonke: 157 600 Kolu ludwe ke bona abakwaDan baya kuba ngumsila.”" 
Numbers2:8 Lilonke ke inani lamaSirayeli âbhalisáyo apho kuloo maqela laba ngamakhulu amathandathu anantathu amawaka anamakhulu amahlanu namashumi amahlanu. 
Numbers2:9 Ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis bona abaLevi abakho kweli nani lamaSirayeli. 
Numbers2:10 Ngoko ke amaSirayeli yonke into ayenza ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo kuMosis. Ayesima ngokweembasa zawo, aze ahambe ngokwemizi yawo." 
Numbers3:1 Nantsi ke ingcombolo ngoonyana baka-Aron noMosis ngexesha *uNdikhoyo ethetha noMosis entabeni iSinayi. 
Numbers3:2 UAron wayenoonyana abane: uNadabhi omkhulu, uAbhihu, uElazare, noItamare." 
Numbers3:3 Bona ke bathanjiswa bamiselwa baba ngababingeleli. 
Numbers3:4 Kambe ke bona ooNadabhi noAbhihu bafela apho kwintlango yeSinayi, ngenxa yokuba benikele ngomlilo ongafanelekanga kuNdikhoyo. Babengekabi nabantwana, ngoko ke uElazare noItamare baba kumsebenzi wobubingeleli ngexesha lika-Aron." 
Numbers3:5 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: 
Numbers3:6 “Thatha indlu kaLevi, uyimisele ibe ngabaququzeleli bombingeleli uAron." 
Numbers3:7 AbaLevi mabasebenze *esibingelelweni, bancedise ababingeleli, bamele ibandla lamaSirayeli liphela." 
Numbers3:8 Mabajongane nazo zonke izixhobo ezisetyenziswa esibingelelweni, wonke umsebenzi bewenzela amaSirayeli ephela." 
Numbers3:9 Kuphela umsebenzi wabaLevi kukuba ngabaququzeleli baka-Aron noonyana bakhe. 
Numbers3:10 UAron noonyana bakhe bamisele basebenze ezobubingeleli; nabani na ke ongomnye ophatha impahla yesibingelelo uya kubulawa.” 
Numbers3:11 UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi:" 
Numbers3:12 “Ngoku abakwaLevi ndibathathile; ngabam. Ekuwabulaleni kwam amazibulo amaJiputa ndazibekela bucala izibulo ngalinye lamaSirayeli ndawonye nawemfuyo yawo. Ngoku ke, endaweni yamazibulo amaSirayeli, ndibanga abakwaLevi; ngabam nqo. NdinguNdikhoyo kaloku.”" 
Numbers3:13  
Numbers3:14 Kwintlango yeSinayi *uNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: 
Numbers3:15 “Babale abaLevi ngokwezindlu nemizi yabo; ubhalise bonke abangamadoda, ukuqalela kubudala obuyinyanga enye nangaphezulu.”" 
Numbers3:16 Ke uMosis wayenza le nto. 
Numbers3:17 ULevi ke wayenoonyana abathathu: uGershon, uKohati, noMerari. Ngabo ookhokho bezi zindlu zibizwa ngabo. UGershon yena waba noonyana ababini: uLibheni noShimeyi. Bona abakaKohati babebane: uAmram, uIzare, uHebron, noUziyeli. AbakwaMerari ke bona babebabini: uMali noMushi. Bona bangookhokho bezi zindlu zibizwa ngabo." 
Numbers3:18  
Numbers3:19  
Numbers3:20  
Numbers3:21 Indlu kaGershon ke imi ngemizi kaLibheni noShimeyi. 
Numbers3:22 Bebonke ke abangamadoda ababudala buyinyanga nangaphezulu abâbhaliswáyo babengamawaka asixhenxe anamakhulu amahlanu. 
Numbers3:23 Le ke yona indlu yema ngasentshona, ngasemva *kwesibingelelo." 
Numbers3:24 Inkulu yayo yanguEliyasafu, unyana kaLayeli." 
Numbers3:25 Owabo ke umsebenzi yayikukujongana nesibingelelo, isigqubuthelo saso sangaphakathi nesangaphandle, umkhusane wesango legumbi eliphakathi," 
Numbers3:26 nomkhusane wenkundla, ngokunjalo nomkhusane weqonga lamadini, kunye nomkhusane wesango lenkundla, neentsontelo, nako konke okunxulumene nezi zinto." 
Numbers3:27 Indlu kaKohati ke yona imi ngemizi ka-Amram, uIzare, uHebron, noUziyeli." 
Numbers3:28 Bebonke ke abangamadoda ababudala buyinyanga nangaphezulu abâbhaliswáyo babesisibhozo samawaka namakulu amathandathu, bonke beququzelela esibingelelweni." 
Numbers3:29 Le ke yona indlu yema kwicala langasezantsi lesibingelelo. 
Numbers3:30 Inkulu yayo yayinguElizafan, unyana kaUziyeli." 
Numbers3:31 Owabo umsebenzi yayikukujongana netyesi yomnqophiso, itafile, isiphatho-zibane, amaqonga, nezixhobo ezisetyenziswa ngababingeleli egumbini eliyingcwele, nomkhusane wokufihla igumbi eliyingcwele kangcwele. Ewe, babejongene nako konke okunxulumene nezi zinto." 
Numbers3:32 Intloko yabaLevi ke yayinguElazare unyana ka-Aron umbingeleli. Yena wayengumveleli kwabo basebenza esibingelelweni. 
Numbers3:33 Ke yona indlu kaMerari imi ngemizi kaMali noMushi. 
Numbers3:34 Bebonke ke abangamadoda ababudala buyinyanga nangaphezulu abâbhaliswáyo babengamawaka amathandathu namakhulu amabini. 
Numbers3:35 Le ndlu ke yona yema ngasentla kwesibingelelo. Inkulu yayo yayinguZuriyeli unyana ka-Abhihayili. 
Numbers3:36 Umsebenzi wabo yaba kukujongana nesakhelo sesibingelelo, imiqobo, iintsika, iziseko, nazo zonke izixhobo zaso. Ewe, babejongene nako konke okunxulumene nezi zinto." 
Numbers3:37 Ngokunjalo babejongene nezibonda, iintsika, izikhonkwane, neentsontela zenkundla." 
Numbers3:38 Ke yena uMosis noAron noonyana bakhe bema phambi kwesibingelelo ngasempuma. Umsebenzi wabo yayikukubusa ngaphakathi egumbini eliyingcwele, bemele amaSirayeli. Nabani na ongomnye owenza lo msebenzi wabo uya kubulawa." 
Numbers3:39 Lilonke inani labaLevi abudala buyinyanga nangaphezulu abathi babhaliswa nguMosis ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo laba ngamashumi amabini anambini amawaka. 
Numbers3:40 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Onke amazibulo angoonyana bamaSirayeli ngawam. Ngoko ke wabhalise onke amazibulo angoonyana bamaSirayeli abudala buyinyanga nangaphezulu. Kambe ke endaweni yawo ndibanga bonke abaLevi – ndinguNdikhoyo kaloku! Ngokunjalo nasendaweni yamazibulo eenkomo zamaSirayeli ndibanga zonke iinkomo zabaLevi.” 
Numbers3:41  
Numbers3:42 UMosis ke wawuthobela lo myalelo kaNdikhoyo, wawabala onke loo mazibulo" 
Numbers3:43 abudala buyinyanga nangaphezulu, aza aba ngamashumi amabini anambini amawaka anamakhulu amabini namashumi asixhenxe anantathu." 
Numbers3:44 UNdikhoyo wayala uMosis wathi: 
Numbers3:45 “Ngoku ke babekele bucala ubamisele abaLevi, babe ngabam, bathathe indawo yoonyana bamazibulo bamaSirayeli. Ngokunjalo ke neenkomo zabaLevi mazithathe indawo yamazibulo eenkomo zamaSirayeli." 
Numbers3:46 Amazibulo angoonyana bamaSirayeli athe kratya ngamakhulu amabini anamashumi asixhenxe anantathu kubaLevi; eli nani badlula ngalo ke malihlawulelwe. 
Numbers3:47 Kweli nani ke unyana ngamnye makahlawulelwe iisiliva ezintlanu ngokomlinganiselo ovunyiweyo. 
Numbers3:48 Le mali ke mayinikwe uAron noonyana bakhe.” 
Numbers3:49 Ngoko ke uMosis wayiqokelela imali yokhululo yokukhulula abo babegqithile kwinani labakhululwe ngabaLevi. 
Numbers3:50 Waqokelela iisiliva eziliwaka elinamakhulu amathathu namashumi amathandathu anantlanu. Le mali uyithathe kuwo onke amazibulo," 
Numbers3:51 waza wayinikezela kuAron noonyana bakhe njengoko wayeyalelwe nguNdikhoyo. 
Numbers4:1 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis noAron 
Numbers4:2 ukuba babale abaLevi bakwaKohati ngokwezindlu nemizi yabo. 
Numbers4:3 Wathi mababhalise onke amadoda akubudala obungamashumi amathathu ukuya kumashumi amahlanu eminyaka, onke awayefanelekile ukuba angasebenza *esibingelelweni." 
Numbers4:4 Umsebenzi wabo ke wawunxulumene nezona zinto zingcwele. 
Numbers4:5 UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wenjenje: “Lakufika ixesha lokunduluka, uAron noonyana bakhe mabakhulule umkhusane ovalele ityesi yomnqophiso, bagqume ityesi leyo ngawo." 
Numbers4:6 Mabayigqume ngesikhumba esisukiweyo, babeke ilaphu elizuba ngaphezulu, bandule ke ukufaka imiqobo yokubamba." 
Numbers4:7 “Mabaneke ilaphu elizuba phezu kwetafile ehlala isonka esinikelwe uNdikhoyo, babeke iipleyiti phezu kwayo, nezitya zesiqhumiso, izitya zomnikelo, neendebe zomnikelo othululwayo. Ke isonka esihlala phezu kwetafile masingasuswa." 
Numbers4:8 Phezu kwazo zonke ke ezi zinto baya kuthi wambu ilaphu elimfusa, baze balebele ngesikhumba esisukiweyo, bafake imiqobo yokubamba." 
Numbers4:9 “Baya kuthatha ilaphu elizuba, bagqume isiphatho-zibane xa sisonke, isifinyiso saso, nezithetyana zaso, ngokunjalo nezitya zaso zeoyile." 
Numbers4:10 Isibane nobuxhaka-xhaka baso mabasisonge ngesikhumba esisukiweyo, basibeke kumanqwanqwa okusiphatha." 
Numbers4:11 “Iqonga legolide baya kuligquma ngelaphu elizuba, balebele ngesikhumba esisukiweyo, baze bafake imiqobo yokubamba." 
Numbers4:12 Baya kuphinda ke bathathe izitya namacephe asetyenziswa esibingelelweni, bawasongele ngelaphu elizuba, bagqume ngesikhumba esisukiweyo, bazibeke phezu kwamanqwanqwa okuziphatha." 
Numbers4:13 Mabasuse uthuthu kwiqonga lamadini, baligqume ngelaphu elimsobo." 
Numbers4:14 Phezu kwalo ke mababeke zonke izinto ezisetyenziswa kulo: iipleyiti zomlilo, iifolokhwe, iifotsholo, nezitya. Kamva ke baya kuligquma ngesikhumba esisukiweyo, balifake imiqobo yokubamba." 
Numbers4:15 Ngexesha lokuhamba ke kuya kuthi xa uAron noonyana bakhe sebegqibile ukuzisonga nokuziqoqosha zonke ezi zinto zingcwele, beze abakwaKohati, bazokuzithatha baziphathe. Kodwa ke mabangazichukumisi, hleze bafe. “Lo msebenzi wokuthwala impahla yesibingelelo ngumsebenzi wamaKohati nanini na xa kufudukwa." 
Numbers4:16 “Ke yena uElazare, unyana ka-Aron, uya kongamela isibingelelo siphela, nako konke okwaso: ioyile yezibane, isiqhumiso, umnikelo weenkozo, namafutha okuthambisa – oko kukuthi isibingelelo nempahla yaso yangaphakathi.”" 
Numbers4:17 UNdikhoyo wabayalela ooAron noMosis, wathi" 
Numbers4:18 mababalumkele abakwaKohati bangasondeli kwezi zinto zingcwele, hleze bafe. Ukuthintela loo ngozi ke wathi uAron noonyana bakhe mabangene kuqala, babele ulowo nalowo umKohati umsebenzi nento aza kuyiphatha." 
Numbers4:19  
Numbers4:20 Kambe ke ukuba amaKohati angenile esibingelelweni, aza azibona nakancinane ezi zinto zingcwele, aya kufa." 
Numbers4:21 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis 
Numbers4:22 ukuba abale abaLevi bakwaGershon ngokwezindlu nemizi yabo. 
Numbers4:23 Wathi makabhalise onke amadoda akubudala obungamashumi amathathu ukuya kumashumi amahlanu eminyaka, onke awayefanelekile ukuba angasebenza *esibingelelweni." 
Numbers4:24 Umsebenzi wabo ke yayikukuphatha ezi zinto: 
Numbers4:25 intente (eyangaphakathi neyangaphandle) nesigqubuthelo sayo, nesikhumba esisukiweyo, umkhusane wesango," 
Numbers4:26 imikhusane neentsontela zenkundla jikelele, imikhusane yesango lenkundla, nazo zonke izixhobo ezisetyenziswa kwezi zinto. Umsebenzi wabo ke uya kunxulumana nezi zinto." 
Numbers4:27 Wonke umsebenzi wawo amaGershon makawenze phantsi kweliso lika-Aron noonyana bakhe, abaya kuwayalela izinto amakazithwale namakazenze." 
Numbers4:28 Le ke yimisebenzi yamaGershon esibingelelweni. Aya kuyenza ekhokelwa nguItamare unyana kambingeleli uAron. 
Numbers4:29 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis ukuba abale abaLevi bakwaMerari ngokwezindlu nemizi yabo. 
Numbers4:30 Wathi makabhalise onke amadoda akubudala obungamashumi amathathu ukuya kumashumi amahlanu eminyaka, onke awayefanelekile ukuba angasebenza *esibingelelweni." 
Numbers4:31 Umsebenzi wabo ke uya kuba kukuphatha izibonda zesibingelelo, iintsika, neziseko zazo;" 
Numbers4:32 neentsika neziseko, izikhonkwane neentsontela zenkundla jikelele, nazo zonke izinto ezisetyenziswa kuyo. Indoda nganye iya kumiselwa izinto emayiziphathe." 
Numbers4:33 Le ke yimisebenzi yamaMerari esibingelelweni. Aya kuyenza ekhokelwa nguItamare unyana kambingeleli uAron. 
Numbers4:34 Ngokomlomo *kaNdikhoyo uMosis, uAron, neenkokheli zamaSirayeli babala abaLevi bakwaKohati, abakwaGershon, nabakwaMerari. Bababhalisa ngokwezindlu nemizi yabo, bebhalisa onke amadoda akubudala bamashumi amathathu ukuya kumashumi amahlanu eminyaka. Babhalisa onke amadoda awayefanelekile ukuba angasebenza *esibingelelweni. Bawabala ngolu hlobo: Indlu Inani AbakwaKohati 2 750 AbakwaGershon 2 630 AbakwaMerari 3 200 Bebonke: 8 580" 
Numbers4:35 Indoda nganye yabhaliswa ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo kuMosis. Kwangaloo myalelo indoda nganye yabelwa owayo umsebenzi, ikhonjiswa into emayiyithwale." 
Numbers5:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: 
Numbers5:2 “Xelela amaSirayeli abakhuphele ngaphandle bonke abantu abanesifo solusu esisulelayo, nabophayo, noba *ngabanomlaza kukuphatha isidumbu." 
Numbers5:3 Bonke *abagqwaliseke ngolu hlobo mabakhutshelwe ngaphandle kwelali apho nam ndihlala kunye nawo.” 
Numbers5:4 Ngenene ke amaSirayeli ayenza le nto, abakhuphela phandle bonke abo bantu, njengoko uNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis." 
Numbers5:5 *UNdikhoyo wanika uMosis 
Numbers5:6 le miyalelo, wathi makayigqithisele kumaSirayeli, athi: “Nabani na, indoda okanye ibhinqa, obonakalisa ukunganyaniseki kuNdikhoyo ngokona omnye," 
Numbers5:7 makayivume loo nto imbi ayenzileyo, akhuphe intlawulo ngokuzeleyo. Ngaphezu koko ke uya kukhupha nesiqingatha sesihlanu, naso asinike umntu lowo amonileyo." 
Numbers5:8 Kambe ke ukuba umntu lowo akasekho, ibe ke kungekho nesalamane ekungahlawulwa kuso, kofuneka inikezelwe kuNdikhoyo, ibe yeyombingeleli. Le ntlawulo ke yongeza kulaa nkunzi yegusha kwenziwa ngayo idini lokucamagushela loo mntu unetyala." 
Numbers5:9 Wonke umnikelo owodwa okhutshwa ngamaSirayeli, ewunikela kuNdikhoyo, unenxaxheba eyeyababingeleli." 
Numbers5:10 Umnikelo wona ngowalowo unikelayo, kambe inxaxheba yeyababingeleli.”" 
Numbers5:11 *UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis," 
Numbers5:12 wathi makayalele amaSirayeli, athi: “Kungenzeka ukuba indoda isole umkayo, imkrokrela ukuba unento yokwenza nenye indoda, kodwa yona ibe ingaqinisekanga, kuba umcimbi lowo ungathiwanga pahaha, futhi ke ingenangqina nabungqina buphathekayo, njengoko engabanjwanga umfazi lowo. Mhlawumbi kungenzeka ukuba indoda leyo ibinamagxa nje, kungekho nanto ibitheni ayenzileyo umfazi lowo." 
Numbers5:13  
Numbers5:14  
Numbers5:15 Nokuba kuyiyiphi na imeko, indoda leyo iya kumthatha umfazi lowo, iye naye kumbingeleli. Kananjalo iya kuphatha ikhilogram enye yomgubo werhasi oyimfanelo yedini; kambe ke ayiyi kuwugalela mafutha nasiqhumiso, kuba ulidini elikhutshwa yindoda enobukhwele, umnikelo wokuphanda inyaniso." 
Numbers5:16 “Umbingeleli ke uya kumthatha umfazi lowo, ammise *esibingelelweni phambi koNdikhoyo." 
Numbers5:17 Uya kuthatha amanzi awodwa, awagalele engqayini, aze akhe umhlaba apho phantsi esibingelelweni, awugalele kuloo manzi, ukuze akrakre." 
Numbers5:18 Uya kusuka ke azikhulule iinwele zomfazi lowo, amnike loo mgubo womnikelo, awuphathe ngesandla. Ke yena umbingeleli uya kuphatha laa ngqayi inamanzi akrakrayo azisa ishwangusha kumntu onetyala." 
Numbers5:19 Umbingeleli ke uya kumfungisa umfazi lowo esithi: ‘Ukuba kuthe kanti awukhange ube nanto yakwenza nandoda yimbi, uza kuba msulwa kwishwangusha eliziswa ngala manzi." 
Numbers5:20 Kambe ke ukuba ngenene ukrexezile," 
Numbers5:21 wanga uNdikhoyo angalenza isiqalekiso igama lakho phakathi kwamawenu. Wanga ungahlala uphuma isisu, okanye uNdikhoyo akubethe ngegalimoya." 
Numbers5:22 Ngenene akwaba la manzi aya kusitsho isisu sakho sibe negalimoya, okanye uhlale uphuma isisu.’ “Umfazi lowo ke uya kuphendula athi: ‘Makube njalo.’" 
Numbers5:23 “Umbingeleli ke uya kusibhala esi siqalekiso, aze aphinde awuhlambe umbhalo lowo, ungene kulaa ngqayi inamanzi akrakrayo." 
Numbers5:24 Emva kokuba umbingeleli emseze umfazi lowo la manzi anokumenza aphathwe ngamahlaba," 
Numbers5:25 uya kuthatha laa mgubo womnikelo usesandleni sakhe, awuwanga-wangise phambi koNdikhoyo, awubeke kwiqonga lamadini." 
Numbers5:26 Uya kukha kuwo ngesandla atshise inxenye yawo apho eqongeni. Ekugqibeleni ke uya kuseza umfazi lowo awafince loo manzi. 
Numbers5:27 Ukuba ke kuthe kanti ngenene umfazi lowo ukrexezile, amanzi lawo aya kumtsho abe namahlaba, abe negalimoya, okanye aphume isisu. Ewe, woba ngoqalekisiweyo phakathi kwamawabo." 
Numbers5:28 Kambe ke, ukuba kuthe kanti umsulwa, akayi kwenzeka nto, futhi uya kuba nako ukufumana abantwana." 
Numbers5:29 “Lo ke ngumthetho mayela nendoda enobukhwele, ekrokrela ukuba umfazi wayo uyakrexeza. Umfazi lowo uya kumiswa esibingelelweni phambi koNdikhoyo, umbingeleli ke awuqhube loo msebenzi." 
Numbers5:30  
Numbers5:31 Indoda ke yona iya kuba msulwa; kanti ke yena umfazi, ukuba ufumaniseke enetyala, uya kuvuna into abeyilimile.”" 
Numbers6:1 *UNdikhoyo wagunyazisa uMosis," 
Numbers6:2 wathi makayalele amaSirayeli, athi: “Nabani na, indoda okanye ibhinqa, owenza isifungo esisodwa sokuba abe *lilolo likaNdikhoyo, kuba efuna ukuba ngokaNdikhoyo qwaba," 
Numbers6:3 makangaze asele iwayini natywala. Ewe, makangaze asele okanye atye nto eyenziwe ngeediliya." 
Numbers6:4 Ngalo lonke ixesha aselilolo makangatyi okanye asele nayiphi na into ephuma emdiliyeni, angafaki nditsho nembewu okanye ixolo lediliya." 
Numbers6:5 “Xa esephantsi kwesi sifungo makangachebi, angasusi neendevu ezi. Kaloku ngalo lonke elo xesha engokaNdikhoyo qwaba ubotshiwe sisifungo, ngoko ke makangaziphathi iinwele neendevu." 
Numbers6:6 Isihlwitha esi ngumqondiso wokuba uzinikele. Makangaze *azigqwalise ngokusondela kwisidumbu nokuba sesikayise okanye unina, nditsho nesomntakwabo." 
Numbers6:7  
Numbers6:8 Kaloku xa esephantsi kwesi sifungo ulilolo likaNdikhoyo. 
Numbers6:9 “Xa kwenzekile ukuba lowo ulilolo agqwaliseke ngokuba kufuphi nomntu osuke wafa ngebhaqo, kofuneka azigugule iinwele neendevu zakhe ngosuku lwesixhenxe, ukuze *ahlambuluke." 
Numbers6:10 Ngosuku lwesibhozo ke uya kuthatha amahobe amabini, noba ngamavukuthu, eze nawo esangweni *lesibingelelo kumbingeleli." 
Numbers6:11 Ngelinye ke umbingeleli uya kwenza idini lesono, lize elinye eli libe lidini elitshiswayo, khon' ukuze acanyagushelwe lowo ugqwaliswe sisidumbu. Kwangaloo mini ke umntu lowo uya kuziyeka ziphinde zikhule iinwele neendevu zakhe," 
Numbers6:12 azinikele ngokutsha ukuba abe lilolo likaNdikhoyo kangangesifungo eso. Intlawulo uya kuyenza ngokukhupha ixhwane lokwenza idini lesono. Elaa thuba lingaphambili ke, alichithe selelilolo, lilahlekile, kuba kaloku iinwele zakhe zigqwalisekile." 
Numbers6:13 “Kothi ke lakuphela ithuba lesifungo selolo elo, kuqhutywe lo msebenzi: Ilolo liya kuya esangweni lesibingelelo" 
Numbers6:14 nezi ndidi zeegusha zingenasiphako: ixhwane eliliduna, loba lelokwenza idini elitshiswayo; ixhwane elilithokazi, lona libe leledini lesono; nenkunzi yegusha yokwenza idini lobudlelwana." 
Numbers6:15 Ezi zinto zihamba nomnikelo weenkozo nowewayini. Uya kufaka ebhaskitini ezi ndidi zesonka ezinganyuswanga: izonka ezenziwe ngomgubo oxutywe namafutha nemiqathane ethanjiswe ngamafutha. 
Numbers6:16 “Umbingeleli ke uya kuwathatha amaxhwane, awanikele uNdikhoyo, enze idini lesono nelitshiswayo." 
Numbers6:17 Kwakhona ke uya kunikela inkunzi yegusha *kuNdikhoyo, ibe lidini lobudlelwana, ayidibanise nesaa sonka sisebhaskitini. Kananjalo ke uya kwenza nomnikelo weenkozo nowewayini." 
Numbers6:18 Apho ke esangweni lesibingelelo ilolo elo liya kuzigugula iinwele zalo, ezo zibubungqina bokuzinikela kwalo kuNdikhoyo, lizifake apho kuloo mlilo wedini lobudlelwana." 
Numbers6:19 “Emva koko umbingeleli makathathe umkhono ovuthiweyo wenkunzi yegusha, abuye athathe nesonka sibe sinye, nomqathane ngokunjalo phaya ebhaskitini, aze ke ezi zinto azinike ilolo elo ukuze lizibambe." 
Numbers6:20 Kananjalo ke umbingeleli uya kuwanga-wangisa lo mnikelo uwonke, awenze umnikelo owodwa kuNdikhoyo. Lo mnikelo owodwa ngowombingeleli; yaye wongeza laa ncum nalaa mlenze wenkunzi yegusha usisabelo sombingeleli kakade. Emva koko ke ilolo likhululekile, lingayisela iwayini.”" 
Numbers6:21 Lo ke ngumthetho obhekiselele kwilolo likaNdikhoyo omelwe kukufezekiswa. Ngaphezu koko lisenokunikela kangangoko ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo. 
Numbers6:22 *UNdikhoyo wathi uMosis," 
Numbers6:23 makayalele uAron noonyana bakhe ukuba bathamsanqele amaSirayeli benjenje: 
Numbers6:24 “Wanga angakuthi jize ngamathamsanqa uNdikhoyo, akulondoloze." 
Numbers6:25 Wanga angayindlezane kuwe uNdikhoyo, usixhamle isisa sakhe." 
Numbers6:26 Wanga angakwazelelela uNdikhoyo, akwambathise uxolo.”" 
Numbers6:27 Waza wathi ke uNdikhoyo: “Ukuba babiza igama lam bethamsanqela abantu bam amaSirayeli, nam ndiya kubathamsanqela.”" 
Numbers7:1 Mhla wagqiba uMosis ukumisela *isibingelelo, wasithambisa, wasinikezela, sona nezixhobo zaso ndawonye neqonga lamadini nokwalo." 
Numbers7:2 Zaza iinkokheli zezindlu zakwaSirayeli, kwaezo zazongamele ubalo," 
Numbers7:3 zezisa iminikelo yazo esibingelelweni *kuNdikhoyo. Yaba ziinqwelo ezintandathu ezineetentyi neenkabi zeenkomo ezilishumi elinambini. Iinkokheli zadibana ngenqwelo ngambini, yaza yayileyo yakhupha inkabi yenkomo. Zakuba zizinikele ke," 
Numbers7:4 uNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: 
Numbers7:5 “Ezi zipho zamkele ze zisetyenziswe esibingelelweni. Zigqithisele kubaLevi ngokwemisebenzi abajongene nayo.” 
Numbers7:6 Ngoko ke uMosis wathatha ezo nqwelo kwakunye neenkabi ezo, wazinika abaLevi." 
Numbers7:7 AbakwaGershon wabanika iinqwelo zambini neenkabi ezine. 
Numbers7:8 Bona abakwaMerari wabanika iinqwelo zane kunye nesibhozo seenkabi. Umsebezi wabo babeza kuwenza bekhokelwa nguItamare unyana ka-Aron. 
Numbers7:9 AbakwaKohati bona uMosis akabanikanga zinqwelo nazinkabi, kuba kaloku bona izinto ezingcwele ababeziphatha babezithwala emagxeni." 
Numbers7:10 Kananjalo iinkokheli zezisa neminikelo yokubhiyozela ukunikezelwa kweqonga lamadini. 
Numbers7:11 Kaloku uNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Zixelele iinkokheli ezo ukuba mazithathe ithuba elingangeentsuku ezilishumi elinambini, inkokheli nganye inikela izipho zayo ngosuku ngalunye, kulo mbhiyozo wokunikezelwa kweqonga lamadini.”" 
Numbers7:12 Ezo zipho ke zanikezelwa ngolu hlobo: Usuku Indlu Inkulu Lokuqala kaJuda uNashon ka-Aminadabhi Lwesibini kaIsakare uNataniyeli kaZuware Lwesithathu kaZebhulon uEliyabhi kaHelon Lwesine kaRubhen uElizure kaShedeyure Lwesihlanu kaSimon uShelumiyeli kaZurishadayi Lwesithandathu kaGadi uEliyasafu kaDuweli Lwesixhenxe kaEfrayim uElishama ka-Amihudi Lwesibhozo kaManase uGamaliyeli kaPedazure Lwesithoba kaBhenjamin uAbhidan kaGidiyoni Lweshumi kaDan uAhiyezere ka-Amisha-dayi Lweshumi linanye ka-Ashere uPagiyeli kaOkran Lweshumi linambini kaNafetali uAhira kaEnan Xa zizonke ke zezisa izipho ezifanayo ngolu hlobo: isitya sesiliva esibunzima buyikhilogram enesiqingatha, nesitya segazi lokutshiza sesiliva esibunzima bungamakhulu asibhozo eegram ngokomlinganiselo ovunyiweyo, zozibini zizele ngumgubo oxutywe namafutha wokwenza idini leenkozo; isityana segolide esibunzima buziigram ezilikhulu elineshumi sizele sisiqhumiso; inkunzana yenkomo, inkunzi yegusha, nexhwane, zokwenza idini elitshiswayo; inkunzi yebhokhwe yedini lesono; neenkabi zeenkomo ezimbini, iinkunzi zeegusha ezintlanu, isihlanu seebhokhwe, namaxhwane amahlanu, zedini lobudlelwane." 
Numbers7:13 Ke zizonke izipho ezeziswa zezi nkokheli kumsebenzi wokunikezelwa kweqonga zazimi ngolu hlobo: Yayingamashumi amabini anane ezitya zesiliva ezibunzima buziikhilogram ezimashumi mabini anesixhenxe namakhulu amathandathu eegram; ishumi elinambini lezityana zegolide ezibunzima buyikhilogram enamakhulu amathathu namashumi amabini eegram zizele sisiqhumiso; ishumi elinambini leenkunzi zeenkomo, ishumi elinambini leenkunzi zeegusha, ishumi elinambini lamaxhwane, ngokunjalo nomnikelo weenkozo wedini elitshiswayo; ishumi elinambini leebhokhwe zedini lesono; amashumi amabini anesine eenkunzi zeenkomo, namashumi amathandathu eenkunzi zeegusha, amashumi amathandathu eebhokhwe, namashumi amathandathu amaxhwane, okwenza idini lobudlelwana." 
Numbers7:14 UMosis wathi akungena esibingelelweni wathetha noNdikhoyo owavakala ethetha phezu kwesivalo setyesi enobungqina bomnqophiso phakathi kwezo *zithunywa zimaphiko. 
Numbers8:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis 
Numbers8:2 makaxelele uAron ukuba xa ebeka esaa sibane sizibane zisixhenxe, aze asimise ngohlobo lokuba ilitha laso liwe ngaphambili." 
Numbers8:3 UAron wawuthobela loo myalelo, wasimisa njengoko kutshiwo isibane." 
Numbers8:4 Wasibumba sonke ngegolide ngokomfanekiso awayewubonisiwe nguNdikhoyo uMosis. 
Numbers8:5 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis 
Numbers8:6 ukuba abakhethe abaLevi kumaSirayeli, abahlambulule" 
Numbers8:7 ngolu hlobo: “Bafefe ngamanzi okuhlambulula, utsho bachebe babususe bonke uboya emizimbeni, bazihlambe neempahla zabo. Bakuba benjenjalo ke baya kuhlambuluka." 
Numbers8:8 Emva koko ke mabathathe inkunzana yenkomo, baphathe nomgubo onamafutha ukulungiselela ukwenza idini leenkozo; uze futhi uthathe enye inkunzi yenkomo yokwenza umnikelo wesono." 
Numbers8:9 Qokelela ibandla lamaSirayeli ephela, uze bona abaLevi ubemise phambi *kwesibingelelo." 
Numbers8:10 AmaSirayeli ke aya kubeka izandla zawo phezu kweentloko zabaLevi. 
Numbers8:11 Ke uAron uya kusuka abanikezele abaLevi abo kum, babe ngumnikelo owanga-wangiswayo ovela kumaSirayeli, ukuze bawufanele umsebenzi wam." 
Numbers8:12 AbaLevi ke baya kubeka izandla phezu kwezaa nkunzi zimbini. Enye yazo yeyedini lesono, kanti ke enye yeyedini elitshiswayo, khon' ukuze abaLevi bacanyagushelwe.”" 
Numbers8:13 UNdikhoyo waqhuba wathi: “AbaLevi mababe ngumnikelo owanga-wangiswayo, baze bonganyelwe nguAron noonyana bakhe." 
Numbers8:14 Ngale ndlela ke bakhethe abaLevi kumaSirayeli, babe libango lam." 
Numbers8:15 Wakuba ke ubahlambulule, wabanikezela abaLevi, baya kukufanela ukubusa esibingelelweni." 
Numbers8:16 Kuwo onke amaSirayeli abaLevi ngabam ncakasana, kuba ndibanga bona endaweni yoonyana bamazibulo bamaSirayeli." 
Numbers8:17 Ukuwabulala kwam amazibulo amaJipta, ndazibekela bucala bonke oonyana bamazibulo bamaSirayeli, ngokunjalo namaduna angamazibulo emfuyo yawo." 
Numbers8:18 Kambe ke ngoku ndibanga abaLevi endaweni yamazibulo amaSirayeli; 
Numbers8:19 abaLevi aba ndiwabeka phantsi koAron noonyana bakhe, bangumnikelo wamaSirayeli esibingelelweni, khon' ukuze babuse bangxengxeze, amaSirayeli angehlelwa sisibetho ebesingawehlelayo xa asondele esibingelelweni.”" 
Numbers8:20 Ngoko ke uMosis noAron nalo lonke ibandla lamaSirayeli babamisela babanikezela abaLevi ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo. 
Numbers8:21 AbaLevi bazicoca bahlamba neempahla zabo, waza ke uAron wabanikezela baba sisipho esiwanga-wangiswayo sikaNdikhoyo, waza wabahlambulula ngokuwacamagushela." 
Numbers8:22 Mayela nabaLevi amaSirayeli alungisa konke ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis. Baba ke ngoko ngolu hlobo abaLevi bafikelele kwibanga lokubusa esibingelelweni phantsi koAron noonyana bakhe. 
Numbers8:23 UNdikhoyo wanika uMosis 
Numbers8:24 ummiselo othi: “Ixesha lokuqala komLevi ngamnye ukubusa esibingelelweni loba kuxa aneminyaka engamashumi amabini nantlanu," 
Numbers8:25 aze aphumle xa anamashumi amahlanu. 
Numbers8:26 Phofu ke angákhe aqhube encedisa oogxa bakhe, kodwa ke yena siqu engenamsebenzi uthe ngxishi. Nantso ke indlela baya kusebenza ngayo abaLevi.”" 
Numbers9:1 Kwathi ke kaloku xa amaSirayeli akwintlango yaseSinayi, kwinyanga yokuqala kunyaka wesibini aphumayo kwelaseJiputa, *uNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi:" 
Numbers9:2 “Emalanga ngomhla weshumi elinesine wale nyanga kofuneka amaSirayeli aqalise umbhiyozo wesikhumbuzo *sePasika, ngokwezimiso nemigaqo yayo.”" 
Numbers9:3  
Numbers9:4 Ngenene ke uMosis wawaxelela amaSirayeli ngePasika," 
Numbers9:5 aza ke ngolo rhatya lomhla weshumi elinesine, kuloo nyanga yokuqala ayibhiyozela khona apho kwintlango yeSinayi. Yonke into yaqhutywa ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis." 
Numbers9:6 Kanti ke kwabakho bantu bathile *babegqwaliswe kukuphatha isidumbu. Bona ke zange babe nako ukuthatha nxaxheba apho kuloo mbhiyozo ngaloo mini. Baya kuzixela kuMosis noAron," 
Numbers9:7 bathi: “*Sinomlaza, kuba sichukumise isidumbu; kambe ke singathini ukuphoswa xa abanye benikela ngedini lePasika kuNdikhoyo?”" 
Numbers9:8 UMosis wathi: “Lindani ndide ndifumane ilizwi kuNdikhoyo.” 
Numbers9:9 UNdikhoyo ke wathi kuMosis: 
Numbers9:10 “Xelela amaSirayeli ukuba xa omnye wawo okanye intsapho igqwaliseke kukuphatha isidumbu, okanye ekude eluhambeni, usenako ukuwubhiyozela umhla wePasika." 
Numbers9:11 Makawubhiyozele ngosuku lweshumi elinesine kwinyanga yesibini ngorhatya. Mawubhiyozelwe ngesonka esinganyuswanga nemifino ekrakrayo. 
Numbers9:12 Oku kutya makungabekwa mbeko, namathambo enyama leyo angàkrotyozwa. Umhla lowo ke wobhiyozelwa ngokwemiqathango yawo." 
Numbers9:13 Nabani na ke ongenasizathu, futhi engekho luhambeni, aze angawubhiyozeli lo mhla, uya kusikwa kumaSirayeli, kuba enganikelanga ngedini lePasika kuNdikhoyo ngexesha elimisiweyo. Uya kohlwaywa ngesono sakhe." 
Numbers9:14 “Ukuba owasemzini ophakathi kwenu ufuna ukuba nenxaxheba kulo mbhiyozo wePasika, uvumelekile, kodwa yonke into makayenze ngokwemimiselo nemigaqo. Wonke umntu wohamba kwangalo mthetho, noba ngumngeneleli okanye ngowothuthu.”" 
Numbers9:15 Ke kaloku kwathi mhla yagxunyekwa yemiswa intente *yesibingelelo enobungqina bomnqophiso lasuka lakhakhaba layambathisa ilifu. Ngokuhlwa kude kube kusasa ke eli lifu lalisuka libe ngumlilo odangazelayo. 
Numbers9:16  
Numbers9:17 AmaSirayeli ayesithi lakuzisonga liphakame ilifu elo, afuduke, aze aye kumisa apho lihle lafukama khona." 
Numbers9:18 AmaSirayeli la ayefuduka ngomyalelo *kaNdikhoyo, kanti ke nokumisa kwawo kwakukwaxhomekeke kuwo. Xa lisahleli lifukamile apho esibingelelweni ilifu elo, amaSirayeli ayehlala alinde." 
Numbers9:19 Naxa lihleli ithuba elide apho esibingelelweni lingemki, amaSirayeli ayethobela uNdikhoyo ahlale." 
Numbers9:20 Maxa wambi ke eli lifu lalihlala nje ithuba leentsukwana, libuye liphakame; kambe ke nakuyiphi na imeko wona amaSirayeli ayehamba okanye ahlale ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo." 
Numbers9:21 Kanti kwakusenzeka nokuba lifike lifukame ngorhatya, lize ngentsasa elandelayo licombuluke. Phofu ke wona amaSirayeli ayengadubeki koko; ayelilandela nanini na licombuluka, nokuba kusemini okanye kusebusuku." 
Numbers9:22 Ewe, nokuba lihleli iintsuku ezimbini, inyanga, nonyaka, kanti naxa lihleli ngaphezu kwelo thuba, oko nje lifukamile apho esibingelelweni, ayelilinda, aze ahambe lakucombuluka." 
Numbers9:23 Ngokupheleleyo ke ukunduluka nokumisa kwamaSirayeli kwakuxhomekeke kwisikhokelo esinikwe uMosis nguNdikhoyo. 
Numbers10:1 *UNdikhoyo wabiza uMosis, wathi:" 
Numbers10:2 “Thatha isiliva, uyibumbe wenze amaxilongo amabini, khon' ukuze uwavuthele xa ubiza ibandla lamaSirayeli, naxa kufuneka kundulukwe." 
Numbers10:3 Xa evuthelwe omabini enza umtyangampo, ibandla lonke likaSirayeli liya kuqokelelana phambi kwakho esangweni *lesibingelelo." 
Numbers10:4 Ukanti ke xa kutso lalinye kuphela, koza kuwe iinkokheli zezindlu zodwa." 
Numbers10:5 Xa ufuna kunduluke izindlu ezikwicala lasempuma, uze ulivuthele litsho ngezinqam." 
Numbers10:6 Xa uziphinda ezo zinqam zexilongo, kuya kunduluka izindlu ezikwicala langezantsi. Ngoko ke xa ixilongo lisitsho ngeziqwenga zezinqam, loba lisithi makundulukwe." 
Numbers10:7 Kodwa ke xa kufuneka uSirayeli ephela ahlangane, ixilongo liya kutsho ngomtyangampo." 
Numbers10:8 “Amaxilongo lawo ke makavuthelwe ngoonyana baka-Aron ababingeleli. Lo ke ngummiselo kuwe nezizukulwana ezizayo. 
Numbers10:9 “Xa kuthe kwafuneka ukuba nihlasele isizwe esinitshutshisayo kwelakowenu, vakalisani ngexilongo ukuba ilizwe lifile. Ke mna Ndikhoyo, Thixo wenu, ndoba ngakuni, ndinihlangule kwezo ntshaba." 
Numbers10:10 Kanti ke nangamathuba emibhiyozo – ukuthwasa kwenyanga nangamaxesha amatheko – hlokomisani amaxilongo xa nisenza amadini atshiswayo nawobudlelwana; aya kundikhumbuza ngani; kaloku ndinguNdikhoyo, uThixo wenu.”" 
Numbers10:11 Ngomhla wamashumi amabini kwinyanga yesibini yonyaka wesibini amaSirayeli andulukayo eJiputa, ilifu *elalisesibingelelweni lacombuluka laphakama." 
Numbers10:12 AmaSirayeli ke afuduka ev' endleleni, ayishiya intlango yeSinayi. Ke kaloku ilifu elo lahamba laza lafika lafukama kwintlango yeParan." 
Numbers10:13 Aqala ke ngoku amaSirayeli ahamba ngamabanga ngokweziyalo *zikaNdikhoyo kuMosis. 
Numbers10:14 Maxa onke amabutho awo ayehlala ebambe ucwangco, etsho ngomngcelele. Abokuqala yaba ngabaphantsi kwembasa yendlu kaJuda, bengamabutho ngamabutho, bekhokelwa nguNashon unyana ka-Aminadabhi." 
Numbers10:15 Ke yena uNataniyeli, unyana kaZuware, wayekhokele indlu kaIsakare;" 
Numbers10:16 waza yena uEliyabhi, unyana kaHelon, wakhokela indlu kaZebhulon." 
Numbers10:17 Yathi ke yakuncothulwa intente yesibingelelo yathathwa ngabaLevi bakwaGershon nakwaMerari, banduluka." 
Numbers10:18 Kwaza ke kwanduluka abembasa yendlu kaRubhen bengamabutho ngamabutho, bekhokelwa nguElizure, unyana kaShedeyure." 
Numbers10:19 Abendlu kaSimon bona bakhokelwa nguShelumiyeli, unyana kaZurishadayi;" 
Numbers10:20 baza abendlu kaGadi bakhokelwa nguEliyasafu, unyana kaDuweli." 
Numbers10:21 Ke bona abaLevi bakwaKohati balandela bephethe ezingcwele zesibingelelo. Bathi befika apho kwakumiswe khona, saba isibingelelo sesimisiwe kwakhona." 
Numbers10:22 Nabo abaphantsi kwembasa yendlu kaEfrayim banduluka, amabutho ngamabutho, bebhexeshwa nguElishama, unyana ka-Amihudi." 
Numbers10:23 Kanti ke bona abendlu kaManase babephantsi kukaGamaliyeli, unyana kaPedazure;" 
Numbers10:24 baza abendlu kaBhenjamin bakhokelwa nguAbhidan, unyana kaGidiyoni." 
Numbers10:25 Emva ke kwakungcambaza abo baphantsi kwembasa yendlu kaDan, bengamabutho ngamabutho, bebhexeshwa nguAhiyezere, unyana ka-Amishadayi." 
Numbers10:26 Bona abendlu ka-Ashere babekhokelwa nguPagiyeli, unyana kaOkran;" 
Numbers10:27 waza yena uAhira, unyana kaEnan, wakhokela indlu kaNafetali." 
Numbers10:28 Nantso ke indlela owawusima ngayo umngcelele wamaSirayeli eluhambeni lwawo. 
Numbers10:29 Ke kaloku uMosis wathetha noHobhabhi usibali wakhe ongunyana kaJetro waseMidiyan, wathi: “Ke ngoku, sibali, sekumbovu ukuba sinduluke sijonge ukuya kungena kwelo lizwe uNdikhoyo wathembisa ukusinika lona. Wasithembisa ukuba uSirayeli uya kuhluma. Ngoko ke hamba nathi, ukuze siyixhamle kunye loo nyhweba yenkqubela.”" 
Numbers10:30 UHobhabhi walandula wathi: “Hayi, andinako, sibali. Ndifuna ukuphindela kwelakowethu.”" 
Numbers10:31 UMosis wambongoza wathi: “Hayi kaloku, ungathini ukusishiya, inguwe nje oyaziyo le ntlango. Wena unako ukusikhokela, usibonise apho sifanele ukumisa khona." 
Numbers10:32 Xa unokuhamba nathi siya kuyixhamla kunye inyhweba yentlala-kahle asibabala ngayo uNdikhoyo.” 
Numbers10:33 Ukuyishiya kwawo amaSirayeli loo ntaba ingcwele, iSinayi, ahamba iintsuku ezintathu. Ke yona ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo yayisoloko ihamba phambili, ibakhangelela indawo yokuphumla." 
Numbers10:34 Nanini na benduluka ilifu likaNdikhoyo lalijinga phezu kwabo. 
Numbers10:35 Xa iphumayo ityesi yomnqophiso uMosis wayedanduluka athi: “Hoyina, Ndikhoyo, vuka wenz' iziqwenga, uzichitha-chithe iintshaba zakho, ubaswantsulise abakuthiyileyo!”" 
Numbers10:36 Apho iphumla khona ke uMosis wayesithi: “Khawubuye, Ndikhoyo, ufukame phakathi kwamawaka-waka akwaSirayeli!”" 
Numbers11:1 Ke kaloku amaSirayeli amkhalazela *uNdikhoyo ngenxa yobunzima ayebuva. Uthe akuyiva le nto uNdikhoyo wacaphuka, wawathumela ngomlilo. Ke wona wadangazela wayitshabalalisa inxalenye yamaphethelo ekampu yamaSirayeli." 
Numbers11:2 Ke wona abhenela kuMosis, acela uncedo. Yena ke wabongoza uNdikhoyo ngenxa yawo, waza ke umlilo lowo wadamba." 
Numbers11:3 Ngenxa yaloo mlilo ke wathunyelwa nguNdikhoyo, amaSirayeli athi igama laloo ndawo yiTabhera." 
Numbers11:4 Ke kaloku phakathi kwamaSirayeli kwakukho ingxubevange yabantu. Bona ke basuka bangenelwa kukurhala, aza namaSirayeli angenelela, akhalaza athi: “Awu, akwaba besinokukhe sifumane inyama!" 
Numbers11:5 Khawufan' ucinge; kaloku eJiputa intlanzi sasiyitya side siyishiye, singayithenganga nokuyithenga. Awu, yeka loo nkonkomire, naloo vatala, nelo hanyanisi, nelo tswele, nezo kinofile sasizixhaphaza!" 
Numbers11:6 Uyabona ke ngoku seside sakruquka; ibe ke akukho nakutya ngaphandle kwale mana.” 
Numbers11:7 Imana leyo ke ibilingana nembewu yekoriyanda, imhlotshana oku kwentlaka." 
Numbers11:8 Ke yona yayibakho ngokuhlwa, isiwa nombethe. Kwakusithi ke kusasa abantu baphume baye kuyichola bayiqokelele, bayisile ibe ngumgubo, okanye bayingqushe. Babeyipheka okanye bayenze amaqebengwana ngamafutha. Emlonyeni yayingathi sisonka esenziwe ngamafutha omnquma." 
Numbers11:9  
Numbers11:10 UMosis weva imizi ngemizi yamaSirayeli ikhalaza. Wev' intw' embi, kuba umsindo *kaNdikhoyo wasuka wavutha." 
Numbers11:11 Wabhekisa kuNdikhoyo wathi: “Ngani ukuba undiphathe kanje, Mhlekazi? Undiqumbele ngani? Kwakutheni ukuze undinike aba bantu baluxanduva olunje?" 
Numbers11:12 Kakade, ngaba bakhawulwa ndim? Hayi kaloku, àbazalwa ndim; ngani ke ukuba uthi mandibasingathe oku kwempelesi egcina usana, ndibase kwelo lizwe wabathembisa ngalo ngesifungo ooyise-mkhulu?" 
Numbers11:13 Kodwa kodwa ndingayizuza phi inyama, ukuze ndiphe bonke aba bantu? Kuba nâbo besoloko bebhomboloza, besithi mandibaphe inyama." 
Numbers11:14 Hayi bo! Andinako ukuwuthwala ndedwa lo mthwalo ungaba bantu; ungaphezu kwam! 
Numbers11:15 Endaweni yale ndlela undiphethe ngayo, ndibulale kube kanye, ukuba uyavelana nam, khon' ukuze ndingayiboni le ntlekele iza kundihlela!”" 
Numbers11:16 Kwesi sithuba ke uNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi: “Thatha amadoda amakhulu angamashumi asixhenxe aziinkokheli zamaSirayeli, uze nawo apha *esibingelelweni, eme nawe." 
Numbers11:17 Ke mna ndiya kufika ndithethe nani khona, ndize nawo ndiwahlulele kuMoya okuwe, khon' ukuze abe nokukunceda kolu xanduva lungaba bantu, ungaluthwali wedwa." 
Numbers11:18 Ke bona aba bantu yithi kubo: ‘Hlambulukani, kuba ngomso niya kuyitya inyama. Kaloku uNdikhoyo usivile isililokazi senu, nisithi nikhanuka inyama, akwaba beniseseJiputa. Ngoku ke uNdikhoyo uza kuninika loo nyama, yaye ke niza kuyitya." 
Numbers11:19 Ewe, anizukuyitya nje usuku olunye nezimbini, mhlawumbi ezimbalwa;" 
Numbers11:20 hayi, niya kuyitya inyanga yonke, ide iphume ngeempumlo, nidikwe ide ibe lizothe kuni. Kaloku nimbukule uNdikhoyo ekho, elapha phakathi kwenu; nibhomboloza nisithi: “Akwaba sasingemkanga eJiputa!” ’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 UMosis waphendula wathi kuNdikhoyo: “Aba bantu ngamakhulu amathandathu amawaka xa ndibala amadoda anokuya emfazweni kuphela, ibe ke wena usithi uza kubanika inyama yenyanga yonke!" 
Numbers11:22 Khona sebexhelelwe imihlambi yeenkomo neegusha, uthi banganela? Okanye ke uthi banganela xa benikwe zonke iintlanzi eziselwandle?”" 
Numbers11:23 UNdikhoyo wabuza wathi: “Ucinga ukuba ikho into engaze indoyise? Nawe uza kuzibonela ukuba liwa phantsi na ilizwi lam!” 
Numbers11:24 UMosis ke waya kumaSirayeli, wawaxelela oko kuthethwe nguNdikhoyo. Wathatha amashumi asixhenxe amadoda amakhulu, wawamisa angqonga isibingelelo." 
Numbers11:25 UNdikhoyo ke wehla ngelifu, wafika wathetha naye. Iinkokheli ezo wazahlulela kuMoya owawukuMosis, zaza zathi ke zakuwufumana zadanduluka okwabashumayeli, nakuba zingaphindanga zenjenjalo." 
Numbers11:26 Ezimbini kwezi nkokheli, uEldadi noMedade, zona zahlala ezindlwini zazo, azaya esibingelelweni. Kodwa uMoya wazifikela, zatsho zashumayela nazo." 
Numbers11:27 Umfana othile wabaleka waya kuxelela uMosis ukuba uEldadi noMedade bayashumayela. 
Numbers11:28 Ke yena uYoshuwa, unyana kaNune, owayelihlakani likaMosis kwasebutsheni bakhe, wabhekisa kuMosis wathi: “Banqande, nkosi yam, bangashumayeli!”" 
Numbers11:29 Koko ke yena uMosis waphendula wathi: “Ngaba uya ndikhweletela na? Ukuba bekuya ngam, uNdikhoyo nge-ebafaka uMoya wakhe bonke abantu bakhe, batsho babe ngabashumayeli bonke.”" 
Numbers11:30 Ke kaloku uMosis naloo mashumi asixhenxe eenkokheli bagoduka. 
Numbers11:31 *UNdikhoyo wasuka wathumela umoya, wandulula izagwityi elwandle. Zafika zasingqonga isikhululo samaSirayeli, zibhabhazela phantsi kumphakamo omalunga nemitha enye. Zazininzi kangangokuba ubunokuhamba imini yonke ucanda phakathi kwazo." 
Numbers11:32 Loo mini yonke ke, nobusuku bayo, nemini elandelayo, amaSirayeli aba zizingxada-ngxada eqokelela izagwityi. Nomntu owabutha kancinci akafumananga ngaphantsi kwewaka leekhilogram ubunzima. Ke inyama leyo ayeyiqwayita eyibeka ijikeleze izindlu zawo." 
Numbers11:33 Kambe kwathi esayihlafuna inyama leyo, engekayigqibi, suka wavutha umsindo kaNdikhoyo, wawabetha ngobhubhani amaSirayeli." 
Numbers11:34 Ngoko ke igama laloo ndawo kwathiwa yiKibroti-hatava, kuba bangcwatywa apho abantu ababebawela inyama." 
Numbers11:35 Ukusuka apho ke amaSirayeli aya kugaleleka eHazeroti, apho afika anqumama khona." 
Numbers12:1 Ke kaloku uMosis wayethathe umKushekazi, kwaza ngenxa yeso sizathu uMiriyam noAron bamgxeka." 
Numbers12:2 Babesithi: “*UNdikhoyo ngaba uthethe ngomlomo kaMosis kuphela na? Kanene akathethanga na nathi?” Kambe ke uNdikhoyo wakuva oku kuthetha kwabo. ( 
Numbers12:3 Lo mfo unguMosis ke wayelilulama, kungekho mntu ufika kuye ngokuthoba ehlabathini liphela.)" 
Numbers12:4 UNdikhoyo wathetha ngoko nangoko noMosis noAron noMiriyam, wathi: “Yiyani phaya *esibingelelweni nobathathu.” Ngenene ke baya," 
Numbers12:5 waza uNdikhoyo wehla ngelifu, waya kuma esangweni lesibingelelo. Wasuka ke wabiza uAron noMiriyam. Bakuba bezile ke," 
Numbers12:6 uNdikhoyo wathi: “Phulaphulan' apha! *Kumshumayeli onokubakho phakathi kwenu ndizibonakalisa ngemibono, ndithethe naye ngamaphupha." 
Numbers12:7 Akunjalo ke kodwa kwisicaka sam uMosis; yena lithenjwa kwindlu yam iphela. 
Numbers12:8 Ngoko ke yena ndithetha naye ubuso ngobuso, hayi ngezangotshe. Ewe, mna ngokwam ndiyazibonakalisa kuye. Hee! Ngani ke ukuba ningoyiki ukuthetha kakubi ngesicaka sam uMosis?”" 
Numbers12:9 Hayi ke, wavutha uNdikhoyo ngumsindo, wabashiya." 
Numbers12:10 Lithe ke lona liphuma ilifu apho esibingelelweni waye uMiriyam selemhlophe wé sisifo solusu esikhwankqisayo. UAron uthe akumjonga wafumanisa ukuba simbophile esi sifo. 
Numbers12:11 Kwangoko ke wajikela kuMosis, wambongoza wathi: “Camagu, nkosi yam! Ndiyakuthandaza; musa ukukhathazeka ngenxa yobutyhakala esibenzileyo." 
Numbers12:12 Nqanda angade abe ngathi yinto ezelw' ifile selineenyama ezonakeleyo.” 
Numbers12:13 Kwangoko ke uMosis wadanduluka kuNdikhoyo, wathi: “Camagu, Thixo wam, ndiyakubongoza, khawumphilise!”" 
Numbers12:14 UNdikhoyo waphendula wathi: “Andithi ebengáthi ekhe watshicelwa nguyise ebusweni anyeliseke iintsuku ezisixhenxe? Nangoku ke makakhutshelwe ngaphandle kwebandla lakwaSirayeli iintsuku ezisixhenxe; emva koko ke aphinde abuye.” 
Numbers12:15 Ngenene ke uMiriyam wakhutshelwa ngaphandle komzi wamaSirayeli iintsuku zasixhenxe. AmaSirayeli ke akhe alinda apho kuloo ndawo wada uMiriyam wabuyiselwa. 
Numbers12:16 Kamva ke anduluka apho eHazeroti, aya kugaleleka kwintlango yaseParan." 
Numbers13:1 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis 
Numbers13:2 ukuba akhethe inkokheli ibe nye kwindlu nganye kwezo zilishumi elinambini, azithumele zibe ziintlola, ziye kuhlola ilizwe laseKanana awayelinika amaSirayeli." 
Numbers13:3 UMosis wenza ngokwelo lizwi likaNdikhoyo, waza khona apho kwintlango yaseParan wazikhetha ngolu hlobo iinkokheli: Indlu Inkokheli KwaRubhen uShamuwa kaZakure KwaSimon uShafati kaHori KwaJuda uKalebhi kaJefune KwaIsakare uIgali kaJosefu KwaEfrayim uHosheya kaNune KwaBhenjamin uPalti kaRafu KwaZebhulon uGadiyeli kaSodi KwaManase uGadi kaSusi KwaDan uAmiyeli kaGemali Kwa-Ashere uSeture kaMikayeli KwaNafetali uNabhi kaVofesi KwaGadi uGeweli kaMaki" 
Numbers13:4  
Numbers13:5  
Numbers13:6 Ezi ke ziintlola ezathunyelwa nguMosis ukuba ziye kuhlola elaseKanana. Ke yena uHosheya, unyana kaNune, uMosis wamnika igama elinguYoshuwa." 
Numbers13:7 Ke kaloku ukuzindulula kwakhe uMosis wathi: “Phumani ninyuke nilingene eMazantsi ilizwe laseKanana, nize niye kufikelela kweleentaba." 
Numbers13:8 Maze nilijonge ukuba uluhlobo luni na umhlaba walo; bungakanani na ubuninzi babantu balo; ngaba ngamakroti okanye amagwala? 
Numbers13:9 Ze niqondisise ukuba lilizwe elinjani na: lihle na noba hayi? Khona abantu balo balime kanjani: ziidolophu eziphangaleleyo, okanye zizixeko ezikhuselweyo?" 
Numbers13:10 Ze nilijonge ukuba ngaba lelendyebo, indlala, sini na; niqondisise noba ngaba linemithi na. Ze nibuye niphethe iziqhamo zakhona.” Ixesha lonyaka ezahamba ngalo yayilelokuvuthwa kweediliya." 
Numbers13:11 Loo madoda ke aphuma enyuka alijonga eqalela kwintlango iZin, aya kuqhina ngeRehobhi kwinkalo yeHamati." 
Numbers13:12 Angena eMazantsi aya kufika eHebron, apho kwakumi ama-Ahiman, namaSheshayi, namaTalmayi omlibo ka-Anaki. (IHebron le ke yayakhiwe kwiminyaka esixhenxe phambi kokwakhiwa kweZowan yaseJiputa.)" 
Numbers13:13 Iintlola ezo ke zaya kufikelela nakwintili ye-Eshkoli. Apha ke zakha isebe lomdiliya elalinesihlahla esinye seediliya. Labekwa esibondeni, laxwaywa ngamadoda amabini. Ngokunjalo zakha zaphatha neerharnati namakhiwane. (" 
Numbers13:14 Le ntili ke yathiywa igama elithi intili ye-Eshkoli ngenxa yeso sikhinkci seediliya iintlola ezo zasikhayo apho kuyo.) 
Numbers13:15 Ezi ntlola ke zathatha amashumi amane eentsuku ziligocagoca elo lizwe, zaza ke zagoduka zaya" 
Numbers13:16 kuMosis noAron nebandla liphela lamaSirayeli eKadeshe kwintlango yaseParan. Zenza ingxelo ngezikubonileyo, zababonisa neziqhamo ezazize nazo." 
Numbers13:17 Zathi kuMosis: “Elaa lizwe silikhangele, saza safumanisa ukuba lityebile, lilizwe lobisi nobusi. Khangela, nazi iziqhamo zakhona." 
Numbers13:18 Kambe ke abantu balo ziingwanyalala, zaye ke nezixeko zabo zikhulu zinqatyisiwe. Ngaphezu koko ke nenzala ka-Anaki siyibone ngamehlo." 
Numbers13:19 Ama-Amaleki wona emi eMazantsi; aze amaHiti, amaJebhusi, nama-Amori wona abe phaya kweleentaba; kanti ke wona amaKanana athe qwelele phaya ngaselwandle nakummandla womlambo iJordan.”" 
Numbers13:20 Kwesi sithuba ke uKalebhi wasuka wababeth' emlonyeni abo babenika ingxelo kuMosis, wathi: “Mawethu, kuf' ayayo! Masinyuke ngoku siye kulihlasela elaa lizwe. Sinako ukubaswantsulisa abaya bantu.”" 
Numbers13:21 Kambe ke oogxa bakhe baphikelele bathi: “Ayikho indlela yokubahlasela, kuba ziingwanyalala kunathi.”" 
Numbers13:22 Ngoko ke lo moya wabo bawuhlwayela apho kumaSirayeli ngemeko yelo lizwe babevela kulo. Bade bathi: “Elo lizwe linengozi; kuyatshatyalalwa apho. Abantu bakhona baziingxilimbela; 
Numbers13:23 siyibonile nenzala ka-Anaki. Ngokubona kwethu, thina sinjengeentethe kubantu belo lizwe; makube kukwanjalo nasekuboneni kwabo.”" 
Numbers14:1 Ke kaloku ibandla liphela lamaSirayeli latsho ngesimbonono lakhala bonke obo busuku. 
Numbers14:2 Ewe, uSirayeli wakhalaza kuMosis noAron, esithi: “Akwaba sasifele eJiputa, okanye sifele kule ntlango." 
Numbers14:3 Ngani ukuba *uNdikhoyo asise kwilizwe elinjalo? Kuba kucacile ukuba siya kufel' emfazweni, baze abafazi nabantwana bethu babe ngamaxhoba. Anitsho nina ukuba kubhetele sibuyele kwaseJiputa?”" 
Numbers14:4 Baza ke bacebisana bathi: “Masizikhethele inkokheli yokusibuyisela eJiputa.” 
Numbers14:5 Kwesi sithuba ke uMosis noAron bathi guqaqa apho phambi kwebandla lakwaSirayeli liphela. 
Numbers14:6 Ke yena uYoshuwa unyana kaNune, noKalebhi unyana kaJefune, abanye bezaa ntlola, basuka baziqwenga iimpahla zabo ngenxa yokukhathazeka," 
Numbers14:7 baza babhekisa kumaSirayeli, bathi: “Hayi bo! Elaa lizwe sivela kulijonga lelihle kunene." 
Numbers14:8 Ukuba uNdikhoyo uyakholwa sithi, uza kusisa kulo, alinikezele kuthi, yeka ke kambe indyebo yalo – liyintombazana!" 
Numbers14:9 Nto nje nina musani ukumvukela uNdikhoyo, ningabaxhaleli nabemi belo lizwe, kuba siya kuboyisa lula. UNdikhoyo ungakuthi, ibe ke bona bakukutya kwethu, kuba *izithixo zabo azinakubanceda. Hayi bo, sanukuba nadyudyu ngenxa yabo!”" 
Numbers14:10 Ke kaloku amaSirayeli ephela athi selezimisele ukubaxuluba ngamatye, suka abona ngobukhazi-khazi bokukhazimla kukaNdikhoyo bukhakhaba phezu kwesibingelelo." 
Numbers14:11 *UNdikhoyo ke wadanduluka wathi: “Koda kube nini aba bantu bendidela? Koda kube nini bengandithembi, nangona sendenze imimangaliso engaka nje phakathi kwabo?" 
Numbers14:12 Yini le! Ndiza kubathumela ngobhubhani ndibatshabalalise. Kambe ke wena, nenzala yakho, ndiza kukwenza isizwe esikhulu nesinobungangamsha kunabo.”" 
Numbers14:13 Ke yena uMosis waphendula wathi kuNdikhoyo: “Awu, Mhlekazi, koba yini amaJiputa akuyiva loo nto? Kaloku nguwe owakhupha aba bantu phakathi kwawo ngamandla akho." 
Numbers14:14 Abemi beli lizwe sebezivile iindaba zokuba wena Ndikhoyo uhamba nawo amaSirayeli, abantu bakho, yaye ubonwa ngamehlo; futhi nelifu lakho lisoloko lijinga phezu kwawo. Bevile nokuba wena emini uwakhokela ngomqulu welifu, uze uwakhokele ngomlilo odangazelayo ebusuku." 
Numbers14:15 Ngoko ke ukuba uyawatshabalalisa, ezi zizwe zivileyo ngodumo lwakho ziya kuthi" 
Numbers14:16 aba bantu bakho ubatshabalalisele kule ntlango kuba woyisiwe kukubasa kwelo lizwe wawubathembise ngalo ngesifungo. 
Numbers14:17 Ndiyakubongoza ke ngoko, Mhlekazi, ukuba ukhe uphuhlise amandla akho ngokwelizwi lakho elithi:" 
Numbers14:18 ‘Mna Ndikhoyo andicaphuki msinya, koko ndiyimvuze-mvuze ngothando; futhi ndiyabaxolela abonayo nabakreqi. Kambe ke andibuyi ngamva ekubohlwayeni abanetyala. Ngenxa yesono sabazali abantwana ndibohlwaya ndide ndiye kuqhina kwesesithathu nakwesesine isizukulwana.’" 
Numbers14:19 Ngoko ke, camagu, lala ngenxeba, Mhlekazi! Khawenze ngokwezibele zothando lwakho olungaphele ndawo, ubuxolele ubugwenxa baba bantu. Njengoko wasoloko umana ubaxolela oko semkayo eJiputa, nakalokunje, Mhlekazi, makube chosi, kube hele!”" 
Numbers14:20 UNdikhoyo waphendula wathi: “Hayi ke, ndiyabaxolela ngokwesicelo sakho." 
Numbers14:21 Kodwa ke ngenene ndiyafunga, ndikho nje, obam ubungangamsha buzalise ihlabathi jikelele." 
Numbers14:22 Ngoko ke akukho nanye indoda kwaba bantu eya kufika kwelo lizwe. Kaloku babubonile ubukhazikhazi obuntama ukuba ndikho, ndawonye nemiqondiso endayenza eJiputa nakule ntlango; kodwa nakuba kunjalo bayaphindelela ukundivavanya, besala ukundithobela." 
Numbers14:23 Soze athi cakatha kwelo lizwe ndathembisa ngalo ooyise ngesifungo. Soze bangene kulo bonke abandidelayo. 
Numbers14:24 “Kambe sona isicaka sam uKalebhi akafani nabo. Yena waba soloko endithobela, ngoko ke yena ndiya kumngenisa kwelo lizwe walibonayo, yena nesizukulwana sakhe." 
Numbers14:25 Njengoko loo mhlaba untili zawo zimiwe ngama-Amaleki namaKanana ngoku, jikani ngomso, nihambe niye entlango ngecala loLwandle oluBomvu.”" 
Numbers14:26 *UNdikhoyo wabhekisa kuMosis noAron, wathi:" 
Numbers14:27 “Kanti koda kube nini ezi zikhohlakali zabantu zindikrokrela? Hayi, ndanele zizikrokro zabo!" 
Numbers14:28 Ngoko ke baxeleleni ukuba ndithi: ‘Ngenene, ndingophilayo nje, ndiyafunga, ndiza kunenzela kanye le nto niyithethileyo. Nditsho mna Ndikhoyo." 
Numbers14:29 Niza kufa, zaye ke izidumbu zenu ziya kuqungquluza kule ntlango. Kaloku niyandikhalazela, ngoko ke bonke ababudala bungaphezu kwamashumi amabini soze bangene kwelo lizwe." 
Numbers14:30 Ndathembisa ukuba elo lizwe loba lelenu, kodwa akukho namnye kuni uya kulifumana, ngaphandle kukaKalebhi noYoshuwa." 
Numbers14:31 Abo bantwana benu nina nithe boba ngamaxhoba mna ndiza kubangenisa kwelo lizwe nilibukulayo nina, lize limiwe ngabo." 
Numbers14:32 Okokwenu ke nina niza kufela apha kule ntlango. 
Numbers14:33 Koda kufe nowokugqibela kuni, abantwana benu bezizibhadu-bhadu amashumi amane eminyaka apha kule ntlango ngenxa yokungandithobeli kwenu." 
Numbers14:34 Ewe, yoba yiminyaka emashumi mane nisitya iziqhamo zokukreqa kwenu; unyaka ngamnye umele usuku ngalunye kwezo zathathwa ziintlola kwelo lizwe. Niza kuthi shuu ngenxa yezono zenu, nibuve ubunzima bokuchaswa ndim!" 
Numbers14:35 Ngenene mna Ndikhoyo ndiyafunga, ndiza kuyenza le nto kuni, zikhohlakalindini zabantu ezidibene ngam. Nonke, ngabanye ngabanye, niza kufela apha kule ntlango.’ ”" 
Numbers14:36 Ezaa ntlola zazithunywe nguMosis kwelaa lizwe zabuya nengxelo engatshongo khona ngalo, yawatsho amaSirayeli amkhalazela uNdikhoyo. Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo wawabetha ngobhubhani afa." 
Numbers14:37  
Numbers14:38 Kwelo shumi linambini leentlola kwasinda uYoshuwa noKalebhi kuphela. 
Numbers14:39 AmaSirayeli enza isijwili esilusizi uMosis akuwaxelela into ethethwa *nguNdikhoyo. 
Numbers14:40 Ke kaloku avuka ekuseni ngomhla olandelayo, aphuma esiya kweleentaba. Ayevuma esithi: “Ngenene sonile; kodwa ke ngoku sikulungele ukuya kulaa ndawo ebethe masiye kuyo uNdikhoyo.”" 
Numbers14:41 Kambe ke uMosis wawanqanda esithi: “Kutheni nitsiba umyalelo kaNdikhoyo nje? 
Numbers14:42 Aniyi kuba nampumelelo. Musan' ukuya, kuba uNdikhoyo akakho ngakuni; ngoko ke niya koyiswa ziintshaba." 
Numbers14:43 Niya kuqubisana nama-Amaleki namaKanana. Nofela apho edabini, kuba engekho ngakuni uNdikhoyo, ngenxa yokuba nina nikreqile ekumlandeleni.”" 
Numbers14:44 Kodwa ke anyanzelisa aya kuloo mmandla weentaba, nangona ityesi yomnqophiso ngokunjalo noMosis wayesele ngemva." 
Numbers14:45 Wona ke ama-Amaleki namaKanana, abemi baloo mmandla, bawahlasela bawoyisa amaSirayeli, baza bawaswantsulisa aya kutsho eHoma." 
Numbers15:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis 
Numbers15:2 makathethe namaSirayeli, athi: “Nakuba nifikile kwelo zwe ndininike lona ukuba libe lelenu," 
Numbers15:3 kungánikelwa ngenkomo, noba yigusha, okanye ibhokhwe, xa kusenziwa amadini ngomlilo, nokuba lidini elitshiswayo, nokuba lelinye idini elisisifungo, okanye elokuqhutywa yintliziyo, okanye elamathuba emibhiyozo. Amadini anje ke alivumba eliyolileyo kuNdikhoyo." 
Numbers15:4 Ke yena umntu owenzela uNdikhoyo idini elinjalo makathathe ikhilogram yomgubo wengqolowa oxutywe nelitha yamafutha omnquma, ukuze ube ngumnikelo wokutya," 
Numbers15:5 ngokunjalo ngesilwanyana ngasinye aphathe nelitha yewayini ibe ngumnikelo othululwayo. 
Numbers15:6 Xa kusenziwa idini ngenkunzi yegusha, mayihambe neekhilogram ezimbini zomgubo wengqolowa oxutywe nelitha enesiqingatha yamafutha omnquma ukwenzela umnikelo wokutya," 
Numbers15:7 ngokunjalo nelitha enesiqingatha yewayini engumnikelo othululwayo. Ivumba lamadini anje ke liyolile kuNdikhoyo. 
Numbers15:8 Kanti ke xa kusenzelwa uNdikhoyo idini elitshiswayo, noba lidini lesifungo, okanye idini lobudlelwana, inkunzi yenkomo mayihambe neekhilogram ezintathu zomgubo wengqolowa oxutywe neelitha ezimbini zamafutha omnquma, uze ube ngumnikelo wokutya," 
Numbers15:9  
Numbers15:10 ngokunjalo neelitha ezimbini zewayini, zibe ngumnikelo othululwayo. Eli ke lidini lomlilo elivumba liyolileyo kuNdikhoyo." 
Numbers15:11 “Kuya kuqhutywa ngolu hlobo ke, kwinkunzi yenkomo nganye, inkunzi yegusha, noba lixhwane eliliduna legusha okanye elebhokhwe." 
Numbers15:12 Maze kwenziwe njalo ngedini ngalinye nokuba mangaphi. 
Numbers15:13 Onke amaSirayeli omthonyama makenjenje ke xa esenza idini ngomlilo, dini elo lileliyolileyo kuNdikhoyo." 
Numbers15:14 Nanini na xa owolunye uhlanga ophakathi kwenu esenza idini ngomlilo elivumba liyolileyo kuNdikhoyo, naye makahambe kwangale miqathango." 
Numbers15:15 Nakwizizukulwana ezizayo ke le miqathango soze ithini kumaSirayeli ngokunjalo nakubangeneleli. Kaloku ngokukaNdikhoyo akukho mahluko phakathi kwenu neentlanga. 
Numbers15:16 Ewe, le mithetho nale miqathango inibandakanya nonke.”" 
Numbers15:17 UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis 
Numbers15:18 makathethe namaSirayeli, athi: “Nakufika kwilizwe endinisa kulo," 
Numbers15:19 xa nisitya ukutya kwelo zwe, maze ninikele inxalenye kuNdikhoyo." 
Numbers15:20 Kwisivuno sengqolowa iqebengwana lokuqala malinikelwe libe ngumnikelo wesivuno. 
Numbers15:21 Apha ke nakwixa elizayo noqhuba njalo nenze umnikelo kuNdikhoyo womgubo wesivuno sokuqala.” 
Numbers15:22 Waqhuba wathi *uNdikhoyo: “Xa kwenzekile ukuba umntu othile ayaphule ngempazamo le miyalelo inikwe uMosis nguNdikhoyo," 
Numbers15:23 mhlawumbi kwenzeke ukuba izizukulwana ezizayo zamaSirayeli ziyiphazame ngokungaqondi le miyalelo, koqhutywa ngolu hlobo:" 
Numbers15:24 Ukuba loo mpazamo yenzeke ngokungaqondi kwebandla liphela, kofuneka kuthathwe inkunzi eselula yenkomo, kwenziwe idini elitshiswayo ngayo – dini elo ke lithandekayo kuNdikhoyo – likhatshwe ngokomgaqo ngumnikelo wokutya nothululwayo, kongezwe nenkunzi yebhokhwe, ibe lidini lesono." 
Numbers15:25 Ngezi zinto umbingeleli uya kucamagushela ibandla lamaSirayeli, lize lixolelwe. Kaloku impazamo leyo yeyokungaqondi, ibe ke futhi elenzile idini ngomlilo elikwalidini lesono." 
Numbers15:26 Ibandla liphela ndawonye nabangeneleli baya kuxolelwa, kuba kaloku xa bebonke iyababandakanya le mpazamo." 
Numbers15:27 “Xa umntu one ngempazamo, makenze idini lesono ngethokazi lebhokhwe elinyaka mnye." 
Numbers15:28 Umbingeleli uya kumngxengxezela phambi koNdikhoyo loo mntu wone ngempazamo, aze ke axolelwe." 
Numbers15:29 Koqhutywa ngaloo ndlela ke nakubani na owone ngokungaqondi, noba ngowomthonyama, okanye umngeneleli." 
Numbers15:30 “Kambe ke yena umntu owone ngabom, engowomthonyama okanye umngeneleli, woba netyala lokunyelisa uNdikhoyo. Ngoko ke makabulawe," 
Numbers15:31 kuba akalikhathalelanga ilizwi likaNdikhoyo, waza wawaphula umyalelo wakhe ngabom. Xa kunjalo ke woba uzenzakalise ngokwakhe.”" 
Numbers15:32 Ngamhla uthile amaSirayeli eselapho entlango kwabhaqwa umntu etheza *ngoMhla wokuPhumla. 
Numbers15:33 Wabanjwa wasiwa kuMosis noAron nebandla liphela. 
Numbers15:34 Waza wakhe wavalelwa, kuba ingekacaci into emayenziwe ngaye." 
Numbers15:35 *UNdikhoyo ke wayalela uMosis, wathi: “Makabulawe! Ibandla liphela malimkhuphele ngaphandle komzi, limxulube ngamatye ade afe.”" 
Numbers15:36 Ngoko ke amaSirayeli ephela amkhuphela ngaphandle, amkhanda ngamatye wada wafa ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo." 
Numbers15:37 *UNdikhoyo ke wathi uMosis 
Numbers15:38 makathethe namaSirayeli, athi: “Nanini na fakani iintshinga kumasondo eempahla zenu. Intshinga nganye ke mayibe nomtya omzuba." 
Numbers15:39 Ezo ntshinga zoba sisikhumbuzo, nize nithi maxa onke nizibona zitsho nikhumbule imiyalelo kaNdikhoyo niyithobele, khon' ukuze ningahendeki nibhaduliswe ziinkanuko zenu." 
Numbers15:40 Zona ziya kuhlala zinikhumbuza ukuthobela imiyalelo yam; nize ke ngokwenjenjalo nibe libango lam ncam. 
Numbers15:41 Mna ndinguNdikhoyo, uThixo wenu, owanikhupha kwelaseJiputa, khon' ukuze ndibe nguThixo wenu. Ngenene mna ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu!”" 
Numbers16:1 UKora unyana kaIzare, umKohati wendlu kaLevi, wagaya amadoda athile, baza bamvukela uMosis. Wayekunye namaRubhen, uDatan noAbhiram, oonyana bakaEliyabhi, no-On unyana kaPelete. Babexhaswa naziinkokheli ezaziwayo zamaSirayeli ezazalathwe ngumzi ukuba zibe liqoqo, zingamakhulu amabini anamashumi amahlanu." 
Numbers16:2  
Numbers16:3 Beza belihlokondiba elichase uMosis noAron, baza bathi kubo: “Kungokunje nigabadele! Ubonanje ibandla liphela lamaSirayeli libango *likaNdikhoyo; kwaye futhi uNdikhoyo ukho phakathi kwalo. Ngani ke ukuba nizenze bhetele kangaka kunebandla lamaSirayeli?”" 
Numbers16:4 UMosis ke uthe akuweva la mazwi, wawa ngamadolo." 
Numbers16:5 Waza ke wabhekisa kuKora nabalandeli bakhe, wathi: “Ngomso kusasa uNdikhoyo uza kukhe asibonise ukuba ngubani na kanye umnyulwa wakhe. Lowo ke ungowakhe ncam, lowo amkhethileyo, uya kumsondeza." 
Numbers16:6 Ngomso kusasa kufuneka wena Kora nabalandeli bakho nithathe imicephe yomlilo, niyifake amalahle avuthayo, nigalele isiqhumiso, niye nayo eqongeni phambi koNdikhoyo. Uya kucaca ke oyena unyuliweyo nguNdikhoyo. Nini kanye baLevi aba bagabadeleyo!”" 
Numbers16:7  
Numbers16:8 UMosis waqhuba wathi kuKora: “Khanitsho, baLevi," 
Numbers16:9 ngaba niyidelile into yokuba uThixo kaSirayeli anibekele bucala kumaSirayeli ephela, ukuze nisondele kuye, nisebenze *esibingelelweni sakhe, nibuse ngenxa yamaSirayeli?" 
Numbers16:10 Nakuba nina baLevi niphela eninike eli wonga nje, ngoku senitsazele nasebubingelelini?" 
Numbers16:11 Eneneni nguNdikhoyo lo nimvukeleyo, wena nehlokondiba lakho, engubani yena uAron nide nimkhalazele nje.”" 
Numbers16:12 Ke kaloku uMosis wathumela wabiza uDatan noAbhiram, kodwa bona baphendula bathi: “Asizi!" 
Numbers16:13 Akwanelanga yile nto uyenzileyo yokusikhupha eJiputa, ilizwe lamasi nobusi, uze kusibulala kule ntlango? Ngoku sowuzenza itshawe phezu kwethu," 
Numbers16:14 ngoku ungekasifikisi kwelaa lizwe lamasi nobusi, ungekasiniki nelifa lamasimi nezidiliya! Ucinga ukuba siziimfama? Asizi!”" 
Numbers16:15 Wabhabhama ngumsindo uMosis, wathi kuNdikhoyo: “Uze ungawamkeli amadini ala madoda. Mna ndimsulwa kuwo; zange ndithathe nedonki le yawo.”" 
Numbers16:16 UMosis wathi kuKora: “Ngomso wena naba bantu bakho bangamakhulu amabini anamashumi amahlanu ze niye esibingelelweni; noAron uya kubakho. Umntu ngamnye ke kuni aze athathe umcephe womlilo, awufake isiqhumiso, awuzise kwiqonga phambi koNdikhoyo.”" 
Numbers16:17  
Numbers16:18 Ngenene ke indoda nganye kubo yathatha umcephe womlilo, yawufaka amalahle nesiqhumiso, yema esangweni lesibingelelo kunye noMosis noAron." 
Numbers16:19 Ke kaloku uKora wabaqokelela bonke abangakuye, bema bajonga kuMosis noAron esangweni lesibingelelo. Kuthe kusenjalo suka kwavela ubuqaqawuli bukaNdikhoyo kumaSirayeli ephela," 
Numbers16:20 waza ke uNdikhoyo wabhekisa kuMosis noAron, wathi:" 
Numbers16:21 “Khwelelani kwaba bantu. Ndiza kubatshabalalisa ngephanyazo!” 
Numbers16:22 Kambe ke uMosis noAron bakhahlela, bawa ngamadolo, badanduluka bathi: “Awu, Thixo, wena mthombo wobomi, kaloku kone umntu wamnye qha, ungathini ke ukusuka ulwe namaSirayeli ephela?”" 
Numbers16:23 UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis ukuba 
Numbers16:24 athi kumaSirayeli: “Khwelelani kwimizi yooKora noDatan noAbhiram.” 
Numbers16:25 Ke kaloku uMosis wahamba waya kuDatan noAbhiram elandelwa ziinkokheli zamaSirayeli. 
Numbers16:26 Wabhekisa kumaSirayeli, wathi: “Khwelelani kwimizi yala madoda akhohlakeleyo, ningakhe nichukumise nento le yawo, hleze nani nitshayelwe kunye nawo ngenxa yezono zawo.”" 
Numbers16:27 Ngoko ke amaSirayeli azikhwebula kwimizi yooKora noDatan noAbhiram. Ke kaloku uDatan noAbhiram babephumile, bema kwiminyango yezindlu zabo, ndawonye nabafazi nabantwana kwaneentsana." 
Numbers16:28 Ke uMosis wabhekisa kumaSirayeli, wathi: “Ngoku kuza kucaca kuni, kuba ngenene ezi zinto andizenzeli ngokuthanda kwam, koko nguNdikhoyo ondithuma ukuba ndizenze." 
Numbers16:29 Ukuba la madoda abulewe zizifo nje eziqhelekileyo, ze nazi ukuba akandithumanga uNdikhoyo." 
Numbers16:30 Kambe ke ukuba uNdikhoyo wenze into engazange ihle nanini na, kwavuleka umhlaba, waginya la madoda nako konke okwawo, ngohlobo lokuba ehle aye kwelabafileyo ehleli, ze niqonde kakuhle ke ukuba aba bantu bamdelile uNdikhoyo.”" 
Numbers16:31 Wathi ke egqiba nje ukuthetha, suka waqhekeka umhlaba!" 
Numbers16:32 Bimbilili wabaginya ooDatan noAbhiram ndawonye nemizi yabo, ngokunjalo nabalandeli bakaKora nako konke ababenako." 
Numbers16:33 Ngoko ke bangcwatywa behleli, baya kwelabafileyo ndawonye nako konke okwabo. Wabuya wavaleka ke umhlaba, banyamalala ke bona." 
Numbers16:34 Onke ke amaSirayeli awayelapho acela kooxhongo akusiva isikhalo sabo. Akhwaza athi: “Kunyembelekile! Sabani, hleze nathi usiginye umhlaba!”" 
Numbers16:35 Kwaza ke kwaphuma umlilo uvela kuNdikhoyo, wawalenya atsha loo makhulu mabini anamashumi amahlanu amadoda awayesondeza isiqhumiso." 
Numbers16:36 *UNdikhoyo ke wayalela uMosis, wathi:" 
Numbers16:37 “Yithi kuElazare unyana wombingeleli uAron asuse imicephe yomlilo yobhedu kuthuthu lwalaa madoda atshileyo, aze wona amalahle akuyo awasarhaze, kuba imicephe leyo ingcwele." 
Numbers16:38 Kaloku yaba ngcwele ukusondezwa kwayo kuNdikhoyo. Makayithathe imicephe leyo yaloo madoda afe ngenxa yesono sawo, aze ayikhande ibe ngamacwecwe amcaba, agqume ngayo iqonga lamadini. Loo nto yoba sisikhumbuzo kumaSirayeli.”" 
Numbers16:39 Ngenene ke uElazare umbingeleli wayithatha imicephe leyo, yaza yakhandwa yangamacwecwe okugquma iqonga lamadini." 
Numbers16:40 Esi ke yaba sisikhumbuzo kumaSirayeli, khon' ukuze angalibali ukuba akukho mntu uvumelekileyo ukuba aye kwiqonga lamadini, enze isiqhumiso phambi koNdikhoyo, engenguye owomlibo ka-Aron. Ngapha koko ke owenze into enjalo uya kutshatyalaliswa, axel' uKora nabantu bakhe. Yonke ke le nto yenziwa ngokomyalelo owathunyelwa nguNdikhoyo kuElazare ngoMosis." 
Numbers16:41 Ngomhla olandelayo ke ibandla lakwaSirayeli liphela lakhalazela uMosis noAron lisithi: “Nina nibulele abantu *bakaNdikhoyo.” 
Numbers16:42 Emva kokuba beqokelelene bagwayimbela uMosis noAron, bajika basingisa *ngasesibingelelweni, baza balibona ilifu lisigqumile ngequbuliso, ngokunjalo kwabonakala nobungangamsha bukaNdikhoyo." 
Numbers16:43 UMosis noAron baya kuma phambi kwesibingelelo. 
Numbers16:44 Ke uNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi:" 
Numbers16:45 “Buy' umva, nikhwebuke kwaba bantu; ndiza kubatshabalalisa ngephanyazo!” Kwesi sithuba ke bobabini bawa ngamadolo;" 
Numbers16:46 waza ke uMosis wabhekisa kuAron wathi: “Thatha umcephe wakho womlilo, ugalele amalahle owathatha kwiqonga lamadini, uthi saa isiqhumiso. Wakugqiba ke, khawuleza uye phaya ebantwini ubacamagushele. Khawulezisa, kuba uNdikhoyo uyavutha ngumsindo, ibe ke sezibonakala iimpawu zikabhubhani.”" 
Numbers16:47 Ngoko nangoko ke uAron wawuthobela umyalelo kaMosis, wawuthatha umcephe wakhe, wakhawuleza waya kungena phakathi kwebandla lamaSirayeli. Wathi akubona ukuba ubhubhani seleqalisile, wafaka isiqhumiso apho emalahleni, wawacamagushela amaSirayeli." 
Numbers16:48 Wema phakathi kwabahleliyo nabafi, wanqamka ubhubhani lowo." 
Numbers16:49 Ke kaloku abantu abafa ngeso sihlandlo sodwa yaba lishumi elinesine lamawaka anamakhulu asixhenxe, ngaphandle kwabo bafa mhla ngogwayimbo lukaKora." 
Numbers16:50 Akuba enqamkile ke ubhubhani lowo, uAron wabuyela kuMosis esangweni lesibingelelo." 
Numbers17:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: 
Numbers17:2 “Thetha namaSirayeli, uthathe iintonga zibe lishumi elinambini kwiinkokheli zakwaSirayeli; ibe nye intonga kwindlu nganye. Kwintonga yenkokheli nganye bhala igama layo," 
Numbers17:3 uze ubhale igama lika-Aron kwintonga yendlu kaLevi. Ngoko ke inkokheli yendlu nganye yoba nentonga yayo. 
Numbers17:4 Zithathe ezo ntonga, uye nazo *esibingelelweni, uzibeke phambi kwetyesi enobungqina bomnqophiso apho ndidibana khona nani." 
Numbers17:5 Intonga yendoda endiyinyulileyo iya kuntshula amagqabi. Ngaloo ndlela ke ndiya kuluphelisa uzenge-zenge lwezikhalazo zamaSirayeli ngakuwe.” 
Numbers17:6 Ngenene ke uMosis wayalela amaSirayeli ukuba inkokheli nganye imnike intonga; zaza ke zenjenjalo. Inkokheli yendlu nganye yakhupha intonga; zaza ke zaba lishumi elinambini zizonke, neka-Aron ikwalapho." 
Numbers17:7 Xa zizonke ezo ntonga ke uMosis wangena nazo esibingelelweni, wazibeka phambi kukaNdikhoyo." 
Numbers17:8 Ngengomso ke uMosis akungena esibingelelweni wafumanisa ukuba intonga ka-Aron, emele indlu kaLevi, intshule amagqabi. Ewe, yantshula yanamathupha, yaza yavelisa neentyatyambo ngokunjalo neziqhamo zealmondi!" 
Numbers17:9 UMosis ke wazithatha zonke ezo ntonga, waphuma nazo, wazibonisa amaSirayeli. Ke wona ayibona into eyenzekileyo, yaza ke yayileyo inkokheli yathatha eyayo." 
Numbers17:10 UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis ukuba athathe intonga ka-Aron, ayibeke kwaphambi kwetyesi yomnqophiso. Watsho esithi mayigcinwe apho, khon' ukuze ibe sisikhumbuzo kumaSirayeli agwayimbayo, khon' ukuze ayeke ukukhalaza, hleze afe." 
Numbers17:11 UMosis ke wenza ngokwaloo myalelo kaNdikhoyo. 
Numbers17:12 AmaSirayeli ke athi kuMosis: “Xa kuyiloo nto ke sifile; kuphelile kuthi! 
Numbers17:13 Nomntu othe cakatha nje ukusondela esibingelelweni uza kufa. Ngaba ke siza kufa sonke?” 
Numbers18:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuAron: “Wena noonyana bakho ndawonye nabaLevi nithwala uxanduva ngaso nasiphi na isigqitho esinxulumene nokubusa esibingelelweni; kodwa nguwe kuphela noonyana bakho abaya kuthwala uxanduva ngesigqitho esinxulumene nobubingeleli. 
Numbers18:2 Phuthuma abo uzalana nabo bendlu kaLevi, usebenze nabo bakuncedise xeshikweni wena noonyana bakho nibusayo esibingelelweni." 
Numbers18:3 AbaLevi baya kujongwa nguwe ngokwemisebenzi yabo esibingelelweni, kodwa mabangasondeli nokusondela kwimpahla yegumbi eliyingcwele okanye eqongeni lamadini, kungenjalo baya kufa kunye nani." 
Numbers18:4 Umsebenzi wabo baya kuwufezekisa ngokuncedisana nani esibingelelweni, ke yena umntu ongomnye ongenalungelo angaze asebenze nanini esibingelelweni." 
Numbers18:5 “Nini emanithwale uxanduva lokulungiselela egumbini eliyingcwele nakwiqonga lamadini, khon' ukuze uNdikhoyo angaphindi awavelele ngomsindo amaSirayeli." 
Numbers18:6 Ndim ngokwam ozinyulele abanakwenu abaLevi kumaSirayeli. Basisipho kuni babingeleli, khon' ukuze benze imisebenzi esibingelelweni." 
Numbers18:7 Nguwe noonyana bakho kuphela abanoxanduva lokulungiselela mayela neqonga lamadini ndawonye negumbi eliyingcwele kangcwele. Lo msebenzi wenu wobubingeleli sisipho enisinikwa ndim. Nabani na othe wasondela kwizinto ezingcwele engenalungelo wobulawa.” 
Numbers18:8 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuAron: “Iminikelo eyenzelwa mna yolawulwa nguwe; yonke iminikelo eyenziwe ngamaSirayeli kum ndiyinika wena noonyana bakho ibe yinxaxheba nesabelo senu esisisigxina. 
Numbers18:9 Inxaxheba yeminikelo engayi kutshiswa eqongeni yeyenu – nditsho yonke iminikelo eyodwa, nokuba yeyokutya, okanye yeyentlambululo, okanye yeyembuyekezo. Loo nxaxheba yeyakho noonyana bakho." 
Numbers18:10 Ezi zinto ze niqonde ukuba zingcwele, nizityele endaweni engcwele, zityiwe ngamadoda kuphela." 
Numbers18:11 “Nayiphi na eminye iminikelo enikelwa kum ngamaSirayeli yeyenu. Ndiyipha wena noonyana neentombi zakho, isisabelo senu esisisigxina. Yona ke yotyiwa nguye nabani na *ongenamlaza kwintsapho yakho." 
Numbers18:12 “Ndikunika lonke ulibo lwezilimo oluziswa ngamaSirayeli kuNdikhoyo: amafutha omnquma, iwayini, nengqolowa. Zonke ke zoba zezakho, zityiwe ngabo bonke abangenamlaza kwintsapho yakho." 
Numbers18:13  
Numbers18:14 “Yonke into kwaSirayeli enikelwe kuNdikhoyo qwaba yeyakho. 
Numbers18:15 Lonke izibulo, elomntu nelemfuyo, elinikelwa ngamaSirayeli kum, lelakho. Kodwa ke makahlawulelwe umntwana wamazibulo, nezibulo lesilwanyana esingàtyiwayo ngokunjalo." 
Numbers18:16 Amazibulo makahlawulelwe xa anenyanga enye ezelwe, kukhutshwe ixabiso eliziingqekembe zesiliva ezintlanu ngokomlinganiselo ovunyiweyo." 
Numbers18:17 Kambe ke amazibulo eenkomo, iigusha, neebhokhwe, wona akayi kuhlawulelwa. Wona ngakaNdikhoyo poqo; makenziwe idini. Igazi lazo makufefwe ngalo iqonga lamadini, amanqatha azo atshiswe abe lidini ngomlilo – dini elo livumba liyolileyo kuNdikhoyo." 
Numbers18:18 Ke yona inyama yazo yoba yeyakho, njengencum nomlenze wasekunene kwidini eliwanga-wangiswayo." 
Numbers18:19 “Yonke iminikelo eyodwa evela kumaSirayeli ndiyipha wena noonyana neentombi zakho zisisabelo senu esisisigxina. Lo ke ngumnqophiso ongasoze uthini endiwenza nawe nesizukulwana sakho.” 
Numbers18:20 UNdikhoyo wathetha noAron, wathi: “Ke wena apha kwaSirayeli akuyi kuzuza sabelo sililifa lakho, ungayi kuzuza namhlaba. Kaloku esakho isabelo, ndawonye nelifa, ndim mna Ndikhoyo.”" 
Numbers18:21 *UNdikhoyo wathi: “Sonke isishumi esivela kumaSirayeli soba yinxaxheba yabaLevi ngenxa yoxanduva lokujonga *isibingelelo. 
Numbers18:22 Ke wona amaSirayeli angawambi akufuneki nganto ukuba abe nento ayenzayo esibingelelweni, khon' ukuze angasifumani isohlwayo sokufa." 
Numbers18:23 Ngoko ke ukusukela ngoku ngabaLevi kuphela amabajongane nesibingelelo, sibe luxanduva lwabo ngokupheleleyo. Lo mthetho ke uya kuhlala umi nakwizizukulwana ezizayo. AbaLevi abasayi kuze babe nalifa lilelinye kwaSirayeli," 
Numbers18:24 kuba kaloku bona ndibanike isabelo esizizishumi endizinikwa ngamaSirayeli. Kungenxa yaloo nto ke ndisithi nje bona abasoze babe nalifa lilelinye kwaSirayeli.” 
Numbers18:25 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis 
Numbers18:26 ukuba athi kubaLevi: “Xa nisamkela isishumi esinikelwa ngamaSirayeli kuNdikhoyo njengesabelo senu, kwalapho kuso khuphani isishumi enisinikela kuNdikhyo." 
Numbers18:27 Lo mnikelo ke uya kuba njengomnikelo okhutshwa ngumlimi kwingqolowa newayini yakhe. 
Numbers18:28 Ngale ndlela ke nani noba nako ukunikela kuNdikhoyo nicaphula kuzo zonke izishumi enizamkelayo kumaSirayeli. Kwezi zishumi inxaxheba kaNdikhoyo maze niyinike uAron umbingeleli. 
Numbers18:29 Ewe, nikelani ngezona-zona kwenizifumanayo, nditsho ezo zimfaneleyo uNdikhoyo." 
Numbers18:30 Xa ninikela ngezona-zona kuya kuba njengaxa umlimi akhupha izishumi zengqolowa newayini. 
Numbers18:31 Ke into eseleyo yeyenu neentsapho zenu; ningayityela naphi na, kuba niyinikwa ingumvuzo womsebenzi wenu *esibingelelweni." 
Numbers18:32 Xa ninikela ngezona-zona anisayi kuba natyala. Ngokwenjenjalo aniyi *kuyigqwalisa iminikelo engcwele yamaSirayeli, ningayi kufa nokufa.”" 
Numbers19:1 *UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis noAron," 
Numbers19:2 wabanika le miyalelo, wathi: “Ngokommiselo kaNdikhoyo amaSirayeli makeze nethokazi lenkomo elibomvu, elingenasiphako, elingazange libotshwe," 
Numbers19:3 alinikezele kuElazare umbingeleli. Lothathwa ke likhutshelwe ngaphandle komzi wamaSirayeli, apho loxhelelwa khona ekho." 
Numbers19:4 UElazare ke uya kuthi nkxu umnwe egazini apho, aze atshize kasixhenxe ejongise kwisango lesibingelelo." 
Numbers19:5 Xa iyonke ke loo nkomo, ufele nenyama, igazi namathumbu, mazitshiswe apho phambi kombingeleli ejongile njalo." 
Numbers19:6 Ke yena uya kuthatha ukhuni lomsedare, ihlamvu lehisopu, nomtya obomvu, aziphose phezu kwelo thokazi litshiswayo." 
Numbers19:7 Kamva ke makahlambe iimpahla zakhe, ngokunjalo nomzimba, aze ke abe nokubuyela emzini. Kambe ke uya kuhlala engekahlambuluki kude kuhlwe." 
Numbers19:8 Naloo mntu ubetshisa le nkomo kufuneka ahlambe iimpahla nomzimba, kodwa naye akayi kuhlambuluka de kube ngorhatya." 
Numbers19:9 Uthuthu lweli thokazi ke maluwolwe yindoda ehlambulukileyo, ilubeke endaweni ehlambulukileyo, kwalapho ngaphandle komzi wamaSirayeli, apho luya kugcinwa khona libandla, ukuze amaSirayeli alusebenzise xa esenza amanzi entlambululo okususa isono." 
Numbers19:10 Loo mntu ubebutha uthuthu makazihlambe iimpahla zakhe, kodwa ke akayi kuhlambuluka kude kuhlwe. Lo mmiselo ke soze uthini nanini nanini; ngoko ke mawuthotyelwe ngamaSirayeli ngokunjalo nabangeneleli.”" 
Numbers19:11 “Nabani na ochukumise isidumbu woba *ugqwalisekile iintsuku ezisixhenxe. 
Numbers19:12 Ngoko ke kofuneka azihlambulule ngamanzi entlambululo kusuku lwesithathu, ngokunjalo nangolwesixhenxe, ukuze abe uhlambulukile. Kambe ke ukuba akazihlambululanga kuzo zombini ezi ntsuku, olwesithathu nolwesixhenxe, akayi kuhlambuluka." 
Numbers19:13 Ke yena ochukumise isidumbu waza akazihlambulula, ugqwalisa *isibingelelo *sikaNdikhoyo. Umntu onjalo makasikwe kwaSirayeli; kaloku akatshizwanga ngamanzi entlambululo. Wohlala egqwalisekile." 
Numbers19:14 “Nanku ummiselo ophathelele malunga nomntu ofele endlwini: nabani na olapho ngelo xesha, okanye ongenayo, uya kuba ugqwalisekile iintsuku zide zibe sixhenxe." 
Numbers19:15 Ngokunjalo nayiphi na ingqayi okanye imbiza engacikwanga yogqwaliseka nayo. 
Numbers19:16 Nomntu othe engaphandle phaya wachukumisa umntu ogetyengiweyo okanye ozifele nje, okanye ochukumise ithambo lomntu okanye ingcwaba, uya kugqwaliseka iintsuku ezisixhenxe." 
Numbers19:17 “Xa kuhlanjululwa umntu onjalo ke, kofuneka kucatshulwe kuthuthu lwethokazi elibomvu, lona luhlambululayo, lufakwe embizeni, luxutywe namanzi angcwengileyo." 
Numbers19:18 Wosuka ke umntu ohlambulukileyo athathe ihlamvu lehisopu, alithi nkxu apho emanzini, atshize indlu nako konke okukuyo, ngokunjalo nabantu ababelapho kuyo. Okanye umntu ohlambulukileyo uya kuthatha loo manzi atshize lowo uchukumise ogetyengiweyo, okanye ofileyo, mhlawumbi ochukumise ithambo noba lingcwaba." 
Numbers19:19 Kusuku lwesithathu, ngokunjalo nakolwesixhenxe, loo mntu uhlambulukileyo uya kutshiza lowo ugqwalisekileyo. Ngosuku lwesixhenxe ke uya kuhlambuluka loo mntu, akuba ezihlambile iimpahla zakhe, naye ngokwakhe ehlambe umzimba. Matshona kwelanga ke woba uhlambulukile." 
Numbers19:20 “Umntu ogqwalisekileyo, waza akazihlambulula, umelwe kukusikwa ebantwini, kuba unyelise isibingelelo sikaNdikhoyo. Kaloku akatshizwanga ngamanzi okuhlambulula; ngako oko uhlala egqwalisekile." 
Numbers19:21 Lo mmiselo mawuthotyelwe nini nanini. Umntu otshiza ngamanzi okuhlambulula makazihlambe iimpahla zakhe. Kanti ke nabani na ochukumisa amanzi okuhlambulula, uhlala engahlambulukanga kude kuhlwe." 
Numbers19:22 Nantoni na echukunyiswe ngumntu ogqwalisekileyo nayo iba njalo; futhi nabani na oyichukumisayo naye uhlala enjalo kude kuhlwe.” 
Numbers20:1 Kwathi ngenyanga yokuqala uSirayeli ephela wagaleleka kwintlango iZin, waza wamisa eKadeshe. Apho ke kulapho wafa waza wangcwatyelwa khona uMiriyam." 
Numbers20:2 Ke kaloku kwakungekho manzi kuloo ndawo. Ngoko ke amaSirayeli aqokelelana kuMosis noAron," 
Numbers20:3 alwa noMosis, athi: “Akwaba nathi sasife nabantakwethu phambi *kwesibingelelo *sikaNdikhoyo." 
Numbers20:4 Ngani ukuba thina bantu bakaNdikhoyo nisizise kule ntlango? Benifuna size kufela apha ndawonye nemfuyo yethu? 
Numbers20:5 Kakade, kwakutheni ukuze nisikhuphe eJiputa, nize kusifaka kwenje yona indawo, emhlaba ungavelisi nento le? Akukho ngqolowa namakhiwane, kungekho diliya narharnati; ke wona amanzi tu!”" 
Numbers20:6 UMosis noAron balishiya ibandla, baya kuma esangweni lesibingelelo. Baguqa phantsi, baza ke babubona ubungangamsha bukaNdikhoyo." 
Numbers20:7 UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis:
