Numbers20:8 “Thatha intonga ephambi kwetyesi yomnqophiso, uze wena nomntakwenu uAron nilihlanganise ibandla, uze ke uthethe neliwa bejongile. Kothi kumpompoze amanzi kulo, baze abantu nemfuyo yabo basele.”" 
Numbers20:9 Ke uMosis wayithatha intonga leyo esibingelelweni ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo. 
Numbers20:10 Yena noAron bawaqokelela onke amaSirayeli apho phambi kweliwa, waza wathi uMosis: “Phulaphulani, nina baqhankqalazi! Ngaba nifuna sikhuphe amanzi kweli liwa?”" 
Numbers20:11 UMosis wayiphakamsa intonga, walibetha kabini iliwa elo, kwaza ke kwampompoza amanzi, abantu ndawonye nemfuyo basela." 
Numbers20:12 UNdikhoyo wabhekisa kuMosis noAron wathi: “Ngenxa yokungandithembi nokungandiniki imbeko phambi kwamaSirayeli, anisayi kulikhokela eli bandla nilingenise kwelo lizwe ndalithembisa lona.”" 
Numbers20:13 Esi siganeko ke sehla eMeribha apho amaSirayeli amkhalazela khona uNdikhoyo. Ke yena wazibonakalisa kuwo ukuba ungcwele. 
Numbers20:14 Ke kaloku uMosis wakhupha abathunywa, baya kukumkani wase-Edom, esithi: “Nanku umyalezo ovela kubantakwenu amaSirayeli: ‘Uyazazi iinzingo ezasihlelayo." 
Numbers20:15 Kaloku ookhokho bethu bafudukela eJiputa, apho sahlala khona iminyaka ngeminyaka. AmaJiputa ke abaphatha kakubi ndawonye nathi." 
Numbers20:16 Sasuka ke sazibika *kuNdikhoyo, waza ke yena wasabela, wathumela isithunywa sakhe, wasikhupha eJiputa. Ngoku ke naku silapha eKadeshe, idolophu esemideni yakho." 
Numbers20:17 Sicela ukuba usivumele sinqumle kulo mhlaba wakho. Siyathembisa ukuba thina nemfuyo yethu siya kuhamba ngqo ngendlela, singaphambukeli emasimini nakwizidiliya zakho, singayi kukhe sisele nakumaqula akho. Ewe, siya kuthi ngqo ngohola, singaphambuki side siphume emhlabeni wakho.’ ”" 
Numbers20:18 Ke wona amaEdom aphendula athi: “Unotshe! Akuyi kucanda apha. Ukungena oku kwakho ndiya kuphuma ndikuhlasele.” 
Numbers20:19 AmaSirayeli aphendula esithi: “Siya kuhamba ngqo ngohola. Ukuba thina okanye impi yethu ithe yasela amanzi akho, siya kuwahlawulela. Inye into esiyifunayo, kukunqumla ngeenyawo.”" 
Numbers20:20 AmaEdom athi: “Anizukunqumla!” Aza ke amaEdom asuka nomkhosi omkhulu, afunza kumaSirayeli." 
Numbers20:21 Ke kaloku amaSirayeli ajika athatha ndlela yimbi, kuba amaEdom ewalela ukuba anqumle emhlabeni wawo." 
Numbers20:22 USirayeli ephela wanduluka ke eKadeshe, waza waya kugaleleka kwintaba iHore" 
Numbers20:23 kufutshane nomda wase-Edom. Apho ke *uNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis noAron, wathi:" 
Numbers20:24 “Wena Aron, uza kufa; akuzi kuya kufika kwelo lizwe ndamthembisa ngalo uSirayeli. Kaloku nina nobabini nawuvukela umthetho wam eMeribha." 
Numbers20:25 Ngoko ke, wena Mosis, thatha uAron nonyana wakhe uElazare, uye nabo kwintaba iHore." 
Numbers20:26 Khona apho ke uze uyithathe iminweba ka-Aron yobubingeleli, uyinxibe uElazare unyana wakhe, kuba uAron yena uza kufa.”" 
Numbers20:27 UMosis wenza ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo. Benyuka baya kwintaba iHore, lonke ibandla libukele," 
Numbers20:28 waza uMosis wayikhulula iminweba yobubingeleli kuAron, wayinxiba uElazare. Ke yena uAron wafela apho phezu kwentaba, baza ke uMosis noElazare behla entabeni." 
Numbers20:29 Athi ke amaSirayeli, akuva ukuba uAron akasekho, amzilela iintsuku ezimashumi mathathu." 
Numbers21:1 Ke kaloku ukumkani waseAradi, umKanana, owayemi emazantsi eKanana, wathi akuva ukuba amaSirayeli ayeza ngendlela esinga eAtarim, wawahlasela, wada wawathimba amanye." 
Numbers21:2 AmaSirayeli ke asuka enza isifungo *kuNdikhoyo, athi: “Ukuba usiphile amandla, saboyisa abo bantu, inene siya kubatshabalalisa ngokupheleleyo ndawonye nezixeko zabo.”" 
Numbers21:3 Ngenene ke uNdikhoyo waweva amaSirayeli, waza wawanceda awoyisa awatshabalalisa tu amaKanana ndawonye nezixeko zawo. Loo ndawo ke ayithiya igama eliyiHoma." 
Numbers21:4 Ukumka kwawo kwintaba iHore amaSirayeli ahamba ngendlela esinga kuLwandle oluBomvu, khon' ukuze bawucezele umhlaba wamaEdom. Endleleni ke apho amaSirayeli akruquka," 
Numbers21:5 aza amkhalazela uThixo ndawonye noMosis, athi: “Kwakutheni kakade ukuze usikhuphe eJiputa, sizokufela kule ntlango? Akukho kutya namanzi apha! Okokwayo ke yona le nkatshu-nkatshu isikruqule!”" 
Numbers21:6 Ke *uNdikhoyo wawathumela isibetho seenyoka ezinobuhlungu, zawaluma amaSirayeli, kwafa amaninzi." 
Numbers21:7 AmaSirayeli ke athi akuqonda ukuba enze imposiso, aya kuMosis, avuma athi: “Sonile ngokukrokrela uNdikhoyo ndawonye nawe. Khawusitarhuzisele, uNdikhoyo azisuse ezi nyoka.” Ngoko ke uMosis wawathandazela amaSirayeli." 
Numbers21:8 UNdikhoyo ke wathi kuMosis: “Yenza umfanekiso wenyoka, uwuxhome esibondeni, khon' ukuze athi nabani na olunywe yinyoka akhangele kuyo, aphile.”" 
Numbers21:9 Ngenene ke uMosis wayenza inyoka ngobhedu, wayixhoma esibondeni. Nabani na ke olunywe yinyoka wayekhangela apho kuloo nyoka yobhedu, atsho aphile." 
Numbers21:10 AmaSirayeli ke anduluka, aya kumisa eObhoti." 
Numbers21:11 Nalapha ke anduluka, aya kutsho kwi-Iye-abharim kwintlango esempuma yomhlaba wamaMowabhi." 
Numbers21:12 Ukusuka apho ke aya kumisa kwintili yaseZerede. 
Numbers21:13 Ukuphuma apha ke aya kumisa kwicala elingentla komlambo iAnoni, kwintlango ehamba iyokuthi xhaxhe kumhlaba wama-Amori. Ke iAnoni le yayingumda owahlula amaMowabhi kuma-Amori." 
Numbers21:14 Yiyo loo nto ke iNcwadi yamaDabi *kaNdikhoyo ithetha ngezi ndawo nje: “Idolophu iWahebhi kwingxingwa kaSufa; umlambo iAnoni," 
Numbers21:15 namathambeka eentili eziyokuthi xhaxhe ngedolophu iAra, ukuya kuqhina kumda wamaMowabhi.”" 
Numbers21:16 Ukuphuma apho ke aya kufika kwindawo ekuthiwa kuseBhere. Lelaa qula ke eli apho uNdikhoyo wathi uMosis makawaqokelele amaSirayeli, azokuwapha amanzi." 
Numbers21:17 Ngelo thuba ke amaSirayeli amemelela enjenje: “Khawutsabis' amanzi, qulandini! Ke thina sowamkela ngengoma." 
Numbers21:18 Iqula elimbiwe ngamatshawe, elingumsebenzi wezikhulu zasebantwini; elimbiwe ngomsimbithi wasebhotwe, ngokunjalo neentonga zakhona.” Ukuphuma apho entlango ke baya kugaleleka eMatana;" 
Numbers21:19 baza ke ngokunjalo bagqitha eNahalile naseBhamoti," 
Numbers21:20 bandula ke ukuya kufika kwintili ekumhlaba wamaMowabhi, phantsi kwentaba iPisga ekrobele umqwebedu." 
Numbers21:21 AmaSirayeli athumela izigidimi kuSihon ukumkani wama-Amori, athi:" 
Numbers21:22 “Sivumele sinqumle elizweni lakho. Asiyi kuphambukela emasimini okanye ezidiliyeni, okanye sisele amanzi emaquleni. Siya kuhamba ngqo ngohola, side siphume emhlabeni wakho.”" 
Numbers21:23 Kambe ke uSihon akavumanga ukuba amaSirayeli anqumle emhlabeni wakhe. Ndaweni yaloo nto waphuma nomkhosi wakhe, waya eJaza entlango, wawahlasela amaSirayeli." 
Numbers21:24 Kodwa ke amaSirayeli alwa alalis' ugodo, aloyisa utshaba ada awuthimba umhlaba walo, ukusukela kumlambo iAnoni ngasentla, ukuya kwiJabhoko; lelama-Amon ke elo. Kaloku umda wama-Amon wawukhuselwe." 
Numbers21:25 Ngoko ke amaSirayeli azithatha zonke izixeko zama-Amori, ngokunjalo neHeshbhon needolophu eziyingqongileyo, aza ema kuzo." 
Numbers21:26 IHeshbhon le ke yayisisixeko esilikomkhulu likaSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori. Wayelwe nokumkani wamandulo waseMowabhi, waza wawuhlutha umhlaba wakhe ukuya kuma ngomlambo iAnoni." 
Numbers21:27 Kuthe ke kwakuba nje zadanduluka iimbongi zathi: “Sangena ke thina boonomthina eHeshbhon, tsotsololo phakathi kwisixeko sikaSihon ukumkani! Hayi kambe, masisivuse sime ngeenyawo." 
Numbers21:28 Andithi na kanene kwalapha kuwe, sixekondini Heshbhon, yayisakuphum' imikhosi kaSihon, ilenya njengomlilo? Yadangazela yaleny' isixekw' iAra kwaMowabhi, yazitshayel' iinduli ezingunozala weAnoni." 
Numbers21:29 Mawoo! Lixubayele kuwe, Mowabhi! Banquli bakaKemoshe, aphelil' amahlathi! Kalok' ubayekil' oonyana bakhe baziimbacu, iintombi zangamaxhoba kaSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori." 
Numbers21:30 Kunamhlanje nje isizukulwana sibhangile kusukela eHeshbhon kuye kuthi gaa ngeDibhon; sivuthulule eNofa, sada saya kuthi xhaxhe ngeMedebha.”" 
Numbers21:31 Aba ngaloo ndlela ke amaSirayeli ayawuma umhlaba wama-Amori. 
Numbers21:32 UMosis wathumela iintlola, zaya kujonga indlela yokuhlasela isixeko iJazere. Ngenene ke amaSirayeli ayihlasela iJazere needoluphu eziyingqongileyo, bawagxotha ama-Amori awayemi apho kuzo." 
Numbers21:33 Ke kaloku amaSirayeli ajika ajonga eBhashan. UOgi, ukumkani waseBhashan, waphuma nomkhosi wakhe, wawahlasela e-Edreyi." 
Numbers21:34 *UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi: “Ungaxhali wena; naye lo ndiza kumenza abe lixhoba lakho ndawonye nomkhosi nomhlaba wakhe. Qhuba kwangalaa ndlela wawenze ngayo kuSihon ukumkani wama-Amori owayehlala eHeshbhon.”" 
Numbers21:35 Ngoko ke amaSirayeli ambulala uOgi noonyana bakhe, ngokunjalo nabo bonke abantu bakhe, akashiya nempunde le. Ke wona loo mhlaba wakhe ema kuwo." 
Numbers22:1 Ke kaloku amaSirayeli anduluka, aza aya kumisa kumathafa aseMowabhi, kwimpuma yeJordan, malunga neJeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Uthe ke uBhalaki, ukumkani waseMowabhi, unyana kaZipore, akuziva izigigaba zamaSirayeli phakathi kwama-Amori," 
Numbers22:3 akubuqonda nobungakanani bawo, suka yena nabantu bakhe bankwantya." 
Numbers22:4 Ke amaMowabhi athetha neenkokheli zamaMidiyan, athi: “Eli hlokondiba losuka livuthulule nje konke kule ngingqi yethu, kanye oku kwenkunzi yenkomo igramza ingca edlelweni.” Ngoko ke ukumkani uBhalaki" 
Numbers22:5 wathumela kuBhalam unyana kaBhehore owayesePetore ngakumlambo iEfrati, kumhlaba wamawabo. Umyalezo lowo wawusithi: “Ndiyakwazisa ukuba kukho isizwe esifikileyo apha siphuma eJiputa. Abantu baso banwenwele kulo lonke eli, futhi sebefike kwimida yam." 
Numbers22:6 Ngokwamanani bangaphezu kwethu; ngoko ke nceda uze kubaqalekisa. Mhlawumbi xa ubaqalekisile singanako ukuboyisa, sibadudule baphume kweli lizwe. Kaloku ndiyazi ukuba xa uthe wabathamsanqela abantu, bayathamsanqeleka; ukanti xa uthe waqalekisa, abantu bahlelwa lishwangusha.”" 
Numbers22:7 Zasuka ke iinkokheli zamaMowabhi nezamaMidiyan zahamba ziphethe intlawulo kaBhalam. Zakufika kuye zawugqithisa umyalezo kaBhalaki. 
Numbers22:8 UBhalam wathi kuwo la madoda: “Lalani. Mna ndonazisa ngomso into endiyixelelwe *nguNdikhoyo.” Ngenene ke amatshawe amaMowabhi alala apho kwaBhalam. 
Numbers22:9 UThixo wafika, wabuza uBhalam, wathi: “Ngoobani la madoda unawo apha?”" 
Numbers22:10 Ke yena waphendula wathi: “UBhalaki, ukumkani waseMowabhi, unyana kaZipore, uthumele kum, wathi:" 
Numbers22:11 ‘Kukho isizwe esifikileyo siphuma eJiputa. Ngoku sinwenwela kuwo wonke umhlaba. Yiza usiqalekise eso sizwe, khon' ukuze ndibe nako ukusoyisa ndisidudule simke.’ ”" 
Numbers22:12 UThixo wathi kuBhalam: “Uze ungahambi nala madoda; uze ungabaqalekisi abo bantu, kuba bathamsanqelekile.”" 
Numbers22:13 Ngengomso ke uBhalam wabandulula abathunywa bakaBhalaki, wathi: “Buyelani ezweni lenu, kuba uNdikhoyo akavumi ukuba ndihambe nani.”" 
Numbers22:14 Ngoko ke bagoduka, bafika bamxelela uBhalaki ukuba uBhalam walile ukuhamba nabo." 
Numbers22:15 Ngoku ke uBhalaki waphinda wathumela iqela leenkokheli ezaziwayo elikhulu kuneliya. 
Numbers22:16 Zaya kuBhalam, zafika zathi: “UBhalaki unyana kaZipore uthi mawuncede uye kuye, ungavumeli nasiphi na isithintelo," 
Numbers22:17 kuba uza kukuhlawula, waye uzimisele ukukwenzela nayiphi na into oyifunayo. Ngoko ke nceda uye kuqalekisa abaya bantu.”" 
Numbers22:18 Kambe ke uBhalam waphendula wathi: “Noba uBhalaki ubeza kundinika ibhotwe lakhe lizele yigolide nesiliva bendingeze ndawaphula umyalelo kaNdikhoyo uThixo wam. 
Numbers22:19 Kodwa ke nani khanilale kwanjengabanye abaya, ukuze ndiphinde ndibuzise, hleze uNdikhoyo andinike myalelo wumbi.”" 
Numbers22:20 Ngobo busuku uThixo wafika kuBhalam, wathi: “Njengoko la madoda eze kukulanda nje, lungisa uhambe nawo. Kambe ke uze wenze loo nto ndikuxelela yona.”" 
Numbers22:21 Ngentsasa elandelayo ke uBalam wabopha idonki yakhe, wakhwela, wahamba nezo nkokheli zamaMowabhi." 
Numbers22:22 Uthe ke uBhalam akuba ehamba, suka wavutha ngumsindo uThixo. Wayesahamba njalo ekhwele kuloo donki yakhe enezicaka zakhe ezibini, suka isithunywa *sikaNdikhoyo saxaba endleleni yakhe." 
Numbers22:23 Idonki ithe yakusibona isithunywa eso sixabile endleleni, siphethe ikrele, yacebuka endleleni, yangena emasimini. Suka ke uBhalam wayibetha, wayibuyisela endleleni." 
Numbers22:24 Ngoku ke isithunywa eso sema apho indlela imxinwa khona phakathi kwezidiliya ezibini, kwaye kukho uthango lwamatye ngapha nangapha." 
Numbers22:25 Idonki leyo ithe yakusibona isithunywa eso, yayama uthango olo, latsho lagruzuka unyawo lukaBhalam. Kwakhona uBhalam wayibetha idonki leyo." 
Numbers22:26 Kwakhona isithunywa sahambela phambilana, safika sema apho indlela yayimxinwa kangangokuba kungabikho sithuba sakudlula ngapha nangapha." 
Numbers22:27 Kwesi ke isihlandlo idonki ithe yakusibona isithunywa eso yalala phantsi. UBhalam wacaphuka, waza wayingena ngenduku idonki yakhe." 
Numbers22:28 Kwesi sithuba ke uNdikhoyo wayenza ukuba ikwazi ukuthetha idonki leyo, yaza ke yathetha yathi kuBhalam: “Kodwa kodwa ndikwenze ntoni? Yintoni kanye ondibethela yona kwezi zihlandlo zozithathu?”" 
Numbers22:29 UBhalam waphendula wathi: “Kungoba uyandibhanxa! Ndiswele nje ikrele, ngendikubulele.”" 
Numbers22:30 Idonki yaphendula yabuza yathi: “Andithi na kanene ndiyidonki yakho, le yasoloko ikuthwala bonke ubomi bakho? Ke, kukangaphi ndikuphatha ngolu hlobo?” UBhalam waphendula wathi: “Zange nakanye.”" 
Numbers22:31 UNdikhoyo ke wenza ukuba uBhalam asibone isithunywa eso sixabe endleleni siphethe ikrele. Akusibona ke, waziphosa phantsi ngobuso." 
Numbers22:32 Isithunywa sabuza sathi: “Ubuyibethela ntoni kangaka le donki yakho kude kube kathathu? Ndize kukunqanda, kuba uzifaka engozini ngolu hambo." 
Numbers22:33 Ke yona idonki yakho indibonile, yaza yaphambuka kwada kwakathathu. Ukuba ibingaphambukanga ngendikubulele ndasindisa kwayona.”" 
Numbers22:34 UBhalam waphendula wathi: “Hayi, ndonile. Bendingaqondi ukuba uxabile endleleni yam, kambe ke ngoku xa ubona ukuba akufanelekanga ukuba ndihambe, ndiyajika, ndiyagoduka.”" 
Numbers22:35 Ke sona isithunywa sathi kuye: “Hayi, sowuhamba nala madoda; kodwa ke uze uthethe loo nto ndithi thetha yona.” Ngoko ke uBhalam wahamba nazo iinkokheli zakwaBhalaki." 
Numbers22:36 UBhalaki uthe akuva ukuba uBhalam uyeza, wamhlangabeza, wadibana naye kwisixeko esiphezu komlambo iAnoni, kumda welaseMowabhi." 
Numbers22:37 UBhalaki wambuza wathi: “Kwakutheni ukuze ungezi ngokuya ndandikuthumele kuqala? Ngaba wawukrokrela ukuba sobe ndibe nako ukukuhlawula?” 
Numbers22:38 UBhalam waphendula wathi: “Andithi na kaloku ndizile? Kambe ke gunya lini endinalo? Hayi kaloku, ndothetha loo nto athi mandiyithethe uThixo.”" 
Numbers22:39 Ngoko ke uBhalam wahamba noBhalaki, baya eKiriyati-huzoti." 
Numbers22:40 UBhalaki waxhela iinkabi zeenkomo ndawonye neegusha, wamkela uBhalam nezo nkokheli wayehamba nazo." 
Numbers22:41 Ngengomso ke uBhalaki wamthatha uBhalam, wamsa eBhamoti-bhali, apho wayeza kuba nako ukubona inxalenye yamaSirayeli." 
Numbers23:1 UBhalam waxelela uBhalaki ukuba akhe amaqonga amadini apho abe sixhenxe, aze amzisele isixhenxe seenkunzi zeenkomo ngokunjalo nesixhenxe seenkunzi zeegusha." 
Numbers23:2 UBhalaki wenza ngokomyalelo lowo, baza ke noBhalam banikela inkunzi yenkomo neyegusha kwiqonga ngalinye." 
Numbers23:3 UBhalam ke washiya uBhalaki kuloo ndawo, wathi kuye: “Yima ngakweli dini litshiswayo, ngeli lixa mna ndiza kukhe ndithi gu. Mhlawumbi *uNdikhoyo uza kudibana nam. Ndiya kukwazisa nasiphi na isityhilelo andinika sona.” Wahamba ke, wenyuka inkqantosi yenduli." 
Numbers23:4 UThixo ke wadibana naye, uBhalam wathi: “Ndakhe amaqonga asixhenxe; kulo ngalinye ndenze idini ngenkunzi yenkomo neyegusha.”" 
Numbers23:5 UNdikhoyo ke waxelela uBhalam oko makakuthethe, wathi: “Buyela kuBhalaki, umazise oku.”" 
Numbers23:6 Ekubuyeni kwakhe ke wamfumana uBhalaki esemi apho ngakwidini elitshiswayo, enezo nkokheli zamaMowabhi." 
Numbers23:7 UBhalam ke wathetha la mazwi andilisekileyo, wenjenje: “Ukumkani uBhalaki wamaMowabhi undisuse kwelama-Aram; undiphuthume kwiintaba ezisempumalanga. Uthe: ‘Yiza ushwabulele uYakobi egameni lam. Yiza kaloku, umqalekise uSirayeli.’" 
Numbers23:8 Xa bendingubani ke mna ukuba ndiqalekise ongaqalekiswanga nguThixo, ndambathise ngeshwangusha ongashwatyulelwanga nguNdikhoyo?" 
Numbers23:9 Kaloku nanko ndimbona ndisencochoyini yeentaba; nanko ndimbukele ndiphezu kweenduli. Ewe, luhlanga olungumth' uzimele; lona aluzibandakanyi nezinye izizwe." 
Numbers23:10 Izizukulwana zikaYakobi yintlaninge njengentlabathi. Ngubani ke ongamcukucezayo ambale uSirayeli? Hayi bo! Masendisifa ukufa kwelungisa. Ewe, isiphelo sam masibe njengesabakhe.”" 
Numbers23:11 UBhalaki wabuza uBhalam wathi: “Yintoni le undenza yona? Ndingakuzisa apha ukuba uqalekise iintshaba zam, uze usuke wena uzithamsanqele!”" 
Numbers23:12 Waphendula ke yena wathi: “Mandingakuthethi oko ndikuxelelwe nguNdikhoyo?” 
Numbers23:13 Ke kaloku uBhalaki wathi kuBhalam: “Hamba siye kwenye indawo apho unokubona inxalenye yamaSirayeli kuphela, uze ke uthi ulapho uwaqalekise.”" 
Numbers23:14 Waya naye kwintsimi kaZofim phezu kwentaba iPisga. Nalapho ke wenza amaqonga asixhenxe, waza wanikela ngenkunzi yenkomo neyegusha kwiqonga ngalinye." 
Numbers23:15 UBhalam wathi kuBhalaki: “Yima ngakweli dini litshiswayo, ngeli lixa mna ndiye kuhlangana naye qelele.”" 
Numbers23:16 *UNdikhoyo ke wadibana noBhalam, wathi: “Buyela kuBhalaki, uthethe naye wenjenje.”" 
Numbers23:17 Wabuyela kwakuBhalaki ke, waza wamfumana esemi ngakwelo dini litshiswayo ndawonye neenkokheli zamaMowabhi. UBhalaki ke wambuza wathi: “Utheni uNdikhoyo?”" 
Numbers23:18 Waza ke yena uBhalam wathetha la mazwi andilisekileyo, wenjenje: “Hoyina ke, Bhalaki, khawubaz' iindlebe; khawundiphulaphule, nyana kaZipore!" 
Numbers23:19 UThixo yena akamntu; akaxoki, akaguqu-guquki okomntu. Akakufezekisi na akuthembisileyo? Akakuphumelelisi na akuthethileyo?" 
Numbers23:20 Nangoku ke kuthiwa mandithi jize ngentsikelelo; ethamsanqele nje yena, mna andinakulicima." 
Numbers23:21 Akubonwa sikhwa kuYakobi; hayi, akubonwa shwangusha kwaSirayeli. UNdikhoyo uThixo wabo ungakubo; ewe, kuvakala intswahla kuba uKumkani uphakathi kwawo." 
Numbers23:22 UThixo uwakhuphile eJiputa; iimpondo zakhe zibaze okwenyathi. 
Numbers23:23 Nemilingo ingabuya nemband' esikhova kuYakobi; nabuqili nabugqwirha buza ze kuSirayeli. Yona ngundaba-mlonyeni ngoYakobi noSirayeli, kusithiwa: ‘Khawubone ke imisebenzi kaThixo!" 
Numbers23:24 Khawukhangele ke olu hlanga! Lucondoba njengemaz' engonyama; luvungama okwengwanyalal' engonyama. Aluphumli lungazenzang' iziqweng' utshaba, luze lulithi qongqololo igazi lamaxhoba!’ ”" 
Numbers23:25 UBhalaki wabhekisa kuBhalam wenjenje: “Xa usala ke ukuwaqalekisa la maSirayeli musa ukuwathamsanqela!” 
Numbers23:26 UBhalam waphendula wathi: “Andithi na kanene ndikuxelele ukuba mna ndenza loo nto ndiyixelelwa nguNdikhoyo kuphela?” 
Numbers23:27 UBhalaki waphinda wathetha noBhalam, wathi: “Hamba siye kwenye indawo. Mhlawumbi uThixo angakuvumela uwaqalekise amaSirayeli xa ukuloo ndawo.”" 
Numbers23:28 Ngoko ke wamsa phezu kwentaba iPehore evelele intlango. 
Numbers23:29 UBhalam wathi: “Yenza amaqonga abe sixhenxe apha, futhi uze nesixhenxe seenkunzi zeenkomo ngokunjalo nezeegusha.”" 
Numbers23:30 Ngenene ke uBhalaki wenza ngokomyalelo kaBhalam, wanikela ngenkunzi yenkomo neyegusha kwiqonga ngalinye." 
Numbers24:1 Ngeli xesha ke uBhalam wayeseleqonda ukuba *uNdikhoyo uzimisele ukumthamsanqela uSirayeli, ngoko ke akabanga sabhenela kwimilingo njengangaphambili. Wajonga ngasentlango," 
Numbers24:2 waza wawabona amaSirayeli eqokelelene izindlu ngezindlu. Wasuka ke wonganyelwa nguMoya kaThixo; 
Numbers24:3 waza wadanduluka wathetha kwavokotheka wenjenje: “Nal' udaba olundilisekileyo lukaBhalam, unyana kaBhehore, amazwi andilisekileyo omfo obona cacileyo," 
Numbers24:4 izihlabo zomfo owevayo amazwi kaThixo, othwetyulweyo, kambe ethe ntsho ngamehlo, walamile, unombono kaSomandla." 
Numbers24:5 Hay' ubuhle beentente zikaYakobi! Ewe, athe dwe amanqugwala kaSirayeli!" 
Numbers24:6 Zithe tyaba okweentili; zithe thande okomyezo ecaleni komlambo, ngathi ngumngcelele wekhala elityalwe nguNdikhoyo, sengathi yimisedare phezu komlambo." 
Numbers24:7 Kuwo imvula iya kuhlala ingunogumbe, imbewu ayityale kumhlaba otofo-tofo. Ukumkani wawo woba mkhulu kunoAgagi, ulawulo lwakhe lubalasele ngodumo." 
Numbers24:8 UThixo wawakhupha eJiputa, iimpondo zakhe zibaze okwenyathi. Iintshaba zawo azithi nqwam-nqwam, amathambo azo awacole. Ke lona utolo lwawo luyahlabanisela." 
Numbers24:9 Luhlanga olubuthuma njengengonyama; lunjengemaz' engonyama, lungavuswa ngubani? Uthamsanqelekile osikelela uSirayeli! Hay' ishwangusha kulowo umqalekisayo!”" 
Numbers24:10 Ke kaloku uBhalaki wabhabhazela ngumsindo, wabetha ngenqindi phantsi, wathi kuBhalam: “Ndakulanda ukuba uze kuqalekisa iintshaba zam, kodwa ngoku kude kwakathathu uzithamsanqela!" 
Numbers24:11 Yini le! Chitheka; goduka! Ndathembisa ukuba ndiya kukuvuza ungakrokri, kambe ke lo Ndikhoyo ukwalele ukuba uwufumane loo mvuzo.”" 
Numbers24:12 UBhalam waphendula wathi: “Abathunywa bakho ndandibaxelele 
Numbers24:13 ukuba noba ungade undinike lonke ibhotwe lakho lizele yisiliva negolide andingekhe ndiwutsibe umyalelo kaNdikhoyo, ndenze ukuthanda kwam. Kuphela ndiya kuthetha oko athe mandikuthethe." 
Numbers24:14 Ke ngoku ndiyagoduka; ndiya kwabakowethu. Kodwa ke, phambi kokuba ndihambe, ndifuna ukukhe ndikulumkise ngento aya kuyenza uSirayeli kubantu bakho.”" 
Numbers24:15 Wathetha ke kwavokotheka uBhalam, wathi: “Nal' udaba olundilisekileyo lukaBhalam, unyana kaBhehore, amazwi andilisekileyo omfo obona cacileyo," 
Numbers24:16 izihlabo zomfo owevayo amazwi kaThixo, olwamkelayo ulwazi oluvela kuPhezukonke, othwetyulweyo, kambe ke ethe ntsho ngamehlo, walamile, unombono kaSomandla." 
Numbers24:17 Ewe, ndiyambona; nankuya phambili phaya. Ndiyamalama, umgama, phambili qelele. Ndibon' inkwenkwez' iphuma kwaYakobi; ndiwujongile umsimbithi usithi thaphu kwaSirayeli. Uya kuzintlekez' iinkokheli zikaMowabhi, abafohloz' oonyana bakaSeti." 
Numbers24:18 Uya kuzivuthulula iintshaba zakhe kwaEdom; ewe, iSeyire ibe yeyakhe, abe ke yena uSirayeli ekhula ngokomelela." 
Numbers24:19 Kothi qhaphu umlawuli kwaYakobi, abasindileyo e-Edom abatshayele kuthi nya.”" 
Numbers24:20 UBhalam wabona nama-Amaleki, waza wathetha kwavokotheka wathi: “UAmaleki fudula elelona hlanga lomeleleyo, kambe ke ekugqibeleni uya kutshabalala kuthi tu!”" 
Numbers24:21 Kwangokunjalo wabona amaKeni, waza wathetha kwavokotheka wathi: “Ikhaya lakho ngumankankela wenqaba, ngathi yindlwana ekwiimfanta zeenkelekethe zamawa." 
Numbers24:22 Kambe ke, nani maKeni, niya kutshabalala, akugaleleka uAsiriya anithimbe.”" 
Numbers24:23 UBhalam waqhuba wathetha kwavokotheka wenjenje: “Yaz'ba ngoobani abanokuphila engafuni uThixo? 
Numbers24:24 Abahlaseli bovela ngaseKiti, behamba ngezikhephe. Baya kumtshabalalisa uAsiriya noHebhere. Kambe nabo ngokwabo baya kutshabalala naphakade.”" 
Numbers24:25 Ke kaloku uBhalam wev' endleleni wagoduka, waza ke noBhalaki wahamba eyakhe indlela." 
Numbers25:1 AmaSirayeli athi xa ayemise kwintili yeShitim, asuka arheletya neentokazi zamaMowabhi." 
Numbers25:2 AmaMowabhikazi amema amaSirayeli ukuba aye kwizidlo zamadini awayesenzelwa *izithixo zamaMowabhi. AmaSirayeli akutya oko kutya, amnqula" 
Numbers25:3 uBhali wasePehore. Ngoko ke *uNdikhoyo wavutha ngumsindo," 
Numbers25:4 waza wathi kuMosis: “Thatha iinkokheli zamaSirayeli, uzibulale, uzixhome esidlangalaleni phambi *kwesibingelelo, khon' ukuze udambe umsindo wam ngakumaSirayeli.”" 
Numbers25:5 Ke kaloku uMosis wathi kwizikhulu zakwaSirayeli: “Ngamnye kuni makabulale amawabo azibandakanye noBhali wasePehore.” 
Numbers25:6 Omnye umSirayeli wathatha umMidiyanikazi, wangena naye kwakhe, ebonwa nguMosis nangamaSirayeli ephela, ngexesha awayesazilile esesangweni lesibingelelo." 
Numbers25:7 Uthe akuyibona le nto uPineyasi, unyana kaElazare, umzukulwana wombingeleli uAron, wee sululu, wemka apho kuloo ndibano, wathatha umkhonto," 
Numbers25:8 walandela loo ndoda naloo mfazi, wangena apho ententeni, wabinza ngomkhonto, wabadibanisa bobabini. Ngaloo ndlela ke ubhubhani owayephethe amaSirayeli wanqamka." 
Numbers25:9 Kambe ke wayeselesube wabulala abantu abangamashumi amabini anane amawaka. 
Numbers25:10 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: 
Numbers25:11 “Ngenxa yale nto yenziwe nguPineyasi, umsindo wam uthothile ngakumaSirayeli. Kaloku yena ngenxa yenzondelelo yakhe usiphuhlisile isidima sam ebandleni, ndaza ke ngoko andalitshabalalisa." 
Numbers25:12 Ngoko ke mxelele ukuba ndenza naye umnqophiso wobudlelwane. 
Numbers25:13 Yena ngokunjalo nenzala yakhe boba ngababingeleli abangasoze bathini. Kaloku yena ube nekhwele ngoThixo wakhe, waza ke ngaloo ndlela wamngxengxezela uSirayeli.”" 
Numbers25:14 Igama lomSirayeli owabulawa kunye nomMidiyanikazi yayinguZimri, unyana kaSalu, inkulu yomzi othile kwindlu kaSimon." 
Numbers25:15 Lona igama lomfazi lowo yayinguKozibhi. Uyise uZure wayeyinkosi yezindlu ezithile zamaMidiyani. 
Numbers25:16 UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: 
Numbers25:17 “AmaMidiyani ziintshaba zenu; watshabalaliseni," 
Numbers25:18 kuba abonise ubutshaba kuni ngokunikhohlisa, nangenxa kaKozibhi owabulawa mhla ngobhubhani obangwe sisithwakumbe sasePehore.”" 
Numbers26:1 Emva kwaloo bhubhani ke *uNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis noElazare unyana wombingeleli uAron, wathi:" 
Numbers26:2 “Libaleni ibandla lamaSirayeli liphela ngokwezindlu, nibale amadoda ukususela kubudala obuyiminyaka emashumi mabini ukunyuka, lawo afanelekileyo ukungena emkhosini.”" 
Numbers26:3 Ngenene ke bawuthobela loo myalelo, bawaqokelela onke amadoda ayiloo ntanga. Ke kaloku ahlanganisana kuloo mathafa aseMowabhi phesheya kweJordan malunga neJeriko. Lawo ke yayingamaSirayeli awayevela eJiputa:" 
Numbers26:4  
Numbers26:5 Indlu kaRubhen (uRhubhen ke wayeyinkulu kaSirayeli); imizi yayo: amaHanoki, amaPalu," 
Numbers26:6 amaHezeron, namaKarmi." 
Numbers26:7 Inani lamadoda ale mizi ke yayingamashumi amane anesithathu amawaka, anamakhulu asixhenxe, namashumi amathathu." 
Numbers26:8 Inzala kaPalu yayinguEliyabhi 
Numbers26:9 noonyana bakhe uNemuweli, uDatan, noAbhiram. Lo Datan nalo Abhiram ke ngabaya babenyulwe ngamaSirayeli. Bamvukela uMosis noAron, baza bazibandakanya nehlokondiba likaKora ngexesha ababevukela *uNdikhoyo." 
Numbers26:10 Kaloku umhlaba wavuleka wabaginya, baza bafa kunye noKora nabalandeli bakhe abatshatyalaliswa ngumlilo bengamakhulu amabini namashumi amahlanu amadoda. Ke bona baba sisilumkiso kumaSirayeli." 
Numbers26:11 Kambe umlibo kaKora zange uphele. 
Numbers26:12 Indlu kaSimon; imizi yayo: amaNemuweli, amaJamin, amaJakin," 
Numbers26:13 amaZera, namaShawuli." 
Numbers26:14 Inani lamadoda ale mizi ke yayingamashumi amabini anambini amawaka anamakhulu amabini. 
Numbers26:15 Indlu kaGadi; imizi yayo: amaZefon, amaHagi, amaShuni," 
Numbers26:16 amaOzeni, amaEri," 
Numbers26:17 ama-Arodi, nama-Areli." 
Numbers26:18 Inani lamadoda ale mizi yaba ngamashumi amane amawaka anamakhulu amahlanu. 
Numbers26:19 Indlu kaJuda; imizi yayo: amaShela, amaPerezi, namaZera. Isizukulwana samaPerezi ngamaHezeron namaHamuli. Isibini koonyana bakaJuda, uEre no-Onan, bafela eKanana." 
Numbers26:20  
Numbers26:21  
Numbers26:22 Ke amadoda ale mizi ayengamashumi asixhenxe anantandathu amawaka, namakhulu amahlanu." 
Numbers26:23 Indlu kaIsakare; imizi yayo: amaTola, amaPawu," 
Numbers26:24 amaYashubhi, namaShimron." 
Numbers26:25 Amadoda ale mizi ke ayengamashumi amathandathu anane amawaka, namakhulu amathathu." 
Numbers26:26 Indlu kaZebhulon; imizi yayo: amaZerede, amaElon, namaJaleli." 
Numbers26:27 Amadoda ale mizi ke aba ngamashumi amathandathu amawaka, namakhulu amahlanu." 
Numbers26:28 Indlu kaJosefu: Ke yena uJosefu wayenoonyana ababini, uManase noEfrayim." 
Numbers26:29 Indlu kaManase: uMakiri unyana kaManase wazala uGiliyadi. 
Numbers26:30 Ke yona inzala kaGiliyadi yile: amaIyezere, amaHeleki," 
Numbers26:31 ama-Aseriyeli, amaShekem," 
Numbers26:32 amaShemida, namaHefere." 
Numbers26:33 UZelofehadi unyana kaHefere wayengenanyana, iziintombi zodwa. Nanga amagama azo: uMala, uNoha, uHogela, uMilika, noTiza." 
Numbers26:34 Inani lamadoda ale ndlu yayingamashumi amahlanu anambini amawaka, namakhulu asixhenxe." 
Numbers26:35 Indlu kaEfrayim; imizi yayo: amaShutela, amaBhekeri, namaTahan." 
Numbers26:36 AmaEran ayinzala kaShutela. 
Numbers26:37 Amadoda ale mizi ke ayengamashumi amathathu anambini amawaka, mashumi amahlanu. Le ke yinzala kaJosefu." 
Numbers26:38 Indlu kaBhenjamin; imizi yayo: amaBhela, ama-Ashbhele, ama-Ahiram," 
Numbers26:39 amaShefufam, namaHufam." 
Numbers26:40 Ama-Ardi namaNaman yinzala kaBhela. 
Numbers26:41 Inani lamadoda ale ndlu yayingamashumi amane anesihlanu amawaka, namakhulu amathandathu." 
Numbers26:42 Indlu kaDan: inzala yayo iphuma kumaShuham. 
Numbers26:43 Inani lamadoda ale ndlu yayingamashumi amathandathu anane amawaka, makhulu amane." 
Numbers26:44 Indlu ka-Ashere; imizi yayo: amaImna, amaIshvi, namaBheriya." 
Numbers26:45 AmaHebhere namaMalekiyeli yinzala kaBheriya. 
Numbers26:46 UAshere wayenentombi egama linguSera. 
Numbers26:47 Amadoda ale ndlu ke ayengamashumi amahlanu anantathu amawaka, namakhulu amane." 
Numbers26:48 Indlu kaNafetali; imizi yayo: amaJazeli, amaGuni," 
Numbers26:49 amaJezere, namaShilem." 
Numbers26:50 Inani lamadoda ale ndlu yaba ngamashumi amane anesihlanu amawaka, namakhulu amane." 
Numbers26:51 Lilonke inani lamaSirayeli angamadoda yaba ngamakhulu amathandathu ananye amawaka, namakhulu asixhenxe, anamashumi amathathu." 
Numbers26:52 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi: 
Numbers26:53 “Umhlaba wahlulele le mizi ngokobubanzi bayo, ube lilifa layo." 
Numbers26:54 Umzi obanzi ilifa lawo malibe likhulu, elomzi onganeno libe nganeno. Umzi ngamnye uya kufumana ilifa lawo ngokwenani lababhaliweyo." 
Numbers26:55 Qiniseka ukuba umhlaba wahlulwa *ngamaqashiso. Isabelo somzi sohamba ngokobubanzi bawo. 
Numbers26:56 Ewe, ilifa elo liya kwabiwa ngamaqashiso kwimizi ebanzi nenganeno ngokunjalo.”" 
Numbers26:57 Nalu uludwe lwemizi yakwaLevi: amaGershon, amaKohati, namaMerari." 
Numbers26:58 Kwinzala yayo kukho nale mizi: amaLibheni, amaHebron, amaMali, amaMushi, namaKora. UKohati nguyise ka-Amram" 
Numbers26:59 owathatha umLevikazi uJokobhedi owazalelwa eJiputa. Ke yena wazalela uAmram oonyana ababini, uAron noMosis, nentombi uMiriyam." 
Numbers26:60 UAron wayenoonyana abane, uNadabhi, uAbhihu, uElazare, noItamare." 
Numbers26:61 UNadabhi noAbhihu ke bona bafa ngokwenzela uNdikhoyo umlilo ongafanelekanga. 
Numbers26:62 Ke bona abaLevi abangamadoda ababudala buyinyanga nangaphezulu baba ngamashumi amabini anantathu amawaka. Phofu ke bona baba noludwe lwabo bodwa, kuba zange banikwe mhlaba kwaSirayeli." 
Numbers26:63 Le ke yimizi eyadweliswa nguMosis noElazare xa babesenza ubalo lwamaSirayeli kumathafa aseMowabhi phesheya kweJordan malunga neJeriko. 
Numbers26:64 Kumadoda awayebalwe nguMosis noAron kwintlango yeSinayi, kubalo lokuqala, kwakungasekho nob' ibe nye." 
Numbers26:65 Kaloku *uNdikhoyo wayethe onke aya kufela entlango, kusinde uKalebhi unyana kaJefune, noYoshuwa unyana kaNune. Nangoku ke kwaba njalo." 
Numbers27:1 UMala, uNowa, uHogela, uMilika, noTiza, ziintombi zikaZelofehadi unyana kaHefere, kaGiliyadi, kaMakire, kaManase. Ngoko ke ziintombi zakwaManase unyana kaJosefu." 
Numbers27:2 Ke zona zaya kuMosis noElazare umbingeleli, benamadoda amakhulu ndawonye noSirayeli ephela. Babehlanganisene esangweni *lesibingelelo." 
Numbers27:3 Zafika zathi: “Utata wafela entlango engazalanga nyana. Akadibananga neqela likaKora elavukela *uNdikhoyo, koko yena wafela isono sakhe." 
Numbers27:4 Ngani ukuba igama likabawo liduke kwaSirayeli ngokuba wayengenanyana? Sincede usinike isabelo nathi phakathi kwamawethu.” 
Numbers27:5 Lo mcimbi uMosis wawusa kuNdikhoyo," 
Numbers27:6 waza ke yena wathi: 
Numbers27:7 “Iintombi zikaZelofehadi zenze isicelo esifanelekileyo, ngoko ke mazinikwe isabelo phakathi kwamawazo. Ilifa likayise maliwele kuzo." 
Numbers27:8 “Yithi ke kumaSirayeli: ‘Xa indoda ife ingenanyana, ilifa layo malityiwe yintombi yayo." 
Numbers27:9 Ukuba ke ayinantombi, ilifa layo loba lelabantakwayo." 
Numbers27:10 Xa kuthe kanti ayinabantakwayo, ilifa malibe lelooyisekazi." 
Numbers27:11 Kambe ke ukuba ayinabantakwayo nayisekazi, ilifa elo malinikwe nabani na osesona sizalwana sayo sisondeleyo. Eli siko ke amaSirayeli makalithobele njengomqathango ongundoqo, alenze njengoko ndikuyaleleyo mna Ndikhoyo.’ ”" 
Numbers27:12 *UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi: “Nyuka uqabele intaba iAbharim, ulijonge ulibuke elo lizwe ndiza kulinika amaSirayeli." 
Numbers27:13 Wakuba ulibonile ke, nawe uza kufa kwanjengoAron umntakwenu." 
Numbers27:14 Kaloku nobabini nawuvukela umyalelo wam kwintlango iZin. Wathi uSirayeli akundikhalazela ngenxa yemeko yamanzi eMeribha nina nala ukusiphuhlisa isihomo samandla am phambi kwakhe.” (IMeribha ke ngumthombo oseKadeshe kwintlango iZin.) 
Numbers27:15 Ke kaloku uMosis wathetha wenjenje: 
Numbers27:16 “Ndikhoyo, Thixo wam, wena mthombo wobomi, nceda utyumbe indoda eya kulikhokela ibandla lakho," 
Numbers27:17 enako ukungena iphuma ilikhokela, khon' ukuze usapho lwakho lungafani neegusha ezingenamalusi.”" 
Numbers27:18 UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis wathi: “Thatha uYoshuwa unyana kaNune, oyindoda endiyixhobise ngoMoya wam, ummisele ngokumbeka izandla." 
Numbers27:19 Biza uSirayeli ephela, nombingeleli uElazare, uze uYoshuwa ummisele angene ezihlangwini zakho apho phambi kwabo." 
Numbers27:20 Mahlulele amagunya akho, khon' ukuze ibandla lonke limthobele." 
Numbers27:21 Ke yena uya kuxhomekeka kumbingeleli uElazare, kuba kaloku yena intando yam uya kuyaziswa *ziiurim neethumim. Ngale ndlela baya kubhexeshwa nguElazare kuyo yonke imicimbi yabo.”" 
Numbers27:22 Ke uMosis wenza ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo. UYoshuwa wammisa phambi kombingeleli uElazare ndawonye nebandla loonyana bakaSirayeli. 
Numbers27:23 Ngokunjalo uMosis wambeka izandla uYoshuwa, wammisela ukuba angene ezihlangwini zakhe ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo." 
Numbers28:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi uMosis 
Numbers28:2 makayalele amaSirayeli athi: “Ngamathuba amisiweyo ndinikeni amadini akukutya okunikelwa kum ngomlilo, idini elivumba limnandi." 
Numbers28:3 “Nanga ke loo madini okutya kufuneka anikelwe ngomlilo kuNdikhoyo: amadini atshiswayo emihla ngemihla, isibini samaxhwane angamaduna angenasiphako." 
Numbers28:4 Elokuqala malinikelwe kusasa, lize elesibini linikelwe ngorhatya." 
Numbers28:5 Ixhwane ngalinye ke malihambe nomnikelo weenkozo ongumgubo wengqolowa obunzima buyikhilogram enye, udityaniswe nelitha yamafutha omnquma acwengileyo." 
Numbers28:6 Elo ke lidini lomlilo lemihla ngemihla; laqala ukwenziwa entabeni iSinayi, ilidini lokutya elivumba likholekileyo kuNdikhoyo." 
Numbers28:7 Kumnikelo wewayini ohamba neli dini lokuqala kothathwa ilitha yewayini ithululwe phambi koNdikhoyo. 
Numbers28:8 Ngorhatya kothathwa elaa xhwane liseleyo, kuqhutywe njengakusasa; ngokunjalo nangomnikelo othululwayo ohamba nalo. Elo ke lidini lomlilo elivumba liyolileyo kuNdikhoyo.”" 
Numbers28:9 “*NgoMhla wokuPhumla makwenziwe idini ngesibini samaxhwane angamaduna angenasiphako: iikhilogram ezimbini zomgubo wengqolowa udityaniswe namafutha omnquma ube ngumnikelo weenkozo, ngokunjalo nomnikelo wewayini." 
Numbers28:10 Eli dini litshiswayo ke malenziwe ngayo yonke imihla yokuphumla, lisongeza kwidini elitshiswayo lemihla ngemihla elihamba nomnikelo othululwayo.”" 
Numbers28:11 “Ekuqaleni kwenyanga nganye makwenzelwe *uNdikhoyo idini elitshiswayo: iinkunzi zeenkomo eziselula zibe mbini, inkunzi yegusha, isixhenxe samaxhwane angamaduna angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers28:12 Umnikelo weenkozo mawube ngumgubo wengqolowa odityaniswe namafutha omnquma. Inkunzi nganye yenkomo yohamba neekhilogram ezintathu zomgubo wengqolowa; ize inkunzi yegusha yona ihambe neekhilogram ezimbini; 
Numbers28:13 ke lona ixhwane ngalinye lohamba nekhilogram enye. La ngamadini atshiswayo; angumnikelo wokutya osondezwa ngomlilo, ivumba elithandekayo kuNdikhoyo." 
Numbers28:14 Inkunzi yenkomo ihamba nomnikelo oziilitha ezimbini zewayini; inkunzi yegusha ihamba nomnikelo oyilitha enesiqingatha sewayini; lize lona ixhwane ngalinye lihambe nomnikelo oyilitha yewayini. Lowo ke ngummiselo mayela nedini elitshiswayo lomhla wokuqala wokuthwasa kwenyanga nganye enyakeni. 
Numbers28:15 Ngaphezu kwelo dini litshiswayo lemihla ngemihla ke lihamba nomnikelo othululwayo, makwenziwe idini lesono ngebhokhwe eliduna.”" 
Numbers28:16 “Umbhiyozo *kaNdikhoyo ngethuba *lePasika mawube ngomhla weshumi elinesine kwinyanga yokuqala. 
Numbers28:17 Ngomhla weshumi elinesihlanu koqala umbhiyozo. Ke kwiintsuku ezisixhenxe kosetyenziswa isonka esinganyuswanga. 
Numbers28:18 Ngomhla wokuqala yoba yintlanganiso eyodwa yokunqula, kungàsetyenzwa." 
Numbers28:19 UNdikhoyo makenzelwe idini lomlilo, libe lidini elitshiswayo. Yoba ziinkunzi zeenkomo eziselula zibe mbini, inkunzi yegusha, nesixhenxe samaxhwane angamaduna, angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers28:20 Makwenziwe umnikelo weenkozo ngomgubo wengqolowa oxutywe namafutha omnquma: iikhilogram ezintathu zohamba nenkunzi yenkomo nganye; iikhilogram ezimbini zihambe nenkunzi yegusha," 
Numbers28:21 ize ikhilogram ihambe nexhwane ngalinye. 
Numbers28:22 Ngokunjalo ke makwenziwe idini lesono ngebhokhwe eliduna, khon' ukuze ibe ngumsitho wokucamagushela amaSirayeli." 
Numbers28:23 La ke ongeza kwelaa dini litshiswayo lemihla ngemihla kusasa. 
Numbers28:24 Kwangaloo ndlela ke, isithuba seentsuku ezisixhenxe, nikelani kuNdikhoyo idini lomlilo elivumba likholekileyo kuye. Eli ke longeza kwidini elitshiswayo lemihla ngemihla elihamba nomnikelo othululwayo." 
Numbers28:25 Ke ngomhla wesixhenxe makube yintlanganiso eyodwa yokunqula, kungàsetyenzwa.”" 
Numbers28:26 “Iiveki ezisixhenxe emva *kwePasika ngosuku lokuqala kumsitho wesivuno xa ninikela ulibo oluziinkozo *kuNdikhoyo, makube yintlanganiso yokunqula, kungàsetyenzwa." 
Numbers28:27 Makwenziwe idini elitshiswayo elivumba likholekileyo kuNdikhoyo: Yoba ziinkunzi zeenkomo eziselula zibe mbini, inkunzi yegusha, kunye nesixhenxe samaxhwane angamaduna, angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers28:28 Makwenziwe umnikelo weenkozo ngomgubo wengqolowa oxutywe namafutha omnquma; iikhilogram ezintatu zohamba nenkunzi yenkomo, zize iikhilogram ezimbini zihambe nenkunzi yegusha;" 
Numbers28:29 ke yona ikhilogram ihambe nexhwane ngalinye. 
Numbers28:30 Ngokunjalo ke makwenziwe idini lesono ngebhokhwe eliduna. Niya kucanyagushelwa ngaloo ndlela ke. 
Numbers28:31 La ke, kunye nomnikelo othululwayo, ongeza idini elitshiswayo lemihla ngemihla ngokunjalo nedini leenkozo. Ngenene ezi zilwanyana mazingabi nasiphako.”" 
Numbers29:1 “Ngomhla wokuqala kwinyanga yesixhenxe makube yintlanganiso eyodwa yokunqula, ningawuphathi umsebenzi. Ngaloo mini ke makukhaliswe amaxilongo." 
Numbers29:2 Yenzelani *uNdikhoyo idini elitshiswayo elivumba likholekileyo kuye: inkunzi yenkomo eselula, inkunzi yegusha, nesixhenxe samaxhwane angamaduna, angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers29:3 Makwenziwe umnikelo weenkozo ngomgubo wengqolowa oxutywe namafutha omnquma: iikhilogram ezintathu zomgubo wengqolowa zohamba nenkunzi yenkomo, iikhilogram ezimbini zihambe nenkunzi yegusha," 
Numbers29:4 ixhwane ngalinye lihambe nekhilogram enye. 
Numbers29:5 Ngokunjalo makwenziwe nedini lesono ngebhokhwe eliduna ukuze nicanyagushelwe. 
Numbers29:6 La madini ke ongeza laa madini atshiswayo enziwa rhoqo kusuku lokuqala enyangeni nomnikelo weenkozo, ngokunjalo nedini elitshiswayo lemila ngemihla elihamba nomnikelo weenkozo nothululwayo. La madini omlilo alivumba elimnandi kuNdikhoyo.”" 
Numbers29:7 “Ngomhla weshumi kwinyanga yesixhenxe makube yintlanganiso eyodwa yokunqula, ukutya nomsebenzi kuzilwe." 
Numbers29:8 Yenzani idini elitshiswayo; lona lilivumba eliyolileyo *kuNdikhoyo: inkunzi yenkomo eselula, inkunzi yegusha nesixhenxe samaxhwane angamaduna, angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers29:9 Yenzani umnikelo weenkozo ngomgubo wengqolowa oxutywe namafutha omnquma: iikhilogram ezintathu zihambe nenkunzi yenkomo, iikhilogram ezimbini zihambe nenkunzi yegusha;" 
Numbers29:10 ikhilogram enye yona ihambe nexhwane ngalinye. 
Numbers29:11 Makwenziwe idini lesono ngebhokhwe eliduna ukongeza kulaa bhokhwe yocamagushelo nedini elitshiswayo lemihla ngemihla elihamba nomnikelo weenkozo nothululwayo.” 
Numbers29:12 “Ngomhla weshumi elinesihlanu kwinyanga yesixhenxe makube yintlanganiso eyodwa yokunqula, ningawuphathi umsebenzi. Yenzelani *uNdikhoyo itheko iintsuku zibe sixhenxe." 
Numbers29:13 Ngalo mhla wokuqala yenzelani uNdikhoyo idini lomlilo elivumba limnandi kuye: ishumi elinesithathu leenkunzi zeenkomo eziselula, iinkunzi zeegusha zibe mbini, neshumi elinesine lamaxhwane angamaduna, angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers29:14 Yenzani umnikelo weenkozo ngomgubo wengqolowa oxutywe namafutha omnquma: iikhilogram ezintathu zomgubo zihambe nenkunzi yenkomo nganye, iikhilogram ezimbini zihambe nenkunzi yegusha nganye," 
Numbers29:15 ize ikhilogram yomgubo ihambe nexhwane ngalinye ngokunjalo neminikelo ethululwayo. 
Numbers29:16 Makwenziwe nedini lesono ngebhokhwe eliduna. Onke ke la madini ongeza idini elitshiswayo lemihla ngemihla elihamba nomnikelo weenkozo nothululwayo. 
Numbers29:17 “Ngosuku lwesibini makwenziwe amadini ngeenkunzi zeenkomo eziselula zibe lishumi elinambini, iinkunzi zeegusha zibe mbini, neshumi elinesine lamaxhwane angamaduna, angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers29:18 La madini ke ohamba nalawo ayimfuneko ndawonye neminikelo kusuku lokuqala. 
Numbers29:19  
Numbers29:20 “Ngosuku lwesithathu makunikelwe ishumi elinanye leenkunzi zeenkomo eziselula, isibini seenkunzi zeegusha, neshumi elinesine lamaxhwane angamaduna, angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers29:21 Ngokunjalo ke ohamba naloo madini ayimfuneko ndawonye neminikelo kusuku lokuqala. 
Numbers29:22  
Numbers29:23 “Ngosuku lwesine makunikelwe ishumi leenkunzi zeenkomo eziselula, isibini seenkunzi zeegusha, neshumi elinesine lamaxhwane angamaduna, angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers29:24 Ngokunjalo ke makahambe naloo madini ayimfuneko ndawonye neminikelo kusuku lokuqala. 
Numbers29:25  
Numbers29:26 “Ngosuku lwesihlanu makunikelwe iinkunzi zeenkomo eziselula zibe lithoba, iinkunzi zeegusha zibe mbini, neshumi elinesine lamaxhwane angamaduna, angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers29:27 Ndawonye nawo ke makwenziwe nalaa madini kwaneminikelo eyimfuneko kusuku lokuqala. 
Numbers29:28  
Numbers29:29 “Ngosuku lwesithandathu makunikelwe isibhozo seenkunzi zeenkomo eziselula, iinkunzi zeegusha zibe mbini, namaxhwane angamaduna alishumi elinesine, angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers29:30 Lawo ayimfuneko ndawonye neminikelo kusuku lokuqala nawo makangasileli. 
Numbers29:31  
Numbers29:32 “Ngosuku lwesixhenxe konikelwa isixhenxe seenkunzi zeenkomo eziselula, neenkunzi zeegusha ezimbini, ndawonye neshumi elinesine lamaxhwane angamaduna, angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers29:33 Ngokunjalo ke makwenziwe naloo madini ayimfuneko ndawonye neminikelo kusuku lokuqala. 
Numbers29:34  
Numbers29:35 “Ngosuku lwesibhozo makube yintlanganiso eyodwa yokunqula, ningasebenzi." 
Numbers29:36 Makwenziwe idini elitshiswayo libe lidini lomlilo elimkholisayo uNdikhoyo: inkunzi yenkomo eselula, inkunzi yegusha, nesixhenxe samaxhwane angamaduna, angenasiphako onke." 
Numbers29:37 Ngokunjalo ke namadini ayimfuneko ndawonye neminikelo ngosuku lokuqala makangasileli. 
Numbers29:38  
Numbers29:39 “Le ke yimimiselo mayela namadini atshiswayo, neminikelo yeenkozo nethululwayo, neyobudlelwane, ekufuneka niyenzele uNdikhoyo ngokusesikweni ngamaxesha ayo. La madini neminikelo ongeza kumadini ezithembiso okanye awokuqhutywa yintliziyo.”" 
Numbers29:40 Ngenene ke uMosis wawaxelela amaSirayeli konke awayekuyalelwe nguNdikhoyo. 
Numbers30:1 Iinkulu zezindlu zikaSirayeli uMosis wazinika le mimiselo *kaNdikhoyo ilandelayo, wathi:" 
Numbers30:2 “Indoda xa ithe yenza isibhambathiso kuNdikhoyo, okanye xa ithe yenza isifungo sokuzibophelela, mayingasaphuli eso sifungo, koko mayikufezekise konke ekuthembisileyo." 
Numbers30:3 “Ukuba intombi engekendi ithembisa ukunika uNdikhoyo into, okanye yafungela ukuzila into ethile," 
Numbers30:4 mayenze ngokwesifungo nesithembiso sayo, ngaphandle kokuba uyise uthe akuyiva loo nto, wayichasa." 
Numbers30:5 Kodwa ke xa athe akuva ngale nyewe uyise, wala ukuba isifezekise eso sithembiso, ayisabophelelekanga kuso. UNdikhoyo uya kuyixolela, kuba yalelwe nguyise ukuba mayisifezekise." 
Numbers30:6 “Kambe ukuba intombi yenze isithembiso, iqonda okanye ingaqondi, mhlawumbi yafungela ukuzila into ethile, yaza ke kamva yenda," 
Numbers30:7 ke yena wathi akusiva umyeni wayo akathetha nto, isifungo eso okanye isithembiso sohlala siyibophile." 
Numbers30:8 Kodwa ke ukuba ithe yakuva ngesi sifungo indoda yayo yasichasa eso sifungo okanye isithembiso, siya kuba sitshitshile; futhi ke xa kunjalo noNdikhoyo uya kuyixolela." 
Numbers30:9 “Ke yena umhlolokazi okanye umfazi owahlukene nendoda yakhe, xa ethe wenza isithembiso okanye isifungo, uya kunyanzeleka ukuba asifezekise." 
Numbers30:10 “Ke ukuba umfazi owendileyo wenze isithembiso okanye isifungo," 
Numbers30:11 yaza yathi yakuyiva loo nto indoda yakhe ayathetha nto, ayasichasa eso sithembiso okanye isifungo, uya kunyanzeleka ukuba asifezekise." 
Numbers30:12 Kambe ke ukuba ithe yakusiva eso sifungo indoda yakhe yasichasa, soba sitshitshisiwe eso sithembiso okanye isifungo, kuba kaloku indoda yakhe imalele ukuba asifezekise; ngoko ke noNdikhoyo uya kumxolela." 
Numbers30:13 Indoda inelungelo lokusixhasa okanye isichithe isithembiso nokuba sisifungo esenziwe ngumfazi wayo. 
Numbers30:14 Ukuba ke indoda leyo ithe yakuva ngeso sifungo yathatha ithuba ingathethi nto, yoba iyasixhasa eso sithembiso okanye isifungo azibophe ngaso umfazi wayo; ewe, yoba isixhasile xa ingathethanga nto yakuba ivile ngaso." 
Numbers30:15 Phofu ke ukuba ithule yathula yajika ngengomso yasitshitshisa eso sifungo, ityala lokungafezekiswa kwaso loba semagxeni ayo.”" 
Numbers30:16 Nantso ke imimiselo eyanikwa uMosis nguNdikhoyo mayela nendoda nomfazi wayo, ngokunjalo mayela nentombi ekowayo." 
Numbers31:1 *UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi:" 
Numbers31:2 “Phambi kokuba ungabikho amaSirayeli makaziphindezele kumaMidiyani ngenxa yento awayenzayo.” 
Numbers31:3 Ngoko ke uMosis wayalela amaSirayeli, wathi: “Xhobisani amadoda omkhosi ukuze ahlasele amaMidiyani, aphindezele ngenxa kaNdikhoyo." 
Numbers31:4 Indlu nganye mayikhuphe iwaka lamadoda.” 
Numbers31:5 Indlu nganye ke yakhetha yakhupha iwaka lamadoda, aza ke ewonke alishumi elinambini lamawaka alibophe aligangatha." 
Numbers31:6 UMosis ke wawukhupha lo mkhosi, uhamba nombingeleli uPineyasi unyana kaElazare. Yena waya edabini ephethe izitya ezingcwele namaxilongo okuhlaba umkhosi." 
Numbers31:7 Ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo ke bawahlasela amaMidiyani, bawatshabalalisa onke amadoda," 
Numbers31:8 kunye neekumkani ezintlanu zamaMidiyani: uEvi, uRekem, uZure, uYuri, noRebha. Bambulala noBhalam unyana kaBhehore." 
Numbers31:9 AmaSirayeli athimba abafazi bamaMidiyani nabantwana bawo, ayithatha yonke imfuyo yawo, azenzela nakubutyebi bawo." 
Numbers31:10 Ke zona iidolophu nemizana azitshisa ngomlilo zonke. 
Numbers31:11 Amabanjwa nemfuyo nako konke ababekuthimbile bakuthatha 
Numbers31:12 bakusa kuMosis noElazare noSirayeli ephela. Bona ke babemise kumathafa aseMowabhi phesheya kweJordan malunga neJeriko. 
Numbers31:13 UMosis, noElazare, neenkulu zezindlu zamaSirayeli, baphuma baya kuhlangabeza umkhosi." 
Numbers31:14 UMosis wakhathazeka sisenzo sabaphathi neengqwayi-ngqwayi zamabutho namaqela awayevela emfazweni. 
Numbers31:15 Wabuza wathi: “Ngani ukuba ningababulali aba bafazi? 
Numbers31:16 Senilibele ngoku ukuba yayingabafazi abâlandela icebo likaBhalam, baza bawawexula amaSirayeli, amvukela *uNdikhoyo ePehore? Kaloku nantso into eyehlisela abantu bakaNdikhoyo ngobhubhani." 
Numbers31:17 Ngoko ke wabulaleni onke amakhwenkwe ngokunjalo nabafazi. 
Numbers31:18 Ke wona amantombazana kunye neentombi zigcineleni. 
Numbers31:19 Bonke ke kuni ababuleleyo nabathe bachukumisa izidumbu mabahlale ngaphandle komzi iintsuki zibe sixhenxe. Ngosuku lwesithathu nolwesixhenxe zihlambululeni ndawonye nâbo nibathimbileyo. 
Numbers31:20 Ngokunjalo ke hlambululani yonke into eyeyokunxiba, nayo yonke into eyenziwe ngofele, uboya bebhokhwe, okanye umthi.”" 
Numbers31:21 Umbingeleli uElazare wathetha naloo madoda awayevela emfazweni, wathi: “Nantsi imimiselo enikelwe uMosis nguNdikhoyo." 
Numbers31:22 Uthe yonke into engatshiyo enjengegolide, isiliva, ubhedu, intsimbi, inkcenkce, okanye ilothe, mayihlanjululwe ngokufakwa emlilweni, ize ifakwe emanzini okuhlambulula. Izinto ezizezinye ke zona zohlanjululwa ngamanzi okuhlambulula kuphela." 
Numbers31:23  
Numbers31:24 Ngosuku lwesixhenxe ke kofuneka nizihlambe iimpahla zenu; xa kunjalo ke noba nihlambulukile ngokusesikweni, nibe nako nokungena emzini.”" 
Numbers31:25 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis, wathi:" 
Numbers31:26 “Thatha uElazare neenkulu zezindlu zamaSirayeli, nibale yonke into eniyithimbileyo kunye namabanjwa nemfuyo." 
Numbers31:27 Onke amaxhoba lawo wahluleni kubini ngokulinganayo. Esinye isahlulo soba sesamajoni, esinye ke sibe sesebandla lonke." 
Numbers31:28 Kwisahlulo samajoni thathani umrhumo kaNdikhoyo; wona ke woba libanjwa elinye kwangamakhulu amahlanu. Nosebenzisa kwaloo mlinganiselo ke nakwimfuyo. 
Numbers31:29 Ezi zinto ke nozinika umbingeleli uElazare, zingumrhumo owodwa kaNdikhoyo." 
Numbers31:30 Ke kwisahlulo samaSirayeli thathani libe linye kumabanjwa angamashumi amahlanu, niqhube kwangaloo mlinganiselo ke nakwimfuyo. Ezi zinto ke zona zinikeni abaLevi abo balusa *isibingelelo.”" 
Numbers31:31 UMosis noElazare ke bazenza zonke ezi zinto ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo. 
Numbers31:32 Nalu ke uludwe lwamaxhoba awathinjwa ngumkhosi xa ewonke: amakhulu amathandathu namashumi asixhenxe anantlanu amawaka eegusha neebhokhwe; 
Numbers31:33 amashumi asixhenxe anambini amawaka eenkomo; 
Numbers31:34 amashumi amathandathu ananye amawaka eedonki; 
Numbers31:35 namashumi amathathu anambini amawaka amantombazana kunye neentombi. 
Numbers31:36 Ke isahlulo samajoni saba ngamakhulu amathathu namashumi amathathu anesixhenxe samawaka namakhulu amahlanu eegusha neebhokhwe; 
Numbers31:37 waza ke umrhumo kaNdikhoyo wangamakhulu amathandathu anamashumi asixhenxe anantlanu. 
Numbers31:38 Zona iinkomo zangamashumi amathathu anesithandathu amawaka; aza ke amashumi asixhenxe anambini aba ngumrhumo kaNdikhoyo. 
Numbers31:39 Iidonki ke zona zazingamashumi amathathu amawaka namakhulu amahlanu; waza ke wona umrhumo kaNdikhoyo waba ngamashumi amathandathu ananye. 
Numbers31:40 Iintombi namantombazana zaba lishumi elinesithandathu lamawaka; umrhumo kaNdikhoyo ke waba ngamashumi amathathu anambini. 
Numbers31:41 Ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo ke uMosis wawugqithisela kuElazare loo mrhumo uwodwa kaNdikhoyo. 
Numbers31:42 Ke isahlulo samaSirayeli sasifana, silingana neso samajoni:" 
Numbers31:43 amakhulu amathathu anamashumi amathathu anesixhenxe amawaka, namakhulu amahlanu eegusha neebhokhwe;" 
Numbers31:44 amashumi amathathu anesithandathu amawaka eenkomo; 
Numbers31:45 amashumi amathathu amawaka namakhulu amahlanu eedonki; 
Numbers31:46 kunye neshumi elinesithandathu lamawaka eentombi namantombazana. 
Numbers31:47 Kwesi sahlulo ke uMosis wathatha lalinye kumashumi amahlanu amabanjwa, ngokunjalo nakwimfuyo, wanika abaLevi ababesalusa isibingelelo ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo." 
Numbers31:48 Ke kaloku abaphathi neengqwayi-ngqwayi zamabutho namaqela omkhosi baya kuxelela uMosis," 
Numbers31:49 bathi: “Mhlekazi, siwabalile amajoni ebesiphume nawo; akukho nalinye elingekhoyo." 
Numbers31:50 Nanku umnikelo ke ophuma kwizinto zegolide esizifumeneyo sonke ngabanye: imixhaka, iibhengile, imisesane, amacici, namaso. Sizinikela ukuba zibe sisicamagushelo sobomi bethu kuNdikhoyo.”" 
Numbers31:51 Ke uMosis noElazare bayamkela loo golide; yonke ke yayizizihombiso. 
Numbers31:52 Uwonke ke loo mrhumo wabaphathi waba kwisituba samakhulu amabini eekhilogram ubunzima. 
Numbers31:53 Ke ijoni ngalinye lazithathela amaxhoba. 
Numbers31:54 Ngoko ke uMosis noElazare bayithatha igolide leyo, bayisa esibingelelweni, khon' ukuze ibe sisikhumbuzo samaSirayeli kuNdikhoyo." 
Numbers32:1 Ke kaloku amaRubhen namaGadi ayenemihlambi emikhulu yeenkomo. Athe ke akuwuqonda umhlaba waseJazere naseGiliyadi ukuba uyifanele imfuyo," 
Numbers32:2 aya kuMosis nombingeleli uElazare kunye nezinye iinkokheli, acela athi:" 
Numbers32:3 “Lo mhlaba amaSirayeli awuphiwe *nguNdikhoyo – sitsho ezi dolophu: iAtaroti, iDibhon, iJazere, iNimra, iHeshbhon, iElale, iSebham, iNebho, neBheyoni – ungumhlaba olungele iinkomo, ibe ke nathi sineenkomo ezininzi." 
Numbers32:4  
Numbers32:5 Ngoko ke kunganjani xa lo mhlaba unikwa thina, ube sisabelo sethu, sime apha kuwo, singabi sayiwela iJordan? Siyakubongoza.”" 
Numbers32:6 UMosis waphendula wathi: “Ngaba ke nina nifuna ukuhlala apha nisonge izandla xa wona amawenu esiya emfazweni? 
Numbers32:7 Ningathini kaloku ukusuka niwatyhafise ngolo hlobo amaSirayeli, xa wona ewela iJordan, esiya kuthatha umhlaba awuphiwe nguNdikhoyo?" 
Numbers32:8 Ooyihlo benza kwale nto ngokuya ndandibathuma siseKadeshe-bhaneya ukuba beze kuhlola lo mhlaba. 
Numbers32:9 Bahamba baya kuma ngentili ye-Eshkoli, bawubona lo mhlaba, kodwa bathi bakubuya bawatyhafisa amaSirayeli, khon' ukuze angezi kweli lizwe aliphiweyo nguNdikhoyo." 
Numbers32:10 Ke yena uNdikhoyo wakhathazeka, waza wafunga wathi:" 
Numbers32:11 ‘Ngenxa yokuba bengakholosanga ngam, kula madoda akwiminyaka emashumi mabini nangaphezulu aphuma eJiputa akukho nanye iya kungena kwelo lizwe ndabathembisa ngalo ooAbraham, uIsake, noYakobi.’" 
Numbers32:12 “Esi sifungo ke sabandakanya bonke ngaphandle kukaKalebhi unyana kaJefune umKeni, noYoshuwa unyana kaNune. Kaloku bona bakholosa ngoNdikhoyo." 
Numbers32:13 UNdikhoyo ke wakhathazeka, waza amaSirayeli wawabhadulisa entlango isithuba seminyaka engamashumi amane, sada safa saphela eso sizukulwana sasimonile." 
Numbers32:14 Nina ke eningene ezihlangwini zooyihlo, nisisizukulwana esitsha esigwenxa esizimisele ukuhlisela umsindo kaNdikhoyo phezu kwamaSirayeli kwakhona." 
Numbers32:15 Nani ke, maRubhen namaGadi, ukuba niyala ukunamathela kuye ngoku, uya kuphinda awalahle entlango amaSirayeli, ize ke intshabalalo yawo ibe yimhemhe yenu.”" 
Numbers32:16 Ke wona asuka aya kuMosis, ambongoza athi: “Sivumele sakhele iigusha zethu iintlanti, futhi sakhele iintsapho zethu iidolophu." 
Numbers32:17 Sizimisele ukuxhoba siwakhokele amawethu emadabini, siwancedise ade awume loo mhlaba uza kuba ngowawo. Ke zona iintsapho zethu siya kuzishiya zihleli kwiidolophu ezinqatyisiweyo, zingabi nakuchukunyiswa ngabantu beli lizwe." 
Numbers32:18 Thina ke soze sibuye ngaphandle kokuba ade onke amaSirayeli asifumane isabelo sawo kwelo lizwe. 
Numbers32:19 Ngokunjalo ke thina soze sifumane sabelo samhlaba phaya phesheya kweJordan, kuba kaloku esethu nasi ngeneno empuma yeJordan.”" 
Numbers32:20 UMosis waphendula wathi: “Xa kunjalo ke, zilungiseleleni apha phambi kukaNdikhoyo, nizimisele ukuya edabini." 
Numbers32:21 Onke amajoni enu kufuneka awele iJordan ekhokelwe nguNdikhoyo, azihlasele iintshaba zakhe ade azoyise, uNdikhoyo" 
Numbers32:22 awohluthe umhlaba wazo. Emva koko ke noba nako ukubuya; kaloku noba nimanelisile uNdikhoyo ndawonye namawenu. Ke wona lo mhlaba woba sisabelo senu enisinikwe nguNdikhoyo. 
Numbers32:23 Kambe ke ukuba anisifezekisanga esi sithembiso, ze nazi ukuba nimonile uNdikhoyo, ibe ke sona isono senu siya kuba yinto kuni." 
Numbers32:24 Ngoko ke yakhelani iintsapho zenu iidolophu, nakhele nemfuyo yenu iintlanti, kambe nisifezekise isithembiso senu.”" 
Numbers32:25 Ke kaloku amaGadi namaRubhen aphendula athi: “Izicaka zakho ziya kwenza ngokwelizwi lakho, mhlekazi." 
Numbers32:26 Iintsapho zethu neenkomo neegusha zona ziya kusala apha kwezi dolophu zaseGiliyadi. 
Numbers32:27 Ke thina sonke sesilungele ukungena phantsi koNdikhoyo. Soxhoba siyiwele iJordan; siya kulwa emfazweni ngokomyalelo wakho.” 
Numbers32:28 UMosis wayalela uElazare, uYoshuwa, nezinye iinkulu zezindlu zamaSirayeli," 
Numbers32:29 wathi: “Ukuba amaGadi namaRubhen ayiwelile iJordan, aza alwa kumkhosi kaNdikhoyo, naza ke noyisa nalithimba elo lizwe, ke wona ze niwanike umhlaba waseGiliyadi, ibe sisabelo sawo." 
Numbers32:30 Kambe ke ukuba akayiwelanga iJordan aya kulwa kunye nani, isabelo sawo osifumana kwelaseKanana kunye nani.”" 
Numbers32:31 Ke wona amaGadi namaRubhen aphendula athi: “Ewe, siya kwenza njengoko athethileyo uNdikhoyo." 
Numbers32:32 Siya kuwela siye kwilizwe laseKanana, silwe siphantsi kwakhe, ukuze singaphulukani nesabelo sethu apha kwimpuma yeJordan.”" 
Numbers32:33 Ngoko ke uMosis wabela amaGadi, amaRubhen, nenxalenye yabakwaManase, wonke ummandla kakumkani uSihon wama-Amori, ndawonye nokakumkani uOgi waseBhashan, ngokunjalo needolophu namaphandle awujikelezileyo." 
Numbers32:34 AmaGadi abuya azakha iidolophu ezinqatyisiweyo zaseDibhon, iAtaroti, iArohere," 
Numbers32:35 iAteroti-shofan, iJazere, iJogebheha," 
Numbers32:36 iBhete-nimra, neBhete-haran." 
Numbers32:37 AmaRubhen ahlaziya iHeshbhon, iElale, iKiriatayim," 
Numbers32:38 iNebho, iBhali-mehon (eli ke igama latshintshwa), neSibhema. Iidolophu abazakhayo bazithiya ngokutsha." 
Numbers32:39 Ke bona abakwaMakire, unyana kaManase, bahlasela umhlaba waseGiliyadi, bawagxotha ama-Amori awayelapho, baza bema kuwo loo mhlaba." 
Numbers32:40 Ngoko ke uMosis umhlaba waseGiliyadi wawunika indlu kaMakire, yema kuwo." 
Numbers32:41 UJayire wendlu kaManase wahlasela iidolophana ezithile, waza wazithatha wazibiza ngokuba ziidolophana zikaJayire." 
Numbers32:42 NoNobha wahlasela iKenati needolophana zayo, waza wayithiya ngaye, wathi yiNobha." 
Numbers33:1 Le yimbali echaza ngeendawo awathi emisa kuzo ngokwezindlu zawo amaSirayeli ukuphuma kwawo eJiputa ekhokelwa nguMosis noAron. 
Numbers33:2 Ngokuyalelwa *nguNdikhoyo ke uMosis wawabhala amagama eendawo abathi bemisa kuzo. 
Numbers33:3 AmaSirayeli anduluka eJiputa ngomhla weshumi elinesihlanu kwinyanga yokuqala enyakeni, kusuku olulandela *iPasika, aphuma engafihlakalanga eRamesi, ekhokelwa nguNdikhoyo, ebonwa ngamaJiputa" 
Numbers33:4 awayexakeke kukungcwaba oonyana bawo abangamazibulo ababebulewe nguNdikhoyo. Ngesi senzo ke uNdikhoyo wazicacisa ukuba ungumakhonya *nakoothixo bamaJiputa. 
Numbers33:5 Ukunduluka kwawo eRamesi amaSirayeli aya kumisa eSukoti; 
Numbers33:6 aza ukuphuma kwawo apho emisa e-Etam ekungeneni kwentlango. 
Numbers33:7 Ukusuka kwawo ke apho aphindela ePi-hahiroti kwimpuma yeBhali-zefon, aza emisa ngaseMigdoli." 
Numbers33:8 Ayishiya iPi-hahiroti, awela uLwandle oluBomvu, angena kwintlango yase-Etam; aza ke athi emva kweentsuku ezintathu aya kugaleleka emisa eMora." 
Numbers33:9 Ukunduluka kwawo apho ke aya kumisa e-Elim, kuba khona kwakukho imithombo yamanzi elishumi elinambini nemithi yesundu engamashumi asixhenxe." 
Numbers33:10 Ukushiya kwawo iElim aya kumisa ngakuLwandle oluBomvu. 
Numbers33:11 Nalapho aphuma aya kungena kwintlango yeSin. 
Numbers33:12 Akuphuma apho aya kumisa eDofeka 
Numbers33:13 naseAlushe. 
Numbers33:14 Kamva ke aya kutsho eRefidim, apho afika engekho amanzi okusela." 
Numbers33:15 Ukuphuma kwawo eRefidim esiya kwintaba iHore, emisa kwezi ndawo zilandelayo: kwintlango iSinayi, iKibroti-hatava, iHazeroti, iRitema, iRimon-pereze, iLibhena, iRisa, iKehelata, intaba iShefere, iHarada, iMakeloti, iTahati, iTera, iMiteka, iHashemona, iMoseroti, iBhene-yakan, iHori-hagidegadi, iYotebhata, iAbrona, iEziyon-gebhere, eKadeshe kwintlango yeZin, nangakwintaba iHore emideni yase-Edom." 
Numbers33:16 Ke kaloku ngokuyalelwa nguNdikhoyo umbingeleli uAron waqabela kwintaba iHore. Ke yena wafela apho ngomhla wokuqala kwinyanga yesihlanu kunyaka wamashumi amane amaSirayeli andulukayo eJiputa. Wayeneminyaka elikhulu elinamashumi amabini anantathu walibonayo ilanga. 
Numbers33:17 Ke kaloku ukumkani waseAradi owayekumazantsi eKanana weva ngokuza kwamaSirayeli. 
Numbers33:18 Ukuphuma kwintaba iHore, ukuya kumathafa aseMowabhi amaSirayeli emisa kwezi ndawo zilandelayo: eZalmona, ePunon, eObhoti, eIye-abharim emdeni womhlaba waseMowabhi, eDibhon yakwaGadi, eAlmon-diblatayim, kwintaba iAbharim, ngakwintaba iNebho, nakumathafa aseMowabhi phesheya kweJordan malunga neJeriko phakathi kweBhete-yeshimoti neentili zeShitim." 
Numbers33:19 Ke kaloku kwathi xa alapho kuloo mathafa aseMowabhi phesheya kweJordan malunga neJeriko, *uNdikhoyo wanika uMosis le miyalelo," 
Numbers33:20 wathi makayigqithisele kumaSirayeli, wathi: “Nakuyiwela iJordan, ningene kwelaseKanana," 
Numbers33:21 ze nibakhuphe nibagxothe abemi bakhona. *Izithixo zabo ezenziwe ngobhedu nangamatye ze nizitshabalalise ndawonye neendawo abanqulela kuzo. 
Numbers33:22 Ze nime nizinze kuloo mhlaba wabo, kuba niwuphiwa ndim." 
Numbers33:23 Loo mhlaba wabo ze niwahlula-hlulele izindlu nemizi yenu *ngamaqashiso; imizi leyo ke ze niyabele ngokobubanzi bayo. 
Numbers33:24 Kambe ke ukuba anibagxothanga bonke abemi balo, abo baseleyo boba yinkathazo njengeliso eliphandliweyo kuni, okanye kufane nokuba nihlatywe ngameva; ewe, bojika banilwe." 
Numbers33:25 Ngaphezu koko ke ukuba anibagxothanga ndonitshabalalisa njengoko ndandizimisele ukutshabalalisa bona kakade.” 
Numbers34:1 *UNdikhoyo wanika uMosis 
Numbers34:2 le miyalelo, wathi makayigqithisele kumaSirayeli, athi: “Nantsi ke imida yelizwe laseKanana endinipha lona." 
Numbers34:3 Umda wangezantsi uya kusuka kwintlango iZin, ubhijele kumda wase-Edom. Ngasempuma uya kuthatha kumazantsi oLwandle oluFileyo," 
Numbers34:4 uhle ujonge kwinkalo yeAkrabhim, utyhutyhumeze ungene eZin, uyokuthi gaa ngeKadeshe-bhaneya. Ukuphuma apho uya kujonga emantla-ntshona, uye eHazare-adare, uphumele eAzemon," 
Numbers34:5 apho uya kujika, ujonge kwiintili zemida yeJiputa, uyokuma ngolwandle olukhulu." 
Numbers34:6 “Ngasentshona umda uya kuba lulwandle olukhulu. 
Numbers34:7 “Ngasentla umda uya kusuka kulwandle olukhulu, uye kurheca intaba iHore," 
Numbers34:8 uye kuthi xhaxhe kwinkalo yeHamati; uze ke uye kurheca iZedada 
Numbers34:9 neZifron, uye kuthi gaa ngeHazare-enan." 
Numbers34:10 “Owasempuma uya kuphuma eHazare-enan, uye kuthi xhaxhe ngeShefam." 
Numbers34:11 Uya kuhla uye eRibhela kwimpuma yeAyin, utyhutyhumeze kwiinduli ezikwimpuma yonxweme loLwandle lwaseGalili;" 
Numbers34:12 uze ke wenjenjeya ukuhla ngomlambo iJordan, uye kuthi gaa ngoLwandle oluFileyo. “Yomine ke le yimida yelizwe lenu.”" 
Numbers34:13 UMosis ke waxelela amaSirayeli, wathi: “Nâlo ke ilizwe eniza kulizuza *ngamaqashiso, ilizwe elabelwe izindlu ezilithoba ezinesiqingatha *nguNdikhoyo." 
Numbers34:14 Ke zona izindlu zikaRubhen, uGadi, kunye nesiqingatha sikaManase, zisifumene isabelo sazo ngokwemizi yazo ngaphesheya kwimpuma yeJordan malunga neJeriko.”" 
Numbers34:15  
Numbers34:16 *UNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis, wathi:" 
Numbers34:17 “Umbingeleli uElazare noYoshuwa unyana kaNune ngabo abaya kwabela amaSirayeli umhlaba. 
Numbers34:18 Ngokunjalo ke khetha inkokheli ibe nye kwindlu nganye bancedise. 
Numbers34:19 Nanga ke amagama eenkokheli ezo: Indlu Inkokheli KwaJuda uKalebhi unyana kaJefune KwaSimon uShemuweli unyana ka-Amihudi KwaBhenjamin uElidade unyana kaKiselon KwaDan uBhuki unyana kaJogeli KwaManase kaJosefu uHaniyeli unyana kaEfodi KwaEfrayim kaJosefu uKemuweli unyana kaShiftan KwaZebhulon uElizafan unyana kaParnaki KwaIsakare uPaltiyeli unyana ka-Azana Kwa-Ashere uAbhihudi unyana kaShelomi KwaNafetali uPedayeli unyana ka-Amihudi.” 
Numbers34:20 Nango ke amadoda âmiswa nguNdikhoyo ukuba abele amaSirayeli umhlaba kwelaseKanana. 
Numbers35:1 Kuloo mathafa aseMowabhi phesheya kweJordan malunga neJeriko *uNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi:" 
Numbers35:2 “Xelela amaSirayeli ukuba kuloo mihlaba ayinikiweyo makahlulele abaLevi iidolophu ezithile ndawonye namadlelo azingqongileyo. 
Numbers35:3 Zona ke zoba zezabaLevi, bahlale kuzo. Ke wona amadlelo oba ngawemfuyo yabo." 
Numbers35:4 Amadlelo makasuke kwiindonga zesixeko abhekele phaya isithuba esingamakhulu amane anamashumi amahlanu eemitha macala," 
Numbers35:5 khon' ukuze ubekho ummandla olinganayo ongamakhulu asithoba eemitha ngapha nangapha, isixeko sona siphakathi." 
Numbers35:6 AbaLevi ze nibanike iidolophu zibe ntandathu, apho umntu angabalekela khona xa abulele omnye ngengozi. Ngaphezu koko ke banikeni ezinye iidolophu zibe ngamashumi amane anambini" 
Numbers35:7 ndawonye namadlelo azo, ukuze ke zibe ngamashumi amane anesibhozo zizonke." 
Numbers35:8 Inani leedolophu ezinikwa abaLevi kwindlu nganye loxhomekeka kubungakanani bomhlaba waloo ndlu. Kweneedolophu ezininzi phungula kakhulu; kweneedolophu ezimbalwa phungula kancinci.” 
Numbers35:9 *UNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis," 
Numbers35:10 wathi makathethe namaSirayeli, athi: “Nakuba niyiwelile iJordan nangena kwelaseKanana," 
Numbers35:11 ze nimise iidolophu apho umntu angabalekela khona xa ebulele omnye ngengozi. 
Numbers35:12 Xa elapho ke woba usindile kwimpindezelo yesizalwana sikamfi. Umntu otyholwa ngokubulala omnye akufuneki abulawe lingakhange lithethwe enkundleni ityala lakhe. 
Numbers35:13 Khethani iidolophu zokuphephela zibe ntandathu," 
Numbers35:14 zibe ntathu ngaphesheya empuma yomlambo iJordan, zibe kwantathu nganeno kwelaseKanana." 
Numbers35:15 Ezi dolophu zoba yindawo yokubalekela kumaSirayeli, kanti nakwiintlanga ezingabangeneleli okanye abemi. Nabani na ke obulele umntu ngengozi woba nokubalekela kwenye yazo." 
Numbers35:16 “Kambe ke yena umntu obulele omnye esebenzisa isixhobo esiyintsimbi, ilitye, okanye umthi, woba netyala lokubulala, isigwebo sakhe ibe kukubulawa." 
Numbers35:17  
Numbers35:18  
Numbers35:19 Uxanduva lokubulala isigwinta eso loba phezu kwesizalwana esingumphindezeli. Apho sisifumene khona masisibulale eso sigwinta. 
Numbers35:20 “Ukuba umntu unomntu amzondayo waza wambulala ngokumeyelisela, ukumgibisela ngento, okanye ukumlalela," 
Numbers35:21 noba kukumbetha ngamanqindi, loo mntu unetyala lokubulala, makabulawe. Uxaduva lokubulala eso sigwinta loba kwisizalwana esingumphindezeli womfi lowo; ngoko ke masisibulale apho sisifumene khona." 
Numbers35:22 “Kambe ke ukuba umntu ubulele omnye ngengozi, kungengakuba ebemzonda, noba umbulele ngokumeyelisela okanye ukumgibisela ngento," 
Numbers35:23 okanye mhlawumbi umntu ubethe omnye ngelitye engamboni, engenazinjongo, engelulo natshaba lwakhe," 
Numbers35:24 kwimeko enjalo ityala maligwetywe yinkundla, nayo ke igwebele lo ubuleleyo, ingesiso isizalwana sikamfi esifuna impindezelo." 
Numbers35:25 Inkundla mayimhlangule umbulali lowo kwisizalwana sikamfi; makabuyiselwe kwakuloo dolophu ebephephele kuyo. Umbulali lo ke makahlale apho kude kufe loo mntu ungumbingeleli omkhulu kwelo thuba, lowo uthanjiswe ngamafutha angcwele." 
Numbers35:26 Kambe ke ukuba umbulali lowo umkile apho kuloo dolophu ebephephele kuyo," 
Numbers35:27 waza ke wabhaqwa, wabulawa sisizalwana sikamfi, eso senzo sempindezelo asilotyala lakubulala." 
Numbers35:28 Loo mntu ubuleleyo makahlale apho kuloo dolophu yokuphephela kude kufe umbingeleli omkhulu; emva koko ke angagoduka. 
Numbers35:29 Le mimiselo ke iya kubopha nina nezizukulwana zenu noba seniphi na. 
Numbers35:30 “Umntu otyholwa ngokubulala angáfunyanwa enetyala aze abulawe kuphela xa kukho amangqina; ke lona ingqina elinye alanele ukuxhasa isityholo sombulali. 
Numbers35:31 Isigwinta masibulawe. Mayingamkelwa intlawulo yokusindisa ubomi baso. 
Numbers35:32 Ukuba umntu ubalekele kwidolophu yokuphephela makangavunyelwa akhuphe intlawulo khon' ukuze abe nokugoduka engekafi umbingeleli omkhulu. 
Numbers35:33 Ze ningalifaki *umlaza ilizwe lakowenu. Kaloku ubugwinta buyalingcolisa ilizwe. Ibe ke ucamagushelo alunakwenzelwa ilizwe ekuphalazwe igazi kulo, ngaphandle kokuba kuphalazwe igazi lesigwinta eso." 
Numbers35:34 Ningaze nilifake umlaza ilizwe enihlala kulo; kaloku mna ndinguNdikhoyo, ndihlala phakathi kwabantu bam amaSirayeli.”" 
Numbers36:1 Iinkulu zendlu yakwaGiliyadi unyana kaMakire umzukulwana kaManase unyana kaJosefu, zaya kuMosis enezinye iinkokheli." 
Numbers36:2 Zafika zathi: “*UNdikhoyo wakuyalela ukuba amaSirayeli uwabele umhlaba *ngamaqashiso. Ngokunjalo wathi umhlaba womntakwethu uZelofehadi uze uwunike iintombi zakhe. 
Numbers36:3 Kambe ke xa zithe zendela ndlwini yimbi, loo mhlaba wazo uwela kuloo ndlu; ngaloo ndlela ke umhlaba olilifa lethu utsho unciphe." 
Numbers36:4 Ngonyaka wobuyiselo xa yonke imihlaba ebithengiwe ibuyiselwa kubanini bayo bamandulo, imihlaba yeentombi zikaZelofehadi ibuyela kwezo zindlu zendele kuzo; ngaloo ndlela ke uyancipha umhlaba olilifa lakowethu.”" 
Numbers36:5 Ngoko ke uMosis wathetha namaSirayeli, wawanika lo myalelo kaNdikhoyo uthi: “Le nto ithethwa ngamaManase yinyani." 
Numbers36:6 Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo uthi: ‘Iintombi zikaZelofehadi zikhululekile ukuba zendele nakubani na, kodwa ke kube kwakule ndlu yakowazo." 
Numbers36:7 Umhlaba olilifa lendlu yakwaSirayeli mawungadluleli kwizindlu ngezindlu. Umhlaba womSirayeli ngamnye kufuneka uhlale ungowaloo ndlu azalwa kuyo nanini na. 
Numbers36:8 Intombi yomSirayeli efumene ilifa lomhlaba kufuneka yendele kwakuloo ndlu yakowayo. Ngale ndlela ke umhlaba wookhokho bendlu ethile uya kujikeleza kwakuloo ndlu," 
Numbers36:9 ungaze uphuncuke uye ndlwini yimbi. Umhlaba wendlu nganye uya kuhlala ungowaloo ndlu nanini na.’ ” 
Numbers36:10 Ke kaloku uMala, uTiza, uHogela, uMilika, noNoha, iintombi zikaZelofehadi, zenza ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis, zendela kwimizi yendlu yakowazo." 
Numbers36:11  
Numbers36:12 Ewe, zendela kwakwimizi yendlu kaManase unyana kaJosefu, yaza ke ngolo hlobo imihlaba kayise ayaphuma kule ndlu yakowazo." 
Numbers36:13 Nantso ke imiyalelo nemimiselo eyanikwa amaSirayeli nguNdikhoyo ngoMosis, kuloo mathafa aseMowabhi phesheya kweJordan malunga neJeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Le yintetho uMosis awayibhekisayo kumaSirayeli xa ayesentlango phesheya kweJordan kwicala lasempumalanga. Babekwintili yeJordan ngaseSufi, phakathi kweParan nezi dolophu: iTofele, iLabhan, iHazeroti, neDizahabhi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Luhambo lweshumi elinanye lweentsuku ukusuka kwintaba iHorebhe ukuya eKadeshe-bhaneya xa udlula kweleentaba lase-Edom. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Ngomhla wokuqala kwinyanga yeshumi elinanye yonyaka wamashumi amane amaSirayeli aphumayo eJiputa, uMosis wawaxelela zonke izinto awayeziyalelwe *nguNdikhoyo malunga nawo." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Ngeli xesha ke kwakusemveni kokoyiswa kokumkani uSihon wama-Amori owayehlala eHeshbhon; ngokunjalo nokumkani uOgi waseBhashan owayekwiidolophu iAshtaroti ne-Edreyi. 
Deuteronomy1:5 Apho phesheya kweJordan kumhlaba waseMowabhi uMosis wasuka wayichaza imithetho kaThixo, wenjenje:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Xa sasikwintaba iHorebhe uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu wathetha nathi, wathi: ‘Seninethuba elide nikule ntaba." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Ngoko ke ndulukani, nisinge ngakumhlaba weentaba wama-Amori, niye kwizizwe eziwungqongileyo kwintili yeJordan, nommandla weentaba ngokunjalo, namathafa kumazantsi aloo ngingqi, ukuya kuthi xhaxhe kunxweme lolwandle. Ewe, jongani kwelaseKanana, niphumele kwiintaba zeLebhanon, niyokuthi gaa ngomlambo omkhulu iEfrati." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Niyabona, lo mhlaba ndiwunika nina. Ngoko ke hambani niwuthathe, nime kuwo. Kaloku ndênza isibhambathiso sokuwunika ookhokho benu, uAbraham, uIsake, noYakobi, ngokunjalo nezizukulwana zabo.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “Kaloku ngelo thuba sasikwintaba iHorebhe ndathetha nani, ndathi: ‘Mna andinakunithwala ndindodwa." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Kaloku *uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu unandise nayinyambalala enjengeenkwenkwezi ezisesibhaka-bhakeni. 
Deuteronomy1:11 Kambe ke uNdikhoyo uThixo wookhokho benu wanga anganandisa kaliwaka, anithamsanqelise ngokwesithembiso sakhe!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Kodwa ke, uxanduva olungaka lokusombulula amaqhina anixakayo ndingaluthwala njani ndedwa? Nditsho imithwalo yenu neembambano zenu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Kungoko ke ndathi: ‘Kwindlu nganye khethani amadoda azizilumko ezaziwayo, amadoda anamava, ukuze ndiwamisele ajongane nezidla umzi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Ke nina naphendula nathi: ‘Kuhle oku uceba ukukwenza.’ 
Deuteronomy1:15 Ngoko ke ndawathatha loo madoda azizilumko anamava naniwakhethe ngokwezindlu zenu, ndawamisela ukuba ajongane neengxaki zenu. Ndawamisa ke ajongana namaqela angabantu abangamawaka, amakhulu, namashumi ngamahlanu, namashumi ngamanye. Ngokwenjenjalo ndaba ndinimisela amagosa ngokwezindlu zenu zonke." 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Ngelo xesha ke ndabayalela abaphicotha iimbambano ezivelayo phakathi kwenu, ndathi: ‘Umcimbi ngamnye ze niwuphicothe ningenaxanasi, noba ngowamaSirayeli odwa okanye ngowomSirayeli nomngeneleli." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Ze ningakhethi buso xa nigwebayo, koko ze nigwebe ulowo nalowo, noba ungubani na, ngokufanayo. Ze ningabi nadyudyu, ningoyiki mntu, kuba nigweba ngegunya likaThixo. Ke yona imicimbi enoyisayo ze niyizise kum, ndiyigwebe ngokwam.’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Kwangelo thuba ke ndaniyalela yonke into enimelwe kukuyenza.” 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Ke kaloku senza ngokomlomo *kaNdikhoyo, sanduluka entabeni iHorebhe, sacanda kweso sidikidiki sentlango eyoyikekayo, sajonga kweleentaba kuma-Amori. Sathi ke sakufika eKadeshe-bhaneya" 
Deuteronomy1:20 ndathi ke mna: ‘Ngoku nifikile kumhlaba weentaba kwelama-Amori, mhlaba lowo asinika wona uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Niyabona, uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, uninike lo mhlaba. Ngoko ke hambani niwuthathe, nime kuwo, njengoko uNdikhoyo uThixo wookhokho aniyalelayo. Sanukuba nexhala okanye noyike.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Kambe ke nina nonke neza kum, nathi: ‘Masithumele iintlola, ziye kuwujonga umhlaba, zisicebise ngeyona ndlela singayithathayo, futhi zisicebise nangokuma kweedolophu zakhona.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Ke kaloku sevana ngaloo ndawo, ndaza ke mna ndanyula ishumi elinambini lamadoda, yanye kwindlu nganye." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Wona ke ahamba aya kutsho kweleentaba, aya kuma kwintili ye-Eshkoli, aza ke ayihlola." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ekubuyeni kwawo asiphathela iziqhamo zakhona, enza nengxelo ethi elo lizwe asinika lona uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu lihle liyintombazana." 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Kambe ke nina navukelana nawo umyalelo kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, anavuma ukungena kulo elo lizwe." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Nahlala phantsi nakhalaza, nisithi: ‘UNdikhoyo usithiyile; ebengekhe asikhuphe kwelaseJiputa, aze azokusibeka esichengeni sokubulawa ngala ma-Amori!" 
Deuteronomy1:28 Siya kuya phi na ke ngoku? Andithi kaloku nala madoda besiwathumile asityhafisile esithi abantu belo lizwe bomelele, futhi bade kunathi, ngokunjalo bahlala kwiidolophu ezinkulu ezibiyelwe ngeendonga ezirhec' izulu; kananjalo babone neengxilimbela ezingoonyana baka-Anaki!’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Ke mna ndaniyala ndisithi: ‘Musani ukuba nedyudyu nixhalabe ngenxa yabo! 
Deuteronomy1:30 UNdikhoyo uThixo wenu nguye onikhokelayo. Yena wonilwela njengoko nambonayo esenjenjalo eJiputa 
Deuteronomy1:31 nasentlango. Andithi kaloku yena wanibeleka njengoko uyise enjenjalo kunyana wakhe, yonke loo ndlela kude kube ngoku?’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Kodwa ke, nakuba kunjalo, animthembanga uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 kanti nguye owayesoloko enikhokela ade anifunele nendawo eningamisa kuyo. Ewe, kaloku wayenikhokela ngelangatye lomlilo ebusuku, ukuze niyibone indlela emanihambe ngayo, aze anikhokele ngomqulu welifu emini.”" 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Ke kaloku *uNdikhoyo akuziva izikrokro zenu wakhathazeka, wada wafunga wathi:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Inene, akukho namnye kuni, sizukulwanandini esigwenxa, uya kungena kwelo lizwe lihle kunene ndabathembisa ngalo ngesifungo ooyihlo-mkhulu." 
Deuteronomy1:36 Kuphela longenwa nguKalebhi unyana kaJefune. Kaloku yena wahlala enyanisekile kum, ndaye ke elo lizwe walihlolayo ndiza kulinikela kuye nesizukulwana sakhe.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 “Kwakukwangenxa yenu ukuze uNdikhoyo akhathazeke, athi kum: ‘Nawe ngokwakho soze uthi cakatha kwelo lizwe." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Kambe ke ihlakani lakho, uYoshuwa unyana kaNune, nguye oya kulingena elo lizwe; mkhuthaze, kuba nguye oya kungenisa uSirayeli kwelo lizwe elililifa lakhe.’" 
Deuteronomy1:39 “Ngaphezu koko ke uNdikhoyo wathi: ‘Ngabantwana benu kuphela abaya kungena kwelo lizwe; nditsho abo bangekakwazi ukwahlula okubi kokuhle, abo kanye nanisithi nina boba ngamaxhoba otshaba. Elo lizwe ndiya kulinikela kubo, limiwe ngabo." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Ke nina jikani, nisinge entlango ngendlela eya kuLwandle oluBomvu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Ke nina naphendula nathi kum: ‘Simonile uNdikhoyo. Ngoko ke siza kujika silihlasele elo lizwe ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo uThixo wethu.’ Ngenene ke nonke naqulela imfazwe, nicinga ukuba yoba yindlwana iyanetha ukuhlasela eleentaba." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Ke yena uNdikhoyo wathi kum: ‘Balumkise uthi: “Ningayi kulwa; andiyi kuhamba nani ndinilwele; niya koyiswa ziintshaba zenu.” ’ 
Deuteronomy1:43 Ndanixelela ke loo mazwi kaNdikhoyo, kodwa zange niwakhathalele. Ewe, nasuka namgwilikela, naza nathi ngelo kratshi lenu nalihlasela eleentaba." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Asuka ke wona ama-Amori awayehlala kwezo ntaba, athi quba phezu kwenu oku kwebubu leenyosi. Aningena ke, aniswantsulisa, nada naya kufika eHoma, anoyisela kwezo ntaba zaseSeyire." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Kweso sithuba ke naba ngazibika kuNdikhoyo nilila, suka wavingc' iindlebe, akaniphulaphula." 
Deuteronomy1:46 “Ke kaloku nahlala eKadeshe ixesha elide.” 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Emva koko sanduluka sangena entlango ngendlela eya kuLwandle oluBomvu, ngokwelizwi *likaNdikhoyo. Apho ke sathatha ithuba elide ukujikeleza ezo ntaba zaseSeyire." 
Deuteronomy2:2 “UNdikhoyo ke wathetha nam, wathi:" 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Selilide ithuba nizama ukujikela le ntaba, ngoko ke jikani niye kwelasentla." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Ke ngoko uzubayale abantu, uthi: “Ngoku seniza kungena kweleentaba laseSeyire, umhlaba wamawenu inzala kaEsawu. Ke wona aza kunoyika," 
Deuteronomy2:5 kambe ke ze nizilumkele ningawaqali, kuba kaloku andiyi kuninika nomhlathana lo kumhlaba wawo. Intaba yeSeyire ndayinika uEsawu nenzala yakhe." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Ukutya namanzi wathengeni kubo xa nidlulayo.” ’ 
Deuteronomy2:7 “Khumbulani kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu unithamsanqele kuko konke enikwenzileyo. Unilondolozile ngalo lonke uhambo lwenu kwesi sithabazi sentlango. Kula mashumi mane eminyaka uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ebenani, anaswela nto." 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Ngoko ke sanduluka, sagqitha eSeyire, nditsho kumhlaba wamawethu inzala kaEsawu, sayishiya indlela yasentlango ephuma e-Elati nase-Eziyon-gebhere eya kuLwandle oluFileyo, sajika sasinga kwintlango yaseMowabhi." 
Deuteronomy2:9 UNdikhoyo wandiyala wathi: ‘Uze ungawabandezeli uwaqale amaMowabhi, inzala kaLothe, kuba ndiwaphe idolophu yaseAra. Ke andiyi kukunika nendawana le kumhlaba wawo.’" 
Deuteronomy2:10 “Apho ke eAra kwakumi uhlanga olomeleleyo, kusithiwa ngamaEma. Nawo ayeziingxilimbela njengama-Anaki." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Kwanjengama-Anaki nawo kwakusithiwa ngamaRafa, kambe ke wona amaMowabhi ayesithi ngamaEma." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Wona amaHori ayekade emi eSeyire, aza agxothwa yinzala kaEsawu, yawaphanzisa kwema yona kuloo mhlaba wawo, kwanjengokuba noSirayeli ezigxothile iintshaba zakhe kumhlaba awuphiwe nguNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy2:13 “UNdikhoyo wathi: ‘Sukani niwele umfula iZeredi.’ Senjenjalo ke. 
Deuteronomy2:14 “Ngoku ke kwakusekuyiminyaka emashumi mathathu anesibhozo saphumayo eKadeshe-bhaneya. Onke amajoni eso sizukulwana ayeselafa ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo. 
Deuteronomy2:15 UNdikhoyo wachasana nawo wada wawatshabalalisa kwathi nya. 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Akuba loo majoni efe onke ke," 
Deuteronomy2:17 uNdikhoyo wathi kum: 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Namhlanje ke niza kucanda kumhlaba waseMowabhi ngaseAra. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Xa nilapho ke noba kufuphi kumhlaba wama-Amon, inzala kaLothe. Ze ningawabandezi okanye niwaqale; kaloku andiyi kuninika nento le kumhlaba endawunika wona.’" 
Deuteronomy2:20 “Lo mmandla ke ukwaziwa ngokuba ngumhlaba wamaRafa, gama elo lilelabantu ababemi khona ngaphambili, ke wona ama-Amon ayesithi ngamaZamzum." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Nabo babeziingxilimbela njengama-Anaki. Babeluhlanga olomeleleyo, bebaninzi ngamanani. Phofu ke uNdikhoyo wabatshabalalisa, khon' ukuze umhlaba wabo umiwe ngama-Amon." 
Deuteronomy2:22 UNdikhoyo wenza kwaloo nto kumaEdom, inzala kaEsawu leyo imi kweleentaba eSeyire. Wawatshabalalisa amaHori, khon' ukuze amaEdom eme kuloo mhlaba wawo. Asekuwo ke unanamhla." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Ke amaKrete, awayevela kwisiqithi saseKrete, awatshabalalisa ama-Avi, awayemi ntlandlolo kwiidolophu zonke ukuya kuthi xhaxhe eGaza, aza ema khona."
