Deuteronomy2:24 “Sakuba ke sigqithile eMowabhi, uNdikhoyo wathi: ‘Ke ngoku sukani niwele umlambo iAnoni. USihon ukumkani wama-Amori oseHeshbhon sendimnikele esandleni senu, ngokunjalo nomhlaba wakhe. Mhlaseleni, niye niwuhluthe umhlaba wakhe." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Ukusukela namhlanje bonke abantu belimiweyo ndiza kubenza banoyike, barhwaqeliswe yingxelo yoko nikwenzileyo.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Ngoko ke ndathumela kukumkani uSihon waseHeshbhon xa thina sasikwintlango yeKedemoti, ndizama uxolo, ndisithi:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Siyakubongoza, sivumele sinqumle emhlabeni wakho. Siya kuhamba ngqo, singaphumi endleleni." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Ukutya namanzi esiwasebenzisileyo siya kuwahlawula. Kuphela into esiyifunayo kukugqitha nje emhlabeni wakho," 
Deuteronomy2:29 side siye kuwela umlambo iJordan, singene kwilizwe esiliphiwe *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wethu. Ke yona inzala kaEsawu eseSeyire ndawonye namaMowabhi aseAra asivumele ukuba sicande emhlabeni wawo.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Kambe ke ukumkani uSihon wala ukuba sicande emhlabeni wakhe. Kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu wayemenze wanenkani waqaqadeka, khon' ukuze simoyise siwuthathe lo mhlaba wakhe simi kuwo unangoku." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “UNdikhoyo ke wathetha nam, wathi: ‘Uyabona ke, ukumkani uSihon sendimgqibile; akusekho yakhe. Ngoko ke ngenani niwuthathe umhlaba wakhe, nime kuwo.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Ke kaloku ukumkani uSihon waphuma nawo wonke umkhosi wakhe, weza kulwa nathi ngaseJaza." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Kambe ke yena uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu wamnikela kuthi, samoyisa noonyana bakhe nawo wonke umkhosi wakhe." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Ngokunjalo ke sahlasela satshabalalisa kuzo zonke iidolophu, amadoda, abafazi, ndawonye nabantwana, asashiya nempunde le. Iidolophu sazitshabalalisa; ke sathimba kuphela iinkomo namanye amaxhoba." 
Deuteronomy2:35  
Deuteronomy2:36 Sazitshabalalisa zonke iidolophu ukusukela eArure ekungeneni kwintili yeAnoni, nesixeko esisembindini waloo ntili, ukuya kuthi gaa ngeGiliyadi. Ukomelela kweendonga zezo dolophu kwaba yintwan' encinci kuthi. NguNdikhoyo uThixo wethu owakunikela kuthi konke oku." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Kambe ke asisondelanga kummandla wama-Amon, okanye kunxweme lomlambo iJabhoko, nakwiidolophu zomhlaba weentaba, nakuyo nayiphi na indawo esasingayalelwanga ngayo nguNdikhoyo uThixo wethu.”" 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Ke kaloku senyuka saya eBhashan. Ke yena ukumkani uOgi waphuma nawo wonke umkhosi wakhe, wasihlasela ngase-Edreyi." 
Deuteronomy3:2 *UNdikhoyo ke wathi kum: ‘Musani ukumoyika; ndimnikele ezandleni zenu, ndawonye nomkhosi wakhe, nawo wonke umhlaba wakhe. Nakuye yenzani kwangaloo ndlela nenza ngayo kuSihon ukumkani wama-Amori eHeshbhon.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo wamnikezela kuthi nokumkani uOgi waseBhashan, saza samxabela ndawonye nabantu bakhe, akwasala namnye." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Ngokunjalo ke sazihlasela sazithatha zonke iidolophu zakhe, asashiya noba ibe nye. Xa zizonke yaba ziidolophu ezimashumi mathandathu yonke loo ngingqi yaseAgobhi, eyayiphantsi ko-Ogi ukumkani waseBhashan." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Zonke ke ezo dolophu zazinqatyisiwe zibiyelwe ngeendonga, zinamasango omelezwe ngemivalo yentsimbi; phofu zazikho needolophu ezazingabiyelwanga." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Zonke ke sazitshabalalisa, sabulala ndoda, mfazi, namntwana wembala, kanye kwangalaa ndlela senza ngayo kwiidolophu zikakumkani uSihon waseHeshbhon." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Sazithimbela iinkomo namanye amaxhoba apho ezidolophini. 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Ngelo thuba ke sawuthatha wonke umhlaba wezo kumkani zimbini zama-Amori, ngasempuma yomlambo iJordan, ukusuka kumlambo iAnoni ukuya kwintaba iHermon." 
Deuteronomy3:9 Ke intaba iHermon yayibizwa ngokuba yiSiriyon ngamaSidon, ama-Amori wona esithi yiSenire." 
Deuteronomy3:10 Sawuthatha wonke ummandla kakumkani uOgi waseBhashan: ezo dolophu zikuloo mathafa, ummandla waseGiliyadi naseBhashan, sada saya kutsho empuma kwiidolophu zaseSaleka nase-Edreyi." 
Deuteronomy3:11 “Ukumkani uOgi waba ngowokugqibela kumaRafa. Wayelala ebhedini yentsimbi. Yayiziimitha ezine ubude, zikwisithuba sesibini ububanzi. Nangoku ke isekhona kwidolophu yama-Amon iRabha.”" 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Ukuwuthatha kwethu umhlaba osempumalanga yeJordan, amaRubhen namaGadi ndawanika ummandla ongasentla kweArure ngakumlambo iAnoni, nenxalenye yeleentaba zaseGiliyadi, ngokunjalo needolophu zakhona." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Ke sona isiqingatha samaManase ndasinika loo mhlaba useleyo waseGiliyadi, ngokunjalo neBhashan iphela apho kwakulawula uOgi. Yonke loo ngingqi yaseAgobhi kwelaseBhashan yayisaziwa ngokuba ngumhlaba wamaRafa." 
Deuteronomy3:14 UJayire wendlu kaManase wawuthatha wonke loo mmandla waseAgobhi, iBhashan, ukuya kutsho kwimimandla yaseGeshuri naseMahaka. Ezo dolophu ke wazithiya ngaye; nangoku ke kusathiwa zezikaJayire." 
Deuteronomy3:15 Ke yona iGiliyadi ndayinika imizi kaMakire wendlu kaManase. 
Deuteronomy3:16 AmaRubhen namaGadi ndawabela ummandla waseGiliyadi ukuya kumlambo iAnoni. Umbindi waloo ntili yangumda ongezantsi; umda ongasentla wona yangumlambo iJabhoko onxalenye yawo yayingumda wama-Amon. 
Deuteronomy3:17 Ngasentshonalanga umda wabo wawuye kuthi xhaxhe ngomlambo iJordan; ngasentla usuka kuLwandle lwaseGalili uye kuthi gaa ngoLwandle oluFileyo ngezantsi, uze uye kuthi rhece kumalengalenga entaba iPisga empumalanga." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Kananjalo ngelo thuba ndaniyalela, ndathi: ‘UNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uninikile loo mhlaba usempumalanga yomlambo iJordan ukuba nime kuwo. Ke wona umkhosi wenu wuxhobiseni, niwuthumele uwele iJordan, wandulele amawawo." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Abafazi nabantwana, ngokunjalo nomhlambikazi weenkomo zenu, mabasale apha kwezi dolophu ndinabele zona." 
Deuteronomy3:20 Wancedeni amawenu nawo ade azinze kuloo mhlaba awuphiwe nguNdikhoyo kwintshonalanga yomlambo iJordan, njengoko selenzile nakuni. Emva koko ke noba nako ukubuyela apha kulo mhlaba usisabelo senu.’" 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Ndaza ke ndathetha noYoshuwa, ndathi: ‘Sowuyibonile ke into eyênziwa nguNdikhoyo uThixo wethu kookumkani ababini, uSihon no-Ogi. Úsaza kwenza kwaloo nto ke nakubo bonke ookumkani obahlaselayo kwelo lizwe ùya kulo." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Ningaboyiki, kuba uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu nguye oza kunilwela.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Kwangelo thuba ndambongoza *uNdikhoyo, ndathi:" 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Mhlekazi Ndikhoyo, nakalokunje wena sowundikrobisile kumsebenzi wakho omkhulu omangalisayo oseluwuqalile. Akukho *thixo wumbi ezulwini nasemhlabeni onako ukwenza imisebenzi enjengale uyenzileyo ukuba mikhulu!" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Ndiyakubongoza kaloku, Ndikhoyo, ndivumele ndiyiwele iJordan, ndiwubone loo mhlaba mhle kunene, ngaphesheya phaya, ezaa nduli zibukekayo ngokunjalo naloo ntaba yeLebhanon.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Kambe ke ngenxa yenu, bantundini, uNdikhoyo wacaphuka, akandiphulaphula, suka wathi: ‘Kwanele; sukuba sathetha nokuthetha! Andisafuni kuva nto ngalo mcimbi." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Nto nje hamba uqabele kwincochoyi yentaba iPisga, ulibuke ujonge ngasentla, ezantsi, empuma, nasentshonalanga. Uya kulibona kuphela ngamehlo, kuba awusoze uwuwele umlambo iJordan." 
Deuteronomy3:28 UYoshuwa myale, umkhuthaze, umomeleze, kuba nguye oza kukhokela amaSirayeli awele aye kuma kwelo lizwe ulibonayo.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Ngoko ke sahlala apho kuloo ntili ijongene neBhete-pehore.” 
Deuteronomy4:1 UMosis wawayala amaSirayeli, wathi: “Le mimiselo ndinifundisa yona yithobeleni, khon' ukuze niphile, nibe nako ukungena kwelo lizwe niliphiwa *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wookhokho benu." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Le miyalelo kaNdikhoyo ndininika yona ze niyigcine, ningaze niyandise okanye niyinciphise." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Nazibonela ngokwenu into awayenzayo uNdikhoyo eBhali-pehore. Wabatshabalalisa bonke ababenqula uBhali wasePehore," 
Deuteronomy4:4 kambe ke nina enanibambelele kuNdikhoyo uThixo wenu nisekho unanamhla. 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Niyabona ke, ndinifundise yonke imimiselo nemigaqo ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo uThixo wam, khon' ukuze niyithobele nakulizuza elo lizwe niza kungena kulo." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Yithobeleni niyigcine, zize ezinye izizwe ziniqonde ukuba ninobulumko nengqiqo. Zakuva ngale mimiselo ziya kutsho ukuthi: ‘Hayi, ukulumka nokuba nengqiqo kolu hlanga olukhulu!’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Sisiphi na esinye isizwe esikhulu kangangokuba *uthixo waso abe kufutshane kuso njengoko uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu esondele kuthi xa simthandaza? 
Deuteronomy4:8 Sisiphi na esinye isizwe esikhulu kangangokuba sibe nemimiselo nemigaqo enjengalo mthetho endiwaneka phambi kwenu namhlanje? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Lumkani ke, nizigcine ubomi benu bonke, hleze nikulibale konke enakubonayo ngamehlo enu, kulibaleke nakwiinkumbulo zenu. Ze nibalisele abantwana benu, ngokunjalo nabazukulwana" 
Deuteronomy4:10 ngalaa mini nanimi phambi koNdikhoyo uThixo wenu kwintaba iHorebhe, apho wathetha nam wathi: ‘Bahlanganise ndawonye aba bantu, ukuze baweve amazwi am, bafunde ukundihlonela nanini na besadla amazimba kweli gada lomhlaba, nokuze bafundise nabantwana babo.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 “Kaloku nakha nasondela nafika nema emazantsi entaba eyayigqunywe yintshinyela yomsi, inamalangatye omlilo awayedangazela esibhakabhakeni." 
Deuteronomy4:12 UNdikhoyo wathetha nani ekuloo mlilo, naza nakuva ukuthetha kwakhe, kodwa anabi nako mpela ukubona ubuqu bakhe – ibililizwi kuphela." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Wawubhengeza kuni umnqophiso wakhe emaniwuthobele, nditsho imithetho elishumi ayibhale kumacwecwe amabini amatye." 
Deuteronomy4:14 UNdikhoyo wandiyala ukuba ze ndinifundise imimiselo nemigaqo eniya kuyithobela kwelo niwelela kulo ukuba nilimé.” 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Xa *uNdikhoyo wayethetha nani eselangatyeni lomlilo kwintaba iHorebhe, zange nisibone isiqu sakhe. Ncedani ke nizigcine," 
Deuteronomy4:16 ningaze none ngokuziqingqela umfanekiso, noba uluhlobo luni na, noba yindoda okanye umfazi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 isilwanyana okanye intaka," 
Deuteronomy4:18 into erhubuluzayo noba yintlanzi. 
Deuteronomy4:19 Ningaze nilingeke nizinqule nizibuse izinto enizibona esibhakabhakeni: ilanga, inyanga, neenkwenkwezi. UNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ezi zinto uziyekele ezinye izizwe ukuba zizinqule." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Ke nina ningabantu uNdikhoyo abahlangule eJiputa kwiziko lomlilo. Wanikhupha apho, khon' ukuze anenze abantu bakhe ncakasana njengokuba kunjalo namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy4:21 “Ngenxa yenu uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu waxabana nam, wafunga ukuba andiyi kuwuwela umlambo iJordan ndilibone ilizwe lendyebo aninika lona." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ngoko ke mna andizukuwuwela umlambo, koko ndiza kufela apha, kodwa ke nina seniza kuwela niye kuma kwelo lizwe lendyebo." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Zigcineni kunene, ningaze niwulibale umnqophiso ophakathi kwenu noNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nisuke niwugqithe umyalelo wakhe, niziqingqele umfanekiso noba ngowantoni na." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ngumlilo olenyayo; unguThixo onekhwele. 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Naxa senaluphele kwelo lizwe, senide nanabantwana nabazukulwana, ukuba nithe nona ngokuziqingqela umfanekiso, noba ngoluhlobo luni na, nenza okubi phambi koNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, niyamcaphukisa." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Ke ngoko namhlanje izulu nomhlaba ngamangqina am: ukuba nithe nenjenjalo niya kukhawuleza ningabikho kwelo lizwe. Aniyi kuhlala thuba lide phaya phesheya kweJordan, kweli lizwe niya kulo ngoku. Niya kutshatyalaliswa niphele tu." 
Deuteronomy4:27 UNdikhoyo uya kunisarhaza phakathi kwezizwe apho kuya kusinda iqaqobana nje kuni. 
Deuteronomy4:28 Apho ke niya kunqula *oothixo abenziwe ngabantu, abenziwe ngomthi, nangamatye: oothixo abangaboniyo, abangevayo, abangatyiyo, bengajoji nokujoja." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Niya kuthi ke nakumfuna uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu nikuloo meko nimfumane; ewe, ukuba nimfuna nimlangazelela ngomxhelo wenu wonke niya kumfumana." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Niya kuthi kamva nakuba sengxakini zibe zinihlele zonke ezi zinto, nitsho nibuyele kuNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nimthobele." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Yena unguThixo onemfesane. Akayi kunilahla kuphele, okanye anitshabalalise; ewe, akayi kuwulibala umnqophiso awawenza ngokwakhe nookhokho benu.”" 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Ze nifunisise nibuzise ngamaxesha amandulo ningekazalwa, de kuye kwixesha apho uThixo wadala umntu emhlabeni. Ze nibuzise ehlabathini liphela. Ngaba into enjengale yakha yehla na ngaphambili? Ngaba ukhona na umntu owakha weva ngento enjengale?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Ngaba sikho na isizwe esakha seva uThixo ethetha naso eselangatyeni lomlilo, saza saphila, njengani?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Ukhona na omnye *uthixo owakha waphuthuma abantu kwesinye isizwe, waza wabenza abakhe ncakasana? Kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu amandla obungangamsha bakhe wawabonakalisa phambi kwenu; wezisa izibetho neemfazwe, wenza imiqondiso nemimangaliso, watsho kwehla izinto ezirhwaqelisayo, nto leyo wayenzayo ngenxa yenu eJiputa." 
Deuteronomy4:35 “UNdikhoyo unibonisile zonke ezi zinto, khon' ukuze niqonde ukuba akukho wumbi, nguye yedwa uThixo." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Wahlokomisa ilizwi lakhe emazulwini kuba eniqeqesha. Nathi nilapha emhlabeni wanibonisa umlilokazi wakhe, waza wathetha nani elapho kuwo." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Wathi ngenxa yokubathanda ookhokho benu waninyula wanikhupha kwelaseJiputa ngamandla akhe angummangaliso nangobukho bakhe," 
Deuteronomy4:38 waza wagxotha izizwe ezikhulu nezinamandla kunani, khon' ukuze aningenise kwimihlaba yazo, mihlaba leyo iseyeyenu unanamhla." 
Deuteronomy4:39 “Kuvumeni nikwamkele ukuba uNdikhoyo unguThixo wamazulu nehlabathi. Akukho Thixo wumbi ngaphandle kwakhe. 
Deuteronomy4:40 Yonke imimiselo nemiyalelo yakhe endininike yona namhlanje yithobeleni, khon' ukuze liqaqambe ikamva lenu nezizukulwana zenu. Ngaloo ndlela ke niya kuma ngonaphakade kweli lizwe aniphe lona uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 UMosis ke wakhetha iidolophu zantathu ngaphesheya empuma yeJordan," 
Deuteronomy4:42 apho umntu wayengaphephela khona, ukuze asinde xa ebulele umntu ongelotshaba lwakhe ngengozi. Xa ebalekele kwezi dolophu wayengenakubulawa." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Indlu kaRhubhen wayinika idolophu yaseBhezere kweso sithabazi sentlango; indlu kaGadi yona wayinika iRamoti kwelaseGiliyadi; waza ke yona indlu kaManase wayinika iGolani eBhashan. 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ke kaloku uMosis wawandlala phambi kwamaSirayeli umthetho kaThixo, ewakhumbuza ngazo zonke izicwangciso nemimiselo nemigaqo yakhe. Kwakusemva kokuphuma kwawo eJiputa, xa ayekuloo ntili iphesheya kweJordan, malunga neBhete-pehore. Apha ke kwakukummandla owawukade ungokaSihon ukumkani wama-Amori owayehlala eHeshbhon. Kaloku uMosis namaSirayeli amoyisa ukuphuma kwabo eJiputa." 
Deuteronomy4:45  
Deuteronomy4:46  
Deuteronomy4:47 Bema emhlabeni wakhe, ngokunjalo nakokaOgi ukumkani waseBhashan phesheya kweJordan, owayengomnye wookumkani ababini aba bama-Amori." 
Deuteronomy4:48 Lo mhlaba ke wawusuka eArure ekungeneni komlambo iAnoni, ugongothe unyuke uyokutsho kwintaba iSiriyon (okanye intaba iHermon)." 
Deuteronomy4:49 Kwangokunjalo wawuthatha nengingqi ephesheya kweJordan uhle uyokutsho kuLwandle oluFileyo, empuma uyokurheca amazantsi entaba iPisga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Ke kaloku uMosis wawabiza onke amaSirayeli, waza wadanduluka wenjenje: “Hoyina, maSirayeli! Phulaphulani, nantsi imimiselo nemigaqo endiyibhengeza ezindlebeni zenu namhlanje. Yifundeni ngenyameko, nize niyithobele." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Kwintaba iHorebhe *uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu wenza umnqophiso nathi. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Lo mnqophiso akawenzanga noobawo nje qha, koko wawenza nathi sonke ngabanye, thina baphilayo namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Apho kuloo ntaba uNdikhoyo wathetha nani ubuso ngobuso eselangatyeni lomlilo. 
Deuteronomy5:5 Ngelo thuba ke mna ndema phakathi kwenu noNdikhoyo ndinivakalisela awayekuthetha, kuba kaloku nina nasuka noyika nakubona umlilo, anavuma ukusondela entabeni. “UNdikhoyo wathetha nani, wathi:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‘Mna ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho owakukhupha eJiputa apho wawulikhoboka khona. 
Deuteronomy5:7 “ ‘Ungaze unqule thixo wumbi ngaphandle kwam. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “ ‘Ungaze uziqingqele umfanekiso wothixo, nditsho nokuba ngowantoni na esesibhakabhakeni phezulu, okanye esemhlabeni phantsi, okanye nokuba yeyasemanzini aphantsi komhlaba." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Ungaze ukhahlele unqule umfanekiso oqingqiweyo; kuba mna Ndikhoyo Thixo wakho ndinguThixo onekhwele. Ndiyabohlwaya abandithiyileyo; ewe, ndohlwaya ooyise ndide ndiye kuqhina kwesesithathu nakwesesine isizukulwana sabo." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Kodwa ke ndiphuphuma izibele kumawaka-waka abo bandithandayo beyithobela imiyalelo yam. 
Deuteronomy5:11 “ ‘Ungaze ulikhankanye ngelize igama lam; mna Ndikhoyo Thixo wakho andiyi kumxolela ofumana alibize igama lam. 
Deuteronomy5:12 “ ‘*UMhla wokuPhumla wugcine ulusuku olulodwa lwam njengoko mna Ndikhoyo Thixo wakho ndikuyalelayo. 
Deuteronomy5:13 Sebenza imihla emithandathu, uwenze wonke umsebenzi wakho." 
Deuteronomy5:14 Ke wona umhla wesixhenxe lusuku lwam olulodwa lokuphumla. Ngoko ke makungabikho mntu usebenzayo ngalo mhla; nditsho nawe, umntwana wakho, nesicaka sakho, nemfuyo yakho, ngokunjalo nomngeneleli ohlala phakathi kwenu. Nesicaka sakho masiphumle kwanjengawe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Kaloku khumbula ukuba nawe ubulikhoboka kwelaseJiputa, ndaza ke mna Ndikhoyo Thixo wakho ndakukhulula ngamandla obungangamsha bam. Yiyo ke le nto ndikuyalela ukuba uwubeke uMhla wokuPhumla." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “ ‘Mhlonele uyihlo ndawonye nonyoko njengoko mna Ndikhoyo onguThixo wakho ndikuyalelayo, khon' ukuze ube nokuzinza uxhamle intlala-kahle kwelo lizwe ndikunika lona mna Ndikhoyo Thixo wakho." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “ ‘Musa ukuba sisibulala-mntu. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “ ‘Musa ukukrexeza. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “ ‘Musa ukûba. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “ ‘Musa ukungqina ubuxoki ngomnye umntu. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “ ‘Musa ukunqwenela umfazi wenye indoda; ngokunjalo nomzi wayo, nentsimi yayo, nesicaka sayo, nenkomo yayo, nedonki yayo, nayo nantoni na eyeyomnye umntu.’" 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Nantso ke imithetho awayibhengezayo kuni uNdikhoyo xa ninonke ngokuya nanihlangene entabeni. Ewe, akukho yimbi imithetho awayivakalisayo ngokuya wayethetha ngelizwi elikhulu eselangatyeni lomlilo kwintshinyela yomsi. Ke yona wayibhala kumacwecwe amabini amatye, wayinika mna.”" 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Kaloku xa intaba yayingumlilo nje yonke, nathi nakuliva ilizwi esithokothokweni sobumnyama, amadoda amakhulu kunye neentloko zezindlu zenu eza kum," 
Deuteronomy5:24 nathi: ‘*UNdikhoyo uThixo wethu usibonisile isihomo nobungangamsha bakhe; kaloku simve ethetha eselangatyeni lomlilo! Namhlanje siyaqonda ukuba kuyenzeka ukuba umntu aphile nangona uThixo athethe naye. 
Deuteronomy5:25 Kodwa ke, ngani ukuba sizibeke emngciphekweni wokufa? Hayi bo! Laa ntleke-ntleke yomlilo iya kusitshabalalisa. Singafa ukuba uthe waqhubela phambili uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu ukuthetha nathi." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Ngaba kukho mntu ukhe waphila akuba eve uThixo ophilayo ethetha njengoko thina simvileyo elangatyeni lomlilo? 
Deuteronomy5:27 Hayi, Mosis, makuye wena, ukuphulaphule konke akuthethayo uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu; uze ke ubuye uze kusixelela. Ke thina siya kuphulaphula simthobele.’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Ke kaloku uNdikhoyo wathi akukuva ukuthetha kwenu, wathi kum: ‘Ndiyivile into ethethwa ngaba bantu; ndiyayamkela." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Akwaba bebeya kusoloko benezimvo ezinje! Akwaba bebeya kuhlala bendihlonipha bayithobele imiyalelo yam, khon' ukuze balungelwe bona nezizukulwana zabo naphakade." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Yiya utsho kubo babuyele emizini yabo. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Kambe ke, wena Mosis, sala apha kunye nam, ukuze ndikunike imiyalelo, nemimiselo, nemigaqo, uze uwafundise ke amaSirayeli, khon' ukuze ayithobele kwelo lizwe ndiwapha lona.’" 
Deuteronomy5:32 “MaSirayeli, noba sekutheni yenzani yonke into aniyaleleyo uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu. Yithobeleni yonke imithetho yakhe ningayityesheli nakancinane." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Ewe, hambani ngokwemimiselo yonke kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, khon' ukuze nizinze kwelo lizwe ningena kulo, nixhamle intlala-kahle nide nikhokhobe.”" 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Nanku ke umyalelo, imigaqo, nemimiselo endithunywe *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ukuba ndinifundise yona. Ngoko ke ze niyithobele nakufika kwelo lizwe niya kulo." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Ngalo lonke ithuba lobomi bakho, wena nezizukulwana zakho, kufuneka nimhlonele uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, uyithobele imithetho nemiyalelo yakhe endikunike yona, khon' ukuze ube nokuxhamla ubomi obude." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Hoyina, maSirayeli! Yiphulaphuleni niyithobele le miyalelo! Xa niyenzile ke loo nto nolungelwa nande kakhulu kwelo lizwe lendyebo eliphuphuma ubisi nobusi, elo nilinikwa ngokwesithembiso sikaNdikhoyo uThixo wooyihlo." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Hoyina, Sirayeli! UNdikhoyo nguThixo wethu, uNdikhoyo yedwa qwaba!" 
Deuteronomy6:5 Ngoko ke mthande uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho ngomxhelo wakho wonke, nangomoya wakho wonke, ngokunjalo nangamandla akho onke." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Le miyalelo ndikunika yona namhlanje mayilawule bonke ubomi bakho. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Uze uyibethelele ekufundiseni abantwana bakho, uthethe ngayo xa usekhaya, kanti noba useluhambeni, naxa ulalayo, ngokunjalo naxa uvukayo." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Uze uyiqhinele ibe ngumqondiso esandleni sakho, ngokunjalo nasebunzi, khon' ukuze ihlale isisikhumbuzo." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Uze uyikrole emigubasini, ngokunjalo nasemasangweni akho.”" 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Ngokwesifungo sakhe kookhokho benu, uAbraham, uIsake, noYakobi, *uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uya kuninika ilizwe elizixeko zihle zikhulu, nangona phofu ungazakhanga ngokwakho." 
Deuteronomy6:11 Izindlu zakhona ziphuphuma ubuyoko-yoko ongabulalekanga ngabo. Uya kufumana amaqula aselembiwe, ngokunjalo nezidiliya nezinquma esezityaliwe. Xa sowusitya uhlutha" 
Deuteronomy6:12 uze ulumke hleze umlibale uNdikhoyo owakukhulula ulikhoboka kwelaseJiputa. 
Deuteronomy6:13 “Uze umhlonele uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, ukhonze yena yedwa, izifungo zakho uzenze ngegama lakhe." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Ungaze ulandele *thixo wumbi, nditsho nowezo zizwe zikuphahlileyo," 
Deuteronomy6:15 hleze umsindo kaNdikhoyo uvuthe, anitshabalalise ningabikho kulo mhlaba. Kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho ohlala phakathi kwenu nguThixo onekhwele." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “UNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ze ningamlingi njengoko nênzayo eMasa. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Iziyalo nezicwangciso ngokunjalo nemimiselo eniyinikwe nguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ze niyithobele ngenyameko. 
Deuteronomy6:18 Kuphela ze nenze ezo zinto athi uNdikhoyo zintle zilungile, khon' ukuze nilungelwe. Xa nisenjenjalo ke noba nako ukulizuza elo lizwe lihle kunene lathenjiswa nguNdikhoyo kookhokho benu ngesifungo." 
Deuteronomy6:19 Noba nako ukuzigxotha iintshaba zenu ngokwelizwi lakhe. 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Kaloku kumaxesha ezayo unyana wakho uya kukubuza athi: ‘Kwakutheni ukuze uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu akunike ezi zicwangciso nale mimiselo, nale migaqo nje?’ Ke wena uze umxelele uthi:" 
Deuteronomy6:21 ‘Kaloku sasingamakhoboka ekumkani yaseJiputa, waza ke uNdikhoyo wasikhulula ngamandla akhe amakhulu." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Ewe, sayibona ngamehlo imiqondiso nemimangaliso erhwaqelisayo awayenzayo uNdikhoyo kumaJiputa, ngokunjalo nakukumkani nendlu yakhe." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Wasikhulula kwelaseJiputa, ukuze asibeke apha kweli lizwe awayebathembise ngalo oobawo-mkhulu ngesifungo." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Ngokwenjenjalo ke uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu wasiyalela ukuba siyithobele le mimiselo simhlonele, size ke silungelwe bonke ubomi bethu, siphile njengokuba kunjalo namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Xa sithe sayithobela yonke imiyalelo, siya kumkholisa uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy7:1 “*UNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uza kuningenisa kwelo lizwe niya kuma kulo. Uza kugxotha izizwe ezininzi kulo; ewe, yoba sisixhenxe sonke sezizwe ezikhulu nezinamandla kunani. Nazi ke: amaHeti, amaGirgashi, ama-Amori, amaKanana, amaPerezi, amaHivi, namaJebhusi." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Ke akuba uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ezinikele kuni ezi zizwe nazoyisa, kufuneka nizitshabalalise ziphele nya. Ningaze nenze mvumelwano kunye nazo, futhi ze ningabi nanceba tu kuzo." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Ningaze nendiselane nazo," 
Deuteronomy7:4 kuba ningáthi niyenzile loo nto zibawexule bamlahle uNdikhoyo abantwana benu, banqule thixo bambi. Ingáthi ikhe yenzeka loo nto uNdikhoyo acaphuke anitshabalalise ngoko nangoko." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Ngoko ke ze nenjenje kuzo: wadilizeni amaqonga azo, iintsika zazo zamatye niziqhekeze zibe ziingceba, ke yona imifanekiso yesithixokazi sazo uAshera ze niyinqunqe, ukanti imifanekiso yazo eqingqiweyo noyitshisa ngomlilo." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Le nto ke noyenza kuba kaloku nina niyimilowo kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu. Kaloku kuzo zonke izizwe zehlabathi uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uninyulele ukuze nibe ngabantu abalibango lakhe elilodwa. 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Ke kaloku uNdikhoyo akathanga nca nani waninyula kuba nibaninzi kunezinye izizwe; hayi, kaloku nanisesona sizwe sincinci ehlabathini liphela." 
Deuteronomy7:8 UNdikhoyo uninyule kuba enithanda, efuna ukusigcina isifungo awasenzela ooyihlo-mkhulu. Kwakungenxa yeso sizathu ukuze anihlangule ngamandla akhe amakhulu, anikhulule ebukhobokeni phantsi kokumkani waseJiputa." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Khumbulani kaloku ukuba uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu lo nguThixo ekukuphela kwakhe, kungekho wumbi ngaphaya; futhi ke uthembekile. Uyawugcina umnqophiso wakhe, futhi izibele zakhe ziphuphumela kwâbo bamthandayo beyigcina imiyalelo yakhe kuse kumawaka ezizukulwana." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Kambe uya kuziphindezela ngqo kwabo bamthiyileyo, abatshabalalise; ewe, akayi kulibazisa ukuziphindezela." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Ngoko ke wuthobeleni ngenyameko lo myalelo nale mimiselo ngokunjalo nale migaqo ndininike yona namhlanje ukuba niyenze.” 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Ukuba nithe nayiphulaphula nayithobela le migaqo, *uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uya kuthi rhoqo ukuwugcina umnqophiso wakhe nani, zithi ke nezibele zakhe ziphuphumele kuni ngokwesifungo sakhe kooyihlo." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Uthando lwakhe uya kulubonakalisa kuni, anithamsanqele kangangokuba niqhame nande. Intsikelelo yakhe yofikelela kuni, nizale abantwana, nasemasimini enu nivune ukudla okwaneleyo: okuziinkozo, iwayini, neoyile. Kanti ke neenkomo zenu uya kuzandisa, nditsho nempahla yenu emfutshane ngokunjalo. Yonke ke le nto uya kunenzele kwelo lizwe wanithembisa ngalo kooyihlo-mkhulu ngesifungo." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Ehlabathini liphela akuyi kubakho sizwe sithamsanqeleke njengani. Phakathi kwenu soze abekho umntu ngokunjalo nemfuyo engazaliyo. 
Deuteronomy7:15 UNdikhoyo uya kunikhusela kuzo zonke izifo; soze aniyekele ngezifo ezifana nezo zoyikekayo zaseJiputa, kambe ke zona iintshaba zenu uya kuzibetha ngezi zifo." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Ze nizitshabalalise zonke izizwe azinikele kuni uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, ningazenzeli nceba konke-konke. Ze ningazikhonzi izithixo zazo, kuba ngokwenjenjalo noba nizenzela umgibe." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Nisenokuthi ekucingeni kwenu: ‘Ezi zizwe zikhulu kunathi; soze sizoyise.’ 
Deuteronomy7:18 Kambe ze ningaxhalabi, koko khumbulani into awayenzayo uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu kukumkani waseJiputa nakwiJiputa iphela," 
Deuteronomy7:19 nditsho ezo zibetho zirhwaqelisayo nazibonayo ngawenu amehlo: loo miqondiso, naloo mimangaliso, ngokunjalo nobungangamsha namandla awanikhulula ngawo uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu. Uya kwenjenjalo ke nakwezi zizwe nizoyikayo." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Ewe, abo baseleyo kuzo uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uya kubathumela ngoonomeva, abagubhulule apho bazimeleyo khona, batshabalale." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Ngoko ke sanukunkwantya ngenxa yaba bantu, kuba uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu unani, abe ke yena unguThixo omkhulu orhwaqelisayo." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Ekungeneni kwenu uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uya kuzigxotha ngokuzigxotha ezi zizwe. Aniyi kusuka nizitshabalalise ngaxesha-nye, kuba ngaloo ndlela angasuka ande amarhamncwa, ke nina nibe semngciphekweni." 
Deuteronomy7:23 UNdikhoyo uya kuzinikela ezandleni zenu iintshaba zenu, azenze zibe namanwele, zidideke, zitshabalale ziphele." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Izikumkani zazo uya kuzinikela ezandleni zenu; ke nina niya kuzitshabalalisa zingabi sakhunjulwa. Akukho mntu uya kuba nako ukumelana nani, naye ke niya kutshabalalisa nivuthulule konke nje." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Imifanekiso eqingqiweyo *yezithixo zabo ze niyitshise. Igolide nesiliva eyenziwe ngayo loo mifanekiso ze ningayibaweli niyithathe, hleze nizenzele umgibe ngayo; kaloku yona ilisikizi kuNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Le mifanekiso ze ningayingenisi emizini yenu, hleze nithi ngokwenjenjalo nizithathele ishwangusha kwanjengokuba nayo iqalekisiwe. Kufuneka niyithiye niyenyanye imifanekiso, kuba kaloku imelwe kukutshatyalaliswa.”" 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Niyabona ke, le miyalelo ndininike yona namhlanje ze niyithobele kangangoko, khon' ukuze niphile nande, ningene kwelo lizwe wabathembisa ngalo ngesifungo uNdikhoyo ooyihlo." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Ngamana aningeyilibali indlela anikhokele ngayo uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu kolu hambo lude kangaka ukucanda intlango, kula mashumi mane eminyaka, enifundisa intobeko, enilinga khon' ukuze aqonde ukuba niza kuyithobela kusini na imiyalelo yakhe!" 
Deuteronomy8:3 Wanithoba eniyekela ngendlela, waza kananjalo wanipha *imana, kutya oko naningakwazi, nina ngokunjalo nooyihlo-mkhulu. Le nto ke wayenza kuba efuna niqonde nazi ukuba ubomi bomntu abuxhomekanga kutyeni kuphela, koko buxhomekeke kuwo onke amazwi kaNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Kula mashumi mane eminyaka impahla yakho yokunxiba zange iguge, kananjalo neenyawo zakho zange zidumbe." 
Deuteronomy8:5 “Qondani kaloku nizikise ukuba uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uyaniqeqesha njengomzali eqeqesha abantwana bakhe. 
Deuteronomy8:6 Ngoko ke yithobeleni imiyalelo kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nihambe ngeendlela zakhe, nimhlonele." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Kaloku ngoku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uningenisa kwilizwe elihle kunene, ilizwe lemifula ebaleka amanzi, ilizwe elinemithombo, ilizwe eligqabhuka imisinga yamanzi ezintlanjeni nasezindulini." 
Deuteronomy8:8 Lilizwe lengqolowa, irhasi, iidiliya, amakhiwane, iirharnati, amafutha omnquma, nobusi." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Elo ke lilizwe lentlutha; soze niswele nto khona. Ilitye lakhona liyintsimbi, ukanti kwiinduli zalo ningavula imigodi yekopolo." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Kwelo lizwe niya kutya nihluthe, nibulele nidomboze kuNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ngenxa yelo lizwe lihle kunene aniphe lona.”" 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Niyabona ke ze ningamlibali *uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ngokuthi ningayithobeli le miyalelo, nale migaqo, ngokunjalo nale mimiselo ndininika yona namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Xa senixhamla intlala-kahle, ninayo yonke into eniyifunayo, senizakhele izindlu ezintle," 
Deuteronomy8:13 nemfuyo yenu isanda ngokunjalo nesiliva negolide nako konke eninako kuvumile," 
Deuteronomy8:14 ze ningakhukhumali, nimlibale uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu owanihlangula ebukhobokeni kwelaseJiputa." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Kaloku yena wanikhokela kweso sithabazi sentlango eyoyikekayo, apho kwakukho iinyoka ezinobuhlungu ndawonye noonomadudwane. Apho kanye kuloo nkangala ingenamanzi wanivelisela amanzi eliweni lenyengane." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Kaloku apho entlango wanondla *ngemana, ukutya okwakungaziwa, kungazange kutyiwe nangooyihlo-mkhulu. Wanithoba ngokunilinga ngezo meko zinjalo, khon' ukuze ekugqibeleni anithamsanqele ngezinto ezintle!" 
Deuteronomy8:17 Nisenokuthetha nithi: ‘Obu butyebi sibufumene ngamandla nangobuchule bethu.’ 
Deuteronomy8:18 Ngokutsho noba nilibele ukuba nguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu onithe jize ngobutyebi. Le nto ke uyenza kuba ezinzisa umnqophiso awawenzayo nooyihlo-mkhulu ngesifungo. 
Deuteronomy8:19 “Mhlenikwezeni namlibala uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nalandela thixo bambi, nabahlonela nabakhonza, inene namhlanje mna ndiyalingqinela elithi niya kutshabalala niphele tu!" 
Deuteronomy8:20 Ke kaloku, ukuba animthobelanga uNdikhoyo, uya kunitshabalalisa, kwanjengokuba eza kuzitshabalalisa ezo zizwe ukungena kwenu kwelo lizwe.”" 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Niyabona ke, maSirayeli, seniza kuwela iJordan, ningene kwilizwe elimiwe zezinye izizwe ezikhulu nezomeleleyo kunani. Izixeko zazo zikhulu, futhi zibiyelwe ngeendonga ezirhec' izulu." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Nabantu bakhona bade, bomelele, bayinzala ka-Anaki, ibe ke niyazi ukuba kuthiwa akukho mntu unokumelana nama-Anaki." 
Deuteronomy9:3 Kambe ke nina niza kuzibonela ngokwenu, kuba *uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uza kunandulela engumlilo odangazelayo. Ezo zizwe úya kuzoyisa azithobe, nize nina nizigxothe nizitshabalalise ngokukhawuleza ngokwesithembiso sakhe." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Xa uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu selenigxothele ezi zizwe, ze ningacingi ukuba nifanelekile. Hayi, akunjalo, nto nje uNdikhoyo ezigxotha nje ezi zizwe kungenxa yenkohlakalo yazo." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Isizathu asikuba nina nilungile, nigqibelele, le nto uNdikhoyo anivumeleyo nawuthatha umhlaba yazo, nangenxa yokuba ezimisele ukusigcina isithembiso awayesenze nooyihlo-mkhulu ooAbraham, uIsake, noYakobi, ngokufunga." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Ngenene mayicace mhlophe into yokuba uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu eninika eli lizwe lihle kangaka nje akukho ngenxa yobulungisa benu, kuba kambe nina nisisizwe esineenkani." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Nokhumbula kaloku ukuba nina namcaphukisa uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu entlango. Ukusukela kwimini enemka ngayo eJiputa nada naza kufika apha, namvukela okokoko." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Nakwintaba iHorebhe namcaphukisa, wada waphantse wanitshabalalisa uNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Ndenyuka entabeni, ndisiya kuphuthuma amacwecwe amatye apho wawubhalwe khona umnqophiso awenze nani uNdikhoyo. Ndahlala apho ke amashumi amane eentsuku nobusuku bazo, ndingatyi ndingaseli." 
Deuteronomy9:10 UNdikhoyo ke wandinika amacwecwe amabini amatye apho wayeyibhale khona ngesakhe isandla yonke into awayithethayo apho entabeni ngokuya wayeselangatyeni lomlilo, mhla ngembizo." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Ewe, emveni kwezo ntsuku zimashumi mane nobusuku bazo, uNdikhoyo wandinika amacwecwe amabini amatye apho wayewubhale khona umnqophiso." 
Deuteronomy9:12 “Ke kaloku uNdikhoyo wathi: ‘Khawuleza uhle, kuba abantu bakho owabakhokela uphuma nabo eJiputa bonile. Ngokukhawuleza nje sebephumile endleleni endabayalela yona; ngoku bazenzele umfanekiso otyhidiweyo.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 “UNdikhoyo wathi: ‘Ndiyabazi aba bantu ukuba neenkani kwabo. 
Deuteronomy9:14 Ngoko ke ndiyeke ndibatshabalalise nya, ndilicime igama labo ehlabathini. Ke wena ndiya kukwenza ube sisizwe esikhulu nesomeleleyo kunabo.’" 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Ngoko ke ndehla apho entabeni, ndiphethe loo macwecwe mabini amatye apho wawubhalwe khona umnqophiso. Ke kaloku intaba leyo yayidangazela umlilo." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ndathi ndakukhangela ndabona ukuba nimvukele uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu; nonile nazityhidela umfanekiso wenkunzi yenkomo; ewe, ngokukhawuleza nje seniphumile endleleni enaniyalelwe yona nguNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Ngoko ke ndawathatha loo macwecwe, ndawaphosa phantsi apho phambi kwenu, ophuka aba ziingceba." 
Deuteronomy9:18 “Kwakhona ke ndazikhahlela phantsi phambi koNdikhoyo amashumi amane eentsuku nobusuku bazo, ndingatyi ndingaseli. Le nto ke ndayenza kuba nina nanimonile kakhulu namcaphukisa ngobubi enabenzayo uNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Ndandisoyika gqitha, kuba uNdikhoyo wayekhathazekile, ecaphuka kangangokuba waphantse wanitshabalalisa. Kambe ke nangeso isihlandlo uNdikhoyo wandiphulaphula." 
Deuteronomy9:20 UNdikhoyo wayecatshukiswe kakhulu nanguAron, yaye ke naye wayeseza kumtshabalalisa, koko ke naye ndamthandazela kwangelo thuba." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Lona ke elo sikizi nanizenzele lona – nditsho loo nkunzi yenkomo nanizityhidele yona – ndayithatha ndayiphosa emlilweni. Ndaza ke kamva ndayikroboza ndayicola yangumgubo, ndaza ndawugalela kumlanjana owawuphuma apho entabeni." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Kaloku naseTabhera, eMasa, naseKibroti-hatava namcaphukisa uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy9:23 NaseKadeshe-bhaneya wathi akuniyalela ukuba ningene niwuthathe loo mhlaba wayenipha wona namvukela, anakholosa ngaye nimthobele." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Okoko ndanaziyo mna nasoloko nivukelana naye uNdikhoyo. 
Deuteronomy9:25 Ewe, kuloo mashumi mane eentsuku ndahlala ndizikhahlele phantsi phambi koNdikhoyo, kuba ndandisazi ukuba seletshilo ukuthi uza kunitshabalalisa." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ndadanduluka ndathi: ‘Awu, Ndikhoyo, Nkosi yam! Ndiyakubongoza, musa ukubatshabalalisa abantu abalibango lakho, owabahlangula wabakhulula ngamandla obungangamsha bakho kwelaseJiputa." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Khawukhumbule izicaka zakho, ooAbraham, uIsake, noYakobi, ungabasi so aba bantu baneenkani, bazizikhohlakali ezigwenxa," 
Deuteronomy9:28 okanye amaJiputa osuka athi: “UNdikhoyo wayengenako ukubathatha abantu bakhe abase kwelo lizwe wayebathembise ngalo. Kungenxa yokuba ebathiyile ukuze emke nabo aye kubaphosa entlango, khon' ukuze ababulale khona.”" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Andithi na kaloku, Nikhoyo, aba ngabantu abalibango lakho, abantu bakho ncakasana, owabakhulula ngamandla obungangamsha bakho kwelaseJiputa?’ ”" 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Ngelo thuba ke *uNdikhoyo wandiyalela wathi: ‘Qingqa amanye amacwecwe amabini amatye, afane nalawa okuqala, uwenzele ityesi ngomthi. Nyuka intaba, uze kum," 
Deuteronomy10:2 ukuze apho kuloo macwecwe ndibhale laa nto ndandiyibhale kulawa wawaphulayo, uze ke uwafake apho etyesini.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Ke kaloku ndayenza ityesi leyo ngomngampunzi, ndaza ndaqingqa namanye amacwecwe amabini amatye afana nalawa okuqala, ndenyuka nawo apho entabeni." 
Deuteronomy10:4 UNdikhoyo wabhala ke apho kuloo macwecwe kwalaa mazwi wayewabhale kulawa okuqala, imithetho elishumi leya wayenixelele yona ngokuya wayeselangatyeni lomlilo, mhla ngembizo entabeni. UNdikhoyo ke wawabuyisela kum amacwecwe lawo," 
Deuteronomy10:5 ndaza ke ndehla nawo apho entabeni. Ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo ke ndawafaka kulaa tyesi ndandiyenzile. Aselapho ke unanamhla. 
Deuteronomy10:6 “AmaSirayeli ke anduluka apho kuloo maqula amaYakana, ajonga eMosera. UAron wafela apho ke, waza wangcwatywa, yona indawo yakhe yobubingeleli yathathwa ngunyana wakhe uElazare." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Ukuphuma kwawo ke apho aya kugaleleka eGudegoda, aza agqithela eYotebhata, umhlaba owawunemisinga yamanzi." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Ngelo xesha ke uNdikhoyo wabahlulela abaLevi umsebenzi wokulondoloza ityesi yomnqophiso, baququzelele *esibingelelweni sikaNdikoyo, bathamsanqele egameni lakhe. Yimisebenzi leyo basayenzayo unangoku." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Kungenxa yeso sizathu ke indlu kaLevi ingazange inikwe mhlaba ulilifa nje, njengezinye izindlu; ilifa layo yinkonzo kaNdikhoyo ngokwesithembiso sikaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Nangesi ke isihlandlo, kwanjengesiya sokuqala, ndahlala apho entabeni amashumi amane eentsuku nobusuku bazo. Kwakhona ke uNdikhoyo wandiva kuba kwakungeyontando yakhe ukunitshabalalisa." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Wathi ke kum uNdikhoyo: ‘Phakama uye kubakhokela abantu, khon' ukuze bangene balithathe elo lizwe ndibathembise ngalo ooyihlo ngesifungo.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Phulaphulani ke, maSirayeli, ingaba yintoni afuna niyenze *uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu? Ufuna nimhlonele, ningaphambuki endleleni yakhe. Ufuna nimthande, nimkhonze ngengqondo yenu yonke nangomoya wenu wonke," 
Deuteronomy10:13 nithobele imiyalelo nemimiselo yakhe, le ndininika yona namhlanje ukuze kulunge kuni." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Kaloku amazulu, nditsho amazulu awo amazulu, ngakaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nehlabathi lelakhe, ngokunjalo nako konke okukulo." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Kambe ke uNdikhoyo ooyihlo wabathanda, wathi nca kubo, wanyula nina sizukulwana sabo kuzo zonke iintlanga, njengoko kusenjalo unanamhla." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Ngoko ke mthobeleni ngomxhelo uNdikhoyo, nahlukane neenkani." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu nguThixo woothixo, iNkosi yeenkosi; nguThixo oyingangamsha; uyingangalala ehloniphekileyo engakhethi cala, ibe ke akanyobeki." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Yena uyazikhusela iinkedama ndawonye nabahlolokazi. Nabangeneleli uyabathanda, ababonelele ngokutya nangempahla yokunxiba." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Ngoko ke nani bathandeni abangeneleli, kuba nani nanikhe nangabasemzini kwelaseJiputa." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Mhloneleni uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nimkhonze, nibambelele kuye, nifunge ngegama lakhe." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Uyimbangi yokudumisa kwenu, unguThixo wenu; ibe ke nizibonele ngawenu amehlo izinto ezinkulu nezimangalisayo anenzela zona." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Ukuya kwabo eJiputa ooyihlo-mkhulu babengamashumi asixhenxe kuphela. Kodwa ke ngoku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu unandisile natsho nayinyambalala enjengeenkwenkwezi esibhakabhakeni.” 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Ngoko ke uze umthande uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, ugcine isigxina sakhe, nemimiselo yakhe, nemigaqo nemiyalelo yakhe, nanini nanini." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Khumbula kaloku ukuba yayingengabo abantwana benu abângcamla amava engqeqesho kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nditsho ubukhulu bakhe, namandla akhe, nobungangamsha bakhe," 
Deuteronomy11:3 nemiqondiso yakhe. Uzibonele ngokwakho izinto azenzileyo kukumkani wamaJiputa nelizwe lakhe liphela. 
Deuteronomy11:4 Andithi na kaloku uyibonile indlela awuvuthulule ngayo umkhosi wamaJiputa ndawonye neenqwelo zawo zamahashe, xa wawunisukelisa, waza yena wawukhukulisa kuLwandle oluBomvu, nto leyo eyabatshabalalisa nya." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Ngokunjalo yaziwa nini indlela anilondoloze ngayo entlango nada naza kufika kule ndawo. 
Deuteronomy11:6 Nisazikhumbula izigigaba azenzileyo kuDatan noAbhiram oonyana bakaEliyabhi wendlu kaRubhen. Kaloku umhlaba wakhamisa wabaginya behleli, ndawonye neentsapho zabo, iintente zabo, nemfuyo yabo; yonke ke loo nto isenzeka amaSirayeli onke ekhangele." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Ewe, ngenene nazibonela ngawenu amehlo zonke ezi zigigaba azenzileyo uNdikhoyo.”" 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Ze niyithobele yonke imiyalelo endininike yona namhlanje. Xa niyenzile loo nto noba nawo amandla, niwele iJordan, ningene nilithathe elo lizwe niya kulo, libe lelenu." 
Deuteronomy11:9 Niya kuzinza kwelo lizwe lendyebo wayebathembise ngalo ngesifungo uNdikhoyo ooyihlo-mkhulu ndawonye nenzala yabo. 
Deuteronomy11:10 Kaloku eli lizwe niza kuma kulo alifani nelaseJiputa apho nivela khona. Kaloku apho nanihlwayela imbewu, nisebenza nzima ninkcenkceshela oku komntu onesitiya;" 
Deuteronomy11:11 kambe ke lona eli lizwe niza kungena kulo ngumhlaba weentaba neentili, ilizwe lemvula." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu eli lizwe ulikhathalele; ewe, uhlala elalusile unyaka wonke." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Ngoko ke yithobeleni le miyalelo ndininika yona namhlanje, nimthande uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nimkhonze ngengqondo yenu yonke nangomoya wenu wonke." 
Deuteronomy11:14 Xa nisenjenjalo ke uNdikhoyo uthi: ‘Ndiya kuyinisa imvula ngamaxesha ayo – entlako-hlaza nasekwindla – khon' ukuze nivune ukudla okuziinkozo, iwayini, namafutha omnquma;" 
Deuteronomy11:15 ize nengca ibe ninzi, zihluthe iinkomo zenu; ngaloo ndlela ke nixhamle intlutha.’" 
Deuteronomy11:16 “Kambe ke lumkani, hleze niwexuleke, ninqule *thixo bambi." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Xa ninokuyenza ke loo nto, uNdikhoyo angakhathazeka gqitha, atsho awavale amazulu, ingani imvula, nomhlaba ungavelisi nto, ke nina nikhawuleze nitshabalale kanye apho kwelo lizwe lihle kunene aninike lona uNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Ngoko ke la mazwi ndininike wona ze niwalondoloze abe sezingqondweni zenu nasemoyeni wenu. Ze niwaqhinele ezandleni abe ngumqondiso, ngokunjalo nasebunzi, khon' ukuze ahlale esisikhumbuzo." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Ze niwafundise abantwana benu, nincokole ngawo xa nihleli ekhaya, ngokunjalo naxa niseluhambeni; nditsho xa nilalayo naxa nivukayo." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Ze niwakrole emgubasini wezindlu, ngokunjalo nasemasangweni enu." 
Deuteronomy11:21 Xa niyenzile ke loo nto, nozinza, nina nenzala yenu, kwelo lizwe wayebathembise ngalo oyihlo-mkhulu ngesifungo uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu. Ewe, niya kuma kulo nanini nanini sisekho nje isibhakabhaka phezu kwehlabathi." 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Le miyalelo ndininike yona ze niyithobele ngenyameko; ze nimthande uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nibambelele kuye, nihambe ngendlela yakhe." 
Deuteronomy11:23 Ke yena ekungeneni kwenu uya kuzidudula azigxothe zonke ezo zizwe, nize ke nina nohluthe umhlaba wezizwe ezikhulu nezomeleleyo kunani." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Uya kuba ngowenu wonke umhlaba enithe nanyathela kuwo. Imida yenu iya kusuka ezantsi entlango ityhutyhumeze iyokutsho kwiintaba zeLebhanon ngasentla; empuma iya kuthatha kumlambo iEfrati iyokuthi xhaxhe ngolwandle ngasentshonalanga. 
Deuteronomy11:25 Akukho bani uya kuba nako ukumelana nani. Naphi na apho nihamba khona kwelo lizwe, uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uya kubarhwaqelisa banoyike abantu bakhona ngokwesithembiso sakhe." 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Niyabona ke, ndithi khethani, kuba namhlanje ndibeka phambi kwenu ithamsanqa nesiqalekiso." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Yoba lithamsanqa ukuba niyayithobela le miyalelo kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ndininika yona namhlanje," 
Deuteronomy11:28 kambe ke yoba sisiqalekiso ukuba nithe anayithobela, koko natyekela bucala nanqula thixo bambi eningazange nabanqula ngaphambili." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Akuba enifikisile uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu kweli lizwe niya kuma kulo, ze nithamsanqele phezu kwentaba iGerizim kanti ke niqalekise phezu kwentaba iEbhali." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Ezi ntaba zimbini zisentshona kumlambo iJordan, kummandla wamaKanana ame kwintili yeJordan. Zingasentshona kude kufuphi nemioki yaseMore ngaseGiligali." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Sekumbomvu niyiwele iJordan, ningene kwelo lizwe aninika lona uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu. Nakuba ningenile nema kulo ke," 
Deuteronomy11:32 ze nincede niyithobele ngenyameko le mimiselo nale migaqo ndininike yona namhlanje.” 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Nantsi imimiselo nemigaqo ekofuneka niyithobele ngalo lonke ixesha lokudla kwenu ubomi kwelo lizwe niliphiwa *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wooyihlo-mkhulu. 
Deuteronomy12:2 Ze nizitshabalalise ziphele tu ezo ndawo zinqulela kuzo *oothixo bazo ezaa zizwe zalaa mhlaba niya kuwohlutha; nditsho ezisezintabeni eziphakamileyo, nezisezindulini, neziphantsi kwemithi eyokozelayo." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Amaqonga azo ze niwadilize; ke zona iintsika zazo zamatye ze niziqhekeze zibe ziingceba. Imifanekiso yazo eqingqiweyo ka-Ashera isithixokazi sazo ze niyitshise; ngokunjalo neminye imifanekiso yazo eqingqiweyo ze niyinqunqe niyitshabalalise, acinywe amagama azo kwezo ndawo." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Nina ke uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ze ningamkhonzi ngale ndlela zinqula ngayo ezo zizwe. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Kumhlaba wenu uphela uNdikhoyo uya kukhetha indawo ibe nye qha apho liya kuzinza khona igama lakhe, ahlale khona, zize zithi ke zonke izindlu zenu zibuzise kuye khona." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Apho ke niya kuwenzela khona amadini enu atshiswayo ndawonye nawaphi na amadini angamanye, nezishumi, iminikelo, nezipho enibhambathisa ngazo, ngokunjalo namazibulo eenkomo naweegusha." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Apha phambi koNdikhoyo uThixo wenu onithamsanqelisayo nina neentsapho zenu niya kuxhamla ubuncwane bezinto enibulaleke ngazo. 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Ngelo xesha ke ze ningenzi njengoko niqhele ukwenza ngako. Ukuza kuthi gaa ngoku benisenza okulungileyo emehlweni enu," 
Deuteronomy12:9 kuba kaloku beningekangeni kwelo lizwe niliphiwa nguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, apho niya kuphumla ngokonwaba khona." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Nakuthi nakuyiwela iJordan, uNdikhoyo anivumele ningene kwelo lizwe, nime kulo. Uya kunigcina nikhuselekile ezintshabeni, nihlale ngenzolo." 
Deuteronomy12:11 UNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uya kunyula indawo ibe nye apho liya kuzinza khona igama lakhe, ahlale khona. Zonke ke izinto endiniyalele ngazo nozisa khona: amadini atshiswayo namanye angawambi, izishumi neminikelo yemveliso yenu, ngokunjalo nezipho ezizodwa enibhambathisa ngazo kuNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Ze nonwabe ke apho phambi kwakhe ndawonye neentsapho nezicaka zenu kunye nabaLevi enihlala nabo, kuba kaloku bona ababelwanga mhlaba ungowabo njengani." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Amadini atshiswayo akufuneki niwenzele naphi na apho nithanda khona," 
Deuteronomy12:14 koko kufuneka niwenzele kuloo ndawo ayinyulileyo uNdikhoyo kumhlaba wenye yezindlu zenu. Amadini enu atshiswayo nowenzela kuloo ndawo kuphela, ngokunjalo ke nazo zonke izinto endiniyalele ukuba nizenze." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Kambe ke nikhululekile ukuba nixhele kwimfuyo yenu, niyixhelele naphi na apho nihlala khona. Ningatya kangangoko nithamsanqeliswa nguNdikhoyo. Xa ninonke abahlambulukileyo nabangahlambulukanga bangayitya inyama leyo kwanjengokuba nisenza kweyebhadi okanye inxala." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Ke lona igazi ningaze nilitye, koko lichitheni phantsi oku kwamanzi." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Into eniyinikela kuNdikhoyo mayingatyelwa apho nihlala khona; ngokunjalo nezishumi zengqolowa, iwayini entsha, namafutha omnquma, noba ngamazibulo eenkomo okanye aweegusha, nezipho enibhambathise ngazo kuNdikhoyo, okanye ezokuqhutywa yintliziyo, kanti ke nawuphi na umnikelo." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Le minikelo kufuneka niyityele phambi koNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, kuloo ndawo ayinyulele ukuzinziswa kwegama lakhe. Yona ke mayityiwe nini nabantwana, izicaka ngokunjalo nabaLevi enihlala nabo, nikuxhamle ngokonwaba ukubulaleka kwenu." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Ke bona abaLevi ningaze nibalahle nanini na xa nisahleli kwelo lizwe. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Uya kuthi ke uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu akuwandisa umhlaba wenu ngokwesithembiso sakhe, nixhele nitye inyama nanini na nifuna." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Ukuba indawo leyo yonqulo ikude, ningaxhela kwimfuyo yenu, nityele apho emakhaya ngokuthanda kwenu ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo njengoko ndanichazelayo." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Nabani na angayitya le nyama, ehlambulukile okanye engahlambulukanga, kwanjengokuba niyitya inyama yebhadi okanye eyenxala." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Inyama emaningayityi yenegazi; kaloku ubomi busegazini, ibe ke akufuneki nitye inyama ndawonye nobomi." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Ke lona igazi ningaze nilitye, koko lichitheni phantsi oku kwamanzi." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Ukuba niyazikhwebula ekutyeni igazi uNdikhoyo uya kukholiseka nini, futhi ke kulunge kuni, ngokunjalo nakwizizukulwana zenu." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Yonke into eninikela ngayo kuThixo, nezipho enibhambathise ngazo, ziseni kuloo ndawo uNdikhoyo ayinyulileyo." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Nowanikela eqongeni likaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu amadini enu atshiswayo, inyama negazi. Igazi ze nilithulule apho ngaseqongeni, inyama yona niyitye." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Nyamekani niyithobele le miyalelo ndininika yona, ukuze nilungelwe ndawonye nezizukulwana zenu, nanini nanini, kuba kaloku noba nisenza yonke into ngokusesikweni nangendlela emkholisayo uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu.”" 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Niyabona ke, *uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uya kuzitshabalalisa ezi zizwe xa ningenayo emhlabeni wazo, ke nina ningene nime kuwo." 
Deuteronomy12:30 Akuba ezitshabalalisile ke uNdikhoyo ezi zizwe, lumkani ningangeni kumgibe wokubuzisa *ngoothixo bazo, nisithi: ‘Zibakhonza njani oothixo ezi zizwe, ukuze nathi senjenjalo?’" 
Deuteronomy12:31 UNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ze ningamnquli ngeendlela ezibanqula ngayo oothixo bazo, kuba kaloku zona zinqula ngeendlela ezimanyumnyezi azicaphukelayo uNdikhoyo. Kaloku zona zide zitshise abantwana bazo emlilweni, zisenzela izithixo zazo amadini." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Konke endiniyalela kona kwenzeni ngokwelizwi lam, ningaphambuki nakancinane ngokusuka nandise okanye niphungule." 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Ukuba kuvela umshumayeli okanye umlawuli-maphupha phakathi kwenu, evakalisa ummangaliso okanye umqondiso oza kubakho," 
Deuteronomy13:2 ize ke kwenzeke ngokwaloo mmangaliso okanye loo mqondiso, aze athi: ‘Masilandele *thixo bambi’ – thixo abo eningazange nibazi – aqhubele phambili athi: ‘Masibanqule,’" 
Deuteronomy13:3 ze ningawathatheli ngqalelo amazwi aloo mshumayeli okanye loo mphuphi. Kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uyanivavanya, khon' ukuze aqonde ukuba nimthanda ngengondo iphela nangomoya uphela na." 
Deuteronomy13:4 NguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu emanimlandele, nimhlonele. Mthobeleni, niyenze imiyalelo yakhe; futhi mkhonzeni, nibambelele kuye." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Nabani na ongumshumayeli okanye umphuphi oniqhubela ekuvukeleni uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu mbulaleni. Kaloku uNdikhoyo lo ngulo wanikhupha eJiputa apho naningamakhoboka khona. Umntu onjalo uzama ukunilukuhla, khon' ukuze niphulukane nehambo eniyalelwe yona nguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu. Ubugwenxa mabususwe mpela phakathi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Nkqu nomntakwenu, noba ngunyana okanye intombi, mhlawumbi umfazi wakho omthandayo, noba sisihlobo sakho esisenyongweni, singakulukuhla sikukhuthaze ngasese ngelithi: ‘Masiye kunqula thixo bambi’ – thixo abo ongabaziyo nabangazange banqulwe nangooyihlo-mkhulu," 
Deuteronomy13:7 oothixo bezizwe eziningqongileyo okanye abo bezizwe ezisekudeni. 
Deuteronomy13:8 Kambe ke ungaze umqhelisele nakancinci; ungamphulaphuli. Ungaze ube nalusini nanceba kuye; ungaze umqume. 
Deuteronomy13:9 Mbulale nya; mayibe nguwe kanye ophambili, baze ke nabanye bakulandele." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Ewe, mgibisele ngamatye umbulale, kuba ebezama ukukuqweqwedisa, khon' ukuze umlahle uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho owakukhulula ulikhoboka eJiputa." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Aya kuthi ke akuyiva loo nto, atsho onke amaSirayeli oyike, kungaze kubekho mntu phakathi kwenu ulenzayo isikizi elinjalo." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Xa senihlala kwezo zixeko aniphe zona uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, kungenzeka nive" 
Deuteronomy13:13 ukuba kukho zinkewu zilulahlekisileyo uhlanga apho esixekweni, zisithi: ‘Masiye kunqula abanye oothixo’ – thixo abo eningabaziyo." 
Deuteronomy13:14 Nakuba niluvile ke umingi-mingi olunjalo, luphandeni ngokucokisekileyo; nithi ke ukuba luyinyani, kwaye kucace mhlophe ukuba ngenene likho isikizi elinjalo elenzekileyo," 
Deuteronomy13:15 ze nibabulale bonke abemi beso sixeko ndawonye nemfuyo yabo. Ewe, vuthululani konke kutshabalale." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Ziqokeleleni zonke izinto ezizezâbo bantu, nizifumbe ebaleni lembutho. Watshiseni onke loo maxhoba ndawonye nesixeko eso, nenzele uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu umnikelo otshiswayo. Mayisale ilinxuwa nanini nanini, ingaze iphinde yakhiwe." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Ningabokuzishiyela nento le kwebezimiselwe ukutshatyalaliswa. Ukuba niyenzile ke loo nto uNdikhoyo uya kwetha emsindweni wakhe, abe novelwano ngani. Ngenene wosikwa yinceba, anandise ngokwesithembiso sesifungo sakhe kooyihlo-mkhulu" 
Deuteronomy13:18 xa nithe nayithobela imiyalelo yakhe endinimisele yona namhlanje, nakwenza konke akufunayo uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu.”" 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Nina ningabantwana *bakaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, ngoko ke ze ningaziqaphuli okanye nibe nendawo eniyichebayo entloko xa nizilela abangasekhoyo, njengoko zisenza ezinye iintlanga." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Kaloku nina niyimilowo kaNdikhoyo ncakasana; kuzo zonke izizwe zehlabathi nina waninyula ukuba nibe libango lakhe.” 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Yonke into athi *uNdikhoyo lisikizi ze ningayityi. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Nazi izinto enivumelekileyo ukuba nizitye: inkomo, igusha, ibhokwe," 
Deuteronomy14:5 inxala, ibhadi, imbabala, itshabangqa, inqu, neula," 
Deuteronomy14:6 naso nasiphi na isilwanyana esimpuphu zicandiweyo, futhi sisetyisa." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Isilwanyana emasityiwe sesineempuphu ezicandiweyo, esetyisayo. Yona inkamela, umvundla, nembila, azityiwa. Zona azihlambulukanga, kuba ziyetyisa, kodwa iimpuphu zazo azicandwanga." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Ngokunjalo nehagu ayityiwa, kuba nayo ayihlambulukanga; kaloku iimpuphu zayo zicandiwe, kodwa ayetyisi. Ezi zilwanyana ke ze ningazityi, futhi nezidumbu zazo ningaze nizichukumise." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Zonke iindidi zeentlanzi ezinamaphiko namaxolo ningazitya. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Kambe ke yonke into ehlala emanzini ingenawo amaphiko namaxolo sanukuyitya, *inomlaza." 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Zonke iintaka ezihlambulukileyo ningazitya. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Kambe ke nazi ezingàtyiwayo: ukhozi, isikhova, ukhetshe, intambanane, untloyiya, ixhalanga, ihlungulu, inciniba, ingabangaba, ukhwalimanzi, udebeza, ingwamza, isihulu-hulu, ubhobhoyi, nelulwane – zonke ezi nezifana nazo."

Deuteronomy14:16  
Deuteronomy14:17  
Deuteronomy14:18  
Deuteronomy14:19 Zonke izinambuzane ezibhabhayo ezingahlambulukanga mazingatyiwa. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Kambe ke ezihlambulukileyo ningazitya. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Isilwanyana esifileyo asityiwa. Kambe ke zona iintlanga eziphakathi kwenu zingasitya, okanye ningasithengisa nakubahambi. Ke nina niyimilowo kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu – abantu bakhe ncakasana. “Ningaze nipheke itakane ngobisi lukanina.”" 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Kufuneka nisibekele bucala isishumi – oko kukuthi isahlulo seshumi kuyo yonke imveliso yakho yamasimi minyaka le. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Ngoko ke wosithatha isishumi eso, uye naso kulaa ndawo inyulwe *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho ukuze lizinze khona igama lakhe, usityele khona phambi kwakhe – noba yingqolowa, iwayini entsha, amafutha omnquma, okanye amazibulo enkomo noba ngawegusha. Le nto ke noyenza khon' ukuze nifunde ukuhlala nimhlonela uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Xa kunokwenzeka ukuba ithi kanti indawo leyo yonqulo ikude gqitha kumakhaya enu, ukuba nibe nako ukuthwala imveliso leyo anithamsanqele ngayo uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, niye nayo kuyo, ze nenjenje:" 
Deuteronomy14:25 Yithengiseni imveliso leyo, nize nithathe imali leyo, niye nayo apho kwindawo yonqulo." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Ze nifike nithenge ngayo nokuba yintoni na – ingayinkomo, igusha, iwayini, noba yenye into eselwayo, nantoni na eniyinqwenelayo. Nothi ke apho phambi koNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nihlale kunye neentsapho zenu, nixhamle ezo zidlo nonwabile." 
Deuteronomy14:27 “Ningaze nibalahle abaLevi abahlala phakathi kwenu; kaloku bona abanamhlaba. 
Deuteronomy14:28 Njalo ekupheleni konyaka wesithathu, thathani isishumi semveliso yenu, nisigcine kwezo ndawo nihlala kuzo." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Esi yoba sisabelo sabaLevi njengoko bengenamhlaba bona, ndawonye nabangeneleli, iinkedama, nabahlolokazi abahlala phakathi kwenu. Kofuneka beze bathathe batye banele. Le nto ke yenzeni khon' ukuze uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu anithamsanqele kuyo yonke into eniyenzayo.”" 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Njalo ekupheleni konyaka wesixhenxe iya kuba lithuba lokucinywa kwamatyala. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Le nto ke noyenza ngolu hlobo: Nabani na obeboleke uwabo ulutho kufuneka alicime elo tyala, angabi sayithatha loo nto, kuba lithuba lokucinywa kwamatyala elimiselwe *nguNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Yona into oyibanjwa yintlanga ungayibiza, kodwa oyibanjwa ngumwenu ungabi sayithatha." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Ke yena uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uya kunithamsanqela kwelo lizwe aninika lona, kangangokuba kungabikho namnye umntu olihlwempu," 
Deuteronomy15:5 ukuba ngaba nithe namthobela nazinyamekela ukuzenza zonke izinto endiniyalele zona namhlanje. 
Deuteronomy15:6 UNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uya kunithamsanqela ngokwesithembiso sakhe. Niya kuba nako ukubolekisa ezizweni, kodwa nina ngokwenu ningaboleki nto mntwini. Niya kuba namagunya phezu kwezizwe, kodwa nina akukho sizwe siya kuba namagunya phezu kwenu." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Kwelo lizwe aninika lona uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, ukuba kuthe kwakho umwenu dolophini ithile osweleyo, uze ungavimbi usifinyeze isandla sakho, wale ukumnceda." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Ndaweni yaloo nto uze ube nezinwe, umboleke umncede kangangoko eswele." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Uze ungali ukumboleka into ngenxa yokuba sowukufuphi unyaka wokucinywa kwamatyala. Into enjalo yinkohlakalo; uze ungayivumeli ingene nokungena oku engqondweni yakho. Xa uthe wala ukumnceda, yena uya kubhenela kuNdikhoyo, uze ke wena ube netyala." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Yiba nezinwe, umphe ungakrokri; ke yena uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho uya kukuthamsanqela kuyo yonke into oyenzayo." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Baya kusoloko bekhona abahlelelekileyo; ngoko ke ndiyaniyala ukuba ze nibe nezinwe ngakumawenu nakwabahlelelekileyo namahlwempu apho kwelo lizwe lenu.” 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Xa umwenu umHebhere okanye umHebherekazi ethe wathengiswa kuwe, walikhoboka lakho, aze akusebenzele iminyaka ibe mithandathu, uze umkhulule ngowesixhenxe." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Ekumkhululeni kwakho ke, uze ungamndululi ungamnikanga nto." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Uze ube nezinwe, umphe kwizinto othamsanqelwe ngazo *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho: iigusha, ingqolowa, newayini." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Khumbula ukuba nawe wawukhe walikhoboka kwelaseJiputa, waza uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho wakukhulula. Kungoko ndikunika lo myalelo namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy15:16 “Kambe ke xa ikhoboka lakho lisithi: ‘Andifuni kukhululeka ndikushiye,’ lisitsho kuba likuthanda, kuba lanelisekile nguwe nekhaya lakho," 
Deuteronomy15:17 uze ulithathe ulise elucangweni lwendlu yakho, uligqoboze iindlebe ngenyatyhowa. Ngolo hlobo ke loba likhoboka lakho bonke ubomi balo. Yoba seso ke nakwikhoboka elibhinqileyo." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Uze ungakhathazeki xa kufuneka ukhulule ikhoboka lakho; kaloku lona likusebenzele iminyaka emithandathu ngesiqingatha sexabiso obuya kulihlawula xa ubuliqeshile. Ukuba wenza ngale ndlela ke uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho uya kukuthamsanqela kuko konke okwenzayo.” 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Onke amazibulo angamaduna eenkomo naweegusha ayinxaxheba *kaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho; ezi nkomo uze ungazisebenzisi, ngokunjalo neegusha ungazichebi." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Minyaka le ke uya kuwathatha uye nawo kwindawo anqulelwa kuyo uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, ufike uwaxhele uwatyele khona nosapho lwakho." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Kambe ke xa kukho elinesiphako kula mazibulo, noba liyaqhwalela, mhlawumbi liyimfama, okanye linaso nasiphi na isiphako, uzungamenzeli idini ngalo uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Elinjalo ungalixhela ulityele ekhaya. Xa ninonke, nihlambulukile ningahlambulukanga, ningalitya kwanjengokuba nisitya inxala okanye imbabala." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kambe ke lona igazi lalo sukulitya, koko lichithe phantsi okwamanzi.”" 
Deuteronomy16:1 “*UNdikhoyo uThixo wakho uze umzimase ngokwenza umbhiyozo *wePasika ngenyanga ka-Abhibhi. Kaloku yena wakukhulula ngabusukwazana buthile ngayo le nyanga kwelaseJiputa. 
Deuteronomy16:2 Ngoko ke ngaloo mini uzuye kuloo ndawo yokunqula yalathwe nguNdikhoyo ukuzinzisa igama lakhe, ufike wenze idini ngegusha okanye inkomo, usenzela uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho isidlo sePasika." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Kweli theko ke isonka uzusitye singanyuswanga. Iintsuku ezisixhenxe ke uzusebenzise isonka esinganyuswanga, kwanjengokuba wênzayo ukumka kwakho eJiputa buphuthu-phuthu. Yitya eso sonka ke – sona kothiwa sisonka seenzingo – khon' ukuze ungaze uyilibale nanini na imini owaphuma ngayo eJiputa." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Isithuba seentsuku ezisixhenxe ke kofuneka kungabikho namnye apho kwelo lizwe lakho ugcina igwele endlwini yakhe. Inyama yaloo nto ixhelwe ngolo rhatya lokuqala ize ityiwe igqitywe kwangobo busuku. 
Deuteronomy16:5 “Izinto ozixhelela eli theko lePasika uzuzixhelele phaya endaweni eyalathwe nguNdikhoyo, eli theko ungalenzeli kwenye indawo apho kwelo lizwe ulinikwa nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. Idini lePasika uzulenze ngongcwalazi selitshona ilanga, xesha elo wathi waphuma ngalo eJiputa." 
Deuteronomy16:6  
Deuteronomy16:7 Inyama leyo ke uzuyojele apho endaweni yonqulo, uyityele khona, nize nibuyele kwezo ndawo nihlala kuzo." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Ngezo ntsuku zintandathu zilandelayo ke uzutye isonka esinganyuswanga; ngolu lwesixhenxe ke kofuneka ungaphathi msebenzi, koko nihlangane ninqule uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu.”" 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Ukusuka kwixesha oqale ngalo ukuvuna uzubale iiveki zibe sixhenxe," 
Deuteronomy16:10 uze ke wenze umsitho wokubhiyozela ulibo, usenzela *uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. Le nto ke uzuyenze ngokuzisa iminikelo yezinwe zakho ngokobungakanani beentsikelelo akunike zona." 
Deuteronomy16:11 “Uze wonwabe ube nemihlali phambi koNdikhoyo uThixo wakho: wena, nabantwana bakho, nezicaka, nabaLevi, nabangeneleli, neenkedama, nabahlolokazi eninabo kwelo lizwe lenu. Lo msitho ke mawenzelwe kuloo ndawo yonqulo yalathwe nguNdikhoyo ukuzinzisa igama lakhe." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Yithobele ngenyameko le mimiselo, ukhumbula ukuba nawe wawukhe walikhoboka kwelaseJiputa.”" 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Emva kokuba uyibhulile ingqolowa wayikhama nediliya, uze wenze umsitho wamaphempe iintsuku zibe sixhenxe." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Ngelo thuba ke yonwaba ube nemihlali, wena, nabantwana bakho, nezicaka, nabaLevi, nabangeneleli, neenkedama, nabahlolokazi abaphakathi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Menzele umsitho *uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho ngokubhiyoza iintsuku zibe sixhenxe endaweni yonqulo eyalathwe nguye. Uzuvuye wonwabe, kuba kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho uwuthamsanqele umsebenzi wakho watsho ngesivuno esincomekayo." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Kathathu ngonyaka onke amadoda esi sizwe kufuneka aye kunqula uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho kuloo ndawo yalathwe nguye: *ngePasika, ngomsitho wolibo, nangomsitho wamaphempe. Indoda nganye kufuneka ize inento eyiphetheyo" 
Deuteronomy16:17 ngokobungakanani bamathamsanqa ewaphiwe nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho.” 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Kufuneka isizwe ngasinye simiselwe abalamli namanye amagosa kuzo zonke iidolophu zelo lizwe ulinikwa nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. La madoda ke kufuneka alawule abantu angakhethi buso. 
Deuteronomy16:19 Kufuneka angabugqwethi ubulungisa, angabi nagobe xa esenza izigqibo, angazamkeli izicengo, kuba izipho ezihamba nezicengo zimfamekisa namehlo ezilumko, ngokunjalo namadoda anyanisekileyo atsho enze izigqibo ezingafanelekanga." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Maxa onke kufuneka kulawule ubulungisa bodwa phakathi kwenu, khon' ukuze niphile nilimé elo lizwe nilinikwa nguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu.”" 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Xa usenzela *uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho iqonga uze ungemisi mthi umele *isithixokazi uAshera ecaleni kwalo. 
Deuteronomy16:22 Uzungamisi nantsika yalitye, kuba úyichasile loo nto uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Ungaze uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho umenzele idini ngenkomo okanye igusha enesiphako, kuba ilisikizi kuye into enjalo." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Xa uthe weva ukuba kwenye yeedolophu zenu kukho indoda okanye umfazi owenza ububi ngokutyeshela umnqophiso kaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho," 
Deuteronomy17:3 akreqe akhonze *thixo bambi, okanye anqule ilanga, inyanga, noba ziinkwenkwezi – zinto ezo zinxamnye nomyalelo kaNdikhoyo –" 
Deuteronomy17:4 ingxelo enjalo uzuyiphande ude ubufumane ubunyani bayo. Ukuba yinyani ukuba ububi obunjalo buhlile kwaSirayeli," 
Deuteronomy17:5 loo mntu ubenzileyo uzumthathe umkhuphele ngaphandle kwedolophu, umxulube ngamatye ade afe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Kambe ke angábulawa kuphela xa kukho abantu ababini nangaphezulu abanobu bungqina ngaye; kanti ke akanakubulawa ngobungqina bomntu omnye kuphela. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Kananjalo abantu abaya kuphosa amatye okuqala ngamangqina lawo, aze ke alandelwe ngabo bonke abanye abantu. Ngaloo ndlela ke woba ubuncothule ububi phakathi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Xa abalamli besoyiswa ngamatyala athile, nokuba ngawokwenzakalisa, ngaweembambano, okanye awokuhlasela, makaziswe kuloo ndawo yalathwe nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Umcimbi lowo uzuwubhekise kubabingeleli babaLevi ngokunjalo nomlamli osesikhundleni ngelo thuba, bawuphicothe bawugwebe umcimbi." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Bakuba bezivakalisile ke izimvo zabo uzuhambe ngazo, ungaphambuki nakancinane kuzo." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Uzusamkele ke isigwebo sabo, uhambe ngokwemiqathango abakunike yona, ungaphumi ecaleni." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Nabani na ongamthobeliyo umlamli okanye umbingeleli omisiweyo makabulawe, ukuze ngaloo ndlela buncothulwe ububi kwaSirayeli." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Wonke ubani uya kuthi akuyiva loo nto atsho oyike, kungabi sabakho bani ungomnye uphinda enze into enjalo.”" 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Wakuba ungenile wada wazinza kwelo lizwe uliphiwa *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, uya kuthi: ‘Nathi masibe nokumkani kwanjengezinye izizwe ezisingqongileyo.’" 
Deuteronomy17:15 Qinisekisa ke ukuba loo ndoda uyikhethela ukuba ibe ngukumkani yileyo inyulwe *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. Umntu omawumkhethe ngumntwan' othuthu, ingabi yintlanga." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Ke ukumkani lowo makangazifuneli mhlambi wamahashe ukomeleza umkhosi wakhe, angaze athumele abantu eJiputa ukuba baye kumthengela amahashe, kuba kaloku uNdikhoyo wayalela wathi: ‘AmaSirayeli makangaze abuyele eJiputa.’" 
Deuteronomy17:17 Ukumkani makangabi nabafazi baninzi, kuba loo nto ingamenza akreqe kuNdikhoyo; kananjalo makangaziqwebeli butyebi basiliva nagolide." 
Deuteronomy17:18 “Ukumkani lowo ke akungena esihlalweni sakhe makazenzele incwadi yomthetho ngokuthatha amazwi aleyo yamandulo igcinwe ngababingeleli bakwaLevi. 
Deuteronomy17:19 Le ncwadi ke aze angahlukani nayo. Kubo bonke ubomi bakhe makahlale eyifunda, khon' ukuze afunde ukumhlonela uNdikhoyo uThixo wakhe, awathobele amazwi alo mthetho, ayenze imimiselo yawo." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Le nto ke iya kumnceda, khon' ukuze angazenzi bhetele kunamawabo, angayityesheli nakancinane imiyalelo kaNdikhoyo. Ngaloo ndlela ke uya kulawula iminyaka emininzi, ngokunjalo nenzala yakhe iya kulawula kwaSirayeli izizukulwana ngezizukulwana.”" 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Indlu kaLevi yona ngababingeleli; ayiyi kuzuza sabelo nalifa njengamanye amaSirayeli, ndaweni yaloo nto ilifa layo ngamadini atshiswayo anikelwa *kuNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy18:2 AbaLevi abazukunikwa sabelo njengezinye izindlu; kaloku esabo isabelo nelifa bubudlelwane noNdikhoyo ngokwesithembiso sakhe. 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Nanini na kusenziwa idini ngenkomo noba yigusha, ababingeleli inxaxheba yabo ngumkhono, intloko, nolusu." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Ulibo lwengqolowa, nolwewayini, nolwamafutha omnquma, noloboya, yoba yinxaxheba yabo." 
Deuteronomy18:5 KumaSirayeli ephela uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho wanyula uLevi nendlu yakhe ukuba abuse kwezobubingeleli nanini nanini. 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Nawuphi na umLevi, noba uhlala phi na apho kwaSirayeli, ukuba uyafuna, angaya kulaa ndawo yalathwe nguNdikhoyo," 
Deuteronomy18:7 abuse uNdikhoyo uThixo wakhe njengabo bonke abaLevi abasebenza khona. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Naye ke makafumane inxaxheba ekwangangaleyo izuzwa ngabanye ababingeleli, nangona anenzuzo ayifumene ngokuthengiswa kwempahla yakowabo.”" 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Wakufika ke kwelo lizwe uliphiwa *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, uze ungawalinganisi amasiko amanyumnyezi alandelwa zizizwe zakhona." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Ungaze uthathe unyana wakho okanye intombi yakho wenze ngaye idini elitshiswayo; abantu bakuni mabangaze bavumise, okanye bambulule, mhlawumbi bachile," 
Deuteronomy18:11 okanye bakhafule, bangayisebenzisi nemilingo, okanye baqhakamshelane nabangasekhoyo." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Kaloku abantu abenza iintlondi ezinje banezothe kuNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. Ziintlondi ezilolu hlobo ezabangela ukuba azigxothe iintlanga zelaa lizwe ekungeneni kwenu. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Hlala umsulwa phambi koNdikhoyo uThixo wakho.” 
Deuteronomy18:14 “Kwelo lizwe uya kulo abantu obagxotha khona bayavumisa bambulule, kodwa ke wena *uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho akafuni uyenze loo nto." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Ndaweni yaloo nto uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho uya kuvelisa *umshumayeli ofana nam lo, ophuma kwakumawenu. Uzuncede ke umthobele." 
Deuteronomy18:16 “Kaloku mhla nanihlangene kwintaba iHorebhe nandibongoza nisithi: ‘Asisakulangazeleli ukuba uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu athethe nathi yena siqu, asisathandi ukubona umlilo odiza ubukho bakhe, kuba soyika ukuthi mhlawumbi sife.’" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Waza wathi kum uNdikhoyo: ‘Sihle isicelo sabo. 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ndiya kubanika umshumayeli ophuma kwakubo, afane nawe lo. Ke yena amazwi am aya kuphuma ngomlomo wakhe, aze abaxelele yonke imimiselo yam." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Uya kuthetha egameni lam; ke mna ndiya kumohlwaya nabani na ongawathobeliyo amazwi am. 
Deuteronomy18:20 Ke yena umshumayeli ongomnye, ozigwagwisa ngokuthi uthetha egameni lam ndingamthumanga, wobulawa. Koba kwangokunjalo nakoshumayela egameni *loothixo abangabambi.’" 
Deuteronomy18:21 “Mhlawumbi ningaxakwa, nithi: ‘Soluqonda njani na udaba ukuba alululo olukaNdikhoyo?’" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Ukuba umshumayeli uthetha egameni likaNdikhoyo ize ingenzeki loo nto ayithethileyo, nomqonda ukuba udaba lwakhe aluphumi kuNdikhoyo, koko uyazithethela nje; ngoko ke sanukuziduba ngaye.”" 
Deuteronomy19:1 “Akuba ke *uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho ezitshabalalisile ezo zizwe zimhlaba wazo awupha wena, naza nazigxotha nema kwiidolophu zazo ngokunjalo nemizi yazo," 
Deuteronomy19:2 lahlule kathathu elo lizwe, kummandla ngamnye ukhethe idolopu efikeleleka lula, uzilungise iindlela eziya kuyo. Úya kuthi ke umntu obulele omnye abe nokuphephela kwenye yazo, afumane ukukhuseleka." 
Deuteronomy19:3  
Deuteronomy19:4 Inkqubo iya kuhamba ngolu hlobo: Umntu obulele omnye ngengozi, engelotshaba lwakhe, wobalekela kwenye yazo ukuze asinde." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Ukuba abantu ababini baphumile baya kutheza ehlathini, waza ke wathi omnye wabo esagawula umthi lasuka lapoqa izembe lakhe laza lamenzakalisa wafa omnye lowo, lo ebegawula makaphephele kwenye yezo dolophu ukuzisindisa." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Xa umgama ekufuneka uhanjwe ngulowo ubalekayo umde, isizalwane esingumphindezeli soba nako ukumfumana lo ubuleleyo engekafiki, simbulale nakuba engenatyala yena ngokwakhe. Andithi na kaloku umbulele ngengozi lo mntu engelotshaba lwakhe!" 
Deuteronomy19:7 Kungenxa yeso sizathu ke le nto ndikuyalela ukuba umise iidolophu zibe ntathu. 
Deuteronomy19:8 “Xa uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho ethe walandisa elo lizwe lakho, wakongezela wonke umhlaba awuthembise ookhokho bakho efunga," 
Deuteronomy19:9 kofuneka uphinde ukhethe nezinye iidolophu zibe ntathu. Uzukwenze ke konke endikuyaleleyo namhlanje, ubonakalise ukumthanda uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, uhlale uziphatha ngokweemfundiso zakhe." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Ezi dolophu ziyimfuneko, khon' ukuze abantu abamsulwa bangabi loxhoba lokubulawa kwelo lizwe uliphiwa nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Kambe ke xa umntu elalele umwabo amthiyileyo wamgebenga engacingele nto, waza wabalekela kwenye yezi dolophu," 
Deuteronomy19:12 amadoda amakhulu aloo dolophu yakhe makamlande, amnikezele kwisizalwane sikamfi esingumphindezeli, size sisibulale isigebenga eso." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Umntu onjalo sukuba natarhu mpela kuye. Ubugebenga mabutshayelwe buphele tu kwaSirayeli, khon' ukuze nihlale ngoxolo.”" 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Ungaze uwuhlehlise umlimandlela wentsimi yommelwane wakho. Kaloku wona wamiswa ngamanyange mandulo kwelo lizwe uliphiwe *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho.” 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Ingqina elinye alanele xa umntu ebekwa ityala, nokuba wone kanjani na. Ubutyala bommangalelwa kufuneka bumelwe ngamangqina amabini okanye amathathu." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Ukuba umntu okhohlakeleyo uzama ukudyobha omnye ngetyala," 
Deuteronomy19:17 bobabini mabasiwe phambi *koNdikhoyo endaweni yonqulo, ityala elo liphicothwe ngababingeleli nabagwebi abasesikhundleni." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Abagwebi mabenze uphando olunzulu, baze bathi xa befumanisa ukuba ummangali lo umdyoba nje uwabo lo," 
Deuteronomy19:19 bohlwaye ummangali lowo ngesohlwayo ebelindele ukuba siya kunikwa ummangalelwa lowo. Ngale ndlela ke wobutshayela ububi buphele phakathi kwenu. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Baya kuthi ke abanye abantu bakuyiva le nto yenzekileyo batsho boyike, kungabi sabakho mntu uphinda ayenze into enjalo." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Ewe, uzungabi natarhu mpela; isohlwayo sibe bubomi ngobomi, iliso ngeliso, izinyo ngezinyo, isandla ngesandla, nonyawo ngonyawo.”" 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Xa uthe waphuma usiya kulwa notshaba, waza wabona ukuba lona luneenqwelo namahashe, nomkhosi walo ungaphezulu kowakho, sukoyika. *UNdikhoyo uThixo wakho owakukhupha eJiputa uya kuba nawe." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Phambi kokuba uhlasele makuze umbingeleli, afike athi apho emkhosini:" 
Deuteronomy20:3 ‘Hoyina, maSirayeli! Namhla ilizwe lifile! Kambe ke sanukuba nantaka, ningabi nadyudyu! Musan' ukuphaphazela!" 
Deuteronomy20:4 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uya kuba nani; nguye oza kunilwela anithwes' uloyiso.’ 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Ke zona iinduna ziya kubhekisa emkhosini zithi: ‘Ngaba kukho ndoda na apha kuni esandula ukwakha indlu, kodwa ingekayivuli? Xa kunjalo ke lowo makabuy' umva agoduke. Kungenjalo, xa athe akabuya emfazweni, loo ndlu yakhe iya kuvulwa mntu wumbi." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Ngaba kukho indoda esandula ukutyala isidiliya, kodwa ingekavuni kuso? Xa kunjalo ke leyo mayibuy' umva; kungenjalo, xa ithe ayabuya emfazweni, loo wayini yayo iya kuxhanyulwa mntu wumbi." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Ngaba kukho indoda elobolayo na apha phakathi kwenu? Xa ikho mayibuye umva; hleze ithi xa kwenzekile ayabuya emfazweni, lowo owayeza kuba ngumkayo atshatwe yindoda yimbi.’" 
Deuteronomy20:8 “Kwakhona iinduna ziya kubuzisa zithi: ‘Ngaba kukho indoda enentliziyo kanina na apha? Xa kunjalo ke mayibuy' umva, hleze isulele namanye.’" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Ziya kuthi ke zakukhov' ukwenjenjalo iinduna ezo, ibutho ngalinye limiselwe izinxiba-mxhaka zalo." 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Xa uya kuhlasela isixeko, abemi baso qala ubaphe ithuba lokuzinikezela." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Xa bathe bavula amasango bezinikezela, bonke baya kuba zizicaka zakho bakusebenzele." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Kambe ke xa abemi abo bengafuni kunikezela, bekhetha ukulwa, umkhosi wakho mawusingqinge eso sixeko." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Akuba ekuvulele ke uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho ukuba uhlasele, tshabalalisa yonke into eyindoda apho." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Kambe ke ungabathimba abafazi, nabantwana, nemfuyo, nako konke okulapho kweso sixeko. Ungayisebenzisa yonke into elixhoba oyithimbe kolo tshaba lwakho; uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho ukuphile." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Uya kwenjenjalo ke xa usilwa nezixeko ezikude, nditsho ezingezizo ezeentlanga eziningqongileyo." 
Deuteronomy20:16 “Kodwa ke xa uhlasela isixeko esikwakwelo lizwe uliphiwa nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, uzubulale konke nje." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Vuthulula utshabalalise wonke umntu: amaHiti, ama-Amori, amaKanana, amaPerezi, amaHivi, namaJebhusi, ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Batshabalaliseni khon' ukuze banganiwexuleli ekumoneni uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, banifundise ezaa ndlela zabo zimasikizi bazinqula ngazo *izithixo zabo." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Xa uhlasela isixeko, sukuyigawula imithi yaso yeziqhamo, noba ungade usingqinge ixesha elide kangakanani na. Ungazitya iziqhamo ezo, kodwa ke ungayitshabalalisi yona imithi. Kungani uhlasele imithi ingelotshaba lwakho nje!" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Ke yona eminye imithi ungayigawula uyisebenzise ekwaphulen' iimpondo eso sixeko ulwa naso.” 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Xa sewukwelo lizwe uza kuliphiwa *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, waza wafumana umntu enzakaliswe wafa engaphandle komzi, ube wena ungazi ukuba ubulewe ngubani na," 
Deuteronomy21:2 kufuneka amadoda amakhulu nabagwebi baye kuloo ndawo afele kuyo, bafike balinganise umgama ukusuka kuloo ndawo ukuya kwiidolophu ezikufutshane." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Ke wona amadoda amakhulu aloo dolophu iyeyona ikufuphi kuloo mntu kofuneka akhethe ithokazi lenkomo elingazange lisebenze. 
Deuteronomy21:4 Aya kulithatha ke, aye nalo ngasentlanjeni engatshiyo, apho kungazange kwalinywa, afike alaphule ilungu lentamo." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Ababingeleli bakwaLevi kofuneka babekho nabo apho, kuba ngabo abanyulwe nguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ukuba baqwalasele imicimbi yonqulo, baze bathamsanqele egameni likaNdikhoyo, bade baphicothe bagwebe kwimibandela yeembambano nobugwinta." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Onke ke amadoda amakhulu aloo dolophu ikufuphi kufuneka ahlambe izandla phezu kwelo thokazi laphulwe ilungu lentamo," 
Deuteronomy21:7 athi: ‘Akagetyengwanga sithi lo mntu, futhi asimazi nomntu oyenzileyo le ntlekele." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Awu, Ndikhoyo, nceda, waxolele amaSirayeli owawahlangula eJiputa. Lala ngenxeba usixolele, ungalibeki phezu kwethu eli tyala legazi elimsulwa.’" 
Deuteronomy21:9 Xa wenze ngokwalo mmiselo kaNdikhoyo ke, uya kuba uzihlambile kwityala lobugebenga.”" 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Xa uNdikhoyo ekunike uloyiso emfazweni, waza wanabantu obathimbayo," 
Deuteronomy21:11 kungenzeka apho kwâbo bantu wena ubone inzwakazi, uze unqwenele ukuyithatha. Yithathe," 
Deuteronomy21:12 uyise emzini wakho, ifike igugule intloko, inqumle iinzipho," 
Deuteronomy21:13 ikhulule izambatho efike nazo. Emva koko ke mayihlale apho, izilele ikhaya layo ngokunjalo nabazali bayo isithuba esingangenyanga, wandule ke ukuyithatha ibe ngumkakho." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Kamva ke, xa ungasayifuni, yikhulule ihambe iye apho ithande khona. Kaloku uyenze umkakho; ngoko ke akunalungelo lakuyithengisa ibe likhoboka.”" 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Ukuba indoda inabafazi ababini, omnye imthanda kunomnye, baza ke bobabini bazala oonyana, kwaza kwathi kanti lo ulizibulo akanguye owomfazi oyintandane," 
Deuteronomy21:16 ngoku ke xa le ndoda ifuna ukubabela ilifa layo, mayingabi nagobe ngokubhekiselele kulo nyana womfazi oyintandane, imnike inxaxheba yonyana wamazibulo." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Unyana wamazibulo makanikwe ilifa eliphindwe kabini, nokuba akazalwa ngumfazi oyintandane. Kaloku nguye oluphawu lwamandla kayise. Ilungelo lenkulu lelakhe.”" 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Xa indoda inonyana onenkani, oyinjubaqa, ongevayo naxa selelulekwa ngabazali bakhe," 
Deuteronomy21:19 kufuneka abazali abo bamthathe bamse enkundleni kumadoda amakhulu edolophu leyo. 
Deuteronomy21:20 Baya kuthetha benjenje: ‘Lo nyana wethu unenkani, uyinjubaqa; akasiphulaphuli. Ulidla-kudla, futhi ulinxila.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Amadoda edolophu leyo makamxulube ngamatye ade afe, khon' ukuze buncothulwe ububi phakathi kwenu. Aya kuthi ke amaSirayeli akuyiva le nto ihlileyo atsho oyike.”"
