Deuteronomy21:22 “Xa indoda ithe inetyala yagwetyelwa ukufa, yaza ke yabulawa yaxhonywa emthini," 
Deuteronomy21:23 makungade kuse isaxhonyiwe. Mayithulwe ingcwatywe kwangaloo mini; kaloku umntu oxhonywe emthini uqalekisiwe nguThixo. Ngoko ke mawungcwatywe umzimba, khon' ukuze *ungagqwaliseki umhlaba owuphiwe *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Ukuba ubhaqa inkomo okanye igusha yomwenu ilahleka, sukuyijonga nje, koko yinqande uyigoduse." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Kodwa ke ukuba umniniyo uhlala kude okanye akuyazi ukuba yekabani na, yithathe uyigcine kwakho. Akufika ke umniniyo eyifuna mnike." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Yenza kwaloo nto nokuba yidonki okanye yimpahla yokunxiba oyicholeyo, nayo nantoni na yomwenu elahlekileyo." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Ukuba idonki okanye inkomo yomwenu ibuthisile, sukugqitha nje; mncedise niyiphakamise." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Abafazi mabanganxibi iimpahla zamadoda, ngokunjalo namadoda makangazinxibi iimpahla zabafazi, kuba abantu abenza imikhuba elolo hlobo banezothe kuNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Ukuba ubonisele intaka emthini okanye phantsi, waza wafumanisa ukuba imazi leyo iyafukama okanye inamathole, sukuyibamba uyithathe imazi leyo." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Amathole wona ungawathatha, kodwa ke yena unina myeke, khon' ukuze uxhamle ubomi obude obunenkqubela." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Xa usakha indlu yenzele ungqameko apha emaphethelweni ephahla, khon' ukuze ungabi natyala lakubulala xa umntu ewe khona waza wafa." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Entsimini olime kuyo idiliya sukulima nesinye isityalo, hleze ungafumani sivuno kuzo zombini." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Ungaze ubophe inkomo kunye nedonki xa ulimayo. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Ungaze unxibe impahla engumxube, uboya kunye nomchako." 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Impahla yakho yenzele amanquma kumasondo omane.” 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Kungenzeka ukuba indoda izeke, ize kamva idikwe ngumfazi lowo," 
Deuteronomy22:14 imnyelise ngokuthi: ‘Ndamzeka, ndaza ndathi ndakusondela kuye ndabhaqa into yokuba akayontombi.’" 
Deuteronomy22:15 “Kumbandela onje ke abazali bomfazi baya kuthatha ubungqina bobuntombi, baye nabo enkundleni kumadoda amakhulu edolophu leyo." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Wothetha enjenje ke uyise: ‘Lo mfo wathatha le ntombi yam ukuba ibe ngumkakhe; kodwa ngoku udikiwe yiyo. 
Deuteronomy22:17 Uyayityhola ngokuthi: “Kuthe kanti ibingeyontombi.” Kambe ke, nabu ubungqina obudiza ubuntombi bomntwan' am; khangelani, niyayibona le ngubo; injani?’" 
Deuteronomy22:18 Kwesi sithuba ke amadoda amakhulu edolophu leyo aya kuyithatha indoda leyo ayikatse. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Kwangokunjalo indoda leyo iya kuhlawuliswa ikhulu leesiliva, lize linikwe uyise wentombi leyo, kuba le ndoda ihlaze intombi yamaSirayeli. Ngaphezu koko ke, lo mfazi uya kuhlala engumkayo; soze abe nelungelo lokumala nanini na." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Ukuba kuthe kanti akukho bungqina babuntombi kuye," 
Deuteronomy22:21 amadoda amakhulu edolophu leyo aya kumkhupha kowabo, amxulube ngamatye ade afe. Kaloku wenze ihlazo phakathi kwamawabo, wavula ubuhlanti bukayise engendanga. Ngale ndlela ke noba nibuncothule ububi kwaSirayeli.”" 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Xa umfo othile ebhaqwe ekrexeza nomka-mntu, mababulawe bobabini. Ngaloo ndlela ke noba nibuncothule ububi kwaSirayeli." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Xa intombi eyendayo ibhaqwe emzini ihlangene nandoda yimbi," 
Deuteronomy22:24 bobabini mabathathwe bakhutshelwe ngaphandle kwedolophu, baxulutywe ngamatye bade bafe. Intombi le mayibulawe kuba ingenzanga mizamo ikhale, nangona ibingéviwayo. Ke yona indoda le mayibulawe kuba ithathe isondo kwintombi eyendayo. Ngale ndlela ke noba nibuncothule ububi phakathi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Ukuba indoda idlwengule intombi eyendayo besendle, indoda leyo mayibulawe." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Ke yona intombi leyo mayingenziwa nto, kuba ayenzanga sono sifanele ukuba ife. Kaloku eli tyala lifana nelendoda ehlasele enye yayenzakalisa," 
Deuteronomy22:27 kuba le ndoda idlwengule intombi endle, yaza yathi nangona ikhala akwabikho bani ungayincedayo." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Ukuba indoda ibhaqwe idlwengula intombi engendiyo," 
Deuteronomy22:29 loo ndoda mayikhuphe ikhazi eliziisiliva ezimashumi mahlanu, iyithathe loo ntombi ibe ngumkayo. Kaloku izithathele isondo ngenkani; ngoko ke mayingaze yahlukane nayo nanini na." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Makungaze kubekho nyana uzeka umka-yise; ngokwenjenjalo uya kuba uhlazisa uyise.” 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Indoda elithenwa ngokutyunyuzwa, okanye enqunyulwe ubudoda, ize ingabandakanywa nebandla labantu *bakaNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Umntwana wombulo ngokunjalo nenzala yakhe kude kuye kwisizukulwana seshumi maze angabandakanywa nebandla labantu bakaNdikhoyo. 
Deuteronomy23:3 “UmAmon okanye umMowabhi, ngokunjalo nenzala yakhe kude kuye kwisizukulwana seshumi, aze angabandakanywa nebandla labantu bakaNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Kaloku wona ala ukukupha ukutya namanzi ngokuya wawuvela eJiputa; ndaweni yaloo nto aqesha uBhalam unyana kaBhehore, owayephuma kwisixeko iPetore kwelaseMesopotami, ukuba akuqalekise." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Kodwa ke uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho zange amhoye uBhalam lowo; ndaweni yaloo nto wasijika isiqalekiso eso saba yintsikelelo ngenxa yokuba ekuthanda. 
Deuteronomy23:6 Ngalo lonke ixesha uzungaze ube nobudlelwane nezi zizwe okanye ukhuthaze inkqubela yazo. 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Ungaze uwajongele phantsi amaEdom; kaloku uyazalana nawo. NamaJiputa uzungaze uwajongele phantsi; kaloku wawukhe waba ngumphambukeli elizweni lawo. 
Deuteronomy23:8 Wona ukusukela kwisizukulwana sawo sesithathu angabandakanywa nebandla labantu bakaNdikhoyo.” 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Xa umkhosi wakho uphuma usiya kuhlasela utshaba mawuzigcine ungenzi nanye into engavumelekanga. 
Deuteronomy23:10 Ukuba ijoni lithe *lanomlaza ngenxa yokuba lichithe ubudoda lilele, maliphumele ngaphandle, lihlale apho." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Kuya kuthi ke emalanga lihlambe umzimba, lize lithi lakutshona ilanga libuyele kwibutho lalo." 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Kufuneka ube nendawo yangasese ngaphandle qelele kwisikhululo sakho. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Phakathi kwezikrweqe zakho malubekho ulugxa, khon' ukuze uthi xa uye ese uzimbele umngxuma owohlala kuwo." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Kaloku *uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho uhlala kunye nawe, khon' ukuze akukhusele, ube nokuzoyisa iintshaba zakho. Ungaze wenze nto ilihlazo, khon' ukuze angakufulatheli uNdikhoyo.”" 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Xa lithe ikhoboka lamshiya umninilo, labalekela kuwe, sukuligodusa." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Lingahlala nakuyiphi na idolophu eliyithandayo. Malingaphathwa gadalala. 
Deuteronomy23:17 “UmSirayeli, eyindoda okanye engumfazi, makangaze abe lihenyu lokunqula *izithixo." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Nemali efunyenwe ngale ndlela mayingaze iziswe endlwini *kaNdikhoyo uThixo ngenxa yaso nasiphi na isibhambathiso. Kaloku lo mkhwa ulisikizi kuNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Xa umSirayeli eboleke imali, noba kukutya, okanye noba yintoni na kuwe, sukumbiza nzala." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Ungayibiza inzala ngento oyiboleke intlanga, ungayibizi kumwenu. Xa uwuthobele lo myalelo uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho uya kuyithamsanqelisa yonke into oyenzayo kwelo lizwe uya kuma kulo." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Xa wenze isibhambathiso kuNdikhoyo uThixo wakho uzungalibazisi ukusifezekisa. Kaloku uNdikhoyo uyasibanga, ibe ke sisono ukungasiphumezi." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Akulotyala ukungenzi sibhambathiso; 
Deuteronomy23:23 kambe ke, xa usenzile, qiniseka ngokusifezekisa. Kaloku usenze ungàqhutywa mntu." 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Xa uhamba ngomlimandlela wesidiliya somntu, ungáyikha idiliya, uyitye kangangoko ufuna; kodwa uze ungayigaleli ntweni, uhambe nayo." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Ukuba uhamba ngomlimandlela wentsimi yomntu enengqolowa, ungáyikha utye kangangoko ufuna, kodwa ungayisiki ngerhengqe.”" 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Ukuba indoda ithathe umfazi, yaza kamva yakruquka nguye ngenxa yesizathu esithile, kufuneka imbhalele incwadi yokwahlukana, ize imnike, ibe ke iyamgxotha ngolo hlobo." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Xa athe kamva waphinda wathathwa yenye indoda," 
Deuteronomy24:3 yaza nayo yamala yambhalela incwadi yokwahlukana yamgxotha, okanye ke mhlawumbi le ndoda yakhe yesibini isuke yatshaba," 
Deuteronomy24:4 laa ndoda yakhe yokuqala ayinalungelo lokuphinda imthathe. Kaloku ngoku *unomlaza. Xa ingasuka imthathe kwakhona yoba lisikizi elo *kuNdikhoyo. Ngoko ke elo lizwe uliphiwa nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho ungaze *uligqwalise ngamasikizi anjalo.” 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Indoda esandula ukuthath' umfazi mayingaphumi nomkhosi. Nakuwo nawuphi na umsebenzi onjalo mayikhululeke ixesha elingangonyaka, khon' ukuze ihlale ekhaya yonwabe nomkayo." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Xa kukho into oyiboleke omnye umntu, sukumenza abambise ngelitye lakhe lokusila, nditsho nkqu imbokotho; kaloku ngolo hlobo loo mzi ungaba wohluthwe indlela yawo yokwenza ukutya." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Nawuphi na umntu oqweqwedise umSirayeli, waza wamenza ikhoboka lakhe, okanye wamthengisa ukuze abe likhoboka, makabulawe. Ngaloo ndlela ke noba nibuncothule ububi phakathi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Xa kukho umntu ogula sisifo solúsu, yenza ngenyameko kanye ngokwemigqaliselo oyinikwa ngababingeleli; yenza ngokwemiyalelo endabanika yona." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Yikhumbule into awayenzayo *uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho kuMiriyam ngokuya naniphuma kwelaseJiputa. 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Xa kukho into oyiboleke umntu othile, sukungena endlwini yakhe xa uye kulanda impahla abambisa ngayo;" 
Deuteronomy24:11 linda phandle, ibe nguye oyizisayo." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Ukuba lo mntu lihlwempu, le mpahla yakhe ke mayingalali kuwe," 
Deuteronomy24:13 koko yibuyisele kuye ukutshona kwelanga, kuba uyayifuna ngexesha lokulala. Úya kuthamsanqeliswa ke nguloo mntu, nesenzo sakho sibe sesobulungisa emehlweni kaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Isicaka osiqeshileyo esisweleyo sukusiqhatha noba singumSirayeli okanye siyintlanga ehlala kwakwezo dolophu zenu. 
Deuteronomy24:15 Yonke imihla ukutshona kwelanga mhlawule ngomsebenzi wakhe; kaloku loo mali uyayifuna, uqamele ngayo. Xa ungamhlawuli uya kukuxela kuNdikhoyo, uze ke wena ube netyala." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Abazali mabangabulawa ngenxa yamatyala enziwe ngabantwana babo, nabantwana mabangabulawa ngenxa yamatyala enziwe ngabazali babo; umntu makabulawe ngenxa yesono asenze ngokwakhe." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Uzungayigqwethi inyaniso xa kuthethwa ityala labangeneleli neenkedama. Xa umhlolokazi eboleke ulutho, sukuyithatha ingubo yakhe abambisa ngayo." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Kaloku khumbula ukuba nawe wawukhe walikhoboka eJiputa, waza ke uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho wakukhulula; yiloo nto ke ndikunika lo myalelo nje." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Ukuba ushiye isithungu sengqolowa entsimini xa uvunayo, sukuphinda usiphuthume; sesoba sesabangeneleli abahlala phakathi kwenu, neenkedama, nabahlolokazi, khon' ukuze uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho akuthamsanqele kuyo yonke into oyenzayo." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Xa uvuna umnquma, sukubuya ukhwahlaze; lo useleyo woba ngowabangeneleli, neenkedama, nabahlolokazi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Ngokunjalo naxa uvuna idiliya sukukhwahlaza; leyo iseleyo yeyabangeneleli, neenkedama, nabahlolokazi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Mayingaze iphume engqondweni yakho into yokuba nawe wawukhe walikhoboka eJiputa; yiyo loo nto ke mna ndikuyala ngolu hlobo nje. 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Xa amaSirayeli amabini exabene, aza asana enkundleni, omnye wawo ke wafunyaniswa engenatyala, waza ke wagwetywa omnye lo;" 
Deuteronomy25:2 ukuba ugwetywe ikatsi, umgwebi makatsho acanjalaliswe. Inani lemivumbo yakhe loxhomekeka kwelo tyala alenzileyo." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Angákatswa ukuya kwimivumbo emashumi mane, kodwa ke ingadluli apho. Kaloku xa inokuba ngaphezu kwaleyo wòba umthobile umwenu." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Xa usebenzisa inkabi yenkomo ekubhuleni ingqolowa, musa ukuyifaka isicheme.”" 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Ukuba oonyana bomntu omnye bahlala mzini-mnye, aze omnye lo asweleke engenanyana, umhlolokazi lowo kamfi akufuneki athathwe ndoda yamzi wumbi; kaloku luxanduva lomntakwabo-mfi ukumthatha amenze umfazi." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Ke unyana wokuqala abaya kumzala bobabini woba ngunyana kamfi, khon' ukuze umlibo wakhe ungatshitshi kwaSirayeli." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Kambe ke ukuba umntakwabo-mfi lo akafuni kumthatha, umka-mfi makaye kuxelela amadoda amakhulu edolophu leyo, athi: ‘Umntakwabo-mfi akavumi kuwenza umsebenzi wakhe; uyala ukuvelisela umfi inzala phakathi kwamaSirayeli.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Ke wona amadoda amakhulu aya kumbiza athethe naye. “Ukuba ke uphikelela ukwala," 
Deuteronomy25:9 umka-mfi lowo makaye kuye ekho namadoda amakhulu edolophu leyo, afike akhulule isihlangu sakhe, amtshicele ebusweni, athi: ‘Nantso ke into eyenziwayo kumntu ongafuniyo ukuvelisela umntakwabo inzala.’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Jikelele ke kwaSirayeli umzi wakhe uya kwaziwa njengomzi ondoda ikhululelwe isihlangu.” 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Ukuba amadoda amabini ayalwa, aze umfazi wenye azame ukuncedisa indoda yakhe ngokubamba le ilwa nayo ngobudoda," 
Deuteronomy25:12 sukumenzela nceba, mnqumle isandla." 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Xa usebenzisa isilinganiso sukwenza buqhophololo mayela nobunzima nobungakanani. Izilinganiso zakho mazibe zezizizo ngalo lonke ixesha. 
Deuteronomy25:14  
Deuteronomy25:15 Sisebenzise ngokunyaniseka isilinganiso, khon' ukuze uhlale ithuba elide kwelo lizwe akunika lona uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Kaloku banezothe kuNdikhoyo abantu abanobuqhophololo. 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Ungaze uyilibale into enayenziwa ngama-Amaleki ngokuya nanivela eJiputa. 
Deuteronomy25:18 Wona ahlangana nani nidiniwe, niphelelwe ngamandla, aza ababulala bonke abo baberhuqeka ngasemva. Kaloku ayengamoyiki uThixo." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Ngoko ke akuba uNdikhoyo ekuhlangule kuzo zonke iintlanga ezikungqongileyo, waza wawuma umhlaba akunika wona ukuba ube lilifa lakho, uze uwabulale uwatshayele ama-Amaleki atsho alibaleke. Uyabona ke, uze ungaphazami!”" 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Wakuba ungenile wema kwelo lizwe uliphiwa *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho," 
Deuteronomy26:2 umntu ngamnye aze athathe ibhaskiti, afake ulibo lwento nganye ayilimileyo, aye nayo kuloo ndawo yonqulo yalathwe nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho ukuzinzisa igama lakhe." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Akufika ke uya kuya kumbingeleli osesikhundleni ngelo xesha, afike athi kuye: ‘Ngoku ndivakalisa kuNdikhoyo uThixo wam ukuba ndingenile kwelo lizwe wayethembise ngesifungo ukusinika lona koobawo-mkhulu.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Ke yena umbingeleli lowo uya kuyithatha ibhaskiti leyo, ayibeke phambi kweqonga lamadini kaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Apho ke phambi koNdikhoyo uThixo wakho wena uya kucengceleza la mazwi, uthi: ‘Ubawo-mkhulu wayesisibhadu-bhadu esiphaleleyo somAram esafuduka saya kuphambukela kwelaseJiputa. Ewe, babembalwa ukuya kwabo, kodwa babuya sebesisizwe esikhulu esomeleleyo." 
Deuteronomy26:6 AmaJiputa asiphatha gadalala, asinyanzela ukuba sisebenze sibulaleka." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Ke thina sazibika kuNdikhoyo uThixo woobawo-mkhulu. Yena wasiva isikhalo sethu, wakubona oko kubandezeleka, naloo hambo-nzima, ngokunjalo nengcinezelo esasikuyo." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Ngobo bungangamsha naloo mandla akhe ke wasikhupha kwelaseJiputa. Wenza imiqondiso nemimangaliso, wabetha kwehla izinto ezirhwaqelisayo." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Wasithatha ke waza kusibeka apha, wasinika eli lizwe lobisi nobusi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Ngoko ke ngoku, Ndikhoyo, ndikuphathele olu libo lwesivuno somhlaba ondiphe wona.’ “Wakuba utshilo ke, ibhaskiti leyo uya kuyibeka phantsi apho phambi koNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, umnqule." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Ewe, vuya, ube nemincili ngenxa yendyebo wena nendlu yakho akunike yona uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. NabaLevi kunye nabangeneleli abahlala apho phakathi kwenu mababe nenxaxheba apho kulo msitho." 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Njalo kunyaka wesithathu, ongunyaka wezishumi, khupha isishumi sesivuno sakho, usinike abaLevi, nabangeneleli, neenkedama, nabahlolokazi, khon' ukuze bathi xa bebonke, kuzo zonke izixeko, batye banele. Wakuba wenjenjalo ke" 
Deuteronomy26:13 thetha noNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, uthi: ‘Ngoku ke ndiyikhuphile inxaxheba yakho; ndiyiphe abaLevi, nabangeneleli, neenkedama, nabahlolokazi, ngokomyalelo owandinika wona. Ewe, andiphambukanga okanye ndilibale namnye kwimiyalelo yakho ngesishumi." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Andityanga nento le kuso xa ndandizilile; andakhupha nento le kuso kowam umzi xa *ndandinomlaza; futhi andithathanga nento le kuso ndenza idini labangasekhoyo. Ndikuthobele, Ndikhoyo Thixo wam. Ewe, ndenze konke obundiyalele kona mayela nesishumi." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Ngoko ke khawondele ezantsi ukwelo khaya lakho likhethekileyo – izulu – ujonge usapho lwakho amaSirayeli, uwathi jize ngamathamsanqa, ngokunjalo nalo mhlaba usiphe wona. Ewe, yenza ngokwesifungo sakho koobawo-mkhulu – nditsho eso selizwe eliphuphuma ubisi nobusi.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Namhlanje ke *uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uniyalela ukuba niyithobele yonke imimiselo nemithetho yakhe. Ewe, nyanisekani niyithobele ngomxhelo wenu uphela." 
Deuteronomy26:17 “Ngokunjalo ke namhlanje niyivakalisile into yokuba uNdikhoyo nguThixo wenu; futhi nithembisile ukuba niya kumthobela, niyenze imimiselo nemiyalelo nemithetho yakhe." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Kunamhlanje nje ke uNdikhoyo uyivakalisile into yokuba unamkele naba ngabantu bakhe ncakasana ngokwesithembiso sakhe; ngoko ke uyaniyala, uthi yithobeleni imiyalelo yakhe." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Ke yena uya kuniphakamisa, nibe ngaphezu kwazo zonke izizwe awazidalayo, khon' ukuze nityibele nibonga nilizisele udumo nesithozela igama lakhe. Ngenene niya kuba ngabantu bakaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ngokomlomo wakhe.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 UMosis ekunye namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli wathi: “Ze niyithobele yonke imiyalelo endininika yona namhlanje. 
Deuteronomy27:2 Mhla nayiwela iJordan nangena kwelo lizwe niliphiwa *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, ze nimise amatye amakhulu, niwatyabeke ngefutha," 
Deuteronomy27:3 niwabhale kuwo onke amazwi alo mthetho. Xa seniwelile nangena kwelo lizwe lobisi nobusi nalithenjiswa nguNdikhoyo uThixo wooyihlo-mkhulu, la matye ze niwamise kwintaba iEbhali, niwatyabeke ngefutha ngokwalo myalelo ndininika wona namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy27:4  
Deuteronomy27:5 Apho ke ze nakhele uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu iqonga lamadini ngamatye angaqingqwanga ngezixholo zentsimbi. 
Deuteronomy27:6 Kaloku iqonga enilakhela uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu kufuneka libe lelamatye angaqingqwanga. Kulapho ke ekufuneka ninikele ngamadini atshiswayo," 
Deuteronomy27:7 ngokunjalo nenze namadini obudlelwana, nitye ninombulelo apho phambi koNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Kuloo matye atyatyekwe ngefutha ke ze niwabhale ngokucacileyo onke amazwi alo mthetho.” 
Deuteronomy27:9 UMosis ekunye nababingeleli babaLevi ke wabhekisa kumaSirayeli, wathi: “Khanindibolek' iindlebe, maSirayeli! Namhlanje nibe ngabantu bakaNdikhoyo ncakasana. Nguye iNkosi yenu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Ngoko ke ze niyithobele imiyalelo nemimiselo endininika yona.” 
Deuteronomy27:11 Ngaloo mini uMosis wawayalela amaSirayeli, wathi:" 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Xa seniyiwelile iJordan ezi zizwe zilandelayo ze zime kwintaba iGerizim xa kuthamsanqelwa amaSirayeli: uSimon, uLevi, uJuda, uIsakare, uJosefu, noBhenjamin." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Kanti ke nazi eziya kuma kwintaba iEbhali xa kuqalekiswa: uRubhen, uGadi, uAshere, uZebhulon, uDan, noNafetali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 “Ke bona abaLevi baya kuvakalisa la mazwi bekhwaza besithi: 
Deuteronomy27:15 ‘Uqalekisiwe umntu oqingqa umfanekiso ngelitye, umthi, noba sisinyithi, aze awunqule emfihlakalweni. Into enjalo lisikizi kuNdikhoyo.’ “Ke bona abantu bophendula besithi: ‘Makube njalo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “ ‘Uqalekisiwe nabani na odela uyise noba ngunina.’ “Ke bona abantu bophendula bathi: ‘Makube njalo!’ 
Deuteronomy27:17 “ ‘Uqalekisiwe nabani na oshenxisa umlimandlela wommelwane.’ “Ke bona abantu bophendula bathi: ‘Makube njalo!’ 
Deuteronomy27:18 “ ‘Uqalekisiwe nabani na olahlekisa imfama endleleni.’ “Ke bona abantu bophendula bathi: ‘Makube njalo!’ 
Deuteronomy27:19 “ ‘Uqalekisiwe nabani na ogqwetha inyaniso xa kuthethwa ityala labangeneleli neenkedama nabahlolokazi.’ “Ke bona abantu bophendula bathi: ‘Makube njalo!’ 
Deuteronomy27:20 “ ‘Uqalekisiwe umntu owambatha umka-yise, kuba unyelisa uyise.’ “Ke bona abantu bophendula bathi: ‘Makube njalo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “ ‘Uqalekisiwe nabani na olala nesilwanyana.’ “Ke bona abantu bophendula bathi: ‘Makube njalo!’ 
Deuteronomy27:22 “ ‘Uqalekisiwe umntu owambatha udade wabo, nditsho intombi kayise nokuba yekanina.’ “Ke bona abantu bophendula bathi: ‘Makube njalo!’" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “ ‘Uqalekisiwe umntu owambatha umkhwekazi.’ “Ke bona abantu bophendula bathi: ‘Makube njalo!’ 
Deuteronomy27:24 “ ‘Uqalekisiwe umntu ogebenga umwabo engabonwa.’ “Ke bona abantu bophendula bathi: ‘Makube njalo!’ 
Deuteronomy27:25 “ ‘Uqalekisiwe umntu othengwayo khon' ukuze agebenge abamsulwa.’ “Ke bona abantu bophendula bathi: ‘Makube njalo!’ 
Deuteronomy27:26 “ ‘Uqalekisiwe nabani na ongazithobeliyo aziphumeze iimfundiso zalo mthetho.’ “Ke bona abantu bophendula bathi: ‘Makube njalo!’ ” 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Ke ukuba ulithobele ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, wayenza ngononophelo imiyalelo endikunika yona namhlanje, uNdikhoyo uya kukuphakamisa kunazo zonke izizwe zehlabathi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Xa uthe walithobela ke walenza lizwi likaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, nâzi iintsikelelo owozixhamla:" 
Deuteronomy28:3 “Wosikelelwa ezidolophini nasemaphandleni. 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Wosikelelwa, umfazi wakho azale, emasimini indyebo ibe ngako, yona imfuyo yande, kubekho amathole namatakane." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Wosikelelwa, ingobozi yakho iphuphume isivuno, isitya sakho sokuxovulela sihlale sinentlama." 
Deuteronomy28:6 “Wosikelelwa ekuphumeni kwakho, nasekubuyeni kwakho ngokunjalo." 
Deuteronomy28:7 “UNdikhoyo uya kukuvathisa ngoloyiso, nditsho noba sewuhlaselwa ziintshaba. Zothi noba sezivela kwicala elithile, wena uzibethe zithi saa macal' onke." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “UNdikhoyo uThixo uya kuwuthamsanqela umsebenzi wakho, izisele zakho zihlale ziphuphuma. Uya kukuthi jize ngamathamsanqa kwelo lizwe akunika lona." 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Ukuba niyithobele imiyalelo nahamba ngokwelizwi lakhe, uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uya kunimisela nibe ngabantu bakhe ncakasana ngokwesithembiso sakhe." 
Deuteronomy28:10 “Ziya kuthi ke izizwe zehlabathi, zakuqonda ukuba uNdikhoyo unenze abantu bakhe, zitsho zinihlonele." 
Deuteronomy28:11 “Ewe, uNdikhoyo wokuthi jize ngenkqubela, uzale abantwana, imfuyo yakho ibe namathole namatakane, amasimi akho axakathe isivuno kwelo lizwe uNdikhoyo wafunga ukubanika lona ooyihlo-mkhulu." 
Deuteronomy28:12 UNdikhoyo uya kuwavula amazulu ngexesha elililo, imvula ayiphokoze kuvimba wakhe, awuthamsanqele umsebenzi wakho, khon' ukuze ungasweli nto, koko ubolekis' ezizweni, phofu wena ngokwakho ube ungafuni nto mntwini." 
Deuteronomy28:13 UNdikhoyo uya kukwenza ube yimbalasane phakathi kwezizwe, ungabi semxukuxeleni. Uya kuba soloko unenkqubela, ungaze uwe phantsi, ukuba uyithobele wayenza imiyalelo yakhe endikunika yona namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Noba sekutheni na ungaze uphambuke nakancinane kule miyalelo; ungaze unqule ubuse *oothixo abangabambi.” 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Kambe ke ukuba akulithobelanga ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, ukuba akuyenzanga yonke le miyalelo nale mimiselo ndikunika yona namhlanje, ziya kukufumana iziqalekiso:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 “Woqalekiswa ezidolophini nasemaphandleni. 
Deuteronomy28:17 “Yoqalekiswa ingobozi yakho, nesitya sakho sokuxovulela ngokunjalo." 
Deuteronomy28:18 “Yoqalekiswa inzala yakho, nesivuno somhlaba wakho, kwanamathole namatakane emfuyo yakho." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “Woqalekiswa ekuphumeni kwakho, nasekubuyeni kwakho ngokunjalo." 
Deuteronomy28:20 “UNdikhoyo uya kukuzisela ishwangusha, kube sisiphithi-phithi nenkxwaleko kuyo yonke into oyenzayo, suka uhlelwe sisithwakumbe ude utshabalale ngephanyazo, ngenxa yobubi obenzileyo bokumlahla ungamthobeli uNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy28:21 UNdikhoyo uya kukubetha ngezifo ngezifo, akutshayele uphele nya, ungawuhlali lo mhlaba uza kungena kuwo ngoku." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Uya kukubetha ngezifo ezidla umzimba, umkhuhlane, necesina. Umoya onolophu uya kuwatshabalalisa amasimi akho, akuyekele ngembalela kwanezifo kwizilimo zakho. Ezi zibetho ke ziya kukuthi nca ude ungabikho." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Ilanga liya kubalela esibhakabhakeni, umhlaba wome ube lilitye." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Imvula aya kuyinisa uNdikhoyo yoba zizaqhwithi nothuli, ude utshabalale." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “UNdikhoyo uya kuzipha uloyiso iintshaba zakho, zikuvuyelele. Wothi uzihlasela kweli cala, zona zikubethe uthi saa macal' onke. Zonke ke izizwe zehlabathi ziya kuthi zakuyibona le nto ikuhleleyo zitsho zihlasimle." 
Deuteronomy28:26 “Xa senifile imizimba yenu iya kutyiwa ziintaka namarhamncwa, futhi kungabikho namntu uzigxothayo." 
Deuteronomy28:27 UNdikhoyo uya kukubetha ngamathumba uxel' amaJiputa. Umzimba wakho uya kuphanjwa zizilonda nalukhwekhwe, urhawuzelelwe ingekho nendlela yokukunyanga." 
Deuteronomy28:28 UNdikhoyo uya kukubetha ngogezo, ubumfama, nobuthwanga-thwanga." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Uya kuba ngathi uyimfama, uphampathe ngoku ilanga lihlab' umhlaba. Kuyo yonke into oyenzayo akuyi kuba nampumelelo. Uya kuba sisisulu sengcinezelo, uphangwe, kungekho bani ungakuncedayo." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Noba sewulobola intombi, kovela mntu wumbi ayixhaphaze. Noba sowusakha indlu, soze uyihlale. Uya kuba ngatyala isidiliya, ungacholi naphantsi kuso." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Nenkomo yakho iya kuxhelwa ujongile, kodwa ungakhothi naphantsi kuloo nyama. Idonki yakho iya kuthinjwa ubukele, ungaze ubuye uyibone. Iigusha zakho ziya kunikelwa ezintshabeni, kungabikho namntu ungakuncedayo." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Oonyana neentombi zakho ziya kunikezelwa kwezinye iintlanga ujongile. Uya kutyabuk' amehlo ujong' enkalweni, ulindele ukubuya kwabantwana bakho, kungekho nto unokuyenza." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Kuya kuvela uhlanga ongalwaziyo, lufike luvune izilimo zakho obulalekileyo ngazo, ke wena into oya kuyizuza yingcinezelo nentshutshiso engaphele ndawo." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Ububi obubonayo buya kukubetha utsho ube ligeza. 
Deuteronomy28:35 UNdikhoyo uya kukubetha ngamathumba anganyangekiyo emadolweni nasemilenzeni, athi tshitshilili ukusuka entloko kuye kuthi xhaxhe ngeenyawo." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Wena, ngokunjalo nokumkani ommiseleyo, uNdikhoyo uya kunithatha anise kwilizwe eningalaziyo, elingazange laziwa nangooyihlo-mkhulu. Apho ke uya kunqula *thixo bambi abenziwe ngomthi, ngokunjalo nabamatye." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Kwezo zizwe akusasaze kuzo uNdikhoyo abantu baya kukuthela nqa, ube yintlekisa nondaba-mlonyeni." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Uya kuthi ngoku ubuhlwayele kakhulu uvune into engekhoyo. Kaloku isivuno sakho siya kunqunquthwa ziinkumbi. 
Deuteronomy28:39 Uya kuba ngatyala isidiliya usihlakule usilungise, ungazuzi diliya nawayini, kuba kaloku siya kungenelwa ngurhuxeshe." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Umnquma uya kubakho kuyo yonke indawo kwelo lizwe, kodwa wena ungabi nawo amafutha okuthambisa, kuba umnquma lowo uya kuvuthuluka." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Oonyana neentombi uya kuba nabo nje ngegama, kuba baya kuthinjwa." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Imithi yakho yeziqhamo, ngokunjalo nezilimo, ziya kunqunquthwa yinkumbi." 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Abangeneleli belakowenu baya kubalasela baye beqaqamba ngokuqaqamba, ke nina niye nidodobala ngokudodobala." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Baya kubolekisa kuwe, ube ke wena ungenanto yakubolekisa. Ekugqibeleni ke baya kuba ziinkokheli, wena ube ngumlandeli." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Zonke ke ezi ziqalekiso ziya kukujikeleza zide zikufumane, zikuvuthulule uphele, ngenxa yokuba ungaliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, ungayenzanga imiyalelo nemimiselo endikunike yona." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Ziya kuba ngumqondiso nesimanga kuwe nakwisizukulwana sakho kude kube nini-nini. 
Deuteronomy28:47 “Nakuba uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho wakusikelela ngeendlela zonke nje, akuvumanga ukumnqula ngokuthakazela ngexesha lentlutha." 
Deuteronomy28:48 Ngoko ke uya kubusa iintshaba akuthumele ngazo uNdikhoyo. Uya kucikidwa yindlala, unxano, nobuze, naziindidi ngeendidi zeentswelo. Uya kukukhama ngedyokhwe yentsimbi ude utshabalale." 
Deuteronomy28:49 UNdikhoyo uya kukuthumela ngohlanga oluvela kwelikude eziphelweni zehlabathi, abantu abantetho ungayivayo; bona ke baya kukurhewula njengokhozi." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Olu ke iya kuba luhlanga olungwanyalala, olungakhathalele mntu mdala, lungenanceba nasemntwaneni." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Iinkomo nesivuno sakho siya kuba lilifa labo, ube ke ubulawa yindlala. Aba bantu baya kutshayela konke nje: ingqolowa, iwayini entsha, amafutha omnquma, inkomo nenzala yayo, ngokunjalo negusha; ke wena ude utshabalale." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Baya kuzihlasela bazingqinge zonke iidolophu zelo lizwe akunika lona uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, nezo ndonga zinde ukholosa ngazo ziya kudilika zifadalale." 
Deuteronomy28:53 “Xa sezikungqingile iintshaba zakho uya kuxineka ucikideke yindlala kangangokuba ude utye nabantwana bakho obaphiwe nguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. 
Deuteronomy28:54 Nditsho namadoda aphucukileyo anesisa ngelo thuba aya kuphalala ebethwa yindlala, kangangokuba ade atye abantwana bawo. Indoda iya kuvimba nomntakwayo, nomfazi wayo oyintanda, nditsho nowokugqibela osekhoyo kubantwana bayo." 
Deuteronomy28:55  
Deuteronomy28:56 Kwanomfazi ozitshoyo, intokazi esisigcodololo esichula ukunyathela, naye uya kuziphatha kwangolo hlobo. Luya kuthi lwakuningqinga utshaba acikidwe liphango, aphalale kangangokuba ade atye nosana agqib' ukulizala, ngokunjalo nomkhaya lowo, yonke ke le nto eyiba. Ewe, uya kude avimbe nendoda le yakhe yebhongo; asisathethi ke ngabantwana bakhe." 
Deuteronomy28:57  
Deuteronomy28:58 “Ukuba akuyithobelanga ngenyameko imfundiso yalo mthetho ubhalwe kule ncwadi, ukuba uthe awalihlonipha eli gama lizukileyo linobuqaqawuli likaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho," 
Deuteronomy28:59 wena ngokunjalo nenzala yakho úya kunibetha ngezithwakumbe ezingaqhelekanga nezingaphele ndawo, nezifo ezoyikekayo ezingeva yeza." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Uya kukuzisela ezaa zifo zaseJiputa wawuzoyika kunene, zaye ke zona ziya kunamathela kuwe." 
Deuteronomy28:61 “Ngaphezu koku uNdikhoyo uya kukuthumela ngazo zonke iindidi zezifo nezithwakumbe, nditsho nezo zingaxelwanga kule ncwadi yomthetho; ke zona ziya kukutshabalalisa." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Nokuba nande nada nayinyambalala enjengeenkwenkwezi ezisesibhaka-bhakeni, liqaqobana nje eliya kusinda, kuba kaloku ningamthobelanga uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Kwanjengokuba uNdikhoyo wayenemihlali ngani waza waninika inkqubela wanandisa, kuya kuba kwanjalo ukunivuthulula nokunitshabalalisa kwakhe. Niya kuncothulwa nifuduswe kweli lizwe ningena kulo ngoku." 
Deuteronomy28:64 “UNdikhoyo uya kukusasaza ezizweni jikelele, ehlabathini liphela, apho ke uya kunqula *oothixo abenziwe ngomthi nabenziwe ngamatye, thixo abo ungazange ubanqule ngaphambili, bengazange banqulwa ngooyihlo-mkhulu." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Soze ufumane nzolo naphi naphi, ungasoze ufumane nandawo yakuphumla. UNdikhoyo uya kukubetha ngonxunguphalo, ukuphalala, nokuncama." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Ubomi bakho buya kuhlala busemngciphekweni. Imini nobusuku uya kuhlala ududa luloyiko, usoloko uxhalele ukufa." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Uya kuba liphakuphaku ngenxa yobubi obubonayo. Kuya kuthi kwakuba kusasa uthi: ‘Akwaba belitshona,’ uthi ke lakutshona: ‘Akwaba beliphuma.’" 
Deuteronomy28:68 UNdikhoyo uya kukubuyisela eJiputa ngeenqanawa, nangona nje ndandithe soze uphinde ubuyele khona. Apho ke uya kuzama ukuzithengisa kwiintshaba zakho, kodwa ke akukho bani uya kuze akuthenge.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Nantsi ke imiqathango yomnqophiso *uNdikhoyo awayalela uMosis ukuba awenze namaSirayeli kwelaseMowabhi; yona ixhasa umnqophiso owenziwa nguNdikhoyo kwintaba iHorebhe. 
Deuteronomy29:2 UMosis wawahlanganisa ndawonye amaSirayeli, waza wathetha nawo wenjenje: “Nizibonele ngokwenu into eyenziwe nguNdikhoyo kukumkani waseJiputa, nakumaphakathi akhe, nelizwe lakhe liphela." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Nizibonile izibetho ezirhwaqelisayo, imiqondiso, nemimangaliso ayenzileyo uNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Kanti unanamhla akaninikanga ingqondo yokuqiqa, namehlo okubona, neendlebe zokuva." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Kule minyaka ingamashumi amane ndinikhokela entlango, impahla yenu yokunxiba, ngokunjalo neembadada zenu, azikhange ziguge." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Beningenasonka nawayini natywala, kodwa uNdikhoyo unilungiselele, khon' ukuze nimqonde ukuba unguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Sithe ke sakufika kulo mhlaba baphuma beza kusihlasela ookumkani uSihon waseHeshbhon nokumkani uOgi waseBhashan. Kambe ke saboyisa. 
Deuteronomy29:8 Umhlaba wabo ke sawuthimba, sawahlulela indlu kaRubhen nekaGadi ngokunjalo nesiqingatha sakwaManase." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Ngoko ke yithobeleni ngenyameko imiqathango yalo mnqophiso, khon' ukuze nibe nempumelelo kuyo yonke into eniyenzayo." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Namhlanje ke nimi phambi koNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nina xa ninonke – iintloko zezindlu zakuni, amadoda amakhulu, amaphakathi namadoda akwaSirayeli ephela," 
Deuteronomy29:11 abafazi nabantwana benu, nabangeneleli abacanda iinkuni nabakha amanzi." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Nilapha ke khon' ukuze nifungiswe nibopheleleke kumnqophiso noNdikhoyo uThixo wenu," 
Deuteronomy29:13 ukuze uNdikhoyo animisele nibe ngabantu bakhe ncakasana, yena ke abe nguThixo wenu ngokwesithembiso sakhe nanjengoko wafungayo kooyihlo-mkhulu, uAbraham noIsake noYakobi." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Lo mnqophiso ke ngokunjalo nesi sifungo uNdikhoyo akasenzi nani kuphela," 
Deuteronomy29:15 koko usenza nabo bonke, nabangekhoyo apha namhlanje, ngokunjalo nani nina nimi phambi kwakhe namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Niyazi ukuba kwakunjani na kwelaseJiputa; futhi nisayikhumbula indlela esahamba ngayo sicanda kwimihlaba yezinye izizwe. 
Deuteronomy29:17 Nayibona nemifanekiso engamasikizi eyenziwe ngomthi, amatye, isiliva, negolide." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Lumkani ke hleze kubekho ndoda, mfazi, noba ngumzi, okanye isizwe kwezimi apha namhlanje, esiya kuthi simfulathele uNdikhoyo uThixo, sinqule *oothixo beentlanga. Ze niqiniseke ingaze ibekho phakathi kwenu ingcambu eyityhefu evelisa iziqhamo ezikrakra." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Xa umntu ololo hlobo athi akuyiva imiqathango yalo mnqophiso azikhohlise entliziyweni yakhe, athi: ‘Mna andinakuhlelwa nto; ndohlala eluxolweni noxa ndisenza ukuthanda kwam,’ into enjalo ingabangela ukuba kutshatyalaliswe konke nje, olungileyo nongendawo." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Ewe, uNdikhoyo akayi kuba natarhu kumntu onjalo. Ndaweni yaloo nto uya kucaphuka, uvuthe umsindo wakhe, zize zithi neziqalekiso ezibhaliweyo apha kule ncwadi zimgubungele, ade ke uNdikhoyo amcime igama kwelimiweyo." 
Deuteronomy29:21 UNdikhoyo uya kwenza umzekelo ngaye kuzo zonke izizwe zakwaSirayeli, amhlisele izithwakumbe ngokweziqalekiso zomnqophiso obhalwe kule ncwadi yomthetho wakhe." 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Oonyana benu abaya kuvela emva kwenu, ngokunjalo neentlanga eziphuma kumazwe akude, ziya kusibona isithwakumbe nenkxwaleko ayihlisele ilizwe lenu uNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Umhlaba uya kubharha, wambathiswe yisulfure netyuwa. Awuyi kuvelisa nto; akuyi kuntshula nokhula olu lwembala. Elo lizwe liya kuba njengeSodom neGomora, iAdama neZebhoyim, awathi ngenxa yengqumbo nomsindo wazitshabalalisa uNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy29:24 “Zonke iintlanga ziya kubuza zithi: ‘Kwakutheni ukuze uNdikhoyo awenjenje lo mhlaba? Wayekhathazwe yintoni ade abe nomsindo kangaka?’ 
Deuteronomy29:25 Impendulo ke iya kuthi: ‘Kungenxa yokuba betyeshele umnqophiso ophakathi kwabo noNdikhoyo uThixo wooyise-mkhulu; mnqophiso lowo bângena kuwo ekubakhupheni kwakhe eJiputa. 
Deuteronomy29:26 Basuke banqula *thixo bambi ababengabazi ngaphambili, ababengavumelekile ukuba babanqule." 
Deuteronomy29:27 UNdikhoyo ke wavutha ngumsindo, waza elo lizwe walihlisela ezi ziqalekiso zibhalwe apha kule ncwadi." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Ewe, wakhathazeka gqitha, wabancothula ngomsindo kwelakowabo, wabafudusela kwilizwe lasemzini apho basekhoyo unanamhla.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Kambe ke zona izinto ezifihlakeleyo zezikaNdikhoyo uThixo wethu, ukanti ke zona ezityhiliweyo ziya kusoloko zizezethu nabantwana bethu. Ngoko ke masiyithobele imiqathango yalo mthetho.”" 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Zakuba zifikile zonke ezi ntsikelelo endikuxelele ngazo, zaza zakuhlela neziqalekiso, kungenzeka ukuba uzithathele ingqalelo naphi na apho uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho athe wakusasaza khona phakathi kweentlanga." 
Deuteronomy30:2 Kwakuba njalo ke, wena nabantwana bakho buyelani kuNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nimthobele ngomxhelo wonke, nangomoya wenu uphela, ngokwale miyalelo ndikunika yona namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy30:3 Wosuka ke yena uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho abe nemfesane ngakuwe, akubuyisele ubuncwane bakho. Uya kuniqokelela anibuyise kuloo mazwe anisasaze kuwo." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Noba ningade nibe nisarhake naya kutsho empelazwe, yena uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uya kuniqokelela anibuyise," 
Deuteronomy30:5 khon' ukuze anibuyisele kumhlaba wooyihlo, ube ngowenu. Ngelo thuba uya kunithi jize ngengayiwayo yona inkqubela, futhi anandise ngokuthe kratya kooyihlo-mkhulu." 
Deuteronomy30:6 UNdikhoyo uThixo wakho uya kuyalùsa intliziyo yakho neentliziyo zabazukulwana bakho, khon' ukuze nimthande ngomxhelo wonke nomoya uphela, nidle ubomi." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Ke zona ezi ziqalekiso uya kubetha ngazo iintshaba zakho, ezo zazikutshutshisa," 
Deuteronomy30:8 wena ke ubuyele ekumthobeleni nasekugcineni le miyalelo ndikunika yona namhlanje. 
Deuteronomy30:9 UNdikhoyo uThixo wakho uya kukupha intlutha kuko konke okwenzayo; ùya kuphiwa inzala, ube nenyambalala yeenkomo, ngokunjalo namasimi akho achume. Kuya kuba luvuyo kuNdikhoyo ukukunika intlutha, kwanjengokuba kwakuluvuyo kuye ukwenjenjalo kooyihlo-mkhulu." 
Deuteronomy30:10 Kambe ke kofuneka nilithobele ilizwi likaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nenze ngokwale miyalelo nale mimiselo ibhalwe apha kule ncwadi yomthetho wakhe. Ngenene kofuneka nibuyele kuye ngomxhelo wenu uphela." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Lo myalelo ndininika wona namhlanje ke, awunzima kakhulu, futhi ungekho ngaphaya kwamandla enu." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Awukho phezulu esibhakabhakeni, ukuba ningade nikhale, nithi: ‘Yaz'ba ngubani na oya kunyuka aye esibhakabhakeni asithobele wona uze kuthi, khon' ukuze sibe nokuwuva siwenze?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Kwangokunjalo awukho ngaphesheya kolwandle, ukuba ningade nikhale, nithi: ‘Yaz'ba ngubani na oya kuwela ulwandle, awuthathe awusondeze kuthi, ukuze siwuve siwenze?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Hayi khona, nakanye! Kaloku lo myalelo awukude kuwe: uthetha ngawo qho, uyawuthanda, uwuthobela nokuwuthobela." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Uyabona ke, zikhethele namhlanje; bukho ubomi nokuhle, ngokunjalo nokufa nobubi." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Mna ndikuyalela namhlanje ukuba umthande uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, uhambe ngeendlela zakhe, uyithobele uyenze imiyalelo nemimiselo nezithethe zakhe. Wakwenjenjalo uya kuphila wande, uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho akuthamsanqele kwelo lizwe ungenela ukuya kuma kulo." 
Deuteronomy30:17 “Kambe ke ukuba uthe wajika, wala ukuphulaphula, wawexulwa ngabanye *oothixo, wakhahlela kubo, wabanqula," 
Deuteronomy30:18 ndiyakuxelela ngayo yona le mini ukuba inene uya kutshabalala. Awuyi kuba nabomi bude kwelo lizwe liphesheya kweJordan ungenela ukuya kuma kulo ngoku. 
Deuteronomy30:19 Amazulu nehlabathi ayangqina namhlanje ukuba ndithi khetha phakathi kobomi nokufa, naphakathi kweentsikelelo neziqalekiso. Kambe ke ndithi kheth' ubomi, khon' ukuze uphile, wena nenzala yakho." 
Deuteronomy30:20 Mthande uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, uliphulaphule ilizwi lakhe, uthi nca kuye. Kaloku nguye okunika ubomi noya kukolulela iminyaka kwelo lizwe wabathembisa ngalo ngesifungo ooyihlo-mkhulu, uAbraham noIsake noYakobi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Waqhubela phambili uMosis ukuthetha nawo onke amaSirayeli," 
Deuteronomy31:2 wathi: “Ngoku sendinekhulu mashumi mabini eminyaka. Andisenako ukunikhokela. Kaloku *uNdikhoyo wandazisa ukuba andiyi kuyiwela iJordan. 
Deuteronomy31:3 NguNdikhoyo ngokwakhe oza kunikhokela niwele, azivuthulule zitshabalale iintlanga zelaa lizwe, ukuze ke nina ningene nime kulo. Ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo nguYoshuwa oza kunikhokela niwele iJordan." 
Deuteronomy31:4 UNdikhoyo uya kuzitshabalalisa ezo ntlanga kwanjengokuba wenzayo kookumkani bama-Amori, uSihon no-Ogi, awabatshabalalisayo kunye nomhlaba wabo." 
Deuteronomy31:5 UNdikhoyo uza kuninceda nizoyise. Ngoko ke kufuneka niziphathe kanye ngale ndlela ndiniyalele yona. 
Deuteronomy31:6 Qinani nikhaliphe, ningaxhali, ningabi nayo nedyudyu. Kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ungakuni; soze arhoxe okanye anilahle.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 UMosis wabiza uYoshuwa, wathetha naye phambi kwawo onke amaSirayeli, wathi: “Qina ukhaliphe! Kaloku nguwe oza kukhokela aba bantu, uye kubadlisa ilifa labo kwelo lizwe uNdikhoyo wabathembisa ngalo ngesifungo ooyise-mkhulu." 
Deuteronomy31:8 NguNdikhoyo ngokwakhe oza kunikhokela, ahambe nani. Soze arhoxe, engasoze anilahle; ngoko ke yomelelani ningoyiki.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Lo mthetho ke uMosis wawubhala, wawunikezela kubabingeleli bakwaLevi ababejongene netyesi yomnqophiso *kaNdikhoyo, ngokunjalo nakumadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Wabayala wathi: “Njalo xa kuphela unyaka wesixhenxe, kusondela unyaka wokucinywa kwamatyala, lo mthetho mawufundwe kumsitho wamaphempe." 
Deuteronomy31:11 Mawufundelwe amaSirayeli xa ewonke mhla eze kunqula uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu kuloo ndawo yalathwe nguye. 
Deuteronomy31:12 Makuqokelelwe bonke abantu – amadoda, abafazi, nabantwana, ngokunjalo nabangeneleli abalapho phakathi kwenu – khon' ukuze bawuve, bafunde ukumhlonela uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, bazithobele bazenze ngondileko iimfundiso zalo mthetho." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Ngale ndlela ke nabantwana benu abangekawazi lo mthetho baya kuwuva. Ngoko ke baya kufunda ukumthobela bamhlonele uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ngalo lonke ithuba nihleli kwelo lizwe niza kungena kulo phesheya kweJordan.” 
Deuteronomy31:14 *UNdikhoyo wabhekisa kuMosis, wathi: “Ngoku sekumbovu ukuba ufe. Ngoko ke biza uYoshuwa, uye naye *esibingelelweni, khon' ukuze ndimyale.” Ngenene ke uMosis noYoshuwa baya esibingelelweni," 
Deuteronomy31:15 waza ke uNdikhoyo wazibonakalisa kubo ngomqulu welifu elisuka lime apho esangweni lesibingelelo. 
Deuteronomy31:16 UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Wena uza kufa ngoku. Wakuba ufile, aba bantu baza kukreqa, bandilahle, banqule *oothixo abanqulwa kwelo lizwe baza kuma kulo ngoku, bawutyeshele umnqophiso endawenza nabo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Yakwenzeka loo nto ndiya kuvutha ngumsindo, ndibalahle, ndibafulathele, batshabalale. Baya kuhlelwa ziinzingo bahlupheke. Ngaloo mini baya kuvakala besithi: ‘Kunje nje nje kungenx' enokuba uThixo wethu engasekho ngakuthi.’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Inene, ngaloo mini ndiya kubafulathela ngenxa yabo bonke ububi ababenzileyo ngokubhenela kwabanye oothixo." 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Ngoko ke bhala le ngoma, uyifundise amaSirayeli, ayicule, ibe lingqina lomnqophiso wam kunye nawo." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Kaloku ndiza kuwangenisa kuloo mhlaba wobisi nobusi ndathembisa ngawo ooyise-mkhulu. Akuxhamla loo ntlala-kahle osuka akreqe, anqule thixo bambi, andidele, awutyeshele umnqophiso wam." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Kweso sithuba ke aya kuhlelwa yintlekele nentlupheko. Ke yona le ngoma iya kuba isaculwa sisizukulwana, ibe lingqina elidandalazisa isono samaSirayeli. Andithi na kaloku, kanye ngoku ndingekawangenisi nokuwangenisa kwelo lizwe ndawathembisa ngalo, sendiyibona imikhwa yawo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Kwangaloo mini ke uMosis wayibhala ingoma leyo, wayifundisa amaSirayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:23 UNdikhoyo ke wamyalela wenjenje noYoshuwa unyana kaNune: “Qina ukhaliphe, kuba nguwe oza kukhokela amaSirayeli, uye kuwangenisa kwelo lizwe ndawathembisa ngalo ngesifungo; ibe ke mna ndiza kuba nawe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Ke kaloku uMosis wawabhala encwadini amazwi alo mthetho, akashiyelela nento le." 
Deuteronomy31:25 Akuba egqibile ke wayalela ababingeleli babaLevi ababejongene netyesi yomnqophso kaNdikhoyo, wathi:" 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Thathani, nantsi ke incwadi yomthetho. Yibekeni ecaleni letyesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, khon' ukuze ibe lingqina likaNdikhoyo ngamaSirayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Kaloku ndiyanazi ukuba nizizibhoja ezinenkani. Ngexesha lokudla kwam ubomi benivukelana naye uNdikhoyo; nobeka phi na ukumvukela xa ndingasekhoyo? 
Deuteronomy31:28 Ngoko ke khanihlanganise amadoda amakhulu ezizwe zakowenu neenduna zenu, ukuze ndiwaxelele ezi zinto. Ndiza kubiza amazulu nehlabathi, ukuze andingqinele." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Kaloku ndiyazi ukuba xa ndingasekho niya kuba ziinjubaqa, niphambuke kule ndlela ndiniyalele yona. Kananjalo ke, kumaxesha ezayo, niya kuhlelwa ziintlekele ngenxa yokuba nixhokonxa uNdikhoyo ngobubi bezithixo ezenziwe zizandla zenu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Ke kaloku uMosis yena wawucengceleza wonke lo mbongo, amaSirayeli wona ephulaphule:" 
Deuteronomy32:1 Khanibek' iindlebe, mazulu, ndithethe; khawuthi cwaka, mhlab', uphulaphule." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Imfundiso yam iza kuchaphaza njengemvula, itshone njengombeth' emhlabeni, amazwi am awe njengomkhumezelo phezu kohlaza, abe njengomvimbi phezu kotyani." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Kaloku ndiza kulibhengez' igama *likaNdikhoyo; ke nina bubabazeni ubukhulu bukaThixo wethu. 
Deuteronomy32:4 YiNgxondorha emsebenz' ufezekileyo; iindlela zakhe bubulungisa bodwa; uThixo othembekileyo enyanisekile, yena lilungisa elingenakumbi." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Kambe ke nina nigwenxa, ngoko ke ngenxa yokubhatyaza kwenu aniselulo usapho lwakhe, sizukulwanandini sigoso sinxaxhileyo!" 
Deuteronomy32:6 Ngani ukuba nimphathe kanj' uNdikhoyo, zidengendini zabantu ezingaqiqiyo? Kaloku yena nguYihlo noMdali wenu; nguye owanenzayo waza wanibonelela." 
Deuteronomy32:7 Khanibuzise niqonde ngezamandulo; khaniphande nive ngezizukulwana ezadlulayo. Amanyange wona aya kunibalisela; amadod' amakhulu aya kunichubela. 
Deuteronomy32:8 Xenikweni uPhezukonke wazabela ilifa izizwe; yena wabahlula-hlula oonyana babantu, waza izizwe wazimisela imida yazo ngokobungakanani boonyana bakaSirayeli." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Ke yona inxaxheba kaNdikhoyo luhlanga lwakhe. Ewe, uYakobi sisabelo sakhe." 
Deuteronomy32:10 Wambhaqa kwimpengempenge yentlango, kwinkangala egxwala amarhamncwa, waza wamchola, wampelesa, wamkhusel' okokhozo lweliso lakhe," 
Deuteronomy32:11 njengokhozi lukhusela amantshontsho alo, lundanda luwathwale ngaloo maphiko alo, xa luwakhupha endlwini yalo." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Ewe, uNdikhoyo wamkhokela yedwa kungekho *thixo ungomnye umncedisayo." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Wamqabelisa imimango enyukayo, wayixhamla imveliso yelizwe; watya ubusi emaweni, waza umnquma wavelisa elulwalweni." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Iimazi zeenkomo nezeebhokhwe yayiziintsengwanekazi; oozinkomo, zibhokhwe, neegusha yayingamateke-teke, nditsho oku kweenkomo zaseBhashan. Ingqolowa ingachum' iliphupha; asisathethi ke ngediliya naloo wayini ingayiwayo." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Kambe ke uYeshurun suka wahlutha wada wakhabalaza; ewe, wakhula wakhukhumala wada waxhathisa. Waza ke wamfulathela uThixo adalwe nguye, wayibukula eyona Ngxondorha imsindisayo." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Wamkhweletisa ngokunqula izithixo; wamxhokonxa ngemikhwa emanyumnyezi. 
Deuteronomy32:17 Suka waxhelel' iindimoni ezingengoThixo; izithixo awayengazazi ngaphambili, izinto ezingazange zinqulwe nangamanyange." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Akayikhathalelanga eyona Ngxondorha aphuma kuyo; suka wamlibala uThixo azelwe nguye. 
Deuteronomy32:19 Waza ke yena uNdikhoyo wakruquka, exhokonkxwa ngoonyana neentombi zakhe nje." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Wathi: “Ubuso bam ndiza kubufihla, ndibone ukuba loba yintoni ikamva labo; kuba basisizukulwana esigwenxa, abantwana abangathembekanga." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Ngezi zithixo bayandikhweletisa; ngale mifanekiso bayandixhokonxa. Nam ke ndobakhweletisa ngohlanga olungebantu bam; ndobaxhokonxa ngohlanga olungenangqondo. 
Deuteronomy32:22 Kaloku umsindo wam uvutha njengomlilo, udangazela kuye kuthi gaa kwelabafileyo; utshisa umhlaba nemveliso yawo, ude ulenye neziseko zeentaba." 
Deuteronomy32:23 “Ndobahlisela ngemfumba yezibetho, iintolo zam ndizifohlele phezu kwabo." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Baya kuthi shuu yindlala nephango, bacikidwe ngubhubhani nezifo-yifo, amarhamncwa abaqwenge ngezo ngxavula zawo, bathi nca bubuhlungu bezirhubuluzayo." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Ezindleleni ikrele lishiy' izigede, nasemagumbini bankwantye barhwaqele. Abafana neentombi itshoba lilal' umbethe; iintsana neengwevu nazo zithi dwe." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ngendibatshabalalise kwathi tu, ababi sakhunjulwa naluluntu," 
Deuteronomy32:27 nto nje kuthi qath' iintshaba zabo, hleze zigcolode zide zizincome, zithi namhla zibuye noloyiso, ukanti ikwandim obathe vithe-vithe.”" 
Deuteronomy32:28 Kwezo ntshaba umqondo tu; kwabo bantu ingqondo ti! 
Deuteronomy32:29 Ukuba nje bebelumkile ngebeyazi le nto, beliqonda nekamva labo." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Iwaka lingaze loyiswe ngumntu omnye; ishumi lamawaka libalek' ababini, ukanti abaphoxwanga yiNgxondorha yabo, mhlawumbi bayekelwe nguNdikhoyo?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Ingxondorha yezinye izizwe ayifani neyethu, nkqu neentshaba zethu ziyayiqonda loo nto." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Kuba isidiliya sazo sesaseSodom; ngumdiliya wamasimi aseGomora. Idiliya yazo inetyhefu, izikhinkci zayo ziyakrakra." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Eyazo iwayini bubuhlungu benyoka; ngengcwangu nqwa nobuhlungu bephimpi. 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Kambe ke isiphelo sazo ndisasibambile; ndisasivalele koovimba bam. 
Deuteronomy32:35 Ke yona impindezelo nokubuyekeza kokwam; ngokuhamba kwexesha zode zityibilike. Imini yazo isemnyango; izingqi zentshabalalo ziza zikhawulezile.” 
Deuteronomy32:36 Kaloku uNdikhoyo wobavelela abantu bakhe, avelane nazo izicaka zakhe, akuba eqonda ukuba baphelelwe, kungasekho mahluko phakathi kwenkosi nesicaka." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Wosuka ke athi: “Baphi ke abo thixo benu? Iye ngaphi kaloku ingxondorha yenu? 
Deuteronomy32:38 Abo batye amanqatha amadini enu, baza basela neminikelo yewayini, mabeze kuninceda kaloku; mabavele kaloku, banikhusele." 
Deuteronomy32:39 “Niyabona ke, ndim, ewe ndim ndedwa uThixo; akukho thixo wumbi ngaphandle kwam. Ndiyabulala, ndidlisa ubomi; ndiyenzakalisa, ndiyanyanga futhi; tu ohlangulayo esandleni sam." 
Deuteronomy32:40 NdinguThixo ophilayo nje inene ndiyafunga, ndithi:" 
Deuteronomy32:41 ‘Ndiza kulilol’ ikrele lam elidangazelayo; ndihlasele kutsho kuvele ubulungisa. Ke zona iintshaba zam ndozohlwaya, abandithiyileyo ndibaphindezele." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Iintolo zam ziza kuxhaph' igazi; ikrele lam liza kudl' enyameni; nditsho igazi labaxatyelweyo nabathinjwa, nkqu negazi leentloko ezinesihlwitha zeentshaba.”" 
Deuteronomy32:43 Hoyina, zizwe, dumisani ngenxa yabantu bakaNdikhoyo! Kalok' uyalibuyekeza igazi lezicaka zakhe. Zidliwe yimpindezelo iintshaba zakhe; kambe ke uyazicamagushela izono zabantu bakhe nelizwe lakhe." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Ke kaloku uMosis noYoshuwa unyana kaNune bawucengceleza wonke lo mbongo, khon' ukuze amaSirayeli awuve." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Akuba ke egqibile uMosis ukuwathetha la mazwi kumaSirayeli 
Deuteronomy32:46 wathi kuwo: “Wathatheleni ingqalelo onke la mazwi endiwabhekise kuni namhlanje. Ze niwayalele abantwana benu, khon' ukuze bafunde ukuyithobela ngenyameko yonke imfundiso yalo mthetho." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Kaloku le mfundiso ayikuko ukulavuza nje, koko bubomi kuni. Ngoko ke yithobeleni niyenze, khon' ukuze nibe nokuma ixesha elide kwelo lizwe niya kulo phesheya kweJordan.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Kwangaloo mini uNdikhoyo wathetha noMosis, wathi:" 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Yiya kwiintaba zeAbharim kwelaseMowabhi malunga neJeriko. Nyuka intaba iNebho, ulibheke elo lizwe laseKanana ndiza kuwangenisa kulo amaSirayeli." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Wena ke uya kufela apho entabeni njengomkhuluwa wakho uAron owafela kwintaba iHori. 
Deuteronomy32:51 Kaloku nina nobabini naningathembekanga kum phakathi kwamaSirayeli. Ewe, ngokuya naniseMeribha ngakwidolophu iKadeshe kwintlango iZin nasithoba isidima sam phambi kwamaSirayeli." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Ke wena elo lizwe uya kulibuka ukude; soze uye kungena kwelo lizwe ndilinika amaSirayeli.” 
Deuteronomy33:1 Phambi kokuba afe, uMosis, umfo wakwaThixo, amaSirayeli wawathi jize ngezi zithamsanqeliso:" 
Deuteronomy33:2 “Kwintaba iSinayi gqi qhaphu *uNdikhoyo; njengelanga wathi gqi kwaEdom. Wabengezela evela kwiintaba zeParan; wavela enamawaka-waka ezithunywa zakhe, kudangazela okomlilo ngasekunene kwakhe." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Hayi ukubathanda kwakho abantu bakho! Ewe, uyabafumbatha bonke abalibango lakho. Kungoko basuka bathi guqaqa ezinyaweni zakho, bethobela umnwe wakho," 
Deuteronomy33:4 mhla uMosis wabanika umthetho, olibango lebandla likaSirayeli." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Wena Ndikhoyo waba ngukumkani kaYeshurun, zakuba zihlanganisene iinkokheli zabantu, zakuba ziqukene izizwe zakwaSirayeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:6 Wasuka ke uMosis wathetha ngoRubhen, wenjenje: “URubhen makahlal' ehleli angaze atshitshe, nakuba engengakanani ngamanani.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 NgoJuda wathi: “Kambe ke, wena Ndikhoyo, bek' iindlebe umphulaphule uJuda, ubuye ummanye namawabo. Yena wazilwela ngezo zandla zakhe, Ndikhoyo, ke ngoko msize ezintshabeni zakhe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 NgoLevi wathi: “Ndikhoyo, *iiurim neethumim otyhila intando yakho ngazo, zezentandane yakho uLevi, yena lowo wamvavanyayo eMasa, owabambana naye emanzin' aseMeribha." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Ngoyise nonina wathi: ‘Andiseva ngani.’ Ngabantakwabo wathi: ‘Andinazi.’ Ngabantwana bakhe wathi: ‘Andisenanto nani.’ Ewe, yena wanonophela ilizwi lakho, wanyaniseka kumnqophiso wakho." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Uya kufundisa uSirayeli imimiselo yakho, ayale abantu ngomyalelo wakho. Uya kwenza isiqhumiso phambi kwakho, anikele namadini atshiswayo eqongeni lakho." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Ndikhoyo, nceda umthi jize ngokomelela, waneliseke ngumsebenzi awenzayo. Ke bona abamvukelayo bavikive; abamthiyayo mabangaze babuye bavele.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 NgoBhenjamin wathi: “UNdikhoyo uyamthanda uBhenjamin; yena usoloko emalusile. Uhlala ekhuselekile imini yonke; yena umi phantsi kwephiko lakhe.” 
Deuteronomy33:13 NgoJosefu wathi: “Ke lona ithamsanqa likaNdikhoyo likwaJosefu; umhlaba wakhe mawunyakamiswe yimvula nangamanzi emithombo ampompoza phantsi komhlaba. 
Deuteronomy33:14 Ilanga nenyanga mazimchumise, ziwulize ngeyona-yona mveliso." 
Deuteronomy33:15 Iintaba zamandulo mazivathe iziqhamo; iinduli zamhlamnene maziphuphume imveliso. 
Deuteronomy33:16 Umhlaba wakhe mawuvelise eyona-yona; uthamsanqelwe kukulunga kukaNdikhoyo owayekho etyholweni elivuthayo. La mathamsanqa makavele kwaJosefu, yena olitshawe phakathi kwabantakwabo." 
Deuteronomy33:17 UJosefu nkunzi yakwabani ukomelela, emise okwenyathi – mpondo ezo zizezamawaka akwaManase namashumi amawaka akwaEfrayim. Ngazo uhlabanisela izizwe; ewe, nezo ziseziphelweni zehlabathi.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 NgoZebhulon noIsakare wathi: “KwaZebhulon makube yimihlali ukucanda elwandle; kwaIsakare makube yimivuyo ukuhlala ekhaya. 
Deuteronomy33:19 Izizwe bozimemela entabeni yabo, bawenzele apho amadini afanelekileyo. Bona bamfimfitha indyebo yaselwandle, ubutyebi babo babubhaqe elunxwemeni.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 NgoGadi wathi: “Makabongwe owandisa uGadi. UGadi ubuthuma njengengonyama ukuze aqwenge ingalo noba lukhakhayi. 
Deuteronomy33:21 Yena uzikhethela ezona-zona elizweni, kuba wabelwa inxaxheba yengqwayi-ngqwayi. Umela ubulungisa nemimiselo kaNdikhoyo, zakuba zihlanganisene iinkokheli zakwaSirayeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 NgoDan wathi: “Ke yena uDan ligatyana lengonyama elithi tsi liphuma eBhashan.” 
Deuteronomy33:23 NgoNafetali wathi: “Yena uNafetali wamkelekile; uphuphuma intsikelelo kaNdikhoyo. Ilifa lakhe lisuka elwandle lihle.” 
Deuteronomy33:24 NgoAshere wathi: “UAshere yena unoyolo kunabo bonke; makabe yintandane kubantakwabo, umhlaba wakhe uchume ngumnquma." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Imivalo yakhe mayibe yintsimbi nobhedu; angaze aswele mandla esaphila.” 
Deuteronomy33:26 “Yeshurun, akakho onjengoThixo wakho, ophalisa isibhakabhaka eze kukusiza, ngobungangamsha bakhe aphalise amafu." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Kwamandulo uThixo yena waba likhaya; waba soloko ekuxhasa ngezo ngalo zakhe. Iintshaba zakho waziswantsulisa, wathi: ‘Mazitshatyalaliswe!’" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Ngoko ke uSirayeli uhleli ngenzolo, umthombo kaYakobi uthe geqe, uthe gcobho kwelengqolowa newayini, apho izulu lifefeza umbethe." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Hay' uyolo onalo wena, Sirayeli! Nguban' ongad' afike kuwe, sizwendini sasindiswa nguNdikhoyo, okwalikhakha nekrele lakho, okuhlanganiselayo akuthi jize ngoloyiso? Neentshaba zakho zitsho zikubongoze, wena uthimbe iindawo zazo eziphakamileyo.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Ke kaloku uMosis wesuka kuloo mathafa aseMowabhi, wenyuka intaba iNebho, waya kutsho kuloo ncopho kuthiwa yiPisga imalunga neJeriko. Wathi elapho ke *uNdikhoyo wambonisa lonke elo lizwe: ummandla waseGiliyadi ukunyuka ukuya kutsho kwaDan;" 
Deuteronomy34:2 nawo wonke umhlaba wakwaNafetali; imimandla yakwaEfrayim nakwaManase, nowakwaJuda ukuya kuthi xhaxhe ngolwandle;" 
Deuteronomy34:3 ngokunjalo namazantsi akwaJuda; neso sithabazi samathafa ukusuka eZoware ukuya kuma ngeJeriko isixeko samasundu. 
Deuteronomy34:4 UNdikhoyo wathi kuMosis: “Nanko ke umhlaba endathembisa ngawo ngesifungo uAbraham, uIsake, noYakobi, ndisithi ndakuze ndiwunike abazukulwana babo. Ndifuna uwubone nje, kuba wena ngokwakho awuzukuya kungena kuwo.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Ngenene ke uMosis isicaka sikaNdikhoyo wafela apho kumhlaba waseMowabhi ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo. 
Deuteronomy34:6 UNdikhoyo wamngcwaba apho kwiintili zaseMowabhi malunga nedolophu iBhete-pehore. Kambe ke akukho bani uyazi ncam indawo elikuyo ingcwaba lakhe unanamhla. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Ukufa kwakhe uMosis wayenekhulu elinamashumi amabini eminyaka, kodwa esomelele, engabikwa hlaba, namehlo akhe engekabi nalo norhatyazo." 
Deuteronomy34:8 AmaSirayeli amzilela iintsuku ezimashumi mathathu apho kuloo mathafa aseMowabhi. Zaba ke zifezekile iintsuku zokuzila. 
Deuteronomy34:9 UYoshuwa unyana kaNune wazaliswa bubulumko nokuqonda, kuba kaloku uMosis wambeka izandla emngenisa ezihlangwini zakhe. NamaSirayeli ke amthobela uYoshuwa, enza ngokwemiyalelo eyanikwa uMosis nguNdikhoyo." 
Deuteronomy34:10 KwaSirayeli ke akuphindanga kuvele *mshumayeli unjengoMosis, owazana noNdikhoyo ubuso ngobuso." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Akukho mshumayeli wumbi wakha wenza imiqondiso nemimangaliso enjengaleyo uMosis wayethunywa nguNdikhoyo ukuba ayenze kwelaseJiputa kukumkani wakhona namaphakathi akhe," 
Deuteronomy34:12 kungekho namshumayeli wakha wabonakalisa imisebenzi yamandla ngendlela erhwaqelisa njengaleyo wasebenza ngayo uMosis phakathi kwamaSirayeli jikelele. 
Joshua1:1 Akuba ebhubhile uMosis, isicaka *sikaNdikhoyo, uNdikhoyo wabhekisa kuYoshuwa unyana kaNune owayesisandla sikaMosis," 
Joshua1:2 wathi: “UMosis, isicaka sam, ubhubhile. Ke wena namaSirayeli ephela wuweleni umlambo iJordan, niye kwelo lizwe ndininika lona." 
Joshua1:3 Indawo nganye eniya kunyathela kuyo ndininika yona njengoko ndamthembisayo uMosis. 
Joshua1:4 Imida yenu yosuka ezantsi entlango, iye kuma ngeentaba zaseLebhanon emantla, isuke empumalanga kumlambo iEfrati, ibandakanye ummandla wamaHeti, iye kuthi gaa ngolwandle entshonalanga." 
Joshua1:5 Akukho namnye uya kumelana nawe yonke imihla yokudla kwakho ubomi. Ndiya kuhlala ndisecaleni kwakho njengoko bendenjenjalo nakuMosis. Andiyi kukuyekela; andiyi kukushiya. 
Joshua1:6 Yomelela, ukhaliphe, kuba uza kubangenisa aba bantu kweli lizwe endithembise ooyise-mkhulu ngesifungo ukuba loba lilifa labo." 
Joshua1:7 Yomelela ke, ukhaliphe kunene! Uze unyamekele ukuwuthobela wonke umthetho owuwiselwe nguMosis isicaka sam. Khon' ukuze ube nempumelelo naphi na apho uya khona, ungàze uphambuke kuwo nakancinane." 
Joshua1:8 Kufuneka incwadi yomthetho ikukhokele kuyo yonke into oyithethayo. Uze uyifunde uyigocagoce ubusuku nemini, uzazi uzithobele izinto ezibhaliweyo kuyo. Xa wenjenjalo woba nenkqubela nempumelelo." 
Joshua1:9 Kaloku ndim okuyalelayo. Yomelela ke, ukhaliphe. Uze ungoyiki unkwantye; kaloku mna Ndikhoyo Thixo wakho ndiya kusoloko ndisecaleni kwakho naphi na apho unyathela khona.”" 
Joshua1:10 UYoshuwa uyalele iinduna zakhe, wathi:" 
Joshua1:11 “Tyhutyhani umzi, nixelele amaSirayeli ukuba alungise umphako wendlela, kuba kuza kuhanjwa emva kweentsuku ezintathu, kuwelwe iJordan, kuthinjwe ilizwe enilinikwe *nguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ukuze libe lelenu.”" 
Joshua1:12 UYoshuwa wathetha nesizwe sakwaRubhen nesakwaGadi nenxalenye yesizwe sakwaManase, wathi:" 
Joshua1:13 “Ze nikhumbule ukuba uMosis, isicaka sikaNdikhoyo, wathi uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uninika lo mhlaba ungasempumalanga kweJordan ukuba ube ngowenu, niphumle kuwo." 
Joshua1:14 Abafazi benu nabantwana nemfuyo banokusala ngasempuma kweJordan, kodwa amadoda omkhosi kufuneka axhobe, awele kuqala kunamanye amaSirayeli, aye kuwanceda" 
Joshua1:15 ade awuthimbe umhlaba ongasentshonalanga yeJordan awunikwe nguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ukuze ube ngowawo aphumle kuwo. Kuya kuthi ke akuba nendawo yokuphumla eyeyawo njengani, nani nibuyele emakhaya kumhlaba ongasempumalanga kweJordan eniwabelwe nguMosis isicaka sikaNdikhoyo.”" 
Joshua1:16 Bathi kuYoshuwa: “Soyenza yonke into osiyalele ukuba siyenze, siye naphi na apho uthi masiye khona." 
Joshua1:17 Sokuthobela kanye ngalaa ndlela sasithobela uMosis ngayo. Akwaba uNdikhoyo uThixo wakunceda njengoko wamncedayo uMosis. 
Joshua1:18 Nabani na ophikisana nawe, angawathobeli amazwi akho, angenzi nantoni na usiyalelayo, wobulawa. Nto nje yomelela wena, ukhaliphe!”" 
Joshua2:1 Emva koko ke uYoshuwa into kaNune wathumela ngasekhusini iintlola zambini zisuka apho babekhulule khona eShitim, wathi: “Hambani niye kuhlola ilizwe laseKanana, ngokukodwa idolophu iJeriko.” Esukile ke loo madoda aya kungena kumzi wehenyukazi uRahabhi." 
Joshua2:2 Ukumkani waseJeriko waxelelwa kwathiwa: “Kukho amaSirayeli afikileyo ngobu busuku, eze kuhlola eli lizwe.”" 
Joshua2:3 Ukumkani wathumela izigidimi kuRahabhi esithi: “Wakhuphe loo madoda asendlwini yakho, kuba aze kuhlola ilizwe lonke.”" 
Joshua2:4 URahabhi waphendula wathi: “Ewe, ebekho amadoda ebefikile apha kwam, phofu andiwazi ukuba abe evela phi na. Kambe ke ahambe ukutshona kwelanga, kungekavalwa namasango edolophu le. Andikhange ndibuze apho aya khona, kodwa ukuba niyawasukela ningawafumana.” (Ethetha le nto nje uRahabhi ezo ntlola wayezifihle phezu kwendlu, zingaphantsi komqhaphu owawubekwe apho.)" 
Joshua2:5  
Joshua2:6  
Joshua2:7 Ahamba ke loo madoda ngendlela eya kumazibuko eJordan, esukela iintlola ezo. Avalwa kwangoko amasango." 
Joshua2:8 Ngaphambi kokuba zilale ezo ntlola, uRahabhi waya kuzo phezu kwendlu," 
Joshua2:9 wafika wathi: “Ndiyazi ukuba *uNdikhoyo ulinike nina eli lizwe. Bonke abemi beli lizwe bayankwantya nini; boyika ngokokude baphelelwe ngamandla. 
Joshua2:10 Sayiva nento yokuba uNdikhoyo walomisa uLwandle oluBomvu ukuba niwele ukunduluka kwenu eJiputa. Saziva neendaba zokubatshabalalisa tu kwenu ooSihon no-Ogi iikumkani zama-Amori ezazimi kwelaa cala lingasempumalanga yeJordan. 
Joshua2:11 Soyika kakhulu ukuvakala kwezo ndaba, sonke apha satsho saphelelwa ngamandla. UNdikhoyo uThixo wenu nguye olawula emazulwini nalapha emhlabeni." 
Joshua2:12 Ngoku ke khanifunge ngegama lakhe ukuba nobenzela inceba abantu basekhaya njengoko nam ndinenzele inceba, nindinike nomqondiso oqinisekileyo." 
Joshua2:13 Ndithembiseni ukuba nomsindisa utata, nomama, nabantakwethu, noodadethu, kunye neentsapho zabo, singàbulawa thina.”" 
Joshua2:14 Athi loo madoda: “Ubomi bethu sibuthenga ngobenu. Ukuba wena akuyithethanga mntwini le nto sihambele yona apha kweli lizwe, siyathembisa ukuba sonenzela inceba xa uNdikhoyo esinikezela lo mhlaba.”" 
Joshua2:15 Indlu kaRahabhi yayiseludongeni olubiyele idolophu. Wawakhupha ngefestile ke loo madoda, ehla ngentambo." 
Joshua2:16 Wathi: “Ze niye kuzimela ezintabeni, ningabonwa ngamadoda athunywe ngukumkani. Ze nihlale apho iintsuku ezintathu, de loo madoda abuye, nandule ke nina ukugoduka.”" 
Joshua2:17 Zathi iintlola kuRahabhi: “Asiyi kuba natyala lokungasigcini isifungo osifungise sona ukuba akukwenzanga oku: 
Joshua2:18 xa singena kweli lizwe kufuneka ubophelele lo msonto ubomvu kule festile usikhuphe ngayo. Kufuneka uze noyihlo nonyoko nabantakwenu, nabo bonke abantu bakowenu, ubahlanganisele endlwini yakho." 
Joshua2:19 Ukuba ngaba kubekho mntu uphumela ngaphandle kule ndlu, aze abulawe, lityala lakhe. Kanti ke xa kwenzakaliswe umntu esendlwini yakho, ityala loba lelethu." 
Joshua2:20 Ukuba uyixelele nabani na into esizele yona, thina asiyi kuba natyala ngokungasigcini esi sifungo.”" 
Joshua2:21 Wavuma uRahabhi, wawandulula. Akuba ehambile, wabophelela loo msonto ubomvu efestileni." 
Joshua2:22 Ezo ntlola zabaleka, zaya kuzimela ezintabeni, zahlala apho iintsuku ezintathu. Amadoda ayethunywe ngukumkani azikhangela kulo lonke ngasendleleni engazifumani, ada ancama abuyela eJeriko." 
Joshua2:23 Zehla ke entabeni iintlola, zawuwela umlambo, zabuyela kuYoshuwa, zamxelela konke okwehlayo kuhambo lwazo," 
Joshua2:24 zathi: “Inene, uNdikhoyo elaa lizwe lonke ulinikezela kuthi, yaye abantu balapho bonke baphelelwe ngamandla ngenxa yokoyika.”" 
Joshua3:1 Ngengomso uYoshuwa namaSirayeli ephela bavuka xa kumpondo zankomo, banduluka eShitim, baya kuma phezu kweJordan lo gama balinde ukuwela." 
Joshua3:2 Emva kweentsuku ezintathu iinduna zajikeleza esikhululweni," 
Joshua3:3 ziyalela abantu zisithi: “Xa nibona ityesi yomnqophiso *kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu kunye nababingeleli abangabaLevi abayithweleyo, ze niphakame, niphume, nilandele." 
Joshua3:4 Kaloku niza kuhamba ngendlela eningazange niyihambe ngaphambili; kuya kufuneka ke nilandele ababingeleli. Kodwa kufuneka ningasondeli kwityesi yomnqophiso. Ze kubekho umgama omalunga nekhilomitha enye phakathi kwayo nani.” 
Joshua3:5 UYoshuwa ke wathi ebantwini: “Zihlambululeni, kuba ngomso uNdikhoyo uza kwenza imimangaliso phakathi kwenu.”" 
Joshua3:6 Waza wabhekisa kubabingeleli wathi: “Thwalani ityesi yomnqophiso niwele, baze abantu balandele.” Benjenjalo ke ababingeleli." 
Joshua3:7 Wathi uNdikhoyo kuYoshuwa: “Into endiza kuyenza namhlanje iya kukwenza utsho uhlonipheke kumaSirayeli, aqonde ukuba ndinawe nanjengoMosis." 
Joshua3:8 Yithi kubabingeleli abathwele ityesi yomnqophiso ze bathi bakufika emlanjeni iJordan, bangene beme enyeleni.”" 
Joshua3:9 UYoshuwa wabiza amaSirayeli wathi: “Sondelani nize kuva amazwi athethwe nguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu. 
Joshua3:10 Noqonda ngale nto ukuba uThixo ophilayo ukho phakathi kwenu: nguye oya kuwaswantsulisa amaKanana, amaHeti, amaHivi, amaPerezi namaGirgashi, ama-Amori kunye namaJebhusi." 
Joshua3:11 Niyabona, ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, iNkosi yehlabathi liphela, yiyo enandulelayo ukuwela iJordan." 
Joshua3:12 Khethani ishumi elinambini lamadoda kwizizwe zakwaSirayeli, ibe nye kwisizwe ngasinye." 
Joshua3:13 Bakuthi cakatha emanzini ababingeleli abathwele ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, iNkosi yehlabathi liphela, umlambo iJordan uya kuma, ahlanganiselane ndawonye amanzi avela ngentla.”" 
Joshua3:14 Yayilixesha lokuvuna, umlambo uzele, uphuphuma. Ukunduluka kwamaSirayeli ukuya kuwela iJordan, ababingeleli babewakhokele, bethwele ityesi yomnqophiso. Kuthe nje ukuba bathi cakatha emlanjeni," 
Joshua3:15  
Joshua3:16 ema amanzi avela ngentla, ahlanganiselana ada aya kutsho eAdam, idolophu emelene neZaretan. Amanzi ahlayo ukusinga kuLwandle oluFileyo anqamka, baza ke abantu bawelela kufuphi neJeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Lo gama abantu bakwaSirayeli bawelayo behamba kumhlaba owomileyo, ababingeleli ababethwele ityesi yomnqophiso babemi zinzi kumhlaba owomileyo apho esizikithini somlambo iJordan, bada bawela baphelela abantu." 
Joshua4:1 Lakuba luwele lwaphelela uhlanga lwamaSirayeli, *uNdikhoyo wathi kuYoshuwa:" 
Joshua4:2 “Tyumba amadoda abe lishumi elinambini, ibe nye kwisizwe ngasinye." 
Joshua4:3 Yithi makathathe ishumi elinambini lamatye kulaa ndawo bekume zinzi kuyo ababingeleli esazulwini seJordan, awathwale loo matye, aze awabeke apho kuya kuba kukhululwe khona ngokuhlwa namhlanje.”" 
Joshua4:4 UYoshuwa wawabiza loo madoda alishumi elinambini awatyumbileyo kwisizwe ngasinye," 
Joshua4:5 wathi: “Ngenani emlanjeni iJordan, nigqithe kwityesi yomnqophiso kaThixo uNdikhoyo, ize indoda nganye ixwaye ilitye eliza kumela isizwe ngasinye samaSirayeli.”" 
Joshua4:6 Watsho esithi: “La matye ngumqondiso kumaSirayeli ngazo zonke iziganeko zikaNdikhoyo. Xa bebuza ngomso abantwana benu besithi: ‘Ngawantoni na la matye?’ 
Joshua4:7 nobaxelela ukuba ngamhla ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo yayiwela umlambo, ema amanzi, ahlanganiselana eJordan. La matye ohlala esisikhumbuzo kumaSirayeli sesiganeko esehla kule ndawo.”" 
Joshua4:8 AmaSirayeli enza ngokomyalelo kaYoshuwa. Awakhetha amatye alishumi elinambini emlanjeni iJordan ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo kuYoshuwa, lalinye kwisizwe ngasinye, awasa kulaa ndawo kwakuza kukhululwa kuyo ngaloo mhla." 
Joshua4:9 UYoshuwa yena wabeka amanye amatye alishumi elinambini kulaa ndawo kwakumi kuyo ababingeleli ababethwele ityesi yomnqophiso, phakathi emlanjeni iJordan. (Aselapho unanamhla loo matye.)" 
Joshua4:10 Ababingeleli bema njalo emlanjeni iJordan kwada kwagqitywa yonke into ekwakuthiwe kuYoshuwa mayenziwe ngabantu. Zizinto ezaziyalelwe nguMosis zonke ezo. Abantu bakhawuleza ukuwela umlambo. 
Joshua4:11 Bakuba bewele bonke, ityesi yomnqophiso yawezwa ngababingeleli, abantu bejongile." 
Joshua4:12 Amadoda esizwe sakwaRubhen nesakwaGadi, kunye nenxalenye yesizwe sakwaManase, awela kuqala kunabo bonke abantu, exhobile, njengoko wayetshilo kuwo uMosis." 
Joshua4:13 Kwawela amashumi mane amawaka amadoda axhobele idabi, aya kutsho kwezo ntili zeJeriko, ekhatshwa nguNdikhoyo." 
Joshua4:14 Into eyenziwa nguNdikhoyo ngalo mhla yatsho amaSirayeli amhlonela uYoshuwa. Amhlonela bonke ubomi bakhe njengoko amhlonelayo uMosis. 
Joshua4:15 UNdikhoyo wathi kuYoshuwa: 
Joshua4:16 “Xelela ababingeleli abathwele ityesi yomnqophiso ukuba baphume emlanjeni.” 
Joshua4:17 Wenjenjalo ke uYoshuwa," 
Joshua4:18 bathi bakuba bewelile, wabuya wazala, waphuphuma kwakhona umlambo." 
Joshua4:19 AmaSirayeli ayiwela iJordan ngomhla weshumi kwinyanga yokuqala, afika amisa iintente eGiligali engasempumalanga yeJeriko." 
Joshua4:20 UYoshuwa wawamisa apho eGiligali laa matye alishumi linambini ayethathwe eJordan. 
Joshua4:21 Wathi kumaSirayeli: “Xa bathe abantwana benu babuza kuni, boyise, besithi: ‘Ngawantoni na la matye?’" 
Joshua4:22 ze nibabalisele nithi: ‘AmaSirayeli ayiwela le Jordan ehamba emhlabeni owomileyo.’ 
Joshua4:23 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu wawanqumamisa amanzi eJordan, khon' ukuze niwele umlambo womile, kanye ngalaa ndlela womisa ngayo amanzi oLwandle oluBomvu khon' ukuze siwele." 
Joshua4:24 Loo nto ke iya kwenza ukuba bonke abemi belizwe bawaqonde amandla kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nani nimoyike ngalo lonke ixesha.”" 
Joshua5:1 Zonke iikumkani zama-Amori ngasentshonalanga kweJordan, nazo zonke ezamaKanana ezigudle ulwandle, zeva ngesiganeko esenziwa nguNdikhoyo sokomisa iJordan ada awela onke amaSirayeli. Zankwantya, zaphelelwa ngamandla ngenxa yamaSirayeli." 
Joshua5:2 Ngelo xesha *uNdikhoyo wathi kuYoshuwa: “Sebenzisa iintshengeca zelitye lenyengane, uwaluse amaSirayeli angolukanga.”" 
Joshua5:3 Wenjenjalo ke uYoshuwa, wawalusela endaweni ekuthiwa yiNduli yeNyama yoKwaluswa." 
Joshua5:4 Ukumka kwamaSirayeli eJiputa onke amakhwenkwe ayesele alukile. Kodwa ke kuthe ngenxa yokubhadula entlango amashumi amane eminyaka akwabikho thuba lakwalusa nkwenkwe. Kanti ke onke amadoda ayeselekwixabiso lokuya emfazweni ukufuduka kwabo eJiputa ayeselebhubhile ngenxa yokungamthobeli uNdikhoyo. Njengoko watshoyo kooyise-mkhulu uNdikhoyo akazange awavumele alibone ilizwe laseKanana eliphuphuma ubisi nobusi. 
Joshua5:5  
Joshua5:6  
Joshua5:7 Oonyana uNdikhoyo awabakhulisa endaweni yooyise ngabo aba awabalusayo ngoku uYoshuwa, kuba kaloku babengazange boluka." 
Joshua5:8 Akuba alusiwe ke onke, ahlala esikhululweni ada aphila loo madoda." 
Joshua5:9 UNdikhoyo wathi kuYoshuwa: “Namhlanje ndilisusile kuni ihlazo lokuba ngamakhoboka aseJiputa.” Yiyo ke loo nto loo ndawo kwathiwa ukubizwa kwayo yiGiligali, igama esabizwa ngalo." 
Joshua5:10 Ngexesha amaSirayeli ayeseseGiligali entilini yaseJeriko, enza umsitho *wePasika ngokuhlwa komhla weshumi elinesine waloo nyanga." 
Joshua5:11 Ngomhla olandelayo ayeqala ukutya ukutya kwaseKanana, agcada ingqolowa, enza nezonka ezingenagwele." 
Joshua5:12 *Imana yaphela ngengomso, akaphinda ayifumana amaSirayeli, aza ngaloo nyaka atya ukutya okuveliswe yiKanana." 
Joshua5:13 Xa wayeselapho ngaseJeriko uYoshuwa, wagagana nomfo ophethe ikrele. Waya kuye uYoshuwa, wafika wathi: “Ngaba ungakuthi, okanye ulutshaba?”" 
Joshua5:14 “Nakanye, ndikho nje mna ndiyingqwayi-ngqwayi yomkhosi *kaNdikhoyo,” utshilo lo mfo. Wazikhahlela phantsi uYoshuwa, wathi: “Mhlekazi, mna ke ndisisicaka sakho; ufuna ndenze ntoni?”" 
Joshua5:15 Yathi loo ngqwayi-ngqwayi yomkhosi kaNdikhoyo: “Khulula iimbadada zakho ezo. Lo mhlaba umi kuwo ngumhlaba ongcwele.” Wenjenjalo ke uYoshuwa. 
Joshua6:1 Amasango eJeriko ayevalwe mba ukuze amaSirayeli angabi nako ukungena. Kwakungekho mntu uphumayo nongenayo kweso sixeko. 
Joshua6:2 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuYoshuwa: “IJeriko ndiyinikela kuwe, kunye nokumkani wayo, kwakunye namagorha ayo." 
Joshua6:3 Wena ke kunye nomkhosi wakho kufuneka niyijikeleze kanye ngemini iintsuku zibe ntandathu. 
Joshua6:4 Kufuneka ababingeleli babe sixhenxe, elowo ephethe isigodlo, bahambe ngaphambi kwetyesi yomnqophiso. Ngosuku lwesixhenxe kufuneka wena nomkhosi wakho nisijikeleze kasixhenxe isixeko, ababingeleli bona bavuthele izigodlo." 
Joshua6:5 Kuya kuthi ke xa bevuthela isandi eside ababingeleli, nihlabe umkhosi, nimemeze, zidilike iindonga zeJeriko. Wandule ke ukungena macal' onke ngaphakathi kwesixeko wonke umkhosi.”" 
Joshua6:6 UYoshuwa wababiza ababingeleli, wathi kubo: “Thathani ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, baze abasixhenxe kuni bahambe ngaphambi kwayo, bephethe izigodlo.”" 
Joshua6:7 Waza ke wayalela umkhosi wakhe ukuba ujikeleze isixeko, amanye amadoda axhobileyo ahambe ngaphambi kwetyesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo." 
Joshua6:8 Kwathi uYoshuwa esathetha njalo beza phambili abo babingeleli basixhenxe bephethe izigodlo ezisixhenxe, bazivuthela, baza balandelwa yityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo." 
Joshua6:9 Ibutho lamadoda axhobileyo lahamba phambi kwabababingeleli ababevuthela izigodlo, elinye ibutho lalandela ityesi yomnqophiso. Wonke loo gama izigodlo bezihlokoma." 
Joshua6:10 UYoshuwa wawayalela amadoda akhe wathi: “Ze ningahlabi mkhosi, ningakhwazi. Ewe, ze ningakhe nilinge niyivule imilomo yenu, ide ibe lolo suku niya kuyalelwa ndim.”" 
Joshua6:11 Loo madoda ke ajikeleza isixeko kwakanye, ehamba netyesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, aza abuyela esikhululweni, alala." 
Joshua6:12 Ngengomso uYoshuwa wavuka kwangentseni, nababingeleli baphinda bayithwala ityesi yomnqophiso njengezolo." 
Joshua6:13 Kwahamba amadoda axhobileyo ngaphambili, kwalandela ababingeleli abavuthela izigodlo abasixhenxe, kweza ababingeleli abathwele ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, kwaza ekugqibeleni yangamadoda axhobileyo." 
Joshua6:14 Ngolu suku lwesibini basijikeleza kanye isixeko, baza babuyela kwasesikhululweni. Loo nto bayenza iintsuku zantandathu." 
Joshua6:15 Ngosuku lwesixhenxe bavuka kwangomsobomvu, baza basijikeleza kasixhenxe isixeko, kwanjengalaa ndlela babenze ngayo. Ewe, ngale imini baphindelela kwada kwasixhenxe ukusijikeleza." 
Joshua6:16 Ngesihlandlo sesixhenxe, xa ababingeleli babevuthela izigodlo, uYoshuwa wathi kumadoda akhe: “Ze nihlabe umkhosi, nimemeze, kuba uNdikhoyo usinikile esi sixeko!" 
Joshua6:17 Isixeko, nayo yonke into ekuso, kufuneka zitshatyalaliswe mpela, zibe ngumnikelo kuNdikhoyo ngomlilo. NguRahabhi ihenyukazi yedwa kunye nabantu bakowabo amabasindiswe, kuba yena wazifihla iintlola zethu." 
Joshua6:18 Ze ningathathi nto ekufuneka itshatyalaliswe; xa nenjenjalo nozibizela intshabalalo ngokunokwenu, nihlisele amaSirayeli ishwangusha xa ewonke." 
Joshua6:19 Yonke into eyenziwe ngesiliva, negolide, nobhedu, okanye ngentsimbi, mayahlulelwe uNdikhoyo. Kufuneka ifakwe koovimba bakaNdikhoyo.”" 
Joshua6:20 Bazivuthela izigodlo ababingeleli. Athi akuziva amadoda, ahlaba umkhosi ememeza, zadilika iindonga! Wasuka umkhosi waya ngqo esixekweni, wafika wasithimba." 
Joshua6:21 Asenza umnikelo kuNdikhoyo isixeko, afaka ikrele umntu wonke, abulala amadoda nabafazi, abatsha nabadala. Abulala iinkomo, iigusha, kunye needonki." 
Joshua6:22 UYoshuwa wathi la madoda mabini ayeziintlola makaye kwaRahabhi, eze naye nabantu bakowabo, njengoko ayethembisile." 
Joshua6:23 Aya ke, abuya naye uRahabhi, kunye noyise, nonina, nabantakwabo, kunye nabo bonke abantu bakowabo. Bathatha wonke loo mzi uphela, babahlalisa ngakwisikhululo samaSirayeli." 
Joshua6:24 Bantumeka umlilo kweso sixeko, satsha nqu, kunye nento yonke eyayilapho. Igolide, nesiliva, nezinto zobhedu, nentsimbi, bazithatha bazisa koovimba bakaNdikhoyo." 
Joshua6:25 Kodwa uYoshuwa wabasindisa ooRahabhi nabantu bakowabo, yaye uRahabhi usekho kwaSirayeli unanamhla, kuba wafihla iintlola ezazithunyelwe eJeriko nguYoshuwa." 
Joshua6:26 UYoshuwa wafunga wathi: “Uqalekisiwe nguNdikhoyo umntu ovusa esi sixeko saseJeriko. Akubeka isiseko saso woswelekelwa lizibulo lakhe. Akuvusa amasango aso woswelekelwa nguntondo wakhe.” 
Joshua6:27 UNdikhoyo waba noYoshuwa, lwavakala kulo lonke udumo lwakhe." 
Joshua7:1 Akazange athembeke amaSirayeli kumyalelo *kaNdikhoyo wokuba angathathi nto kufuneka itshatyalalisiwe eJeriko. Umfo owawudelayo loo myalelo nguAkana, unyana kaKarmi, umzukulwana kaZabhedi wakwaZera wesizwe sakwaJuda. Loo nto yawuvuthisa umsindo kaNdikhoyo ngakumaSirayeli." 
Joshua7:2 UYoshuwa wathumela amadoda asuka eJeriko esiya eAyi, idolophu eyayingasempumalanga yeBhetele, imelene neBhetaven, ukuba aye kuhlola elo lizwe. Aya ke, ayihlola iAyi," 
Joshua7:3 abuya athi kuYoshuwa: “Akukho mfuneko yakusa wonke umkhosi eAyi. Makuye nokuba ngamawaka amabini okanye amathathu amadoda. Noko abantu baseAyi bambalwa.” 
Joshua7:4 Hayi ke, kwaphuma amawaka amathathu ukuya kuhlasela iAyi, kodwa asuka aswantsuliswa." 
Joshua7:5 Amadoda aseAyi awajika emasangweni edolophu loo madoda, awaleqa ewahlisa induli ukuya kutsho ezixhotyeni, abulala amashumi amathathu anantandathu. AmaSirayeli atyhafa, ankwantya kukoyika." 
Joshua7:6 UYoshuwa kunye namadoda amakhulu bazikrazula izambatho zabo, bazikhahlela phantsi ngaphambi kwetyesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, bahlala benjenjalo kwada kwahlwa. Babezigalele nangothuli entloko, bebonakalisa intlungu ababenayo." 
Joshua7:7 UYoshuwa wakhala wathi: “Ndikhoyo, Mhlekazi, wawusiwezela ntoni ke kambe eJordan? Wawufuna ukuza kusitshabalalisa ngala ma-Amori? Akwaba sasisuke sahlala ngaphesheya kweJordan kwaba kanye!" 
Joshua7:8 Ndikhoyo, ndiza kuthini ngoku esuke aswantsuliswa nje amaSirayeli ziintshaba zawo?" 
Joshua7:9 Akuyiva le nto amaKanana kunye nabemi beli lizwe, baza kuza bonke, basicime igama. Ke wena, uza kuthini ngegama lakho elidume kangaka?”" 
Joshua7:10 Wathi kuYoshuwa uNdikhoyo: “Yoshuwa, vuka; uqubudele ntoni kuloo ndawo?" 
Joshua7:11 AmaSirayeli enze isono! Awaphule umnqophiso wam, awugqitha umyalelo ebendiwanike wona, athatha ezinye izinto kwebekufuneka zitshatyalaliswe mpela. Azibile, aza axoka nokuxoka, azifihla phakathi kwezinto zawo." 
Joshua7:12 Yiyo ke loo nto engenakumelana notshaba nje amaSirayeli. Ebaleka nje kungenxa yokuba nawo emelwe kukutshabalala! Andikubuya ndibe phakathi kwenu nide nibe nizitshabalalisile izinto ebekufuneka zitshatyalaliswe. 
Joshua7:13 “Phakama ke, ubahlambulule abantu. Yithi kubo mabazihlambulule ngenxa yokuya kwenzeka ngomso, kuba mna Ndikhoyo, Thixo wamaSirayeli, ndithi kubo: ‘Phakathi kwenu kukho oko bekumelwe kukunikelwa kum ngokutshatyalaliswa. Anisoze nibe nakumelana notshaba de nahlukane nezo zinto.’" 
Joshua7:14 “Baxelele ke ukuba ngomso kusasa baza kubizwa ngokwezizwe zabo. Eso sizwe salathiweyo nguNdikhoyo kufuneka size ngaphambili ngokwezindlu zaso, ize indlu eyalathiweyo ize ngaphambili ngokomzi, kuze kumzi owalathiweyo kuphume indoda nganye." 
Joshua7:15 Loo ndoda ke yalathiweyo kwaza kwafunyanwa kuyo ezo zinto kufuneka zitshatyalalisiwe, yotshiswa kunye nako konke okukokwayo. Kaloku iwaphule umnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, yenza ubuyatha kwaSirayeli.”" 
Joshua7:16 Kwangentsasa ngengomso uYoshuwa wawabiza amaSirayeli, izizwe ngezizwe. Isizwe sakwaJuda salathwa nguNdikhoyo." 
Joshua7:17 Seza ngaphambili isizwe sakwaJuda ngokwezindlu zaso, kwaza kwalathwa indlu kaZera. Kuloo ndlu kaZera kwathiwa imizi yayo mayize ngaphambili," 
Joshua7:18 kwaza kwalathwa umzi kaZabhedi. Eza ngaphambili amadoda aloo mzi, kwaza kwalathwa uAkana unyana kaKarmi umzukulwana kaZabhedi wakwaZera wesizwe sakwaJuda."
