Joshua7:19 Wathi kuye uYoshuwa: “Mfo wam, mzukise uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli, uzityande igila kuye, uyivume into oyenzileyo, ungandifihleli.”" 
Joshua7:20 Wathi uAkana: “Kuyinene ukuba ndimonile uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli. Yiyo ke le into endayenzayo: 
Joshua7:21 phakathi kwamaxhoba ndabona umnweba omhle owenziwe eBhabheli, nesiliva ebunzima buziikhilogram ezimbini, kunye necwecwe legolide elibunzima bungaphezu kwesiqingatha sekhilogram. Ndazinqwenela, ndazithatha ke. Naziya zombelwe phaya endlwini yam, isiliva yona ingaphantsi.”" 
Joshua7:22 UYoshuwa wathi makuye amadoda apho. Akhawuleza ke, aza azifumana zombelwe apho ngenene ezo zinto, isiliva ingaphantsi yona." 
Joshua7:23 Bazithatha bazisa kuYoshuwa nakumaSirayeli ephela, baza bazandlala phambi koNdikhoyo." 
Joshua7:24 UYoshuwa, ekunye namaSirayeli, bamthatha uAkana, kunye naloo siliva, naloo golide, naloo mnweba, nditsho nkqu noonyana neentombi zakhe, imfuyo yakhe, nentente yakhe, konke okwakhe, babasa kwintili yeAkore." 
Joshua7:25 Wathi uYoshuwa: “Kutheni usifake enkathazweni nje? Nawe ke ngoku uNdikhoyo uza kukuhlisela inkathazo.” Umntu wonke wamxuluba ngamatye uAkana. Nosapho lwakhe nalo baluxuluba ngamatye, balutshisa kunye nako konke okwakhe." 
Joshua7:26 Bafumba amatye phezu kwakhe – aselapho unanamhla. Yathiywa njalo ke loo ndawo, kwathiwa yintili yeAkore. Yathomalala ke nengqumbo kaNdikhoyo." 
Joshua8:1 Ke kaloku wathi *uNdikhoyo kuYoshuwa: “Uze ungoyiki, ungankwantyi. Thatha wonke umkhosi wakho, uhlasele iAyi. Ukumkani waseAyi, kunye nabantu bakhe, nesixeko sakhe, kunye nalo mhlaba wakhe, ndimnikele ezandleni zakho." 
Joshua8:2 Nalapha eAyi uze wenze laa nto wawuyenze eJeriko nakukumkani wakhona. Kodwa ngoku amaxhoba eenkomo kunye nezinye izinto nize nizithathele zona. Nize nizilungiselele ukuyiqubula loo dolophu, nibe nabalaleli ngapha kwayo.”" 
Joshua8:3 UYoshuwa waxhabashela ukuya eAyi kunye nomkhosi wakhe. Wakhetha amawaka amashumi mathathu awona angamakhalipha kumadoda omkhosi, wawakhupha ngobusuku" 
Joshua8:4 nalo myalelo: “Phulaphulani! Zimelani ngapha kwesixeko, ningabi kude, nihlale nichophe phezu kwezikrweqe." 
Joshua8:5 Mna kunye namadoda ahamba nam sosivelela ngaphambili isixeko. Xa amadoda aseAyi asihlangabezayo thina siya kujika sibaleke njengokwesihlandlo sokuqala. 
Joshua8:6 Wona ke osisukela de athi qelele esixekweni, eba siyabaleka njengakuqala. Besasisukela njalo ke" 
Joshua8:7 nina niya kuphuma kuloo ndawo benizimele kuyo, nihlasele isixeko, nisithimbe. UNdikhoyo uThixo wenu wosinikela ezandleni zenu." 
Joshua8:8 Nakuba nisithimbile eso sixeko, ze nisintumeke umlilo ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo. Ze nenjenjalo; ndiyaniyalela!”" 
Joshua8:9 Wawandulula ke loo madoda uYoshuwa, ahamba aya kulinda ezimele ngasentshonalanga yeAyi, phakathi kweAyi neBhetele. Yena uYoshuwa wasala apho babekhulule khona ngobo busuku." 
Joshua8:10 Wavuka ekuseni uYoshuwa, wahlanganisa elakhe iqela lomkhosi. Wenjenjeya ewukhokelela eAyi kunye neenkokheli zawo." 
Joshua8:11 Lo mkhosi wahamba ujonge ngqo eAyi, wafika wagxumeka iintente zawo emantla esixeko, ahlulwe naso yintili." 
Joshua8:12 Ngelo xesha uYoshuwa wayeselethathe amawaka amahlanu amadoda, wawafihla ngakwintshonalanga yesixeko, phakathi kweAyi neBhetele." 
Joshua8:13 Amiswa ngeendawo zawo ke loo madoda, elungele idabi, iintente zawo zimi ngasemantla esixeko, amanye amadoda ezifihlile ngasentshonalanga. Ngobo busuku uYoshuwa wangena kuloo ntili." 
Joshua8:14 Akabanga saphozisa maseko ukumkani waseAyi akuwubona ekuseni umkhosi kaYoshuwa. Wesuka kwangoko, wawuhlangabeza kunye namadoda akhe kuloo ntili ikhangelene nentlango, engaqondi phofu ukuba kukho amadoda alaleleyo ngaphaya kwesixeko." 
Joshua8:15 UYoshuwa namadoda omkhosi wakhe yena wanga uyabaleka, wabheka ngasentlango." 
Joshua8:16 Kwahlatywa umkhosi, aphuma onke amadoda aseAyi, awusukela umkhosi kaYoshuwa. Lo gama asukelayo wawuya usithi tyishi umgama ophakathi kwawo nesixeko." 
Joshua8:17 Akwasala nanye indoda eBhetele naseAyi engawasukelanga amaSirayeli, yaza iAyi yasala ingenabani wakuyikhusela." 
Joshua8:18 UNdikhoyo wathi kuYoshuwa: “Khomba eAyi ngomkhonto wakho, kuba ndiyinikezela kuwe loo dolophu.” Wenjenjalo uYoshuwa." 
Joshua8:19 Uthe nje akusiphakamisa isandla, laa mkhosi wakhe wawuzimela wesuka iindulumbane wangena esixekweni, wasintumeka umlilo." 
Joshua8:20 Athe akubheka amadoda aseAyi abona kufunquza intshinyela yomsi ngasesibhakabhakeni. Akazange abe nakubalekela ndawo, kuba amaSirayeli awayezenza ngathi ayabaleka ajika angena kuwo." 
Joshua8:21 Kaloku wathi uYoshuwa neqela lakhe bakuqonda ukuba isixeko sithinjiwe liqela elalizimele, yaye sasisele silidangatye ngumlilo, bajika bawahlasela amadoda aseAyi." 
Joshua8:22 AmaSirayeli awayethimbe isixeko afika aza kunceda edabini. Aba ke amadoda aseAyi angqingwe macal' onke ngamaSirayeli, abulawa onke. Akubangakho mntu usindayo, kungazange kuphuncule bani," 
Joshua8:23 ngaphandle kokumkani waseAyi yedwa. Kanti ke naye wabanjwa wasiwa kuYoshuwa. 
Joshua8:24 AmaSirayeli, akuba ewabulele onke loo madoda ayeleqwe ngawo emasimini nasentlango, abuyela kwaseAyi, afika abulala yonke into engumntu apho." 
Joshua8:25 Ngaloo mini kwabulawa yonke into engumntu eAyi, kwafa ishumi elinambini lamawaka lamadoda nabafazi." 
Joshua8:26 UYoshuwa wayesoloko umkhonto wakhe ewukhombe eAyi, akasithoba kwada kwaba kufe umntu wonke apho." 
Joshua8:27 AmaSirayeli azithathela imfuyo kwanamanye amaxhoba njengoko uNdikhoyo wawayalelayo ngomlomo kaYoshuwa. 
Joshua8:28 UYoshuwa wayintumeka umlilo iAyi, yasala ingamabhodlo. Iseyiloo nto unanamhla oku." 
Joshua8:29 Ukumkani waseAyi yena waxhonywa emthini, wayekwa apho kwada kwarhatyela. Kwathi ngorhatya wathi uYoshuwa isidumbu sikakumkani masithulwe siye kulahlwa emasangweni esixeko. Kwafunjwa phezu kwaso ingqumba yamatye asekho apho unanamhla." 
Joshua8:30 Emva koko ke uYoshuwa wenzela *uNdikhoyo, uThixo kaSirayeli, iqonga lamadini phezu kwentaba iEbhali," 
Joshua8:31 elenze njengoko uMosis, isicaka sikaNdikhoyo, wayeyalele. Walenza ngamatye angaqingqwanga, ngokomyalelo osencwadini yomthetho kaMosis. Kwelo qonga kwakusenziwa amadini atshiswayo kunye nawobudlelane." 
Joshua8:32 UYoshuwa wawakhuphela umthetho kaMosis, ewukrola ematyeni, amaSirayeli ejongile." 
Joshua8:33 AmaSirayeli onke, amadoda amakhulu, amagosa, nabalamli, kwakunye nabangeneleli, bema bephahle ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, bejongene nababingeleli bomlibo ka-Aron ababeyithwele. Elinye iqela lalimi ngakwintaba iGerezim, elinye limi ngakwintaba iEbhali. Kaloku uMosis, isicaka sikaNdikhoyo, wayethe maze benjenje lakufika ithuba lokubhengeza amathamsanqa uNdikhoyo awanika abantu bakhe amaSirayeli." 
Joshua8:34 Kwesi sithuba ke uYoshuwa wabafundela umthetho uphela, nditsho iintsikelelo neziqalekiso njengoko zibhaliwe encwadini yomthetho." 
Joshua8:35 UYoshuwa ke wayifundela elo bandla liphela imiyalelo kaMosis, engashiyanga nesuntswana eli. Ayekho namakhosikazi, nabantwana, kwakunye nabangeneleli abemi phakathi kwamaSirayeli." 
Joshua9:1 Imbali yokutshatshela kwamaSirayeli yaya kuvakala nakwiikumkani ezazimi ngasentshonalanga kweJordan: kweleentaba, emazantsi eentaba, nasemantla konxweme lolwandle, ukuya kutsho eLebhanon. Ezo ke yayiziikumkani ezazilawula amaHeti, ama-Amori, amaKanana, amaPerezi, amaHivi, namaJebhusi." 
Joshua9:2 Zonke zabuthelana ngamxhelo mnye ukuze zilwe noYoshuwa namaSirayeli. 
Joshua9:3 Abantu baseGibheyon, ababengamaHivi, bayiva imbali yezigigaba zikaYoshuwa eJeriko naseAyi," 
Joshua9:4 baza bagqiba ekubeni mabenze iqhinga. Bathume izigidimi zilayishe ukutya ezimbongolweni ngeengxowa ezigugileyo. 
Joshua9:5 Zanxiba amadlavu, neembadada ezikrazukileyo, zathatha isonka esomileyo esingundileyo" 
Joshua9:6 Zenyuka zaya esikhululweni eGiligali, zafika zathi kuYoshuwa namaSirayeli: “Singabantu abavela kwilizwe elikude. Size kucela kuni imvisiswano yokuhlalisana ngoxolo.”" 
Joshua9:7 AmaSirayeli athi: “Singathini na ukunqophisana nani? Kusenokwenzeka ukuba nisuka kwalapha kufuphi.” 
Joshua9:8 Bathi kuYoshuwa: “Thina sizizicaka zakho.” Wababuza uYoshuwa wathi: “Ningamani, yaye nivela phi?”" 
Joshua9:9 Bona baphendula bathi: “Mhlekazi, sivela kwelikude; saye sivile ngezigigaba *zikaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, nangayo yonke into awayenza eJiputa," 
Joshua9:10 kwakunye nakwenze kwiikumkani ezimbini zama-Amori ngaphesheya kweJordan, kukumkani uSihon waseHeshbhon kunye nokumkani uOgi waseBhashan owayemi eAshtoreti." 
Joshua9:11 Amadoda amakhulu akuthi, kunye nabemi bonke belakowethu, bathi kuthi: ‘Zenzeleni umphako wendlela, nihambe niye kubo, nithi: “Sizizicaka zenu. Visisanani nathi, sihlalisane ngoxolo.” ’" 
Joshua9:12 Khangela umphako wethu wesonka. Ukunduluka kwethu ekhaya sisiza apha, esi sonka sasiseshushu. Ngoku sesomile, singunde nokungunda." 
Joshua9:13 Iimvaba zewayini zazizele, zintsha, ngoku sezikrazukile. Neempahla zethu kunye neembadada zigugile luhambo olude.”" 
Joshua9:14 Amadoda akwaSirayeli angcamla kumphako waloo madoda, kodwa akakhange abhekise kuNdikhoyo." 
Joshua9:15 NoYoshuwa ke wasivuma isicelo sawo soxolo, wanqophisana nawo ngelithi akayi kubulawa. Zafunga iinkokheli zebandla lamaSirayeli, zathi loo mnqophiso aziyi kuwutyeshela." 
Joshua9:16 Kwathi kungekadluli neentsuku ezintathu senziwa isivumelwano, eva amaSirayeli ukuba abo bantu yayingabamelwane bawo, behlala kufuphi nawo." 
Joshua9:17 Anduluka ke amaSirayeli, athi emva kweentsuku ezintathu agaleleka apho kwakuhlala khona loo madoda. Izixeko zawo yayiyiGibheyon, iKefira, iBheroti, kunye neKiriyati-yarim." 
Joshua9:18 Kambe ke amaSirayeli akazange ababulale aba bantu, kuba kaloku iinkokheli zebandla lawo zazibenzele isifungo ngegama likaNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli. Lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli lazikhalazela iinkokheli," 
Joshua9:19 zaza iinkokheli zathi: “Kaloku safunga ngegama likaNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli kwaba bantu. Ke ngoko asinakubenza nto konke. 
Joshua9:20 Naku emasikwenze: masingabachukumisi, hleze sihlelwe yingqumbo ngokutyeshela isifungo." 
Joshua9:21 Masibayeke baphile ngokwesifungo sethu, kodwa ngabo abaza kusikhelela amanzi, basicandele iinkuni.”" 
Joshua9:22 UYoshuwa wathi mabeziswe kuye abantu baseGibheyon, wabhekisa kubo wathi: “Nisikhohlisele ntoni nisithi nivela kude nje, kanti nihlala kufuphi?" 
Joshua9:23 Niqalekisiwe ngenxa yento eniyenzileyo. Niya kuhlala ningamakhoboka, nithuthe amanzi, nicande neenkuni zomzi woThixo wam.”" 
Joshua9:24 Bathi ukuphendula bona: “Mhlekazi, sibangwe kukuva ukuba kuyinyani ukuba uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu wayalela uMosis ukuba wonke lo mhlaba makawunike nina, batshabalalise bonke abemi bawo, ke ngoko sasoyikela nobomi bethu." 
Joshua9:25 Ngoku ke siphantsi kwegunya lakho; yenza loo nto wena ucinga ukuba ilungile.” 
Joshua9:26 Nantsi ke into awayenzayo uYoshuwa: wabakhusela, akawavumela ukuba amaSirayeli ababulale," 
Joshua9:27 kodwa wathi mababe ngamakhoboka okukha amanzi nokucanda iinkuni zamaSirayeli nezeqonga lamadini kaNdikhoyo. Loo msebenzi basawenza unanamhla kuloo ndawo yalathwe nguNdikhoyo. 
Joshua10:1 UAdoni-zedeki ukumkani waseJerusalem weva ukuba uYoshuwa wayithimba iAyi wayitshabalalisa, waza nekumkani yalapho wayibulala kanye njengoko wayenzile naseJeriko nakukumkani walapho. Weva nokuba amaGibheyon anqophisene namaSirayeli, yaye ngoku ahlalisana nawo ngoxolo." 
Joshua10:2 Abemi baseJerusalem yabaxhalisa kakhulu le meko, kuba kaloku iGibheyon yayisisixeko esibalulekileyo esilingana nezinye ezingamaziko olawulo. IGibheyon le yayingaphezulu kweAyi, nomkhosi wakhona unamagorha amadoda." 
Joshua10:3 Ngoko ke ukumkani uAdoni-zedeki wathumela izigidimi kukumkani uHoham waseHebron, nakukumkani uPiram waseYamuti, nakukumkani uYafiya waseLakishe, nakukumkani uDebhiri wase-Eglon, esithi:" 
Joshua10:4 “Khanize kundincedisa siyihlasele iGibheyon, kuba amaGibheyon enze uxolo noYoshuwa namaSirayeli.”" 
Joshua10:5 Zasuka ke ezi kumkani zintlanu zama-Amori – eyaseJerusalem neyaseHebron, eyaseYamuti neyaseLakishe kunye neyase-Eglon – zahlanganyela iGibheyon, zayihlasela." 
Joshua10:6 Amadoda aseGibheyon athumela isigidimi kuYoshuwa esikhululweni eGiligali, esithi: “Nceda ungasiyekeli thina zicaka zakho. Khawuleza uze kusinceda usisindise, kuba iinkosi zonke zama-Amori asezintabeni zisihlanganyele; ziyasihlasela.”" 
Joshua10:7 Wesuka kwangoko eGiligali uYoshuwa namagorha onke omkhosi wakhe. 
Joshua10:8 Waza *uNdikhoyo wathi kuYoshuwa: “Uze ungaboyiki. Sendibanikele esandleni sakho. Akukho nanye kwezo kumkani enokumelana nawe.” 
Joshua10:9 UYoshuwa nomkhosi wakhe wahamba ubusuku bonke ukusuka eGiligali besiya eGibheyon, bafika bawaqubula ama-Amori." 
Joshua10:10 UNdikhoyo wawenza adideka ama-Amori ukufika komkhosi wamaSirayeli. AmaSirayeli abaswantsulisa eGibheyon, abasukela ukunyuka inkalo yaseBhete-horon ukubheka eAzeka naseMakeda." 
Joshua10:11 Ngeli xesha babaleka amaSirayeli ukuhla ithambeka, uNdikhoyo wabatyhumfuza ngesichotho konke ukwenjenjeya ukuya eAzeka. Abaninzi bafa sisichotho ngaphezu kokubulawa ngamaSirayeli." 
Joshua10:12 Ngaloo mhla uNdikhoyo amaSirayeli wawoyisela ngawo ama-Amori uYoshuwa wabhekisa kuNdikhoyo phambi kwawo onke amaSirayeli, wathi: “ ‘Langa, yima phezu kweGibheyon. Wena nyanga, yima phezu kwentili iAyalon.’" 
Joshua10:13 Lema bhunxe ilanga, nenyanga nayo ayahamba, kwada kwaba aloyisile utshaba amaSirayeli.” Oku kwenzeka njengoko kuxeliwe kwiNcwadi kaYashare. Ilanga lema bhunxe embindini wesibhakabhaka, alakhawuleza ukutshona isithuba esingangemini iphela." 
Joshua10:14 Akuzange kubekho umhla onjalo ngaphambili. Nangasemva koko awuzange ubekho konke umhla awathi uNdikhoyo waliphulaphula ilizwi lomntu. Wawalwela ke khona uNdikhoyo amaSirayeli! 
Joshua10:15 Emva kwedabi uYoshuwa nomkhosi wakhe babuyela esikhululweni eGiligali. 
Joshua10:16 Ookumkani bama-Amori baphuncula bobahlanu, baya kuzimela emqolombeni eMakeda." 
Joshua10:17 Babhaqwa, waza waxelelwa apho bakhoyo uYoshuwa." 
Joshua10:18 Wathi: “Qengqelani amatye amakhulu, nivale ngawo umlomo womqolomba, nize nishiye amadoda okulinda." 
Joshua10:19 Ke nina ze ningahlali apho, koko lusukeleni utshaba, ningaluvumeli lubalekele ezixekweni zalo. Kaloku *uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu selebanikele ezandleni zenu.”" 
Joshua10:20 Umkhosi kaYoshuwa waluswantsulisa utshaba, kambe abambalwa babaleka bade baya kungena ezixekweni ezinqatyisiweyo zakomawabo, basinda." 
Joshua10:21 Abuya onke amadoda omkhosi kaYoshuwa, ehamba ngoxolo, aya esikhululweni esasiseMakeda, kungekho nto inokuwaphazamisa." 
Joshua10:22 UYoshuwa wathi: “Wuvuleni umqolomba, nizizise kum zontlanu ezo kumkani.”" 
Joshua10:23 Wavulwa ke umqolomba, zaza zasiwa kuYoshuwa iikumkani zaseJerusalem, eHebron, eYamuti, eLakishe, nase-Elon." 
Joshua10:24 UYoshuwa wawabiza ke onke amadoda akwaSirayeli, wathi kubaphathi-mkhosi: “Yizani apha nizinyathele entanyeni ezi kumkani.” Benjenjalo," 
Joshua10:25 wathi ke uYoshuwa: “Nize ningoyiki ninkwantye! Yomelelani nikhaliphe! Yiyo le into aza kuyenza uNdikhoyo kuzo zonke iintshaba zenu enilwa nazo.” 
Joshua10:26 UYoshuwa wazixabela ke ezo zikumkani, wathi mazixhonywe emithini emihlanu. Zajinga apho ke kwada kwaba ngorhatya." 
Joshua10:27 Kwathi ngongcwalazi uYoshuwa wayalela ukuba zithulwe izidumbu zazo. Zaphoswa kwakuloo mqolomba bezizimele kuwo, kwavalwa ngamatye amakhulu apho. Aselapho unanamhla." 
Joshua10:28 Kwangaloo mini uYoshuwa wahlasela iMakeda, wayithimba kwakunye nekumkani valapho. Kwabulawa wonke ubani kweso sixeko, akwasala namnye. Kwikumkani yaseMakeda wenza kwalaa nto wayeyenze kukumkani waseJeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Ukusuka kwabo eMakeda uYoshuwa nawo onke amaSirayeli badlulela eLibhena, nayo bayihlasela." 
Joshua10:30 Nalapho *uNdikhoyo wasinikela isixeko nokumkani waso ezandleni zamaSirayeli. Abulala wonke ubani apho, akashiya mntu. Nalapho kukumkani uYoshuwa wenza eso saseJeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Basuka eLibhena ooYoshuwa, baya eLakishe, bayingqinga, bayihlasela." 
Joshua10:32 UNdikhoyo wayinikezela iLakishe ezandleni zamaSirayeli, waza uYoshuwa wangena kuyo ngosuku lwesibini. Isixeko nabo bonke abakuso wasitshabalalisa njengoko wênjenjalo eLibhena." 
Joshua10:33 Kweza ukumkani uHoram waseGezere, ezokunceda amaLakishe, wachithwa kunye nomkhosi wakhe, babulawa bonke, akwasala nempunde le." 
Joshua10:34 UYoshuwa nomkhosi wakhe basuka eLakishe baya e-Eglon, bafika bayingqinga, bayihlasela." 
Joshua10:35 Bayoyisa kwangaloo mini, babulala wonke umntu apho, baxelisa eLakishe." 
Joshua10:36 UYoshuwa namaSirayeli onke bemka eLakishe, baya eHebron, bafika bayihlasela" 
Joshua10:37 bayoyisa kwangaloo mini. Babulala ukumkani walapho, nabantu bonke beso sixeko, kwakunye nabeelali ezimelene naso. Wathi masitshatyalaliswe eso sixeko uYoshuwa, kanye njenge-Eglon. Akuzange kusinde mntu apho." 
Joshua10:38 Baphethuka apho, babheka eDebhiri. Bafika bayihlasela," 
Joshua10:39 bayoyisa, kunye nokumkani wayo, neelali ezimelene nayo. Kwatshatyalaliswa ukumkani naye wonke umntu owayelapho, akwasala namnye. Nalapho wenza kwaesaseLibhena nesaseHebron." 
Joshua10:40 UYoshuwa wabatshabalalisa bonke abemi belo zwe. Abantu ababemi kweleentaba, emathambekeni ngasempumalanga, kumazants' eentaba zasentshona, kwakunye nabo babemi kwimimandla yentlango ngasemazantsi, neekumkani zabo bonke. Wayethatha phambi konyawo atshayele yonke into ephefumlayo, ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli." 
Joshua10:41 Waloyisa ukusukela eKadeshe-bhaneya emazantsi, kuse eGaza ngaselwandle, nawo wonke ummandla waseGeshon, kuse eGibheyon emantla." 
Joshua10:42 Le mimandla yonke uYoshuwa wayoyisa ephume umkhosi isihlandlo sasinye, kuba kaloku wayesilwelwa nguNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli." 
Joshua10:43 Babuyela kwasesikhululweni eGiligali ooYoshuwa nomkhosi wakhe. 
Joshua11:1 Ukumkani uJabhin waseHazore uthe akuva ngeziqwenga ezazisenziwa ngamaSirayeli, wathumela isigidimi kukumkani uJobhabhi waseMadon nakwiikumkani zaseShimron naseAkeshafi," 
Joshua11:1 Ukumkani uJabhin waseHazore uthe akuva ngeziqwenga ezazisenziwa ngamaSirayeli, wathumela isigidimi kukumkani uJobhabhi waseMadon nakwiikumkani zaseShimron naseAkeshafi," 
Joshua11:2 nakwiikumkani ezazikweleentaba emantla, eJordan kwintili esemzantsi woLwandle lwaseGalili, emazantsi eentaba, nakunxweme lwangaseDore." 
Joshua11:3 Wasithumela nakumaKanana aphahle iJordan, kuma-Amori, kumaHeti, kumaPerezi, nakumaJebhusi kweleenduli, kwanakumaHivi awayemi phantsi kwentaba iHermon kummandla waseMizpa." 
Joshua11:4 Ezo kumkani zeza nemikhosi yazo yonke, inyambalala yamajoni esith' ilanga, ekwanjalo namahashe neenqwelo ubuninzi." 
Joshua11:5 Zahlanganisa imikhosi yazo ezo kumkani, zaya kugxumeka iintente ngakumlanjana iMerom, zilungele ukulwa namaSirayeli." 
Joshua11:6 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuYoshuwa: “Uzungaboyiki wena. Ngeli xesha ngomso ndoba sendiwancedile amaSirayeli ukubabulala bonke. Kufuneka amahashe abo niwatshece imisipha, nezo nqwelo zabo nizintumeke umlilo.”" 
Joshua11:7 Nanko ke uYoshuwa nomkhosi wakhe wonke eyiqubula loo mikhosi ngakuloo mlanjana iMerom. 
Joshua11:8 Wayinikela ezandleni zabo loo mikhosi uNdikhoyo, bayoyisa, bayisukela ukuya kutsho emantla eMisefoti-mayim naseSidon enkulu, kwaya kutsho entshonalanga kuloo ntili yaseMizpa. Babatyakatya kwada akwabikho namnye useleyo." 
Joshua11:9 Ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo uYoshuwa wawatsheca imisipha loo mahashe abo, watshisa nezo nqwelo zabo." 
Joshua11:10 Wajika apho uYoshuwa, waya kuthimba iHazore, wayibulala nekumkani yalapho. (Ngaloo mihla iHazore yayisesona sikumkani siyinjinga kwezo zalapho.)" 
Joshua11:11 Kwabulawa wonke umntu apho, akwasinda namnye, neso sixeko satshatyalaliswa ngomlilo." 
Joshua11:12 Wazithimba zonke ezo zixeko ezinookumkani uYoshuwa, ebulala wonke umntu kwanokumkani, kanye njengoko wayeyalelwe nguMosis isicaka sikaNdikhoyo." 
Joshua11:13 Kambe ke akazange azitshise amaSirayeli izixeko ezazakhiwe ezindulini; yaba yiHazore yodwa awathi uYoshuwa mayitshiswe. 
Joshua11:14 AmaSirayeli emka nawo amaxhoba nemfuyo yezo zixeko. Ababulala bonke abantu, akashiya namnye." 
Joshua11:15 Kaloku uNdikhoyo wayalela uMosis, waza uMosis yena wayigqithisela kuYoshuwa loo miyalelo, ke yena uYoshuwa wayithobela. Wenza konke okwayalelwa nguNdikhoyo kuMosis." 
Joshua11:16 UYoshuwa wawuthimba wonke loo mhlaba: eleenduli, amazantsi eentaba ngasemantla nangasemazantsi, wonke ummandla waseGoshen, nentlango esezantsi, kwakunye naloo ntili yeJordan." 
Joshua11:17 Lo mmandla usuka kwintaba iHalaki ngase-Edom ezantsi, wenjenjeya ukuya kutsho eBhali-gadi emantla kuloo ntili yeLebhanon ngaphantsi kwentaba iHermon. UYoshuwa walwa ithuba elide neekumkani zalapha, kodwa ekugqibeleni wazoyisa, wazibulala." 
Joshua11:18  
Joshua11:19 YiGibheyon qha isixeko esanqophisana namaSirayeli. Kulapho ayehlala khona amaHivi. Zonke ezinye izixeko zoyiswa edabini. 
Joshua11:20 *UNdikhoyo wazinika isibindi sokulwa namaSirayeli, khon' ukuze zitshatyalaliswe ziphele tu kungekho lusizi. Yayingumyalelo kaNdikhoyo lowo kuMosis." 
Joshua11:21 Ngelo xesha uYoshuwa waya kutshabalalisa ama-Anaki ahlala kweleenduli eHebron, eDebhiri, eAnabhi, nakuzo zonke iinduli zakwaJuda nakwaSirayeli. Wawatshabalalisa kunye nezixeko zawo zonke uYoshuwa." 
Joshua11:22 KwaSirayeli akuzange kusinde namnye umntu wesizwe sama-Anaki. Babekho kambe abasindayo eGaza, eGati, naseAshdode." 
Joshua11:23 Wawuthimba wonke loo mhlaba uYoshuwa ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis. Wawunika amaSirayeli ukuba bawume, libe lilifa lawo, khon' ukuze isizwe ngasinye sifumane indawo yaso. Kwabakho uxolo elizweni." 
Joshua12:1 AmaSirayeli ayesele oyisa awuthimba nomhlaba ongasempumalanga yeJordan, ukususa kuloo ngingqi yeAnon, kunyuse loo ntili yeJordan, kuye kutsho kwintaba iHermon." 
Joshua12:2 Owokuqala ukumkani owoyiswayo yaba nguSihon umAmori owayelawula ummandla waseHeshbhon. Icala leGiliyadi laliphantsi kwakhe, ukususela eArure (engakumlambo iAnon) nasembindini wengingqi leyo, ukwenjenjeya ukusa eJabhoko (engumda welama-Amon)." 
Joshua12:3 Intili yeJordan ukususela kuLwandle lwaseGalili nayo yayikwalapho, ukusa ezantsi eBhete-yeshimoti (engasempumalanga yoLwandle oluFileyo) kwenjenjeya kuse emazantsi entaba iPisga." 
Joshua12:4 Woyiswa naye ukumkani uOgi waseBhashan owayengowokugqibela kumaRafa. Wayephethe iAshtaroti kunye ne-Edreyi. 
Joshua12:5 Intaba iHermon, iSaleka, kunye nayo yonke iBhashan, kuse kwimida yeGeshuri neMahaka, necala leGiliyadi, kuye kutsho kummandla kakumkani uSihon waseHeshbhon, nazo zazikwalawulwa yile kumkani." 
Joshua12:6 Ezi kumkani zombini zoyiswa nguMosis namaSirayeli. Umhlaba wazo uMosis isicaka *sikaNdikhoyo wawunika isizwe sakwaRubhen nesakwaGadi nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase. 
Joshua12:7 UYoshuwa kunye namaSirayeli bazoyisa iikumkani ezazimi kummandla ongasentshonalanga yeJordan, ukusuka eBhali-gadi kwintili vaseLebhanon kuse kwintaba iHalaki ezantsi kufuphi neSeyire. Wawohlulela izizwe zakwaSirayeli lo mmandla uYoshuwa, ukuba ziwume." 
Joshua12:8 Nazi iziphaluka zalo mmandla: eleenduli, amazantsi eentaba zasentshona, intili yeJordan namazantsi eentaba zayo, iingingqi zangasempuma, kunye nentlango engasezantsi. Lo mmandla yayingumhlaba wamaHiti, ama-Amori, amaKanana, amaPerezi, amaHivi, namaJebhusi." 
Joshua12:9 AmaSirayeli oyisa iikumkani zezixeko iJeriko, iAyi (ngaseBhetele)," 
Joshua12:10 iJerusalem, iHebron," 
Joshua12:11 iYarmuti, iLakishe," 
Joshua12:12 iEglon, iGezere," 
Joshua12:13 iDebhiri, iGedere," 
Joshua12:14 iHoma, iAradi," 
Joshua12:15 iLibhena, iAdulam," 
Joshua12:16 iMakeda, iBhetele," 
Joshua12:17 iTapuwa, iHefere," 
Joshua12:18 iAfeki, iLasharon," 
Joshua12:19 iMadon, iHazore," 
Joshua12:20 iShimron-meron, iAkeshafi," 
Joshua12:21 iTanaki, iMegido," 
Joshua12:22 iKedeshe, iYokeneham (eKarmele)," 
Joshua12:23 iDore (elunxwemeni), iGoyim (eGiligali)," 
Joshua12:24 kunye neTirza. Yayingamashumi mathathu ezikumkani zizonke. 
Joshua13:1 Mhlenikweni uYoshuwa wayeselaluphele kakhulu, *uNdikhoyo wathi kuye: “Sewumdala kakhulu ngoku, Yoshuwa, ukanti umhlaba ekusafuneka uthinjwe usemkhulu." 
Joshua13:2 Yiyo le imimandla esaseleyo: ummandla wamaFilistiya (akumkani zawo zihlala eGaza naseAshdode, eAshkelon, eGati, nase-Ekron); ummandla wamaGeshure (ekudla ngokuthiwa ngowamaKanana, usuka ngakwintlambo iShihore ngakwimida yeJiputa, kuse emantla kwimida yase-Ekron); ummandla wama-Avi;" 
Joshua13:3  
Joshua13:4 ummandla wamaKanana ongasezantsi kwakunye neMeyara (engumhlaba wamaSidon), kuse eAfeka ngakwimida yama-Amori;" 
Joshua13:5 elamaGebhali kunye neLebhanon iphela ukubheka ngasentshona ukususela eBhali-gadi esemzantsi wentaba iHermon, kuse kuloo nkalo yeHamati;" 
Joshua13:6 wonke ummandla wamaSidon ahlala kweleentaba phakathi kweentaba zaseLebhanon neMisefoti-mayim. “Bonke abemi balapho ndobakhupha apho ukufika kwamaSirayeli. Loo mhlaba uzuwabele amaSirayeli kanye ngalaa ndlela bendikuxelele yona, ube lilifa lezizwe ezilithoba kunye nesiqingatha sakwaManase.”" 
Joshua13:7  
Joshua13:8 Isizwe sakwaRubhen nesakwaGadi kwakunye nesinye isiqingatha sakwaManase zona zaziseziwabelwe umhlaba wazo nguMosis isicaka *sikaNdikhoyo. Loo mhlaba wawungasempumalanga kweJordan. 
Joshua13:9 Wawuye kuthi xhaxhe eArure ummandla wabo, phezu kwentili iAnoni, nakwisixeko esasikuloo ntili, uthathe onke loo mathafa aseMedebha ukusa eDibhon." 
Joshua13:10 Wenjenjeya ukusa kwimida yaseAmon, waquka zonke ezo zixeko zaziphantsi kwekumkani yama-Amori uSihon owayephethe eHeshbhon." 
Joshua13:11 Lo mmandla wawuquka iGiliyadi, utyhutyhe imimandla yaseGeshure naseMahaka, uthathe yonke intaba iHermon nayo yonke iBhashan ukuya kutsho eSaleka." 
Joshua13:12 Ukwalapho nomhlaba kaOgi owaba yikumkani yokugqibela kumaRafa, owayephethe iAshtaroti ne-Edreyi. Ezi ntlanga zonke zoyiswa nguMosis, wawuthimba umhlaba wazo." 
Joshua13:13 Kambe ke amaSirayeli wona akazange abagxotha abantu baseGeshure naseMahaka; basahlala kunye namaSirayeli unangoku. 
Joshua13:14 UMosis akazange ababele mhlaba abaLevi. Bona esabo isabelo, ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis, yinxaxheba bayifumana kumadini atshiswayo enzelwa uNdikhoyo, uThixo kaSirayeli." 
Joshua13:15 Nguwo lo umhlaba uMosis owawabela isizwe sakwaRubhen ngokwemizi yaso ube lilifa laso: 
Joshua13:16 ummandla waso wawuye kuthi xhaxhe ngeArure phezu kwentili iAnoni, udibanise nesixeko esisembindini waloo ntili, kunye naloo mathafa ajikeleze iMedebha," 
Joshua13:17 uthathe iHeshbhon kunye nezo zixeko zikuloo mathafa: iDibhon, iBhamoti-bhali, iBhete-bhali-mehon," 
Joshua13:18 iYaza, iKedemoti, iMefati," 
Joshua13:19 iKiriyatayim, iSibhema, kunye neZereti-shahare eyayisendulini kuloo ntili," 
Joshua13:20 iBhete-pehore, amathambeka aloo ntaba iPisga, kunye neBhete-yeshimoti." 
Joshua13:21 Wawucanda kwezo dolophu zikuloo mathafa, uwuthathe wonke umhlaba wekumkani yama-Amori uSihon, owayephethe eHeshbhon. UMosis wayoyisa le kumkani ndawonye nezilawuli zaseMidiyan: uEvi, uRekem, uZure, noYuri, kunye noRebha. La madoda ayezizibonda ezaziphantsi kokumkani uSihon." 
Joshua13:22 Phakathi kwabantu ababulawa ngamaSirayeli kwafa noBhalam unyana kaBhehore owayengusiyazi. 
Joshua13:23 Umlambo iJordan yayingumda wangasentshonalanga wesizwe sakwaRubhen. Zizo ke ezo izixeko needolophu ezabelwa imizi yesizwe sakwaRubhen zaba lilifa lazo. 
Joshua13:24 Nguwo lo umhlaba uMosis owawabela isizwe sakwaGadi ngokwemizi yaso ube lilifa laso: 
Joshua13:25 ummandla waso uthathela eJazere udibanise zonke izixeko zaseGiliyadi, udibanise nesiqingatha sommandla wama-Amon, kuye kuthi xhaxhe ngeArure ekhangelene neRabha." 
Joshua13:26 Wawusuka eHeshbhon use eRamati-mizepe naseBhetonim, usuke eMahanayim use kwimida yeDebhiri." 
Joshua13:27 Kwintili yeJordan wawuthatha iBhete-haram, iBhete-nimra, iSukoti, kunye neZafon, nawo wonke ummandla kakumkani uSihon waseHeshbhon. Umda wabo ngasentshona yayingumlambo iJordan kuse emantla kuLwandle lwaseGalili." 
Joshua13:28 Ezi zixeko needolophu zaba lilifa lezindlu zesizwe sakwaGadi. 
Joshua13:29 Nguwo lo umhlaba uMosis owawabela isiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase ngokwemizi yaso ube lilifa laso: 
Joshua13:30 ummandla waso waya kuthi xhaxhe ngeMahanayim, wadibanisa neBhashan – wonke ummandla kakumkani uOgi waseBhashan, kunye nazo zonke ezo lali zimashumi mathandathu zaseJayire eBhashan." 
Joshua13:31 Uthatha isiqingatha seGiliyadi, udibanise iAshtaroti ne-Edreyi, iidolophu ezazingamaziko olawulo zelizwe likakumkani uOgi waseBhashan. Wonke lo mmandla wabelwa isiqingatha semizi eyinzala kaMakire unyana kaManase." 
Joshua13:32 Wenjenjalo ke uMosis ukwaba umhlaba ongasempumalanga kweJeriko neJordan kuloo mathafa akwaMowabi. 
Joshua13:33 Kodwa ke uMosis akazange ababele mhlaba bona abaLevi. Elabo ilifa nguNdikhoyo uThixo wamaSirayeli ngokwesithembiso sakhe. 
Joshua14:1 Le yinkcukacha yokwabelwa kwamaSirayeli umhlaba waseKanana ongasentshonalanga kweJordan. Lo mhlaba wabelwa abantu nguElazare umbingeleli, noYoshuwa unyana kaNune, bekunye neentloko zezindlu zezizwe zamaSirayeli." 
Joshua14:2 Umhlaba olilifa lezizwe ezilithoba elinesiqingatha wasikwa ngokwenza *amaqashiso ngokomyalelo *kaNdikhoyo kuMosis. 
Joshua14:3 Umhlaba ongasempumalanga kweJordan uMosis wayeselewabele izizwe ezibini ezinesiqingatha. (Inzala kaJosefu yayizizizwe ezibini: esakwaManase nesakwaEfrayim.) Kambe ke abaLevi bona uMosis akazange ababele mhlaba. Ndaweni yaloo nto babelwa izixeko bahlala kuzo, kunye namadlelo empahla." 
Joshua14:4  
Joshua14:5 AmaSirayeli awaba loo mhlaba kanye ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis. 
Joshua14:6 Abantu besizwe sakwaJuda bafika kuYoshuwa eGiligali, uKalebhi unyana kaJefune umKenezi wathi kuYoshuwa: “Uyayazi into eyathethwa kuMosis umfo wakwaThixo *nguNdikhoyo mayela nawe kunye nam eKadeshe-bhaneya." 
Joshua14:7 Ndandimashumi mane ubudala ngamhla uMosis wandithumayo ndesuka eKadeshe-bhaneya ndaza kuhlola lo mhlaba. Ndamphathela ingxelo ngokungafihlisi," 
Joshua14:8 kuba ndamthobela ngomxhelo wam wonke uNdikhoyo uThixo. Kambe ke amadoda awayekunye nam abatsho bankwantya abantu. 
Joshua14:9 Ke ngoko uMosis wafunga wathi kum: ‘Inene, laa mhlaba unyathele kuwo woba lilifa lakho ndawonye nenzala yakho ngonaphakade, kuba umthobele ngomxhelo wonke uNdikhoyo uThixo wam.’" 
Joshua14:10 Ke uNdikhoyo usandigcinile njengoko wathembisayo. Kambe sekudlule amashumi amane anantlanu eminyaka oko uNdikhoyo wathetha loo nto kuMosis ngokuya amaSirayeli ayebhadula entlango. Ndim lo ke, ndimashumi asibhozo anantlanu eminyaka ndisidla amazimba," 
Joshua14:11 kodwa ndisengumqabaqaba njengoko ndandinjalo ukundithuma kwakhe uMosis. Ndisomelele; ndingaya emfazweni, ndingenza nantoni na." 
Joshua14:12 Ngoku ke ndabele eliya leentaba ndalithenjiswa nguNdikhoyo mhla ndenza ingxelo. Nawe ngokwakho weva ngaloo mini ukuba olwaa hlanga lweengxilimbela kuthiwa ngama-Anaki ayehlala apho ezixekweni ezikhulu ezingqingwe ngeendonga. Ukuba uNdikhoyo ungakum ndozichitha kanye njengoko yena watshoyo.” 
Joshua14:13 UYoshuwa wamsikelela uKalebhi unyana kaJefune, wamabela iHebron yaba lilifa lakhe." 
Joshua14:14 Unanamhla oku iHebron iseyeyenzala kaKalebhi unyana kaJefune umKenazi, kuba yena wamthobela ngomxhelo wonke uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli." 
Joshua14:15 Ngaphambili iHebron kwakusithiwa sisixeko sika-Arbha. (UArbha ngoyena mAnaki mkhulu.) Kwabakho uxolo elizweni. 
Joshua15:1 Nguwo lo umhlaba owabelwa izindlu zesizwe sakwaJuda *ngamaqashiso: Lo mhlaba waya kutsho kumda wase-Edom ezantsi kwentlango. 
Joshua15:2 Lo mda wangasezantsi wawucanda kwincam engezantsi yoLwandle oluFileyo," 
Joshua15:3 uhle ubheke ezantsi ukusuka kwiNkalo yooNomadudwana, ugqithele eZin. Wawutyhutyha amazantsi eKadeshe-bhaneya, udlule eHezeron, unyuke usinge eAdare, ujike ujonge ngaseKareka," 
Joshua15:4 wenjenjeya usinga eAzemon, ugudle intlambo ekuthiwa yeyeJiputa, ujonge elwandle, apho ufika ume khona. Ngumda ongasezantsi wakwaJuda ke lowo." 
Joshua15:5 Umda wangasempumalanga wawuluLwandle oluFileyo, wenjenjeya uye kutsho apho umlambo iJordan ungena khona elwandle. Wawuqala apho umda wangasentla," 
Joshua15:6 unyuke ubheke ngaseBhete-hogela, ubheke entla eBhete-arabha. Wawusuka apho unyukele kwiLitye likaBhohan (uBhohan ngunyana kaRubhen)," 
Joshua15:7 usuke ngakwintili yeAkore, unyukele eDebhiri, uze ujike ujonge emantla ngaseGiligali. IGiligali le yayijonge inkalo yeAdumim esemazantsi omfula lowo. Wawugqithela kwimithombo yase-En-shemeshe, wenjenjeya ukuya e-En-rogele," 
Joshua15:8 uze unyuke utyhutyhe intili yoonyana bakaHinom esethambekeni lenduli ekwakumi kuyo isixeko samaJebhusi (yiJerusalem ke leyo), usuke apho unyuse intaba, utsho encotsheni ngakwicala langasentshona lentili iHinom ngasentla kumaphethelo entili yamaRafa." 
Joshua15:9 Usuka apho usinge emthonjeni waseNefetowa, ugqithele kwizixeko ezingakwintaba iEfron. Uyajika apho, ubheke ngaseBhala (oko kukuthi iKiriyati-yarim)," 
Joshua15:10 apho ujikela ngasentshonalanga yeBhala, ujonge kwintaba iSeyire, uphume kwicala elingasentla lentaba iYarim (oko kukuthi iKesalon), uhle uye eBhete-shemeshe, ugqithele eTimna." 
Joshua15:11 Lo mda wawunyuka uye kwinduli engasentla kwe-Ekron, ujike ujonge eShikeron, udlule intaba iBhala, wenjenjeya ukusinga eYabheneli. Wawuhamba uyokuma ngolwandle" 
Joshua15:12 olwalungumda wangasentshonalanga. Ngaphakathi kwale mida kwakuhlala abantu bezindlu zikaJuda. 
Joshua15:13 Inxalenye yommandla wakwaJuda wabelwa uKalebhi unyana kaJefune wesizwe sakwaJuda, ngokomyalelo *kaNdikhoyo kuYoshuwa. Wabelwa iHebron, isixeko sika-Arbha, uyise ka-Anaki." 
Joshua15:14 UKalebhi wayikhuphela ngaphandle kweso sixeko inzala ka-Anaki. YayinguSheshayi, uAhiman, noTalmayi." 
Joshua15:15 Wesuka apho waya kuhlasela abantu ababehlala eDebhiri ekwakusithiwa yiKiriyati-sefere mandulo. 
Joshua15:16 UKalebhi wathi: “Intombi yam uAkesa ndoyendisela kumntu oya kuze ayihlasele ayithimbe iKiriyati-sefere.” 
Joshua15:17 UOteniyeli unyana womntakwabo-Kalebhi uKenazi wasithimba ke eso sixeko, waza uKalebhi wayendisela kuye intombi yakhe uAkesa." 
Joshua15:18 Bakuba betshatile wacenga uOteniyeli amvumele acele umhlaba kuyise. Wehla kwidonki awayekhwele kuyo uAkesa, waza uKalebhi wabuza wathi: “Kwenzeke ntoni?”" 
Joshua15:19 Wathi ukuphendula uAkesa: “Ndicela intsikelelo. Kaloku umhlaba ondinike wona ukwindawo ebharhileyo. Nceda undinike imithombo.” UKalebhi ke wamnika imithombo angasentla nengasezantsi. 
Joshua15:20 Lo ngumhlaba owabelwe izindlu zesizwe sakwaJuda, waba lilifa lazo:" 
Joshua15:21 Izixeko zabo ezazisemazantsi, ezo zazikufuphi nomda wase-Edom, yayizezi: iKabhezeli, iEdere, iYagure," 
Joshua15:22 iKina, iDimona, iAdada," 
Joshua15:23 iKedeshe, iHazore, i-Itenana," 
Joshua15:24 iZifi, iTelem, iBheyaloti," 
Joshua15:25 iHazore-hadata, iKeriyoti-hezeron (okanye iHazore)," 
Joshua15:26 iAmam, iShema, iMolada," 
Joshua15:27 iHazare-gada, iHeshmon, iBhete-pelete," 
Joshua15:28 iHazare-shuwali, iBheshebha, iBhiziyotiya," 
Joshua15:29 iBhala, i-Iyim, iEzem," 
Joshua15:30 iEltoladi, iKezili, iHoma," 
Joshua15:31 iZikelage, iMademana, iSanesana," 
Joshua15:32 iLebhawoti, iShilim, iAyin, kunye neRimon. Yaba zizixeko ezimashumi mabini anethoba zizonke, kwakunye neelali ezizingqongileyo." 
Joshua15:33 Izixeko ezazisesihlanjeni yayizezi: iEshtawoli, iZora, iAshna," 
Joshua15:34 iZanowa, iEn-ganim, iTapuwa, iEnam," 
Joshua15:35 iYamuti, iAdulam, iSoko, iAzeka," 
Joshua15:36 iSharayim, iAditayim, neGedera (okanye iGederotayim). Yaba zizixeko ezilishumi elinesine kunye neelali ezazizingqongile." 
Joshua15:37 Kwakukho nezinye izixeko ezilishumi linantandathu ezazingqongwe ziilali. YayiyiZenan, iHadasha, iMigdali-gadi, iDilan, iMizpa, iYoketeli, iLakishe, iBhozekati, iEglon, iKabhon, iLamam, iKitilishe, iGederoyi, iBhete-dagoni, iNama, kunye neMakeda." 
Joshua15:38  
Joshua15:39  
Joshua15:40  
Joshua15:41  
Joshua15:42 Kanti ke kwakukho nezinye izixeko ezilithoba ezazingqongwe ziilali: iLibhena, iEtere, iAshan, i-Ifeta, iAshna, iNezibhi, iKeyila, iAkezibhi, kunye neMaresha." 
Joshua15:43  
Joshua15:44  
Joshua15:45 IEkron yayingqongwe zizixeko kunye neelali," 
Joshua15:46 kukho nezinye izixeko neelali ngaseAshdode, ukusuka e-Ekron kuse elwandle." 
Joshua15:47 Yayikwalapho iAshdode kunye neGaza kwanezixeko neelali zazo, zithe thande de kuye kuthi xhaxhe kwintlambo ekuthiwa yeyeJiputa nakunxweme lolwandle." 
Joshua15:48 Izixeko zeleentaba yayiyiShamire, iYatire, iSoko," 
Joshua15:49 neDana, iKiriyati-sana (okanye iDebhiri)," 
Joshua15:50 iAnabhi, iEshtemo, kunye neAnim," 
Joshua15:51 iGoshen, neHolon, kunye neGilo. Yayizizixeko ezilishumi linambini zizonke kunye neelali ezizingqongileyo." 
Joshua15:52 YayiyiArabhu, iDuma, iEshan," 
Joshua15:53 iYanim, iBhete-tapuwa, iAfeka," 
Joshua15:54 iHumta, iKiriyati-arbha (yiHebron ke leyo), kunye neZiwore, izixeko ezilithoba kunye neelali ezizingqongileyo." 
Joshua15:55 IMawon, iKarmele, iZifi, neJuta," 
Joshua15:56 kunye neYizereli, iYokedim, neZanowa," 
Joshua15:57 iKayin, neGibheya, kunye neTimna, izixeko ezilishumi zizonke kunye neelali ezizingqongileyo." 
Joshua15:58 IHalehule, neBhete-zure, iGedore," 
Joshua15:59 neMarati, kunye neBhete-anoti ne-Eltekon, yayizizixeko ezithandathu kunye neelali ezizingqongileyo." 
Joshua15:60 Kwakukho neKiriyati-bhali (okanye iKiriyati-yarim) kunye neRabha: izixeko ezibini neelali ezizingqongileyo. 
Joshua15:61 Entlango kwakukho iBhete-arabha, iMidin, iSekaka," 
Joshua15:62 iNibheshan, isiXeko seTyuwa, kunye ne-Engedi: zazizithandathu kunye neelali ezizingqongileyo." 
Joshua15:63 Kodwa ke kambe amaJuda akazanga aba nako ukuwagxotha amaJebhusi awayemi eJerusalem. Asahlala apho nangoku kunye noonyana bakaJuda. 
Joshua16:1 Umda ongezantsi womhlaba owabelwa inzala kaJosefu wawuqala eJordan kufuphi neJeriko, kwindawo eyayikwicala langasempumalanga yemithombo yaseJeriko, wenjenjeya ubhekisa ngasentlango. Wasuka eJeriko walityhutyha eleentaba ukusa eBhetele." 
Joshua16:2 Ukusuka eBhetele (ekwakuthiwa yiLuzi) wadlulela eAtaroti, apho ayemi khona ama-Arki." 
Joshua16:3 Wehla wajonga ngasentshona kummandla wamaYafeleti, waya kuma kummandla waseBhete-horon engasezantsi. Wedlula apho ujonge eGezere, waya kuma ngolwandle." 
Joshua16:4 Lo mhlaba waba lilifa lenzala kaJosefu, izizwe zakwaEfrayim noManase." 
Joshua16:5 Nanku ummandla wezindlu zakwaEfrayim: Umda wabo wawusuka eAtaroti-adare ubheke ngasempumalanga eBhete-horon ekumantla," 
Joshua16:6 usuke apho uye kutsho elwandle. Ngasemantla apho yayiyiMikemetati, kuthi ngasempumalanga yalapho ujike umda ujonge iTanati-shilo, udlule apho kwangasempuma yalapho, ujonge eYanowa." 
Joshua16:7 Ukusuka apho uyehla ubheke eAtaroti naseNara, ugqithe eJeriko, uye kuma ngeJordan." 
Joshua16:8 Apho umda wawucanda ngasentshonalanga ukusuka ngaseTapuwa, ubheke kwintlambo iKana, uye kuma ngolwandle. Nguwo ke lowo umhlaba owaba lilifa lezindlu zesizwe sakwaEfrayim." 
Joshua16:9 Iidolophu neelali ezazikwimida yakwaManase zanikwa uEfrayim. 
Joshua16:10 Abazange bawagxothe amaKanana awayemi eGezere. Ahlala ke namaEfrayim kwada kwakaloku amaKanana, kodwa ênza umsebenzi ngokunyanzelwa." 
Joshua17:1 Inxalenye yomhlaba ongasentshonalanga kweJordan wabelwa ezinye izindlu zezindlu eziyinzala yonyana omkhulu kaJosefu uManase *ngamaqashiso. UMakire, uyise kaGiliyadi, wayengunyana omkhulu kaManase, umfo oligorha emfazweni. Yiyo ke loo nto wabelwa iGiliyadi neBhashan, ezingasempumalanga kweJordan." 
Joshua17:2 Umhlaba ongasentshonalanga kweJordan wona wabelwa inxalenye yezindlu zesizwe sakwaManase: ooAbhiyezere, Heleki, Aseriyeli, Shekem, Hefere, noShemida. Aba ngokwezindlu zabo yayingabazukulwana abangamadoda bakaManase unyana kaJosefu." 
Joshua17:3 UZelofehadi unyana kaHefere, ozalwa nguGiliyadi unyana kaMakire ozalwa nguManase, yena akazanga azale madoda, yaba ziintombi zodwa. Nanga amagama azo: uMala, noNowa, uHogela, noMilika, kunye noTirza." 
Joshua17:4 Zaya kuElazare umbingeleli, bekunye noYoshuwa unyana kaNune kwaneenkokheli, zafika zathi: “*UNdikhoyo uyalele uMosis ngelithi nathi aze asabele umhlaba kunye nezizalwana zethu ezingamadoda.” Ke ngoko zawunikwa umhlaba kwanjenge-zizalwana zabo ezingamadoda njengoko uNdikhoyo wayetshilo." 
Joshua17:5 Isizwe sakwaManase saba nezabelo ezilishumi nje ukongezelela kwiGiliyadi neBhashan engasempumalanga kweJordan," 
Joshua17:6 kungenxa yokuba abazukulwana bakaManase abaziintombi nabangamadoda babelwa umhlaba. Umhlaba waseGiliyadi wona wabelwa enye inxalenye yabazukulwana bakaManase. 
Joshua17:7 Ummandla wesizwe sakwaManase wawusuka eAshere use eMikemetati ngasempumalanga yeShekem. Umda wawusihla uye ngasezantsi, uquke bonke abantu base-En-tapuwa." 
Joshua17:8 Umhlaba owawungqinge iTapuwa wawungowakwaManase, kodwa sona isixeko saseTapuwa esisemdeni sasisesenzala kaEfrayim." 
Joshua17:9 Wawusihla loo mda ubheke ezantsi ngakwintlambo iKana. Izixeko ezingezantsi kwaloo ntlambo yayizezakwaEfrayim, nakuba zazikummandla wakwaManase nje. Umda wakwaManase wawucanda ngakwicala elingasentla kwaloo ntlambo, uye kuma ngolwandle." 
Joshua17:10 Isizwe sakwaEfrayim sasingasezantsi, esakwaManase sona singasentla, ulwandle lungasentshona. UAshere wayemi ngasentla koManase, uIsakare emi ngasempuma." 
Joshua17:11 Ngaphakathi kwemida yakwaIsakare nakwa-Ashere iBhete-shan kunye neIbleyam, neelali ezizingqongileyo, yayizezakwaManase, kwakunye neDore engaselwandle, ne-Endore, iTanaki, iMegido, kwaneelali ezizijikelezileyo." 
Joshua17:12 Isizwe sakwaManase kambe asizanga sibe nako ukubagxotha abemi bezo zixeko, kuba amaKanana ayezimisele ukuhlala khona." 
Joshua17:13 Naxa amaSirayeli selenamandla, akabanga nako ukuzithimba ezo zixeko zamaKanana, kambe awanyanzela ukuba abe zizicaka." 
Joshua17:14 Bathi kuYoshuwa abazukulwana bakaJosefu: “Ngani ukuba usinike isiqwenga sibe sinye somhlaba, ukanti sibaninzi kangaka ngenxa yokuthamsanqeliswa kunene *nguNdikhoyo?”" 
Joshua17:15 Wathi uYoshuwa: “Ukuba nibaninzi kangangokuba neleentaba lakwaEfrayim lingananeli, yiyani emahlathini, nifike nigece nizivulele umhlaba kwelamaPerezi namaRafa.”" 
Joshua17:16 Baphendula bathi: “Eliya leentaba aliphangalele kangangokuba lingasanela, kanti ke phaya ezintilini amaKanana aneenqwelo zentsimbi, la ahlala eBhete-shan nalawa ahlala kule ntili yeYizereli xa ewonke.”" 
Joshua17:17 Wathi uYoshuwa kubo: “Ngenene, ndlu kaJosefu, nina zinto zikaEfrayim nani zinto zikaManase, nibaninzi, yaye ninamandla. Niza kusongezwa isabelo senu." 
Joshua17:18 Eleentaba lelenu, nditsho lilihlathi linjalo. Kufuneka niligece nime kulo lonke. AmaKanana wona kufuneka niwagxothe, nditsho enezo nqwelo zentsimbi, omelele enjalo.”" 
Joshua18:1 Ibandla lakwaSirayeli lahlangana eShilo, lamisa *isibingelelo *sikaNdikhoyo apho. Naxa umhlaba wawuseluthinjiwe" 
Joshua18:2 kwakusekho izizwe zamaSirayeli ezisixhenxe ezazingekabelwa ilifa lazo. 
Joshua18:3 Wabhekisa kumaSirayeli ke uYoshuwa wenjenje: “Niya kulibazisa kude kube nini ukuya kuthimba umhlaba enawunikwa nguNdikhoyo, uThixo wooyihlo-mkhulu?" 
Joshua18:4 Ndikhetheleni amadoda abe mathathu kwisizwe ngasinye, ndiwathume aye kulicanda ilizwe, abhale iinkcukacha zalo ngokwelifa lesizwe ngasinye. Kufuneka aphinde eze kum akugqiba." 
Joshua18:5 Loo mhlaba ke uya kwabiwa wahlulwe ube ziziqwenga ezisixhenxe. UJuda wohlala ngezantsi kummandla wakhe, noJosefu wohlala kowakhe ummandla ngasentla." 
Joshua18:6 Ze nizibhale iinkcukacha zezo ziphaluka zosixhenxe, nize nazo kum nakugqiba. Mna ke ndokwenza amaqashiso, ndiqonde umnqweno kaNdikhoyo uThixo wethu ngani." 
Joshua18:7 AbaLevi bona abayi kwabelwa isabelo njengani; kaloku esabo isabelo kukuba ngababingeleli abakhonza uNdikhoyo. Zona ke izizwe zakwaGadi noRubhen nesiqingatha sikaManase sebelabelwe elabo ilifa phaya ngasempumalanga kweJordan, alinikwa nguMosis isicaka sikaNdikhoyo.”" 
Joshua18:8 Anduluka ke loo madoda, aya kucanda umhlaba, emva kokuba uYoshuwa wayethe: “Ze niwujikeleze niwucande loo mhlaba, nizibhale iinkcukacha zawo, nibuye nize kum. Mna ndoqonda kuNdikhoyo ngokwenza *amaqashiso apha eShilo.”" 
Joshua18:9 Awujikeleza ke loo mhlaba loo madoda, abhala echaza ukuba awahlule njani waziziqwenga ezisixhenxe, enza noludwe lwezixeko. Babuyela kuYoshuwa esikhululweni eShilo." 
Joshua18:10 UYoshuwa wenza amaqashiso phambi koNdikhoyo, waza ke wazabela izizwe zakwaSirayeli ebezingekabi namhlaba iziqwenga zomhlaba, ewaba ngokwezindlu zazo." 
Joshua18:11 Kwaqala kwaphuma iqashiso lommandla wezindlu zesizwe sakwaBhenjamin. Umhlaba wabo wawumi phakathi kwesizwe sakwaJuda nesakwaJosefu. 
Joshua18:12 Ngasentla umda wabo wawuqala eJordan, unyuke loo mathambeka angasentla kweJeriko, wenjenjeya ukusinga ngasentshona, utyhutyha eleentaba, uye kuma ngentlango iBhete-aven." 
Joshua18:13 Wawunyuka ithambeka kwicala elingasezantsi eLuzi (yiBhetele ke leyo) uhle ubheke eAtaroti-adare entabeni engezantsi kweBhete-horon emzantsi. 
Joshua18:14 Lo mda wawujika ujonge emazantsi usuka kwicala elingasentshonalanga yeleentaba, wenjenjeya ukusinga eKiriyati-bhali (iKiriyati-yarim) yesizwe sakwaJuda. Ngumda wangasentshona lo." 
Joshua18:15 Umda wangasezantsi wawuqala ngasemaphethelweni eKiriyati-yarim ngasentshona, ubheke kumthombo waseNefetowa," 
Joshua18:16 usuke apho uhle ubheke phantsi kwentaba ejonge kwintili yoonyana bakaHinom engasentla kwentili yamaRafa. Wawusuka apho uhle utyhutyhe loo ntili iHinom kwithambeka emazantsi esixeko samaJebhusi, ubheke ngase-En-rogele." 
Joshua18:17 Uyajika ujonge emantla e-En-shemeshe, uze ugqithele eGeliloti ngakwinkalo yeAdumim. Ukusuka apho uyehla uye ngakwiLitye likaBhohan (uBhohan wayengunyana kaRubhen)," 
Joshua18:18 uze udlule ngasentla kwengxondorha ephezu kwaloo ntili yeJordan, uhle uye entilini," 
Joshua18:19 uze udlule ngasentla kwengxingwa eBhete-hogela, uye kuphela ngasentla apho umlambo iJordan ungena khona kuLwandle oluFileyo. Lo ke yayingumda wangasezantsi." 
Joshua18:20 IJordan yona yayingumda wangasempumalanga. Yiyo ke leyo imida yomhlaba owabelwa izindlu zesizwe sakwaBhenjamin, walilifa lazo." 
Joshua18:21 Izixeko zezindlu zesizwe sakwaBhenjamin zizo ezi: iJeriko, iBhete-hogela, iEmeki-kezizi," 
Joshua18:22 iBhete-arabha, iZemarayim, iBhetele," 
Joshua18:23 iHavim, iPara, iOfra," 
Joshua18:24 iKefar-amoni, iOfeni, kunye neGebha. Yayilishumi elinambini lezixeko ezingqongwe ziilali." 
Joshua18:25 Kwakukho neGibheyon, iRama, iBheroti," 
Joshua18:26 iMizpa, iKefira, iMoza," 
Joshua18:27 iRekem, i-Irpeli, iTarala," 
Joshua18:28 iZela, iHayelefe, nesixeko samaJebhusi (oko kukuthi iJerusalem), kwakunye neGibheya, neKiriyati-yarim. Yayilishumi elinesine lezo zixeko ezazingqongwe ziilali. Nguwo ke lowo umhlaba owabelwa izindlu zesizwe sakwaBhenjamin." 
Joshua19:1 *Iqashiso lesibini laphumela isizwe sakwaSimon ngokwezindlu zaso. Ilifa laso lalikummandla wakwaJuda. 
Joshua19:2 Umhlaba wakwaSimon wawuquka iBheshebha, iShebha, iMolada," 
Joshua19:3 iHazare-shuwali, iBhala, ne-Ezem," 
Joshua19:4 iEltoladi, iBhetuli, iHoma," 
Joshua19:5 iZikelagi, iBhete-markabhoti, iHazare-susa," 
Joshua19:6 iBhete-lebhawoti, kunye neSharuhen. Yayizizixeko ezilishumi linantathu kunye neelali ezazizingqongile." 
Joshua19:7 Kwakukwakho neAyin, iRimon, iEtere, kunye neAshan; izixeko ezine kunye neelali ezizingqongileyo." 
Joshua19:8 Zonke iilali ezazingqonge ezo zixeko zazikwalapho kude kuse eBhalati-bhere (ekuthiwa yiRama) kwintlango engasezantsi. Nguwo ke lowo umhlaba owabelwa izindlu zesizwe sakwaSimon, waba lilifa lazo." 
Joshua19:9 Umhlaba wakwaJuda inxalenye yawo yabelwa isizwe sakwaSimon ukuba ibe lilifa laso, kuba wawumkhulu ngaphezu kokuba isizwe sakwaJuda sasiwudinga." 
Joshua19:10 Ngesihlandlo sesithathu *iqashiso laphumela isizwe sakwaZebhulon ngokwezindlu zaso. Umda welifa lesi sizwe waya kuma ngeSaridi. 
Joshua19:11 Ukusuka apho umda wacanda ngasentshona waya kutsho eMarala, wegqitha eDabhesheti nakwintlambo iYokeneham." 
Joshua19:12 Kwicala elingaphaya kweSaridi wenjenjeya ukuya ngasempuma kumda weKiseloti-tabhore, wedlulela eDabherati ukusinga eYafiya." 
Joshua19:13 Ukusuka apho wakhweza kwicala langasempumalanga, ujonge eGati-hefere nase-Eti-kazin, wajika wajonga ngaseRimon usinga eNeha." 
Joshua19:14 Umda ngasemantla wajika apho wasinga ngaseHanaton, waya kuma kwintili i-Ifeta-eli." 
Joshua19:15 Wawuquka ezi zixeko: iKatati, iNalali, iShimron, i-Idala, kunye neBhetelehem. Yaba lishumi linambini lezixeko kunye neelali ezizingqongileyo." 
Joshua19:16 Ezo zixeko kunye nezo lali zazikumhlaba owabelwa izindlu zesizwe sakwaZebhulon. 
Joshua19:17 Ngesesine isihlandlo *iqashiso laphumela isizwe sakwaIsakare ngokwezindlu zaso. 
Joshua19:18 Kummandla waso kwakukho izixeko iYizereli, iKesuloti, iShunem," 
Joshua19:19 iHafarayim, iShiyon, iAnarati," 
Joshua19:20 iRabhiti, iKishiyon, iEbheze," 
Joshua19:21 neRemeti, iEn-ganim, iEn-hada, kunye neBhete-pazeze." 
Joshua19:22 Lo mda wadibanisa iTabhore, iShazuma, kunye neBhete-shemeshe, uye kuma ngeJordan. Wawunezixeko ezilishumi linantandathu kunye neelali ezizingqongileyo." 
Joshua19:23 Ezo zixeko kunye nezo lali zazikumhlaba owabelwa izindlu zesizwe sakwaIsakare ukuze ube lilifa lazo. 
Joshua19:24 Ngesihlandlo sesihlanu *iqashiso laphumela isizwe sakwa-Ashere ngokwezindlu zaso. 
Joshua19:25 Ummandla wesi sizwe wawuquka izixeko iHelekati, iHali, iBheten, neAkeshafi," 
Joshua19:26 kwakunye neAlam-meleki, iAmadi, kunye neMishali. Ngasentshonalanga wawudlula eKarmele naseShikore-libhenati." 
Joshua19:27 Ukujika kwawo ngasempumalanga wawusinga ngaseBhete-dagoni, udlule kwaZebhulon nakwintili i-Ifeta-eli ukubheka ngasentla eBhete-emeki naseNeyeli. Wenjenjeya ukunyuka ucanda ngasekunene kweKabhuli," 
Joshua19:28 ujonge e-Ebron, eRehobhi, eHamon, naseKana, ukuya kutsho kwiSidon enkulu." 
Joshua19:29 Wawujika apho ujonge eRama, ude uye kutsho kwisixeko saseTire esinqatyisiweyo, ujike ujonge ngaseHosa, uye kuma ngolwandle. Wawuquka iMahalabhi, iAkezibhi," 
Joshua19:30 iUma, iAfeki, kunye neRehobhi. Yayingamashumi mabini nambini ezixeko kunye neelali ezizingqongileyo." 
Joshua19:31 Zazikummandla welifa lesizwe sakwa-Ashere ezi zixeko kunye neelali ezizingqongileyo. 
Joshua19:32 Ngesesithandathu isihlandlo *iqashiso laphumela isizwe sakwaNafetali ngokwezindlu zaso. 
Joshua19:33 Umda waso wawusuka eHelefe uye kutsho kum-oki oseZananim, udlulele eAdami-nekebhe naseYabheneli kude kuse eLekum, uye kuma ngeJordan." 
Joshua19:34 Apho wawufika ujonge ngasentshonalanga uye eAzenoti-tabhore, usuke apho uye eHukoki, ubethe ngakuZebhulon emazantsi, udlule kwa-Ashere ngasentshonalanga, naseJordan kwicala langasempumalanga." 
Joshua19:35 Izixeko ezazinqatyisiwe yayiyiZidim, iZera, iHamati, iRakati, iKinerete," 
Joshua19:36 iAdama, iRama, iHazore," 
Joshua19:37 iKedeshe, iEdreyi, kunye ne-En-hazore," 
Joshua19:38 iYiron, iMigdali-eli, iHorem, iBhete-anati, kunye neBhete-shemeshe. Yayilishumi linethoba lezixeko kunye neelali ezizingqongileyo." 
Joshua19:39 Ezo zixeko kunye nezo lali zazikummandla owabelwa izindlu zesizwe sakwaNafetali zaba lilifa lazo. 
Joshua19:40 Ngesesixhenxe isihlandlo *iqashiso laphumela isizwe sakwaDan ngokwezindlu zaso. 
Joshua19:41 Ummandla waso wawuquka iZora, iEshtawoli, i-Ire-shemeshe," 
Joshua19:42 kunye neShalabhim, iAyalon, i-Itela," 
Joshua19:43 iElon, neTimnata, kunye ne-Ekron," 
Joshua19:44 uthathe ne-Elteke, iGibheton, iBhalata," 
Joshua19:45 iYehudi, iBhene-bheraki, iGati-rimon," 
Joshua19:46 iMeyakon, neRakon, kunye nommandla ojongene neJopa." 
Joshua19:47 Athi akulahlekelwa ngumhlaba wawo amaDan aya kuhlasela iLeshem. Ayithimba yaba yeyawo akuba ebabulele abemi balapho. Ema apho, alijika negama layo iLeshem, athi ukuyibiza kwayo yiDan, eyithiya ngokhokho wawo uDan." 
Joshua19:48 Ezi zixeko nezi lali zaba ngumhlaba owaba lilifa lesizwe sakwaDan. 
Joshua19:49 Athi akugqiba ukuwaba amaSirayeli umhlaba, abela uYoshuwa unyana kaNune elakhe ilifa" 
Joshua19:50 ngokomyalelo *kaNdikhoyo. Amnika iTimnata-sera, isixeko awasicelayo. ITimnata-sera yayikweleentaba kwaEfrayim. Wasivusa eso sixeko uYoshuwa, wahlala apho." 
Joshua19:51 UElazare umbingeleli, ekunye noYoshuwa unyana kaNune, kwakunye neentloko zezindlu zezizwe zakwaSirayeli, babeyaba le mimandla ngokwenza *amaqashiso phambi koNdikhoyo eShilo ngasekungeneni *kwesibingelelo. Bawaba ke ngolo hlobo loo mhlaba bada bagqiba." 
Joshua20:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuYoshuwa: 
Joshua20:2 “Thetha namaSirayeli, uthi ndithi makalathe izixeko zokuphephela endandixelele uMosis ngazo." 
Joshua20:3 Zoba ziindawo ekubalekela kuzo abantu abathe babulala omnye ngengozi okanye ngempazamo. Yoba ziindawo zokuzimela kwimpindezelo yezizalwana zaloo mntu ubuleweyo. 
Joshua20:4 Umntu oye kuzimela kwezo zixeko kufuneka anike inkcazelo ngesenzo sakhe enkundleni kumadoda amakhulu esangweni leso sixeko. Ngawo aya kumamkela amnike indawo yokuhlala phakathi kwawo. 
Joshua20:5 Xa umphindezeli athe walandela ekhondweni lalowo ubalekele apho, wona akasayi kumnikezela kuye – kaloku wambulala ngengozi umfi, bengazange baxabana ngaphambili." 
Joshua20:6 Umbulali angahlala apho kweso sixeko de kufike umhla wokuvavanywa kwetyala ngumzi. Akuba eswelekile umbingeleli omkhulu angabuyela ke kwisixeko sakowabo awayebaleke kuso.” 
Joshua20:7 Kwatyunjwa iKedeshe eGalili kweleentaba lakwaNafetali, neShekem kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, kunye neKiriyati-arba (yiHebron ke leyo) kweleentaba lakwaJuda." 
Joshua20:8 Kumphesheya-Jordan ongasempuma yeJeriko kwatyunjwa ezi zixeko: kwisizwe sakwaRubhen yaba yiBhezere ekumathafa asentlango, kwisizwe sakwaGadi yaba yiRamoti eseGiliyadi, yaza kwaManase yaba yiGolan eBhashan." 
Joshua20:9 Zizo ke ezo izixeko ekwakunokuphephela kuzo nawuphi na umSirayeli okanye umngeneleli ohlala phakathi kwamaSirayeli. Injongo yazo yayikukuzimelisa umntu obulele omnye ngengozi, ukwenzela ukuba ze kungabikho mntu ubulawayo sisizalwana somfi engekemi enkundleni yamatyala ngaphambi kwebandla." 
Joshua21:1 Iintloko zezindlu zakwaLevi zaya kumbingeleli uElazare noYoshuwa unyana kaNune, bekunye neentloko zezindlu zakwaSirayeli." 
Joshua21:2 Zaya kubo eShilo kwelamaKanana, zafika zathi: “*UNdikhoyo wayethe kuMosis thina masinikwe izixeko kunye namadlelo azo.”" 
Joshua21:3 AmaSirayeli ke ngoko, ethobela umyalelo kaNdikhoyo, acaphula kwilifa lawo, abanika ezinye izixeko zawo abaLevi kunye namadlelo azingqongileyo." 
Joshua21:4 *Iqashiso lokuqala laphumela imizi yendlu yabaLevi bakwaKohati, babelwa izixeko ezilishumi linantathu, ezazikummandla wakwaJuda, nowakwaSimon, kunye nowakwaBhenjamin." 
Joshua21:5 Inxalenye yemizi kaKohati yabelwa ishumi lezixeko ezazikwaEfrayim, kwaDan, nakwisiqingatha sasentshonalanga sakwaManase." 
Joshua21:6 Indlu yakwaGershon yabelwa ishumi elinantathu lezixeko kummandla wakwaIsakare, nakwa-Ashere, kwaNafetali, nakwisiqingatha sakwaManase esiseBhashan." 
Joshua21:7 Indlu yakwaMerari ngokwemizi yayo yabelwa ishumi elinambini lezixeko kummandla wakwaRubhen nakwaGadi nakwaZebhulon. 
Joshua21:8 Njengoko uNdikhoyo wayetshilo kuMosis amaSirayeli ababela abaLevi ezi zixeko namadlelo ngokwenza amaqashiso. 
Joshua21:9 Nazi ke izixeko ezabelwa abazukulwana baka-Aron, inzala kaLevi, bendlu kaKohati, ezazikummandla kaJuda noSimon: iqashiso laphumela bona kuqala," 
Joshua21:10  
Joshua21:11 babelwa isixeko sika-Arbha (uArbha wayenguyise ka-Anaki) le kuthiwa yiHebron ngoku. Nantso kweleentaba kwaJuda. Bayinikwa kunye namadlelo ayo," 
Joshua21:12 kambe zona iilali eziyingqongileyo kunye namasimi zazisezabelwe uKalebhi unyana kaJefune, zaza zaba zezakhe." 
Joshua21:13 Ukongezelela kwiHebron (eyayisesinye sezixeko zokuphephela) kwahlonyelwa nezi zixeko kubazukulwana bombingeleli uAron: iLibhena," 
Joshua21:14 iYatire, iEshtemowa," 
Joshua21:15 iHolon, iDebhiri," 
Joshua21:16 iAyin, iJuta, kunye neBhete-shemeshe, kwanamadlelo azo. Yayilithoba lezixeko kummandla wakwaJuda nakwaSimon." 
Joshua21:17 Kummandla wakwaBhenjamin babelwa zazine izixeko: iGibheyon, iGebha," 
Joshua21:18 iAnatoti, kunye neAlmon, kwanamadlelo azo." 
Joshua21:19 Zaba lishumi linantathu izixeko ezabelwa ababingeleli abazukulwana baka-Aron, kunye namadlelo azo." 
Joshua21:20 Eminye imizi yabaLevi endlu yakwaKohati yabelwa izixeko kummandla kaEfrayim. 
Joshua21:21 Banikwa izixeko ezine: iShekem namadlelo ayo kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim (yenye yezixeko zokuphephela nayo), iGezere," 
Joshua21:22 iKibhezayim, kunye neBhete-horon, kunye namadlelo azo." 
Joshua21:23 Kummandla wakwaDan abelwe izixeko ezine: iElteke, iGibheton," 
Joshua21:24 iAyalon, kunye neGati-rimon, namadlelo azo." 
Joshua21:25 Kummandla wesiqingatha sikaManase esingasentshonalanga abelwa izixeko ezibini: iTanaki, neGati-rimon, kunye namadlelo azo." 
Joshua21:26 Indlu yakwaKohati yabelwa ishumi lezixeko zizonke kunye namadlelo azo. 
Joshua21:27 Abanye abaLevi bendlu kaGershon babelwa izixeko zazibini kummandla wesiqingatha sikaManase esingasempuma: yaba yiGolan eBhashan (esinye sezixeko sokuphephela) kunye neBheshtera namadlelo azo. 
Joshua21:28 Kummandla wakwaIsakare babelwa izixeko ezine: iKishiyon, iDabherati," 
Joshua21:29 iYamuti, ne-En-ganim kunye namadlelo azo." 
Joshua21:30 Kummandla wakwa-Ashere babelwa zazine: iMishali, iAbhedon," 
Joshua21:31 iHelekati, neRehobhi, namadlelo azo." 
Joshua21:32 Kummandla wakwaNafetali zaba zithathu: iKedeshe eGalili namadlelo ayo (yayisisixeko sokuphephela), iHamoti-dore, neKartan, namadlelo azo." 
Joshua21:33 Imizi yendlu yakwaGershon yabelwa ishumi linantathu lezixeko zizonke, namadlelo azo." 
Joshua21:34 AbaLevi bendlu yakwaMerari, yona eyayingekabonelelwa, babelwa izixeko zazine kwaZebhulon: iYokeneham, iKarta," 
Joshua21:35 iDimna, neNahali, namadlelo azo." 
Joshua21:36 KwaRubhen babelwa zazine: iBhezere, iYaza," 
Joshua21:37 iKedemoti, eMefati, namadlelo azo." 
Joshua21:38 KwaGadi babelwa zazine: iRamoti-giliyadi namadlelo ayo (esinye sezixeko zokuphephela), iMahanayim," 
Joshua21:39 iHeshbhon, neYazere, namadlelo azo." 
Joshua21:40 Indlu kaMerari ke yabelwa ishumi linambini lezixeko zizonke, isabelwa ngokwezindlu zayo ngamaqashiso." 
Joshua21:41 AbaLevi babelwa izixeko ezingamashumi mane anesibhozo zizonke kummandla wamaSirayeli. Zonke ezo zixeko ngazinye zazinamadlelo azo. 
Joshua21:42  
Joshua21:43 Wenjenjalo ke *uNdikhoyo ukuzalisekisa isithembiso awasenzayo kookhokho bamaSirayeli sokuba wowanika umhlaba. Ema kuloo mhlaba ke amaSirayeli akuba ewuthimbile. 
Joshua21:44 Wezisa uxolo kulo lonke elo zwe uNdikhoyo, njengoko wabathembisayo ngesifungo ookhokho babo. Iintshaba zawo zonke zange zibe nakumelana nawo amaSirayeli kuba uNdikhoyo wayezinikela ezandleni zawo iintshaba zawo." 
Joshua21:45 Wazigcina zonke izithembiso awazenza kumaSirayeli uNdikhoyo; ewe, akukho nalinye ilizwi alithethileyo angalifezekisanga." 
Joshua22:1 UYoshuwa wabiza isizwe sakwaRubhen nesakwaGadi kunye nesiqingatha sesakwaManase sasempuma," 
Joshua22:2 wathi: “Nikufezile konke enakuyalelwa sisicaka *sikaNdikhoyo uMosis, nayithobela yonke imiyalelo yam." 
Joshua22:3 Unanamhla aniwashiyanga enyanyeni amawenu, koko ninyamekele ukuthobela umthetho kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Joshua22:4 Ngoku ke uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uwaphumzile amawenu, njengoko wathembisayo. Ke ngoko godukani niye kumhlaba ongowenu ongakwicala elingasempumalanga yeJordan, lowo nawunikwa nguMosis isicaka sikaNdikhoyo." 
Joshua22:5 Kambe maze ninyaniseke ngokupheleleyo ekuwuthobeleni umyalelo nomthetho eniwuwiselwe nguMosis isicaka sikaNdikhoyo, othi: ‘Mthande uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho; mthobele ezintweni zonke, uyigcine imiyalelo yakhe, unamathele kuye, umkhonze ngomxhelo wonke nangomoya wakho wonke.’ ”" 
Joshua22:6 Emva koko ke uYoshuwa wabasikelela wabandulula bagoduka. 
Joshua22:7 Kaloku uMosis wayabele isiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase umhlaba eBhashan, kanti ke yena uYoshuwa wabela esinye isiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase umhlaba ongasentshona kweJordan kunye namawabo. UYoshuwa wabandulula wabasikelela wathi:" 
Joshua22:8 “Ngoku nigoduka nizizityebi, ninemfuyo eninzi, nesiliva, negolide, ubhedu, nentsimbi, nemfumba yezambatho. Ze niwabele amawenu kumaxhoba eniwafumene ezintshabeni.”" 
Joshua22:9 AmaRubhen namaGadi nesiqingatha samaManase bagoduka. Amanye amaSirayeli bawashiya apho eShilo kwelamaKanana, basinga kwelakowabo eGiliyadi, ababeyifumene ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo kuMosis." 
Joshua22:10 Zathi zakufika eGeliloti ngaseJordan eKanana izizwe zakwaRubhen nakwaGadi noManase osempuma, zakha into enkulu yeqonga lamadini apho phezu komlambo." 
Joshua22:11 AmaSirayeli eva kusithiwa: “Khangelani uRubhen noGadi nesiqingatha sikaManase bakhe iqonga lamadini emdeni welaseKanana nganeno apha eGeliloti phezu komlambo iJordan!” 
Joshua22:12 Yakuvakala loo nto lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli lahlangana eShilo, lizilungiselela ukuhlasela izizwe ezingaphesheya, empumalanga yeJordan." 
Joshua22:13 AmaSirayeli athuma umbingeleli uPineyasi unyana kaElazare kwaRubhen nakwaGadi nakwaManase ongaphesheya eGiliyadi. 
Joshua22:14 UPineyasi wahamba neshumi lamadoda aziinkokheli zezizwe ezilishumi zakwaSirayeli. La madoda ayeziintloko zezindlu. 
Joshua22:15 Baya kufika eGiliyadi kwaRubhen, kwaGadi, nakwaManase ongasempuma, bafika bathi:" 
Joshua22:16 “Sithetha nje, sithetha egameni lebandla likaNdikhoyo liphela. Niyenzeleni into embi kangaka ngokungathembeki kuThixo kaSirayeli? Yini na ukuba nityeke kuNdikhoyo ngokuzakhela iqonga lamadini, nivukelane naye ngoku?" 
Joshua22:17 Khange bube sisifundo na ubugwenxa obenzeke ePehore Kaloku uNdikhoyo wabetha ibandla xa lilonke ngobhubhani. Ngaba unanamhla anikahlanjululwa na kobo bugwenxa," 
Joshua22:18 le nto nityekayo ekumlandeleni uNdikhoyo? Xa namhlanje nimvukela uNdikhoyo, ngomso kosa eliqumbele lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli." 
Joshua22:19 Xa umhlaba wenu ugqwalisekile, ngani ningaweli iJordan nje, niye apho simiyo *isibingelelo sikaNdikhoyo ezweni lakhe, nize kuma apha phakathi kwethu? Yekani ukumvukela uNdikhoyo nize nathi nisifake kolo vukelo lwenu ngokwenza qonga limbi lingelilo likaNdikhoyo uThixo wethu." 
Joshua22:20 Ngaba senikulibele ukungathembeki kuka-Akana unyana kaZera, owathatha amaxhoba amakatshatyalaliswe, kwaza ngenxa yeso senzo kohlwaywa lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli? UAkana akazange afe yedwa ngenxa yesono sakhe.”" 
Joshua22:21 Oonyana bakaRubhen, noonyana bakaGadi, nesiqingatha sikaManase, benjenje ukuphendula iintloko zezizwe zakwaSirayeli:" 
Joshua22:22 “Oyena unguThixo nguNdikhoyo! Ewe, oyena unguThixo nguye uNdikhoyo! Nguye owaziyo ukuba sikwenzeleni na oku, yaye nani sifuna nazi. Ukuba oku sikwenze ngokungathembeki kuNdikhoyo, okanye ngokumvukela, masingasindi ekufeni namhlanje." 
Joshua22:23 Yaye ukuba ngeli qonga sityekile ekumlandeleni uNdikhoyo ngokwenzela kulo amadini ethu atshiswayo, nawokudla, nawobudlelane, makasuke asigwebe yena ngenkqu." 
Joshua22:24 Hayi bo! Elaa qonga silenze ngenxa yexhala lokuba kwixesha elizayo abantwana benu basenokuthi kubantwana bethu: ‘Uyintoni kuni kakade uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli? 
Joshua22:25 Akanto yakwenza nani maRubhen namaGadi; wasahlula nani ngokwenza iJordan umda.’ Loo nto ke ingabangela ukuba abantwana bethu bayeke ukunqula uNdikhoyo. 
Joshua22:26 Kungoko ke satshoyo ukuthi: ‘Masakhe iqonga, kodwa kungabi ngenjongo yakunikela madini naminikelo kulo.’" 
Joshua22:27 Hayi, sisitsho nje besisenzela thina nani, nezizukulwana ezizayo, ubungqina bokuba ngenene uNdikhoyo simnqula esibingelelweni sakhe ngamadini atshiswayo, nawobudlelane, nangeminikelo. Besisenzela ukuba abantwana benu bangaze bathi kwabethu: ‘Aninasabelo nina nanto yakwenza kuNdikhoyo.’" 
Joshua22:28 Thina besiba abantwana bethu babeya kuthi xa ithe yehla into enjalo: ‘Naliya iqonga elifana nqwa neliya likaNdikhoyo lakhiwa ngoobawo. Ewe kambe, asililo lamadini neminikelo, lona lilingqina kumawethu nakumawenu.’" 
Joshua22:29 Asingeke ke thina sivukele uNdikhoyo okanye sityeke kuye ngokwakha iqonga lamadini neminikelo elilelinye. ElikaNdikhoyo uThixo wethu lona limi esibingelelweni sakhe.” 
Joshua22:30 OoPineyasi neentloko zakwaSirayeli kunye nezezindlu, banela bakuba beyivile impendulo yamaRubhen namaGadi kunye neyesiqingatha samaManase." 
Joshua22:31 Umbingeleli uPineyasi, unyana kaElazare, wathi kuwo: “Ngoku siyazi ukuba uNdikhoyo uphakathi kwethu; animvukelanga. Ngoko ke amaSirayeli ephela asindile kumsindo wakhe.”" 
Joshua22:32 UPineyasi ke neentloko zamaSirayeli bemka kwaRubhen nakwaGadi eGiliyadi, babuyela eKanana, baya kwenza ingxelo kumaSirayeli." 
Joshua22:33 Aneliseka yiloo ngxelo amaSirayeli, atsho abonga uThixo; akabi sathetha ngakuhlasela awutshabalalise umhlaba wamaRubhen namaGadi." 
Joshua22:34 Baza ke abantu bakwaRubhen nakwaGadi balibiza elo qonga ngokuthi: “Lingqina kuthi sonke ukuba uNdikhoyo unguThixo.” Baza ke bathi ukulibiza liNgqina. 
Joshua23:1 Lakuba ligqithile ithuba elide *uNdikhoyo uwaphumzile amaSirayeli ezintshabeni zawo ezaziwangqongile; noYoshuwa ngoku wayeselemdala aluphele. 
Joshua23:2 UYoshuwa wawabiza onke amaSirayeli, amadoda amakhulu, iintloko zezindlu, abalamli, kunye nabanye abangamagosa, wathi kubo: “Sendaluphele; ndigugile mna ngoku." 
Joshua23:3 Niyibonile yonke into ayenzileyo ngenxa yenu uNdikhoyo kuzo zonke iintlanga zalapha. UNdikhoyo uThixo wenu ubesoloko enilwela kaloku. 
Joshua23:4 Khumbulani ukuba isizwe ngasinye kuni ndisabele umhlaba waso kumhlaba weentlanga endizitshabalalisileyo, kwanezo zisaseleyo phakathi kweJordan nolwandle ngasentshonalanga." 
Joshua23:5 UNdikhoyo uThixo wenu nguye ngenkqu owozigxotha phambi kwenu; wovulela nina indawo. Ke ngoko lo mhlaba ngowenu njengoko kanye wathembisayo. 
Joshua23:6 Ngoko ke yomelelani, ninyamekele nithobele yonke into ebhalwe kwincwadi yomthetho kaMosis, ningashiyi nendawo le." 
Joshua23:7 Nize ningazibandakanyi naba bantu basaseleyo apha, ningabizi namagama *oothixo babo, okanye nisebenzise amagama oothixo babo xa nifunga, ningabanquli abo thixo nikhahlele kubo." 
Joshua23:8 Ndaweni yaloo nto nina namathelani kuNdikhoyo, nenze njengoko senenzile unanamhla." 
Joshua23:9 UNdikhoyo unigxothele izizwe ezikhulu nezinamandla ekungeneni kwenu, akwabikho bani unako ukumelana nani edabini." 
Joshua23:10 Nditsho nomntu omnye kuni angachitha-chitha iwaka eyedwa, kuba kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu uyanilwela njengoko wathembisayo." 
Joshua23:11 Ze nigcise ke ngenxa yobomi benu, uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu nimthande," 
Joshua23:12 kuba kaloku xa nithe natyeka kuye nazibandakanya nezi ntlanga ziseleyo apha, nendiselana nazo," 
Joshua23:13 ze nazi kakuhle ukuba uNdikhoyo akakubuy' azigxothe, anivulele indawo. Ndaweni yaloo nto ziya kusuka zibe ngathi zizabatha nezigu zokunigcayisela, zibe ngathi zizabhokhwe zokunitywatyusha, nameva asemehlweni, nide niphele nithi shwaka kulo mhlaba ulungileyo niwunikwe nguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Joshua23:14 “Ngoku ke sendiza kufa. Nazi mhlophe ezintliziyweni zenu nasemiphefumlweni yenu ukuba akukho nanye into ayithembisileyo angayenzanga uNdikhoyo; ewe, akukho nanye into ayithethileyo angayiphumelelisanga." 
Joshua23:15 Kanti kwalo Ndikhoyo unenzela izinto ezintle kangaka uyakwazi ukubuya azise ububi anitshabalalise nithi shwaka kulo mhlaba ulungileyo aninike wona. 
Joshua23:16 Ewe, xa niwutyeshelayo umnqophiso athe maze niwugcine uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, nisuke nina nikhonze ninqule izithixo, wovutha umsindo wakhe, anitshabalalise ngephanyazo, niphele kuthi tu kulo mhlaba ulungileyo aninike wona.”" 
Joshua24:1 UYoshuwa wenza imbizo yazo zonke izizwe zakwaSirayeli eShekem. Wabiza onke amadoda amakhulu, iintloko zezindlu, abalamli, kunye nabanye abangamagosa akwaSirayeli, bonke baya kuthi nqwadalala *ngasesibingelelweni *sikaNdikhoyo." 
Joshua24:2 Wabhekisa kubo bonke abantu uYoshuwa wenjenje: “Utsho uNdikhoyo, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi: ‘Kudala kanye ooyihlo-mkhulu uTera kunye noonyana bakhe uAbraham noNahore babemi ngaphesheya komlambo iEfrati, benqula *thixo bambi." 
Joshua24:3 Uyihlo-mkhulu uAbraham ndamkhupha apho ngaphesheya kwe-Efrati, walityhutyha lonke elaseKanana. Ndampha abantwana abaninzi. Ndamnika uIsake;" 
Joshua24:4 uIsake yena ndamnika uYakobi noEsawu. UEsawu ndamnika ilizwe leentaba lase-Edom. Yena uYakobi noonyana bakhe behla baya eJiputa. 
Joshua24:5 Ndathuma uMosis noAron, amaJiputa ndawehlisela izibetho. Niyayazi into endawenza yona. Ndaza ke emva koko ndanikhupha eJiputa, naza nina naza kutsho kuLwandle oluBomvu. AmaJiputa akhupha iinqwelo zamahashe nomkhosi okhwele amahashe ukusukela ooyihlo, asinga kuLwandle oluBomvu." 
Joshua24:6  
Joshua24:7 Kodwa bathi bakukhala ooyihlo, ndafaka ithunzi lobumnyama phakathi kwamaSirayeli namaJiputa. Ndawagubungela ngamanzi olwandle, eyela amaJiputa – niyayazi loo nto. “ ‘Nahlala entlango ithuba elide." 
Joshua24:8 Ndaza mna ndanizisa kumhlaba wama-Amori awayemi ngasempumalanga yeJordan. Alwa nani, kodwa mna ndawanikela ezandleni zenu. Nawuthatha umhlaba wawo, ndakuba mna ndiwatshabalalisile." 
Joshua24:9 Ukumkani uBhalaki wakwaMowabhi, unyana kaZipore, waqubisana namaSirayeli edabini. Wathumelela uBhalam, unyana kaBhehore, ukuba abizwe eze anishwabulele," 
Joshua24:10 kodwa andizange ndivume ukumphulaphula uBhalam. Ndaweni yaloo nto wamana ukunithamsanqelisa, ndaba ke ndinihlangule kuBhalaki." 
Joshua24:11 Nawela iJordan, naya eJeriko. Abemi balapho balwa nani, njengoko enjenjalo ama-Amori, namaPerezi, namaKanana, amaHiti, amaGirgashi, amaHivi, namaJebhusi, kodwa ndabanikela ezandleni zenu." 
Joshua24:12 Ndabathumela ngoonomeva abo balwa nani. Yiyo loo nto eyachitha iikumkani zama-Amori zombini – asilokrele nalutolo lwenu. 
Joshua24:13 Ndaninika umhlaba eningazanga nawusebenza nezixeko eningazanga nazakha. Ngoku nihlala apho nitye isivuno semidiliya eningayilimanga, neminquma eningazanga nabulaleka yiyo.’" 
Joshua24:14 “UNdikhoyo mhloneleni, nimnqule ngentembeko ninyanisekile. Yahlukanani *nezithixo zookhokho benu ngexesha bengaphesheya kwe-Efrati naseJiputa, nikhonze uNdikhoyo yedwa." 
Joshua24:15 Ke ukuba kubi emehlweni enu ukumkhonza uNdikhoyo, khethani ngoku, ukuba nokhonza bani na nina, phakathi koothixo baseMesopotami booyihlo noothixo bama-Amori enimi kumhlaba wawo. Kodwa mna kunye nomzi wam, siya kukhonza uNdikhoyo.”" 
Joshua24:16 Aphendula amaSirayeli athi: “Thina asisoze sahlukane noNdikhoyo sikhonze thixo bambi. 
Joshua24:17 NguNdikhoyo uThixo wethu owasikhulula thina nookhokho eJiputa ebukhobokeni. Siyayazi imiqondiso emikhulu awayenzayo. Wasilondoloza konke apho sihamba khona, wasikhusela xa besicanda phakathi kweentlanga." 
Joshua24:18 UNdikhoyo wasigxothela zonke iintlanga, nditsho kunye nama-Amori awayemi apha. Ngoko ke nathi sokhonza uNdikhoyo; nguye uThixo wethu.”" 
Joshua24:19 UYoshuwa wathetha namaSirayeli wenjenje: “Aninako ukumkhonza uNdikhoyo. UNdikhoyo nguThixo owahlukileyo; unguThixo onekhwele. Akasayi kukuxolela ukumvukela kwenu nokumona kwenu," 
Joshua24:20 yaye ukuba niyamfulathela nikhonze izithixo zasemzini, wonijikela anihlisele ububi. Wonitshabalalisa niphele, ngoku kanye ebekade eniphethe kakuhle.”" 
Joshua24:21 Abantu bathi kuYoshuwa: “Hayi bo! Thina siza kukhonza uNdikhoyo.” 
Joshua24:22 Wathi ke uYoshuwa: “Ningamangqina enu ngokwenu ke ukuba nina nizikhethele ukukhonza uNdikhoyo.” “Ewe, singamangqina,” batsho abantu." 
Joshua24:23 “Yahlukanani ke nazo ezo zithixo zasemzini ninazo,” watsho uYoshuwa, “nize ke nizinikele ngomxhelo wonke kuNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli.”" 
Joshua24:24 Bathi abantu kuYoshuwa: “Thina sokhonza uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu, siphulaphule ilizwi lakhe.”" 
Joshua24:25 Ngaloo mini, belapho eShekem, uYoshuwa wabenzela umnqophiso abantu, wabanika imimiselo nemithetho amabayithobele." 
Joshua24:26 Wayibhala yonke loo nto uYoshuwa encwadini yomthetho kaThixo. Waza emva koko wathatha ilitye elikhulu, walimisa phantsi komthi wom-oki ngakuloo ndawo wayenqulelwa kuyo uNdikhoyo." 
Joshua24:27 Wathi ebantwini bonke: “Niyabona, eli litye loba lelobungqina, kuba liwevile onke amazwi uNdikhoyo awabhekise kuthi. Lilo ke eloba lingqina xa nimkhanyela uThixo wenu.”" 
Joshua24:28 Emva koko ke wabandulula abantu uYoshuwa, umntu ngamnye wabuyela emhlabeni olilifa lakhe." 
Joshua24:29 Wabhubha ke emva koko uYoshuwa, unyana kaNune, isicaka *sikaNdikhoyo, eminyaka ilikhulu lineshumi." 
Joshua24:30 Wafihlelwa eTimnata-sera, emhlabeni olilifa lakhe, kweleentaba kwaEfrayim, kumantla entaba iGahashe." 
Joshua24:31 AmaSirayeli ahlala ekhonza uNdikhoyo lo gama wayesaphila uYoshuwa. Akungabikho ahlala esenjenjalo nangalo gama ayesekho amadoda amakhulu awayenamava ngeziganeko ezikhulu ezenziwa nguNdikhoyo. 
Joshua24:32 Amathambo kaJosefu awayeze nawo eJiputa amaSirayeli, awangcwaba kumhlaba owathengwa nguYakobi eShekem koonyana bakaHamore uyise kaShekem ngekhulu leesiliva. Lo mhlaba waba lilifa lenzala kaJosefu." 
Joshua24:33 Wabhubha noElazare, unyana ka-Aron, waza wangcwatyelwa eGibheya kweleentaba kwaEfrayim, emhlabeni owabelwa uPineyasi unyana wakhe." 
Judges1:1 Akuba engasekho uYoshuwa, amaSirayeli abuzisa *kuNdikhoyo, athi: “Ngubani onokusikhokela ukuya kuhlasela amaKanana?”" 
Judges1:2 Ke yena waphendula wathi: “Mayibe nguJuda; ndiwunikele esandleni sakhe loo mhlaba.” 
Judges1:3 Ke indlu kaJuda yathi kumawabo amaSimon: “Sincediseni xa silwa namaKanana ukuzuza isabelo sethu somhlaba, khon' ukuze nathi sinincedise xa nilwela esenu isabelo.” Ngoko ke ahamba nendlu kaJuda amaSimon." 
Judges1:4 Bahlasela ke abendlu kaJuda, uNdikhoyo wawanikela ezandleni zabo amaKanana namaPerezi, baza babulala ishumi lamawaka eBhezeki." 
Judges1:5 Apho ke bafumana uAdoni-bhezeki, balwa naye, bawaswantsulisa amaKanana namaPerezi." 
Judges1:6 Ke yena uAdoni-bhezeki wabaleka, baza bona bamsukela, bambamba, bamnqumla oobhontsi bezandla nabeenyawo." 
Judges1:7 UAdoni-bhezeki wathi: “Amashumi asixhenxe ookumkani ababhontsi babo bezandla neenyawo bashunqulweyo babefudula bechola-chola iimvuthuluka apho ndityela khona. Kodwa ke ngoku uThixo undiphindezele ngaloo nto ndandibenza yona.” Wathathwa ke, wasiwa eJerusalem, apho wafela khona." 
Judges1:8 Abendlu kaJuda ke bayihlasela bayithimba iJerusalem. Abemi bayo babatshabalalisa, sona isixeko basifak' umlilo." 
Judges1:9 Emva koko ke balwa namaKanana akweleentaba, namazantsi azo, ngokunjalo nakwintlango esezantsi." 
Judges1:10 Bahlasela namaKanana awayemi eHebron eyayibizwa ngokuba yiKiriyati-arbha mandulo. Bayoyisa ke imizi yamaSheshayi, ama-Ahiman, namaTalmayi." 
Judges1:11 Abendlu kaJuda baya kuhlasela abantu abahlala eDebhiri, ekwakusithiwa yiKiriyati-sefere mandulo." 
Judges1:12 UKalebhi wathi: “Intombi yam uAkesa ndoyendisela kumntu oya kuze ayihlasele ayithimbe iKiriyati-sefere.” 
Judges1:13 UOteniyeli, unyana kaKenazi umninawa omncinci kaKalebhi, wasithimba ke eso sixeko, waza ke uKalebhi wayendisela kuye intombi yakhe uAkesa." 
Judges1:14 Bakuba betshatile wacenga uOteniyeli amvumele acele umhlaba kuyise. Wehla kwidonki awayekhwele kuyo uAkesa, waza uKalebhi wambuza wathi: “Kwenzeke ntoni?”" 
Judges1:15 Wathi ukuphendula uAkesa: “Ndicela intsikelelo. Kaloku umhlaba ondinike wona ukwindawo ebharhileyo. Nceda undinike imithombo.” UKalebhi ke wamnika imithombo engasentla nengasezantsi. 
Judges1:16 Inzala kayise womka-Mosis, umKeni, yahamba nendlu kaJuda ukuphuma kwisiXeko samaSundu, yaya kumhlaba oyintlango ezantsi kweArade kwelakwaJuda, yaza ke yema phakathi kwabantu balapho." 
Judges1:17 Ke uJuda noSimon badibana, baza bawoyisa amaKanana awayehlala eZefati. Eso sixeko basivuthulula, basitshabalalisa, baza basithiya igama eliyiHoma." 
Judges1:18 *UNdikhoyo wayinceda indlu kaJuda, yawuthatha umhlaba okweleentaba. Phofu abakwaJuda zange babe nako ukubagxotha abantu ababemi kwintili egudle ulwandle, kuba babeneenqwelo ezenziwe ngentsimbi. Izixeko zabo ibiyiGaza, iAshkelon, ne-Ekron, zinemimandla yazo." 
Judges1:19  
Judges1:20 Ngokomlomo kaMosis iHebron yanikwa uKalebhi, owagxotha izindlu ezintathu khona ezaziyinzala ka-Anaki." 
Judges1:21 Kodwa ke amaBhenjamin zange awagxothe amaJebhusi awayehlala eJerusalem – asemi khona ndawonye namaBhenjamin unanamhla. 
Judges1:22 Abendlu kaJosefu bahlasela iBhetele, ekwakusithiwa yiLuzi ngaloo maxesha. *UNdikhoyo wabanceda. Bathumela iintlola apho esixekweni," 
Judges1:23  
Judges1:24 zaza zabona indoda iphuma khona, zathi kuyo: “Sibonise indlela yokungena esixekweni. Ukuba uthe wenjenjalo asiyi kukwenzakalisa.”" 
Judges1:25 Yazibonisa ke, aza amaJosefu ababulala bonke abantu bakhona, ashiya loo ndoda nendlu yayo kuphela." 
Judges1:26 Emva koko yaya kwelamaHiti, yakha isixeko, yathi yiLuzi igama laso. Sisabizwa ngelo gama ke nangoku." 
Judges1:27 AmaManase zange azigxothe izizwe ezazihlala eBhete-shan, eTanaki, eDore, eIbleyam, eMegido, nakwiilali ezikufuphi nezi dolophu, kuba amaKanana ayezimisele ukuhlala apho." 
Judges1:28 Athi ke akomelela amaSirayeli azenza izicaka zawo ezo zizwe, kodwa akazigxotha." 
Judges1:29 NamaEfrayim zange awagxothe amaKanana awayehlala eGezere; awayeka bahlala kunye. 
Judges1:30 AmaZebhulon nawo zange awagxothe amaKanana awayehlala eKitron naseNalali, kodwa ahlala nawo, awenza izicaka." 
Judges1:31 Nama-Ashere zange abagxothe abemi baseAko, nabaseSidon, nabaseAlabhi, nabaseAkezibhi, nabaseHelebha, nabaseAfeki, nabaseRehobhi." 
Judges1:32 Ngoko ke ama-Ashere ahlala nawo loo maKanana. 
Judges1:33 Indlu kaNafetali zange ibagxothe abemi baseBhete-shemeshe nabaseBhete-anati. Loo maKanana ke ahlala namaNafetali, aba zizicaka zawo." 
Judges1:34 AmaDan oyiswa ngama-Amori, atsho ahlala kweleentaba, akaba nako ukuhlela emathafeni." 
Judges1:35 Ama-Amori ayezimisele ukunganikezeli eAyalon, naseShalabhim, nakwintaba iHeres; kodwa ke amaJosefu ada awongamela, aba zizicaka zawo." 
Judges1:36 Umda wama-Amori wawuhamba uye kuphuma ngenkalo yeAkrabhim, uye kudlula eSela." 
Judges2:1 Isithunywa *sikaNdikhoyo saphuma eGiligali, saya eBhokim, saza sathi: “Ndanikhupha kwelaseJiputa, ndanizisa kweli lizwe ndabathembisa ngalo ooyihlo-mkhulu ngesifungo. Ndathi: ‘Andisoze ndiwaphule umnqophiso wam nani." 
Judges2:2 Ke nina ze ningaze nenze mnqophiso nabemi beli lizwe. Kufuneka niwadilize amaqonga abo amadini.’ Kambe ke anenzanga ngokwelizwi endalithethayo kuni. Yintoni le niyenzileyo? 
Judges2:3 Ngoko ke ndiyanazisa ukuba andiyi kuzigxotha ezi zizwe. Zona ke ziya kuba ngumgibe kuni, nirhintyelwe yindlela ezinqula ngayo *oothixo bazo.”" 
Judges2:4 Sakuthetha la mazwi ke isithunywa sikaNdikhoyo, onke amaSirayeli asitsho isikhalo." 
Judges2:5 Ngenxa yaloo nto ke igama laloo ndawo kuthiwa yiBhokim. Khona apho uNdikhoyo amenzela amadini amaSirayeli. 
Judges2:6 Ke kaloku uYoshuwa amaSirayeli wawandulula. Indlu nganye yaya kuthatha esayo isabelo somhlaba esililifa layo. 
Judges2:7 Ngalo lonke ixesha esadla ubomi uYoshuwa, amaSirayeli ambusa amnqula *uNdikhoyo. Nasekufeni kwakhe aqhubela phambili amnqula lo gama esaphila amadoda amakhulu awayeyibone ngamehlo imimangaliso awayeyenzele amaSirayeli uNdikhoyo." 
Judges2:8 UYoshuwa, unyana kaNune, isicaka sikaNdikhoyo, wabhubha xa enekhulu elineshumi leminyaka ezelwe." 
Judges2:9 Wangcwatywa kumhlaba olilifa lakhe eTimnata-heres kweleentaba kwaEfrayim, ngasentla kwentaba iGahashe." 
Judges2:10 Sakuba sitshonile sonke eso sizukulwana, kwavela sizukulwana simbi, singamaziyo uNdikhoyo, ngokunjalo naloo misebenzi yakhe wayeyenzela amaSirayeli." 
Judges2:11 Ke amaSirayeli amona *uNdikhoyo ngokunqula ooBhali," 
Judges2:12 asuka amfulathela uNdikhoyo, uThixo wooyise-mkhulu, uThixo owawakhupha kwelaseJiputa. Asuka abusa *thixo bambi kwizithixo zabantu ababewangqingile. UNdikhoyo amcaphukisa ngokusuka akhahlele abuse ezo zithixo." 
Judges2:13 Amfulathela uNdikhoyo, asuka akhonza ooBhali nooAshtarte." 
Judges2:14 Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo waba nomsindo, amaSirayeli wawayekela ngeentshaba, zawahlasela ziwaphanga. Wazivulela macala onke, zawongamela, ada akaba nako ukuzikhusela." 
Judges2:15 Ayesithi xa ephumile aya edabini, uNdikhoyo awayekele, ngokomlomo wakhe. Kwathi ke kwakuba nje amaSirayeli abandezeleka kunene." 
Judges2:16 Noko ke uNdikhoyo amaSirayeli wawanika iinkokheli ezawasindisayo kwabo babewahlasela bewaphanga. 
Judges2:17 Kambe ke wona amaSirayeli zange azikhathalele ezo nkokheli. Ewe kaloku, uSirayeli suka waqhogana nathixo bambi endaweni kaNdikhoyo. Ooyise bona babeyithobele imiyalelo kaNdikhoyo, kodwa sona isizukulwana esitsha sisuke saphuma kwelo khondo." 
Judges2:18 UNdikhoyo ke wayesithi xa enika amaSirayeli inkokheli ayixhase iwahlangule amaSirayeli ezintshabeni ngalo lonke ithuba lokudla kwayo ubomi. UNdikhoyo wayeba nenceba, kuba ayenesingqala egogoza phantsi kweengcinezelo." 
Judges2:19 Kodwa ke kwakusithi yakubhubha inkokheli leyo, amaSirayeli abuyele kwesezolo, abe nesimo esilumezayo kunesooyise. Ayebusa anqule thixo bambi, engavumi ukwahlukana neenkani zawo, alumleke kwezo ndlela zawo zigwenxa."
