1Samuel15:9 USawule namadoda omkhosi wakhe bamyeka abambulala ukumkani uAgagi; iinkomo neegusha ezintle abazange bazibulale kunye namathole namatakane azo. Yonke into entle bayigcina, batshabalalisa nje imigqutsuba nezinto ezingenaxabiso kuphela." 
1Samuel15:10 Lafika ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo kuSamweli lisithi: 
1Samuel15:11 “Ndiyazisola ngokumenza ukumkani uSawule lo. Selenxaxhile kum ngokungawuthobeli umyalelo wam.” Wakhathazeka kakhulu uSamweli yile nto. Wahlala ubusuku bonke ezibika kuNdikhoyo. 
1Samuel15:12 Uvuke ekuseni uSamweli, waya kukhangela uSawule. Ufike kusithiwa: “USawule uye eKarmele, waza apho wamisa ilitye lesikhumbuzo sakhe, wedlula nalapho waya eGiligali.”" 
1Samuel15:13 Walanda ekhondweni uSamweli, wada wamfumana, uSawule wathi: “Makakuthamsanqele uNdikhoyo, Samweli! Ndiwufezile umyalelo kaNdikhoyo!”" 
1Samuel15:14 “Xa kunjalo, kokwantoni oku kukhala kweegusha ndikuvayo kunye nokunxakama kweenkomo?” ubuzile uSamweli." 
1Samuel15:15 Uthe uSawule ukuphendula: “Zezithinjwe ngamadoda omkhosi wam kuma-Amaleki. Zonke ezinye bazitshabalalisile; bagcina nje ezona zintle, ukuze bamenzele amadini ngazo uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho.”" 
1Samuel15:16 “Khawume ke,” utshilo uSamweli, “ndikhe ndikuxelele ukuba utheni na kum uNdikhoyo phezolo.” “Ndixelele,” watsho uSawule." 
1Samuel15:17 USamweli wathi: “Naxa wena wawuzibona uphantsi, kodwa wenziwa intloko yezizwe zakwaSirayeli. Wathanjiswa nguNdikhoyo ukuba ube ngukumkani wamaSirayeli," 
1Samuel15:18 waza wakuyalela ukuba uye kutshabalalisa eziya zikhohlakali zama-Amaleki. Wakuxelela ukuba uze ulwe uwatshayele ade aphele onke kuthi tu. 
1Samuel15:19 Ke kutheni ungamthobelanga nje uNdikhoyo? Wenze into embi phambi koNdikhoyo ngokungxamela ukuthatha amaxhoba.” 
1Samuel15:20 “UNdikhoyo ndimthobele,” kutsho uSawule. “Ndiyile emfazweni ngokuthunywa nguye, ndambamba ukumkani uAgagi, kodwa ndawabulala onke amanye ama-Amaleki." 
1Samuel15:21 Ke amajoni akazibulalanga ezona zintle iigusha neenkomo; eze nazo apha eGiligali, ukuza kwenzela uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho amadini.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Uqhube wenjenje uSamweli: “Ngaba yintoni emkholisayo uNdikhoyo: kukumthobela, okanye kukumenzela iminikelo namadini? Ukuthobela uNdikhoyo kubhetele kunokumenzela idini, nokuphulaphula kungcono kunamanqatha enkunzi!" 
1Samuel15:23 Ukumvukela uNdikhoyo nqwa nobugqwirha. Kanti nempakamo ifana nqwa nokunqula izithixo ngobubi. Ngenxa yokuba wena ulikhabile ilizwi likaNdikhoyo, naye ke uNdikhoyo uyakukhiqa ekulawuleni.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Uvakele selesithi uSawule kuSamweli: “Ndonile ngenene, kuba ndiphambukile kwilizwi likaNdikhoyo, ndayidela nemiyalelo yakho. Ndoyike umkhosi wam, ndenza ukuthanda kwawo." 
1Samuel15:25 Ndincede undixolele isono sam, undikhaphe, ndiye kuqubuda kuNdikhoyo.”" 
1Samuel15:26 “Hayi, andizi kuhamba nawe. Kaloku wena ulikhabile ilizwi likaNdikhoyo, naye ke uNdikhoyo ukukhiqile ekulawuleni,” utshilo uSamweli." 
1Samuel15:27 Uthe gwiqi uSamweli, eza kumshiya apho. USawule yena wamthi hlasi ngesondo lengubo, yakrazuka." 
1Samuel15:28 Uthe ke uSamweli: “Namhlanje uNdikhoyo ulukrazule kuwe ulawulo lwamaSirayeli, walunika ummelwane wakho olungileyo kunawe." 
1Samuel15:29 USimakade uThixo kaSirayeli akaxoki yena, yaye akaguquguquki. Kaloku akangomntu ulala neli avuke neli.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Waphendula uSawule wathi: “Ewe kambe, ndonile. Kodwa ke wena bonakalisa imbeko kum phambi kwezithwala-ndwe zamajoni am nangaphambi kwamaSirayeli. Ndikhaphe ndiye kuqubuda kuNdikhoyo uThixo wakho.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Wamkhapha ke uSamweli, waza uSawule waqubuda kuNdikhoyo." 
1Samuel15:32 USamweli wathi: “Zisani uAgagi ukumkani wama-Amaleki apha kum.” Wasiwa uAgagi kuSamweli, ehamba eziva ekhululekile emoyeni, esithi: “Hayi noko, ixhala elikrakra lokufa ligqithile.”" 
1Samuel15:33 Suka uSamweli wavakala esithi: “Ikrele lakho lishiye abazalikazi abaninzi bengenabantwana, nowakho ke ngoku unyoko uza kungabi namntwana.” Watsho emhlahla loo Agagi apho ngaphambi kukaNdikhoyo eGiligali." 
1Samuel15:34 Emva koko uSamweli wabuyela eRama, waza yena ukumkani uSawule waya kowabo eGibheya." 
1Samuel15:35 USamweli akazange abuye ambone ukumkani emva koko. Kambe ke wasoloko engcungcutheka ngenxa kaSawule. UNdikhoyo kaloku wayezisola ngokwenza kwakhe uSawule ukumkani. 
1Samuel16:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kuSamweli: “Koda kube nini uzingcungcuthekisa ngenxa kaSawule? Ndimkhiqile ekulawuleni amaSirayeli. Zalisa iqhaga lakho ngamafutha omnquma, uye eBhetelehem kwaJese, kuba ndityumbe omnye koonyana bakhe ukuba abe ngukumkani wamaSirayeli.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Ubuze wenjenje uSamweli: “Ndingathini ukuya? Angandibulala uSawule ukuyiva kwakhe loo nto!” UNdikhoyo uthe kuSamweli: “Uze uqhube ithokazi lenkomo, uthi uye kwenza idini apho." 
1Samuel16:3 Uze ufike umeme uJese eze kwelo dini. Mna ke ndokuxelela into omawuyenze, ndikubonise nomntu omawumthambise abe ngukumkani.”" 
1Samuel16:4 USamweli wenjenjeya ukusinga eBhetelehem, ethunywe nguNdikhoyo. Wahlangatyezwa ngamadoda amakhulu edolophu, egubha kukoyika. Ambuza esithi: “Ngaba uze ngoxolo?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Uthe ukuphendula uSamweli: “Kunjalo kanye; ndize ngoxolo. Ndize kwenzela uNdikhoyo idini. Zihlambululeni, nize nani, sinyuse idini.” Waza uJese noonyana bakhe wabahlambulula, wabamema nabo ukuba beze edinini." 
1Samuel16:6 Bakuba bezile edinini apho, wathi uSamweli akubona uEliyabhi unyana kaJese, wathetha yedwa esithi: “Inene, nanku umthanjiswa kaNdikhoyo emi phambi kwakhe.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Kodwa uNdikhoyo wathi kuSamweli: “Musa ukujonga ubunzwana bakhe nesithomo sakhe. Asinguye endimfunayo. Kaloku mna Ndikhoyo andijongi okujongwa ngabantu. Abantu bakhangela umfaneleko; mna Ndikhoyo ndikhangela ngaphakathi entliziyweni.” 
1Samuel16:8 UJese ubize omnye unyana wakhe, uAbhinadabhi, wamgqithisa phambi koSamweli. USamweli wathi: “Hayi bo, nalo akafunwa nguNdikhoyo!”" 
1Samuel16:9 Kugqithiswe uShama, wathi uSamweli: “Naye lo akafunwa nguNdikhoyo.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Bada bosixhenxe oonyana bakaJese bagqithiswa phambi koSamweli, yena emana esithi: “Hayi, akatyunjwanga nguNdikhoyo.”" 
1Samuel16:11 USamweli ubuzile kuJese: “Akunanyana bambi na?” Uthe uJese: “Ewe, ukho untondo; phofu usendle; walusa iigusha.” USamweli wathi: “Makaye kubizwa.” Watsho esithi: “Asizi kutya ade afike.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Ke uJese wathumela, waza waphuthunywa. Ebusweni ebekhangeleka esegazini, enamehlo abukhali, eyinzwana yomfo. UNdikhoyo ke wathi kuSamweli: “Nguye ke lowo, mthambise!”" 
1Samuel16:13 Wathatha elo qhaga lamafutha omnquma wayeliphethe uSamweli, wathambisa ngawo uDavide, abakhuluwa bakhe bejongile. Ukusukela ngaloo mini uDavide wangenwa ngamandla nguMoya kaNdikhoyo. Emva koko ke uSamweli yena wabuyela eRama." 
1Samuel16:14 Ke kaloku uSawule washiywa nguMoya *kaNdikhoyo, waza waphathwa ngumoya okhohlakeleyo, uvunyelwe nguNdikhoyo." 
1Samuel16:15 Izicaka zakhe zathi kuye: “Uyabona, umoya ongalunganga ovunyelwe nguThixo uyakuthuthumbisa." 
1Samuel16:16 Ke, mhlekazi, yithi masikufunele umntu okwaziyo ukubetha uhadi; kuze kuthi xa ufikelwa ngulo moya mbi akudlalele uhadi, ubuye udlamke.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Wathi uSawule: “Mfuneni loo mntu udlala kakuhle, nize naye kum.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Sathi esinye isicaka: “UJese waseBhetelehem unonyana oyincutshe yengoma. Kanti ukwaligorha lomfana oziqhelileyo iimfazwe. Uliciko lokuthetha, ekwayinzwana, kwaye uNdikhoyo unaye.”" 
1Samuel16:19 USawule wathumela izigidimi eBhetelehem kuJese, wathi: “Ndithumele unyana wakho uDavide owalusa iigusha.”" 
1Samuel16:20 UJese ke wamthumela uDavide kwaSawule, eqhuba itakane lebhokhwe, kunye nedonki ekulayishwe kuyo izonka nemvaba yewayini." 
1Samuel16:21 Waya kufika kwaSawule uDavide, waba sisicaka apho. Wathandwa kakhulu nguSawule uDavide, wada wenziwa umfana wokuphatha izikrweqe zikakumkani." 
1Samuel16:22 Ke kaloku uSawule wathumela umyalezo kuJese othi: “Ndiyakholwa nguDavide. Selumyeka asebenze apha komkhulu.” 
1Samuel16:23 Ke uDavide waba soloko ethatha uhadi adlalele uSawule ingoma ngalo lonke ixesha afikelwa nguloo moya mbi uvunyelwe nguThixo, afumane isiqabu, adlamke uSawule, angabi sakhathazwa nguloo moya." 
1Samuel17:1 Laxubayela, amabutho amaFilistiya aqokelelana eSoko, idolophu eyayikwaJuda. Ikampu yawo ayimisa kwindawo ekuthiwa yiEfese-damin, phakathi kweSoko neAzeka." 
1Samuel17:2 USawule namajoni amaSirayeli aya kudibanela entlanjeni ekuthiwa yeyom-oki, ayimisa apho eyawo ikampu, ema ngokwezintlu zawo, alungela idabi namaFilistiya." 
1Samuel17:3 AmaFilistiya ema endulini, amaSirayeli ema kwenye, kukho intlambo phakathi kwemikhosi yawo." 
1Samuel17:4 Kwavela umfo othile oyintshatsheli ogama linguGoliyati, wedolophu yaseGati, esuka kwikampu yamaFilistiya. Wayephantse ukuba ziimitha ezintathu ubude," 
1Samuel17:5 egaxele isikhuselo esenziwe ngobhedu, esasimalunga namashumi amahlanu eekhilogram ubunzima, ethwele umnqwazi wobhedu." 
1Samuel17:6 Imilenze nayo yayikwakhuselwe ngobhedu, exwaye intshuntshe yobhedu." 
1Samuel17:7 Umkhonto wawungangesibonda, ubutsolo bawo obenziwe ngentsimbi bumalunga nesixhenxe seekhilogram ubunzima. Wayenomfo othwala ikhaka lakhe ehamba ngaphambi kwakhe." 
1Samuel17:8 UGoliyati wema bhuxe, wakhwaza ebhekisa kwizintlu zamaSirayeli, wathi: “Wa, zicakandini zikaSawule, nenzani apho? Makuliwe! NdingumFilistiya mna; mayiphume ngapha ibe nye, sigagane." 
1Samuel17:9 Ukuba indoyisile yandibulala, soba zizicaka zenu thina. Xa indim owoyisileyo, nina noba zizicaka zethu." 
1Samuel17:10 Ndim lo, ndinibeka ehlazweni, maSirayeli. Khuphani indoda ibe nye, sihlangane!”" 
1Samuel17:11 Boyika, bagubha ooSawule namadoda omkhosi wakhe, bakuyiva into ethethwa nguloo mFilistiya." 
1Samuel17:12 UDavide wayengunyana kaJese umEfrata waseBhetelehem kwaJuda. UJese wayenoonyana abasibhozo. Wayeselemdala kakhulu ngexesha ekwakulawula uSawule. 
1Samuel17:13 Oonyana bakhe abakhulu abathathu baya emfazweni kunye nomkhosi kaSawule. Omkhulu yayinguEliyabhi, kuze uAbhinadabhi, kulandele uShama." 
1Samuel17:14 UDavide yena wayenguntondo. Lo gama abakhuluwa bakhe babenoSawule," 
1Samuel17:15 yena uDavide wayedla ngokuthi ekwaSawule abe emana egoduka aye eBhetelehem, esiya kwalusa iigusha zikayise." 
1Samuel17:16 Yaba ngamashumi amane eentsuku uGoliyati mihla le ecela umngeni kumaSirayeli kusasa nangokuhlwa. 
1Samuel17:17 UJese wathuma unyana wakhe uDavide, wathi: “Hamba nale ngqolowa igcadiweyo, ishumi leekhilogram, neli shumi lezonka, ukhawuleze uzise kubantakwenu emkhosini," 
1Samuel17:18 uphathele umphathi-butho nala maqebengwana alishumi etshizi, usivele ukuba basaphila na abantakwenu. Uze ube nento oza nayo, eyoba bubungqina bokuba basaphila." 
1Samuel17:19 Ukumkani Sawule nabantakwenu, kunye nomkhosi wonke wamaSirayeli, nabaya kulaa ntili yom-oki, besilwa namaFilistiya.”" 
1Samuel17:20 Wavuka ekuseni uDavide ngengomso, wayishiya nomnye umalusi impahla. Waya kulanda ukutya awayekuthunyiwe nguJese uyise, wanduluka. Ufike ekampini yomkhosi xa kanye amaSirayeli alungiselela idabi, ehlaba intlaba-mkhosi yawo." 
1Samuel17:21 AmaSirayeli namaFilistiya amisa izintlu, agolozelana." 
1Samuel17:22 Oko kutya wayekuphethe uDavide wakushiya kumgcini-mithwalo, wagqotsa ukuya apho kuza kuliwa khona. Akufika wabulisa abantakwabo." 
1Samuel17:23 Esathetha nabo njalo, wavakala umFilistiya uGoliyati intshatsheli yaseGati, ephinda esezolo, ewahlazisa amaSirayeli. Wayiva loo nto ke uDavide." 
1Samuel17:24 Ahlehla amaSirayeli akubona uGoliyati, agubha luloyiko." 
1Samuel17:25 AmaSirayeli avakala esithi: “Yoo! Nimbonile laa mfo? Niyivile into ayithethayo? Akasidelanga na? Ukumkani uSawule uthe indoda embuleleyo uya kuyinika omkhulu wona umvuzo. Nangaphezu koko uya kumtshatisa nentombi kakumkani, ungàrhafiswa nomzi kayise.”" 
1Samuel17:26 UDavide wabuzisa kumadoda awayemi ngakuye, wathi: “Nithi uya kwenzelwa ntoni umntu obulele laa mFilistiya, awakhuphe kweli hlazo amaSirayeli? Ingubani kakade yona laa ntlanga ingalukanga yomFilistiya idela umkhosi kaThixo ophilayo?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Bamxelela yonke into eya kwenzelwa umntu onokuthi abulale uGoliyati. 
1Samuel17:28 Umkhuluwa kaDavide uEliyabhi wamvela uDavide ethetha naloo madoda. Wacaphuka, wathi kuDavide: “Uzokwenza ntoni apha, kwedini? Laluswa ngubani na elaa gcuntswana leegusha entlango ulapha nje? Ntondini inekratshi ikhohlakeleyo, uzele nje ukuza kubukela idabi wena!”" 
1Samuel17:29 “Kowu! Sendenze ntoni ngoku? Uthetha ukuba andinakuba sabuza nokubuza oku?” kutsho uDavide. 
1Samuel17:30 Watsho eguqukela komnye umfo, ebuza kwaloo mbuzo mnye. Ufumene kwaloo mpendulo ikwafanayo." 
1Samuel17:31 Yeviwa intetho kaDavide, yasiwa kuSawule. Yena wathi makabizwe uDavide." 
1Samuel17:32 Wafika wathi uDavide kuSawule: “Mhlekazi, makungabikho bani unkwantyayo ngenxa yalaa mFilistiya! Mna mkhonzi wakho ndiza kuya kulwa naye.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Waphendula uSawule wathi: “Ayingangawe into yokuya kulwa nalaa mFilistiya. Ùselula, kanti yena uqhelene nokulwa kwasebutsheni bakhe.”" 
1Samuel17:34 “Mhlekazi,” kutsho uDavide, “ndim owalusa iigusha zikabawo. Xa kuthe kwakho ingonyama okanye ibhere exhwila itakane emhlambini," 
1Samuel17:35 kusuka mna ndiyilandele ndiyihlasele, ndilihlangule elo takane. Xa ithe loo ngonyama okanye loo bhere yajika yalwa nam, ndisuka ndiyithi nqaku ngoqhoqhoqho, ndiyibethe ife." 
1Samuel17:36 Ndiqhele ukubulala oozingonyama noomabhere; nale ntlanga ingolukanga yomFilistiya idela umkhosi *kaNdikhoyo ndiza kuyibulala. 
1Samuel17:37 UNdikhoyo owandisindisayo koozingonyama noomabhere nangoku uza kundisindisa kulo mFilistiya.” “Kulungile ke, yiya, mfo wam; ubenga uNdikhoyo anganawe,” watsho uSawule." 
1Samuel17:38 Watsho enika uDavide ezakhe izikhuselo, wamthwesa umnqwazi wobhedu, wamfaka nesikhuselo somzimba." 
1Samuel17:39 UDavide waxwaya ikrele likaSawule, waza wanga angahamba, suka akaba nako, kuba wayengaziqhelanga ezi zixhobo. Ubhekise kuSawule wathi: “Andikwazi ukuhamba ndinxibe ezi zinto; kaloku andiziqhelanga.” Watsho wazikhulula zonke." 
1Samuel17:40 Wathatha intonga yakhe, wachola amatye ampuluswa amahlanu apho entlanjeni, wawafaka engxoweni yakhe yokwalusa. Warhola *inkwitshi yakhe, wahamba ukuya kugagana nomFilistiya lowo." 
1Samuel17:41 Yena umFilistiya wanyantsula esondela ngakuDavide, umphathi-khaka wakhe ehamba ngaphambi kwakhe." 
1Samuel17:42 UmFilistiya akumbona uDavide wamdela, kuba kaloku uDavide wayeselula, eyinzwana, ebusweni ekhangeleka esegazini." 
1Samuel17:43 Uvakele esithi kuDavide: “Uza kwenzani ngezo ntonga? Uba ndiyinja?” Watsho etyibela uDavide ngeziqalekiso *zoothixo bakhe. 
1Samuel17:44 “Sondela, loo mzinjana wakho ndiwuphose kumaxhalanga namarhamncwa,” waqokela watsho." 
1Samuel17:45 Uthe yena uDavide kumFilistiya lowo: “Uza kum uphethe ikrele, umkhonto, nentshuntshe, wena; kodwa mna ndiza kuwe egameni likaNdikhoyo onamandla onke, uThixo womkhosi wakwaSirayeli, lo wena uwudelileyo." 
1Samuel17:46 Namhla oku uNdikhoyo uza kukunikela kum. Ndiza kukuwisa, ndikunqumle intloko. Izidumbu zomkhosi wamaFilistiya zona ndoziphosa kumaxhalanga namarhamncwa, lonke elimiweyo likwazi ukuba uSirayeli unoThixo." 
1Samuel17:47 Sonke esi sihlwele esihlangene apha soqonda ukuba uNdikhoyo akadingi makrele namikhonto ukusindisa abantu bakhe. Nguye olilawulayo idabi, yaye nonke uza kuninikela ezandleni zethu.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Waya esondela kuDavide umFilistiya lowo, ezimisele ukumhlasela, waza uDavide wasukela ukumhlangabeza ekulweni." 
1Samuel17:49 Wafaka isandla engxoweni yakhe, warhola ilitye lalinye, wajolisa ngenkwitshi kuGoliyati. Wamchana ebunzi, latsho latshona ilitye. Waya kuwa ngobuso emhlabeni uGoliyati." 
1Samuel17:50 Waba ke uDavide uyamongamela uGoliyati, wamoyisa engaphethe krele, wambulala ngenkwitshi nelitye!" 
1Samuel17:51 Wasukela waya kutsho phezu kukaGoliyati. Wafika walithi rhutyu esingxotyeni salo ikrele likaGoliyati, wamnqumla intloko ngalo, emgqibezela. Acela kwabasicatyana amaFilistiya, akubona ukuwa kwegorha lawo." 
1Samuel17:52 Amadoda akwaSirayeli nawakwaJuda wona ahlaba umkhosi, awasukela amaFilistiya, ada aya kutsho ekungeneni eGati nasemasangweni e-Ekron. Kwakuthe waca ngamaFilistiya aziingxwelerha konke endleleni eya eSharayim kuse eGati nase-Ekron." 
1Samuel17:53 Ukubuya kwawo ekusukeleni amaFilistiya, amaSirayeli aya kuthatha amaxhoba kwikampu yomkhosi wamaFilistiya." 
1Samuel17:54 UDavide yena wathatha intloko kaGoliyati, waya nayo eJerusalem, zona izikrweqe zikaGoliyati wazigcina ententeni yakhe." 
1Samuel17:55 USawule akubona uDavide esiya kulwa noGoliyati wabuza kuAbhinere umphathi-mkhosi, wathi: “Yinto kabani laa ntwana?” UAbhinere wathi: “Mhlekazi, inene, andinalwazi konke.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Wathi uSawule: “Hamba ubuzisa kaloku, siqonde ukuba ungunyana kabani laa mfana.”" 
1Samuel17:57 Uthe ke akubuyela ekampini uDavide, emva kokuba ebulele uGoliyati, uAbhinere wamsa kuSawule. Wayesaphethe loo ntloko kaGoliyati uDavide." 
1Samuel17:58 USawule wambuza wathi: “Uyinto kabani, mfo wam?” Wathi uDavide: “Ndingunyana wesicaka sakho uJese waseBhetelehem.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Bayigqiba incoko yabo ooSawule noDavide. Intliziyo yonyana kaSawule, uJonatan, yaphakelana kanobom nekaDavide, wamthanda ngale ndlela azithanda ngayo yena." 
1Samuel18:2 Kususela loo mini uSawule akazange amvumele agoduke uDavide. 
1Samuel18:3 UJonatan wanqophisana noDavide, kuba wayemthanda ngale ndlela awazithanda ngayo yena." 
1Samuel18:4 Wakhulula umnweba awayewambethe uJonatan, wawunika uDavide, kunye nesinxibo sakhe sobujoni, nekrele lakhe, nesaphetha, nebhanti yakhe." 
1Samuel18:5 UDavide wayephumelela kuyo yonke imicimbi athunywa yona nguSawule, waza ke uSawule wamnyusela wamenza umphathi emkhosini wakhe. Eso senzo sabakholisa bonke abantu kunye namagosa omkhosi kaSawule." 
1Samuel18:6 Ukubuya kukaDavide kunye nomkhosi emfazweni, emva kokuba wayebulele uGoliyati, baphuma bonke abafazi beedolophu zakwaSirayeli, beze kuhlangabeza ukumkani uSawule. Babesombela, bengqungqa, bebetha iintambula neekatala." 
1Samuel18:7 Babevuma bengqungqa besithi: “Wabulal' amawaka uSawule; yen' uDavide uwise amawaka ngamawaka alishumi.” 
1Samuel18:8 USawule akazange ayithande loo nto, wacaphuka gqitha. Wavakala esithi: “UDavide bambalela amashumi ngamashumi amawaka, kodwa mna bandibalela amawaka ngamawaka nje. Selibubukumkani nje into angekabi nayo!”" 
1Samuel18:9 Waba nomona ke uSawule, wasoloko embeke esweni uDavide ukususela loo mini." 
1Samuel18:10 Ngengomso uSawule waphathwa ngumoya okhohlakeleyo ovunyelwe nguThixo, wamtsho waliphambana kuloo ndlu yakhe. Wayebetha uhadi uDavide ngokwesiqhelo, uSawule yena ephethe umkhonto." 
1Samuel18:11 “Ndingambethelela koluya ludonga ngalo mkhonto lo Davide,” uzitsholo uSawule. Waba selemjula uDavide ngawo, kodwa yena wawuphepha zozibini izihlandlo uDavide." 
1Samuel18:12 USawule wamoyika uDavide, kuba *uNdikhoyo wayenaye, emfulathele uSawule." 
1Samuel18:13 USawule wamshenxisa uDavide kuye, wamenza umphathi wewaka lamadoda omkhosi. Wayewakhokela emadabini loo madoda," 
1Samuel18:14 aphumelele uDavide kuyo yonke imisebenzi ayiphathayo, kuba kaloku uNdikhoyo wayenaye." 
1Samuel18:15 USawule wamoyika ngakumbi ke uDavide akubona impumelelo yakhe. 
1Samuel18:16 Wonke ubani kwaSirayeli nakwaJuda wayemthanda uDavide, kuba wayeyinkokheli emadabini." 
1Samuel18:17 USawule wabiza uDavide, wathi kuye: “Nanku uMerabhi, intombi yam enkulu. Ndiya kumendisela kuwe. Wena ke uzundikhonze ngobugorha, ulwe amadabi *kaNdikhoyo.” USawule wayesithi: “Andizukumsa sandla mna ngokwam; mayibe ngamaFilistiya.”" 
1Samuel18:18 UDavide waphendula wathi: “Bendingubani na mna, nabakowethu bayintoni na bona, nditsho kwaumzi kabawo uyintoni na kwaSirayeli, khon' ukuze ndibe ngumkhwenyana kakumkani?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Kodwa lathi lakufika ixesha lokwendela kukaMerabhi kuDavide, suka wendiselwa komnye umfo owayegama linguAdriyeli waseMehola." 
1Samuel18:20 UMikali, enye intombi kaSawule, wamthanda uDavide, waza noSawule wathakazela akuyiva loo nto." 
1Samuel18:21 Wacamanga wathi: “Heke! UMikali ndiza kumendisela kuDavide. Ndiza kumbambisa ngaye uDavide lo, aze abulawe ngamaFilistiya.” Ke uSawule wathi kuDavide: “Nali ithuba lakho lesibini lokuba ngumkhwenyana wam.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Wathuma amaphakathi akhe uSawule, esithi: “Thethani noDavide bucala, nithi: ‘Ukumkani ukholisekile nguwe, yaye onke amagosa kakumkani ayakuthanda. Ngoko ke yiba ngumkhwenyana kakumkani.’ ”" 
1Samuel18:23 Amaphakathi ke awathetha loo mazwi kuDavide. Yena wenjenje ukuphendula: “Nicinga ukuba kuyinto elula na ukuba ngumkhwenyana kakumkani? Kaloku mna ndilihlwempu elingaziwayo.” 
1Samuel18:24 Amaphakathi kaSawule aya kumxelela okwathethwa nguDavide. 
1Samuel18:25 USawule wathi: “Yitshoni kuDavide ukuthi: ‘Kuphela kwakhazi alifunayo kuwe ukumkani ngamajwabu amaFilistiya alikhulu awe edabini. Ufuna ukuziphindezela ngolo hlobo kwiintshaba zakhe.’ ” Kaloku yayilicebo likaSawule lokubulala uDavide ngesandla samaFilistiya. 
1Samuel18:26 Ayixela le nto amaphakathi kaSawule kuDavide, yalunga loo nto kuye ukuba abe ngumkhwenyana kakumkani. UDavide akaphozisanga maseko," 
1Samuel18:27 waphuma namadoda omkhosi wakhe, wabulala amakhulu amabini amaFilistiya. Waya nezo nyama zazisikwe kuwo, wazinika ukumkani zonke, ukuze abe ngumkhwenyana kakumkani. Waza ke uSawule wendisela uMikali intombi yakhe kuDavide." 
1Samuel18:28 Waqonda kakuhle ngoku uSawule ukuba *uNdikhoyo ukunye noDavide. Nayo intombi yakhe uMikali yayimthanda uDavide. 
1Samuel18:29 USawule wamoyika ngakumbi uDavide, waba lutshaba kuye bonke ubomi bakhe." 
1Samuel18:30 Iinkokheli zamaFilistiya zazimana ukuwahlasela amaSirayeli. Kuwo onke loo madabi uDavide wayetshatshela ukudlula zonke ezinye iinkokheli eziphantsi koSawule. Ngenxa yaloo nto ke igama likaDavide laba nodumo. 
1Samuel19:1 Ke kaloku uSawule waxelela unyana wakhe uJonatan kunye namaphakathi akhe ukuba uDavide makabulawe. Phofu uJonatan wayevana kakhulu noDavide. 
1Samuel19:2 Usuke ke uJonatan waya kuchazela uDavide, esithi: “Ubawo uzama indlela yokukubulala; uze ulumke ke ngomso kusasa. Uze uye kufuna indawo yokuzimela, uhlale apho." 
1Samuel19:3 Mna ndiza kuya nobawo apho endle, ndifike ndime naye kuloo ndawo uzimele kuyo, ndithethe ngawe kuye. Ukuba ndive nto yimbi, ndobe ndikwazise.”" 
1Samuel19:4 UJonatan wathetha ngoDavide kuSawule, emncoma esithi: “Mhlekazi, noko ngewungamenzi nto imbi umkhonzi wakho uDavide; akukho nto wakha wakona ngayo. Usuke waba luncedo kakhulu kuwe ngayo yonke into ayenzileyo." 
1Samuel19:5 Nangamhla wabulala uGoliyati obakhe ubomi wabubeka esichengeni, waza *uNdikhoyo wawanika uloyiso olukhulu amaSirayeli. Yaye nawe wavuya kakhulu ukuyibona le nto. Yini na ukuba wone umntu ongenatyala, umbulale uDavide kungekho sizathu?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Yavakala le ntetho kaJonatan kuSawule, watsho wafunga wathi: “Ekho nje uNdikhoyo, akayi kubulawa uDavide.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Emva koko ke uJonatan wambiza uDavide, wamchazela ngengxoxo yakhe noyise. Ukusuka apho waya naye kuSawule, waza ke uDavide wabuyiselwa kwasesikhundleni sakhe komkhulu." 
1Samuel19:8 Kwabuya kwavuka imfazwe kwakhona phakathi kwamaSirayeli namaFilistiya. Wabuya wawahlasela uDavide, wawabetha ee qhu saa." 
1Samuel19:9 USawule wafikelwa ngumoya ombi ovunyelwe nguNdikhoyo. Ngaloo mini wayehleli engqendevile ebhotwe, ephethe umkhonto, edlalelwa ihapu nguDavide." 
1Samuel19:10 Wawujula umkhonto uSawule, efuna ukubethelela ngawo uDavide eludongeni. Suka waphepha yena uDavide, umkhonto wona watshona lé eludongeni apho." 
1Samuel19:11 Ngobo busuku waphuncuka wabaleka uDavide. USawule wathumela amadoda ukuba aye kungqinga indlu kaDavide, ukuze ambulale kwakusa. UMikali walumkisa umyeni wakhe uDavide, wathi: “Ukuba akubaleki umke apha ngobu busuku, ngomso woba ngofileyo!”" 
1Samuel19:12 Watsho wamkhupha ngefestile, wabaleka wasaba uDavide." 
1Samuel19:13 UMikali uthathe *umlonde-khaya, wawubeka emandlalweni, wawuqamelisa ngomqamelo woboya bebhokhwe, waza wawambathisa." 
1Samuel19:14 USawule uthume amadoda ukuba ambambe uDavide, uMikali wathi kuwo: “Akaphilanga.”" 
1Samuel19:15 USawule wathi makaye azibonele ngokwawo uDavide. Watsho esithi: “Ze nimthwale ngaloo mandlalo wakhe, nize naye apha, ndimbulale.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Bafika bangena endlwini abo bafo, bafika kukho umlonde-khaya kuloo mandlalo, uqamele ngomqamelo woboya bebhokhwe." 
1Samuel19:17 Wabuza intombi yakhe uMikali uSawule esithi: “Yini na ukuba wenjenje ukundikhohlisa? Uyabona, ulubalekisile utshaba lwam lwasinda!” UMikali uphendule wathi: “Úthe kum: ‘Ndiyeke ndimke! Yini na ukuba ndikubulale?’ ”" 
1Samuel19:18 UDavide wabalekela kuSamweli eRama, wamchazela ngazo zonke izinto uSawule amenze zona. Banduluka apho uSamweli kunye noDavide, baya kuhlala eNayoti." 
1Samuel19:19 Uthe uSawule akuva ukuba uDavide uhlala eNayoti eRama," 
1Samuel19:20 wathumela amadoda, efuna ukumbamba. Abona iqela labashumayeli lihamba lishumayela, likhokelwe nguSamweli. UMoya kaThixo wawafikela loo madoda awayethunywe nguSawule, nawo angenelela ahamba nabashumayeli." 
1Samuel19:21 Uthe akuyiva loo nto wathumela amanye amadoda, aza nawo angenelela. USawule uthumele izigidimi isihlandlo sesithathu, kwehla esezolo nakwezi." 
1Samuel19:22 Usuke yena siqu uSawule wenjenjeya ukusinga eRama. Uthe akufika kwiqula elikhulu laseSeku, wabuzisa apho esithi: “Baphi uSamweli noDavide?” Uxelelwe kwathiwa: “BaseNayoti eRama.”" 
1Samuel19:23 Uthe esendleleni eya apho, naye wafikelwa nguMoya kaThixo, waza wahamba eshumayela yonke loo ndlela isinga eNayoti." 
1Samuel19:24 Wafika wakhulula izambatho zakhe, washumayela njalo apho ekho uSamweli. Walala ze loo mini nobusuku bayo. Savela ngolo hlobo ke nesaci esithi: “NoSawule lo kanti selewaba ngumshumayeli naye?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Emva koko uDavide wasaba eNayoti eRama, wabalekela kuJonatan. Ufike wabuza wathi: “Ngaba yintoni le ndenze yona kukumkani? Ndenze tyala lini? Ndimone ngani na uyihlo le nto afun' ukundibulala?”" 
1Samuel20:2 UJonatan wenjenje ukuphendula uDavide: “Soze ubulawe! Uyazi ukuba akukho nto akhe ayenze ubawo, nokuba inkulu, nokuba incinane, engandityandelanga igila. Ubengathini ke ukungandixeleli into enjengale uyithethayo? Hayi, akukho nto injalo.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Wafunga uDavide, wathi: “Kaloku uyihlo uyazi kakuhle ukuba undithanda kakhulu, waza ke wayifihla le nto kuwe yokuceba ukundibulala, esithi: ‘UJonatan makangakwazi oku, kuba woba buhlungu.’ Kodwa ndithi kuwe, ekho nje *uNdikhoyo, nawe ukho nje, lona ingcwaba sendilikrobile!”" 
1Samuel20:4 Kwesi sithuba ke uJonatan uthe kuDavide: “Yitsho ndikwenzele nantoni na oyifunayo.” 
1Samuel20:5 Wenjenje ke ukuphendula uDavide: “Ngomso oku ngumsitho wokuthwasa kwenyanga, yaye ke kufuneka ndibekho esidlweni sikakumkani. Nceda undikhulule ndiye kuzimela endle kude kube ngokuhlwa kwangomsomnye." 
1Samuel20:6 Xa uyihlo ephawula ukuba andikho, uze uthi kuye: ‘UDavide undibongozile ukumvumela khe athi tsi kowabo eBhetelehem, abekho xa kusenziwa idini lonyaka elenzelwa onke amawabo.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Ukuba uthe kulungile, úya kuba enoxolo ngakum. Kodwa ukuba uthe wacaphuka, uze wazi ukuba uzimisele ukundenzakalisa." 
1Samuel20:8 Uze uncede ke uwugcine umnqophiso owandenzela wona phambi koNdikhoyo, usenzele ububele isicaka sakho. Kodwa ukuba ngenene ndinetyala, ndibulale ngokwakho; akukho nto ithi mandisiwe kuyihlo.”" 
1Samuel20:9 “Unotshe!” kutsho uJonatan. “Ucinga ukuba ngendingakuxelelanga na xa bendisazi ukuba ubawo uzimisele ukukwenzakalisa?” 
1Samuel20:10 “Ngubani kakade owondazisa xa uyihlo ekuphendule kalukhuni?” wabuza uDavide. 
1Samuel20:11 “Makhe siye ngasendle,” kutsho uJonatan. Bahamba ke kunye," 
1Samuel20:12 waza uJonatan wathi kuDavide: “Ekho nje uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli, ngeli xesha ngomsomnye ndakuba sendiyiphandile le nto kubawo. Ndokwazisa xa ndimfumene engenandawo ngakuwe." 
1Samuel20:13 Kanti ke ukuba uzimisele ukukwenzakalisa, ndize mna ndingakuxeleli khon' ukuze ubaleke, aze andohlwaye mna lo uNdikhoyo. UNdikhoyo makabe nawe kanye njengoko wayenobawo!" 
1Samuel20:14 Ukuba mna ndisaphila, uze uthembeke kum oku kukaNdikhoyo, kodwa xa ndithe ndafa," 
1Samuel20:15 uze uhlale unaloo ntembeko kusapho lwam ngalo lonke ixesha, naxa uNdikhoyo selezitshabalalisile iintshaba zakho kulo lonke ihlabathi.”" 
1Samuel20:16 UJonatan wanqophisana nomzi kaDavide, esithi: “Maze uNdikhoyo aziphindezele kwiintshaba zikaDavide.”" 
1Samuel20:17 UJonatan wabuya wamfungisa uDavide ukuba amthande, kuba yena wayemthanda uDavide ngomphefumlo wakhe wonke." 
1Samuel20:18 Uqhube wathi uJonatan: “Ngomso sisidlo sokuthwasa kwenyanga, yaye kuza kubonakala ukuba akukho. Kaloku indawo yakho iya kuba ingenamntu." 
1Samuel20:19 Ngomsomnye koba sobala nje ukuba akukho ethekweni. Hamba uye kuzimela kulaa ndawo wawuzimele kuyo, ufike uzifihle ngakwilitye le-Ezeli." 
1Samuel20:20 Mna ke ndodubula apho ngakulo ngeentolo zibe ntathu, ndibe ngathi ndizijolise entweni." 
1Samuel20:21 Emva koko ke ndothuma isicaka ukuba siye kuzikhangela. Xa ndithi kwisicaka: ‘Nazi iintolo nganeno kwakho, yiza nazo;’ uze uqonde ukuba akukho ngozi, uphume ubuye." 
1Samuel20:22 Kodwa xa ndithe: ‘Nazo ngaphaya kwakho iintolo;’ uze usuke umke, kuba uNdikhoyo woba esithi: ‘Hamba!’" 
1Samuel20:23 Uze ukhumbule ukuba uNdikhoyo ulingqina phakathi kwethu ngomnqophiso esiwenzileyo.” 
1Samuel20:24 Wahamba ke uDavide, waya kuzimela endle. Ngomhla womsitho wokuthwasa kwenyanga ukumkani uSawule" 
1Samuel20:25 wahlala endaweni yakhe ethekweni ngaseludongeni. Ecaleni kwakhe kwahlala uAbhinere, waza uJonatan wahlala ejongene nokumkani. Yayingenamntu indawo kaDavide," 
1Samuel20:26 kodwa uSawule akazange athethe nto loo mini, kuba wacinga esithi: “Ngahle kukho nto imvaleleyo uDavide, emenze waba ngongahlambulukanga – inene *unomlaza.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Ngengomso olandela itheko lokuthwasa kwenyanga ayibanga namntu kwakhona indawo kaDavide, waza uSawule wabuza kuJonatan wathi: “Kutheni engezanga esidlweni izolo nanamhla unyana kaJese?”" 
1Samuel20:28 UJonatan uphendule ngelithi: “Undicengile ukuba ndimvumele ahambe aye eBhetelehem. 
1Samuel20:29 Uthe: ‘Nceda undikhulule, kuba kowethu eBhetelehem kuza kubakho idini, waye ke nomkhuluwa wam undiyalele ukuba ndibekho nakanjani. Ukuba ungumhlobo wam, ndikhulule ndikhe nditsibe ekhaya, ndibone amawethu.’ Yiyo ke loo nto umbona engekho nje endaweni yakhe apha etafileni kakumkani.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Wavutha ngumsindo uSawule akuyiva le ntetho kaJonatan, wathi: “Yini le, gqubushandini lomvukeli! Uba andikuqondi ukuba ukhetha icala likaDavide unyana kaJese? Phofu uzihlaza wena kunye naloo nyoko wakuzalayo." 
1Samuel20:31 Wena kunye nobukumkani bakho akusoze uzinze esaphila unyana kaJese. Yiza naye apha ke ngoku – ndimfuna efile!” 
1Samuel20:32 UJonatan ubuze kuyise wenjenje: “Uza kubulawelwa ntoni? Wenze tyala lini?” 
1Samuel20:33 Kweso sithuba uSawule wajula umkhonto, efuna ukumbulala uJonatan. Waqonda mhlophe ke uJonatan ukuba uyise uzimisele mpela ukumcim' igama uDavide." 
1Samuel20:34 Wemka kuloo tafile efutha ngumsindo uJonatan. Akasa nasuntswana eli emlonyeni ngaloo mini yesibini yetheko. Wayebuhlungu yindlela ekrwada uyise amphathe ngayo uDavide. 
1Samuel20:35 Ngengomso uJonatan waya endle kuDavide ngokwesigqibo sabo. Wayehamba nenkwenkwana," 
1Samuel20:36 wathi kuyo: “Baleka ulande iintolo zam ndakuzidubula.” Yabaleka ngaphambili loo nkwenkwe, uJonatan wadubula utolo lwaya kuwa ngaphaya kwayo." 
1Samuel20:37 Ithe yakufika ngakuloo ndawo beluwe kuyo utolo loo nkwenkwe, wayikhwaza uJonatan, esithi: “Kwedini, utolo naluya ngaphaya kwakho!" 
1Samuel20:38 Umele ntoni apho! Baleka!” Yaluchola olo tolo inkwenkwe, yalusa kwinkosi yayo," 
1Samuel20:39 ingazi yona ukuba kwakuqhubeka ntoni na. Loo nto yayisaziwa nguJonatan noDavide kuphela. 
1Samuel20:40 Wayinika izikrweqe zakhe uJonatan loo nkwenkwe, wathi mayigoduke nazo." 
1Samuel20:41 Yakuba imkile, uDavide waphuma kuloo ndawo wayezimele kuyo, wathi guqaqa ngamadolo, ekhahlela, ubuso bude buye kutsho emhlabeni izihlandlo zade zaba zithathu. Bangana bobabini belilelana, uDavide elila ngokugqithisileyo." 
1Samuel20:42 Kwesi sithuba uJonatan uthe kuDavide: “Hamba ngoxolo, mfondini, kuba thina sobabini sifungile egameni likaNdikhoyo. Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo ulingqina phakathi kwam nawe, naphakathi kwenzala yam neyakho.” UDavide ke wemka, waza yena uJonatan wabuyela edolophini." 
1Samuel21:1 Ukusuka apho uDavide waya kwambingeleli uAhimeleki eNobhi. Wamhlangabeza uAhimeleki esoyika, wambuza esithi: “Kutheni uhamba wedwa nje? Kutheni kungekho bani ukukhaphayo nje?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Uphendule wenjenje uDavide: “Ndize apha ngokuthunywa ngukumkani. Yaye uthe ze ndingaluxeleli mntu udaba andithume lona. Ndithe kumadodana am siya kudibana endaweni ethile. 
1Samuel21:3 Ngaba akunanto ityiwayo apha? Ndiphe izonka noba zihlanu, okanye nantoni ongaba unayo.”" 
1Samuel21:4 Uthe umbingeleli: “Akukho sonka siqhelekileyo sikhoyo apha; kuphela kwesonka esikhoyo sesingcwalisiweyo. Phofu ungasifumana xa loo madodana akho engakhange ahlangane nabantu ababhinqileyo kutshanje.” 
1Samuel21:5 UDavide wamphendula umbingeleli wathi kuye: “Inene, asidibani nabantu ababhinqileyo xa sihambela umcimbi, nokuba ngongephi, andithethi ke xa kungumcimbi omkhulu njengalo siwuphetheyo.”" 
1Samuel21:6 Umbingeleli ke wamnika uDavide eso sonka singcwalisiweyo, kuba kwakungekho sonka simbi ngaphandle kweso sasinikelwe kuNdikhoyo. Sasisesisusiwe esibingelelweni, sekubekwe esitsha." 
1Samuel21:7 UDowegi wase-Edom, induna yabelusi bakaSawule, wayekho apho ngaloo mini, ehlaliswe endlwini kaNdikhoyo." 
1Samuel21:8 UDavide wabuza uAhimeleki wathi: “Akunamkhonto na okanye ikrele apha? Udaba lukakumkani lwalungxamisekile kangangokuba andizange ndifumane thuba lakuthatha sixhobo konke.” 
1Samuel21:9 Wathi umbingeleli: “Likho ikrele apha. LelikaGoliyati, lowa mFilistiya wambulalela kwintlambo yom-oki. Naliya phaya ligqunywe ngesidanga, lithandelwe ngesiziba. Ungalithatha xa ulifuna; kuphela kwesikrweqe esikhoyo apha eso.” Wathi uDavide: “Ndinike lona. Akukho limbi linjengalo.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Wemka uDavide, ebaleka uSawule, waya eGati kukumkani uAkishe." 
1Samuel21:11 Amaphakathi kakumkani uAkishe abuza kukumkani athi: “UDavide lo asingokumkani na kowabo? Asinguye lo babesombela ngaye abafazi, besithi: ‘USawule ubulele amawaka, kodwa yen' uDavide uwise amawaka ngamawaka alishumi’?”" 
1Samuel21:12 Wakuwazikisa la mazwi uDavide wangenwa kukumoyika ukumkani uAkishe. 
1Samuel21:13 Kwathi ke ngalo lonke ixesha ekufuphi naye, uDavide aziphambanise, enze izinto zobugeza. Wayedla ngokukrwela ezindongeni zesixeko, avuzise izinkcwe zihle ngeendevu." 
1Samuel21:14 Wavakala uAkishe esithi kwiinduna zakhe: “Hayi, le ndoda iphambene! Niyizisela ntoni apha kum?" 
1Samuel21:15 Ndiswele amageza kakade le nto nindizisela elinye lize kundiphambanela apha ekhaya?” 
1Samuel22:1 Emva koko wemka eGati uDavide, ebalekela kumqolomba ongaseAdulam. Abantakwabo nendlu yonke kayise baya kugaleleka apho bakuba bevile ngomkhondo wakhe." 
1Samuel22:2 Kwakudla ngokuya kuye abantu ababandezelekileyo, nabaneengxaki zamatyala, nabanganelisekanga, waba yinkokheli yabo. Amadoda anaye ayemalunga namakhulu amane ewonke." 
1Samuel22:3 Wesuka apho uDavide, waya kwelaseMowabhi eMizpa, wabhekisa kukumkani walapho wenjenje: “Mhlekazi, ubawo nomama ndibacelela indawo apha kuwe, ndide ndiqonde ukuba uThixo iinjongo zakhe ziyintoni na ngam.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Wabashiya apho ke uyise nonina, baza bahlala khona phantsi kokumkani waseMowabhi wonke lo gama yena Davide wayezimele enqabeni." 
1Samuel22:5 Emva koko kwafika *umshumayeli uGadi kuDavide, wathi: “Musa ukuhlala kule nqaba. Buyela kwaJuda.” Wemka ke apho uDavide, waya kuhlala kwihlathi laseHerete." 
1Samuel22:6 Ke uSawule weva ukuba uDavide kunye namadoda akhe babhaqiwe. USawule wayeseGibheya, echophe phantsi komthi womtamariske, ephethe umkhonto. Kwakuthe nqwadalala, amaphakathi akhe emngqongile." 
1Samuel22:7 Wathi uSawule kumaphakathi akhe amngqongileyo: “Khanindiphe iindlebe, mawethu akwaBhenjamin! Nicinga ukuba kanene unyana kaJese uza kuninika amasimi nezidiliya, animise nonke nibe ngabaphathi bamabutho namaqela?" 
1Samuel22:8 Ngaba yiyo loo nto nonke senindenzela amayelenqe? Yiyo loo nto kungabangakho namnye kuni okhe wandithela thsuphe ngemvumelwano yonyana wam nonyana kaJese? Bekungasekho mntu na undikhathaleleyo kangangokuba andixelele ukuba uDavide, isicaka sam, ndithethanje undilalele, efuna ukundibulala, exhaswa ngunyana wam?”" 
1Samuel22:9 UDowegi owayengomnye waloo maphakathi ayengqonge uSawule, wangenelela wenjenje: “Ndambona uDavide eye eNobhi kuAhimeleki unyana ka-Ahitubhi." 
1Samuel22:10 UAhimeleki wabuzela uDavide *kuNdikhoyo, waza wamnika umphako nekrele lomFilistiya uGoliyati.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Emva koko ukumkani uSawule wathumela ukuba kuye kubizwa uAhimeleki unyana ka-Ahitubhi nezalamane zakhe ezazingababingeleli eNobhi. Bonke ke beza kukumkani. 
1Samuel22:12 Wathi uSawule: “Phulaphula, nyana ka-Ahitubhi!” “Ewe, mhlekazi,” waphendula watsho uAhimeleki." 
1Samuel22:13 Uqhube wathi uSawule: “Liyelenqe lani eli nindenzela lona wena nonyana kaJese? Umnikeleni ukutya, nekrele, wada wambuzela kuThixo, ukuze asuke andilalele njengokuba kunjalo ngoku?”" 
1Samuel22:14 Uphendule wenjenje uAhimeleki: “Mhlekazi, kungekho sicaka unaso sithembeke ngaphezu kukaDavide nje? Kaloku uDavide ngumyeni wentombi yakho, engumphathi wabagadi bakho, yaye uhlonitshwa ngumntu wonke wakomkhulu." 
1Samuel22:15 Ndimbuzele kuNdikhoyo, ndaye ndingaqali kwenjenjalo phofu. Nalo mba athetha ngawo umhlekazi andazani nawo mna, nditsho namawethu ephela akazi nto ngawo.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Ukumkani uphethe ngelithi: “Umelwe kukufa, wena Ahimeleki, kunye nomzi wonke kayihlo.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Watsho ebhekisa kubagadi esithi: “Bulalani ababingeleli bakaNdikhoyo! Babebhunga noDavide, abandixelela naxa asabileyo, ukanti babeyazi loo nto.” Bala bona abagadi ukusa isandla kubabingeleli bakaNdikhoyo." 
1Samuel22:18 Wathi ke uSawule kuDowegi: “Bahlasele aba babingeleli!” Waza uDowegi wabahlasela wababulala bonke. Yayingamashumi asibhozo ababingeleli ababenelungelo lokuphatha *isidanga ababulawa nguDowegi ngaloo mini. 
1Samuel22:19 Wada wabulala bonke abemi baseNobhi, eyayisisixeko sababingeleli. Kwafa amadoda nabafazi, abantwana neentsana; kwafa zinkomo, zidonki, zigusha, akwasala nto." 
1Samuel22:20 Kwasinda kuphela uAbhiyatare unyana ka-Ahimeleki, owabalekela kuDavide." 
1Samuel22:21 Wafika wambalisela ukuba uSawule ubaxabele ababingeleli bakaNdikhoyo. 
1Samuel22:22 Wathi uDavide kuAbhiyatare: “Ndaqonda kakuhle ndakumbona uDowegi phaya eNobhi ukuba akanakuze angamxeleli uSawule. Ndim obabeke esichengeni abantu bakuni. 
1Samuel22:23 Seluhlala apha kunye nam, ungaxhali; akukho nto iya kukuthi cha apha. Lowo uzungula ubomi bakho uzungula nobam.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Zafika kuDavide iindaba ezithi: “AmaFilistiya ayihlasele idolophu iKehila; aphanga ingqolowa apho ibhulelwa khona.” 
1Samuel23:2 UDavide wabuza *kuNdikhoyo wathi: “Mandiwahlasele na amaFilistiya?” UNdikhoyo wathi: “Yiya kuwahlasela, ubahlangule abantu baseKehila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Amadoda kaDavide wona avakala esithi: “Singathi sihleli sisoyika kakade apha kwaJuda, sibuye siye kuhlasela umkhosi wamaFilistiya eKehila?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Emva koko ke uDavide wabuza kuNdikhoyo kwakhona ukuba angaya kuwahlasela na amaFilistiya. Waphendula wathi uNdikhoyo: “Wahlasele amaFilistiya eKehila, kuba ndiza kuwanikela ezandleni zakho.”" 
1Samuel23:5 UDavide wanduluka kunye namadoda akhe, baya kuwahlasela amaFilistiya. Babulala amaFilistiya amaninzi, bathimba nemihlambi yawo. Waba ke uyihlangule njalo loo dolophu uDavide." 
1Samuel23:6 Ekubalekeleni kwakhe kuDavide eKehila uAbhiyatare unyana ka-Ahimeleki wafika esiphethe *isidanga. 
1Samuel23:7 Zafika kuSawule iindaba zokuba uDavide waya eKehila. Wavakala esithi: “Unikelwe nguThixo kum uDavide lo. Uzikhonkxile ngokwakhe ngokuya kungena kwidolophu enamasango atshixwayo.” 
1Samuel23:8 Watsho eqokelela umkhosi wakhe wonke uSawule, ukuba aye kuvingcela uDavide namadoda akhe apho eKehila." 
1Samuel23:9 Zafika kuDavide iindaba zokuba uSawule uceba ukwenza ububi kuye, waza wathi kuAbhiyatare: “Yiza nesidanga.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Ubuze *kuNdikhoyo ke uDavide wenjenje: “Ndikhoyo, Thixo kaSirayeli, ndiva kusithiwa ngenene uSawule uzimisele ukuza kuyihlasela ayitshabalalise iKehila ngenxa yam." 
1Samuel23:11 Ndixelele, mna sicaka sakho, ndiyakubongoza, ngaba angandinikezela kuSawule amadoda amakhulu alapha? Ngaba ngenene uSawule uza kuza njengoko amarhe esitsho?” UNdikhoyo waphendula wathi: “Uza kuza.”" 
1Samuel23:12 “Amadoda amakhulu aseKehila ngaba aza kusinikela kuSawule?” ubuzile uDavide. “Ewe, aza kuninikela,” kutsho uNdikhoyo." 
1Samuel23:13 Wanduluka kwangoko ke eKehila uDavide kunye namadoda akhe amalunga namakhulu amathandathu, behamba behlala. Akabanga saya eKehila uSawule akuva ukuba uDavide ubalekile wemka apho." 
1Samuel23:14 UDavide waya kuhlala kwiindawo ezinqabileyo entlango nakweleentaba zentlango eyiZifi. Wathi rhoqo uSawule ukufuna uDavide, kodwa *uNdikhoyo akamnikelanga ezandleni zakhe." 
1Samuel23:15 Kwathi uDavide eseHoreshe kuloo ntlango iyiZifi weva ukuba uSawule uphumele ukumbulala. 
1Samuel23:16 Kwafika uJonatan apho, eze kumkhuthaza ngaye uThixo." 
1Samuel23:17 Wathi kuDavide uJonatan: “Musa ukoyika, Davide; ubawo uSawule akasoze abe nako ukusa isandla kuwe. Nguwe oza kuba ngukumkani kwaSirayeli; mna ndiza kuba sisandla sakho. Úyayazi naye loo nto ubawo uSawule.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Baphinda banqophisana phambi koNdikhoyo. Emva koko wagoduka uJonatan, uDavide yena wasala apho eHoreshe." 
1Samuel23:19 Kwesuka amaZifi, aya eGibheya, eye kuxelela uSawule esithi: “Nanko uDavide ezímele kwelakowethu kwinduli iHakila eyenye yeendawo ezinqabileyo ezikummandla waseHoreshe ezantsi kweYeshimoni." 
1Samuel23:20 Ke ngoko, mhlekazi, nanini wakuthanda, yiza – siya kumnikela ezandleni zikakumkani.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Wathi kuwo uSawule: “Nindincedile; ubenga uNdikhoyo anganithamsanqela ngenxa yokundikhathalela kwenu. 
1Samuel23:22 Godukani ke, niphinde nikhangelise kakuhle apho akhoyo, nimazi naloo mntu umbonileyo. Kuthiwa uDavide ulumkile." 
1Samuel23:23 Ziqapheleni kakuhle iindawo ahlala kuzo, nibuye nindazise ke. Emva koko ke ndiya kuhamba kunye nani. Ukuba uselapho ndiya kumkhangela kulo lonke, ndimfune ndide ndimfumane, nokuba kungade kufuneke ndityhutyha-tyhutyhe onke amawaka akwaJuda.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Basuka ke abo bantu, bamandulela uSawule ukuya eZifi. Ngoku uDavide namadoda akhe babekwintili ekwintlango iMawoni, kumazantsi elakwaJuda, ezantsi kweYeshimoni." 
1Samuel23:25 USawule wanduluka ukuya kufuna uDavide. Kodwa yena uDavide wayixelelwa loo nto, wemka waya kuhlala kwingxondorha yenduli eyayikuloo ntlango iMawoni. Uthe akuyiva loo nto uSawule, waya kwintlango iMawoni, esekhondweni likaDavide." 
1Samuel23:26 USawule nomkhosi wakhe noDavide namadoda akhe bohlulwa yiloo nduli, omnye ekwelinye icala, omnye ekwelinye, ooDavide bezama ukubaleka umkhosi kaSawule owawuselubarhangqile ukubabamba." 
1Samuel23:27 Kanye ngelo thuba kwafika isigidimi kuSawule, size nodaba oluthi: “Khawuleza uze, kuba amaFilistiya ayaliphanga ilizwe lakowethu.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Wajika kwangoko uSawule, waya kuqubisana namaFilistiya. Loo nduli yathiywa igama elithi yiSela-hamalekoti." 
1Samuel23:29 Wemka apho uDavide, waya ezindaweni ezinqabileyo zase-Engedi, wafika wazímela apho." 
1Samuel24:1 Ukubuya kwakhe uSawule emfazweni, evela kulwa namaFilistiya, waxelelwa ukuba uDavide wayekwintlango yase-Engedi." 
1Samuel24:2 USawule wathatha amawaka amathathu amadoda akhethiweyo kwaSirayeli, wangena ekhondweni, esiya kukhangela uDavide ngakwicala langasempumalanga laMaweempunzi." 
1Samuel24:3 Endleleni apho uSawule wafika kwindawo eneentango zeegusha. Apho bekukho umqolomba, waza uSawule wangena kuwo, efuna ukuya kuzithuma. Yayinguloo mqolomba kanye wayezímele kuwo uDavide namadoda akhe, besengontsini phakathi kanye." 
1Samuel24:4 Athi amadoda akhe akuyibona loo nto: “Nali ithuba lakho! Akazanga atsho *uNdikhoyo ukuthi wolunikela kuwe utshaba lwakho, wenze nantoni na ofuna ukuyenza ngalo?” Wachwechwa ke uDavide, wafika wasika isondo lesambatho sikaSawule, phofu uSawule engakuqondi okuqhubekayo." 
1Samuel24:5 Loo nto wayenza kuSawule yamdla kakhulu uDavide. 
1Samuel24:6 Wathi kumadoda akhe: “Makandithintele uNdikhoyo ekwenzeni into enje kwinkosi yam umthanjiswa kaNdikhoyo, nditsho le yokuba ndise isandla sam kuye, kuba kaloku ungumthanjiswa kaNdikhoyo!”" 
1Samuel24:7 Wawakhalimela ngaloo mazwi uDavide amadoda akhe, wawanqanda ukuze angamhlaseli uSawule. Wesuka kuloo ndawo uSawule, wangena endleleni." 
1Samuel24:8 UDavide waphuma emqolombeni, wamlandela ekhwaza esithi: “Wa, mhlekazi, nkosi yam!” Wajika wakhangela ngasemva uSawule. Wawa ngobuso emhlabeni uDavide ekhahlela." 
1Samuel24:9 Waqhuba wenjenje: “Mhlekazi, kungani na ukuba uhambisane nolwimi oluthi mna ndizungula ukukwenzakalisa?" 
1Samuel24:10 Wena akuyiboni into yokuba khona ngoku uNdikhoyo ebekunikele esandleni sam phaya kulaa mqolomba? Bekusithiwa mandikucim' igama, kodwa ndaba nenceba, ndala konke mna ukukubulala, kuba kaloku wena ungukumkani, umthanjiswa kaNdikhoyo." 
1Samuel24:11 Bawo, khangela, nali isondo lesambatho sakho esandleni sam! Ngendikucim' igama, koko ndisuke nje ndasika le ndawo engubeni yakho. Yazi ke ngoku uqonde ukuba mna andikhange ndafuna kukuvukela okanye kukwenzakalisa. Nguwe ozingela mna, ufuna ukundibulala, naxa ndingakwenzanga nto imbi." 
1Samuel24:12 Wanga ke uNdikhoyo angahlula phakathi kwam nawe. Ubenga angandiphindezela ngenxa yobubi ondenzele bona. Mna andingekhe ndikuse sandla. 
1Samuel24:13 Kaloku sitsho njalo isaci samandulo ukuthi: ‘Inkohlakalo iphuma kwabakhohlakeleyo.’ Ke mna andiyi kukusa sandla konke. 
1Samuel24:14 Ngaba úyayiqonda yona le nto ayileqayo ukumkani wamaSirayeli? Yintoni le ayisukelayo? Ngaba usukela inja efileyo okanye intakumba enye? 
1Samuel24:15 Hayi, makahlule uNdikhoyo, kucace ukuba ngubani owonileyo phakathi kwam nawe. Makayigqale imeko yam, andigwebele, ancede andihlangule kuwe!”" 
1Samuel24:16 Uthe akupheza ukuthetha uDavide, wavakala uSawule esithi: “Davide, mfo wam, ngaba lilizwi lakho na elo?” Watsho elila." 
1Samuel24:17 Waqhuba wathi kuDavide: “Unyanisile, ndim lo wonileyo, kuba ubusoloko usenza ubuhle kum, kanti mna bendikuphatha kakubi!" 
1Samuel24:18 Ukubonakalalisile ukulunga kwakho kum namhlanje, kuba akundibulalanga uNdikhoyo selendinikele esandleni sakho!" 
1Samuel24:19 Yakha yabonwa phi into yokuba athi umntu, selelubambile utshaba lwakhe, abuye aluyeke angalwenzakalisi? Ubenga uNdikhoyo angakuthamsanqela ngale nto ilungileyo undenzele yona namhlanje." 
1Samuel24:20 Ngoku ndiyazi ukuba iza kuba nguwe ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, nokuba ulawulo lwakwaSirayeli luya kuzinziswa ezandleni zakho." 
1Samuel24:21 Kodwa ke funga uNdikhoyo ukuba akuyi kuyitshabalalisa inzala yam, ukuze igama lam lingabhangi endlwini kabawo.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Wafunga ke uDavide. Emva koko uSawule wabuyela komkhulu, waza yena uDavide namadoda akhe babuyela endaweni yabo enqatyisiweyo." 
1Samuel25:1 Wathi akubhubha uSamweli aqokelelana onke amaSirayeli, aza amzilela. Wangcwatyelwa kowabo eRama uSamweli. Emva koko uDavide wemka waya kuhlala kwintlango iParan." 
1Samuel25:2 Ke kaloku eMawon bekukho indoda eyayifuya eKarmele. Le ndoda ibimi kakuhle, inewaka leebhokhwe namawaka amathathu eegusha eyayizicheba eKarmele." 
1Samuel25:3 Igama laloo ndoda lalinguNabhali, lona elomkayo linguAbhigeli. Umfazi lowo wayehlakaniphile eyinzwakazi. Indoda yayingqwabalala, ingenambeko, yona ingumKalebhi." 
1Samuel25:4 Esentlango apho uDavide weva ukuba uNabhali ucheba iigusha. 
1Samuel25:5 Wathumela ishumi lamadodana eKarmele ukuba aye kumbuza impilo uNabhali. 
1Samuel25:6 Wathi ze bambulisele, badlulise iminqweno emihle nakwintsapho yakhe nako konke okwakhe, baze bathi:" 
1Samuel25:7 “Inkosi yethu uDavide ithi: ‘Ndivile ukuba kuyachetywa kwakho. Ke abelusi bakho babekunye nathi, saza sabaphatha kakuhle, baza abalahlekelwa nto lonke elo xesha babekunye nathi eKarmele." 
1Samuel25:8 Nabo bangayingqina loo nto. Ke ngoku, njengokuba la madodana ndiwathumele kuwe ngomhla wetheko, nceda uwanike nokuba yintoni na, eze nayo apha kum, mna nyana wakho.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 Loo madoda awusa kuNabhali loo mlomo kaDavide, aza alinda impendulo." 
1Samuel25:10 Wavakala uNabhali esithi: “Loo Davide nithetha ngaye ngubani; engubani loo nyana kaJese? Ngathi kuthe saa elizweni zizicaka ezisabayo kwiinkosi zazo ndibonanje. 
1Samuel25:11 Ndingathini ukuthatha ukutya kwam, nesiselo sam, nenyama endiyixhelele abachebi bam, ndiphise ngayo kumadoda angoovuk' engceni.”" 
1Samuel25:12 Abuyela kwakuDavide loo madodana, afika amxelela konke okuthethwe nguNabhali." 
1Samuel25:13 UDavide wathi kumadoda akhe: “Xwayani nonke amakrele enu!” Bonke bawaxwaya, waza naye wenjenjalo. Wahamba namakhulu amane amadoda, kwasala amakhulu amabini elinde impahla." 
1Samuel25:14 Kwesuka esinye kwizicaka zakwaNabhali, saya kuhlebela umkakhe uAbhigeli, safika sathi: “Nkosikazi, uvile na? UDavide ubethumele izigidimi zivela entlango ukuba zizise imibuliso kumhlekazi, wasuka yena wazinukuneza." 
1Samuel25:15 Kanti ke la madoda ayesiphethe kakuhle. Akazanga asihlupha nganto, saye singazange sibe nanto ilahlekayo ngalo lonke elo xesha sasisendle kunye nawo." 
1Samuel25:16 Asoloko esikhusela ubusuku nemini ngokuya sasisalusa impahla endle. 
1Samuel25:17 Khawuyicinge nawe loo nto, ukhangele ukuba wena ungenza ntoni na. Isenokuba yingozi kumhlekazi le nto, nkqu nakumzi wakhe wonke. Ayizonkani kumhlekazi; akeva mntu!”" 
1Samuel25:18 Wagxabha-gxabhisa uAbhigeli, waqokelela amakhulu amabini ezonka, neemvaba ezimbini zizele yiwayini, kunye nenyama yeegusha ezintlanu eyosiweyo, nengqolowa egcadiweyo eziikhilogram ezisixhenxe, nekhulu lezikhinkci zerasentyisi, namafiya aqwayitiweyo alikhulu lezikhinkci. Yonke loo nto wayilayisha phezu kweedonki." 
1Samuel25:19 Wathi kwizicaka zakhe: “Khokelani; mna ndiza kulandela.” Akazange ase lizwi kumyeni wakhe uNabhali. 
1Samuel25:20 Kwathi esahamba ngaloo donki yakhe uAbhigeli, xa kanye agwejelayo endulini, wagagana noDavide kunye namadoda akhe, besiza ngakuye." 
1Samuel25:21 UDavide wayesatsho ukuthi: “Kube lilize ukukhusela impahla yelaa tshijolo uNabhali endle. Akukho nanye into yakhe eyakha yabiwa, kodwa ngoku undibulela ngesikhohlela ndakugqiba ukumnceda!" 
1Samuel25:22 Makandigwebe kalukhuni uThixo ukuba ilanga lithe lasa kusekho into eyindoda kwaNabhali!” 
1Samuel25:23 Wathi uAbhigeli akuthana nqwakaqhwa noDavide, wakhawuleza wehla kuloo donki wayekhwele kuyo, wawa ngobuso emhlabeni ezinyaweni zikaDavide," 
1Samuel25:24 wakhahlela wathi: “Mhlekazi, nceda, libeke kum ityala! Ndivumele mna sicakazana sakho ndithethe nawe, uyive into endiyibhekisa kuwe." 
1Samuel25:25 Musa ukuzikhathaza ngesiya sikhohlakali sendoda uNabhali! Iyile nto kanye lithetha yona igama layo – sisihiba. Mna khange ndiwabone loo madodana inkosi yam ibiwathumele. 
1Samuel25:26 Nangoku *nguNdikhoyo lo ukunqandileyo ukuba ungaphalazi igazi ngokuziphindezela kwiintshaba zakho. Ekho nje uNdikhoyo zonke iintshaba zakho kunye nâbo bakuzondayo baza kohlwaywa, bafane noNabhali." 
1Samuel25:27 Nasi isipho endize naso, mhlekazi; sithathe usinike amadoda akho." 
1Samuel25:28 Uze nam sicakazana sakho undixolele. UNdikhoyo uya kukwenzela umzi ozinzileyo, kuba uyamlwela, yaye ububi abuyi kufunyanwa kuwe imihla yakho yonke." 
1Samuel25:29 Xa kukho bani ukuhlaselayo efuna ukukubulala, uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho wokukhusela, axel' indoda elinde indyebo yayo. Zona iintshaba zakho uNdikhoyo wozithi jwi-jwi okwamatye ajiwulwa *ngenkwitshi." 
1Samuel25:30 Akuba uNdikhoyo ekufezekisile konke okulungileyo akuthembise kona, wakumisela waba ngolawulayo kwaSirayeli," 
1Samuel25:31 okwenzekileyo namhlanje akuyi kuba sisizathu sokuba ukhubeke okanye uzisole ngento yokuphalaza igazi elimsulwa uziphindezela. Nam ke, mhlekazi, uze ungandilibali xa athe wakuthamsanqela uNdikhoyo.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Uphendule ngelithi uDavide: “Makabongwe uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli othe wakuthumela ukuba undihlangabeze namhlanje! 
1Samuel25:33 Makabongwe uThixo okuphe loo ngqondo ube nayo, ukuze wenze le nto indivalelayo, ukuze ndingenzi bugwinta ngokuziphindezela ngezam izandla." 
1Samuel25:34 Ewe, nguNdikhoyo lo undinqandileyo ukuba ndingamenzakalisi uNabhali. Kambe ndifunga uThixo kaSirayeli ukuba, xa ubungakhawulezanga wandikhawulela, ngengomso ibiya kuba ifile yonke into eyindoda kwaNabhali.”" 
1Samuel25:35 UDavide wazamkela ezo zipho awayeze nazo uAbhigeli, waza wathi: “Hamba ngoxolo ugoduke. Ndikuvile, yaye ndosenza isicelo sakho.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Wagoduka ke uAbhigeli, ebuyela kuNabhali, owayenze itheko elifana nelekumkani. Wayeshushu umfo, watsho wayimvuzemvuze bububele. UAbhigeli ke akazanga abe samxelela nto kwada kwangegomso." 
1Samuel25:37 Wathi akuqabuka uNabhali, wandula uAbhigeli ukumbalisela konke akwenze ngezolo. Wasuka wafa umzimba wasisigogo." 
1Samuel25:38 Kwathi emva kwemihla elishumi uNdikhoyo wambetha uNabhali, wasweleka." 
1Samuel25:39 Zathi zakufika kuDavide iindaba zokuba uNabhali akasekho, wavakala esithi: “Makabongwe uNdikhoyo ondilamleleyo kwimbambano yam noNabhali owandenzela ulunya. Mna sicaka sakhe uNdikhoyo wandinqanda ekwenzeni ububi, baza ubugwenxa bukaNabhali babuyekezelwa kwakuye.” Emva koko uDavide wathumelisa kuAbhigeli emcela ukuba abe ngumkakhe." 
1Samuel25:40 Zafika kuAbhigeli eKarmele izicaka zikaDavide, zathi: “Uthe uDavide masize kukuphuthuma ukuze ube ngumkakhe.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Wathoba ubuso bakhe, wabujongisa emhlabeni uAbhigeli, wathi: “Ewe, mna ndisisicakazana sakhe; ndiyavuma ukumkhonza, ndihlambe nokuhlamba iinyawo zezicaka zakhe.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Wagxabha-gxabhisa, wakhwela edonkini yakhe, wahamba nezigidimi zikaDavide, ekhatshwa ziimpelesi zakhe ezintlanu ukuya kwendela kuDavide." 
1Samuel25:43 UDavide wayeselenomfazi onguAhinowam intombi yaseYizereli ngoku athatha uAbhigeli. 
1Samuel25:44 Kanti ke uSawule intombi yakhe uMikali, eyayikwangumka-Davide, wayeyendisele kuPalti unyana kaLayishe waseGalim." 
1Samuel26:1 AmaZifi ahambela kuSawule eGibheya, athi: “Nanko uDavide ezímele kulaa nduli iHakila ekumaphethelo entlango yelakwaJuda.”" 
1Samuel26:2 Unduluke kwangoko uSawule wenjenjeya, ehamba namawaka amathathu amadoda akhethiweyo kwaSirayeli, ukuya kukhangela uDavide kuloo ntlango yaseZifi." 
1Samuel26:3 Wafika wamisa ikampu ngasendleleni kuloo nduli iHakila. Wayesesentlango uDavide lo gama kufika uSawule. Uthe ke akubona ukuba nanko uSawule emlandela," 
1Samuel26:4 wathumela iintlola, ziye kuqonda ukuba ngaba wayelapho ngenene na uSawule." 
1Samuel26:5 UDavide usuke kwangoko wayijongisisa loo ndawo wayemise kuyo uSawule. Wayibona indawo apho uSawule noAbhinere, unyana kaNere, umphathi-mkhosi kaSawule, babelalisa kuyo. USawule wayelala phakathi ekampini, engqongwe ngumkhosi wakhe." 
1Samuel26:6 Emva koko uDavide ubhekise kuAhimeleki umHeti, nakuAbhishayi umntakwabo-Jowabi (onina yayinguZeruya) wenjenje: “Ngubani phakathi kwenu ofuna ukuya nam kulaa kampu kaSawule?” “Ndim oza kuhamba nawe,” uvakele esitsho uAbhishayi." 
1Samuel26:7 Ngobusuku bangaloo mini ke uDavide kunye noAbhishayi baya kungena ekampini kaSawule, elele ubuthongo phakathi ekampini, umkhonto wakhe ugxunyekwe phantsi ngasentloko. Amajoni noAbhinere babelele obentlombe bemngqongile." 
1Samuel26:8 Kwesi sithuba uAbhishayi uthe kuDavide: “Utshaba lwakho ulunikezele esandleni sakho namhlanje uThixo! Ndiyeke ndimgwaze ndimhlabanisele ngomkhonto. Andiyi kuphinda kabini!” 
1Samuel26:9 Uphendule wathi uDavide: “Uze ungambulali! Ngubani ongamsa isandla umthanjiswa *kaNdikhoyo aze abe msulwa? 
1Samuel26:10 Inene, ekho nje uNdikhoyo,” waqhuba watsho uDavide, “nguNdikhoyo ngokwakhe oya kumbetha, nokuba kungokufika kwemini yakhe yokufa, nokuba kungokubulawa kwakhe edabini." 
1Samuel26:11 Ngenxa kaNdikhoyo mna mandingaze ndimse isandla umthanjiswa kaNdikhoyo. Thatha laa mkhonto wakhe, nalaa ngqayi yakhe yamanzi ingasentlokweni yakhe, sihambe.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Bawuthatha ke loo mkhonto naloo ngqayi zazisentla koSawule, bemka nazo ooDavide noAbhishayi. Akukho bani owababonayo, nabani owakuvayo okwakuqhubeka, nabani owaphaphamayo; bonke babelel' obentlombe, kuba kaloku uNdikhoyo wabahlisela obunzulu obu ubuthongo xa bebonke." 
1Samuel26:13 Wasuka apho wawela intlambo uDavide, waya kuthi qingqi ngaphesheya endulini ethe qelele, wafika" 
1Samuel26:14 wamemeza ekhwaza umkhosi kaSawule noAbhinere, esithi: “Wa, Abhinere! Khawuphendule, mfondini!” “Ngaba ngubani na lo ufundekela ukumkani?” NguAbhinere lowo utshoyo." 
1Samuel26:15 Kuphendule kwauDavide, wenjenje: “Andibi kanene, Abhinere, nguwe intshatsheli emfazweni? Ukhona na omnye olingana nawe kwaSirayeli? Ngani ke ungamkhuseli umhlekazi ikumkani yakho? Ngoku ndithethayo kungene umntu apho emkhosini wenu, eze kubulala ukumkani." 
1Samuel26:16 Imbi le nto uyenzileyo, Abhinere! Ekho nje uNdikhoyo, ndithi nimelwe kukufa nonke, kuba noyisakele kukukhusela ukumkani wenu, umthanjiswa kaNdikhoyo! Khawukhangele: uphi umkhonto kakumkani? Iphi yona ingqayi yakhe, le ibisentla kwakhe?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Waliva ilizwi ukuba lelikaDavide uSawule. Uvakele esithi: “Ngaba nguwe lowo, Davide, nyana wam?” “Ewe, ndim, mhlekazi,” kuphendule uDavide." 
1Samuel26:18 Watsho eqhuba esithi: “Khawutsho, mhlekazi, usandizungula ngantoni kangaka! Ndenzeni, mhlekazi? Liyintoni ityala lam kuwe?" 
1Samuel26:19 Mhlekazi, nkosi yam, khawuphulaphule amazwi omkhonzi wakho! Ukuba nguNdikhoyo okuxhokonkxileyo ngakum angáxoliswa ngumnikelo. Phofu ukuba ngabantu, mabahlelwe sisiqalekiso sikaNdikhoyo. Kaloku bandiphephethe ndatsho ndabhacela ngaphandle komhlaba olilifa lethu esilinikwe nguNdikhoyo, besithi: ‘Deda, uye kunqula *thixo bambi!’" 
1Samuel26:20 Mhlekazi, igazi lam malingaphalali ezizweni kude noNdikhoyo! Inene, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli uphumele ukuzingela intakumba enye, exela ubani osukela isakhwatsha ezintabeni.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Uphendule wenjenje uSawule: “Ndonile; buyel' ekhaya, Davide nyana wam! Andisobe ndikuse sandla konke, ngokuba namhlanje ubomi bam bube lixabiso kuwe. Ngenene ndenze ubudenge ndaphazama gqitha!”" 
1Samuel26:22 Waphendula uDavide wathi: “Umkhonto wakho nguwo lo, mhlekazi. Thumela omnye wabafana bakho eze kuwuthatha." 
1Samuel26:23 NguNdikhoyo ongumvuzi wabenza okulungileyo kwanâbo bathembekileyo. Wena ebekubeke esandleni sam namhlanje uNdikhoyo, kambe ke mna andikusanga sandla, kuba ungukumkani othanjiswe nguye." 
1Samuel26:24 Njengoko ndibuxabisileyo ubomi bakho namhlanje, ubenga uNdikhoyo abuxabise nobam, andihlangule kuzo zonke iimbandezelo.”" 
1Samuel26:25 USawule wathi kuDavide: “Wanga ungathamsanqeleka, nyana wam Davide. Uya kuya usomelela ngokomelela, ude ube ngotshatsheleyo.” Emva koko ke uDavide wahamba indlela yakhe, yena uSawule wagoduka." 
1Samuel27:1 Emva koko uDavide wacinga wathi: “Uya kuze andithi hlasi andibulale uSawule lo ngenye imini. Icebo linye ke: kukusabela kwelamaFilistiya. Wondincama ke uSawule, ayeke ukundifuna kwaSirayeli, ndibe ke ndiyaphuncuka esandleni sakhe.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Wanduluka ke uDavide kunye namadoda akhe angamakhulu amathandathu, benjenjeya ukusinga kwa-Akishe, unyana kaMawoki, ukumkani waseGati." 
1Samuel27:3 Bafumana indawo ke apho ooDavide namadoda akhe, bahlala neentsapho zabo kwelo zwe. UDavide wayehamba nabo abafazi bakhe uAhinowam waseYizereli kunye noAbhigeli umhlolokazi kaNabhali waseKarmele." 
1Samuel27:4 USawule akuva ukuba uDavide wasabela eGati, wanikezela, wayeka ukumzingela." 
1Samuel27:5 Wathi uDavide kuAkishe: “Ukuba uyakholwa ndim, ndinike idolophana kwezisemaphandleni, ndihlale kuyo. Akukho nto ithi mandihlale apha komkhulu kunye nawe, mhlekazi.”" 
1Samuel27:6 Ukumkani uAkishe wamnika idolophu iZikelage. Kususela loo mini ke iZikelage yaba phantsi kolawulo lweekumkani zakwaJuda. 
1Samuel27:7 Apho eFilistiya uDavide wahlala unyaka oneenyanga ezine. 
1Samuel27:8 Ngelo xesha ke uDavide namadoda akhe babemana behlasela amaGeshuri namaGezere kunye nama-Amaleki. Kwamandulo ezi zizwe zazimi kuloo mmandla osuka eShure, uthi ga ngelamaJiputa." 
1Samuel27:9 Ngalo lonke ixesha uDavide ehlasela ummandla othile wayebulala onke amadoda nabafazi, athimbe zigusha, zinkomo, zidonki, neenkamela, nditsho nkqu nempahla enxitywayo. Emva koko wayedla ngokubuyela kwakumkani uAkishe." 
1Samuel27:10 Xa ukumkani uAkishe wayembuza athi: “Ubuye kuhlasela phi namhlanje?” uDavide wayedla ngokuphendula athi: “Ndivela ezantsi kwelakwaJuda,” okanye athi: “Ndivela kummandla wakwaJerameli ezantsi,” okanye athi: “Ndivela ezantsi kwelamaKeni.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Wayedla ngokubulala wonke umntu uDavide, indoda nomfazi, kuba wayesithi: “Bangasintama, bathi: ‘UDavide wênza oku noku.’ ” Wenjenjalo ke uDavide ngalo lonke elo xesha aseFilistiya." 
1Samuel27:12 UAkishe wayemthembile uDavide kangangokude avakale esithi: “Selenuka kangaka nje kumawabo amaSirayeli, uza kuhlala apha, abuse kum bonke ubomi bakhe.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Ngaloo mihla amaFilistiya ayeqokelele amabutho, eza kulwa namaSirayeli. Ukumkani uAkishe wabhekisa kuDavide wenjenje: “Uzuqonde mhlophe ukuba wena namadoda akho niza kulwela mna kule mfazwe!”" 
1Samuel28:2 Uphendule wathi uDavide: “Uza kuzibonela ngokwakho, mhlekazi, oko angákwenzayo umkhonzi wakho.” Uphendule wathi ukumkani uAkishe: “Yiyo ke loo nto ndifuna ukuba ube ngumlindi wam osisigxina wena.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Ngelo xesha uSamweli wayeselebhubhile, aza onke amaSirayeli amzilela, amngcwaba eRama kwisixeko sakhe. Ngaloo mihla uSawule wayebagxothe kwaSirayeli bonke abavumisa ngoonomathotholo kwakunye noosiyazi." 
1Samuel28:4 Amabutho amaFilistiya aqokelelana, aya kumisa eShunem. Ke yena uSawule wawaqokelela amaSirayeli, umkhosi wawumisa entabeni iGilibhowa." 
1Samuel28:5 Wankwantya uSawule akuwubona umkhosi wamaFilistiya," 
1Samuel28:6 wabuza *kuNdikhoyo ukuba angathini na. UNdikhoyo akamphendulanga; nditsho nangamaphupha, kwankqu *nangeeurim neethumim, ukanti *nangabashumayeli." 
1Samuel28:7 Ngenxa yaloo nto ke uSawule wathi kumaphakathi akhe: “Ndifuneleni umfazi ovumisa ngoonomathotholo, ukuze sithathe iintonga, siye kuye.” “Ukho lo kuthiwa use-Endore,” kutsho amaphakathi." 
1Samuel28:8 USawule wazenza mntu wumbi, wanxiba zambatho zimbi. Uthe ngorhatya wakhatshwa ngamaphakathi amabini, baya kuloo mfazi uvumisayo. Uthe akuba efikile kuloo mfazi uSawule, wabhekisa kuye wenjenje: “Khawubhekise kwabangasekhoyo, undibizele lo mntu ndiza kukuxelela igama lakhe.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Suke loo mfazi wathi kuSawule: “Ngathi uyayazi nje into eyenziwe ngukumkani uSawule! Andithi nguye owaphelisa abavumisa ngoonomathotholo kwakunye noosiyazi kwaSirayeli? Kutheni ufuna ukundibambisa nje, ndibulawe?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Wafunga uSawule wathi: “Ndiyafunga, ekho nje uNdikhoyo, akuyi kubekwa tyala wena ngenxa yale nto.”" 
1Samuel28:11 “Ndikuvusele bani ke?” kutsho loo mfazi. “Ndivusele uSamweli,” kuphendula uSawule." 
1Samuel28:12 Kuthe akuvela uSamweli, wakhala ngamandla loo mfazi, wathi kuSawule: “Kutheni undikhohlisa nje? Inguwe nje ukumkani uSawule!”" 
1Samuel28:13 “Musa ukuphaphazela,” watsho uSawule. “Ndixelele, ubona ntoni?” “Ndibona isiqu selemimoya siphuma emhlabeni,” kutsho loo mfazi uvumisayo." 
1Samuel28:14 “Injani inkangeleko yaso?” nguSawule lowo ubuzayo. “Ndibona kusiza ixhego, lambethe umnweba,” kutsho umfazi. USawule waqonda ukuba yayinguSamweli. Watsho waqubuda ngobuso emhlabeni ekhahlela." 
1Samuel28:15 Wenjenje ukubhekisa kukumkani uSawule uSamweli: “Kungani na undiphazamisa nje undivusa?” Uphendule wenjenje uSawule: “Ndisengxakini enkulu! AmaFilistiya ayandihlasela, yaye noThixo undishiyile. Akasathethi nam ngomshumayeli nangamaphupha. Ndikubizele ukuba undixelele into emandiyenze.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Wathi uSamweli: “Yini na ukuba ubuze kum, uNdikhoyo ekushiyile nje, wakujikela?" 
1Samuel28:17 Le nto yenzeke kuwe ngoku yile ebekade ekuxelela yona ngam uNdikhoyo. Uluhluthile esandleni sakho ulawulo, walunika ummelwane uDavide." 
1Samuel28:18 Kaloku wena wala ukumthobela uNdikhoyo: akwenzanga ngokwengqumbo yakhe evuthayo kuma-Amaleki. Yiyo ke loo nto akwenze le nto nje uNdikhoyo ngoku. 
1Samuel28:19 Uza kukunikela esandleni samaFilistiya wena kunye namaSirayeli ephela. Ngomso oku wena kunye noonyana bakho sobe sikunye, yaye uNdikhoyo loo mkhosi wamaSirayeli uza kuwunikela esandleni samaFilistiya.”" 
1Samuel28:20 Ngoko nangoko wawa bhaxa emhlabeni uSawule, egubha ngenxa yamazwi kaSamweli. Wayeselephelelwe nangamandla, kuba wayengazange wasa nto emlonyeni imini nobusuku." 
1Samuel28:21 Waya kuye loo mfazi, wafika uSawule efile kukoyika, waza wathi: “Mhlekazi, umkhonzazana wakho ukuthobele. Ubomi bam ndibubeke esichengeni ndenza ngokomyalelo wakho." 
1Samuel28:22 Ngoku ke siphulaphule isicakazana sakho; mandikwenzele into etyiwayo, utye, ahlaziyeke amandla akho, uhambe indlela yakho.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Wala uSawule, esithi: “Andiyi kusa nto emlonyeni!” Kambe ke amcenga amaphakathi kunye naloo mfazi. Ngenene woyisakala, wavuka, wahlala ebhedini." 
1Samuel28:24 Loo mfazi wakhawuleza waxhela ithole elondlekileyo awayenalo emzini wakhe; wathatha umgubo, waxova, wenza isonka esinganyuswanga." 
1Samuel28:25 Oko kutya wakubeka ngaphambi kukaSawule kunye namaphakathi akhe, bakutya, baza banduluka kwangobo busuku." 
1Samuel29:1 Amabutho amaFilistiya aqokelelana eAfeki, waza umkhosi wamaSirayeli waya kumisa ngakumthombo waseYizereli." 
1Samuel29:2 Zaphuma iikumkani zamaFilisitiya, zihamba namabutho azo angamakhulu-khulu namawaka-waka. Yena uDavide namadoda akhe babelandela ngasemva, behamba kunye nokumkani uAkishe." 
1Samuel29:3 Zidumzele iinkokheli zamaFilistiya zakubabona, zathi: “La maHebhere afuna ntoni apha?” Kuphendule ukumkani uAkishe kweso sithuba, wathi: “Ngumphakathi kakumkani uSawule lo, uDavide. Selenethuba elide elapha kum, yaye andifumananga sikhwasilima kuye okoko wafikayo apha kum.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Azimhoyanga iinkokheli zamaFilistiya, zaba nomsindo, zathi: “Makahambe lo mfo apha, aye kulaa dolophu wamnika yona. Makangayi kunye nathi emfazweni, hleze asijikele xa lishushu idabi. Leyo ingaba yindlela elula angaxolisa ngayo inkosi yakhe ngokubulala amadoda omkhosi wethu." 
1Samuel29:5 Kanene, asinguye na lo Davide bakha bombelela ngaye abafazi besithi: ‘USawule ubulele amawaka, kodwa yen' uDavide uwise amawaka ngamawaka alishumi’?”" 
1Samuel29:6 UAkishe ke wabiza uDavide, waza wathi kuye: “Davide, ndiyafunga, ekho nje uNdikhoyo, wena unyanisekile, ndaye bendingathandayo ukuba siye kunye kule mfazwe, kuba andifumananga sikhwasilima kuwe konke okoko wafikayo apha kum. Kambe ke abanye abaphathi àbakholwa bubukho bakho." 
1Samuel29:7 Phindel' emva ngoxolo ke, mfo wam, ungakhe wenze nto abanokuthi bayigxeke.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Wabuza wathi uDavide: “Ndenzeni, mhlekazi? Wena ubone sikhwasilima sini na kum oko ndafikayo apha? Ngani ndingavunyelwa nje ndihambe nawe, mhlekazi, ndiye kulwa neentshaba zenkosi yam?”" 
1Samuel29:9 “Ngeba nditsho nam, Davide.” NguAkishe ke lowo. “Mna ndikubona unyaniseke ngokungathi usisithunywa sikaThixo. Kodwa ke ezinye iinkokheli zithi asinako ukuya nawe emfazweni." 
1Samuel29:10 Kufuneka ke ngomso oku, wena namadoda akho, enamshiyayo uSawule neza kum, nivuke ekuseni, ninduluke kusathi qhekre ukusa.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Banduluka ekuseni ke ngengomso ooDavide ukubuyela kwelamaFilistiya. AmaFilistiya wona ajonga phambili eYizereli. 
1Samuel30:1 Ngomhla wesithathu bagaleleka eZikelage ooDavide namadoda akhe. Bafika ama-Amaleki esanda kungenela amazantsi elakwaJuda, ahlasela neZikelage. Ayeyitshise pam loo dolophu," 
1Samuel30:2 athimba abafazi nabantwana bonke. Kwakungafanga mntu phofu; ayethimbe nje konke okushukumayo endleleni yawo. 
1Samuel30:3 Ukufika kwabo ooDavide bafika loo dolophu iluthuthu, abafazi noonyana kunye neentombi zabo kumkiwe nazo." 
1Samuel30:4 Hayi ke, abhomboloza loo madoda ada aphelelwa ngamandla." 
1Samuel30:5 Kwakuthathwe nabafazi ababini bakaDavide, uAhinowam waseYizereli kunye noAbhigeli umhlolokazi kaNabhali waseKarmele." 
1Samuel30:6 Wazibona selesengxakini embi uDavide, kuba amadoda akhe ayefuna ukumxuluba ngamatye, kuba ayekhathazekile ngenxa yokuduka kweentsapho zawo. Kodwa uDavide wazomeleza ngokuthembela *kuNdikhoyo uThixo wakhe kuyo yonke loo nto." 
1Samuel30:7 UDavide wabiza unyana ka-Ahimeleki, uAbhiyatare umbingeleli, wathi kuye: “Khawuze *nesidanga eso, mfo ka-Ahimeleki.” Wasisa uAbhiyatare." 
1Samuel30:8 UDavide wabuza kuNdikhoyo wenjenje: “Ndibasukele na aba banqolobi? Ndobafumana na?” “Baleqe; uza kubafumana, ubakhulule abaya bathinjwa,” utshilo uNdikhoyo." 
1Samuel30:9 Wanduluka ke uDavide kunye naloo makhulu mathandathu amadoda. Bathi bakufika kwintlambo iBhesore, asala apho amadoda" 
1Samuel30:10 angamakhulu amabini awayedinwe kangangokuba angabi nako ukuyiwela loo ntlambo. Wabheka phambili yena uDavide kunye namakhulu amane amadoda," 
1Samuel30:11 abhaqa umJiputa endle apho, aza amsa kuDavide. Ampha ukutya, watya; amnika namanzi, wathoba unxano;" 
1Samuel30:12 ampha nomqwayito wamafiya kunye nezikhinkci zeerasentyisi zazibini. Uthe akugqiba ukutya, waziva edlamkile. Kaloku kwakusekuziintsuku ezintathu engafumani nto ityiwayo, nditsho neyokuthoba unxano." 
1Samuel30:13 Emva koko ke uDavide wambuza wathi: “Khawutsho ke, ungokabani, uphuma phi?” “Mna ndingumJiputa, ikhoboka lomAmaleki,” kuphendula umfo lowo. “Ndishiywe yinkosi yam, kuba ndisuke andaphila. Sekuziintsuku ezintathu ngoku." 
1Samuel30:14 Sasiye kuthimba kulaa mmandla wamaKreti ukumazantsi elakwaJuda, sadlulela kummandla wakwaKalebhi, senjenjeya saya kutshisa iZikelage.”" 
1Samuel30:15 “Ungasisa apho bakhoyo abo banqolobi?” kubuza uDavide. Wenjenje ukuphendula: “Ewe, ndinganisa ukuba ungafunga uThixo ukuba anizi kundibulala okanye nindinikele kwinkosi yam.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Emva koko ke loo mfo wabasa ooDavide apho babemise kona abanqolobi. Babethe saa abanqolobi abo kuloo ndawo, kutyiwa, kuselwa, kubhiyozelwa amaxhoba angako awayethinjwe kwelamaFilistiya nakwaJuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Kwathi xa kumpondo-zankomo ngomhla olandelayo, zanqoza, ebahlasela uDavide, zatsho kwada kwangongcwalazi. Akwasinda namnye kubo ngaphandle kwamakhulu amane abafana abasuka bona bakhwela ezinkameleni, babaleka." 
1Samuel30:18 UDavide wabahlangula bonke abathinjwa bama-Amaleki, wabuya nawo onke loo maxhoba babewathimbile, kunye nabafazi bakhe bobabini, akwabikho nto ingafunyanwanga." 
1Samuel30:19 Oonyana neentombi zamadoda akhe kunye nawo onke loo maxhoba ama-Amaleki wabuya nawo uDavide. 
1Samuel30:20 Wabuya nemihlambi yeenkomo neegusha, ahamba eqhuba loo mihlambi amadoda akhe, esithi: “Huntshuu! Amaxhoba kaDavide!”" 
1Samuel30:21 Wesuka apho uDavide, wafika kulawa makhulu mabini amadoda awasala entlanjeni eBhesore ngenxa yokudinwa. Aphuthuma ukuhlangabeza uDavide namadoda akhe. Wawabulisa uDavide, wawabuza nempilo," 
1Samuel30:22 kodwa kwabakho amatshijolo nabaphembi-qhushululu kubalandeli bakaDavide, abathi: “Aba bebengahambanga nathi. Ngoko abazi kuba nanxaxheba kula maxhoba size nawo. Indoda nganye ingasuka ithathe umfazi wayo nabantwana bayo, ihambe.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Wenjenje ukuwaphendula loo madoda uDavide: “Mawethu, aninako ukwenjenjalo ngento esiyiphiwe nguNdikhoyo! NguNdikhoyo lo usikhuseleyo wasoyisela abaya banqolobi bathimbe izinto zethu." 
1Samuel30:24 Ayamkeleki le nto niyithethayo. Kaloku umntu osala nemithwalo ufumana isabelo esinye nalo uya edabini. Makunikwe inxaxheba kumntu wonke ngokulinganayo.” 
1Samuel30:25 Loo mthetho wawiswa nguDavide waba ngummiselo nesiko kwaSirayeli ukususela ngaloo mini. 
1Samuel30:26 Wathi akufika eZikelage uDavide, wathatha isabelo kuloo maxhoba, wasithumela kumadoda amakhulu angoogxa bakhe kwaJuda, esithi: “Nantso inxaxheba esinabela yona kumaxhoba esiwathimbe kubachasi bakaNdikhoyo.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Wabela abantu baseBhetele, nabaseRama, kwaJuda emazantsi, nakubantu baseYatire," 
1Samuel30:28 eArohere, eSifimoti, e-Eshtemowa," 
1Samuel30:29 kunye naseRakeli. Wabela nomzi wakwaJerameli, namaKeni," 
1Samuel30:30 kwakunye nabantu baseHoma, eBhorashan, eAtaki," 
1Samuel30:31 nabaseHebron, nakuzo zonke iindawo apho wakha waxhwarha khona kunye namadoda akhe." 
1Samuel31:1 Aqubisana amaFilistiya namaSirayeli, aswantsuliswa amaSirayeli, kwawa inkitha yawo kuloo ntaba iGilibhowa." 
1Samuel31:2 AmaFilistiya awasukela, athana mbende noSawule kunye noonyana bakhe, aza ababulala bobathathu oonyana bakaSawule, uJonatan, noAbhinadabhi, kunye noMalkishuwa." 
1Samuel31:3 Laba shushu idabi kufuphi noSawule, abatoli bamngxwelerha." 
1Samuel31:4 Kweso sithuba uSawule ubhekise kumfana owayephatha izikhali zakhe, wathi: “Rhola ikrele, undigwaze. Andifuni kuvuyelelwa zeziya ntlanga zingalukanga, xa ziza kundibulala.” Loo mfana kambe akazange avume kuyenza loo nto, kuba wayesoyika. USawule ke urhole ikrele lakhe, waza waziphosa kulo." 
1Samuel31:5 Wathi akubona uSawule efile, naye loo mfana waziphosa kwelakhe ikrele, wafa kunye noSawule." 
1Samuel31:6 Kwaba njalo ke ukufa kukaSawule, noonyana bakhe bobathathu, kunye naloo mfana owayemphathela izikhali. Kwawa onke amadoda omkhosi kaSawule ngaloo mhla." 
1Samuel31:7 AmaSirayeli angaphesheya kwentili nangaphesheya kweJordan athi akubona ukuba umkhosi wakwaSirayeli uswantsulisiwe, nokuba uSawule kunye noonyana bakhe bawile, ashiya iidolophu zawo, abhaca. Afika amaFilistiya, ahlala kwezo dolophu zawo." 
1Samuel31:8 Ngengomso xa amaFilistiya aya kuphanga impahla yâbo babewe edabini, afika izidumbu zooSawule noonyana bakhe bobathathu ziqungquluze apho kuloo ntaba iGilibhowa." 
1Samuel31:9 Amnqumla intloko uSawule, amkhulula izixhobo zakhe zemfazwe, athumela izigidimi kulo lonke elamaFilistiya, ukuba ziye kuvakalisa iindaba zoloyiso ezindlwini *zoothixo bawo nakuwo onke amawabo." 
1Samuel31:10 Izikrweqe zikaSawule azibeka endlwini yothixo wawo uAshtaroti, isidumbu sakhe asibethelela kudonga lwedolophu iBhete-shan." 
1Samuel31:11 Zathi zakuvakala kubantu baseJabheshe eGiliyadi iindaba zento eyenziwe kuSawule ngamaFilistiya," 
1Samuel31:12 kwanduluka onke amagorha alapho, ahamba ubusuku bonke esinga eBhete-shan. Afika azithula izidumbu zooSawule noonyana bakhe kolo donga lwaseBhete-shan, agoduka nazo, aya kuzitshisa eJabheshe." 
1Samuel31:13 Emva koko bawathatha amathambo abo, baya kuwangcwaba ngaphantsi komthi womtamariske eJabheshe, baza bazila iintsuku ezisixhenxe." 
2Samuel1:1 Akuba uSawule efile, uDavide wabuyela eZikelage emva kokoyisa kwakhe ama-Amaleki, wachitha khona iintsuku zambini." 
2Samuel1:2 Ngolwesithathu usuku kwafika mfo uthile, evela kwikampu yomkhosi kaSawule. Wayambethe iingubo ezikrazukileyo, ezigalele umhlaba entloko. Wathi akufika kuDavide, wawa phantsi ekhahlela." 
2Samuel1:3 UDavide wathi kuye: “Uvela phi?” Uphendule ngelithi: “Ndibaleke ekampini yamaSirayeli.” 
2Samuel1:4 UDavide wathi: “Kwenzeke ntoni? Khawundixelele.” “Umkhosi wethu usuke wabaleka,” utshilo ukuphendula, “yaye maninzi amadoda awileyo edabini. Nditsho nkqu uSawule noJonatan unyana wakhe nabo itshoba lilele umbethe.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Wathi uDavide kuloo mfana wayemzisela ezi ndaba: “Wazi ngantoni ukuba uSawule nonyana wakhe uJonatan bafile?” 
2Samuel1:6 Umfana lowo waphendula wathi: “Kwathi ndilapho entabeni iGilibhowa ndabona ukuba uSawule wayexhathise ngomkhonto, seleza kufunyanwa ziinqwelo nabakhweli-mahashe abamsukelayo." 
2Samuel1:7 Wathi akukhangela ngasemva wandibona, wandibiza, nam ke ndasabela ndathi: ‘Ndikwenzele ntoni?’" 
2Samuel1:8 Wathi kum: ‘Ungubani?’ Ndathi kuye: ‘NdingumAmaleki.’ 
2Samuel1:9 Uthe kum ke: ‘Sondela undigqibezele. Ubomi bam sebungamacimi-cimi, kodwa andikaphelelwa.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Ndaya ke, ndafika ndamgwaza, kuba ndandiqonda mhlophe ukuba akasokube angafi, ukuba ukhe wawa nje. Emva koko ndamothula esi sithsaba awayesithwele, ndamkhulula nesi sacholo engalweni. Nazi ke, mhlekazi; ndizizisile kuwe!”" 
2Samuel1:11 Wazikrazula izambatho zakhe uDavide, enjenjalo nawo onke amadoda awayekunye naye." 
2Samuel1:12 Bazila, balila, abatya nokutya oku kwada kwahlwa, belilela uSawule nonyana wakhe uJonatan kunye namaSirayeli, abantu *bakaNdikhoyo, ababewe ngekrele." 
2Samuel1:13 Emva koko uDavide wabuza loo mfana wayeze nezi ndaba, wathi: “Uvela phi kakade wena, mfana?” “Mna ndingunyana wendoda engumngeneleli, umAmaleki,” uphendule watsho loo mfana." 
2Samuel1:14 UDavide ke wathi: “Ngani ungoyiki ukuphakamisa isandla sakho ubulale umthanjiswa kaNdikhoyo?” 
2Samuel1:15 Waza uDavide wabhekisa kwenye yamadodana akhe, wathi: “Bulala le nto!” Loo ndodana ke imgwaze kwangoko umfana lowo, yaphel' intw' ibithethwa." 
2Samuel1:16 Wavakala uDavide esithi: “Igazi lakho malibe phezu kwentloko yakho. Urhintyelwe kwangulo mlomo wakho xa ubungqina usithi: ‘Ndimbulele umthanjiswa kaNdikhoyo.’ ” 
2Samuel1:17 Emva koko uDavide wavuma le ngoma, elilela uSawule nonyana wakhe uJonatan." 
2Samuel1:18 Wathi kufuneka bayifundiswe bonke abemi bakwaJuda, ibe yingoma yesaphetha. (Ibhalwe kwiNcwadi kaYashare.) Ithi loo ngoma:" 
2Samuel1:19 “Awu! Itshoba lilel' umbethe kwiimbalasane zakwaSirayeli! Awil' amagorha akuthi phaya endulini! 
2Samuel1:20 “Ze ningayithethi le ntlekele eGati, ningayidizi nasezitalatweni zaseAshkelon; hleze sihlekwe ziintombi zamaFilistiya; hleze zivuye iintombi zeentlanga ezingalukiyo." 
2Samuel1:21 “Hoyina, zintaba zaseGilibhowa! Mawunibukul' umbethe ngokunjalo nemvula, uz' umhlab' uhlal' ungumqwebedu, ungavelisi umnikelo wengqolowa. Kaloku lahlazek' apho kun' ikhaka lenqeberh' enkulu; kungokunje alisawev' amafutha ikhaka likaSawule." 
2Samuel1:22 Kwajub' ugodo lutolo lukaJonatan, lenz' iziqweng' ikrele likaSawule, kwaw' izigantsontso luqikilek' utshaba." 
2Samuel1:23 “Ziinzwana, ziintandane uSawule noJonatan; ngumtya nethunga behleli, befile. Asingomendu, kuncam' ixhalanga; ziingwanzilili, bodlul' iingonyama." 
2Samuel1:24 “Gixani, zintombi zakwaSirayeli, nililel' uSawule owayenambes' ezimbeje-mbeje zon' iingubo, ehombis' izambatho zenu ngegolide." 
2Samuel1:25 “Awu! Ewe, awil' amagorh' amakhulu, itshoba lalal' umbeth' esedabini. Ukhahlelwe phantsi uJonatan phaya endulini." 
2Samuel1:26 Kubuhlung' ukushiywa nguwe, Jonatan, mfo wethu! Ubuyinceke, intandane kum. Uthando lwakho kum beluncamisile; beludlul' uthando lwentombazana." 
2Samuel1:27 “Awu! Ngenene, itshoba lilel' umbethe kumagorh' akuthi; nezo zikrweqe zemfazwe zifane zalal' umhlwa.”" 
2Samuel2:1 Emva koko uDavide wabuzisa *kuNdikhoyo wathi: “Ndingaya kuhlala na kwesinye sezixeko zakwaJuda?” UNdikhoyo wathi: “Yiya.” Wabuza uDavide wathi: “Mandiye phi?” Wathi uNdikhoyo: “Yiya eHebron.” 
2Samuel2:2 Wahamba ke uDavide kunye nabafazi bakhe ababini uAhinowam waseYizereli kunye noAbhigeli owayengumhlolokazi kaNabhali waseKarmele. 
2Samuel2:3 Wahamba nawo amadoda akhe uDavide, aya kuhlala neentsapho zawo kummandla waseHebron." 
2Samuel2:4 Afika ke amadoda akwaJuda, eze kumthambisa uDavide apho eHebron ukuba abe ngukumkani wakwaJuda. Zithe zakufika kuDavide iindaba zokuba abantu baseJabheshe eGiliyadi bamngcwabile uSawule," 
2Samuel2:5 wathumela izigidimi kubo, wathi: “Wanga uNdikhoyo anganithamsanqela ngesenzo esihle sokubonakalisa intembeko ngokungcwaba inkosi yenu uSawule." 
2Samuel2:6 Ubenga uNdikhoyo anganiphatha ngobubele nangokunyaniseka. Nam ke ndiza kuniphatha kakuhle ngenxa yale nto niyenzileyo. 
2Samuel2:7 Ze niqine, ningoyiki ngenxa yokuba inkosi yenu uSawule ingasekho. Abantu bakwaJuda bandithambisile ndaba ngukumkani wabo.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Umphathi wemikhosi kaSawule uAbhinere, unyana kaNere, wabaleka nonyana kaSawule uIshbhoshete, waya naye eMahanayim ngaphesheya kweJordan." 
2Samuel2:9 Wafika apho uAbhinere wamisela uIshbhoshete waba ngukumkani ophethe imimandla yaseGiliyadi, kwa-Ashere, eYizereli, kwaEfrayim, nakwaBhenjamin, nditsho elakwaSirayeli liphela." 
2Samuel2:10 Waba ngukumkani xa emashumi mane ubudala uIshbhoshete unyana kaSawule, walawula iminyaka yamibini. Isizwe sakwaJuda sona sasiphantsi kukaDavide." 
2Samuel2:11 Wasilawula ehlala eHebron iminyaka yaba sixhenxe neenyanga ezintandathu. 
2Samuel2:12 Kwasuka uAbhinere eMahanayim, ehamba namaphakathi kaIshbhoshete, baya kwidolophu iGibheyon." 
2Samuel2:13 Ngasechibini laseGibheyon bahlangana noJowabhi, owayezalwa nguZeruya. UJowabhi wayehamba namanye amaphakathi kaDavide. Bahlala phantsi bonke, elinye iqela likweli cala lechibi, elinye likweliya." 
2Samuel2:14 Wavakala uAbhinere esithi kuJowabhi: “Makhe sithelekise abafana, bakhuphisane ngokulwa sibukele.” UJowabhi wathi: “Kulungile, mabenze!”" 
2Samuel2:15 Kwasuka ishumi elinambini labafana limele uIshbhoshete unyana kaSawule ngakwicala lakwaBhenjamin, baqubisana neshumi elinambini labafana becala likaDavide."
