2Samuel19:25 Uthe akufika evela eJerusalem, wathi kuye ukumkani: “Mefibhoshete, kwakutheni ukuze ungahambi nam?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Uphendule ngelithi uMefibhoshete: “Mhlekazi, nkosi yam, uyazi ukuba ndisisiqhwala. Ndathi isicaka sam uZibha masibophe idonki ndihambe ngayo ndikukhaphe, kodwa sona sasuka sandiphoxa." 
2Samuel19:27 Saza kuxoka ngam kuwe, mhlekazi. Kambe ke wena mhlekazi, nkosi yam, usisithunywa sikaThixo – yenza loo nto ubona ifanele." 
2Samuel19:28 Kwathi umzi kabawo umelwe kukubulawa, wena wathi mandiye kuhlala kwakho. Andisenako nokuba ndibe sacela isisa kuwe ngoku, mhlekazi.”" 
2Samuel19:29 Ukumkani wathi kuye: “Musa ukuba sathetha; ndigqibe kwelokuba wena noZibha nahlulelane ngomhlaba kaSawule.” 
2Samuel19:30 UMefibhoshete wathi kukumkani: “Makakuthathe konke uZibha, mhlekazi. Mna ndixolile kukubona wena ubuyela ekhaya.”" 
2Samuel19:31 UBhazilayi waseGiliyadi wayekho naye, evela eRogelim, eze kuphuthuma ukumkani eJordan." 
2Samuel19:32 Wayesele eyinkonde emashumi asibhozo ubudala. Wayesisityebi, esoloko emondla ukumkani ngokuya wayeseMahanayim." 
2Samuel19:33 Ukumkani wathi kuBhazilayi: “Masiye eJerusalem, wondliwe ndim wena ngoku.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Uthe uBhazilayi: “Mhlekazi, seyimbalwa imihla yokudla kwam ubomi; ndiza kuba sahambela ntoni ukuya nokumkani eJerusalem?" 
2Samuel19:35 Sendimashumi asibhozo ubudala; akusekho nto imnandi nembi kum. Ukutya nento eselwayo azisenancasa kum; andisawuva nomculo weemvumi neemvumikazi. Ndingasuka ndibe ngumthwalo kuwe ngoku, mhlekazi, nkosi yam." 
2Samuel19:36 Noko andikufanelanga ukuba ukumkani andivuze ngolo hlobo. Ndiza kuhamba nje ithutyana, ndikukhaphe uwele iJordan," 
2Samuel19:37 emva koko ndijike ndigoduke, ndiye kufela ngakumathambo kabawo noma. Nasi isicaka sakho uKimam; ungahamba naso, mhlekazi, usenzele loo nto wena ubona ukuba isilungele.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Uthe ukuphendula ukumkani: “Makahambe nam uKimam; ndomenzela into efunwa nguwe. Wena ndingakwenzela nantoni na oyifunayo.” 
2Samuel19:39 Wayiwela ke iJordan ukumkani uDavide nawo onke amadoda omkhosi wakhe. Uthe akuba ngaphesheya wajika wanga uBhazilayi, wamthamsanqela, waza ke uBhazilayi wajika wagoduka." 
2Samuel19:40 Uthe akuwela ukumkani ekhatshwa ngawo onke amadoda akwaJuda nenxalenye yamadoda akwaSirayeli, waya eGiligali. Wayelapho noKimam." 
2Samuel19:41 Emva koko amaSirayeli onke aya kukumkani, afika athi: “Mhlekazi, ngaba abantakwethu abaya bakwaJuda babuthathe phi ubuganga bokukuthatha eJordan nomzi wakho uphela?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Onke amadoda akwaJuda awaphendula awakwaSirayeli athi: “Loo nto siyenze ngenxa yokuba nathi sibanye nokumkani. Yintoni ke ekhathazayo kuloo nto, engasihlawuleli nakutya nje, kungekho nanto asenzele yona?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Aphendula amadoda akwaSirayeli athi kumadoda akwaJuda: “Sinebango eliphindwe kalishumi kunani kukumkani. Ke ngoko sinelungelo kuye kunani. Ngani ke ukuba nisidele? Sanukulibala ukuba sithi kaloku esathetha kuqala ngokulandwa kukakumkani.” Amadoda akwaJuda ayegadlela wona kunamaSirayeli ekwenzeni elawo ibango ngokumkani. 
2Samuel20:1 Apho eGiligali kwakukho itshijolo elithile lomfo ogama linguShebha, unyana kaBhikri wesizwe sakwaBhenjamin. Wasuka wabetha isigodlo sakhe, wamemelela esithi: “Asinasahlulo kuDavide, singenalifa kunyana kaJese. Elowo makaye endlwini yakhe, maSirayeli!”" 
2Samuel20:2 Ke onke amadoda akwaSirayeli amshiya uDavide, alandela uShebha unyana kaBhikri, kodwa wona amaJuda asala noDavide, amlandela ukusuka eJordan ada aya kutsho naye eJerusalem." 
2Samuel20:3 Wathi uDavide akufika komkhulu eJerusalem, wawathatha lawo maqadi akhe alishumi ayesele ejonge ikomkhulu, wathi makajongwe ngabalindi. Wayebondla, kodwa akabuyanga ahlangane nabo, bahlala ubomi bobuhlolokazi bonke ubomi babo." 
2Samuel20:4 UDavide wathi kuAmasa: “Wabize amadoda akwaJuda eze apha zingadlulanga iintsuku ezintathu.” 
2Samuel20:5 Wahamba uAmasa, esiya kubiza amaJuda, kodwa akabuya ngosuku awayemiselwe lona ngukumkani." 
2Samuel20:6 Uvakele esithi ukumkani kuAbhishayi: “Phofu uyaqonda na ukuba uShebha unyana kaBhikri uza kusenzela ingxwaba-ngxwaba nangaphezu koAbhasalom. Hamba nala madoda omkhosi wam, nimlandele engekayi kwiidolophu ezinqatyisiweyo, asithele emehlweni ethu.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Asuka ke amadoda ebutho likaJowabhi, nabalindi abangamaKreti namaPleti, nawo onke amagorha, anduluka eJerusalem, alanda ekhondweni likaShebha unyana kaBhikri." 
2Samuel20:8 Bathi bakufika ngakwelaa liwa laseGibheyon, bahlangana noAmasa. UJowabhi wayegaxele ezedabi, ikrele lisesingxobeni, sibotshelelwe ebhantini. Uthe akusondela lawa elo krele." 
2Samuel20:9 UJowabhi wathi kuAmasa: “Uphila njani, mfo wethu?” Wamthi nqaku ngentshebe uAmasa ngesokunene isandla sakhe, eza kumanga." 
2Samuel20:10 UAmasa wayengalilumkelanga ikrele elalisesandleni sikaJowabhi, wamhlaba ngalo esiswini, wamkhupha amathumbu. Wafa kwangoko, akwafuneka ukuba abuye amhlabe uJowabhi. Basuka apho uJowabhi nomntakwabo uAbhishayi bangena endleleni, belandela uShebha unyana kaBhikri." 
2Samuel20:11 Enye kulaa madoda ayehamba noJowabhi yasala imi ngakweso sidumbu sika-Amasa, ikhwaza isithi: “Indoda engakwicala likaJowabhi noDavide mayilandele uJowabhi.”" 
2Samuel20:12 Isidumbu sika-Amasa esasilijaja ligazi sasiqungquluze phakathi endleleni. Loo ndoda yathi yakubona amadoda afika eme apho, yasirhuqela entsimini eso sidumbu, yasigquma ngengubo." 
2Samuel20:13 Emva koko ke wonke umntu walandela uJowabhi, kuzingelwa uShebha unyana kaBhikri." 
2Samuel20:14 UShebha wawutyhutyha wonke ummandla wezizwe zakwaSirayeli, wada waya kutsho kwidolophu iAbhele-bhete-mahaka, elandelwa nguwo wonke umzi wakwaBhikri." 
2Samuel20:15 UJowabhi nomkhosi wakhe bamngqinga uShebha apho eAbhele-bhete-mahaka. Benza amanqwanqwa ngomhlaba okuqabela udonga lwangaphandle, bemba ngaphantsi kodonga, befuna ukuluwisa." 
2Samuel20:16 Kweso sixeko kwakukho umfazi owayehlakaniphile. Wamemeza engaphakathi, wathi: “Khawuphulaphule apha. Nceda undibizele uJowabhi; ndifuna ukuthetha naye.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Efikile uJowabhi, wabuza loo mfazi wathi: “UnguJowabhi?” Wathi: “Ewe, ndinguye.” Umfazi lowo wathi kuye: “Khawuphulaphule ke, mhlekazi, oko isicakazana sakho sikuthethayo.” Yena wathi: “Ewe, qhuba, ndimamele.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Umfazi lowo wathi: “Kudala kwakudla ngokuthiwa: ‘Yiya kwidolophu iAbhele, uye kuvisa khona.’ Yayisenziwa ke loo nto." 
2Samuel20:19 Le yidolophu exolileyo nethembekileyo kwaSirayeli; kutheni ke ngoku uyidiliza nje, utshabalalisa isixeko esingunozala kuSirayeli? Ngani ukuba ufune ukucima isixeko esililifa *likaNdikhoyo?”" 
2Samuel20:20 Waphendula uJowabhi wathi: “Hayi, andingeke ndisidilize isixeko senu ndisicime." 
2Samuel20:21 Asiyiyo injongo yam leyo. Kukho umfo okuthiwa nguShebha, unyana kaBhikri wakweleentaba kwaEfrayim; nguye oqale olu dushe ngokuvukela ukumkani uDavide. Mkhupheni ngaphandle; ndosiyeka esi sixeko.” “Kulungile, intloko yakhe soyijula ngaphandle kodonga,” utshilo loo mfazi." 
2Samuel20:22 Wabuyela kubemi balapho necebo lakhe, bamnqumla intloko uShebha, bayijula ngaphandle kodonga kuJowabhi. Wasivuthela isigodlo, amadoda akhe ayeka ukusihlasela isixeko, agoduka. Wenjenjeya noJowabhi ukubuyela kukumkani eJerusalem." 
2Samuel20:23 Umphathi-mkhosi wakwaSirayeli yayinguJowabhi. Abalindi bakakumkani uDavide abangamaKreti namaPleti umphathi wabo yayinguBhenaya unyana kaJoyada. 
2Samuel20:24 UAdoram yena wayephethe abo benza umsebenzi ngokunyanzelwa; uYoshafati yena, unyana ka-Ahiludi, wayengumgcini-manqaku," 
2Samuel20:25 uSheva ingunobhala, ababingeleli inguZadoki noAbhiyatare." 
2Samuel20:26 UIra waseJayire wayengomnye wababingeleli bakaDavide. 
2Samuel21:1 Kwabakho indlala enkulu eyathatha iminyaka emithathu ngexesha kulawula uDavide. UDavide wafuna ukuqonda *kuNdikhoyo, waza uNdikhoyo wathi: “Kungenxa kaSawule nokuphalaza kwendlu yakhe igazi mhla wababulalayo abantu baseGibheyon.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Abantu baseGibheyon bebengengawo amaSirayeli. Babeliqaqobana lama-Amori awathenjiswa ukukhuselwa ngamaSirayeli, kodwa uSawule walinga ukuwatshabalalisa, kuba etshiseka ngenxa yenkqubela yamaSirayeli namaJuda. UDavide ke wawabiza amaGibheyon," 
2Samuel21:3 waza wathi kuwo: “Ngaba nifuna ndinenzele ntoni? Ndinganixolisa njani ukuze nilithamsanqelise ilifa likaNdikhoyo?” 
2Samuel21:4 Athi ukuphendula amaGibheyon: “Imbambano yethu noSawule nomzi wakhe ayinakuze ilungiswe ngegolide nesiliva, yaye asizimiselanga ukukhupha isixhiba ngokubulala namnye umSirayeli.” Yena wathi: “Ke nifuna ndinenzele ntoni?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Athi kukumkani: “Indoda eyasitshabalalisayo, iceba ukusicima igama kwimida yakwaSirayeli," 
2Samuel21:6 masinikwe amadoda abe sixhenxe kwinzala yayo, aye kuxhonywa phambi koNdikhoyo eGibheya, isixeko sikaSawule ukumkani owatyunjwa nguNdikhoyo.” Ukumkani wathi: “Kulungile, ndiza kunikhululela.”" 
2Samuel21:7 UDavide wamsindisa uMefibhoshete, unyana kaJonatan unyana kaSawule, ngenxa yesifungo awasenza kunye noJonatan phambi koNdikhoyo." 
2Samuel21:8 Kodwa ke wakhupha uArmoni kunye noMefibhoshete, oonyana ababini bakaRizpa intombi ka-Aya eyabazalela uSawule, kunye noonyana abahlanu bentombi kaSawule uMerabhi eyabazalela uAdriyeli unyana kaBhazilayi waseMehola," 
2Samuel21:9 wabanikela esandleni sabantu baseGibheyon. Bona baya kubaxhoma entabeni ngaphambi koNdikhoyo. Bafa bonke ngaxesha-nye. Ukufa kwabo kwakungexesha lokuqalisa ukuvuna, ekuqaleni kokuvunwa kwerhasi." 
2Samuel21:10 Emva koko uRizpa intombi ka-Aya wazenzela indlu yamarhonya kwelo litye babefele kulo, wahlala apho ukususela ngexesha lokuvuna kwada kwalixesha leemvula. Emini wayedla ngokugxotha amaxhalanga, aze ngokuhlwa agxothe amarhamncwa afuna ukudla ezo zidumbu." 
2Samuel21:11 Wathi uDavide, zakufika kuye ezo ndaba zento eyenziwa nguRizpa iqadi likaSawule," 
2Samuel21:12 waya kuthatha amathambo kaSawule noJonatan kubantu baseJabheshe eGiliyadi. (Babewabe endaweni yembutho yaseBhete-shan apho yayixhonywe khona imizimba yabo ngamhla amaFilistiya abulala uSawule kwintaba iGilibhowa.) 
2Samuel21:13 Wemka nawo uDavide amathambo kaSawule noJonatan kwakunye nawabo basixhenxe babexhonywe apho. 
2Samuel21:14 Bawafaka engcwabeni likaKishe uyise kaSawule amathambo kaSawule noJonatan eZela kummandla wakwaBhenjamin njengokomthetho kakumkani. Emva koko uThixo wayiva imithandazo yabo bethandazela ilizwe. 
2Samuel21:15 Kwavuka enye imfazwe phakathi kwamaFilistiya namaSirayeli, wanduluka uDavide waya kulwa namaFilistiya enamadoda akhe. Balwa ke namaFilistiya, waza uDavide wadinwa kakhulu." 
2Samuel21:16 Wasuka uIshbhi-bhenobhi wenzala kaRafa, ephethe umkhonto wobhedu obunzima bungaphezu kweekhilogram ezintathu, enekrele elitsha, wafuna ukubulala uDavide." 
2Samuel21:17 Waza uAbhishayi, unyana kaZeruya, waya kunceda uDavide. Ufike wamhlasela loo mFilistiya, wamosela. Emva koko amadoda kaDavide enza isifungo athi: “Unakanye ukuba uphinde uye edabini kunye nathi, hleze isibane sakwaSirayeli sicinywe.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Emva kwelo dabi kwabakho elinye idabi namaFilistiya eGobhi, apho uSibhekayi waseHusha wabulala uSafu wenzala kaRafa." 
2Samuel21:19 Kuphinde kwabakho elinye idabi kunye namaFilistiya kwaseGobhi apho, waza uEl-hanani, unyana kaJayire umluki waseBhetelehem, wabulala khona uGoliyati waseGati owayephethe umkhonto ongangesibonda." 
2Samuel21:20 Kubekho elinye idabi eGati, apho kwakukho ingxilimbela eyayikuthanda kunene ukulwa. Yayiyinto eminwe mithandathu kwisandla ngasinye, ineenzwane ezintandathu kunyawo ngalunye, amashumi amabini anesine ukutsho. Nayo yayiyinzala kaRafa." 
2Samuel21:21 Yawathuka amaSirayeli, yabulawa nguJonatan unyana kaShama umntakwabo-Davide." 
2Samuel21:22 Bobane aba babeyinzala kaRafa eGati. Babulawa nguDavide namadoda akhe. 
2Samuel22:1 UDavide wabhekisa lo mhobe *kuNdikhoyo mhla wamkhulula kwiintshaba zakhe nasesandleni sikaSawule. 
2Samuel22:2 Wathi: NguNdikhoyo iliwa lam; nguye inqaba yam; nguye umkhuseli wam. 
2Samuel22:3 Xa ndizimele ngoThixo wam ndihlala ndikhuselekile. Nguye ikhaka lam; nguye ondigcina ndifihlakele. Nguye inqaba yam ephakamileyo; nguye isikhundla sam sokuzimela. Mhlanguli wam, nguwe ondisindisayo kumadoda anogonyamelo." 
2Samuel22:4 Ndithi ndakukhala kuNdikhoyo, asuke andithi hlasi kwiintshaba zam. Ngenene, makabongwe uNdikhoyo!" 
2Samuel22:5 Bendintlithwa ngamaza abulalayo, amaza arhaxayo endigubungele." 
2Samuel22:6 Ukufa bekundirhangqile, ingcwaba selivuleke lithe ng'aa." 
2Samuel22:7 Ndazibika kuNdikhoyo ndikuloo ngxingongo; ewe, ndabiza kuThixo wam. Wandiva engqendeve kwibhotwe lakhe, savakala kuye isikhalo sam." 
2Samuel22:8 Suka wagungqa wanyikima umhlaba, isibhakabhaka sangcangcazela, kuba uThixo wayenomsindo." 
2Samuel22:9 Kwathi phoko umsi emathatheni akhe, walephuza amadangatye ngomlomo, kuliqika amalahle avuthayo." 
2Samuel22:10 Wasikrazula isibhakabhaka wehla engqendeve phezu kwelifu elimnyama. 
2Samuel22:11 Wandanda ngenqwelo *yezithunyw' ezimaphiko, itshebeleza ngesantya emoyeni." 
2Samuel22:12 Wayethiwe gqume sisithokothoko, kumnyama thsu; engqingwe ziingqimba zamafu anemvula," 
2Samuel22:13 kutshawuza imibane ngaphambi kwakhe, kunga kuvutha amalahle." 
2Samuel22:14 Wazongoma esibhakabhakeni uNdikhoyo, lavakala ilizwi loPhezukonke." 
2Samuel22:15 Wadubula ngeentolo zakhe, zee qhu saa iintshaba, eziswantsulisa ngokugqekreza kwemibane." 
2Samuel22:16 Watsho zoma qoko iilwandle, kwatsho kwavela nezisekelo zelizwe, akukhalima yena uNdikhoyo, egragramela iintshaba enomsindo." 
2Samuel22:17 Wehla, wandithi hlasi uNdikhoyo, wandihlangula kumanzi enzonzobila." 
2Samuel22:18 Wandihlangula kwiintshaba zam nakwabo bandichasayo, bendivuyelela." 
2Samuel22:19 Bandihlasela ndisengxingweni, wandikhusela yena uNdikhoyo." 
2Samuel22:20 Wandihlangula ndisengozini, wandisindisa kuba ekholisekile ndim." 
2Samuel22:21 Wandivuza uNdikhoyo kuba ndandilungisa; wandithamsanqela kuba ndimsulwa. 
2Samuel22:22 Umthetho kaNdikhoyo ndiyawuthobela; andimfulathelanga uThixo wam. 
2Samuel22:23 Yonke imiyalelo yakhe ndiyigcinile; andayaphula imithetho yakhe. 
2Samuel22:24 Uyandazi ukuba andonanga; ndiyazilumla ekwenzeni ububi. 
2Samuel22:25 Ngoko ke uyandivuza kuba ndisenza okulungileyo; uyandivuza kuba akukho sikhwa kum. 
2Samuel22:26 Uthembekile, Ndikhoyo, kwabo bathembekileyo; ubenzela ububele abo bandlela zithe tse." 
2Samuel22:27 Umsulwa kwabo bamsulwa; uchasene nabo bangamatshijolo. 
2Samuel22:28 Ungumsindisi wabathobekileyo, obabone benekratshi ubathobe." 
2Samuel22:29 Usisibane sokundikhanyisela, wena Ndikhoyo; nguwe ondigxothela ubumnyama." 
2Samuel22:30 Ewe, ngawe ndingawuchitha-chitha nomkhosi, ngamandla akho ndilutsibe nongqameko lwawo." 
2Samuel22:31 Hayi bo, zigqibelele izinto azenzayo lo Thixo! Hayi ukuthembeka kwelizwi lakhe! Uyabakhusela bonke abo bathembela ngaye." 
2Samuel22:32 NguNdikhoyo yedwa uThixo; nguye kuphela osikhuselayo; 
2Samuel22:33 ewe, nguThixo oyinqaba yam; nguye oyenza iphumelele indlela yam." 
2Samuel22:34 Undicondobisa kuhle njengenxala, andichankcathise emaweni ndingatyibiliki." 
2Samuel22:35 Undiqhelisa ukulwa edabini, andifundise ukugoba isaphetha esomeleleyo." 
2Samuel22:36 Ndikhoyo, undinike ikhaka lokuhlanganisa; undibonelele ndatsho ndazimaseka." 
2Samuel22:37 Undimise endaweni ephangaleleyo; azinakutyibilika kuyo iinyawo zam. 
2Samuel22:38 Ndizisukela ndizoyise iintshaba zam; andijiki ndide ndizitshabalalise. 
2Samuel22:39 Ndizithi ntshinte-ntshinte zingavuki tu, ziqungquluze apha phambi kwam." 
2Samuel22:40 Undinika amandla edabini, undoyisele iintshaba zam." 
2Samuel22:41 Ziyandoyika iintshaba zam; abandithiyileyo ndibatshabalalisile. 
2Samuel22:42 Ziba ngafuna uncedo zingancedwa bani; ziba ngazibika kuNdikhoyo angaphenduli. 
2Samuel22:43 Mna ndizicumza zibe njengothuli, ndizinyhashe okodaka endleleni." 
2Samuel22:44 Wena wandihlangula ekuvukelweni ngamawethu, walimisa igunya lam elizweni, ndada ndaphatha nabo bendingabazi." 
2Samuel22:45 Ndikhahlelwa nangabasemzini abantu; bayandithobela bakuwuva umthetho wam. 
2Samuel22:46 Baphuma kwiinqaba zabo begubha, bephelelwe sisibindi xa bebonke." 
2Samuel22:47 Huntshuu! Khul' ud' ukhokhobe, Ndikhoyo! Mawubongwe wena mkhuseli wam, Thixo ongumhlanguli wam!" 
2Samuel22:48 Wena undoyisela iintshaba zam; wena ugoba iintlanga zindikhahlele; 
2Samuel22:49 wena undihlangula kwabandichasayo! Ewe, undoyisele iintshaba zam, wandikhusela kubaphalazi-gazi." 
2Samuel22:50 Ngoko ke ndiya kukubonga phakathi kwezizwe, ndityibele ndivuma umbongo wakho, Ndikhoyo." 
2Samuel22:51 NguThixo omnika uloyiso ukumkani, amenzele izibele umthanjiswa wakhe, uDavide nayo yonke inzala yakhe kude kuse ephakadeni." 
2Samuel23:1 Nanku ke umyolelo kaDavide: Utsho uDavide unyana kaJese, itsho indoda eyaphakanyiselwa phezulu, umthanjiswa kaThixo kaYakobi, iciko leengoma kwaSirayeli." 
2Samuel23:2 UMoya *kaNdikhoyo uthetha ngomlomo wam; ilizwi lakhe lisencakameni yolwimi lwam. 
2Samuel23:3 Uthethile uThixo kaSirayeli; iliwa lokhuselo likaSirayeli libhekise kum lathi: “Lowo kumkani ulawula ngobulungisa, lowo ulawula esoyika uThixo," 
2Samuel23:4 uqaqamba ngokwelanga ngomsobomvu ngentsasa engenamafu, lona liqaqambis' umhlaba emva kwemvula, lintshulise ingca emhlabeni.”" 
2Samuel23:5 UThixo ukuzinzisile ukulawula kwenzala yam, kub' undenzel' umnqophis' ongasoz' ujike, umnqophis' ongayi kwaphulwa, dinga elingagugiyo. Uya kuluphumelelisa usindiso lwam, awufezekise wonke umnqweno wam." 
2Samuel23:6 Kodwa amatshijolo ngamev' alahliweyo; ziinkuni ezingathezwayo ngokuhlaba. 
2Samuel23:7 Wona abanjwa ngesixhobo sentsimbi, okanye atyhalwe ngomphini womkhonto, atshiselwe kuloo ndawo akuyo." 
2Samuel23:8 Ngawo la amagama amagorha omkhosi kaDavide: nguYoshebhe-bhashebhete waseTakemon kuqala, owayeyinkokheli yamagorha amathathu. Walwa namakhulu asibhozo amadoda eyedwa, wawabulala onke ngomkhonto wakhe kwidabi elinye." 
2Samuel23:9 Olandelayo nguElazare unyana kaDodo umAhoyi. Engomnye wamagorha amathathu nje, yena wayekunye noDavide xa bacela umngeni kumaFilistiya awayeze edabini. Abuya umva amaSirayeli," 
2Samuel23:10 kodwa yena wangena kuwo amaFilistiya, wabetha sada isandla sakhe sagogeka yinkantsi, watsho akabi nako ukuliyeka ikrele lakhe. *UNdikhoyo watshatshela edabini loo mini. Igalelo labalandeli bakaElazare kwelo dabi yaba kukuthimba impahla yabawileyo." 
2Samuel23:11 Olandelayo nguShama unyana ka-Age waseHarari. Waqubisana namaFilistiya eLehi ngasentsimini yeentlumayo. Abaleka amaSirayeli," 
2Samuel23:12 wema yena uShama, walwa ekhusela loo ntsimi, afa amaFilistiya, watshatshela uNdikhoyo." 
2Samuel23:13 Kwakha kwathi kanye xa kusondela ixesha lokuvuna, kwasuka isithathu kuloo madoda angamashumi amathathu aziintloko zomkhosi kaDavide, saya kuye kumqolomba waseAdulam, lo gama wona umkhosi wamaFilistiya umise ngakwintili yamaRafa." 
2Samuel23:14 Ngelo xesha uDavide wayesezintabeni kwindawo enqabileyo, kukho ibutho lamaFilistiya eBhetelehem." 
2Samuel23:15 UDavide wanxanwa, waza wathi: “Akwaba bekungakho mntu undiphathela amanzi kwelaa qula lingasesangweni eBhetelehem.”" 
2Samuel23:16 Loo magorha mathathu ke atyhoboza apho kuloo maFilistiya, aya kukha amanzi apho kwelo qula lingasesangweni eBhetelehem, abuya nawo, awanika uDavide. Kambe ke uDavide wala ukuwasela, ndaweni yaloo nto wawachitha, esenza umnikelo ngawo kuNdikhoyo, esithi:" 
2Samuel23:17 “Andinakuze ndiwasele la manzi, Ndikhoyo. Loo nto ingafana nqwa nokusela igazi lala madoda abubeke esichengeni ubomi bawo.” UDavide wala ukuwasela loo manzi. Zazinjalo ke izigigaba zaloo magorha mathathu." 
2Samuel23:18 UAbhishayi, umntakwabo-Jowabhi, onina unguZeruya, yayinguye inkokheli yamashumi amathathu amagorha. Yena ngomkhonto wakhe walwa namadoda angamakhulu amathathu, wawabulala, watsho wabalasela njengaloo magorha mathathu." 
2Samuel23:19 Ewe, waba yimbalasane njengaloo magorha mathathu, waba yinkokheli yelo qela lingamashumi amathathu, noxa engabandakanywanga kuloo magorha mathathu." 
2Samuel23:20 Enye indoda eyayitshatshele ngemisebenzi yobugorha nguBhenaya unyana kaJoyada waseKabhezeli. Yena wabulala iintshatsheli zamaMowabhi ezimbini. Kwakhona ngemini ekwakukhithika ngayo waya kungena emhadini, wabulala khona ingonyama." 
2Samuel23:21 Wabulala nesigantsontso somJiputa ophethe umkhonto. UBhenaya wamgqebha ngebhunguza, hlasi loo mkhonto, wamgwaza kwangawo loo mJiputa." 
2Samuel23:22 Zazinjalo ke izigigaba zikaBhenaya unyana kaJoyada; naye wayedume njengaloo magorha mathathu. 
2Samuel23:23 Wayebalasele phakathi kwaloo magorha angamashumi amathathu, kodwa wayengabandakanywanga kuloo magorha mathathu. UDavide wamenza inkokheli yabalindi bokumkani." 
2Samuel23:24 Kuloo magorha angamashumi amathathu kwakukho aba: YayinguAsayeli umntakwabo-Jowabhi, uEl-hanani unyana kaDodo waseBhetelehem," 
2Samuel23:25 uShama waseHarodi, uElikana waseHarodi," 
2Samuel23:26 uHeleze wasePeleti, kunye noIra unyana kaIkeshe waseTekowa." 
2Samuel23:27 Wayelapho uAbhiyezere waseAnatoti, noMebhunayi waseHusha," 
2Samuel23:28 uZalmon waseAhoyi, kwakunye noMaharayi waseNetofa," 
2Samuel23:29 uHelebhe unyana kaBhana waseNetofa, noItayi unyana kaRibhayi waseGibheya kwaBhenjamin." 
2Samuel23:30 Wayelapho uBhenaya wasePiraton, uHidayi wamaxandeka aseGahashe," 
2Samuel23:31 kunye noAbhiyalebhon waseBhete-arabha, uAzemavete waseBhawurim," 
2Samuel23:32 noEliyabha waseShalebhon. Zazilapho iinto zikaYashene, noJonatan" 
2Samuel23:33 unyana kaShama waseHarari, kunye noAhiyam unyana kaSharare waseHarari," 
2Samuel23:34 uElifelete, unyana ka-Ahasebhayi waseMahaka, uEliyam unyana ka-Ahitofele waseGilo," 
2Samuel23:35 uHezero waseKarmele, uParayi waseArbhi," 
2Samuel23:36 uIgali unyana kaNatan waseZobha, uBhani wakwaGadi," 
2Samuel23:37 uZeleki umAmon, noNaharayi waseBheroti umphathi-zikrweqe zikaJowabhi, unyana kaZeruya." 
2Samuel23:38 Wayelapho uIra waseItri, noGarebhe waseItri," 
2Samuel23:39 kunye noUriya umHeti. Babengamashumi mathathu anesixhenxe xa bebonke. 
2Samuel24:1 Wabuya wavutha umsindo *kaNdikhoyo ngakumaSirayeli, waza waxhokonxa uDavide ukuchasana nawo, esithi: “Yiya uwabale amaSirayeli namaJuda.”" 
2Samuel24:2 UDavide ukumkani uyalele uJowabhi umphathi-mkhosi owayekunye naye, wathi: “Zibale zonke izizwe zakwaSirayeli, ukususela kwaDan kuse eBheshebha, khon' ukuze ndilazi inani labantu.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Ke yena uJowabhi wathi kukumkani: “Ngamana uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho wabandisa kalikhulu abantu, aze amehlo enkosi yam ukumkani ayibone loo nto. Kodwa ke, nkosi yam mhlekazi, ngani ukuba ufune ukwenza into enje?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Kambe ke ilizwi likakumkani laboyisa ooJowabhi nabaphathi-mkhosi, baza ke bahamba bamshiya ukumkani, baya kubala uluntu lwakwaSirayeli." 
2Samuel24:5 Bawuwela umlambo iJordan, baya kuqalisa emazantsi eArohere kwisixeko esasisembindini wentlambo kummandla wakwaGati. Besuka apho baya emantla weYazere," 
2Samuel24:6 bedlulela eGiliyadi nakummandla waseTatim-hodeshe, baya kutsho kwaDan-yahan, benjenjeya ukusa eSidon." 
2Samuel24:7 Besuka apho bajonga emazantsi kwidolophu yaseTire eyayinqatyisiwe, baya badlulela nakuzo zonke iidolophu zamaHivi namaKanana, baya kugqibela ngeBheshebha ekumzantsi welakwaJuda." 
2Samuel24:8 Babuyela eJerusalem emva kweenyanga ezilithoba namashumi amabini eentsuku, sele belityhutyhile lonke elo lizwe." 
2Samuel24:9 UJowabhi ke wamchazela ukumkani inani lamadoda akulungeleyo ukubhaliswa emkhosini. KwaSirayeli yaba ngamakhulu asibhozo amawaka amadoda akwaziyo ukusebenzisa ikrele, kwaza kwaJuda yaba ngamakhulu amahlanu amawaka." 
2Samuel24:10 Kusuke kwathi akuba elwenzile olo balo uDavide wangenwa kukuba nomva-ndedwa. Waza ke wazibika kuNdikhoyo wathi: “Ndenze into embi gqitha ngesi senzo, Ndikhoyo. Ngoko ke ndiyakubongoza, bususe ubutyala bam, mna sicaka sakho. Ndenze into yobutyhakala.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Ekuvukeni kukaDavide ngentsasa elandelayo ilizwi likaNdikhoyo laliselifikile *kumshumayeli uGadi, imboni kaDavide, lisithi:" 
2Samuel24:12 “Hamba uye kuthi kuDavide: ‘Utsho uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ndikubekela izinto ezintathu. Khetha ibe nye kuzo, ndize ke mna ndikwenze loo nto.’ ”" 
2Samuel24:13 UGadi ke waya kuDavide, wafika wamxelela esithi: “Khetha phakathi kweminyaka esixhenxe yendlala ezweni lakho, okanye iinyanga ezintathu ubalekana neentshaba zakho xa zona zikusukela, okanye iintsuku ezintathu kukho isibetho sikabhubhani ezweni lakho. Cingisisa ugqibe, undinike impendulo emandiyise kulowo undithumileyo.”" 
2Samuel24:14 UDavide waphendula wathi kuGadi: “Ndisengxakini enkulu. Kodwa ke kubhetele siwele ezandleni zikaNdikhoyo, kuba inkulu inceba yakhe. Ewe, andikunqweneli ukuwela ezandleni zabantu.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo wathumela isibetho sikabhubhani kwaSirayeli. Saqalisa kwangentsasa yangaloo mini, kwada kwaya kutsho kwelaa xesha wayelimisele. Kwafa amashumi asixhenxe amawaka abantu ukusukela kwaDan kuye kutsho eBheshebha." 
2Samuel24:16 Kwathi xa isithunywa sikaNdikhoyo sasisolula isandla siza kutshabalalisa iJerusalem, uNdikhoyo wazijika iimbono zakhe ngenxa yaloo ntlekele, waza wathi kwisithunywa esasitshabalalisa abantu: “Kwanele! Sirhoxise isandla sakho.” Oku kwenzeke xa kanye isithunywa sasingakwisanda sokubhula sika-Aravena umJebhusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Akusibona uDavide eso sithunywa sasibhubhisa abantu, wathi kuNdikhoyo: “Ndim owonileyo wenza ubugwenxa. Aba bantu bona banjengeegusha; akukho nto bayenzileyo. Isandla sakho masohlwaywe mna kunye nomzi kabawo.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Kwangaloo mini uGadi waya kuDavide, wathi kuye: “Hamba uye kwakhela uNdikhoyo iqonga lamadini esandeni sokubhula sika-Aravena umJebhusi.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Ngoko ke uDavide waya wayenza loo nto ayiyalelwe nguGadi ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo. 
2Samuel24:20 Wathi akukhangela uAravena, wabona ukumkani esiza kuye ehamba namaphakathi akhe. Waphuma uAravena, wakhahlela ejongise ubuso emhlabeni phambi kokumkani." 
2Samuel24:21 Waza uAravena wathi: “Kungani ukuba ukumkani inkosi yam eze kwisicaka sakhe?” Waphendula ukumkani uDavide wathi: “Ndize kuthenga esaa sanda sokubhula sakwakho, ndize ndakhele kuso uNdikhoyo iqonga lamadini, khon' ukuze isibetho sikabhubhani sinqamke ebantwini.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Wathi uAravena kuDavide: “Inkosi yam ukumkani mayithathe konke okukholekileyo kuyo, yenze idini. Naziya iinkabi zeenkomo zokwenza idini elitshiswayo. Naziya nezileyi zokubhula kunye needyokhwe zokwenziwa iinkuni." 
2Samuel24:23 Zonke ezi zinto, mhlekazi, uAravena uzinika ukumkani.” Waza waqhuba uAravena wathi kukumkani: “Ubenga uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho angakwamkela.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Kambe ke ukumkani uphendule uAravena wathi: “Ngunotshe lowo! Ndiza kulihlawula ixabiso lazo. Andingekhe ndinikele kuNdikhoyo amadini atshiswayo ngento endingadlekanga ngayo.” UDavide wasithenga ke eso sanda sokubhula kunye neenkabi zeenkomo ngexabiso elingamashumi amahlanu eesiliva. 
2Samuel24:25 UDavide ke wakhela uNdikhoyo iqonga lamadini apho, waza wenza amadini atshiswayo kunye nawobudlelwana. Wakuva uNdikhoyo ukuthandazelwa kwelizwe, satsho saphela isibetho sikabhubhani kwaSirayeli." 
1Kings1:1 Ngoku ke ukumkani uDavide wayeyindoda eyalupheleyo, iminyaka yakhe seyihambile. Wayekhathazwa kukugodola, kuba wayengafudumali noba selefunjelwe ngeengubo ezininzi." 
1Kings1:2 Ke kaloku amaphakathi akhe athetha naye athi: “Masikukhangelele intombi nto, mhlekazi, ukuze ikulungiselele ikonge, ilale kufuphi nawe, ufudumale, mhlekazi.”" 
1Kings1:3 Behla benyuka ke apho kwaSirayeli, bekhangela loo nzwakazi, bada ke bafumana uAbhishagi umShunemikazi. Bamthatha ke, bamzisa apho kukumkani." 
1Kings1:4 Intombi le ke yayiyinzwakazi ecikizekileyo. Yamonga ke ukumkani, yamlungiselela, kambe ke yena ukumkani zange ayambathe." 
1Kings1:5 Ke kaloku uAdoniya, unyana kakumkani, onina yayinguHagiti, wazigqatsa wathi: “Ndiza kuba ngukumkani.” Wazilungiselela iinqwelo namahashe, kananjalo wandulelwa ngamashumi amahlanu amadoda. (" 
1Kings1:6 Kaloku uyise wayengazanga amngxolise athi kuye: “Uyenzeleni into enje?” Yena wayesalekela uAbhasalom, ibe ke umfo lo eyinzwana.)" 
1Kings1:7 UAdoniya ke wathetha-thethana noJowabhi unyana kaZeruya, kunye noAbhiyatare owayengumbingeleli, baza ke bona bamxhasa." 
1Kings1:8 Ke yena umbingeleli uZadoki, noBhenaya unyana kaJoyada, *nomshumayeli uNatan, noShimeyi, noReyi, kunye noolindikhaya bakaDavide, zange bahambisane noAdoniya." 
1Kings1:9 UAdoniya wathatha iigusha neenkomo namathole atyetyisiweyo wenza idini elityeni likaZohelete ngase-En-rogeli. Wabamema bonke abaninawe bakhe, oonyana bakakumkani, nawo onke amadoda akwaJuda angamaphakathi komkhulu." 
1Kings1:10 Kodwa ke wabashiya abashumayeli uNatan noBhenaya noolindikhaya kunye nomninawa wakhe uSolomon. 
1Kings1:11 UNatan wabuza kuBhashebha unina kaSolomon wathi: “Uvile nje ukuba uAdoniya ozalwa nguHagiti bamenze ukumkani ngaphandle komhlekazi uDavide? 
1Kings1:12 Yiva ke, ndikucebise, ukuze usinde, usindise nobomi bonyana wakho uSolomon." 
1Kings1:13 Yiya kukumkani uDavide, uthi kuye: ‘Mhlekazi, kumkani, kanene wawungafunganga kum wathi: “Ngenene unyana wakho uSolomon woba ngukumkani emva kwam, angene esihlalweni sam”? Ngani ke ngoku kungene uAdoniya abe ngukumkani?’" 
1Kings1:14 Ke kaloku uya kuthi usathetha njalo nokumkani, nam ndingene ndikungqinele kuloo nto uyithethayo.”" 
1Kings1:15 Ngenene ke wangena uBhashebha, waya kuyibona ingwevu leyo ingukumkani, isegumbini layo lokulala, apho yayihleli noAbhishagi umShunemikazi eyilungiselela." 
1Kings1:16 UBhashebha wavova, waguqa phambi kokumkani. Ukumkani wathi: “Kukho nto na uyifunayo?”" 
1Kings1:17 Ke kaloku waphendula wathi: “Mhlekazi, andithi kanene nguwe ngokwakho owafungayo apha kum, mna sicakazana sakho, wabhambathisa *ngoNdikhoyo uThixo wakho usithi: ‘USolomon unyana wakho uya kuba ngukumkani esikhundleni sam, angene esihlalweni sam’?" 
1Kings1:18 Kodwa ke ngoku nanko uAdoniya engukumkani ngaphandle kwakho, mhlekazi kumkani, wena ungazi nto ngaloo nto." 
1Kings1:19 Wenze idini ngentaphane yeenkomo, amathole atyetyisiweyo, neegusha. Futhi ubamemile noonyana bakho, kunye nombingeleli uAbhiyatare nenjengele yomkhosi uJowabhi. Kambe ke akammemanga uSolomon isicaka sakho." 
1Kings1:20 Kambe ke, mhlekazi kumkani, uSirayeli ewonke ujonge kuwe, ulindele ukuva ngawe ukuba ngubani na oza kungena ahlale esikhundleni sakho emva kwakho." 
1Kings1:21 Kungenjalo ke, mhlekazi, uya kuthi nje ukuba ufe ulaliswe nooyihlo, mna nonyana wam uSolomon siphathwe njengabangcatshi.”" 
1Kings1:22 Uthe esathetha nokumkani njalo, wagaleleka umshumayeli uNatan." 
1Kings1:23 Waxelelwa ke ukumkani kwathiwa: “Nanku umshumyeli uNatan.” Wangena ke, waya kukumkani, wafika wakhahlela, waqubuda ngobuso bakhe emhlabeni." 
1Kings1:24 UNatan wathi: “Ngaba nguwe na, mhlekazi kumkani, othe uAdoniya uya kuba ngukumkani emva kwakho, angene esihlalweni sakho?" 
1Kings1:25 Kaloku namhlanje uye kwenza idini ngentaphane yeenkomo, amathole atyetyisiweyo, kunye neegusha. Ubamemile bonke oonyana bakho, iinjengele zomkhosi, nombingeleli uAbhiyatare. Ngoku nâbo besela bemana bedanduluka besithi: ‘Khul' ud' ukhokhobe, kumkani Adoniya!’" 
1Kings1:26 Phofu ke akammemanga umbingeleli uZadoki, nam sicaka sakho, noBhenaya unyana kaJoyada, kunye noSolomon isicaka sakho." 
1Kings1:27 Mhlekazi kumkani, ingaba nguwe lo wenze into enje ungazazisanga izicaka zakho ukuba ngubani na oya kungena ahlale esikhundleni sakho xa ungasekho?”" 
1Kings1:28 Ukumkani uDavide wathi: “Ndibizeleni uBhashebha.” Weza ke, wafika wema phambi kokumkani." 
1Kings1:29 Ke kaloku ukumkani wafunga wathi: “Ekho nje *uNdikhoyo, yena owandihlangulayo kuzo zonke iinkathazo," 
1Kings1:30 inene namhlanje ndiza kuyifezekisa into endakufungela yona ngoNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli, ndisithi: ‘Unyana wakho uSolomon uya kuba ngukumkani emva kwam, angene esihlalweni sam.’ ”" 
1Kings1:31 UBhashebha wavova, ejonge phantsi, waguqa phambi kokumkani, wathi: “Phil' ud' ukhokhobe, mhlekazi kumkani Davide!”" 
1Kings1:32 Ukumkani uDavide wathi: “Ndibizeleni umbingeleli uZadoki, *nomshumayeli uNatan, noBhenaya unyana kaJoyada.” Bafika ke phambi kokumkani," 
1Kings1:33 waza wathi kubo: “Thathani amaphakathi am, unyana wam uSolomon nimkhwelise kwimbongolo yam, niye eGihon," 
1Kings1:34 khona apho ke umbingeleli uZadoki nomshumayeli uNatan bamthambise bammisele abe ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli. Ze nivuthele isigodlo, nidanduluke nithi: ‘Khul' ud' ukhokhobe, kumkani Solomon!’" 
1Kings1:35 Emva koko ke ze nibuye naye, aze kungena ahlale esihlalweni sam, alawule endaweni yam. Ndimtyumbile ukuba abe ngukumkani kwaSirayeli nakwaJuda.”" 
1Kings1:36 Ke yena uBhenaya unyana kaJoyada wamphendula ukumkani wathi: “Makube njalo! Ngamana watsho noNdikhoyo uThixo wenkosi yam ukumkani! 
1Kings1:37 Njengoko uNdikhoyo wayenenkosi yam ukumkani, ngokunjalo makabe naye uSolomon, ulawulo lwakhe lwande ludlule olwenkosi yam ukumkani uDavide.”" 
1Kings1:38 Behla ke, umbingeleli uZadoki, umshumayeli uNatan, uBhenaya unyana kaJoyada, nabalindi abangamaKreti namaPleti, uSolomon bemkhwelise kwimbongolo kakumkani uDavide, baya naye eGihon." 
1Kings1:39 Ke kaloku umbingeleli uZadoki waluthatha uphondo lwamafutha awayelufumene *esibingelelweni, waza ke wathambisa uSolomon ngaloo mafutha. Bakhalisa isigodlo, baza bonke abantu bakhwaza bathi: “Phil' ud' ukhokhobe, kumkani Solomon!”" 
1Kings1:40 Loo nginginya yabantu ke yamlandela, ihamba ikhalisa amaxilongo, igcobe kangangokuba isingqi sabo sawunyikimisa umhlaba." 
1Kings1:41 UAdoniya nâbo wayebamemile bayiva le ntshukumo, xa kanye baliphethayo itheko labo. Akusiva isandi sesigodlo uJowabhi wabuza wathi: “Ngaba yeyantoni le ngxokolo ivakala esixekweni?”" 
1Kings1:42 Esabuza njalo kwathi gqi uJonatan unyana wombingeleli uAbhiyatare. UAdoniya wathi: “Ngena! Umntu ohlonipheke njengawe lo unokuba usiphathele iindaba ezimnandi.” 
1Kings1:43 UJonatan waphendula wathi kuAdoniya: “Hayi bo! Umhlekazi ukumkani uDavide umisele uSolomon wangukumkani. 
1Kings1:44 Ukumkani umkhuphe nombingeleli uZadoki nomshumayeli uNatan, uBhenaya unyana kaJoyada, nabalindi abangamaKreti namaPleti; bamkhwelise kwimbongolo kakumkani." 
1Kings1:45 Ke umbingeleli uZadoki nomshumayeli uNatan bamthambisele eGihon wangukumkani. Basuke apho benemincili; nangoku ke kusathe nkxwe esixekweni. Loo ntswahla uyivayo ngabo. 
1Kings1:46 Ewe, uSolomon selengene esihlalweni phaya ebhotwe." 
1Kings1:47 Namaphakathi akomkhulu nango evuyisana nomhlekazi ukumkani uDavide esithi: ‘Ngamana uThixo angalenza labalasela ngaphezu kwelakho igama likaSolomon, nolawulo lwakhe aluqaqambise ngaphezulu!’ Nokumkani ke suka wathelela enqula esemandlalweni wakhe." 
1Kings1:48 Ewe, usuke wathi: ‘Makabongwe uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli, othe namhlanje wandenzela inyhweba yokuba ndimbone ngawam amehlo lowo uthatha isihlalo esikhundleni sam.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Lakuziva ezi ndaba iqela lika-Adoniya lothuka lachithakala ngoko nangoko. 
1Kings1:50 Ke yena uAdoniya ngokoyika uSolomon wasuka waya kubambelela ngeempondo zeqonga lamadini. 
1Kings1:51 Waxelelwa ke uSolomon kwathiwa: “UAdoniya nanko ebambelele ngeempondo zeqonga lamadini kuba esoyika ukumkani uSolomon. Uthi: ‘Ukumkani uSolomon makafunge namhlanje, athembise ukuba akayi kundifaka ikrele andibulale mna sicaka sakhe.’ ”" 
1Kings1:52 USolomon wathi: “Ukuba ufumaniseke engumfo onyanisekileyo, akayi kuba nawo nowempumlo umkrwelo; kambe ke, ukuba ufumaniseke enobubi, uza kufa.”" 
1Kings1:53 Ukumkani uSolomon wathumela amadoda, amphuthuma apho eqongeni lamadini uAdoniya. Ke uAdoniya weza wafika wakhahlela apho kukumkani uSolomon. Ke uSolomon wathi kuye: “Kulungile, goduka.”" 
1Kings2:1 Lithe lakufika ixesha lokunduluka kukaDavide emhlabeni, wamyalela unyana wakhe uSolomon wathi:" 
1Kings2:2 “Mna sendiza kuwushiya umhlaba. Ngoko ke wena yomelela ngokwendoda," 
1Kings2:3 ungaphazami ukuhamba ngokwesimiso *sikaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. Hamba endleleni yakhe, uyithobele imimiselo nemithetho yakhe, nayo yonke imigaqo nemiqathango ayimisileyo, njengoko yabhalwayo emthethweni kaMosis. Xa usenjenjalo ke, uya kuba nenkqubela kuyo yonke into oyenzayo, uphumelele naphi na apho ukhoyo." 
1Kings2:4 Ke yena uNdikhoyo wosifezekisa isithembiso sakhe kum. Kaloku yena wathi: ‘Ukuba izizukulwana zakho zithe zaziphatha ngendlela efanelekileyo, zanyaniseka, zathembeka kum ngentliziyo yonke nangomphefumlo wonke, ngenene soze ingabikho indoda yendlu yakho kwisihlalo solawulo lwakwaSirayeli.’" 
1Kings2:5 “Ngoku ke, mfo wam, uyayazi into awandenza yona uJowabhi unyana kaZeruya, nditsho into awayenzayo kwiinjengele ezimbini zomkhosi kaSirayeli, uAbhinere unyana kaNere noAmasa unyana kaYetere. Kaloku wababulala, waliphalaza igazi labo ngexesha loxolo, kwanga kusemfazweni, wayidyobha ngalo ibhanti eyayisesinqeni sakhe neembadada ezazisezinyaweni zakhe." 
1Kings2:6 Into omawuyenze kuye wozibonela ngokobulumko bakho, kodwa uze ungamyeki afe ngenxa yokwaluphala, aze aye engcwabeni enoxolo." 
1Kings2:7 “Kodwa ke uze wenze ngezibele koonyana bakaBhazilayi waseGiliyadi. Bona mababe phakathi kwâbo batya kunye nawe esithebeni sakho. Kaloku babengakum ngokuya ndandibaleka umntakwenu uAbhasalom. 
1Kings2:8 Uze ungamlibali uShimeyi unyana kaGera, umBhenjamin waseBhawurim, lowa wandishwabulela endiqalekisa kabuhlungu mhla ndandisiya eMahanayim. Wathi akuhla endihlangabeza eJordan, ndafunga uNdikhoyo ndathi andisayi kumbulala ngekrele." 
1Kings2:9 Kodwa ke ngoku uze ungamthathi njengongenatyala. Kaloku wena ungumfo onobulumko, ngoko ke akuyi kuxakwa yinto onokuyenza kuye. Mse engcwabeni izimvi zakhe zinegazi.”" 
1Kings2:10 Ke kaloku uDavide waya kuphumla kunye nooyise-mkhulu, waza wafihlwa kwisixeko sikaDavide." 
1Kings2:11 KwaSirayeli walawula iminyaka engamashumi amane. Yaba yiminyaka esixhenxe eHebron, yangamashumi mathathu anantathu eJerusalem." 
1Kings2:12 USolomon ke wangena esihlalweni sikayise uDavide, lwaza ulawulo lwakhe lwazinza." 
1Kings2:13 Ke kaloku uAdoniya, unyana kaHagiti, waya kuBhashebha, unina kaSolomon. Ke yena uBhasheba wathi: “Ngaba uza ngoxolo na?” UAdoniya waphendula wathi: “Ewe, ndiza ngoxolo.”" 
1Kings2:14 Waphinda wathi: “Kukho into endifuna ukuyithetha kuwe.” UBhashebha wathi: “Kulungile; thetha.” 
1Kings2:15 Waqhuba uAdoniya wathi: “Njengoko usazi ulawulo yayilolwam, uSirayeli wonke ekhangele kum njengokumkani wakhe. Kodwa izinto zajika, ulawulo lwajika lwawela kumntakwethu uSolomon; nto leyo ke yamiselwa *nguNdikhoyo." 
1Kings2:16 Kambe ke ngoku ndinasicelo sinye endifuna ukusenza kuwe; uze uncede ungasikhabi.” UBhashebha waphendula wathi: “Kulungile; thetha ndive.” 
1Kings2:17 Waqhuba ke wathi: “Khawuncede uthethe nokumkani uSolomon; akanakwala kuwe. Ndifuna andinike uAbhishagi, intombi yomShunemi, abe ngumfazi wam.”" 
1Kings2:18 UBhashebha ke wathi: “Kulungile; ndiya kukuthethela kukumkani.” 
1Kings2:19 UBhashebha ke waya kukumkani uSolomon, esiya kuthethelela uAdoniya. Akumbona ke ukumkani, waphakama wamhlangabeza, wakhahlela, waza ke wachopha esihlalweni sakhe. Wathi makuziwe nesihlalo, ukuze ahlale kuso unina, waza ke wamhlalisa ngasekunene kwakhe." 
1Kings2:20 UBhashebha ke wathi: “Ndinesicelo esinye endifuna ukusenza kuwe; uze ungalanduli.” Ukumkani waphendula wathi: “Thetha, mama; andiyi kulandula.”" 
1Kings2:21 Waqhuba ke wathi: “Kunganjani xa uAbhishagi umShunemikazi enikelwa kumntakwenu uAdoniya abe ngumkakhe?” 
1Kings2:22 Ukumkani uSolomon uphendule unina wathi: “Ngani ukuba uAbhishagi umShunemikazi umfunele uAdoniya? Kungcono umcelele obu bukumkani buphela – andithi kaloku yena ngumkhuluwa – abe yena exhaswa ngumbingeleli uAbhiyatare noJowabhi unyana kaZeruya!” 
1Kings2:23 Ukumkani uSolomon wafunga uNdikhoyo wathi: “Makandohlwaye uThixo nokuba kuqatha kangakanani na, ukuba uAdoniya akafanga ngenxa yeli lizwi." 
1Kings2:24 Ewe, ekho nje uNdikhoyo, lo undimiseleyo ndazinza kwisihlalo sikabawo uDavide, yena lo undenzele umlibo ngokwesithembiso sakhe, inene namhlanje uza kufa uAdoniya!”" 
1Kings2:25 Ke ukumkani uSolomon wayalela uBhenaya unyana kaJoyada, waza wamgwaza uAdoniya, wafa." 
1Kings2:26 Ukumkani ke wathi kumbingeleli uAbhiyatare: “Wena ke phindela emasimini akho eAnatoti. Ufanelwe kukufa, kambe ke andiyi kukubulala kwangoku, kuba yayithwalwa nguwe ityesi yomnqophiso *kaNdikhoyo uThixo ngexesha likabawo uDavide, futhi wawuzithwele kunye nobawo iimbandezelo zakhe.”" 
1Kings2:27 Ngoko ke uSolomon wamkhiqa uAbhiyatare kububingeleli, ezalisekisa ilizwi awalithethayo uNdikhoyo eShilo malunga nendlu kaEli." 
1Kings2:28 Akuziva ezi ndaba uJowabhi – kaloku naye wayekho kwiyelenqe lika-Adoniya, nangona wayengekho kwelika-Abhasalom – suka ke yena wabalekela *esibingelelweni sikaNdikhoyo, waya kubambelela ngeempondo zeqonga lamadini." 
1Kings2:29 Waxelelwa ke uSolomon ukuba nanko uJowabhi ebaleke waya kubambelela ngeempondo zeqonga lamadini esibingelelweni sikaNdikhoyo. Wasuka wathuma uBhenaya unyana kaJoyada esithi: “Yiya umgwaze!” 
1Kings2:30 UBhenaya ke waya esibingelelweni sikaNdikhoyo, wafika wathi kuJowabhi: “Ukumkani uthi: ‘Phuma apha!’ ” Kambe ke yena waphendula wathi: “Andiphumi; ndiya kufela apha.” UBhenaya ke waya kubika olo daba kukumkani, wathi: “UJowabhi uthetha ngolu hlobo; ewe, wenjenje ukuphendula.”" 
1Kings2:31 Ukumkani ke wathi kuBhenaya: “Yiya kuye, wenze njengokuthetha kwakhe. Mosele umngcwabe, ukuze mna nendlu kabawo sahlukane nobutyala ngegazi awaliphalazayo." 
1Kings2:32 Kaloku yena wahlasela amadoda amabini wawabulala engadibananga nobawo uDavide. Omabini loo madoda, uAbhinere unyana kaNere, injengele yomkhosi wakwaSirayeli, kunye noAmasa unyana kaYetere, injengele yomkhosi wakwaJuda, ewe, omabini la madoda ayengcono enyanisekile kunaye." 
1Kings2:33 Igazi labo malihlale phezu koJowabhi nezizukulwana zakhe naphakade, kambe ke kuDavide nezizukulwana zakhe, indlu yakhe nobukhosi bakhe, makuphumle uxolo lukaNdikhoyo ngonaphakade.”" 
1Kings2:34 Ngenene ke uBhenaya unyana kaJoyada waya wafika wamosela uJowabhi, waza ke wangcwatyelwa kumhlaba wakhe entlango." 
1Kings2:35 Ke ukumkani wamisela uBhenaya unyana kaJoyada wayinjengele yomkhosi esikhundleni sikaJowabhi, waza endaweni ka-Abhiyatare wafaka umbingeleli uZadoki." 
1Kings2:36 Waza ke ukumkani wathumela kuShimeyi wathi: “Zakhele indlu eJerusalem, uhlale kuyo, ungaze uphume khona uye naphi na." 
1Kings2:37 Mhla waphuma wayiwela le ntili yeKedron, uze wazi ukuba ufile, kambe ke igazi lakho loba phezu kwentloko yakho.”" 
1Kings2:38 UShimeyi uphendule ngelithi kukumkani: “Uthethe kakuhle, mhlekazi. Isicaka sakho siya kuyenza loo nto uyithethileyo, nkosi yam kumkani.” Ngenene ke uShimeyi wahlala eJerusalem ithuba elide." 
1Kings2:39 Ke kaloku emva kweminyaka emithathu amakhoboka amabini kaShimeyi abalekela kuAkishe unyana kaMahaka ukumkani waseGati, waza ke uShimeyi waxelelwa kwathiwa: “Uyabona, amakhoboka akho aseGati.”" 
1Kings2:40 Akuyiva ke le nto, wabopha idonki yakhe, waya kuAkishe eGati, efuna loo makhoboka. Ke uShimeyi wawafumana apho eGati amakhoboka lawo, wabuya nawo." 
1Kings2:41 Waxelelwa ke uSolomon ukuba uShimeyi uphume eJerusalem waya eGati, waza waphinda wabuya." 
1Kings2:42 Ukumkani ke wambiza uShimeyi, wathi kuye: “Kanene ndandingakufungisanga uNdikhoyo na ndikulumkisa ndisithi: ‘Mhla waphuma usiya naphi na ngaphandle, uze wazi ukuba ufile’? Ndathi ndakutsho kuwe wena waphendula usithi: ‘Uthethe kakuhle mhlekazi; ndiya kukuthobela.’" 
1Kings2:43 Ngani ke ngoku ukuba ungasifezekisi isibhambathiso sakho kuNdikhoyo, uwuthobele nomyalelo wam?”" 
1Kings2:44 Waqhuba ukumkani wathi kuShimeyi: “Uyazazi kakuhle entliziyweni yakho zonke izinto ezimbi owazenzayo kubawo uDavide. Ngoku uNdikhoyo uza kukubuyekeza ngobugwenxa bakho. 
1Kings2:45 Kambe ke yena ukumkani uSolomon uya kuthamsanqeleka, nesihlalo sikaDavide sohlala siluqilima phambi koNdikhoyo kude kube ngunaphakade.”" 
1Kings2:46 Ke ukumkani wayalela uBhenaya unyana kaJoyada, waza ke wamgwaza uShimeyi, wafa. Kwesi sithuba ke ulawulo lwaluseluzinzile luluqilima esandleni sikaSolomon." 
1Kings3:1 Ke kaloku uSolomon walamana nokumkani waseJiputa ngokuthatha intombi yakhe. Ke yona yeza kuhlala naye kwisixeko sikaDavide lada lagqitywa ukwakhiwa ibhotwe lakhe, ngokunjalo nendlu *kaNdikhoyo kunye nodonga olujikeleze iJerusalem." 
1Kings3:2 Kambe ke bona abantu amadini babesawenzela ezindulini, kuba belingekakhelwa indlu igama likaNdikhoyo ngelo xesha." 
1Kings3:3 USolomon ke wabonakalisa ukumthanda uNdikhoyo, kuba wayehamba ngokwemimiselo kayise uDavide, ngaphandle nje kwento yokuba wayesenza amadini neziqhumiso ezindulini." 
1Kings3:4 Ukumkani waya eGibheyon, esiya kwenza amadini, kuba leyo yayiyeyona nduli ibalulekileyo, waza ke uSolomon wenza iwaka lamadini atshiswayo apho eqongeni." 
1Kings3:5 Ke kaloku apho eGibheyon uNdikhoyo wabonakala kuSolomon ephupheni ebusuku, wathetha wenjenje: “Cela nantoni na ofuna ndikuphe yona.”" 
1Kings3:6 USolomon waphendula wathi: “Wena wasenzela ububele obukhulu isicaka sakho ubawo uDavide, ngenxa yokuba wayethembekile kuwe elilungisa, umfo ontliziyo ithe tse. Ezo zibele zakho ke uziqhubele phambili kwada kwanamhlanje, kuba umnike unyana ukuze achophe esihlalweni sakhe." 
1Kings3:7 Ngoko ke ngoku, Ndikhoyo Thixo wam, isicaka sakho esi usenze ukumkani, wandibeka endaweni kabawo uDavide. Kambe ke bendingubani na, ndiyimveku engazi nto nje! Ewe, andazi nendlela endingawuqhuba ngayo lo msebenzi wam." 
1Kings3:8 Ewe, isicaka sakho esi siphakathi kwabantu obanyulileyo, ihlokondiba labantu abayinyambalala engenakubalwa." 
1Kings3:9 Ngoko ke mna sicaka sakho ndiphe intliziyo enobulumko, ukuze ndikwazi ukubalawula abantu bakho, ndiwazi umahluko phakathi kokulungileyo nokubi. Kaloku akakho umntu onganako ukuyilawula le ndimbane yaba bantu bakho.”" 
1Kings3:10 Ke kaloku iNkosi yakholiswa sesi sicelo sikaSolomon. 
1Kings3:11 Ngoko ke uThixo wathi kuye: “Ngenxa yokuba ucele ngolu hlobo, awazicelela ubomi obude okanye ubutyebi, awucelanga nokuba kubulawe iintshaba zakho, koko ucele ubuchule bokuthetha amatyala ngobulungisa," 
1Kings3:12 ke mna ke ndiza kukunika ngokwesicelo sakho. Ewe, ndiza kukupha intliziyo enobulumko nengqiqo ukuze ube yimbalasane kubo bonke abantu, kungaze kubekho mntu ufana nawe kwabaphile ngaphambi kwakho nabaya kulandela emva kwakho." 
1Kings3:13 Ngaphezulu ke ndiza kukunika nezo zinto ungazicelanga – ubutyebi nesihomo – ukuze ebomini bakho bonke ungabi nantanga kubo bonke ookumkani. 
1Kings3:14 Ukuba ke uthe wahamba ngeendlela zam, wayithobela imimiselo nemithetho yam njengoDavide uyihlo, ndokuthi jize ngobomi obude.”" 
1Kings3:15 Ke kaloku uSolomon wavuka, waqonda ukuba kuthe kanti liphupha. Wabuyela eJerusalem, wema phambi kwetyesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, waza wenza amadini atshiswayo ngokunjalo nawobudlelwane. Kamva ke wazenzela umbhiyozo zonke izinxiba-mxhaka zakhe." 
1Kings3:16 Ke kaloku abafazi ababini abangamahenyukazi beza kuma phambi kokumkani," 
1Kings3:17 omnye wabo wathi: “Mhlekazi, mna nalo mfazi sihlala ndlwini-nye. Ngoku ke mna ndiye ndabeleka ndafumana umntwana, ngoko silala sobabini." 
1Kings3:18 Ngosuku lwesithathu ndibelekile nalo mfazi ubeleke owakhe umntwana. Ke kaloku ke besisobabini apho endlwini, kungekho mntu wumbi." 
1Kings3:19 Ngabusuku buthile lo mfazi wamfuthanisela wafa unyana wakhe. 
1Kings3:20 Kwakuba njalo ke uvukile wachwechwa ezinzulwini zobusuku, weza kûba unyana wam ecaleni lam, mna ke sicakazana sakho ndilele thwii. Suka ke wathatha lo nyana wakhe ungasekhoyo wambeka esifubeni sam, lo wam wamncancisa kuye." 
1Kings3:21 Ndithe ke ndakuvuka ngentsasa elandelayo, ndizama ukuncancisa usana lwam, lwaye lungasekho! Kuthe ke kwakukhanya ndamqwalasela, ndafumanisa ukuba lo asinguye unyana wam endimzeleyo.”" 
1Kings3:22 Omnye lo ke umfazi wathi: “Hayi bo! Lo mntwana uphilayo ngowam; owakho ngulo ufileyo.” Lo wokuqala ke umfazi wathi: “Unotshe! Owakho ngulo ufileyo; ngowam lo uphilayo!” Yaba yiloo mpikiswano ke apho phambi kokumkani. 
1Kings3:23 Ukumkani ke wathi: “Oo! Lo uthi: ‘Ngunyana wam lo uphilayo, ngunyana wakho lo ufileyo;’ abe omnye esithi: ‘Hayi khona, ngunyana wakho lo ufileyo, owam ngulo uphilayo!’ ”" 
1Kings3:24 Suka ke ukumkani wathi: “Ndiziseleni ikrele.” Walinikwa ke ukumkani ikrele elo. 
1Kings3:25 Wayalela wathi: “Mahluleni kubini lo mntwana uphilayo, icala nilinike omnye waba bafazi, omnye ke nimnike icala.”" 
1Kings3:26 Ke kaloku lo mfazi yayingowakhe umntwana ophilayo wasikwa yinimba, wathi kukumkani: “Ndincede, mhlekazi, musa ukumbulala! Ndaweni yaloo nto mnike lo mfazi lo mntwana uphilayo!” Ke yena omnye lo umfazi wathi: “Ewe, kungcono singamfumani sobabini; mahlule kubini!”" 
1Kings3:27 Waza ke ukumkani wawisa isigwebo wathi: “Sukuba sambulala umntwana, koko mnike lo mfazi wokuqala, kuba ngenene ngowakhe.”" 
1Kings3:28 Athe ke amaSirayeli akusiva eso sigwebo sikakumkani, atsho amhlonela, kuba eqonda ukuba kuthe kanti uThixo ukumkani umphe ubulumko bokuthetha amatyala ngobulungisa." 
1Kings4:1 Ke kaloku uSolomon wayelawula uSirayeli ewonke jikelele. 
1Kings4:2 Nazi izinxiba-mxhaka zakhe: UAzariya unyana kaZadoki – umbingeleli; 
1Kings4:3 uElihorefe noAhiya oonyana bakaShisha – oonobhala; uJoshafati unyana ka-Ahiludi – usiba-khulu; 
1Kings4:4 uBhenaya unyana kaJoyada – injengele; uZadoki noAbhiyatare – ababingeleli; 
1Kings4:5 uAzariya unyana kaNatan – umaqhuzu kubalawuli bezithili; uZabhude unyana kaNatan – umbingeleli nomcebisi kakumkani; 
1Kings4:6 uAhisha – umaqhuzu wasebhotwe; uAdoniram unyana ka-Abheda – induna-nkulu yabasebenzi abasebenza ngokunyanzelwa. 
1Kings4:7 USolomon ke wayenabalawuli-zithili abalishumi elinambini apho kuSirayeli ephela. Bona ke babexhasa ukumkani nekomkhulu ngokudla. Kunyaka ngamnye isithili sasithatha inyanga yonke sixhasa. 
1Kings4:8 Nanga amagama abo: Kumhlaba weenduli zakwaEfrayim yayinguBhen-yuri; 
1Kings4:9 eMakaze, eShalabhim, eBhete-shemeshe, nase-Elon-bhete-hanan yayinguBhen-dekere;" 
1Kings4:10 eArubhati (iSoko nayo yonke imimandla yaseHefere) yayinguBhen-rhesedi; 
1Kings4:11 eNafoti-dore yayinguBhen-abhinadabhi, umyeni kaTafati intombi kaSolomon;" 
1Kings4:12 eTanaki, naseMegido, neBhete-shan xa iyonke malunga neZaretan ngezantsi kweYizereli, ukusuka eBhete-shan ukuya eAbhele-mehola ngaphesheya kweYokemeyam, yayinguBhanaya unyana ka-Ahiludi;" 
1Kings4:13 eRamoti yaseGiliyadi (leyo yimimandla kaJayire unyana kaManase eGiliyadi ngokunjalo nezithili zaseAgobhi eBhashan nezo zixeko zayo zimashumi mathandathu zikhulu kunene zibiyelweyo, ezinamasango nemivalo yobhedu) yayinguBhen-gebhere;" 
1Kings4:14 eMahanayim yayinguAhinadabhi unyana kaIdo; 
1Kings4:15 kwaNafetali yayinguAhimazi umyeni kaBhasemati intombi kaSolomon; 
1Kings4:16 kwa-Ashere naseAloti yayinguBhayana unyana kaHushayi; 
1Kings4:17 kwaIsakare yayinguJoshafati unyana kaParuwa; 
1Kings4:18 kwaBhenjamin yayinguShimeyi unyana kaEla; 
1Kings4:19 eGiliyadi (kuloo mhlaba kaSihon ukumkani wama-Amori, kunye nomhlaba kaOgi ukumkani waseBhashan) yayinguGebhere unyana kaUri; yena wayeyedwa kweso sithili." 
1Kings4:20 Ke kaloku abantu bakwaJuda nabakwaSirayeli babebaninzi njengentlabathi eselunxwemeni lolwandle; babonwabile besitya besela. 
1Kings4:21 Ke yena uSolomon wazilawula zonke izikumkani ukusukela kumlambo iEfrati ukuya kuthi xhaxhe ngelamaFilistiya, aye kuthi xhaxhe kumda waseJiputa. Xa zizonke ke ezo zizwe zaziphantsi koSolomon, zinikela imirhumo kuye bonke ubomi bakhe." 
1Kings4:22 Isixhaso sakwaSolomon semini nganye yayingamawaka amahlanu eelitha zeflawa ecolekileyo, neshumi lamawaka eelitha zomgubo wengqolwa;" 
1Kings4:23 ishumi leenkabi zeenkomo ezityetyisiweyo, namashumi amabini eenkomo ezondliwa emadlelweni; ikhulu leegusha, ngaphandle kwamanxala namabhadi namanqa neenkuku zodidi." 
1Kings4:24 Kaloku uSolomon wayelawula zonke izikumkani ezikwintshona yomlambo iEfrati, ukusuka eTisa ukuya eGaza, kuyinzolo macal' onke." 
1Kings4:25 Ngexesha likaSolomon uJuda noSirayeli xa ewonke, ukusuka kwaDan kuye kuthi xhaxhe ngeBheshebha, wayehleli ekhuselekile, umntu ngamnye enesidiliya namakhiwane." 
1Kings4:26 USolomon wayenamawaka amane emikhumbi yamahashe eenqwelo kunye neshumi elinambini lamawaka amahashe. 
1Kings4:27 Abalawuli bezithili yayingulowo nalowo enenyanga yakhe, bexhasa ukumkani uSolomon ngokudla okwakutyiwa ngabo bonke abalapho kwisithebe sakomkhulu. Babexhasa kungabikho nto ilambathayo." 
1Kings4:28 Kananjalo babezisa isixhaso samahashe eenqwelo nesamanye, basibeke endaweni yaso; leyo ke yayiyihabile kunye nengca." 
1Kings4:29 UThixo wanika uSolomon ubulumko nengqondo egqithisileyo, nolwazi oluphangaleleyo olungenakulinganiswa oku kwentlabathi yaselunxwemeni." 
1Kings4:30 Ubulumko bukaSolomon babugabadele kunobulumko babo bonke abantu basempuma, kananjalo buthe kratya kubulumko bonke bamaJiputa." 
1Kings4:31 Ngobulumko wayebagqwesa bonke abantu, kananjalo noEtan umEzra – ethe kratya kunoHeman, uKalkoli, noDarda oonyana bakaMaholi. Udumo lwakhe ngobulumko lwanwenwela kuzo zonke izizwe ezijikelezileyo." 
1Kings4:31 Ngobulumko wayebagqwesa bonke abantu, kananjalo noEtan umEzra – ethe kratya kunoHeman, uKalkoli, noDarda oonyana bakaMaholi. Udumo lwakhe ngobulumko lwanwenwela kuzo zonke izizwe ezijikelezileyo." 
1Kings4:32 Wenza izafobe ezingamawaka amathathu; waqamba iingoma eziliwaka elinesihlanu. 
1Kings4:33 Imithi nezityalo wayichaza, esusela kumsedare waseLebhanon, waya kuthi xhaxhe ngehisophu enaba ezindongeni. Wafundisa nangezilwanyana, iintaka, nezilo ezirhubuluzayo, kwaneentlanzi." 
1Kings4:34 Ewe, kuSolomon kwakusiza abantu beentlanga zonke, bethunyelwa zizikumkani zehlabathi liphela, ukuze baziphulaphulele ubulumko bakhe obabungundaba-mlonyeni." 
1Kings5:1 Ke kaloku ukumkani uHiram waseTire akuva ukuba uSolomon uthanjisiwe wangena esikhundleni sikaDavide, wathumela oonozaku-zaku bakhe kuSolomon, kuba kaloku kwakusoloko kukho unxibelelwano lobuhlobo phakathi kwakhe noDavide." 
1Kings5:2 Nanku ke umyalezo owathunyelwa nguSolomon kuHiram: 
1Kings5:3 “Kaloku nawe uyazi ukuba ngenxa yeemfazwe awazilwa zivela ngenxa zonke ubawo uDavide akazange abe nako ukwakhela igama *likaNdikhoyo uThixo wakhe indlu, de abe uNdikhoyo uzibeke phantsi kweenyawo zakhe zonke iintshaba zakhe." 
1Kings5:4 Kambe ke ngoku mna uNdikhoyo uThixo wam undithe jize ngenzolo macal' onke; andinazintshaba nazithwakumbe. 
1Kings5:5 Ngoko ke ndizimisele ukulakhela indlu igama likaNdikhoyo uThixo wam, njengoko uNdikhoyo watshoyo kubawo uDavide. Kaloku wathi: ‘Ngunyana wakho, endiya kumngenisa esihlalweni sakho, oya kulakhela indlu igama lam.’" 
1Kings5:6 Ngoko ke wena nceda uyalele ndigawulelwe imisedare eLebhanon. Amadoda am aya kusebenzisana nawakho kulo msebenzi, ndize ke mna amadoda akho ndiwahlawule loo mvuzo uwumisileyo. Kaloku nawe uyazi ukuba abam abasebenzi abanabo ubuchule obunjengobo bamaSidon ekugawuleni imithi.”" 
1Kings5:7 Akulufumana ke olu daba uHiram wavuya kakhulu, wathi: “Namhlanje makabongwe uNdikhoyo, kuba kaloku uDavide umnike isilumko sonyana ukuze asilawule esi sizwe sikhulu kangaka.”" 
1Kings5:8 Ke uHiram wathumela kuSolomon esithi: “Umyalezo wakho ndiwufumene, ndaye ke ndiza kwenza njengokuthetha kwakho, ndikugawulele imisedare nemipayini." 
1Kings5:9 Amadoda am aya kuyithoba eLebhanon, ayise elwandle, aze ke ayenze iinyanda, ayidadise, ayise kuloo ndawo ufuna ibe kuyo. Aya kuyikhulula ke, uze wena uyithathe umke nayo. Nto oya kuyenza ke wena kukuxhasa ikomkhulu eli ngokutya.”" 
1Kings5:10 Ngale ndlela ke uHiram waxhasa uSolomon ngayo yonke imisedare nezibonda zompayini awayezifuna. 
1Kings5:11 Ke yena uSolomon waxhasa uHiram ngokutya minyaka le: amashumi amabini eetoni zengqolowa, nesine samakhulu amawaka eelitha zamafutha omnquma acwengileyo." 
1Kings5:12 Ngokwesithembiso sakhe ke uNdikhoyo uSolomon wamthi jize ngobulumko. Kwabakho uxolo phakathi koHiram noSolomon, baza ke benza umnqophiso." 
1Kings5:13 Ukumkani uSolomon wavelisa umsebenzi wonyanzelo kuSirayeli ephela, waza ke wagaya amadoda angamashumi amathathu amawaka." 
1Kings5:14 Wawafaka abolekisana ukuya eLebhanon, ngenyanga nganye kuye ishumi lamawaka. Ngoko ke ayeba semsebenzini inyanga yonke, aze ahlale zibe mbini ekhaya. Ingqwayi-ngqwayi yabo basebenzi ke yayinguAdoniram." 
1Kings5:15 USolomon wayenamashumi asixhenxe amawaka amadoda okuthwala imithwalo, enamashumi asibhozo amawaka abaqingqi bamatye phaya ezintabeni." 
1Kings5:16 Kanti ke wayenamashumi amathathu anantathu amakhulu eenduna ezazivelele loo msebenzi, ziphethe abasebenzi." 
1Kings5:17 Ukumkani wabayalela ukuba bembe amatye omeleleyo, bawaqingqe, ukuze ngawo kwenziwe isiseko sendlu kaThixo." 
1Kings5:18 Iingcibi zikaSolomon noHiram namadoda aseGebhali zawalungisa zawaqingqa amatye nemithi yokwakha indlu kaThixo. 
1Kings6:1 Ke kaloku ngonyaka wamakhulu amane namashumi asibhozo ephumile amaSirayeli eJiputa, xa kanye uSolomon wayekunyaka wesine elawula amaSirayeli, ngenyanga yesibini uZivi, waqalisa ukuyakha indlu *kaNdikhoyo." 
1Kings6:2 Le ndlu kaNdikhoyo wayakhayo ke uSolomon ngaphakathi ubude bayo babuziimitha ezingamashumi amabini anesixhenxe; zazilithoba ububanzi, ukuphakama zilishumi elinesithathu nesiqingatha." 
1Kings6:3 Igumbi lesango laliziimitha ezine ezinesiqingatha ubude, ububanzi iziimitha ezilithoba, ububanzi bulingana nobendlu ngokwayo." 
1Kings6:4 Le ndlu ke wayenzela iifestile ezinamanqwanqwa asondeleneyo. 
1Kings6:5 Ngaphandle phaya wakha umgangatho owayame eludongeni, ujikeleza igumbi eliphambili neliphakathi, waza wakha neminye imigangatho phezu kwawo." 
1Kings6:6 Kumgangatho ophantsi igumbi laliziimitha ezimbini ezinesiqingatha ububanzi; elomgangatho ophakathi laliziimitha ezintathu ububanzi; ke lona elokugqibela liziimitha ezintathu ezinesiqingatha ububanzi. Kumgangatho ngamnye udonga lwale ndlu lwalunciphile kunalo mgangatho ungaphantsi. Ngaloo ndlela ke amagumbi la ayexhathise ngodonga, imiqadi yawo inganxibelelananga neendonga ezi." 
1Kings6:7 Xa yakhiwayo ke le ndlu amatye ayo ayeqingqelwa kulaa ndawo athathwa kuyo. Ngaloo ndlela ke kwakungasetyenziswa sando nasixozi okanye nasiphi na esinye isixhobo esingxolayo sentsimbi apho kweso siza kwakusakhiwa kuso. 
1Kings6:8 Isango lomgangatho wangaphantsi lalikwicala langasezantsi kule ndlu; kanti ke ukuphuma apho yayingumchankcatho okhokelela kumgangatho wesibini, uphuma khona uye kowesithathu." 
1Kings6:9 Ke uSolomon wayakha indlu leyo wayigqiba, waza wayixhoma ngemiqadi namaplanga omsedare." 
1Kings6:10 Umgangatho owayame eludongeni wawuziimitha ezimbini ezinesiqingatha ukuphakama unxityelelaniswe nendlu ngemiqadi yomsedare. 
1Kings6:11 Ke kaloku lafika ilizwi likaNdikhoyo kuSolomon lisithi: 
1Kings6:12 “Ngokusingisele kule ndlu uyakhayo, ukuba uthe wahamba ngemimiselo yam, wawenza amasiko am, wayigcina yonke imithetho yam wahamba ngayo, ndosifezekisa ngawe isithembiso endasenza kuyihlo uDavide." 
1Kings6:13 Ndiya kuhlala phakathi kwamaSirayeli, ndaye ke andisoze ndibashiye abantu bam amaSirayeli.”" 
1Kings6:14 Ke uSolomon wayakha wayigqiba indlu kaThixo. 
1Kings6:15 Ngaphakathi iindonga zale ndlu wazambathisa ngamaplanga omsedare ukusuka phantsi emgangathweni kuye kuthi xhaxhe ngesilingi, waza phantsi phaya wandlala amaplanga ompayini." 
1Kings6:16 Entla phaya apha endlwini wenza igumbi eliphakathi ekuthiwa yingcwele kangcwele. Laliziimitha ezilithoba ubude, lakhiwe ngamaplanga omsedare asuka emgangathweni athi xhaxhe ngesilingi phezulu." 
1Kings6:17 Igumbi eliphambi kweli ke laliziimitha ezilishumi elinesibhozo ubude. 
1Kings6:18 Uwonke umphakathi wendlu le yayingumsedare ukroliwe wahonjiswa ngethangazana neentyatyambo. Yayingumsedare nje ngaphakathi, ungekhe ulibone ilitye lodonga." 
1Kings6:19 Ke kaloku igumbi eliyingcwele eliya lingaphakathi kule ndlu walilungiselela ukuze kulo kuhlale ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo. 
1Kings6:20 Eli gumbi liphakathi ke lona laliziimitha ezilithoba ubude, ububanzi, nokuphakama. Umphakathi walo ke wawutyatyekwe ngegolide ecwengileyo; ukanti lona iqonga lalambathiswe ngomsedare." 
1Kings6:21 Umphakathi wale ndlu uSolomon wawutyabeka ngegolide ecwengileyo, waza watsala amatyathanga egolide anqumleza phambi kwelaa gumbi liphakathi, nalo ke elalityatyekwe ngegolide." 
1Kings6:22 Umphakathi wonke wawutyatyekwe kwangegolide; kananjalo neqonga elikwigumbi eliyingcwele likwatyatyekwe ngegolide. 
1Kings6:23 Phaya kwigumbi eliyingcwele wenza *izithunywa ezimaphiko zazibini, ezenza ngomthi womnquma. Ukuphakama kwaso ngasinye kwakuziimitha ezine ezineesentimitha ezimashumi mane." 
1Kings6:24 Zozibini ezi zithunywa zazilingana zifana, ngasinye ke sinamaphiko amabini, phiko elo laliziimitha ezimbini ezineesentimitha ezimashumi mabini ubude. Ngoko ke umgama wokusuka kwincam yephiko ukuya kwincam yelinye wawuziimitha ezine ezineesentimitha ezimashumi mane." 
1Kings6:25  
1Kings6:26 Ukuphakama kwesithunywa ngasinye bekuziimitha ezintlanu. 
1Kings6:27 Zozibini ke ezi zithunywa zazimi zilungelelene apho kwigumbi eliphakathi. Amabini kuloo maphiko azo athe naa ayerhecana esazulwini segumbi elo, aze amanye la mabini arhece iindonga." 
1Kings6:28 Zozibini ke ezi zithunywa wazityabeka ngegolide. 
1Kings6:29 Iindonga zegumbi elikhulu nezegumbi eliphakathi zazihonjiswe ngemifanekiso ekroliweyo yezithunywa ezimaphiko, amasundu, kwaneentyatyambo." 
1Kings6:30 Umgangatho wala magumbi wawambathisa ngegolide. 
1Kings6:31 Emnyango wegumbi eliyingcwele kwakukho ungcango-mbini owenziwe ngamaplanga omnquma, umgubasi wona wenziwe wangunxa-ntlanu." 
1Kings6:32 Iingcango zazihonjiswe ngemifanekiso ekroliweyo yezithunywa ezimaphiko, namasundu neentyatyambo. Iingcango nemihombiso yazo zazambathiswe ngegolide egudisiweyo." 
1Kings6:33 Umgubasi womnyango wegumbi elikhulu wawakhiwe buxande, wenziwe ngomthi womnquma." 
1Kings6:34 Kananjalo wenzelwa iingcango ezimbini zompayini ezisongwayo ngehinjisi. 
1Kings6:35 Zazihonjiswe ngemifanekiso ekroliweyo yezithunywa ezimaphiko neyamasundu neentyatyambo, yaza yonke loo nto yambathiswa ngegolide egudisiweyo." 
1Kings6:36 Inkundla yangaphakathi wayakha yazizintlu ezintathu zamatye aqingqiweyo alandelwa luluhlu lwamaplanga omsedare ochweliweyo. 
1Kings6:37 Ke sona isiseko sale ndlu kaNdikhoyo sabekwa ngenyanga uZivi kunyaka wesine wolawulo lukakumkani uSolomon. 
1Kings6:38 Ke kaloku kwathi ngonyaka wakhe weshumi elinanye, kwinyanga yesibhozo uBhuli, yagqitywa ukwakhiwa indlu kaThixo – ncincililii! Ewe, yakhiwa ngokwezicwangciso ezazimisiwe. Loo msebenzi wokuyakha ke wathatha iminyaka esixhenxe." 
1Kings7:1 Kambe ke uSolomon wathatha iminyaka elishumi elinesithathu xa wayesakha ibhotwe lakhe. 
1Kings7:2 Ibhotwe lalibizwa ngokuba lihlathi laseLebhanon. Laliziimitha ezingamashumi amane anesine ubude balo, liziimitha ezingamashumi amabini anambini ububanzi, ukuphakama kuziimitha ezilishumi elinesithathu elinesiqingatha. Lalinezintlu ezine zeentsika zomsedare, zintsika ezo ezazixhasa imiqadi yomsedare." 
1Kings7:3 Uphahla lwayo lwalwenziwe ngomsedare obekwe phezu kwemiqadi eyayixhaswa ziintsika. Imiqadi le yayingamashumi amane anantlanu, ilishumi elinesihlanu kuluhlu ngalunye." 
1Kings7:4 Kwakukho izintlu ezintathu zeefestile eziphakamileyo zijongene. 
1Kings7:5 Imigubasi yeengcango yayenziwe buxande, iminyango le izizintlu ezintathu ezijongeneyo." 
1Kings7:6 Igumbi elilandelayo laliziimitha ezingamashumi amabini anesibini ubude, luziimitha ezilishumi elinesithathu nesiqingatha ububanzi. Ekungeneni kulo kwakukho igunjana elilisango elineentsika nevaranda." 
1Kings7:7 Igumbi elilandelayo yayiligumbi lekumkani elalikwayinkundla yamatyala apho uSolomon wayewavavanyela khona. Iindonga zazambathiswe ngamaplanga omsedare ukusukela emgangathweni kuye kuthi gaa ngesilingi. 
1Kings7:8 Ibhotwe lakhe apho wayehlala khona uSolomon, elalakhiwe kwiyadi esemva kwendlu yokuxoxwa kwamatyala, lalakhiwe ngokufanayo nezinye izindlu esezichaziwe. Kananjalo uSolomon wakha ibhotwe eliyelele kwelakhe, elakhela umkakhe intombi yokumkani waseJiputa." 
1Kings7:9 Zonke ezi zakhiwo, kunye neyadikazi enkulu, zazakhiwe ngawona matye odidi oluphambili ukusuka kwiziseko zazo kuye kuthi xhaxhe ekudibaneni nophahla. La matye ayelungiselwa apho ayembiwa khona ukuze angene athi ngci ezindaweni zawo. Ayecokiswa ngeesarha ukuze afaneleke ngaphandle nangaphakathi." 
1Kings7:10 Isiseko sasisesamatye amakhulu odidi, amanye kuwo eziimitha ezintathu ezinesiqingatha ubude, amanye ke eziimitha ezine." 
1Kings7:11 Bekusakhiwa ngamanye amatye phezu kwawo aqingqwe alungelelaniswa kunye nemiqadi yomsedare. 
1Kings7:12 Iindonga zeyadi yebhotwe, kwanezeyadi ephakathi yendlu *kaNdikhoyo, kwanegunjana elilisango lendlu kaNdikhoyo, zazakhiwe ngemiqolo emithathu yamatye aqingqiweyo elandelwa ngumqolo omnye weplanga lomsedare, njalo ke ukunyuka." 
1Kings7:13 Ukumkani uSolomon wathumela eTire ukuba kuyiwe kuthathwa uHuram," 
1Kings7:14 onina wayengumhlolokazi wendlu kaNafetali, uyise engumTire. Lo mfo wayeyingcibi yezobhedu, elichule elinamava kuzo zonke izinto ezenziwa ngobhedu. Weza ke kukumkani uSolomon, wawenza wonke umsebenzi awunikiweyo." 
1Kings7:15 Ke kaloku uHuram lo wabumba iintsika zobhedu ezimbini, inye iziimitha ezisibhozo ukuphakama, iziimitha ezintlanu nesiqingatha jikelele." 
1Kings7:16 Ezi ntsika wazenzela iintloko ezingqukuva ngobhedu; nganye kuzo yayiziimitha ezimbini ezinekota ukuphakama. 
1Kings7:17 Intloko yentsika nganye wayihombisa ngamatyathanga asixhenxe alukiweyo. 
1Kings7:18 Wazenza ngolo hlobo ke iintsika, waza kwicala langentla kula matyathanga alukiweyo wafakelela imiqolo emibini yeerharnati zobhedu ezisixhenxe." 
1Kings7:19 Ezi ntloko zingqukuva zezi ntsika zazimile okweenyibiba, ukuphakama zinganeno kweemitha ezimbini." 
1Kings7:20 Phezu kwezi ntloko zezi ntsika zimbini ngentla kwalaa ndawo ibusitya malunga naloo mnxeba wetyathanga kwakukho amakhulu amabini eerharnati ziyimikrozo jikelele. 
1Kings7:21 Ezi ntsika ke wazimilisela phambi komnyango wendlu kaThixo. Le ingasekhohlo wathi nguJakin, waza engasekunene wathi nguBhowazi." 
1Kings7:22 Iintloko zazo zazimilise okweenyibiba. Waba ke njalo uyagqitywa umsebenzi weentsika. 
1Kings7:23 Kananjalo wenza ichibi ngobhedu. Lalingqukuva, liziimitha ezimbini ezinekota ubunzulu, ububanzi buziimitha ezine ezinesiqingatha, laza ke laziimitha ezilishumi elinekota ukujikeleza." 
1Kings7:24 Ngaphantsi komphetho walo jikelele kwakukho amathangazana. La mathangazana ayeyimiqolo emibini, eyinto enye nechibi elo." 
1Kings7:25 Eli chibi lalimi phezu kweenkunzi zeenkomo ezilishumi elinesibini ezenziwe ngobhedu, ezintathu zikhangele ngasentla, ezintathu zijonge ngasentshona, esintathu zikhangele ngasezantsi, zaza kananjalo ezintathu zajonga ngasempuma. Ichibi lalithe ngxishi phezu kwazo, izinqe zazo zijonge embindini walo." 
1Kings7:26 Ububanzi balo babulingana nesandla, umphetho walo ufana nekomityi, kanye oku kwenyibiba edubuleyo. Lalingena iilitha ezingamawaka angamashumi amane." 
1Kings7:27 Kananjalo uHuram wenza neshumi leenqwelo zobhedu, nganye kuzo iyimitha eneekota ezintathu ubude, bukwangako nobubanzi, ukuphakama kuyimitha enekota." 
1Kings7:28 Ezi nqwelo zazenziwe ngolu hlobo: zazinamanqwanqwa anxityelelaniswe nezibonda. 
1Kings7:29 Kuloo manqwanqwa phakathi kwezibonda kwakukho iingonyama, iinkunzi zeenkomo, *nezithunywa ezimaphiko. Ngaphezulu nangaphantsi kweengonyama nezo nkunzi zeenkomo kwakujinga izidanga ezixonxiweyo." 
1Kings7:30 Inqwelo nganye yayinamavili amane obhedu, ikwaneasi yobhedu. Kwakukho isitya esixhaswe ngezibonda ezine. Ezo zibonda zazihonjiswe ngezidanga macala." 
1Kings7:31 Ngaphezu kwesitya kwakukho indawo ekhamisileyo ingqukuva. Ngaphezu kwenqwelo yayivele isithuba seesentimitha ezimashumi mane anesihlanu, iziisentimitha ezilishumi elinesibhozo ukuhla. Yayikroliwe jikelele. Amanqwanqwa la wona ayengoono-ne abalinganayo, engekho ngqukuva." 
1Kings7:32 La mavili mane ayephantsi kwaloo manqwanqwa, iiasi zamavili zinxibelelene nenqwelo. Ukuphakama kwevili ngalinye kwakuziisentimitha ezingamashumi amathandathu anesithandathu." 
1Kings7:33 Amavili la ayefana neenqwelo zonke; iasi, umphetho, izibonda zazo, ngokunjalo neenafu, zonke zazizezobhedu." 
1Kings7:34 Inqwelo nganye yayinezibonda ezine ezinxityelelwe apha ezikoneni emazantsi. 
1Kings7:35 Inqwelo nganye yayibotshwe ngebhanti engqukuva apha emantla, ke yona iziisentimitha ezingamashumi amabini anambini jikelele. Izibonda ezaziyixhasile, ndawonye namacala, zazinxityelelaniswe nenqwelo ngobubanzi." 
1Kings7:36 Kananjalo wakrola *izithunywa ezimaphiko, iingonyama, nemithi yesundu apho kwezo zibonda, nakuloo macala, naphi na apho kwakukho isithuba, kujikeleziswe nezidanga." 
1Kings7:37 Zazinjalo ke ezo nqwelo zilishumi. Zazibunjwe ngandlela-nye, ngazinye zifana zilingana." 
1Kings7:38 UHuram wenza izitya ezilishumi, esenzela ezo nqwelo zolishumi. Isitya ngasinye sasiyimitha eneekota ezintathu ububanzi, singena iilitha ezimakhulu asibhozo." 
1Kings7:39 Isihlanu sezo nqwelo wasibeka ngasekunene kwendlu kaThixo, esinye isihlanu sezo nqwelo wasibeka ngasekhohlo kwayo. Ke lona ichibi walibeka ngasekunene kwikona ekumazantsi-mpuma." 
1Kings7:40 Kananjalo uHuram wenza neembiza, iifotsholo, nezitya zokufefa. Ngoko ke uHuram wawugqiba umsebenzi awayewenzela ukumkani uSolomon endlwini *kaNdikhoyo." 
1Kings7:41 Yayiziintsika ezimbini; iintloko ezimbini ezibusitya zezo ntsika; amatyathanga alukiweyo amabini ahombise ezo ntloko zimbini zibusitya zezo ntsika; 
1Kings7:42 iirharnati ezimakhulu mane ziyimiqolo emibini ethe nca kwityathanga ngalinye elilukiweyo elihombisa ezo ntloko zibusitya zeentsika ezo; 
1Kings7:43 izixhaso ezilishumi zinezitya zazo ezilishumi; 
1Kings7:44 ichibi lobhedu lineenkunzi zeenkomo ezilishumi elinambini ezenziwe ngobhedu ezilixhasayo; 
1Kings7:45 iimbiza, iifotsholo, nezitya zokufefa. Zonke ke ezo zixhobo zazenziwe nguHuram ezenzela ukumkani uSolomon ukuze zisetyenziswe endlwini kaNdikhoyo zazenziwe ngobhedu olugudisiweyo." 
1Kings7:46 Ezo zinto ukumkani wathi mazibunjwe ngezibumbi zomdongwe kwintili yeJordan phakathi kweSukoti neZaretan. 
1Kings7:47 USolomon zange abulinganise ubunzima bezi zinto, kuba kaloku zazininzi gqitha. Ngoko ke ubunzima bobhedu zange bulinganiswe." 
1Kings7:48 Kananjalo uSolomon wazenza zonke iimpahla zendlu kaNdikhoyo: iqonga lamadini legolide; itafile yegolide eyayihlala isonka esinikelwa kuThixo; 
1Kings7:49 iziphatho-zibane ezenziwe ngegolide (ezihlanu ngasekunene, ezihlanu ngasekhohlo, zimi phambi kwegumbi eliyingcwele kangcwele); iintyatyambo, izibane, nezitya zokugcina imitya yezibane;" 
1Kings7:50 izitya zegolide, izikhwezeli-zibane, izitya zokufefa, izitya zesiqhumiso, neepani zamalahle; iihinjisi zegolide zegumbi eliyingcwele kangcwele, nezo zeengcango zegumbi elingaphandle." 
1Kings7:51 Uthe ke wakufezeka loo msebenzi uSolomon awayewenzela indlu kaNdikhoyo, wazithatha zonke ezo zinto zazinikezelwe nguyise uDavide – isiliva, igolide, nezinye izinto zokusebenza – waza ke wazifaka koovimba bendlu kaNdikhoyo." 
1Kings8:1 Ke kaloku ukumkani uSolomon wawabizela kuye eJerusalem onke amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, bonke abaziintloko zezizwe, namadoda aziinkulu zezindlu zamaSirayeli, ukuze aye kuthatha ityesi yomnqophiso *kaNdikhoyo eZiyon, isixeko sikaDavide." 
1Kings8:2 Onke ke amadoda akwaSirayeli aqokelelana kukumkani uSolomon ngexesha lombhiyozo kwinyanga yesixhenxe uEtanim. 
1Kings8:3 Athe ke akuphelela amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, ababingeleli bayithatha ityesi kaNdikhoyo," 
1Kings8:4 kunye nentente yesibingelelo, nazo zonke izinto ezingcwele ezazikuyo. Ababingeleli nabaLevi bazithwala ezo zinto." 
1Kings8:5 Ke yena ukumkani uSolomon nalo lonke ibandla likaSirayeli elaliqokelelene kuye babemi phambi kwetyesi, besenza amadini ngeegusha neenkomo ezininzi, inyambalala enganakubalwa." 
1Kings8:6 Ababingeleli ke bayithatha ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, bayisa endaweni yayo kwigumbi elingaphakathi endlwini kaThixo – ingcwele kangcwele – bayibeka phantsi kwamaphiko ezo *zithunywa zimaphiko." 
1Kings8:7 Izithunywa ezo ke zawathi naa loo maphiko azo, zayigquma loo ndawo yayikuyo ityesi ndawonye namanqwanqwa okuyiphatha." 
1Kings8:8 La manqwanqwa ke ayemade ngangokuba zazibonakala iziphelo zawo kumntu ophambi kwengcwele kangcwele, kambe ke zingabonakali kongaphandle kweyona ndawo ingcwele. Aselapho ke unanamhlanje." 
1Kings8:9 Apho kuloo tyesi kwakungekho nto ngaphandle kwamacwecwe amabini amatye, lawo ayefakwe kuyo nguMosis eHorebhe, apho uNdikhoyo wenza umnqophiso namaSirayeli akuba ephumile eJiputa." 
1Kings8:10 Bathe ke bakuphuma ababingeleli kwindawo engcwele, indlu kaNdikhoyo leyo yazaliswa lilifu." 
1Kings8:11 Ngenxa yelo lifu ababingeleli ababanga nako ukwenza imisebenzi yabo. Kaloku ubukhazikhazi besidima sikaNdikhoyo babuyizalisile indlu yakhe. 
1Kings8:12 Ke kaloku uSolomon wathi: “UNdikhoyo wayethe uza kuhlala kwilifu elimnyama. 
1Kings8:13 Ke mna ngenene ndikwakhele ipomakazi lendlu, indawo oya kuhlala kuyo ngonaphakade.”" 
1Kings8:14 Lithe lisemi apho lonke elo bandla likaSirayeli, ukumkani wee guququ walithamsanqela," 
1Kings8:15 wathi: “Makabongwe uNdikhoyo, uThixo kaSirayeli, yena othe ngesandla sakhe wasifezekisa isithembiso awasenza ngowakhe umlomo kubawo uDavide. Kaloku yena wathi:" 
1Kings8:16 ‘Ukusukela kwimini endabakhuphayo ngayo abantu bam amaSirayeli eJiputa, zange ndizikhethele sixeko nakwisiphi na isizwe sakwaSirayeli apho lalinokwakhelwa khona indlu igama lam; kambe ke ndinyule uDavide ukuze abalawule abantu bam amaSirayeli.’" 
1Kings8:17 “UDavide ubawo wayezimisele ngomxhelo wakhe ukuba igama likaNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli alakhele indlu. 
1Kings8:18 Kambe ke uNdikhoyo wathi kubawo uDavide: ‘Ibe yinto entle ukuba uzimisele ukulakhela indlu igama lam. 
1Kings8:19 Noko ke kambe asinguwe oza kulakhela indlu igama lam, koko yoba ngunyana wakho; nditsho kanye owesinqe sakho – nguye oya kulakhela indlu igama lam.’" 
1Kings8:20 “UNdikhoyo ke usigcinile eso sithembiso wasenzayo. Naku ngoku ndingene esikhundleni sikabawo uDavide. Ewe, ndichophe kwisihlalo sokulawula sakwaSirayeli ngokwesithembiso sikaNdikhoyo, ndaza ndalakhela indlu igama likaNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli." 
1Kings8:21 Ndiyenzele indawo ityesi equlathe umnqophiso kaNdikhoyo awayewenze noobawo ekubakhululeni kwakhe kwelaseJiputa.” 
1Kings8:22 Ke kaloku uSolomon wema phambi kweqonga *likaNdikhoyo, apho phambi kwaloo nginginya yebandla likaSirayeli, waza izandla zakhe waziphakamisela ezulwini," 
1Kings8:23 wathi: “Ewe, Ndikhoyo, Thixo kaSirayeli, akakho uthixo onjengawe, nditsho ezulwini phezulu nasemhlabeni phantsi. Kaloku ungulowo uwugcinayo umnqophiso wakho wokuzithanda izicaka zakho ezithe rhoqo ngomxhelo wazo wonke ukuhamba ezindleleni zakho." 
1Kings8:24 Nangoku ke usigcinile isithembiso sakho kwisicaka sakho uDavide ubawo. Wathembisa ngomlomo wakho; kunamhlanje-nje ke ufezekisile ngesandla sakho. 
1Kings8:25 “Nangoku ke, Ndikhoyo, Thixo kaSirayeli, isicaka sakho uDavide ubawo khawumgcinele ezo zithembiso wamenzela zona usithi: ‘Akusoze ungabi nayo indoda yokuchopha phambi kwam kwisihlalo sokulawula sakwaSirayeli, ukuba kodwa oonyana bakho bathe bakunyamekela ngandlela zonke ukuba bahambe phambi kwam njengawe lo.’" 
1Kings8:26 Ewe, nangoku, Thixo kaSirayeli, ilizwi owalithethayo uthembisa isicaka sakho uDavide ubawo malifezeke." 
1Kings8:27 “Kambe ke, ngaba uThixo angade ahlale emhlabeni? Hayi bo, kaloku namazulu, nditsho namazulu asemajuku-jukwini ngokwawo, akanako ukukuqulatha. Ibeke phi ke yona le ndlu ndiyakhileyo!" 
1Kings8:28 Nakuba kunjalo, Ndikhoyo, Thixo wam, wubekele iindlebe umthandazo wesicaka sakho esizibikayo kuwe. Kuve ukulila nokukhunga kwesicaka sakho esikubongozayo nakalokunje." 
1Kings8:29 Ubusuku nemini ngamana amehlo akho athi ntsho kuyo le ndlu. Kaloku yile wathetha ngayo usithi: ‘Igama lam liya kuba kuyo;’ Ke ngoko wuphulaphule umthandazo esiya kuthi isicaka sakho siwubhekise kule ndawo. 
1Kings8:30 Zibazele iindlebe izikhungo zesicaka sakho ndawonye nabantu bakho amaSirayeli xa umthandazo wabo bewubhekisa kule ndawo. Yiva wena usekhayeni lakho ezulwini; ewe, yiva, uvile uxolele." 
1Kings8:31 “Xa umntu ethe wona ummelwane wakhe, kwaza ke kwafuneka enze isifungo, waza ke yena weza kufunga kule ndlu phambi kweqonga lakho," 
1Kings8:32 wena ke yiva usezulwini, usebenze ngaloo nto. Uze ugwebe phakathi kwezicaka zakho, umsingele phantsi onetyala, umohlwaye ngokufanele isenzo sakhe. Uze umgwebele umntu omsulwa, khon' ukuze aphuhle ukuba umsulwa." 
1Kings8:33 “Xa abantu bakho amaSirayeli ethe oyiswa lutshaba ngenxa yokuba ekonile wena, makathi akubuyela kuwe ebula, evuma igama lakho, ethandaza, esenza isikhungo kuwe kuyo le ndlu," 
1Kings8:34 wena ke yiva usezulwini, usixolele isono sabantu bakho amaSirayeli, uwabuyisele kulo mhlaba wawunika ooyise." 
1Kings8:35 “Xa amazulu athe avaleka, ayabikho imvula, kuba abantu bakho bekonile, mabathi xa bathe babhekisa kule ndawo ngomthandazo, bevuma igama lakho, bezishiya nezono zabo kuba wena ubabandezele –" 
1Kings8:36 wena ke, yiva usezulwini, usixolele isono sezicaka zakho, abantu bakho amaSirayeli. Uze ubafundise indlela efanelekileyo yokuziphatha, ulithi jize ngemvula ilizwe elililifa owalinika abantu bakho." 
1Kings8:37 “Xa kuthe kwakho indlala nokuba ngubhubhani kweli lizwe, okanye kubekho isihlava, isihumba, iinkumbi, iintotoviyane, okanye xa abantu bakho bathe bangqingwa lutshaba nakusiphi na kwizixeko zabo, ukanti nokuba sisiphi na isithwakumbe okanye isifo esibafikeleyo," 
1Kings8:38 makuthi xa kukho nawuphi na kubantu bakho othandazayo ekhunga ngenxa yokubandezeleka kwentliziyo yakhe, nezandla zakhe eziphakamisela kule ndlu," 
1Kings8:39 wena ke yiva usekhayeni lakho ezulwini. Ewe, xolela, ulowo nalowo umphathe ngokwezenzo zakhe, kuba wena uyayazi intliziyo yakhe. (Kaloku nguwe wedwa ozaziyo iintliziyo zabantu bonke.)" 
1Kings8:40 Ngaloo ndlela ke baya kukuhlonela ngalo lonke ixesha lokudla kwabo ubomi kulo mhlaba wawupha oobawo. 
1Kings8:41 “Kanti ke nowasemzini ongenguye owabantu bakho amaSirayeli, kodwa ofike evela kwelikude ilizwe ngenxa yegama lakho –" 
1Kings8:42 kaloku abantu baya kuva ngodumo lwegama lakho nangamandla esandla sakho kunye nobungangamsha bengalo yakho – onjalo ke makathi akuza kuthandaza apha kule ndlu," 
1Kings8:43 wena uve usekhayeni lakho ezulwini, owasemzini lo umenzele konke oko akucelayo kuwe, khon' ukuze zonke izizwe zehlabathi zilazi igama lakho, zikuhlonele kwanjengokuba bekuhlonela abantu bakho amaSirayeli. Ewe, ukuze ziqonde ukuba le ndlu ndiyakhileyo ibizwa ngegama lakho." 
1Kings8:44 “Nabantu bakho xa bathe baya emfazweni besilwa neentshaba zabo, noba ubathumela phi na, mabathi bakuthandaza kuwe bebhekisa kule ndlu ndiyakhele igama lakho kwesi sixeko osinyulileyo," 
1Kings8:45 yithi ke wena usezulwini uwuve umthandazo nesikhungo sabo, ubagwebele." 
1Kings8:46 “Xa bathe bakona (kaloku akukho mntu ungoniyo) waza ke wena wakhathazeka, wabanikela elutshabeni, luze ke lona lubathimbe, luye nabo kwilizwe lalo, nokuba kukude okanye kukufuphi," 
1Kings8:47 xa bathe baguquka bazisola kwelo lizwe bathinjelwe kulo, ewe, xa beguquka bezibika kuwe belapho kwelo lizwe labeyisi babo, besithi: ‘Ewe, sonile, senze ububi nenkohlakalo,’" 
1Kings8:48 xa babuyela kuwe ngomxhelo wabo wonke nentliziyo yabo iphela bekwelo lizwe leentshaba ezibathimbileyo, bethandaza bebhekisa kweli lizwe walinika ooyise, kwesi sixeko wasinyulayo, nakule ndlu ndiyakhele igama lakho," 
1Kings8:49 yithi ke wena usekhayeni lakho ezulwini, uwuve umthandazo wabo nesikhungo sabo, ubagwebele." 
1Kings8:50 Ewe kaloku, uze ubaxolele abantu bakho abakonileyo, uzixolele zonke iziphoso zabo ngakuwe, wenze ukuba abo babathimbileyo babe nenceba kubo." 
1Kings8:51 Kaloku aba bantu ngabakho ncakasana, balilifa lakho owalikhuphulula eJiputa kwelo ziko lokunyibilikisa isinyithi." 
1Kings8:52 “Ngamana waneliso ekuzibikeni kwesicaka sakho nakuzo izikhungo zabantu bakho amaSirayeli; ewe, akwaba ungabaphulaphula nanini na bezibika kuwe." 
1Kings8:53 Kaloku wena wabatyumba phakathi kwazo zonke izizwe zehlabathi, ukuze babe lilifa lakho, nanjengoko watshoyo ngomlomo wesicaka sakho uMosis, ngokuya wena, Nkosi Ndikhoyo, wawukhulula oobawo kwelaseJiputa.”" 
1Kings8:54 Uthe ke uSolomon akuyiphetha le mithandazo nezi zikhungo wayezenza *kuNdikhoyo, suka waphakama apho phambi kweqonga likaNdikhoyo, apho wayeguqe khona, izandla zakhe eziphakamisele ezulwini." 
1Kings8:55 Wema ngoku, wayithamsanqela yonke loo ndimbane yebandla likaSirayeli. Ewe, wadanduluka ekhwaza esithi:" 
1Kings8:56 “Makabongwe uNdikhoyo obathe jize ngenzolo abantu bakhe amaSirayeli, kanye ngokwesithembiso sakhe. Akukho nalinye ilizwi elifadaleleyo kuzo zonke izithembiso ezilungileyo awazenza ngesicaka sakhe uMosis." 
1Kings8:57 Ngamana ke uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu waba nathi kwanjengokuba wayenabo noobawo; ngamana akangesishiyi okanye asilahle.
