2Kings15:25 Elinye lamaphakathi akhe injengele uPeka unyana kaRemaliya wamenzela iyelenqe. Wathatha amashumi amahlanu kumadoda aseGiliyadi, waza wambulala uPekaya ndawonye noArgobhi noAriye enqabeni yebhotwe lakomkhulu eSamariya. Ewe, uPeka wambulala uPekaya, waza ke wangena esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings15:26 Ezinye zeziganeko zolawulo lukaPekaya nayo yonke imisebenzi yakhe nâzo encwadini yeembali zookumkani bakwaSirayeli. 
2Kings15:27 Ngonyaka wamashumi amahlanu anambini elawula uAzariya kwelakwaJuda, uPeka unyana kaRemaliya waba ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli, waza walawula eSamariya iminyaka emashumi mabini." 
2Kings15:28 Wênza okubi emehlweni *kaNdikhoyo; zange ashenxe kwizono zikaJerobhowam unyana kaNebhati, ezo wawalukuhlela kuzo amaSirayeli." 
2Kings15:29 Ngexesha likaPeka, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, ukumkani waseAsiriya uTigelate-pilezere weza wafika wathimba i-Iyon, iAbhele-bhete-mahaka, iYanowa, iKedeshe, neHazore. Wayithimba neGiliyadi ndawonye neGalili (lonke elikaNafetali), waza abemi wabafudusela eAsiriya." 
2Kings15:30 Ke uHosheya unyana kaEla wamenzela iyelenqe uPeka unyana kaRemaliya. Suka wamhlasela wambulala, waza wangukumkani esikhundleni sakhe xa uYotam unyana kaUziya wayekunyaka wamashumi amabini elawula kwaJuda." 
2Kings15:31 Ke ezinye zeziganeko zolawulo lukaPeka, nayo yonke imisebenzi yakhe, nâzo encwadini yeembali zookumkani bakwaSirayeli." 
2Kings15:32 Ngonyaka wesibini kaPeka unyana kaRemaliya ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, uYotam unyana kaUziya wakwaJuda waqalisa ukulawula." 
2Kings15:33 Ukuqala kwakhe ukulawula wayeneminyaka emashumi mabini anantlanu, waza ke walawula eJerusalem iminyaka elishumi elinesithandathu. Unina yayinguJerusha intombi kaZadoki." 
2Kings15:34 Naye njengoyise u-Uziya wenza okuhle emehlweni *kaNdikhoyo. 
2Kings15:35 Kambe ke zona iindawo eziphakamileyo zonqulo zange zibhangiswe, abantu baqhubela phambili besenza amadini neziqhumiso apho kuzo. UYotam wabuya walakha iSango laseNtla lendlu kaNdikhoyo." 
2Kings15:36 Ke ezinye zeziganeko zolawulo lukaYotam, nayo yonke imisebenzi yakhe, nâzo encwadini yeembali zookumkani bakwaJuda." 
2Kings15:37 Ngaloo mihla uNdikhoyo waxhokonxa uRezin ukumkani waseSiriya, ndawonye noPeka unyana kaRemaliya, baza bahlasela uJuda." 
2Kings15:38 UYotam ke waya kuphumla kooyise, waza wangcwatywa phakathi kwabo kwisixeko sikaDavide uyise. Ke uAhazi unyana wakhe wangena esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings16:1 Ke kaloku kwathi ngonyaka weshumi elinesixhenxe elawula uPeka unyana kaRemaliya kwaSirayeli, uAhazi unyana kaYotam ukumkani wakwaJuda waqalisa ukulawula kwelakwaJuda." 
2Kings16:2 UAhazi wayeneminyaka emashumi mabini ukungena kwakhe embusweni, waza ke walawula iminyaka elishumi elinesithandathu eJerusalem. Yena akalithathanga ikhondo likayise-mkhulu uDavide; ewe, akazange enze okuhle emehlweni *kaNdikhoyo uThixo wakhe." 
2Kings16:3 Wahamba ekhondweni lookumkani bakwaSirayeli, wada wenza isikizi lokufaka unyana wakhe emlilweni, esenza idini ngaye, siko elo lalisenziwa ziintlanga awazigxothayo uNdikhoyo ekungeneni kwamaSirayeli." 
2Kings16:4 Wayesenza amadini neziqhumiso ezindaweni zonke zonqulo ezindulini naphantsi kwemithi yonke efukufuku. 
2Kings16:5 Ke uRezin, ukumkani wakwa-Aram, kunye noPeka, unyana kaRemaliya, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, basuka bahlasela iJerusalem, bayingqinga nakuba bengayoyisanga." 
2Kings16:6 Ngelo thuba ke ukumkani uRezin wakwa-Aram wayibuyisela kwa-Aram iElati, wabagxotha kuyo abantu bakwaJuda. Aza ke angena ema khona amaSiriya unanamhla." 
2Kings16:7 UAhazi ke wathumela izigidimi kuTigelate-pilezere, ukumkani waseAsiriya, esithi kuye: “Mna ndisisicaka nebamba lakho; ngoko ke nceda uze kundihlangula, naku ndihlaselwa ngukumkani wakwa-Aram ekunye nowakwaSirayeli.”" 
2Kings16:8 Kananjalo ke uAhazi wayithatha isiliva kunye negolide ezazisendlwini kaNdikhoyo nakoovimba bakomkhulu, wazithumela zasisipho arhuma ngaso kukumkani waseAsiriya." 
2Kings16:9 Ukumkani waseAsiriya ke wasamkela eso sicelo, waza ke wahlasela iDamasko. Abemi bakhona wabafudusela eKiri, ke yena uRezin wambulala." 
2Kings16:10 Ukumkani uAhazi wahlangabeza ukumkani waseAsiriya uTigelate-pilezere eDamasko. EDamasko ke apho wabona iqonga lamadini, waza wathumela kumbingeleli u-Uriya emnika iplani yalo neenkcukacha zokwakha elifana nalo." 
2Kings16:11 Umbingeleli u-Uriya ke wakha iqonga lamadini ngokwezo nkcukacha wayezithunyelelwe ngukumkani uAhazi eseDamasko. Iqonga elo waligqiba engekabuyi eDamasko ukumkani uAhazi. 
2Kings16:12 Ekubuyeni kwakhe ke, ukumkani walibona iqonga elo, waza wenza amadini kulo." 
2Kings16:13 Wenza amadini atshiswayo, iminikelo yeenkozo, kunye neminikelo ethululwayo, waza wafefa ngegazi elingumnikelo wakhe wobudlelwane kwalapho eqongeni." 
2Kings16:14 Ke lona iqonga lobhedu elalimi phambi koNdikhoyo walisusa phambi kwendlu kaThixo, apho lalikhona phakathi kweqonga elitsha nendlu kaNdikhoyo, walimisa ngasentla kweqonga elitsha." 
2Kings16:15 Ukumkani uAhazi wayalela umbingeleli u-Uriya wathi: “Kweli qonga litsha likhulu yenza amadini atshiswayo akusasa, namadini eenkozo asemalanga, amadini kakumkani atshiswayo, ndawonye namadini akhe eenkozo, kunye namadini atshiswayo abantu beli lizwe, ndawonye namadini abo eenkozo kunye nathululwayo. Apho eqongeni ke uze ufefe ngegazi lawo onke amadini atshiswayo. Ke lona iqonga lobhedu ndolisebenzisa xa ndifuna isikhokelo.”" 
2Kings16:16 Ngenene ke u-Uriya wenza ngokomyalelo kakumkani uAhazi. 
2Kings16:17 Ukumkani uAhazi waziqhaqha iinqwelo zobhedu ezazilapho endlwini kaThixo, wazisusa nezitya zokuhlambela ezazikuzo. Walisusa ichibi lobhedu kwezo nkunzi zeenkomo zazilixhasile, walixhasa ngesiseko samatye." 
2Kings16:18 Wasisusa isigqubuthelo esasakhelwe *uMhla woPhumlo apho endlwini kaThixo, walisusa nesango elalilungiselelwe ukumkani apho endlwini kaNdikhoyo, izinto ezo awayezenza kuba ezama ukukholisa ukumkani waseAsiriya." 
2Kings16:19 Ke ezinye zeziganeko zolawulo luka-Ahazi nâzo encwadini yeembali zookumkani bakwaJuda. 
2Kings16:20 UAhazi waya kuphumla kunye nooyise, waza wangcwatywa phakathi kwabo kwisixeko sikaDavide. Esikhundleni sakhe ke kwangena unyana wakhe uHezekiya." 
2Kings17:1 Kwathi ngonyaka weshumi elinambini uAhazi engukumkani wakwaJuda wangena embusweni uHosheya, unyana kaEla, waba ngukumkani kwaSirayeli eSamariya. Walawula iminyaka elithoba." 
2Kings17:2 Wênza okubi emehlweni *kaNdikhoyo, kambe ke noko akafananga nookumkani bakwaSirayeli ababemandulele." 
2Kings17:3 Ke uShalmanesere ukumkani waseAsiriya wahlasela uHosheya owayekade ephantsi kwakhe emnika imirhumo. 
2Kings17:4 Ukumkani waseAsiriya wafumanisa ukuba uHosheya umgwilikele, kuba wayethumele oonozaku-zaku kukumkani waseJiputa onguSo, futhi ke engasayikhuphi imirhumo awayefudula eyikhupha minyaka le. Ngoko ke uShalmanesere wambamba wamvalela entolongweni uHosheya." 
2Kings17:5 Ewe, ukumkani waseAsiriya wahlasela elo lizwe liphela; ke yona iSamariya wayingqinga iminyaka emithathu." 
2Kings17:6 Kuthe ke kunyaka wethoba elawula uHosheya, suka ukumkani waseAsiriya wayoyisa iSamariya, waza amaSirayeli lawo wawafudusela eAsiriya. Wawahlalisa eHala nakwiGozan ephezu komlambo iHabhore, ngokunjalo nakwiidolophu zamaMedi." 
2Kings17:7 Le ntlekele ke yamhlela uSirayeli kuba emonile *uNdikhoyo uThixo wakhe owaya kumkhuphulula wamkhulula eJiputa phantsi kwesandla esingqongqo sokumkani wakhona. Basuka banqula thixo bambi," 
2Kings17:8 balandela imikhwa yeentlanga awazigxothayo *uNdikhoyo, waza wafaka amaSirayeli emhlabeni wazo. Kananjalo bangena kwimikhwa eyangeniswa ngookumkani bakwaSirayeli." 
2Kings17:9 AmaSirayeli anyebelezela enza izinto ezichaseneyo noNdikhoyo uThixo wawo, zinto ezo wayengazifuni. Azakhela iindawo zonqulo kuzo zonke iidolophu, ukusukela kwimboniselo yabalindi kuye kutsho kwizixeko ezinqatyisiweyo." 
2Kings17:10 Amisa iintsika zamatye kunye nemifanekiso ka-Ashera kuzo zonke iinduli naphantsi kwayo yonke imithi efukufuku. 
2Kings17:11 AmaSirayeli ayesenza iziqhumiso kuzo zonke iinduli zawo zonqulo, mkhwa lowo ke wawusenziwa ziintlanga awazigxothayo uNdikhoyo phambi kokuba afake amaSirayeli khona. Ewe, ayesenza izinto azichasileyo uNdikhoyo; ngaloo ndlela ke awuxhokonxa umsindo wakhe." 
2Kings17:12 Ewe, ayenqula *izithixo, nangona uNdikhoyo wayethe: “Ze ningayenzi into enjalo.”" 
2Kings17:13 Kaloku uNdikhoyo wayemlumkisile uSirayeli ndawonye noJuda, ethetha nabo ngabashumayeli bakhe neemboni, esithi: “Buyani kwiindlela zenu ezikhohlakeleyo. Yithobeleni imithetho ndawonye nemimiselo yam. Ziphatheni ngokwezimiso zomthetho xa uwonke, ngokwelizwi endalimisela ooyihlo ndathi mabalithobele, ndabuya ndalithetha nakuni ngabashumayeli abazizicaka zam.”" 
2Kings17:14 Kambe ke amaSirayeli asuka akaphulaphula, koko ankaniza njengooyise ábâsuka àbakholosa ngoNdikhoyo uThixo wabo." 
2Kings17:15 Basuka bayibukula imimiselo kunye nomnqophiso awayewenze kunye nooyise, abazikhathalela nezilumkiso awabayala ngazo. AmaSirayeli asuka alandelana nemifanekiso ephuthileyo, aza kananjalo nawo aphutha. Asuka alinganisa iintlanga ezaziwangqongile, nangona uNdikhoyo wayewayalile wathi: “Ze ningayilandeli imikhwa yazo.”" 
2Kings17:16 Ayilahla yonke imithetho kaNdikhoyo uThixo wawo, aza azenzela imifanekiso etyhidiweyo yethole yamibini, aqingqa nomfanekiso ka-Ashera. Aguqa abusa kuzo zonke iinkwenkwezi, anqula noBhali." 
2Kings17:17 AmaSirayeli afaka oonyana neentombi zawo emlilweni, esenza amadini ngabo. Ewe, angena kwimikhwa yokuvumisa, ahamba nakoosiyazi, azinikezela ekwenzeni okubi emehlweni kaNdikhoyo, emcaphukisa." 
2Kings17:18 Ngoko ke *uNdikhoyo wakhathazeka gqitha, waza wawasusa amaSirayeli phambi kwakhe, akwasala namnye ngaphandle nje kwendlu kaJuda." 
2Kings17:19 Kanti nayo leyo ayiyithobelanga imithetho kaNdikhoyo uThixo wayo. Nabo bangena ekhondweni lemikhwa eyaqalwa nguSirayeli. 
2Kings17:20 Ngeso sizathu ke uNdikhoyo wawabukula amaSirayeli xa ewonke. Suka wawabandezela, wawayekela azizisulu zokuxhatshazwa. Ekugqibeleni ke wawasusa phambi kwakhe." 
2Kings17:21 UNdikhoyo wathi akumahlula uSirayeli kwindlu kaDavide, suka uSirayeli wathatha uJerobhowam unyana kaNebhati, wamenza ukumkani. UJerobhowam lowo ke wamwexula uSirayeli ekulandeleni uNdikhoyo, wamlukuhla, wamfaka kwisonokazi esikhulu." 
2Kings17:22 AmaSirayeli athi nca kwizono zikaJerobhowam, akavuma ukwahlukana nazo," 
2Kings17:23 wada ke uNdikhoyo wawagxotha ngokwesilumkiso awayesenze ngomlomo wezicaka zakhe abashumayeli. Ngoko ke amaSirayeli afuduswa kwelakowawo, agxothelwa eAsiriya, apho asekhona ke unanamhla." 
2Kings17:24 Ke kaloku ukumkani waseAsiriya waya kuthatha abantu eBhabheli, eKuta, eAva, eHamati, naseSefarvayim, waza wabahlalisa kwiidolophu zamaSirayeli eSamariya. ISamariya leyo ke bayithathela kubo, bahlala kwiidolophu zayo." 
2Kings17:25 Ekungeneni kwabo khona zange bamnqule *uNdikhoyo; ngoko ke wabathumela ngeengonyama ezababulalayo abanye abantu. 
2Kings17:26 Bathetha nokumkani waseAsiriya, wafumana umyalezo othi: “Abantu owabafudusela kwiidolophu zaseSamariya abayazi indlela yokunqula uThixo wakhona. Ngoko ke ubathumelele iingonyama ezibabulalayo, kuba kaloku abo bantu abawazi amasiko awafunayo uThixo wakhona.”" 
2Kings17:27 Ke ukumkani waseAsiriya wanika umyalelo othi: “Thathani omnye kubabingeleli enabathimba eSamariya, niye kumhlalisa khona, ukuze afundise abo bantu indlela anqulwa ngayo uThixo wakhona.”" 
2Kings17:28 Ngenene ke bathatha omnye kubabingeleli ababethinjwe eSamariya, baya kumhlalisa eBhetele, wabafundisa ke abo bantu indlela anqulwa ngayo uNdikhoyo." 
2Kings17:29 Naxa kunjalo kwezo dolophu uhlanga ngalunye kwezo dolophu zazikuzo ezo ntlanga lwazenzela oothixo balo, lwabamisa kwezo ndawo ziphakamileyo zonqulo zazenziwe ngabantu baseSamariya." 
2Kings17:30 Ababevela eBhabheli bazenzela uSukoti-bhenoti, ababevela eKuta bazenzela uNergale, ababevela eHamati bazenzela uAshima," 
2Kings17:31 ama-Avi wona azenzela uNibhasi noTartake; ke wona amaSefarvayim ayefaka abantwana bawo emlilweni, esenzela oothixo bawo uAdrameleki noAnameleki amadini." 
2Kings17:32 Babemnqula yena uNdikhoyo, kodwa kananjalo bamisela abantu babo ukuze babe ngababingeleli kwiindawo zonqulo eziphakamileyo." 
2Kings17:33 Bamnqula uNdikhoyo, kodwa ngokunjalo babanqula noothixo babo, ngokwamasiko ezo ntlanga babephuma kuzo." 
2Kings17:34 Unanamhla abakalumleki kuloo mikhwa yabo yemveli. UNdikhoyo abamnquli nokumnqula, bengabambeleli nakwizimiso nemiyalelo, imithetho nemiqathango, uNdikhoyo awayinikela isizukulwana sikaYakobi, lowo wambiza ngokuba nguSirayeli." 
2Kings17:35 Ngokuya uNdikhoyo wayesenza umnqophiso namaSirayeli wayalela wathi: “Ze ningabanquli abanye oothixo; ze ningaguqi nibakhahlele, ningabakhonzi, ningabenzeli namadini." 
2Kings17:36 Eniya kunqula yena nguNdikhoyo, yena wanikhululayo kwelaseJiputa ngaloo mandla obungangamsha bakhe angoyiswa nto. Nguye enifanele ukuguqa kuye, nimenzele amadini." 
2Kings17:37 Ze nizithobele ngenyameko izimiso nemiyalelo yakhe, imithetho nemiqathango awanibhalela yona. Ze ninganquli thixo bambi ngaphandle kwakhe." 
2Kings17:38 Umnqophiso endawenza kunye nani ze ningawulibali, ninganquli thixo bambi." 
2Kings17:39 Kuphela nqulani uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, kuba nguye yedwa oya kunihlangula kuzo zonke iintshaba zenu.”" 
2Kings17:40 Kambe ke zange baphulaphule, koko bayiqhubela phambili imikhwa yabo yemveli." 
2Kings17:41 Aba bantu babesithi bemnqula nje uNdikhoyo, kodwa babe beyinqula nemifanekiso yabo eqingqiweyo. Unanamhla ke abantwana babo, nditsho nesizukulwana, basathene nca nezo ndlela zooyise-mkhulu." 
2Kings18:1 Ke kaloku kwathi ngonyaka wesithathu kaHosheya unyana kaEla ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, uHezekiya unyana ka-Ahazi ukumkani wakwaJuda waqalisa ukulawula." 
2Kings18:2 Ukuqalisa kwakhe ukulawula wayenamashumi amabini anesihlanu ezelwe, waza ke walawula eJerusalem amashumi amabini anethoba eminyaka. Unina yayinguAbhiya intombi kaZakariya." 
2Kings18:3 Wênza okuhle emehlweni *kaNdikhoyo njengoyise-mkhulu uDavide. 
2Kings18:4 Wazibhangisa iindawo eziphakamileyo zonqulo, wawaqhekeza amatye awodwa onqulo, wazigawula iintsika zika-Ashera. Wayikroboza inyoka yobhedu eyayenziwe nguMosis. Kaloku ukuza kuthi ga kwelo thuba amaSirayeli ayeyenzela iziqhumiso, kusithiwa nguNehushtani." 
2Kings18:5 UHezekiya yena wakholosa ngoNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli. Kubo bonke ookumkani bakwaJuda akuzange kubekho ofana naye, ngaphambili nangasemva kwakhe." 
2Kings18:6 Wabambelela kuNdikhoyo, akashenxa kuye, wayithobela loo mithetho wayinika uMosis uNdikhoyo." 
2Kings18:7 Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo waba ngakuye, wamphumelelisa nakuyiphi na into ayenzayo. Wayivukela ikumkani yaseAsiriya, akavuma ukuyibusa." 
2Kings18:8 Wawagqogqa wawagqugqisa amaFilistiya esusela ezimboniselweni ukuya kwizixeko ezinqatyisiweyo, wada wee xhaxhe ngeGaza nemimandla yayo." 
2Kings18:9 Kwathi kunyaka wesine kakumkani uHezekiya owawungunyaka wesixhenxe kaHosheya unyana kaEla ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, ukumkani waseAsiriya uShalmanesere wahlasela iSamariya wayingqinga." 
2Kings18:10 Ekupheleni kweminyaka emithathu ama-Asiriya lawo ayoyisa iSamariya, yaza ke yaba ithinjiwe ngonyaka wesithandathu kaHezekiya, owawungunyaka wethoba kakumkani uHosheya wakwaSirayeli." 
2Kings18:11 Ukumkani waseAsiriya wamfudusa uSirayeli, wamsa eAsiriya, abantu wabamisa eHala, naseGozan kumlambo iHabhore, nakwiidolophu zamaMedi." 
2Kings18:12 Isihla nje le ntlekele kungokuba amaSirayeli engamthobelanga uNdikhoyo uThixo wawo, koko esuka awaphula umnqophiso nayo yonke imiyalelo yesicaka sikaNdikhoyo uMosis. Ewe, akeva, akenza." 
2Kings18:13 Ngonyaka weshumi elinesine wokulawula kukakumkani uHezekiya, ukumkani waseAsiriya uSenakeribhe wazihlasela wazithimba zonke izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zakwaJuda." 
2Kings18:14 Ke uHezekiya, ukumkani wakwaJuda, wathumela lo myalezo kukumkani waseAsiriya eLakishe, esithi: “Ewe, ndikonile; nceda ke ngoko urhoxe kum. Ndokhupha nantoni na othi mandirhume ngayo.” Ukumkani waseAsiriya ke wamrhafisa ishumi lamawaka eekhilogram zesiliva kunye newaka leekhilogram zegolide." 
2Kings18:15 Ngoko ke uHezekiya wamnika yonke isiliva eyafumanekayo endlwini kaNdikhoyo nakoovimba bakomkhulu. 
2Kings18:16 Kananjalo ke uHezekiya, ukumkani wakwaJuda, ngelo xesha wayixobula negolide awayetyabeke ngayo iingcango nemigubasi yendlu kaNdikhoyo, wayinika ukumkani waseAsiriya." 
2Kings18:17 Ke kaloku ukumkani waseAsiriya wathi eseLakishe wathumela ukumkani uHezekiya eJerusalem umkhosi omkhulu uphantsi kwenjengele yakhe, nengqwayi-ngqwayi engumaqhuzu, ndawonye nengqwayi-ngqwayi ebhexeshayo. Wakufika eJerusalem loo mkhosi, wema kwindlela ebheka apho kusetyenzwa khona amalaphu, ngakumjelo otsala amanzi kwiqula elingentla." 
2Kings18:18 La madoda ke akhwaza ukumkani, kwaza ke kwaphuma uEliyakim unyana kaHilekiya umaqhuzu wakomkhulu, noShebhena unobhala wenkundla, ndawonye noJowa unyana ka-Asafu usiba-khulu, bawahlangabeza." 
2Kings18:19 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi ebhexeshayo yathetha nabo yathi: “Xelelani uHezekiya nithi: ‘Ithethe ngolu hlobo ingangalala ukumkani waseAsiriya: Njengokuba uzithembe kangaka nje, Hezekiya, uqamele ngantoni kanye?" 
2Kings18:20 Akuzilibali unamacebo nobuchule bomkhosi onamandla. Awu, waza walavuza kambe! Ukholose ngabani, undivukela nje?" 
2Kings18:21 Jonga, ndiyazi ukuba uthembele ngeJiputa. Xa ingubani yona, umsimelelo ofana nengcongolo entlekekileyo, ojika uhlabe izandla zomntu osimelela ngawo, umtsho abe namanxeba. Ewe, unjalo ukumkani waseJiputa; ubenjenjalo bonke abakholosa ngaye." 
2Kings18:22 Mhlawumbi ke uthi: “Hayi, thina sikholose ngoNdikhoyo uThixo wethu.” Kanene lowo asingulo uHezekiya amdilizele iindawo eziphakamileyo zonqulo, wabhangisa namaqonga amadini akhe, esithi kuJuda neJerusalem: “Yizani kunqula kwiqonga eliseJerusalem”?" 
2Kings18:23 “ ‘Hayi bo! Yiza kaloku, ukhe unqophisane nenkosi yam, umhlekazi ukumkani waseAsiriya. Ndokunika amawaka amabini amahashe ukuba unganabo abakhweli." 
2Kings18:24 Kuxa ungubani wena? Akunakuthelekiswa nalo nebhetye-bhetye kumajoni aseAsiriya, noba ungade ukholose ngeenqwelo namahashe aseJiputa." 
2Kings18:25 Kakade ke, uthi ndifane ndeza kuhlasela ukuze nditshabalalise ndibhuqe konke apha ndingayalelwanga nguNdikhoyo? Hayi, nguNdikhoyo ngokwakhe othe mandingene apha, ndilitshabalalise eli lizwe!’ ”" 
2Kings18:26 Kwesi sithuba ke uEliyakim unyana kaHilekiya, noShebhena, noJowa, babhekisa apho kwingqwayi-ngqwayi engumbhexeshi, bathi: “Khawuncede ukhumshe isiAram, mhlekazi; izicaka zakho ezi ziyasiqonda. Musa ukuthetha nathi ngesiHebhere, hleze kuve naba bantu baseludongeni.”" 
2Kings18:27 Kambe ke loo ngqwayi-ngqwayi yaphendula yathi: “Yini le, nicinga ukuba la mazwi inkosi yam iwabhekisa enkosini yenu nakuni kuphela? Nithi ayiwabhekisi nakwaba bantu bahleli kolu donga? Andithi kaloku nabo kwanjengani baza kutya ilindle labo, basele umchamo wabo!”" 
2Kings18:28 Yaphakama ke ingqwayi-ngqwayi leyo, yadanduluka ithetha ngesiHebhere, yathi: “Phulaphulani nive ekuthethayo ingangalala, ukumkani waseAsiriya!" 
2Kings18:29 Ukumkani uthi: ‘Sanukukhohliswa nguHezekiya lo! Akanako ukunihlangula esandleni sam. 
2Kings18:30 Sanukumvumela aniwexulele ekukholoseni ngoNdikhoyo, esithi: “Ngenene uNdikhoyo uya kusihlangula, nesi sixeko asiyi kuba lixhoba lokumkani waseAsiriya.” ’" 
2Kings18:31 “Musani ukumphulaphula uHezekiya lo! Ukumkani waseAsiriya uthi: ‘Phumani, nize kuzinikezela kum, sivisisane. Ukuba niyayenza loo nto, nonke ngabanye niya konwaba, ibe ngulowo nalowo atye iziqhamo zesidiliya sakhe namakhiwane akhe, esela amanzi equla lakhe," 
2Kings18:32 ndide ndize kunithatha, ndinise kwilizwe elifana neli lenu, umhlaba onemveliso yeenkozo newayini, ilizwe lengqolowa nediliya, ilizwe elinemithi yeminquma kunye nobusi. Zikhetheleni ubomi ke, ningakhethi ukufa.’ “Sanukulahlekiswa nguHezekiya, kuba uyanilahlekisa xa esithi: ‘UNdikhoyo uza kusihlangula.’" 
2Kings18:33 *Nguthixo wasiphi isizwe owakhe wasihlangula esandleni sokumkani waseAsiriya? 
2Kings18:34 Baphi oothixo baseHamati naseArpadi? Baphi oothixo baseSefarvayim, abaseHena, nabaseIva? Ngaba bakha bayihlangula iSamariya esandleni sam?" 
2Kings18:35 Nguwuphi kwaba thixo bezi zizwe xa bebonke owakha wanako ukuhlangula ilizwe esandleni sam? Ke, uNdikhoyo lowo yena angayihlangula njani iJerusalem esandleni sam?”" 
2Kings18:36 Kodwa ke bona abantu abo bathula bathi cwaka, abaphendula, kuba kaloku ukumkani uHezekiya wayebayalile wathi: “Ze ningamphenduli.”" 
2Kings18:37 Ke kaloku uEliyakim unyana kaHilekiya, umaqhuzu wakomkhulu, noShebhena unobhala wenkundla, kunye noJowa unyana ka-Asafu, usiba-khulu, bakhathazeka, bazikrazula izambatho zabo, bahamba baya kuHezekiya, baza bamazisa loo mazwi athethwe yingqwayi-ngqwayi." 
2Kings19:1 Ke kaloku wathi akuziva ezi ndaba ukumkani uHezekiya, suka wakhathazeka, wazikrazula izambatho zakhe, wanxiba ezirhwexayo zokuzila, waya kungena endlwini *kaNdikhoyo." 
2Kings19:2 Wathuma uEliyakim umaqhuzu wakomkhulu, noShebhena unobhala, kunye nababingeleli abaphambili, bonke benxibe ezirhwexayo, wathi mabaye *kumshumayeli uIsaya unyana ka-Amozi." 
2Kings19:3 Baya, bafika bathi: “UHezekiya uthi: ‘Lo ngumhla wenkxwaleko, impoxo, nehlazo. Sifana nomfazi ofikelwe lixesha lakhe lokuzala, kodwa engenawo amandla okujongana naloo meko." 
2Kings19:4 Makube uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho uwevile onke amazwi athethwe yingqwayi-ngqwayi leya ibithunywe yinkosi yayo ukumkani waseAsiriya ukuze ize kuphoxisa ngoThixo ophilayo. Ngamana yakhalinyelwa ngenxa yamazwi aweve ngokwakhe *uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. Ngoko ke nceda uthandazele amasalela asindileyo.’ ” 
2Kings19:5 Athe akufika kuIsaya loo maphakathi kakumkani uHezekiya," 
2Kings19:6 uIsaya wathi kuwo: “Yixeleleni inkosi yenu ukuba uNdikhoyo uthi: ‘Musa ukuxhalaba yiloo nto uyivileyo – loo mazwi athethwe liphakathi lokumkani waseAsiriya lindithuka. 
2Kings19:7 Uyabona ke, mna ndiza kumfaka umoya wokuba athi akuva umingi-mingi lodaba oluthile, asuke abuyele kwelakowabo. Khona apho ke ndiya kwenza ukuba abulawe ngekrele.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi engumbhexeshi womkhosi yathi yakuva ukuba ukumkani waseAsiriya umkile eLakishe, suka yarhoxa, yabuya umva, yaza yafika ukumkani esilwa neLibhena." 
2Kings19:9 Ke uSenakeribhe wafumana udaba oluthi uTiraka, umKushe ongukumkani waseJiputa, nanko ehlasela iAsiriya. Ngoko ke waphinda wathumela kuHezekiya esithi:" 
2Kings19:10 “Yithi kukumkani uHezekiya wakwaJuda: ‘Musa ukukhohliswa ngulo Thixo wakho umthembileyo. Uyakuxokisa xa esithi: “IJerusalem ayiyi kuthinjwa ngukumkani waseAsiriya.” 
2Kings19:11 Kaloku sowuzivile izigigaba zokumkani waseAsiriya kwezinye izizwe; uyazi ukuba wazibhukuqa wazitshabalalisa tu. Ke wena uthi uya kusinda njani? 
2Kings19:12 Babephi *oothixo bezizwe ezatshatyalaliswa ngoobawo-mkhulu? Abazihlangula ngani ke? Oothixo baseGozan, eHaran, eRezefe, nabo babantu base-Eden ababeseTelasare!" 
2Kings19:13 Uphi ngoku ukumkani waseHamati, nowaseArpadi, nokumkani wesixeko saseSefarvayim? Yena owaseHena nowaseIva uphi?’ ”" 
2Kings19:14 Ezo zigidimi zamnika loo leta uHezekiya, waza ke yena wayifunda, wayithatha waya nayo endlwini *kaNdikhoyo, wafika wayandlala phambi koNdikhoyo." 
2Kings19:15 Wathandaza kuNdikhoyo, wathi: “Ndikhoyo, Thixo kaSirayeli, wena osesihlalweni phakathi kwezithunywa ezimaphiko, nguwe kuphela onguThixo olawula zonke izikumkani zehlabathi. Wena wawadala amazulu kwanehlabathi." 
2Kings19:16 Kaloku ke, Ndikhoyo, khawubek' iindlebe uphulaphule. Vula amehlo akho ujonge, Ndikhoyo. Khawuweve la mazwi awathumeleyo uSenakeribhe, ethuka uThixo ophilayo." 
2Kings19:17 Sivile, Ndikhoyo, ukuba ookumkani baseAsiriya bazibhuqa bazitshabalalisa ezi zizwe kunye nemihlaba yazo." 
2Kings19:18 Oothixo bazo wabafaka emlilweni, wabatshabalalisa; kuba kakade babengethixo, koko yimifanekiso eqingqwe zizandla zabantu ngomthi nangelitye." 
2Kings19:19 Ngoko ke ngoku, Ndikhoyo Thixo wethu, khawusihlangule kulo mfo, khon' ukuze zonke izikumkani zehlabathi ziqonde ukuba nguwe wedwa, Ndikhoyo, onguThixo.”" 
2Kings19:20 Ke uIsaya unyana ka-Amozi wathumela umyalezo kuHezekiya, esithi: “*UNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli uthi: ‘Ndiwuvile umthandazo wakho mayela nokumkani waseAsiriya uSenakeribhe.’" 
2Kings19:21 Mayela naye ke uNdikhoyo uthi: “ ‘Okokwakho, wena Senakeribhe, isixeko iZiyon siyakugcolodela; isixeko iZiyon sihlekisa ngawe. Ewe, iJerusalem ihlunguzel' intloko xa ikubona wena uswantsula." 
2Kings19:22 Ngubani lo umngcikiva ngezinyeliso ezinje? Uba uthetha nabani ukhwaza nje? Ngubani lo umjonge ungenambeko? Lowo ke nguYedwa kaSirayeli! 
2Kings19:23 Wena uthumele izigidimi, uNdikhoyo wamfumba ngezithuko; kaloku ugcolode wathi: “Mna ndinenyambalala yeenqwelo; ngazo ndiqabel' iintab' eziphakamileyo, loo malenga-lenga aseLebhanon. Ndiyigawule imisedare yayo emide naloo mipayini yayo ingayiwayo. De ndafikelela nasekudeni, nditsho esitsikolweni sehlathi." 
2Kings19:24 Ndimbe amaqula kumazwe eentlanga, ndaza ke ndasela amanzi khona. Ndingqishe ngonyawo kuphela, yatsho yoma yonke imithomb' eJiputa.”" 
2Kings19:25 “ ‘Ngaba awuzange uve na; ukuba le nto yamiselwa ndim, ukuba sekuntsuku ndayicwangcisayo le nto yenzekayo namhlanje, ukuba wena udilize izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo, uzivuthulule zitsho zibe ngamabhodlo?" 
2Kings19:26 Abemi bazo baphelelwe ngamandla; bathe nkamalala, basezintlonini. Nqwa nomfino emasimini phaya ngathi zizithombo ezithukuzayo, ngathi yingc' entshula phezu kwendlu, esuk' itshe ingakhulanga nokukhula." 
2Kings19:27 “ ‘Kambe ke ndikwazi kakuhle, ndikwazi ukusuka nokuhlala namagwevu okundivukela kwakho." 
2Kings19:28 Kaloku wena uzimisele ukulwa nam. Ndivile nangokundinyelisa kwakho. Ndiza kukuqhobosha impumlo, ndikufake umkhala emlonyeni, ndikubuyisele aph' ubuvela khona.’" 
2Kings19:29 “Nanku ke umqondiso wakho, Hezekiya: “ ‘Kulo nyaka uya kutya ummilela, kowesibini utye ummilela wommilela, kowesithathu ke uhlwayele uvune utyale izidiliya, utye iziqhamo zazo." 
2Kings19:30 Ophinda ke amasalela endlu kaJuda amile; ewe, aya kuzika ade azinze, aqhelezele yinkqubela abe njeyaa." 
2Kings19:31 Kaloku lona lophuma eJerusalem; losuka lithi gqi qhaphu ihlumelo. Lothi nyalulu kwintaba iZiyon; nditsho iqela labo babhungcileyo. Ewe, uNdikhoyo uSomandla uzimisele, yaye ke eya kuyifezekisa loo nto.’" 
2Kings19:32 “Ewe, uNdikhoyo uthetha ngolu hlobo mayela nokumkani waseAsiriya: “ ‘Akasoze angene kwesi sixeko, engayi kudubula lutolo apha. Akasoze eze phambi kwaso, engayi kusihlanganisela ngakhaka. Akasayi kwakha asingqinge esi sixeko." 
2Kings19:33 Ewe, wobuya agoduke kwangendlela ebeze ngayo. Soze angene kwesi isixeko! Nditshilo nje mna Ndikhoyo, nditshilo." 
2Kings19:34 Ndiya kusihlanganisela esi sixeko; ewe, mna ndiya kusihlangula. Ngenxa yesidima segama lam, nangenxa yesicaka sam uDavide, yonke loo nto ndiya kuyenza.’ ”" 
2Kings19:35 Ngobo busuku ke isithunywa sikaNdikhoyo saya kumkhosi wama-Asiriya, safika sabulala amadoda alikhulu mashumi asibhozo anantlanu amawaka. Bathe ke bakuvuka ngentsasa elandelayo bazibona izidumbu zithe gangalala!" 
2Kings19:36 Ngoko ke uSenakeribhe, ukumkani waseAsiriya, wazichitha warhoxa, wabuyela eNiniva, wahlala khona." 
2Kings19:37 Ngamhla uthile ke uthe esanqula kwindlu yothixo wakhe uNiseroki, suka oonyana bakhe uAdrameleki noSharezere bamhlasela, bambulala ngekrele, baza ke babalekela kwelaseArarati. Ke uEsaridon, omnye koonyana bakhe, wangena esikhundleni sakhe, wangukumkani." 
2Kings20:1 Ngelo thuba ke ukumkani uHezekiya wahlabeka, waza wagulela ukungabikho. *Umshumayeli uIsaya, unyana ka-Amozi, waya kumbona, waza wathi kuye: “*UNdikhoyo uthi: ‘Lungisa imicimbi yomzi wakho ime kakuhle, kuba uza kufa, awuzukuphila.’ ”" 
2Kings20:2 Ke uHezekiya wasuka wafulathela, wajonga eludongeni, wathandaza kuNdikhoyo wathi:" 
2Kings20:3 “Khumbula kaloku, Ndikhoyo, ukuba oko ndakunqulayo ndikukhonza ngentembeko nokunyaniseka, ndaba soloko ndihamba ngokomyalelo wakho.” Suka ke wangqukruleka kabuhlungu." 
2Kings20:4 Uthe ke uIsaya engekaphumi kwindlu ephakathi, labe ilizwi likaNdikhoyo selifikile kuye. Lalisithi:" 
2Kings20:5 “Jika uxelele inkokheli yabantu bam uHezekiya, uthi: ‘Nali ilizwi elithethwa nguNdikhoyo uThixo kayihlo uDavide: Ndiwuvile umthandazo wakho, ndazibona neenyembezi zakho. Ndiza kukuphilisa. Ngosuku lwesithathu ukusuka ngoku uya kuya endlwini kaNdikhoyo." 
2Kings20:6 Ndiza kubongeza ngeminyaka elishumi elinesihlanu ubomi bakho. Futhi ndiza kukuhlangula wena kunye nesi sixeko kwisandla sokumkani waseAsiriya. Esi sixeko ndiza kusikhusela ngenxa yesidima segama lam nangenxa yesicaka sam uDavide.’ ” 
2Kings20:7 UIsaya uqhube wathi: “Ithumba elo libekeleni ngentlama yomkhiwane.” Ngenene ke balibekela ithumba elo, waza ke waphila." 
2Kings20:8 UHezekiya wabuza kuIsaya wathi: “Woba yintoni na umqondiso wokuba uNdikhoyo uya kundiphilisa ndize ndibe nako ukuya endlwini kaNdikhoyo ngosuku lwesithathu ukusuka ngoku?” 
2Kings20:9 UIsaya wathi: “Nanku ke umqondiso kaNdikhoyo ocacisa ukuba yena uya kwenza ngokwesithembiso sakhe. Ùthi isithunzi masiye phambili ishumi leenyawo okanye sibuye umva ishumi leenyawo?” 
2Kings20:10 UHezekiya wathi: “Yinto engenamsebenzi ukuba isithunzi siye phambili ishumi leenyawo. Hayi, kanye masibuye umva ishumi leenyawo.”" 
2Kings20:11 Ke umshumayeli uIsaya wanqula uNdikhoyo, waza uNdikhoyo wasibuyisa umva isithunzi kangangeenyawo ezilishumi apho kwisitupu sika-Ahazi." 
2Kings20:12 Ke kaloku ngelo xesha ukumkani waseBhabheli, uMerodaki-bhaladan unyana kaBhaladan, weva ukuba uHezekiya ubekhe wagula. Ngoko wambhalela iileta, wazithumela ngezigidimi kunye nesipho." 
2Kings20:13 UHezekiya wazamkela izigidimi ezo, waza wazibonisa konke okwakukoovimba bakhe: isiliva negolide, ubulawu neziqholo, nazo zonke izikrweqe zakhe zomkhosi. Wazingenisa kubo bonke oovimba bakhe, akwabikho nto zingayibonanga apho ebhotwe nakubukumkani bakhe buphela." 
2Kings20:14 Umshumayeli uIsaya ke waya kukumkani uHezekiya, wafika wabuza wathi: “La madoda ebevela phi, efuna ntoni khona?” UHezekiya uphendule wathi: “Aphuma kwelikude eBhabheli.”" 
2Kings20:15 “Ngaba kukho nto ayibonileyo ke apha komkhulu?” ubuzile umshumayeli. UHezekiya uphendule ngelithi: “Akukho nto angayibonanga. Ndiwangenise kubo bonke oovimba bam.” 
2Kings20:16 Waza ke uIsaya wathi kuHezekiya: “Nali ke ilizwi likaNdikhoyo: 
2Kings20:17 ‘Ngenene liyeza ithuba apho yonke into elapha komkhulu nalo lonke ilifa elashiywa ngooyihlo ukuza kuthi gaa namhlanje liya kuthinjwa lifuduselwe eBhabheli.’ Ewe, uNdikhoyo uthi akukho nto iya kusala." 
2Kings20:18 Abanye kubazukulwana besinqe sakho kanye baya kuthinjwa, baze benziwe amathenwa, babe zizicaka kwibhotwe lokumkani waseBhabheli.”" 
2Kings20:19 “Eli lizwi likaNdikhoyo ulithethayo lifanelekile,” uphendule watsho uHezekiya. Kaloku wayesithi: “Noko kuya kubakho inzolo nokhuseleko ngemihla yokudla kwam ubomi.”" 
2Kings20:20 Ke ezinye zeziganeko zikaHezekiya, nayo yonke imizabalazo yakhe esenza iqula netonela awatsala amanzi ngalo ewangenisa esixekweni, nâzo encwadini yeembali zookumkani bakwaJuda." 
2Kings20:21 UHezekiya ke waya kuphumla kooyise, waza ke unyana wakhe uManase wangukumkani esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings21:1 UManase wayeneshumi elinesibini leminyaka ukuqala kwakhe ukuba ngukumkani, waza ke walawula eJerusalem iminyaka emashumi mahlanu anesihlanu. Unina yayinguHefezibha." 
2Kings21:2 Wênza okubi emehlweni *kaNdikhoyo, wasuka wahamba ekhondweni lemikhwa emasikizi yezo zizwe wazigxothayo uNdikhoyo phambi kwamaSirayeli." 
2Kings21:3 Iindawo zonqulo eziphakamileyo awazitshitshisayo uyise uHezekiya, yena wabuya wazivusa, kananjalo wakhela noBhali amaqonga, wenza nentsika ka-Ashera, kanye ngendlela awayenze ngayo uAhabhi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli. Wayequbuda nakwiindidi zonke zeenkwenkwezi ezinqula." 
2Kings21:4 Wakha amaqonga endlwini kaNdikhoyo, nangona uNdikhoyo wayeyalele wathi: “Igama lam ndolimisa eJerusalem.”" 
2Kings21:5 Kuzo zombini iinkundla endlwini kaNdikhoyo wakhela iinkwenkwezi amaqonga. 
2Kings21:6 Unyana wakhe wamfaka emlilweni, esenza idini ngaye. Wayethe phithi yimilingo nokuvumisa, ehamba kumagqirha noosiyazi. Wayegqithisile ukwenza ububi emehlweni *kaNdikhoyo, emqumbisa." 
2Kings21:7 Wathatha intsika ka-Ashera awayeyikrolile, wayifaka endlwini kaThixo, ukanti ke uNdikhoyo wayemyalile uDavide ndawonye noSolomon unyana wakhe, wathi: “Igama lam ndolimisa kude kube ngunaphakade apha kule ndlu eJerusalem, ndawo leyo ndayinyulayo phakathi kwazo zonke izindlu zikaSirayeli." 
2Kings21:8 Ukuba amaSirayeli abe nenyameko, akwenza konke endiwayalele kona, awuthobela wonke umthetho awawunikwa sisicaka sam uMosis, mna andisoze ndibuye ndiwenze abhadule emke kweli lizwe ndalinika ooyise.”" 
2Kings21:9 Kodwa akaphulaphulanga, kuba uManase wawalahlekisa ngangokuba wada wabalasela ekwenzeni ububi kunezo zizwe wazitshabalalisayo uNdikhoyo phambi kwamaSirayeli." 
2Kings21:10 UNdikhoyo wathetha ngomlomo wezicaka zakhe *abashumayeli, wathi:" 
2Kings21:11 “UManase ukumkani wakwaJuda wenze izono ezilumezayo. Yena ubalasele ekwenzeni okubi kunawo nama-Amori awayelapho ngaphambi kwakhe. Ngale mifanekiso yakhe uJuda umlukuhlele esonweni. 
2Kings21:12 Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo, uThixo kaSirayeli, utsho ukuthi: ‘Niyabona, iJerusalem ndawonye noJuda ndiza kuyithobela isithwakumbe esiya kubetha zithi nzwii iindlebe zakhe wonke umntu ophulaphuleyo." 
2Kings21:13 Apha phezu kweJerusalem ndiza kuthoba isohlwayo esifana neso ndayohlwaya ngaso iSamariya kunye nendlu ka-Ahabhi. IJerusalem ndoyitshabalalisa ndiyibhukuqe oku komntu osula isitya aze asiphethule. 
2Kings21:14 Ndosuka ndiwabukule amasalela alilifa lam; ewe, ndowanikezela ezandleni zeentshaba zawo. Aya kuxhatshazwa abhunculwe ziintshaba zawo." 
2Kings21:15 Kaloku wona asuke enza okubi emehlweni am, awuxhokonxa umsindo wam, nto leyo ke yenzeka kwamhla bâphuma ooyise eJiputa kude kube namhla.’ ”" 
2Kings21:16 Ngaphezu koko ke uManase waliphalaza gqitha igazi elingenatyala, eqalela kweli cala, athi xhaxhe kweliya icala leJerusalem; nangaphandle kwesono awalukuhlela amaJuda kuso ukuze enze okubi emehlweni kaNdikhoyo." 
2Kings21:17 Ke ezinye zeziganeko zolawulo lukaManase, nayo yonke imisebenzi yakhe ikunye neso sono sakhe, nâzo encwadini yeembali zookumkani bakwaJuda." 
2Kings21:18 Ke uManase waya kuphumla kooyise, waza wangcwatywa emyezweni wakhe apho ebhotwe – lowo ke ngumyezo kaUza. Unyana wakhe uAmon wangena esikhundleni sakhe wangukumkani." 
2Kings21:19 Ke kaloku uAmon wayeneminyaka emashumi mabini anambini ezelwe ukuqala kwakhe ukulawula, waza ke walawula iminyaka emibini eJerusalem. Unina yayinguMeshulemete intombi kaHaruze eYotebha." 
2Kings21:20 KwanjengoManase uyise naye wênza okubi emehlweni *kaNdikhoyo. 
2Kings21:21 Yena wahamba ekhondweni likayise, akanxaxha; naye wanqula imifanekiso *yezithixo njengoyise, equbuda kuyo." 
2Kings21:22 Wasuka wambukula uNdikhoyo uThixo wooyise, akahamba ngendlela yakhe." 
2Kings21:23 Ke amaphakathi kakumkani uAmon amenzela iyelenqe, ambulalela kwakhe ebhotwe." 
2Kings21:24 Bona ke abantu belo zwe bababulala bonke abo babenzele ukumkani uAmon iyelenqe, baza babeka unyana wakhe uJosiya wangukumkani esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings21:25 Ezinye ke iziganeko zolawulo luka-Amon, nemisebenzi yakhe, nâzo encwadini yeembali zookumkani bakwaJuda." 
2Kings21:26 Wangcwatyelwa engcwabeni lakhe emyezweni kaUza. Unyana wakhe uJosiya waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe. 
2Kings22:1 UJosiya waqalisa ukulawula eneminyaka esibhozo, waza walawula eJerusalem iminyaka emashumi mathathu ananye. Unina yayinguYedida intombi ka-Adaya waseBhozekati." 
2Kings22:2 Ke yena wênza okuhle emehlweni *kaNdikhoyo, ehamba ekhondweni likayise-mkhulu uDavide, enganxaxhi." 
2Kings22:3 Ngonyaka wakhe weshumi elinesibhozo ukumkani uJosiya wathumela unobhala onguShafan unyana ka-Azaliya kaMeshulam endlwini kaNdikhoyo, wathi kuye:" 
2Kings22:4 “Yiya kumbingeleli omkhulu uHilekiya, utsho alungise laa mali ibiziswe endlwini kaNdikhoyo, leya ibiqokelelwe ngabagcini-mnyango ebantwini." 
2Kings22:5 Yitsho bayigcinise kuloo madoda amiselwe ukongamela umsebenzi wendlu kaThixo. Loo madoda ke wona aze ahlawule abasebenzi abahlaziya indlu kaNdikhoyo: 
2Kings22:6 abachweli, abakhi, neengcibi. Kananjalo mabathenge imithi namatye akroliweyo, ukuze kuhlaziywe indlu kaThixo." 
2Kings22:7 Kambe ke ze bangenzi nkcukacha yangxelo ngaloo mali isezandleni zabo, kuba bangabantu abasebenza ngentembeko.”" 
2Kings22:8 UHilekiya umbingeleli omkhulu ke waxelela uShafan unobhala lowo, wathi: “Apha endlwini kaNdikhoyo ndifumene incwadi yomthetho.” Waza ke wamnika, ke yena uShafan wayifunda." 
2Kings22:9 UShafan lowo ke waya kukumkani, waza wamazisa wathi: “Izicaka zakho ziyikhuphile imali ebisendlwini kaNdikhoyo, zaza zayinikezela kubasebenzi nakwabo bongamele umsebenzi wokuhlaziywa kwendlu kaThixo.”" 
2Kings22:10 Kananjalo ke unobhala lowo unguShafan wathi kukumkani: “Umbingeleli uHilekiya undinike incwadi.” Waza ke wayirhola, wayifundela ukumkani lowo." 
2Kings22:11 Uthe ke ukumkani akuweva amazwi encwadi leyo yomthetho, suka wazikrazula izambatho zakhe." 
2Kings22:12 Wamnika lo myalelo, ewubhekisa kumbingeleli uHilekiya, uAhikam unyana kaShafan, uAkibho unyana kaMikaya, uShafan unobhala, kunye noAsaya igosa likakumkani, esithi:" 
2Kings22:13 “Hambani niye kuqondisisa kuNdikhoyo egameni lam, nelabantu, noJuda ephela, nibuzise ngako konke okubhaliweyo kule ncwadi ifunyenweyo. Awunganganto umsindo kaNdikhoyo ngakuthi ngenxa yoobawo abangazange bawathobele amazwi ale ncwadi. Ewe, abenzanga ngokufanelekileyo mayela namazwi athethwa yile ncwadi ngokubhekiselele kuthi.”" 
2Kings22:14 Ke umbingeleli uHilekiya, noAhikam, uAkibho, uShafan, noAsaya, baya kuthetha nomshumayelikazi uHulda owayengumka-Shalum unyana kaTikiwa kaHarase, owayengumgcini wegumbi lezambatho. Yena wayehlala kwisithili sesibini eJerusalem." 
2Kings22:15 Ke yena wathetha nabo wathi: “Utsho uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli ukuthi: ‘Mxeleleni loo mntu unithume kum nithi: 
2Kings22:16 Utsho uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Niyabona, le ndawo ndiza kuyizisela isithwakumbe kunye nabantu bayo, ngokwamazwi onke abhaliweyo kule ncwadi ayifundileyo ukumkani wakwaJuda." 
2Kings22:17 Kaloku bona bandilahlile, basuka benza iziqhumiso, besenzela thixo bambi, nto leyo iwuxhokonxileyo umsindo wam. Ewe, umsindo wam soze uthothe mayela neli lizwe; kaloku abantu balo basuke baxabisa imifanekiso abayenze ngezandla zabo." 
2Kings22:18 Mxeleleni ukumkani wakwaJuda onithume ukuba nize kubuzisa kuNdikhoyo nithi: La ngamazwi athethwe nguNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli ngokunxulumene namazwi owevileyo. 
2Kings22:19 Ke ngenxa yokuba wena uhlabekile, waza wazithoba kum wakuweva amazwi endawathethayo ngokubhekiselele kule ndawo nabantu bayo, xa ndandisithi baqalekisiwe, futhi le ndawo iya kwenziwa ibe yinkangala, wena ke ngenxa yokuba usuke walila wazikrazula izambatho zakho, mna Ndikhoyo ndithi ndikuvile." 
2Kings22:20 Ngoko ke ndiya kukubuyisela kooyihlo, ungcwatywe ngoxolo. Awakho amehlo akasayi kusibona isithwakumbe endiza kusithoba phezu kweli lizwe.’ ” Loo mpendulo ke bâya kuyixelela ukumkani." 
2Kings23:1 Ke ukumkani uJosiya wawaqokelela onke amadoda amakhulu akwaJuda nawaseJerusalem. 
2Kings23:2 Wahamba waya endlwini *kaNdikhoyo kunye namadoda akwaJuda, nabantu baseJerusalem, ababingeleli nabashumayeli. Ewe, waqokelela umntu wonke, eqalela komncinci aye komdala. Wabafundela onke amazwi encwadi yomnqophiso, leyo yayifunyenwe endlwini kaNdikhoyo." 
2Kings23:3 Ukumkani wema ngasentsikeni, wawuhlaziya umnqophiso kunye noNdikhoyo, ethembisa ukulandela uNdikhoyo, ayithobele imiyalelo, imiqathango, nemimiselo yakhe, oko ekwenza ngomxhelo wakhe wonke, ngokwamazwi aloo mnqophiso wawubhalwe apho encwadini. Nabantu ke bathembisa bazibophelela apho emnqophisweni." 
2Kings23:4 Ukumkani wayalela umbingeleli omkhulu uHilekiya, nababingeleli abanganeno kwakhe, nabagcini-mnyango, ukuba bazisuse apho endlwini kaNdikhoyo zonke izinto ezazenzelwe uBhali noAshera neenkwenkwezi. Zonke ezo zinto wazitshisela ngaphandle kweJerusalem kwezo ntili zeKedron; ke lona uthuthu waluthatha walusa eBhetele." 
2Kings23:5 Wabadenda abo babingeleli banqula *izithixo, abo babemiselwe ngookumkani bakwaJuda ukuze benze iziqhumiso kwiindawo eziphakamileyo zonqulo kwiidolophu zakwaJuda, nakwezo zingqonge iJerusalem. Abo ke babesenzela uBhali iziqhumiso, besenzela ilanga, inyanga, nazo zonke iinkwenkwezi ezisesibhaka-bhakeni." 
2Kings23:6 Intsika ka-Ashera wayincothula endlwini kaNdikhoyo, wayisa kwintili yeKedron ngaphandle kweJerusalem, wayitshisela khona. Wayisila yaluthuli, waza olo thuli lwayo walusarhaza phezu kwamangcwaba abantu." 
2Kings23:7 Wawachitha amagumbi awayehlala amahenyu apho endlwini kaNdikhoyo, apho abafazi babezalukela khona iimpahla zika-Ashera." 
2Kings23:8 UJosiya wabaqokelela bonke ababingeleli kwiidolophu zakwaJuda, waza wazibhangisa iindawo eziphakamileyo zonqulo, eqalela eGebha, wathi xhaxhe ngeBheshebha, ndawo ezo babeqhumisa kuzo ababingeleli abo. Wazidiliza izibingelelo emasangweni phaya, ekungeneni kwisango likaYoshuwa unolali elingasekhohlo kwisango lesixeko." 
2Kings23:9 Nangona ababingeleli beendawo eziphakamileyo zonqulo babengasebenzi kwiqonga likaNdikhoyo eJerusalem, kodwa babesitya isonka esinganyuswanga kunye noogxa babo abangababingeleli." 
2Kings23:10 UJosiya wayibhangisa iTofeti eyayikwintili yeBhen-hinom, ukuze ingabi sasetyenziselwa ukwenzela uMoleki amadini ngabantwana." 
2Kings23:11 Apho esangweni elingena endlwini kaNdikhoyo wawasusa loo mahashe ayenikezelwe ngookumkani bakwaJuda elangeni. Ayesenkundleni ngakwigumbi legosa ekwakuthiwa nguNatan-meleki. Neenqwelo ezazinikezelwe kwilanga wazitshisa. 
2Kings23:12 Wawadiliza amaqonga awayakhiwe ngookumkani bakwaJuda ngaphezu kwegumbi eliphezulu lika-Ahazi, kunye naloo maqonga wawakhayo uManase kwiinkundla zombini zendlu kaNdikhoyo. Ewe, wawasusa wawadiliza ayimvuthuluka yenkunkuma awayiphosa kwintili yeKedron." 
2Kings23:13 Ke kaloku ukumkani wazixabhela neendawo eziphakamileyo zonqulo ezazikwimpuma yeJerusalem, ngezantsi kwenduli yomonakalo, ezo uSolomon ukumkani wamaSirayeli wayezakhele uAshtoreti isikizi lesithixokazi samaSidon, neendawo eziphakamileyo zonqulo zikaKemoshe, isikizi lesithixo samaMowabhi, nesikaMilikom isikizi lesithixo sama-Amon." 
2Kings23:14 UJosiya wazaphula iintsika zamatye, waza wazigawula iintsika zika-Ashera, waza ezo ndawo zazo wazigquma ngamathambo abantu." 
2Kings23:15 Walidiliza neqonga eliseBhetele, loo ndawo yonqulo yayenziwe nguJerobhowam unyana kaNebhati, lowo walukuhlela amaSirayeli esonweni, konke nje wakutshabalalisa, loo ndawo yonqulo wayitshisa wayisila yaluthuli, ngokunjalo nentsika ka-Ashera wayitshisa." 
2Kings23:16 UJosiya wakhangela ngapha nangapha waza wabona amangcwaba awayelapho kwelo thambeka, wathi makakhutshwe kuwo amathambo, waza wawatshisela eqongeni ukulixabhela ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo elavakaliswa ngumfo wakwaThixo owazixelayo kwangaphambili ezo zinto." 
2Kings23:17 Ukumkani wathi: “Elaa litye lengcwaba ndilibonayo lelikabani?” Amadoda eso sixeko athi kuye: “Eliya lingcwaba lomfo wakwaThixo owayevela kwaJuda, waza waxela ezi zinto uzenzileyo mayela neli qonga laseBhetele.”" 
2Kings23:18 Wathi: “Liyekeni ke; makungaze kubekho mntu uwachukumisayo amathambo akhe.” Ngoko ke bawayeka amathambo akhe kunye nalawo omshumayeli owayevela eSamariya. 
2Kings23:19 Kwanjengoko wenzayo eBhetele uJosiya wazisusa wazixabela zonke izibingelelo ezindaweni eziphakamileyo zonqulo, ezo zazakhiwe ngookumkani bakwaSirayeli kwiidolophu zaseSamariya, nto leyo eyawuxhokonxayo umsindo kaNdikhoyo." 
2Kings23:20 UJosiya wababulalela apho emaqongeni bonke ababingeleli bezo ndawo zonqulo, watshisa amathambo omntu kuloo maqonga. Waza ke wabuyela eJerusalem." 
2Kings23:21 Ke kaloku ukumkani wabanika umyalalelo bonke abantu othi: “Yenzani *iPasika *kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu njengoko kubhaliweyo kule ncwadi yomnqophiso.” 
2Kings23:22 IPasika le ke yayingazange yenziwa, kwaukususela kwimihla yeenkokheli ezazikhokela uSirayeli, ingazange yenziwa nakwimihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli, ngokunjalo nakweyâbo bakwaJuda." 
2Kings23:23 Kambe ke ngonyaka weshumi elinesibhozo kakumkani uJosiya yabhiyozelwa iPasika kaNdikhoyo eJerusalem. 
2Kings23:24 Ngaphezu koko ke uJosiya wazibhangisa zonke izangoma namagqirha, nayo yonke imilonde-khaya nemifanekiso ezizithixo, nazo zonke izinto ezingamasikizi ezazifumaneka ezweni lakwaJuda naseJerusalem. Yonke ke loo nto wayenza efezekisa imiqathango yomthetho eyayibhalwe kuloo ncwadi yayifunyenwe ngumbingeleli uHilekiya endlwini kaNdikhoyo." 
2Kings23:25 Ngaphambili nasemva kwakhe uJosiya wayengazange abekho, engaphindanga wakhona, ukumkani owayezinikezele kuNdikhoyo njengaye, loo nto eyenza ngomxhelo wakhe uphela, nangamandla akhe, njengoko usitsho umthetho kaMosis." 
2Kings23:26 Nakuba kunjalo ke kodwa, yena uNdikhoyo akajikanga kwingcwangu yomsindo wakhe owawuvutha ngakuJuda, ngenxa yezinto awayemxhokonxe ngazo uManase." 
2Kings23:27 Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo wathi: “Ndiza kumgxotha phambi kwam uJuda kwanjengoko ndenzayo kuSirayeli; ewe, ndoyibukula iJerusalem, isixeko endasinyulayo, nditsho nkqu nayo le ndlu endandithethe ngayo ndathi: ‘Lohlala kuyo igama lam.’ ”" 
2Kings23:28 Ke zona ezinye zeziganeko zolawulo lukaJosiya, nayo yonke imizabalazo yakhe, nâzo encwadini yeembali zookumkani bakwaJuda." 
2Kings23:29 Ke kaloku ngaloo mihla kakumkani uJosiya ukumkani waseJiputa uNeko wanyuka waya kuncedisa ukumkani waseAsiriya ngakumlambo iEfrati. Ukumkani uJosiya waphuma nomkhosi wakhe wamhlangabeza. Kodwa ke uNeko lowo wagagana naye eMegido, wamosela wafa." 
2Kings23:30 Ke amaphakathi akhe awuthatha umzimba kaJosiya apho eMegido, awuthwala ngenqwelo, aya nawo eJerusalem, afika amfaka engcwabeni lakhe. Abemi belizwe ke bathatha uYowahazi unyana kaJosiya, bamthambisa bammisela wangukumkani esikhundleni sikayise." 
2Kings23:31 Ukuqala kwakhe ukulawula uYowahazi wayeneminyaka emashumi mabini anantathu, walawula apho eJerusalem iinyanga zantathu. Unina yayinguHamutali intombi kaJeremiya okhaya laliseLibhena." 
2Kings23:32 Naye wathatha ikhondo looyise-mkhulu ngokwenza okubi emehlweni kaNdikhoyo. 
2Kings23:33 Ukumkani waseJiputa uNeko wamkhonkxa ngamatyathanga eRibhela, umhlaba waseHamati, waza ke akabi nako ukulawula apho eJerusalem. Kananjalo uJuda wammisela irhafu yeekhilogram zesiliva ezimawaka mathathu makhulu mane, kunye neekhilogram zegolide ezimashumi mathathu anane." 
2Kings23:34 Ke kaloku ukumkani waseJiputa uNeko lowo wathatha unyana kaJosiya uEliyakim wammisela wangukumkani esikhundleni sikayise, igama lakhe elo walijika wathi nguJoyakim. Ke yena uYowahazi wamfudusela eJiputa, apho wafela khona." 
2Kings23:35 UJoyakim wayeyikhupha loo siliva naloo golide yayimiselwe ngukumkani waseJiputa. Loo mrhumo ke wawukhupha ngokurhafisa abantu belizwe lakhe, bekhupha isiliva negolide ngokwezinto abanazo." 
2Kings23:36 UJoyakim waqalisa ukulawula eneminyaka emashumi mabini anantlanu, waza ke walawula eJerusalem iminyaka elishumi elinanye. Unina yayinguZebhida intombi kaPedaya waseRuma." 
2Kings23:37 Wênza okubi emehlweni *kaNdikhoyo; naye wathatha ikhondo looyise-mkhulu. 
2Kings24:1 Ngexesha lolawulo lukaJoyakim, ukumkani uNebhukadenezare waseBhabheli walihlasela elakwaJuda, waza uJoyakim waba phantsi kwakhe iminyaka emithathu. Phofu ke uJoyakim wabuya wamvukela uNebhukadenezare lowo." 
2Kings24:2 Kambe ke *uNdikhoyo wamthumelela ngeentshaba ezamhlaselayo, ingamaKaledi, nama-Aram, namaMowabhi, nama-Amon. Ezo ntshaba zazikho ukuze zimtshabalalise uJuda, ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo elavakaliswa zizicaka zakhe *abashumayeli." 
2Kings24:3 Ewe, ezi zinto uJuda zamhlela ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo, ukuze amgxothe phambi kwakhe ngenxa yezono nazo zonke izenzo ezazenziwe nguManase," 
2Kings24:4 ndawonye nelo gazi limsulwa waliphalazayo. Kaloku iJerusalem wayizalisa ngegazi labamsulwa, ngoko ke uNdikhoyo wayengazimiselanga ukumxolela." 
2Kings24:5 Ke ezinye zeziganeko zolawulo lukaJoyakim, kunye nemisebenzi yakhe nâzo encwadini yeembali zookumkani bakwaJuda." 
2Kings24:6 UJoyakim waya kuphumla kooyise. Esikhundleni sakhe kwangena unyana wakhe uJoyakin. 
2Kings24:7 Ukumkani waseJiputa akaphindanga aphume elizweni lakhe aye kuhlasela, kuba kaloku ukumkani waseBhabheli wawuthatha wonke umhlaba wakhe ukuqalela kumda waseJiputa kuye kuthi xhaxhe ngomlambo iEfrati." 
2Kings24:8 UJoyakin waqala ukulawula eneminyaka elishumi elinesibhozo, waza walawula eJerusalem iinyanga ezintathu. Unina yayinguNehushta intombi kaElinatan waseJerusalem." 
2Kings24:9 Wênza okubi emehlweni *kaNdikhoyo kwanjengooyise. 
2Kings24:10 Ngelo xesha ke iingqwayi-ngqwayi zomkhosi zikakumkani uNebhukadenezare waseBhabheli zahlasela iJerusalem zayingqinga," 
2Kings24:11 waza ke nokumkani uNebhukadenezare weza ngokwakhe apho eJerusalem, ngoko ingqingiweyo ngumkhosi wakhe." 
2Kings24:12 Ke ukumkani wakwaJuda uJoyakin kunye nonina, nezicaka zakhe, izikhulu namagosa akhe, bebonke bazinikezela kukumkani waseBhabheli. Ke kaloku kwathi kunyaka wesibhozo elawula ukumkani waseBhabheli wamthimba walibanjwa uJoyakin." 
2Kings24:13 Ke kaloku ngokomlomo kaNdikhoyo uNebhukadenezare wabufudusa bonke ubutyebi endlwini kaNdikhoyo nakoovimba basebhotwe, wazinqunqa zonke ezo zinto zegolide ezazenzelwe indlu kaNdikhoyo ngukumkani uSolomon wakwaSirayeli." 
2Kings24:14 Xa iyonke iJerusalem wayithimba: onke amaphakathi namadoda omkhosi, iingcibi namagcisa, bebonke yayilishumi lamawaka. Kuphela kwasala abona bantu bangamahlwempu kwaJuda." 
2Kings24:15 UNebhukadenezare wathimba uJoyakin waya naye eBhabheli. Kananjalo wafudusela apho eBhabheli unina kakumkani, nabafazi bakakumkani, namagosa akhe, kunye namadoda aphambili elizweni." 
2Kings24:16 Waya nawo eBhabheli wonke umkhosi – amawaka asixhenxe amadoda, nditsho amagorha, izinto ezilindele umayenzeke – kunye newaka leengcibi namagcisa." 
2Kings24:17 Ke ukumkani waseBhabheli wamisela uMataniya uyisekazi kaJoyakin wangukumkani esikhundleni sikaJoyakin. Igama lakhe elo lona walijika wathi nguZedekiya. 
2Kings24:18 Ukuqala kwakhe ukuba ngukumkani uZedekiya wayeneminyaka emashumi mabini ananye, waza ke walawula eJerusalem iminyaka elishumi elinanye. Unina yayinguHamutali intombi kaJeremiya waseLibhena." 
2Kings24:19 KwanjengoJoyakim naye wenza ububi emehlweni *kaNdikhoyo. 
2Kings24:20 Kungenxa yengqumbo kaNdikhoyo ukuba uJuda neJerusalem bahlelwe yile ntlekele, bade ekugqibeleni ke bagxothwa phambi kwakhe. UZedekiya wavukelana nokumkani waseBhabheli." 
2Kings25:1 Ngoko ke kwathi kunyaka wethoba wolawulo lukaZedekiya, ngomhla weshumi wenyanga yeshumi, ukumkani waseBhabheli uNebhukadenezare wagaleleka eJerusalem nomkhosi wakhe uphela. Wamisa ngaphandle kwesixeko, wasingqinga ngokusakhela udonga." 
2Kings25:2 Sahlala singqingiwe njalo ke isixeko eso yada yangunyaka weshumi elinanye kakumkani uZedekiya. 
2Kings25:3 Kwathi ngomhla wethoba kwinyanga yesine yabe indlala ibhokile apho esixekweni, kangangokuba abantu baphelelwa kukutya." 
2Kings25:4 Ke kaloku wonke umkhosi watyhoboza apho eludongeni ngobusuku, wasaba uphuma ngesango eliphakathi kwezo ndonga zimbini ngakumyezo kakumkani, nakuba wona amaKaledi ayesingqingile isixeko. Wabalekela ngakwintili yeJordan." 
2Kings25:5 Kambe ke umkhosi wamaKaledi wasukelisa, waza wambamba uZedekiya nomkhosi wakhe xa asezinkqantosini zaseJeriko. Wahlukaniswa nomkhosi lowo, wona wasarhaka," 
2Kings25:6 waza yena wathinjwa. Wathathwa wasiwa eRibhela kukumkani waseBhabheli, apho wagwetywa khona." 
2Kings25:7 Oonyana bakhe uZedekiya babulawa ekhangele. Yena uZedekiya bamtyhaphaza amehlo, baza bamkhonkxa ngamatyathanga obhedu, baya naye eBhabheli." 
2Kings25:8 Ke kaloku kwathi ngomhla wesixhenxe wenyanga yesihlanu kunyaka weshumi elinethoba kakumkani waseBhabheli uNebhukadenezare ingqwayi-ngqwayi yabalindi uNebhuzaradan eyayiliphakathi likakumkani waseBhabheli yagaleleka eJerusalem. 
2Kings25:9 Indlu *kaNdikhoyo wayintumeka umlilo, yatsha kunye nebhotwe ngokwalo, nazo zonke izakhiwo zaseJerusalem. Zonke izakhiwo ezibalulekileyo wazitshisa." 
2Kings25:10 Wonke loo mkhosi waseBhabheli phantsi kwaloo ngqwayi-ngqwayi yabalindi basebhotwe walungenela waludiliza lonke udonga olwalujikeleze iJerusalem. 
2Kings25:11 UNebhuzaradan lowo wababamba wabathimba abantu ababesekhona apho esixekweni, ndawonye namagcisa kwakunye nâbo babesebewelele ngakumaBhabheli." 
2Kings25:12 Kambe ke ingqwayi-ngqwayi leyo yabashiya abantu abahleleleke kakhulu, ukuze basebenze amasimi nezidiliya." 
2Kings25:13 AmaBhabheli azaphula iintsika zobhedu kwakunye neenqwelo, nechibi lobhedu, zinto ezo zazisendlwini kaNdikhoyo, aza aluthatha lona ubhedu olo, aya nalo eBhabheli." 
2Kings25:14 Azithatha neembiza, iifotsholo, izikhwezeli-zibane, namacephe, nazo zonke izinto ezenziwe ngobhedu ezazisetyenziswa apho endlwini kaThixo." 
2Kings25:15 Ewe, ingqwayi-ngqwayi leyo yazithatha neepani zesiqhumiso, kunye nezitya zokufefa, nayo yonke into eyayenziwe ngegolide okanye isiliva." 
2Kings25:16 Ubhedu olwafumaneka kwezo ntsika zimbini, kwelo chibi, nakwezo nqwelo – zinto ezo ezazenzelwe indlu kaNdikhoyo nguSolomon – lwalungenamlinganiso ngenxa yobuninzi." 
2Kings25:17 Intsika nganye kwezo zimbini zobhedu yayiziimitha ezisibhozo ukuphakama, intloko elubhedu iyimitha enesithathu ukuphakama. Intloko nganye yayihonjiswe jikelele ngomnatha wobhedu nangeerharnati zobhedu. Ewe, zombini zazifana, nditsho zinomnatha zinjalo." 
2Kings25:18 Loo ngqwayi-ngqwayi yabalindi yamthimba umbingeleli omkhulu uSeraya, kunye nombingeleli onganeno kwakhe uZefaniya, nabagcini-mnyango abathathu." 
2Kings25:19 Kwabaseleyo apho esixekweni yathatha umphathi womkhosi kunye nesihlanu sabacebisi basebhotwe. Yamthatha nonobhala owayeligosa eliyintloko elihlela abomkhosi, kunye namahlakani akhe angamashumi amathandathu, bantu abo babeselapho esixekweni." 
2Kings25:20 Bonke ke uNebhuzaradan wabathatha waya nabo kukumkani waseBhabheli eRibhela. 
2Kings25:21 Khona apho eRibhela kwelaseHamati ukumkani lowo wathi mababulawe. Ngaloo ndlela ke amaJuda afuduselwa ekuthinjweni, kude lee nelizwe lakowawo." 
2Kings25:22 Ukumkani waseBhabheli uNebhukadenezare wamisela uGedaliya unyana ka-Ahikam unyana kaShafan wangumlawuli wâbo bantu wabashiyayo kwelakwaJuda. 
2Kings25:23 Ke amagosa omkhosi neqela lawo athi akuva ukuba ukumkani waseBhabheli umisele uGedaliya ukuba abe ngumlawuli, asuka aya kuye uGedaliya eMizpa: uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya, uYohanan unyana kaKareya, uSeraya unyana kaTanumente umNetofa, noYazaniya unyana kaMahakati, bekunye neqela labo." 
2Kings25:24 Ke uGedaliya wawaqinisekisa loo madoda efunga esithi: “Musani ukuba naxhala niwoyike amagosa aseBhabheli. Kuphela nina hlalani phantsi nizinze kweli lizwe, nibuse ukumkani waseBhabheli; konke ke konilungela.”" 
2Kings25:25 Kambe ke kwathi ngenyanga yesixhenxe wasuka uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya kaElishama, owayengumntwana wegazi, weza neshumi lamadoda, bambulala uGedaliya kunye namadoda akwaJuda namaBhabheli awayekunye naye eMizpa." 
2Kings25:26 Ngenxa yesi sihelegu ke bonke abantu, kuqalela komdala kuye komncinci bekunye namagosa omkhosi, bathi ngokoyika amaBhabheli basaba baya kwelaseJiputa." 
2Kings25:27 Ke kaloku kwathi ngonyaka wamashumi amathathu anesixhenxe wathinjwayo uJoyakin ukumkani wakwaJuda, nyaka lowo waqala ngawo ukulawula uEvili-merodaki ukumkani waseBhabheli, wasuka wamkhulula uJoyakin entolongweni. Loo nto ke yenzeka ngomhla wamashumi mabini anesixhenxe kwinyanga yeshumi elinambini." 
2Kings25:28 Wathetha naye ngobulali, wamnika isihlalo sembeko esingaphezu kwezo zabanye ookumkani awayenabo apho eBhabheli." 
2Kings25:29 Ngoko ke uJoyakin wazikhulula iimpahla zasentolongweni, waza wasoloko esesithebeni sokumkani lonke ixesha lobomi bakhe." 
2Kings25:30 Ukumkani lowo ke wathi rhoqo wamxhasa ngokutya uJoyakin, loo nto eyenza imihla ngemihla ngabo bonke ubomi bukaJoyakin." 
1Chronicles1:1 UAdam wazala uSeti, uSeti wazala uEnoshe," 
1Chronicles1:2 uEnoshe wazala uKenan, uKenan wazala uMahalaleli, uMahalaleli wazala uJerede," 
1Chronicles1:3 uJerede wazala uInoki, uInoki wazala uMethusela, uMethusela wazala uLameki, uLameki wazala uNowa." 
1Chronicles1:4 Ke uNowa wazala uShem noHam noYafete. 
1Chronicles1:5 Oonyana bakaYafete nguGomere, noMagogi, noMadayi, noJavan, noTubhali, noMesheki, noTirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Oonyana bakaGomere nguAshekenazi, noRifati, noTogarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Oonyana bakaJavan: nguElisha, noTashishe, namaKiti, namaRoda." 
1Chronicles1:8 Naba oonyana bakaHam: nguKushe, noMizerayim, noPuti, noKanana." 
1Chronicles1:9 Oonyana bakaKushe nguSebha, noHavila, noSabheta, noRama, noSabheteka. Oonyana bakaRama nguShebha noDedan." 
1Chronicles1:10 Ke uKushe wazala uNimrodi owaba ligorha lokuqala emhlabeni. 
1Chronicles1:11 Nasi isizukulwana sikaMizerayim: ngamaLudi, nama-Anam, namaLehabhi, namaNafetuyi," 
1Chronicles1:12 namaPatrusi, namaKaseluyi (apho kwaphuma khona amaFilistiya), namaKafto." 
1Chronicles1:13 UKanana wazala uSidon owamazibulo, noHeti," 
1Chronicles1:14 kunye namaJebhusi, nama-Amori, namaGirgashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 namaHivi, nama-Areki, namaSini," 
1Chronicles1:16 nama-Arvadi, namaZemari, namaHamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Oonyana bakaShem nguElam, noAsuri, noArpakishadi, noLudi, noAram, noUzu, noHuli, noGetere, noMesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 UArpakishadi wazala uShela, uShela wazala uHebhere." 
1Chronicles1:19 UHebhere wayenoonyana ababini. Inkulu yabizwa ngokuba nguPelege, ngokuba ngemihla yakhe bahluka-hlukana abemi bomhlaba. Yona inci yayinguJoketan." 
1Chronicles1:20 Oonyana bakaJoketan nguAlemodadi, noShelefe, noHazare-mavete, noJera," 
1Chronicles1:21 noHadoram, noUzali, noDikela," 
1Chronicles1:22 noEbhali, noAbhimayeli, noShebha," 
1Chronicles1:23 no-Ofire, noHavila, noJobhabhi. Yonke le ke yinzala kaJoketan." 
1Chronicles1:23 no-Ofire, noHavila, noJobhabhi. Yonke le ke yinzala kaJoketan." 
1Chronicles1:24 Nanku umlibo kaShem: UShem wazala uArpakishadi, uArpakishadi wazala uShela," 
1Chronicles1:25 uShela wazala uHebhere, uHebhere wazala uPelege, uPelege wazala uRewu," 
1Chronicles1:26 uRewu wazala uSerugi, uSerugi wazala uNahore, uNahore wazala uTera," 
1Chronicles1:27 uTera wazala uAbram, lo ukwabizwa ngokuba nguAbraham." 
1Chronicles1:28 Oonyana baka-Abraham nguIsake noIshmayeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Nantsi inzala yabo: owamazibulo kuIshmayeli nguNebhayoti, ibe nguKedare, noAdebhele, noMibhesam," 
1Chronicles1:30 noMishma, noDuma, noMasa, noHadadi, noTema," 
1Chronicles1:31 noJeture, noNafishi, noKedema. Yinzala kaIshmayeli ke leyo." 
1Chronicles1:32 UAbraham wayeneqadi uKetura owazala oonyana abanguZimran, noYokeshan, noMedan, noMidiyan, noIshbhaki, noShuwa. Oonyana bakaYokeshan nguShebha noDedan." 
1Chronicles1:33 Oonyana bakaMidiyan nguHefa, noEfere, noHanoki, noAbhida, noElda. Bonke abo ngoonyana bakaKetura." 
1Chronicles1:34 UAbraham wazala uIsake. Oonyana bakaIsake nguEsawu noSirayeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Oonyana bakaEsawu nguElifazi, noRuweli, noJewushe, noJalam, noKora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Oonyana bakaElifazi nguTeman, no-Oma, noZefi, noGatam, noKenazi, noTimna, noAmaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Oonyana bakaRuweli nguNahati, noZera, noShama, noMiza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Oonyana bakaSeyire nguLotan, noShobhali, noZibheyon, noAna, noDishon, noEzere, noDishan." 
1Chronicles1:39 Oonyana bakaLotan nguHori noHomam. Udade boLotan nguTimna. 
1Chronicles1:40 Oonyana bakaShobhali nguAliyana, noManahati, noEbhali, noShefi, no-Onam. Oonyana bakaZibheyon nguAya noAna." 
1Chronicles1:41 Unyana ka-Ana nguDishon. Oonyana bakaDishon nguHamran, noEshbhan, noItran, noKeran." 
1Chronicles1:42 Oonyana bakaEzere nguBhilehan, noZavan, noYakane. Oonyana bakaDishan ngu-Uze noAran." 
1Chronicles1:43 Naba ookumkani ababelawula ezweni lakwaEdom phambi kokuba kwaSirayeli kubekho ukumkani olawulayo: NguBhela unyana kaBhehore, okomkhulu laliyiDinabha." 
1Chronicles1:44 Akufa uBhela kwangena esikhundleni sakhe uJobhabhi unyana kaZera waseBhozera. 
1Chronicles1:44 Akufa uBhela kwangena esikhundleni sakhe uJobhabhi unyana kaZera waseBhozera. 
1Chronicles1:45 Akufa uJobhabhi kwangena esikhundleni sakhe uHusham wakummandla wakwaTeman. 
1Chronicles1:45 Akufa uJobhabhi kwangena esikhundleni sakhe uHusham wakummandla wakwaTeman. 
1Chronicles1:46 Akufa uHusham kwangena esikhundleni sakhe uHadadi unyana kaBhedadi, owawachitha edabini amaMidiyan kwelamaMowabhi, okomkhulu laliyiHaviti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Akufa uHadadi kwangena esikhundleni sakhe uSamla waseMasereka. 
1Chronicles1:48 Akufa uSamla kwangena esikhundleni sakhe uShawule waseRehobhoti phezu komlambo iEfrati. 
1Chronicles1:49 Akufa uShawule kwangena esikhundleni sakhe uBhali-hanani unyana ka-Akibho. 
1Chronicles1:50 Akufa uBhali-hanani kwangena esikhundleni sakhe uHadadi okomkhulu laliyiPawu, omkakhe wayenguMetabheli intombi kaMatredi intombi kaMezabhi." 
1Chronicles1:51 Akufa uHadadi yaba zezi izikhulu zakwaEdom: uTimna, uAleva, uYetete," 
1Chronicles1:52 uHolibhama, uEla, uPinon," 
1Chronicles1:53 uKenazi, uTeman, uMibheza," 
1Chronicles1:54 uMagediyeli, noIram. Zizo ezo izikhulu zakwaEdom." 
1Chronicles2:1 Naba oonyana bakaSirayeli: nguRubhen, uSimon, uLevi, uJuda, uIsakare, uZebhulon," 
1Chronicles2:2 uDan, uJosefu, uBhenjamin, uNafetali, uGadi, noAshere." 
1Chronicles2:3 Oonyana bakaJuda nguEre, no-Onan, noShela, oonyana abathathu abazelwe ngumKananakazi uBhashuwa. Ke uEre, amazibulo kaJuda, zange amkholise *uNdikhoyo, waza wambulala." 
1Chronicles2:4 UTamare, umolokazana kaJuda, wamzalela uPerezi noZera. Bebonke ke oonyana bakhe babebahlanu." 
1Chronicles2:5 Oonyana bakaPerezi nguHezeron noHamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Oonyana bakaZera nguZimri, noEtan, noHeman, noKalkoli, noDara. Bebonke babebahlanu." 
1Chronicles2:7 Unyana kaKarmi nguAkana, lowo wawahlisela inkathazo amaSirayeli, wenza ubuqhophololo ngokuwathathela kuye amaxhoba awayefanele ukutshatyalaliswa." 
1Chronicles2:8 Unyana kaEtan nguAzariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Oonyana bakaHezeron nguJerameli, noRam, noKelubhayi." 
1Chronicles2:10 URam wazala uAminadabhi, uAminadabhi wazala uNashon, inkulu yamaJuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 UNashon wazala uSalma, uSalma wazala uBhowazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 uBhowazi wazala uObhede, uObhede wazala uJese." 
1Chronicles2:13 Naba oonyana abasixhenxe bakaJese ngokuzana kwabo: uEliyabhi, uAbhinadabhi, uShimeha," 
1Chronicles2:14 uNataniyeli, uRadayi," 
1Chronicles2:15 uOzem, noDavide." 
1Chronicles2:16 Oodade babo yayinguZeruya noAbhigeli. UZeruya wayenoonyana abathathu: uAbhishayi, uJowabhi, noAsayeli." 
1Chronicles2:17 UAbhigeli wazala uAmasa; uyise ka-Amasa nguYetere umIshmayeli. 
1Chronicles2:18 Unyana kaHezeron uKalebhi wazalelwa intombi enguJerihoti ngumkakhe uAzubha, waza wazala oonyana abanguYeshere, noShobhabhi, noArdon." 
1Chronicles2:19 Akusweleka uAzubha uKalebhi wathatha uEfrati owazala uYuri. 
1Chronicles2:20 UYuri wazala u-Uri, u-Uri wazala uBhezaleli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Emva koko, xa uHezeron wayeminyaka imashumi mathandathu, wathatha intombi kaMakire uyise kaGiliyadi, eyamzalela uSegubhi." 
1Chronicles2:22 USegubhi wazala uJayire owayenemizi engamashumi amabini anantathu ezweni laseGiliyadi. 
1Chronicles2:23 Ke uGeshuri noAram bathimba iHavoti-yayire kunye neKenati namaphandle azo, iilali ezingamashumi amathandathu zizonke. Bonke aba bantu babeyinzala kaMakire uyise kaGiliyadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Emva kokusweleka kukaHezeron eKalebhi yase-Efrata, umka-Hezeron uAbhiya wamzalela uAshure ukhokho weTekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Oonyana bakaJerameli, amazibulo kaHezeron, nguRam owamazibulo, noBhuna, no-Oren, no-Ozem, noAhiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 UJerameli ebenomnye umfazi ogama linguAtara, owayengunina kaOnam." 
1Chronicles2:27 Oonyana bakaRam, amazibulo kaJerameli, nguMazi, noTamin, noEkere." 
1Chronicles2:28 Oonyana bakaOnam nguShamayi noYada. Oonyana bakaShamayi nguNadabhi noAbhishure. 
1Chronicles2:29 Umka-Abhishure nguAbhihayili owazala uAbhan noMolidi. 
1Chronicles2:30 Oonyana bakaNadabhi nguSelede noApayim. USelede wafa engenamntwana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Unyana ka-Apayim nguIshi, uyise kaSheshan owazala uAlayi." 
1Chronicles2:32 Oonyana bakaYada, umntakwabo-Shamayi, nguYetere noJonatan. UYetere wafa engenamntwana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Oonyana bakaJonatan nguPelete noZaza. Bonke aba ke yinzala kaJerameli. 
1Chronicles2:34 USheshan ebengenanyana; ibiziintombi zodwa. Ebenesicaka esingumJiputa esigama linguYar-ha. 
1Chronicles2:35 Ke uSheshan wendisela intombi yakhe kwisicaka sakhe uYar-ha yaza yazala uAtayi. 
1Chronicles2:36 UAtayi wazala uNatan, uNatan wazala uZabhadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 uZabhadi wazala uEflali, uEflali wazala uObhedi," 
1Chronicles2:38 uObhedi wazala uYehu, uYehu wazala uAzariya," 
1Chronicles2:39 uAzariya wazala uHeleze, uHeleze wazala uElasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 uElasa wazala uSisamayi, uSisamayi wazala uShalum," 
1Chronicles2:41 uShalum wazala uYekamiya, uYekamiya wazala uElishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Amazibulo kaKalebhi, umntakwabo-Jerameli, nguMesa. UMesa wazala uZifi, uZifi wazala uMaresha, ukhokho weHebron." 
1Chronicles2:43 Oonyana bakaHebron nguKora, noTapuwa, noRekem, noShema." 
1Chronicles2:44 UShema wazala uRaham, uyise kaYokeham. URekem yena wazala uShamayi." 
1Chronicles2:45 UShamayi wazala uMahon, ukhokho weBhete-zure." 
1Chronicles2:46 UKalebhi wayeneqadi elinguHefa elazala uHaran, noMoza, noGazeze. UHaran wazala uGazeze. (" 
1Chronicles2:47 Oonyana bakaYadayi nguRegem, noJotam, noGeshan, noPelete, noHefa, noShahafe.)" 
1Chronicles2:48 UKalebhi wayenelinye iqadi elinguMahaka elazala uShebhere noTirana. 
1Chronicles2:49 Liphinde lazala uShahafe, ukhokho weMademana, noSheva, ukhokho weMakebhena neGibheya. Intombi kaKalebhi nguAkesa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Naba balandelayo bakwayinzala kaKalebhi: Oonyana bakaYuri, amazibulo kaEfrata, nguShobhali ukhokho weKiriyati-yarim." 
1Chronicles2:51 Ubuye wazala uSalma ukhokho weBhetelehem, waza wazala noHarete ukhokho weBhete-gadere." 
1Chronicles2:52 Inzala kaShobhali, ukhokho weKiriyati-yarim, ngabantu baseHarowe necandelo labantu baseManati," 
1Chronicles2:53 kwakunye nezindlu zaseKiriyati-yarim ezingamaItri, amaPuti, amaShumati, namaMisherayi. Aphuma apha amaZorati namaEshtawoli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Inzala kaSalma ngabantu baseBhetelehem, nabaseNetofa, nabaseAteroti-bhete-jowabhi, nelinye icandelo labantu baseManati amaZori." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ukwangukhokho wezindlu zababhali ababehlala eYabheze: amaTira, amaShimeya, namaSuka. La ngamaKeni ayinzala kaHamati ukhokho weBhete-rekabhi." 
1Chronicles3:1 Naba oonyana abathandathu bakaDavide abazalelwa eHebron ngokuzana kwabo: uAmnon onina inguAhinowam waseYizereli; uDaniyeli onina inguAbhigeli waseKarmele; 
1Chronicles3:2 uAbhasalom ozalwa nguMahaka, intombi kaTalmayi ukumkani waseGeshuri; uAdoniya ozalwa nguHagiti;" 
1Chronicles3:3 uShefatiya onina inguAbhitali; noItram onina inguEgla. 
1Chronicles3:4 Bobathandathu aba bazalelwa eHebron, apho uDavide wayelawula khona iminyaka esixhenxe eneenyanga ezintandathu. Emva koko uDavide waba neminyaka emashumi mathathu anantathu elawula eJerusalem" 
1Chronicles3:5 apho wazala oonyana abaninzi khona. Umkakhe uBhashebha intombi ka-Amiyeli wazala uShimeya, noShobhabhi, noNatan, noSolomon." 
1Chronicles3:6 Abanye nguIbhare, uElishuwa, uElifelete," 
1Chronicles3:7 uNoga, uNifege, uYafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 uElishama, uEliyada, noElifelete, belithoba bebonke." 
1Chronicles3:9 Aba ke ngoonyana bakaDavide, ngaphandle kwabo bamaqadi. Udade wabo nguTamare." 
1Chronicles3:10 Unyana kaSolomon nguRewobhowam; unyana kaRewobhowam nguAbhiya; unyana ka-Abhiya nguAsa; unyana ka-Asa nguYoshafati; 
1Chronicles3:11 unyana kaYoshafati nguYoram; unyana kaYoram nguAhaziya; unyana ka-Ahaziya nguYowashe; 
1Chronicles3:12 unyana kaYowashe nguAmaziya; unyana ka-Amaziya nguAzariya; unyana ka-Azariya nguYotam; 
1Chronicles3:13 unyana kaYotam nguAhazi; unyana ka-Ahazi nguHezekiya; unyana kaHezekiya nguManase; 
1Chronicles3:14 unyana kaManase nguAmon; unyana ka-Amon nguYosiya. 
1Chronicles3:15 Oonyana abane bakaYosiya ngokuzana kwabo nguYohanan, uJoyakim, uZedekiya, noShalum." 
1Chronicles3:16 Abangene ezihlangwini zikaJoyakim ngunyana wakhe uJoyakin yaza yaba nguZedekiya. 
1Chronicles3:17 Nantsi inzala kaJoyakin owathinjwayo: Oonyana bakaJoyakin nguShelatiyeli," 
1Chronicles3:18 noMalkiram, noPedaya, noShenazare, noYekamiya, noHoshama, noNedabhiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Oonyana bakaPedaya nguZerubhabheli noShimeyi. Oonyana bakaZerubhabheli ngooMeshulam, noHananiya, benodade wabo uShelomiti," 
1Chronicles3:20 kwakunye nesinye isihlanu soonyana: uHashubha, uOheli, uBherekiya, uHasadiya, noYushabhi-rhesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Oonyana bakaHananiya nguPelatiya noJesaya; ewe, noonyana bakaRefaya, nabaka-Arnana, nabakaObhadiya, nabakaShekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Oonyana bakaShekaniya nguShemaya noonyana bakhe: uHatushe, uIgali, uBhariya, uNeyariya, noShafati, bebathandathu bebonke." 
1Chronicles3:23 Oonyana bakaNeyariya bathathu: nguEliyohenayi, uHezekiya, noAzerikam." 
1Chronicles3:24 UEliyohenayi yena wayenoonyana abasixhenxe: uHodaviya, uEliyashibhi, uPelaya, uAkubhi, uYohanan, uDelaya, noAnani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Oonyana bakaJuda nguPerezi noHezeron, noKarmi, noYuri, noShobhali." 
1Chronicles4:2 URaya, unyana kaShobhali, wazala uYahati, uYahati wazala uAhumayi noLahadi. Zizo ezo ke izindlu zamaZora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Oonyana bakaEtam nguYizereli, noIshma, noIdebhashe. Igama lodade wabo nguHazeleleponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 UPenuweli, ukhokho weGedore, kunye noEzere, ukhokho weHusha, babeyinzala kaYuri, owayengamazibulo kamka-Kalebi uEfrata, ukhokho weBhetelehem." 
1Chronicles4:5 UAskure, ukhokho weTekowa, wayenabafazi ababini, uHela noNahara." 
1Chronicles4:6 UNahara wazala uAhuzam, noHefere, noTemani, noHashatari." 
1Chronicles4:7 Oonyana bakaHela nguZerete, noZohare, noEtenan," 
1Chronicles4:8 noKozi owazala uAnubhi, noZobhebha, nendlu ka-Aharele unyana kaHarum." 
1Chronicles4:9 UYabheze wayedumile kunabantakwabo. Unina wamthiya eli gama linguYabheze esithi: “Kaloku ndimzele ngokubulaleka yintlungu yenimba.” 
1Chronicles4:10 UYabeze lo wazibika kuThixo wakwaSirayeli, wathi: “Ngamana wandithamsanqelisa, wawandisa umhlaba wam. Nceda ube nam, undikhusele ebubini, ukuze ndingafi yintlungu.” Ke uThixo wamenzela loo nto ayicelileyo." 
1Chronicles4:11 UKelubhi, umntakwabo-Shuwa, wazala uMeyire, uyise kaEshton." 
1Chronicles4:12 UEshton wazala uBhete-rafa, noPaseha, noTehina, ukhokho weIre-nahashe. Yinzala yala madoda ke emi eReka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Oonyana bakaKenazi nguOteniyeli noSeraya. UOteniyeli wazala uHatati [noMeyonotayi]," 
1Chronicles4:14 uMeyonotayi wazala uOfra. Ke uSeraya wazala uJowabhi, ukhokho weGeharashim, eyabizwa ngeli gama kuba abantu balapho babeziingcibi." 
1Chronicles4:15 Oonyana bakaKalebhi, unyana kaYefune, nguIru, noEla, noNaham. Unyana kaEla nguKenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Naba oonyana bakaYehaleleli: nguZifi, uZifa, uTiriya, noAsareli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Oonyana bakaEzera nguYetere, noMerede, noEfere, noYalon. UMerede wathatha uBhitiya, intombi yokumkani waseJiputa, baza bazala intombi enguMiriyam noonyana abanguShamayi noIshbha. UIshba lo ngukhokho weZanowa. UMerede wathatha iqadi kwindlu yakwaJuda, lazala uJerede ukhokho weGedore, noHebhere ukhokho weSoko, noYekutiyeli ukhokho weZanowa." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 UHodiya wathatha udade boNaham, ukhokho weKehila. Oonyana bakhe nguGarmi noEshtemowa waseMahaka." 
1Chronicles4:20 Naba oonyana bakaShimon: nguAmnon, uRina, uBhen-rhanana, noTilon. Oonyana bakaIshi ngooZoyeti noBhen-zoyeti." 
1Chronicles4:21 Oonyana bakaShela, unyana kaJuda, nguEre ukhokho weLeka, noLada ukhokho weMaresha, nezindlu zabasebenza ilineni eBhete-ashbheya," 
1Chronicles4:22 noYokim, nabemi baseKozebha, noYowashe, noSarafe, ababeziziphathamandla eMowabhi naseYashubhi-lehem. Ke ezi zizinto zakudala." 
1Chronicles4:23 Babengababumbi bezinto zomdongwe. Babehlala nokumkani eNetayim naseGedera, bemsebenzela." 
1Chronicles4:24 Naba oonyana bakaSimon: nguNemuweli, noJamin, noYaribhi, noZera, noShawule." 
1Chronicles4:25 UShawule wazala uShalum, uShalum wazala uMibhesam, uMibhesam wazala uMishma." 
1Chronicles4:26 Ke uMishma wazala uHamuweli, uHamuweli wazala uZakure, uZakure wazala uShimeyi." 
1Chronicles4:27 UShimeyi wayenoonyana abalishumi elinantandathu neentombi ezintandathu, kodwa abantakwabo-Shimeyi ababanga nabantwana abaninzi. Ke ngoko indlu yakwaSimon ayandanga njengendlu yakwaJuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Babehlala eBheshebha, naseMolada, naseHazare-shuwali," 
1Chronicles4:29 naseBhileha, nase-Ezem, naseToladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 naseBhetuweli, naseHoma, naseZikelage," 
1Chronicles4:31 naseBhete-markabhoti, naseHazare-susim, naseBhete-bhiri, naseSharayim. Zizo ezo ke iilali apho yayihlala khona indlu yakwaSimon de uDavide waba ngukumkani." 
1Chronicles4:32 Babehlala nakwezinye iindawo ezintlanu: e-Etam, eAyin, eRimon, eToken, naseAshan," 
1Chronicles4:33 kwanasezilalini eziphahle ezo ndawo, kude kuye kutsho kwaBhali. Zizo ezo ke iindawo ababehlala kuzo, begcina imilibo yokuzalwa." 
1Chronicles4:34 Nazi ke iintloko zezindlu: UMeshobhabhi; noYamleki; noYosha, unyana ka-Amaziya;" 
1Chronicles4:35 noYoweli; noYehu, unyana kaYoshibhiya kaSeraya ka-Asiyeli;" 
1Chronicles4:36 noEliyohenayi; noYakobha; noYeshohaya; noAsaya; noAdiyeli; noJesimiyeli; noBhenaya; 
1Chronicles4:37 noZiza, unyana kaShifi ka-Alon kaYedaya kaShimri kaShemaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Ke izindlu zabo zanaba kunene," 
1Chronicles4:39 bada baya ngasemacaleni eGedore, beyifunela amadlelo impahla yabo empumalanga entilini yalapho." 
1Chronicles4:40 Bafumana amadlelo atyebileyo amahle, ethe thabalala. Elo lizwe lalizolile, lonwabile. Kudala kwakumi amaHam apho." 
1Chronicles4:41 Ngemihla kakumkani uHezekiya wakwaJuda la madoda akhankanyiweyo afika awahlasela amaHam ezindlwini zawo, kwakunye namaMehun awayelapho, aza awatshabalalisa kwaphela, njengoko kusenjalo nangoku. Ahlala ezikhundleni zawo ke, kuba amadlelo alapho ebeyifanele impahla yawo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Kuwo la maSimon kwaphuma amadoda angamakhulu amahlanu, aya kuhlasela eleentaba lase-Edom. Ayephantsi koPelatiya, noNehariya, noRefaya, noUziyeli, oonyana bakaIshi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Baxabela amasalela ama-Amaleki awayesindile, baza bahlala khona unanamhla." 
1Chronicles5:1 Naba oonyana bakaRubhen, amazibulo kaSirayeli. (Ke wahluthwa ubuzibulo bakhe kuba wasixabhela isilili sikayise, baza ubuzibulo bakhe banikwa oonyana bakaJosefu unyana kaSirayeli. Emilibeni yokuzalwa akasabalwa ke ukuba ungowamazibulo." 
1Chronicles5:2 Ke ngoko, nangona uJuda athe wabalasela kunabantakwabo kangangokuba kwada kwaphuma ukumkani kuye, bona ubuzibulo banikwa uJosefu.)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Naba ke oonyana bakaRubhen, amazibulo kaSirayeli: nguHanoki, uPalu, uHezeron, noKarmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Nantsi inzala kaYoweli. UYoweli wazala uShemaya, uShemaya wazala uGogi, uGogi wazala uShimeyi," 
1Chronicles5:5 uShimeyi wazala uMika, uMika wazala uRaya, uRaya wazala uBhali," 
1Chronicles5:6 uBhali wazala uBheyera owafuduswa nguTigelate-pilezere ukumkani waseAsiriya. UBheyera lo ebesisikhulu samaRubhen. 
1Chronicles5:7 Nazi iintloko zendlu yakwaRubhen ngokokulandwa komlibo wokuzalwa: nguYehiyeli, noZekariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 noBhela unyana ka-Azazi kaShema kaYoweli. Aba babemi eArohere kuye eNebho naseBhali-meyon. 
1Chronicles5:9 Imfuyo yabo yanda ezweni laseGiliyadi, baza banabela empumalanga, baya kuma emacaleni entlango ethabathela emlanjeni iEfrati." 
1Chronicles5:10 Ngemihla kaSawule amaRubhen aqhwaya imfazwe, alwa namaHagri, aza awoyisa. Ayithimba ke imizi yamaHagri kuwo wonke umhlaba ongakwimpuma yeGiliyadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Oonyana bakaGadi babemelene nabakaRubhen ezweni laseBhashan ukuya kutsho eSaleka. 
1Chronicles5:12 Indlu enkulu yayiyekaJoweli eBhashan, kulandele ekaShafam, ekaJanayi nekaShafati." 
1Chronicles5:13 Ezinye izindlu yayizezi: ekaMikayeli, ekaMeshulam, ekaShebha, ekaJorayi, ekaYakan, ekaZiya, nekaHebhere, zisixhenxe zizonke." 
1Chronicles5:14 Babeyinzala ka-Abhihayili, unyana kaYuriyi, kaYarowa, kaGiliyadi, kaMikayeli, kaYeshishayi, kaYado, kaBhuzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 UAhi, unyana ka-Abhediyeli kaGuni, wayeyintloko yezi zindlu." 
1Chronicles5:16 AmaGadi la ayemi eGiliyadi naseBhashan nasezilalini zalapho nasemadlelweni aseSharon onke. 
1Chronicles5:17 Bonke aba babalwa emilibeni yokuzalwa ngemihla kaYotam ukumkani wakwaJuda nangemihla kaJerobhowam ukumkani wakwaSirayeli. 
1Chronicles5:18 AmaRubhen namaGadi nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase ayenamadoda angamashumi amane anesine amawaka, anamakhulu asixhenxe, anamashumi amathandathu, akufaneleyo ukuphuma umkhosi. La madoda ayengamakroti aqeqeshelwe umkhosi, ekuqhelile ukusebenzisa ikhaka nekrele nokudubula ngeentolo." 
1Chronicles5:19 Lo mkhosi waya emfazweni walwa nezizwe zamaHagri ezingamaJeture, namaNafishi, namaNodabhi." 
1Chronicles5:20 Umkhosi lo wawukholose ngoThixo, waza wathandazela ukuncedwa nguye ekulweni. Wawuva ke uThixo umthandazo wawo, wawuncedisa emfazweni, oyiswa amaHagri nabo bonke ababekunye nawo." 
1Chronicles5:21 Yathinjwa ke impahla yamaHagri: iinkamela ezingamawaka amashumi mahlanu, iigusha ezimawaka amakhulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu, needonki ezingamawaka amabini. Ngaphezu koko bathimba nabantu abalikhulu lamawaka." 
1Chronicles5:22 Kwabulawa amaHagri amaninzi, kuba loo mfazwe yayiphuma kuThixo. AmaRubhen namaGadi nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase ahlala ezikhundleni zamaHagri ada athinjwa." 
1Chronicles5:23 Isiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase sande saba ngabantu abaninzi. Imida yabo ibithabathele eBhashan, ise eBhali-hermon, naseSenire, nasentabeni yeHermon." 
1Chronicles5:24 Nazi iintloko zezindlu: nguHefere, uIshi, uEliyeli, uAzeriyeli, uJeremiya, uHodaviya, noYadiyeli. Babengamagorha anobukroti, amadoda anegama, eziintloko zezindlu zakumawawo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Kambe ke amaRubhen namaGadi, nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase zange athembeke kuThixo wooyise, koko amlahla akhonza *oothixo bezizwe zelo zwe, ezo uThixo wazitshabalalisayo ukuze angene endaweni yazo." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ke ngoko uThixo kaSirayeli wawuxhokonxa umoya kaPuli ukumkani waseAsiriya (lo ukwabizwa ngokuba nguTigelate-pilezere) wazifudusa ezi zizwe, wazisa eHala, naseHabhore, naseHara, nasemlanjeni iGozan, apho zisekhona unanamhla." 
1Chronicles6:1 Oonyana bakaLevi nguGershon, noKohati, noMerari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Oonyana bakaKohati nguAmram, noIzare, noHebron, noUziyeli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Abantwana baka-Amram ngooAron, noMosis, noMiriyam. Oonyana baka-Aron ngooNadabhi, noAbhihu, noElazare, noItamare." 
1Chronicles6:4 UElazare wazala uFineyasi, uFineyasi wazala uAbhishuwa," 
1Chronicles6:5 uAbhishuwa wazala uBhuki, uBhuki wazala u-Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 u-Uzi wazala uZeraya, uZeraya wazala uMerayoti," 
1Chronicles6:7 uMerayoti wazala uAmariya, uAmariya wazala uAhitubhi," 
1Chronicles6:8 uAhitubhi wazala uZadoki, uZadoki wazala uAhimazi," 
1Chronicles6:9 uAhimazi wazala uAzariya, uAzariya wazala uYohanan." 
1Chronicles6:10 UYohanan wazala uAzariya lo wayengumbingeleli ngexesha lokwakhiwa kwendlu kaThixo nguSolomon eJerusalem. 
1Chronicles6:11 UAzariya wazala uAmariya, uAmariya wazala uAhitubhi," 
1Chronicles6:12 uAhitubhi wazala uZadoki, uZadoki wazala uShalum," 
1Chronicles6:13 uShalum wazala uHilekiya, uHilekiya wazala uAzariya," 
1Chronicles6:14 uAzariya wazala uSeraya, uSeraya wazala uYozadaki." 
1Chronicles6:15 UYozadaki lo wafuduswa nabemi bakwaJuda neJerusalem basiwa ekuthinjweni ngokuya *uNdikhoyo wayebathumele ngoNebhukadenezare. 
1Chronicles6:16 Oonyana bakaLevi nguGershon, noKohati, noMerari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Naba oonyana bakaGershon: nguLibheni noShimeyi. 
1Chronicles6:18 Oonyana bakaKohati nguAmram, noIzare, noHebron, noUziyeli." 
1Chronicles6:19 Oonyana bakaMerari nguMali noMushi. Nazi iinkulu zezindlu zabakwaLevi ngokuzana kwazo izizukulwana ngezizukulwana: 
1Chronicles6:20 Kwindlu kaGershon inkulu nguLibheni, ibe nguYahati, uZima," 
1Chronicles6:21 uJowa, uIdo, uZera, noYaterayi." 
1Chronicles6:22 Kwindlu kaKohati inkulu nguAminadabhi, ibe nguKora, uAsire," 
1Chronicles6:23 uElikana, uAbhiyasafu, uAsire," 
1Chronicles6:24 uTahati, u-Uriyeli, u-Uziya, noShawule." 
1Chronicles6:25 Kwindlu kaElikana ngoonyana bakhe ooAmisayi noAhimoti," 
1Chronicles6:26 ibe ngunyana ka-Ahimoti uElikana, ibe ngunyana wakhe uZofayi, ibe nguNahati," 
1Chronicles6:27 uEliyabhi, uJeroham, uElikana, [noSamweli]," 
1Chronicles6:28 ibe ngoonyana bakaSamweli, [uJoweli] owamazibulo noAbhiya umninawa wakhe." 
1Chronicles6:29 Kwindlu kaMerari inkulu nguMali, ibe nguLibheni, uShimeyi, u-Uza," 
1Chronicles6:30 uShimeya, uHagiya, noAsaya."
