1Chronicles6:31 Aba ngâbo ukumkani uDavide wabaphathisa umbandela weengoma *esibingelelweni *sikaNdikhoyo emva kokuba ityesi yomnqophiso yazinziswa khona. 
1Chronicles6:32 Babethwele uxanduva lokulungiselela ngeengoma kwisibingelelo esiyintente, wada ukumkani uSolomon wayakha indlu kaNdikhoyo eJerusalem. Umsebenzi wabo babewuqhuba ngokwemiqathango abayibekelweyo." 
1Chronicles6:33 Naba ke abebephathiswe iingoma noonyana babo: Kwindlu kaKohati umbhexeshi wekwayara enkulu ibinguHeman unyana koJoweli, kaSamweli," 
1Chronicles6:34 kaElikana, kaJeroham, kaEliyeli, kaTowa," 
1Chronicles6:35 kaZufi, kaElikana, kaMahati, ka-Amasayi," 
1Chronicles6:36 kaElikana, kaJoweli, ka-Azariya, kaZefaniya," 
1Chronicles6:37 kaTahati, ka-Asire, ka-Abhiyasafu, kaKora," 
1Chronicles6:38 kaIzare, kaKohati, kaLevi, kaSirayeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 Ikwayara enganeno ibibhexeshwa nguAsafu unyana kaBherekiya, kaShimeya," 
1Chronicles6:40 kaMikayeli, kaBhaseya, kaMalekiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 kaEteni, kaZera, ka-Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 kaEtan, kaZima, kaShimeyi," 
1Chronicles6:43 kaYahati, kaGershon, kaLevi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ikwayara yesithathu ibibhexeshwa nguEtan wendlu kaMerari. UEtan lo ebengunyana kaKishi unyana ka-Abhedi, kaMaluki," 
1Chronicles6:45 kaHashabhiya, ka-Amaziya, kaHilekiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 ka-Amazi, kaBhani, kaShemere," 
1Chronicles6:47 kaMali, kaMushi, kaMerari, kaLevi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Amawabo abaLevi ayephathiswe wonke umsebenzi ongomnye esibingelelweni nasendlwini kaThixo. 
1Chronicles6:49 UAron noonyana bakhe babenyusa amadini eqongeni lamadini atshiswayo, beqhumisela eqongeni leziqhumiso, besenza wonke umsebenzi weyona ndawo ingcwele endlwini kaThixo. Bebengxengxeza egameni lamaSirayeli ngokwemiyalelo yonke kaMosis isicaka sikaThixo." 
1Chronicles6:50 Naba oonyana baka-Aron: uAron wazala uElazare, uElazare wazala uFineyasi, uFineyasi wazala uAbhishuwa," 
1Chronicles6:51 uAbhishuwa wazala uBhuki, uBhuki wazala u-Uzi, u-Uzi wazala uZeraya," 
1Chronicles6:52 uZeraya wazala uMerayoti, uMerayoti wazala uAmariya, uAmariya wazala uAhitubhi," 
1Chronicles6:53 uAhitubhi wazala uZadoki, uZadoki wazala uAhimahaze." 
1Chronicles6:54 Nantsi imihlaba eyanikwa inzala ka-Aron wendlu yakwaKohati. Banikwe isabelo sokuqala kwiindawo ezabelwe abaLevi *ngeqashiso. 
1Chronicles6:55 Banikwa iHebron ezweni lakwaJuda kunye namadlelo ayo. 
1Chronicles6:56 Ke wona amasimi aseHebron kunye neelali eziyingqongileyo zanikwa uKalebhi unyana kaJefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Nazi ke iidolophu namadlelo azo ezanikwa oonyana baka-Aron: iHebron (eyayisisixeko sokuphephela), iLibhena, iYatire, iEshtamowa," 
1Chronicles6:58 iHilen, iDebhiri," 
1Chronicles6:59 iAshan, neBhete-shemeshe." 
1Chronicles6:60 Esizweni sakwaBhenjamin banikwa ezi dolophu zinamadlelo azo: iGebha, iAlemete, neAnatoti. Zizonke ezi dolophu ezazinikwe amaKohati bezilishumi elinantathu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Oonyana bakaKohati abaseleyo bazabelwa ngeqashiso iidolophu ezilishumi esiqingatheni sesizwe sakwaManase. 
1Chronicles6:62 Oonyana bakaGershon ngokwezindlu zabo banikwa iidolophu ezilishumi elinantathu esizweni sakwaIsakare nasesizweni sakwaNafetali nakwicandelo lesizwe sakwaManase eliseBhashan. 
1Chronicles6:63 Oonyana bakaMerari ngokwezindlu zabo bazabelwa ngeqashiso iidolophu ezilishumi elinambini esizweni sakwaRubhen nasesizweni sakwaGadi nasesizweni sakwaZebhulon. 
1Chronicles6:64 Ke ngoko amaSirayeli anika abaLevi ezi dolophu zikhankanyiweyo zinamadlelo azo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Kwizizwe zakwaJuda, nakwaSimon, nakwaBhenjamin bazifumana ngamaqashiso." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ke izindlu ezithile zamaKohati zanikwa iidolophu ezinamadlelo esizweni sakwaEfrayim. 
1Chronicles6:67 Kwiintaba zakwaEfrayim banikwa iShekem (eyayisisixeko sokuphephela), neGezere," 
1Chronicles6:68 neYokemeham, neBhete-horon," 
1Chronicles6:69 neAyalon, neGati-rimon." 
1Chronicles6:70 Ke zona izindlu eziseleyo zamaKehati zanikwa iAnere neBhileham namadlelo azo esiqingatheni sesizwe sakwaManase. 
1Chronicles6:71 AmaGershon wona abelwa ngolu hlobo: Kwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase anikwa iGolan yaseBhashan neAshtaroti, zinamadlelo azo." 
1Chronicles6:72 Kwisizwe sakwaIsakare anikwa iKadeshe, neDabherati," 
1Chronicles6:73 neRamoti, neAnem, zinamadlelo azo." 
1Chronicles6:74 Kwisizwe sakwa-Ashere anikwa iMashale, neAbhedon," 
1Chronicles6:75 neHukoki, neRehobhi, zikunye namadlelo azo." 
1Chronicles6:76 Kwisizwe sakwaNafetali anikwa iKedeshe yaseGalili, neHamon, neKiriyatayim, zinamadlelo azo." 
1Chronicles6:77 Abaseleyo kubaLevi yayingoonyana bakaMerari. Bona banikwa ezi dolophu zilandelayo zinamadlelo azo: Kwisizwe sakwaZebhulon banikwa iRimon neTabhore. 
1Chronicles6:78 Kwisizwe sakwaRubhen ngaphesheya kweJordan ngasempumalanga kweJeriko banikwa iBhezere esentlango, iYaza," 
1Chronicles6:79 iKedemoti, neMefati." 
1Chronicles6:80 Kwisizwe sakwaGadi banikwa iRamoti yaseGiliyadi, neMahanayim," 
1Chronicles6:81 neHeshbhon, neYazere zinamadlelo azo." 
1Chronicles7:1 UIsakare wayenoonyana abane: uTola, uPuwa, uYashubhi, noShimron." 
1Chronicles7:2 Oonyana bakaTola ngu-Uzi, noRefaya, noJeriyeli, noYamayi, noIbhesam, noSamweli. Babeziinkulu zezindlu zakwaTola. Ngemihla kaDavide amadoda akwaTola anokungena emkhosini ayengamashumi amabini anambini amawaka anamakhulu amathandathu." 
1Chronicles7:3 Unyana kaUzi nguYezeraya. Oonyana baYezeraya nguMikayeli, no-Obhadiya, noJoweli, noIshiya. Bebonke yayiziinkulu zezindlu." 
1Chronicles7:4 Babenabafazi noonyana abaninzi; inzala yabo ibingamadoda angamashumi amathathu anantandathu anokungena emkhosini. 
1Chronicles7:5 Ewonke amaIsakare ezindlu ngezindlu anokungena emkhosini ayengamashumi asibhozo anesixhenxe samawaka. 
1Chronicles7:6 UBhenjamin wayenoonyana abathathu: uBhela, uBhekere, noYediyali." 
1Chronicles7:7 UBhela wayenoonyana abahlanu abaziinkulu zezindlu, bengamagorha anobukroti: uEzebhon, u-Uzi, u-Uziyeli, uJerimoti, noIri. Inzala yabo ibingamadoda angamashumi anambini amawaka anamashumi amathathu anane anokungena emkhosini." 
1Chronicles7:8 Naba oonyana bakaBhekere: nguZemira, noYowashe, noElizere, noEliyohenayi, no-Omri, noJeremoti, noAbhiya, noAnatoti, noAlemete." 
1Chronicles7:9 Inzala yabo ngokwezindlu ibingamadoda angamashumi amabini amawaka anamakhulu amabini anokungena emkhosini. 
1Chronicles7:10 UYediyali wazala uBhilehan. Oonyana bakaBhilehan nguJewushe, noBhenjamin, noEhude, noKenana, noZetan, noTashishe, noAhishare." 
1Chronicles7:11 Oonyana bakaYediyali aba babeziinkulu zezindlu, bengamagorha anobukroti. Inzala yabo ibilishumi elinesixhenxe lamawaka anamakhulu amabini amadoda anokungena emkhosini." 
1Chronicles7:12 AmaShupim namaHupim yinzala kaIre, ke wona amaHushim yinzala ka-Ahere." 
1Chronicles7:13 UNafetali, unyana kaYakobi nomkakhe uBhiliha, wazala uGuni, noYezere, noShalum." 
1Chronicles7:14 UManase wayeneqadi elingumAramikazi elazala uAseriyeli noMakire uyise kaGiliyadi. 
1Chronicles7:15 UMakire lo wathatha uMahaka udade boHupim noShupim. Omnye wenzala kaMakire nguZelofehadi owazala amantombazana kuphela. 
1Chronicles7:16 Umka-Makire uMahaka wazala unyana awamthiya igama elinguPereshe. Umninawa wakhe nguShereshe, owazala u-Ulam noRakem." 
1Chronicles7:17 U-Ulam lo wazala uBhedan. Yiyo leyo ke inzala kaGiliyadi, unyana kaMakire, unyana kaManase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Udade boGiliyadi uHamolekete wazala uIshodi, noAbhiyezere, noMala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Oonyana bakaShemida nguAhiyan, noShekem, noLiki, noAniyam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Nantsi inzala kaEfrayim. UEfrayim wazala uShutela, uShutela wazala uBheredi, uBheredi wazala uTahati, uTahati wazala uEliyada, uEliyada wazala uTahati," 
1Chronicles7:21 uTahati wazala uZabhadi, uZabhadi wazala uShutela. Abanye oonyana bakaEfrayim, uEzere noEladi, babulawa xa babefuna ukuthimba imfuyo yabantu baseGati." 
1Chronicles7:22 UEfrayim wabazilela ixesha elide oonyana bakhe abaswelekileyo, baza abazalana naye bafika bamkhuza." 
1Chronicles7:23 Emva koko umkakhe wamitha, wazala unyana, waza uEfrayim wamthiya igama elinguBheriya, kuba indlu yakhe ibihlelwe lilishwa." 
1Chronicles7:24 UEfrayim wazala nentombi enguShera. UShera lo wayakha iBhete-horon, eyasezantsi neyasentla, wayakha neUzen-shera." 
1Chronicles7:25 UEfrayim wazala nonyana onguRefa. URefa lo wazala uReshefe, uReshefe wazala uTela, uTela wazala uTahan," 
1Chronicles7:26 uTahan wazala uLadan, uLadan wazala uAmihudi, uAmihudi wazala uElishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 uElishama wazala uNune, uNune wazala uYoshuwa." 
1Chronicles7:28 Umhlaba abema kuwo oonyana bakaEfrayim yiBhetele namaphandle ayingqongileyo. Ngasempumalanga umda ubuma ngeNaran, ngasentshona ume ngeGezere neelali eziyingqongileyo, uye kutsho naseShekem neelali zakhona, naseAya neelali zakhona." 
1Chronicles7:29 Ngasemdeni wakwaManase ibiyiBhete-shehan, iTanaki, iMegido, iDore, neelali ezizingqongileyo. Kulapho yayimi khona inzala kaJosefu unyana kaSirayeli." 
1Chronicles7:30 Nantsi inzala ka-Ashere: oonyana nguImna, noIshwa, noIshvi, noBheriya, nodade wabo uSera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Oonyana bakaBheriya nguHebhere noMalkiyeli owazala uBhizaviti. 
1Chronicles7:32 Ke yena uHebhere wazala uYafelete, noShemere, noHotam, nodade wabo uShuwa." 
1Chronicles7:33 Oonyana bakaYafelete nguPasaki, noBhimehali, noAshevati." 
1Chronicles7:34 Oonyana bakaShemere nguAhi noRoga, noYehubha, noAram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Oonyana bomntakwabo-Shemere uHelem nguZofa, noImna, noSheleshe, noAmali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Ke bona oonyana bakaZofa nguSuwa, noHarenefere, noShuwali, noBheri, noImra," 
1Chronicles7:37 noBhezere, noHodi, noShama, noShilesha, noItran, noBhera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Oonyana bakaYetere nguYefune, noPisepa, noAra." 
1Chronicles7:39 Oonyana bakaUla nguAra, noHaniyeli, noRiziya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Bonke aba babeyinzala ka-Ashere. Babeziinkulu, bengamadoda akhethiweyo anobukroti, beziinkokheli ezinamagama. Bebonke babengamadoda angamashumi amabini anantandathu amawaka anokungena emkhosini." 
1Chronicles8:1 Naba oonyana abahlanu bakaBhenjamin ngokuzana kwabo: nguBhela owamazibulo, ibe nguAshbhele, uAhara," 
1Chronicles8:2 uNoha, noRafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Oonyana bakaBhela nguAdare, noGera, noAbhihudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 noAbhishuwa, noNaman, noAhowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 noGera, noShefufan, noHuram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Oonyana bakaEhude nguNaman, noAhiya, noGera. Babeziinkulu zezindlu zaseGebha, ezo zanyanzelekayo ukuba zifuduke, zaza zaya eMahanati, zikhokelwa nguGera uyise kaUza noAhihudi." 
1Chronicles8:7  
1Chronicles8:8 UShaharayim wawuqhawula umtshato wakhe nabafazi bakhe, uHushim noBhayara, waya kuma eMowabhi," 
1Chronicles8:9 wathatha uHodeshe, wazala uJobhabhi, noZibheya, noMesha, noMalkom," 
1Chronicles8:9 wathatha uHodeshe, wazala uJobhabhi, noZibheya, noMesha, noMalkom," 
1Chronicles8:10 noYehuze, noSakiya, noMirma. Oonyana bakhe aba bonke baba ziinkulu zezindlu." 
1Chronicles8:11 Ke nomkakhe uHushim wayemzalele uAhitubhi noElipali. 
1Chronicles8:12 Oonyana bakaElipali nguHebhere, noMisham, noShemede lowo wayakhayo iOno kwaneLodi neelali ezizingqongileyo." 
1Chronicles8:13 OoBheriya noShema babeziinkulu zezindlu ezazimi eAyalon zaza zabagxotha abemi baseGati. 
1Chronicles8:14 Kwinzala kaBheriya kukho uAhiyo, noShashaki, noYeremoti," 
1Chronicles8:15 noZebhadiya, noAradi, noEdere," 
1Chronicles8:16 noMikayeli, noIshpa, noYoha." 
1Chronicles8:17 Oonyana bakaElipali nguZebhadiya, noMeshulam, noHizeki, noHebhere, noIshmerayi, noYeziliya, noJobhabhi." 
1Chronicles8:17 Oonyana bakaElipali nguZebhadiya, noMeshulam, noHizeki, noHebhere, noIshmerayi, noYeziliya, noJobhabhi." 
1Chronicles8:18  
1Chronicles8:19 Oonyana bakaShimeyi nguYakim, noZikri, noZabhedi, noElihenayi, noZiletayi, noEliyeli, noAdaya, noBheraya, noShimrati." 
1Chronicles8:20  
1Chronicles8:21  
1Chronicles8:22 Oonyana bakaShashaki nguIshpan, noHebhere, noEliyeli, noAbhedon, noZikri, noHanan, noHananiya, noElam, noAntotiya, noIfediya, noPenuweli." 
1Chronicles8:23  
1Chronicles8:24  
1Chronicles8:25  
1Chronicles8:26 Oonyana bakaJeroham nguShamsherayi, noShehariya, noAtaliya, noYareshiya, noEliya, noZikri." 
1Chronicles8:27  
1Chronicles8:28 Zizo ezo ke iinkulu zezindlu ezazihlala eJerusalem. 
1Chronicles8:29 Ukhokho weGibheyon wayehlala khona eGibheyon. Igama lomkakhe nguMahaka. 
1Chronicles8:30 Ngokuzana kwabo oonyana bakhe nguAbhedon owamazibulo, ibe nguZure, uKishe, uBhali, uNadabhi," 
1Chronicles8:31 uGedore, uAhiyo, uZekere," 
1Chronicles8:32 noMikeloti owazala uShimeya. Nabo nenzala yabo babehlala eJerusalem ngakwamanye amaBhenjamin. 
1Chronicles8:33 UNere wazala uKishe, uKishe wazala uSawule, uSawule wazala uJonatan, noMalkishuwa, noAbhinadabhi, noEshbhali." 
1Chronicles8:34 UJonatan wazala uMeribhali, uMeribhali wazala uMika." 
1Chronicles8:35 Oonyana bakaMika nguPiton, noMeleki, noTareya, noAhazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 UAhazi wazala uYowada, uYowada wazala uAlemete, noAzemavete, noZimri, waza uZimri wazala uMoza," 
1Chronicles8:37 uMoza wazala uBhineya, uBhineya wazala uRafa, uRafa wazala uElasa, uElasa wazala uAzele." 
1Chronicles8:38 UAzele ebenoonyana abathandathu, amagama abo inguAzerikam, uBhokeru, uIshmayeli, uShariya, uObhadiya, noHanan." 
1Chronicles8:39 Oonyana abathathu bakaEsheki, umntakwabo-Azele ngu-Ulam owamazibulo, ibe nguJewushe noElifelete." 
1Chronicles8:40 Oonyana bakaUlam babengamagorha anobuchule kwicala lamatolo. Babenoonyana nabazukulwana abalikhulu elinamashumi amahlanu. Bonke abo babeyinzala kaBhenjamin. 
1Chronicles9:1 AmaSirayeli onke adweliswa ngokwemilibo yawo encwadini yookumkani bakwaSirayeli. AmaJuda athinjwa, asiwa eBhabheli, ngenxa yokunganyaniseki kwawo." 
1Chronicles9:2 Abokuqala ababuya ekuthinjweni bangena balanda ilifa labo ngamaSirayeli athile, nababingeleli, nabaLevi, nabasebenza endlwini kaThixo." 
1Chronicles9:3 Bekukho abendlu kaJuda, nabendlu kaBhenjamin, nabendlu kaEfrayim nekaManase ababehlala eJerusalem." 
1Chronicles9:4 Nazi iinkulu zabendlu kaJuda ababehlala eJerusalem: Kwinzala kaPereze, unyana kaJuda, inkulu ngu-Utayi, unyana ka-Amihudi, unyana kaOmri, unyana kaImri, unyana kaBhani." 
1Chronicles9:5 Kwindlu kaShela inkulu nguAsaya izibulo, noonyana bakhe." 
1Chronicles9:6 Kwindlu kaZera inkulu nguJeweli. Bebonke abantu bendlu yakwaJuda babengamakhulu amathandathu anamashumi alithoba. 
1Chronicles9:7 Nazi iinkulu zamaBhenjamin awayehlala eJerusalem: nguSalu kaMeshulam kaHodaviya kaHasenuwa; 
1Chronicles9:8 uIbheneya kaJeroham; uEla kaUzi kaMikri; noMeshulam kaShefatiya kaRuweli kaIbheniya. 
1Chronicles9:9 La madoda ke ayeziinkulu zezindlu zakowawo. Ewonke la maBhenjamin ayengamakhulu alithoba anamashumi amahlanu anantandathu. 
1Chronicles9:10 Naba ababingeleli ababehlala eJerusalem: nguYedaya, uJoyaribhi, uJakin," 
1Chronicles9:11 uAzariya kaHilekiya kaMeshulam kaZadoki kaMerayoti ka-Ahitubhi, owayeligosa elikhulu lendlu kaThixo," 
1Chronicles9:12 uAdaya kaJehoram kaPashure kaMalekiya, noMasayi ka-Adiyeli kaYazera kaMeshulam kaMeshilemiti kaImere." 
1Chronicles9:13 Ababingeleli ababeziinkulu zezindlu babeliwaka elinamakhulu asixhenxe anamashumi amathandathu. Babeziingcungela kumsebenzi wendlu kaThixo. 
1Chronicles9:14 Naba abaLevi ababehlala eJerusalem: nguShemaya kaHashubhi ka-Azerikam kaHashabhiya, wendlu kaMerari," 
1Chronicles9:15 uBhakebhakare, uHerese, uGalali, uMataniya kaMika kaZikri ka-Asafu," 
1Chronicles9:16 uObhadiya kaShemaya, kaGalali kaJedutun, noBherekiya ka-Asa kaElikana, owayehlala kwiilali zamaNetofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Naba abagcini-masango bendlu kaThixo ababehlala eJerusalem: nguShalum, noAkubhi, noTalmon, noAhiman, nabantakwabo. Intloko yabo ibinguShalum." 
1Chronicles9:18 Unangoku basagada isango elingasempumalanga, elo adla ngokungena ngalo ukumkani. Mandulo babegada amasango eekampu zabaLevi." 
1Chronicles9:19 UShalum unyana kaKore, unyana ka-Abhiyasafu, unyana kaKora, kunye namawabo amaKora, wayephathiswe umsebenzi wokugada amasango endlu kaThixo kanye njengoko ookhokho babo babegada isango lentente esisibingelelo *sikaNdikhoyo." 
1Chronicles9:20 Mandulo uFineyasi, unyana kaElazare, wayebongamele abagcini-masango, yaye uNdikhoyo wayenaye." 
1Chronicles9:21 UZekariya, unyana kaMeshelemiya, naye wayengumgcini-sango kwindlu kaNdikhoyo." 
1Chronicles9:22 Bebonke abagcini-masango bendlu kaThixo babengamakhulu amabini aneshumi elinesibini. Babebalwa ngokwemimandla abahlala kuyo. Ookhokho babo babenikwe uxanduva lokuba ngabagcini-masango ngukumkani uDavide nomshumayeli uSamweli, kuba babengamadoda athembekileyo." 
1Chronicles9:23 Bona nenzala yabo babesoloko ke begada amasango endlu kaNdikhoyo. 
1Chronicles9:24 Babegada amasango kumacala omane; empumalanga nasentshonalanga, ngasentla nangasezantsi." 
1Chronicles9:25 Aba bagadi babencediswa ngamawabo asezilalini awayedla ngokuza kubabambela iintsuku zibe sixhenxe. 
1Chronicles9:26 Bekukho abaLevi abane abangabaphathi babagadi. Bona babethenjiwe, begada amagumbi noovimba bendlu kaThixo." 
1Chronicles9:27 Ebusuku babelala kufuphi nendlu kaThixo, ukuze bayaluse, baze bayivule yonke intsasa." 
1Chronicles9:28 Abanye kubaLevi babephethe ubugcwabalala obusetyenziswayo xa kunqulwa. Yonke into ephumayo babeyibhala, baphinde benjenjalo naxa ibuyayo." 
1Chronicles9:29 Abanye babephethe yonke enye impahla yendlu kaThixo, kunye nomgubo wengqolowa, newayini, namafutha omnquma, nentlaka yokuqhumisa, neziqholo." 
1Chronicles9:30 Umsebenzi wokucola iziqholo wona ubuphethwe ngababingeleli. 
1Chronicles9:31 UMatitiya, omnye wabaLevi, owayelizibulo likaShalum umKora, wayephathiswe uxanduva lokosa izonka zomnikelo." 
1Chronicles9:32 Kumawabo amaKohati bekukho aphathiswe umsebenzi wokosa izonka ebezibekwa etafileni *ngeMihla yokuPhumla. 
1Chronicles9:33 Iintloko zezindlu zabaLevi eziziimvumi bezihlala emagumbini endlwini kaThixo, zingaphathiswanga wumbi umsebenzi, kuba uxanduva lweengoma beluphethwe zizo emini nasebusuku." 
1Chronicles9:34 Zizo ezi ke iintloko zezindlu zabaLevi ezaziziinkulu ezihlala eJerusalem. 
1Chronicles9:35 UYehiyeli, ukhokho weGibheyon, wayehlala khona. Igama lomkakhe nguMahaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Ngokuzana kwabo oonyana bakhe nguAbhedon owamazibulo, ibe nguZure, uKishe, uBhali, uNere, uNadabhi," 
1Chronicles9:37 uGedore, uAhiyo, uZekariya, noMikeloti." 
1Chronicles9:38 UMikeloti wazala uShimeya. Nabo nenzala yabo bebehlala eJerusalem ngakumawabo. 
1Chronicles9:39 UNere wazala uKishe, uKishe wazala uSawule, uSawule wazala uJonatan, noMalkishuwa, noAbhinadabhi noEshbhali." 
1Chronicles9:40 UJonatan wazala uMeribhali, uMeribhali wazala uMika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Oonyana bakaMika nguPiton, noMeleki, noTareya," 
1Chronicles9:42 noAhazi owazala uYara. UYara wazala uAlemete, noAzemavete, noZimri, waza uZimri wazala uMoza," 
1Chronicles9:43 uMoza wazala uBhineya, uBhineya wazala uRefaya, uRefaya wazala uElasa, uElasa wazala uAzele." 
1Chronicles9:44 UAzele ebenoonyana abathandathu. Amagama abo nguAzerikam, uBhokeru, uIshmayeli, uShariya, uObhadiya, noHanan." 
1Chronicles10:1 Aqubisana amaFilistiya namaSirayeli, aswantsuliswa amaSirayeli, kwawa inkitha yawo kuloo ntaba iGilibhowa." 
1Chronicles10:2 AmaFilistiya awasukela, athana mbende noSawule kunye noonyana bakhe, aza ababulala bobathathu oonyana bakaSawule, uJonatan, noAbhinadabhi, kunye noMalkishuwa." 
1Chronicles10:3 Laba shushu idabi kufuphi noSawule, abatoli bamchana, bamngxwelerha." 
1Chronicles10:4 Kweso sithuba uSawule ubhekise kumfana owayephatha izikhali zakhe, wenjenje: “Rhola ikrele, undigwaze. Andifuni kuvuyelelwa zeziya ntlanga zingalukanga.” Loo mfana kambe akazange avume kuyenza loo nto, kuba wayesoyika. USawule ke urhole ikrele lakhe, waza waziphosa kulo." 
1Chronicles10:5 Wathi akubona uSawule efile, naye loo mfana waziphosa kwelakhe ikrele." 
1Chronicles10:6 Kwanjalo ke ukufa kukaSawule, noonyana bakhe bobathathu, kunye nendlu yakhe iphela." 
1Chronicles10:7 AmaSirayeli onke angaphesheya kwentili athi akubona ukuba umkhosi uswantsulisiwe, nokuba uSawule kunye noonyana bakhe bawile, ashiya iidolopu zawo, abhaca. Afika amaFilistiya, ahlala kwezo dolophu zawo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ngengomso xa amaFilistiya aya kuphanga impahla yâbo babewe edabini, afika izidumbu zooSawule noonyana bakhe ziqungquluze apho kuloo ntaba iGilibhowa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Amkhulula izixhobo zakhe zemfazwe uSawule, athatha intloko yakhe nezixhobo zakhe, athumela izigidimi kulo lonke elamaFilistiya, ukuba ziye kuvakalisa iindaba zoloyiso *koothixo bawo nakubantu bawo." 
1Chronicles10:10 Izikrweqe zikaSawule azibeka endlwini yothixo wawo, intloko yakhe ayixhoma endlwini yothixo wawo uDagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Zathi zakuvakala kubemi bonke baseJabheshe eGiliyadi iindaba zento yonke eyenziwe kuSawule ngamaFilistiya," 
1Chronicles10:12 kwanduluka onke amagorha alapho, azithatha izidumbu zooSawule noonyana bakhe, azisa eJabheshe. Emva koko bawathatha amathambo abo, baya kuwangcwaba ngaphantsi komthi omkhulu eJabheshe, baza bazila iintsuku ezisixhenxe." 
1Chronicles10:13 USawule lo ke wafa kuba esuke akathembeka *kuNdikhoyo. Akazange alithobele ilizwi likaNdikhoyo, wada waya kubuzisa nakoosiyazi, efuna isikhokelo," 
1Chronicles10:14 endaweni yokubuzisa kuNdikhoyo. Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo wambulala, waza umbuso lowo wawunikezela kuDavide unyana kaJese." 
1Chronicles11:1 Ke kaloku onke amaSirayeli ahlanganiselana kuDavide eHebron, athi: “Mhlekazi, siyazalana; sikwaligazi lakho." 
1Chronicles11:2 Phambili phaya, ngokuya uSawule ebesengukumkani, amaSirayeli ayekhokelwa nguwe xa aya emfazweni. *UNdikhoyo uThixo wakho wathi kuwe: ‘Wena uya kuba ngumalusi wabantu bam amaSirayeli, ube ngumlawuli wabo.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Aya kufika ke amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli kukumkani uDavide eHebron, waza wanqophisana nawo phaya eHebron phambi koNdikhoyo, aza ke amthambisa waba ngukumkani wamaSirayeli ngokwesithembiso sikaNdikhoyo esivakaliswe nguSamweli." 
1Chronicles11:4 UDavide namaSirayeli ephela baphuma baya eJerusalem – yiJebhusi ke leyo. Abemi bakhona, amaJebhusi," 
1Chronicles11:5 athi kuDavide: “Akunakuze ungene apha wena!” Kambe ke uDavide wasuka wayithimba inqaba iZiyon, isixeko sikaDavide." 
1Chronicles11:6 UDavide ke wayethe: “Nabani na othe wakhokela xa kuhlaselwa amaJebhusi uya kuba yinjengele.” Ke uJowabhi, unyana kaZeruya, yaba nguye ophumayo, waza ke wenziwa injengele yomkhosi." 
1Chronicles11:7 Waya kuhlala apho kuloo nqaba uDavide, yaza yabizwa ngokuba sisixeko sikaDavide." 
1Chronicles11:8 Wakha isixeko sayijikeleza, esusela kungqameko, waya kuthi ngqu ngodonga olujikelezileyo. Ke yena uJowabhi wasizinzisa isixeko ngokubanzi." 
1Chronicles11:9 UDavide ke waya esomelela ngokomelela, kuba kaloku uNdikhoyo onamandla onke wayenaye." 
1Chronicles11:10 Nazi iintloko zamagorha omkhosi kaDavide. Wona ke ekunye namaSirayeli ephela awuxhasa awomeleza umbuso wakhe wada wanabela kulo lonke elo lizwe ngokwesithembiso *sikaNdikhoyo. 
1Chronicles11:11 Ewe, nalu uludwe lwamagorha kaDavide: UJashobham umHakimoni wayeyintloko yamagorha angamashumi amathathu. Walwa namakhulu amathathu amadoda eyedwa, wawabulala onke ngomkhonto wakhe kwidabi elinye." 
1Chronicles11:12 Olandelayo nguElazare, unyana kaDodo umAhoyi, engomnye wamagorha amathathu." 
1Chronicles11:13 Yena wayekunye noDavide ePasi-damimi mhla ngedabi, amaFilistiya ehlanganisene khona. Ndaweni ithile apho kwakukho intsimi ezele yirhasi, umkhosi waswantsuliswa ngamaFilistiya." 
1Chronicles11:14 Kambe ke uElazare namadoda akhe bema baqingqa apho phakathi kuloo ntsimi. Ewe, bahlanganisa babetha kwajub' ugodo kumaFilistiya, waza uNdikhoyo waba ngotshatsheleyo." 
1Chronicles11:15 Isithathu kuloo madoda angamashumi amathathu aziintloko zomkhosi kaDavide saya kuye kwiliwa elikumqolomba waseAdulam, lo gama wona umkhosi wamaFilistiya umise kwintili yamaRafa." 
1Chronicles11:16 Ngelo xesha uDavide yena wayesezintabeni kwindawo enqabileyo, kukho ibutho lamaFilistiya eBhetelehem." 
1Chronicles11:17 UDavide wanxanwa, waza wathi: “Akwaba bekungakho mntu undiphathela amanzi kwelaa qula lingasesangweni eBhetelehem.”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Loo magorha mathathu ke atyhoboza apho kuloo maFilistiya, aya kukha amanzi apho kwelo qula lingasesangweni leBhetelehem, abuya nawo, awanika uDavide. Kambe ke uDavide wala ukuwasela, ndaweni yaloo nto wawachitha, esenza umnikelo ngawo kuNdikhoyo, esithi:" 
1Chronicles11:19 “Hayi khona, uThixo makandithintele; soze ndiyenze into enjalo! Ndingaba ndisela igazi lala madoda awakhe ngokubeka ubomi bawo esichengeni sokufa. Ewe, ngokuhamba aye kuwakha aphinde abuye nawo, abubeke esichengeni ubomi bawo.” UDavide wala ukuwasela loo manzi. Zazinjalo ke izigigaba zaloo magorha mathathu." 
1Chronicles11:20 UAbhishayi umntakwabo-Jowabhi yayinguye inkokheli yamashumi amathathu amagorha. Yena ngomkhonto wakhe walwa namadoda angamakhulu amathathu wawabulala, watsho wabalasela njengaloo magorha mathathu." 
1Chronicles11:21 Waba yimbalasane njengaloo magorha mathathu, waba yinkokheli yelo qela lingamashumi amathathu, noxa engabandakanywa kuloo magorha mathathu." 
1Chronicles11:22 Enye indoda eyayitshatshele ngemisebenzi yobugorha nguBhenaya unyana kaJoyada waseKabhezeli. Yena wabulala iintshatsheli zamaMowabhi ezimbini. Kwakhona ngemini ekwakukhithika ngayo waya kungena emhadini, wabulala khona ingonyama." 
1Chronicles11:23 Wabulala umJiputa owayelufafa oluziimitha ezimbini ezinekota ubude. UmJiputa lo wayephethe umkhonto ongangesibonda, uBhenaya wamgqebha ngebhunguza, hlasi loo mkhonto, wamgwaza kwangawo loo mJiputa." 
1Chronicles11:24 Zazinjalo ke izigigaba zikaBhenaya unyana kaJoyada; naye wayedume njengaloo magorha mathathu. 
1Chronicles11:25 Wayebalasele phakathi kwaloo magorha angamashumi amathathu, kodwa wayengabandakanywanga kuloo magorha mathathu. UDavide wamenza inkokheli yabalindi bokumkani." 
1Chronicles11:26 Nanga loo magorha: NguAsayeli umntakwabo-Jowabhi, uEl-hanani unyana kaDodo waseBhetelehem," 
1Chronicles11:27 uShamoti waseHarori, uHeleze wasePelon," 
1Chronicles11:28 uIra unyana kaIkeshe waseTekowa, uAbhiyezere waseAnatoti," 
1Chronicles11:29 uSibhekayi waseHusha, uIlayi waseAhoyi," 
1Chronicles11:30 uMaharayi waseNetofa, uHelede unyana kaBhana waseNetofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 uItayi unyana kaRibhayi waseGibheya kwaBhenjamin, uBhenaya wasePiraton," 
1Chronicles11:32 uHurayi wamaxandeka aseGahashe, uAbhiyeli waseBhete-arabha," 
1Chronicles11:33 uAzemavete waseBhawurim, uEliyabha waseShalebhon," 
1Chronicles11:34 oonyana bakaHashem waseGizon, uJonatan unyana kaShage waseHarari," 
1Chronicles11:35 uAhiyam unyana kaSakare waseHarari, uElifali unyana kaUre," 
1Chronicles11:36 uHefere waseMekera, uAhija wasePelon," 
1Chronicles11:37 uHezero waseKarmele, uNarayi unyana kaEzebhayi," 
1Chronicles11:38 uJoweli umtakwabo-Natan, uMibhare unyana kaHagri," 
1Chronicles11:39 uZeleki umAmon, uNaharayi waseBheroti, umphathi-zikrweqe zikaJowabhi unyana kaZeruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 uIra waseItri, uGarebhe waseItri," 
1Chronicles11:41 u-Uriya umHeti, uZabhadi unyana ka-Alayi," 
1Chronicles11:42 uAdina unyana kaShiza, umRubhen owayeyinkulu yamaRubhen, enamadoda angamashumi amathathu kunye naye," 
1Chronicles11:43 uHanan unyana kaMahaka, uYoshafati waseMeten," 
1Chronicles11:44 u-Uziya waseAshterati, uShama noYeyeli oonyana bakaHotam waseArohere," 
1Chronicles11:45 uYediyali unyana kaShimri, umntakwabo uYowa waseTizi," 
1Chronicles11:46 uEliyeli waseMahavi, uJeribhayi noYoshaviya oonyana bakaElnam, uItema umMowabhi," 
1Chronicles11:47 uEliyeli, no-Obhedi, noYasiyeli waseMezobhaya." 
1Chronicles12:1 La ngamadoda awaya kuDavide eZikelage, ngokuya wayegxothiwe nguSawule unyana kaKishe. Yayingamanye kumajoni awayesima nawo edabini." 
1Chronicles12:2 Ayexhobe ngeentolo *neenkwitshi, iinto ezidubula ngazo zozibini esokunene nesasekhohlo. Yayingamadoda endlu kaBhenjamin, izizalwana zikaSawule." 
1Chronicles12:3 Ewe, la madoda iingqwayi-ngqwayi zawo yayinguAhizene noYowashe, oonyaba bakaShemawa waseGibheya; wona inguYeziyeli noPelete, oonyana baka-Azemavete; uBheraka, uYehu waseAnatoti," 
1Chronicles12:4 noIshmaya waseGibheyon, igorha kulaa mashumi mathathu elaliyingqwayi-ngqwayi yawo; uJeremiya, uYaziyeli, uYohanan, uYozabhadi waseGedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 uEluzayi, uJerimoti, uBheliya, uShemariya, noShefatiya umHarufi," 
1Chronicles12:6 uElikana, uYeshiya, uAzarele, uYowezere, noYashobhewam, amaKora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 noYowela noZebhadiya oonyana bakaJeroham zaseGedore. 
1Chronicles12:8 Namanye kumaGadi awelela kuDavide ngoko asenqabeni yakhe entlango. Yayingamatsha-ntliziyo aqule aligangatha, iinto ezinesandla ngakumkhonto nekhaka. Yayizizinto ezibuso bungwanyalala okwengonyama, izinto ezisantya ngathi yimbabala yentaba." 
1Chronicles12:9 Ayekhokelwa nguEzere, esalekelwa nguObhadiya, kulandele uEliyabhi," 
1Chronicles12:10 owesine inguMismana, owesihlanu inguJeremiya," 
1Chronicles12:11 uAtayi ingowesithandathu, uEliyeli ingowesixhenxe," 
1Chronicles12:12 owesibhozo inguYohanan, uElizabhadi ingowethoba," 
1Chronicles12:13 uJeremiya ingoweshumi, oweshumi elinanye inguMakebhanayi." 
1Chronicles12:14 La maGadi yayiziingqwayi-ngqwayi zomkhosi, nelona tyutyusi kuwo sasingeyontanga yalo nekhulu, noyena makhonya kuwo engeyontanga yalo newaka." 
1Chronicles12:15 Ngawo la awela umlambo iJordan ngenyanga yokuqala, ingazele iphuphuma, aza abaswantsulisa bonke ababemi kwiintili zayo empuma nasentshona." 
1Chronicles12:16 Kananjalo namanye amaBhenjamin ekunye nabathile bakwaJuda awelela kuDavide ngoko asenqabeni yakhe. 
1Chronicles12:17 UDavide waphuma wawahlangabeza, wathi kuwo: “Ukuba ngaba nize ngoxolo apha kum, ngenjongo yokundincedisa, ndiyanamkela, singamanyana. Kambe ke, ukuba kuthe kanti nize ngeenjongo zokundintama ezintshabeni zam, ngoku ndingasenanxa namntu, ngamana anganibona uThixo woobawo, anibuyekeze.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Ke uMoya wehla phezu koAmasayi ingqwayi-ngqwayi yaloo mashumi mathathu, waza wathi: “Thina singabakho, Davide! Singabakho, mfo kaJese! Makube yimpumelelo kuwe, baphumelele nabo bakuxhasayo, kuba uThixo wakho uza kukunceda!” Ngoko ke uDavide wawamkela, wawenza iingqwayi-ngqwayi zamabutho okuhlasela." 
1Chronicles12:19 Namanye kumadoda akwaManase awelela kuDavide xa wayekunye namaFilistiya, besilwa noSawule. Kambe ke yena naloo madoda akhe zange bade bawancedise amaFilistiya lawo, kuba athi akuba ethetha-thethene, umlawuli wawo wamgxotha, esithi: “Le nto ingangumngcipheko kwakuthi – hleze asuke akreqe kuthi, axhase inkosi yakhe uSawule.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Ke ekuyeni kwakhe eZikelage, nanga amaManase azibandakanya noDavide: uAdena, uYozabhadi, uYediyali, uMikayeli, uJozabhadi, uElihu, noZiletayi, iingqwayi-ngqwayi zamabutho akwaManase." 
1Chronicles12:21 UDavide amnceda kumabutho ahlaselayo. Kaloku onke ayengoompondo-zihlanjiwe, eziingqwayi-ngqwayi emkhosini wakhe." 
1Chronicles12:22 Amadoda aphikela ukuwelela kuDavide mihla le, wada ke wanomkhosikazi owomeleleyo." 
1Chronicles12:23 La ngamanani amadoda omkhosi awazibandakanya noDavide eHebron, ukuze umbuso kaSawule awubhukuqe uwele kuDavide ngokomlomo *kaNdikhoyo:" 
1Chronicles12:24 awakwaJuda, iinto eziqule zaligangatha, zixhobe ngomkhonto nekhaka, yayingamawaka amathandathu namakhulu asibhozo;" 
1Chronicles12:25 awakwaSimon, iinto eziqule zaligangatha, zilindele umayenzeke, yayingamawaka asixhenxe nekhulu;" 
1Chronicles12:26 awakwaLevi, ingamawaka amane namakhulu amathandathu," 
1Chronicles12:27 ekunye noJoyada intloko yendlu ka-Aron, kunye namadoda angamawaka amathathu namakhulu asixhenxe," 
1Chronicles12:28 noZadoki igorha lomfana, namagosa endlu yakowabo angamashumi amabini anesibini;" 
1Chronicles12:29 awakwaBhenjamin kuloSawule, ayengamawaka amathathu, awayesoloko engakuSawule ukuza kuthi gaa ngelo thuba;" 
1Chronicles12:30 awakwaEfrayim, amagorha aziwayo nakowawo, yayingamashumi amabini amawaka namakhulu asibhozo;" 
1Chronicles12:31 awesiqingatha sikaManase, awayekhutshelwe ukuza kumisela uDavide ukuba abe ngukumkani, yayilishumi elinesibhozo lamawaka;" 
1Chronicles12:32 awakwaIsakare, izinto ezaziwaqonda amaxesha, ziyazi into afanele ukuyenza uSirayeli, yayiziinkokheli ezimakhulu mabini, zikunye nezizalwana zazo ezaziphantsi kolawulo lwazo;" 
1Chronicles12:33 awakwaZebhulon, oomakad' enetha bamajoni, izinto ezichophele imfazwe, zilungele nasiphi na isixhobo, zizimisele ukunceda uDavide zingenakumbi, yayingamashumi amahlanu amawaka;" 
1Chronicles12:34 awakwaNafetali yayiliwaka lamagosa kunye nezinto eziphath' ikhaka nomkhonto, zingamashumi amathathu anesixhenxe amawaka;" 
1Chronicles12:35 awakwaDan, izinto ezilindele umayenzeke, yayingamashumi amabini anesibhozo amawaka namakhulu amathandathu;" 
1Chronicles12:36 awakwa-Ashere, oomakad' enetha bamajoni, izinto ezilindele umayenzeke, yayingamashumi amane amawaka;" 
1Chronicles12:37 awangaphesheya kweJordan, kwaRubhen noGadi nesiqingatha sikaManase, izinto ezixhobe ngeendidi zonke, yayingamawaka alikhulu namashumi amabini." 
1Chronicles12:38 Onke la yayingamajoni azinikelayo ukuze angene emabuthweni. Wona aya eHebron ezimisele ukuba uDavide amenze ukumkani phezu kwakhe ewonke uSirayeli. Ewe, amaSirayeli xa ewonke jikelele ayemoya mnye wokuba uDavide abe ngukumkani wawo." 
1Chronicles12:39 Loo madoda ke ahlala iintsuku zantathu apho esitya esela oko akulungiselelwe ngamawabo. 
1Chronicles12:40 Kaloku noogxa bawo ababevela kwaIsakare, kwaZebhulon, nakwaNafetali, beza nokutya, bekuthwele ngeedonki, iinkamela, iimeyile, neenkabi zeenkomo. Ukutya kwakudlal' abantwana: umgubo wengqolowa, amaqebengwane amakhiwane naweerasentyisi, iwayini, amafutha omnquma, iinkomo, neegusha. Kaloku yayiyimincili kwaSirayeli." 
1Chronicles13:1 Ke kaloku uDavide wathetha-thethana namaphakathi akhe onke, lawo aphethe amajoni aliwaka nalawo aphethe alikhulu." 
1Chronicles13:2 Kananjalo wabhekisa kwibandla likaSirayeli liphelele, wathi: “Xa nibona kufanelekile, futhi kuyintando *kaNdikhoyo uThixo wethu, masiwagqogqe amawethu kuyo yonke imimandla yakwaSirayeli, singabashiyi ababingeleli nabaLevi abakwalapho kwezo dolophu ngokunjalo nasemaphandleni, bonke mabeze kuzibandakanya nathi." 
1Chronicles13:3 Kambe masiyibuyise ityesi kaThixo wethu, kuba kakade asizange sibuzise kuye ngalo lonke ithuba lolawulo lukaSawule.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Xa lilonke ibandla lavumelana kwezi mbono, kuba le nto yafumaneka ilungile kumntu wonke." 
1Chronicles13:5 Ngoko ke uDavide wahlanganisa uSirayeli wonke jikelele ukusukela kumlambo iShikore kwelaseJiputa kuye kwinkalo yaseHamati, ukuze kulandwe ityesi kaThixo eKiriyati-yarim." 
1Chronicles13:6 UDavide namaSirayeli ewonke waya eBhala kwaJuda (eKiriyati-yarim) ukuze ithathwe khona ityesi kaThixo leyo ibizwa ngegama lakhe uNdikhoyo. Ke yena ungqendeve phakathi *kwezithunywa ezimaphiko. 
1Chronicles13:7 Bayithatha ke ityesi kaThixo endlwini ka-Abhinadabhi, beyithwele ngenqwelo entsha, ikhokelwa ngu-Uza noAhiyo." 
1Chronicles13:8 UDavide namaSirayeli ephela babebhiyoza ngamxhelo mnye phambi koThixo, becula iingoma, bekhalisa iihaphu, iikatala, amagubu, amacangci, namaxilongo." 
1Chronicles13:9 Bathi bakufika ngasesandeni sikaKidon, zakhubeka iinkabi, waza u-Uza wayibamba ityesi yomnqophiso eyixhasa." 
1Chronicles13:10 Wavutha umsindo kaNdikhoyo ngaku-Uza, waza wambetha wafa, kuba eyichukumise ngesandla ityesi leyo. Ngoko ke wafa ngoko nangoko ebulawa nguThixo." 
1Chronicles13:11 Wakhathazeka uDavide, kuba umsindo kaNdikhoyo utyhobozele ku-Uza. Loo ndawo ke kwathiwa yiPereze-uza ukubizwa kwayo unanamhla." 
1Chronicles13:12 Wangenwa kukoyika uThixo ngaloo mini uDavide, wathi: “Yaz'ba ndingayithabathela njani na kum ityesi kaThixo?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Ngoko ke wayiyeka ityesi leyo, akabi sayibeka kwisixeko sikaDavide. Ndaweni yaloo nto wayibeka endlwini kaObhedi-edom umGati." 
1Chronicles13:14 Yahlala apho ke ityesi kaThixo, kuloo mzi kaObhedi-edom, iinyanga zantathu. Ke uNdikhoyo wayithamsanqela indlu kaObhedi-edom nento yonke anayo." 
1Chronicles14:1 Ukumkani uHiram waseTire wathumela izigidimi kuDavide, ziphethe izibonda zomsedare, zihamba neengcibi zamatye nabachweli, ukuze bakhele uDavide ibhotwe." 
1Chronicles14:2 Ke uDavide waqonda ukuba *uNdikhoyo umzinzisile wangukumkani kwaSirayeli, eqonda nokuba umbuso wakhe uwuphakamise kakhulu ngenxa yabantu bakhe amaSirayeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Apho eJerusalem ke uDavide wathatha abanye abafazi, waza ke wazala abanye oonyana neentombi." 
1Chronicles14:4 Nanga amagama abantwana bakhe abazelwe eJerusalem: nguShamuwa, uShobhabhi, uNatan, uSolomon," 
1Chronicles14:5 uIbhare, uElishuwa, uElipelete," 
1Chronicles14:6 uNoga, uNifege, uYafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 uElishama, uBheliyada, noElifelete." 
1Chronicles14:8 Zakuvakala kumaFilistiya iindaba zokuba uDavide uthanjiswe waba ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli, akhupha umkhosi wawo, emfuna. Uthe akuyiva loo nto uDavide wasuka waya kuwahlangabeza." 
1Chronicles14:9 Afika ke amaFilistiya ayihlasela intili yamaRafa," 
1Chronicles14:10 waza uDavide wabuzisa kuThixo wathi: “Kufuneka ndiwahlasele na amaFilistiya? Ngaba uza kuwanikela esandleni sam na?” UNdikhoyo wathi kuye: “Ewe, wahlasele; ndowanikela esandleni sakho amaFilistiya.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Waphuma nomkhosi wakhe ke uDavide, waya eBhali-perazim, apho wafika wawoyisa amaFilistiya. Wavakala esithi: “Njengokutyhoboza kwamanzi uThixo wenjenjalo ukuzikhukulisa iintshaba zam ngesandla sam.” Ngoko ke loo ndawo kwathiwa yiBhali-perazim." 
1Chronicles14:12 Ke kaloku amaFilistiya abashiya apho *oothixo bawo, waza uDavide wayalela ukuba batshiswe." 
1Chronicles14:13 Aphinda ke amaFilistiya ayihlasela loo ntili," 
1Chronicles14:14 waza uDavide wabuzisa kuThixo kwakhona, ke yena uThixo wathi kuye: “Sukuya ngqo kuwo, koko warhawule, uze uwahlasele phaya ngakwimithi yebhalsam." 
1Chronicles14:15 Uze uthi nje ukuba uve isingqisho phaya kwiincopho zemithi yebhalsam, uphume ungene kuwo, kuba lowo yoba ngumqondiso wokuba uThixo uhamba phambi kwakho, uza kuwuqwakanisa umkhosi wamaFilistiya.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 UDavide ke wenza ngokomyalelo kaThixo, baza ke bawuvuthulula umkhosi wamaFilistiya, ukusuka eGibhiyon kuye kutsho eGezere." 
1Chronicles14:17 Udumo lukaDavide ke lwanabela kuzo zonke izizwe, uNdikhoyo wazitsho zamhlonela." 
1Chronicles15:1 Emva kokuba uDavide ezenzele izakhiwo kwisixeko sikaDavide, walungisa indawo yokuhlala ityesi kaThixo, waza wamisa intente ukuze ihlale kuyo." 
1Chronicles15:2 UDavide wathi: “Le tyesi kaThixo ayinakuthwalwa mntu wumbi ngaphandle kwabaLevi, kuba ngabo abanyulwayo *nguNdikhoyo ukuze bayithwale balungiselele endlwini yakhe kude kube ngunaphakade.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 UDavide wawaqokelela onke amaSirayeli, wawahlanganisela eJerusalem ukuze kubuyiswe ityesi kaNdikhoyo, iziswe kuloo ndawo wayeyilungiselele yona." 
1Chronicles15:4 Wayiqokelela yonke inzala ka-Aron nabaLevi: 
1Chronicles15:5 Abenzala kaKohati: u-Uriyeli inkulu yezizalwana ezilikhulu elinamashumi amabini; 
1Chronicles15:6 abenzala kaMerari: uAsaya inkulu yezizalwana ezingamakhulu amabini namashumi amabini; 
1Chronicles15:7 abenzala kaGershom: uJoweli inkulu yezizalwana ezilikhulu elinamashumi amathathu; 
1Chronicles15:8 abenzala kaElizafan: uShemaya inkulu yezizalwana ezimakhulu mabini; 
1Chronicles15:9 abenzala kaHebron: uEliyeli inkulu yezizalwana ezimashumi asibhozo; 
1Chronicles15:10 abenzala kaUziyeli: uAminadabhi inkulu yezizalwana ezilikhulu elineshumi elinesibini. 
1Chronicles15:11 UDavide wabiza ababingeleli uZadoki noAbhiyatare, nabaLevi u-Uriyeli, uAsayiya, uJoweli, uShemaya, uEliyeli, noAminadabhi." 
1Chronicles15:12 Wathetha nabo wathi: “Nini abaziinkulu zendlu kaLevi. Nina ke nabaLevi bonke zihlambululeni, ukuze nibuyise ityesi kaNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli, ize endaweni endiyilungiselele yona." 
1Chronicles15:13 Kwakungenxa yokuba yayingeziswanga nini baLevi kuqala, ukuze nje uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu asivukele ngomsindo. Sasingazange sibuzise kuye ngendlela efanelekileyo yokuyizisa.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Ngoko ke ababingeleli nabaLevi bazihlambulula ukuze babuyise ityesi kaNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli. 
1Chronicles15:15 AbaLevi bayithwala ityesi kaThixo, beyiphethe ngezibonda, beyixwaye emagxeni ngokomyalelo kaMosis awawenza ngokwelizwi likaNdikhoyo." 
1Chronicles15:16 UDavide wayalela izikhulu zabaLevi, wathi mazimise abanye kumawabo babe ziimvumi, bamemelele becula iingoma bekhatshwa zizikhalisi: imirhubhe, iihapu, namacangci." 
1Chronicles15:17 Ngoko ke abaLevi banyula uHeman unyana kaJoweli, nakubantakwabo uAsafu unyana kaBherekiya, baza kubantakwabo oonyana bakaMerari banyula uEtan unyana kaKushaya," 
1Chronicles15:18 kunye nabantakwabo abanezikhundla ezinganeno: uZekariya, uYaziyeli, uShemiramoti, uYehiyeli, u-Uni, uEliyabhi, uBhenaya, uMaseya, uMatitiya, uElifele, uMikeneya, uObhedi-edom, noYehiyeli, abagcini-masango." 
1Chronicles15:19 Ke zona iimvumi, uHeman, uAsafu, noEtan, babeza kukhalisa amacangci obhedu." 
1Chronicles15:20 Aba babeza kukhalisa iihapu ezilizwi liyisoprano: uZakariya, uHaziyeli, uShemiramoti, uYehiyeli, u-Uni, uEliyabhi, uMaseya, noBhenaya," 
1Chronicles15:21 kunye noMatitiya, uElifele, uMikeneya, uObhedi-edom, uYehiyeli, noAzaziya, bona babeza kudlala iihapu ezilizwi liyibhesi." 
1Chronicles15:22 UKenaniya inkulu yabaLevi yayinguye umphathi wekwayala, ingumsebenzi wakhe lowo, kuba kakade wayeyingcali kwelo cala." 
1Chronicles15:23 UBherekiya noElikana babengabagcini-masango, besalusa ityesi kaThixo." 
1Chronicles15:24 Aba ke babeza kukhalisa amaxilongo phambi kwetyesi kaThixo: uShebhaniya, uYoshafati, uNataniyeli, uAmasayi, uZekariya, uBhenaya, noElizere. UObhedi-edom noYehiya nabo babengabagcini-masango, besalusa ityesi kaThixo." 
1Chronicles15:25 Ke kaloku uDavide, namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, kunye neengqwayi-ngqwayi zomkhosi, benyuka baya kuthatha ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo eyayisendlwini kaObhedi-edom. Babehamba benemincili" 
1Chronicles15:26 ngenxa yokuba uThixo ebancedile abaLevi ababethwele ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, kwenziwa umbingelelo ngeenkunzi zeenkomo ezisixhenxe, neenkunzi zeegusha ezisixhenxe." 
1Chronicles15:27 Ke uDavide nabaLevi ababethwele ityesi, ngokunjalo neemvumi kunye noKenaniya owayengumphathi-kwayala, bonke babethe wambu iminweba yelinen entle kunene. Kananjalo ke uDavide wayefake *nesidanga esenziwe ngelinen." 
1Chronicles15:28 Ngoko ke wonke uSirayeli waya kuyithatha wayibuyisa ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo, ehamba ekhwaza ekhalisa nezigodlo zenkunzi yegusha, amaxilongo, amacangci, iihapu, nemirhubhe." 
1Chronicles15:29 Ekungeneni kwabo netyesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo esixekweni sikaDavide uMikali intombi kaSawule wayebukele, ekrobe ngefestile. Wathi ke, akubona ukumkani uDavide exhentsa ebhiyoza, yamtsho wamcekisa entliziyweni yakhe loo nto." 
1Chronicles16:1 Bahamba nayo ityesi kaThixo, bayibeka ngaphakathi kwintente eyenzelwe yona nguDavide, baza ke benzela uThixo amadini atshiswayo nawobudlelwane." 
1Chronicles16:2 Uthe akugqiba ukwenza loo madini atshiswayo nawobudlelwane uDavide wacelela abantu amathamsanqa kuNdikhoyo. 
1Chronicles16:3 Kamva ke wonke umSirayeli, indoda nomfazi, wamnika iqebengwana lesonka nesuntswana leedatile neleerasentyisi." 
1Chronicles16:4 Wamisela abaLevi abathile ukuze balungiselele phambi koNdikhoyo, benze izikhungo, imibulelo, neendumiso zokubonga uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli." 
1Chronicles16:5 Babekhokelwa nguAsafu, isekela inguZakariya, kulandela uYehiyeli, uShemiramoti, uYehiyeli, uMatitiya, uEliyabhi, uBhenaya, uObhedi-edom, noYehiyeli. Babeza kukhalisa imirhubhe neehapu, uAsafu abethe amacangci," 
1Chronicles16:6 ababingeleli uBhenaya noYaziyeli bona bavuthele amaxilongo njalo-njalo apho phambi kwetyesi yomnqophiso kaThixo. 
1Chronicles16:7 Ngaloo mini ke uDavide wanikela lo mhobe wokubulela *uNdikhoyo kuAsafu namahlakani akhe: 
1Chronicles16:8 Bulelani uNdikhoyo, ninqule igama lakhe, nizibalisel' iintlanga ngezintw' asenzele zona." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mombeleleni, mbongeni, zixeleni izintw' ezimangalisayo asenzele zona!" 
1Chronicles16:10 Qhayisani ngegama lakhe elilodwa; mabachwayite abo bamnqulayo uNdikhoyo! 
1Chronicles16:11 Lufuneni kuNdikhoyo uncedo; mfunen' aph' akhoyo ngawo onke amaxesha. 
1Chronicles16:12 Ze nizikhumbule izinto asenzele zona: imimiselo ayenzileyo, nemithetho ayiwisileyo." 
1Chronicles16:13 Nina niyinzala yesicaka sakhe uSirayeli, nilusapho lukaYakobi umnyulwa wakhe." 
1Chronicles16:14 UThixo wethu nguNdikhoyo; yeyehlabathi lonke imithetho yakhe. 
1Chronicles16:15 Akasokuwulibala naphakade umnqophiso wakhe, awawenzela izizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
1Chronicles16:16 Ndixel' umnqophiso awawenza noAbraham, kwanesifungo asenze kuIsake." 
1Chronicles16:17 Kaloku wamnik' ummiselo uNdikhoyo uYakobi, wamnik' umnqophis' ongasoz' uphele uSirayeli," 
1Chronicles16:18 esithi: “Wena ndokunik' umhlaba waseKanana, ube sisabelo esililifa lakho.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Babengabantw' abambalwa nje, bengazelwe nto; babengabaphambukeli kuphela nje kuloo mhlaba." 
1Chronicles16:20 Babebhadula kumazwe ngamazwe, besuka kolunye ulawulo baye kolunye." 
1Chronicles16:21 Kodwa uThixo akavumanga ukuba batsaliswe nzima; ude wazohlwaya neekumkani ngenxa yabo. 
1Chronicles16:22 Watsho esithi: “Ze ningabachukumisi abathanjiswa bam, ningakhe nibenzakalise *abashumayeli bam.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Mombeleleni uNdikhoyo, hlabathi lonke, zivakaliseni mihla le iindaba zakhe zosindiso." 
1Chronicles16:24 Zibaliseleni ngesihomo nesithozela sakhe iintlanga; zixeleleni ngemimangaliso ayenzileyo zonke izizwe. 
1Chronicles16:25 Kaloku yingangalala uNdikhoyo, ufanelwe yimbeko enkulu. Ufanelwe kukoyikwa ngaphezu kwezithixo zonke," 
1Chronicles16:26 kuba yimifanekiso nje izithixo zeentlanga, kodwa yena uNdikhoyo wadal' oomazulu." 
1Chronicles16:27 Yena unesihomo nesithozela; kukho ubungangamsha nemincili ekhayeni lakhe. 
1Chronicles16:28 Mbongeni uNdikhoyo, nina bemi bomhlaba; mbongeni kuba unewonga namagunya." 
1Chronicles16:29 Mnikeni imbeko efanele igama lakhe; sondezani amadini, nize phambi kwakhe. Mnquleni uNdikhoyo, yena unesihomo nesithozela." 
1Chronicles16:30 Malingcangcazele lonk' ihlabathi phambi kwakhe; nguye oya kubagweba ngobulungisa bonke abantu. 
1Chronicles16:31 Gcobani, mazulu, lichwayite ihlabathi. Zixeleleni iintlanga ukuba uNdikhoyo nguKumkani." 
1Chronicles16:32 Gquma, wena lwandle, nako konke okwakho; makayeyezele amadlelo nezinto ezikuwo." 
1Chronicles16:33 Mayombele imithi emahlathini, ibe nemihlali phambi koNdikhoyo, kuba uyeza uNdikhoyo – uza kuligweba ihlabathi." 
1Chronicles16:34 Bambani ngazibini, kuba ulungile uNdikhoyo. Kaloku izibele zakhe ziya kuhlala zikho ngonaphakade." 
1Chronicles16:35 Hlahlambani nithi: “Sisindise, Thixo onguMsindisi wethu! Siqokelele usihlangule phakathi kweentlanga, ukuze sikubulele, silibonge igama lakho elingcwele.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Makabongwe uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli kususela ngoku kude kube nini-nini! Ke kaloku bonke abantu bathi: “Huntshuu! Makabongwe uNdikhoyo!” 
1Chronicles16:37 Ke kaloku uDavide wamshiya apho phambi kwetyesi kaNdikhoyo uAsafu namahlakani akhe ukuze basoloko belungiselela ngokweemfuneko zemini nganye. 
1Chronicles16:38 Kananjalo wamshiya no-Obhedi-edom namahlakani akhe angamashumi amathandathu ukuze nabo balungiselele. UObhedi-edom, unyana kaJedutun, kunye noHosa, yayingabagcini-masango." 
1Chronicles16:39 Umbingeleli uZadoki namahlakani akhe uDavide wabashiya esibingelelweni sikaNdikhoyo kwindawo yonqulo eGibheyon," 
1Chronicles16:40 ukuze bahlale besenzela uNdikhoyo amadini atshiswayo kwelo qonga lamadini atshiswayo, loo nto ke beyenza kusasa, nasemalanga, ngokwemimiselo yonke ebhalwe encwadini yomthetho kaNdikhoyo leyo wayinikezela kuSirayeli." 
1Chronicles16:41 Apho kubo ke washiya noHeman noJedutun nabo bonke ababenyuliwe bakhankanywa ukuze benze imibulelo kuNdikhoyo ngenxa yezibele zakhe ezingatshitshiyo. 
1Chronicles16:42 UHeman noYedutun ngabo ababemiselwe ukuhlokomisa amaxilongo namacangci kananjalo badlale nezinye izikhalisi zeengoma zokudumisa uThixo. Ke bona oonyana bakaYedutun bamiselwa isango. 
1Chronicles16:43 Ke kaloku bonke abantu bemka, yangulowo nalowo wagoduka. NoDavide ke wagoduka, waya kuthamsanqela usapho lwakhe." 
1Chronicles17:1 Akuba uDavide ezinzile kwikomkhulu lakhe wathetha *nomshumayeli uNatan, wathi: “Khangela, mna ndihlala kwibhotwe elakhiwe ngamaplanga omsedare, ukanti yona ityesi yomnqophiso *kaNdikhoyo ihlala nje ententeni.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 UNatan wathi kuDavide: “Nantoni na oyicingayo ungayenza, uThixo unawe.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Ngobo busuku ke lafika kuNatan ilizwi likaThixo lisithi: 
1Chronicles17:4 “Hamba uye kuxelela isicaka sam uDavide uthi: ‘Utsho uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Asinguwe umntu oza kundakhela indlu endiya kuhlala kuyo. 
1Chronicles17:5 Ukususela mhla ndamkhupha eJiputa uSirayeli kude kube namhla andizange ndihlale endlwini. Ndasoloko nditshintsha izikhundla, ndithi ndikule indawo yokumisa intente, ndibe ndikuleya." 
1Chronicles17:6 Oko ndajikeleza ndihamba namaSirayeli, andizange ndikhalaze kwiinkokheli endaziyalela ukuba zaluse abantu bam, andizange ndizibuze ndithi: Ngani ukuba ningandakheli indlu yomsedare?’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Ke ngoko, yithi kuDavide isicaka sam: ‘Utsho uNdikhoyo onamandla onke ukuthi: Wena Davide ndakuthatha emadlelweni, ekwaluseni iigusha, ndakwenza umlawuli wabantu bam amaSirayeli." 
1Chronicles17:8 Ndakukhapha kwiindawo zonke owawuhamba kuzo, ndazisusa zonke iintshaba zakho phambi kwakho. Ngoko ke ngoku igama lakho ndiza kulenza lidume lifane nelabakhulu emhlabeni." 
1Chronicles17:9 Abantu bam amaSirayeli ndobabonela indawo abaza kuma kuyo, ndibazinzise, babe nendawo yabo, bangabuye babandezelwe nanini. Abantu abakhohlakeleyo abayi kuba sabacinezela njengoko bebesenjenjalo ngaphambili," 
1Chronicles17:10 ukusukela kwimihla endabamisela abantu bam amaSirayeli iinkokheli. Ndiza kuzoyisa zonke iintshaba zakho. “ ‘Nditsho kuwe ukuthi nguNdikhoyo oya kuyizinzisa indlu yakho. 
1Chronicles17:11 Yakuphela imihla yakho, xa sowuye kuphumla kooyihlo, ndokuvusela ihlumelo, lithathe isikhundla sakho. Ewe, nditsho omnye woonyana bakho. Ndiya kuluzinzisa ulawulo lwakhe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Nguye ke oya kundakhela indlu, ndiluzinzise ulawulo lwakhe ngonaphakade." 
1Chronicles17:13 Mna ndiya kuba nguyise kuye, yena abe ngunyana wam. Uthando lwam kuye alusoze lutshitshe, njengoko lwenzayo kumfo owangena esikhundleni sakhe wena." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ndiya kummisela endlwini yam, alawule kude kube ngunaphakade. Ewe, ulawulo lwakhe lohlala ngonaphakade.’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Ke uNatan waya kuxelela uDavide onke amazwi alo mbono. 
1Chronicles17:16 Ke kaloku ukumkani uDavide wangena waya kuhlala phambi *koNdikhoyo, waza wathi: “Kuxa ndingubani mna, Ndikhoyo Thixo? Iyintoni yona indlu yam, ukuba ude uze kundibeka kule ndawo ndikuyo ngoku?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Kanti ke akwanelanga ukwenjenjalo kuphela, Thixo: ngoku uthetha nangekamva lendlu yesicaka sakho. Ewe, Ndikhoyo, Thixo wam, ude wandiphatha ngathi ndingumntu onewonga." 
1Chronicles17:18 “Mandithini, mna Davide, ukuthetha nawe, Ndikhoyo, wena osiwonga kangaka isicaka sakho? Kaloku uyabazi ubunjani besicaka sakho!" 
1Chronicles17:19 Ngenxa yesicaka sakho, nangokuthanda kwakho, wenze le nto inkulu kangaka, waza wavakalisa nezi zithembiso zingaka." 
1Chronicles17:20 “Akakho onjengawe, Ndikhoyo, kungekho naThixo ngaphandle kwakho, njengoko sazivelayo ngezi zethu iindlebe." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ngoobani abanjengabantu bakho amaSirayeli? Kaloku wona asisizwe ekukuphela kwaso ehlabathini esiThixo waso waphumayo waya kuzikhululela abantu bakhe, ukuze uzenzele igama ngezigigaba ezimangalisayo, xa wawuqwakanisa izizwe uzigxotha khon' ukuze endaweni yazo kungene abantu owabakhulula kwelaseJiputa." 
1Chronicles17:22 Waza ke amaSirayeli wawenza abantu bakho ncakasana ngonaphakade. Wena ke, Ndikhoyo, waba nguThixo wabo." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Ngoku ke, Ndikhoyo, isithembiso osenzileyo ngokuphathelele kwisicaka sakho kunye nendlu yaso masibe njalo ngonaphakade. Yenza ngokwesithembiso sakho," 
1Chronicles17:24 ukuze sona sizinze, negama lakho libalasele ngonaphakade. Nabantu ke botsho bathi: ‘UNdikhoyo uSomandla, uThixo kaSirayeli, nguye uThixo wakhe.’ Nendlu yesicaka sakho uDavide ke iya kuzinza phambi kwakho." 
1Chronicles17:25 “Wena Thixo wam, usithyilele isicaka sakho ukuba uya kusakhela indlu. Yiyo ke loo nto isicaka sakho sibe nobuganga bokuthandaza kuwe." 
1Chronicles17:26 Wena Ndikhoyo, unguThixo! Isicaka sakho esi usenzele esi sithembiso sihle kangakanana." 
1Chronicles17:27 Wena ubone kufanelekile ukuba uyithamsanqele indlu yesicaka sakho esi, ukuze ihlale ikukhonza njalo. Kaloku wena Ndikhoyo, uyithamsanqele, ngoko ke yothamsanqeleka ngonaphakade!”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Ke kaloku ekuhambeni kwexesha uDavide wawahlasela amaFilistiya wawoyisa, wayihlutha iGati namaphandle ayingqongileyo, ayabi sabakho phantsi kwamaFilistiya." 
1Chronicles18:2 Ngokunjalo wawoyisa namaMowabhi, aza aba phantsi kwakhe, amnika imirhumo." 
1Chronicles18:3 Kananjalo uDavide walwa nokumkani waseZobha uHadadizere, wamoyisa, wamsukelisa, waya kumfaka eHamati, xa kanye wayezama ukumilisela ulawulo lwakhe kummandla womlambo iEfrati." 
1Chronicles18:4 UDavide wathimba iwaka leenqwelo zakhe, kunye namawaka asixhenxe abakhweli-mahashe, ngokunjalo namashumi amabini amawaka amajoni ahamba ngeenyawo. Amahashe ke wawanqumla imisipha, washiya amahashe eenqwelo alikhulu." 
1Chronicles18:5 Athe ke ama-Aram aseDamasko akuzama ukuncedisa uHadadizere ukumkani waseZobha, wasuka uDavide wabulala amashumi amabini anambini amawaka awo." 
1Chronicles18:6 Wasuka ke wabeka amabutho akhe kuwo wonke umbuso wama-Aram aseDamasko, ahlala ephantsi kwakhe, akhupha imirhumo kuye. UDavide wanikwa uloyiso nguNdikhoyo apho konke ahamba khona." 
1Chronicles18:7 UDavide wawahlutha amakhaka egolide awayephathwa ngamaphakathi kaHadadizere, waya nawo eJerusalem." 
1Chronicles18:8 Kwiidolophu zikaHadadizere iTebha neKun, uDavide wathimba intaphane yobhedu olwasetyenziswa nguSolomon xa wayesenza ichibi lobhedu, iintsika, kwanezinye izinto ezazenziwe ngobhedu." 
1Chronicles18:9 Zaya kutsho naseHamati kukumkani uToyu iindaba zokoyiswa nguDavide komkhosi wokumkani waseZobha uHadadizere. 
1Chronicles18:10 Wandulula unyana wakhe uHadoram ukuba ase imibuliso yakhe kukumkani uDavide, avuyisane naye ngokoyisa kwakhe uHadadizere owalwa kaninzi-ninzi nokumkani uToyu. UHadoram waphathela uDavide izipho ezenziwe ngegolide nangesiliva nangobhedu." 
1Chronicles18:11 Ezo zipho ke uDavide wazinikezela kuNdikhoyo, kwanjengoko wenjenjalo ngesiliva negolide awayeyithimbe kuzo zonke ezi zizwe: amaEdom, amaMowabhi, ama-Amon, amaFilistiya, nama-Amaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Ke uAbhishayi unyana kaZeruya wabulala ishumi elinesibhozo lamawaka amaEdom kwiNtlambo yeTyuwa. 
1Chronicles18:13 Wamisa amabutho akhe e-Edom, aza amaEdom aba phantsi koDavide. UNdikhoyo wamnika uloyiso uDavide konke apho ahamba khona." 
1Chronicles18:14 Ke kaloku uDavide walawula uSirayeli ewonke jikelele, ebaphethe kakuhle nangobulungisa bonke abantu bakhe." 
1Chronicles18:15 UJowabhi, unyana kaZeruya, wayeyinjengele yomkhosi, uYoshafati, unyana ka-Ahilude, engumthathi-manqaku." 
1Chronicles18:16 Ke yena uZadoki, unyana ka-Ahitubhi, noAhimeleki, unyana ka-Abhiyatare, babengababingeleli, uShavesha yena engunobhala." 
1Chronicles18:17 UBhenaya, unyana kaJoyada, wayongamele abalindi abangamaKreti namaPleti. Ke bona oonyana bakaDavide bengamaphakathi kakumkani aphambili." 
1Chronicles19:1 Emva koko wafa ukumkani uNahashe wama-Amon, kwaza ke esikhundleni sakhe kwalawula unyana wakhe." 
1Chronicles19:2 Ke uDavide wathi: “Mandimenzele ububele uHanun, unyana kaNahashe, kuba uyise wandenzela ububele.” Wathumela izigidimi ke uDavide ukuba ziye kukhuza ukumkani uHanun ngenxa kayise. Athe ke loo madoda akufika kuHanun kwelama-Amon, eze kumkhuza," 
1Chronicles19:3 zasuka izikhulu zama-Amon zathi kuHanun: “Ucinga ukuba ngaba uDavide lo unika imbeko kuyihlo ngokuthumela la madoda kuwe esithi eze kukukhuza? Ayikho loo nto! La madoda ngoongcothoza; eze kuhlola eli lizwe ukuze akwazi ukulibhukuqa.” 
1Chronicles19:4 UHanun wasuka wawabamba loo madoda kaDavide, wawagugula iindevu, nezambatho zawo wazigumpula embindini kwaya kuthi xhaxhe ezimpundwini, waza ke wawandulula." 
1Chronicles19:5 Uthe ke uDavide akuxelelwa ngoko kwenzekileyo kula madoda, wathumela izigidimi, zawahlangabeza, kuba kaloku ayehlaziswe gqitha. Ukumkani wathi: “Hlalani eJeriko, ningabuyi de zikhule iindevu.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Ke kaloku aqonda ama-Amon ukuba azigqwalisile kuDavide, waza ke uHanun enama-Amon ephela bathumela amashumi amathathu anane amawaka eekhilogram zesiliva, ukuze kuqeshwe iingqwelo namajoni eAram-narayim, eAram-maka, naseZobha." 
1Chronicles19:7 Baqesha amashumi amathathu anambini amawaka eenqwelo namajoni azo, kwakunye nokumkani waseMaka nomkhosi wakhe. Ke yena waza wafika wamisa ngaseMedeba; abe ke wona ama-Amon ecombuluka ephuma kuzo zonke iidolophu zawo, exhobele imfazwe." 
1Chronicles19:8 Akuyiva loo nto uDavide wakhupha uJowabhi nomkhosi wonke wamagorha. 
1Chronicles19:9 Ama-Amon aphuma akha uhlelo lokulwa ngasesangweni lesixeko. Baye ke bona ookumkani ababeze kuncedisa bethe gingqi bodwa phaya ethafeni. 
1Chronicles19:10 Ke kaloku uJowabhi wabona ukuba uphahlwe ngumkhosi ngaphambili nangasemva. Ngoko ke wakhetha awona mabutho aphambili kwaSirayeli, wawamisa ajongana nama-Aram." 
1Chronicles19:11 Elinye icandelo lomkhosi walinika umntakwabo uAbhishayi, aza ahlelwa loo madoda ajongana nama-Amon." 
1Chronicles19:12 UJowabhi wathi: “Ukuba athe andongamela ama-Aram la, kofuneka uze kundihlangula; ukanti ke xa ethe akongamela ama-Amon, nam ndoza kukuhlangula." 
1Chronicles19:13 Uze uqine, silwe ngobukroti, ngenxa yabantu bethu, nangenxa yezixeko zoThixo wethu. UNdikhoyo uya kwenza oko kukholekileyo kuye.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 UJowabhi namabutho akhe wafunza kuwo ama-Aram, aza wona abaleka." 
1Chronicles19:15 Athe ke ama-Amon akubona ama-Aram ebaleka, asuka nawo abaleka angena ngaphakathi esixekweni, esaba kuAbhishayi umntakwabo-Jowabhi. Ngoko ke uJowabhi wajika waya eJerusalem nomkhosi wakhe." 
1Chronicles19:16 Akubona ukuba oyisiwe ngamaSirayeli ama-Aram, athumela amema ama-Aram aphesheya komlambo iEfrati; aza afika ekhokelwa nguShofaki injengele yomkhosi kaHadadizere." 
1Chronicles19:17 Akuluva olo daba uDavide wawuqokelela wonke umkhosi wakwaSirayeli, wawela nawo umlambo iJordan. Wathi ngqo kuwo, waza wakha uhlelo lwakhe ejongene nawo. Ewe, uDavide walwakha uhlelo lwakhe lwangqalana nama-Aram, zaza ke zanqoza." 
1Chronicles19:18 Kambe ke ama-Aram aswantsuliswa ngamaSirayeli, waza uDavide wabulala isixhenxe samawaka amajoni eenqwelo, kunye namashumi amane amawaka amajoni ahamba ngeenyawo. Kananjalo wayibulala nenjengele yomkhosi wawo uShofaki." 
1Chronicles19:19 Zonke iikumkani ezaziphantsi kukaHadadizere zathi zakuqonda ukuba ziyoyiswa ngamaSirayeli, zenza uxolo noDavide, zaba phantsi kwakhe. Ukususela oko ama-Aram akaphindanga avume ukuwanceda emfazweni ama-Amon." 
1Chronicles20:1 Ke kaloku uJowabhi waphuma nawo umkhosi wakowabo ngexesha lentlakohlaza, ithuba abadla ngokulwa iimfazwe ngalo ookumkani. Walibhuqa walivuthulula elama-Amon, waza waya kungqinga iRabha. Ke yena uDavide wayeshiyeke eJerusalem. NeRabha leyo wayihlasela uJowabhi, wayishiya ingamabhodlo." 
1Chronicles20:2 UDavide wasothula isithsaba esasisentloko yokumkani wama-Amon. Sasibunzima bumalunga namashumi amathathu anantlanu eekhilogram, senziwe ngegolide, sihonjiswe ngamatye axabisekileyo. UDavide wasithweswa eso sithsaba. Wathatha amaxhoba amaninzi kweso sixeko," 
1Chronicles20:3 abemi balapho wabathatha wabafaka emsebenzini wokusarha, nowokumba, nokucanda. Wenjenjalo ke uDavide nakwabanye abemi bezixeko zama-Amon. Emva koko uDavide wabuyela eJerusalem kunye nomkhosi wakhe wonke." 
1Chronicles20:4 Ekuhambeni kwethuba amaSirayeli alwa namaFilistiya eGezere. Ngelo thuba ke uSibhekayi umHusha wabulala uSipayi ongomnye wenzala kaRafa; aza ke amaFilistiya oyiswa. 
1Chronicles20:5 Kwelinye idabi namaFilistiya uEl-hanani, unyana kaJayire, wabulala uLami owayengumntakwabo-Goliyati umGati, lowa wayenomkhonto ongangesibonda." 
1Chronicles20:6 Kanti ke kwelinye idabi elaliwa eGati, kwakukho ingxilimbela yomfo otsho ngeminwe emithandathu ezandleni zozibini nasezinyaweni zombini, ingamashumi amabini anesine iyonke. Naye wayeyinzala kaRafa." 
1Chronicles20:7 Wathi esahlekisa ngamaSirayeli wasuka wabulalwa nguJonatan unyana kaShimeya umntakwabo-Davide. 
1Chronicles20:8 Esi ke yayisisizukulwana sikaRafa eGati. Kambe ke bawela ezandleni zikaDavide nomkhosi wakhe. 
1Chronicles21:1 Ke kaloku uSathana wavukela uSirayeli ngokuxhokonxa uDavide ukuze awabale amaSirayeli. 
1Chronicles21:2 UDavide wathetha noJowabhi nabanye abaphathi bomkhosi, wathi kubo: “Yiyani kubala amaSirayeli, niqale eBheshebha, nime kwaDan. Nakugqiba ke nize nindinike ingxelo, ukuze ndilazi inani lawo.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Ke yena uJowabhi wathi: “Ngamana *uNdikhoyo wabandisa kalikhulu abantu bakhe. Mhlekazi kumkani, asingobakho bonke na aba bantu? Ngani ke, mhlekazi, ukuba ufune ukwenza into enje? Ngani ukuba umhlekazi azisele uSirayeli ityala?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Kambe ke ilizwi likakumkani lamoyisa uJowabhi, waza wemka uJowabhi wamtyhutyha wonke uSirayeli, kamva ke wabuyela eJerusalem." 
1Chronicles21:5 Inani lamadoda omkhosi walixela kuDavide. KuSirayeli ephela yayisisigidi esinekhulu lamawaka, amadoda akwaziyo ukusebenzisa ikrele, kwakunye namakhulu amane anamashumi asixhenxe amawaka kwelakwaJuda." 
1Chronicles21:6 Kambe ke uJowabhi akambalanga uLevi noBhenjamin, kuba kaloku umyalelo kakumkani wawulumeza kuye." 
1Chronicles21:7 Ewe, lo myalelo wawumbi nakuThixo, ngoko ke wasuka wawohlwaya amaSirayeli." 
1Chronicles21:8 UDavide wathi kuThixo: “Ewe, ndenze into embi gqitha ngesi senzo. Ngoko ke ndiyakubongoza bususe ubutyala bam, mna sicaka sakho. Ndenze into yobutyhakala.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 UNdikhoyo wathetha nomshumayeli kaDavide uGadi, wathi:" 
1Chronicles21:10 “Yiya kuDavide, uthi: ‘Nanga amazwi kaNdikhoyo,’ uthi ndithi makakhethe kwizinto ezintathu, ukuze ndikwazi ukuthatha amanyathelo.”" 
1Chronicles21:11 UGadi waya ke kuDavide, wafika wathi: “Utsho uNdikhoyo ukuthi khetha into amakakwenze yona:" 
1Chronicles21:12 iminyaka emithathu yembalela, okanye iinyanga ezintathu zinivuthulula ziniwisa ngamakrele azo iintshaba zenu, kungenjalo ke ibe ziintsuku ezintathu uNdikhoyo ethumele isithunywa sakhe ukuze sifake ubhubhani kuwo wonke umhlaba wakwaSirayeli. Cingisisa undinike impendulo emandiyise kulowo undithumileyo.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 UDavide waphendula wathi kuGadi: “Ndisengxakini enkulu. Kodwa ke kubhetele ndiwele ezandleni zikaNdikhoyo, kuba inkulu inceba yakhe. Ewe, andikunqweneli ukuwela ezandleni zabantu.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Ngoko ke uNdikhoyo wathumela isibetho sikabhubhani kwaSirayeli, kwaza kwafa amadoda angamashumi asixhenxe amawaka." 
1Chronicles21:15 UThixo wathumela isithunywa sakhe ukuze sitshabalalise iJerusalem, kodwa ke sithe sisawenza loo msebenzi, uNdikhoyo wathi akuyibona loo ntlekele suka wazijika iimbono zakhe, wasinqanda ukuze singabatshabalalisi abantu, wathi: “Kwanele, sirhoxise isandla sakho!” Oku kwenzeke xa kanye isithunywa eso sasimi ngasesandeni sokubhula sika-Aravena umJebhusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Wathi akukhangela uDavide wasibona isithunywa sikaNdikhoyo, simi phakathi kwezulu nomhlaba, siphethe ikrele ngesandla, silijongise eJerusalem. Ke uDavide namadoda amakhulu banxiba ezirhwexayo, bakhahlela bawa emhlabeni." 
1Chronicles21:17 UDavide wathi kuThixo: “Indim nje othe makabalwe amadoda omkhosi! Ewe kaloku, ndim owonileyo ndenza okugwenxa. Aba bantu bona banjengeegusha; akukho nto bayenzileyo. Hayi, Ndikhoyo, Thixo wam, isandla sakho masohlwaye mna kunye nomzi kabawo; ke yena lo bhubhani sukumyeka abatshabalalise abantu bakho.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Isithunywa sikaNdikhoyo sathetha noGadi, sathi makaye kuxelela uDavide ukuba makakhele uNdikhoyo iqonga lamadini kwesiya sanda sokubhula sika-Aravena umJebhusi." 
1Chronicles21:19 Ngoko ke uDavide waya ngokwelo lizwi lalithethwe nguGadi egameni likaNdikhoyo. 
1Chronicles21:20 Uthe esabhula ingqolowa uAravena waguquka, wabona isithunywa sikaThixo, baza oonyana bakhe abane ababekunye naye bazimela." 
1Chronicles21:21 Wathi akuvela uDavide, uAravena wambona, waza wemka apho esandeni sokubhula, wamhlangabeza, wakhahlela ejongise ubuso emhlabeni phambi koDavide." 
1Chronicles21:22 UDavide wathi kuye: “Ndinike lo mhlaba sikuwo esi sanda sokubhula, ukuze ndakhele uNdikhoyo iqonga lamadini, khon' ukuze isibetho sikabhubhani sinqamke ebantwini. Ndithengisele wona ngexabiso lawo.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Wathi uAravena kuDavide: “Kulungile, ungawufumana. Inkosi yam ukumkani mayenze ngokubona kwayo; mna ke ndiza kunikela ngeenkabi zeenkomo zokwenza amadini atshiswayo, izileyi zokubhula zoba ziinkuni. Ndonikela nangengqolowa yokwenza umnikelo weenkozo; zonke ezo zinto ndozikhupha.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Kambe ke ukumkani uDavide uphendule uAravena wathi: “Ngunotshe lowo! Ndiza kulihlawula lonke ixabiso lazo. UNdikhoyo andinakumnika izinto zakho, ndingayi kwenza mnikelo nadini litshiswayo ngento endingadlekanga ngayo.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Ngoko ke uDavide wahlawula uAravena amakhulu amathandathu eegolide ngeso sanda sokubhula. 
1Chronicles21:26 UDavide ke wakhela uNdikhoyo iqonga lamadini apho, waza wenza amadini atshiswayo kunye nawobudlelwana. Wanqula uNdikhoyo, waza ke yena waphendula ngokuthobela umlilo ezulwini kwelo qonga lamadini." 
1Chronicles21:27 UNdikhoyo ke wathetha naso isithunywa eso, saza salifaka esingxotyeni salo ikrele laso." 
1Chronicles21:28 Ngelo xesha ke uDavide akuqonda ukuba uNdikhoyo umphendule apho kweso sanda sokubhula sika-Aravena umJebhusi, wasuka wanikela amadini apho kuso." 
1Chronicles21:29 Ngelo xesha ke isibingelelo sikaNdikhoyo esasenziwe nguMosis entlango kunye neqonga lamadini atshiswayo sasisendaweni ephakamileyo yonqulo eGibheyon. 
1Chronicles21:30 Kambe ke uDavide akayanga kubuzisa khona kuThixo, kuba kaloku wayesoyika ikrele lesithunywa sikaNdikhoyo." 
1Chronicles22:1 Ke kaloku uDavide wathi: “Iza kwakhiwa apha indlu *kaNdikhoyo uThixo kunye neqonga lamadini atshiswayo awenzelwa uSirayeli.” 
1Chronicles22:2 Ngoko ke uDavide wayalela ukuba kuqokelelwe bonke abasemzini abemi apho kwaSirayeli, waza ke apho kubo wakhetha abangabaqingqi bamatye, ukuze bakrole amatye okwakha indlu kaThixo." 
1Chronicles22:3 Wakhupha nento eninzi yentsimbi yokwenza izikhonkwane zeengcango zamasango nezokubethelela, kananjalo nobhedu olubunzima bungenamlinganiselo." 
1Chronicles22:4 Wakhupha nenyambalala yezikhuni zomsedare; kaloku zona uDavide wayeziphiwe zazininzi gqitha ngamaSidon namaTire. 
1Chronicles22:5 UDavide wathi: “Umfana wam uSolomon usemncinci, engekabi nawo namava, ibe ke yona le ndlu *kaNdikhoyo eza kwakhiwa kufuneka ibe lipomakazi eliyimbalasane, uduma-kude ngobunewu-newu nakuzo zonke izizwe. Ngoko ke ndiza kuwenza amalungiselelo okwakhiwa kwayo.” Ewe, uDavide wawenza ngokubanzi amalungiselelo lawo kwangaphambi kokusweleka kwakhe." 
1Chronicles22:6 UDavide wathetha nonyana wakhe uSolomon, wamyalela ukuba akhele uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli indlu." 
1Chronicles22:7 Wathi apho kuSolomon: “Mfo wam, ndandizimisele ukulakhela indlu igama *likaNdikhoyo uThixo wam." 
1Chronicles22:8 Kambe ke kwafika ilizwi likaNdikhoyo kum, lisithi: ‘Wena uliphalaze gqitha igazi; ulwe iimfazwe ezininzi gqitha. Ngoko ke asinguwe oya kulakhela indlu igama lam, kuba wena uphalaze igazi elininzi gqitha emhlabeni phambi kwam." 
1Chronicles22:9 Kambe ke uza kuba nonyana oya kuba yindoda yoxolo nenzolo; mna ndiya kumthi jize ngenzolo, ndimphumze macal' onke ezintshabeni zakhe. Igama lakhe liya kuba nguSolomon, ibe ke uSirayeli ndiya kumthi jize ngoxolo nenzolo ngexesha lombuso wakhe." 
1Chronicles22:10 Nguye ke oya kulakhela indlu igama lam. Yena uya kuba ngunyana wam, mna ndibe nguYise. Ewe, mna ndiya kusizinzisa isihlalo sombuso wakhe phezu koSirayeli kude kube ngunaphakade.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 Ngoko ke ngoku, nyana wam, ngamana wanawe uNdikhoyo; ngamana waphumelela ekuyakheni indlu kaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho, nanjengoko wayethe uya kuyakha." 
1Chronicles22:12 UNdikhoyo ngamana wakupha ingqiqo nokuqonda xa ekufaka ukuba wongamele uSirayeli, khon' ukuze uwuthobele umthetho kaNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
1Chronicles22:13 Ewe, uya kuba nempumelelo xa uthe wanenyameko wayinonophela imimiselo nemithetho leyo uNdikhoyo wayinikezela uSirayeli ngoMosis. Yomelela ukhaliphe; uze ungoyiki utyhafe!" 
1Chronicles22:14 “Amalungiselelo ndiwenze ngenyameko, ndilungiselela ukwakhiwa kwendlu kaNdikhoyo. Ndiqokelele iitoni zegolide ezingaphezu kwamawaka amathathu anamakhulu amane, kunye neetoni zesiliva ezingaphezu kwamashumi amathathu anesine amawaka, ukuze kwakhiwe indlu leyo, kwakunye nentaphane yobhedu, kunye nentsimbi ebunzima bungenamlinganiselo, ngokunjalo nemithi namatye. Nawe ke ungazongeza ezo zinto." 
1Chronicles22:15 Unabo baninzi abasebenzi, abaqingqi bamatye, iingcibi nabachweli, kunye namadoda angamachule kuzo zonke iindidi zomsebenzi." 
1Chronicles22:16 Igolide nesiliva, ubhedu nentsimbi, ikho ingenamlinganiselo. Ngoko ke qalisa, uNdikhoyo abe nawe!”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Ngoko ke uDavide waziyalela zonke iinkokheli zakwaSirayeli ukuze zincedisane naye unyana wakhe uSolomon. 
1Chronicles22:18 Wathi kuzo: “Andithi na kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu unani? Ewe kambe, unithe jize ngenzolo ngeenxa zonke! Kaloku uzinikele esandleni sam zonke iintlanga ezingabemi beli lizwe. Eli lizwe ke ngoko lelikaNdikhoyo nabantu bakhe." 
1Chronicles22:19 Ngoko ke zinikezeleni ngomxhelo wenu wonke kuNdikhoyo uThixo wenu. Qalisani ukuyakha indlu kaNdikhoyo uThixo, ukuze nibe nako ukuyingenisa ityesi yomnqophiso kaNdikhoyo kunye nezinto ezingcwele zikaThixo, zonke nizifake kuloo ndlu iza kwakhelwa igama likaNdikhoyo.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Ke kaloku uthe akukhula, xa seleyindoda enkulu, uDavide wabeka unyana wakhe uSolomon wangukumkani kwaSirayeli." 
1Chronicles23:2 Kananjalo waqokelela zonke iinkokheli zakwaSirayeli kunye nababingeleli nabaLevi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Babalwa abaLevi ababudala bungamashumi amathathu nangaphezulu, baza bafumaneka bengamashumi amathathu anesibhozo amawaka." 
1Chronicles23:4 UDavide wathi: “Amashumi amabini anesine amawaka abaLevi baya kongamela umsebenzi wendlu *kaNdikhoyo, size isithandathu samawaka sibe ngamagosa nabagwebi." 
1Chronicles23:5 Ke wona amawaka amane aya kuba ngabagcini-masango; kananjalo amanye amawaka amane adumise uNdikhoyo ngeengoma esebenzisa izikhalisi endizilungiselele loo njongo.” 
1Chronicles23:6 UDavide wabahlula-hlula abaLevi ngokwamaqela oonyana bakaLevi: uGershon, uKohati, noMerari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Oonyana bakaGershon nguLadan noShimeyi. 
1Chronicles23:8 Oonyana bakaLadan bathathu: nguYehiyeli owamazibulo, ibe nguZetam noJoweli." 
1Chronicles23:9 Oonyana bakaShimeyi nabo bathathu: nguShelimoti, noHaziyeli, noHaran. Zizo ezo ke iinkulu zezindlu zakwaLadan." 
1Chronicles23:10 Oonyana bakaShimeyi bane: nguYahati owamazibulo, kulandele uZina, ibe nguJewushe noBheriya. Ke uJewushe noBheriya babengenanyana baninzi, yaza inzala yabo yabalelwa ekubeni yindlu enye." 
1Chronicles23:11  
1Chronicles23:12 Oonyana bakaKohati bane: nguAmram, noIzare, noHebron, noUziyeli." 
1Chronicles23:13 Oonyana baka-Amram nguAron noMosis. UAron nenzala yakhe bachongwa ukuba bagcine izinto ezingcwele zonqulo, bamkhonze uNdikhoyo, bemenzela iziqhumiso, besikelela abantu egameni lakhe kude kube ngunaphakade." 
1Chronicles23:14 Ke bona oonyana bakaMosis, umfo wakwaThixo, babalelwa kubaLevi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Oonyana bakaMosis nguGershom noElizere. 
1Chronicles23:16 Inkulu yoonyana bakaGershom nguShebhuweli. 
1Chronicles23:17 Inkulu yoonyana bakaElizere nguRehabhiya. UElizere akazalanga wumbi unyana ngaphandle koRehabhiya, kodwa uRehabhiya wazala oonyana abaninzi gqitha." 
1Chronicles23:18 Inkulu yoonyana bakaIzare nguShelomiti. 
1Chronicles23:19 Inkulu yoonyana bakaHebron abane nguTeriya, ibe nguAmariya, noYaziyeli, noYekamam." 
1Chronicles23:20 Koonyana baka-Aziyeli nguMika inkulu, ibe nguIshiya owesibini." 
1Chronicles23:21 Oonyana bakaMerari nguMali noMushi. Oonyana bakaMali nguElazare noKishe. 
1Chronicles23:22 UElazare wafa engenanyana, eneentombi zodwa, zaza zathathwa ngamawabo oonyana bakaKishe." 
1Chronicles23:23 Oonyana bakaMushi bathathu: nguMali, noEdere, noYeremoti." 
1Chronicles23:24 Ezi ke yayizizizukulwana zikaLevi ngokwezindlu zazo – iinkulu zezindlu ngokwamagama okubhaliswa kwazo zibalwa ngazinye, abasebenzi abaminyaka imashumi mabini nangaphezulu, abo babelungiselela endlwini kaNdikhoyo." 
1Chronicles23:25 Kaloku uDavide wathi: “Ngoku uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli ubanike ukuphumla abantu bakhe; yena ke uya kusoloko ehlala ehleli eJerusalem. 
1Chronicles23:26 Ngoko ke abaLevi aba akuseyomfuneko kubo ukuthwala isibingelelo nezixhobo ezisetyenziswa kuso.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Ngokwalo myalelo kaDavide ke abaLevi babalwa kuqalelwa kwabo baneminyaka emashumi mabini nangaphezulu. 
1Chronicles23:28 Umsebenzi wabaLevi aba ke yayikukunceda inzala ka-Aron kumsebenzi wendlu kaNdikhoyo: ukujonga iinkundla namagumbi azo, ukuhlanjululwa kwezinto ezingcwele, nokujongana nayo yonke eminye imisebenzi yendlu kaThixo." 
1Chronicles23:29 Yayingabo abajongene nesonka esasihlala etafileni, umgubo womnikelo weenkozo, nemiqhathane enganyuswanga, ukubhaka nokuxuba, nazo zonke iindidi zemilinganiselo." 
1Chronicles23:30 Ngazo zonke iintsasa kwakufuneka beme babulele badumise uNdikhoyo; nasemalanga ke kwakufuneka benze kwaloo nto. 
1Chronicles23:31 Ukanti nanini na kusenzelwa uNdikhoyo amadini atshiswayo *ngeMihla yokuPhumla nangemibhiyozo yokuthwasa kwenyanga, nangawo onke amatheko amisiweyo. Kwakufuneka bahlale belungiselela uNdikhoyo ngamathuba amisiweyo, naloo nto ke beyenza ngendlela emisiweyo." 
1Chronicles23:32 Ngoko ke abaLevi abo bawuqhuba umsebenzi wabo apho esibingelelweni nakwindawo engcwele, bephantsi kwabantakwabo abayinzala ka-Aron, belungiselela apho endlwini kaNdikhoyo." 
1Chronicles24:1 Oonyana baka-Aron babahlulwa-hlulwe kanje: Naba oonyana baka-Aron: uNadabhi, uAbhihu, uEliyazare, noItamare." 
1Chronicles24:2 Kambe ke yena uNadabhi noAbhihu basweleka bengenanyana kwangaphambi kokusweleka kukayise. Ngoko ke ababingeleli yaba nguEliyazare noItamare. 
1Chronicles24:3 UDavide wancediswa nguZadoki, owayeyinzala kaEliyazare, kunye noAhimeleki, owayeyinzala kaItamare; baza ke babahlula-hlula bangamaqela okulungiselela ngezigaba ezimisiweyo." 
1Chronicles24:4 Kwafumaneka iqela elikhulu kwinzala kaEliyazare kunelo lafumaneka kwinzala kaItamare, baza ke bahlulwa-hlulwa ngokunjalo: Yaba ziinkulu ezilishumi elinesithandathu kwinzala kaEliyazare, yaziinkulu ezisibhozo kwinzala kaItamare." 
1Chronicles24:5 Babahlula-hlula ngendlela engenaxanasi ngokwenza *amaqashiso, kuba kaloku kwakukho amagosa esibingelelo namagosa ezakwaThixo kuzo zozibini izizukulwana zikaEliyazare nezo zikaItamare." 
1Chronicles24:6 Ke unobhala uShemaya, unyana kaNataniyeli umLevi, wawabhala amagama abo ekho nokumkani kunye nala magosa: umbingeleli uZadoki, uAhimeleki unyana ka-Abhiyatare, kunye neenkulu zezindlu zababingeleli kunye nezabaLevi. Kwakuthathwa indlu ibe nye kuEliyazare, ize ibe nye nakuItamare." 
1Chronicles24:7 Amaqashiso aphuma ngolu hlobo: Elokuqala laphuma noJoyaribhi, elesibini noYedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 elesithathu noHarim, elesine noSeworim," 
1Chronicles24:9 elesihlanu noMalekiya, elesithandathu noMiyamin," 
1Chronicles24:10 elesixhenxe noHakoze, elesibhozo noAbhiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 elethoba noYeshuwa, eleshumi noShekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 eleshumi elinanye noEliyashibhi, eleshumi elinesibini noYakim," 
1Chronicles24:13 eleshumi elinesithathu noHupa, eleshumi elinesine noYeshebhabhi," 
1Chronicles24:14 eleshumi elinesihlanu noBhilega, eleshumi elinesithandathu noImere," 
1Chronicles24:15 eleshumi elinesixhenxe noHezire, eleshumi elinesibhozo noHapizere," 
1Chronicles24:16 eleshumi elinethoba noPetaya, elamashumi amabini noYezekeli," 
1Chronicles24:17 elamashumi amabini ananye noJakin, elamashumi amabini anambini noGamuli," 
1Chronicles24:18 elamashumi amabini anantathu noDelaya, nelamashumi amabini anane noMaziya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Lulo olo ke uluhlu lokusebenzisana kwabo ekulungiseleleni endlwini kaNdikhoyo ngokwemimiselo abayinikwa ngukhokho wabo uAron ethobela umyalelo kaNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli. 
1Chronicles24:20 Nazi ke ezinye iinkulu zezindlu zakwaLevi: koonyana baka-Amram nguShubhayeli, koonyana bakaShubhayeli nguYedeya," 
1Chronicles24:21 koonyana bakaRehabhiya inkulu nguIshiya," 
1Chronicles24:22 kumaIzare nguShelomoti, koonyana bakaShelomoti nguYahati," 
1Chronicles24:23 koonyana [bakaHebron] nguJeriya inkulu, ibe nguAmariya owesibini, noYeziyeli owesithathu, noYekamam owesine," 
1Chronicles24:24 koonyana bakaUziyeli nguMika, koonyana bakaMika nguShamire," 
1Chronicles24:25 koonyana bakaIshiya, umntakwabo-Mika, nguZekariya," 
1Chronicles24:26 koonyana bakaMerari nguMali noMushi, koonyana bakaYaziya, unyana kaMerari, nguBheno, noShoham, noZakure, noHibri," 
1Chronicles24:27  
1Chronicles24:28 koonyana bakaMali nguElazare ongabanga nanyana," 
1Chronicles24:29 koonyana bakaKishe nguJerameli," 
1Chronicles24:30 koonyana bakaMushi nguMali, noEdere, noJerimoti. Abo ke ngabaLevi ngokwezindlu zabo." 
1Chronicles24:31 Nabo benza *amaqashiso kwanjengabantakwabo abayinzala ka-Aron, ekho nokumkani uDavide, uZadoki, uAhimeleki, neenkulu zezindlu zababingeleli nezabaLevi. Izindlu zâbo baziinkulu zaziphathwa ngokufanayo nezo zâbo baziinci." 
1Chronicles25:1 Ukumkani uDavide, ekunye neengqwayi-ngqwayi zomkhosi, wachonga abathile koonyana baka-Asafu, nabakaHeman, nababakaJedutum, wabanika umsebenzi wokushumayela bekhalisa iihapu nemirhubhe namacangci. Nanga ke amadoda awayephethe lo msebenzi:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Koonyana baka-Asafu nguZakure, noJosefu, noNetaniya, noAsharela. Babeshumayela ngokomyalelo kakumkani, bephethwe nguAsafu." 
1Chronicles25:3 Koonyana bakaJedutun nguGedaliya, noZeri, noYeshaya, [noShimeyi], noHashabhiya, noMatitiya, bebathandathu. Babephethwe nguyise uJedutun, owayeshumayela esebenzisa ihapu ukubulela nokudumisa *uNdikhoyo." 
1Chronicles25:4 Koonyana bakaHeman nguBhukiya, noMataniya, noUziyeli, noShebhuweli, noJerimoti, noHananiya, noHanani, noEliyata, noGidaleti, noRomamti-ezere, noYoshebhekasha, noMaloti, noHotire, noMaziyoti." 
1Chronicles25:5 Bonke aba babengoonyana bakaHeman *umshumayeli kakumkani. Wayebanikwe ngokwesithembiso sikaThixo sokuphakamisa isidima sakhe. Ewe, uThixo wanika uHeman oonyana abalishumi elinane neentombi ezintathu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Ngokomyalelo kakumkani onke la madoda ayephethwe ngooyise uAsafu, noJedutun, noHeman. Ayevuma enkonzweni endlwini kaNdikhoyo, enamacangci nemirhubhe neehapu." 
1Chronicles25:7 Inani lawo, ekunye nabantakwawo ababeqeqeshelwe iingoma zikaNdikhoyo, lalingamakhulu amabini anamashumi asibhozo anesibhozo." 
1Chronicles25:8 Xa bawabayo umsebenzi benza *amaqashiso, kungekho ukhethe phakathi komncinane nomkhulu, ngokunjalo nokwaziyo nosaqeqeshwayo." 
1Chronicles25:9 Nazi iziphumo zamaqashiso malunga nokulandelelana kwamathuba okusebenza kwamaqela: elokuqala: elikaJosefu umAsafu, elesibini: elikaGedaliya," 
1Chronicles25:10 elesithathu: elikaZakure," 
1Chronicles25:11 elesine: elikaIzeri," 
1Chronicles25:12 elesihlanu: elikaNetaniya," 
1Chronicles25:13 elesithandathu: elikaBhukiya," 
1Chronicles25:14 elesixhenxe elikaYesharela," 
1Chronicles25:15 elesibhozo: elikaYeshaya," 
1Chronicles25:16 elethoba: elikaMataniya," 
1Chronicles25:17 eleshumi: elikaShimeyi," 
1Chronicles25:18 eleshumi elinanye: elika-Azarele," 
1Chronicles25:19 eleshumi elinambini: elikaHashabhiya," 
1Chronicles25:20 eleshumi elinesithathu: elikaShubhayeli," 
1Chronicles25:21 eleshumi elinesine: elikaMatitiya," 
1Chronicles25:22 eleshumi elinesihlanu: elikaYeremoti," 
1Chronicles25:23 eleshumi elinesithandathu: elikaHananiya," 
1Chronicles25:24 eleshumi elinesixhenxe: elikaYoshebhekasha," 
1Chronicles25:25 eleshumi elinesibhozo: elikaHanani," 
1Chronicles25:26 eleshumi elinethoba: elikaMaloti," 
1Chronicles25:27 elamashumi amabini: elikaEliyata," 
1Chronicles25:28 elamashumi amabini ananye: elikaHotire," 
1Chronicles25:29 elamashumi amabini anambini: elikaGidaleti," 
1Chronicles25:30 elamashumi amabini anantathu: elikaMaziyoti," 
1Chronicles25:31 elamashumi amabini anane: elikaRomamti-ezere. Iqela ngalinye beliba namadoda alishumi elinambini, liphantsi kwenkokheli yalo." 
1Chronicles26:1 Nazi iintloko zamaqela abagcini-masango endlu kaThixo: KumaKora yayinguMeshelemiya unyana kaKore wendlu ka-Asafu.
