Job7:11 “Hayi khona, andiyi kuthi cwaka! Ndiya kuwuphalaza umva-ndedwa wam, ndikhale ndibindekile!" 
Job7:12 Ngani ke ukuba ude undimisele umlindi? Ngaba ndilulwandle, okanye isilo solwandle?" 
Job7:13 Ndakulala ndiye ndicinge ukuba umandlalo wam wondithuthuzela, ndithi ubuthongo bondithomalalisa." 
Job7:14 Kodwa wena usuka undirhwaqelise ngamaphupha; usuka undivingcele ngemibono. 
Job7:15 Ndide ke mna ndikhethe ukukrwitshwa; kanye ndinyula ukufa kunokuphila kulo mzimba wam. 
Job7:16 Ewe kambe, ndidikiwe bobu bomi; kakade andiyi kuphila ngonaphakade. Hayi ndiyekeni, kuba ubomi bam bunjengomphunga." 
Job7:17 “Yaz'ba uyintoni na umntu, le nto umxabise kangaka; ngani ukuba umzondelele kangaka?" 
Job7:18 Ewe, yonke imihla uyamphicotha; ngayo yonke imizuzu uyamvavanya." 
Job7:19 Hayi kaloku, khawuthi gu kancinci; khawundiyeke ndikhe ndiginy' amathe!" 
Job7:20 Ke ukuba ndiyona, ikukhathaza ngani loo nto, wena Malusi woluntu? Ngani ukuba ndibe selisweni lakho kangaka? Ngaba ndingumthwalo ongako kuwe?" 
Job7:21 Ngaba awungendixoleli na isono sam, ubulibale ubutyala bam? Kuba ke ngoku ndiza kulala kobandayo; uthi undifuna ndibe ndingasekho!”" 
Job8:1 Waphendula ke uBhildadi umfo waseShuwa, wathi:" 
Job8:2 “Mfondini, koda kube nini ushwaqa, usenza imbudede yamazwi afana nomoya obhudlayo?" 
Job8:3 Uthi uThixo angakujika okulungileyo? Uthi uSomandla angabugqwetha ubulungisa? 
Job8:4 Ukuba abantwana bakho bawaphule ummiselo wakhe, yena ke ubawisele isohlwayo esibafaneleyo." 
Job8:5 Into omawuyenze wena kukuzibika kuThixo, ubuse umbongoze uSomandla." 
Job8:6 Ukuba ungumntu onyanisekileyo omsulwa, ngenene uya kukuva, akubuyekeze ngomzi wakho." 
Job8:7 Ewe, ubunayo inkqubela ngaphambili, kodwa ayinakulinganiswa nendyebo owoba nayo esiphelweni." 
Job8:8 Khawuphonononge ulande imbali yemihla yamandulo; phicotha ufunde kumava amanyange. 
Job8:9 Kaloku thina singabayizolo, asazi nto, nemihla yethu emhlabeni idlula njengesithunzi." 
Job8:10 Ke bona baya kukululeka, bathethe nawe; ewe, bangakuphokozela kuloo vimba wolwazi lwabo, bathi:" 
Job8:11 ‘Ngaba ingaphuma na imizí apho kungekho mgxobhozo? Uthi ingakhula ingcongolo apho kungekho manzi? 
Job8:12 Zithi zingekalungeli kukhiwa, zimbatshe kuqala kunezinye izityalo.’" 
Job8:13 Iba njalo indlela yabo bonke abamlibalayo uThixo; ewe, ithemba lâbo bangamnquliyo uThixo liyadaka." 
Job8:14 Kaloku bona bangqiyama ngentambo yesigcawu, lisuke ke elo themba labo linqamke." 
Job8:15 Bayama ngendlu yesigcawu, ibe ke yona ingaqinanga; babambelela kuyo ngoku yona igqashu-gqashu." 
Job8:16 Bahluma okwesityalo esinamanzi esibethwa yimitha yelanga, sona esinwenwa siphinyele egadini." 
Job8:17 Iingcambu zaso zibhijela amatye, zibambelele kuwo." 
Job8:18 Phofu ke uthi wakusincothula, kungabi sabonakala ukuba sasikhe sakho." 
Job8:19 Uyabona, injalo indlela yokukhula kwaso: indawo yaso ithathwa sesinye." 
Job8:20 “Ewe, uThixo akamlahli umntu othembekileyo, kodwa akangeke azomeleze izandla zabenzi bokubi." 
Job8:21 Ngoko ke úya kulubuyisela uncumo emlonyeni wakho, nemilebe yakho ibobotheke yimincili." 
Job8:22 Ke bona abakuthiyileyo baya kwambathwa lihlazo; kanti ke yona imizi yabakhohlakeleyo iya kubhanga.” 
Job9:1 Ke uYobi waphendula wathi: 
Job9:2 “Ewe, ndiyazi ukuba kunjalo; kambe ke umntu angaphumelela njani xa emi enkundleni noThixo?" 
Job9:3 Noba ungade uzimisele ukuxoxa, awungebi nako ukuphendula nomnye kwiwaka lemibuzo yakhe." 
Job9:4 Kaloku yena sisilumko esibalaseleyo ngamandla; akukho mntu unokumelana naye aze aphumelele. 
Job9:5 Kaloku yena neentaba ezi usuka azisiphule zingazi zona; ewe, ngaloo ngqumbo yakhe usuka azibhukuqe." 
Job9:6 Yena nomhlaba lo uyawugungxula, neentsika zawo zitsho ziqhaqhazele." 
Job9:7 Nelanga uthetha nalo litsho lingaphumi, ke zona iinkwenkwezi uzigubungela zitsho zingaveli." 
Job9:8 Nguye owawatwabululayo amazulu, waza wandolosa phezu kwawo amaza olwandle." 
Job9:9 Nguye umenzi weendidi zeenkwenkwezi, oozibhere noomakroza, isilimela nomthala wasezantsi." 
Job9:10 Yena ngumenzi wezinto ezinkulu ezingaphicothekiyo; kanti nemiqondiso yakhe ayinakubalwa. 
Job9:11 Nokuba selegqitha ngakum andinako ukumbona; uthi tshe ndingaqondanga mna. 
Job9:12 Khona selengade athathe into, ngubani ongamnqandayo? Akekho nongabuzayo athi: ‘Wenza ntoni ke?’" 
Job9:13 Kaloku uThixo akabuyi ngamva ngengqumbo yakhe; neentshaba zakhe ezazithelela uRahabhi isilo saselwandle wazinyhasha. 
Job9:14 “Bendingubani ke mna ukuba ndingade ndiphendulane naye? Khona, ndingawazuza phi amazwi okuxoxa naye?" 
Job9:15 Nditsho sendimsulwa, andingeze ndamxoxisa; nto endingayenzayo kukuzibika ndimbongoze uMgwebi wam." 
Job9:16 Nokuba sendizibika kuye, naxa angade andiphendule, anditsho ukuba angakuva ukuzithethelela kwam." 
Job9:17 Kaloku yena undintlitha ngenzwinini yesaqhwithi, anditsho imivumbo ixananaze ngaphandle kwesizathu." 
Job9:18 Akandiniki neli lokukhok' umoya ithuba, koko unditsho ndanengcwangu." 
Job9:19 Xa kuthethwa ngamandla, nguye onawo; xa kuthethwa ngobulungisa, nguye onokundimangalela.”" 
Job9:20 “Ndimsulwa ndinjalo, kodwa ndigwetywa kwangumlomo wam. Nangona ndingade ndibe andinabala, yena angandifumana ndinetyala." 
Job9:21 Ewe, andinabala, kodwa andizibaleli ntweni; nto nje ndikruqukile bobu bomi." 
Job9:22 Kuba kaloku kuyafana; yiyo loo nto ke ndithi: ‘Yena utshabalalisa bonke, abamsulwa ngokunjalo nezaphula-mthetho.’" 
Job9:23 Isithwakumbe sithi sakuzisa ukufa yena aphoxise ngaso isibetho sabamsulwa. 
Job9:24 Ihlabathi lisezandleni zezikhohlakali; ke bona abagwebi ubamfamekisile. Xa ingenguye ke uthi ngaba ngubani? 
Job9:25 “Imihla yam ikhawuleza ngaphezu kwembaleki; ewe, ibaleka gqitha, ibe ke ayinayo nanto incomekayo." 
Job9:26 Iphala njengesikhephe seengcongolo; ikhawuleza ngathi lukhozi lurhiwula ixhoba. 
Job9:27 Noba sendisithi: ‘Hayi, ngoku ndiza kukhe ndizingcwabe izikhalazo zam, ndibobotheke ndihlale ndizonwabele,’" 
Job9:28 ndisuka ndoyike ndibe namanwele, kuba ndiyaqonda ukuba wena akungeke undibalele njengongenatyala." 
Job9:29 Ke, ukuba ndiza kugwetywa, ngani ukuba ndibe sazabalaza?" 
Job9:30 Noba ndingade ndihlambe ngekhephu, izandla zam ndizicoce ngesephu," 
Job9:31 wena uya kundiphosa emhadini, nditsho ndibe rhono-rhono, kwankqu neempahla zam zingandamkeli." 
Job9:32 “Ebengumntu na kakade ukuba ndibe ndiphendulane naye? Hayi, bendingeze ndime naye enkundleni!" 
Job9:33 Kaloku phakathi kwethu sobabini akukho mlamli unokusahlula ngezandla zakhe. 
Job9:34 Hayi bo! Khawumke noswazi lwakho khon' ukuze ndingabi sankwantya ndisoyika isohlwayo. 
Job9:35 Xa kunjalo ke ndingatsho ndithethe ndingenaloyiko, kodwa ngale ndlela izinto zimi ngayo ngoku andinako.”" 
Job10:1 “Kwowu, ndidikiwe bobu bomi! Ngoko ke ndosuka ndithethe utyhatyhiwe, isikhalo sam ndisitsho ndibindekile!" 
Job10:2 Ewe, ndiya kuthetha naye ndithi: ‘Ngani ukuba undigwebe, Thixo? Hayi kaloku, ndazise ityala kuqala." 
Job10:3 Ikunceda ntoni wena ingcinezelo enje, ukutshabalalisa umsebenzi wezandla zakho, uze uthelele amacebo ezikhohlakali?" 
Job10:4 Ngaba amehlo akho afana nawabantu na? Ngaba nawe ubona njengomntu? 
Job10:5 Ngaba imihla yakho ifana neyomntu? Ngaba iminyaka yakho ifana neyakhe na? 
Job10:6 Ngani ke ukuba ugqogqe iziphoso zam, uzingelane nesono sam?" 
Job10:7 Kaloku uyazi ukuba andinatyala, ibe ke futhi uyazi ukuba akekho ongandihlangulayo esandleni sakho." 
Job10:8 “ ‘Ndenziwa nguwe nje, ndabunjwa zizandla zakho, ngaba ngoku uza kujika unditshabalalise?" 
Job10:9 Khumbula kaloku ukuba wandibumba njengodongwe! Ngaba ke ngoku uza kundivuthulula ndibe luthuli? 
Job10:10 Andithi na kaloku wandithulula njengobisi, ndaza ke ndakhanywa njengengqaka?" 
Job10:11 Kaloku wandibumba ngamathambo nemisipha, wandinxibisa inyama, wandambathisa ufele." 
Job10:12 Wandinika ubomi, wandambesa ngezibele; undinonophele ke wandixhasa." 
Job10:13 “ ‘Kambe ke zonke ezi zinto undifihlele, kuba le ibiyinjongo yakho kakade." 
Job10:14 Kaloku wena ube ugade ukuba ndone ukuze undigwebe ngenxa yesono sam. 
Job10:15 Ukuba ke ndisisikhohlakali kunyembelekile kum! Kambe ke noba ndililungisa andinaqhayiya, kuba ndibandezelekile, ndambethwe lihlazo." 
Job10:16 Noba ndingade ndiqholose wena ungandizingela njengengonyama, uphinde wenze kum ngokwaloo mandla akho amangalisayo." 
Job10:17 Usoloko unamangqina andintywiliselayo, ibe ke nengqumbo yakho iyakhula ngakum, kuba uyaphindelela ukundihlasela." 
Job10:18 “ ‘Kwakutheni ukuze undiyeke ndizalwe? Awu! Akwaba ndandife ndingekalanywa naliliso eli! 
Job10:19 Ngoku ngendifana nongazange abekho, kuba ngendavela nje ndasiwa engcwabeni." 
Job10:20 Ewe, bufutshane kambe ubomi bam! Hayi khona, khawundiyeke ndikhe ndiphumle kancinane!" 
Job10:21 Kaloku ngoku ndiyahamba, ibe ke soze ndibuye; ndiya kwilizwe lethunzi nobumnyama." 
Job10:22 Ewe, ndiya kwilizwe lobumnyama namathunzi, nelesithokothoko sobumnyama, apho ukukhanya kufana nobumnyama.’ ”" 
Job11:1 Ke uZofare waseNama waphendula wathi: 
Job11:2 “Uthi kungathi cwaka, ingaphendulwa le nyambalala yamazwi akho? Ucinga ukuba ukulavuza okunje kungamthethelela umntu?" 
Job11:3 Uthi oku kubhobhoza kwakho kuya kusenza sithi cwaka? Uthi wena ngoku uphoxisa thina masikuyeke singakuphoxi? 
Job11:4 Andithi na kaloku wena uthi imfundiso yakho imsulwa, nawe ngokwakho awunabala phambi koThixo?" 
Job11:5 Awu, akwaba uThixo ebengadandulukayo athethe nawe," 
Job11:6 akhe akubonise iingontsi-ngontsi zobulumko! Kuba kambe kunzulu ukwazi kwakhe! Yiqonde into yokuba esi sohlwayo akunike sona uThixo siyalaba-laba kubutyala bakho. 
Job11:7 “Uthi ungahle uziqonde iingontsi-ngontsi zobunzulu bukaThixo, ngokunjalo nobungakanani bamandla kaSomandla?" 
Job11:8 Hayi bo, úngaphaya kwakho, namazulu uwakrobele! Ewe, yena ubona nelabafileyo, ube ke wena awazi nto!" 
Job11:9 UThixo ulivelele ihlabathi, kanti ke ulukrobele nolwandle!" 
Job11:10 Ukuba ke usuka akubambe edlula, aze akuse ematyaleni, ngubani ongamnqandayo?" 
Job11:11 Kaloku yena uyabazi oongantweni; ke, xa ebona ububi ùthi makangenzi nto?" 
Job11:12 Ke zona iziyatha zoza zibe nengqondo mhla iqwarha lazala umntu! 
Job11:13 “Ukuba uthe wayisebenzisa ingqondo yakho, unganako ukolulela izandla kuThixo." 
Job11:14 Ukuba uphethe ububi yahlukana nabo, nezinto zenkohlakalo mazingafumaneki nasemzini wakho." 
Job11:15 Ukuba unokwenjenjalo ke unganako ukuma ungenaxhala nganto, ume ngxishi ungenadyudyu." 
Job11:16 Ngako ke ungatsho uyilibale yonke le mbandezelo; ewe, ilibaleke njengeempuphuma zomlambo oseluwuthile." 
Job11:17 Ke bona ubomi bakho buya kutsho buqaqambe ngathi kusemin' emaqanda. Le meko yakho yokubandezeleka ijike ibe yeginyis' amathe, oku komsobomvu." 
Job11:18 Uya kutsho uzithembe, kuba kaloku nekamva liqaqambile. Ngenene uya kuhlala ukhuselekile ungenaxhala." 
Job11:19 Uya kuthi zava ungenadyudyu, bathi nabaninzi bacele uncedo kuwe." 
Job11:20 Ke zona izikhohlakali ziya kucinywa amehlo, abe ke namathuba okuphuncula engasekho, kuphela kwanto iseleyo kukuqhawuka.”" 
Job12:1 Ke uYobi waphendula wathi: 
Job12:2 “Inene, ningabona bantu; ibe ke nobulumko buya kufa nani!" 
Job12:3 Kambe ke nam ndinengqondo njengani; anindidluli nganto. Kakade ke nithi ngubani ongàzaziyo ezi zinto? 
Job12:4 “Mna ndiyakhala kuThixo, aze andiphendule; kodwa ngoku sendiyintlekisa nakwizihlobo zam – ewe, ilungisa lomfo ongenabala, kambe ke namhlanje ndisisigculelo!" 
Job12:5 Oseshweni uyadelwa ngabathe zava; ogxadazelayo uyakhatywa! 
Job12:6 Kukho ulonwabo ezindlwini zezikrelemnqa; abamqumbisayo uThixo bakhuselekile; nditsho abo bacingayo ukuba uThixo usezandleni zabo. 
Job12:7 “Kodwa ke khanibuze nakwiinyamakazi, ziya kunifundisa; nibuze nasezintakeni, zinixelele." 
Job12:8 Khaningqawe ulwazi nakwizilo zomhlaba, ziya kuninika; ninkinkqe ukuqonda nasezintlanzini elwandle, ziya kuniphokozela." 
Job12:9 Phakathi kwazo akukho ungaqondiyo ukuba le nto yenziwe *nguNdikhoyo. 
Job12:10 Kaloku zonke izinto eziphilayo zisesandleni sakhe, nobomi boluntu lonke buxhomekeke kuye." 
Job12:11 Kaloku kwanjengokuba umlomo usiva ubunjani bokutya, nendlebe ke iyawaphicotha amazwi." 
Job12:12 Ubulumko buyafumaneka kwiingwevu; ke bona ubudala buza namava. 
Job12:13 “Kanti ke yena uThixo unobulumko namandla, amacebo nengqiqo." 
Job12:14 Into ayiqhaqhileyo akukho mntu unokubuya ayakhe; ngokunjalo nomntu amvaleleyo akukho ungamvulelayo. 
Job12:15 UThixo akuwavalela amanzi kuyabalela; kanti ke akuwavulela kutsho kube ziimpuphuma. 
Job12:16 Ukomelela noloyiso lolwakhe, kanti ke nabakhohlisi ngokunjalo nabakhohliswa basesandleni sakhe." 
Job12:17 Yena amaphakathi uwatsho ancitheke, nabagwebi abatsho babe ziimpanga-mpanga." 
Job12:18 Uyawakhulula amakhamandela aqhotyoshwe ngookumkani, aze bona ngokwabo abanxibise umbhinqo wamabanjwa." 
Job12:19 Ababingeleli ubatsho baphoxeke, aze wona amakhwahla awakhiqe." 
Job12:20 Amaciko athenjiweyo uwatsho abhibhidle; aze ayiphuthise nengqiqo yamadoda amakhulu. 
Job12:21 Amatshawe uwahlaza ngendelelo; ke zona iingwanyalala uzihlutha izixhobo. 
Job12:22 Utyhila izinto ezifihlakele ezinzulwini zobumnyama, nobona bumbonde-mbonde abujike bube kukukhanya." 
Job12:23 Uyazikhulisa izizwe, abuye azivuthulule; azithi jize ngobungangalala, abuye aziyekele zithinjwe." 
Job12:24 Iinkokheli zezizwe uzitsho zibe zizithwanga-thwanga, zifathule zibhadula enkangala." 
Job12:25 Ngoko ke ziphutha-phutha ebumnyameni, kungekho kukhanya; zigxadazele njengamanxila." 
Job13:1 “Hayi kaloku, zonke ezi zinto sendikhe ndazibona ngala wam amehlo; ewe, ndizivile ngezi zam iindlebe, ndaye ke ndiziqonda." 
Job13:2 Zonke ezi zinto nizaziyo nam ndiyazazi; anindidlule nganto. 
Job13:3 Kambe ke mna okunokwam ndifuna ukuthetha noSomandla, ndiwaneke ndiwuxoxe naye lo mcimbi." 
Job13:4 Ke nina nilibele kukugquma inyaniso ngobuxoki; nifana nqwa neqithilili logqirha ongenakunyanga mntu. 
Job13:5 Akwaba beningathi cwaka; oko kuthula kwenu bekungaba bobona bulumko benu. 
Job13:6 Khaniphulaphule xa ndixoxayo, nive ukuzithethelela kwam." 
Job13:7 Nicinga ukuba ningakuThixo, nide nikhuthaze intswela-bulungisa nje? Nithi ninceda yena ngale nkohliso?" 
Job13:8 Ngaba nizama ukuthatha icala ngenxa yakhe? Nifuna ukuthethela uThixo? 
Job13:9 Nithi kunganjani xa anokuthi anigoca-goce? Mhlawumbi naye nithi ningamkhohlisa ngale ndlela nibakhohlisa ngayo abantu? 
Job13:10 Inene, uya kunohlwaya, ukuba nenza isheyi ngokufihlakeleyo." 
Job13:11 Ewe, ubungangamsha bakhe buya kunirhwaqelisa, nonganyelwe kukunkwantya." 
Job13:12 Kaloku ezi zangotshe zenu zifana nelahle elinothuthu; zaye ke nezi ngxoxo zenu ziya kusumka ngathi ludongwe.” 
Job13:13 “Sukan' apha! Khanindiyeke ndithethe utyhatyhiwe, yehl' ehlayo!" 
Job13:14 Ngoku ndiza kuzibeka esichengeni, ubomi bam bube semngciphekweni." 
Job13:15 Noba selengade andigwinte andikhathali; kodwa ukuxoxa oku ke kona ndiza kuxoxa, ndiyandlale kuThixo imeko yam!" 
Job13:16 Mhlawumbi le nto yeyona ingandisindisayo, kuba ke akukho saphula-mthetho singade sibe nokujongana naye." 
Job13:17 Khanibaz' iindlebe nindiphulaphule, niyiqwalasele ingcaciso yam." 
Job13:18 Hayi ke, ngoku sendiqule ndaligangatha; futhi ndiza kuyibeka imeko yam, ndixoxe ndiphume phambili." 
Job13:19 Ngaba ukhona na ongabambana nam? Kuba xa kunjalo ndothi cwaka ndife. 
Job13:20 “Masivumelane ngezi zinto zimbini, Thixo, ukuze ndingabi sazama kuzifihla kuwe." 
Job13:21 Sirhoxise kum isandla sakho, sahlukane nam; mandingabi sahlala ndirhwaqele ndisoyika wena." 
Job13:22 Uze uthethe, ndiya kukuphendula; okanye kuya kuthetha mna, ke wena uze undiphendule." 
Job13:23 Bungakanani na ubugwenxa bam nesono sam? Ndazise ubutyala nokona kwam. 
Job13:24 Ngani ukuba undifulathele, undithathe njengotshaba?" 
Job13:25 Ngoku sowusukelisana negqabi eliphephethekayo? Uhlasela inkintshi-nkintshi yomququ? 
Job13:26 Kaloku undimangalela ngezityholo ezinzima; ude undityabeke ngobutyala bam basebuntwaneni. 
Job13:27 Iinyawo zam uzikhonkxa ngezikhuni; uyazigqala zonke iindlela zam, uzicandele umda iintende zeenyawo zam." 
Job13:28 Ngenxa yoko ndivuthuluka njengevithi; sendifana nempahla edliwe ngamanundu.” 
Job14:1 “Hayi kambe umntu, intw' ezelwe ngumfazi! Mifutshane imihla yakhe; izele ziinkathazo." 
Job14:2 Uvela njengentyatyambo, akhawuleze abune; uthi tshe oku kwesithunzi, aphel' emehlweni." 
Job14:3 Uthi onjalo ke ungamgqala, ude ume naye enkundleni umgwebe?" 
Job14:4 Ngaba ukhona na ongakhupha into ehlambulukileyo kwengahlambulukanga? Unotshe, akukho namnye!" 
Job14:5 Kaloku imihla yakhe seyimisiwe, nenani leenyanga zakhe liyaziwa nguwe; kananjalo ke ummisele umda angenakuwutsiba." 
Job14:6 Somyeka, ungabi samjonga, akhe aphumle njengomqeshwa ogqibe umsebenzi wemini." 
Job14:7 “Umthi xa ugawuliwe lisekhona ithemba ngawo; awunakufa kuphele, usenokubuya uhlume amagqabi." 
Job14:8 Noba ingakhula ibe ndala ingcambu yawo emhlabeni nesiphunzi sawo sife apho simile khona," 
Job14:9 uthi nje ukuba ukhe wasezela ukunyepha kwamanzi, utsho uhlume, uvelise amasebe njengegatyana lomthi." 
Job14:10 Ukanti ke yena umntu uyafa, iphel' intw' ibithethwa. Ewe, uyafa aphel' emehlweni." 
Job14:11 Njengokuba amanzi echibi ephela, namanzi omlambo esitsha ome;" 
Job14:12 nomntu ke unjalo, ulala phantsi angabuyi avuke. Ibe ke soze aphinde avuke, okanye ashukunyiswe kobo buthongo bakhe, ade amazulu angabi sabikho." 
Job14:13 “Akwaba ubungandifihla kwelo labafileyo ide ithothe ingqumbo yakho, uze ke undimisele ixesha oya kundikhumbula ngalo." 
Job14:14 Ukuba ngaba ke umntu ufile, angabuya aphile? Xa kunjalo ngendilinda yonke imihla yokubulaleka kwam, lide lifike ixesha lokukhululeka kwam." 
Job14:15 Ngewundibiza, ndisabele ke mna, kuba wena ukulangazelela ukubona umsebenzi wezandla zakho." 
Job14:16 Ngewuzibala izinyathelo zam, ungaziqwalaseli noko iziphoso zam." 
Job14:17 Zonke izikreqo zam ziya kuvalelwa engxoweni, ubugqume ubugwenxa bam." 
Job14:18 Kodwa wena uyalitshitshisa ithemba lomntu, oku kweentaba ezidilikayo zivuthuluke, oku kwamawa asunduziweyo angabi sabakho, nditsho oku kwamanzi awadlayo amatye, okwezandyondyo zemvula eziwukhukulisayo umhlaba." 
Job14:19  
Job14:20 Umntu umvikiva kube kanye, angabi sabikho; uguqula ubuso bakhe, umgxothe." 
Job14:21 Oonyana bakhe noba sebewongekile, akaqondi yena; ukanti akaboni naxa sebehlazeka." 
Job14:22 Kaloku into emdlayo yintlungu yesiqu sakhe, abe ezililela yena buqu.”" 
Job15:1 Ke uElifazi waseTeman waphendula wathi: 
Job15:2 “Uthi isilumko singaze sitsho ngembudede enje? Singathi kanti sihlalele ukubhodla umoya wasempuma? 
Job15:3 Wawusibona phi isilumko esibhibhidla kanje xa sixoxayo, esisuka sizithethelele ngamazwi ayimfeketho njengawe lo?" 
Job15:4 Wena ngoku uyakuphuthisa ukuthobela uThixo; ngale ndlela yakho akukho bani ongaphinda anxulumane noThixo. 
Job15:5 Ukuthetha kwakho sekulawulwa bubugwenxa; ulwimi lwakho luvuza amaqhinga. 
Job15:6 Wena awugwetywa nandim, koko ngumlomo wakho, ngamazwi akho kanye akugwebayo." 
Job15:7 “Nguwe na umntu wokuqala ukuzalwa? Ngaba wavela kungekabikho neentaba ezi? 
Job15:8 Ngaba wawukho kwigqugula likaThixo? Ngani ke ukuba ububange kangaka ubulumko? 
Job15:9 Zinto zini ezi zaziwa nguwe wedwa singazaziyo thina? Ngaba kukho izinto eziyintsonkotha ezicace kuwe wedwa? 
Job15:10 Thina sineengwevu namadoda amakhulu, amadala nditsho nakuyihlo." 
Job15:11 Kutheni ukuba unganeli yintuthuzelo kaThixo, okanye ngala mazwi sikubongoza ngawo?" 
Job15:12 Yintoni le ikulahlekisa kangaka? Atshawuziswa yintoni amehlo akho? 
Job15:13 Kutheni ukuba uvukelane noThixo, ude uthethe amazwi anje?" 
Job15:14 “Nguwuphi umntu ongade abe nyulu, ingubani kwabazelweyo ngabafazi ongafumaneka engenatyala?" 
Job15:15 Khumbula kaloku ukuba uThixo akathembanga nditsho neengcwele zakhe zasezulwini; ewe, nezulu ngokwalo alikho nyulu emehlweni akhe." 
Job15:16 Ubeka phi ke yena umntu eyinto elisikizi ephuthileyo nje? Kuxa engubani esela uluchwe lobubi nje oku kwamanzi? 
Job15:17 “Khawuphulaphule ndikhe ndikuxelele, ndikwazise izinto endizibonileyo." 
Job15:18 Nditsho ezo zaxelwayo zizilumko njengoko zona zingafihlelwanga ngamanyange. 
Job15:19 Kaloku wona eli lizwe alinikwa laba lelawo odwa kungekho maveza-ndlebe. 
Job15:20 Isikhohlakali sihlala sibhinyalaza singcungcutheka yonke imihla yaso; ewe, bunjalo ke bonke ubomi bomntu ongqwabalala!" 
Job15:21 Kaloku sisoloko sisothuswa yingxolo esezindlebeni zaso; size sihlaselwe xa sizicingela ukuba sikhuselekile. 
Job15:22 Asinathemba lakuphuncula ebumnyameni kuba sihleli silindelwe likrele. 
Job15:23 Kaloku lo mntu usesichengeni sokuba kukutya kwamaxhalanga; uqonda kakuhle ukuba yintshabalalo ngaphambili. 
Job15:24 Usuka onganyelwe yinkxwaleko nomva-ndedwa, kanye oku kokumkani esiya kuhlasela." 
Job15:25 Kaloku yena usolulele kuThixo isandla sakhe, wazenza igorha kuSomandla," 
Job15:26 emhlasela engakhathalele, ephethe elo khaka lakhe elingqingqwa." 
Job15:27 “Noxa ubuso bakhe bugutyungelwe ngamanqatha, nemihlubulo yakhe ivuthelene kukutyeba," 
Job15:28 izixeko zakhe ziya kuba ngamanxuwa; indlu yakhe ilil' ibhungane; ngokukhawuleza iza kuba ngamabhodlo nje. 
Job15:29 Ewe, uya kuphelelwa kukuba sisityebi, ize nendyebo yakhe ibhange, nditsho nenzuzo yakhe ingabi sabakho kulo lonke ilizwe." 
Job15:30 Akayi kubuphepha ubumnyama bokufa. Ihlumelo lakhe liya kurhawulwa lilangatye, amazwi akhe aphephetheke nomoya." 
Job15:31 Makangazikhohlisi aqamele ngamampunge, kuba inzuzo yakhe iya kuba lilize." 
Job15:32 Uya kutshazwa phambi kwexesha, amagqabi angaze abe luhlaza." 
Job15:33 Uya kufana nomdiliya ovuthuluke iziqhamo ziseluhlaza, nqwa nomnquma ovuthuluke iintyatyambo." 
Job15:34 Lonke elo qela labangamnquliyo uThixo aliyi kuba nanto, nemizi yabo eyakhiwe ngezinyobo iya kuvuthululwa ngumlilo." 
Job15:35 Kaloku bakhawula ububi, bazale uqhushululu, inzala yabo ibe yinkohliso.”" 
Job16:1 Ke uYobi waphendula wenjenje: 
Job16:2 “Zonke ezi zinto nindixelela zona sendikhe ndaziva ngaphambili; inene, xa ninonke ningabathuthuzeli abangento." 
Job16:3 Ngaba le ntshwaqane yenu ayinasiphelo? Nomelezwa yintoni kangaka engxoxweni? 
Job16:4 Nam bendingathethayo ngolo hlobo xa ibinini abakule meko ndikuyo; bendiya kuthetha nani ndimana ndichan' amagama, ndide ndimane ndihlunguzela intloko." 
Job16:5 Bendiya kunomeleza ngamacebiso, ndinithuthuzele ngamazwi alalanisayo." 
Job16:6 “Kambe ke, nokuba ndiyathetha, intlungu le ayisuki; kanti ke nokuba ndithule, kusafana." 
Job16:7 Hayi ke, ngoku uThixo undiqobile; usapho lwam uluvuthulule bhuqe!" 
Job16:8 Ndifunyenwe nguye, kwaza oko kwaba bubungqina bokundityhola; ukonakala komzimba wam bubungqina obundidobelelayo." 
Job16:9 Ngale ngqumbo yakhe undiqwengile wandenzakalisa; undisinekele ngaloo mazinyo akhe; yena mchasi wam uyandijamela. 
Job16:10 Abantu bathetha ngam bendigxeka; bandimpakaza esidleleni ngengcikivo, bebonke badibana ngokundichasa." 
Job16:11 UThixo undiyekele ngezaphula-mthetho, wandinikela ezandleni zezikhohlakali." 
Job16:12 Mna bendingacingele nto, suka ke yena wandintlekeza, wandibamba ngobhongwana, wandiqwenga. Ewe, mna sendiyeyona nto ajolise kuyo." 
Job16:13 Abeentolo bakhe bandirhawule; undincule izintso engenalusini, wayiphalazela emhlabeni inyongo yam." 
Job16:14 Undingxwelerhe wada wandiqusha; ufunzela kum okwejoni. 
Job16:15 “Ngoku sendithe wambu ezokuzila; uphondo lwam luseluthulini. 
Job16:16 Sendilile ndada ndambatsha; ke wona amehlo am ade af' amnyama. 
Job16:17 Kambe ke phofu mna andinabundlongo-ndlongo, nomthandazo wam kuThixo awunakumbi." 
Job16:18 “Yini na, mhlaba! Sukulingcwab' igazi lam! Isikhalo sam masivakale!" 
Job16:19 Kaloku nangoku ingqina lam lisemazulwini; ewe, ukho ongakum ondithethelelayo kweliphezulu." 
Job16:20 Sendiyintlekisa nakwizihlobo zam; ke iinyembezi zam ndiziphalaza phambi koThixo. 
Job16:21 Akwaba ebenokulamla phakathi komntu noThixo njengoko ebakho umlamli phakathi komntu nomhlobo wakhe! 
Job16:22 Kuba kaloku akuseminyaka mingaphi ndithathe uhambo olungabuyiyo.” 
Job17:1 “Umoya wam wonakele, nemihla yam iphelile; ngoku sending'ong'ozelwe lingcwaba." 
Job17:2 Inene, ngapha nangapha ndiphahlwe ngabandigculelayo; ewe, ndijongene nentiyo yabo." 
Job17:3 “Nceda, Thixo, undibekele isibambiso. Kakade ke ibingubani omnye ongandikhuselayo?" 
Job17:4 Kaloku iingqiqo zabo uzithe lwale ngokungaqondi; ngoko ke mabangandoyisi. 
Job17:5 Kaloku umntu ongcothoza izihlobo zakhe ngenxa yenzuzo, abantwana bakhe baya kufa amehlo." 
Job17:6 “Undenze ndaba ngundaba-mlonyeni kubantu bonke, into etshicelwa ebusweni." 
Job17:7 Ngenxa yeenzingo amehlo am selede anorhatyazo; sendide ndayingcadalala ephephukayo. 
Job17:8 Abo banyanisekileyo ke bamangalisiwe; ewe, abamsulwa bayakhathazeka ngenxa yabachasene noThixo." 
Job17:9 Olilungisa ubambelele nkqi endleleni yakhe, ngokunjalo ke nabo bazandla zimsulwa baya besomelela ngokomelela." 
Job17:10 “Kambe ke, noba niyaphinda nibuye xa ninonke, andiyi kufumana nasinye isilumko apho phakathi kwenu." 
Job17:11 Imihla yam iphelile, namacebo am achithakele, ngokunjalo neminqweno yam ivuthulukile." 
Job17:12 Ubusuku bathi yimini; kanti xa kuhlwayo bathi sekuza kusa. 
Job17:13 Uthi ke, xa ndingasuka ndithi elabafileyo likhaya lam, ndize ndizandlalele kwamnyama-ndawo," 
Job17:14 okanye ke, xa ndinokuthi ingcwaba ngubawo, ndize ndithi iimpethu ngumama nodade wethu:" 
Job17:15 liphi ke ithemba lam, ingubani khona onokundibonelela?" 
Job17:16 Ngaba bendinokuhla nalo na ndiye emasangweni elabafileyo? Bendinokuhla nalo na, ndiye kuphumla nalo eluthulini?”" 
Job18:1 Kwesi sithuba ke kuthathise uBhildadi, umfo waseShuwa, wenjenje:" 
Job18:2 “Koda kube nini untyuntya? Hayi bo, khawubuyel' ezingqondweni, nathi ke sithethe!" 
Job18:3 Kutheni ukuba usiphathe okwezilwanyana? Ngaba usibona siziziyatha ezinjalo? 
Job18:4 Uyazenzakalisa ngalo msindo wakho. Ngaba umhlaba mawujike ube yinkangala ukungqinela ukunyaniseka kwakho? Uthi makudilik' amawa ezindaweni zawo? 
Job18:5 “Hayi kaloku, isibane sesikhohlakali siza kucinywa, futhi ke nelangatye laso soze liphinde livuthe." 
Job18:6 Ukukhanya kuya kujika kube bubumnyama endlwini yaso; ewe, isibane saso siya kucinywa." 
Job18:7 Siza kuphelelwa kukunyantsula, sikhutyekiswe kwalelaso iqhinga." 
Job18:8 Iinyawo zaso ziya kugaxeleka kwisabatha, size sigxalathelane siye kuthi gxwa emhadini." 
Job18:9 Umgibe wosuka usithi hlasi ngesithende, usiqhoge usibambe ntshilikithi!" 
Job18:10 Kaloku sibekelwe isabatha emhlabeni, sacutshelwa unoxhaka endleleni yaso." 
Job18:11 Lo mntu urhwaqeliswa zizoyikiso ngeenxa zonke; zimthe mbende zimpheka zimophula. 
Job18:12 Inkxwaleko imlambele; uhlala ezingelwa sisithwakumbe. 
Job18:13 Uthiwe mome sisifo esilenceza ulusu lwakhe; ewe, kanye izibulo lokufa limgrenya amalungu omzimba." 
Job18:14 Woqwengelwa apho kwelo nqugwala liyinqaba yakhe, suka ukufa kumqweqwedisele kwikumkani yezoyikiso." 
Job18:15 Akukho nto iyeyakhe iya kusala kwelo nqugwala lakhe; kaloku isulfure evuthayo iya kusasazeka phezu kwalo. 
Job18:16 Phants' apha iingcambu zakhe ziya koma, kanti ke wona amasebe akhe atshaze phezulu phaya." 
Job18:17 Udumo lwakhe luya kutshitsha elizweni, negama lakhe lilibaleke ehlabathini." 
Job18:18 Wogxothwa kweli lizwe lokukhanya, akhatshelwe ebumnyameni; ewe, uya kunikw' uphum' aphele kwelimiweyo." 
Job18:19 Akayi kushiya mlibo nanzala phakathi kwamawabo; ngenene akayi kushiya nempunde le kwelakowabo. 
Job18:20 Abasentshona bothi bakuyiva le ntlekele bakhamnqe; kanti ke abasempuma bothi bakuva ngesi sibetho batsho babamb' ongezantsi! 
Job18:21 Kuya kuba njalo ke kwindlu yesikhohlakali. Ewe, injalo indawo yongamkhathalelanga uThixo!”" 
Job19:1 Ke kaloku waphendula uYobi wathi: 
Job19:2 “Yaz'ba koda kube nini na nindingcungcuthekisa, nindaphula nindikroboza ngamazwi?" 
Job19:3 Kunini niphoxisa ngam! Aninantloni ukundihlasela kangaka? 
Job19:4 Khona sekusithiwa ndonile, ningena phi ke nina?" 
Job19:5 Eyona nto ngoku niyandivuyelela; kuni ezi nkathazo zam zibonisa ubutyala bam. 
Job19:6 Anisaboni ke nina ukuba nguThixo lo undifake kule ngxingwa? Ewe kaloku, nguye ondigubungele ngomnatha." 
Job19:7 “Ndiba ngakhwaza ndisithi: ‘Ugonyamelo!’ andifumani nokuhoywa oku! Futhi ndibe ngazibika, akukho bani undilamlelayo!" 
Job19:8 Yena uyivalile indlela yam ukuze ndingabi nakugqitha. Iindlela zam uzithe zinzi ngobumnyama. 
Job19:9 Yena undihlube iwonga lam, wandihlutha naloo ntshinga bendinayo." 
Job19:10 Undidilize macal' onke, ndee shwaka, walincothula njengomthi ithemba lam." 
Job19:11 Ingqumbo yakhe uyijolise kum; undiphethe njengolona tshaba lwakhe. 
Job19:12 Undikhuphele umkhosi wakhe; undimbela izikanisi zokundihlasela; ujikeleza umzi wam. 
Job19:13 Unditsho ndabalekwa nangabantakwethu; xa kungokunje nezihlobo zam ezi zihambela phaya! 
Job19:14 Okwakuzizalamane zam zindishiyile, ngokunjalo nabazalana nam bandilibele." 
Job19:15 Abo babeziindwendwe zam abasandikhumbuli, nezicakazana zam azisandazele nto, sendithathwa njengowasemzini." 
Job19:16 Ndakusibiza isicaka sam, asisabeli nokusabela oku, nditsho nokuba ndiyasicenga." 
Job19:17 Kanti nomfazi wam weenkomo selekhutyekiswa kukuphefumla kwam; sendiliqaqa nakwabesizalo sikama. 
Job19:18 Sendidelwe nangabantwana aba bembala; bathi ndakuthi gqi bakrukrutheke yintsini. 
Job19:19 Endandikade ndilala ngengub' enye nabo, bayandicaphukela; ukanti nâbo ndibathandayo bandivukele." 
Job19:20 Izihlunu zam sezithe nca emathanjeni, nolusu lwam sendilonwaya ngamazinyo." 
Job19:21 “Hoyina! Hoyina, balingane bam; khanibe nebuya-mbo! Kaloku sisandla sikaThixo esi sindenze ndanje!" 
Job19:22 Ngani ukuba nani ninditshutshise njengoThixo? Hayi kaloku, noko ngoku sekwanele!" 
Job19:23 Akwaba ebekho owabhalayo la mazwi am; akwaba ebeshicilelwe encwadini! 
Job19:24 Ngenene akwaba la mazwi ebekrolwe elityeni ngentsimbi ebukhali nangelothe, khon' ukuze ahlale ehleli nanini nanini!" 
Job19:25 Kambe ke ndiyazi ukuba umkhululi wam ukho; ekugqibeleni iya kuba nguye otshatshelayo ehlabathini. 
Job19:26 Nokuba ulusu lwam lungade ludlavulwe sesi sifo, noko uThixo yena ndiya kumbona ndidlavuke ndinjalo!" 
Job19:27 Ewe, ndiya kumbona ngala wam amehlo, indim, ingenguye wumbi. Loo nto ndiyilangazelela ngomxhelo wam wonke." 
Job19:28 Ke nina nisuka nithi: ‘Hayi ukungcungcutheka kwakhe! Yabe ingcambu yaloo nto ikuye ngenkqu.’ 
Job19:29 Kambe ke lilumkeleni ikrele elifunza kuni, ikrele lengqumbo kaThixo ngenxa yesono; liya kunenza niqonde ukuba ukhona umgwebi.”" 
Job20:1 Ke kaloku uZofare waseNama waphendula wathi: 
Job20:2 “Ukudubeka kwam kundibangela ukuba mandiphendule; kunditsho ndikungxamele ukuthetha. 
Job20:3 Ngale ndlela undigxeka ngayo uyandihlaza, kodwa ndiza kukuphendula ngengqiqo." 
Job20:4 Ngaba akuyiqondi le nto, ingathi lisiko lidala nje? Laqala kwaukufika komntu wokuqala ehlabathini." 
Job20:5 Nditsho le nto yokuba ulonwabo lwesikhohlakali alubhekele phi. Kaloku imincili yalowo ungamnquliyo uThixo yeyomzuzwana nje. 
Job20:6 Ewe, yena angasisihandiba esiwakrobeleyo namazulu, abe sisikhulu esintloko irheca amafu," 
Job20:7 kodwa wosuka adake kuphele njengelindle lakhe, baze abo bebembonile bathi: ‘Utshone phi na?’" 
Job20:8 Usuka athi shwaka njengephupha, azimele njengombono wasebusuku, angaze aphinde alanywe bani." 
Job20:9 Ababehlala bembona abaphindi bambone, futhi nendawo yakhe ingaze ibe samalama." 
Job20:10 Abantwana bakhe baya kubabuyekeza abasweleyo, izandla zakhe zibuyisele ubutyebi bakhe kubo." 
Job20:11 Nakuba wayefudula enamandla ngeemini zobutsha bakhe, kodwa ngoku loo mandla aya kulala eluthulini kunye naye." 
Job20:12 “Inkohlakalo inganambitheka kamnandi emlonyeni wakhe, ade ayigushe phantsi kolwimi." 
Job20:13 Anganamathela kuyo angavumi ukwahlukana nayo, asuke akhethe ukuhlala eyimumathile ngenkalakahla." 
Job20:14 Kodwa ke oko kutya kwakhe esiswini sakhe kosuka kukrakre, kube ngathi yityhefu yephimpi." 
Job20:15 Kaloku umntu okhohlakeleyo ubutyebi ubuginya ajike abuhlanze; uThixo ubugrumba nakweso sisu sakhe. 
Job20:16 Isikhohlakali simfimfitha ubuhlungu bamaphimpi, buze busibinze kanye oku kobuhlungu berhamba." 
Job20:17 Asihlali side sibone imilambo empompoza amanzi, okanye iintlambo ezinkcenkceza ubusi namasi." 
Job20:18 Ukubulaleka kwaso kufuneka sikuncame singakhange sikuxhamle; kaloku asilifumani ithuba lokubutya ubutyebi baso, sinambithe imveliso yokurhweba kwaso." 
Job20:19 Andithi na kaloku sona saphila kukucinezela abahlelelekileyo; izindlu sizifumana singazakhanga? 
Job20:20 “Kaloku ukunyoluka komntu okhohlakeleyo akunasiphelo; ulixhoba leminqweno yakhe. 
Job20:21 Utya konke, angashiyi nto; ngoko ke ngoku inkqubela yakhe isuke yanqamka." 
Job20:22 Uthi xa asencotsheni yempumelelo ahlelwe ziinzima; zisuke zimfikele ngamandla iinkathazo. 
Job20:23 Angatya yena ahluthe mpu, kodwa uThixo wosuka amnisele ngengqumbo yakhe, amohlwaye ngokumzisela imfazwe." 
Job20:24 Xa azama ukuphepha ikrele elenziwe ngentsimbi uya kuchanwa lutolo lobhedu, lumbinze luphumele." 
Job20:25 Xa elikhupha emqolo, encothula intloko yalo ekhazimlayo enyongweni, wosuka onganyelwe kukunkwantya." 
Job20:26 Yonke indyebo yakhe yovuthuluka iphele, kuthi gqi umlilo ongaphenjwanga mntu utshabalalise okushiyekileyo endlwini yakhe." 
Job20:27 Amazulu osuka awadandalazise amatyala akhe, ke lona ihlabathi lisuke limvukele." 
Job20:28 Indlu yakhe iya kukhukuliswa, imke nomsinga wamanzi ngemini yengqumbo kaThixo." 
Job20:29 Naso ke isabelo uThixo asinika abakhohlakeleyo; ewe, elo lilifa abamisele lona uThixo.”" 
Job21:1 UYobi ke waphendula wenjenje: 
Job21:2 “Khanibek' iindlebe nindiphulaphule; leyo ke yoba yeyona ntuthuzelo kum. 
Job21:3 Khanindinyamezele nam ndikhe ndithethe; emva koko ke ningaqhubela phambili niphoxise. 
Job21:4 “Ke mna ndifanele ukukhathazeka; kaloku andixabananga nomntu nje. 
Job21:5 Jongani kum: niya kumangaliswa, nibamb' ongezantsi." 
Job21:6 Nam ndithi ndakuyicinga le nto indihleleyo ndisuke ndikhwankqiswe, ndize ndifikelwe kukungcangcazela komzimba." 
Job21:7 Ngani ukuba abakhohlakeleyo bayizuze inyhweba yokukhula bade babe badala, baxhamle ukomelela nenkqubela?" 
Job21:8 Bakhula babe nabantwana nabazukulwana; ewe, baba nenyhweba yokusibukela isizukulwana sabo." 
Job21:9 Emizini yabo bonwabile, abakhathazwa nto; uThixo akabayekeli ngezibetho." 
Job21:10 Kubo iinkunzi ziyazizalisa iimazi, zingashiyi nanye; ibe ke neemazi zabo ziyazala zingaphunzi." 
Job21:11 Owabo umlisela utaka-taka ngokwamatakane; abantwana babo bayadloba-dloba. 
Job21:12 Ungafika bememelela bekhatshwa ziintambula neengqongqo; bangqungqa benemincili bebetha iifluthi. 
Job21:13 Obabo ubomi babudla ngentlutha nenzolo, baze bathi nyubelele baye kutshona kwelemimoya ngaphandle kwamagingxi-gingxi." 
Job21:14 Izikhohlakali zithi kuThixo: ‘Suka kuthi! Asinamdla wakuzazi iindlela zakho.’ 
Job21:15 Zisuka zithi: ‘Kuxa engubani yena uSomandla ukuba singade simbuse? Khona, nzuzoni esiyifumanayo ngokumnqula?’" 
Job21:16 Kambe impumelelo yazo ayixhomekekanga ezandleni zazo. Mna andihambisani necebo lâbo bantu bakhohlakeleyo. 
Job21:17 “Kukangaphi isibane sesikhohlakali sicinywa? Kukangaphi zingundaniselwa zizibetho? Andithi na kaloku uThixo abakhohlakeleyo ubahlomlela ingqumbo yakhe," 
Job21:18 aze abavuthele baphephetheke njengengca enqunqiweyo, bavuthuluke njengomququ unyuka nesaqhwithi?" 
Job21:19 Ngaba uThixo usibekela abantwana isohlwayo sabazali? Hayi bo; makohlwaye abo bonileyo ngokwabo, khon' ukuze nabo baqonde." 
Job21:20 Abo bonileyo mabaxhamle isohlwayo, basele ingqumbo kaSomandla." 
Job21:21 Kakade ke, umntu uwukhathalele ngani umzi wakhe xa yena engasekho, xa iinyanga zakhe azibalelweyo kobu bomi seziphelile?" 
Job21:22 “Ngubani ongafundisa uThixo ulwazi? Nezithwala-ndwe zaphezulu zisesandleni sakhe nje! 
Job21:23 Bambi bafa bethe gabhu kwintlala-kahle nenkqubela; bafa bengazele nto bekhuselekile. 
Job21:24 Ewe, bafikelwa kukufa iimvaba zabo zizele ngamasi; nangokwasempilweni bayimiqaba-qaba." 
Job21:25 Ukanti ke bambi bafa benxunguphele, bengazange bayive nokuyiva intlala-kahle." 
Job21:26 Kambe ke bonke bayafa bangcwatywe, baze ke babe lixhoba leempethu." 
Job21:27 Ewe, ndiyakubona ukuyila kweengqiqo zenu, ngokunjalo naloo mayelenqe niwayilayo ukuchasana nam." 
Job21:28 Niyawaza kubuza ke nithi: ‘Uphi umzi wesikhulu xa kunamhlanje-nje? Iphi loo ndlu sasiyenzela kuyo inkohlakalo?’ 
Job21:29 Ngaba anikhe nibuze na kwabalikhenkethileyo ilizwe? Ke, ngaba anikayiqondi ingxelo yabo?" 
Job21:30 Le yokuba ngomhla wesithwakumbe isikhohlakali siyasinda, sihlangulwe kuyo ingqumbo!" 
Job21:31 Akukho mntu ujongana naso asimangalele, kungekho bani usibuyekezayo ngezenzo zaso." 
Job21:32 Sisiwa emangcwabeni, lilindwe ingcwaba laso." 
Job21:33 Amagada entlambo alala athi ncwaba phezu komzimba waso. Bonke abantu bayasilandela ukuya apho; kanti sandulelwe linani elingenakubalwa. 
Job21:34 “Ningathini ke ukufuna ukundithomalalisa ngamazwi alambathayo? Zonke iingxoxo zenu bubuvuvu obungeyonyaniso.” 
Job22:1 Ke kaloku uElifazi umfo waseTeman uphendule wenjenje: 
Job22:2 “Ngaba ukhona na umntu oluncedo kuThixo? Ngaba angazuza lutho na kwinkintsela yesilumko? 
Job22:3 Uthi ngaba uSomandla unolutho aluzuzayo ukuba wena ulilungisa? Khona sekusithiwa awunabala, imnceda ntoni loo nto?" 
Job22:4 “Ngaba uThixo angakohlwaya na ngenxa yokuba umthobela, aze akumise enkundleni?" 
Job22:5 Akungebi ngokuba wone gqitha, nobugwenxa bakho bungenasiphelo?" 
Job22:6 Kaloku wena amawenu uwamisele isibambiso ngaphandle kwesizathu; ude uwohluthe nempahla yawo yokunxiba, asale eze." 
Job22:7 Abadiniweyo benxaniwe awuluthobanga unxano lwabo, nabalambileyo ubavimbile ukutya." 
Job22:8 Wena ubusisinhanha esinemihlaba; ubungummi obekekileyo. 
Job22:9 Kanti awanelanga kukungancedi bahlolokazi, koko ude waxhaphaza wacinezela neenkedama ezi!" 
Job22:10 Ngoko ke ngoku ubhijelwe zizabatha; uminxwe naliphaphu. 
Job22:11 Ngoku ukhulelwe bubumnyama, awuboni; ugutyungelwe naziimpuphuma." 
Job22:12 “Andithi na kaloku uThixo yena uhlala emajukujukwini amazulu? Neenkwenkwezi ngokwazo kuloo malenga-lenga zikuwo yena uzivelele. 
Job22:13 Ube ke wena usithi: ‘Wazi ntoni uThixo? Esithwe ziingqimba zamafu nje, angasigweba njani?’" 
Job22:14 Uthi: ‘Akaboni; uvalelwe ngamafu; kuphela uhamba-hamba phaya esibhakabhakeni.’ 
Job22:15 Ngaba usazimisele ukuhamba indlela yamandulo, ulandele ikhondo labantu abakhohlakeleyo?" 
Job22:16 Kaloku bona baxhwilwe kwangaphambi kwexesha labo; izikhukula zemka neziseko zabo. 
Job22:17 Aba ngabo babesithi kuThixo: ‘Suka kuthi. Angasenza ntoni na uSomandla?’ 
Job22:18 Kambe ke ikwanguye ozalisa imizi yabo ngobuqhele-qhele. Phofu ke mna andihambisani neqhinga lezikhohlakali. 
Job22:19 “Amalungisa ayakubona ukutshabalala kwezikhohlakali, asuke avuye; abamsulwa bahlekisa ngazo besithi:" 
Job22:20 ‘Inene, iintshaba zethu zitshatyalalisiwe, nobutyebi bazo budliwe ngumlilo.’" 
Job22:21 “Ngoko ke wena zilahlele kuThixo, ube noxolo kunye naye; kwakuba njalo ke uya kuzuza okulungileyo." 
Job22:22 Yamkela imfundiso ephuma emlonyeni wakhe, uwamilisele entliziyweni yakho amazwi akhe." 
Job22:23 Ewe, ukuba uyabuyela kuSomandla uya kwakheka; nto nje wena lahla la manyondololo aqhubeka kulo mzi wakho." 
Job22:24 Igolide yakho yilahle, neyona yodidi yaseOfire yithathe njengamatye nje aphaya entlanjeni." 
Job22:25 Kuphela igolide yakho mayibe nguSomandla, neengqumba zesiliva yakho mayibe kwanguye." 
Job22:26 Wakuba wenjenjalo ke uya kukholosa ngoThixo uSomandla, ubujongise kuye ubuso bakho." 
Job22:27 Uya kuthandaza kuye eve; ngokunjalo ke nezibhambathiso zakho uzifezekise. 
Job22:28 Izigqibo zakho ziya kuphumelela, ngokunjalo nendlela yakho ibe mhlophe." 
Job22:29 Xa abantu bekhahlelwe phantsi uze uthi: ‘Nceda ubaphakamise.’ UThixo uya kubahlangula abazithobileyo; 
Job22:30 ewe, ude ahlangule nongekho msulwa, emsindisa ngobunyulu bezandla zakho.”" 
Job23:1 UYobi uphendule wenjenje: 
Job23:2 “Nanamhlanje ndisamkhalazela ndikrakra uThixo, kuba undiphethe gadalala nakuba sendincwina kangaka nje!" 
Job23:3 Akwaba bendimazi apho akhoyo, ndiyazi nendlela eya apho ahlala khona." 
Job23:4 Bendiya kusibeka isikhalo sam phambi kwakhe, ndixoxe ndizithethelele." 
Job23:5 Bendiya kukhe ndimve ukuba uthini na; ndive ukuba uthetha ntoni na. 
Job23:6 Ngaba angasunduzana nam ngaloo mandla akhe? Hayi, uThixo ngeke akwenze oko." 
Job23:7 Kaloku enkundleni yakhe amalungisa aphuma phambili. Ke ngoko uMgwebi wam ebeya kundigwebela kuphele. 
Job23:8 “Ndikhangele ndamfuna empumalanga, kodwa andimfumani; ukanti nasentshonalanga andimbhaqanga." 
Job23:9 Nokuba usebenza kwelasentla andimboni; xa ebuyela kwelasezantsi usithele emehlweni am. 
Job23:10 Phofu ke uThixo uyayazi indlela endiyihambayo; ukuba unokukhe andivavanye ndingafumaneka ndimsulwa okwegolide. 
Job23:11 Kaloku iinyawo zam zilandela emkhondweni wakhe; indlela yakhe ndiyigcinile, andaphambuka kuyo." 
Job23:12 Andiyishiyanga imiyalelo yemilebe yomlomo wakhe; andenzanga ngokufuna kwam, koko ndiwathobele amazwi akhe." 
Job23:13 Xa enze isigqibo ngubani ongamjikayo? Oko afuna ukukwenza uyakwenza. 
Job23:14 Ngoko ke uya kukufezekisa konke oko andimisele kona, nditsho nokuba yintoni na ayicebileyo ngam." 
Job23:15 Ngoko ke ndisuka ndirhwaqele phambi kwakhe; ewe, ndithi ndakucinga ngaye ndinkwantye." 
Job23:16 NguThixo lo unditsho ndoyika kangaka! Ewe, nguSomandla lo undirhwaqelisayo." 
Job23:17 Phofu bona ubumnyama abundivalanga umlomo, nditsho esi sithokothoko sigqume ubuso bam.”" 
Job24:1 “Ngani ukuba uSomandla angalimisi ixesha lokugweba? Kutheni ukuba nâbo bamaziyo bangayiboni loo mini? 
Job24:2 Abantu bayawushenxisa umlima-ndlela. Ewe, beba iigusha bazifuye emadlelweni." 
Job24:3 Bayayohlutha idonki yenkedama; babambisa ngenkabi yenkomo yomhlolokazi. 
Job24:4 Amahlwempu bayawagila aphume endleleni, babanyanzelisele ekuzimeleni abaziintsizana belizwe." 
Job24:5 Ewe, abahlelelekileyo bavuka kusasa, bexelengela ukutya kwabo, oku kweqwarha elibhadula ezindle lifuna ukutya koozintlango; yinkqantosi kuphela ebonelela abantwana babo ngokutyiwayo." 
Job24:6 Ukutya kwabo bakuvuna efusini, bakhwahlaze izidiliya zezikhohlakali." 
Job24:7 Ebusuku balala ngengub' esele; abanazo iingubo zokubakhusela engqeleni. 
Job24:8 Ezintabeni phaya iimvula zibatsho babe manzi tixi, bemana bezikhusela ngokuncathama emaweni." 
Job24:9 Abakhohlakeleyo bathimba iintsana eziziinkedama ezisesebeleni; bathatha iintsana zamahlwempu zibe sisibambiso. 
Job24:10 Ewe, amahlwempu ahamba ze engenampahla; athwala izithungu izisu zithe nca!" 
Job24:11 Akhama ioyile eminqumeni, axovule newayini ezidiliyeni; kodwa wona ngokwawo abe enxaniwe." 
Job24:12 Ezixekweni kuncwina amadoda, iingxwelerha ziyahlahlamba zicela uncedo, kodwa yena uThixo akazisi enkundleni izikhohlakali.”" 
Job24:13 “Kukho abantu abangafunaniyo nokukhanya, abangafuni nokuziqonda iindlela zako, futhi bengahambisani nako mpela!" 
Job24:14 Izikrelemnqa zivuka ekuseni ziye kugebenga abahlelelekileyo, kuze kuthi kwakuhlwa zijike zibe ngamasela." 
Job24:15 Ke bona abakrexezi balinda ungcwalazi, ufike sebefihl' ubuso, besithi: ‘Andiyi kubonwa.’" 
Job24:16 Ebusuku amasela aqhekeza izindlu, aze kwakuba semini azimele angafunani nokukhanya." 
Job24:17 Isithoko-thoko sobumnyama sifana nemini kubo; ubusuku oboyikekayo bunjengomhlobo kubo. 
Job24:18 “Isikhohlakali sikhukuliswa sisikhukula; amasimi asisabelo saso ashwatyulelwe, akusekho bani usebenzayo ezidiliyeni zaso." 
Job24:19 Ikhephu liyanyibilika lakudibana nobushushu nembalela; ngokunjalo naboni bayavuthuluka kwelabafileyo. 
Job24:20 Nditsho nonina uyamlibala; kaloku umemethwe ziimpethu, akabi sakhunjulwa. Ewe, isikhohlakali sinkumka oku komthi owomileyo." 
Job24:21 Kaloku sona siphanga abafazi abaziindlolo, singabenzeli inceba abahlolokazi." 
Job24:22 Ngamandla akhe uThixo uyazishenxisa izihandiba; ewe, uThixo uthi akusebenzisa amandla akhe zitsho ziphelelwe lithemba lokudla ubomi." 
Job24:23 UThixo noba angaziyeka zihlale zithe zava, kodwa usoloko ezijongile ukusuka nokuhlala kwazo." 
Job24:24 Abantu abakhohlakeleyo bahluma babe nenkqubela okwexeshana, kodwa yonke loo nto iphela ngokukhawuleza; bayadaka bafe njengamntu wonke, bayabuna oku kwesikhwebu sengqolowa esivuniweyo." 
Job24:25 “Ngubani ongayiphikisayo le nyaniso? Makavele ongandiphikisayo, athi nditheth' amampunge!”" 
Job25:1 Kwesi sithuba ke kuphendule uBhildadi umfo waseShuwa, wathi:" 
Job25:2 “Kaloku uThixo nguSomagunya, nguDuma-barhwaqele; yaye ke ulugcinile ucwangco kweliphezulu." 
Job25:3 Ngaba ukhona na ongazibalayo izinxiba-mxhaka zakhe? Khona ngaba kuphi apho lungabonakaliyo ukhanyiso lwakhe? 
Job25:4 Ngaba kungenzeka ukuba umntu afumaniseke emsulwa enkundleni kaThixo? Uthi ingenzeka into yokuba umntu ozelwe ngumfazi angabi nabala? 
Job25:5 Kaloku nenyanga ngokwayo ayiqaqambanga kangako phambi kwakhe; kanti neenkwenkwezi ezi azingcwenganga kangako kuye. 
Job25:6 Kuxa engubani ke yena umntu, eyimpethu nje? Uthi unaxabiso lini unyana womntu kuThixo, engumbungu nje?”" 
Job26:1 Ke yena uYobi uphendule wenjenje: 
Job26:2 “Kuthi mandivume ndithi ùluncedo kwababhetye-bhetye! Hayi kambe ukubahlangula kwakho abo baswele amandla! 
Job26:3 Ewe, uzicebise kakuhle izityhakala; hayi, ubulumko obubonakalisileyo!" 
Job26:4 Phofu uthi ngubani ongade aweve la mazwi akho? Khona futhe lini eli uthetha uphantsi kwalo?” 
Job26:5 “Abafileyo bayabhinyalaza kukunkwantya, kanti ke nelo lamanzi liyazibhija-bhija kunye nabemi balo." 
Job26:6 Ewe, elabafileyo lityhilekile phambi koThixo; ayinasigqubuthelo inzonzobila." 
Job26:7 Kaloku uThixo wasitwabulula isibhakabhaka ngasentla phaya, waza umhlaba wawujingisa enyanyeni." 
Job26:8 Nguye ofaka amanzi kwiingqimba zamafu, aze loo mafu awabophe angagqajuzwa bobo bunzima bamanzi." 
Job26:9 Uyayifihla inyanga ingabonakali; ewe, utwabulula ilifu lithi zinzi, itsho ifihlakale." 
Job26:10 Wakwahlula ukukhanya ebumnyameni ngeso sazinge sizotywe elundini lolwandle. 
Job26:11 Uthi angakhalima zitsho zihexe iintsika ezixhase isibhakabhaka; ewe, zitsho zizama-zame zingcangcazele kukoyika." 
Job26:12 Kaloku yena ngaloo mandla akhe waluthomalalisa ulwandle, waza kwangobo buchule bakhe wamvikiva uRahabhi isilo saselwandle." 
Job26:13 Ngomoya wakhe ufutha sitsho sicwenge isibhakabhaka; kanti ke ikwasisandla sakhe esangxwelerha inyoka enyubelezayo. 
Job26:14 Kambe ke la ngamagqabantshintshi nje amandla akhe. Thina esikuvileyo lumingi-mingi nje! Ibingubani ke ongade akuqonde ukuzongoma kwamandla kaThixo?” 
Job27:1 Ke kaloku uYobi uphinde wathathisa wenjenje: 
Job27:2 “Ekho nje uThixo, lo undivimb' ubulungisa, nditsho uSomandla lo uwenze umphefumlo wam wangcamla ubukrakra:" 
Job27:3 Ukuba ndisaxomoloza ndisadl' amazimba, xa ngaba ndisaphila ndinomphefumlo kaThixo emathatheni am," 
Job27:4 imilebe yam ayisokuze ithethe inkohlakalo, ngokunjalo nolwimi lwam alusoze luthethe inkohliso." 
Job27:5 Andisoze ndithi ninyanisile, futhi ndiya kude ndife ndibambelele kwinyaniso yokuba ndimsulwa." 
Job27:6 Ndiya kuthi nca kwinto yokuba ndililungisa; andisoze ndibe nasazela yonke imihla yam. 
Job27:7 “Akwaba utshaba lwam lwafumana isohlwayo sabakhohlakeleyo, ngokunjalo nombandezeli wam azuze isiphelo sabangenabulungisa." 
Job27:8 Liyintoni na ithemba labangenaThixo mhla wabunqumla ubomi babo uThixo? 
Job27:9 Xa sele kunyembelekile kubo, uthi uThixo angaze asive isikhalo sabo?" 
Job27:10 Khona bangaziyolisa na ngoSomandla? Bangamnqula na uThixo ngamaxesha onke? 
Job27:11 “Makhe ndinifundise ngobukhulu bamandla kaThixo; mandingazifihli izicwangciso zikaSomandla. 
Job27:12 Hayi gxebe, senizibonele nje ngokwenu; ngani ke ukuba nibe sathetha imfungu-mfungu enje?" 
Job27:13 “Naso ke isabelo sezikhohlakali kuThixo; elo ke lilifa lezibhoja kuSomandla. 
Job27:14 Noba zingade zibe nenyambalala yoonyana bosuka babe lilifa lekrele emfazweni; ewe, inzala yazo yasoloko ithiwe nca liphango!" 
Job27:15 Nemingqandanda esindileyo itshayelwa ngubhubhani, baze nabahlolokazi bazo bangalili nokulila." 
Job27:16 Noba zingade zibe nemfumba yesiliva ngathi luthuli, zibe nempahla yokwambatha efumbe okodongwe," 
Job27:17 kosuka kuthi gqi lungisa lithile inxitywe lilo loo mpahla; kosuka kuvele abantu abamsulwa babelane ngaloo siliva. 
Job27:18 Isikhohlakali sakha indlu efana nesingxobo seqonya; sakha into engathi liphempe labalindi. 
Job27:19 Isikhohlakali silala sinobutyebi, kodwa siyagqibelisa – sivuka sebuphel' emehlweni." 
Job27:20 Sisuka sirhwaqele ngathi siyarhaxwa; kaloku sitshayelwa sisaqhwithi ngobhadakazi. 
Job27:21 Kufika umoya wasempuma usitshayele, usuke usinqukrule singabi sazana nekhaya laso." 
Job27:22 Usuka usilenge ungenalusini tu; nakanjani kufuneka siwasabe amandla awo. 
Job27:23 Ewe, umoya usiqhwabela izandla, usihewule isikhohlakali simke endaweni yaso.”" 
Job28:1 “Ewe, ikho imigodi yesiliva; ngokunjalo zikho neendawo zokuhluza igolide." 
Job28:2 Abantu bemba isinyithi emhlabeni, baze banyibilikise ubhedu olusematyeni." 
Job28:3 Nenzonzobila yobumnyama abantu bayayihlola-hlola; baphicotha namathumbu omhlaba, baze bembe bacubungule kwimiwewe enzongo-nzongo yenzonzobila." 
Job28:4 Kude lé kwelimiweyo, apho kungazange kwathi cakatha mntu, abantu bayemba bavule imigodi, bajinga-jinge kwalunkcwe, bebotshelelwe ngeentambo." 
Job28:5 Phezulu apha lo mhlaba uvelisa ukudla; kanti ngaphantsi phaya ubhukuqwa ngathi ngumlilo. 
Job28:6 Kumatye omhlaba kuphuma iisafire, kanti ke lona uthuli lwawo luvelisa igolide." 
Job28:7 Amaxhalanga ngokwawo akazazi iindlela zasemigodini phaya, ngokunjalo zange zalanywa naliliso likakhetshe." 
Job28:8 Amarhamncwa anyalasayo akazange athi cakatha unyawo apho, nkqu nengonyama ayizange yadlula khona." 
Job28:9 Kaloku abantu baqhekeza bagqale nditsho nenyengane le; ewe, neentaba ngokwazo bayazibhukuqa, bazisiphule neengcambu." 
Job28:10 Basuka bagqobhoze iitonela emaweni, lize iliso labo liwabhaqe amatye axabisekileyo." 
Job28:11 Imithombo yakhona bayayivingca ingampompozi, baze bazidandalazise izinto ezifihlakeleyo." 
Job28:12 “Kambe ke, bungaze bufumaneke phi ubulumko? Khona lona ulwazi lungazuzwa phi?" 
Job28:13 Ewe, ubulumko abunakufumaneka ebantwini; kaloku akukho namnye ulaziyo nexabiso labo." 
Job28:14 Andithi na kaloku kwankqu neenzonzobila ezinzongo-nzongo, nditsho neelwandle, ziyabulandula?" 
Job28:15 Kaloku bona abungekhe bufumaneke nangegolide ecikizekileyo, kanti nentabalala yesiliva ayinako ukubuhlawula." 
Job28:16 Neyona golide yaseOfire iyalaba-laba kwixabiso labo; nditsho namatye exabiso, nokuba yionike okanye yisafire." 
Job28:17 Ewe, abunakulinganiswa negolide, ukanti abunakuthelekiswa nayo nemveliso yegolide, nditsho nayo neglasi yodidi." 
Job28:18 Asisathethi ke ngeekorale neekristale, kuba kaloku bona ubulumko bubalasele ngexabiso, ndithi bugqwesa kwaiiperile." 
Job28:19 Ewe, netopazi yaseKushe ayinakulinganiswa nabo, ngokunjalo abunakuthengwa nangeyona ihluziweyo igolide." 
Job28:20 Ke, ngaba uphi owona mthombo wobulumko? Umntu angalufumana phi ulwazi?" 
Job28:21 Abubonakali kuzo zonke izinto eziphilileyo, nditsho nakweyona intingayo intaka." 
Job28:22 Ewe, nokufa nentshabalalo, zombini ziyavuma, zithi: ‘Luvakele nje umingi-mingi ngabo ezindlebeni zethu!’" 
Job28:23 NguThixo kuphela owaziyo ngobulumko; nguye owaziyo umthombo wabo. 
Job28:24 Kaloku yena ubona nditsho namaphethelo ehlabathi, kuba kuye akukho nanye into efihlakeleyo phantsi kwamazulu." 
Job28:25 Ngokuya uThixo wayemisela umoya amandla awo, namanzi ewacandela umda wawo," 
Job28:26 nemvula eyenzela ummiselo wayo, nombane ewalathisa indlela," 
Job28:27 kanye ngelo thuba ke uThixo wabubona wabuphicotha ubulumko, waza ke wabumisela wabugoca-goca." 
Job28:28 Ke uluntu waluyalela wathi: ‘Niyabona, ofuna ubulumko makathobele uThixo; ofuna ukuzuza ulwazi makabucezele ububi.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Ke kaloku uYobi wathathisa wathetha wenjenje: 
Job29:2 “Awu, akwaba ibinokubuyiselwa kum imihla yamandulo, ngokuya uThixo wayesandilondolozile," 
Job29:3 xenikweni isibane sakhe besikhanya phezu kwentloko yam, xa ndanditabhata nasebumnyameni endikhanyisela." 
Job29:4 Ewe, ngaloo mihla yamfamlibe ndandimi kakuhle; bendilala ngangubo-nye noThixo emzini wam." 
Job29:5 USomandla wayengakum ngoko, ndiphahlwe ngabantwana bam." 
Job29:6 Ngaloo mihla amasi ayedlal' abantwana kwam; ke yona iminquma ichuma nasematyeni, ithulula ioyile." 
Job29:7 “Ndandisithi ndakufika enkundleni ngasesangweni, ndakuthi zinzi phakathi kwamadoda amakhulu," 
Job29:8 abafana bathi gu bucala, ke zona iingwevu zime ngeenyawo." 
Job29:9 Ewe, ayesuka aphel' emqaleni kumatshawe, ufike selethe khebevu!" 
Job29:10 Izikhulu zazisithi cwaka ngathi ulwimi lukhulekiwe enkalakahleni. 
Job29:11 Abandiva ndithetha babendincoma, kanti ababona izinto endizenzayo babendingqinela." 
Job29:12 Kaloku ndandisabela ndiwahlangule amahlwempu esakukhala; ukanti ndazibonelela neenkedama ezazingenamncedi. 
Job29:13 Ababesindakala ndaza ndabanceda babendincoma, ukanti nabahlolokazi ndandibanceda batsho baba neengoma ezintliziyweni zabo." 
Job29:14 Ndandivatha ubulungisa njengesinxibo sam; ukwenza okulungileyo kwakuyingubo yam neqhiya yam. 
Job29:15 Ndandingamehlo kwiimfama, ndiziinyawo koqhwalelayo." 
Job29:16 Ndandingutata kumahlwempu, neengxaki zabasemzini bendizithabathela kum." 
Job29:17 Yayindim umaphul' iimpondo kwizibhoja, amaxhoba azo ndiwathi hlasi emilonyeni yazo." 
Job29:18 “Ndandisithi: ‘Ndiya kukhula ndide ndikhokhobe endlwini yam, nemihla yam ibe mininzi njengentlabathi.’" 
Job29:19 Ndandifana nomthi ongcambu zinabele emanzini, omasebe asoloko elalelwa ngumbethe." 
Job29:20 Udumo lwam lwaluhlala luhlaziyeka, amandla am engapheli nokuphela." 
Job29:21 “Ndandisithi ndakuthetha kutsho kuthi cwaka, abantu bewaphulaphula amacebiso am." 
Job29:22 Ndandilebela xa ndithethayo, kungekho mntu unokongeza; kaloku amazwi am ayezika njengemvula." 
Job29:23 Ndandilangazelelwa oku kwemvula, amazwi am bewaginya oku komhlaba uginy' imvula entlakohlaza." 
Job29:24 Babekhuthazeka ndakuncuma; ukukhululeka kobuso bam bekubomeleza. 
Job29:25 Ndandingqendeva njengomnumzana, ndithethe kume ngam; ndandibakhokela njengenjengele kwimikhosi yayo; ndandibaxhasa njengothuthuzela abadakumbileyo.”" 
Job30:1 “Xa kunamhlanje-nje sendisisigculelo nakubafana abayise bendingabazele nto, ebendingeze ndabashiya nezinja zam ezalusa iigusha." 
Job30:2 Bebeligquba nje ekungekho yalo, amabhetye-bhetye angenakwenza nto tu!" 
Job30:3 Bangamahlwempu alambayo, ahamba ngobusuku, ufike enqunquda iingcambu emqwebedwini phaya." 
Job30:4 Balamba kangangokuba ungafika besimba iinqoba emqwebedwini, bade batye neengcambu zemithi." 
Job30:5 Abantu babagxothile phakathi kwabo; basuke babahewula bangathi bachil' isela! 
Job30:6 Kuye kwanyanzeleka ukuba baye kuhlala emiqolombeni, emingxunyeni, nasezimfanteni emaweni." 
Job30:7 Bakhonya phakathi kwamatyholo, ufike sebethe buthalala phantsi kwemithi." 
Job30:8 Awu, ziinjubaqa; sisizukulwana soongantweni eside sagxothwa nakwelakowazo!" 
Job30:9 “Ngoku ke sebendicabela nasezingomeni zabo; ewe, sendisisimbo nesigculelo sabo." 
Job30:10 Ewe, ngoku bandidelile, bayandenyanya; bathi bangandibona banditshicele ebusweni!" 
Job30:11 Ngenxa yokuba uThixo undiyekele ndatsho ndangugqush' eluthulini, nabo ke ngoku baziqhawule iintambo zokulawulwa ndim." 
Job30:12 Ngasekunene bafunzela ukundihlasela belihlokondiba; ewe, bayandijoka, futhi sebezimisele ukundihlabanisela." 
Job30:13 Bayandiqhiwulela endleleni, befuna ukundigqiba, besithi: ‘Akanabani ongamncedayo.’" 
Job30:14 Bandihlasela ngathi batyhoboza kwindawo ebanzi; baphoseka kum becanda amabhodlo. 
Job30:15 Ngoku ke sendirhawulwe kukunkwantya; isidima sam sivuthuluke ngathi siyavuthelwa, ukukhuseleka kwam kubhange oku komfankungu." 
Job30:16 “Ngoku ndisebugxwayibeni, kuba imihla yenkathazo indibambile." 
Job30:17 Ebusuku ndiqaqanjelwa nangamathambo la; iintlungu ezindidlayo azipheli. 
Job30:18 Ndigxavulwa ngeempahla zokunxiba, ndidlakazeliswe; ndiyakrwitshwa sisambatho, ndibanjwe ngobhongwana." 
Job30:19 UThixo undiphose eludakeni; andisento, sendifana nothuli nothuthu." 
Job30:20 Ndiba ngakhala ndikubongoza, akundiphenduli; ndiba ngazibika kuwe, akundihoyi." 
Job30:21 Wena ngoku ujike wandikhohlakalela, undihlasela ngengalo yakho enamandla." 
Job30:22 Uyandiphakamisa undiyekele ngomoya undibhudle; ndiyaqotha-qotheka ndiqwengwa sisaqhwithi. 
Job30:23 Ndiyaqonda ke ukuba undinikezela ekufeni, apho baya kuphelela khona bonke abaphilayo." 
Job30:24 “Kambe akukho hlwempu elizibikayo endingalincedanga, nditsho elaliphakamisela izandla kum licela uncedo." 
Job30:25 Andithi na kaloku ndandilila kunye nabasezingxakini, umphefumlo wam udandatheka ngenxa yamahlwempu?" 
Job30:26 Mna ndithe ndijonge okuhle kwathi gqi okubi; bendilindele ukukhanya, suka kwathi nyalulu ubumnyama." 
Job30:27 Ndithiwe fithi lunxunguphalo, alundiphe thuba; imihla ngemihla ndihlangatyezwa yinkathazo." 
Job30:28 Ukukhanya akukho, ndihamba ndigutyungelwe bubumnyama; into endiyenzayo embizweni kukuzibika." 
Job30:29 Ngoku sendingumlingane woodyakalashe; ewe, ndiliqabane leenciniba." 
Job30:30 Ulusu lwam selujike lwamnyama, futhi luyaxobuka, ibe ke nomzimba wam lo uyagcadeka." 
Job30:31 Ihapu yam ngoku seyijike yaba yeyesililo, nefluthi yam ngoku seyisenza isijwili.”" 
Job31:1 “Ke mna ke sendazimisela ngomxhelo wam wonke ukuba kungáze kubekho ntombi ndiyincwasayo. 
Job31:2 Ke, siyintoni isabelo somntu kuThixo? Liyintoni ilifa kuSomandla kweliphezulu?" 
Job31:3 Abangalunganga ubathwaxa ngezibetho, aze abo bangamatshijolo abayekele ngentlekele." 
Job31:4 Andithi na kaloku yena uyazazi iindlela zam, ewabala onke amanyathelo am?" 
Job31:5 “Ndiqinisekile andizange ndenze buqhophololo, ndingazanga ndakhohlisa mntu." 
Job31:6 Makhe ndibekwe esikalini kungekho xanasi ukuze uThixo aqonde ukuba ndimsulwa. 
Job31:7 Ukuba ngaba nditenxile endleleni, ndaza ke ndabhaduliswa yiminqweno, okanye ukuba izandla zam zidyojwe bububi," 
Job31:8 izilimo zam mazixhatshazwe mntu wumbi, yonke into endiyilimileyo mayincothulwe neengcambu." 
Job31:9 “Ukuba ngaba ndikhe ndancwasa omnye umfazi, okanye ndaya kumxhwarhela ngasemasangweni ommelwane," 
Job31:10 umfazi wam ngamana wagubela enye indoda; ewe, ngamana wambathwa bantu bambi." 
Job31:11 Kuba eso ingaba sisenzo esigwenxa, ingaba lityala elifanelwe kukugwetywa." 
Job31:12 Loo nto ingaba njengomlilo otshabalalisayo, otshisa yonke imveliso yam." 
Job31:13 “Ukuba ndakha ndasigatya isikhalazo sesicaka sam, okanye andasihoya isicakazana xa sinesikrokro ngakum," 
Job31:14 bendingathini ke ukujongana noThixo? Ndingathini ukuphendula xa efuna ingxelo? 
Job31:15 Andithi na kaloku kwalo Thixo udale mna zikwadalwe nguye nezicaka zam! 
Job31:16 “Mna andizange ndikumangale ukunceda amahlwempu, nabahlolokazi abazange bemke belambatha kum." 
Job31:17 Andizange ndaneliseke kukutya ndedwa, ibe yona inkedama ingenayo into etyiwayo." 
Job31:18 Kaloku ndayikhulisa njengoyise kwasebuntwaneni bayo, ndayondla ndayithantamisa kwasekuzalweni kwayo." 
Job31:19 Ndakubona usizana oluze, oluhlwempuzeke kangangokuba lungabi nayo impahla yokunxiba," 
Job31:20 bendilunika impahla eyenziwe ngoboya obuyimveliso yeegusha zam, lutsho lundincome luhambe lundidumisa." 
Job31:21 Ngaba ndakha ndayivuyelela inkedama kuba ndiqhayisa ngokuyitshonisa nasenkundleni? 
Job31:22 Xa kunjalo ke ngamana ndakroboka iingalo; akwaba zingancothuka emagxeni am. 
Job31:23 Hayi bo! Ngenxa yokoyika isohlwayo sikaThixo, nangenxa yokuhlonipha ubuhandiba bakhe, into enjalo andizange ndayenza." 
Job31:24 “Xa bendingaqamelela ngegolide, kwecikizekileyo ndisithi: ‘Ulithemba lam!’" 
Job31:25 ukuba bendivuye ndada ndaqholosa ngenxa yentabalala yobutyebi bam, nangenxa yokwanda kwemveliso yam," 
Job31:26 ukuba bendisuke ndanqula ilanga ngenxa yokuqaqamba kwalo, okanye inyanga ngenxa yomfaneleko wayo," 
Job31:27 ukuba ngaba bendiwexulekile ndasanga isandla sam, ndibusa zona ezi zinto," 
Job31:28 nale ke into ibingaba bubugwenxa obufanele isohlwayo esiqatha, kuba ukwenjenjalo ingaba kukuvukelana noThixo kweliphezulu." 
Job31:29 “Andizange ndavuyiswa kukubandezeleka kotshaba lwam, ndingazange ndakuthakazelela ukuminxeka kwalo." 
Job31:30 Andizange umlomo wam ndiwuvule wone ngokusuka ndilushwabulele utshaba lwam. 
Job31:31 Namadoda andisebenzelayo akazange athi: ‘Yhu, besilamba phaya kwaYobi!’" 
Job31:32 Abahambi abazange balale ecaleni lendlela ndikho; ndiyabamema beze, kuba iingcango zomzi wam zahlala zivulekile." 
Job31:33 Bambi bayazigusha bazifihle iziphoso zabo, kambe ke mna andibufihli ubugwenxa bam." 
Job31:34 Kuba mna andiboyiki abantu, andithi cwaka okanye ndizivalele endlwini, kuba ndisoyika ukunyenjwa zizalamane." 
Job31:35 “Akwaba bekukho ondiphulaphuleyo! Ndiwandlalile umcimbi wam; uSomandla makandiphendule. Akwaba izityholo endibekwa zona ngondimangalelayo bezibhaliwe. 
Job31:36 Bendiya kuzithwala emagxeni, ndizithi jize ngazo entloko njengentshinga." 
Job31:37 UThixo bendiya kumanekela konke okwam, ndingqiyaze phambi kwakhe njengetshawe." 
Job31:38 “Ukuba ngaba umhlaba wam ubundenzela isijwili, zindigxeka neefolo zawo," 
Job31:39 ukuba nditye imveliso yawo ndingabahlawulanga abaniniwo, ndaza bona abalimi bawo ndabavimba," 
Job31:40 ewe, endaweni yengqolowa mawuvelise imithi enameva, ukuze endaweni yerhasi uvelise ukhula.” Waba njalo ke uyaphetha uYobi: ncincilili-i-i!" 
Job32:1 Ke kaloku la madoda mathathu ade amncama uYobi, kuba yena wasuka wanje, esithi umsulwa yena." 
Job32:2 Ke yena uElihu unyana kaBharakeli wendlu kaRam eBhuzi uthe akuyiqonda le meko wasuka wakhathazeka, kuba kaloku uYobi wayezenza ilungisa esola uThixo." 
Job32:3 Futhi wakhathazwa nayinto yokuba ezi zihlobo zikaYobi zithathu zisuke zoyiswa kukuphendulana noYobi, zingabanga nako ukudandalazisa ubutyala bakhe, kodwa zimtyhola." 
Job32:4 UElihu lo wayesalindele ukuthetha noYobi, kuba abanye aba babebadala kunaye." 
Job32:5 Athe ke la madoda mathathu akuba selethethe koma umqala esoyiswa bubuciko bukaYobi, wakhathazeka," 
Job32:6 wangenelela ke yena uElihu unyana kaBharakeli waseBhuzi, wathi: “Kambe ke ndiyimveku ngeminyaka, ke nina senikhulile, niziingwevu, nto leyo ke esuke yanditsho ndamathidala, ndoyika ukuphuhlisa olwam uluvo." 
Job32:7 Ndithe: ‘Mandiyekel' iminyak' isiphakele.’ Bendisithi: ‘Izilimela zingasiph' ubulumko.’ 
Job32:8 Kambe ke ngoku ndiyaqonda ukuba ngumoya osemntwini, ewe, lifuthe likaSomandla elimthi jize ngokuqonda umntu." 
Job32:9 Hayi, abuyi ngaminyaka ubulumko, kungayi nangabudala ukuqonda imfanelo." 
Job32:10 “Ngoko ke bekan' iindlebe, khe ndiniphakele; makhe ndinivakalisel' olwam uluvo." 
Job32:11 Ewe, ndiniphulaphule xa beniphakula ubulumko benu; ndibuvisisile xa benidimbaza nigalela." 
Job32:12 Bendiziindlebe ndonke xa benithetha; akukho namnye umchaniley' uYobi, kungekho namnye ukwaziy' ukuchan' amagama." 
Job32:13 Ke nina sanukuthi: ‘Sibuzuzile ubulumko.’ Kaloku nguThixo yedwa ongaphendulanayo noYobi, hayi umntu." 
Job32:14 UYobi ubebhekisa kuni, ingekum. Kambe ke bendingamphenduli njengani mna." 
Job32:15 “Hayi, Yobi, bathethe kom' umqala; kungokunje basik' umlomo." 
Job32:16 Mandithini na ke mna? Uthi mandithi cwaka kuba nabo bethule? Ewe, nâbo bethe bhuxe, inkukw' isik' umlomo!" 
Job32:17 Hayi bo! Nam makhe ndenze owam umda, ndiluvakalise nolwam uluvo." 
Job32:18 Hayi, mna andisenakuzibamba ndithi cwaka, kuba kuninzi ukuthetha kum." 
Job32:19 Hayi, ngenene ndifana nemvaba yewayini ebila ingavulwanga – xa ndingaphokozi ndosuka ndigqabhuke." 
Job32:20 Ewe, manditheth' ukuze kuthi qabu; mandiwuvule umlomo wam ndiphendule." 
Job32:21 Mna andiz' ukuceng' usolala phi, ndiza kutheth' utyhatyhiwe ndingalalanisi." 
Job32:22 Kambe akunto yam ukulalanisa; xa bekunjalo uMdali wam ebengandicim' igama ngoko nangoko! 
Job33:1 “Ewe ke ngoku, Yobi, khawukuve ukuthetha kwam, uwaphulaphule onke amazwi am." 
Job33:2 Khawundibolek' iindlebe, nam khe ndikuphokozele. Phulaphula, ulwimi lwam selubeth' inkalakahla." 
Job33:3 Ewe kaloku, ndithetha ndinyanisekile; andikufihli oko ndikwaziyo." 
Job33:4 Kaloku nam ndidalwe nguMoya kaThixo; ukuphefumla kukaSomandla kundidlise ubomi. 
Job33:5 Ndiphendule ukuba unako; qula uzilungiselele amagama. 
Job33:6 Kaloku phambi koThixo siyafana sobabini; ewe, sobabini sabunjwa nguye ngodongwe." 
Job33:7 Ngoko ke uzungatatazeli, mwethu; noko nesandla sam asingeke sikucinezele." 
Job33:8 “Ngokuya ubuthetha ndikuvisisile; kaloku uthethe wenjenje: 
Job33:9 ‘Mna ndimsulwa, andinatyala; andinachaphaza, ndingenasiphoso." 
Job33:10 Koko uThixo uyandidlelelela nje; ewe, ufumana endityhola ngokuba ndilutshaba!" 
Job33:11 Iinyawo zam uzikhonkxa ngezikhuni; uyazigqala zonke iindlela zam.’ 
Job33:12 “Uyabona, uphazamile ngayo le ndawo; mandikuphendule, kuba uThixo yena mkhulu kunomntu." 
Job33:13 Ngani ke ukuba umangalelane naye, usithi yena akaphenduli mntu?”" 
Job33:14 “Kaloku uThixo uthetha nomntu ngandlela zonke, kambe ke yena umntu akahoyi." 
Job33:15 Xa umntu ekobunzulu ubuthongo, elele emandlalweni wakhe, uThixo uthetha ngamaphupha nemibono yasebusuku." 
Job33:16 Ewe, uzivula ngelo xesha iindlebe zabantu, ebalumkisa batsho barhwaqele." 
Job33:17 Ethethanje ke uthintela ukona; unqanda umntu angazigwagwisi. 
Job33:18 Ukhusela umphefumlo womntu engcwabeni, amhlangule kwintshabalalo yekrele." 
Job33:19 “Kananjalo umntu wolulekwa nangezigulo ezibuhlungu, aphanjwe ziingqaqambo emzimbeni." 
Job33:20 Ewe, ude angabi sakulangazelela nokutya, nokona kumnandi akucekise." 
Job33:21 Ubhitya abe ngumcinga, nezo mbanjana zakhe bezifihlakele zithi gqi ngaphandle." 
Job33:22 Kaloku selejinga phezu kwengcwaba; ubomi bakhe bukhwetywa kukufa. 
Job33:23 Mhlawumbi ke angeza kulamlelwa sisithunywa, esinye kuloo mawaka-waka, simkhumbuze ngeemfanelo zakhe." 
Job33:24 Singatsho ngovelwano sithi: ‘Mkhulule; makangehli aye kwelabafileyo. Nantsi kaloku intlawulo.’ 
Job33:25 Ulusu lwakhe luya kuhlaziyeka njengolosana, lubuyiselwe kwimihla yobutsha bakhe;" 
Job33:26 athi ke akuthandaza eviwe nguThixo, atsho amnqule ngothakazelelo, abuye abe ngumntu oziphethe ngaloo ndlela ayifunayo uThixo." 
Job33:27 Uya kuvuma esidlangalaleni athi: ‘Ndonile ndaphambuka endleleni, kodwa uThixo akandohlwayanga ngako oko bekundifanele." 
Job33:28 Ewe, undihlangule engcwabeni, nobomi bam abuyi kucinyelwa langa.’" 
Job33:29 “Zonke ezi zinto ke zenziwa nguThixo; ewe, uzenza umhla nezolo." 
Job33:30 Umntu uyamhlangula engcwabeni, ukuze naye axhamle ubomi." 
Job33:31 “Ngamana wandiphulaphula ke, Yobi; ewe, yithi cwaka khe ndithethe." 
Job33:32 Kambe ke uphendule xa unako; nam ndizimisele ukukulungiselela. 
Job33:33 Phofu ke, xa ungenamazwi, yithi tu, mna ndikufundise ubulumko.”" 
Job34:1 Ke uElihu utyatyadule wenjenje: 
Job34:2 “Hoyina, nani nina zilumko; khanibek' iindlebe, nani zingqondi!" 
Job34:3 Ukutya kungcanyulwa lulwimi, ke yona intetho iviwa ziindlebe." 
Job34:4 Makhe sikhethe oko kulungileyo; ewe, masiphicothe oko kufanelekileyo." 
Job34:5 “Kaloku uYobi uthi: ‘Ndimsulwa, kodwa uThixo undivimb' ubulungisa." 
Job34:6 Nangona ndinyanisekile, ndiphathwa okwexoki; nangona ndingenatyala, utolo lwakhe lundingxwelerhile.’" 
Job34:7 Wakha wakho phi ofana noYobi lo, osoloko ehlalele ukuphoxisa," 
Job34:8 umnt' osoloko ethene mbende nabenzi bobubi, ohlal' eqhogene nezikhohlakali?" 
Job34:9 Kaloku yena uthi: ‘Akumncedi lutho umntu ukuzimisela ukukholisa uThixo.’ 
Job34:10 “Kambe ke ndiphulaphuleni, zingqondi: kukude lé kuThixo ukwenza ububi, kuSomandla ukwenza ubugwenxa." 
Job34:11 Kuye umntu uvuna loo nto ayilimileyo; umntu umphatha ngokwehambo yakhe. 
Job34:12 Hayi bo, uThixo akayenzi inkohlakalo; uSomandla akabugqwethi ubulungisa." 
Job34:13 Kakade ngubani owammiselayo ukuba alawule ihlabathi? Ngubani owambeka ukuba alongamele lonke elimiweyo? 
Job34:14 Xa ebenokusuka azimisele awunqamle umoya wakhe nempefumlelo yakhe 
Job34:15 konke okuphilayo kungasuka kutshabalale, noluntu lonke lubuyele kwaseluthulini." 
Job34:16 “Ngaba uyaqiqa na – phulaphula ke! Bek' iindlebe ndithethe. 
Job34:17 Umchasi-mthetho angalawula njani? Ke wena ungamgweba njani uThixo eyingangalala yelungisa nje? 
Job34:18 Kaloku nakukumkani yena unokuthi: ‘Awunto yanto;’ aze kwizidwangube athi: ‘Nizizinto ezikhohlakeleyo.’ 
Job34:19 UThixo akakhethi buso nakumatshawe; nesityebi akasilungiseleli ngaphezu kwehlwempu; kaloku bonke bangumsebenzi wezandla zakhe. 
Job34:20 Bafa ngephanyazo ezinzulwini zobusuku; bayagungqiswa abantu, bafe; kwanezihandiba ziyawa zingawiswanga mntu." 
Job34:21 “Kaloku yena uzijongile iindlela zabantu; uwabona onke amanyathelo abo. 
Job34:22 Kaloku akukho thunzi nantsunguzi yabumnyama apho abenzi bobubi bangazifihla khona. 
Job34:23 KuThixo akuyomfuneko ukubancwina ngakumbi abantu xenikweni ebasa ematyaleni. 
Job34:24 KuThixo akukho mfuneko yaluphando xa abakhiqayo abasezintanjeni, aze amisele abanye ezikhundleni zabo." 
Job34:25 Kaloku uyazazi izenzo zabo; ubabhukuqa ngobusuku babhange. 
Job34:26 Xa sukuba ebohlwaya ngenxa yobugwenxa babo, loo nto uyenza esidlangalaleni." 
Job34:27 Andithi na kaloku basuke bakreqa, ababi sazikhathalela iindlela zakhe?" 
Job34:28 Ohlelelekileyo bamtsho wazibika kuThixo, waza ke yena wasiva isikhalo sabasweleyo." 
Job34:29 Xa athe cwaka ngubani ongamgwebayo? Naxa efihle ubuso bakhe ngubani ongambonayo? Nguye ngokwakhe olawula uluntu nezizwe," 
Job34:30 ukuze athintele isikhohlakali ekulawuleni, singababekeli umgibe abantu." 
Job34:31 “Ukuba ngaba umntu ebenokuthi kuThixo: ‘Ndikuvukele, kodwa andiyi kuphinda ndone." 
Job34:32 Ndifundise oko ndingenako ukukubona. Ukuba ndenze ubugwenxa andisayi kuphinda ndenjenjalo.’ 
Job34:33 Ngaba uThixo uthi useza kumohlwaya ngenxa yokumvukela kwakhe? Zikhethele ngokwakho, ingabi ndim. Into oyaziyo yithethe." 
Job34:34 “Kambe ke iingqondi zosuka zithi, ewe, izilumko zona zingathi:" 
Job34:35 ‘UYobi uthethiswa kukungazi; ewe, akathethi, koko uyabhibhidla.’" 
Job34:36 Akwaba uYobi ebenokucikidwa ngokupheleleyo, kuba impendulo yakhe ifana neyendoda ekhohlakeleyo." 
Job34:37 Ewe, esi sono sakhe uyasandisa, kuba kaloku usuka adlongozele, aqhwabe ngolunya izandla zakhe phakathi kwethu, atheth' umlembelele ngoThixo.”" 
Job35:1 UElihu uqhube wathi: 
Job35:2 “Ucinga ukuba bubulungisa na obu? Kaloku uthi: ‘Ndiya kugwetyelwa nguThixo.’ 
Job35:3 Kanti ubhekisa kuThixo usithi: ‘Khon' ukuba ndonile ke? Kundinceda ngani ukungoni?’ 
Job35:4 “Ke ngoku mna ndiza kukuphendula, wena ngokunjalo nabahlobo bakho." 
Job35:5 Khawuqethuke ujonge amazulu, uwabone la mafu aphezu kwakho." 
Job35:6 Noba uyona awumchukumisi nganto uThixo; ewe, awumenzi nto noba ungade uphinda-phinde!" 
Job35:7 Ukulungisa kwakho kumnceda ngantoni ke? Ewe, uThixo akazuzi nto esandleni sakho." 
Job35:8 Ukona kwakho kuphazamisa kwa-abantu, nokulungisa kwakho kunceda kwabona." 
Job35:9 “Abantu bayakhala ngenxa yobuninzi bengcinezelo; balangazelela ukukhululeka kwisandla sabanamandla. 
Job35:10 Kodwa yinqaba ukubhenela kuThixo uMdali wabo ozisa ithemba xa sukuba lixubayele. 
Job35:11 Nguye osinika ulwazi kunezilwanyana; yena usenza silumke kuneentaka. 
Job35:12 Abantu noba sebekhala, uThixo akaphenduli, kuba abakhohlakeleyo bathiwe lwale likratshi." 
Job35:13 Inene, uThixo akangeke awaphulaphule amampunge; uSomandla akawasi so tu." 
Job35:14 Kunjalo maxa usithi akumboni uThixo, usithi umcimbi wakho uphambi kwakhe, usithi ulinde yena," 
Job35:15 naxa uthi uThixo akacaphuki ohlwaye, usithi akasihoyi isono." 
Job35:16 Ke uYobi uthetha amampunge, wenza umlembelele engenalwazi.”" 
Job36:1 UElihu uqhube wathi: 
Job36:2 “Kambe ke khawundinyamezele kancinci, kuba kusekho ekufuneka ndikuthethe ndimele uThixo." 
Job36:3 Olwam ulwazi luvela kude; lucacisa ukuba uThixo, uMdali wam, lilungisa." 
Job36:4 Kaloku akukho buxoki kula mazwi am – ophakathi kwenu unolwazi olugqibeleleyo. 
Job36:5 UThixo womelele, kodwa akadeleli mntu; unamandla, nolwazi lwakhe alugungqi." 
Job36:6 Izikhohlakali akaziyeki zidle ubomi, kodwa uyabazelelela abo bahlelelekileyo." 
Job36:7 Akawasusi amehlo akhe kumalungisa. Nguye obeka ookumkani ezihlalweni, abanye abayeke apho ixesha elide. Kodwa ukuba bayaziphakamisa" 
Job36:8 bakhonkxwa ngamatyathanga, bebanjiwe ngezintya zeentlupheko." 
Job36:9 UThixo ubatyhilela izenzo zabo, esalatha izikreqo zabo xa babeziphakamisa." 
Job36:10 Kaloku yena ubenza balulamele ululeko; ubayalela ukuba bahlukane nobugwenxa. 
Job36:11 Ukuba ke bayamva bemthobela uThixo, boyigqiba imihla yabo bexhamla indyebo, neminyaka yabo ibe yeyokwaneliseka." 
Job36:12 Kambe ke xa bengeva baya kutshabalala ngekrele, bafe ngenxa yokuswela kwabo ulwazi." 
Job36:13 “Abantliziyo zingenaThixo bazongezelela ingqumbo yakhe; abazibiki kuye naxa bekhonkxiwe. 
Job36:14 Bona bafa besebatsha, bexhwalekile ngamahlazo abahlala kuwo." 
Job36:15 Kambe uThixo uyabafundisa abantu nangehambo-nzima; ubavula iindlebe ngokusebenzisa nembandezelo. 
Job36:16 “Nawe wakukhupha enkathazweni, wakutsho waxhamla intlala-kahle, usitya uhlutha, ungaswele nto." 
Job36:17 Kodwa ngoku isohlwayo esifanele abakhohlakeleyo siphezu kwakho; ukugwetywa nokohlwaywa kukufikele. 
Job36:18 Lumka ke umsindo wakho ungawenzi umgibe wokubambisa abanye, ungazimiseli ukusebenzisa ukunyoba okukhulu ukuguqula imeko." 
Job36:19 Ngaba kukubhomboloza kwakho na okunokukunceda? Hayi bo, yonke imigudu yakho ayingeke incede." 
Job36:20 Sukulangazelela ukuza kobusuku, xesha elo batshabalala ngalo abantu." 
Job36:21 Lumka ungayi ebubini; ungazilahleli kubo ngenxa yokubandezeleka. 
Job36:22 Kaloku uThixo yimbalasane ngamandla; ke kumba wokufundisa uyingcungela. 
Job36:23 UThixo akaxelelwa mntu amakakwenze; ngubani onokuthi kuye: ‘Wenze okugwenxa’? 
Job36:24 Khumbula uwuphakamise umsebenzi wakhe, lowo abantu bawubongayo ngeengoma." 
Job36:25 Bonke abantu bayayibona imisebenzi yakhe, noxa beyibona bekude nje." 
Job36:26 Hayi ukuba mkhulu kukaThixo! Uyiphakamele ingqiqo yethu; inani leminyaka yakhe aligocagoceki. 
Job36:27 “Nguye ofunxa amanzi emhlabeni, awajike awenze amathontsi emvula," 
Job36:28 mvula leyo ina iphuma emafini, ibe zizandyondyo kumntu wonke." 
Job36:29 Ngubani okuqondayo ukuhamba kwamafu, nokuzongoma kweendudumo ezulwini phaya?" 
Job36:30 Yena utshawuzisa umbane esibhakabhakeni; nguye ogubungela inzonzobila yolwandle. 
Job36:31 Le yindlela aluxhasa ngayo uluntu, aluthi jize ngendyikityha yendyebo." 
Job36:32 Ke yona imibane iselulawulweni lwesandla sakhe; uyayiyalela itsho ichan' ucwethe. 
Job36:33 Kambe ke sona isiphango sixelwa ziindudumo, nditsho neenkomo ziyakwazi ukuza kwaso." 
Job37:1 “Kuthi ke kwakuba njalo isuke igubhe intliziyo yam, ixhume endaweni yayo." 
Job37:2 Khanikuve ukuzongoma kwelizwi lakhe, niphulaphule ukungqokola okuphuma emlonyeni wakhe." 
Job37:3 Utshawuzisa imibane esibhakabhakeni, ayithumele eziphelweni zehlabathi." 
Job37:4 Ikhatshwa kukududuma kwelizwi lakhe, lizongoma ngezwi lobungangamsha bakhe. Xa avakalisa izwi lakhe kuba zizabhokhwe zombane ezingathintelekiyo." 
Job37:5 Ewe, uThixo wenza imimangaliso ngezwi lakhe, utsho ngezinto ezinkulu esingenako ukuziqonda." 
Job37:6 Uthi kwikhephu: ‘Yiwa emhlabeni;’ kwimikhwitsho yemvula athi: ‘Yenza izandyondyo zomvimbi.’ 
Job37:7 Ke bona abantu batsho bayeke ukusebenza; kaloku ngoku nguye osebenzayo. 
Job37:8 Iinyamakazi zitsho zingene emingxunyeni yazo, zizimele apho ezikhundleni zazo." 
Job37:9 Iinkqwithela ziphuma endaweni yazo, imimoya enamandla ize nengqele." 
Job37:10 UThixo uthi angaphefumla amanzi atsho abe ngumkhenkce, ububanzi bawo buqine bukhenkcezeke." 
Job37:11 Kanti wona amafu uwahlohl' ukufuma, aze awahlwayele imibane." 
Job37:12 Kaloku nguThixo owalawulayo, atsho enze eyakhe imiyalelo kulo lonke elimiweyo." 
Job37:13 Unethisa imvula emhlabeni; kanti isenokuba sisibetho ebantwini, kwanjengokuba isenokuba ngumqondiso wothando lwakhe." 
Job37:14 “Yobi, khawunqumame wondele, ujonge imimangaliso kaThixo." 
Job37:15 Uyakwazi ukuhamba komyalelo kaThixo, esithi umbane mawulenyeze emafini?" 
Job37:16 Amafu la uthi ajinga kanjani esibhaka-bhakeni, into emangalisayo engumsebenzi walowo unolwazi olugqibeleleyo?" 
Job37:17 Uxakwa nje kukuzikhusela ngezambatho kwifuthe lolophu," 
Job37:18 ungathini ukufuna ukubambisana naye xa atwabulula isibhakabhaka, esenza somelele okwesipili esityhidiweyo?" 
Job37:19 “Khawutsho, uthi masithini ke kuThixo? Kaloku kumnyama kuthi; asinamhlaba wakuziphendulela!" 
Job37:20 Uthi masicele ukuthetha naye! Ngubani ongazibizela intshabalalo? 
Job37:21 Bekungekho bani unako ukubona ukukhanya; ukuqaqamba kwako bekusithwe ngamafu, kodwa kwakudlula umoya, kuthi qwenge." 
Job37:22 Emantla phaya ukukhanya busabugoliderha; isihomo sikaThixo sisitsho sinkwantye ke thina. 
Job37:23 Amandla akhe amtsho angafikeleleki; usulungekile, ebalasele ngobulungisa; akukho bani amcinezelayo." 
Job37:24 Ngenxa yaloo nto ke, abantu bayamhlonela; kambe ke zona izindwebi akazikhathalele.”" 
Job38:1 Ke *uNdikhoyo waphendula esesaqhwithini, wathetha noYobi wathi:" 
Job38:2 “Wena kuxa ungubani, ukuba ude ufune ukulenza mfiliba icebo lam? Mazwi mani wona la, engenalwazi nje?" 
Job38:3 Khawuqule, ume njengendoda; mna ndiza kukubuza, wena ke uphendule." 
Job38:4 “Wawuphi xa ndiseka ihlabathi? Yitsho kaloku, uyingqondi andithi?" 
Job38:5 Ngubani owamisa ubungakanani balo? Awunakungayazi loo nto! Ngubani owalijikelezayo etsala intambo? 
Job38:6 Khona, zixhaswe yintoni iintsika zalo? Ingubani owalimisela ilitye lesiseko?" 
Job38:7 Ngaloo ntsasa iinkwenkwezi zamemelela, izidwangube zakwaThixo zona zanemincili." 
Job38:8 Mhla lwagqabhuka ulwandle emhlabeni, ngubani owalumisela imida?" 
Job38:9 Kaloku ndim owalwambathisa ngamafu, ndaza ndalusonga ngobumnyama." 
Job38:10 Ndim owalumisela imida, ndalubiyela ndaluvalela endaweni yalo." 
Job38:11 Ndaluyalela ndathi: ‘Hamba, ungagqithi apha; amaza akho adlokovayo makaphele apha.’" 
Job38:12 “Ukhonje wakha wayiyalela intsasa yabakho? Wakha wasikhombisa indawo yaso na isifingo? 
Job38:13 Nditsho umsobomvu okhanyisela iziphelo zehlabathi, khon' ukuze izikhohlakali zingabi nakuzimela ebumnyameni." 
Job38:14 Kaloku ukusa kuzitsho ziphuhle iinduli neentili, zibe ngathi yingubo ebikade isongene; ewe, zitsho zicace oku kophawu olushicilelwe kumdongwe." 
Job38:15 Abakhohlakeleyo bayoyiswa kukukhanya; kaloku ingalo yabo yokugonyamela yaphulwe. 
Job38:16 “Ngaba wakha wayibona imithombo yolwandle? Sowukhe wathi cakatha ezintunjini zenzonzobila? 
Job38:17 Uwatyhilelwe na amasango okufa? Wakha wakubona kwamnyama-ndawo? 
Job38:18 Khawutsho, lingakanani ihlabathi? Phendula kaloku ukuba uyazazi ezi zinto!" 
Job38:19 “Ungalixela apho likhoyo ikhaya lokukhanya? Khona, wona umthombo wobumnyama uphi?" 
Job38:20 Ezi zinto ungazibuyisela na endaweni yazo? Khona, uyayazi na indlela esinga esikhundleni sazo?" 
Job38:21 Awunakungazazi; kaloku wawuseluzelwe, neminyaka yobomi bakho mininzi, ngabula wena!" 
Job38:22 “Wakha wababona oovimba bam bekhephu? Oovimba besichotho bona uyabazi? 
Job38:23 Ezi zinto ndizigcinele mhla kwanyembeleka; ndizigcinele mhla kwathiwa ilizwe lifile. 
Job38:24 Uyayazi na indlela eya apho kuvela khona ukukhanya? Uthini umoya wasempuma ukusasazeka phezu kwehlabathi? 
Job38:25 Ngubani ovulela izandyondyo zemvula umjelo; ingubani yena khona ovulela iindudumo indlela? 
Job38:26 Ngubani onisa imvula endle phaya? Inethiswa ngubani imvula enkqantosini," 
Job38:27 ukuze ithobe unxano kumhlaba okhamisileyo, kutsho kuthi rhwelele utyani?" 
Job38:28 Kakade, imvula le yinto kabani; ingubani yena uyise wombethe?" 
Job38:29 Ke wona umkhenkce wakhawulwa ngubani; ingubani yena umzali weqabaka? 
Job38:30 Kaloku amanzi ayaqina abe ngathi lilitye; inzongo-nzongo yamanzi itsho ikhenkcezele. 
Job38:31 “Uthi ngaba unokuzidibanisa izilimela; khona unako ukuwakhulula amakroza? 
Job38:32 Ungazilawula iinkwenkwezi namathuba azo, nditsho oozibhere ngokunjalo namatakane azo?" 
Job38:33 Uyayazi imithetho elawula ilanga nenyanga neenkwenkwezi? Unganako ukumisela impembelelo yazo emhlabeni? 
Job38:34 “Unganako ukuliphakamisela emafini ilizwi lakho, khon' ukuze akugubungele ngezantyala-ntyala zemvula?" 
Job38:35 Ngaba unganako ukuyithuma imibane? Ngaba ingavuma ithi: ‘Ndiyaya’? 
Job38:36 Ngubani oyazisayo intsikizi ngemvula, ingubani oxelela umqhagi ngemini entsha?" 
Job38:37 Sisiphi isilumko esinokubala amafu, ingubani onokuqubuda iingqayi zamanzi zasemazulwini?" 
Job38:38 Nditsho imvula ejika uthuli lube ludaka, ke wona amagade atsho ancamathelane." 
Job38:39 “Unganako ukuzingelela imazi yengonyama? Ungawahluthisa khona amathole engonyama," 
Job38:40 xa ahleli esikhundleni sawo, okanye xa ancathame ngetyholo?" 
Job38:41 Uthi ngubani owondla amahlungulu, xa amantshontsho awo akhala kuThixo, ebhadula ngenxa yendlala?" 
Job39:1 “Ngaba uyalazi ixesha lokuzala kwamagogo asemaweni? Wakha walibona na inxala xa lifikelwa yinimba yokuzala?
