Job39:2 Lithatha iinyanga ezingakanani lithwele, lize lifike nini ke ixesha lokuzala kwalo?" 
Job39:3 Uyalazi ukuba lingqengqa nini na ukuze libeke itakane lalo, ibe ke ngokunjalo idlule intlungu yenimba?" 
Job39:4 Amatakane alo akhulela ezindle ade omelele, aze ke asuke emke angaze abe sabuya." 
Job39:5 “Iqwarha eli layithatha phi inkululeko? Ngubani owalikhulula intambo ukuba libhadule? 
Job39:6 Ndim owalinikela ukuba lihlale entlango, ikhaya lalo libe kuloo mathafa etyuwa." 
Job39:7 Isiphithi-phithi sasezixekweni yintlekisa kulo; ngokunjalo nemikhwazo yombhexeshi aliyiva. 
Job39:8 Libhadula ezintabeni lifuna amadlelo, lize limemethe naluphi na uhlaza elilufumanayo." 
Job39:9 “Uthi ungaze uyisebenzise inyathi? Unganako ukuyivalela ebuhlanti? 
Job39:10 Uthi ungayirhintyela ulime ngayo; mhlawumbi uyerhe entilini phaya? 
Job39:11 Uthi ingaze ikuncede ngamandla ayo; ungawunikela kuyo umsebenzi wakho? 
Job39:12 Ngaba unganako ukuvuna ngayo? Uthi ungabhula ngayo esandeni phaya? 
Job39:13 “Hayi ukufaneleka kwamaphiko enciniba! Kambe ke iyagqweswa yingwamza ngokuphapha. 
Job39:14 Amaqanda ayo iwabeka emhlabeni iwashiye ukuze ke afudunyezwe ngumhlaba lowo. 
Job39:15 Ayinaloyiko lokuba osuka anyathelwe, okanye kuthi gqi inyamakazi iwakroboze." 
Job39:16 Ayinankathalo ngamantshontsho ayo, ngathi asingawayo; ayivakalelwa kukubhanga kwemigudu yayo." 
Job39:17 UThixo uyivimbe ubulumko inciniba, akayinika nokuyinika ingqiqo." 
Job39:18 Kambe ke yakuwathi naa amaphiko ayo ibaleka iyalihleka ihashe nokhwele kulo. 
Job39:19 “Ngaba nguwe na owenze ihashe lomelela kangaka? Nguwe owalivathisa ngeso singci siyakayaka? 
Job39:20 Nguwe olenze lanako ukuthi qakatha njengeenkumbi? Nguwe olenze larhwaqelisa ngesandi somfutho walo? 
Job39:21 Ligxanya ngamandla ngaloo manqina alo xa lijikela entilini phaya, selifunzele phakathi kwayiwayo!" 
Job39:22 Kaloku lona alinadyudyu nantaka; aliwazele nto umkhonto, alibuyi ngamva." 
Job39:23 Kaloku lo uphezu kwalo uxhob' uf' amacala; oomikhonto noozincula ziyabengezela. 
Job39:24 Ngaloo manqina alo lisiphula umhlaba, selingasakwazi ukuzibamba, lilindele ukuvakala kwexilongo." 
Job39:25 Lakuva umtyangampo wexilongo lithi: ‘Ngxatsho ke!’ ze lithi lisekude lé, libe seliqonda ukuba izwe lifile! Kaloku liyabeva oomaqhuzu xa bayalelayo." 
Job39:26 “Ngaba bubulumko bakho na obunika ukhetshe ubuchule bokubhabha? Nguwe omenza athi naa amaphiko abheke kwelasezantsi? 
Job39:27 Ngaba nguwe oyalela ixhalanga ukuba lintinge, lakhe nendlu yalo emalenga-lengeni phaya?" 
Job39:28 Kaloku lona lihlala kwiinkelekethe zamawa; lizenzela inqaba kwiimfanta zamalenga-lenga. 
Job39:29 Lithi cwaa apho lilonga-longe ixhoba, lize lilipopole noba selisekudeni." 
Job39:30 Amathole alo amfimfitha igazi; nalapho zikhoyo izidumbu libutha khona ixhalanga.” 
Job40:1 *UNdikhoyo uqhube wathi kuYobi: 
Job40:2 “Ngaba ufuna ukubambana noSomandla, usalatha iimpazamo zakhe? Wena omangalela uThixo, phendula.”" 
Job40:3 Ke yena uYobi uphendule *uNdikhoyo wathi: 
Job40:4 “Xa kungokunje ndiyaqonda ukuba andinto yanto. Ndingaba saphendula ndithini? Kungokunje ndidl' imu. 
Job40:5 Ewe, ndithethe ndaphinda-phinda, kambe ke ngoku ndosuka ndiwuthunge.”" 
Job40:6 Ke *uNdikhoyo waphendula esesaqhwithini, wathetha noYobi wathi:" 
Job40:7 “Khawuqule, ume njengendoda; mna ndiza kukubuza, wena ke uphendule." 
Job40:8 “Ngaba ufuna ukusisingela phantsi isigwebo sam? Ugweba mna ukuze wena ugwetyelwe? 
Job40:9 Ngaba nawe womelele njengoThixo? Nelakho ilizwi lizongoma njengelakhe? 
Job40:10 Xa kunjalo ke khawuvele uveth' isidima uzimasekile; khawuthi jize isihomo nesithozela. 
Job40:11 Khawuphokoze loo msindo wakho, ubaphoxe abo bazigwagwisayo." 
Job40:12 Ewe, badilize abo baqholosayo; ke zona izikhohlakali zinyhashele apho zikhoyo." 
Job40:13 Xa zizonke zibandakanye uzingcwabe; zigqume zihlale kwelo labafileyo. 
Job40:14 Xa kunjalo ke ndiya kuvuma, ndisithi unako ukuzisindisa ngawakho amandla." 
Job40:15 “Imvubu le uyayiqonda? Njengawe nayo ndayidala; phofu yona injengenkomo, itya ingca." 
Job40:16 Kambe ke, yeka – asimandla esinqeni sayo! Yinto emzimba unemisipha engwanyalala!" 
Job40:17 Yinto emsila ungqangqasholo okomsedare; ke zona izihlunu zemilenze ziphindene. 
Job40:18 Amathambo ayo omelele njengobhedu; ewe, afana nemivalo yentsimbi." 
Job40:19 Kuzo zonk' izidalwa ithe kratya ngokukhwankqisa; nguMdali wayo yedwa onako ukuyoyisa. 
Job40:20 Ukutya kwayo kufumaneka ezintabeni phaya, apho zidloba-dloba khona izilwanyana." 
Job40:21 Ungafika ingqengqe phantsi kwamatyholo akhula ngasemanzini, okanye izimele ezingcongolweni, emgxobhozweni phaya." 
Job40:22 Ewe, iphumla emthunzini wamatyholo entlanjeni phaya, ufike ijikelezwe yimingcunube." 
Job40:23 Yona ayiwoyiki umlambo ophuphumayo; ithi zole nakwiJordan elatyuza amanzi de abethe emlonyeni wayo. 
Job40:24 Kodwa kodwa ngubani ongayihlaselayo? Ngaba uqale wayityhaphaza? Ngubani ongayithiyela ayithi qhoo ngaloo mpumlo? 
Job41:1 “Uthi ungaze uyilobe ingwenya, okanye ubambe ulwimi lwayo ngentambo?" 
Job41:2 Uthi ungaze uyifake intambo impumlo yayo, mhlawumbi uyithi qhoo imihlathi ngegwegwe?" 
Job41:3 Ucing' ukuba ingaze itarhuzise kuwe? Uthi ingakukubongoza ngamazwi athambileyo? 
Job41:4 Uthi ingenza isivumelwano kunye nawe, ithembise ukuba likhoboka lakho ngonaphakade?" 
Job41:5 Ngaba ungayenza intaka ongadlalisa ngayo, uyikhulekele amantombazana akho?" 
Job41:6 Abarhwebi uthi bangarhweba ngayo? Ucing' ukuba bangahlulelana ngayo? 
Job41:7 Isikhumba sayo ungasigqobhoza ngamagwegwe? Mkhonto waphi ongangxwelerha intloko yayo? 
Job41:8 Khawuyichukumise nje – soz' uphinde! Engak' imfazwe soz' uyilibale! 
Job41:9 Ngamampunge ukucinga ukuba ungayoyisa. Umntu uthi nje akuyibona asuke avikiveke aphelelwe. 
Job41:10 Kungekho bani nje unesibindi sokuyiphazamisa, ngubani ke ngoko onako ukumelana nam?" 
Job41:11 Ukhona na onako ukubanga into kum ukuze ndimbuyisele? Kaloku yonke into phantsi kwezulu yeyam. 
Job41:12 “Andinakuthi cwaka ngemilenze yayo; makhe ndikuphokozele ngokomelela kwayo nokufaneleka kokwakhiwa kwayo. 
Job41:13 Ngubani onokuyinyanzela ukuvula umlomo, ingubani onokuyifaka umkhala?" 
Job41:14 Ewe, ngubani ongavula loo mihlathi yayo ijikelezwe ziingxavula ezoyikekayo zamazinyo?" 
Job41:15 Umqolo wayo unoludwe lwamakhaka aphotheneyo ngathi atywiniwe. 
Job41:16 Ewe, asondelelene ayimbumba; phakathi kwawo akungeni nomoya." 
Job41:17 Hayi, anxibelelene angunonca, abambene nkwa, akanakwahlukaniswa." 
Job41:18 Yintw' ethi yakuthimla kumenyeze, emehlo ngathi lilanga liphuma." 
Job41:19 Yintw' emlomo ulatyuza amadangatye, kutsho kutak' iintlantsi." 
Job41:20 Yintw' emarhanana alephuz' umsi, oku kwembiza ebaselwe ngeengcongolo." 
Job41:21 Ngomphefumlo wayo ungáwuphemb' umlilo; kaloku kuthaphuz' amadangatye kuloo mlomo. 
Job41:22 Yintw' etsho ngengwanyalala yesixhanti; bakuyibona abantu suka barhwaqele. 
Job41:23 Izihlunu zayo zifumbene; ziyingwanyalala engenakuhluthuzwa. 
Job41:24 Yintw' entliziyo iqine oku kwenyengane! Yomelele oku kwelitye lokusila. 
Job41:25 Ithi ingaphakama kunkwantye neengangalala; yakushukuma zisuka zithi phithi. 
Job41:26 Yona yomelele, ayinakungxwelerhwa naziintshuntshe, oomikhonto, noozincula." 
Job41:27 Kuyo intsimbi ifana nomququ; ke lona ubhedu nqwa nevithi. 
Job41:28 Okukokwalo utolo ayilwazele nto; kuyo ilitye *lenkwitshi linkumnka ngathi sisabhunge. 
Job41:29 Ke lona ibhunguza lifana nodiza; iincula ziyinto yentsini kuyo. 
Job41:30 Isisu sayo nqwa namaceba embiza; umhlaba siwukrazula oku kwesileyi sokubhula. 
Job41:31 Amanzi enzonzobila iwatsho abile okwembiza, ulwandle iluzama-zamise okweqhaga leziqholo." 
Job41:32 Emva kwayo ngumzila omenyezelayo emanzini. Inzonzobila isuka ifane neenwele zengwevu. 
Job41:33 Ehlabathini akukho nto inokulinganiswa nayo, nditsho isilo esingenabo ubugwala." 
Job41:34 Kaloku noozindlula-mthi izikrobile; ewe, ingukumkani kwizilo zonke ezinyalasayo.”" 
Job42:1 Ke kaloku uYobi uphendule *uNdikhoyo wenjenje: 
Job42:2 “Ewe, ngoku ndiyaqonda ukuba wena unako ukufeza konke; konke okucebayo wena unako ukukwenza." 
Job42:3 Bendingubani ukufuna ukulenza mfiliba icebo lakho, ndingenalwazi nje? Ngenene ndigabadele, ndithethiswa kukungaqondi; ndithethe ngemimangaliso nezinto ezinkulu kunam." 
Job42:4 “Uthe kum: ‘Phulaphula, mna ndiza kukubuza, wena ke uphendule.’" 
Job42:5 Ngoko bendikwazi nje ngokuva ngeendlebe, kambe ke ngoku ndikubonile ngala wam amehlo." 
Job42:6 Ngenxa yale nto ke ngoku ndiyazisola; ewe, ndiyaguquka; ndiseluthulini naseluthuthwini.”" 
Job42:7 Emva kwale ntetho *kaNdikhoyo noYobi uNdikhoyo ubhekise kuElifazi waseTema, wathi: “Umsindo wam uyavutha kuwe nakubahlobo bakho ababini, kuba anithethanga nto iyiyo ngam njengesicaka sam uYobi." 
Job42:8 Ngoko ke thathani iinkunzi zeenkomo ezisixhenxe, neenkunzi zeegusha ezikwasixhenxe, niye nazo kwisicaka sam uYobi, nizenzele idini elitshiswayo. Ke yena uYobi isicaka sam uya kunithandazela; ibe ke mna ndiya kuwamkela loo mthandazo wakhe, ndinganiphathi ngokobudenge benu. Kaloku nina anithethanga nto iyiyo ngam njengoko enzileyo yena uYobi isicaka sam.”" 
Job42:9 Ngenene ke uElifazi waseTeman noBhildadi waseShuwa noZofare waseNama benza ngokomlomo *kaNdikhoyo, waza ke yena wawamkela umthandazo kaYobi." 
Job42:10 Akuba ke uYobi ebathandazele abahlobo bakhe kuNdikhoyo, uNdikhoyo waphinda wambuyisela uYobi kundalashe. Ewe, ubutyebi bakhe wada wabuphinda-phinda." 
Job42:11 Abantakwabo noodade bakhe, ngokunjalo nâbo babemazi ngaphambili, beza, batya kunye naye emzini wakhe. Bavelana naye, bamkhuza bemthuthuzela ngenxa yesithwakumbe awayebethwe ngaso nguNdikhoyo. Bonke ngabanye ngabanye bamnika imali nomsesane wegolide." 
Job42:12 Ke kaloku uNdikhoyo walithamsanqela ikamva likaYobi nangaphezu kokuba wayenzile kubomi bakhe bangaphambili. UYobi waba neshumi elinesine lamawaka eegusha, isithandathu samawaka eenkamela, amawaka amabini eenkabi zeenkomo newaka leedonki." 
Job42:13 Waphiwa isixhenxe soonyana neentombi zantathu. 
Job42:14 Eyokuqala yayinguJimayima, kweza uKeziya, eyesithathu ke yanguKeren-hapuka." 
Job42:15 Kulo lonke ihlabathi akukho ntombi yayifika kwezo ntombi zikaYobi ngobunzwakazi. Nazo ke uyise wazinika ilifa kwanjengabantakwazo. 
Job42:16 Emva koku ke uYobi wahlala iminyaka elikhulu elinamashumi amane. Ewe, wada wabona abazukulwana nabantwana babo kwada kwaya kuthi xhaxhe ngesesine isizukulwana." 
Job42:17 Ke kaloku uYobi wafa seleyingwevu, iminyaka selihambile." 
Psalms1:1 Hayi inyhweba yomntu ongahambiyo ngecebo labantw' abagwenxa, ongahambiyo ekhondweni lamatshijolo, umnt' ongadlelaniyo nabaphoxisayo." 
Psalms1:2 Lowo wonwatyiswa yimiyalelo *kaNdikhoyo, ayetyise emini nasebusuku." 
Psalms1:3 Unjengomth' otyalwe ngasemijelweni yamanzi, umth' ovelisa iziqhamo ngexesha leziqhamo, umth' omagqabi angasoz' abune. Ewe, konk' akwenzayo umnt' onjalo kuyaphumelela." 
Psalms1:4 Àbanjalo kambe bona abantw' abagwenxa; bona banjengomquq' ophetshethwa ngumoya. 
Psalms1:5 Ngenxa yoko aboni abanako ukujongana nenkundla, koko bona baya kugxothwa embizweni yamalungisa." 
Psalms1:6 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uyalusile indlela yamalungisa; ke indlela yabakhohlakeleyo iya kudaka. 
Psalms2:1 Ngani na izizwe zisenza imbudumbudu nje? Ngani na abantu besenza amayelenqe azé nje? 
Psalms2:2 Ookumkani bemi bume, neziphathamandla zenza amabhunga okuvukela *uNdikhoyo nomthanjiswa wakhe, besithi:" 
Psalms2:3 “Masiziqhawule ezo mbophelelo zabo, sikhululeke kuloo makhamandela abo.”" 
Psalms2:4 Lowo ungqendeve esihlalweni sakhe ezulwini uyabahleka; uNdikhoyo usuka abagxwale. 
Psalms2:5 Uya kusuka akhalimele ngomsindo, abankwantyise ngengqumbo yakhe, athi:" 
Psalms2:6 “Ndim lo umisele lo kumkani wam phezu kweZiyon, intaba yam ncakasana.”" 
Psalms2:7 Ewe, ndivakalisa isibhengezo sikaNdikhoyo esithi: “Ungunyana wam wena; ndikuzele namhlanje." 
Psalms2:8 Cela kum, ndikunike iintlanga zibe lilifa lakho, namaphethelo ehlabathi abe ngawakho." 
Psalms2:9 Wòzilawula ngegqudu lentsimbi, ùzintlekeze zibe ziingceba oku kwezitya zomdongwe.”" 
Psalms2:10 Ngoko ke, nina bokumkani, lumkani, nina ziphathamandla zelizwe, yalekani." 
Psalms2:11 Mkhonzeni ngembeko uNdikhoyo, nivuye ninokuzoyikela." 
Psalms2:12 Khahlelani kuye unyana ngentobeko, hleze aniqumbele nitshabalale endleleni; kaloku umsindo wakhe uyakhawuleza. Hayi uyolo lwabo bonke abazimela ngoNdikhoyo!" 
Psalms3:1 *Ndikhoyo, hay' ukuba ninzi kwazo iintshaba zam! Ewe, zindivukela zinguMbo nomXesibe." 
Psalms3:2 Zide zithi xa zithetha ngam: “Naloo Thixo wakhe akamhlanguli konke!” 
Psalms3:3 Kambe ke, wena Ndikhoyo, ulikhaka lam. Usisidima sam; undenza ndibe neqhayiya." 
Psalms3:4 Ndiyakhala, ndibhenele kuNdikhoyo, andiphendule esentabeni yakhe eyodwa." 
Psalms3:5 Ndiyaphumla, ndilale ubuthongo, ndibuye ndivuke, kuba uNdikhoyo uyandixhasa." 
Psalms3:6 Andiwoyiki amawaka-waka eentshaba, naxa zindirhawule nje, zindingqonge macal' onke." 
Psalms3:7 Khawuphakame ume, Ndikhoyo! Ndisindise, Thixo wam! Kaloku nguwe ozoyisayo zonk' iintshaba zam; ewe, nguwe ozaphul' iimpondo iintshaba zam." 
Psalms3:8 Ukuhlangulwa kuvela kuwe, Ndikhoyo; khawubathamsanqele ke abantu bakho!" 
Psalms4:1 Ndiphendule ndakukhala kuwe, Thixo, mlondolozi wamalungelo am! Wandikhulula embandezelweni yam; yiba nenceba ke ngoko, uwuve umthandazo wam." 
Psalms4:2 Bantundini, koda kube nini na nindihlazisa? koda kube nini nithand' ilize, niphuthaphuth' ubuxoki?" 
Psalms4:3 Yazini ke ukuba *uNdikhoyo uyabathand' abantu bakhe; uyandiva xa ndizibika kuye. 
Psalms4:4 Xa niqumbileyo, ze ningoni; loo nto yetyiseni nithe cwaka kwiimandlalo zenu." 
Psalms4:5 Menzeleni amadini alungileyo, nikholose ngaye uNdikhoyo." 
Psalms4:6 Baninzi abalangazelela okulungileyo. Ndikhoyo, sikhangele ngobubele," 
Psalms4:7 usiphe ukuchulumacha okudlula okwâbo bakufumana ngomdliva wengqolowa newayini. 
Psalms4:8 Ndiya kuphumla ngenzolo, ndilale; nguwe kuphela kaloku, Ndikhoyo, ondinqabisayo." 
Psalms5:1 Khawuwabekel' iindlebe amazwi am, *Ndikhoyo, usigqale isingqala sam." 
Psalms5:2 Kuve ukukhala kwam, kumkani wam, Thixo wam, xa ndithandazayo kuwe." 
Psalms5:3 Uyawuva umthandazo wam, Ndikhoyo, kwakusasa: kwakusasa ndizibika kuwe, ndilinde impendulo." 
Psalms5:4 Kaloku unguThixo ongadlelaniyo nobugwenxa; akukunyamezeli ukungcola phambi kwakho. 
Psalms5:5 Akubanyamezeli abantw' abazingcayo; ubuthiye bonk' ubugqwirha. 
Psalms5:6 Uyawatshabalalisa amaxoki; ewe, Ndikhoyo, abaxhaphi-gazi nabakhohlisi banezothe kuwe." 
Psalms5:7 Ke mna ndiya kungena endlwini yakho, ngenxa yobubele bakho obuncamisileyo, ndikunqule endlwini yakho ekhethiweyo, ndikunqule ngembeko ndingcangcazela." 
Psalms5:8 Ndikhokelel' ekwenzeni intando yakho, Ndikhoyo. Kaloku baninzi abandichasayo; yenze icace phambi kwam indlela yakho." 
Psalms5:9 Azinanyani iintshaba zam, iintliziyo zazo zizel' inkohlakalo; Zizungula ukutshabalalisa ngentetho elalanisayo." 
Psalms5:10 Zohlwaye, Thixo; zirhintyele kwangamacebo azo; zigxothe ngenxa yezono zazo, kuba ziphikisana nawe." 
Psalms5:11 Bayavuya bonke abo bathembela ngawe; bohlala bechulumacha luvuyo. Kaloku uyabakhusela abo bakuthandayo; abo ke banemihlali ngenene. 
Psalms5:12 Ndikhoyo, uyabathamsanqela abakuthobelayo, ubafukamele ngobubele ngathi bagqunywe ngekhaka." 
Psalms6:1 Uze ungandikhalimeli unomsindo, *Ndikhoyo; ungandohlwayi uqumbile." 
Psalms6:2 Yiba nenceba kum, Ndikhoyo, kuba ndityhafile; ndomeleze, Mhlekazi, ndiphelelwe." 
Psalms6:3 Ndihleli ndinexhala elibi; koda kube nini kodwa kunje, Ndikhoyo?" 
Psalms6:4 Yiza, Ndikhoyo, undihlangule; ndikhulule ngenxa yothando lwakho olungajikiyo." 
Psalms6:5 Kaloku akusekho kukukhumbula kwabafileyo; akukho bani unokukudumisa engcwabeni. 
Psalms6:6 Sendide ndatyhafa sisingqala; ubusuku ngobusuku ndiyantywizisa; umqamelo umanzi tixi ziinyembezi. 
Psalms6:7 Atyhumfutyhumfu amehlo am kukulila; sekude kwanzima nokujonga. Ndinje nje nje kungenxa yeentshaba zam. 
Psalms6:8 Sukani kum, nonke nina mathol' esihulu-hulu! Kaloku uNdikhoyo usivile isingqala sam." 
Psalms6:9 Ukuvile ukubongoza kwam, wawuphulaphula umthandazo wam." 
Psalms6:10 Ziya kudana, zidideke zonk' iintshaba zam; ziya kujika ngephanyazo, ziphoxekile." 
Psalms7:1 Thixo wam, Ndikhoyo, ndithembele ngawe! Ndihlangule, undisindise kubo bonk' abandileqayo," 
Psalms7:2 hleze bandiqwenga-qwenge njengengonyama, bandiqangqulule ndibe zizijungqe ndingenamhlanguli." 
Psalms7:3 Thixo wam, Ndikhoyo, ukuba kukho nto ndiyenzileyo kwezi zinto: ukuba kukho bani ndimonileyo," 
Psalms7:4 nokuba ndingcatshe umhlobo wam, okanye ndifumane ndalwenzakalisa utshaba lwam," 
Psalms7:5 malundileqe ke lundifumane utshaba, lundinqumle, ndife kube kanye, lundishiye apho ndilutywantsi." 
Psalms7:6 Khalima ngomsindo, Ndikhoyo; undithethelele kule ngqumbo yeentshaba zam. Thixo wam, vuka undincede; kaloku wena ufuna kugwetywe ngobulungisa." 
Psalms7:7 Mazibizwe zonke izizwe zikungqonge, ungqendeve esihlalweni sakho phezu kwazo." 
Psalms7:8 NguNdikhoyo umgwebi wabo bonk' abantu. Ligwebe ityala lam ke, Ndikhoyo, bucace ubulungisa bam, kucace ukuba ndimsulwa." 
Psalms7:9 Phelisa inkohlakalo yabantw' abagwenxa, uwazimase amalungisa, wena Thixo othand' ukulunga, ogocagoca iintliziyo neengcinga zabantu." 
Psalms7:10 Likhaka lam uThixo, uyabakhusela abantw' abathand' ukulunga." 
Psalms7:11 UThixo ngumgwebi olilungisa; unguThixo ocatshukisw' imihla nezolo. 
Psalms7:12 Ukuba abazohlwayi abantu wolirhola ikrele lakhe elibukhali uThixo. Selesityedile isaphetha sakhe, wema kuhle;" 
Psalms7:13 uzikhuphile esingxotyeni sazo izikhali, wajolisa ngeentolo ezinomlilo." 
Psalms7:14 Khangela, umnt' ogwenxa ukhawula ukungcola, amith' ubumenemene, azal' ubuxoki." 
Psalms7:15 Umba umhadi onzulu, ajike eyele kwakuloo mgibe awenzileyo;" 
Psalms7:16 urhintyelwa kwabubumenemene bakhe, isikhuni sibuye nomkhwezeli." 
Psalms7:17 Ndiyambulela uNdikhoyo ngenxa yobulungisa bakhe. Ndisaya kumbonga uNdikhoyo uPhezukonke. 
Psalms8:1 *Ndikhoyo, Nkosi yethu, hayi ukubaluleka kwegama lakho ehlabathini! Wena uqaqambisa amazulu ngesithozela sakho," 
Psalms8:2 nditsho abantwana kwaneentsana ziyakubonga, nto leyo ibamisela umqobo abachasi wokuvalela utshaba kwanomphindezeli." 
Psalms8:3 Xa ndiqwalasela amazulu owenzileyo, inyanga, neenkwenkwezi ezidalwe nguwe," 
Psalms8:4 ngubani yena umntu, le nto umkhumbulelayo, engubani yena unyana womntu, le nto umkhathalelayo?" 
Psalms8:5 Ngaphezu koko umenze wanganeno kancinane nje kuwe, Thixo; umthe jize ngesihomo nesithozela." 
Psalms8:6 Umnike igunya kuyo yonke indalo yakho, wazibeka phantsi kwegunya lakhe zonk' izinto:" 
Psalms8:7 iinkomo neegusha, kwanazo neenyamakazi;" 
Psalms8:8 iintaka eziphaphazelayo, neentlanzi, nayo yonke into ephithizela elwandle." 
Psalms8:9 Hayi ukubaluleka kwalo igama lakho ehlabathini liphela, Ndikhoyo, Nkosi yethu!" 
Psalms9:1 Mandikubonge ngomxhelo wam wonke, *Ndikhoyo, ndibalise ngayo yonke imimangaliso oyenzileyo." 
Psalms9:2 Ndomemelela ngemincili, ndikuvumel' ingoma, ndibonge wena, Phezukonke." 
Psalms9:3 Zithe xa zihlehlayo iintshaba zam, zawa zatshabalala, wakuvela wena, Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms9:4 Kaloku undigwebele ityala lam; ungqendeve esihlalweni sakho, wena mgwebi olungileyo." 
Psalms9:5 Uzikhalimele iintlanga, wabatshabalalisa abantw' abagwenxa, waliphanzisa kwaphela igama labo." 
Psalms9:6 Iintshaba zethu zibhangile mpela, uzidilize didli izixeko zazo; sele zacimayo nasezingqondweni." 
Psalms9:7 Kodwa uNdikhoyo uya kuhlal' elawula kude kube nini-nini; selengqendeve enkundleni yakhe, elungele ukugweba." 
Psalms9:8 Ulilawula ngobulungisa elimiweyo; azigwebe kakuhle zonke iintlanga. 
Psalms9:9 NguNdikhoyo inqaba yokuzimela abacinezelwayo; nguye ikhusi ngamaxesha eembandezelo. 
Psalms9:10 Bathembele ngawe, Ndikhoyo, bonke abakwaziyo; kaloku akuzange ubafulathele abo bakufunayo." 
Psalms9:11 Mbongeni uNdikhoyo ongqendeve ebhotwe eZiyon; zibhengezeni eluntwini izinto asenzele zona. 
Psalms9:12 Uyaliphindezela igazi labacinezelweyo; akasilibali isikhalo sabo baselusizini. 
Psalms9:13 Ndenzele inceba, Ndikhoyo; bona indlela abandiphethe ngayo abo bandithiyileyo, wena ondihlangula ethunzini lokufa." 
Psalms9:14 Mandiluxele udumo lwakho phakathi kwabantu bakho eJerusalem. Ewe, ndinemincili ngenxa yokuba undihlangule." 
Psalms9:15 Iintlanga zeyele kumhadi ebeziwembile, zabhajiswa sisabatha ebezisithiyile." 
Psalms9:16 Uzibonakalisile uNdikhoyo, wasiwisa isigwebo; izikhohlakali zarhintyelwa kwayimisebenzi yazo." 
Psalms9:17 Ziya kwelabafileyo izikhohlakali, neentlanga zonke ezimfulathelayo uThixo." 
Psalms9:18 Kaloku akayi kusoloko elityalwa amahlwempu; ithemba labahlelelekileyo aliyi kusoloko lifuthaniselwe. 
Psalms9:19 Lamla, Ndikhoyo; malungaphakami uluntu; mazize phambi kwakho uzigwebe iintlanga." 
Psalms9:20 Zenze zikoyike, Ndikhoyo, ziqonde ukuba zingabantu nje kuphela." 
Psalms10:1 Yini na, *Ndikhoyo? Wachasela? Kutheni? Wazifihla ngexesha longxunguphalo?" 
Psalms10:2 Abantw' abagwenxa banolunya; bayabaleqa ababuthathaka. Mabarhintyelwe kwangaloo mayelenqe abo. 
Psalms10:3 Bayazidla ngaloo magugwana abo, bazicengezele konempumelelo, bamdele uNdikhoyo." 
Psalms10:4 Libathe lwale ikratshi abantw' abagwenxa; bade bazikhohlise ngokuthi: “Akukho Thixo ngandawo!” 
Psalms10:5 Zinempumelelo zonk' iinzame zabo, kodwa imiyalelo yakho ikude lee kubo. Bayazeya zonke iintshaba zabo." 
Psalms10:6 Baziqhayisa ngokuthi abasoze boyiswe nto bona, abasoze balibone ishwangusha." 
Psalms10:7 Umlomo wabo mbi, uzel' izishwabulo, ubuxoki, nezisongelo; basoloko beceba ububi nobutshinga." 
Psalms10:8 Bahamba bencathama ngezindlu ezixekweni, bezungul' ukugwint' abantw' abangenatyala, balalel' abantw' abangenakuzikhusela." 
Psalms10:9 Bazimel' engontsini, baxel' ingonyama, ilalel' ixhoba elingumnt' oludwayi; xhakamfu bambambise ngomgibe wabo!" 
Psalms10:10 Nal' olo sizana lungen' esigwini lusoyisakala. 
Psalms10:11 Bathi xa bezikhohlisa: “UThixo akakhathali; akahoyanga nto; akasoz' aqonde.” 
Psalms10:12 Lamla, Ndikhoyo; caca ukuba unguThixo! Sukubalibal' abantw' abahlelelekileyo!" 
Psalms10:13 Kungani bekudela nje abantw' abagwenxa? Kutheni le nto bade bathi: “Akukho nt' aya kuyenza loo Thixo”? 
Psalms10:14 Ewe, wena uzijongile wazibona iintlupheko neentsizi, khon' ukuze ulungele ukusisiza. Ewe, zibalekela kuwe nazo iindwayi, wena ongumncedi weenkedama." 
Psalms10:15 Zaphul' iimpondo ke izikrelemnqa nabantw' abagwenxa; bohlwaye ide iphele nya inkohlakalo yabo. 
Psalms10:16 Ngukumkani uNdikhoyo kuya kude kube nini-nini. Zobhanga ziphele nya emhlabeni iintshaba zakhe. 
Psalms10:17 Ndikhoyo, uyaziva izicelo zabantw' abathobekileyo; uyabavuselela, uziphendule izicelo zabo." 
Psalms10:18 Iinkedama nabacinezelweyo uyabaqwebela, khon' ukuze oonyana babantu bangagrogrisi mntu ehlabathini." 
Psalms11:1 Ndithembele *ngoNdikhoyo nje, ningathini ukuthi: “Balekela ezintabeni zenu njengentaka!" 
Psalms11:2 Kaloku abantw' abagwenxa sebejolisile ngesaphetha esinotolo, bajolisel' ukulidubul' emnyameni ilungisa." 
Psalms11:3 Xa sekudilike neziseko nje, lingenzani ke lona ilungisa?”" 
Psalms11:4 UNdikhoyo ukwibhotwe lakhe elilodwa, uhlel' esihlalweni sakhe ezulwini. Uyabagqala oonyana babantu, uyazibona izintw' abazenzayo," 
Psalms11:5 uyabavavany' abalungileyo nabagwenxa, abathiye ngentiyokazi enkulu abaphalazi-gazi." 
Psalms11:6 Uya kubabetha ngesichotho sesalfa namalahl' avuthayo abantw' abagwenxa; iziphango nezaqhwithi ziba sisabelo sabo. 
Psalms11:7 Kaloku ulilungisa uNdikhoyo; uyazithanda izenzo ezilungileyo. Abo balungisayo bobonana naye ubuso ngobuso. 
Psalms12:1 Nceda, *Ndikhoyo! Akukho namnye umnt' olungileyo; baphelile abantw' abathembekileyo." 
Psalms12:2 Bathetha ubuxok' abantu, bekhohlisana. Bav' amantyontyelo baxokisane ngeentethw' ezimbaxa." 
Psalms12:3 Wobaqhawul' imilebe uNdikhoyo abantw' abakhohlisayo; wobashunqul' iilwimi abantw' abazigwagwisayo. 
Psalms12:4 Nditsho nkqu abo bathi: “Sophumelela ngolwimi lwethu. Iyeyethu nje imilebe le, ngubani owosixelela emasikuthethe?”" 
Psalms12:5 “Ndiza kulamla ke ngoku,” utsho uNdikhoyo, “ngenxa yokuba amahlwempu ayacinezelwa, neentsizana ziyancwina. Ndobanika oko kuphumla bakulangazelelayo.”" 
Psalms12:6 Zithembekile izithembiso zikaNdikhoyo, azinasibhidi, zinjengesiliva enyityilikiswe eziko kasixhenxe. Uzigcinile izithembiso zakho, Ndikhoyo; sigcine sikhuselekile kubantw' abagwenxa." 
Psalms12:7  
Psalms12:8 Basingqonge macal' onke abantw' abagwenxa, lo gama wonke ubani ekuvuyela ukungcola." 
Psalms13:1 Koda kube nini na, *Ndikhoyo, undilibele kwaphela? Koda kube nini na ndingakuboni?" 
Psalms13:2 Koda kube nini na ndinomva-ndedwa, ndinesingqala, ibuhlung' imini yonke intliziyo yam? Koda kube nini zindivuyelel' iintshaba zam?" 
Psalms13:3 Bek' iindlebe, Ndikhoyo, undive, Thixo wam. Ndihlaziye, hleze ndilal' ubuthongo bokufa," 
Psalms13:4 hleze luthi lundoyisil' utshaba lwam, bachwayit' ababandezeli, kuba ndoyisiwe." 
Psalms13:5 Kodwa ndithembe uthando lwakho olungajikiyo; ndochulumacha kuba uyandihlangula. 
Psalms13:6 Ndombonga uNdikhoyo, kuba endiphethe ngobubele." 
Psalms14:1 Iziyatha zithi akukho Thixo ngandawo. Zonakele, futhi zenza amasikizi; akukho ulungisayo kuzo." 
Psalms14:2 Ke yena *uNdikhoyo ubabukele abantu; uhlel' ezulwini efuna ukuqonda ukuba ngaba sikho na isilumko, nditsho ofuna ukunqula uThixo." 
Psalms14:3 Kambe ke bonke bemkile, xa bebonke bonakele; kuba akakho olungisayo, nditsho nokuba abe mnye." 
Psalms14:4 Abanangqondo na abakhohlakeleyo; abo baxhaphaza amawethu, ngathi batya isonka, bangamnquliyo nokumnqula uNdikhoyo?" 
Psalms14:5 Baya kunkwantya benkwantyile, kuba uThixo ukunye nâbo bamthobeleyo." 
Psalms14:6 Nangona aminxwayo amacebo osizana, nguNdikhoyo olixhadi lalo." 
Psalms14:7 Akwaba ingavela eZiyon inkululeko yamaSirayeli, akuba uNdikhoyo eyibuyisile inkqubela yabantu bakhe. AbakwaYakobi baya kugcoba; ewe, ochulumacha amaSirayeli." 
Psalms15:1 *Ndikhoyo, ngubani oya kuba lundwendwe lwakho; ingubani oya kutyelela kwakho?" 
Psalms15:2 Ngulowo uhambo ingenabala, owenza ubulungisa, ayithethe inyaniso engafihlisi." 
Psalms15:3 Ngulowo unganyelisiyo, ungamenziyo into embi uwabo, ungamhlebiyo ummelwana wakhe." 
Psalms15:4 Ngobadelayo abo babukulwe nguThixo, abancome abo bamoyikayo uNdikhoyo, ofunga angajiki noba kunyembelekile." 
Psalms15:5 Ngongabolekisi ngemali yakhe, ngenxa yokuba efuna inzala; ngongekhe anyotywe ngokuthengisa umnt' ongenatyala. Lowo ke wenjenjalo ngumnt' ozinzileyo." 
Psalms16:1 Ndikhusele kaloku, Thixo; ndithembele ngawe." 
Psalms16:2 Ewe, ndiyazibika, *Ndikhoyo; nguwe iNkosi yam; ngaphandle kwakho, Mhlekazi, andinabani." 
Psalms16:3 Kuba mna ulonwabo lwam luphakathi kwemilowo yakwaThixo; nditsho leyo itshatsheleyo kweli hlabathi. 
Psalms16:4 Bazandisel' iintsizi abo bazinyulela *thixo wumbi. Andiyi kuba nanxaxheba kumadini abo; andiyi kubanqula ngomlomo wam oothixo babo. 
Psalms16:5 Nguwe kuphela, Ndikhoyo, inxaxheba endiyabelweyo; lisentendeni yesandla sakhw' ibango lam." 
Psalms16:6 Isabelo sam sisendaweni entle; hayi ukuba lihle kwalo ilifa lam! 
Psalms16:7 Mbongeni uNdikhoyo ngokuba endiphe icebo; nesazela sam siyandiluleka ebusuku. 
Psalms16:8 Ndihlala ndimbeke phambi kwam uNdikhoyo; ungasekunene kwam, ngoko ke andiyi kushukunyiswa nto." 
Psalms16:9 Yiyo ke loo nto ndihleli ndichwayitile nje; ngenene ndiziva ndikhuselekile. 
Psalms16:10 Kaloku akuyi kundishiya enyanyeni ndide ndife; akuyi kusiyeka sibole isicaka sakho esithembekileyo. 
Psalms16:11 Wena undazisa iindlela zobomi; kaloku ndizala yimincili xa ndiphambi kwakho. Ngasekunene kwakho yimihlali yodwa kude kube ngunaphakade. 
Psalms17:1 Kuphulaphule ukunyaniseka kwam, *Ndikhoyo; kubazel' iindlebe ukutarhuzisa kwam. Yiva, nas' isicelo sam. Kaloku mna andinankohliso." 
Psalms17:2 Malicace kuwe ibango lam; amehlo akho makakhangele ngokungenaxanasi. 
Psalms17:3 Uyicikidile intliziyo yam, wandivelela ebusuku; undivavanyile, akwafumana bugwenxa kum. Kaloku ndizimisele ukungoni, nditsho nangokuthetha oku." 
Psalms17:4 Andixelisang' abany' abantu ngokuphikisana nomyalelo wakho; ndizikhwebule kwiindlela zamathanda-gazi. 
Psalms17:5 Ndithe ngcembe, ndihamba ngendlela yakho; andaphambuka konke kuyo." 
Psalms17:6 Ndizibika kuwe, Thixo; kaloku uyandiva; zibaze iindlebe, uwuve umthandazo wam." 
Psalms17:7 Bonakalisa uthando lwakh' olungagugiyo, wena msindisi wâbo bathembela ngawe, ubakhusele ezintshabeni zabo." 
Psalms17:8 Ndilondoloze ngokokhozo lweliso lakho, undisithelise ngethunzi lamaphiko akho" 
Psalms17:9 kubantw' abagwenxa abandihlaselayo, kwezo ntshaba zindingqongileyo, zifuth' inkohlakalo." 
Psalms17:10 Azinalo novelwano; zithe lwale likratshi. 
Psalms17:11 Ziyandizungula, zifun' ukundirhangqa; zindithe ntsho ngamehlo, zijong' ukundiqethula." 
Psalms17:12 Zifun' ukundithi qwenge-qwenge zixel' ingonyama; zindilalele zincatham' engontsini njengerhamncwa. 
Psalms17:13 Lamla, Ndikhoyo; zikhalimele iintshaba, uzichithe! Ndihlangule ngekrele lakho kubantw' abagwenxa." 
Psalms17:14 Ndihlangule, Ndikhoyo, koohlohlesakhe abazisu zimbaxa, betsho ngenyambalala yoonyana. Bathi zubelele bafe, babushiyel' oonyana obo butyebi." 
Psalms17:15 Mna ndobonana nawe ngenxa yobulungisa bam; ndokwaneliswa kukubona wena xa ndivukayo. 
Psalms18:1 Ndiyakuthanda, Ndikhoyo, mandla am." 
Psalms18:2 NguNdikhoyo iliwa lam; nguye inqaba yam; nguye umkhuseli wam. Xa ndizimele ngoThixo wam ndihlala ndikhuselekile. Nguye ikhaka lam, nguye ondigcina ndifihlakele." 
Psalms18:3 Ndithi ndakukhala kuNdikhoyo, asuke andithi hlasi kwiintshaba zam. Ngenene, makabongwe uNdikhoyo!" 
Psalms18:4 Bendirhintyelwe ziintambo zokufa, amaza arhaxayo endigubungele." 
Psalms18:5 Ukufa bekundirhangqile, ingcwaba selivuleke lithe ng'aa." 
Psalms18:6 Ndazibika kuNdikhoyo ndikuloo ngxingongo, ndalucela uncedo kuThixo wam. Wandiva engqendeve ebhotwe lakhe, savakala kuye isikhalo sam." 
Psalms18:7 Suka wagungqa wanyikima umhlaba, nditsho neziseko zeentaba zashukuma, kuba uThixo wayenomsindo." 
Psalms18:8 Kwathi phoko umsi emathatheni akhe, walephuza amadangatye ngomlomo, kuliqika amalahle avuthayo." 
Psalms18:9 Wasikrazula isibhakabhaka, wehla, ethe zukuva phezu kwelifu elimnyama." 
Psalms18:10 Wandanda ngenqwelo *yezithunyw' ezimaphiko itshebeleza ngesantya emoyeni. 
Psalms18:11 Wayethiwe gqume sisithokothoko, kumnyama thsu; engqingwe ziingqimba zamafu anemvula." 
Psalms18:12 Kwaw' isichotho namalahl' avuthayo, ziphuma kumban' ongaphambi kwakhe, zagqobhoza kuloo ntshinyela yamafu." 
Psalms18:13 Wazongoma esibhakabhakeni uNdikhoyo, lavakal' ilizwi loPhezukonke, satsho isichotho nemibane." 
Psalms18:14 Wadubula ngeentolo zakhe, zee qhu saa iintshaba, eziswantsulisa ngokugqekreza kwemibane." 
Psalms18:15 Ewe, watsho zoma qoko iilwandle, kwatsho kwavela neziseko zelizwe, wakukhalima, wena Ndikhoyo, ugragramela iintshaba unomsindo." 
Psalms18:16 Wehla, wandithi hlasi uNdikhoyo, wandihlangula kumanzi enzonzobila." 
Psalms18:17 Wandihlangula kwiintshaba zam nakwabo bandichasayo, bendivuyelela." 
Psalms18:18 Bandihlasela ndisengxingweni, wandikhusela yena uNdikhoyo." 
Psalms18:19 Wandihlangula ndisengozini, wandisindisa kuba ekholisekile ndim." 
Psalms18:20 Wandivuza uNdikhoyo, kuba ndandilungisa; wandithamsanqela, kuba ndimsulwa." 
Psalms18:21 Umthetho kaNdikhoyo ndiyawuthobela; andimfulathelanga uThixo wam. 
Psalms18:22 Yonke imiyalelo yakhe ndiyigcinile; andiyaphulanga imithetho yakhe. 
Psalms18:23 Uyandazi ukuba andonanga; ndiyazilumla ekwenzeni ububi. 
Psalms18:24 Ngoko ke uyandivuza, kuba ndisenza okulungileyo; uyandivuza, kuba akukho sikhwa kum." 
Psalms18:25 Uthembekile, Ndikhoyo, kwabo bathembekileyo; ubenzela ububele abo bandlela zithe tse." 
Psalms18:26 Umsulwa kwabo bamsulwa; uchasene nabo bangamatshijolo. 
Psalms18:27 Ungumsindisi wabathobekileyo; uyabathoba abo banekratshi. 
Psalms18:28 Usisibane sokundikhanyisela, wena Ndikhoyo; undigxothela ubumnyama, wena Thixo." 
Psalms18:29 Ewe, ngawe ndingawuchitha-chitha nomkhosi, ngamandla akho ndilutsibe nongqameko lwawo." 
Psalms18:30 Hayi bo, zigqibelele izinto azenzayo lo Thixo! Hayi ukuthembeka kwelizwi lakhe! Uyabakhusela bonke abo bathembela ngaye." 
Psalms18:31 NguNdikhoyo yedwa uThixo; nguye kuphela osikhuselayo. 
Psalms18:32 Ewe, nguThixo ondinika amandla; nguye oyenza iphumelele indlela yam." 
Psalms18:33 Undicondobisa kuhle njengenxala, ndichankcathe emaweni ndingatyibiliki." 
Psalms18:34 Undiqhelisa ukulwa edabini, andifundise ukugoba isaphetha esomeleleyo." 
Psalms18:35 Ndikhoyo, undinike ikhaka lokuhlanganisa, wandixhasa ngesandla sakho esinamandla; undibonelele ndatsho ndazimaseka." 
Psalms18:36 Undimise endaweni ephangaleleyo; azinakutyibilika kuyo iinyawo zam. 
Psalms18:37 Ndizisukela ndizifumane iintshaba zam; andijiki ndide ndizitshabalalise. 
Psalms18:38 Ndizithi ntshinte-ntshinte zingavuki tu, ziqungquluze apho phambi kwam." 
Psalms18:39 Undinika amandla edabini, undoyisele iintshaba zam." 
Psalms18:40 Ziyandoyika iintshaba zam; abandithiyileyo ndibatshabalalisile. 
Psalms18:41 Ziba ngafuna uncedo, zingancedwa bani; ziba ngazibika kuNdikhoyo, angaphenduli." 
Psalms18:42 Mna ndizicumza zibe njengothuli luphetshethwa ngumoya, ndizinyhashe okodaka endleleni." 
Psalms18:43 Wandihlangula kubavukeli, walimisa igunya lam ezizweni, ndada ndaphatha nabo bendingabazi." 
Psalms18:44 Bayandithobela bakuwuva umthetho wam; ndikhahlelwe nangabasemzini abantu," 
Psalms18:45 bephuma kwiinqaba zabo begubha, bephelelwe sisibindi xa bebonke." 
Psalms18:46 Huntshu! Khul' ud' ukhokhobe, Ndikhoyo! Mawubongwe, wena mkhuseli wam, Thixo ongumhlanguli wam!" 
Psalms18:47 Wena undoyisela iintshaba zam; wena ugoba iintlanga zitsho zindikhahlele; 
Psalms18:48 wena undihlangula kwabandichasayo! Ewe, undoyisele iintshaba zam, wandikhusela kubaphalazi-gazi." 
Psalms18:49 Ngoko ke ndiya kukubonga phakathi kwezizwe, ndityibele ndivuma umbongo wakho, Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms18:50 NguThixo omnika uloyiso ukumkani, omenzele izibele umthanjiswa wakhe, uDavide nayo yonke inzala yakhe kude kuse ephakadeni." 
Psalms19:1 Amazulu abalisa ngobungangamsha bukaThixo, nesibhakabhaka sixela umsebenzi wezandla zakhe." 
Psalms19:2 Imini ixelela imin' elandelayo, nobusuku bubikela ubusuk' obulandelayo." 
Psalms19:3 Akukho ntetho namazwi nasandi sivakalayo; 
Psalms19:4 kodwa kukho intlokoma kulo lonk' elimiweyo, nebali lazo liwugqibe wonk' umhlaba. UThixo ulakhele esibhakabhakeni ilanga." 
Psalms19:5 Liphuma linyalasa njengomyen' ephum' entangeni, nanjengembalek' engxamel' ukubalek' elugqatsweni." 
Psalms19:6 Liphum' emaphethelwen' esibhakabhaka, liye kutshw' emaphethelweni kwelinye icala; akukho nto inokusinda kwingqatsini yalo." 
Psalms19:7 Ugqibelele won' umyalelo *kaNdikhoyo: uhlaziya amandla. Uthembekile wona, kub' unik' isiyatha ubulumko." 
Psalms19:8 Imimiselo kaNdikhoyo ilungile: ivuyis' intliziyo. Imithetho kaNdikhoyo inyulu: ikhanyisel' amehl' indlela. 
Psalms19:9 Kulungil' ukunqul' uNdikhoyo; koba njalo nanini-nini. Ziyinyanis' izigqibo zakhe, yaye zilunge kwaphela." 
Psalms19:10 Zinqweneleka ngaphezu kwegolide, nditheth' igolid' engcwengileyo; zimnandi ngaphezu kobusi, ewe, ndixel' ikhephelele lenqatha lobusi." 
Psalms19:11 Ngaphezu koko ziyasilulek' isicaka sakho, yaye ngumvuz' omkhulu ukukuthobela." 
Psalms19:12 Kambe ke ngubani oziqiqayo iziphoso zakhe? Ndikhulul' ezonweni endingaziqondiyo. 
Psalms19:13 Ndikhusel' ezonwen' ezibangwa likratshi, hleze zindongamele. Ndiyakwandul' ukuba msulwa ndakuba ndikhululekil' ezonweni ezoyikekayo." 
Psalms19:14 Ngamana angamkeleka kuwe, Ndikhoyo, amazwi am neengcamango zentliziyo yam, wena mkhuseli wam nomkhululi wam." 
Psalms20:1 Wanga *uNdikhoyo angakuphulaphula ngemini yeembandezelo! Wanga angakukhusela uThixo kaYakobi! 
Psalms20:2 Wanga angakuthumela uncedo luvel' ebhotwe lakhe, akuxhase esentabeni yeZiyon." 
Psalms20:3 Wanga angayamkela iminikelo yakho uThixo, akholiseke ngamadini omenzela wona." 
Psalms20:4 Wanga angakunika umnqweno wentliziyo yakho, aziphumelelise zonk' iinquleqhu zakho." 
Psalms20:5 Sokwandul' ukuba nemincili ngoloyiso lwakho, siphakamis' izindwe, simbong' uThixo. Wang' uNdikhoyo angaziva izicelo zakho!" 
Psalms20:6 Kaloku ndiyaz' ukuba uNdikhoyo uyamnceda umthanjiswa wakhe, uyamva ekwibhotwe lakhe elilodwa ezulwini, umnik' uloyiso ngamandla akhe." 
Psalms20:7 Baqhayisa ngeenqwelo zokulwa abanye, abanye ngamahashe; thina siqhayisa ngoNdikhoyo uThixo wethu." 
Psalms20:8 Bona babhukuqwa bawe; thina sisuka sime ngxishi. 
Psalms20:9 Ndikhoyo, mnike amandla oloyiso ukumkani; sive naxa sizibika kuwe!" 
Psalms21:1 Uyavuya ukumkani ngenxa yamandla akho, *Ndikhoyo, uyachulumacha kuba umnike uloyiso." 
Psalms21:2 Umnikile umnqweno wentliziyo yakhe; usivile isicelo sakhe. 
Psalms21:3 Umhlangabeze ngeentsikelelo ezingathethekiyo, wamthi jize ngesithsaba segolid' entloko." 
Psalms21:4 Wacela ubomi kuwe; wampha ubom' obude obuhlala buhleli. 
Psalms21:5 Ufumene imbeko enkulu ngenxa yoncedo lwakho; umnike udumo nobungangamela. 
Psalms21:6 Ewe, umnike uyolo olungapheliyo; kwanobukho bakho buyamchwayitisa." 
Psalms21:7 Kaloku ukumkani uthembele ngoPhezukonke, yaye ngenxa yenceba kaNdikhoyo uya kuhlal' engukumkani." 
Psalms21:8 Zonk' iintshaba zakho uya kuzibhaqa; uya kubafumana bonk' abakuthiyileyo. 
Psalms21:9 Úya kubatshisa ngesihogo somlil' akufika; uNdikhoyo wobatshabalalisa ngomsindo, abaqwele ngomlilo." 
Psalms21:10 Uya kuyiphelisa inzala yabo ehlabathini, bangabikho abantwana babo phakathi kwabantu." 
Psalms21:11 Nokuba bayila ububi ngawe, nokuba benza iyelenqe, abanakuphumelela." 
Psalms21:12 Kaloku úya kubadubula ebusweni ngeentolo zakhe, abachithe babe ziintsalu." 
Psalms21:13 Mawubongwe, Ndikhoyo, ngenxa yobugorha bakho; thina sokubonga sikudumise ngenxa yamandla akho." 
Psalms22:1 Thixo wam, Thixo wam, undishiyeleni na? Kudala ndizigixa, ndicel' uncedo, kodwa andikalufumani unangoku!" 
Psalms22:2 Thixo wam, emini ndikhalela kuwe, kodwa akundiva. Nasebusuku ndiyakhala, ndingafumani kuphumla phezu koko." 
Psalms22:3 Kambe wena ungqendeve phakathi kwabakudumisayo; nditsho wena ngangamela yakwaSirayeli. 
Psalms22:4 Babekholose ngawe ookhokho bethu; babekuthembile, wabahlangula wena." 
Psalms22:5 Bakhala kuwe, wabakhulula wena; babethembele ngawe, akwabadanisa." 
Psalms22:6 Ke mna andimntu, ndifana nqwa nombungu; ndiyintlekisa ebantwini, ndideliwe luluntu." 
Psalms22:7 Bonk' abandibonayo bayandigxwala; bandinyevulele, bahlunguzelis' intloko besithi:" 
Psalms22:8 “Ubethembele *kuNdikhoyo, makamhlangule kaloku; makamkhulule ukuba uyamthanda.”" 
Psalms22:9 Kanti ke nguwe owawundikhusele kwasekuzalweni kwam, wandilondoloza ndisesemabeleni kama." 
Psalms22:10 Ndahlulelwa wena kwasekuzalweni kwam; ubunguThixo wam wena ndingekazalwa. 
Psalms22:11 Mus' ukuba kude kum. Kaloku sele isemnyango imbandezelo; ibe akukho namnye ongandincedayo. 
Psalms22:12 Zindingqongile iintshaba zam, ngathi ziinkunz' ezomeleleyo zaseBhashan; zindivelele macal' onke." 
Psalms22:13 Zikhamisile, zindivulel' imilomo; ziyandijamela zixel' ingonyam' egqumayo." 
Psalms22:14 Ndiphelelwe; amandla aphalele njengamanzi, ahlukene onke amathambo am, intliziyo yam iyanyibilika ngathi ngumthwebeba." 
Psalms22:15 Aphele mpel' amandla kum, ulwimi lwam lunamathel' ezinkalakahleni, undishiy' eluthulini njengofileyo." 
Psalms22:16 Lindirhawul' igquba labantw' abagwenxa, ndangathi ndirhangqwe ligqiza lezinja; bandidlavul' izandla neenyawo," 
Psalms22:17 ngoko ke amathambo am aphandle. Ke zona iintshaba zam zibukele. 
Psalms22:18 Babelana ngeengubo zam; benzelan' amaqashiso ngesambatho sam. 
Psalms22:19 Ke wena, Ndikhoyo, mus' ukuba kude nam; Mkhululi wam, khawuleza undincede!" 
Psalms22:20 Ndihlangule ekreleni, undisindise kwezi zinja." 
Psalms22:21 Ndihlangule emlonyeni wengonyama; ndisindise kulo mngcipheko ndikuwo. 
Psalms22:22 Ndowabalisela amawethu ngezint' ozenzileyo, ndikubonge ebandleni, ndithi:" 
Psalms22:23 “Mbongen' uNdikhoyo, nina bamhlonelayo; mdumiseni nonke, nina bonyana bakaYakobi; mhloneleni nonke, nina nzala kaSirayeli!" 
Psalms22:24 Kaloku akazideli engazicekisi iintsizi zehlwempu; uyaziva izicelo zalo, angalifulatheli.”" 
Psalms22:25 Ndiya kukubonga esidlangalaleni, ngenxa yezinto ondenzele zona; ndowafezekisa amadinga endawenzayo, phambi kwebandla lâbo bakuthobelayo." 
Psalms22:26 Amahlwempu aya kutya ahluthe mpu; bombonga uNdikhoyo abo bamfunayo. Banga banganempumelelo engapheliyo. 
Psalms22:27 Zonke izizwe zomkhumbula uNdikhoyo, zibuyele kuye ehlabathini liphela, ziqubude kuye zonke iintlanga." 
Psalms22:28 Kaloku nguNdikhoyo ukumkani; nguye umlawuli weentlanga zonke. 
Psalms22:29 Ewe, zonk' izinhanha ziya kudlelana, zimvume yena; nditsho yonk' intw' engumntu iya kumnqul' uNdikhoyo." 
Psalms22:30 Izizukulwana ziya kumkhonza, ooyise babalisele abazukulwana ngoNdikhoyo." 
Psalms22:31 Ewe, nâbo bangekazalwa boxelelwa ukuba uNdikhoyo wabasindisa abantu bakhe." 
Psalms23:1 *InguNdikhoyo nje ondalusayo, ndingaswela ntoni na?" 
Psalms23:2 Nguye ondikhaphelela kumadlelo aluhlaza, andikhokelele kwimilambo empompozayo," 
Psalms23:3 nditsho ndihlaziyeke emphefumlweni. Undithundezela kwezona ndlela zilungileyo, ukuze lidunyiswe igama lakhe." 
Psalms23:4 Ngoko ke, nokuba ndihamba kwiingxondorha ezimnyama, andinadyudyu. Kaloku ungakum, wena Ndikhoyo; isagweba sakho nebhunguza lakho lixhadi lam." 
Psalms23:5 Undamkela okondwendwe oluxabisekileyo, uqukeze ude undihlinzeke ngesidlo, iintshaba zam zibukele. Ngenene, iyaphuphuma indebe yam." 
Psalms23:6 Ngoko ke ndiya kulandelwa kokulungileyo nabububele, umzi wakho ube likhaya lam yonke imihla yobomi bam." 
Psalms24:1 *LelikaNdikhoyo ihlabathi liphela, nako konk' okukulo; ndixel' ilizwe elimiweyo kunye nabemi balo." 
Psalms24:2 Walisekela phezu kweelwandle; walithi zinzi phezu kwayo imilambo. 
Psalms24:3 Ngubani onganyukayo aye entabeni kaNdikhoyo; ingubani oya kuthi gcobho endlwini yakhe? 
Psalms24:4 Ngulow' uzandla zimsulwa, untliziyo inyulu, lowo ungazinquliyo izintw' ezingento, low' ungafungiyo exoka." 
Psalms24:5 Uya kumthamsanqela uNdikhoyo, kuye kube chosi, kube hele, kuba nguThixo umkhululi wakhe." 
Psalms24:6 Sinjalo ke isizukulwana sabo bamfunayo, abo bafuna ukubona uThixo kaYakobi." 
Psalms24:7 Vulekani, masango; vulekani, minyango yakudala, angene uKumkani iNgangalala!" 
Psalms24:8 Ngubani loo Ngangalala yoKumkani? NguNdikhoyo igorha elinamandla onke; nguNdikhoyo onamandla onk' edabini! 
Psalms24:9 Vulekani, masango; vulekani, minyango yakudala, angene uKumkani iNgangalala!" 
Psalms24:10 Ngubani loo Ngangalala yoKumkani? NguNdikhoyo onamandla onke; nguye uKumkani, nguye iNgangalala." 
Psalms25:1 Ndiwuphakamisela kuwe, *Ndikhoyo, umphefumlo wam;" 
Psalms25:2 Thixo wam, ndithembele kuwe. Mandingakhe ndidane konke; mazingakhe zindivuyelele konk' iintshaba zam." 
Psalms25:3 Ewe, mabangadani bonk' abathembele kuwe; mayibe ngâbo banxaxhayo amabadane." 
Psalms25:4 Ndibonise indlela yakho, Ndikhoyo; ndifundise iindlela zakho." 
Psalms25:5 Ndikhokelele enyanisweni yakho, undifundise. Kaloku nguwe, Thixo, umkhululi wam; ndihleli ndikulindele imini yonke." 
Psalms25:6 Khumbula, Ndikhoyo, inceba yakho, nothando lwakho obukade unalo kwakudala." 
Psalms25:7 Ungazikhumbuli izono zobutsha bam, nokungathobeli kwam umthetho wakho; kanye ndazelelele ngothando olungagungqiyo, ngenxa yobubele bakho, Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms25:8 UNdikhoyo unobubele, ulungile. Yiyo loo nto abafundisayo indlela yakhe aboni." 
Psalms25:9 Abathobekileyo ubakhokelela kokulungileyo, abafundise indlela yakhe abalulamileyo." 
Psalms25:10 Zonk' iindlela zikaNdikhoyo zezothando nenyaniso kwabo bathobela umnqophiso nemithetho yakhe. 
Psalms25:11 Ngenxa yegama lakho, Ndikhoyo, ndixolele ityala lam nakuba lilikhulu kangaka." 
Psalms25:12 UNdikhoyo uya kumbonisa indlela umntu omoyikayo. 
Psalms25:13 Uya kuhlala enenkqubela nabantwana bakhe ube lilifa labo umhlaba. 
Psalms25:14 Ungumhlobo kwabo bamhlonelayo uNdikhoyo, uyabaqondisa umnqophiso wakhe." 
Psalms25:15 Ndihleli ndilindele uncedo lukaNdikhoyo, kuba uyawusombulula umgib' ezinyaweni zam." 
Psalms25:16 Buyela kum, Ndikhoyo, undenzele inceba; kaloku ndilikheswa, ndixhwalekile." 
Psalms25:17 Ndikhulule kwintlungu endikuyo, undikhuphe ezimbandezelweni." 
Psalms25:18 Qwalasela ubunzima nosizi endikulo, undixolele zonk' izono zam." 
Psalms25:19 Zigqale ubuninzi bazo iintshaba zam, nendlela ebuhlungu ezindiphethe ngayo ngolunya." 
Psalms25:20 Bukhusele ubomi bam, undihlangule; mandingadaniswa kaloku, kuba ndithembele ngawe." 
Psalms25:21 Mandihlale ndingasoleki ndililungisa, kuba kaloku ithemba lam likuwe." 
Psalms25:22 Bakhulule, Thixo, abantu bakho amaSirayeli kuzo zonke iimbandezelo zabo." 
Psalms26:1 Ndigwebele, *Ndikhoyo; kaloku azisoleki iindlela zam, nethemba lam kuwe aligungqi." 
Psalms26:2 Ndivavanye, undicikide, Ndikhoyo; yigocagoce intliziyo yam ngokunjalo neengcinga zam." 
Psalms26:3 Ndisoloko ndikhokelwa zizibele zothando lwakho; ndihamba njalo nasenyanisweni yakho. 
Psalms26:4 Andinanto yakwenza namamenemene, ndaye ndingenabudlelwana nabakhohlisi." 
Psalms26:5 Ndiyithiyile imbutho yabantw' abagwenxa, ndaye ndingadlelani nabantw' abangcolileyo." 
Psalms26:6 Ndazihlamba kubo ezam izandla, ndenjenjeya ukuy' esibingelelweni sakho, Ndikhoyo," 
Psalms26:7 ndivuma ingoma yombongo, ndibalisa ngazo zonk' izenzo zakhw' ezingummangaliso." 
Psalms26:8 Ndiyakuthanda ukuhlala endlwini yakho, Ndikhoyo, apho sikhoyo isidima nesithozela sakho." 
Psalms26:9 Ungandikhukhulisi kunye naboni, ungandidibi nezigwinta," 
Psalms26:10 abantw' abazandla zipheth' ukungcola, abasoloko begush' ukunyoba." 
Psalms26:11 Ke mna ndohlala ndingasoleki; ndihlangule undenzel' inceba. 
Psalms26:12 Iinyawo zam zithe zinzi emhlabeni; ndibonga uNdikhoyo ebandleni. 
Psalms27:1 *InguNdikhoyo nje ondikhanyiselayo, inguye nje ondisindisayo, ndingoyika ntoni? InguNdikhoyo nje inqaba yam, ndingoyika bani?" 
Psalms27:2 Xa bendidlavula abantw' abakhohlakeleyo, iintshaba zam nabandileqayo, kokhubeka kwabona, bawe." 
Psalms27:3 Nokuba ndingade ndingqongwe ngumkhosi, andiyi kuba naluvalo konke. Nokuba ndirhawulwe yimfazwe, ndiya kuthembela ngoNdikhoyo." 
Psalms27:4 Ndinqwenela into enye kuphela kuNdikhoyo, ndaye ndifuna yona kanye: le yokuba ze ndihlale kwaNdikhoyo yonke imihla yobomi bam, ndiqwalasele ubuhle bakhe, ndimfune endlwini yakhe." 
Psalms27:5 Kaloku wondikhusela enqabeni yakhe ngexesha lobubi, andifihle engontsini endlwini yakhe, ndithi ngcu phezulu eliweni." 
Psalms27:6 Ngoko ke ndiya kuzikrobela iintshaba ezindingqongileyo, ndinikele uNdikhoyo idini endlwini yakhe, ndinemivuyo ndicula, ndivumela uNdikhoyo." 
Psalms27:7 Ndive, Ndikhoyo, xa ndizibika kuwe; yiba nenceba kum, undiphulaphule." 
Psalms27:8 Kweli wena uthi: “Funani ubuso bam,” intliziyo yam yathi: “Ewe, ndiyafuna ukukubona, Ndikhoyo.”" 
Psalms27:9 Mus' ukuzifihla kum, Ndikhoyo, ungasilahli ngomsindo isicaka sakho. Wena mncedi wam, mus' ukundilahla; uzungandishiyi, Thixo wam, Mkhululi wam." 
Psalms27:10 Xa ndilahlwe ngubawo noma, wondichola yena uNdikhoyo." 
Psalms27:11 Ndifundise indlela yakho, Ndikhoyo, undikhokele endleleni elungileyo, kuba zininzi iintshaba zam." 
Psalms27:12 Uzungandiyekeli kwabandivukelayo, kuba andivukele amangqina obuxoki, afutha ukundenzakalisa." 
Psalms27:13 Ngenene ndobuxhamla kambe ububele bukaNdikhoyo lo gama ndisadla amazimba. 
Psalms27:14 Thembela kuNdikhoyo; yomelela, ube nesibindi! Ewe, thembela kuNdikhoyo wena!" 
Psalms28:1 Ndizibika kuwe, *Ndikhoyo, xhadi lam; musa ukuzenza isithulu, hleze ndifane nabeyel' emhadini xa uthe cwaka." 
Psalms28:2 Live ilizwi lam xa ndizibika, xa izandla zam ndiziphakamisela kuwe ebhotwe." 
Psalms28:3 Uzungandisingeli phantsi kunye nabantw' abagwenxa, abantw' abenza okungcolileyo, abathetha kamnandi nabamelwane, kanti bagush' ububi." 
Psalms28:4 Babuyekeze ngokwemisebenzi yabo, ubohlwaye ngenxa yenkohlakalo yabo. Bavuze ngokwezintw' abazenzayo, bafumane loo nto ibafaneleyo." 
Psalms28:5 Ngenxa yokuba bengayinanzi imisebenzi kaNdikhoyo, kwakunye nezintw' azenzileyo, yena wobabhubhisa baphele kuthi tu, bangaze babuye bavuke." 
Psalms28:6 Makabongwe uNdikhoyo, kuba ukuvile ukutarhuzisa kwam." 
Psalms28:7 NguNdikhoyo amandla am nekhaka lam; ndithembele ngaye ngomxhelo wam wonke. Ndoncedakala nditsho ndibe nemincili, ndimbonge ngengoma." 
Psalms28:8 NguNdikhoyo obomelezayo abantu bakhe; nguye omkhuselayo nomsindisayo umthanjiswa wakhe. 
Psalms28:9 Basindise abantu bakho, Ndikhoyo; lithamsanqelise ilifa lakho. Baluse, ubathwale ngoku kude kube nini-nini." 
Psalms29:1 Mbongen' *uNdikhoyo, nina bemi baphezulu; mnikeni isihomo nesithozela namandla." 
Psalms29:2 Lenzelen' imbeko igama lakhe, ninqule ningcangcazela phambi kwakhe." 
Psalms29:3 Sivakal' emanzini elwandl' isandi selizwi lakhe; utsho kuzongome uThixo onesithozela. Kaloku nguNdikhoyo ogragramis' iilwandle. 
Psalms29:4 Lindongondong' ilizwi lakhe, ngugquma-barhwaqele ngenkqu." 
Psalms29:5 Liwis' imisedare ilizwi likaNdikhoyo; ndixel' imisedare yaseLibhanon. 
Psalms29:6 Lidlobis' iLibhanon ixel' inkonyane; litsho iSiriyon ixel' ithole lenyathi. 
Psalms29:7 Ndith' ilizwi likaNdikhoyo litshawuz' amadangatye; 
Psalms29:8 ndith' ilizwi likaNdikhoyo linyakamis' intlango, ewe, nditsho intlango yaseKadeshe." 
Psalms29:9 Litsho kungcangcazele amanxala; litsho kuvuthuluk' amahlathi. Batsho bathi bonk' abasendlwini yakhe: “Huntshuu!” 
Psalms29:10 NguNdikhoyo olawula oozikhukula; kaloku nguye ukumkani, koda kube nini-nini." 
Psalms29:11 Wanga angabaph' amandl' abantu bakhe; wanga angabathamsanqela abaph' inzolo. 
Psalms30:1 Ndokudumisa, Ndikhoyo, kuba undisindisile, akwavuma ukuba zindivuyelel' iintshaba zam." 
Psalms30:2 Ndikhoyo, Thixo wam, ndibhenela kuwe; kuba wena undihlangule ekufeni." 
Psalms30:3 Wandikhupha kwelabafileyo wena, Ndikhoyo; wandikhetha kwabo behlela emhadini." 
Psalms30:4 Mbongen' uNdikhoyo, nina milowo yakwakhe, nilibonge igama lakhe elingcwele." 
Psalms30:5 Kaloku yeyomzuzwana ingqumbo yakhe; ukanti buhlala buhlel' ububele bakhe. Ewe, zibakho zon' iinzingo ebusuku, kodwa kusasa kuba yimincili yodwa." 
Psalms30:6 Xa izinto zazindilungele, ndandidla ngokuthi: “Andisoze ndoyisakale.”" 
Psalms30:7 Ewe, ndandithe zinzi njengentaba ngenxa yobubele bakho, Ndikhoyo. Suka wena wasithela; ndaza mna ndakhathazeka." 
Psalms30:8 Kodwa ndithembele kuwe, Ndikhoyo; ndiyazithoba kuwe, Nkosi yam." 
Psalms30:9 Kukho nzuzoni na xa ndiye kwantshabalala? Lunganako na ukukudumisa uthuli? Khona lungabalisa na ngokunyaniseka kwakho? 
Psalms30:10 Ndive, Ndikhoyo, undenzele inceba; Ndikhoyo, yiba ngumncedi wam." 
Psalms30:11 Wabuguqula baluvuyo ubunzima bam; wandikhulul' ezokuzila, wandambathis' ezolonwabo." 
Psalms30:12 Mandikubonge ndingayeki, Thixo wam; ewe, ndikubonge kude kube ngunaphakade, Ndikhoyo!" 
Psalms31:1 *Ndikhoyo, ndizifihla kuwe, mandingadani konke! Wena lungisa, uzundihlangule!" 
Psalms31:2 Ndibekele iindlebe, ukhawulez' undihlangule. Yiba yinqaba endizimela kuyo, nomkhuseli wam ondisindisayo." 
Psalms31:3 Ewe, nguwe inqaba yam nekhusi lam; ndikhokele, undithundeze, lidunyiswe igama lakho." 
Psalms31:4 Ndikhulule kwisabatha ebendigcayiselwe ngaso, kuba ungamandla am wena." 
Psalms31:5 Ndiwunikela ezandleni zakho umoya wam; kaloku undihlangule wena, Ndikhoyo, Thixo othembekileyo." 
Psalms31:6 Ndibathiyile abo banqula izintw' ezingento; mna ndikholosa ngawe, Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms31:7 Ndovuya, ndigcobe ngenxa yezibele zothando lwakho, kuba uyibonile inkxwaleko yam, wakugqala nokungcungcutheka kwam." 
Psalms31:8 Akundiyekelanga kwingcinezelo yeentshaba; koko usuke wandinika inkululeko. 
Psalms31:9 Ndenzele inceba, Ndikhoyo, ndibandezelekile. Atsho adumba kukulila amehlo am, nam ndiphelile kukudinwa." 
Psalms31:10 Ziyandaluphaza iinkxwaleko zam, nemihla yam iphelela ekungcungcuthekeni. Ndiphelelwe ngamandla ngenxa yeentlupheko, namathambo am selegugile." 
Psalms31:11 Ndiyintlekisa kwiintshaba zam, isigculelo kubamelwane bam. Abandaziyo bayandoyika, bandibaleke, xa badibana nam esitalatweni." 
Psalms31:12 Sele ndalityalwa mpela; ndinjengomfi ongasakhunjulwayo; sendalahlwa kwesinomhlwa. 
Psalms31:13 Ewe, ndiyivile intlebendwane yabanye; kuthe saa luloyiko macal' onke, lo gama bandenzela amayelenqe, beceba ukundibulala." 
Psalms31:14 Kodwa ithemba lam likuwe, Ndikhoyo; ewe, unguThixo wam wena." 
Psalms31:15 Imihla yam isesandleni sakho; ndihlangule ezintshabeni zam nakwabanditshutshisayo. 
Psalms31:16 Ndisisicaka sakho, Ndikhoyo, ndikhangele ngobubele; ndihlangule ezintshabeni zam ngenxa yezibele zakho." 
Psalms31:17 Mandingadani konke, Ndikhoyo, xa ndizibika kuwe; mabadane abantw' abagwenxa, banyoshoze baye kufa." 
Psalms31:18 Watsho athi cwaka amaxoki, wona anyelisa amalungisa ngeentetho zolunya nendelelo." 
Psalms31:19 Hayi ubuhle bezinto ozigcinele abo bakuhlonelayo, Ndikhoyo; zintle kambe izinto ozenzela abo bakholose ngawe!" 
Psalms31:20 Uyabakhusela ngobukho bakho kumayelenqe abantu, ubagushe phantsi kwephiko lakho, bangagxijwa ziintshaba." 
Psalms31:21 Makabongwe uNdikhoyo, kuba undenzele ububele obungummangaliso, xa ndandixiniwe, ndihlaselwa." 
Psalms31:22 Ukothuka kwam ndathi ndilahlelwe kude nawe, kodwa wandiva ndakuzibika kuwe." 
Psalms31:23 Mthandeni uNdikhoyo, nonke nina milowo yakwakhe, kuba uyabalondoloza abathembekileyo, abohlwaye abanekratshi." 
Psalms31:24 Qinani nibe nesibindi, nonke nina nithembele ngoNdikhoyo." 
Psalms32:1 Hay' uyolo lwabo baluxolelweyo ukreqo lwabo nguThixo, abo bazono zabo zingcwatyiweyo." 
Psalms32:2 Ewe, unoyolo lowo athe *uNdikhoyo akabubalela kuye ubugwenxa bakhe, umnt' ongenayo konke inkohliso." 
Psalms32:3 Ndithi ndakungasivumi isono sam, amandla atsho andiphelele, ngenxa yesingqala endiba naso imini yonke." 
Psalms32:4 Isandla sakho sindicinezele ubusuku nemini, ndaphelelwa ngamandla, ngathi ndigqatswe lilanga lehlobo." 
Psalms32:5 Ndithe ke ndakusivuma kuwe isono sam, ndabuxela ubugwenxa bam, ndisithi: “Ndisixela kuwe, Ndikhoyo, isono sam;” wandixolela wena ityala lam." 
Psalms32:6 Yiyo ke loo nto bazibikayo xa kunzima abo banyanisekileyo, kuba ukufika komsinga abayi kugutyungelwa." 
Psalms32:7 Wena uyinqaba endizifihla kuyo; uyandikhusela xa ndisebunzimeni. Undirhangqe ngosindiso lwakho; ngoko ke ndimemelela ndinemincili. 
Psalms32:8 Ndokwazisa indlela omawuhambe ngayo, utsho uNdikhoyo, ndikufundise, ndikujonge." 
Psalms32:9 Mus' ukuba sisititsi, uxel' ihashe nembongolo, izintw' ezilawulwa ngomkhala ukuze zingadlokovi." 
Psalms32:10 Bajongene neentsizi ezininzi abantw' abagwenxa, kodwa yena othembele kuNdikhoyo uphahlwe zizibele zakhe." 
Psalms32:11 Vuyani, nina malungisa, nichwayite ngenxa kaNdikhoyo; nina bamthobelayo uNdikhoyo, chulumachani!" 
Psalms33:1 Mdumiseni *uNdikhoyo, nina malungisa! Ewe, afanele ukumdumisa uNdikhoyo amalungisa." 
Psalms33:2 Mbetheleni uhadi uNdikhoyo, nimenzele ingoma ngeehapu ezingcingo zilishumi." 
Psalms33:3 Mombeleleni ingoma entsha uNdikhoyo; mdlaleleni ngobuchule nimemelela. 
Psalms33:4 Kaloku ilizwi likaNdikhoyo linyanisekile, nemisebenzi yakhe yonke inyanisekile." 
Psalms33:5 UNdikhoyo uyakuthanda ukunyaniseka nokulunga; lizele ihlabathi zizibele zakhe. 
Psalms33:6 Wathetha nje ngelizwi, akho amazulu, wadala ilanga, inyanga, noozinkwenkwezi." 
Psalms33:7 Wawaqokelela amanzi olwandle ngathi uwatha eselweni, wazivalela iinzulu zolwandle ngathi kukoovimba." 
Psalms33:8 Malimbong' uNdikhoyo lonke ihlabathi, bamhlonele bonke abemi balo." 
Psalms33:9 Wathetha kaloku, laza ladalwa; wawisa umyalelo, kwatsho kwavel' indalo." 
Psalms33:10 Uyawaphuthisa uNdikhoyo amayelenqe ezizwe, awaphanzise amacebo eentlanga." 
Psalms33:11 Kodwa awakhe amacebo ohlala ehleli; zohlala zikho iingcinga zakhe kude kube nini-nini. 
Psalms33:12 Sinoyolo isizwe esiThixo unguNdikhoyo, eso asinyule sangabantu bakhe." 
Psalms33:13 Wondela phantsi uNdikhoyo esezulwini, ababone bonke oonyana babantu." 
Psalms33:14 Ubaqwalasele bonke abemi behlabathi, engqendeve kwibhotwe lakhe." 
Psalms33:15 Zidalwe nguye iintliziyo zabo; uyazazi zonke izinto abazenzayo. 
Psalms33:16 Asimkhosi mkhulu ohlangula ikumkani; asimandla agorha alisindisayo. 
Psalms33:17 Akuthenjelwa ngahashe edabini, kungemandla alo amsindisayo umntu." 
Psalms33:18 UNdikhoyo uyabanakekela abo bamhlonelayo nabo bathembe izibele zenceba yakhe," 
Psalms33:19 aze abahlangule ekufeni, abondle ngelixa lendlala." 
Psalms33:20 Thina sithembele kuNdikhoyo, kuba nguye umncedi nomkhuseli wethu." 
Psalms33:21 Ewe, siya kuchulumacha ngenxa kaNdikhoyo, kuba sithembele kwigama lakhe elidumileyo." 
Psalms33:22 Ndikhoyo, senzele ububele nenceba, njengoko kaloku sithembele kuwe." 
Psalms34:1 Ndohlala ndimbonga *uNdikhoyo; andisayi kuyeka ukumdumisa. 
Psalms34:2 Ndoqhayisa ngezinto andenzele zona uNdikhoyo, batsho bavuye abo babandezelekileyo." 
Psalms34:3 Mbongeni uNdikhoyo, kunye nam; masilidumise kunye igama lakhe." 
Psalms34:4 Ndazibika kuNdikhoyo waza wandiva, wandikhulula kuko konke ukoyika kwam." 
Psalms34:5 Abacinezelweyo bathembela kuNdikhoyo, bagcobe; ewe, abasayi kuze badakumbe bona." 
Psalms34:6 Lwazibika udwayi, waluva uNdikhoyo, walukhupha kuzo zonke iinkxwaleko zalo." 
Psalms34:7 Bonke abahlonela uNdikhoyo isithunywa sakhe siyabakhusela, sibahlangule." 
Psalms34:8 Khanibuxhamle ububele bukaNdikhoyo; ngenene unoyolo umntu othembela ngoNdikhoyo! 
Psalms34:9 Mhloneleni uNdikhoyo, nina milowo yakwakhe, kuba abayi kuswela nto abo bamhlonelayo." 
Psalms34:10 Neengonyama ziyaswela zilambe, kodwa abo bamfunayo uNdikhoyo akukho nto intle bayiswelayo." 
Psalms34:11 Yizani, lusatshana; ndiphulaphuleni; ndonifundisa ukuhlonela uNdikhoyo." 
Psalms34:12 Lowo unga angadla ubomi, abe nenkqubela, lowo unga angafumana imihla emnandi," 
Psalms34:13 makazilumle ekuthetheni kakubi, ayeke ukuthetha ubuxoki;" 
Psalms34:14 makahlukane nobubi, enze okulungileyo; makaphuthume uxolo, ahlale kulo." 
Psalms34:15 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uwalusile amalungisa, uyayiva imithandazo yawo;" 
Psalms34:16 kodwa ubafulathele abenzi bobubi, abaphanzise bangabi sakhunjulwa emhlabeni." 
Psalms34:17 Uyaweva amalungisa akuzibika kuye, awakhulule kuzo zonke iinzima zawo." 
Psalms34:18 UNdikhoyo ukufuphi nâbo badakumbileyo, ebaphakamisa abo baphelelwe lithemba." 
Psalms34:19 Zininzi iingxaki ezivelela ilungisa, kodwa uyalikhulula kuzo zonke uNdikhoyo;" 
Psalms34:20 uwagcina onke amathambo alo, kungaphuki nalinye kuwo." 
Psalms34:21 Abantw' abagwenxa bobulawa ngobubi babo, bagwetywe abo balithiyayo ilungisa." 
Psalms34:22 UNdikhoyo wozihlangula izicaka zakhe; bonke abakholose ngaye abayi kugwetywa. 
Psalms35:1 *Ndikhoyo, ndilamlele kwabo bandivuyelelayo, undilwele kwabo balwa nam." 
Psalms35:2 Qubula ikhaka lakho nesikrweqe sakho, undincede undilamlele." 
Psalms35:3 Wurhole umkhonto nentshuntshe yakho, ubavalele indlela abo bandileqayo, uthi kum: “Ndim umhlanguli wakho.”" 
Psalms35:4 Mabahlazeke, badane abandizungulayo; mabajike bedidekile abo bandenzela amayelenqe." 
Psalms35:5 Mababe njengenkunkuma ephetshethwa ngumoya, sibaqweqwedise isithunywa sikaNdikhoyo." 
Psalms35:6 Mayingacaci indlela yabo, mayibe mtyibilizi; masibasukele isithunywa sikaNdikhoyo." 
Psalms35:7 Kaloku bebendigcayisele ndingenzanga nto, befun' ukunditshonisa emhadini kungekho sizathu." 
Psalms35:8 Mabatshabalale ngequbuliso bengekaqondi, barhintyelwe nguloo mgibe bebendigcayisele ngawo, beyele kuwo, batshabalale." 
Psalms35:9 Ndovuya ke, ndichulumache, kuba uNdikhoyo undihlangule." 
Psalms35:10 Ndothi ngomxhelo wonke: “Akakho onjengawe, Ndikhoyo.” Wena uhlangula iindwayi kwabanamandla kunazo, ukhusele indwayinge kubacinezeli." 
Psalms35:11 Kuvele amangqina athetha ulwimi ngam, andinkqangisa ngezinto endingazaziyo;" 
Psalms35:12 andibuyekeza ubuhle ngobubi, ndatsho ndaphelelwa lithemba." 
Psalms35:13 Kodwa mna, okuya babegula, ndambatha ezirhwexayo, ndazicinezela nangokuzila ukutya, ndithandaza ngentobeko." 
Psalms35:14 Ndangathi ndithandazela umhlobo wam nomntakwethu; ndathokombisa intloko ngokungathi ndizilela umama. 
Psalms35:15 Ndithe ke ndakuba sengxakini, baqokelelana bandihleba, ndanyeliswa nazizinto endingazaziyo." 
Psalms35:16 Bandenza intlekisa, bandingcungcuthekisa, bendijamela ngentiyokazi enkulu." 
Psalms35:17 Koda kube nini na kodwa ubukele, Ndikhoyo? Nceda ndihlangule kwabandiqwengayo; busindise ubomi bam kwezi ngonyama." 
Psalms35:18 Ndokubonga phakathi kwebandla, ndikuncome esidlangalaleni." 
Psalms35:19 Mazingandivuyeleli ngobuxoki iintshaba zam, bangandisinekeli abo bandithiya ndingenatyala." 
Psalms35:20 Bona abathethi ngemibandela yoxolo, koko bayila ubuxoki ngabathand' uxolo." 
Psalms35:21 Bandivuyelela besithi: “Heke! Sikubhaqile!” 
Psalms35:22 Ndikhoyo, nguwe ingqina lam, mus' ukuthi tu! Nkosi yam, mus' ukuchasela!" 
Psalms35:23 Lamla, Nkosi, ndiphendulele; Thixo wam, ndithethelele!" 
Psalms35:24 Ndikhoyo, Thixo olilungisa, ndigwebele; mazingandinyevuleli iintshaba zam." 
Psalms35:25 Mazingandigcolotheli zithi: “Nantso ke! Simgqibile ngoku!” 
Psalms35:26 Mabadane badideke abavuyiswa yinkxwaleko yam; mabadane baphoxeke abazikhukhumalisayo. 
Psalms35:27 Makube yimincili kwabo bafuna ndigwetyelwe; mabamemelele bathi: “Makabongwe uNdikhoyo, yena ofuna impumelelo yesicaka sakhe.”" 
Psalms35:28 Ke mna ndovakalisa ukulunga kwakho, ndikubonge imini yonke." 
Psalms36:1 Isono esendele entliziyweni siyamngxolela umnt' ogwenxa, asuke angamoyiki uThixo." 
Psalms36:2 Simthi lwale ngokuzikhohlisa angaliboni isikizi lobubi baso. 
Psalms36:3 Intetho yakhe ayilunganga; izele yinkohliso. Selephelelwe nakukwazi ukwenza okulungileyo. 
Psalms36:4 Xa esemandlalweni ucinga amacebo aphuthileyo, azimisele ukuhamba ngendlela egwenxa, angayityesheli inkohlakalo." 
Psalms36:5 Kodwa zona izibele zakho, Ndikhoyo, ziye kuthi gaa ngamazulu, nentembeko yakho yaya kuthi ngqu ngamafu." 
Psalms36:6 Ukulunga kwakho akugungqi, kunjengentaba; zinzulu njengolwandle zona izigqibo zakho. Uyabanakekela abantu nezilo, wena Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms36:7 Hayi izibele zakho, Thixo, ebantwini! Oonyana babantu bazimela phantsi kwephiko lakho." 
Psalms36:8 Baxhamla intlutha yendlu yakho; ubaseze kumlambo wokulunga kwakho. 
Psalms36:9 Wena ulithende lobomi; ngokhanyiso lwakho sibona ukukhanya. 
Psalms36:10 Mazinganqamki izibele zakho kubo bonke abo bakwaziyo, uwabonelele amalungisa." 
Psalms36:11 Mandinganyhashwa ngeenyawo ngabanolunya, ndingantlithwa zizandla zabagwenxa." 
Psalms36:12 Bawile daxa abantw' abagwenxa; bakhahlelwe phantsi, abavuka." 
Psalms37:1 Mus' ukuziduba ngamatshijolo wena, ungabamoneli abenzi bobubi." 
Psalms37:2 Kwakamsinya baya kubuna njengengca, bavuthuluke njengamagqabi." 
Psalms37:3 Thembela *kuNdikhoyo wena, wenze okulungileyo; uya kuba sisima-mhlaba, ube nekamva." 
Psalms37:4 Zonwabise ngokululamela uNdikhoyo; wokunika umnqweno wentliziyo yakho. 
Psalms37:5 Zilahlele kuNdikhoyo, ukholose ngaye; yena ke wokwenzelelela." 
Psalms37:6 Wobutyhila bukhanye njengelanga ubulungisa bakho, kucace mhlophe ukulunga kwakho." 
Psalms37:7 Zola phambi koNdikhoyo, ulindele kuye, ungazidubi ngabantu abaphumelela ngamaqhinga." 
Psalms37:8 Zilumle emsindweni, uyilahle ingqumbo, ungazidub' umphefumlo, hleze unxunguphale." 
Psalms37:9 Kaloku othi shwaka amatshijolo, kodwa boba zizima-mhlaba abathembele kuNdikhoyo." 
Psalms37:10 Ngumzuzwana nje athi shwak' amatshijolo; uthi uwakhangela ungawaboni. 
Psalms37:11 Kodwa bona abathobekileyo bowuma umhlaba, baxhamle intlutha noxolo." 
Psalms37:12 Amatshijolo awenzela amayelenqe amalungisa, awajamele ngentiyokazi enkulu." 
Psalms37:13 Kodwa uNdikhoyo usuka acubhuke yintsini, kuba uyazi yena ukuba imihla yamatshijolo selisongekile." 
Psalms37:14 Arhola amakrele, ajolise iintolo zawo amatshijolo, efun' ukuwisa iintsizana namahlwempu, abulale amalungisa." 
Psalms37:15 Otyakatywa kwangelawo ikrele, zaphulwe nezo ntolo zawo." 
Psalms37:16 Obo buncinanana linabo ilungisa, bungcono kunentaphane ezinayo izikrelemnqa," 
Psalms37:17 kuba uya kuzaphul' iimpondo uNdikhoyo izikrelemnqa, awenzelelele wona amalungisa." 
Psalms37:18 UNdikhoyo uyawabonelela amalungisa, awenze awume umhlaba ngalo lonk' ixesha." 
Psalms37:19 Akayi kuntshubaza ngamaxesh' endlala; ohlutha naxa ikati selilel' eziko. 
Psalms37:20 Ke zona iintshaba zikaNdikhoyo zotshabalala, zibhange zixel' ingca etshayo edlelweni." 
Psalms37:21 Izikrelemnqa ziboleka zingabuyisi, ke lona ilungisa lipha ngesisa." 
Psalms37:22 Boba zizima-mhlaba abo abathamsanqelayo uNdikhoyo, bagxothwe abo abaqalekisayo." 
Psalms37:23 NguNdikhoyo okhokelela umntu kwindlela amakahambe ngayo; nguye omenza akholeke kuye. 
Psalms37:24 Nokuba uwile, uyavuka, kuba nguNdikhoyo omthundezayo." 
Psalms37:25 Ndiyaluphala ngoku, ukanti andizange ndilibone ilungisa lintshubaza, nabantwana balo belamba." 
Psalms37:26 Lisoloko libolekisa, lisipha ngesisa, nenzala yalo iyathamsanqelwa." 
Psalms37:27 Yahlukana nobubi, wenze okulungileyo; uya kwalulelwa imihla yakho ebomini." 
Psalms37:28 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uyakuthanda okulungileyo; akayi kubafulathela abantu bakhe. Wasoloko ebakhusela uNdikhoyo, kodwa yona inzala yamatshijolo iyanqunyulwa." 
Psalms37:29 Amalungisa aya kuba zizima-mhlaba, ahlale ngoxolo kude kube nini." 
Psalms37:30 Ilungisa lithetha amazwi obulumko; into eliyithethayo isoloko ilungile. 
Psalms37:31 Lisoloko liwubambile umthetho kaThixo; alisoze licebuke kuwo nanini na. 
Psalms37:32 Itshijolo lisoloko lizungula ukubulala amalungisa," 
Psalms37:33 kodwa uNdikhoyo akayi kuliyekela kumatshijolo ilungisa, engayi kuliyekela lohlwaywe enkundleni yamatyala." 
Psalms37:34 Thembela kuNdikhoyo, uthobele imithetho yakhe; wokunika umhlaba uwume, uwabone amatshijolo etshabalala." 
Psalms37:35 Ndalibona lilawula ngegqudu itshijolo, lilugxibha ngathi ngumkhoba wamahlathi." 
Psalms37:36 Ndaphinda ndadlula apho, ndabona lingasekho; ndalikhangela, andalifumana konke." 
Psalms37:37 Kugqale ukulunga nobumsulwa, kuba kumzisela uxolo umntu ekugqibeleni;" 
Psalms37:38 kodwa bona aboni baya kutshatyalaliswa, nenzala yabo iphanziswe kuphele." 
Psalms37:39 NguNdikhoyo umhlanguli wamalungisa; ulikhaka lawo ngexesha lobunzima. 
Psalms37:40 Nguye owancedayo, awahlangule, awasindise kumatshijolo, kuba akholose ngaye amalungisa." 
Psalms38:1 *Ndikhoyo, ungandingxolisi ngomsindo, ungandohlwayi ngengqumbo." 
Psalms38:2 Zindityakatyile iintolo zakho, nesandla sakho sindicinezele kabuhlungu." 
Psalms38:3 Nditsho ndayingxwelerha ngenxa yomsindo wakho; ndiyafa ziintlungu ngenxa yezono zam. 
Psalms38:4 Ndintyumpa-ntyumpeka ezonweni; zindisinda oku komthwal' onzima. 
Psalms38:5 Zitsho zabhidla izilonda zam, kuthi phuu ngenxa yobudenge bam." 
Psalms38:6 Ndibandezelekile, ndiphelile, kangangokude ndizile imini yonke." 
Psalms38:7 Ndiyapena-pena ziintlungu; andinampilo konke. 
Psalms38:8 Ndoyisakele kwaphela; ndiyagcuma ziintlungu nalixhala. 
Psalms38:9 Nkosi yam, uyawazi umnqweno wam, uyaziva zonke iincwina zam." 
Psalms38:10 Ndinovalo, ndiphelelwe ngamandla, namehlo am selebona kaluzizi." 
Psalms38:11 Ke zona izihlobo nabamelwana abasondeli kum, nkqu nentsapho yam le icezela phaya." 
Psalms38:12 Bayandithiyela abafuna ukundibulala; bayandoyikisa abazungula ukundenzakalisa; bayandibhunga imini yonke. 
Psalms38:13 Kodwa mna ndaba njengesithulu, andeva; ndanjengesimumu, andawuvula tu umlomo." 
Psalms38:14 Ewe, ndinjengomntu ongaphenduliyo, kuba engeva." 
Psalms38:15 Ndikhoyo, ndithembele ngawe; nguwe, Nkosi, Thixo wam, oya kundiphendulela." 
Psalms38:16 Ndithandazela nje ukuba ungabayeki bandivuyelele abo bahlekayo xa ndiwayo. 
Psalms38:17 Ndingawa nanini na; kaloku iintlungu zindiphethe. 
Psalms38:18 Sendizivuma izono zam; ndiyazithiya izigqitho zam. 
Psalms38:19 Banamandla abo baziintshaba zam, nâbo bandithiya kungekho sizathu." 
Psalms38:20 Ubuhle bandibuyisela ngobubi, naxa mna ndizama ukwenza okulungileyo." 
Psalms38:21 Zungandifulatheli, Ndikhoyo; Thixo wam, mus' ukuchasela kum." 
Psalms38:22 Khawuleza undincede, Nkosi, Msindisi wam!" 
Psalms39:1 Ndathi: “Ndiya kuzilumkela iindlela zam, ndingoni ngokuthetha, ndilubambe ulwimi lwam xa ndiphakathi kwamatshijolo.”" 
Psalms39:2 Ndathi cwaka, andathetha nto. Ukuthula kwam akuncedanga nto, kodwa noko yona inkxwaleko yathath' unyawo." 
Psalms39:3 Ndavalwa luvalo ndisacamanga, ndavukwa ngumva-ndedwa, ndavakala ndibuza ndisithi:" 
Psalms39:4 “*Ndikhoyo, ndazise isiphelo sobomi bam nenani lemihla yokuphila kwam. Ewe, ndazise ubufutshane bobomi bam." 
Psalms39:5 Kaloku imihla yam uyicuthe kakhulu; àyinto konke kuwe imihla yobomi bam; umntu ufana nomphunga nje kuwe. 
Psalms39:6 Uhla enyuke njengesithunzi silandelelana nomntu; ubila esoma nje ngenxa yelize; uqweba indyebo engazi nokuba yoba yekabani na. 
Psalms39:7 “Xa kunjalo ke, Nkosi, mna ndikholose ngantoni? Elam ithemba likuwe." 
Psalms39:8 Ndikhulule kuzo zonke izono zam, ndingade ndihlekwe nazizidenge." 
Psalms39:9 Ndiya kuthi cwaka, ndingathethi, kuba nguwe ondifake kule meko." 
Psalms39:10 Mus' ukuba sandohlwaya; mus' ukundinkula ndide ndenzakale. 
Psalms39:11 Ngokumohlwaya umntu, umbonisa isono. Uyidlavula njengenundu loo nto ayithandayo. Ewe, kambe, umntu ufana nomphunga nje kuwe." 
Psalms39:12 “Ndikhoyo, wubazel' iindlebe umthandazo wam; ndive, ndakuzibika kuwe. Ungàthi cwaka xa ndikhala kuwe, kuba ndiselugcinweni lwakho, nam ndisisibhadu-bhadu njengookhokho." 
Psalms39:13 Khawundenzele umnyinyivana, khe ndiphefumle, ngoku ndingekemki kweli hlabathi.”" 
Psalms40:1 Ndakhala ndijonge *kuNdikhoyo, wada wandiva ndakuzibika kuye." 
Psalms40:2 Wandikhupha emhadini onengozi, nasemgxobhozweni, wandibeka endaweni eyomileyo, ndatsho ndee ngxishishi, ndema." 
Psalms40:3 Wandifundisa ingoma yombongo entsha, ingoma yokubonga uThixo wethu. Boyika abaninzi bakuyiqonda loo nto, balibeka kuNdikhoyo ithemba labo." 
Psalms40:4 Hay' uyolo lomntu othembele ngoNdikhoyo, ongadlelaniyo nabanekratshi, abo banqula izithixo." 
Psalms40:5 Mikhulu, Ndikhoyo, Thixo wam, imimangaliso osenzele yona. Kukwangako nokusazelelela kwakho; akakho onjengawe, Nkosi! Ngeba ndiyabalisa, koko ndiswel' imilomo eliwaka." 
Psalms40:6 Wena akuwananze nganto amadini neminikelo, akuwathandanga amadini atshiswayo nawesono, kambe ke undinike indlebe evayo." 
Psalms40:7 Kungoko ke ndathi mna: “Njengoko kubhaliwe ngam encwadini, ewe, ndim lo." 
Psalms40:8 Iyandivuyisa intando yakho, Thixo wam; umthetho wakho ndiwumilisele entliziyweni.”" 
Psalms40:9 Ndizixelile ebandleni iindaba zakho zosindiso; Ndikhoyo, uyazi ukuba andikuyeka ukuzibalisa." 
Psalms40:10 Andilufihlanga udaba losindiso lwakho; bendisoloko ndibalisa ngokunyaniseka noncedo lwakho; andilifihlelanga ibandla lakho izibele zakho nenyaniso yakho. 
Psalms40:11 Uzungandibandezeli inceba yakho, Ndikhoyo; ndilondoloze ngenceba nenyaniso." 
Psalms40:12 Zindivelela macal' onke iingxaki. Ndixakene nezono zam, azindiphi mtyhi konke. Nditsho ndatyhafa, kuba zininzi ngangeenwele zentloko yam." 
Psalms40:13 Khawuncede undihlangule, *Ndikhoyo! Phuthuma, Ndikhoyo, undincede!" 
Psalms40:14 Mabadane badideke abandizondayo; mabarhoxe baphoxeke abazungula ukundenzakalisa. 
Psalms40:15 Mabajike benyoshoza abo bathi tshotsho vityo. 
Psalms40:16 Abakulangazelelayo mabavuye bagcobe ngawe; abaluthandayo usindiso lwakho mabangaphezi ukuthi: “Huntshu – uyingangalala uNdikhoyo!” 
Psalms40:17 Ke mna ndilihlwepu, ndiludwayi; awu, Nkosi, khawundivelele! Umncedi nomhlanguli wam nguwe; sukuba saphozisa maseko, Thixo wam!" 
Psalms41:1 Hayi uyolo lomntu obonelela amahlwempu; womhlangula *uNdikhoyo xa yena esengxakini. 
Psalms41:2 Womkhusela amlondoloze ebomini. Womthamsanqela emhlabeni, angamyekeli kwiintshaba zakhe." 
Psalms41:3 UNdikhoyo womonga xa angaphilanga, ambuyisele empilweni." 
Psalms41:4 Ke mna ndathi: “Ndikhoyo, ndenzele inceba! Ndikonile; nceda ndiphilise!”" 
Psalms41:5 Zahlekisa ngam iintshaba zisithi: “Uya kufa nini kakade, angabi sakhunjulwa bani?”" 
Psalms41:6 Nabo baze kundivelela abakho ntweni, bezela nje ukuza kuva ulwimi, bahambe besasaza intlebendwane." 
Psalms41:7 Zihamba zindihleba iintshaba zam, zindinqwenelela okubi." 
Psalms41:8 Zihamba zisithi: “Ukufa mumosele! Akanakuba savuka kumandlalo wakhe!” 
Psalms41:9 Ewe, nesihlobo sam esisenyongweni ebendisithembile, nditsho kanye eso sabelana ngeqhekeza lesonka, naso sindivukele." 
Psalms41:10 Ndikhoyo, ndenzele inceba, ndiphakame, ndize ndiziphindezele kwiintshaba zam." 
Psalms41:11 Phofu ke ndiyazi ukuba undikhathalele, kuba azinakundivuyelela iintshaba zam." 
Psalms41:12 Uyandinceda kuba ndimsulwa; undibeka phambi kwakho ngalo lonke ixesha. 
Psalms41:13 Makabongwe uNdikhoyo, uThixo kaSirayeli, ngoku kude kube nini-nini! Amen, ewe, makube njalo!" 
Psalms42:1 Njengenxala elikhothekileyo kukunxanwa nam ndikwanjalo ukukulangazelela wena, Thixo." 
Psalms42:2 Ewe, intliziyo yam iyakulangazelela, Thixo, nditsho wena Thixo ophilayo. Yaz'ba koda kube nini na ukuze ndide ndibe nonxibelelwano nawe, Thixo?" 
Psalms42:3 Imini nobusuku ndiyinyhididi kukugixa. Ke zona izibhoxi zasoloko zindiphoxa zisithi: “Ude abe phi na lo Thixo wakho?” 
Psalms42:4 Kambe ke ndithi ndakukhumbula mandulo ijijitheke intliziyo yam. Kaloku fudula ndiwukhokela loo mngcelele uya endlwini kaThixo. Ewe, sasingumkhosi wochulumacho sonwabile, simemelela sidumisa." 
Psalms42:5 Hee! Ngani ukuba ndidakumbe kangaka? Ngani ukuba ndikhathazeke kangaka? Hayi bo! Mandikholose ngoThixo, khon' ukuze ndibuyele ekumdumiseni uMsindisi noThixo wam." 
Psalms42:6 Ke kaloku ndinomva-ndedwa, ngoku ke ndikhumbula wena, kobu bugxwayiba ndikubo, kwezi ntili zeJordan, ngakwiintaba zeHermon, neenduli zaseMiza." 
Psalms42:7 Iziziba ezinzongo-nzongo ziyamemezana ngokukrotsha kweengxangxasi zakho. Amaza eze ngendlu yawo, ngokunjalo kwaneempuphuma. Ewe, ziwugubungele umphefumlo wam." 
Psalms42:8 Kambe ke, ngeny' imini, *Ndikhoyo, luya kubalasela uthando lwakho. Ndiya kuphikelela ndikudumise ebusuku, ndithandaze kuThixo endixhomekeke kuye." 
Psalms42:9 Ndiyakhala kuwe, mqolomba wam, Thixo: “Ngani ukuba undilibale? Ngani ukuba ndihlale ndizibambe ngeenkophe ngenxa yokubandezelwa ziintshaba?”" 
Psalms42:10 Ewe, sendixushekile zizenyeliso zabo. Kaloku basoloko bendigcolodela besithi: “Ude abe phi na lo Thixo wakho?”" 
Psalms42:11 Hee! Ngani ukuba ndidakumbe kangaka? Ngani ukuba ndikhathazeke kangaka? Hayi bo! Mandikholose ngoThixo, khon' ukuze ndibuyele ekumdumiseni uMsindisi noThixo wam." 
Psalms43:1 Ngamana wandigwebela, Thixo. Ewe, mandiphume phambili ekumangalelweni ngabantu abakuchasileyo. Ndihlangule kubantu abanamaqhinga nobuqhokolo." 
Psalms43:2 Kaloku ùnguThixo endizimela ngaye. Ngani ke ukuba undilahle? Ngani ukuba ndihlale ndizibambe ngeenkophe ngenxa yokubandezelwa ziintshaba? 
Psalms43:3 Mandikhanyiselwe nguwe, ndikhokelwe yinyaniso yakho. Mazindise entabeni yakho engcwele, endlwini elikhaya lakho." 
Psalms43:4 Ke mna mandingene *esibingelelweni sakho, wena Thixo ongumonwabisi wam. Ndiya kubeth' intambula ndintyiloze ndidumise wena, Thixo – Thixo wam!" 
Psalms43:5 Hee! Ngani ukuba ndidakumbe kangaka? Ngani ukuba ndikhathazeke kangaka? Hayi bo! Mandikholose ngoThixo, khon' ukuze ndibuyele ekumdumiseni uMsindisi noThixo wam." 
Psalms44:1 Ewe kambe, sizivele ngezethu iindlebe, Thixo. Kaloku amanyange asibalisela ngezigigaba zakho zemihla yawo yamfamlibe." 
Psalms44:2 Wena wazigxotha iintlanga, waza bona abantu bakho wabamilisela elizweni lazo. Wazitshutshisa iintlanga waza bona abakho wabathi jize ngenkqubela." 
Psalms44:3 Hayi, eli lizwe abalizuzanga ngenxa yezikhali, bengaphumelelanga ngenxa yezigalo zabo; koko kwakungenxa yegunya nezigalo zakho nefuthe lobukho bakho, njengoko babethandeka kuwe." 
Psalms44:4 Wena unguKumkani noThixo wam. Lumiselwa nguwe uloyiso lwakwaYakobi. 
Psalms44:5 Ngoncedo lwakho siyazingqula iintshaba zethu; ngegama lakho siyabaxovula abasihlaselayo. 
Psalms44:6 Andixhomekekanga kolwam utolo, ndingaqamelanga ngalo nekrele." 
Psalms44:7 Hayi, nguwe owasihlangulayo ezintshabeni zethu; ikwanguwe owabaduba-dubayo abasithiyileyo." 
Psalms44:8 Thina siqhayisa ngoThixo njalo-njalo, saye siya kumdumisa nanini-nanini." 
Psalms44:9 Kambe ke usilahle satsho sahlazeka, njengoko ungasaphumi nemikhosi yethu." 
Psalms44:10 Wena usiyekele zasiswantsulisa iintshaba, zaza zathimba amaxhoba ngokuthanda kwazo." 
Psalms44:11 Wena usiyekele saxhelwa njengeegusha; usithathe wasisarhaza phakathi kweentlanga. 
Psalms44:12 Abantu bakho wabathengisa ngelize, wena akwafumana nzuzo ngabo." 
Psalms44:13 Usenze intsini kubamelwane, satsho sasisigculelo nesenyeliso kwezo zizwe zisingqongileyo." 
Psalms44:14 Ngoku singundaba-mlonyeni phakathi kwezizwe; sesingabasizelwayo kulo lonke elimiweyo. 
Psalms44:15 Ndisoloko ndithiwe mbende lihlazo. Ke zona iintloni zindongamele 
Psalms44:16 ngenxa yempoxo nezenyeliso ezigityiselwa kum ziintshaba ezindivukeleyo. 
Psalms44:17 Zonke ezi zinto zasihlela, nangona singazange sakulibala thina, okanye siwutshinizele umnqophiso wakho." 
Psalms44:18 Asizange sikufulathele thina, singazange sanxaxha endleleni yakho." 
Psalms44:19 Kodwa elethu linyhashwe laba linxuwa, silahlwe esithokothokweni sobumnyama." 
Psalms44:20 Ukuba besikutyeshele, wena Thixo, okanye sanqula thixo bambi," 
Psalms44:21 andithi, wena Thixo, ubuya kuyibhaqa na naleyo? Kaloku wena uyabazi ubunzulu beentliziyo." 
Psalms44:22 Kambe ke kungenxa yakho sisesichengeni sokubulawa nje; yiyo loo nto sesifana neegusha zokuxhelwa nje. 
Psalms44:23 Hayi bo! Vuka, Nkosi yam! Ngani ukuba uthurh' obentlombe? Vuka; sukusinyengez' uhle nomcinga!" 
Psalms44:24 Ngan' ukuba usilibale kangaka? Ngan' ukuba usifulathele ngolu hlobo, sibe sisisulu sembandezelo nengcinezelo?" 
Psalms44:25 Ewe, asisazelwe nto konke; sesingoogqush' eluthulini." 
Psalms44:26 Ngenxa yothando lwakho olungatshitshiyo khawuvuke usihlangule kaloku! 
Psalms45:1 Intliziyo yam suke yaphuphuma; kuthi mandibonge ndityibele. Ulwimi lwam lona luqule lwaligangatha, ndanga ndingumbhali ongenadyudyu. Kaloku ndingqungel' ukubhekisa kuMntwan' omhle." 
Psalms45:2 Kubo bonke wen' uyinzwan' engenasiphako; uliciko elicikoza kuvokotheke. Kaloku uThixo ukuthamsanqele ngezingaphele ndawo iintsikelelo. 
Psalms45:3 Yithi hlas' ikrel' uqule, Somagorha! Qula ngesidima nobungangamsha!" 
Psalms45:4 Nyantsul' uye kuqhawuk' unobathana! Qula uyilwele inyaniso nobulungisa! Ngobungangamsha bakho dubula ugeqa! 
Psalms45:5 Iintolo zakho zibukhali; ziyazihlabanisela iintshaba zakho, izizwe zitsho zibe phantsi kwakho." 
Psalms45:6 Kambe ulawulo lwakho, Thixo, aluphele ndawo; owakho umsimbithi ngowobulungisa." 
Psalms45:7 Ungumathand' ubulungisa; uyithiyil' inkohlakalo. Ngenxa yaloo nto ke, Thixo, uThixo wakho ukuthambisile. Ewe, ukuthe jize ngesihomo nesithozela esisigqwesayo esoogxa bakho." 
Psalms45:8 Iminweba yakho iqholwe ngomtsalane wemore, ikhala, nekasiya. Kwizixeko ezihonjiswe ngamabamba eendlovu wonwatyiswa ngezeentambula." 
Psalms45:9 Phakathi kwezo zikuphahlileyo zikho neentombi zookumkani. Kufuphi nawe kuthe zinzi inkosazana ethe thande ecikiziweyo igolide yaseOfire. 
Psalms45:10 Khawundiphe iindlebe, uphulaphule, ntombam. Uze ulincame ikhaya, ngokunjalo nendlu kayihlo." 
Psalms45:11 Kaloku wena uyinzwakazi; ke yena ukumkani uyakulangazelela. Phofu ke yena ungumhlekazi, ngoko ke wena mthobele." 
Psalms45:12 Wena ntombi yaseTire, baya kukucenga bakunyobe; ewe, izinhanha ngeendidi zonke zobutyebi." 
Psalms45:13 Phaya entangeni bubuyokoyoko, inkosazana ivath' ezegolide." 
Psalms45:14 Nantso irhuqisa ngamawezaweza, irholwa isiwa kukumkani. Nâzo neentombi eziyikhaphileyo ziyiphahlile zisiya nayo kuye." 
Psalms45:15 Ziyaduda, ziyavuya, ziyamemelela; tsotsololo zagaleleka ebhotwe!" 
Psalms45:16 Ngxatsho ke, mntwan' omhle! Ezihlangwini zooyihlo kuya kungena abakho oonyana. Wena uya kubathi jize ngobungangamsha, babe zizinxiba-mxhaka ehlabathini liphela." 
Psalms45:17 Ke mna ndiya kulubhengeza udumo lwegama lakho. Uya kudunyiswa zizizukulwana ziphela. Ewe, zonke izizwe ziya kutyibela, zikubonga kude kube ngunaphakade." 
Psalms46:1 UThixo ulihlathi nenqaba yethu; ngexesha leenkathazo uluncedo oluhlala lulungile. 
Psalms46:2 Ngoko ke asoyiki lutho, nokuba ihlabathi lingazama-zama, nokuba iintaba zingaphoswa enzulwini yolwandle." 
Psalms46:3 Hayi, amanzi alo angade agqume alephuze amagwebu, iintaba zingcangcazeliswe kukulephuza kwawo." 
Psalms46:4 Kukho umlambo omisinga isivuyisayo isixeko sikaThixo, esilikhaya elingcwele likaPhezukonke." 
Psalms46:5 UThixo uthe zinzi apho kuso. Ngoko ke asinakuze sitshabalale, kuba yena usinceda kwasekuseni." 
Psalms46:6 Izizwe ziyaphithizela; izikumkani ziyabhukuqwa. Lakuhlokoma ilizwi lakhe ihlabathi litsho linyibilike. 
Psalms46:7 *UNdikhoyo uSomandla ungakuthi; ihlathi lethu nguThixo kaYakobi.
