Psalms46:8 Yizani nibone akwenzileyo uNdikhoyo. Ewe, uliphanzisile ihlabathi." 
Psalms46:9 Ngumaphelis' iimfazwe ehlabathini jikelele. Uyasiqoboza isaphetha, awuvikive umkhonto, amakhaka awantumek' umlilo." 
Psalms46:10 Uthetha ngelizwi athi: “Phezani, ndim uThixo. Ndizivelele izizwe; nehlabathi ndilikrobele.”" 
Psalms46:11 UNdikhoyo uSomandla ungakuthi; ihlathi lethu nguThixo kaYakobi. 
Psalms47:1 Qhwaban' izandla, nonke zizwe; dandulukani, niculel' uThixo nivuya." 
Psalms47:2 *UNdikhoyo unguPhezukonke, ufanelwe kukuhlonelwa. Yena uyingangalala yokumkani elawula ihlabathi jikelele." 
Psalms47:3 Yena wasithi jize ngoloyiso, izizwe sazinyathela ngeenyawo; kungaye sizilawula nje izizwe." 
Psalms47:4 Yena wasikhethela ilifa, iqhayiya lakwaYakobi amthandayo." 
Psalms47:5 UThixo unyuke ephelekwa yimikhwazo yovuyo; uNdikhoyo ukhawulelwe ngexilongo elihlokomayo. 
Psalms47:6 Khanimemelele niculele uThixo; ntyilozani nibong' ukumkani wethu. 
Psalms47:7 Kaloku uThixo ngukumkani; ewe, ngowehlabathi jikelele. Ngoko ke memelelani nibongisele." 
Psalms47:8 UThixo ungqendeve kwibhotwe lakhe elingcwele; uThixo ngumakhonya phezu kwezizwe. 
Psalms47:9 Amatshawe ezizwe aqukene ngeentloko; nawo amatwa nabendlu yoThixo ka-Abraham. Amagorha ehlabathi ngakaThixo; yena nguMongameli ovelele bonke. 
Psalms48:1 *UNdikhoyo mkhulu kakhulu; masimbonge simdumise, esixekweni sikaThixo wethu, entabeni yakhe engcwele." 
Psalms48:2 Ngamalengalenga, ikwayinzwakazi, izisa imihlali kwihlabathi jikelele. Ewe, leyo yiNtaba iZiyon. Emantla emalandalahla silaph' isixeko sengangalala yokumkani." 
Psalms48:3 Kanye kwezo zakhiwo zinendili uThixo uzibalule, yena nqaba ingafikelelwayo." 
Psalms48:4 Nâzo izikumkani zihlanganisana; nâzo zidibana zimanyana. 
Psalms48:5 Kambe zithe zakuyalama, zasuka zamangaliswa, zasuka zankwantya, zasaba zingabhungisanga." 
Psalms48:6 Ngoko nangoko zahlaselwa kukungcangcazela, zatsho zazibhija-bhija njengonenimba." 
Psalms48:7 Iinqanawa zaseTashishe wena wazintlitha ngomoya wasempuma. 
Psalms48:8 Sivile, futhi ngoku sizibonele esixekweni sikaNdikhoyo uSomandla. Nditsho isixeko sikaThixo wethu, isixeko asizinzise unaphakade uThixo." 
Psalms48:9 Phakathi endlwini yakho, Thixo, siyakwetyisa ukubalasela kothando lwakho." 
Psalms48:10 Ukudunyiswa kwakho, Thixo, kukwanjengegama lakho, kuthi xhaxhe ngeziphelo zehlabathi. Ulawulo lwakho lunobulungisa." 
Psalms48:11 Mabavuye abemi beNtaba iZiyon; mazidlokove izixeko zelakwaJuda. Kaloku kulungile ukugweba kwakho. 
Psalms48:12 Khanihamba-hambe nijikeleze iZiyon; zibaleni iinqaba zayo eziphakamileyo. 
Psalms48:13 Ewe, zigqaleni iindonga zayo. Khanizihlole izakhiwo zayo, ukuze nibalisele izizukulwana." 
Psalms48:14 Ewe, yena uThixo nguThixo wethu, ngoku nanini na. Yena uya kusikhapha kude kuse ephakadeni." 
Psalms49:1 Phulaphulani, nonke zizwe! Yivani, nonke bemi behlabathi!" 
Psalms49:2 Iindidi zonke maziphulaphule, izityebi ngokunjalo namahlwempu!" 
Psalms49:3 Ngoku ndiza kuphokoza ubulumko, iingcamango zam zizal' ukuqiqa." 
Psalms49:4 Ndiza kujongana nentsonkotha; ndiza kuyichaza ngengoma yehapu. 
Psalms49:5 Ndingoyika ntoni ngemihla yobubi, xa ndingqongwe yinkohlakalo yabakhohlisi," 
Psalms49:6 abantu abaqamele ngobutyebi, abaqhayisa ngentabalala yobutyebi?" 
Psalms49:7 Umntu akanako ukusindisa umntu; akanako ukunika uThixo ixabiso lobomi bakhe. 
Psalms49:8 Nakanye! Kaloku ixabiso lobomi bomntu likhulu. Alifikeleleki mpela-mpela 
Psalms49:9 elo linokumenza abe sisimakade, angaze alibone ingcwaba." 
Psalms49:10 Uyabona, kaloku nezilumko ziyafa, izidenge kwanezityhakala! Ubutyebi babushiya kwabakhoyo." 
Psalms49:11 Amangcwaba likhaya labo naphakade. Baya kuhlala khona njalo-njalo, nakuba babefudula benemihlaba ebizwa ngabo." 
Psalms49:12 Umntu akanako ukukuphepha ukufa ngokuba esisinhanha. Hayi bo! Uyatshabalala njengezilwanyana. 
Psalms49:13 Nâso ke isiphelo sabasweli-kuqonda, abo bakhohliswa ziingcinga zabo." 
Psalms49:14 Bamiselwe ukufa njengeegusha; bona baxhatshazwa kukufa. Bathi ngqo behlele engcwabeni, onke amathambo abo avuthuluke, kuba kaloku bona abasekho." 
Psalms49:15 Ke mna ke, uThixo uya kundikhulula; uya kundihlangula andithathele kuye." 
Psalms49:16 Sukuxhala wakubona umntu ehluma, wakubona ubutyebi bakhe bukhula." 
Psalms49:17 Akanakuhamba nabo xa afayo; ubutyebi buya kusala ngasemva. 
Psalms49:18 Nakuba ebezicingela ukuba wonwabile ngokuya ebesaphila, nokuba ebenconywa ngempumelelo," 
Psalms49:19 wohamba aye kuhlala namanyange angaze abonane nokukhanya. 
Psalms49:20 Umntu osisinhanha, kodwa engenangqiqo, uyafana nje nezilwanyana ezi zitshabalalayo." 
Psalms50:1 *UNdikhoyo, uThixo uSomandla, uyathetha; ubhekisa kwihlabathi jikelele, ukususela empumalanga kuye entshonalanga." 
Psalms50:2 UThixo ubengezela eZiyon, isixeko esibalaseleyo ngobuhle." 
Psalms50:3 Uyeza uThixo wethu; yena akayi kuthi tu. Phambi kwakhe kudangazela umlilo; uphahlwe sisitshu sesivungu-vungu. 
Psalms50:4 Umema amazulu kwanehlabathi, xa aza kugweba abantu bakhe." 
Psalms50:5 Uthi: “Bahlanganiseleni kum abam abathembekileyo, abanqophisene nam ngombingelelo.”" 
Psalms50:6 Amazulu ngokwawo abalisa ngobulungisa bukaThixo; kaloku umgwebi ikwanguye ngokwakhe. 
Psalms50:7 “Khaniphulaphule, bantu bam, ndithethe; ndiyakumangalela, Sirayeli. Mna Thixo ndinguThixo wakho." 
Psalms50:8 Andiyigxeki imibingelelo yakho; amadini akho atshiswayo asoloko ephambi kwam. 
Psalms50:9 Kambe azisamkeleki iinkunzi zakho zeenkomo; ngokunjalo neebhokhwe zemihlambi yakho. 
Psalms50:10 Kaloku zezam zonke izilwanyana neenyamakazi ezikumawaka-waka eenduli. 
Psalms50:11 Xa zizonke iintaka ndiyazazi; nezinambuzane zamathafa zezam. 
Psalms50:12 “Xa bendingalambayo, bendingayi kukubikela. Kaloku lelam ihlabathi nezinto zalo." 
Psalms50:13 Ngaba ndiyayitya inyama yeenkunzi? Khona, ndiyalisela igazi leebhokhwe?" 
Psalms50:14 Umbingelelo wakho kuThixo mayibe kukubulela, uzifezekise izithembise zakho kuPhezukonke." 
Psalms50:15 Zibike kum xa usengxakini; mna ndiya kukuhlangula, ke wena undidumise.”" 
Psalms50:16 Kambe ke kwabo bakhohlakeleyo uThixo uthi: “Ngani ukuba niyicengceleze imithetho yam, nincokole ngomnqophiso wam?" 
Psalms50:17 Kaloku niyayenyanya ingqeqesho; aniyithobeli nemiyalelo yam. 
Psalms50:18 Nakudibana nesela, nihlobana nalo; abakrexezi niyevana nabo." 
Psalms50:19 “Usoloko uthetha kakubi; uqhelene nentlebendwane. 
Psalms50:20 Uncokola kakubi ngamawethu; uhleba nomntakanyoko lo. 
Psalms50:21 Ndinibukele nizenza ezi zinto, andathetha nada nacinga ukuba nam ndifana nani. Kodwa ke ngoku ndiyakhalima; ndilaneka phambi kwenu ityala." 
Psalms50:22 “Phulaphulani, nina bangandikhathalelanga, hleze ndiniqwenge, angabikho nonqandayo." 
Psalms50:23 Obingelela ngokubulela uyandidumisa; uzilungiselela ukusindiswa nguThixo.” 
Psalms51:1 Awu, Thixo, ndiyatarhuzisa! Ngenxa yezibele zothando lwakho, nobubanzi benceba yakho, nceda uzicime iziphoso zam!" 
Psalms51:2 Ndihlambe ndahlukane nabo bonke ububi; ndenze ndibe nyulu, ndingabi nasono!" 
Psalms51:3 Kaloku ndiyabuvuma ubugwenxa bam; isono sam sindithukuthezele. 
Psalms51:4 Eyona ngcambu yesono sam kukuba ndone wena kanye, ndenze into ekuhlazisayo. Ngoko ke undigwebe ngakhona; isigwebo sakho sifanelekile." 
Psalms51:5 Kaloku ndaba gwenxa kwasekuzalweni; ndaba ngumoni ndisakhawulwanje nguma. 
Psalms51:6 Ewe, wena uthanda umntu onyanisekileyo; ndincede undiphe ingqiqo enzulu." 
Psalms51:7 Ndihlambe undicokise ndicoceke; ndihlambe ndibe mhlophe qhwa, ndibe ngaphezu kwalo nekhephu." 
Psalms51:8 Mandiphuphume luvuyo nemincili; nakuba undikrobozile nje, mandonwabe." 
Psalms51:9 Bufihle ubuso bakho ezonweni zam, ubususe bonke ubugwenxa bam." 
Psalms51:10 Ewe, Thixo, intliziyo yam yidale ngokutsha, ibe nyulu; wuhlaziye umoya wam, ndikhaliphe." 
Psalms51:11 Musa ukundigxotha, Nkosi yam; ungamthathi uMoya wakho kum." 
Psalms51:12 Ndibuyisele uvuyo losindiso lwakho, undixhase ngoMoya wakho, khon' ukuze ndikuthobele." 
Psalms51:13 Ke, bona aboni ndiya kubafundisa imiyalelo yakho, baguquke, beze kuwe." 
Psalms51:14 Awu, Thixo, ndihlangule ekufeni! Nguwe, Thixo, ondisindisayo. Ke mna ndiya kudanduluka, ndicule ngokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms51:15 Vula imilebe yam, Nkosi, khon' ukuze ndikubhengeze ngawo umlomo wam." 
Psalms51:16 Kaloku wena akunanze mibingelelo. Ndingafanelana ndisenza amadini atshiswayo; akangekwanelisi wena. 
Psalms51:17 Umbingelelo owufunayo, Thixo, yintliziyo ethobekileyo. Intliziyo ethobekileyo neguqukayo, wena Thixo, akuyideli." 
Psalms51:18 Khawuncede uyivelele iZiyon, uyilungiselele; khawuphinde uzakhe iindonga zeJerusalem." 
Psalms51:19 Uya kwandula ke waneliswe yimibingelelo efanelekileyo; amadini atshiswayo, nditsho natshiswa ephelele. Kobingwa neenkunzi eqongeni lakho lamadini." 
Psalms52:1 Uqhayisela ntoni ngobubi, gorhandini, usithi inceba kaThixo iphezu kwakho?" 
Psalms52:2 Usoloko uzungula ukutshabalalisa. Ulwimi lwakho alubukhali, yintshengeca! Uhlala uyila ubutshijolo." 
Psalms52:3 Uthanda okubi kunokulungileyo; uthe phithi bubuxoki endaweni yenyaniso. 
Psalms52:4 Hayi ke bethu umntu onolwini! Uyakuthanda ukuphixanisa. 
Psalms52:5 Ke yena uThixo uya kukudiliza kuthi tu; uya kukuthi xhakamfu, akukhuphe endlwini yakho; uya kukuncothula umke ezweni labaphilayo." 
Psalms52:6 Akuyibona le nto amalungisa omangaliswa ahlekise athi: 
Psalms52:7 “Nanko ke umntu ongazange akholose ngoThixo, owasuka wakholosa ngobutyebi, waphumelela ngobutshijolo!”" 
Psalms52:8 Ke mna ndinjengomnquma oyokoyoko; ndihlala phakathi endlwini kaThixo. Ndihlala ndikholose ngezibele zothando lukaThixo; kuya kude kube ngunaphakade. 
Psalms52:9 Ngenxa yesi senzo sakho, Thixo, ndiya kukudumisa njalo-njalo. Ndithembele kuwe kuba ulungile. Ewe, ndiya kukubhengeza phakathi kwâbo bakuthandayo." 
Psalms53:1 Iziyatha zithi akukho Thixo ngandawo. Zonakele, futhi zenza amasikizi; akukho ulungisayo kuzo." 
Psalms53:2 Ke yena uThixo ubabukele abantu; uhlel' ezulwini efuna ukuqonda ukuba ngaba sikho na isilumko, nditsho ofuna ukunqula uThixo." 
Psalms53:3 Kambe ke bonke bemkile; xa bebonke bonakele; kubo akakho olungisayo; nditsho nokuba abe mnye. 
Psalms53:4 Abanangqondo na abakhohlakeleyo, abo baxhaphaza amawethu, ngathi batya isonka, bengamnquli nokumnqula uThixo?" 
Psalms53:5 Baya kunkwantya ngendlela engaziwa mntu. Kaloku uThixo uyawasarhaza amathambo âbo bamchasayo. Baya kuhlazeka kuba uThixo ubalahlile. 
Psalms53:6 Akwaba ingavela eZiyon inkululeko yamaSirayeli! Akuba uThixo eyibuyisele inkqubela yabantu bakhe, abakwaYakobi baya kugcoba, achulumache amaSirayeli." 
Psalms54:1 Ngegunya lakho ndisindise, Thixo; ngamandla akho undikhulule." 
Psalms54:2 Wuphulaphule umthandazo wam, sive isikhalo sam, Thixo." 
Psalms54:3 Iintlanga ziyandihlasela; izikhohlakali zizungula ukundibulala. Zona azimkhathalele nganto uThixo. 
Psalms54:4 Kodwa ke umncedi wam nguThixo, umxhasi wam nguMhlekazi." 
Psalms54:5 Ngamana wayibuyisela kwasezintshabeni zam inkohlakalo yazo. Zibhangise, kuba uthembekile wena." 
Psalms54:6 *Ndikhoyo, ndilangazelela ukukwenzela umbingelelo. Ndiyabulela kuwe, kuba wena ulungile." 
Psalms54:7 Kuzo zonke iingxaki zam wena undihlangule; ukoyiswa kweentshaba zam ndikubone ngamehlo. 
Psalms55:1 Ndincede uwubekele iindlebe umthandazo wam, Thixo. Ndibhenela kuwe; sukundifulathela." 
Psalms55:2 Sabela, undiphendule. Kaloku iinkathazo zindongamele. Ngenxa yezisongelo zeentshaba zam ndididekile; ingcinezelo yabangendawo indixinile. Bafumba inkxwaleko phezu kwam; futhi bandingcikiva ngolunya." 
Psalms55:3  
Psalms55:4 Ndiyajijitheka ngaphakathi; izoyikiso zokufa zindivingcele. 
Psalms55:5 Andoyiki ndiyagubha! Ukunkwantya kuyandirhwaqelisa. 
Psalms55:6 Ndide ndithi: “Akwaba bendinamaphiko njengehobe! Bendiya kuntinga ndiye kuphumla kude lee. 
Psalms55:7 Ewe, bendiya kubethwa ngumoya, ndihlale entlango." 
Psalms55:8 Ndandiya kukhawuleza ndizifunele umqolomba, ndiyizimele kuyo imimoya ebhudlayo.”" 
Psalms55:9 Nqanda, Mhlekazi! Waphuthise amacebo abo! Kubhidanise ukuthetha kwabo, bangevani, kuba ndibona ugonyamelo nesidube-dube esixekweni." 
Psalms55:10 Imini nobusuku bajikeleza ezindongeni zesixeko; siyaphuphuma bububhoja nobutshijolo. 
Psalms55:11 Ewe, siphuphuma intshabalalo; ezindaweni zeembutho yingcinezelo nobukrelemnqa." 
Psalms55:12 Kambe ke andingcikivwa lutshaba. Ukuba ibilulo bendinganyamezelayo. Asinguye ondichasayo lo undiqholoselayo, okanye bendingamphephayo." 
Psalms55:13 Koko nguwe, ntangam, wena gxa wam, mhlobo wam osenyongweni." 
Psalms55:14 Fudula sisidl' imbadu kunye; endlwini kaThixo sasikunye, singumtya nethunga." 
Psalms55:15 Ngamana zahlaselwa kukufa iintshaba zam. Ewe, ngamana zehlela kwelabafileyo zihleli. Koloku amakhaya azo aqhelene nobubi." 
Psalms55:16 Kambe ke ndibhenela kuThixo. Ewe, *uNdikhoyo uya kundihlangula." 
Psalms55:17 Kusasa emini nangokuhlwa ndithiwe mbende ngumva-ndedwa; saye ke isililo sam sinyukela kuye, futhi ke uza kundiphulaphula." 
Psalms55:18 Yena uza kundikhulula, ndingenawo nowempumlo, kweli dabi ndikulo, kwezingaka zona iintshaba." 
Psalms55:19 Ewe, uThixo owaba sesihlalweni kwamandulo uza kusabela; waye ke eya kuzibhukuqa. Kaloku zona aziguquki, zingamkhathalele noThixo." 
Psalms55:20 Ewe, obefudula engugxa wam suka wavukela izihlobo zakhe, wasaphula isithembiso sakhe." 
Psalms55:21 Yena wayethetha kamnandi, kodwa intliziyo yona ifukam' inkohlakalo. Amazwi akhe ayelalanisa, kodwa engebukhali, eyintshengeca!" 
Psalms55:22 Iingxaki zakho ziphose kuNdikhoyo; yena uya kukuxhasa, akayi kuze aliyekele ilungisa." 
Psalms55:23 Kambe ke, Thixo, uya kubeyelisela enzonzobileni abangendawo, ababulali namatshijolo, bengekagqibi nesiqingatha sobomi. Ukanti ke mna ndiya kukholosa ngawe." 
Psalms56:1 Awu, Thixo, velana nam, kuba iintshaba ziyandihlasela; maxa onke ziyanditshutshisa." 
Psalms56:2 Ewe, ndixinekile yintshutshiso yotshaba; yinyambalala abahlaseli abaqholosayo." 
Psalms56:3 Ndakuxineka ndikholosa ngawe. 
Psalms56:4 UThixo olizwi ndilidumisayo ndikholosa ngaye ndingenadyudyu. Soze andenze nto umntu. 
Psalms56:5 Iintshaba zam ziyaphixanisa; zasoloko ziyila amacebo okundilimaza. 
Psalms56:6 Ziphum' izithuba, ziyandilalela; zithene mbende nam. Kaloku ziyandizungula." 
Psalms56:7 Babuyekeze ngenxa yezenzo zabo, Thixo; ngamana wabakhahlela phantsi ungenalusizi." 
Psalms56:8 Uyakubona ukubhadula kwam, neenyembezi zam uyazibona. Kaloku uyazibhala ezi zinto." 
Psalms56:9 Mhla ndabhenela kuwe iintshaba ziya kuphethuka. Ndotsho ndiqonde ukuba uThixo ungakum. 
Psalms56:10 UThixo olizwi ndilidumisayo, *uNdikhoyo olizwi ndilidumisayo," 
Psalms56:11 ndokholosa ngaye ndingenadyudyu. Soze andenze nto umntu. 
Psalms56:12 Ewe, Thixo, ndozifezekisa izithembiso zam, ndenze umbingelelo wokukubulela;" 
Psalms56:13 kuba undihlangule ekufeni, undisindise ekoyisweni, ukuze ndibe phambi koThixo, ndidle ubomi njalo-njalo." 
Psalms57:1 Khawube nenceba uvelane nam, Thixo; kaloku igwiba lam nguwe. Ndizimela kuloo maphiko akho zide zidlule iinkqwithela." 
Psalms57:2 Ndibhenela kuThixo uPhezukonke, kuThixo ongenakundiyekela," 
Psalms57:3 eve esezulwini andihlangule, abahlazise abo bandixobongayo. Ngokuthembeka kwakhe uThixo, ngokunjalo nangezibele zothando lwakhe, yena uya kuphendula." 
Psalms57:4 Ndiphahlwe ziingonyama ezibaqwengayo oonyana babantu. Zisineke ngeengxavula ezingathi yimikhonto neentolo; zitsho ngeelwimi ezilencayo. 
Psalms57:5 Awu, Thixo, zimaseka phezulu esibhakabhakeni; isidima nesihomo sakho masibe phezu kwehlabathi jikelele." 
Psalms57:6 Bandithiyela ngezabatha; ndatsho ke ndaminxeka. Bandimbela umwonyo; suka kweyela kwabona. 
Psalms57:7 Awu, Thixo, ndizimisele ngokupheleleyo; ewe, ngenene, andithandabuzi; ndiza kumemelela nditsholoze!" 
Psalms57:8 Awuhoyi na, mphefumlo wam? Ndosuka ndiqubul' ihapu nekatala; ewe, ndovuka xa kumpondo zankomo." 
Psalms57:9 Ndiya kukuncoma phakathi kweentlanga, Nkosi; ewe, ndokudumisa naphakathi kwezizwe." 
Psalms57:10 Izibele zakho zibalasele ezulwini; ukuthembeka kwakho kurhec' amafu. 
Psalms57:11 Awu, Thixo, zimaseka esibhakabhakeni; isidima nesihomo sakho masibe phezu kwehlabathi jikelele!" 
Psalms58:1 Ngaba anikhethi buso na kodwa, nina balawuli, xa nilawulayo? Anibalamli ngegobe kodwa abantu?" 
Psalms58:2 Hayi bo! Niyila inkohlakalo; kweli hlabathi naba ugonyamelo. 
Psalms58:3 Abakhohlakeleyo banxaxha bezalwa nje; ewe, banxaxha besesesizalweni, bathethe ubuxoki." 
Psalms58:4 Banobuhlungu njengeenyoka; banjengenyushu ezenza isithulu," 
Psalms58:5 ukuze ingeva tu xa iculelwa ngabo banemilingo; ubuqili benkintsela bungasebenzi. 
Psalms58:6 Khawubaphule loo mazinyo, Thixo; wafohloze amabamba engonyama, *Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms58:7 Mabaphel' emehlweni, baxel' amanzi ehamba ngomsele. Mabajolise ngeentolo ezibuthuntu." 
Psalms58:8 Mabanyibilike, baxel' inkumba. Mabaxel' imva-mbilini ejik' endleleni." 
Psalms58:9 Imbiza ingekawuva umlilo, noba wokhekile, noba awokhekanga, izikhohlakali ziqweqwediswa zingabi sabonakala." 
Psalms58:10 Ke lona ilungisa liya kugcoba lisakuyibona le mpindezelo; liya kugxampuza egazini labakhohlakeleyo. 
Psalms58:11 Abantu baya kutsho bathi: “Kuthe kanti kuneziqhamo ukuba lilungisa; ngenene ukho uThixo olilawulayo ihlabathi.” 
Psalms59:1 Khawundihlangule ezintshabeni, Thixo wam; ndikhusele kwabo bandihlaselayo." 
Psalms59:2 Ndihlangule kubantu abagwenxa; ndisindise kwizikrelemnqa. 
Psalms59:3 Uyabona bayandilalela. Izikhohlakali zidibana ngam, ndingonanga nokona, *Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms59:4 Hayi, andenzanga nento le, kodwa nâbo bendiqulela." 
Psalms59:5 Ndikhoyo, Thixo Somandla, wena Thixo kaSirayeli, phakama uze kundinceda! Vela undibone kaloku. Zivukele uzohlwaye iintlanga. Mabangasindi abaphembi boqhushululu." 
Psalms59:6 Baphuma ngamarhatya, ngathi zizinja ezilambayo, benze umkhulungwane esixekweni." 
Psalms59:7 Nâbo begragrama, iilwimi zabo ngathi likrele; bathi ngubani obakhathaleleyo." 
Psalms59:8 Ke wena, Ndikhoyo, uyabahleka; ewe, ziyintlekisa kuwe iintlanga." 
Psalms59:9 Ungumkhuseli wam, ndizimela ngawe; ulikhakha lam, wena Thixo." 
Psalms59:10 Ngenxa yokuba undithanda uyandihlangabeza, Thixo wam; uya kuziswantsulisa iintshaba zam." 
Psalms59:11 Musa ukubatshabalalisa, Thixo, khon' ukuze abantu bakho bafumane umzekelo. Ngaloo mandla akho basarhaze babe zizibhadu-bhadu. Ulikhakha lethu, wena Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms59:12 Kukrwada ukuthetha kwabo; mabaxakane nekratshi labo, kuba bayaqalekisa, futhi bayaxoka." 
Psalms59:13 Babhubhise ngomsindo wakho; batshabalalise kuthi tu, khon' ukuze ihlabathi lazi ukuba kwaYakobi kulawula uThixo." 
Psalms59:14 Baphuma ngamarhatya, ngathi zizinja ezilambayo, benze umkhulungwane esixekweni." 
Psalms59:15 Bafunana nokutya, barhaqaze bakuba benganeli." 
Psalms59:16 Kodwa ke mna ndiya kucula ndibonga amandla akho; ndiya kumemelela kwasekuseni, kuba uthando lwakho luyamangalisa. Kaloku wena uyinqaba yam, ungumqolomba ngomhla wembandezelo." 
Psalms59:17 Ndiya kukubonga, mkhuseli wam. Mna ndizimela ngoThixo; ewe, uThixo ondithandayo." 
Psalms60:1 Awu, Thixo, usilahlile! Ngoku sitsho soyisakala. Wena usivelele ngomsindo. Nceda, khawube nebuyambo." 
Psalms60:2 Wena uwunyikimisile umhlaba; wona utsho wazama-zama; kungokunje uyaqhaqhazela. Nceda ungcibe ezo ntanda. 
Psalms60:3 Abantu bakho ubavise inkxwaleko; ewe, usitsho sazizinxada-nxada." 
Psalms60:4 Ubanike intshinga abakuhlonelayo; ubahluphezile ukuze bazuze uloyiso. 
Psalms60:5 Nceda ngamandla akho usivelele, ukuze basinde abo ubathandayo." 
Psalms60:6 UThixo uthethe *esesibingelelweni sakhe, wathi: “IShekem ndiyayahlula-hlula, ngoloyiso ndiyayihlahlela; intili yeSukoti yona ndiyibenge." 
Psalms60:7 IGiliyadi yeyam, noManase ngowam. UEfrayim lelona xhadi lam; uJuda ngumsimbithi wam." 
Psalms60:8 UMowabhi yintili yam yebhongo; ke yena uEdom ndiyambanga. EFilistiya ndikhwaza uloyiso.” 
Psalms60:9 Ngubani onokundisa emzini oxhotyisiweyo? Ngubani onokundisa e-Edom? 
Psalms60:10 Noko usilahlile, Thixo. Awusaphumi nemikhosi yethu." 
Psalms60:11 Sincedise ezintshabeni zethu: kaloku olomntu uncedo luphuthile. 
Psalms60:12 Ukuba uThixo ungakuthi siya kuphumelela; uya kuzinyhasha iintshaba zethu. 
Psalms61:1 Thixo, ndiyakhala; nceda undiphulaphule." 
Psalms61:2 Ndibhenela kuwe ndisekudeni; ndisuke ndanengevane. Nceda undikhokele, undise entabeni ephakamileyo." 
Psalms61:3 Kaloku wena uyinqaba yam; uyandikhusela ezintshabeni. 
Psalms61:4 Ndiya kuhlala kwakho njalo-njalo, ndithi ncwaba phantsi kwaloo maphiko." 
Psalms61:5 Kaloku, wena Thixo, uzivile izithembiso zam; undinike ilifa labakuhloniphayo." 
Psalms61:6 Yandise imihla yokumkani; makakhule ade akhokhobe. 
Psalms61:7 Makangqendeve kwaThixo njalo-njalo, umkhusele ngothando lwezibele zakho; ewe, maluse ngokuthembeka kwakho." 
Psalms61:8 Mna ke ndiya kukubonga mihla le, ndihlale ndizifezekisa izithembiso zam." 
Psalms62:1 Ndithe cwaka ndikholose ngoThixo; kaloku nguye yedwa ondikhululayo. 
Psalms62:2 Ndizimela ngaye, nguye ondisindisayo. Yinqaba yam, soze ndichukunyiswe." 
Psalms62:3 Koda kube nini nimhlasela umntu, ninxanel' igazi lakhe, noba enjengodonga olukekeleyo, enqwa nothango oluwayo?" 
Psalms62:4 Nizungula ukumbhukuqa awe; niqhayisa ngokuxoka. Ngomlomo niyathamsanqelisa, ukanti niyaqalekisa ngaphakathi." 
Psalms62:5 Ndithe cwaka, ndikholose ngoThixo; kaloku nguye yedwa ithemba lam." 
Psalms62:6 Ndizimela ngaye, nguye ondisindisayo. Yinqaba yam, soze ndichukunyiswe." 
Psalms62:7 Ndisindiswa nguThixo, uliwonga lam. UThixo yinqaba yam, ndizimela ngaye." 
Psalms62:8 Maxa onke thembelani kuye, bantundini, nizityand' igila kuye; kaloku uThixo yinqaba yethu." 
Psalms62:9 Abantu bafana nomphunga. Umntu yinto engento yanto. Akubekwa esikalini ukhaphukhaphu; hayi, kubhetele kwaphepha." 
Psalms62:10 Musa ukuqamela ngezigalo; musa ukuthembela ekuphangeni. Noba bungade bufumbe ubutyebi, wena musa ukuqamela ngabo." 
Psalms62:11 Nto zimbini azithethileyo uThixo: Le yokuba amandla ngawakhe," 
Psalms62:12 nenkqu yothando ivela kuMhlekazi. Kaloku wena, Nkosi, uyazelelela, umntu umvuza ngokwemisebenzi yakhe." 
Psalms63:1 Wena Thixo, unguThixo wam, ndithe swi nguwe. Umphefumlo wam uyakulangazelela. Ndihlala ndizula-zula ndikufuna; ndinxanele wena oku komhlaba obharhileyo." 
Psalms63:2 Ndikuzingela phakathi *esibingelelweni, ukuze ndibone amandla nesidima sakho." 
Psalms63:3 Kaloku izibele zothando lwakho ziyabugqwesa nobomi, ngoko ndiya kuhlala ndikudumisa." 
Psalms63:4 Ndiya kukubonga lo gama ndisaphilayo; ndiya kunyukela kuwe ngomthandazo. 
Psalms63:5 Ndiya kutya ndide ndincinde amafutha; ndiya kumemelela ndicule ndinemihlali. 
Psalms63:6 Emandlalweni wam ndicinga ngawe; ndicamngca ngawe phakathi kobusuku. 
Psalms63:7 Kaloku wena uluncedo lwam; ngamaphiko akho uyandikhusela, nditsho ndicule ndinemincili." 
Psalms63:8 Ndizimisele ukuthi nca kuwe; kaloku wena uyandixhasa. 
Psalms63:9 Ke bona abafunana nobomi bam baya kweyela kwelabafileyo. 
Psalms63:10 Baya kubulawa ngekrele, babe lixhoba leengcuka." 
Psalms63:11 Ke yena ukumkani uvuyiswa nguThixo. Bonke abaqamela ngaye baya konwaba. Amaxoki ke wona aya kusikw' umlomo. 
Psalms64:1 Bek' iindlebe, Thixo, ndiyakhala; ndikhusele kwizoyikiso zotshaba." 
Psalms64:2 Ndifihle kumayelenqe abakhohlakeleyo, kwihlokondiba eliyila inkohlakalo." 
Psalms64:3 Ulwimi lwabo lubukhali njengekrele; bajolisa ngamazwi abukhali okweentolo. 
Psalms64:4 Balalela badubule abamsulwa; babaqubula bengenasazela. 
Psalms64:5 Bayakhuthazana kobu bukrelemnqa; bafuthelana ngamayelenqe; bathi: “Soze sibonwe! 
Psalms64:6 Ngubani onokulibhaqa eli yelenqe lethu? Iqhinga lethu silenze ngobuchule.” Kaloku intliziyo yomntu lulwandle! 
Psalms64:7 Kodwa ke uThixo uya kubadubula ngotolo; uya kubachana benzakale bengalindelanga. 
Psalms64:8 Uya kubabhubhisa ngenxa yokuthetha kwabo, abababonayo banikine iintloko." 
Psalms64:9 Bonke baya kutsho boyike, bakubhengeze akwenzileyo uThixo, bayetyise imisebenzi yakhe." 
Psalms64:10 Amalungisa makonwatyiswe *nguNdikhoyo. Ewe, makazimele ngaye; onke amalungisa makaqhayise ngaye." 
Psalms65:1 Ufanelwe kukubongwa, Thixo, eZiyon, zifezekiswe kuwe izibhambathiso." 
Psalms65:2 Wena uyawugqala umthandazo; bonke baya kuza kuwe. 
Psalms65:3 Ngenxa yobugwenxa bethu iziphoso zethu ziyasongamela, kodwa wena uyasixolela." 
Psalms65:4 Uthamsanqelekile omnyulayo wena. Lowo umhlalisa enkundleni yakwakho. Siya kufumana ukwanela endlwini yakho, apho kukho ubunewu-newu nobungcwele." 
Psalms65:5 Ngemisebenzi yakho emangalisayo uyasiphendula usikhulule. Thixo, wena uyinkululeko kuthi. Ihlabathi liphela lithembele ngawe, nditsho neelwandle jikelele." 
Psalms65:6 Iintaba waziseka ngegunya lakho, zingumzobo wamandla akho." 
Psalms65:7 Ungumthozamisi weelwandle ezilwayo, umthibazi wamaza alatyuzayo, umthomalalisi wezizwe ezixokozelayo." 
Psalms65:8 Nabaseziphelweni zehlabathi bathi, bakuzibona ezi zinto, barhwaqele. Ngapha nangapha wena uhlwayela ulonwabo." 
Psalms65:9 Ilizwe wena ulalusa ngemvula; wena ulitsho libe yintombazana. Ke yona imilambo iyankcenkceza; uyabalungiselela bafumane indyebo. 
Psalms65:10 Amasimi uwavathisa ngemvula, atsho ee thinte ngamanzi. Umhlaba uwunyakamisa ngomvimbi, zitsho ziqhame izityalo." 
Psalms65:11 Unyaka uwuthi jize ngendyebo, kuvuz' ubusi namafutha kwimizila yeenyawo zakho." 
Psalms65:12 Amadlelo athe thande yimfuyo; iinduli zimbeje-mbeje, ziyavuya." 
Psalms65:13 Idobo liphanjwe yimihlambi; iintili zivathiswe likhaba. Ziyakratsha, ziyacula zinemincili." 
Psalms66:1 Khanitsho ngentsholo nidumisa, nibong' uThixo, nonke bemi behlabathi!" 
Psalms66:2 Culani nidumise isidima sakhe; khanimtyibele nimemelele! 
Psalms66:3 Dandulukani, nithi kuThixo: “Iyamangalisa imisebenzi yakho; ubungangamsha bakho bunabile; buzitsho neentshaba zakho zinkwantye." 
Psalms66:4 Ihlabathi liphela likhahlela kuwe, livum' amaculo, lidumisa wena; liyamemelela, libong' igama lakho.”" 
Psalms66:5 Yizani niyibone imisebenzi kaThixo; izenzo zakhe ziyalumangalisa uluntu. 
Psalms66:6 Ulwandle walujika lwayinkangala. Umlambokazi bawuwela betabhata. Ngenene sachulumacha ngenxa yakhe. 
Psalms66:7 Igunya lamandla akhe alinamida. Iliso lakhe lizalusile izizwe; nezibhoja mazingajambalazi. 
Psalms66:8 Mncomeni uThixo wethu, nonke zizwe! Izibongo zenu maziviwe nangabakude." 
Psalms66:9 Yena wasithundeza wasixhasa; akasiyekelanga ekutyibilikeni. 
Psalms66:10 Kaloku, wena Thixo, usivavanyile; usicikide njengesiliva." 
Psalms66:11 Wasiyeka sagaxeleka elubobeni; wasiyekela sathandelwa ziinkxwaleko. 
Psalms66:12 Wasivula, iintshaba zasityakatya, sadada emililweni nasemanzini; wabuya wasithi jize ngendyebo." 
Psalms66:13 Ndoya endlwini yakho, ndikuphathele amadini atshiswayo; ndiza kuzifezekisa izithembiso zam," 
Psalms66:14 ndizenze izinto endazithethayo mhla kwakugos' okwaphukayo. 
Psalms66:15 Ndiza kukwenzela amadini ngezityebileyo, ndiqhumise ngombingelelo weenkunzi zeegusha, ndibingelele ngeenkunzi zeenkomo nezeebhokhwe." 
Psalms66:16 Nonke nina nimhlonelayo uThixo, yizani ndinibonise izinto andenzele zona." 
Psalms66:17 Ndadanduluka kuye ndizibika; ndandipheth' iindumiso nemibongo. 
Psalms66:18 Ukuba ndandizigushile izono zam uMhlekazi ebengayi kundiphulaphula. 
Psalms66:19 Kambe ke uThixo undivile; uwuphendule umthandazo wam. 
Psalms66:20 Ngenene ngowokubongwa uThixo. Yena akakhalalanga ndakuzibika kuye; akazibandezanga izibele zothando lwakhe. 
Psalms67:1 Ngamana wanesisa wasithamsanqelisa, Thixo! Ewe, ngamana ungenza kube hele kube chosi kuthi," 
Psalms67:2 ukuze yaziwe intando yakho emhlabeni, izizwe ziluxhamle usindiso lwakho." 
Psalms67:3 Zonk' iintlanga mazikubonge, Thixo; bonk' abantu mabakudumise." 
Psalms67:4 Mazidanduluk' izizwe zicule ngemincili, kuba wena ulawula ngobulungisa, zaluswa nguwe zonk' izizwe." 
Psalms67:5 Zonk' iintlanga mazikubonge, Thixo; bonk' abantu mabakudumise." 
Psalms67:6 Ilizwe liphuphum' indyebo. UThixo usithamsanqele; nditsho uThixo wethu. 
Psalms67:7 Ngenene uThixo uyasithamsanqela; ngamana lamthobela ihlabathi jikelele. 
Psalms68:1 Ngamana waphakam' uThixo, waziswantsulis' iintshaba zakhe. Banga bangaba ziintsali abamthiyileyo." 
Psalms68:2 Mabaphaphatheke; bavuthele, bathi shwaka, baxel' umsi. Mabanyibilike, baxel' umthwebeba emlilweni. Mababhubhe phantsi koThixo abakhohlakeleyo." 
Psalms68:3 Ke wona amalungisa makonwabe. Wona makavuye phambi koThixo. Ewe, makabe nemihlali nemincili." 
Psalms68:4 Culelani uThixo, nibong' igama lakhe. Ewe, mbongeni lowo ucand' emafini. Igama lakhe *nguNdikhoyo, vuyani ngenxa yakhe." 
Psalms68:5 UThixo usendlwini yakhe engcwele. Nguyise weenkedama, umthetheleli wabahlolokazi." 
Psalms68:6 Abangenabani ubenzela izihlobo. Amabanjwa uwakhokelela enyhwebeni; ke bona abavukeli bohlala kwelingumqwebedu. 
Psalms68:7 Ke wena, Thixo, wabakhokela abantu bakho; wanyantsula, wacanda entlango." 
Psalms68:8 Umhlaba watsho wanyikima, yagalelek' imvula, ngokufika kukaThixo waseSinayi; ewe, nditsho uThixo wamaSirayeli." 
Psalms68:9 Wena, Thixo, wathulula izandyondyo zemvula, walinyanga ilizwe lakho elibharhileyo." 
Psalms68:10 Abantu bakho watsho bazuza umhlaba wokuma; ngenceba yakho wabazelelela abahlelelekileyo. 
Psalms68:11 INkosi inika umyalelo, batsho babe baninzi abavakalisa iindaba." 
Psalms68:12 Iinjengele zomkhosi nâzo zibaleka; ke bona abafazi basala besab' amaxhoba. 
Psalms68:13 Sebengathi ngamahobe ahonjiswe ngesiliva; amaphiko ehonjiswe ngegolide. 
Psalms68:14 Wathi uSomandla ukubasarhaza ookumkani, kwatsho kwalal' ikhephu eZalmon." 
Psalms68:15 Iphakamile ke kambe intaba iBhashan; yintaba encopho zininzi. 
Psalms68:16 Zintabandini, ngani ukuba niyigxeleshe intaba, nditsho intaba enqwenelekayo kuThixo, apho wohlala khona ngonaphakade uNdikhoyo!" 
Psalms68:17 UNdikhoyo weza ngeenqwelo ezimawaka-waka, ephuma eSinayi, esiza ebhotwe." 
Psalms68:18 Wantinga, wanyukela phezulu, erhuqa umngcelele wabathinjwa, wamkela izipho ebantwini, ewe, nditsho nakwabamvukelayo, ukuze uNdikhoyo uThixo ahlale khona." 
Psalms68:19 Yibongeni iNkosi! Mihla le iyasazelelela, uThixo ngumsindisi wethu." 
Psalms68:20 UThixo wethu ungosindisayo; uMhlekazi uNdikhoyo uyasihlangula ekufeni. 
Psalms68:21 Kodwa ke uThixo uya kuzintlekeza iintshaba zakhe, abo bathene nca nenkohlakalo." 
Psalms68:22 INkosi yathi: “Ndiya kuzibuyisa eBhashan; ndiya kuzirhola enzonzobileni yolwandle; 
Psalms68:23 ukuze nina nigxampuze egazini lazo, zona izinja zihluthe kukuxhaph' igazi.”" 
Psalms68:24 Umngcelele wakho, Thixo, uyabonakala, umngcelele oya esibingelelweni, nditsho okaThixo, ukumkani wam." 
Psalms68:25 Phambili ngabantyilozayo, belandelwa ngabangqungqayo; phakathi kwabo iintombi zibeth' iingqongqo." 
Psalms68:26 Mbongeni uThixo embizweni yakhe; mbongeni, nina bandla likaSirayeli!" 
Psalms68:27 Zikhokelwa nguBhenjamin inci. Nâlo neqela lamatshawe akwaJuda. Ayalandela awakwaZebhulon nawakwaNafetali. 
Psalms68:28 Bonakalìsa ubungangamsha bakho, Thixo; loo mandla wasinceda ngawo, Thixo." 
Psalms68:29 Ngenxa yesidima sendlu yakho eJerusalem izikumkani ziza zipheth' imirhumo. 
Psalms68:30 Bakhalimele abo bahlala eJiputa, isizwe esiziphetheleyo izizwe, esicinezela ezinye ngenxa yomrhumo. Isizwe esingumnqay' ulambile sizichitha-chithile ezinye izizwe." 
Psalms68:31 Imirhumo mayize iphuma eJiputa; amaKushe makaphakamele kuThixo azibike. 
Psalms68:32 Culelan' uThixo, zizwe zehlabathi; memelelani nimbonge uMhlekazi;" 
Psalms68:33 kulowo ucanda amazulu, nditsho amazulu amandulo, otsho ngelizwi ngathi liyazongoma." 
Psalms68:34 Wancomeni amandla kaThixo obungangamsha buphezu koSirayeli, omagunya akhe asesibhakabhakeni." 
Psalms68:35 Uyamangalisa uThixo kwikomkhulu lakhe; ewe, nditsho uThixo kaSirayeli. Abantu bakhe ubabela amandla nokomelela. Huntshu-u-u, mbongeni uThixo!" 
Psalms69:1 Awu, khawundihlangule, Thixo! Ndithe gabhu ngentamo emanzini." 
Psalms69:2 Ndiyazika eludakeni olubizelayo, apho kungekho nokuxhathisa. Ndithe dyumpu esizibeni; umsinga uyandintywilisela." 
Psalms69:3 Sendikhale zada zoma, kungokunje ndom' umqala; amehlo afiphele kukujong' enkalweni, ndilangazelela wena, Thixo wam." 
Psalms69:4 Abo bandithiyileyo ngaphandle kwesizathu bagqitha inani leenwele zentloko yam. Zizigantsontso ezifuna ukunditshabalalisa, ezindihlasela ngokundityhola. Ndingathini ukuhlawula ndingebanga nje?" 
Psalms69:5 Ke wena, Thixo wam, uyasazi isono sam; amatyala am' aselubala kuwe." 
Psalms69:6 Awu, *Ndikhoyo, Thixo onamandla onke, mandingabahlazisi abo bakholosa ngawe; abakulangazelelayo mabangangcikivwa ngenxa yam, Thixo kaSirayeli." 
Psalms69:7 Kaloku kungenxa yakho ndinyeliswa nje; ngoku sendintywil' ehlazweni. 
Psalms69:8 Sendaba yintlanga kumawethu; ndingumhambi kwiinto zikabawo. 
Psalms69:9 Ke kona ukuzondelela indlu yakho kundongamele; izithuko zabakunyelisayo ziphezu kwam. 
Psalms69:10 Ndalila ezimathontsi, ndizila ukutya, kodwa naleyo yaba sisingcikivo." 
Psalms69:11 Ndithi ndakunxiba ezirhwexayo zokuzila ndisuke ndibe ngundaba-mlonyeni. 
Psalms69:12 Bancokola ngam ezimbuthweni; sendide ndayingoma yamanxila. 
Psalms69:13 Kambe ke, Ndikhoyo, mna ndiyakuthandaza. Ngeli xesha lifanelekileyo, Thixo, nangenxa yendyebo yezibele zothando lwakho, khawuncede undiphendule. Ngenxa yokuthembeka kwakho ndihlangule; naku sendizika eludakeni." 
Psalms69:14 Ndisindise ezintshabeni zam; ndikhuphe emanzini anzongonzongo. 
Psalms69:15 Ewe, mandingantywiliselwa ngumsinga; mandingarhaxwa kwisiziba esimnyama; mandingaginywa yinzonzobila." 
Psalms69:16 Hayi ubuhle bezibele zakho! Ndikhoyo, ndivelele undiphendule; ewe, ngokobuninzi beenceba zakho ndive!" 
Psalms69:17 Musa ukusifulathela isicaka sakho. Ndibandezelekile; nceda undiphendule. 
Psalms69:18 Sondela undisindise; ndikhulule ezintshabeni zam. 
Psalms69:19 Uyayazi indlela endingcikivwa ngayo; uyazi ukuba andinto yanto, ndihlazekile; uyazazi zonke iintshaba zam." 
Psalms69:20 Izinyeliso ziwaphule umoya wam; kungokunje ndivikivekile. Ndathemba ukukhuzwa, kodwa nya! Nokuthuthuzelwa andakufumana." 
Psalms69:21 Ndaweni yokutya ndanikwa ityhefu; endaweni yamanzi yaba yiviniga. 
Psalms69:22 Mabenzakaliswe kwakukutya kwabo, amatheko abo abe ngumgibe kubo." 
Psalms69:23 Mabamfanyekiswe bangaboni; umzimba wabo mawutyhutyhwe lidumbe. 
Psalms69:24 Mabagutyungelwe yingqumbo yakho; mabatshiswe ngumsindo wakho. 
Psalms69:25 Mawube linxuwa umzi wabo, makungahlali nabani kuwo," 
Psalms69:26 kuba bayamtshutshisa ombethileyo, baphoxise ngaye omenzakalisileyo." 
Psalms69:27 Bancine ngesona sohlwayo; mabaphoswe yinceba yakho. 
Psalms69:28 Mabacinywe kwincwadi yoludwe lwabaphilayo, mabangadweliswa namalungisa." 
Psalms69:29 Kambe ke ndiyajwaqeka yintlungu; ndonyule undisindise, Thixo." 
Psalms69:30 Ndiya kumemelela ndibonge uThixo; ndiya kumncoma ndidomboze. 
Psalms69:31 Lo ke wona umbulelo ubalasele; ungaphezulu kokubulela ngethole kuNdikhoyo, uyidlula lee inkunzi yenkomo." 
Psalms69:32 Ke bona abahlelelekileyo baya kuvuya; abamlangazelelayo uThixo bokhuthazeka. 
Psalms69:33 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uyabeva abahlelelekileyo; akabacekisi abakhe ababanjiweyo. 
Psalms69:34 Dandulukani, mazulu nani hlabathi, nimbonge, nani zilwandle nako konke okushukumayo kuni!" 
Psalms69:35 Kuba uThixo uya kuyisindisa iZiyon, aphinde azakhe izixeko zakwaJuda. Izicaka zakhe ziya kuba ngabemi bakhona," 
Psalms69:36 izizukulwana zona zidle ilifa, bathi nabamthandayo bahlale khona." 
Psalms70:1 Awu, khawuncede undihlangule, Thixo! Khawuleza, *Ndikhoyo, undincede!" 
Psalms70:2 Mabadane badideke abandizondayo; mabarhoxe baphoxeke abazungula ukundenzakalisa. 
Psalms70:3 Mabajike benyoshoza abo bathi tshotsho vityo. 
Psalms70:4 Abakulangazelelayo mabavuye bagcobe ngawe; abaluthandayo usindiso lwakho mabangaphezi ukuthi: “Huntshu – uyingangalala uThixo!” 
Psalms70:5 Ke mna ndilihlwempu, ndiludwayi; awu, Thixo, khawundivelele! Umncedi nomhlanguli wam nguwe; sukuba saphozisa maseko, Ndikhoyo!" 
Psalms71:1 *Ndikhoyo, ndizimela ngawe, mandingaze ndidaniswe." 
Psalms71:2 Njengokuba ulilungisa, ndihlangule undisindise; ndiphulaphule, undikhulule." 
Psalms71:3 Yiba ngumqolomba wokuzimela; yiba yinqaba endiphephela kuyo. Thetha ngezwi ndikhuseleke; kaloku uligwiba elindikhuselayo. 
Psalms71:4 Thixo wam, ndihlangule kwabakhohlakeleyo, ndingabanjwa ngabagwenxa nezikhohlakali." 
Psalms71:5 Kaloku ithemba lam nguwe, Nkosi; ndakholosa ngawe ndisengumntwana, Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms71:6 Ndaqamela ngawe kwasekuzalweni; ndakhutshwa nguwe kumama. Ndiya kukubonga njalo-njalo. 
Psalms71:7 Ndisisimanga kwabaninzi, kodwa ke wena uyandikhusela." 
Psalms71:8 Ndiswel' imilomo yokukubonga, ndikudumise maxa onke." 
Psalms71:9 Ungandilahli ndakuguga; ungandishiyi ndakuphelelwa ngamandla. 
Psalms71:10 Iintshaba zifakan' imilomo ngam; abandizungulayo bayacebisana. 
Psalms71:11 Bathi: “Ulahliwe nguThixo. Masimsukele simgxagxamise. Akukho uya kumhlangula.” 
Psalms71:12 Sondela kum, Thixo! Khawuleza undincede, Thixo wam!" 
Psalms71:13 Abandihlaselayo mabahlazeke babhubhe. Ngamana baphoxeka bahlazeka abazungula ukundenzakalisa. 
Psalms71:14 Ndiya kuthembela kuwe rhoqo, ndikubonge njalo-njalo." 
Psalms71:15 Ndiya kububhengeza ubulungisa bakho, ndihlale ndiluvakalisa usindiso lwakho nakuba lungenakuphicothwa." 
Psalms71:16 Ndize kukudumisa, Mhlekazi Ndikhoyo, ngenxa yamandla akho, ndikubonge ngobulungisa obungakanana." 
Psalms71:17 Wandifundisa kwasebuncinaneni, Thixo. Unangoku ndisayincoma imisebenzi yakho, kuba iyamangalisa." 
Psalms71:18 Nangona ndiyingwevu nje, sukundilahla, Thixo, ndide ndiwabhengeze amandla akho nakwizizukulwana ezizayo." 
Psalms71:19 Amandla nobulungisa bakho, Thixo, bufikelela emazulwini. Kambe zinkulu izinto ozenzileyo. Awu, Thixo, akakho onjengawe!" 
Psalms71:20 Undithubelezise ezinkathazweni ezininzi; kambe ke uya kundihlangula ekufeni, undikhuphe emathunjini omhlaba." 
Psalms71:21 Uya kundizimasa, undithuthuzele kwakhona." 
Psalms71:22 Ndiya kubeth' ihapu ndikubonge, kuba uthembekile, Thixo wam. Ndobeth' ikatala ndikudumise, wena Ngcwele kaSirayeli." 
Psalms71:23 Ndiya kumemelela ndinemincili, ndicule ngokuzimisela okukhulu ngenxa yokuba undihlangule." 
Psalms71:24 Ndiya kubalisa ngobulungisa bakho, ndithethe ngabo ndingaphezi, kuba abo babezama ukundenzakalisa bahlazisiwe batsho baphoxeka." 
Psalms72:1 Mthi jize ngobulumko bokulawula ukumkani, Thixo; mabele ukunyaniseka kwakho umntwan' egazi;" 
Psalms72:2 ukuze abaphathe ngobulungisa abantu bakho, abalawule ngokubazelelela abahlelelekileyo." 
Psalms72:3 Mazihlaziyeke iinduli neentaba ziqhame; makube yinzolo inkqubela nobulungisa. 
Psalms72:4 Ngamana yena wawakhusela amahlwempu, abancede abo bahlelelekileyo, abanyhashe abacinezeli." 
Psalms72:5 Abantu mabambuse bamkhonze xa lisaman' ukuvela ilanga, lo gama isakhanyisa nenyanga, kuye kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Psalms72:6 Makabe njengemvula emasimini, abe njengomvimbi emhlabeni." 
Psalms72:7 Makande amalungisa ngemihla yakhe; ewe, axhamle inzolo de ingabi sabikho inyanga." 
Psalms72:8 Ngamana olwakhe ulawulo lwasuka elwandle lwesa elwandle, lusuke emlanjeni iEfrati luse eziphelweni zehlabathi." 
Psalms72:9 Ngamana baqubuda kuye abasentlango, iintshaba zakhe zity' umhlaba." 
Psalms72:10 Ngamana ookumkani baseTashishe nabeziqithi bakhuph' imirhumo, abaseSheba nabaseSebha bakhuph' isithabathaba." 
Psalms72:11 Bonk' ookumkani mabakhahlele kuye, zonk' izizwe zimbuse." 
Psalms72:12 Uyabahlangula abakhalayo, amahlwempu nabangenabani." 
Psalms72:13 Uyavelana nababuthathaka neentsizana, abasindise abahlelelekileyo." 
Psalms72:14 Ubakhulula kwingcinezelo nakwizibhovubhovu; kuye lixabisekile igazi labo. 
Psalms72:15 Kuye sithi: “Mpilo-nde-ntle!” Mayize kuye igolide yaseShebha; makathandazelwe njalo-njalo, iintsikelelo zihlale zivuza phezu kwakhe." 
Psalms72:16 Ngamana kwayindyebo emhlabeni, neencopho zeentaba ziqhame, kuchume njengaseLebhanon. Mabanyakazele abantu ezixekweni, baxel' ingca emadlelweni." 
Psalms72:17 Igama lakhe malingaze liphele; malibe sisimakade lixel' ilanga. Ngamana bonk' abantu bamdumisa; ewe, mabamnqwenelele iintsikelelo, zonk' izizwe zimthamsanqele." 
Psalms72:18 Ngamana wadunyiswa *uNdikhoyo, uThixo kaSirayeli, ekukuphela kwakhe owenza imimangaliso enje." 
Psalms72:19 Huntshu-u-u! Masibongwe isidima segama lakhe kude kube nini nanini! Ngamana waphuphuma umhlaba sisihomo nesithozela sakhe! Huntshu-u-u! ( 
Psalms72:20 Iyaphela apha incwadi yemihobe kaDavide unyana kaJese.) 
Psalms73:1 Ngenene uThixo umphethe kakuhle uSirayeli; ulungile kwabantliziyo zinyulu. 
Psalms73:2 Kodwa ke mna suka ndathandabuza, ewe, gcwizi ndityibilike," 
Psalms73:3 kuba ndinekhwele ngabaqhayisayo, kukubona inkqubela yabakhohlakeleyo." 
Psalms73:4 Kaloku bona abazani nantlungu; baphile bayimiqaba-qaba. 
Psalms73:5 Abakhathazwa nto njengabanye abantu; abafunyanwa zizibetho njengabanye. 
Psalms73:6 Ngoko ke bagaxel' ikratshi; bathi wambu ugonyamelo. 
Psalms73:7 Badumb' amehlo kukutyeba; iintliziyo ziphuphum' ubuqhophololo. 
Psalms73:8 Bayangcikiva benentlamba; baziphakamisile basongela ngengcinezelo. 
Psalms73:9 Bangcikiva nkqu namazulu; batheth' unothanda emhlabeni. 
Psalms73:10 Ke bona abantu bayabamkela; barhorhozela emva kwabo. 
Psalms73:11 Bathi: “UThixo ngeke aqonde; uPhezukonke ngeke asibhaqe.” 
Psalms73:12 Banjalo ke abakhohlakeleyo; abazihluphi nganto, kodwa bayahluma." 
Psalms73:13 Ngani ke ukuba ndiziphathe kakuhle, ndizigcine ndinyulu?" 
Psalms73:14 Kaloku andahlukani nentlupheko; miso le ndiyohlwaywa. 
Psalms73:15 Xa bendithetha kanjalo bendingaba ndingcatsha abantu bakho. 
Psalms73:16 Ndizamile ukuyiphonononga le nyewe, kodwa suka yayinkinge kum." 
Psalms73:17 Ndide ke ndabhenela engcweleni kaThixo, ndacacelwa ke sisiphelo sabo." 
Psalms73:18 Ngenene ubabeka emtyibilizini, bawe batshabalale." 
Psalms73:19 Ngephanyazo baba nesiphelo esilumezayo, beyela bephanziswa kukunkwantya." 
Psalms73:20 Nkosi, banjengephupha ekuphaphameni komntu; ubume balo buyalibaleka akuvuka." 
Psalms73:21 Ngokuya ndandibindekile, ndikhathazekile entliziyweni," 
Psalms73:22 ndandingaqondi, ndisisidenge; ndandiziphethe njengesilwanyana." 
Psalms73:23 Kambe ke ndisoloko ndikuwe; undithe chu ngesandla. 
Psalms73:24 Ewe, wena uyandithundeza; kamva ke wondamkelela ewongeni." 
Psalms73:25 Ndikholosa ngawe usemazulwini; ungowam nje ke, andilinanze nganto ihlabathi." 
Psalms73:26 Umzimba nentliziyo zingade ziphelelwe, wona amandla am nguThixo, ulibango lam naphakade." 
Psalms73:27 Abakutyeshelayo baya kubhanga; uyabatshabalalisa abaqhankqalazi. 
Psalms73:28 Kum ke kuluyolo ukuba kufuphi kuwe, Thixo. Nkosi yam *Ndikhoyo, ndikhuselwa nguwe, ukuze ndibalise ngemisebenzi yakho." 
Psalms74:1 Awu, Thixo! Ngani ukuba wenjenje ukusilahla? Awusathothi na umsindo wakho kubantu bakho?" 
Psalms74:2 Khawulikhumbule ibandla lakho owalifumana mandulo, owalikhululayo ukuze libe lilifa lakho; khumbula ikhaya lakho intaba iZiyon." 
Psalms74:3 Khawuye kuloo mabhodlo; iintshaba zabhuqa konke endlwini yakho. 
Psalms74:4 Zabharhumla phakathi endaweni engcwele, zaza zamisa eyazo indwe." 
Psalms74:5 Ezo zinxosha-nxosha zabhulula konke, ngathi ngabagawuli begec' imithi." 
Psalms74:6 Zona izinto ezenziwe ngomthi bazintlekeza ngooncelemba nezando. 
Psalms74:7 Zayintumek' umlilo indawo engcwele, zayixabhela zayidiliza indlu yakho engcwele." 
Psalms74:8 Zathi: “Masibabhangise kuthi tu.” Kulo lonke bazitshisa iindawo zokunqula. 
Psalms74:9 Eyakuthi indwe ayisabonakali; akusekho namshumayeli, kungekho waziyo ukuba koda kube nini na." 
Psalms74:10 Koda kube nini, Thixo, utshaba lungcikiva? Lohlala lukunyelisa njalo-njalo?" 
Psalms74:11 Kutheni ukuba ungasincedi? Ngani ukuba usonge izandla? 
Psalms74:12 Kambe ke wena, Thixo, waba ngukumkani kwamandulo. Uyabahlangula abantu ehlabathini liphela." 
Psalms74:13 Ngaloo mandla walahlula-hlula ulwandle, waziqhekez' intloko iingwenya," 
Psalms74:14 wasintlekeza intloko isilo solwandle, sakukutya kwelo libharhileyo." 
Psalms74:15 Wena wampompozisa imithombo nemilanjana, waza wayomisa imilambo engatshiyo." 
Psalms74:16 Yadalwa nguwe imini, ngokunjalo nobusuku; ivela kuwe inyanga, ngokunjalo nelanga." 
Psalms74:17 Yamiswa nguwe imida yehlabathi; ngokukwanjalo ihlobo nobusika. 
Psalms74:18 Awu, *Ndikhoyo, khumbula ukuba iintshaba ziyakusinekela; izibhoja ziyalingcikiva igama lakho." 
Psalms74:19 Ungabayekeli ezintshabeni abantu bakho; khumbula ngokubandezeleka kwabantu bakho. 
Psalms74:20 Khawucinge ngomnqophiso wakho, kuba eli lizwe liphethwe zizibhoja zona zigoxa kwamnyama-ndawo." 
Psalms74:21 Sukubayekela abacinezelweyo; nawo amahlwempu neentsizana makakudumise. 
Psalms74:22 Khawuvuke uhlanganise, Thixo; izibhoja zisoloko zikungcikiva." 
Psalms74:23 Sukuyilibala intsholo yotshaba lwakho, umlembelele wengxolo yabakuchasayo." 
Psalms75:1 Ngxatsho ke, siyakubulela, Thixo! Siyalibabaza igama lakho ngenxa yemisebenzi yakho emangalisayo." 
Psalms75:2 “Ngexesha endilimisileyo ndiya kugweba ndingakhethi buso. 
Psalms75:3 Lakuhexa ihlabathi nabemi balo iintsika zalo zomelezwa ndim. 
Psalms75:4 Kwabazingcayo ndithi: ‘Kahleni ngamabhongo.’ Kwizikhohlakali ndithi: ‘Sanukuqholosa.’ 
Psalms75:5 Yahlukanani nokuzigqatsa; kuyekeni ukubhobhoza.” 
Psalms75:6 Unyuselo aluveli empuma nasentshona, lungaveli nasentlango." 
Psalms75:7 Kaloku nguThixo ogwebayo: uyamthoba lo, amnyuse lowa." 
Psalms75:8 *UNdikhoyo uphethe indebe ngesandla, iphuphuma ingqumbo ebilayo; ubarhabulisa kuyo abagwenxa, boyisela bafince nentlenge." 
Psalms75:9 Kodwa ndohlala ndimncoma njalo-njalo; ndiya kumemelela ndibonga uThixo kaYakobi. 
Psalms75:10 Abagwenxa ndiya kubaphul' iimpondo; ndiluphakamis' uphondo lwamalungisa. 
Psalms76:1 UThixo uyaziwa kwaJuda; igama lakhe lidumile kwaSirayeli. 
Psalms76:2 IseJerusalem indlu yakhe; ikhaya lakhe liseZiyon. 
Psalms76:3 Wazikroboza iintolo namakhakha, amakrele nezikrweqe zemfazwe." 
Psalms76:4 Kambe wena uyamangalisa ngokuqaqamba, ubalasele kuneentaba eziyokoyoko." 
Psalms76:5 Amagorha uwahluthe amaxhoba; amajoni alala undolala, akabi nako ukuzisebenzisa izikrweqe." 
Psalms76:6 Uthi nje wakukhalima, Thixo kaYakobi, amahashe nabawakhweleyo babe zizigede." 
Psalms76:7 Awu, uyamangalisa kambe! Ngubani onokujongana nawe wakuvutha umsindo wakho?" 
Psalms76:8 Wena wagweba usemazulwini, ihlabathi latsho lakhwankqiswa." 
Psalms76:9 Ngokuya wena wawisa isigwebo sokusindisa abacinezelwa behlabathi. 
Psalms76:10 Ngenene ngomsindo wakho uyadunyiswa; abasindileyo kuwo bayayaleka. 
Psalms76:11 Zifezekiseni izithembiso zenu *kuNdikhoyo uThixo; abamngqongileyo mabezise izithabathaba barhume kulowo ufanele ukoyikwa," 
Psalms76:12 kulowo unqamla umoya wamatshawe, ewe, kumrhwaqelisi wezikumkani zehlabathi." 
Psalms77:1 Ndiyakhwaza, ndibhekisa kuThixo; ndikhala kuye, ukuba andiphulaphule." 
Psalms77:2 Ngomhla wenkathazo ndibhenela eNkosini; ebusuku ndiyazingisa, ndiziphakamisela kuyo izandla, umoya wam ungavumi ukuthuthuzeleka." 
Psalms77:3 Ndakucinga ngoThixo, ndiba nesingqala; ndakucamngca, uyatyhafa umoya wam." 
Psalms77:4 Andisabazi nobuthongo; ndixakwe nakukuthetha ziinkathazo. 
Psalms77:5 Hay' imihla yamfamlibe; ndikhumbul' iminyaka yamandulo. 
Psalms77:6 Ebusuku ndidliwa ngumva-ndedwa; ndiyacamngca ndiyicikida intliziyo yam, ndisithi:" 
Psalms77:7 “Ngaba yondilahla kuphele iNkosi, ingaze ibuye indamkele?" 
Psalms77:8 Ngaba lutshitshile na uthando lwayo? Sibhangile na isithembiso sayo? 
Psalms77:9 Selekulibele na uThixo ukubuya ngetarhu? Ngaba umsindo wakhe uluvalile uvelwano?” 
Psalms77:10 Ndide ndithi: “Nantsi eyona indixhelayo: kukunqamka kwamandla kaPhezukonke. 
Psalms77:11 Ndikhumbula izenzo zakho, *Ndikhoyo; ewe, ndicinga ngemimangaliso yamandulo." 
Psalms77:12 Ndicamngca ngemisebenzi yakho; ndetyisa izenzo zakho ezikhwankqisayo.” 
Psalms77:13 Hayi ke beth' ubunyulu bukaThixo! Thixo wuphi ofana noThixo wethu? 
Psalms77:14 Wena unguThixo owenza imimangaliso; amandla akho abonakele phakathi kwabantu; 
Psalms77:15 Wabakhulula ngamandla akho abantu; ewe, nditsho oonyana bakaYakobi nabakaJosefu." 
Psalms77:16 Uthi wakuvela wena, Thixo, arhwaqel' amanzi, nenzongonzongo yolwandle ingcangcazele." 
Psalms77:17 Amafu wona atsho avuz' amanzi, isibhakabhaka sona sagragrama, imibane yona yaphithizela." 
Psalms77:18 Izithonga zeendudumo zazihamba nezaqhwithi, imibane yalikhanyisa lonke ihlabathi, umhlaba wangcangcazela wanyikima." 
Psalms77:19 Wena wadabul' ulwandle, wacand' amanzi anzongonzongo. Ke wona umkhondo wakho awufumaneki." 
Psalms77:20 Wabakhokela njengomhlambi abantu bakho ngesandla sikaMosis noAron. 
Psalms78:1 Khaniyibekel' iindlebe, mawethu, imfundiso yam; khanindiph' iindlebe ndithethe." 
Psalms78:2 Ndiza kuthetha nani ngemizekeliso; ndiza kuphokoz' iintsonkotha zamandulo. 
Psalms78:3 Ndixel' izinto esazivayo nesizaziyo, izintw' esazixelelwa ngoobawo." 
Psalms78:4 Asinako ukubafihlela abantwana babo, koko sozibhengeza kwizizukulwana ezizayo: imisebenzi emihle *kaNdikhoyo namandla akhe, ewe, nditsho nemimangaliso ayenzileyo." 
Psalms78:5 Wamisela umthetho kwaYakobi, wanikela imimiselo kwaSirayeli; wabanqonqozisa ngayo oobawo, ukuze bafundise abantwana babo," 
Psalms78:6 khon' ukuze ziyazi izizukulwana ezizayo, ewe, nditsho nabangekalibon' ilanga. Bona ke bayigqithisele kubantwana babo," 
Psalms78:7 ukwenzela ukuba bakholose ngoThixo, bangaze bayilibale imisebenzi yakhe, koko bayithobele imimiselo yakhe;" 
Psalms78:8 ewe, bona bangafuzi ooyise, isizukulwana esineenkani nesigwilikayo, abantu abantliziyo zibhetyebhetye, abangazange banyaniseka kuThixo." 
Psalms78:9 AmaEfrayim axhoba ngeentolo, engàxhob' ef' amacala, kodwa aswantsula ngomhla wedabi." 
Psalms78:10 Akawuthobelanga umnqophiso kaThixo, asuka ala ukuhamba ngokomthetho." 
Psalms78:11 Suke ayilibala imisebenzi yakhe, imiqondiso awayewabonise yona." 
Psalms78:12 UThixo wenza imimangaliso phambi kooyise, eJiputa kumathafa aseZowan." 
Psalms78:13 Walahlula-hlula ulwandle, bawela, amanzi aba yinduli ngapha nangapha." 
Psalms78:14 Wabakhokela ngelifu emini, ebusuku wabakhokela ngomlilo." 
Psalms78:15 Waqhekeza amawa entlango, basela amanzi ampompozayo." 
Psalms78:16 Wavelisa imithombo elulwalweni, amanzi aqukuqela ngathi yimilambo." 
Psalms78:17 Kodwa baphindelela ukona, bavukelana naye uPhezukonke entlango." 
Psalms78:18 Bamvavanya ngabom uThixo ngokubiza ukutya ababekubawela. 
Psalms78:19 Baphoxisa ngoThixo bathi: “Angakuthatha phi na ukutya apha entlango? 
Psalms78:20 Ewe, waliqhekeza iliwa, antyunty' amanzi, kwaza kwagqobhoza imilambo. Ewe, makasinik' isonka kaloku, abaph' inyama abantu bakhe.”" 
Psalms78:21 Akuyiva le nto uNdikhoyo wacaphuka, waza wamlenya ngomlilo uYakobi. Ewe, wanoburhalarhume kuSirayeli," 
Psalms78:22 kuba bengakholosanga ngoThixo, bengathembanga ukuba angabasindisa." 
Psalms78:23 Kambe ke wayalela isibhakabhaka, zaza zavuleka iingcango zezulu," 
Psalms78:24 yaza *imana yawa njengemvula, wabanika batya ukutya kwaphezulu." 
Psalms78:25 Ewe, abantu batye ukutya kwezithunywa zezulu, baza batya bada bahlutha." 
Psalms78:26 Wathumela umoya wasempuma wabhudla, ngamandla akhe wavusa umoya wasezantsi." 
Psalms78:27 Wabathobela inyama, kwangathi sisivungu-vungu; inyambalala yeentaka ezingangentlabathi yolwandle" 
Psalms78:28 waziwisa apho babemise khona, ewe, zajikeleza iintente zabo." 
Psalms78:29 Abantu batya bada bahlutha; kaloku wabanika loo nto babeyifuna. 
Psalms78:30 Kanti ke bathe bengekadikwa, besaxakekile besatya njalo," 
Psalms78:31 suka wavutha umsindo kuThixo, wababulala abona bomeleleyo, wabageqa abafana bakwaSirayeli." 
Psalms78:32 Nakuba kunjalo baphikelela ukona, bangenelwa kukudelela, àbakholwa." 
Psalms78:33 Waza ke wababhangisa okomphunga, imihla yabo yaphela lishwangusha." 
Psalms78:34 Akubohlwaya babuyela kuye, baguquka bazinikela kuThixo." 
Psalms78:35 Bakhumbula ukuba nguThixo inqaba yabo, bangáhlangulwa nguThixo uPhezukonke." 
Psalms78:36 Kodwa kuloo nto yonke bamqhatha; bâthi: “Lala, gusha, ndikuchebe.”" 
Psalms78:37 Zabe iintliziyo zona zikude lee kuye, bengakhange bawunanze umnqophiso wakhe." 
Psalms78:38 Kambe ke yena uThixo waba nenceba, wabaxolela iziphoso zabo, wazibamba akabatshabalalisa; ewe, wayewubamba futhi umsindo wakhe, wayithomalalisa ingqumbo yakhe." 
Psalms78:39 Wakhumbula ukuba bangabantu, into edlula njengomoya iphele." 
Psalms78:40 Kwaba kaninzi bemvukela entlango; ewe, babemtsho abe neenzingo kwelingamiwayo." 
Psalms78:41 Baphinda-phinda ukumvavanya, bamcaphukisa oyiNgcwele kaSirayeli." 
Psalms78:42 Bamlibala àbamkhumbula ngamandla akhe, bawulibala umhla wokuhlangulwa kwabo elutshabeni." 
Psalms78:43 Abayikhumbulanga imiqondiso yakhe yaseJiputa, nemimangaliso yakhe kumathafa aseZowan," 
Psalms78:44 apho wawajika khona amanzi aba ligazi, kwayinqaba kumaJiputa ukusela emithonjeni." 
Psalms78:45 Wabathumela ngamabubu eempukane, zabangcungcuthekisa, ngokunjalo namasele abazisela imbubho." 
Psalms78:46 Izilimo zabo wazithumela ngesihlava, isivuno sabhuqwa ziinkumbi." 
Psalms78:47 Idiliya yabo wayivuthulula ngesiphango, ke wona amakhiwane wawarhawula ngeqabaka." 
Psalms78:48 Iinkomo zabo wazintlitha ngesichotho, imihlambi yabo yalenywa yimibane." 
Psalms78:49 Wasuka ke wavutha umsindo wakhe, wayivulela ingqumbo yakhe ecaphukile, wababandezela ngolunya, umkhosi wezithunywa wabatshabalalisa." 
Psalms78:50 Zange abe sazibamba, wawuvulela umsindo wakhe, akabasindisa ekufeni; ewe, wasuka wabathumela ngobhubhani." 
Psalms78:51 Wawathi qwaka onke amazibulo amaJiputa, wabageqa abaligugu neqhayiya lakwaHam." 
Psalms78:52 Kanti ke wabakhokela njengeegusha abantu bakhe, entlango wabalusa ngathi ngumhlambi." 
Psalms78:53 Wabalondoloza batsho baphelelwa ngamaxhala, kambe ke ulwandle lwaziginya iintshaba zabo." 
Psalms78:54 Wabakhokela wabasa kwelilelakhe ilizwe, entabeni awayizuza ngamandla akhe." 
Psalms78:55 Bakufika wazidudula izizwe zabhaca, abantu bakhe wabacandela umhlaba wazo, amaSirayeli athi zava ezikhundleni zazo." 
Psalms78:56 Kanti ke bamlinga bamvukela uThixo uPhezukonke; ewe, abazange bawuthobele umthetho wakhe." 
Psalms78:57 Bamvukela, bahamba ngobutshijolo booyise; basuka àbanyaniseka, àbathembeka okwesaphetha esityokololo." 
Psalms78:58 Bamcaphukisa ngokukodwa ngokunqula izithixo, bamkhweletisa ngemifanekiso ababeyinqula." 
Psalms78:59 Akuyibona le nto uThixo waqumba kangangokuba wasuka wamhlamba uSirayeli. 
Psalms78:60 Ewe, wafuduka emzini wakhe eShilo, wayishiya indlu awayehlala kuyo phakathi kwabantu." 
Psalms78:61 Wabayekela yathinjwa ityesi yomnqophiso, iqhayiya labo lemka notshaba." 
Psalms78:62 Abantu bakhe baba zizisulu zekrele, ilifa lakhe waliqwenga ngengqumbo." 
Psalms78:63 Abafana batshayelwa ngumlilo, zatsho iintombi zaphoswa ngumtshato." 
Psalms78:64 Ababingeleli bageqwa likrele, kodwa abahlolokazi babo àbalila." 
Psalms78:65 INkosi yathi khwaphuphu njengobelele, njengegorha elishushiswa yiwayini." 
Psalms78:66 Wazikhaba iintshaba zakhe, zatsho zaxabheleka umlibe." 
Psalms78:67 Wayilahla indlu kaJosefu, wayibukula indlu kaEfrayim." 
Psalms78:68 Kodwa wayichonga indlu kaJuda, intaba iZiyon ayithandayo." 
Psalms78:69 Wayakha yafana nezulu indlu yakhe; ikhaya lakhe sisimakade, linjengomhlaba." 
Psalms78:70 Wasinyula isicaka sakhe uDavide, wasiphuthuma ekwaluseni." 
Psalms78:71 Wamkhupha ekwaluseni amatakane, wamenza umalusi wabantu bakhe, wangumalusi kaSirayeli ilifa lakhe." 
Psalms78:72 Wabalusa ngokuzimisela nangenyameko; ewe, wabakhokela ngobuchule." 
Psalms79:1 Iintshaba ziwuhlasele umhlaba wakho, Thixo; ziyixabhele indlu yakho engcwele, iJerusalem itsho yalinxuwa." 
Psalms79:2 Imizimba yezicaka zakho kukutya kweentaka, izidumbu zazo zityiwa ziinyamakazi." 
Psalms79:3 Igazi lazo laphalala njengamanzi, laba ngumgxobhozo ojikelez' iJerusalem, kungekho bani wokuzifihla." 
Psalms79:4 Sesiyintlekisa kubamelwane; bayakrwecana bephoxisa ngathi. 
Psalms79:5 Koda kube nini, *Ndikhoyo? Uya kusoloko ucaphukile? Lohlala livutha ikhwele lakho?" 
Psalms79:6 Wugalele ezintlangeni umsindo wakho, kwabo bangakukhathalelanga wena, kwizikumkani ezingakunquliyo." 
Psalms79:7 Kuba bamqwengile uYakobi, babhuqe bavuthulula konke." 
Psalms79:8 Ungasixhibi ngenxa yezono zoobawo; nceda velana nathi kuba siphelelwe. 
Psalms79:9 Khawuncede usisindise, Thixo wethu, ngenxa yesidima segama lakho. Sihlangule usixolele amatyala ethu ngenxa yegama lakho." 
Psalms79:10 Ngani ukuba iintlanga zide zithi: “Uphi lo Thixo wabo?” Liphindezele igazi lezicaka zakho; masikubone uzohlwaya iintlanga. 
Psalms79:11 Yive incwina yâbo bathinjiweyo; ngaloo mandla akho basindise abo bagwetyelwe ukufa. 
Psalms79:12 Babuyisele kasixhenxe abamelwane ngenxa yezenyeliso abakuthuka ngazo, Mhlekazi." 
Psalms79:13 Ke thina bantu baziigusha ozalusayo siya kukubulela njalo-njalo; ewe, soze sipheze ukukuncoma!" 
Psalms80:1 Khawubek' iindlebe, malusi kaSirayeli! Wena makhokel' uJosefu njengomhlambi, wena osesihlalweni *ngakwizithunywa ezimaphiko," 
Psalms80:2 khanya kwaEfrayim nakwaBhenjamin nakwaManase; ngaloo mandla akho yiza usisindise. 
Psalms80:3 Awu, Thixo, yiba nebuyambo; velana nathi usisindise!" 
Psalms80:4 *Ndikhoyo Thixo onamandla onke, koda kube nini ungayamkeli imithandazo yabantu bakho?" 
Psalms80:5 Wena usondle ngeentsizi, wasiseza iinyembezi." 
Psalms80:6 Usitsho abamelwane baxhwithana ngathi; ngoku iintshaba zihlekisa ngathi. 
Psalms80:7 Awu, Thixo Somandla, yiba nebuyambo; velana nathi usisindise!" 
Psalms80:8 Wena weza nomdiliya eJiputa, wazigxotha iintlanga, watyala wona." 
Psalms80:9 Walima wawulungiselela umhlaba, wamila waxanda emhlabeni wonke." 
Psalms80:10 Ithunzi lawo lafikelela ezintabeni, lawagquma amasebe emisedare." 
Psalms80:11 Amasebe awo afikelela elwandle, iingcambu zafikelela e-Efrati." 
Psalms80:12 Uludilizeleni ke uthango lwawo, abadlulayo sebegqwathula iziqhamo nje?" 
Psalms80:13 Ngoku sewunqunqudwa nayingulube; iinyamakazi zizifikisela kuwo. 
Psalms80:14 Khawusivelele, Thixo onamandla onke; khawuphos' amehlo uzibonele, uwuhlangule umdiliya." 
Psalms80:15 Nditsho isebe owalityalayo, ewe, elo latyalwa zizandla zakho." 
Psalms80:16 Bawugecile baza bawutshisa; batshabalalise ngomsindo wakho. 
Psalms80:17 Kodwa ke basindise abantu bakho abayinqobo, abo uzomelezele bona." 
Psalms80:18 Thina ke soze sabuya mva; sihlaziye saye sohlala sikudumisa. 
Psalms80:19 Awu, Thixo Somandla, yiba nebuyambo; velana nathi usisindise!" 
Psalms81:1 Dandulukani ngovuyo, nibonge uThixo osikhuselayo; memelelani nidumise uThixo kaYakobi." 
Psalms81:2 Hlabelani nitsho ngohadi; dlobani ngoncuthu lweehapu neekatala. 
Psalms81:3 Vuthelani ixilongo ukuthwasa kwenyanga, nasekuhlanganeni kwenyanga mhla ngetheko." 
Psalms81:4 Kaloku lowo ngummiselo wakwaSirayeli, lisiko loThixo kaYakobi." 
Psalms81:5 Walenza langummiselo kwaSirayeli, mhla wahlasela elamaJiputa. Ndiva ilizwi endingaliqondiyo, lisithi:" 
Psalms81:6 “Ndawothula umthwalo owawusemagxeni enu, zaxibilika iingobozi ezandleni." 
Psalms81:7 Nakhala ngomhla wengxingongo, ndanihlangula; ndaniphendula ndingabonakali ndisezindudumeni; ndanivavanya emthonjeni waseMeribha." 
Psalms81:8 “Ndathi sigqaleni isilumkiso sam, bantu bam; Sirayeli, akwaba ubuya kundiva!" 
Psalms81:9 Ze ningamnquli *uthixo wesinye isizwe; ongomnye eningamaziyo ze ningamnquli. 
Psalms81:10 Ndim mna *Ndikhoyo uThixo wenu owanikhuphayo kwelamaJiputa; khamisani, mna ndiza kunifunza." 
Psalms81:11 “Phi ke! Abantu bam zange baphulaphule; abafunanga nokuva oku ngam. 
Psalms81:12 Ndaza ke ndabayekela kwezo nkani zabo, ukuze benze ngokuthanda kwabo." 
Psalms81:13 Ngamana nandiphulaphula, bantu bam; akwaba ubungandithobela, Sirayeli." 
Psalms81:14 Bendingazigeqayo iintshaba zakho; ewe, bendiya kuzinyhasha iintshaba zakho." 
Psalms81:15 Abamthiyileyo uNdikhoyo bebeya kushwabana, isigwebo sabo sibe ngumlibe." 
Psalms81:16 Bendiya kunondla ngeyona-yona ngqolowa, ndinanelise ngobusi obupholileyo.”" 
Psalms82:1 UThixo uchophele intlanganiso *yoothixo; nguye olawulayo koothixo bonke; 
Psalms82:2 uthi: “Kunini nilawula ngegobe, nibabonelela abakhohlakeleyo!" 
Psalms82:3 Khanilungiselele abaxakekileyo neenkedama, nibonelele iintsizana namahlwempu." 
Psalms82:4 Khanikhulule abahlelelekileyo nama-athalala; bahlanguleni abagonyamelwa zizikhohlakali. 
Psalms82:5 “Basemnyameni ombode-mbode; bayafathula njengempumputhela, nangona lona ihlabathi lizama-zama." 
Psalms82:6 Ndithi: Ewe kambe, ningoothixo; nonke ningoonyana bakaPhezukonke." 
Psalms82:7 Kambe ke niya kufa njengamntu wonke, nibhange njengamatshawe.”" 
Psalms82:8 Awu, Thixo, khawulingenele ngomgwebo ihlabathi; andithi kaloku zonke izizwe zisesandleni sakho!" 
Psalms83:1 Awu, Thixo, ungathini ukuthi cwaka? Ngani ukuba wonwabe, Thixo?" 
Psalms83:2 Nâzo iintshaba zakho zikuvukela. Nâbo abakuthiyileyo bephithizela. 
Psalms83:3 Ewe, babenzela amayelenqe abantu bakho; badibene ngabo abo ubakhuselayo." 
Psalms83:4 Bathi: “Yizani sisibhangise esi sizwe, uSirayeli angabi sakhunjulwa.”" 
Psalms83:5 Kaloku bona bathetha nto-nye, bevana ngawe ngegobe." 
Psalms83:6 Nditsho amaEdom namaIshmayeli, amaMowabhi kunye namaHagare," 
Psalms83:7 amaGebhali, ama-Amoni, nama-Amaleki, amaFilistiya nabemi baseTire." 
Psalms83:8 Angenelele nama-Asiriya, bebonke bancedisana nenzala kaLothe." 
Psalms83:9 Khawubafumanise esamaMidiyan ngomhla kaSisera noJabhin entlanjeni iKishon," 
Psalms83:10 abatshabalela e-Endore, banyhashwa batsho bangumgquba." 
Psalms83:11 Iinjengele zabo zifanise no-Orebhe noZebhe; amatshawe abo wanyhashe njengoZebha noZalmuna. 
Psalms83:12 Kaloku bona bafuna ukuwohlutha umhlaba wabantu olibango likaThixo. 
Psalms83:13 Thixo wam, baphephethe njengothuli, babe njengomququ ophetshethwa ngumoya." 
Psalms83:14 Mabatshayelwe okwehlathi lilenywa ngumlilo, okweentaba zibhuqwa ngumlilo." 
Psalms83:15 Ewe, yiba sisitshu emva kwabo, barhwaqelise ngesaqhwithi." 
Psalms83:16 Mabambatshe bade banyoshoze, ukuze badane bakulangazelele, *Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms83:17 Baswantsulise, bahlale bengcungcutheka; ewe, mabafele ehlazweni." 
Psalms83:18 Mabavume ukuba nguwe wedwa onguNdikhoyo, uPhezukonke obhijel' ihlabathi jikelele." 
Psalms84:1 Hay' ubuhle nokuthandeka komzi wakho, *Ndikhoyo onamandla onke." 
Psalms84:2 Umphefumlo wam uzele lulangazelelo; ewe, ulangazelela inkundla yakwakho, Ndikhoyo. Ndiyamemelela ndicula ngochulumacho, ndidumisa uThixo ophilayo." 
Psalms84:3 Namasomi azakhela iindlwana zawo khona; kwaneenkonjane zifumana ikhaya khona. Amathole azo ziwagcina *esibingelelweni sakho, Ndikhoyo onamandla onke, wena kumkani noThixo wam." 
Psalms84:4 Hay' ithamsanqa lâbo bahlala endlwini yakho, abasoloko bentyiloza bememelela bebonga wena." 
Psalms84:5 Hay' ithamsanqa labantu abaxhotyiswa nguwe, abasoloko belangazelela ukuya eZiyon." 
Psalms84:6 Bathi xa bedlula kwelibharhileyo kutsho kugqabhuke imithombo, iimvula zokuqala zilitsho lithi thande ngamaqula." 
Psalms84:7 Baya besomelela ngokomelela, bade bavele phambi koThixo eZiyon." 
Psalms84:8 Ndikhoyo, Thixo Somandla, wuve umthandazo wam; ndiphulaphule, Thixo kaYakobi." 
Psalms84:9 Thixo, mbone ukumkani wethu; mvelele umamkele umthanjiswa wakho." 
Psalms84:10 Imini enye echithelwe kwakho, Thixo, ingaphezulu kwewaka lemihla echithwe ndaweni yimbi. Kubhetele ndibe ngumgcini-mnyango kwaThixo ndaweni yokungqendeva phakathi kwezaphula-mthetho." 
Psalms84:11 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uThixo ngumkhuseli nelanga lethu; usithi jize ngendili nangobubele. UNdikhoyo akazibandezi izinto ezintle kwabo bamthobela ngokupheleleyo. 
Psalms84:12 Hay' ithamsanqa lomntu okholosa ngawe, Ndikhoyo onamandla onke!" 
Psalms85:1 Ewe, *Ndikhoyo, ulazelelele eli lizwe; uYakobi umthe jize ngendyebo nenkqubela." 
Psalms85:2 Ubaxolele abantu bakho ngobugwenxa babo; ubuye wazilibala izono zabo. 
Psalms85:3 Ubuye wayibamba ingqumbo yakho; uphinde wathomalala umsindo wakho. 
Psalms85:4 Yiba nebuyambo, Thixo, usisindise, ungabi sakhathazeka sithi." 
Psalms85:5 Ngani ukuba ungabi saphela umsindo wakho? Koda kube zizizukulwana ucaphukile na? 
Psalms85:6 Nceda ubuye usihlaziye, abantu bakho bagcobe ngawe." 
Psalms85:7 Maziphuphumele kuthi izibele zothando lwakho; awu, Ndikhoyo, sithi jize ngenkululeko yakho." 
Psalms85:8 Mandiweve amazwi kaNdikhoyo uThixo; kaloku uzisa uxolo kubantu bakhe, kwabo bayimilowo yakhe engajika-jikiyo." 
Psalms85:9 Ngenene usindiso lwakhe lukufuphi kwabo bamthobelayo; nobungangamsha bakhe bohlala kweli lizwe. 
Psalms85:10 Kodibana uthando nokunyaniseka, ubulungisa noxolo bulale ngengub' enye." 
Psalms85:11 Ukunyaniseka kuya kuntshula emhlabeni; ubulungisa bona boqwalasela busesibhakabhakeni. 
Psalms85:12 Ewe, uNdikhoyo wosithi jize ngenkqubela, lona ilizwe lethu libe yintombazana." 
Psalms85:13 Yena uya kukhokelwa bubulungisa; ewe, buya kumgabulela izigcawu." 
Psalms86:1 Khawusabele, *Ndikhoyo, undilungiselele; kaloku mna ndiyimpula kalujaca." 
Psalms86:2 Ndikhusele kaloku, kuba ndiyakuthobela; sihlangule isicaka esikholosa ngawe." 
Psalms86:3 UnguThixo wam, ndibabale, Nkosi. Kaloku mna ndihlala ndikhala kuwe." 
Psalms86:4 Ewe, khawusonwabise isicaka sakho. Nkosi, ndiwunyusela kuwe umthandazo wam." 
Psalms86:5 Kuba wena, Nkosi, ulungile, uyaxolela; uphuphuma luthando kwabo bakholosa ngawe." 
Psalms86:6 Ndikhoyo, wuve umthandazo wam; khawundivele, ndiyakubongoza." 
Psalms86:7 Ndakuba sengxakini, ndibhenela kuwe, kuba wena uyavelana nam." 
Psalms86:8 Nkosi, kubo bonke *oothixo akakho onjengawe, engekho nonemisebenzi enjengeyakho." 
Psalms86:9 Zonke izizwe owazidalayo ziya kukhahlela kuwe, Nkosi, zibonga zibabaza igama lakho." 
Psalms86:10 Kuba wena uyingangalala, uyamangalisa; ewe, nguwe wedwa uThixo." 
Psalms86:11 Khawundifundise iindlela zakho, Ndikhoyo, khon' ukuze ndinamathele enyanisweni. Ewe, ndifundise ukukuhlonela, Nkosi; ndikunqule ndingankwalambisi." 
Psalms86:12 Ndikubulela ngomxhelo wam wonke, Nkosi; Thixo wam, ndolidumisa njalo igama lakho," 
Psalms86:13 kuba ziyandimangalisa izibele zakho; undihlangule enzonzobileni yengcwaba. 
Psalms86:14 Awu, Thixo, zindivukele izibhoja. Ewe, izikrelemnqa ziyandizingela; zona azikukhathalele nganto." 
Psalms86:15 Kambe ke wena, Nkosi, unguThixo onenceba nesisa. Wena ucaphuka kade, uphuphuma uthando nokunyaniseka." 
Psalms86:16 Buya uvelane nam; khawusomeleze isicaka sakho, umhlangule unyana wesicakazana sakho." 
Psalms86:17 Ndinike umqondiso wokundazelelela kwakho, ukuze abandithiyileyo babone badane, kuba wena, Ndikhoyo, undincedile wandithuthuzela." 
Psalms87:1 *UNdikhoyo wasithi zinzi isixeko sakhe phezu kwentaba engcwele. 
Psalms87:2 Ewe, yena akaziva ngeZiyon; ingaphezu kwayo yonke imizi yakwaYakobi." 
Psalms87:3 Ewe, kuthethwa kamnandi ngawe, Ziyon, sixeko sikaThixo:" 
Psalms87:4 “Phakathi kwabo bandaziyo ndibalula iJiputa neBhabheli; ewe, amaFilistiya, amaTire, namaKushe, xa ewonke aphuma eJerusalem.”" 
Psalms87:5 IZiyon kuya kuthiwa ngunozala wezizwe zonke, kuba uPhezukonke uyayixhasa." 
Psalms87:6 Akuzidwelisa zonke izizwe uNdikhoyo, xa zizonke zoba ngabemi baseJerusalem." 
Psalms87:7 Iimvumi nabangqungqayo baya kuthi: “Thina singabomthonyama.” 
Psalms88:1 Emini ndibhenela kuwe, *Ndikhoyo, Msindisi wam; nasebusuku ndizibika kuwe, Thixo wam." 
Psalms88:2 Mawuvakale umthandazo wam kuwe; ndive xa ndikhala kuwe, Thixo wam." 
Psalms88:3 Kuba ndiphahlwe ziinkxwaleko; sendimi phezu kwengcwaba. 
Psalms88:4 Ewe, sendibalelwa kubafi; akusekho yam kwaphela." 
Psalms88:5 Sendinikelwe kwabafileyo; sendifana nowoselweyo othe gangalala engcwabeni. Ndinjengâbo ungasabakhumbuliyo, abo bangasenakuncedakala." 
Psalms88:6 Undithe tywa kwelimnyama ingcwaba, ezantsi emathunjini omhlaba." 
Psalms88:7 Ingqumbo yakho indisibekele, amaza alatyuzayo andongamele." 
Psalms88:8 Undihluthe izihlobo zam ezisenyongweni; kungokunje ziyandenyanya. Ndixinekile, futhi andisenakuphuncula;" 
Psalms88:9 ndiyayengezelisa ngenxa yembandezelo. Ndikhoyo, ndikhala kuwe yonke imihla; ndiphakamela kuwe ngomthandazo." 
Psalms88:10 Imimangaliso ngaba uyenzela abafileyo na? Boze bavuke bakudumise na? 
Psalms88:11 Uthando lwakho luxelwa ngabafileyo na? Ukunyaniseka kwakho kwaziwa kwantshabalala na? 
Psalms88:12 Ngaba imimangaliso yakho yaziwa enzonzobileni na? Okanye usindiso lwakho lusebenza kwelokulibala na? 
Psalms88:13 Hayi bo! Ndikhoyo, ndibhenela kuwe; ntsasa zonke ndizibika kuwe." 
Psalms88:14 Awu, Ndikhoyo, ngani ukuba undilahle? Ngani ukuba undifulathele?" 
Psalms88:15 Ndaxhwaleka ndasemngciphekweni kwandisemtsha; ndiyangcungcutheka, andisento yanto." 
Psalms88:16 Ingqumbo yakho iyandigubungela; ewe, izithonga zakho zindicim' igama," 
Psalms88:17 zindirhawula njengamanzi imini yonke, zindigubungela ngeenxa zonke." 
Psalms88:18 Undihluthe izihlobo nezizalwane zam; ngoku sendihlobene nobumnyama kuphela. 
Psalms89:1 *Ndikhoyo, ndiya kucula ngezibele zakho njalo-njalo; ukuthembeka kwakho ndokubhengeza kuzo zonke izizukulwana." 
Psalms89:2 Ndiya kububengeza obakho ububele ukuba soze butshitshe; ukuthembeka kwakho ukuzinzisile emazulwini. 
Psalms89:3 Kaloku wena wathi: “Ndenze umnqophiso kunye nomnyulwa wam; ndinqophisene nesicaka sam uDavide, ndathi:" 
Psalms89:4 ‘Ndiya kuyimisela ngonaphakade inzala yakho; ndoluxhasa ulawulo lwakho lungabi nasiphelo.’ ” 
Psalms89:5 Amazulu ababaza imimangaliso yakho, Ndikhoyo, ukuthembeka kwakho ebandleni lemilowo yakwakho!" 
Psalms89:6 Esibhakabhakeni ngubani onokulinganiswa nawe, Ndikhoyo, ingubani kwabasemazulwini ofana nawe?" 
Psalms89:7 UnguThixo ohlonelwayo kwibandla labamsulwa; umkhulu uyoyikeka ngaphezu kwabo bonke abakungqongileyo. 
Psalms89:8 Ndikhoyo, Thixo onamandla onke, ngubani oyingangamsha njengawe? Ngeendlela zonke uthembekile!" 
Psalms89:9 Iilwandle ezinzongo-nzongo zilawulwa nguwe; wena uyawazolisa amaza agugumayo. 
Psalms89:10 Wena wasinyhasha isilo esikhulu saselwandle; ngaloo mandla akho wazisarhaza iintshaba zakho. 
Psalms89:11 Amazulu ngokunjalo nehlabathi lelakho; ihlabathi nako konke okukulo kwasekwa nguwe. 
Psalms89:12 Umntla nomzantsi wadalwa kwanguwe; iintaba iTabhore neHermon ziyakudumisa. 
Psalms89:13 Ubungangamsha bakho buyakhamnqisa; ubugorha nobukroti bakho buyamangalisa. 
Psalms89:14 Ulawulo lwakho lusekwe ngobulungisa nolungelelwano; wena ukhokelwa bububele nokuthembeka. 
Psalms89:15 Basethamsanqeni abantu abakubhengeza ngendumiso; ewe, Ndikhoyo, abo basoloko bekufutshane nawe," 
Psalms89:16 abonwatyiswa nguwe imini yonke, bekudumisa ngenxa yobulungisa bakho." 
Psalms89:17 Wena uyindili yokomelela kwabo; batshatshele kuba baxhaswa nguwe. 
Psalms89:18 LikuNdikhoyo ikhaka lethu; ukumkani wethu uvela koyiNgcwele kaSirayeli. 
Psalms89:19 Kwamandulo wena wathetha ngombono nâbo bathembekileyo, wathi: “Ndiyithe jize ngembasa ingangalala; ulawulo ndilunikele umfana okhethwe ebantwini." 
Psalms89:20 Ndimfumene uDavide isicaka sam; yena ndimthambise ngamafutha angcwele. 
Psalms89:21 Ke ngoko isandla sam soba naye njalo-njalo; ewe, uya komelezwa ndim." 
Psalms89:22 Akasoze onganyelwe lutshaba, nezibhoja soze zimthibaze." 
Psalms89:23 Ndiya kuzinyhasha iintshaba zakhe, ndibatshabalalise abo bamthiyileyo." 
Psalms89:24 Ndohlala ndimthanda, ndilithemba lakhe; ndiya kumenza ahlale eyintshatsheli." 
Psalms89:25 Ulawulo lwakhe luya kuma ngeelwandle, luya kuthi xhaxhe ngemilambo." 
Psalms89:26 Uya kubhenela kum, athi: ‘Wena unguTata; unguThixo wam, umqolomba ondihlangulayo.’" 
Psalms89:27 Yena uya kuba yinkulu yam, abe yingangalala yookumkani behlabathi." 
Psalms89:28 Ububele bam kuye buya kuma njalo-njalo; umnqophiso wam naye soze utshitshe. 
Psalms89:29 Ulawulo soze luphume endlwini yakhe; Ewe, lona lohlala luhleli njengamazulu." 
Psalms89:30 “Sothi isizukulwana sakhe sakundilahla, ewe, sakuyilahla imiyalelo yam," 
Psalms89:31 ukuba sithe sayaphula imimiselo yam, asayithobela imithetho yam," 
Psalms89:32 ndisohlwaye ngoswazi, ndibakatse ngenxa yesono sabo." 
Psalms89:33 Kambe ke soze ndipheze ukumthanda, ingasoze inxaxhe intembeko yam." 
Psalms89:34 Soze ndiwutshitshise umnqophiso wam, lingasoze liwe phantsi ilizwi endalithethayo." 
Psalms89:35 Ewe, kaloku ndafunga ubungcwele bam, ngoko ke soze ndimxokise uDavide." 
Psalms89:36 Indlu yakhe soze ithini nanini-nanini; ulawulo lwakhe luqiniseke njengelanga. 
Psalms89:37 Soze luthini, lunjengenyanga yona ilingqina elithembekileyo elisesibhakabhakeni.”" 
Psalms89:38 Phi ke, ngoku umlahlile nje, wanengcwangu ngakumthanjiswa wakho?" 
Psalms89:39 Uwutshitshisile umnqophiso wakho nesicaka sakho; uyohluthile naloo mbasa yakhe. 
Psalms89:40 Uzidilizile iindonga zesixeko sakhe; uzitsho zangamabhodlo iinqaba zakhe. 
Psalms89:41 Ngoku abadlulayo bayazixhwithela; uyintlekisa nakubamelwane bakhe. 
Psalms89:42 Wena uziphakamisile iintshaba zakhe; iintshaba zakhe ziyamqholosela. 
Psalms89:43 Ewe, ikrele lakho ulitsho layindunyuva; ngoku usisisulu edabini." 
Psalms89:44 Uwohluthile umsimbithi oliwonga lakhe, walubhangisa ulawulo lwakhe." 
Psalms89:45 Uyinqamle imihla yobutsha bakhe; ewe, umthe wambu ngehlazo." 
Psalms89:46 *Ndikhoyo, koda kube nini ufulathele – ngumlibe na? Koda kube nini ivutha njengomlilo ingqumbo yakho?" 
Psalms89:47 Ndikhoyo, khawukhumbule ukuba bufutshane kwabo ubomi bam; khumbula ukungabi nto kwabo ubomi bomntu." 
Psalms89:48 Nguwuphi umntu oya kuhlala ngonaphakade, ingubani ongaliphephayo ingcwaba?" 
Psalms89:49 Nkosi, zaya ngaphi izibele zakho zamandulo, nditsho ezo wazifungela uDavide?" 
Psalms89:50 Nkosi, khawukubone ukungcikivwa kwesicaka sakho, ndlela le ndijijithekiswa yintlamba yoluntu ngayo." 
Psalms89:51 Ndikhoyo, iintshaba zihlekisa ngam; ewe, ziphoxisa ngaye umthanjiswa wakho naphi na apho anyathela khona." 
Psalms89:52 Huntshu-u-u! UNdikhoyo ngowokubongwa naphakade! Makube njalo – ewe; amen! 
Psalms90:1 Usoloko ulikhaya lethu, wena Nkosi, izizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Psalms90:2 Zingekadalwa iintaba, ungekalenzi ilizwe nehlabathi, ubusel' ukade unguThixo wena kwanini-nini." 
Psalms90:3 Umbuyisela kwaseluthulini umntu, usithi: “Buyela apho ubuvela khona, mntundini!”" 
Psalms90:4 Linjengemini enye iwaka leminyaka kuwe, lona liyafana nemini yezolo, lifutshane okwexesha labalindi ebusuku." 
Psalms90:5 Uphephetheka njengephepha umntu; uphela okobuthongo, abune njengengca," 
Psalms90:6 yona iba luhlaza kusasa, ithi kwakuhlwa ibe selintshwenyile." 
Psalms90:7 Siyaphela kaloku yingqumbo yakho, uyasigqiba umsindo wakho." 
Psalms90:8 Izono zethu zaziwa nguwe, nezifihliweyo zisekuhleni kuwe." 
Psalms90:9 Uyinqumle imihla yethu ngenxa yomsindo, yadlula ngathi kukuqhwanyaza." 
Psalms90:10 Iminyaka yomntu iba ngamashum' asixhenxe, xa ngaba womelele ibe ngamashum' asibhozo; kodwa iza neenkxwaleko neentsizi, imihla yethu ithi tshe iphele." 
Psalms90:11 Ngubani owaziyo umsindo wakho; ingubani oluqondayo unkwantyo oluza nengqumbo yakho? 
Psalms90:12 Sifundise ukuyiqingqa imihla yethu, ukuze sizuze ubulumko." 
Psalms90:13 Yiba nebuyambo, *Ndikhoyo; koda kube nini usifulathele? Yiba nenceba kuthi zicaka zakho." 
Psalms90:14 Sithululele izibele zakho kwangentseni, size sonwabe, simemelele yonke imihla yobomi bethu." 
Psalms90:15 Sithuthuzele kaloku wakuba usohlwayile; sonwabe kangangoko ubusibandezele. 
Psalms90:16 Bubonakalise ububele bakho kuthi zicaka zakho, ukuze nesizukulwana sethu sisazi isihomo sakho." 
Psalms90:17 Nkosi, Thixo, sithamsanqelise! Siphumelelise kuyo yonke imizamo yethu; ewe, yiphumelelise yonke imizamo yethu." 
Psalms91:1 Lowo uhleli ekhuselwe nguPhezukonke, uhlala esemthunzini kaSomandla." 
Psalms91:2 Yena uya kuthi: “*Ndikhoyo, ungumkhuseli wam; uyinqaba yam, wena Thixo, ndiya kuthembela kuwe.”" 
Psalms91:3 Kuba nguye okuhlangula emgibeni wabakugcayiseleyo nakubhubhani wesifo," 
Psalms91:4 akwambathise ngamaphiko akhe, akufihle ekhusini lakhe, kube likhaka nekhuselo lakho ukuthembeka kwakhe." 
Psalms91:5 Akuyi koyika zingozi zasebusuku, nakuhlaselwa ngequbuliso emini," 
Psalms91:6 nabhubhani wangobusuku, nasifo sigqugqisayo emini emaqanda." 
Psalms91:7 Nokuba kungawa iwaka ecaleni kwakho, neshumi lamawaka liwe likungqonge, akusayi kuchukunyiswa nto wena." 
Psalms91:8 Uya kuqwalasela ukubone ngamehlo akho ukohlwaywa kwawo amatshijolo. 
Psalms91:9 Ngenxa yokuba uthembele ngoNdikhoyo, wamenza umkhuseli wakho uPhezukonke," 
Psalms91:10 akuyi kuhlelwa bubi; akuyi kusondela nasibetho emzini wakho. 
Psalms91:11 Kaloku woziwisela umthetho ngawe izithunywa zakhe wokuba zikugcine endleleni yakho," 
Psalms91:12 zikufunqule hleze ukhubeke elityeni. 
Psalms91:13 Wonyathela phezu kweengonyama neenyoka, unyhashe amathol' eengonyama noogqoloma." 
Psalms91:14 Ngenxa yokuba endithanda, ndomhlangula; ndimphakamise, kuba elazi igama lam." 
Psalms91:15 Akuzibika kum, ndiya kumva; ndiya kuba naye ezimbandezelweni, ndimhlangule, ndimbek' ezimbekweni," 
Psalms91:16 ndimvuze ngobomi obude, ndimbonise ukuba ndiyasindisa." 
Psalms92:1 Yinto entle ukumbulela *uNdikhoyo; yinto entle ukubonga igama loPhezukonke. 
Psalms92:2 Kulungil' ukubalisa ngezibele zakhe kusasa, nangokunyaniseka kwakhe ngokuhlwa," 
Psalms92:3 kuvakala uncuthu lwengoma yeentambula, nehapu itsho ngesongo sengom' emyoli." 
Psalms92:4 Kub' undivuyisile, Ndikhoyo, ngezinto ondenzele zona; ndokubonga ndinemincili ngenxa yemisebenzi yakho." 
Psalms92:5 Hay' ukubaluleka kwemisebenzi yakho, Ndikhoyo! Hay' ukuba nzulu kweengcamango zakho!" 
Psalms92:6 Isidenge asinakuyazi loo nto, nesiyatha asinako ukukuqiqa:" 
Psalms92:7 le yokuba amatshijolo aya kubhangiswa, nokuba selede amila njengokhula, nokuba selede aphumelela." 
Psalms92:8 Kaloku wena, Ndikhoyo, unguPhezukonke; wena unguye nanini-nanini." 
Psalms92:9 Iintshaba zakho, Ndikhoyo, zotshabalala kuphele, kananjalo abhangiswe onke amatshijolo." 
Psalms92:10 Undomeleze ndanga ndiyinyathi; undithe jize ngombhiyozo nolonwabo. 
Psalms92:11 Ndikubone ngala wam amehlo ukuwa kweentshaba zam; ndiyive ngezi zam iindlebe intshabalalo yâbo bandizungulayo. 
Psalms92:12 Amalungisa achuma njengesundu, akhula njengemisedare yaseLibhanon." 
Psalms92:13 Amilile emzini kaNdikhoyo; ayakhula endlwini kaThixo. 
Psalms92:14 Avelisa iziqhamo naxa selaluphele, aqhelezele omelele." 
Psalms92:15 Kutheth' ukuthi ke uNdikhoyo ulilungisa, yena ngumkhuseli wam, akukho khwiniba kuye." 
Psalms93:1 *UNdikhoyo ungukumkani; uthe wambu isihomo nesithozela namandla. Ewe, ulimise zinzi ihlabathi, aligungqi." 
Psalms93:2 Isihlalo sakho, Ndikhoyo, sasekwa kwantlandlolo; wena wawukho kwanini-nini." 
Psalms93:3 Iyagquma imilambo, Ndikhoyo, ivakalisa isandi sayo; iyavakala imigqumo yayo." 
Psalms93:4 UNdikhoyo yingangalala yaphezulu; unamandla kunamaza alephuzayo, nangaphezu kwamaza agqumayo." 
Psalms93:5 Imiqondiso yakho ayiguquki, Ndikhoyo; iyingcwele ngenene indlu yakho, Ndikhoyo, kuya kuda kube nini-nini." 
Psalms94:1 *Ndikhoyo, Thixo ongumgwebi, wena Thixo ophindezelayo, zibonakalise." 
Psalms94:2 Lamla, wena mgwebi woluntu; babuyekeze kwangezitya zabo abantw' abazingcayo!" 
Psalms94:3 Koda kube nini na, Ndikhoyo, koda kube nini kakade esivuyelela amatshijolo?" 
Psalms94:4 Koda kube nini eqhayisa; koda kube nini ezidla ngokungcola kwawo? 
Psalms94:5 Ayababulala abantu bakho, Ndikhoyo; ayawucinezela umzi wakho amatshijolo." 
Psalms94:6 abandezele abahlolokazi neenkedama, abulale nabantu basemzini." 
Psalms94:7 Ade athi: “Akaboni nto uNdikhoyo; akaqondi konke uThixo kaYakobi.” 
Psalms94:8 Lumkani, bantundini bazizidenge! Noda niqiqe nini, zityhifilindini?" 
Psalms94:9 Nithini? Nithi uThixo owadala iindlebe akeva? Nithi lo wenza amehlo enu akaboni? 
Psalms94:10 Lo ulawula zonk' iintlanga nithi akanakuzohlwaya? Lo ufundise abantu nithi akazi nto? 
Psalms94:11 Ulogocagoca iingcinga zabantu, uyazi ukuba zibubuvuvu nje bodwa." 
Psalms94:12 Unoyolo lowo uyalwa nguwe, Ndikhoyo; nditsho ofundiswa nguwe umyalelo wakho." 
Psalms94:13 Umnika inzolo ngemihla yobubi, lo gama amatshijolo ombelwa umhadi." 
Psalms94:14 Kaloku akayi kubafulathela abantu bakhe uNdikhoyo; akasoze ayilahle indlu yakhe. 
Psalms94:15 Kobakho ubulungisa ezinkundleni, abulandele onke amalungisa." 
Psalms94:16 Azi, ngubani owondilwela kumatshijolo? Yoba ngubani na ongakum?" 
Psalms94:17 Ukuba bendingancedwanga nguNdikhoyo, ngesele ndikwantsonga-nyawana." 
Psalms94:18 Xa ndandisendisithi ndiyoyisakala, wandixhasa ngezibele zakho wena, Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms94:19 Xa ndandinxubile, ndixhalabile, wandithuthuzela, wandonwabisa wena." 
Psalms94:20 Akunabudlelana nabalawuli abakhohlakeleyo, bona bayenza umthetho intswela-bulungisa." 
Psalms94:21 Bayalihlanganyela ilungisa bona, bamgwebele ukufa umnt' engenatyala." 
Psalms94:22 Kodwa ngumkhuseli wam yena uThixo; yinqaba endizimela ngayo. 
Psalms94:23 UNdikhoyo wobohlwaya ngenxa yenkohlakalo yabo, batshabalalele kobo bugwenxa babo; wobabhangisa kuphele tu uThixo." 
Psalms95:1 Yizani sombelele *uNdikhoyo, simculele sigcobile umkhuseli nomsindisi wethu!" 
Psalms95:2 Masiye kuye sinombulelo, simombelele iingoma zokubonga."
