Psalms95:3 Kaloku uNdikhoyo nguThixo onamandla, ngukumkani omkhulu *kwizithixo zonke." 
Psalms95:4 Lisesandleni sakhe ihlabathi liphela; iinzulu neencopho zilawulwa nguye. 
Psalms95:5 Ulawula ulwandle kuba walwenza; nomhlaba wawudala ngezandla zakhe. 
Psalms95:6 Yizani siqubude simnqule, siguqe phambi koNdikhoyo umdali wethu," 
Psalms95:7 kuba yena nguThixo wethu. Thina singumhlambi awalusayo, iigusha ezondliwa nguye. Namhla liveni ilizwi lakhe elithi:" 
Psalms95:8 “Musan' ukuba neenkani, njengookhokho benu eMeribha, njengemihla yaseMasa entlango," 
Psalms95:9 apho bandilingayo, naxa babezibona izinto endandibenzela zona." 
Psalms95:10 Iminyaka emashumi mane bandikruqula, ndada ndathi: ‘Hay' ukungeva kwabo; abayithobeli imiyalelo yam.’" 
Psalms95:11 Ngoko ke ndafunga ngomsindo, ndathi: ‘Abasoze bangene ekuphumleni kwam.’ ”" 
Psalms96:1 Mombeleleni ingoma entsha *uNdikhoyo! Mombelel' uNdikhoyo, hlabathi lonke!" 
Psalms96:2 Mombelelen' uNdikhoyo, nibonge igama lakhe; zivakaliseni mihla le iindaba zakhe zosindiso." 
Psalms96:3 Zibaliseleni ngesihomo nesithozela sakhe iintlanga; zixeleleni ngemimangaliso ayenzileyo zonke izizwe. 
Psalms96:4 Kaloku yingangalala uNdikhoyo, ufanelwe yimbeko enkulu; ufanelwe kukoyikwa ngaphezu *kwezithixo zonke," 
Psalms96:5 kuba yimifanekiso nje izithixo zeentlanga, kodwa yena uNdikhoyo wadal' oomazulu." 
Psalms96:6 Yena unobungangamsha nesithozela; kukho isihomo nendili apho akhoyo. 
Psalms96:7 Mbongeni uNdikhoyo, nina bemi bomhlaba; mbongeni kuba unewonga namagunya." 
Psalms96:8 Mnikeni imbeko efanele igama lakhe; sondezani amadini, ningene endlwini yakhe." 
Psalms96:9 Mnquleni uNdikhoyo, yena unesihomo nesithozela; malingcangcazele lonk' ihlabathi phambi kwakhe." 
Psalms96:10 Zixeleleni iintlanga ukuba uNdikhoyo nguKumkani; nguye olizinzisayo ihlabathi, aliyi kugungqa; nguye oya kubagweba ngobulungisa bonke abantu." 
Psalms96:11 Gcobani, mazulu, lichwayite ihlabathi; gquma, wena lwandle, nako konke okwakho;" 
Psalms96:12 makayeyezele amadlelo nezinto ezikuwo; mayombele imithi emahlathini; 
Psalms96:13 kuba uyeza uNdikhoyo; uza kuligweba ihlabathi, alilawule ngobulungisa, azigwebe ngokomthetho izizwe." 
Psalms97:1 Ngukumkani *uNdikhoyo, uyalawula; malichwayite ke ngoko ihlabathi, nani ziqithi vuyani!" 
Psalms97:2 Ugqubuthele ngentshinyela yelifu, nesithokothoko sobumnyama simsithile; ngukumkani ogweba kakuhle, ngobulungisa." 
Psalms97:3 Kulephuz' umlilo ngaphambi kwakhe, uzitshise macal' onke iintshaba zakhe." 
Psalms97:4 Imibane yakhe imenyezela kutsho kukhany' ehlabathini; batsho bangcangcazele kukoyika bakuyibon' abemi balo. 
Psalms97:5 Zitsho zinyibilik' iintaba phambi koNdikhoyo, zixel' umthwebeba; nditheth' ingangalala yehlabathi liphela." 
Psalms97:6 Sibonakalis' ubulungisa bakhe isibhakabhaka, ze zonk' iintlanga ziluqond' udumo lwakhe." 
Psalms97:7 Bahlala bedana bonk' abanqula imifanekiso; nditshw' abo baqhayisa ngemifanekiso eqingqiweyo; kuba zonk' *izithixo zikhahlela kuNdikhoyo. 
Psalms97:8 Beva, bavuya abantu baseZiyon, nezixeko zakwaJuda zachwayita, ngenxa yezigqibo zakho, Thixo." 
Psalms97:9 Kuba wena, Ndikhoyo, uyingangalal' ehlabathini; uyingqonyela yazo zonke izithixo." 
Psalms97:10 Nina bamthandayo uNdikhoyo, buthiyeni ububi; kaloku yena uyabagcina abantu bakhe, abahlangule esandleni sabantw' abakhohlakeleyo." 
Psalms97:11 Ilitha lokukhanya lithe thaa phezu kwamalungisa; banemincili abantw' abantliziyo zinyulu. 
Psalms97:12 Gcobani nonke malungisa, nibulel' uNdikhoyo ngezintw' ezintl' anenzele zona." 
Psalms98:1 Mombelelen' ingoma entsha *uNdikhoyo, kuba unenzele izinto ezintle. Kaloku woyisile ngamandla akhe nangegunya lakhe." 
Psalms98:2 UNdikhoyo ulutyhilile usindiso lwakhe, wabuveza ezintlangeni ubulungisa bakhe." 
Psalms98:3 Wasigcina isithembiso sakhe kumaSirayeli. Uthe ngcembe ngezibele nangentembeko; lwabonwa ngumntu wonk' ehlabathini uloyiso lukaThixo wethu. 
Psalms98:4 Mombeleleni ngemihlali uNdikhoyo, nonke hlabathi! Dandulukani, nimemelele, nivum' imibongo!" 
Psalms98:5 Mbongeni uNdikhoyo ngesandi sengoma yehapu; mbethelen' uncuthu lwengoma ngehapu. 
Psalms98:6 Bethan' amaxilongo, kukhal' isigodlo, nenz' intshol' emnandi phambi koNdikhoyo ukumkani." 
Psalms98:7 Gquma, wena lwandle, nako konk' okukuwe; nawe hlabathi, hlabel' ingoma!" 
Psalms98:8 Bethan' izandla, milambo; nani zinduli, mombelelen' uNdikhoyo!" 
Psalms98:9 Kuba uza kuligweb' ihlabathi, alawule konke ngobulungisa, engenamkhethe." 
Psalms99:1 *UNdikhoyo ngukumkani, uyalawula; mazimnike imbeko izizwe! Ungqendeve esihlalweni engqongwe *zizithunywa ezimaphiko; malingcangcazele ihlabathi!" 
Psalms99:2 UNdikhoyo yingangalala eZiyon; ngumlawuli wazo zonk' iintlanga. 
Psalms99:3 Malidunyiswe ngumntu wonk' igama lakhe elindilekileyo! Kaloku yena nguyedwa okhethekileyo. 
Psalms99:4 Wena kumkani, ngangalala, mthandi wokulungileyo; nguwe owezisa ubulungisa kwaYakobi, wawis' izigwebo kakuhle ungenamkhethe." 
Psalms99:5 Mbongeni uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu; zikhahleleni ngasezinyaweni zakhe. Kaloku yena unobungangamsha. 
Psalms99:6 UMosis noAron yayingababingeleli bakhe; uSamweli yayingomnye wababemnqula; bonke bazibika kuNdikhoyo, wabeva." 
Psalms99:7 Wayethetha nabo ekwintshinyela yelifu, kuba babeyithobela imiyalelo nemithetho yakhe."

Psalms99:9 Mbongeni uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu. Mnquleleni entabeni yakhe eyodwa! Kaloku ungcwele uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu. 
Psalms100:1 Mombeleleni *uNdikhoyo, nonke hlabathi!" 
Psalms100:2 Mnquleni uNdikhoyo nivuya, nize kuye nisombela iingom' ezimyoli!"

Psalms101:1 Igwijo lam lingentembeko nokulunga; ndiya kukombelela lona, *Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms101:2 Ndisoloko ndikuhlonela; woda ufike nini na, Mhlekazi? Ndohlala ndimsulwa emzini wam;" 
Psalms101:3 andisayi kumelana nobutshijolo. Ndizithiyil' izimilo zabangahloneli Thixo; andihambisani nazo mpela. 
Psalms101:4 Andiyi kungathembeki; andiyi kusondela ebubini.

Psalms101:6 Ndobamkela abahlonela uThixo kwibhotwe lam, amagosa am abe ngabantw' abathembekileyo." 
Psalms101:7 Akukho mkhohlisi uya kuba semzini wam, naxoki liya kuhlala apho ndikhoyo." 
Psalms101:8 Ndowatshabalalisa rhoqo onke amatshijolo elizweni, ndibagxoth' abantw' abagwenxa emzini kaNdikhoyo." 
Psalms102:1 Ndikhoyo, wuve umthandazo wam, nesikhalo sam masifike kuwe!" 
Psalms102:2 Sukundizimela xa ndisebunzimeni; ndiphulaphule undive kamsinya ndakukhala. 
Psalms102:3 Imihla yam ithe shwaka okomsi; ndiyathuthunjelwa ziingqaqambo. 
Psalms102:4 Ndixusheke ndada ndalityéba; senditsho ndaphelelwa nangumdla wokutya. 
Psalms102:5 Ndiyagcuma kukugula; andibhitye nditsho ndangamathambo. 
Psalms102:6 Ndifana nesikhova enkangala; ndinjengesihulu-hulu senxiwa. 
Psalms102:7 Ndilal' obentaka kukumana ndiphuthelwa; ndifana nentak' ehleli yodwa exhantini. 
Psalms102:8 Ziyandigxibha yonk' imini iintshaba zam; ziphoxisa ngam, ziqalekisana ngegama lam." 
Psalms102:9 Ndinesingqala, ukutya akuvumi kuhla; intw' endiyiselayo seliziinyembezi zam." 
Psalms102:10 Loo ntw' ibangwa yingqumbo nomsindo wakho; kaloku wena undifunqule wandilahla kwesinomhlwa. 
Psalms102:11 Seligqithe njengamathunz' okuhlwa imihla yam; selide yabuna okwengca elahliweyo. 
Psalms102:12 Kodwa wena, Ndikhoyo, uya kulawula kude kube ngunaphakade; ziya kubalisa ngawe zonk' izizukulwana." 
Psalms102:13 Uya kuhlabeka, uyisizele iZiyon; ewe, ixesha lokuyenzel' inceba selifikile, seligalelekile." 
Psalms102:14 Ziyayithand' izicaka zakho, naxa seliziindonga nje; ziyahlabeka xa ziyibona selingamabhodlo iZiyon." 
Psalms102:15 Zolihlonel' igama likaNdikhoyo zonk' iintlanga, neekumkani zonke zisibeke isihomo sakhe." 
Psalms102:16 Kuba kaloku uNdikhoyo woyivusa iZiyon, sicace ke isidima nesithozela sakhe." 
Psalms102:17 Uyawuva umthandazo weendwayi, azisabele nezicelo zazo." 
Psalms102:18 Le mbali mayibhalelwe isizukulwana esizayo ze bamdumise uNdikhoyo nâbo bangekazalwa. 
Psalms102:19 Kaloku wakhangela phantsi yena ephezulu uNdikhoyo, nditsho uNdikhoyo *esesibingelelweni sakhe; wajong' emhlabeni esezulwini yena," 
Psalms102:20 ukuze akuve ukuncwina kwababanjiweyo, nokuze abakhulule abo bagwetyelwe ukufa." 
Psalms102:21 Yiyo ke loo nto baya kuyivakalisa eZiyon indumiso yakhe, bambonge naseJerusalem uNdikhoyo," 
Psalms102:22 apho sukuba zihlangen' iintlanga nezizwe, zize kudumisa zinqule uNdikhoyo." 
Psalms102:23 Mna uNdikhoyo wandaphul' iimpondo ndiselula, wayifinyeza imihla yobomi bam." 
Psalms102:24 Kodwa ndazibika ndathi: “Thixo wam, sukundithatha kwangoku ndingekaluphali. “Wena uzityhutyha zonke izizukulwana;" 
Psalms102:25 ladalwa nguwe kwantlandlolo ihlabathi; enziwa nguwe nawo amazulu. 
Psalms102:26 Xa zizonke ziya kudlula, ube wena usahleli; ziya kuguga njengeempahla, uzisonge njengeengubo. Zona ziya kutshintshwa njengesambatho," 
Psalms102:27 ube wena ungaguquki, ube wena ungagugi." 
Psalms102:28 Iintsapho zethu zohlala zikhuselekile, nenzala yabo yohlala phantsi kwekhusi lakho.”" 
Psalms103:1 Mbonge *uNdikhoyo, moya wam! Mandimbonge uNdikhoyo ngomxhelo wam wonke!" 
Psalms103:2 Moya wam, mbonge uNdikhoyo, ungaze uyilibale imisebenzi yakhe emihle nanini-nanini:" 
Psalms103:3 uloxolela zonk' izono zam; ulophilisa zonk' izifo endinazo; 
Psalms103:4 ulohlangula ubomi bam enzonzobileni, andambese ngezibele nangenceba;" 
Psalms103:5 ulondenzel' izintw' ezintle ebomini, ndihlale ndingumqaba-qaba njengokhozi." 
Psalms103:6 NguNdikhoyo obonelela abacinezelweyo ubulungisa; ewe, nguye obagwebelayo bonke ngokungenaxanasi." 
Psalms103:7 Wamazisa icebo lakhe uMosis; wawabonisa amaSirayeli amandla akhe. 
Psalms103:8 UNdikhoyo unenceba nesisa; uqumba kade, yimvuze-mvuze enobubele." 
Psalms103:9 Kaloku akasolok' engxolisa, yaye akananqala." 
Psalms103:10 Akasohlwayi njengoko sifanelwe kukohlwaywa, engaziphindezeli ngokwezigqitho zethu." 
Psalms103:11 Kungangokuba kude kwesibhakabhaka emhlabeni ukubalasela kwezibele zakhe kwabamhlonelayo; 
Psalms103:12 ulogxoth' izono zithi qelele kuthi njengempumalanga nentshonalanga. 
Psalms103:13 Bufana nomzali kubantwana ububele bukaNdikhoyo kwabamnik' imbeko. 
Psalms103:14 Kaloku uyasazi into esiyiyo; uyaqonda ukuba siluthuli. 
Psalms103:15 Yen' okokwakhe umntu uyafana nje nengca: uyakhula, achume okwentyatyambo." 
Psalms103:16 Suka uvuthuze won' umoya, iphephethek' intyatyambo, ingab' ibekho kuloo ndaw' ibikad' ikuyo." 
Psalms103:17 Ke zon' izibele zikaNdikhoyo zivelela abamhloneleyo; uhlala enobubele kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana," 
Psalms103:18 kwabanyanisekileyo kumnqophiso wakhe nabathobela imithetho yakhe. 
Psalms103:19 UNdikhoyo ungqendev' esihlalweni sakhe ebhotw' ezulwini; ulawulo lwakhe luqhakamshela ihlabathi liphela. 
Psalms103:20 Mbongeni uNdikhoyo, nina zithunywa zakhe ezinamandla; mbongeni, nina nibalasele ngokumthobela; liphulaphuleni ilizwi lakhe." 
Psalms103:21 Mbongeni, uNdikhoyo, nina mikhosi yezulu; mbongeni, nina zicaka zakhe." 
Psalms103:22 Nani zidalwa, khanimbonge nonke, kuzo zonk' iindaw' alawula kuzo. Nawe, moya wam, mbonge uNdikhoyo!" 
Psalms104:1 Mbonge *uNdikhoyo, moya wam! Ubungangalala bakho, Ndikhoyo, Thixo wam, buyamangalisa! Uzithe wambu ngesihomo nesithozela;" 
Psalms104:2 ulowambath' ukukhanya, kwanga yingubo; ulotwabulul' isibhakabhaka, wanga wanek' intente;" 
Psalms104:3 ulomis' iintsika zendlu yakhe emanzini, enze iinqwelo ngamafu, achankcathe phezu kwamaphik' omoya;" 
Psalms104:4 ulowenz' imimoya izithunywa zakhe, nemiban' elenyay' ibe zizicaka zakhe." 
Psalms104:5 Zabekwa nguw' iziseko zomhlaba ze zingashuku-shukunyiswa bani. 
Psalms104:6 Wawugquma ngenzonzobil' olwandle, wang' uwambes' ingubo, atshw' amanzi azithi gqume iintaba." 
Psalms104:7 Uthe wakuwakhalimel' abaleka; zakuvakal' iindudumo zezwi lakho, aphaphathek' elatyuza." 
Psalms104:8 Ehl' iintaba neenduli, abhek' ezantsi, apho wawuthe maze aye khona." 
Psalms104:9 Kaloku wamis' imid' amanz' angegqithi kuyo, hlez' aphind' awugubungel' umhlaba." 
Psalms104:10 Ulogqabhuz' imithombo ezintlanjeni, ibaleke phakathi kweenduli," 
Psalms104:11 apho kusel' izilwanyana, nalaph' amaqwarh' athob' unxano." 
Psalms104:12 Kulapho zakhela khon' iintaka, zintyiloz' emasebeni emithi." 
Psalms104:13 Ulonkcenkceshel' iintaba ngeemvula zaphezulu; uchumil' umhlaba ziintsikelelo zakho. 
Psalms104:14 Ulontshulisel' iinkomo ingca, akhulisel' abantu izityalo, kuvel' isivuno sokutya," 
Psalms104:15 newayin' echwayitisayo, amafuth' okuthambisa, kunye nesonka sokubondla." 
Psalms104:16 Iyifumana kanobom imvula imithi kaNdikhoyo, loo mithi yemisedare awayityala eLebhanon." 
Psalms104:17 Iintaka zizakhela kuyw' iindlwana zazo, neengwamza zakhel' emikhobeni." 
Psalms104:18 Won' amatshabanqa ahlal' ezingxondorheni, ziz' iimbila zibalekele emaweni." 
Psalms104:19 Iinyanga zibalwa ngokufa kwenyanga, nelanga liyalazi ixesha lokutshona kwalo." 
Psalms104:20 Ubusuku benziwa nguwe, ukuz' izilwanyana zihamba-hambe." 
Psalms104:21 Amathol' eengonyam' ayagragram' ezingela, efuna ukuty' okuvela kuThixo." 
Psalms104:22 Ukuphuma kwelanga ziyemka zonk' izilo, ziye kulal' ezikhundleni zazo." 
Psalms104:23 Bandul' ukuphum' abantu baphangele, basebenze kude kutshon' ilanga." 
Psalms104:24 Hay' ubuninzi bezintw' ozenzileyo, Ndikhoyo! Uzenze ngobulumko xa zizonke; uzel' umhlaba zizintw' ezidalwe nguwe." 
Psalms104:25 Phaya esithabazini solwandle kukho inyambalala yezilo; kukho ezikhulu, kukho nezincinane." 
Psalms104:26 Kuhamba iinqanawa apho, kanti nomnenga udlwabiza udloba kulo, eso silw' esadalelwa loo nto nguwe." 
Psalms104:27 Zonke ezo zinto zijonge kuwe, ukuz' uzondle ngexesh' ekufuneka zitye ngalo." 
Psalms104:28 Wakuzipha ziyatya, ze wakuzondla zihluthe." 
Psalms104:29 Uthi wakuzifulathela, zoyike, zixhale; wakuwuthatha umphefumlo zife, zibuyele eluthulini." 
Psalms104:30 Wakuthumela umoya wakho ziyadalwa, butsho buvuseleleke ubuso bomhlaba." 
Psalms104:31 Masime ngonaphakade isihomo nesithozela sakho, Ndikhoyo; wanga ungakonwabisa umsebenzi owenzileyo." 
Psalms104:32 Wena uthi ungawujonga nje ube selungcangcazela umhlaba, uzichukumis' iintaba zitsho ziphum' umsi." 
Psalms104:33 Ndomombelel' uNdikhoyo lo gama ndisaphilayo, ndimbong' uThixo wam lo gama ndisadl' ubomi." 
Psalms104:34 Wanga angavuyiswa ngumbongo wam uNdikhoyo, kuba yena uyandivuyisa." 
Psalms104:35 Mababhangisw' aboni ehlabathini; makangabikho konk' amatshijolo. Wena moya wam, mbonge uNdikhoyo; ewe, mbonge uNdikhoyo!" 
Psalms105:1 Bulelani *uNdikhoyo, ninqule igama lakhe, nizibalisel' iintlanga ngezintw' asenzele zona." 
Psalms105:2 Mombeleleni, mbongeni, zixeleni izintw' ezimangalisayo asenzele zona!" 
Psalms105:3 Qhayisani ngegama lakhe; mabachwayite abo bamnqulayo uNdikhoyo! 
Psalms105:4 Lufuneni kuNdikhoyo uncedo; mfuneni aph' akhoyo ngawo onke amaxesha. 
Psalms105:5 Ze nizikhumbule izinto asenzele zona: imimangaliso ayenzileyo, nemithetho ayiwisileyo." 
Psalms105:6 Nina niyinzala yesicaka sakhe uAbraham, nilusapho lukaYakobi umnyulwa wakhe." 
Psalms105:7 UThixo wethu nguNdikhoyo; yeyehlabathi lonke imithetho yakhe. 
Psalms105:8 Akasokuwulibala naphakade umnqophiso wakhe, awawenzela izizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Psalms105:9 Ndixel' umnqophiso awawenza noAbraham, kwanesifungo asenze kuIsake." 
Psalms105:10 Kaloku wamnik' ummiselo uNdikhoyo uYakobi, wamnik' umnqophis' ongasoz' uphel' uSirayeli," 
Psalms105:11 esithi: “Wena ndokunik' umhlaba waseKanana, ube sisabelo selifa lakho.”" 
Psalms105:12 Babengabantw' abambalwa nje, bengazelwe nto; babengabaphambukeli kuphela nje kuloo mhlaba." 
Psalms105:13 Babebhadula kumazwe ngamazwe; besuka kolunye ulawulo baye kolunye. 
Psalms105:14 Kodwa uThixo akavumanga ukuba batsaliswe nzima; ude wazohlwaya neekumkani ngenxa yabo. 
Psalms105:15 Watsho esithi: “Ze ningabachukumisi abathanjiswa bam, ningakhe nibenzakalise abashumayeli bam.”" 
Psalms105:16 Ekubeni evelise indlala elizweni labo uNdikhoyo, nokutya kwabo wakuphelisa mpela," 
Psalms105:17 wabathumela uJosefu wabandulela, wathengiswa waba likhoboka." 
Psalms105:18 Amaqatha akhe adliswa ngamatyathanga, waminxwa nasemqaleni ngamakhamandela," 
Psalms105:19 lada lazaliseka ilizwi awayelithethile, ilizwi likaNdikhoyo lamngqinela." 
Psalms105:20 Ikumkani yamhlangula, umlawuli wezizwe wamkhulula," 
Psalms105:21 yamenza intloko yomzi wayo, yamnika igunya lokulawula konke okwayo," 
Psalms105:22 yamnika iwonga kunamaphakathi ayo, kwanegunya lokuqeqesha bonke ooceba bayo." 
Psalms105:23 Naye uYakobi waya eJiputa, waba ngummi elizweni lakwaHam." 
Psalms105:24 UNdikhoyo wabanika inzala eninzi abantu bakhe, wabanika amandla kunababandezeli babo." 
Psalms105:25 Wawafaka intiyo amaJiputa, ukuze azikhohlise izicaka zakhe." 
Psalms105:26 Emva koko uthumele uMosis isicaka sakhe kunye noAron umnyulwa wakhe. 
Psalms105:27 Babonakalisa imiqondiso yamandla kaThixo, benza nemimangaliso eJiputa." 
Psalms105:28 UThixo wezisa ubumnyama emhlabeni, kuba engalivanga amaJiputa ilizwi lakhe." 
Psalms105:29 Amanzi emilambo ajika aligazi, zafa zaphela nezo ntlanzi zabo." 
Psalms105:30 Axhuma-xhuma amaxoxo kwelo lizwe, angena nkqu nasemagumbini ekumkani." 
Psalms105:31 Watheth' uThixo, kwavela ibubu leempukane, nebubu lezibawu zalityhutyha lonke elo." 
Psalms105:32 Kwawa isichotho endaweni yemvula, kwamenyezel' imiban' eyoyikekayo apho." 
Psalms105:33 Yavuthuluk' imithi yemidiliya namakhiwane, yawa yaphela imithi kweli lizwe." 
Psalms105:34 Watheth' uThixo, kwavel' iinkumbi, zatsho ngenyambalala yomqikela." 
Psalms105:35 Zalubhuqa lonk' uhlaza lwalapho, zayibhuqa yonke imveliso yomhlaba." 
Psalms105:36 Wawabulala onk' amavela-tanci, nditheth' onke amazibulo amaJiputa." 
Psalms105:37 Wawakhupha amaSirayeli, emka epheth' igolide nesiliva, kungekho namny' ubikwa hlaba kubantu bakhe." 
Psalms105:38 Avuya amaJiputa akumka amaSirayeli; kaloku ayeselewoyika. 
Psalms105:39 Wabasitha ngelif' emini abantu bakhe, wabakhanyisela ngesithatha somlil' ebusuku." 
Psalms105:40 Bakucel' ukutya kwavel' izagwityi, wabanik' isonka esivel' ezulwini, bahlutha." 
Psalms105:41 Wavul' iliwa, ampompoza amanzi, kwavel' imisinga, yacand' enkangala." 
Psalms105:42 Kaloku wakhumbula isithembiso sakhe, esingumnqophiso wakhe noAbraham isicaka sakhe." 
Psalms105:43 Wabandulula bechwayitile abantu bakhe, abanyulwa bakhe behamba besombela." 
Psalms105:44 Wabanika amazwe ezinye izizwe, basixhamla isiqhamo sokubila kwazo," 
Psalms105:45 khon' ukuze bayithobel' imithetho yakhe, bagcine nemiyalelo yakhe. Makabongwe uNdikhoyo!" 
Psalms106:1 Mbongen' *uNdikhoyo! Bambani ngazibini kuba ulungile uNdikhoyo. Kaloku izibele zakhe ziya kuhlala zikho ngonaphakade. 
Psalms106:2 Ngubani onokubalisa ngezenzo ezidumileyo zikaNdikhoyo; ingubani onokumbonga ngokufezekileyo? 
Psalms106:3 Hay' uyolo lwabo bathobela imithetho yakhe; nditheth' abo bahlala besenza okulungileyo. 
Psalms106:4 Uzundikhumbule, Ndikhoyo, xa ubonelel' abantu bakho; ungandishiyi, Ndikhoyo, xa ubahlangulayo." 
Psalms106:5 Nam maze ndiyibon' inkqubela yabanyulwa bakho, ndize ndivuye kunye nabantu bakho, ndilixhamle ibhongo neqhayiya labantu bakho." 
Psalms106:6 Nathi sone njengookhokho, sikwenzile ukungcola nobubi." 
Psalms106:7 Xa babeseJiputa oomawokhulu zange bazinanze izenzo zakhw' ezidumileyo; bazilibala izibele zakho, basuka bamvukel' uPhezukonke kuLwandl' oluBomvu." 
Psalms106:8 Kodwa wabahlangula uNdikhoyo ngenxa yegama lakhe, khon' ukuze bawaqonde amandla akhe." 
Psalms106:9 Wawis' izwi, lwaza loma qoko uLwandle oluBomvu; wabaweza kuloo nzonzobila, banga bahamb' enkangala." 
Psalms106:10 Wenjenjal' ukubakhulula esandleni sotshaba; wabahlangula kubabandezeli babo. 
Psalms106:11 Zagutyungelwa ngamanzi iintshaba zabo, akwasinda namnye kuzo." 
Psalms106:12 Bandul' ukuziqonda ke izithembiso zikaNdikhoyo, baza badomboza betyibela ngemibongo." 
Psalms106:13 Kwakamsinya bazilibala izintw' abenzele zona, benza ukuthanda kwabo bengajonge cebiso kuye." 
Psalms106:14 Entlango bangenwa kukubawa, baza bamlinga uThixo kuloo nkangala." 
Psalms106:15 Wabenzela izicelo zabo, kodwa wabathumela ngobhubhani wesifo." 
Psalms106:16 Bammonela uMosis apho entlango, nditsho naso isicaka sikaNdikhoyo uAron." 
Psalms106:17 Wavuleka wona umhlaba waginya uDatan, wagqumelela uAbhiram kunye neqela lakhe." 
Psalms106:18 Kwagqabhuk' umlilo phakathi kwabo, awabhuq' onk' amatshijolo amalangatye." 
Psalms106:19 Babumba ithole eHorebhe, baza banqula kwaloo mfanekiso bawenzileyo." 
Psalms106:20 Ngale ndlela isihomo sikaThixo basinika umfanekiso wenkomo, into edla utyani." 
Psalms106:21 Bamfulathela uMsindisi wabo, kanye lo wabenzela izinto ezintle eJiputa." 
Psalms106:22 Hay' ubukhulu bezinto abenzela zona kwelakwaHam; hay' ukukhwankqisa kwemimangaliso kuLwandl' oluBomvu! 
Psalms106:23 Yiyo ke loo nto athe nge-ebabhangisile uThixo ukuba uMosis isicaka sakhe wayengabamelanga, athibaz' ingqumbo kaThixo bangatshabalali." 
Psalms106:24 Balicekisa ilizwe elihle kakhulu, kuba babengazikholelwa izithembiso zikaThixo." 
Psalms106:25 Babehlala ezintenteni bekrokra, bengawuthobeli umyalelo kaNdikhoyo." 
Psalms106:26 Wamis' isibhozo efung' esithi wobayeka bafel' aph' enkangala," 
Psalms106:27 ize inzala yab' ayichitha-chithe phakathi kweentlanga, ibe ziintsalu apho kumazw' asemzini." 
Psalms106:28 Basuka bazibandakanya nabanquli bakaBhali wasePehore, batya nokutya kwamadini *ezithixo." 
Psalms106:29 Bamcaphukisa uNdikhoyo ngezenzo zabo, kwabakho ubhubhani wesifo phakathi kwabo." 
Psalms106:30 Waphakama wabangxengxezela uPineyasi, saza sathomalala isibetho eso." 
Psalms106:31 Ngale nto ke wabalelwa kumalungisa, wahlala ekhunjulwa izizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Psalms106:32 Nangasemithonjeni yeMeribha bamqumbisa uNdikhoyo, waba sengxakini uMosis ngenxa yabo." 
Psalms106:33 Bamcaphukisa uMosis ngangokuba wada wathetha amazwi angemahle konke. 
Psalms106:34 Abazange bazitshabalalise iintlanga njengoko babeyalelwe nguNdikhoyo. 
Psalms106:35 Basuka bendiselana nazo, bafunda namasiko azo." 
Psalms106:36 Banqula izithixo abantu bakaThixo, nto leyo ke yaba ngumgibe wabo." 
Psalms106:37 Babinga oonyana neentombi zabo, besenzela iindimoni amadini." 
Psalms106:38 Baliphalaz' igaz' elingenatyala, nditheth' eloonyana neentombi zabo ababebanikela kwizithixo zaseKanana; labubutyadidi ke elo zwe lelo gazi." 
Psalms106:39 Benjenjalo ke ukuzixabhela; benjenjalo ukuzenyelisa bamfulathela uThixo. 
Psalms106:40 UNdikhoyo wavutha ngumsindo, waza wabacaphukela abantu bakhe." 
Psalms106:41 Wabayekela ezandleni zeentlanga, baba phantsi kolawulo lweentshaba zabo." 
Psalms106:42 Zababandezel' iintshaba, bahlala kabuhlungu phantsi kwazo." 
Psalms106:43 Kwaba kaninzi-ninzi ebahlangula uNdikhoyo, kodwa bakhetha ukungamva, beyela zwabha esonweni;" 
Psalms106:44 Kambe ke wabuya wayigqala uNdikhoyo imbandezelo yabo, wabeva bakuzibika kuye;" 
Psalms106:45 wazikhumbula nezithembiso zakhe kubo, waba nenceba ngenxa yothando lwakhe olukhulu," 
Psalms106:46 wabatsho basizelwa ngababandezeli babo. 
Psalms106:47 Sisindise, Ndikhoyo, Thixo wethu, siqokelele phakathi kweentlanga, ukuze sikubulele, silibonge igama lakho elingcwele." 
Psalms106:48 Makabongwe uNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli kususela ngoku kude kube nini-nini! Bonk' abantu mabathi: “Huntshu!” Mawubongwe wena, Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms107:1 Mdumiseni *uNdikhoyo, kuba elungile; ezakhe izibele zohlala zihleli." 
Psalms107:2 Ewe, mabadanduluke batsho abasindisiweyo bakaNdikhoyo, abo abakhululeyo esandleni sotshaba;" 
Psalms107:3 nditsho abo baqokelelwe kwizizwe ngezizwe, empuma nasentshona, emantla nasezantsi." 
Psalms107:4 Bambi babebhadula entlango, bengenaso isixeko sokuma bazinze." 
Psalms107:5 Ewe, babelamba benxanwa; kwakugos' okwaphukayo beyoba." 
Psalms107:6 Ke kaloku babhenela kuNdikhoyo bekhohliwe, waza yena wabakhulula kwezo ngxaki zabo," 
Psalms107:7 wabakhokela ngendlela ethe ngqo, wada wabamisa esixekweni bazinza." 
Psalms107:8 Mabambulele uNdikhoyo ngenxa yezibele zakhe ezingatshitshiyo, nangenxa yezigigaba azenzela oonyana babantu." 
Psalms107:9 Andithi kaloku uyamanelisa onxaniweyo, aze amhluthise ngokulunga olambileyo!" 
Psalms107:10 Abanye babehlala esithokothokweni sobumnyama, bengamabanjwa akhonkxwe ngemixokelelwane;" 
Psalms107:11 kuba kaloku bawavukela amazwi kaThixo, bawudela ummiselo kaPhezukonke." 
Psalms107:12 Babeziinxekenxeke, besebenza nzima; babezizigede, kungekho bani ubasizayo." 
Psalms107:13 Ke kaloku babhenela kuNdikhoyo besengxakini, waza yena wabakhulula kwezo nkxwaleko zabo." 
Psalms107:14 Wabakhupha esithokothokweni sobumnyama, waziqhawula iimbophelelo zabo." 
Psalms107:15 Mabambulele uNdikhoyo ngenxa yezibele zakhe ezingatshitshiyo, nangenxa yezigigaba azenzela oonyana babantu." 
Psalms107:16 Kaloku yena uyazifohloza iingcango zesinyithi, aze azikroboze izibonda zentsimbi." 
Psalms107:17 Bambi babencithekile ngenxa yezono zabo; ngenxa yobugwenxa babo babexhwalekile. 
Psalms107:18 Ukutya babengasafuni nokukubona; kaloku babesebelikrobile ingcwaba. 
Psalms107:19 Ke kaloku babhenela kuNdikhoyo besengxakini, waza yena wabakhulula kwezo nkxwaleko zabo." 
Psalms107:20 Wathetha ngelizwi, baza baphila; ewe, wabahlangula ekufeni." 
Psalms107:21 Mabambulele uNdikhoyo ngenxa yezibele zakhe ezingatshitshiyo, nangenxa yezigigaba azenzela oonyana babantu." 
Psalms107:22 Mabenze amadini okubulela, batsholoze bemdumisa ngemisebenzi yakhe." 
Psalms107:23 Abanye babehamba elwandle ngeenqanawa; babephila kukurhweba elwandle. 
Psalms107:24 Babeyibona imisebenzi emikhulu kaNdikhoyo; nditsho imimangaliso yakhe elwandle. 
Psalms107:25 Kaloku wathetha ngelizwi, kwavel' isaqhwithi, aza ke wona amaza alatyuza." 
Psalms107:26 Iinqanawa zaphatha kunyuka, zaphatha kuzika; ke bona abarhwebi banxuba." 
Psalms107:27 Batatazela badidizel' okwamanxila; ewe, lalixubayele bexakiwe." 
Psalms107:28 Ke kaloku babhenela kuNdikhoyo besengxakini, waza yena wabakhulula kwezo nkxwaleko zabo." 
Psalms107:29 Wasithothisa ke isaqhwithi, aza ke amaza olwandle azola." 
Psalms107:30 Ke kaloku bachulumacha kuba kuzolile, waza ke wabafikisa kwizibuko ababelinqwenela." 
Psalms107:31 Mabambulele uNdikhoyo ngenxa yezibele zakhe ezingatshitshiyo, nangenxa yezigigaba azenzela oonyana babantu." 
Psalms107:32 Ngoko ke mabamncome ebandleni labakhe, bamdumise embizweni yamadoda amakhulu." 
Psalms107:33 Ulojika imilambo ibe yinkangala, imithombo ibe ngumqwebedu." 
Psalms107:34 Ngenxa yenkohlakalo yabemi balo elichumayo ulitsho libe yintlango. 
Psalms107:35 Umajik' intlango ibe sisithabazi samanzi, elibharhileyo litsho litsits' imithombo." 
Psalms107:36 Uzimisa apho ke izilambi, khon' ukuze zime zizinze." 
Psalms107:37 Ziyalima, zizityalela izidiliya; ewe, zivuna intabalala yendyebo." 
Psalms107:38 Ngentsikelelo yakhe bazala bangayeki, neenkomo zabo zihlala zisanda." 
Psalms107:39 Suka ke bancipha ngamanani, baza ke bathobeka, ngenxa yengcinezelo, inkxwaleko, neentsizi." 
Psalms107:40 Amatshawe uwagalele ngehlazo, aba zizibhadu-bhadu zelibharhileyo." 
Psalms107:41 Ke bona abahlelelekileyo uyabonyula ezinkathazweni, abatsho bande ngokwemihlambi." 
Psalms107:42 Athi akuyibona le nto amalungisa agcobe; ke bona abangendawo baxakwe. 
Psalms107:43 Olumkileyo makazigqale ezi zinto; abantu mabaziqonde izibele zikaNdikhoyo. 
Psalms108:1 Awu, Thixo, ndizimisele ngokupheleleyo; ewe ngenene, andithandabuzi; ndiza kumemelela nditsholoze!" 
Psalms108:2 Ndosuka ndiqubul' ihapu nekatala; ewe, ndovuka xa kumpondo zankomo." 
Psalms108:3 Ndiya kukuncoma phakathi kweentlanga, *Ndikhoyo; ewe, ndokudumisa naphakathi kwezizwe." 
Psalms108:4 Izibele zakho zibalasele ezulwini; ukuthembeka kwakho kurhec' amafu. 
Psalms108:5 Awu, Thixo, zimaseka phezulu esibhakabhakeni; isidima nesihomo sakho masibe phezu kwehlabathi jikelele." 
Psalms108:6 Nceda ngamandla akho usivelele, ukuze basinde abo ubathandayo." 
Psalms108:7 UThixo uthethe *esesibingelelweni sakhe, wathi: “IShekem ndiyayahlula-hlula, ngoloyiso ndiyayihlahlela; intili yeSukoti yona ndiyibenge." 
Psalms108:8 IGiliyadi yeyam, noManase ngowam; uEfrayim lelona xhadi lam; uJuda ngumsimbithi wam." 
Psalms108:9 UMowabhi yintili yam yebhongo; ke yena uEdom ndiyambanga. EFilistiya ndikhwaza uloyiso.” 
Psalms108:10 Ngubani onokundisa emzini oxhotyisiweyo? Ngubani onokundisa e-Edom? 
Psalms108:11 Noko usilahlile, Thixo? Akusaphumi nemikhosi yethu?" 
Psalms108:12 Sincedise ezintshabeni zethu; kaloku olomntu uncedo luphuthile. 
Psalms108:13 Ukuba uThixo ungakuthi, siya kuphumelela; uya kuzinyhasha iintshaba zethu." 
Psalms109:1 Thixo wam endimncomayo, ngani ukuba uthi cwaka," 
Psalms109:2 ndimangalelwa nje zizikhohlakali namaxoki? Kaloku bona bandirhintyela ngobuxoki; 
Psalms109:3 bathetha izinto ezimasikizi ngam; bandihlasela ndingenzanga nto. 
Psalms109:4 Ndandibathanda ndibathandazela, kodwa bandibuyekeza ngokundityhola." 
Psalms109:5 Ukulunga kwam bakubuyekeza ngobubi; uthando lwam balubuyekeza ngentiyo. 
Psalms109:6 Mmisele isibhoja lo mfo; misa ofana naye ematyaleni. 
Psalms109:7 Ematyaleni makafunyaniswe onile, nomthandazo wakhe mawumgwebe." 
Psalms109:8 Imihla yakhe mayinqanyulwe; indawo yakhe mayithathwe ngomnye. 
Psalms109:9 Abantwana bakhe mababe ziinkedama, umfazi wakhe abe ngumhlolokazi." 
Psalms109:10 Abantwana bakhe mababe zizibhadu-bhadu ezingqibayo; mabajikeleze bazingele ukutya nasemabhodlweni. 
Psalms109:11 Ombamba ulutho wanga angamthimba; amandla akhe makaxhatshazwe ngabasemzini. 
Psalms109:12 Ngamana akungebikho bani uvelana naye, angabikho ozisizelayo ezo nkedama." 
Psalms109:13 Ngamana yaphanza nenzala yakhe, igama lakhe lingaphindi likhankanywe." 
Psalms109:14 Ngamana wabuxhiba *uNdikhoyo ububi booyise, buhlale phambi kwakhe nobubi bukanina." 
Psalms109:15 Ngamana wabugcina njalo uNdikhoyo obu bubi; igama lakhe malicime kuthi tu emhlabeni. 
Psalms109:16 Kaloku lo mntu zange abakhathalele abahlelekileyo nabaxakekileyo, koko wabadobelela abacinezelwa." 
Psalms109:17 Wayengumqalekisi, naye ke makaqalekiswe; zange athamsanqele, naye ke makangakuzuzi." 
Psalms109:18 Ukuqalekisa wayekunxiba njengempahla: makuthi nca emzimbeni njengamanzi; makugqobhozele emathanjeni njengamafutha. 
Psalms109:19 Ewe, makube njengengubo ayambathayo; mihla le makube yibhanti ayibhinqayo." 
Psalms109:20 Ndikhoyo, esi mayibe sisohlwayo sâbo bandimangalelayo, abo bathetha kakubi ngam." 
Psalms109:21 Kodwa ke, Mhlekazi Ndikhoyo, ndivelele ngenxa yegama lakho; ndihlangule ngenxa yezibele zakho." 
Psalms109:22 Kaloku ndihlelelekile, ndixakekile; futhi ke ndixhelekile." 
Psalms109:23 Ndithe shwaka ngokwesithunzi samarhatya; ndivuthuluke ngokwesinambuzane. 
Psalms109:24 Nditsho ndanengevane kukungatyi; andibhityanga, ndingumcinga!" 
Psalms109:25 Iintshaba zam ziphoxisa ngam; zakundibona zihlunguzel' intloko. 
Psalms109:26 Khawundincede, Ndikhoyo Thixo wam; ndisindise ngokwezo zibele zakho!" 
Psalms109:27 Khawubethe baqonde ukuba nguwe lo, nguwe ondihlangulayo, Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms109:28 Mabathi bendiqalekisa nje, ube wena undithamsanqela; bathi ntimfa ngehlazo abo bandihlaselayo. Mna ke sicaka mandiphuphume yimincili." 
Psalms109:29 Abandimangalelayo mabavathe ihlazo; ewe, mabalithi wambu oku komnweba." 
Psalms109:30 Ndiya kubhomboloza ndidumisa uNdikhoyo; ndiya kumncoma phakathi kwezihlwele; 
Psalms109:31 kuba yena uyamxhasa ohlelelekileyo, amhlangule kwabo bamsingela phantsi." 
Psalms110:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi enkosini yam ukumkani: “Hlala ngakum kweli wonga, lo gama ndikoyisela iintshaba zakho.”" 
Psalms110:2 Ulawulo lwakho uNdikhoyo woluqalisa eZiyon. Ke wena zilawule iintshaba zakho. 
Psalms110:3 Amatshawe akho ozincama engaqhutywa, evethe eziyokoyoko zoloyiso, mhla wagagana notshaba lwakho. Kusasa ngejekejeke lobuthelana okombethe ulutsha." 
Psalms110:4 UNdikhoyo akayi kujika, kuba wafunga wathi: “Wena ungumbingeleli wodidi lukaMelkizedeki oya kuhlala ehleli.”" 
Psalms110:5 Ke yona iNkosi ingakuwe; mhla yacaphuka iya kuzibhangisa izikumkani. 
Psalms110:6 Iya kuzingenela ngomgwebo izizwe, zitsho ziqungquluze izidumbu zabantu; ewe, iya kuzivikiva iziphathamandla jikelele." 
Psalms110:7 Ukumkani uya kusela ecaleni kwendlela; ngako ke aqingqe ethwel' indwe. 
Psalms111:1 Huntshu-u-u! Sithi: “Bayethe, Mhlekazi!” *UNdikhoyo ndiya kumbonga ndiphelelise; ewe, ndiya kumbonga ndikunye namalungisa ebandleni lakhe." 
Psalms111:2 Ewe, mikhulu kambe imisebenzi kaNdikhoyo; abayilangazelelayo bayayiphicotha bayiqondisise." 
Psalms111:3 Imisebenzi yakhe inesidima nobungangamsha; ubulungisa bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms111:4 Yena uyasikhumbuza imisebenzi yakhe; uNdikhoyo unobubele enesisa. 
Psalms111:5 Uyabondla abo bamthobelayo; yena akawulibali umnqophiso wakhe. 
Psalms111:6 Abantu bakhe ubabonisile amandla akhe ngokubabèla ilifa leentlanga. 
Psalms111:7 Ewe, imisebenzi yakhe mihle, inyanisekile; umntu angaqamela ngemimiselo kaNdikhoyo." 
Psalms111:8 Ke yona iya kuhlala ihleli; yamiselwa ngentembeko nokunyaniseka. 
Psalms111:9 Abantu bakhe wabathi jize ngenkululeko, waza wabamisela umnqophiso ongatshitshiyo. Hay' ubunyulu nobungangamsha begama lakhe!" 
Psalms111:10 Isiseko sobulumko kukuthobela uNdikhoyo. Abayenzayo ke le nto baba nengqiqo eyiyo. Ewe, makadunyiswe nanini-nanini!" 
Psalms112:1 Aa! Bayethe, Mhlekazi! Hayi uyolo lomntu omthobelayo *uNdikhoyo, oyilangazelelayo imiyalelo yakhe." 
Psalms112:2 Inzala yakhe iya kuba nobungangamsha elizweni; isizukulwana samalungisa sothamsanqeleka. 
Psalms112:3 Kweyakhe indlu yindyebo nobutyebi; uya kuhlala esenza ubulungisa. 
Psalms112:4 Yena uyawakhanyisela amalungisa; unjengesibane ebumnyameni, kuba unobubele, inceba, nokulunga." 
Psalms112:5 Unethamsanqa umntu onika ngesisa, lowo ungayiqhubi ngobuqhetseba imicimbi yakhe." 
Psalms112:6 Ilungisa alisoze ligungqe, laye lingasoze lilibaleke." 
Psalms112:7 Iindaba ezimbi azilirhwaqelisi; kaloku lomelele, kuba liqamele ngoNdikhoyo." 
Psalms112:8 Alitatazeli, laye lingenadyudyu, zide zoyisakale iintshaba zalo." 
Psalms112:9 Lona linezinwe kumahlwempu; liya kuhlala lisenza ubulungisa. Ewe, liyahlonitshwa, futhi linesidima." 
Psalms112:10 Abangendawo bathi bakuyibona le nto bakhathazeke; bathwal' umlomo bajijitheke bancame. Ewe, iminqweno yabo ayizi nanto." 
Psalms113:1 Aa! Bayethe, Mhlekazi! Ewe, mbongen' *uNdikhoyo, zicaka zakhe; khanityibele nibong' igama likaNdikhoyo." 
Psalms113:2 Ewe, lelokubongwa lidunyiswe igama likaNdikhoyo, kusukela kalokunje kude kube nini-nini." 
Psalms113:3 Kusukela empuma kude kuye entshonalanga uNdikhoyo makabe ngokhahlelwayo. 
Psalms113:4 UNdikhoyo ungaphaya, uzivelele zonk' izizwe; isihomo sakhe siwakrobel' amazulu." 
Psalms113:5 Yaz'ba singamfanisa nabani n' uNdikhoyo uThixo wethu, umahlal' emalandalahla kweliphezulu?" 
Psalms113:6 Ngumagob' umnqonqo alengetyeke, eqwalasel' amazulu nehlabathi." 
Psalms113:7 Amahlwempu uyawaphakamisa, awavuthulul' uthuli; ewe, nabagqub' eluthuthwini uyabaphakamisa." 
Psalms113:8 Batsho bangqendeve ndawonye namatshawe; ewe, babe matwa namatshawe abantu bakhe." 
Psalms113:9 Nomfazi ongaphathiyo umzimasa ngomzi, atsho abe ngunobantwana onemincili. Huntshu-u-u! Bayethe, Mhlekazi!" 
Psalms114:1 Ke kaloku ekuphumeni kwamaSirayeli eJiputa, ewe, ekundulukeni kwendlu kaYakobi kwelasemzini," 
Psalms114:2 uJuda waba libango *likaNdikhoyo, ke yena uSirayeli waba luhlanga lwakhe." 
Psalms114:3 Luthe lungabona lwaswantsula ulwandle; kanti ke yona iJordan suka yahlehla. 
Psalms114:4 Iintaba zadloba, zaxel' amankonyana; ke zona iinduli zataka-taka, zaxel' amatakane." 
Psalms114:5 Lwandle, ngani ukuba ubaleke? Jordan, ngani uhlehl' umva nje?" 
Psalms114:6 Ngani ukuba zidlob' okwamankonyana iintaba? Kungan' ukub' iinduli zitaka-take okwamatakane? 
Psalms114:7 Ewe, hlabathi, khawurhwaqele, uyeza uNdikhoyo; rhwaqela phambi koThixo kaYakobi," 
Psalms114:8 umajik' ulwalwa luntywil' emanzini, inyengan' impompoz' umthombo." 
Psalms115:1 Hayi bo! Mayingabi sithi, *Ndikhoyo; ewe, makudunyiswe igama lakho, ngenxa yezibele nokunyaniseka kwakho!" 
Psalms115:2 Ngani ukuba iintlanga zide zithi: “Uphi na lo Thixo wabo kakade?” 
Psalms115:3 UThixo wethu usemazulwini; yena wenza loo nto ayithandayo. 
Psalms115:4 Kanti ke *izithixo zabo ziyisiliva negolide; bazenza ngezandla ngokwabo. 
Psalms115:5 Ewe, zinemilomo nje, azithethi; zinawo amehlo, kodwa ziimfama." 
Psalms115:6 Nakuba zineendlebe, aziva kodwa; zineempumlo, kodwa azikwazi ukusezela." 
Psalms115:7 Ewe, zinezandla ezifileyo; zineenyawo, kodwa azikwazi ukuhamba; imiqala yazo ayikwazi kwenza sandi." 
Psalms115:8 Ew', abenzi bazo bofana nazo, bekwanjalo nabo bonke abaqamela ngazo." 
Psalms115:9 Ke wena, Sirayeli, kholosa ngoNdikhoyo! Uluncedo nomkhuseli wakho." 
Psalms115:10 Nani, ndlu ka-Aron, kholosani ngoNdikhoyo! Uluncedo nomkhuseli wenu." 
Psalms115:11 Nabo bonke abamthobelayo uNdikhoyo mabakholose ngaye! Uluncedo nomkhuseli wabo. 
Psalms115:12 UNdikhoyo wosithamsanqelisa, kuba uyasazelelela; uya kuyithamsanqela indlu kaSirayeli, ayithamsanqele indlu ka-Aron." 
Psalms115:13 Bothamsanqeleka abamthobelayo uNdikhoyo; ewe, nditsho abancinci kwanabakhulu." 
Psalms115:14 Ngamana wanandisa uNdikhoyo, nina kunye nezizukulwana zenu." 
Psalms115:15 Ngamana wanithamsanqela uNdikhoyo ongumenzi wamazulu nehlabathi. 
Psalms115:16 Kambe ke wona amazulu ngakaNdikhoyo; ke lona ihlabathi walabela oonyana babantu. 
Psalms115:17 Abafileyo abamdumisi uNdikhoyo, bengacingi nâbo behlela kwelabathe cwaka." 
Psalms115:18 Kambe ke thina somdumisa uNdikhoyo kusukela ngoku kude kuse ephakadeni. Huntshu-u-u! Sithi: “Bayethe, Mhlekazi!”" 
Psalms116:1 *UNdikhoyo ndiyamthanda, kuba uyandiva; uyasabela ndakuzibika kuye." 
Psalms116:2 Njengoko endiphulaphula nje, ndobhenela kuye xa ndisadl' ubomi." 
Psalms116:3 Izabatha zokufa zandibhijela, izoyikiso zelabafileyo zandikhonkxa; latsho laxubayela ndangcungcutheka." 
Psalms116:4 Ke kaloku ndabhenela kuNdikhoyo, ndathi: “Awu, Ndikhoyo, ndiyakubongoza, ndisindise!”" 
Psalms116:5 Unesisa kambe uNdikhoyo, ulungile; hayi ke bethu, inceba yoThixo wethu!" 
Psalms116:6 UNdikhoyo uyabakhusela abaxakiweyo; nam ndandingenamandla wandihlangula. 
Psalms116:7 Musa ukuxhalaba, mphefumlo wam, kuba uNdikhoyo undivelele." 
Psalms116:8 UNdikhoyo undihlangule ekufeni; yena undosule iinyembezi, wandikhusela andakhubeka." 
Psalms116:9 Kungoko ndihamba noNdikhoyo kweli lizwe labaphilayo. 
Psalms116:10 Ndancekelela, ndathemba, nakuba ndandisithi sendivuthulukile." 
Psalms116:11 Ekuncameni ndakhala ndathi: “Abathembekanga kambe abantu.” 
Psalms116:12 Yaz'ba ndingambuyisela ngantoni na uNdikhoyo ngezibele ezingaka andenzele zona? 
Psalms116:13 Ndothatha indebe yosindiso, ndibize igama likaNdikhoyo." 
Psalms116:14 Izithembiso zam ndozifezekisa kuNdikhoyo; ewe, nditsho phambi kwabantu bakhe." 
Psalms116:15 Ayithandeki kambe kuNdikhoyo into yokufa kwabantu bakhe. 
Psalms116:16 Awu, Ndikhoyo, ndisisicaka sakho; ewe, ndingunyana wesicakazana sakho; ndilapha nje ndakhululwa nguwe." 
Psalms116:17 Ndiya kukwenzela idini lombulelo; ewe, ndobiza igama likaNdikhoyo." 
Psalms116:18 Izithembiso zam ndozifezekisa kuye; ewe, nditsho phambi kwabantu bakhe," 
Psalms116:19 enkundleni yendlu kaNdikhoyo, kanye phakathi eJerusalem. Huntshu-u-u! Sithi: “Bayethe, Mhlekazi!”" 
Psalms117:1 Dandulukani nibong' *uNdikhoyo, nonke nina zintlanga! Mtyibeleni nimncome, nonke nina zizwe!" 
Psalms117:2 Kaloku izibele zakhe zibalasele ngakuthi; ibe ke uNdikhoyo wohlala enyanisekile kude kuse ephakadeni. Kungoko sisithi: “Bayethe, Mhlekazi!”" 
Psalms118:1 Mdumiseni *uNdikhoyo, kuba elungile; izibele zakhe zohlala zihleli." 
Psalms118:2 Ewe, makatsho uSirayeli athi: “Izibele zakhe soze zitshitshe.”" 
Psalms118:3 Ngokunjalo nendlu ka-Aron mayithi: “Ngenene izibele zakhe soze zithini.” 
Psalms118:4 Ewe, abamthobelayo uNdikhoyo mabathi: “Izibele zakhe zifikelela ephakadeni.”" 
Psalms118:5 Xa ndandisebunzimeni ndabhenela kuNdikhoyo, waza yena wasabela wandihlangula." 
Psalms118:6 Andinadyudyu, kuba uNdikhoyo ungakum; okokwakhe yena umntu akanakundenza nto konke." 
Psalms118:7 Ngenene uNdikhoyo ungakum, uyandinceda; ngoko ke ndiya kuboyisa abandithiyileyo." 
Psalms118:8 Into ebhetele kukuzimela ngoNdikhoyo, kunokuba uthembele ngomntu." 
Psalms118:9 Kubhetele ukholose ngoNdikhoyo, ndaweni yokukholosa ngamanene." 
Psalms118:10 Ndakha ndarhawulwa ziintlanga, kodwa egameni likaNdikhoyo ndaziqwakanisa." 
Psalms118:11 Ewe, zazindirhawule mbombo zone, kodwa ngamandla kaNdikhoyo ndalalisa ugodo." 
Psalms118:12 Wena wakha wagutyungelwa libubu leenyosi? Hayi, zazidangazela njengomlilo wameva, kodwa ngamandla kaNdikhoyo ndaziswantsulisa." 
Psalms118:13 Zazindityhala ndaphantse ndakhahlelwa phantsi, kodwa nalapho uNdikhoyo wandinceda." 
Psalms118:14 Ingoma yam namandla am nguNdikhoyo; ewe kaloku, ndisindiswa nguye." 
Psalms118:15 Nantso intsholo yoloyiso ivakala; kaloku amalungisa ayamemelela, athi: “Ubungangamsha bukaNdikhoyo bugqwesile;" 
Psalms118:16 amandla kaNdikhoyo abalasele; ewe, ubungangamsha bukaNdikhoyo bugqwesile!”" 
Psalms118:17 Mna andiyi kufa; ndiya kudla ubomi, ndibalise ngezenzo zikaNdikhoyo." 
Psalms118:18 Yena undohlwaye kabukhali; kambe ke akandiyekelanga ekufeni. 
Psalms118:19 Khanindivulele amasango endlu kaThixo, khon' ukuze ndingene ndidumise uNdikhoyo." 
Psalms118:20 Nali isango lokungena kwaNdikhoyo; ngamalungisa odwa angenayo ngalo. 
Psalms118:21 Ndiyabulela kuba undivile; kaloku wena ungumhlanguli wam. 
Psalms118:22 Kaloku ilitye abalidelayo abakhi laba lelona libalulekileyo lesiseko. 
Psalms118:23 Ewe, lo ngumsebenzi kaNdikhoyo; kambe ke thina uyasimangalisa." 
Psalms118:24 Namhla kunamhla, yimini kaNdikhoyo; masizonwabise sibe nemihlali ngayo." 
Psalms118:25 Sisindise, siyakubongoza, Ndikhoyo! Awu, siyatarhuzisa, Ndikhoyo; masiphumelele ngawe!" 
Psalms118:26 Banoyolo abangena ngegama likaNdikhoyo; siyanithamsanqela thina sisendlwini kaNdikhoyo. 
Psalms118:27 UNdikhoyo nguThixo, usikhanyisele. Yenzani umngcelele wokubulela, niphethe amahlamvu, ningqungqe, nilijikeleze iqonga lamadini." 
Psalms118:28 UnguThixo wam, ndiyakubulela; ubungangamsha bakho, Thixo, ndiya kububhengeza." 
Psalms118:29 Mdumiseni uNdikhoyo, kuba elungile; izibele zakhe zohlala zihleli." 
Psalms119:1 Hay' inyhweba yabantu abamsulwa; nditsho abo baziphatha ngokwemiyalelo *kaNdikhoyo. 
Psalms119:2 Banoyolo abo bayithobelayo imfundiso kaNdikhoyo, abayilulamelayo ngomxhelo wabo wonke," 
Psalms119:3 abantu abangabenziyo ububi, koko abahamba endleleni kaNdikhoyo." 
Psalms119:4 Kaloku wena, Ndikhoyo, wasinika imimiselo yakho, ukuze siyithobele ngenyameko." 
Psalms119:5 Akwaba bendingachul' ukunyathela, ndiyinonophele imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:6 Ukuba ndizibambile iziyalo zakho, andisoze ndibhaqwe lihlazo." 
Psalms119:7 Ndakusazi isigwebo sakho esingenagobe, ndiya kukuncoma ngenene nangenyaniso." 
Psalms119:8 Mna ndiya kuyithobela imithetho yakho; awu, nceda ungandilahli kuphele." 
Psalms119:9 Lungaziphatha kanjani ulutsha ukuze ihambo yalo ibe nyulu? Ngokuthobela ilizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:10 Ndizimisele ukukulandela ngokupheleleyo; ndincede ndingaze ndizidele iziyalo zakho. 
Psalms119:11 Ndihamba ngokomlomo wakho, khon' ukuze ndingoni." 
Psalms119:12 Awu! Bayethe, *Mhlekazi! Khawundifundise imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:13 Mna ndiya kuzibhengeza zonke izigqibo zakho. 
Psalms119:14 Kum ziluyolo izithethe zakho; zingaphezu kwabo bonke ubutyebi. 
Psalms119:15 Ndiya kucamngca ngemimiselo yakho, ndizinyamekele iindlela zakho." 
Psalms119:16 Ndiyayithakazelela imithetho yakho; soze ndilityeshele ilizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:17 Ndazelele, mna sicaka sakho, ukuze ndibudle ubomi, ndilithobele ilizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:18 Nceda undivule amehlo, ndiziqonde iintsonkotha ezisemyalelweni wakho." 
Psalms119:19 Ndilundwendwe apha emhlabeni; ndicacisele imiqathango yakho. 
Psalms119:20 Umoya wam uhlala wonganyelwe kukulangazelela isigwebo sakho. 
Psalms119:21 Wena uyabakhalimela abaziphakamisayo; baseshweni abanxaxhayo kwiziyalo zakho. 
Psalms119:22 Ndihlambe kwizinyeliso nezigculelo, kuba ndiyayithobela imfundiso yakho." 
Psalms119:23 Nokuba zingade zindibhunge iziphathamandla, mna sicaka sakho ndiya kucamngca ngemithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:24 Kambe ke andiziva ngezithethe zakho, kuba ziyintonga yam yasekhosi." 
Psalms119:25 Awu, ndiphelelwe, ndiyimvuthuluka; ndihlaziye ngokwesithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:26 Undivile ndakuzandlala; nceda undifundise imithetho yakho. 
Psalms119:27 Ndifundise amasolotya emimiselo yakho, khon' ukuze ndicamngce ngemimangaliso yakho." 
Psalms119:28 Iinzingo ziwuvikivile umoya wam; khawundomeleze ngokwelizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:29 Ndihlangule kuyo inkohliso; ewe, ndibabale undifundise imiyalelo yakho." 
Psalms119:30 Ndenze isigqibo sokuba ndinyaniseke; ndizimisele ukusithobela isigwebo sakho. 
Psalms119:31 Ndinamathele kwizithethe zakho, *Ndikhoyo, ngoko ke mandingaphoxeki." 
Psalms119:32 Ndiya kuhamba ngokwemiqathango yakho, kuba wena uyivulile ingqiqo yam." 
Psalms119:33 Awu, *Ndikhoyo, ndifundise imithetho yakho, ukuze ndihlale ndiyithobela maxa onke." 
Psalms119:34 Ndivule ingqondo, ndiwuthobele umyalelo wakho; ndiya kuwulandela ngomxhelo wam wonke." 
Psalms119:35 Ndikhokele ngeziyalo zakho, kuba zona ziligugu lam." 
Psalms119:36 Intliziyo yam mayinxanele imfundiso yakho ndaweni yokusukelana nenzuzo yobuqhophololo. 
Psalms119:37 Ndincede ndingalibali zizinto eziphuthileyo; mandiphile ngokwenza ukuthanda kwakho. 
Psalms119:38 Idinga lakho malifezekiswe kum, mna sicaka sakho; kaloku lelâbo bakuthobelayo." 
Psalms119:39 Ndihlangule ezenyelisweni, kuba ndiyazoyika; ke zona izigqibo zakho zifezekile." 
Psalms119:40 Ewe, andiziva ngemimiselo yakho; ndihlaziye ngobulungisa bakho." 
Psalms119:41 *Ndikhoyo, ndibonise ububele bakho; mandiluxhamle usindiso ngokwesithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:42 Ndiya kuba nako ke ukujongana nabandenyelisayo, kuba ndikholosa ngelizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:43 Ndincede ndiyithethe inyaniso, kuba ithemba lam zizigqibo zakho." 
Psalms119:44 Ndohlala ndiwuthobela umyalelo wakho; ewe, kude kube ngunaphakade." 
Psalms119:45 Mna ndiya kuxhamla inkululeko, kuba ndihamba ngemimiselo yakho." 
Psalms119:46 Izithethe zakho ndozivakalisa nakwizinxiba-mxhaka, kuba kaloku mna andinadyudyu," 
Psalms119:47 kuba iqhayiya lam ziziyalo zakho – andizithandi ngako, ndiphupha ngazo!" 
Psalms119:48 Ndiyayihlonela imiqathango yakho, nditsho leyo ndiyithandayo; ewe, ndicamngca ngemithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:49 Ungalilibali idinga lakho kwisicaka sakho. Andithi kaloku wandithembisa! 
Psalms119:50 Nasebunzimeni ndiyathuthuzeleka, kuba isithembiso sakho siyandihlaziya." 
Psalms119:51 Abangakhathalele Thixo baphoxisa ngam; kambe ke mna andihexi emyalelweni wakho. 
Psalms119:52 Ndakukhumbula izimiso zakho zantlandlolo, nditsho ndithuthuzeleke, *Ndikhoyo." 
Psalms119:53 Ndikhathazeka gqitha ndakubona abanxaxhayo, abo bangawukhathalelanga umyalelo wakho." 
Psalms119:54 Imithetho yakho yingoma yam; ndimemelela ngayo xa ndikwelasemzini. 
Psalms119:55 Ndicinga ngawe noba ndilele, *Ndikhoyo; ewe, ndiyayithobela imiyalelo yakho." 
Psalms119:56 Ngenene mna andinakumbi, koko ndithobela imimiselo yakho." 
Psalms119:57 Ndathi ke mna: Isabelo sam nguwe, *Ndikhoyo; ndiya kulithobela ilizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:58 Awu, velana nam, ndiyakubongoza; ndibabale ngokwesithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:59 Ndiyiqondile indlela endiziphethe ngayo; ngoko ke ndibuyela kwizithethe zakho. 
Psalms119:60 Sendingxamile, andisayi kulibazisa; ndozithobela iziyalo zakho." 
Psalms119:61 Noba bangandirhintyela abakhohlakeleyo, soze ndiwulibale umyalelo wakho." 
Psalms119:62 Nasezinzulwini zobusuku ndiyavuka; ewe, ndivuka ndikudumise ngenxa yokusulungeka kwesigwebo sakho." 
Psalms119:63 Amaqabane am ngabakuthobelayo, abahamba ngemimiselo yakho." 
Psalms119:64 Ihlabathi liphuphuma izibele zakho, Ndikhoyo; nceda undifundise imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:65 *Ndikhoyo, usazelelele isicaka sakho; wenze ngokwesithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:66 Ndithi jize ngobulumko nokuqonda, kuba mna ndikholosa ngemiqathango yakho." 
Psalms119:67 Phambi kokuba undohlwaye ndandibhadula, kodwa ngoku ndiyalithobela ilizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:68 Hay' ukulunga kwakho, uyindlezane! Khawundifundise imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:69 Izikhohlakali zindityabeka ngobuxoki, kodwa mna ndithobela imimiselo yakho ngomxhelo wam wonke." 
Psalms119:70 Zona zingamagumasholo angachukumisekiyo; ke mna ndithakazelela umyalelo wakho. 
Psalms119:71 Ewe, tshotsh' undohlwaye, Ndikhoyo, ukuze ndiyifunde imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:72 Umyalelo wakho kum ubhetele kunobutyebi, nditsho nkqu nekhipha legolide nesiliva." 
Psalms119:73 Ndinje nje nje ndidalwe nguwe; ndifundise ndiziqonde iziyalo zakho. 
Psalms119:74 Abakuthobelayo bovuya bakundibona, kuba mna ndikholosa ngamadinga akho." 
Psalms119:75 Ndiyakuvuma ukufaneleka kwesigwebo sakho; ewe, *Ndikhoyo, undohlwaye ngakhona." 
Psalms119:76 Ndithuthuzele ngezibele zakho, njengoko wasithembisayo isicaka sakho." 
Psalms119:77 Velana nam, ukuze ndiphile, kuba iqhayiya lam ngumyalelo wakho." 
Psalms119:78 Zona izibhoja mazihlazeke, kuba zindirhintyela ngobuqili; ke mna ndocamngca ngemimiselo yakho." 
Psalms119:79 Mabeze kum bonke abakuthobelayo, abo bayiqondayo imfundiso yakho." 
Psalms119:80 Mandingabi nabala kwimithetho yakho, khon' ukuze ndingahlazeki." 
Psalms119:81 *Ndikhoyo, kuncamekile kum, ndisindise! Ithemba lam lilizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:82 Amehlo amnyama kukujong' enkalweni; yaz'ba uya kundithuthuzela nini na? 
Psalms119:83 Andinto yanto, ndigqole oku kwentsuba yewayini esemsini; kambe ke andiyilibalanga imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:84 Koda kube nini sinyamezele isicaka sakho? Ngani ungabohlwayi nje abanditshutshisayo? 
Psalms119:85 Abanekratshi bayandithiyela, abo bangawuthobeliyo umyalelo wakho." 
Psalms119:86 Imiqathango yakho ithembekile; nceda, nâbo bendibhijela ngobuxoki." 
Psalms119:87 Sebephantse bandicim' igama, kanti ke unotshe ukuba ndiyilahle imimiselo yakho." 
Psalms119:88 Ngenxa yezibele zakho ndihlaziye, ukuze ndihambe ngokwezithethe zakho." 
Psalms119:89 *Ndikhoyo, ilizwi lakho sisimakade; lithe zinzi emazulwini." 
Psalms119:90 Wena uya kuhlala uthembekile; ihlabathi walenza, soze lashukuma." 
Psalms119:91 Izigqibo zakho zohlala zihleli; iinto zonke zikhahlela kuwe. 
Psalms119:92 Ukuba bendingawulangazeleli umyalelo wakho ngezindibulele iimbandezelo. 
Psalms119:93 Soze ndiyityeshele imimiselo yakho, kuba ndibufumana kuyo ubomi." 
Psalms119:94 Mna ndingowakho, ndisindise, kuba ndiyayilandela imimiselo yakho." 
Psalms119:95 Abakhohlakeleyo bafuna ukunditshabalalisa; ke mna ndiyayetyisa imfundiso yakho. 
Psalms119:96 Ndiyaqonda ukuba ayikho into efezekileyo; ke yona imiqathango yakho ayinantanga ngemfezeko. 
Psalms119:97 Ndiyawuthanda kambe umyalelo wakho; ndiphicothana nawo imini yonke. 
Psalms119:98 Iziyalo zakho zendele kum; zindenza ndilumke kuneentshaba zam. 
Psalms119:99 Ndibavelele nabafundisayo, kuba ndizinonelele iimfundiso zakho." 
Psalms119:100 Ngokuqonda nditshatshele nakwabadala, kuba ndiyazithobela izithethe zakho." 
Psalms119:101 Ndiyazicezela iindlela ezinengozi, kuba ndithobela ilizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:102 Andiphambuki kwisigwebo sakho, njengoko wandifundisayo." 
Psalms119:103 Izithembiso zakho zimnandi, ziyanandipheka; ewe, ziyolile kunobusi." 
Psalms119:104 Imfundiso yakho indivul' ingqondo, ngoko ke ndibuthiyil' ubugwenxa." 
Psalms119:105 Ilizwi lakho sisibane sendlela yam; liyandikhanyisela eluhambeni. 
Psalms119:106 Ndizibophelele ngesifungo; ndiya kusithobela isigwebo sakho. 
Psalms119:107 *Ndikhoyo, ndixhwaleke ngokungathethekiyo; ndihlaziye ngokwedinga lakho." 
Psalms119:108 Ndikhoyo, wamkele umbulelo wam, undazise izigqibo zakho." 
Psalms119:109 Ubomi bam buhlala busesichengeni, kodwa andishenxi kumyalelo wakho." 
Psalms119:110 Abakhohlakeleyo bayandithiyela, kodwa andiphambuki kwimimiselo yakho." 
Psalms119:111 Imfundiso yakho lilifa lam nanini na; ewe, iluyolo entliziyweni." 
Psalms119:112 Ndizimisel' ukuyenza imithetho yakho; ewe, ndoyithobela kude kube sekupheleni." 
Psalms119:113 Ndibathiyile abantu abambaxa, kodwa ndiyawuthanda umyalelo wakho." 
Psalms119:114 Wena ulikhaka nekhusi lam; ndiqamele ngelizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:115 Khanindiyeke, nina bantu bangcolileyo, ndithobele imiqathango yoThixo wam." 
Psalms119:116 Ndixhase ngokwesithembiso sakho, khon' ukuze ndibudle ubomi; mandingadani kukufadalala kwethemba lam." 
Psalms119:117 Ndomeleze, khon' ukuze ndisinde, ndihlale ndinonelele imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:118 Wena ubachasile abanxaxhayo emithethweni yakho; kona ukundweba kwabo ngamampunge. 
Psalms119:119 Wena izikhohlakali uzishenxisa njengenkunkuma; ngoko ke ndiyazithanda izithethe zakho. 
Psalms119:120 Ke mna ndiziva ndikoyika; sona isigwebo sakho siyandirhwaqelisa. 
Psalms119:121 Ndizithobele izimiso zakho, andinabala; sukundiyekela ngabo banditshutshisayo." 
Psalms119:122 Ndivelele undilungiselele, mna sicaka sakho; mandingaxhatshazwa zizijama-nkungwini." 
Psalms119:123 Amehlo am selenikezela, ejonge ukusindiswa, nditsho ukufezekiswa kwesithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:124 Ndazelelele ngokokuphuphuma kwezibele zakho, undifundise imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:125 Ndingowakho, ndiphe ukuqonda, ukuze ndizazi izithethe zakho." 
Psalms119:126 Ngoku ke kungawe, *Ndikhoyo; abantu bawunyathele umyalelo wakho." 
Psalms119:127 Iziyalo zakho ndiyazithanda ngaphezu kwayo negolide yodidi; 
Psalms119:128 kungoko ndiyilandela imimiselo yakho; ke kona ukunxaxha ndikuthiyile. 
Psalms119:129 Imfundiso yakho ibalulekile; ndoyithobela ngomxhelo wam wonke. 
Psalms119:130 Lithi lakuchazwa ilizwi lakho kutsho kuthi qwenge; abangazi nto libanika ukuqonda. 
Psalms119:131 Ndisuka ndikhefuze ndithe nkebe, kuba ndiyazilangazelela iziyalo zakho." 
Psalms119:132 Khawuze kum undibabale, kakade wenjenjalo kwabakuthandayo." 
Psalms119:133 Khawundisekele ngokwesithembiso sakho, ungandiyekeli ndonganyelwe bububi." 
Psalms119:134 Ndikhulule kwingcinezelo yabantu, ukuze ndiyenze imimiselo yakho." 
Psalms119:135 Ndivelele undazelelele, undifundise imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:136 Ngenxa yabantu abangawuthobeliyo umthetho wakho zitsho ziphalale iinyembezi kum. 
Psalms119:137 Hayi kambe ukulunga kwakho, *Ndikhoyo! Ewe, isigwebo sakho asinagobe." 
Psalms119:138 Usinika imfundiso enobulungisa; ewe, inolungelelwano, ithe ngqo." 
Psalms119:139 Ikhwele lindongamele ngenxa yeentshaba ezingalikhathalelanga ilizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:140 Izithembiso zakho zivavanyiwe zagqwesa; ke mna ndizixabise gqitha. 
Psalms119:141 Nakuba ndidelekile, ndingazelwa nto, andishenxi kwimimiselo yakho." 
Psalms119:142 Ubulungisa bakho bohlala buhleli, nomyalelo wakho wohlala uthembekile." 
Psalms119:143 Ndiphahlwe ziinzima neenkathazo, kodwa ke mna andiziva ngeziyalo zakho." 
Psalms119:144 Imfundiso yakho iya kuhlala ifezekile; ndiphe ukuqonda, ukuze ndiphile." 
Psalms119:145 Yo-o-o! Khawundivelele, *Mhlekazi! Ke yona imithetho yakho ndiya kuyithobela." 
Psalms119:146 Ndizibika kuwe, ndikhulule; imfundiso yakho ndoyithobela." 
Psalms119:147 Ndikhala kuwe kusathi qheke ukusa; kaloku ndikholosa ngezwi lakho. 
Psalms119:148 Ndivuk' ezinzulwini zobusuku; ndicamngca ngezithembiso zakho. 
Psalms119:149 Ngenxa yezibele zakho, *Ndikhoyo, sabela, undihlaziye ngokwesigqibo sakho." 
Psalms119:150 Abandenzela amayelenqe bayasondela, bona abayikhathalelanga imiyalelo yakho." 
Psalms119:151 Kanti ke wena ukufutshane nam, Ndikhoyo, neziyalo zakho zithembekile." 
Psalms119:152 Kwantlandlolo ndizifundile izithethe zakho; zaye ke zona zisisimakade. 
Psalms119:153 Velana nam, kuba ndibandezelekile, undisindise, kuba andishenxi emyalelweni wakho." 
Psalms119:154 Zabalaza undihlangule; ndihlaziye ngokwesithembiso sakho. 
Psalms119:155 Kwizikhohlakali usindiso luthe qelele, kuba aziyikhathalele imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:156 Ke wena, *Ndikhoyo, unguSozinceba; ndihlaziye ngokwesigqibo sakho." 
Psalms119:157 Zininzi iintshaba nabandibandezelayo, kodwa andishenxi kwimfundiso yakho." 
Psalms119:158 Ndiyakhamnqa ndakubona abangcatshi; kaloku bona abalise so idinga lakho. 
Psalms119:159 Ndiyayithanda kambe imimiselo yakho, Ndikhoyo; ngokwezibele zakho ndazelele ebomini." 
Psalms119:160 Oyena ndoqo wodaba lwakho yinyaniso; xa zizonke izigqibo zakho soze zithini. 
Psalms119:161 Iziphathamandla ziyanditshutshisa ngaphandle kwesizathu; ke mna ndiyalihlonipha ilizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:162 Izithembiso zakho ziyandonwabisa; nditsho ndifane nomntu oxhaphaza isisulu. 
Psalms119:163 Ndibuthiyil' ubutshijolo, bunezothe kum; kanti ke umyalelo wakho ndiyawuthanda." 
Psalms119:164 Lide liye kutshona ndikubulela ngenxa yokulunga kwezigqibo zakho. 
Psalms119:165 Abathobela umyalelo wakho bahlala banelisekile; kaloku akukho nto ingabaphazamisayo. 
Psalms119:166 Ndikhoyo, ndijonge kuwe, ndisindise; kaloku ndizithobele iziyalo zakho." 
Psalms119:167 Imfundiso yakho ndiyilandela ngomoya wam wonke; kaloku andizenzi, ndiyayithanda." 
Psalms119:168 Ndiyayithobela imimiselo nezithethe zakho, kambe ke wena wazi konke ngam." 
Psalms119:169 Ndiyatarhuzisa; ndive, *Nkosi; ndivul' ingqondo ngokwesithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:170 Ndiyakubongoza, ndiphulaphule; ndihlangule njengoko wathembisayo." 
Psalms119:171 Ndiya kusoloko ndikuncoma, ndikubonga, kuba uyandifundisa imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:172 Ingoma yam ngamadinga akho; kaloku iziyalo zakho zilungile. 
Psalms119:173 Hlala ulungele ukundinceda; kaloku ndizikhethele imimiselo yakho. 
Psalms119:174 Wowu! Ndiyakulangazelela ukusindiswa! *Ndikhoyo, andiziva ngemithetho yakho!" 
Psalms119:175 Ndiphe ubomi, ukuze ndikudumise; isigqibo sakho masindixhase." 
Psalms119:176 Ndibhadula njengegusha elahlekileyo. Awu, phuthuma usifune isicaka sakho, kuba andiyilibali imiqathango yakho!" 
Psalms120:1 Ndazibika *kuNdikhoyo ndixhwalekile; yena wandiva, wasabela." 
Psalms120:2 Ndathi: “Mhlekazi, ndihlangule kumaxoki nakubakhohlisi.”" 
Psalms120:3 Nithi makenze ntoni ngani uThixo? Nisalindele ntoni eyenye, maxokindini," 
Psalms120:4 ngaphandle kotolo lwemfazwe olubukhali, ngokunjalo neziko elimalahle avuthayo!" 
Psalms120:5 Athi ke mna, mnt' ubhacele kwaMesheki, mna mntu uxhwarhe phakathi kwamaKedare!" 
Psalms120:6 Kunini ndihlalele ukungcuchalaza phakathi koompayipheli. 
Psalms120:7 Phi ke, ndisithi nje ndakuthetha, basuke bahlab' umkhosi." 
Psalms121:1 Amehlo am ndiwajongis' enkalweni; yaz'ba lovela ngaphi na uncedo lwam? 
Psalms121:2 Umncedi wam *nguNdikhoyo, yena ungumenzi wamazulu nehlabathi." 
Psalms121:3 Yena wondibamba lungatyibiliki unyawo lwam; kaloku akozeli, walusa mna." 
Psalms121:4 Khangela, umalusi kaSirayeli akozeli, engalali nokulala oku." 
Psalms121:5 Kaloku nguNdikhoyo okwalusayo – nguye okwenzela umthunzi. 
Psalms121:6 Emini ilanga aliyi kukugqatsa; kanti ke nenyanga ebusuku ayinakukwenza nto. 
Psalms121:7 NguNdikhoyo ixhadi lakho lakubhek' umoya; ewe, uya kukwalusa ungachukunyiswa nto." 
Psalms121:8 Ngenene, uNdikhoyo uya kukwalusa, xa uhambayo naxa ubuyayo, kuqalela ngoku kude kube nini-nini." 
Psalms122:1 Hay' imincili endaba nayo basakuthi kum: “Masihambe siye endlwini *kaNdikhoyo.” 
Psalms122:2 Naku ke ngoku iinyawo zethu zime bhuxe ngaphakathi kwamasango akho, Jerusalem." 
Psalms122:3 Ke kaloku iJerusalem yingxikela yesixeko esakhiwe sabandakanywa saba sinye. 
Psalms122:4 Kulapho zityelela khona izizwe; nditsho izizwe zikaNdikhoyo. Kaloku lowo yaba ngummiselo kumaSirayeli ukuba aye kudomboza abulele uNdikhoyo. 
Psalms122:5 Apha kulapho zikhoyo iinkundla; nditsho iinkundla zendlu kaDavide. 
Psalms122:6 Thandazani kubekho inzolo eJerusalem, nithi: “Makube yinkqubela kwabakuthandayo, Jerusalem;" 
Psalms122:7 kuwe makube chosi, kube hele, ukhuseleke umzi wakho jikelele.”" 
Psalms122:8 Ngenxa yezihlobo nabalingane bam nangoku ndithi: “Makube chosi, kube hele!”" 
Psalms122:9 Kanti ke nangenxa yendlu kaNdikhoyo uThixo wethu ndiya kuzabalaza ndikufunela intlala-kahle. 
Psalms123:1 *Ndikhoyo, ndikhangela kuwe, wena ohlala emazulwini." 
Psalms123:2 Kaloku namaphakathi ajonga izinwe zenkosi yawo, nanjengokuba namaphakathikazi elindele izinwe kwinkosazana. Nathi ke senjenjalo ukukhangela kuwe, Ndikhoyo Thixo wethu, ude wena usenzele inceba." 
Psalms123:3 Awu, Ndikhoyo, sikwa yimfesane; velana nathi, siyakubongoza! Koda kube nini sisisigculelo?" 
Psalms123:4 Ewe, kudala sinyamezele, sigxijwa ngabazingcayo, sidodotyaliswa ngabacinezeli abanekratshi." 
Psalms124:1 USirayeli makatsho athi: “Ukuba *uNdikhoyo ebengekho ngakuthi," 
Psalms124:2 ewe, ukuba besingaxhaswa nguNdikhoyo ekuhlaselweni kwethu lutshaba," 
Psalms124:3 ngelusiginye sihleli ngokuya lwaluvutha ngumsindo. 
Psalms124:4 Ngezasitshayela iimpuphuma; ewe, umsinga ngewawusirhaxile." 
Psalms124:5 Ngesantywiliselwa, satshona lè, kuloo manzi alatyuzayo.”" 
Psalms124:6 UNdikhoyo ngowokubongwa, kuba yena akasiyekelanga saba ngamaxhoba okuqwengwa." 
Psalms124:7 Thina siphuncule njengentak' esigwini; ewe, isigu saphukile, sasinda ke thina." 
Psalms124:8 Uncedo lwethu luvela kuNdikhoyo ongumdali wamazulu nehlabathi. 
Psalms125:1 Abo bakholosa *ngoNdikhoyo banjengentaba iZiyon, yona ingasoze yashukunyiswa koko izinzile ngonaphakade." 
Psalms125:2 Kwanjengokuba iintaba ziyingqongile iJerusalem noNdikhoyo wenjenjalo ukubaphahla abantu bakhe, nangoku kude kube ngunaphakade." 
Psalms125:3 Izikhohlakali soze zilawule elizweni lamalungisa, hleze namalungisa asuke enze ububi." 
Psalms125:4 Awu, Ndikhoyo, walungiselele amalungisa, abo bantliziyo zingaphambukiyo." 
Psalms125:5 Kodwa ke bona abaphambukayo babandakanye nezikhohlakali, Ndikhoyo. Makube chosi, kube hele kwaSirayeli!" 
Psalms126:1 Ekusibuyiseleni *kukaNdikhoyo eZiyon, ngokuya sasiphuma ekuthinjweni, kwasuka kwaba ngathi liphupha." 
Psalms126:2 Safumana sagigitheka yintsini, kwayintswahla yemincili novuyo. Zade zatsho nezizwe zathi: “Ngenene uNdikhoyo ubenzele izinto ezinkulu.”" 
Psalms126:3 UNdikhoyo usincede kakhulu, ngoko ke siyavuya." 
Psalms126:4 Khawusibuyisele inkqubela, Ndikhoyo, njengamanzi empompoz' entlango." 
Psalms126:5 Abo bahlwayela behlininika besezinyembezini banga bangavuna bebobotheka yimincili. 
Psalms126:6 Abo baphuma bahambe bezibambe ngeenkophe, bepheth' imbewu, besiya kuhlwayela, bobuya bedanduluka, bememelela ngemincili. Kaloku bobuya besikaza, bethwel' isivuno." 
Psalms127:1 Ukuba *uNdikhoyo akayakhi indlu, bafumana bebulaleka abayakhayo. Ukuba asaluswa nguNdikhoyo isixeko, ancam' ubuthongo ngelize amajoni alindayo." 
Psalms127:2 Ngamampunge ukuzabalaza uzam' ukuzixhasa, uvuka ngentseni, ulal' ezinzulwini, ungumaphila-kukuzenzela. Kaloku uNdikhoyo uyabaxhasa abakhe; ewe, yena ubaxhasa belele." 
Psalms127:3 Uyabona ke, oonyana lilifa elivela kuNdikhoyo; ngenene, abantwana sisipho esivela kuye." 
Psalms127:4 Oonyana bendodana bafana neentolo elixhobe ngazo ijoni. 
Psalms127:5 Hay' ukuzimaseka kwendoda enesiphampa sazo! Ayisoze yadeleka mpela, naxa ixambulisana neentshaba enkundleni." 
Psalms128:1 Hay' inyhweba yomntu omthobelayo *uNdikhoyo, ohamba ngokwemimiselo yakhe." 
Psalms128:2 Onjalo uyazibona iziqhamo zemisebenzi yakhe; uhlala ngokonwaba enenkqubela. 
Psalms128:3 Inkosikazi yakhe ifana nomdiliya oyokozelayo, omi ngasendlwini; abantwana bakhe bafana nezithole zomnquma ezingqonge isithebe sakhe." 
Psalms128:4 Ewe, ngenene unenyhweba umntu omthobelayo uNdikhoyo." 
Psalms128:5 Ngamana waphokoza amathamsanqa eseZiyon uNdikhoyo, ke wena uyibone inkqubela yeJerusalem ngayo yonke imihla yobomi bakho," 
Psalms128:6 ukhule ude ukhokhobe. Makube chosi, kube hele kwaSirayeli!" 
Psalms129:1 USirayeli makabalise athi: “Iintshaba zandihlasela kwandiseyimveku. 
Psalms129:2 Ewe, zanditshutshisa kwandiselula, kodwa zange zindongamele." 
Psalms129:3 Zandixobula umqolo, ndangathi bendilinywa." 
Psalms129:4 Kambe ke yena *uNdikhoyo ulilungisa; undikhulule kwiimbophelelo zabakhohlakeleyo.” 
Psalms129:5 Bonke abayithiyileyo iZiyon mababuye bephoxekile. 
Psalms129:6 Mabafane nengca entshula phezu kwendlu, yona idodobalayo ingakhuli." 
Psalms129:7 Ayide isikwe nokusikwa; futhi ayiqokelelwa ibe zizipha. 
Psalms129:8 Nabadlulayo abatsho nokutsho ukuthi: “UNdikhoyo makanithamsanqele; thina siyanithamsanqelisa egameni likaNdikhoyo!” 
Psalms130:1 *Ndikhoyo, ndiyazibika kuwe; ndikhala kuwe ndibindekile." 
Psalms130:2 Awu, Nkosi, ndive ndiyakuthandaza, usiphulaphule isikhungo sam." 
Psalms130:3 Ukuba ubuzigcina izono zabantu, Ndikhoyo, ngubani obengasindayo?" 
Psalms130:4 Kambe ke wena uyaxolela, khon' ukuze uhlonitshwe." 
Psalms130:5 Ndithembele ngokupheleleyo kuNdikhoyo; ewe, ndikholosa ngelizwi lakhe." 
Psalms130:6 Umoya wam ukholosa ngoNdikhoyo ngenzondelelo, ngaphezu komlindi ojonge ukusa, nangaphezu komantshingilane ojong' umsobomvu." 
Psalms130:7 Sirayeli, thembela kuNdikhoyo, kuba yena unobubele, futhi yena ukhulula ngokupheleleyo." 
Psalms130:8 Ewe, yena uya kumkhulula uSirayeli kuzo zonke izono zakhe." 
Psalms131:1 Awu, *Ndikhoyo, mna andizigwagwisi; ngokunjalo mna andiziphakamisi. Kaloku andizixakekisi ngemicimbi ephakamileyo kunokuba ndinjalo mna." 
Psalms131:2 Kodwa ndanelisekile, ndaye ndixolile. Ndinjengosana oluthe cwaka ezingalweni zikanina; ngenene umoya wam uphuphuma ukwanela." 
Psalms131:3 Sirayeli, khawuthembele kuNdikhoyo, kususela ngoku kude kube nini-nini." 
Psalms132:1 Awu, *Ndikhoyo, mkhumbule uDavide ngawo onke amasuka-ndihlale akhe," 
Psalms132:2 nesifungo awakwenzela sona, Ndikhoyo, eso akuthembise ngaso, Ngangalala yakwaYakobi." 
Psalms132:3 Wathi: “Andisayi kugoduka, ndingasayi kulala," 
Psalms132:4 ngenene andisoze ndiwavale amehlo, ndingasoze ndibuthurhe ubuthongo," 
Psalms132:5 ndingamakhelanga umzi uNdikhoyo, nditsho ikhaya lengangalala kaYakobi.”" 
Psalms132:6 Ewe, seva ngaloo mnqophiso e-Efrata, sagagana nawo kumathafa aseYeharim, sathi:" 
Psalms132:7 “Masiye kuye ebhotwe; masiye kumnqula simkhahlele.” 
Psalms132:8 Ndikhoyo, khawuye endaweni yakho yokuphumla, wena ndawonye netyesi yomnqophiso; nditsho leyo ingumqondiso wamandla akho." 
Psalms132:9 Ababingeleli mabavathe ubulungisa, abantu bakho batsholoze ngovuyo." 
Psalms132:10 Ngenxa yesicaka sakho uDavide ungamfulatheli umthanjiswa wakho. 
Psalms132:11 Kaloku, Ndikhoyo, wamenzela isifungo uDavide, futhi ke soze usijike, usithi: “Omnye koonyana besinqe sakho ndiya kumthambisa abe ngukumkani, angene esikhundleni sakho." 
Psalms132:12 Ukuba ke bathe bawugcina umnqophiso lo oonyana bakho, kwanemimiselo endibafundisa yona, noonyana babo bolawula, bachophe esikhundleni sakho ngonaphakade.”" 
Psalms132:13 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uyinyule iZiyon; uyikhethele ukuba ibe likhaya lakhe, esithi:" 
Psalms132:14 “Eli likhaya lam lokuphumla naphakade; ndiya kuma apha ngokomnqweno wam. 
Psalms132:15 Ndiya kuyithi jize ngentabalala yendyebo; abahlelelekileyo ndiya kubondla. 
Psalms132:16 Ababingeleli bovatha usindiso, abantu bam batsholoze ngemihlali." 
Psalms132:17 Kuya kuvela omnye kubazukulwana bakaDavide; ndiya kuwugcina umlibo womthanjiswa wam. 
Psalms132:18 Iintshaba zakhe ndozigalela ngehlazo; ke olwakhe ulawulo loba nesidima nenkqubela.” 
Psalms133:1 Khawukhangele ukubukeka nomkhitha wokuhlala kwezalamane ngemvano! 
Psalms133:2 Kunjengesiqholo esigalelwe entloko, esihla ngeendevu zika-Aron, side sithi xhaxhe ngomphetho wengubo yakhe." 
Psalms133:3 Kufana nombethe entabeni iHermon, lowo ulala kwiinduli zeZiyon. Kulapho *uNdikhoyo awafumbe khona amathamsanqa nobomi obungaphele ndawo." 
Psalms134:1 Yizani nimbonge nimncome *uNdikhoyo, nonke nina zicaka zakhe, nina nonke nima bume ebusuku, nisebenza endlwini kaNdikhoyo." 
Psalms134:2 Ziphakamiseleni esibingelelweni izandla zenu, nimbonge nimncome uNdikhoyo." 
Psalms134:3 UNdikhoyo, umenzi wamazulu nehlabathi, wanga angakuthamsanqela eseZiyon." 
Psalms135:1 Huntshu-u-u! Khanityibele nimbonge *uNdikhoyo; ewe, lidumisen' igama likaNdikhoyo! Zicaka zakhe, khahlelani nidumisa uNdikhoyo;" 
Psalms135:2 nditsho nina nitabhata endlwini kaNdikhoyo, nasenkundleni yomzi woThixo wethu." 
Psalms135:3 Mdumiseni, kuba uNdikhoyo yindlel' enqwelo ngokulunga; memelelani nimdumise, kuba kuluyolo ukwenjenjalo." 
Psalms135:4 Andithi kaloku uNdikhoyo wazinyulela uYakobi! Ewe, wazikhethela uSirayeli wangowakhe ncakasana!" 
Psalms135:5 Ndiyaqonda ukuba uNdikhoyo ubavelele, ewe, ubakrobele bonke abanye *oothixo." 
Psalms135:6 Kaloku uNdikhoyo wenza ngokubona kwakhe – nditsho emazulwini nasemhlabeni, kwiilwandle nakwiinzongo-nzongo zeenzulu." 
Psalms135:7 Ngumavus' iingqimba zamafu eziphelweni zehlabathi, ulokhaph' imvula ngemibane elenyayo, aze akhuph' isaqhwithi ngendlu yaso." 
Psalms135:8 Kaloku nguye owabhubhisa amazibulo eJiputa; ewe, wageqa awabantu nawezilwanyana." 
Psalms135:9 Kanye phakathi kwelaseJiputa wenza imiqondiso nemimangaliso, wamohlwaya ukumkani nezicaka zakhe." 
Psalms135:10 Wazingenela izizwe, kwajub' ugodo, wabageqa ookumkani abaziwayo." 
Psalms135:11 Nditsho ooSihon ukumkani wama-Amori, noo-Ogi ukumkani waseBhashan, nazo zonke izikumkani zaseKanana." 
Psalms135:12 Umhlaba wazo wona wawohlutha, waza waba lilifa labantu bakhe amaSirayeli." 
Psalms135:13 Igama lakho, Ndikhoyo, lohlala ngonaphakade; udumo lwakho lovakala kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Psalms135:14 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uya kubalungiselela abantu bakhe, avelane nazo izicaka zakhe." 
Psalms135:15 Oothixo beentlanga benziwe ngegolide nesiliva; basisiqhamo sobuchule bezandla zomntu. 
Psalms135:16 Benemilomo nje, abakwazi ukuthetha; banawo namehlo, kodwa ababoni." 
Psalms135:17 Nakuba beneendlebe nje, bazizithulu; baziziduli ezingenawo nomphefumlo." 
Psalms135:18 Bakwafana nazo abenzi bazo, nabo bonke abakholosa ngazo." 
Psalms135:19 Khanidume nibonge uNdikhoyo, ndlu kaSirayeli, nani ndlu ka-Aron, mbongen' uNdikhoyo." 
Psalms135:20 NabaLevi mabakhahlele bebonga uNdikhoyo, nabamthobelayo uNdikhoyo mababonge bade babongisele." 
Psalms135:21 Izibongo mazihlokome, ziphuma eZiyon, zidumisa uNdikhoyo okhaya liseJerusalem. Awu! Sitsho sonke, sithi: “Bayethe, Mhlekazi!”" 
Psalms136:1 Bulelani nidomboze ngenxa yokulunga *kukaNdikhoyo. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:2 Bulelani kuThixo onguyedwa. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:3 Bambani ngazibini kwiNkosi yamakhosi. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:4 Nguye yedwa owenza imimangaliso. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:5 Ngobulumko bakhe wawadal' amazulu. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:6 Ulotwabulula ihlabathi phezu kwamanzi. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:7 Yena ngumenzi welanga nenyanga. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:8 Ilanga laba ngumongameli wemini. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:9 Yona inyanga neenkwenkwezi zongamela ubusuku. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:10 Yena ngumaqwakanis' amazibulo aseJiputa. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:11 Yena wamkhupha uSirayeli phakathi kwamaJiputa. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:12 Wolula isandla sakhe, wamkhulula ngengalo yakhe engwanyalala. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli." 
Psalms136:13 Yena walahlula-hlula uLwandle oluBomvu. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:14 USirayeli wanqumla kulo wawela. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:15 Kambe ke wamntywilisela ukumkani nomkhosi wakhe. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:16 Ulokhokel' abantu bakhe entlango, Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli." 
Psalms136:17 umqwakanisi wookumkani abanamagama, Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli." 
Psalms136:18 umhlabaniseli wookumkani abadumileyo, Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli." 
Psalms136:19 uSihon ukumkani wama-Amori, Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli." 
Psalms136:20 uOgi ukumkani waseBhashan. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:21 Umhlaba wabo wawenza ilifa lamaSirayeli. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:22 Loo mhlaba waba lilifa lesicaka sakhe uSirayeli. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:23 Nguye owasivelelayo sigqusha eluthulini. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:24 Yena wasihlangula ezintshabeni zethu. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:25 Yena ngumondli wazo zonke izinto eziphilayo. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms136:26 Bulelani nidomboze kuThixo wamazulu. Kaloku ububele bakhe buhlala buhleli. 
Psalms137:1 Ngasemilanjeni yaseBhabheli sahlala phantsi sagixa sakucinga *ngeZiyon. 
Psalms137:2 Iikatala zethu sazixhoma emingcunubeni kwalapho. 
Psalms137:3 Kaloku abo babesithimbile suka bathi: “Khanisonwabise ngengoma; khanihlabele enye kwezaseZiyon.” 
Psalms137:4 Besingathini kambe ukucula *ezikaNdikhoyo kwelasemzini! 
Psalms137:5 Ukuba ndingakulibala, Jerusalem, sanga singashwabana isandla sam sokunene." 
Psalms137:6 Malunamathele ezinkalakahleni ulwimi lwam, ukuba ndinokukulibala, xa ndinokusuka ndingayibaluli iJerusalem njengeyona ntshinga yovuyo lwam." 
Psalms137:7 Awu, Ndikhoyo, yikhumbule into eyênziwa ngamaEdom, mhla yahlaselwa iJerusalem. Kaloku agcoloda athi: “Yidilizeni niyisiphule neengcambu.”" 
Psalms137:8 Athi ke wena, Bhabheli, sisulundini sentshabalalo! Hayi inyhweba yalowo ukubuyekezayo ngazo zonke izinto osenze zona." 
Psalms137:9 Unoyolo ozithathayo iintsana zakho azintlekeze emaweni. 
Psalms138:1 Awu, ndibamba ngazibini, *Ndikhoyo. Ewe, ndinongazenzisiyo umbulelo; ndikuncoma ndikubonge naphi na." 
Psalms138:2 Ndikhala ndijongise ngasendlwini yakho engcwele, ndibonga ndincoma igama lakho, ngenxa yezibele nokunyaniseka kwakho, kuba uzicacisile ukuba wena, ndawonye nezithembiso zakho, ubalasele." 
Psalms138:3 Ndathi ndakukhala kuwe wandiphendula kangangokuba ndatsho ndomelezeka. 
Psalms138:4 Zonke izikumkani zehlabathi mazikudumise, Ndikhoyo, kuba zizivile izithembiso zakho." 
Psalms138:5 Ziya kumemelela, zibonga iindlela zikaNdikhoyo, kuba kaloku sibalasele isidima sakhe." 
Psalms138:6 Ewe, nakuba uMhlekazi enguSomaqhuzu nje, ubanonophele abagqush' eluthulini; ke bona abaqholosayo ubabukele." 
Psalms138:7 Nokuba ndidavuza ezinkathazweni, wena uyandikhusela; ulwa nazo iintshaba zam, undihlangule ngamandla akho." 
Psalms138:8 UNdikhoyo uyalifezekisa icebo lakhe ngam. Kambe ke, Ndikhoyo, izibele zakho zisisimakade; ungabi sawushiya umsebenzi wezandla zakho." 
Psalms139:1 Ewe, *Ndikhoyo, undigoca-gocile, uyandazi." 
Psalms139:2 Wena undazi ukusuka nokuhlala; iingcamango zam uziqonda zingekaveli. 
Psalms139:3 Mna andinako ukukunqabela nganto – nditsho ndihamba okanye ndilele, wena uyaziqonda iindlela zam zonke." 
Psalms139:4 Kaloku wena wazi ndingekathethi; ewe, Ndikhoyo, wazi nento endiza kuyithetha." 
Psalms139:5 Kaloku wena undiphahle macal' onke; isandla sakho sindifumbathile. 
Psalms139:6 Ndlela le undazi ngayo indongamele; ewe, ndiyalabalaba, isemajukujukwini kum." 
Psalms139:7 Ndingamzimela ndithini uMoya wakho? Ndingasabela phi apho ungekhoyo khona? 
Psalms139:8 Ukuba ndingenyukela emazulwini, ndingafika ukho; nokuba ndingalala kwelabafileyo, ukho nalapho." 
Psalms139:9 Ndingafanelana ndihamba nokusa, ndiye kutsho eziphelweni zolwandle," 
Psalms139:10 nalapho ndingakhokelwa sisandla sakho; ewe, ndohlala ndisemandleni akho." 
Psalms139:11 Noba ndingathi mandisongelwe bubumnyama, nokukhanya kujike kube bubusuku," 
Psalms139:12 kwabumnyama obo abumnyamanga kuwe. Kaloku nobusuku bukhanya njengemini kuwe, kuba nobumnyama buyakhanya kuwe." 
Psalms139:13 Andithi na kaloku ndadalwa nguwe; nditsho mna kanye lo! Ewe, wandixonxa wandilunga-lungisa kwandisekumama." 
Psalms139:14 Ndikubonga ndikubulela ngenxa yomntu endinguye, ngenxa yokumangalisa nokukhwankqisa kwento endiyiyo. Ewe, iyakhamnqisa kambe imisebenzi yakho. Leyo ke into ndiyiqonde pheleleyo." 
Psalms139:15 Uphahla lomzimba wam alungomnqa kuwe; okuya ndandibunjwa ekusitheleni wawukho. Ewe, ndabunjwa ngokunqabileyo emajukujukwini." 
Psalms139:16 Kaloku wena wandibona ndingekenziwa; imihla owandimisela yona yabhalwa encwadini yakho, ndingekayiqali nokuyiqala mna." 
Psalms139:17 Hayi bo, zintsonkothile kambe iingcamango zakho, Thixo wam! Yaz'ba zingakanani na ubuninzi!" 
Psalms139:18 Xa bendinokuzibala, zingaphaya kwentlabathi; noba bendingazigqibayo, andikabi phi. Ndoba ngalala ndivuke, usengulowa." 
Psalms139:19 Akwaba ubungabatshabalalisa abakhohlakeleyo, Thixo; izijama-nkungwini mazisuke kum," 
Psalms139:20 abantu abakwenyelisayo bengakukhathalele, abakuvukelayo beqhutywa yinkohlakalo." 
Psalms139:21 Ewe, ndibathiyile abakuthiyileyo, Ndikhoyo; kum banezothe abakuchasayo." 
Psalms139:22 Ngenene ndibathiyile mpela; ndibathatha njengeentshaba zam. 
Psalms139:23 Ndibhenela kuwe, Thixo wam: khawundigoca-goce, undiphicothe, undiqondisise; ndivavanye uziqonde iingcamango zam!" 
Psalms139:24 Ndiqwalasele, hleze ndithi kanti ndiphambukile; undikhokelele kwindlela eyeyona-yona." 
Psalms140:1 *Ndikhoyo, ndihlangule kubantu abagwenxa; ndilondoloze ndingenzakaliswa zizijama-nkungwini," 
Psalms140:2 kwabasoloko beyila amayelenqe, behamba bephemba uchuku," 
Psalms140:3 abalwimi zilenca njengezeenyoka, abamilomo inobuhlungu obunjengoberhamba." 
Psalms140:4 Ndikhoyo, ndaluse ndingabi lixhoba lezikhohlakali; ndilondoloze ndingawi ezandleni zezijama-nkungwini ezifutha amacebo okunditshabalalisa." 
Psalms140:5 Izibhoxi zindimbela umhadi, zona ziyandithiyisela zindigcayisele; ewe, zindibekela izabatha endleleni." 
Psalms140:6 Hoyina! Ndibhenela kuwe, Ndikhoyo; ndithi: “Wena unguThixo wam.” Ndive, ndiyatarhuzisa, Mhlekazi." 
Psalms140:7 Athi ke wena, Ndikhoyo, Nkosi yam, Mandlandini andisindisayo, wena ulixhadi lam mhla ngedabi." 
Psalms140:8 Mayingafezeki iminqweno yezikhohlakali, Ndikhoyo; mazibuye nembande yesikhova kumayelenqe azo." 
Psalms140:9 Abo bandirhawulayo bayabhobhoza; izisongelo zabo mazenzakalise kwabona. 
Psalms140:10 Akwaba bebengabuxulwa ngamalahle avuthayo, bahalakatsheke enzonzobileni, bangaze babuye." 
Psalms140:11 Abaphixanisi mabangaze bahlume; izijama-nkungwini mazonganyelwe bububi, zitshabalale." 
Psalms140:12 Ndiyazi ukuba wena uyabalungiselela abacinezelweyo; ewe, Ndikhoyo, uyababonelela abo bagqush' eluthulini." 
Psalms140:13 Ngenene amalungisa aya kukudumisa; ewe, kaloku wona aya kuhlala nawe." 
Psalms141:1 *Ndikhoyo, ndibhenela kuwe; nceda ndivelele. Khawubek' iindlebe, usabele ndakukhala." 
Psalms141:2 Umthandazo wam mawube sisiqhumiso kuwe, ukuphakama kwezandla zam kube ngumnikelo wamatshona." 
Psalms141:3 Ndikhoyo, wumisele umlindi umlomo wam; imilebe yam mayihlale yalusiwe." 
Psalms141:4 Ndenze ndikucezele ukwenza ububi, ndingazixakekisi ngezenzo zenkohlakalo, ndingahambisani nabantu abakhohlakeleyo. Mandingaze ndizixhamle izimuncu-muncu zabo." 
Psalms141:5 Noba lingandohlwaya ilungisa – yinyhweba leyo; nokuba liyandikhalimela – yintsikelelo leyo; ewe, andinakuphikisana nayo. Umthandazo wam uchasene nezenzo zamatshijolo." 
Psalms141:6 Iziphathamandla ke zophoswa emaweni; izikhohlakali ke zona zotsho ziqonde, zivume ukuba amazwi am afanelekile." 
Psalms141:7 Bosuka baphoxise ke bathi: “Kutsho kwangathi kuyakhutyelwa, namathambo ethu nango ethe saa; ewe, athe xhaxhe ngamangcwaba.”" 
Psalms141:8 Ke mna ndijonge enkalweni kuwe, Ndikhoyo, Thixo wam. Ndilangazelela ukukhuselwa nguwe; ungandishiyi ndisesichengeni." 
Psalms141:9 Ndihlangule kwimigibe abandibekele yona, nakuzo izabatha zabakhohlakeleyo." 
Psalms141:10 Abakhohlakeleyo mababanjiswe kwayimigibe yabo, mna ke ndingabi nawo nomkrwelo." 
Psalms142:1 Ndiyabhomboloza, ndizibika *kuNdikhoyo; ndiyahlahlamba, ndibhenela kuNdikhoyo." 
Psalms142:2 Ndiphokoza isikhalo sam phambi kwakhe; ndimbikela zonke iingxaki zam. 
Psalms142:3 Ndakuba ndidakumbile yena uyayazi imeko yam. Iintshaba zindithiyisela endleleni yam. 
Psalms142:4 Ndakukhangela ngasekunene, akakho ozidubayo ngam; ayikho indawo yokuzimela, kungekho namntu undikhathaleleyo." 
Psalms142:5 Ndibhenela kuwe, Ndikhoyo; kaloku wena uyinqaba yam, nguwe ibango lam kweli lizwe." 
Psalms142:6 Sibazele iindlebe isikhalo sam, kuba kaloku ndixhwalekile. Ndihlangule kwabo banditshutshisayo; kaloku bona bomelele kunam." 
Psalms142:7 Ndikhulule kula makhamandela, ukuze ndilibonge igama lakho. Amalungisa aya kundiphahla, kuba wena undithamsanqele." 
Psalms143:1 Wuphulaphule umthandazo wam, *Ndikhoyo; sive isikhungo sam. Wena uthembekile, ulilungisa; nceda undiphendule." 
Psalms143:2 Musa ukusixoxisa isicaka sakho; kaloku akukho bani umsulwa phambi kwakho. 
Psalms143:3 Kaloku utshaba luthene mbende nam; lundixushe lwada lwandishikixa. Lundivalele kwamnyama-ndawo, ndanga ndingowafa kudala." 
Psalms143:4 Xa kungokunje ndiyayoba; intliziyo yam iyangcungcutheka. 
Psalms143:5 Ndikhumbula imihla yamfamlibe, ndicamanga ngezinto ozenzileyo, ndiphicotha imisebenzi yezandla zakho." 
Psalms143:6 Ndizolulela kuwe izandla zam; ndikunxanele njengomhlaba owomileyo.
