Psalms143:7 Nceda usabele, Ndikhoyo; umoya wam ufadalele. Hayi, musa ukundifulathela, hleze ndifane nâbo baya enzonzobileni." 
Psalms143:8 Ububele bakho mandibuve kwakusasa; kaloku mna ndikholosa ngawe. Ndifundise indlela endifaneleyo; kaloku mna ndizibika kuwe. 
Psalms143:9 Ndikhoyo, ndihlangule ezintshabeni zam; kaloku mna ndizimela ngawe." 
Psalms143:10 Wena unguThixo wam, ngoko ke ndifundise ukuthanda kwakho. UMoya wakho wobubele makandikhokelele endleleni esisithabazi!" 
Psalms143:11 Ndikhoyo, ngenxa yesidima sakho ndihlaziye, ngenxa yobulungisa bakho ndihlangule ekuxinanisweni." 
Psalms143:12 Ngenxa yezibele zakho nceda uzinqamle iintshaba zam. Batshabalalise abanditshutshisayo; kaloku mna ndisisicaka sakho. 
Psalms144:1 Makabongwe *uNdikhoyo ondikhuselayo, yena ondiqeqeshela idabi, andenze ndiyiqulele imfazwe." 
Psalms144:2 Yena ulixhadi nenqaba yam, umqolomba nomhlanguli wam, umkhuseli endincathama ngaye. Izizwe uzifaka phantsi kwam." 
Psalms144:3 Awu, Ndikhoyo, yaz'ba kuxa eyintoni na umntu le nto ude uzidube ngaye? Ngani ukuba ude uzikhathaze ngaye?" 
Psalms144:4 Umntu ufana nqwa nomphunga, imihla yakhe injengesithunzi sisiya kusithela." 
Psalms144:5 Wakuwashukumisa amazulu, Ndikhoyo, suka akhahleleke phantsi. Wakuzichukumisa iintaba zithuquza umsi." 
Psalms144:6 Lekuza ngemibane, ubasarhaze; binza ngeentolo batsho baduba-dubeke." 
Psalms144:7 Yolula isandla sakho kweliphezulu, undonyule ndiphume kulo mgxobhozo. Ndihlangule esandleni seentlanga" 
Psalms144:8 ezimilomo impompoza ubuxoki, ezifunga ubuqhophololo." 
Psalms144:9 Thixo wam, ndiya kukudumisa ngengoma entsha; ndiya kukuculela ngekatala." 
Psalms144:10 Ngumavathis' ookumkani ngoloyiso, umhlanguli kaDavide isicaka sakhe. Ndisindise kwikrele lezikhohlakali;" 
Psalms144:11 ndihlangule esandleni seentlanga ezimilomo impompoza ubuxoki, ezifunga ubuqhophololo." 
Psalms144:12 Oonyana bethu ebutsheni babo banga banganjengezityalo eziyokozelayo; iintombi zethu zibe njengamatye akroliweyo alungiselelwe ukuvathisa ibhotwe. 
Psalms144:13 Akwaba bangaphuphuma oovimba bethu, bazale ziintlobo ngeentlobo zesivuno. Akwaba zingazala amawaka iigusha zethu, zande ngamawaka aphindwe kalishumi emaphandleni." 
Psalms144:14 Ngamana zathatha iimazi zethu zeenkomo; zingemi ngenxa yokuphunza. Ngamana akungebikho zimbonono ezitalatweni zethu; ewe, singaphithizeliswa kukuthinjwa." 
Psalms144:15 Hayi uyolo lwabantu abayixhamlayo le ntsikelelo! Sinenyhweba kambe isizwe esiThixo waso unguNdikhoyo! 
Psalms145:1 Ndiya kukuncoma, Thixo ongukumkani wam; igama lakho ndolibonga nanini nanini." 
Psalms145:2 Ndiya kukubulela mihla le; igama lakho ndolidumisa kude kuse ephakadeni. 
Psalms145:3 Ngenene *uNdikhoyo yingangalala, ufanele ukudunyiswa; obakhe ubukhulu abuphengululeki." 
Psalms145:4 Isizukulwana siya kubalisela esilandelayo ngemisebenzi yakho; siya kuzibhengeza izigigaba zakho kwisizukulwana esilandelayo. 
Psalms145:5 Ndiya kucamngca ngemisebenzi yakho emangalisayo, nesidima sobuqaqawuli bobungangamsha bakho." 
Psalms145:6 Abantu baya kububhengeza ubukhulu bezenzo zakho ezikhwankqisayo, ndaye ndiya kububabaza ubukhulu bakho." 
Psalms145:7 Baya kuluxela udumo lokulunga kwakho; ewe, baya kutsholoza bencoma ubulungisa bakho." 
Psalms145:8 UNdikhoyo unesisa, yaye enovelwano. Yena unomonde; uyimvuze-mvuze bububele." 
Psalms145:9 UNdikhoyo uyabalungiselela bonke abantu; unemfobe ngazo zonke izinto azenzileyo. 
Psalms145:10 Zonke izinto ozenzileyo ziya kudomboza zibulele, Ndikhoyo; imilowo yakwakho iya kukudumisa." 
Psalms145:11 Baya kuyibhengeza indili nesidima solawulo lwakho; amandla akho aya kuba ngundaba-mlonyeni," 
Psalms145:12 ukuze uluntu luzazi izigigaba ozenzileyo kwanesidima nobuqaqawuli bolawulo lwakho. 
Psalms145:13 Ulawulo lwakho alunamida yasiphelo; ubukhosi bakho bozityhutyha zonke izizukulwana. Ilizwi alithethileyo uNdikhoyo alidliwa nja, yaye unesisa kuko konke akwenzileyo." 
Psalms145:14 UNdikhoyo uyabaxhasa bonke abagqush' eluthulini, abaphakamise bonke abathobekileyo." 
Psalms145:15 Iinto zonke zikhangela kuye ngethemba, ke yena uyazondla ngexesha elililo." 
Psalms145:16 Ewe, yena zivulekile izandla zakhe, izinto zonke uyazanelisa ngokweentswelo zazo." 
Psalms145:17 UNdikhoyo ulilungisa ngeendlela zonke, unobubele kuko konke akwenzayo." 
Psalms145:18 UNdikhoyo ukufuphi kwabo babhenela kuye, kwabo bamfuna benyanisekile." 
Psalms145:19 Uyabahlangabeza abo bamhlonelayo; uyasabela bakuzibika, abahlangule." 
Psalms145:20 UNdikhoyo uyabalondoloza abo bamthandayo; ke bona abakhohlakeleyo uya kubatshabalalisa. 
Psalms145:21 UNdikhoyo ndiya kusoloko ndimdumisa. Mazimdumise zonke izidalwa, zilincome igama lakhe elihloniphekileyo; ewe, kude kube ngunaphakade." 
Psalms146:1 Aa! Bayethe, Mhlekazi! Duma ukhahlele *kuNdikhoyo, mphefumlo wam!" 
Psalms146:2 Ndiya kumbonga uNdikhoyo lo gama ndisadla ubomi; ndiya kuhlabela indumiso, ndibonge uThixo wam bonke ubomi bam." 
Psalms146:3 Musa ukukholosa ngamanene; sukuthemba umntu, kuba akaloncedo." 
Psalms146:4 Uthi akuba efile abuyele emhlabeni; ngaloo mini buyatshitsha ubuchule bakhe. 
Psalms146:5 Hay' inyhweba yalowo uluncedo lunguThixo kaYakobi, lowo uthembele ngoNdikhoyo uThixo wakhe;" 
Psalms146:6 ongumenzi wamazulu nehlabathi, ulwandle neento zonke ezilapho kulo; yena ungajikiyo kwizithembiso zakhe;" 
Psalms146:7 umthetheleli wâbo baxhatshazwayo; umondli wâbo balambayo. UNdikhoyo uwathi jize ngenkululeko amabanjwa. 
Psalms146:8 UNdikhoyo ngumvuli wamehlo eemfama, umphakamisi wâbo bawileyo. UNdikhoyo ngumathand' amalungisa." 
Psalms146:9 UNdikhoyo ngumkhuseli wabahambi nabangeneleli, umxhasi wabahlolokazi neenkedama. Ke bona abakhohlakeleyo uyabatshabalalisa." 
Psalms146:10 Kambe ke yena uNdikhoyo uya kulawula naphakade, uThixo wakho, Ziyon, kuzo zonke izizukulwana. Siyakhahlela, sithi: “Bayethe, Mhlekazi!”" 
Psalms147:1 Dumani nithi: “Bayethe, Mhlekazi!” Kaloku yinto entle ukumemelela, sibonge uThixo wethu; ewe, luyolo, kwaye kufanelekile ukumdumisa." 
Psalms147:2 *NguNdikhoyo umakhi weJerusalem, umqokeleli weembacu zakwaSirayeli," 
Psalms147:3 umnyangi wabantliziyo zenzakeleyo, ewe, umbophi wamanxeba abo." 
Psalms147:4 Ngumqingqi wenani leenkwenkwezi; iyileyo naleyo kuzo uyibiza ngegama layo. 
Psalms147:5 Hay' ubukhulu bukaNdikhoyo, uyingangalala ngamandla! Ubulumko bakhe abunamda." 
Psalms147:6 UNdikhoyo uyabaphakamisa abagqush' eluthulini; ke bona abakhohlakeleyo ubakhahlela phantsi. 
Psalms147:7 Hlabelani nimombelele uNdikhoyo nibulela; tsholozani niculele uThixo wethu ngezeengcingo – 
Psalms147:8 umtwabululi wamafu afihl' isibhakabhaka, nguye owabela umhlaba imvula, ulontshulis' ingca ezintabeni," 
Psalms147:9 umondli wezilwanyana ngokutya kwazo, umfunzeli wamathol' ehlungulu azibikayo." 
Psalms147:10 Yena akakuhoye nganto ukukhalipha kwehashe, engabukhathalele nobungwanyalala bezitho zendoda," 
Psalms147:11 koko yena uNdikhoyo uthanda abamhlonelayo, abo bakholosa ngezibele zakhe ezingatshitshiyo." 
Psalms147:12 Duma ubonge uNdikhoyo, Jerusalem! Mbonge uThixo wakho, Ziyon!" 
Psalms147:13 Kaloku nguye owomeleza imivalo yamasango akho; nguye othamsanqela abantu bakho. 
Psalms147:14 Nguye omisela inzolo phakathi kwemida yakho; ikwanguye okwanelisa ngeyona-yona ngqolowa. 
Psalms147:15 Yena uthetha ngelizwi nje qha, ngoko nangoko lityhutyhe ihlabathi." 
Psalms147:16 Ukhitikisa ikhephu, libe njengoboya; unisa iqabaka, kube mhlophe okothuthu." 
Psalms147:17 Usarhaza umkhenkce, ngathi sisichotho; ngubani onokumelana nengqele yakhe?" 
Psalms147:18 Uthetha ngelizwi, zinyibilike ezo zinto; athumele umoya, kubaleke amanzi." 
Psalms147:19 Ngumazisi wodaba lwakhe kuYakobi, imithetho nezigqibo zakhe kuSirayeli." 
Psalms147:20 Kwezinye izizwe zange enjenjalo, nemimiselo yakhe aziyazi. Dumani nithi: “Bayethe, Mhlekazi!”" 
Psalms148:1 Aa! Bayethe, Mhlekazi! Bongan' *uNdikhoyo, nimdumise emazulwini; mdumiseni kweliphezulu!" 
Psalms148:2 Mbongeni, nonke nina zithunywa zakhe; mdumiseni, nani mikhosi yakhe!" 
Psalms148:3 Mbongeni, wena langa nawe nyanga; mdumiseni, nonke zinkwenkwezi eziqaqambileyo!" 
Psalms148:4 Mbongeni, nani mazulu asemajuku-jukwini; ewe, makube njalo nakuni, manzi angaphaya kwesibhakabhaka!" 
Psalms148:5 Ewe, mazilidumise igama likaNdikhoyo; kaloku yena wathetha ngelizwi, zabakho ke zona." 
Psalms148:6 Wazimisela ukuze zihlale zihleli nanini-nanini; ewe, wazimisela umda ongasoze washukunyiswa." 
Psalms148:7 Dumani kuNdikhoyo nalapha emhlabeni! Nditsho kuni, bominenga, nani nonke, manzi anzongonzongo," 
Psalms148:8 wena mlilo, nawe sichotho, khephundini, nani mafu, nawe saqhwithi sofezekisa ilizwi lakhe." 
Psalms148:9 Dumani, zintaba, nani zinduli, mithi yeziqhamo, nani nonke misedare!" 
Psalms148:10 Mbongeni, nina marhamncwa, nani nonke zinkomo, nina zinto zirhubuluzayo, nani zintaka ziphaphayo!" 
Psalms148:11 Khahlelani, zikumkani zehlabathi, nani nonke zizwe, matshawe, nani nonke zinxiba-mxhaka zehlabathi!" 
Psalms148:12 Dumisani xa ninonke, mlisela kwanani mthinjana; yenzani njalo, maxhego kwanani bantwana!" 
Psalms148:13 Ewe, mabalibonge igama likaNdikhoyo; kaloku yena ngugama-khulu. Ke bona ubungangamsha bakhe bulivelele ihlabathi ndawonye namazulu." 
Psalms148:14 Ewe, abantu bakhe ubathe jize ngodumo nobungangamela, ke yona imilowo yakhe ithwel' intshinga yendumiso – nditsho amaSirayeli, isizwe esisenyongweni kuye. Masitsho sonke sithi: “Bayethe, Mhlekazi!”" 
Psalms149:1 Aa! Bayethe, Mhlekazi! Memelelani niculele *uNdikhoyo ingoma entsha abongwa ngayo ebandleni lakhe labanyanisekileyo!" 
Psalms149:2 USirayeli makagcobe agcolode ngoMdali wakhe; oonyana beZiyon mabachulumache ngoKumkani wabo. 
Psalms149:3 Mabadude bamdumise bememelela, betsholoza bembonga ngegubu nekatala." 
Psalms149:4 Kaloku uNdikhoyo akaziva ngosapho lwakhe; abazithobayo ubathi jize ngoloyiso! 
Psalms149:5 Imilowo yakhe mayitaka-take ngemincili; mayimemelele ngemihlali naxa ilalayo; 
Psalms149:6 mayitsho ngentsholo idumisa uThixo, amakrele abazwe macala esezandleni," 
Psalms149:7 ukuze iphakele iintlanga impindezelo, ixhaphaze izizwe ngesohlwayo," 
Psalms149:8 ibasonge ibakhonkxe ookumkani ngamakhamandela, zona izikhulu zabo izikhuleke ngemixokelelwana," 
Psalms149:9 khon' ukuze ifezekise isigwebo sikaThixo phezu kwabo. Nântso ke intshinga yemilowo yakhe. Masikhahlele sithi: “Bayethe, Mhlekazi!”" 
Psalms150:1 Sithi: “Bayethe, Mhlekazi!” Khahlelani, nimbonge uThixo endlwini yakhe engcwele; mdumiseni ngenxa yamandla akhe esibhakabhakeni." 
Psalms150:2 Mbongeni ngenxa yemisebenzi yobugorha bakhe, nimdumise kuba yena usisihandiba sesikhulu!" 
Psalms150:3 Yitshoni ngomtyangampo wexilongo nimdumise; yombelani nimbonge ngomrhubhe nehapu! 
Psalms150:4 Dumisani nimbonge ngegubu nomdudo; ngqungqani nimbonge ngezeengcingo nesigodlo! 
Psalms150:5 Tshilani nimbonge ngamacangci akhenkcezayo; yitshoni ngentswahla nimdumise ngamacangci ahlokomayo! 
Psalms150:6 Ewe, konke okushukumayo makudume kubonge *uNdikhoyo! Masidanduluke sonke sithi: “Bayethe, Mhlekazi!”" 
Proverbs1:1 Ezi zizafobe zikaSolomon unyana kaDavide ukumkani wakwaSirayeli. 
Proverbs1:2 Ezi zafobe ziluncedo: umntu ziyamqeqesha, zimnike ubulumko, abe nokuziqonda neentetho ukuba ngaba zezengqondo na." 
Proverbs1:3 Ewe, zimenza aqeqesheke, akwazi ukuziphatha, abe ngumntu owenza okulungileyo, nothe ngqo engenagobe." 
Proverbs1:4 Ongekabi namava zimenza abe krele-krele, nomfana atsho akwazi ukwenza izigqibo ngobulumko." 
Proverbs1:5 Isilumko siyeva, sivune ulwazi; kanti nengcaphephe itsho ifumane amacebo aphilileyo," 
Proverbs1:6 khon' ukuze ikwazi ukuqonda izaci nezafobe, nditsho amazwi ezilumko nokuntsonkotha kwawo." 
Proverbs1:7 Isiseko sobulumko kukuthobela *uNdikhoyo, kambe ke zona izityhakala zibujongele phantsi ubulumko nengqeqesho." 
Proverbs1:8 Mfo wam, yithobele ingqeqesho kayihlo, ungazityesheli neziluleko zikanyoko." 
Proverbs1:9 Zona ziya kuyiphuhlisa ihambo yakho, oku kwentsimbi ehombisa intloko, nditsho oku kwamaso anika intamo umfaneleko." 
Proverbs1:10 Nyana wam, sukuvuma xa uwexulwa ngoongantweni." 
Proverbs1:11 Mhlawumbi bangathi: “Yiza silalele umntu ongenatyala, ukuze simhlasele simbulale engacingele nto.”" 
Proverbs1:12 Basenokuthi: “Yiza, siza kumcim' igama njengosengcwabeni, abe ngathi uginywe lelabafileyo," 
Proverbs1:13 size ke thina sizithathele konke okunexabiso, izindlu zethu zitsho zizale ngamaxhoba." 
Proverbs1:14 Hayi, mfondini, yiza, uzibandakanye nathi; yoba nye ingxowa yethu sonke.”" 
Proverbs1:15 Nyana wam, zikhwebule kwiindlela zabo, ulubuyise nonyawo lwakho kuzo." 
Proverbs1:16 Kaloku iinyawo zabo aziva ntambo ukuleqeka esonweni; bayakhawuleza ukuphalaza igazi. 
Proverbs1:17 Nakuba kungancedi nto nje ukuthiyela intaka xa isibona isabatha eso," 
Proverbs1:18 kodwa bona balalela elabo igazi; ewe, bazonda owabo umphefumlo." 
Proverbs1:19 Sinjalo ke isiphelo sazo zonke izikrelemnqa: ophila ngobugebenga ufa kwangobugebenga. 
Proverbs1:20 Ke bona ubulumko bumemeza nasezitalatweni; kanti ke bude bukhwaze nasezindaweni zembutho. 
Proverbs1:21 Izwi labo aligqunyelelwa nayingxolo yasezitalatweni; ewe, buvakala nasemasangweni ezixeko:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Ziyathandini, koda kube nini nithe nca ebudengeni? Yaz'ba koda kube nini na abagculeli bekuvuyela ukuphoxisa? Koda kube nini izityhakala ziluthiyile ulwazi?" 
Proverbs1:23 Kambe ke xa beninokukugqala ukukhalima kwam, bendinganiphokozela umoya wobulumko, ndabelane nani ngolwazi lwam." 
Proverbs1:24 Kaloku ndibe ngabiza, anisabeli; ndibe nganolulela isandla sam, akukho bani usamkelayo!" 
Proverbs1:25 Ewe, anilikhathalele icebiso lam; anivumi kusamkela nesilumkiso sam." 
Proverbs1:26 Ke mna ndiya kuhlekisa ngani nakungena enkathazweni; ndiya kuphoxisa ngani ngomhla wonxunguphalo. 
Proverbs1:27 Ewe, nditsho naxa senirhwaqele lunxunguphalo, lunihlasela njengesaqhwithi; seningathi nirhiwulwa sisivunguvane, imbandezelo neenzingo zinifikele." 
Proverbs1:28 “Ngenene, niya kuzibika kum, kodwa ke mna ndingasabeli. Niya kuba ngabhadula nindifuna, ningandizuzi." 
Proverbs1:29 Kaloku nisuke naluthiya ulwazi, anakukhathalela ukuthobela *uNdikhoyo." 
Proverbs1:30 Ewe, anilamkelanga icebiso lam, anivumanga naxa ndinilumkisa." 
Proverbs1:31 Ngoko ke niya kuvuna loo nto niyilimileyo; amacebo enu lawo niya kuwatya nide niwatyekeze. 
Proverbs1:32 Kaloku iziyatha zifa kuba zibumangala ubulumko; zona izityhakala zizibhubhisa ngokungakhathaleli nto. 
Proverbs1:33 Kambe ke bona abandiphulaphulayo bahlala bekhuselekile; ewe, bathi zava, bengaxhalele kwenzakaliswa nto.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Mfo wam, wathathele ingqalelo amazwi am, ungaze uyishiye imiyalelo yam." 
Proverbs2:2 Ewe, bubazele iindlebe ubulumko, nentliziyo yakho uyilahlele ekwazini." 
Proverbs2:3 Kubizele kuwe ukuqiqa, uliphakamisele ilizwi lakho ekuqondeni." 
Proverbs2:4 Ubulumko buzingele njengesiliva, ubufune njengobutyebi obombelweyo." 
Proverbs2:5 Ukuba uyenzile loo nto uya kukuqonda into okuyiyo ukuthobela *uNdikhoyo, utsho ufikelele ekumazini uThixo." 
Proverbs2:6 Kaloku nguNdikhoyo onika ubulumko; luphuma emlonyeni wakhe ulwazi nokuqonda. 
Proverbs2:7 Abo bathembekileyo ubathululela ingqiqo, aze abe likhaka lâbo banyanisekileyo." 
Proverbs2:8 Uhlala eyalusa indlela yamalungisa, aze abakhusele kwihambo yabo âbo banyanisekileyo kuye." 
Proverbs2:9 Ukuba uyandiphulaphula uya kuba nako ukubuqonda ubulungisa, ukwazi okufanelekileyo nokulungileyo. Ewe, uya kutsho uyazi yonke indlela ethe ngqo." 
Proverbs2:10 Kaloku ubulumko buya kuhlala entliziyweni yakho, umphefumlo wakho uchwayite lulwazi." 
Proverbs2:11 Ukuba neembono eziphangaleleyo kuya kukugcina; ukuqonda kuya kukukhusela," 
Proverbs2:12 utsho ukhwebuke ekwenzeni izinto ezigwenxa, usinde kubantu abaphembelela iinkathazo –" 
Proverbs2:13 nditsho asebazilahlayo iindlela ezithe ngqo, asebehamba ngeendlela zobumnyama." 
Proverbs2:14 Abo ke bangabantu abavuyayo xa besenza into embi, abayichwayitelayo imikhwa ephuthileyo yobubi." 
Proverbs2:15 Ewe, aba bantu ngamaqhophololo; iindlela zabo zingamagoso-goso." 
Proverbs2:16 Ngenene uya kutsho usinde kumfazi ongakwaziyo ukuziphatha, umfazi wasemzini omazwi alalanisayo." 
Proverbs2:17 Nditsho lowo ungathembekanga nasendodeni awazimanya nayo kwasebutsheni bakhe, ongawukhathalelanga nomnqophiso awawenza phambi koThixo wakhe." 
Proverbs2:18 Kaloku indlela eya emzini wakhe iya ekufeni, nabo bonke ke abahamba ngayo basinga kwelabafileyo." 
Proverbs2:19 Ewe, kuloo mzi wakhe akuyi lubuyayo; uthi umntu angangena khona angaze aphinde ayifumane indlela yobomi." 
Proverbs2:20 Ngoko ke hamba ekhondweni labantu abalungileyo, uziphathe ngeendlela zamalungisa." 
Proverbs2:21 Kaloku ngabantu abanyanisekileyo abaya kuma kweli lizwe; ewe, ngâbo bamsulwa abaya kuhlala behleli kulo." 
Proverbs2:22 Ke bona abantu abakhohlakeleyo baya kunqanyulwa elizweni; abo bangamatshijolo baya kuncothulwa kulo. 
Proverbs3:1 Mfo wam, sukuyilibala imfundiso yam, koko mayihlale ihleli imiyalelo yam engqondweni yakho." 
Proverbs3:2 Kaloku imfundiso yam iya kukongezela imihla emininzi, ikwandisele iminyaka noxolo." 
Proverbs3:3 Ungaze wahlukane nentembeko nokunyaniseka. Maxa onke ezi zinto mazibe sisivatho entanyeni yakho. Ewe, zikrole elucwecweni lwentliziyo yakho." 
Proverbs3:4 Ukuba uyayenza ke loo nto uya kuhlala wamkelekile, ube negama elihle kuThixo nasebantwini." 
Proverbs3:5 Kholosa *ngoNdikhoyo ngomxhelo wakho wonke, ungaze ungqiyame ngezakho iimbono." 
Proverbs3:6 Mkhumbule uNdikhoyo kuyo yonke ihambo yakho, waye ke yena eya kukukhokela kuzo zonke iindlela zakho." 
Proverbs3:7 Musa ukuzibona usisilumko wena ngokwakho; ndaweni yaloo nto hlala umhlonela uNdikhoyo, ubucezele ububi." 
Proverbs3:8 Loo nto iya kuwunika impilo umzimba wakho, atsho omelezeke amathambo akho." 
Proverbs3:9 Rhuma ngobuncwane bengeniso yakho, uzimase uNdikhoyo; ewe, menzele umnikelo ngolibo lwemveliso yakho." 
Proverbs3:10 Ukuba uyayenza le nto ziya kutsho zizale izisele zakho yindyebo; kanti ke neentsuba zakho ziya kuhlala ziphuphuma yiwayini entsha. 
Proverbs3:11 Mfo wam, musa ukuyidela ingqeqesho kaNdikhoyo, ungasicekisi isiluleko sakhe." 
Proverbs3:12 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uyamluleka umntu amthandayo, kwanjengokuba uyise emohlwaya unyana anebhongo ngaye." 
Proverbs3:13 Unenyhweba kambe umntu obufumeneyo ubulumko; nditsho lowo ukuzuzileyo ukuqonda. 
Proverbs3:14 Kaloku bona ubulumko yingeniso engaphezu kwayo nesiliva; nditsho negolide ayithathi nto kubo. 
Proverbs3:15 Ewe, bungaphezulu lee nakumatye axabisekileyo. Kuzo zonke izinto onokuzinqwenela ayikho edlula ubulumko." 
Proverbs3:16 Kaloku isandla sabo sokunene siqhelezela bubomi, kanti kwesokhohlo buxakathe ubutyebi nesidima." 
Proverbs3:17 Iindlela zabo ziindlela ezimnandi; ewe, xa zizonke zizisa uxolo." 
Proverbs3:18 Bungumthi wobomi kwababambelela kubo; bonwabile abo babuzuzileyo. 
Proverbs3:19 Kaloku uNdikhoyo ihlabathi waliseka ngobulumko, namazulu ngokwawo wawazinzisa ngengqiqo yakhe." 
Proverbs3:20 Bubugcisa bakhe obagqabhuza iinzonzobila, namafu atsho afukama avuza umbethe." 
Proverbs3:21 Mfo wam, buxabise ubuchule ndawonye nobulumko bokuvisisana; ezi zinto mazingasitheli emehlweni akho." 
Proverbs3:22 Ziya kukuthi jize ngobomi, zibe sisihombiso sentamo yakho," 
Proverbs3:23 utsho uhambe ungenaxhala, unyawo lwakho lungenakukhubeka ntweni." 
Proverbs3:24 Ngokuhlwa uya kungqengqa ungaphaphazeli, ulale uthi yoyi ubusuku bonke." 
Proverbs3:25 Awuyi kuba sayixhalela intshabalalo equbulayo, ngokunjalo nesibetho esifikela izikhohlakali." 
Proverbs3:26 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uya kukugcina ukhuselekile; soze aluyekele unyawo lwakho lungene emgibeni. 
Proverbs3:27 Musa ukwala nento elungileyo konelungelo ngayo, ngakumbi xa kusemandleni akho ukumnceda." 
Proverbs3:28 Musa ukuthi kummelwane wakho: “Hamba, uze uphinde ubuye; ndiya kukunika ngomso,” kanti unalo uncedo kuwe." 
Proverbs3:29 Ungaze umenzele iyelenqe ummelwane wakho; kaloku uhlala ngakuwe ekuthembile. 
Proverbs3:30 Musa ukuxabana nomntu ngaphandle kwesizathu, engakwenzanga nto imbi." 
Proverbs3:31 Musa ukuyilangazelela inzuzo yomntu okhohlakeleyo; ndaweni yaloo nto zicezele iindlela zakhe. 
Proverbs3:32 Kaloku ulisikizi kuNdikhoyo umntu olitshijolo; kodwa abathe tye bangamathenjwa akhe. 
Proverbs3:33 UNdikhoyo uwushwabulele umzi womntu okhohlakeleyo; kanti ke wona umzi welungisa uyawuthamsanqela. 
Proverbs3:34 Ke bona abantu abagxekayo uphoxisa ngabo, aze abenzele isisa abo bazithobayo." 
Proverbs3:35 Abantu abalumkileyo baya kulidla ilifa udumo; ke zona iziyatha ziya kwambathwa lihlazo. 
Proverbs4:1 Yiphulaphuleni, bonyana, ingqeqesho kayihlo; yigqaleni, khon' ukuze nizuze ukuqonda." 
Proverbs4:2 Ndininika eyona mfundiso iyiyo, ngoko ke musani ukuwutyeshela umyalelo wam." 
Proverbs4:3 Ngokuya ndandiseyinkwenkwana katata, ndiselula, ndinguyedwa kamama," 
Proverbs4:4 utata wayendiyala athi: “Wazikise engqondweni yakho amazwi am, ungayilibali imiyalelo yam; yigcine imithetho yam, uphile." 
Proverbs4:5 Thabatha, nabu ubulumko, nantsi ingqiqo! Ungaze wahlukane okanye ushenxe kumazwi omlomo wam!" 
Proverbs4:6 Ungaze ubushiye ubulumko, ke bona buya kukulondoloza. Thandana nabo, khon' ukuze bukukhusele." 
Proverbs4:7 Ubulumko ngoyena ndoqo, bufunisise! Fumana ingqiqo, nokuba kudle konke onako." 
Proverbs4:8 Ewe, bunonelele ubulumko, ke bona buya kukuphakamisa; bukhwaphe, ke bona buya kukuthi jize ngesihomo." 
Proverbs4:9 Boba njengentsimbi ehombisa intloko yakho, bukuthi jize ngesithsaba esingayiwayo.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Phulaphula, nyana wam, uwathathele ingqalelo amazwi am, uze udle ubomi iminyaka emininzi." 
Proverbs4:11 Mna ngokwam ndikufundisile ubulumko, ndakukhokelela endleleni ethe ngqo." 
Proverbs4:12 Xa uhamba, ukunyathela kwakho akuyi kuphazanyiswa, ngokunjalo naxa ubaleka akuyi kukhubeka." 
Proverbs4:13 Ungaze wahlukane nengqeqesho, koko bambelela kuyo; yilondoloze, kuba ibubomi bakho." 
Proverbs4:14 Musa ukuhambisana nabantu abakhohlakeleyo, ungahambi nasekhondweni labenzi bobubi." 
Proverbs4:15 Ewe, ndithi zicezele iindlela zabo, ungahambi ngazo. Shenxa kuzo, uhambe uzigqithe." 
Proverbs4:16 Kaloku izikhohlakali azaneli kukulala zingenzanga nto imbi. Ewe, ziphuthelwa ubusuku bonke, zide zibe zenzakalise umntu." 
Proverbs4:17 Kaloku inkohlakalo sisonka abasidlayo; ubundlobongela yiwayini abayiselayo. 
Proverbs4:18 Ke yona indlela yamalungisa ifana nemitha yokusa, yona iya iqaqamba ngokuqaqamba de ibe yimini epheleleyo." 
Proverbs4:19 Kambe ke zona iindlela zabakhohlakeleyo zingumnyam' ombonde-mbonde. Naxa bekhubeka abayazi into abakhubeka kuyo. 
Proverbs4:20 Ke wena, mfo wam, wagqale amazwi am, uyibazele iindlebe into endikuxelela yona." 
Proverbs4:21 Amazwi am makangacimi emehlweni akho, koko wamilisele phakathi entliziyweni yakho." 
Proverbs4:22 Ewe, abubomi kwabo bawafumeneyo; ayimpilo kumzimba xa uwonke." 
Proverbs4:23 Eyona nto emawuyilondoloze ngaphezu kwazo zonke ezinye yintliziyo yakho, kuba yona ingumthombo wobomi." 
Proverbs4:24 Mabungabikho ubuxoki emlonyeni wakho, nentetho ekhohlisayo ibe kude lee emilebeni yakho." 
Proverbs4:25 Makathi ntshoo phambili amehlo akho, neenkophe zamehlo akho zithi ngqo." 
Proverbs4:26 Qiqa phambi kokuba ubeke unyawo lwakho endleleni, ukuze ihambo yakho iqiniseke." 
Proverbs4:27 Musa ukujika-jika uye ngasekunene nangasekhohlo; unyawo lwakho malubucezele ububi. 
Proverbs5:1 Mfo wam, buve ubulumko bam, ukubazele iindlebe ukuqonda kwam," 
Proverbs5:2 ukuze ube nako ukuzilungelelanisa izinto, futhi ukwazi ukuthetha ngengqiqo." 
Proverbs5:3 Kaloku imilebe yomfazi ongakwaziyo ukuziphatha ivuza ubusi; kwaye nenkalakahla yakhe igudile kunamafutha omnquma. 
Proverbs5:4 Kanti ke ekugqibeleni uba nobukrakra okomhlonyane, akwenzakalise okwekrele elibukhali macala." 
Proverbs5:5 Kaloku iinyawo zakhe zisinga ekufeni; ukunyathela kwakhe kubheka ngqo engcwabeni. 
Proverbs5:6 Uyakuwexula kwindlela eyeyobomi; ube wena ungayazi loo nto. 
Proverbs5:7 Ngoko ke, bonyana, ndiphulaphuleni, ningashenxi koko ndinixelela kona." 
Proverbs5:8 Ewe, ndithi mcezeleni umfazi onjalo, ningasondeli nasemnyango wendlu yakhe," 
Proverbs5:9 hleze amandla enu axhatshazwe ngabanye, niyinike isikhohlakali iminyaka yenu." 
Proverbs5:10 Ewe, xa ningeva ikamva lenu liya kuxhanyulwa ngabasemzini, zize zona izinto eniziqwebileyo zibe sisisulu seentlanga." 
Proverbs5:11 Ekugqibeleni ke yoba ziincwina zodwa ugcuma, ube wona umzimba wakho uvuthuluka nezihlunu zawo." 
Proverbs5:12 Uya kuthi: “Akwaba ndandingazange ndiyithiye ingqeqesho; akwaba ndandiziphulaphule iziluleko. 
Proverbs5:13 Ngenene zange ndiwaphulaphule amazwi âbo babendiyala, zange ndiyibazele iindlebe imfundiso yabandilulekayo." 
Proverbs5:14 Ngoku ke naku ndizibhaqa sendisehlazweni ekuhlaleni naseluntwini.” 
Proverbs5:15 Nyaniseka kumfazi wakho; ewe, sela amanzi kwelakho iqula." 
Proverbs5:16 Ngani ukuba abantwana bakho bathi saa, oku komthombo omanzi wawo aphuphumela esitalatweni?" 
Proverbs5:17 Abantwana bakho mayibe ngabakho wedwa; sukuvuma baxhatshazwe nangabasemzini. 
Proverbs5:18 Ewe, ziyolise nomfazi wakho weenkomo, abe ngumthombo olithamsanqa lakho –" 
Proverbs5:19 nditsho loo nzwakazi imanz' andonga, elo bhadikazi lihle kunene! Isifuba sayo sanga singakutsho ube nemihlali, ikurhawule ngolo thando lwayo, utsho uthi ncithi." 
Proverbs5:20 Mfo wam, ngani ukuba ude uthinjwe ngumfazi ongakwaziyo ukuziphatha? Ngani ukuba ugonane nomka-mntu?" 
Proverbs5:21 Kaloku zonke izinto ezenziwa ngumntu ziyabonwa *nguNdikhoyo; zonke iindlela zakhe uzijongile. 
Proverbs5:22 Ke zona izenzo zomntu okhohlakeleyo zibambisa kwayena, ajike akhonkxwe kwasisono sakhe." 
Proverbs5:23 Ubulawa kukungaqeqesheki; ewe, uphuphuthekiswa bubuhiba bakhe." 
Proverbs6:1 Mfo wam, ukuba uthe wamela omnye umntu, wabambana nomnye ngesandla," 
Proverbs6:2 waza ke ngaloo ndlela warhintyeleka ngamazwi omlomo wakho, wavaleleka emgibeni ngenxa yesithembiso sakho," 
Proverbs6:3 nantsi ke into omawuyenze, nyana wam, ukuze ukhululeke ezandleni zommelwane wakho: hamba uzithobe kuye, umbongoze akukhulule." 
Proverbs6:4 Ewe, ungakhe ulale ungayenzanga loo nto, ungaphumli nokuphumla oku." 
Proverbs6:5 Xelisa inxala elizihlangulayo esandleni somzingeli, okanye intaka ephuncuka esandleni somthiyeli." 
Proverbs6:6 Yiya embovaneni, vilandini; qwalasela indlela eziphethe ngayo, nawe ulumke." 
Proverbs6:7 Kaloku yona ayinankosi, ingenamlawuli nankokheli," 
Proverbs6:8 kodwa nakuba injalo iyaxakeka ehlotyeni iqokelela umphako, izilungiselela ukutya ngexesha lokuvuna." 
Proverbs6:9 Kodwa kodwa, vilandini, koda kube nini uthe tywa kuloo mandlalo? Uya kuvuka nini kobo buthongo bakho?" 
Proverbs6:10 Ulibele kukuthi: “Hayi noko, makhe ndithi qwaka, ndithi ntlithi kancinane, khe ndisonge izandla, ndiphumle.”" 
Proverbs6:11 Kambe ke bona ubuhlwempu nâbo bukuchwechwela njengomkhuthuzi. Ewe, nantso ihambo-nzima isiza kukuhlasela oku kwendoda exhobileyo!" 
Proverbs6:12 Ke yena umntu ohamba ejikeleza ethetha ezolwimi ngungantweni wetshijolo. 
Proverbs6:13 Ewe, onjalo ungafika emana encwina amehlo, egobhana nabanye, ekhomba ngaloo minwe yakhe." 
Proverbs6:14 Ngalo lonke ke elo xesha uqulunqa amayelenqe entliziyweni yakhe; ewe, uyila ububi, aphembelele uqhushululu." 
Proverbs6:15 Kuthi kunjalo ke afunyanwe yinkxwaleko ngebhaqo, atsho enzakale ngephanyazo, angabi nakunyangeka." 
Proverbs6:16 Zintandathu izinto azithiyileyo *uNdikhoyo; gxebe, zisisixhenxe izinto ezilizothe kuye:" 
Proverbs6:17 amehlo endelelo, ulwimi oluxokayo, izandla eziphalaza igazi elimsulwa," 
Proverbs6:18 intliziyo eceba amayelenqe, iinyawo ezikhawuleza ukuquqela ebubini," 
Proverbs6:19 ingqina elixokayo liyigqwethe inyaniso, nomntu ophembelela ingxabano phakathi kwabazalanayo." 
Proverbs6:20 Mfo wam, yithobele imimiselo oyinikwa nguyihlo, ungazityesheli neziluleko zikanyoko." 
Proverbs6:21 Amazwi abo wamilisele engqondweni yakho nanini nanini, uwagaxele abe sisihombo entanyeni yakho." 
Proverbs6:22 Ewe, la mazwi aya kukukhokela endleleni yakho, abe ngumlindi wakho xa ulele, aze athethe nawe xa uvukile." 
Proverbs6:23 Kaloku imiyalelo isisibane; zona iziluleko zilukhanyiso; ingqeqesho ekukhalimelayo ingundoqo wobomi. 
Proverbs6:24 Zizo ezinokukukhwebula kumfazi oziphethe kakubi, zikuhlangule kumfazi wasemzini olwimi lugudileyo." 
Proverbs6:25 Sukunikezela umncwase ngenxa yobuhle bakhe; sukumkhathalela nokuba selecela amehlo. 
Proverbs6:26 Ihenyukazi ungalithenga nangesonka, kanti yena umkrexezikazi angakwenza uphulukane nobomi bakho." 
Proverbs6:27 Khawutsho! Uthi ungawufaka esifubeni sakho umlilo ize impahla yakho ingatshi? 
Proverbs6:28 Uthi ungawanyathela amalahle avuthayo zize zingatshi iinyawo zakho? 
Proverbs6:29 Kunjalo ke kumntu owambatha umka-mntu: akukho namnye omchukumisayo oya kuba msulwa. 
Proverbs6:30 Aligxekwa kangako isela xa lisiba kuba lilambile. 
Proverbs6:31 Noxa kunjalo lihlawuliswa kasixhenxe xa libanjiwe, lithinjwe yonke impahla yendlu yalo." 
Proverbs6:32 Ke yena umntu okrexezayo ngathi ushiywe ziingqondo; ewe, uyazibhubhisa yena ngokunokwakhe." 
Proverbs6:33 Isiqhamo salo msebenzi wakhe ziinduma nokuhlazeka; futhi ke oko kuphoxeka kwakhe kuya kuhlala kungenakucinywa. 
Proverbs6:34 Kaloku indoda enobukhwele inengcwangu; ithi ke apho iziphindezela khona ingabi nanceba. 
Proverbs6:35 Ewe, xa sele ikuloo meko ayiva zicengo, kungekho nantlawulo iya kuyamkela noba ingakanani na." 
Proverbs7:1 Mfo wam, wagcine amazwi am, uyimilisele kuwe imiyalelo yam." 
Proverbs7:2 Ukuba uyayilandela imimiselo yam uya kubudla ubomi. Ewe, imfundiso yam yilondoloze njengokhozo lweliso lakho." 
Proverbs7:3 Imiyalelo yam zikhumbuze ngayo ngokungathi ibotshelelwe eminweni yakho, ihlale ibhaliwe engqondweni yakho." 
Proverbs7:4 Yithi kubulumko: “Wena ungudade wethu,” kwingqiqo uthi: “Wena ungumwethu.”" 
Proverbs7:5 Xa kunjalo ke uya kusinda kumfazi okrexezayo, ungabi nakufumaneka kumfazi wasemzini okulalanisayo ngamazwi." 
Proverbs7:6 Ndikrobe ngefestile yendlu yam, ndalunguza ndingasemva kwenqwanqwa," 
Proverbs7:7 ndabona abafana abaswele ukuqonda, phakathi kwabo ndaqaphela omnye osisityhakala." 
Proverbs7:8 Wahamba ke esitalatweni apho, waya kubhijela ngekona ngasendlwini yomfazi othile." 
Proverbs7:9 Ngelo xesha ke kwakungongcwalazi, imini seyisangene, ubusuku nobumnyama sebunkqonkqoza." 
Proverbs7:10 Nâko ke kusithi gqi umfazi emkhawulela, ethe wambu ezobuhenyukazi, eneenjongo ezigwenxa." 
Proverbs7:11 Wayengungantweni womfazi othethela phezulu, engunyawo lwambethe indlela." 
Proverbs7:12 Uthi esezitalatweni abe sezindaweni zembutho, abe elunguza nasezirhangeni." 
Proverbs7:13 Lo mfazi usuke wamgona umfana lowo, wamanga; ngobuso obungenazintloni wathi kuye:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Ekhaya ndenze amadini obudlelwane; namhlanje ndizifezekisile izibhambathiso zam. 
Proverbs7:15 Ndilapha nje ke bendikhangela wena, kambe ke ngoku nguwe lo, ndikufumene!" 
Proverbs7:16 Nomandlalo wam ndiwulungisile; ndiwuthe wambu ngengayiwayo ilinen yaseJiputa. 
Proverbs7:17 Ewe, umandlalo wam sendiwuqhole ngoozimore, ikhala, ndawonye nesinamon." 
Proverbs7:18 Yiza ke, masibe seluthandweni kude kuse; ewe, masizonwabise ngalo!" 
Proverbs7:19 Kaloku owakwam usathe tshalala; uthathe uhambo olude, akekho ekhaya." 
Proverbs7:20 Umke isipaji sakhe sizele yimali; uya kubuya ukuthwasa kwenyanga.” 
Proverbs7:21 Wamlalanisa ngaloo ntetho yakhe igudileyo, wamwexula ngamazwi ezicengo zakhe." 
Proverbs7:22 Nanko ke selerhorhozela kwangoko emva kwaloo mfazi, selengathi yinkomo eya ekuxhelweni. Ungena okwesiyatha emgibeni," 
Proverbs7:23 luze utolo lumchane isibindi. Oku kwentaka engqala esigwini ulahlekelwa bubomi bakhe engaqondi. 
Proverbs7:24 Ngoko ke, bonyana, ndiphulaphuleni, niwathathele ingqalelo amazwi am!" 
Proverbs7:25 Musa ukulandelana neendlela zomfazi onjalo, ungaze ulahlekele kuzo." 
Proverbs7:26 Kaloku zininzi iingxwelerha aziwisileyo; linani eliphezulu amadoda awabuleleyo. 
Proverbs7:27 Xa usiya endlwini yakhe usinga ekufeni; ewe, uhlela kumagumbi elabafileyo." 
Proverbs8:1 Yivani, nâbo ubulumko bumemeza! Nayo ingqiqo nantso izazisa." 
Proverbs8:2 Kaloku bumi ngasezindleleni phezu kweentaba; ewe, nabu buthe bhunxe eziphambukeni zeendlela." 
Proverbs8:3 Nabo bungxang' emasangweni edolophu; ewe, buyamemelela ekungeneni esixekweni:" 
Proverbs8:4 “Hoyina, ndibhenela kuni, nina nonke luntu; ndiyanibiza nani, nzala yakwantu." 
Proverbs8:5 Kambe nani, ziyatha, fundan' ingqiqo, nani, nina zidenge, qalisan' ukuqonda." 
Proverbs8:6 Phulaphulani, kuba ndiza kutheth' izintw' ezibalaseleyo; yivani, kuba ndiza kuyixel' imfanelo." 
Proverbs8:7 Kaloku ngomlomo wam ndiza kutheth' inyaniso, kuba ke mna ndiyithiyil' inkohlakalo emilebeni yam." 
Proverbs8:8 Onke amazwi omlomo wam anyanisekile; ubuqhophololo nobuxoki abukho kuwo. 
Proverbs8:9 Kumntu oqondayo onke acacile; kwâbo baziyo onke alungile. 
Proverbs8:10 Nawe ke, yamkela ingqeqesho kunesiliva; ndithi thatha ulwazi kuneyona golide." 
Proverbs8:11 Mna bulumko ndiyawagqitha namatye exabiso; nakwiindidi zobutyebi mna andidlulwa nto. 
Proverbs8:12 “Mna bulumko ndihlala ndithe qwa; ndixakath' ulwazi kunye nokulungelelanisa. 
Proverbs8:13 Ukumthobela *uNdikhoyo kukubuthiya ububi. Yiloo nto ndikuchasileyo ukuzigwagwisa, ikratshi, ukungabi nasimilo, kunye nentetho egwenxa." 
Proverbs8:14 Ndingusomacebo, ndingumthombo weembono ezichubekileyo; ndinako ukuqonda, kanti nokomelela kokwam." 
Proverbs8:15 Ewe, oozikumkani balawula ngam, neziphathamandla zilawula ngobulungisa nje ndim." 
Proverbs8:16 Bonke abasemagunyeni bancedwa ndim lo: oomatshawe, noozikhulu, nabagwebi ngokwabo." 
Proverbs8:17 Kaloku ndiyabathanda abo bandithandayo, futhi ndiyafumaneka kwabo bandifunayo." 
Proverbs8:18 Ndibathi jize ngesihomo nendyebo, batsho babe nobutyebi obuzinzileyo nenkqubela." 
Proverbs8:19 Inzala engenxa yam ingaphezu kwayo negolide; imveliso yam iyayibetha neyona siliva. 
Proverbs8:20 Ihambo yam bubulungisa bodwa; iindlela zam zifanelekile. 
Proverbs8:21 Ubutyebi lilifa endibanikayo abo bandithandayo; ndibathi jize ngoovimba abaphuphumayo. 
Proverbs8:22 “Ekuqalekeni kwendalo kaNdikhoyo mna ndandikho ndingowakhe; ewe, ndandikho ingekabikho imisebenzi yakhe yamandulo." 
Proverbs8:23 Mna wandiqingqa kwasephakadeni, kuqala ngqa, nehlabathi lingekabikho." 
Proverbs8:24 Ndavela engekabikho namanzi anzongo-nzongo, tanci ingekaveli nemithombo ephuphuma amanzi." 
Proverbs8:25 Ndingowokuqala phambi kwazo neentaba; neenduli zilibone emva kwam ilanga. 
Proverbs8:26 Ndabakho ungekabikho umhlaba neentili zawo; ewe, kwakungekabikho nothuli olu ehlabathini!" 
Proverbs8:27 Ndandikho ekumiselweni kwamazulu nguThixo, xa wayetwabulula isibhakabhaka kumanzi anzongo-nzongo." 
Proverbs8:28 Xa wayesambathisa isibhakabhaka ngamafu ndandilapho, nangokuya wayeseka imithombo yeelwandle ndandikho." 
Proverbs8:29 Ndandilapho xa wayemisa imida yolwandle, xa wayesithi: ‘Latyuza, kodwa ungagqithi apha.’ Ekuzimiseni kwakhe iziseko zehlabathi ndandikho." 
Proverbs8:30 Ewe, ndayingcali yomsebenzi, ndiyintonga yakhe yasekhosi; ndandizele yimincili iimini ngeemini, ndivuya apho ecaleni kwakhe." 
Proverbs8:31 Ngenene ndandichulumacha kulo elimiweyo; ndandiziva ndinemihlali phakathi koluntu. 
Proverbs8:32 “Ngoko ke, bonyana, ndiphulaphuleni, kuba banoyolo abo bahamba ngeendlela zam." 
Proverbs8:33 Yamkeleni ingqeqesho, ukuze nibe zizilumko; sanukuyityeshela, koko bambelelani kuyo." 
Proverbs8:34 Unenyhweba kambe umntu ondiphulaphulayo; nditsho lowo uhlala enkundleni yam yonke imihla, osoloko elindile emasangweni am phaya." 
Proverbs8:35 Ozuze mna ke ubufumene ubomi; uxhamla ukwaneliseka kukaNdikhoyo. 
Proverbs8:36 Kambe ke yena ondiphosileyo uzenzakalisile; kanti ke lowo undithiyileyo uthand' ukufa.” 
Proverbs9:1 Ubulumko buyakhile indlu yabo, bayenzela iintsika ezisixhenxe." 
Proverbs9:2 Ubulumko buxhelile, bayixuba newayini; kwaye netafile sebuyidekile." 
Proverbs9:3 Buthume izicakazana ukuba zime ezindulini, zazise apho edolophini, zithi:" 
Proverbs9:4 “Yizani nonke, nina bangaqondiyo.” Kanti ke kwabaswele ukuqonda buthi:" 
Proverbs9:5 “Ngenani nitye ukutya endikulungisileyo, nisele newayini endiyixubileyo." 
Proverbs9:6 Lahlani ubuyatha, khon' ukuze niphile; hambani ngendlela yeengqondi." 
Proverbs9:7 “Othethisa umgxeki uzibizela ukuthukwa; okhalimela isikhohlakali udibana nokunyeliswa. 
Proverbs9:8 Sukuziduba ngokululeka umgxeki kuba wosuka akucaphukele; kambe ke wakululeka isilumko sitsho sikuhloniphe. 
Proverbs9:9 Wakusifundisa isilumko sitsho silumke ngaphezulu. Ukuba uyalicebisa ilungisa litsho longeze ulutho kulwazi lwalo. 
Proverbs9:10 “Isiseko sobulumko kukuthobela *uNdikhoyo; umntu omaziyo oyiNgcwele kanye uzuza ingqiqo. 
Proverbs9:11 Mna bulumko ndoyenza ibe mininzi imihla yakho, ndiyongeze iminyaka yobomi bakho." 
Proverbs9:12 Xa usisilumko woncedwa bubulumko bakho; kanti xa ungumgxeki iya kuba nguwe kanye ohluphekayo.” 
Proverbs9:13 Umfazi onguNobudenge usoloko engxola; yindlavinikazi engazi nto. 
Proverbs9:14 Uthanda ukuhlala emnyango endlwini yakhe okanye kwiindawo eziphezulu edolophini," 
Proverbs9:15 ufike selemana ekhwaza abantu abadlula ngendlela, behamba bexakeke yimicimbi yabo," 
Proverbs9:16 esithi: “Yizani apha nonke, nina bangaqondiyo!” Kwabaswele ukuqonda uthi:" 
Proverbs9:17 “Akamnandi ngako amanzi abiweyo! Kanti ke nokutya okutyiwa ekufihlekeni kokona kunencasa.” 
Proverbs9:18 Abamphulaphulayo abaqondi ukuba kukufa okubalindele apho; abazi ukuba abo bakhe bamtyelela xa kungokunje bakwelabafileyo. 
Proverbs10:1 Nazi izafobe zikaSolomon: Unyana osisilumko ulibhongo likayise, ke yena osisityhakala ungumva-ndedwa kanina." 
Proverbs10:2 Ubutyebi obufunyenwe ngobuqhophololo abuphumelelisi, kodwa ke kona ukuziphatha kakuhle kuhlangula ekufeni." 
Proverbs10:3 *UNdikhoyo soze abayeke abantu abalungileyo balambe, kambe ke zona izikhohlakali uyazithintela ingafezeki iminqweno yazo." 
Proverbs10:4 Umntu oqhokrwe izandla uba lihlwempu; ke yena okhutheleyo uba sisityebi. 
Proverbs10:5 Unyana oxakekayo evuna ngexesha lokuvuna ukhaliphile; kambe ke yena olalayo xa isivuno silungile lihlazo. 
Proverbs10:6 Amalungisa athiwa jize ngesithsaba sentsikelelo, ke zona izikhohlakali ubundlobongela zibufihla ngokuthetha." 
Proverbs10:7 Kuyintsikelelo ukukhumbula amalungisa, kambe ke lona igama lezikhohlakali liyaphutha." 
Proverbs10:8 Umntu onengqondo uyayiphulaphula imiyalelo; kambe ke sona isityhakala esilavuzayo siya kubhanga. 
Proverbs10:9 Umntu onyanisekileyo uhamba engaxhalele nto; ke yena onamaqhinga uya kubhaqwa. 
Proverbs10:10 Umntu oyivalela amehlo inkohlakalo ubangela intlupheko, kambe ke isityhala esilavuzayo siya kubhanga." 
Proverbs10:11 Amazwi omntu olilungisa angumthombo wobomi; kanti ke zona izikhohlakali ubundlobongela zibufihla ngokuthetha. 
Proverbs10:12 Intiyo iphembelela ingxabano; ke lona uthando luyazingcwaba zonke izono. 
Proverbs10:13 Umntu oqondayo uthetha ubulumko, kanti ke umhlana wesinyabi ufanelwe yintonga." 
Proverbs10:14 Isilumko siyaluqoqosha ulwazi, kanti ke kona ukuthetha kwesityhakala kuza nentshabalalo." 
Proverbs10:15 Ubutyebi besinhanha lixhadi laso; ke bona ubuhlwempu yintshabalalo yosweleyo. 
Proverbs10:16 Ilungisa lixhamla ubomi ngemigudu yalo; ke yona inzuzo yesikhohlakali iphelela esonweni. 
Proverbs10:17 Umntu oyithobelayo ingqeqesho usekhondweni lobomi; ke yena ongaphulaphuliyo ulahlekene nendlela. 
Proverbs10:18 Umntu oyifihlayo intiyo lixoki; ke yena osasaza iindaba zolwimi sisiyatha. 
Proverbs10:19 Ekuthetheni kakhulu isono sidla ngokubakho, kambe ke ozibambayo ekuthetheni unengqiqo." 
Proverbs10:20 Amazwi elungisa afana nesiliva ecwengileyo; ke zona iingcinga zesikhohlakali ziphuthile. 
Proverbs10:21 Amazwi omntu onengqondo ayinzuzo kwabaninzi; kanti ke zona izityhakala zibulawa kukungayisebenzisi ingqondo. 
Proverbs10:22 Yintsikelelo kaNdikhoyo enika umntu ubutyebi; kambe ke yona ayihambi nazintsizi. 
Proverbs10:23 Isiyatha siyavuya xa sisenza ubugwenxa; phofu ke yena umntu onengqondo uyabuvuyela ubulumko. 
Proverbs10:24 Umntu okhohlakeleyo uzuza kanye le nto imnxunguphalisayo, kodwa yena olilungisa unikwa oko akufunayo." 
Proverbs10:25 Zakufika iinkqwithela zimka nabo abantu abakhohlakeleyo; kanti ke bona abanyanisekileyo bema ngxishi ngonaphakade. 
Proverbs10:26 Asinto umdintsi ukusetyenzelwa livila, nqwa neviniga emazinyweni okanye umsi emehlweni." 
Proverbs10:27 Ukuthobela uNdikhoyo kuyabongeza ubomi bomntu; kanti ke yona iminyaka yezibhoja iyanqanyulwa. 
Proverbs10:28 Ithemba lelungisa liza novuyo; ke lona ithemba lesikhohlakali liphelel' emoyeni. 
Proverbs10:29 Indlela kaNdikhoyo yinqaba yamalungisa; kodwa ke yintshabalalo kwabenza ububi. 
Proverbs10:30 Ilungisa alisoze libhukuqwe; ke yena okhohlakeleyo ngekhe eme elizweni. 
Proverbs10:31 Umntu obhadlileyo uphuphuma ubulumko, kambe ke yena umntu ogqwethayo uya kunqunyulwa ulwimi." 
Proverbs10:32 Umntu onengqondo uthetha amazwi afanelekileyo; kambe ke sona isikhohlakali sithetha amazwi akrwempayo. 
Proverbs11:1 UNdikhoyo umthiyile umntu osebenzisa isilinganiso esinegobe; kambe ke uyamthanda lowo usebenzisa isilinganiso esingenaxanasi. 
Proverbs11:2 Umntu ozigwagwisayo uyakhawuleza ukuhlazeka; kambe ke kona ukuzithoba kuhamba nobulumko. 
Proverbs11:3 Ukunyaniseka kuyamalusa umntu othe ngqo, kodwa ke bona ubuqhokolo buyawabhangisa amaqhophololo." 
Proverbs11:4 Ubutyebi bomntu abumsindisi kwingqumbo kaThixo; sisimo esisulungekileyo kuphela esimhlangulayo umntu ekufeni. 
Proverbs11:5 Indlela yabantu abamsulwa igudiswa sisimo sabo; ke bona abakhohlakeleyo bawiswa yinkohlakalo yabo. 
Proverbs11:6 Isimilo siyamsindisa umntu othe ngqo; kodwa bona abangcatshi babhajiswa kukunyoluka. 
Proverbs11:7 Akufa umntu okhohlakeleyo amathemba akhe ayadaka, nokukholosa kwakhe ngamandla akhe kuyaphutha." 
Proverbs11:8 Umntu olilungisa uyahlangulwa enkathazweni – endaweni yakhe iwa phezu kwesikhohlakali. 
Proverbs11:9 Umlomo womntu ongakhathalele Thixo wenzakalisa ummelwane wakhe; ke bona abathobela uThixo balondolozwa lulwazi. 
Proverbs11:10 Inkqubela yamalungisa itsho uchulumance umzi wonke; kanti ke ukufa kwezikhohlakali kutsho kuhlokome yimivuyo. 
Proverbs11:11 Isixeko siyaphakanyiswa sakuthamsanqelwa ngabantu abathe ngqo; kambe ke wona amazwi ezikhohlakali ayasitshabalalisa isixeko. 
Proverbs11:12 Umntu ongenangqondo uyabanyemba abanye abantu; ke yona ingqondi ithi cwaka. 
Proverbs11:13 Umntu ongenasifuba uyazidiza iimfihlelo; kambe ke yena othembekileyo uyaligcina ihlebo. 
Proverbs11:14 Isizwe esingenamcebisi siyawa; kanti ke xa sinabacebisi abaninzi siba luqilima. 
Proverbs11:15 Umntu omela omnye angamaziyo uyenzakala; ke yena ongavumiyo ukubamba isandla somnye ebhambathisa ukhuselekile. 
Proverbs11:16 Umfazi onesimilo uyahlonitshwa; ke wona amadoda aziindlavini azizuzela kuphela ubutyebi. 
Proverbs11:17 Umntu onobubele uyazimaseka; kambe ke yena ongqwabalala uyazenzakalisa. 
Proverbs11:18 Okuzuzwa ngumntu okhohlakeleyo ngenkohliso kuyaphela, phofu ke ohlala esenza okulungileyo ufumana umvuzo oqinisekileyo." 
Proverbs11:19 Ubulungisa obububo busingisa ebomini; ke yena oleqa ububi usingisa ekufeni. 
Proverbs11:20 UNdikhoyo ubathiyile abantu abantliziyo zinenkohlakalo; kanti ke ukholiswa ngabasimo sisulungekileyo. 
Proverbs11:21 Ngokuqinisekileyo baya kohlwaywa abantu abenza izinto ezimbi; kambe ke bona abenza izinto ezilungileyo baya kusinda. 
Proverbs11:22 Ubunzwakazi bomfazi ongenangqiqo bufana nomsesane wegolide empumlweni yehagu. 
Proverbs11:23 Umnqweno womntu olilungisa uzala ubuhle; ke lona ithemba lesikhohlakali liza nengqumbo. 
Proverbs11:24 Abanye abantu banezinwe kodwa bahambela phambili ngenkqubela; kanti ke bambi abasoluli isandla noko baya beswela ngokuswela. 
Proverbs11:25 Umntu ophayo uba nenkqubela; ukuba ùyabanceda abanye abantu nawe uya kuncedwa. 
Proverbs11:26 Abantu bayamshwabulela umntu okubandezayo ukudla; kanti ke bayamthamsanqela lowo ukuthengisayo. 
Proverbs11:27 Umntu ofuna okuhle uzuza okulungileyo; phofu ke yena ozungula ububi uzuza kwabona. 
Proverbs11:28 Umntu okholosa ngobutyebi bakhe uvuthuluka njengamagqabi ebusika; ke yena umntu ofanelekileyo uhluma njengamagqabi entlakohlaza. 
Proverbs11:29 Umntu oyinkathazo ekhayeni udla ilifa elingumoya; sona isiyatha siba sisicaka sesilumko. 
Proverbs11:30 Isiqhamo sâbo balungisayo ngumthi onika ubomi; umntu onobulumko uhlangula imiphefumlo yabantu. 
Proverbs11:31 Umntu olilungisa umvuzo wakhe uwuzuza kwalapha emhlabeni; kobeka phi ke ukohlwaywa komqhankqalazi nomoni? 
Proverbs12:1 Umntu oyithandayo ingqeqesho uthanda ulwazi; kodwa ke yena ongafuni kululekwa usisityhakala. 
Proverbs12:2 Umntu oziphethe kakuhle uyathandwa nguNdikhoyo, kambe ke akamfuni umntu onamayelenqe." 
Proverbs12:3 Akakho umntu onokuzinza eqamele ngenkohlakalo; kambe ke wona amalungisa amila abe neengcambu ezingenakugungqiswa. 
Proverbs12:4 Umfazi ofanelekileyo yintshinga yendoda yakhe; ke yena umfazi oyithwalela amahlazo indoda yakhe ufana nempehla emathanjeni ayo. 
Proverbs12:5 Iingcinga zamalungisa zinyanisekile; ke wona amacebo ezikhohlakali yinkohliso. 
Proverbs12:6 Amazwi abantu abakhohlakeleyo ngawokulalela igazi; kambe ke wona amazwi abantu abathe ngqo ayasindisa. 
Proverbs12:7 Sakukhiqwa isikhohlakali iyaphela intw' ebithethwa; kambe ke yona indlu yamalungisa ima imi. 
Proverbs12:8 Umntu onengqondo uxatyisiwe; phofu ke yena osisidodo ngengqondo akazelwe nto. 
Proverbs12:9 Kulungile ukuba ngongenagama, kodwa noko unaso isicaka, kunokuzenza isinhanha kodwa ulamba." 
Proverbs12:10 Umntu olilungisa uyazazelelela iimfuno zezilwanyana zakhe; kodwa nezona zenzo zingathi zihle zesikhohlakali ziba ngqwabalala. 
Proverbs12:11 Umntu olima amasimi akhe akasweli kutya; kambe ke bubuyatha ukulibala ngumsebenzi ongaphumi nto. 
Proverbs12:12 Umntu okhohlakeleyo usoloko efuna amaxhoba azuzwe ngabantu abanobubi; ke yona ingcambu yezityalo zamalungisa iyachuma. 
Proverbs12:13 Umntu ongento ubanjiswa kwangamazwi akhe agwenxa; ke lona ilungisa liyazikhulula enkathazweni. 
Proverbs12:14 Umntu ufumana ulutho aneliswe sisiqhamo sokuthetha kwakhe; kananjalo umsebenzi womntu ubuyela kwakuye. 
Proverbs12:15 Indlela yesityhakala ibonakala ilungile kwawaso amehlo; ke sona isilumko siyeva sakucetyiswa. 
Proverbs12:16 Umntu osisiyatha uzibonakalisa kwangoko xa ecaphukile; kanti ke yena umntu oqiqayo akazidubi ngezithuko. 
Proverbs12:17 Ingqina elinyanisekileyo lithetha inyaniso; ukanti ke ingqina elixokayo lisasaza ulwimi. 
Proverbs12:18 Amazwi okulavuza ahlabanisela njengekrele; kambe ke wona amazwi ezilumko ayaphilisa. 
Proverbs12:19 Inyaniso ima ngonaphakade; ke bona ubuxoki bobomzuzwana. 
Proverbs12:20 Abo bantliziyo zinenkohliso ngabo abacebi bobubi; kambe ke abakhuthaza uxolo bazuza ulonwabo. 
Proverbs12:21 Amalungisa akahlelwa bubi; ke bona abakhohlakeleyo baphahlwe ziinkathazo. 
Proverbs12:22 UNdikhoyo uyamcaphukela umntu oxokayo, kodwa uyakholiswa ngonyanisekileyo." 
Proverbs12:23 Umntu oqiqayo akalubhengezi ulwazi lwakhe; ke sona isiyatha sihamba sivakalisa ubudenge baso. 
Proverbs12:24 Abakhutheleyo ngabo abaya kulawula; ke wona amavila aphelela kumsebenzi wobukhoboka. 
Proverbs12:25 Amaxhala ayamtyhafisa umntu; ke wona amazwi enkuthazo ayahlaziya. 
Proverbs12:26 Ilungisa limalathisa indlela ummelwane; ke yona indlela yabakhohlakeleyo iyabalahlekisa. 
Proverbs12:27 Umntu onqenayo akayosi nenyamakazi le ayizingelayo; kodwa ke osebenzayo uzuza impahla exabisekileyo. 
Proverbs12:28 Indlela yobulungisa isinga ebomini; ewe, yiyo leyo indlela engasingisi ekufeni." 
Proverbs13:1 Unyana osisilumko uyayithobela ingqeqesho kayise; ke yena ongumgxeki akakufuni ukululekwa. 
Proverbs13:2 Umntu ufumana ulutho axhamle isiqhamo sokuthetha kwakhe; kambe ke wona umnqweno wabantu abanganyanisekanga bubundlobongela. 
Proverbs13:3 Lowo uwubopha ngomkhala umlomo wakhe ukhusela ubomi bakhe; kanti ke yena othetha gqitha uyazenzakalisa. 
Proverbs13:4 Ivila liyanqwenela lingazuzi nto noko; kambe yena umntu okhutheleyo uyalangazelela aneliseke. 
Proverbs13:5 Ilungisa libuthiyile ubuxoki, ukanti yena umntu okhohlakeleyo uthanda amanyondololo namahlazo." 
Proverbs13:6 Ubulungisa bulondoloza ihambo yomntu othe ngqo; kanti ke inkohlakalo iyambhukuqa umoni. 
Proverbs13:7 Abanye abantu ngathi zizityebi kanti abananto; bambi ke ngathi bahlwempuzekile kanti ke bemi kakuhle. 
Proverbs13:8 Kusenokwenzeka ukuba ubutyebi bomntu bube yintlawulo yobomi bakhe; kanti ke lona ihlwempu alazani nokugrogriswa. 
Proverbs13:9 Isibane selungisa siqaqambile; ke sona esomntu okhohlakeleyo siyancumeza. 
Proverbs13:10 Ikratshi liphembelela ingxabano; ke bona ubulumko buzuzwa ngabo bamkela iingcebiso. 
Proverbs13:11 Ubutyebi obufumaneka bumini buphuncuka lula; obufumaneka ngendlela ecothayo buya busanda ngokwanda. 
Proverbs13:12 Umnqweno ongafezekiyo uyamngcungcuthekisa umntu; kanti ke wakufezeka umnqweno ufana nomthi onika ubomi. 
Proverbs13:13 Umntu ozidelayo iziluleko uzibizela intshabalalo; kambe ke yena owuhlonelayo umyalelo uya kuba nomvuzo. 
Proverbs13:14 Imfundiso yesilumko ngumthombo wobomi, kuba umntu imhlangula kwizabatha zokufa." 
Proverbs13:15 Umntu oqiqayo uyahlonelwa; kanti ke yona indlela yabangathembekanga iyadaka. 
Proverbs13:16 Umntu onengqondo uyaqiqa phambi kokuba ayenze into, kodwa yena umntu osisiyatha uyabudandalazisa ubutyhakala bakhe." 
Proverbs13:17 Umthunywa ongathembekanga uzifaka enkathazweni; kambe ke yena onyanisekileyo uzisa ukuphila. 
Proverbs13:18 Umntu ongakhathalele ngqeqesho ulandelwa kukuhlazeka nobuhlwempu, ke yena oziphulaphulayo iziluleko uyahlonelwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Ukufezeka komnqweno luyolo emphefumlweni. Iziyatha ziyakucekisa ukwahlukana nobubi. 
Proverbs13:20 Umntu ovana nezilumko naye uba sisilumko; ke yena otshomana nezityhakala uyenzakala. 
Proverbs13:21 Umoni uthiwa mbende ngamashwa, kanti ke yena olungisayo uvuzwa ngenkqubela." 
Proverbs13:22 Umfo obhadlileyo ubashiyela ilifa abazukulwana bakhe, ke bona ubutyebi besityhakala lilifa lamalungisa." 
Proverbs13:23 Umhlaba oqala ukulinywa ungawanika ukudla okuninzi amahlwempu, kambe ke xa kungekho bulungisa kutshayelwa kuphele." 
Proverbs13:24 Umntu ongalusebenzisiyo uswazi umthiyile umntwana wakhe; kanti ke yena omthandayo uyamqeqesha ngokufanelekileyo. 
Proverbs13:25 Umntu olilungisa utya aneliseke, ukanti isisu sokhohlakeleyo sambathwa liphango." 
Proverbs14:1 Umfazi onobulumko uyawakha umzi wakhe; kanti ke yena ongenangqondo uyawuchitha ngezakhe izandla. 
Proverbs14:2 Ohlonela uNdikhoyo uhamba ngokuthe tye; ke yena omdelayo iindlela zakhe ziphambukile. 
Proverbs14:3 Umntu onekratshi ukuthetha kwakhe kumhlisela ukohlwaywa; ke wona amazwi esilumko ayasikhusela. 
Proverbs14:4 Apho kungekho nkabi zankomo umkhombe wesitali uba zé; ngamandla enkabi yenkomo kunokuzuzwa ingeniso eninzi. 
Proverbs14:5 Ingqina elinyanisekileyo alibuthethi ubuxoki, kodwa ke lona elixokayo liphuphuma lulwimi." 
Proverbs14:6 Umgxeki ubufuna ancame ubulumko, kanti ke yena umntu oqiqayo uluzuza lula ulwazi." 
Proverbs14:7 Musa ukutshomana nomntu osisiyatha, kuba awuyi kuzuza nto ibhadlileyo emlonyeni wakhe." 
Proverbs14:8 Ubulumko bomntu onengqondo bumenza ayichane indlela yakhe; ukumatha komntu osisityhakala kubanga inkohliso. 
Proverbs14:9 Idini letyala elenziwa zizimathane yintlekisa, kanti ke abathe ngqo baxhamla imvisiswano." 
Proverbs14:10 Intliziyo nganye iyabazi obayo ubukrakra, kanti akukho bani wahlulelana nayo ngovuyo lwayo." 
Proverbs14:11 Umzi womntu okhohlakeleyo uya kutshatyalaliswa; ke wona umzi womntu othe ngqo uyabalasela. 
Proverbs14:12 Kukho indlela ebonakala ngokungathi ilungile emntwini, kodwa isiphelo sayo sisa ekufeni." 
Proverbs14:13 Nokuba ubani uyahleka usenokuba nomva-ndedwa, nesiphelo soko kuchwayita sibe sisingqala." 
Proverbs14:14 Umntu onganyanisekanga uvuna loo nto ayilimileyo, kanti nomntu olungileyo utya isimilo sakhe." 
Proverbs14:15 Umntu ongaqondiyo ukholelwa yinto yonke; kanti ke yena oqiqayo uhlab' ekhangele. 
Proverbs14:16 Umntu onengqondo uhlala egcisile, ayiphephe inkathazo; ke sona isityhakala asikhathali, siyatyhuthuza." 
Proverbs14:17 Umntu ocaphuka msinya wenza izinto zobudenge; umntu onobuqhophololo uyathiywa. 
Proverbs14:18 Umntu ongaqondiyo uvuna ubutyhakala; ke yena onengqondo uthiwa jize ngolwazi. 
Proverbs14:19 Abantu abagwenxa baya kuqubuda phambi kwabo balungileyo, bakhahlele emasangweni amalungisa." 
Proverbs14:20 Ihlwempu libukulwa nditsho nangummelwane; kanti ke yena umntu omi kakuhle unezihlobo ezininzi. 
Proverbs14:21 Umntu omdelelayo ummelwane wakhe uyona, kambe ke olenzela ububele ihlwempu, hayi inyhweba yakhe!" 
Proverbs14:22 Abayi kulahleka na abo bayila ububi? Inceba nenyaniso ikwabo baceba okulungileyo. 
Proverbs14:23 Ekubulalekeni kukusebenza kukho umvuzo; ke yena olibala kukuncokola wambathwa bubuhlwempu kuphela. 
Proverbs14:24 Abantu abazizilumko bathiwa jize ngobutyebi; ke bona ubutyhakala beziyatha buvelisa ubutyhakala. 
Proverbs14:25 Ingqina elinyanisekileyo liyabasindisa abantu; kodwa ke lona elixokayo liyakhohlisa. 
Proverbs14:26 Umntu omhlonelayo uNdikhoyo unenqaba eluqilima; nabantwana bakhe bazimela kuyo. 
Proverbs14:27 Isiseko sobomi kukuthobela uNdikhoyo; umntu kuyamphephisa kwizirhintyelo zokufa. 
Proverbs14:28 Ubuhandiba bokumkani buxhomekeke kubuninzi babantu bakhe; kambe bengekho abantu bokulawulwa itshawe alinto. 
Proverbs14:29 Umntu onomonde uba nengqiqo; kambe ke yena ocaphuka msinya usuka enze ubudenge. 
Proverbs14:30 Umntu ozolileyo uba nempilo; ke lona ikhwele yimpehla emathanjeni. 
Proverbs14:31 Umntu ocinezela ihlwempu ugxeka uMdali walo; ke yena obalungiselelayo abahlelelekileyo udumisa uMdali. 
Proverbs14:32 Umntu okhohlakeleyo ubhangiswa bububi bakhe; kanti ke yena olilungisa unenqaba azimela ngayo nasekufeni. 
Proverbs14:33 Ubulumko busekhaya kumntu obhadlileyo; kanti buyazibika naphakathi kweziyatha. 
Proverbs14:34 Ubulungisa buyasiphakamisa isizwe; ke sona isono lihlazo nakwesiphi na isizwe. 
Proverbs14:35 Ukumkani uyakholiswa liphakathi elilumkileyo, kodwa umsindo wakhe uyavutha kowenza okuziintloni." 
Proverbs15:1 Impendulo ethambileyo iyawuthibaza umsindo, kanti ke wona amazwi akrwempayo ahlobisa igazi." 
Proverbs15:2 Izilumko ziphokoza ulwazi xa zithethayo; kanti ke zona izityhakala zithulula ubudenge. 
Proverbs15:3 UNdikhoyo uyazibona zonke izinto ezenzekayo; ubakhangele abenza okubi nokulungileyo. 
Proverbs15:4 Amazwi axolelanisayo angumthi wobomi; ke wona awenkohlakalo ayawaphula umoya. 
Proverbs15:5 Umntu ongaqiqiyo akayikhathalele imfundiso kayise; kambe ke yena ozamkelayo iziluleko unengqondo. 
Proverbs15:6 Ubutyebi buyagcinakala emzini womntu olungileyo; kanti ke yona ingeniso yesikhohlakali isiphathela inkathazo. 
Proverbs15:7 Umlomo wesilumko usasaza ulwazi; phofu ke akunjalo kwintliziyo yesityhakala. 
Proverbs15:8 Amadini omntu okhohlakeleyo alisikizi kuNdikhoyo, kambe ke uyayamkela imithandazo yabantu abathe ngqo." 
Proverbs15:9 UNdikhoyo uyazicaphukela iindlela zabantu abakhohlakeleyo, kodwa uyabathanda abo bathene mbende nezinto ezifanelekileyo." 
Proverbs15:10 Umntu ophambukayo endleleni wohlwaywa qatha; ke yena okuthiyileyo ukululekwa uya kufa. 
Proverbs15:11 Ingcwaba nelabafileyo azifihlakalanga kuNdikhoyo; zibeka phi ke ukungafihlakali iingcamango zomntu kuye? 
Proverbs15:12 Abagxeki abafuni kucetyiswa, bengafuni nokuya nakwizilumko." 
Proverbs15:13 Umntu oxolileyo ukhangeleka enemihlali, kanti ke yena oneenzingo uyanxuba." 
Proverbs15:14 Umntu onengqondo usoloko elangazelela ukufunda; kanti ke sona isidovela saneliswa kukumatha. 
Proverbs15:15 Yonke imihla yomntu olusizana ngamabona-ndenzile, kambe ke kumntu ochwayithileyo ubomi busoloko bufana netheko." 
Proverbs15:16 Kubhetele ukuba lihlwempu elihlonela uNdikhoyo kunokuba sisinhanha esiphethwe ngamaxhala. 
Proverbs15:17 Xa ukho umoya wobudlelwana akunani nokuba utya imifuno, ndaweni yokutya inyama yenkomo etyetyisiweyo ikhatshwa yintiyo." 
Proverbs15:18 Umntu onephuku uphembelela uqhushululu; kanti ke yena onomonde uyayiphelisa ingxabano. 
Proverbs15:19 Indlela yevila soloko ibekelwe ameva; phofu ke yona eyabathe ngqo iphangalele. 
Proverbs15:20 Unyana olumkileyo uyamvuyisa uyise; ke yena umntu osisiyatha uyamdela unina. 
Proverbs15:21 Umntu ongabhadlanga engqondweni uvuyiswa bubi, ke yena onengqondo ihambo yakhe ithe ngqo." 
Proverbs15:22 Apho kungekho kucebisana izicwangciso ziyabhanga, kanti ke apho kukho abacebisi abaninzi ziyaphumelela." 
Proverbs15:23 Hayi ukuvuya komntu oyaziyo impendulo echanekileyo! Ewe, ilizwi elithethwe ngexesha elililo lihle kunene." 
Proverbs15:24 Indlela yomntu onengqondo isinga phezulu ebomini; yena uyayiphepha indlela ehlayo eya kwelabafileyo. 
Proverbs15:25 UNdikhoyo uyayidiliza imizi yabantu abanekratshi; kanti ke uyawukhusela umhlaba womhlolokazi. 
Proverbs15:26 UNdikhoyo uyazicaphukela iingcinga zabantu abagwenxa; kanti ezabanyulu zamkelekile kuye. 
Proverbs15:27 Umntu onyolukileyo uyihlisela inkathazo indlu yakhe; ke yena okuthiyileyo ukunyotywa uya kudla ubomi. 
Proverbs15:28 Umntu olilungisa uyacinga phambi kokuba aphendule; ke wona umlomo womntu okhohlakeleyo uphuphuma ububi. 
Proverbs15:29 UNdikhoyo ukude kubantu abakhohlakeleyo; phofu ke uyayiphulaphula imithandazo yamalungisa. 
Proverbs15:30 Imbonakalo echwayitileyo izisa ulonwabo entliziyweni; ibe ke zona iindaba ezimnandi ziyahlaziya emathanjeni. 
Proverbs15:31 Umntu ophulaphula ukucetyiswa uya kudla ubomi, azive esekhaya phakathi kwezilumko." 
Proverbs15:32 Umntu ongayifuniyo ingqeqesho uyazilimaza yena ngokwakhe: kanti ke yena ovayo akululekwa uzuza ukuqonda. 
Proverbs15:33 Ukuhlonela uNdikhoyo kufundisa ubulumko; indlela eya ewongeni yintobeko. 
Proverbs16:1 Umntu uyazenza izicwangciso, kodwa lona ilizwi lokugqibela lelikaNdikhoyo." 
Proverbs16:2 Zonke iindlela zomntu zilungile kwawakhe amehlo, kodwa nguNdikhoyo ocikida iinjongo zazo." 
Proverbs16:3 Kunikele kuNdikhoyo konke okwenzayo, yaye ke yena uya kuziphumelelisa izicwangciso zakho." 
Proverbs16:4 UNdikhoyo unenjongo ngayo yonke into; ewe, kwanomntu lo ukhohlakeleyo umenzele imini yobubi." 
Proverbs16:5 UNdikhoyo umthiyile umntu ontliziyo inekratshi; ngokuqinisekileyo ngekhe agwetyelwe. 
Proverbs16:6 Ngako ukuthembeka nokunyaniseka isono siyacanyagushelwa; ngokuhlonela uNdikhoyo umntu uyabucezela ububi. 
Proverbs16:7 Ukuba uNdikhoyo uyakholiswa yihambo yomntu neentshaba zakhe zitsho zihlalisane naye ngoxolo. 
Proverbs16:8 Akunani kwaintwana engephi oyizuze ngendlela elungileyo kunentabalala yengeniso oyifumene ngondlela-mnyama. 
Proverbs16:9 Umntu uyalucwangcwisa uhambo lwakhe, kodwa nguNdikhoyo olawula ukunyathela kwakhe." 
Proverbs16:10 Ukuthetha kukakumkani kuba ludaba olundilisekileyo; umlomo wakhe mawungabi naxanasi xa agwebayo. 
Proverbs16:11 UNdikhoyo ufuna kusetyenziswe isilinganiso nesikali esingenagobe; ubunzima bamatye okuveyisha mabube ngokwezigqibo zakhe. 
Proverbs16:12 Ookumkani bayabucekisa ubugwenxa; kaloku uburhulumente buzinziswa bubulungisa. 
Proverbs16:13 Ookumkani bayakholiswa ngumntu onyanisekileyo; ewe, bayamxabisa umntu othetha inyaniso." 
Proverbs16:14 Umsindo kakumkani sisigidimi sokufa; ke yena umntu olumkileyo uyamthomalalisa. 
Proverbs16:15 Xa bukhululekile ubuso bukakumkani kudliwa ubomi; ukwamkeleka kuye nqwa nemvula entlakohlaza. 
Proverbs16:16 Kulungile ukuzuza ubulumko kunokufumana igolide; kungcono ukukhetha ulwazi kunokwamkela isiliva. 
Proverbs16:17 Umntu othe ngqo uhamba ngendlela ebucezelayo ububi; ewe, oyalusayo indlela yakhe ulondoloza ubomi bakhe." 
Proverbs16:18 Ikratshi lilandelwa yimbubho; ke kona ukudelela kutshayelela ukuwa. 
Proverbs16:19 Akunani kwaukugqush' eluthulini nabahlelelekileyo kunokuxhaphaza amaxhoba nabakhukhumeleyo. 
Proverbs16:20 Umntu oyinonophelayo imfundiso uyaphumelela; ewe, yimihlali yodwa kokholosa ngoNdikhoyo." 
Proverbs16:21 Isilumko esizinzileyo siduma ngengqondo; ubuciko baso busenza silandelwe ngabantu. 
Proverbs16:22 Ingqiqo ngumthombo wobomi kwabo banayo; kambe ke imfundiso yeziyatha bubudenge. 
Proverbs16:23 Isilumko siyawabala amazwi esiwathethayo; intetho yaso isenza silandelwe ngabantu. 
Proverbs16:24 Amazwi amyoli nqwa nobusi; ayanandipheka emphefumlweni, ephilisa emathanjeni." 
Proverbs16:25 Kukho indlela ebonakala ngokungathi ilungile emehlweni abantu, kodwa isiphelo sayo sisa ekufeni." 
Proverbs16:26 Indlala imenza umntu ukuba asebenze; ewe, iphango limtyhalela ekuxelengeni." 
Proverbs16:27 Itshijolo lihlala liqingqa ububi; kwa-amazwi nje alo agqatsa njengomlilo. 
Proverbs16:28 Umntu onobugwenxa udala ingxabano; umntu ohlebayo wahlukanisa izihlobo. 
Proverbs16:29 Indlavini iyamkhukulisa ummelwane, imkhokelele kwimikhuba ephuthileyo." 
Proverbs16:30 Omana ewancina amehlo uceba ubugwenxa; ohlala eluma umlomo utyekele ebubini. 
Proverbs16:31 Izimvi sisithsaba sobuhandiba; zizuzwa ngabaphila ngobulungisa. 
Proverbs16:32 Onomonde ulungile kunegorha; olawula umsindo wakhe ungcono kunothimba isixeko. 
Proverbs16:33 Abantu basenokulenza *iqashiso, kanti ke ngumnwe kaNdikhoyo ofezekisayo." 
Proverbs17:1 Akunani kwaukutya iqhekeza lesonka uxolile kunokuba semzini ozele yinyama yamadini kodwa kugquba imbambano. 
Proverbs17:2 Isicaka esinobulumko sifumana amagunya ngaphezu konyana oza namahlazo, size naso sibe nenxaxheba elifeni njengabanye oonyana." 
Proverbs17:3 Isiliva ivavanywa ngokuyinyibilikisa embizeni; igolide ivavanywa ezikweni lomlilo; kodwa yona intliziyo yomntu ivavanywa nguNdikhoyo. 
Proverbs17:4 Umenzi wobubi uyawuphulaphula umlomo onenkohliso, kanti ke ixoki liyibazela iindlebe intetho eyenzakalisayo." 
Proverbs17:5 Umntu ohlekisa ngehlwempu ugxeka uMdali walo; umntu ozivuyelayo iinkxwaleko zabanye uyohlwaywa. 
Proverbs17:6 Abazukulwana libhongo lookhokho, kanti ke igugu labantwana ngabazali." 
Proverbs17:7 Amazwi obuciko akanakufumaneka emlonyeni wesiyatha; amazwi obuxoki akalindelekanga emilebeni yesikhulu. 
Proverbs17:8 Ukunyoba kufana nomlingo kulowo ukwenzayo; uba kuza kumphumelelisa naphi na apho aya khona. 
Proverbs17:9 Obugubungelayo ubugwenxa uzicengezelela ukuthandwa, kodwa lowo umana ewunokoza umcimbi uchitha ubuhlobo." 
Proverbs17:10 Ukukhalinyelwa kuyamakha umntu onengqondo, kunokuba imivumbo elikhulu injalo kwisiyatha." 
Proverbs17:11 Umvukeli uqhwaya ingxwaba-ngxwaba; ke ngoko uthunyelwa isigidimi esingenanceba. 
Proverbs17:12 Kubhetele ukuhlangana nebhere eyohluthwe amathole ayo, kunokuhlangana nesityhakala sisenza ubudenge." 
Proverbs17:13 Umntu ophindezela ubuhle ngobubi soze yahlukane nelishwa indlu yakhe. 
Proverbs17:14 Ukuphemba inkathazo kufana nokuqhekezwa kodonga lwedama; ngoko ke nyawuka ingekakongameli. 
Proverbs17:15 Okhulula umntu onetyala nogweba umntu omsulwa bobabini uNdikhoyo uyabacekisa. 
Proverbs17:16 Kunceda ntoni ukuba isiyatha siphathe imali, sifune ulwazi, kanti asinangqondo?" 
Proverbs17:17 Umhlobo unothando ngamaxesha onke; ke yena umntakwenu uzalelwe ukuba nawe kwiimbandezelo. 
Proverbs17:18 Ngumntu ongenangqondo obamba isandla ebhambathisa, emela ityala lommelwane." 
Proverbs17:19 Umntu othanda ingxwaba-ngxwaba uthanda ubugwenxa; umntu osoloko eqhayisa ngezinto zakhe uzibizela iingxaki. 
Proverbs17:20 Umntu ontliziyo ikhohlisayo akabi nampumelelo; kanti nomntu ontetho ikrwada ungena enkathazweni. 
Proverbs17:21 Yinto ebuhlungu ukuba nonyana ongenangqondo; uyise wesityhakala soze onwabe. 
Proverbs17:22 Umntu onentliziyo echwayitileyo uba nempilo; kanti ke wona umoya odakumbileyo uyimpehla emathanjeni. 
Proverbs17:23 Umntu okhohlakeleyo uyanyotywa ngasese, usuke ke wona umthetho ugqwetheke." 
Proverbs17:24 Umntu onengqondo unonophela ubulumko; ke sona isityhakala amehlo aso athi elapha abe ephaya. 
Proverbs17:25 Unyana osisiyatha uzisela uyise ukukhathazeka; kanti ke ungumva-ndedwa kunina omzeleyo. 
Proverbs17:26 Yinto embi ukuhlawulisa abantu abamsulwa; kuyalumeza ukohlwaya izikhulu ezithembekileyo. 
Proverbs17:27 Umntu onengqondo uyawakhetha amazwi akhe, kanti ke nomntu oqondayo uhlala epholile." 
Proverbs17:28 Kanti ke nesiyatha sicingelwa ukuba sisilumko ukuba asithandi kuthetha; kaloku umntu othuleyo ubalelwa ukuba yingqondi. 
Proverbs18:1 Umntu ozahlulayo kwabanye ujongana nokwakhe ukulungelwa; uwasengela phantsi onke amacebiso aphilileyo. 
Proverbs18:2 Umntu osisiyatha akanamdla wakuqonda nto – nto angxamele ukuyenza kukuvakalisa ezakhe iimbono. 
Proverbs18:3 Xa kuvela umntu okhohlakeleyo ngokunjalo nokudelela kuthath' indawo; ukuphoxa ke kuhambisana nehlazo. 
Proverbs18:4 Amazwi omlomo womntu anjengesiziba samanzi; kambe ke umthombo wobulumko yintlambo enkcenkcezayo. 
Proverbs18:5 Yinto embi ukuba nesheyi kumntu onenkohlakalo; akulunganga ukumenzela igobe umntu omsulwa. 
Proverbs18:6 Ukuthetha komntu osisiyatha kuzala ingxwaba-ngxwaba; amazwi akhe ambizela ukubethwa. 
Proverbs18:7 Ukuthetha komntu osisityhifili kumzisela inkathazo; umlomo wakhe ngumgibe wakhe. 
Proverbs18:8 Amazwi entlebendwane ayanambitheka; ahla kamnandi athi ngcoo embilinini. 
Proverbs18:9 Umntu owuphath' ewuyeka umsebenzi wakhe uyintlaka nexolo notshabalalisayo. 
Proverbs18:10 UNdikhoyo ngumqolomba: bazimela kuye abalungisayo, basinde." 
Proverbs18:11 Izinhanha zicinga ukuba ubutyebi yinqaba yazo; kuzo ngathi buludonga oluphakamileyo lokuzifihla. 
Proverbs18:12 Ikratshi lomntu lilandelwa yintshabalalo; ke lona udumo lukhokelwa yintobeko. 
Proverbs18:13 Ophendula engevanga kuqala bubudenge obo kuye nehlazo. 
Proverbs18:14 Umoya onganikezeliyo wenza ukuba umntu amelane nokufa. Ke wona umxhelo xa uwile ngubani ongawuvuselelayo? 
Proverbs18:15 Umntu onengqiqo ufunana nolwazi; ewe, iindlebe zezilumko zibazele lona." 
Proverbs18:16 Xa ufuna ukuviwa ngabo basemagunyeni phatha umngena-ndlwini xa uya kubo. 
Proverbs18:17 Intetho yommangali etyaleni iba ngathi iyavakala, xa engekaphicothwa ngemibuzo." 
Proverbs18:18 Liphelisa ingxabano *iqashiso, libahlule abantu abanamandla." 
Proverbs18:19 Isizalwana esikhutyekisiweyo silukhuni ngaphezu kwesixeko esinqatyisiweyo; ingxabano yabazalanayo injengemivalo yamasango enqaba. 
Proverbs18:20 Umntu uzalisa iphango lakhe ngeziqhamo zokuthetha kwakhe; uhlutha sisivuno somlomo wakhe. 
Proverbs18:21 Ukuthetha komntu kulawula ukuphila nokufa; ke othetha kakhulu uvuna iziqhamo zaloo nto. 
Proverbs18:22 Umntu ofumene umfazi uzuze okulungileyo; ewe, ufumene okukholekileyo kuNdikhoyo." 
Proverbs18:23 Ihlwempu liyacenga libongoze, ukanti ke sona isinhanha siphendula rhabaxa." 
Proverbs18:24 Iitshomi ezininzi ziyamvuthulula umntu; kanti ke sikho sona isihlobo esithembekayo kunomntakwenu. 
Proverbs19:1 Akunani kwaukuhleleleka unyanisekile kunokuba sisiyatha esinganyanisekanga. 
Proverbs19:2 Ukutyhuthuzela kungekho kuqonda akulunganga; onyawo zingxamileyo uyayiphosa indlela. 
Proverbs19:3 Ubuyatha bomntu buyabulimaza ubomi bakhe, aze ke entliziyweni yakhe asole uNdikhoyo." 
Proverbs19:4 Isinhanha siba nezihlobo ezininzi, kodwa lona ihlwempu libalekwa nazezikhoyo." 
Proverbs19:5 Ingqina elixokayo liyohlwaywa; umntu ongathethi nyani enkundleni akasindi. 
Proverbs19:6 Baninzi abacenga izikhulu; bonke abantu bazizihlobo zomntu ophayo. 
Proverbs19:7 Ihlwempu alifunwa nangabakowalo; yeka ke ukungafunwa kwalo zizihlobo! Noba selizifuna linezicengo soze lizifumane. 
Proverbs19:8 Ozingela ubulumko uyazithanda ngokwakhe; okuxabisileyo ukuqonda uzuza ukonwaba. 
Proverbs19:9 Ingqina elixokayo liyohlwaywa; umntu ongathethi nyani enkundleni uyatshabalala. 
Proverbs19:10 Isiyatha asifanelwa kukuthi zava – kobeka phi ukuba kubi kokuba amatshawe aphathwe sisicaka? 
Proverbs19:11 Umntu onengqondo akacaphuki msinya; kuye linqaku ukungakhathali noba selesoniwa. 
Proverbs19:12 Umsindo kakumkani unjengokugragrama kwengonyama; ke kona ukwamkeleka kuye kunjengombethe phezu kohlaza. 
Proverbs19:13 Unyana osisiyatha uyamtshonisa uyise; kanti ke yena umfazi onochuku ufana nendlu enethontsi. 
Proverbs19:14 Indlu nobutyebi lilifa looyise, kodwa umfazi onengqondo uvela kuNdikhoyo." 
Proverbs19:15 Ubuvila bufuthanisela umntu ngobuthongo; ukanti ke umntu ongasebenziyo ubhuqwa yindlala. 
Proverbs19:16 Umntu ozithobelayo iziluleko uzuza ubomi; ke yena ongayikhathaleliyo ihambo yakhe uyafa. 
Proverbs19:17 Umntu opha ohlelelekileyo ufana noboleka uNdikhoyo; uNdikhoyo uya kumbuyisela. 
Proverbs19:18 Mqeqeshe unyana wakho, kuba oko kunika ithemba, kodwa ke ungagabadeli ude umbulale." 
Proverbs19:19 Umntu ocaphuka msinya uvuna loo nto ayilimileyo; ukuba ukhe wamnceda kwaba kanye uya kuphinda-phinda. 
Proverbs19:20 Waphulaphule amacebiso, ukwamkele ukululekwa – ekugqibeleni uya kuba nobulumko." 
Proverbs19:21 Umntu uyaceba acwangcise entliziyweni yakhe, kodwa ke licebo likaNdikhoyo eliphumelelayo." 
Proverbs19:22 Umntu uzilahlela kuloo nto ayinqwenelayo; phofu akunani kwaukuba lihlwempu kunokuba lixoki. 
Proverbs19:23 Obona bomi kukuhlonela uNdikhoyo; umntu owenjenjalo uyazonwabela, inkathazo ingamchaphazeli." 
Proverbs19:24 Ivila liyakha esityeni, kodwa lingabi nako ukusa emlonyeni." 
Proverbs19:25 Mohlwaye umntu odelelayo, ukuze bazuze ukuqonda abangekabi namava; isilumko siyafunda sakululekwa." 
Proverbs19:26 Unyana ophatha gadalala uyise, agxothe unina, ngunyana olihlazo nonamanyondololo." 
Proverbs19:27 Nyana wam, ukuba uthe walutyeshela uqeqesho, uya kuphulukana namazwi anolwazi." 
Proverbs19:28 Ingqina elingungantweni liyabugqwetha ubulungisa; okuphuma emlonyeni womntu okhohlakeleyo bububi bodwa. 
Proverbs19:29 Umgxeki ufanelwe kukugwetywa; ke sona isiyatha silindelwe kukutyatyushwa emhlana. 
Proverbs20:1 Iwayini ngumgxeki; utywala yingxolo; umntu ohexiswa bubo akanabo ubulumko. 
Proverbs20:2 Ukumkani xa enomsindo nqwa nengonyama enengcwangu egragramayo; umntu omcaphukisayo ubeka ubomi bakhe emngciphekweni. 
Proverbs20:3 Umntu onesidima uyasicezela isiphithi-phithi; kanti ke sona isiyatha siyathanda ukuphemba uqhushululu. 
Proverbs20:4 Ivila alilimi ngexesha lokulima; ngoko ke ngexesha lokuvuna liyafuna lingazuzi nto. 
Proverbs20:5 Iingcinga zomntu zifana nequla elinzulu; ke yena umntu oqiqayo ukha ulutho kuzo. 
Proverbs20:6 Baninzi abantu abazincoma ukunyaniseka; kodwa ke ungamzuza phi umntu othembekileyo? 
Proverbs20:7 Umntu olilunga uphila ubomi obungenabala; bayathamsanqeleka abantwana bakhe abamlandelayo. 
Proverbs20:8 Ukumkani ohleli kwisihlalo sokugweba uhluza ububi bonke ngamehlo akhe. 
Proverbs20:9 Ngubani ongatshoyo athi: “Intliziyo yam ihlambulukile; ndinyulu, ndaye ndingenasono”?" 
Proverbs20:10 Amatye okuveyisha anobuqhetseba nezilinganiso ezinegobe, zombini ezo zinto uyazicekisa uNdikhoyo." 
Proverbs20:11 Nditsho kwaumntwana waziwa ngokuziphatha kwakhe – zizinto azenzayo ezixela ukusulungeka nokuthi ngqo kwesimilo sakhe. 
Proverbs20:12 Indlebe evayo neliso elibonayo, zombini ezo zinto zenziwe nguNdikhoyo." 
Proverbs20:13 Sukuzinikela ebuthongweni hleze ube lihlwempu! Umntu ophaphamileyo akasweli kutya. 
Proverbs20:14 “Hayi bo, ayilunganga kwaphela,” utsho othengayo, kodwa asuke emke alilisele ngesisulu asifumeneyo!" 
Proverbs20:15 Ikho igolide, ngokunjalo namatye amaninzi axabisekileyo; kanti ke eyona nto ixabisekileyo kukuthetha ulwazi." 
Proverbs20:16 Zithathe iimpahla zomntu omele ityala londwendwe; ewe, bambisa ngazo, kuba umele umntu wasemzini." 
Proverbs20:17 Ukutya okufunyenwe ngobuqhetseba kuhla kamnandi, kanti ke kamva kusuka kulumeze okomlomo ozele yintlabathi." 
Proverbs20:18 Xa ufuna ukuphumelela qokelela amacebo; ewe, cwangcisa uqokelele amacebo phambi kokuba uqhwaye imfazwe." 
Proverbs20:19 Umntu onolwimi uyawadiza amahlebo, ngoko ke sukudlelana nabantu abathetha gqitha." 
Proverbs20:20 Umntu othuka uyise nonina ubomi bakhe busuka buthi pam njengesibane esicime kwisithoko-thoko sobumnyama. 
Proverbs20:21 Ilifa lisenokuzuzwa buphuthu-phuthu ekuqaleni, kodwa ekugqibeleni alingekhe likuzisele amathamsanqa." 
Proverbs20:22 Musa ukuthi: “Ndiya kuziphindezela ngenxa yobu bugwenxa.” Yekela kuNdikhoyo ibe nguye okuhlangulayo. 
Proverbs20:23 UNdikhoyo uyawacekisa amatye okulinganisa abunzima bungafaniyo; isikali sobuqhetseba asilunganga. 
Proverbs20:24 Umntu akanako ukuyiqonda indlela ayihambayo, kuba amabakala obomi bakhe axhomekeke kuNdikhoyo." 
Proverbs20:25 Kufana nomgibe emntwini xa enikezele ngento kuNdikhoyo buphuthu-phuthu, aze kamva acinge ngenye indlela ngezibhambathiso zakhe." 
Proverbs20:26 Ukumkani olumkileyo uyabahluza abantu abakhohlakeleyo, abanyhashe oku kwevili lokubhula." 
Proverbs20:27 Isazela somntu sisibane sikaNdikhoyo; ngaso uphicotha konke okufihlakeleyo ngaphakathi emntwini. 
Proverbs20:28 Ukumkani ukhuselwa kukunyaniseka nenceba; isihlalo sakhe sobukhosi sixhaswa bububele. 
Proverbs20:29 Isihomo samadoda amatsha ngamandla awo; kanti ke sona isithozela samadod' amakhulu zizimvi. 
Proverbs20:30 Imivumbo neenduma zahlukanisa umntu nobubi; ukubethwa kuhlambulula ububi obungaphakathi emntwini. 
Proverbs21:1 Ingqondo kakumkani isesandleni sikaNdikhoyo; uyilawula ngokuthanda kwakhe, ngathi kukuhamba komlambo." 
Proverbs21:2 Zonke iindlela zomntu zibonakala zilungile kwawakhe amehlo, kanti ke nguNdikhoyo oyibeka esikalini intliziyo yomntu." 
Proverbs21:3 Ukwenza ubulungisa nokuthe ngqo kwamkelekile kuNdikhoyo kunamadini. 
Proverbs21:4 Amehlo azigwagwisayo nentliziyo ezidlayo, nditsho isibane sezikhohlakali, sisono." 
Proverbs21:5 Amacebo omntu okhutheleyo amnika indyebo, kodwa ke yena umntu otyhuthuzayo uzibizela ubuhlwempu." 
Proverbs21:6 Ubutyebi obufumene ngobuqhetseba buphephetheka njengenkungu, futhi bukubeka emngciphekweni wokufa." 
Proverbs21:7 Ubundlobongela bezikhohlakali buyaziqweqwedisa, kuba azivumi ukwenza okufanelekileyo." 
Proverbs21:8 Iindlela zomntu onetyala zigoso-goso, kodwa ke yena umntu omsulwa wenza imisebenzi efanelekileyo." 
Proverbs21:9 Akunani kwaukuhlala wedwa, noba kuphezu kwendlu, ndaweni yokuhlala ndlwini-nye nomfazi ongunogqwashu." 
Proverbs21:10 Umntu okhohlakeleyo usoloko elambele ukwenza into embi; ummelwane wakhe akafumani nceba kuye. 
Proverbs21:11 Akohlwaywa umgxeki, nabangaqondiyo batsho bafumane isifundo; sakufundiswa isilumko, sizuza ukwazi." 
Proverbs21:12 UThixo olilungisa uyazazi izinto ezenzeka kwimizi yabantu abakhohlakeleyo, yaye ke eya kuzibhangisa izikhohlakali ngenxa yobubi bazo." 
Proverbs21:13 Umntu ongaphulaphuliyo xa amahlwempu ezibika naye akayi kuhoywa xa esengxakini. 
Proverbs21:14 Isipho umntu asinikwa ngasese sithomalalisa umsindo; ewe, isicengo esigushiweyo sithothisa ingqumbo." 
Proverbs21:15 Umntu olungileyo uyavuya xa izinto ziqhutywa ngokusemthethweni, kambe ke abenzi bobubi baya kunkwantya." 
Proverbs21:16 Umntu obhadulayo, emke kwiindlela zengqiqo, uzifumanisa selekwisikhungu sabafileyo." 
Proverbs21:17 Umntu othanda iziyolo uya kuba lihlwempu; kanti ke yena umntu othanda iwayini namafutha omnquma soze abe sisityebi. 
Proverbs21:18 Kulula ukuncama umntu okhohlakeleyo ngenxa yolungileyo, othembekileyo athathe isikhundla songathembekanga." 
Proverbs21:19 Kubhetele ube lilolo entlango, kunokuhlala nomfazi onochuku okhalazayo." 
Proverbs21:20 Endlwini yesilumko kusoloko kukho ubuncwane namafutha omnquma, kodwa sona isiyatha sizavaza konke." 
Proverbs21:21 Umntu oxunela ubulungisa nenceba ufumana ubomi nobulungisa nodumo. 
Proverbs21:22 Isilumko siqabela ngaphaya kweendonga zesixeko samagorha, siyidilize inqaba athembele kuyo." 
Proverbs21:23 Lowo uwubambayo umlomo wakhe nolwimi lwakhe ukhusela ubomi bakhe kwiinkxwaleko. 
Proverbs21:24 Umntu ozigwagwisayo enendelelo kuthiwa ngumgxeki – usisityhuthu-tyhuthu esingakhathalele mntu. 
Proverbs21:25 Ivila elingafuni kusebenza lizibulala ngokwalo; kaloku izandla zalo ziqhokriwe ekusebenzeni. 
Proverbs21:26 Umntu onjalo ulibala imini yonke kukucinga ngezinto azifunayo; kanti ke yena umntu olungileyo unezinwe uyapha. 
Proverbs21:27 Idini elenziwa ngumntu okhohlakeleyo liyanyanyeka, ngakumbi xa elenza eneenjongo ezigwenxa." 
Proverbs21:28 Ingqina elixokayo liyabhanga; kanti ke lona ilizwi lomntu onyanisekileyo lihlala lihleli. 
Proverbs21:29 Umntu okhohlakeleyo unobuganga bokuzicingela ukuba uyayazi into ayenzayo, onyanisekileyo uyayicingisisa ihambo yakhe." 
Proverbs21:30 Ubulumko nengqondo kunye namacebo omntu akanakumelana nentando kaNdikhoyo. 
Proverbs21:31 Amahashe angayiqeqeshelwa imfazwe, kodwa nguNdikhoyo onika uloyiso." 
Proverbs22:1 Igama elihle lilungile ngaphezu kwentabalala yobutyebi; ukuba nesidima kungaphezu kwayo isiliva negolide. 
Proverbs22:2 Umntu osisityebi nomntu olihlwempu ikho into ebadibanisayo: kaloku bobabini badalwe nguNdikhoyo. 
Proverbs22:3 Umfo ohlakaniphileyo uthi akuyibona isiza ingozi ayiphephe; ke yena ongaqondiyo uthwabaza aye kungena kuyo, aze ke ave ubuhlungu yiloo nto." 
Proverbs22:4 Ukuba uyazithoba, umhlonela uNdikhoyo, uya kuxhamla ubutyebi, isidima, nobomi." 
Proverbs22:5 Indlela yamatshijolo iphahlwe ngameva nemigibe; ke yena umntu okhusela ubomi bakhe uyayicezela. 
Proverbs22:6 Ukuba umntwana umqeqeshile ngendlela yokuziphatha, soze ahlukane nayo naxa selekhulile." 
Proverbs22:7 Umntu osisityebi uyalilawula ihlwempu; nalowo ubolekayo likhoboka lalowo ubolekisayo. 
Proverbs22:8 Umntu ohlwayela inkohlakalo uvuna iinkxwaleko, nentonga yomsindo wakhe iya kwaphuka." 
Proverbs22:9 Umntu onezinwe uyathamsanqeleka, kuba kaloku uyawapha amahlwempu kukutya anako." 
Proverbs22:10 Wakumgxotha umgxeki itsho iphele ingxabano, ngokunjalo zitsho zinqamke iingxwaba-ngxwaba nokunyelisa." 
Proverbs22:11 Umntu onyanisekileyo nontetho inambithekayo uyathandwa nditsho nangukumkani. 
Proverbs22:12 Amehlo kaNdikhoyo ayalwalusa ulwazi; ke zona iintetho zabantu abaphixanisayo uyaziphanzisa. 
Proverbs22:13 Ivila lithi: “Kukho ingonyama phandle! Ndobulawa ezitalatweni!” 
Proverbs22:14 Umlomo womfazi ongakwaziyo ukuziphatha nqwa nenzonzobila yomhadi; ke bona abashwatyulelwe nguNdikhoyo batshona kuyo. 
Proverbs22:15 Ingqondo yomntwana idla ngokunxaxha, kodwa ke into emlulekayo luswazi." 
Proverbs22:16 Omnye ucinezela amahlwempu ngeenjongo zokwandisa ubutyebi bakhe, wumbi anikezele ngezipho kwizinhanha, kodwa bobabini baphelela ebuhlwempini." 
Proverbs22:17 Wabazele iindlebe uwaphulaphule amazwi ezilumko, imfundiso yam uyibethelele entliziyweni yakho." 
Proverbs22:18 Kaloku kumnandi xa unawo engqondweni yakho, ube nako ukumana ucaphula kuwo ungathintilizi." 
Proverbs22:19 Ndikwazisa wona ke namhlanje, ukuze wena kanye ube nako ukukholosa *ngoNdikhoyo." 
Proverbs22:20 Ngoko ke nazi iingongoma endikubhalele zona zimashumi mathathu, ziqulethe ubulumko namacebiso." 
Proverbs22:21 Ezi ngongoma ziya kukunceda ukwazi ukuyicalula inyaniso, utsho ukwazi ukunika ingxelo enyanisekileyo xa uthunyiwe." 
Proverbs22:22 Musa ukuthi kuba umntu elihlwempu umxhaphaze; futhi sukumcinezela umntu ohlelelekileyo xa esematyaleni. 
Proverbs22:23 Kaloku uNdikhoyo ngokwakhe uya kuba ngummeli wabo, abaphange abo babaphangayo." 
Proverbs22:24 Musa ukuhlobana nomntu onephuku; sukuhambisana nonkom' iyahlaba. 
Proverbs22:25 Kaloku xa usenjenjalo uya kugcayiseleka, nawe uzibhaqe sesikusulele eso simo sakhe." 
Proverbs22:26 Sukuyenza into yokubamba isandla ubhambathisa, umele ityala lomnye umntu." 
Proverbs22:27 Kaloku xa ungasenako ukuhlawula uya kuthinjwa wohluthwe nditsho kwanebhedi olala kuyo. 
Proverbs22:28 Ungaze uwugudlule umlima-ndlela wakudala owamiswa ngookhokho bakho. 
Proverbs22:29 Ungazibonela ngokwakho: umntu olichule emsebenzini usebenzela ukumkani, akasoze asebenzele abantu abangenagama." 
Proverbs23:1 Xa uthe wahlala phantsi ukuba udle nesikhulu, yaneliswa yiloo nto ibekwe phambi kwakho." 
Proverbs23:2 Xa ngaba ungumntu otya gqitha wubambe umqala wakho. 
Proverbs23:3 Musa ukuzibawela izimuncu-muncu zakhe, hleze uzibizele ingozi ngazo." 
Proverbs23:4 Musa ukuziqoba amandla ufunana nobutyebi, ungaphulukani nengqondo yakho ngenxa yabo." 
Proverbs23:5 Kaloku ubutyebi busuka buthi shwaka ngephanyazo; ungáde ucinge ukuba busuke bantshula amaphiko bantinga njengokhozi. 
Proverbs23:6 Musa ukutya ukudla komntu ovimbayo, ungazibaweli izimuncu-muncu zakhe." 
Proverbs23:7 Kaloku yena ngumntu apha osoloko ebala indleko. Noba angathi: “Yitya, usele,” akathethi loo nto entliziyweni yakhe." 
Proverbs23:8 Ewe, iya kubuya yonke loo ntwana uyityileyo, ube uwalahlile naloo mazwi akho okuncoma." 
Proverbs23:9 Musa ukulahla amazwi akho kumntu osisityhakala; kaloku uya kubudela ubulumko bamazwi akho. 
Proverbs23:10 Ungaze uwugudlule umlima-ndlela wakudala, nomhlaba weenkedama musa ukuwohlutha." 
Proverbs23:11 Kaloku uMkhululi wazo unamandla; nguye oya kubambana nawe ngenxa yazo. 
Proverbs23:12 Zimisele ukuyiphulaphula ingqeqesho, uyibazele iindlebe yonke into oyifundiswayo." 
Proverbs23:13 Sukuyekelela ukumqeqesha umntwana; ukuba uyamohlwaya ngoswazi akayi kufa.
