Proverbs23:14 Kaloku ngokumohlwaya umntwana uhlangula ubomi bakhe ekufeni. 
Proverbs23:15 Mfo wam, ndingonwaba kakhulu xa ingqondo yakho idlamkile." 
Proverbs23:16 Ewe, ndingatsho ndibe nebhongo xa ndikuva uthetha izinto ezithe ngqo." 
Proverbs23:17 Sukuziduba intliziyo ngabenzi bobugwenxa; nto mawuyenze wena kukuhlonela uNdikhoyo maxa onke. 
Proverbs23:18 Xa usenjenjalo ngenene uya kuba nekamva, nethemba lakho aliyi kunqanyulwa." 
Proverbs23:19 Mfo wam, phulaphula ukuze ube sisilumko; yigqale indlela oziphatha ngayo." 
Proverbs23:20 Musa ukuvana nabantu abanxilayo; ngokunjalo nabanyolukileyo bacezele. 
Proverbs23:21 Kaloku wona amanxila nezidla-kudla bayahlwempuzeka, namathongorha ambatha amadlavu." 
Proverbs23:22 Mntwana wam, mphulaphule uyihlo owakuzalayo, ungamdeli nonyoko ekwaluphaleni kwakhe." 
Proverbs23:23 Wakuyifumana inyaniso sukuthengisa ngayo; ewe, sukwahlukana nobulumko, ingqeqesho, kwanokuqonda." 
Proverbs23:24 Unebhongo umzali womntwana olilungisa; ewe, umntwana osisilumko uligugu kubazali bakhe." 
Proverbs23:25 Ngenene uyihlo nonyoko mabavuye ngawe – menze abe nemihlali lowo wakuzalayo. 
Proverbs23:26 Yinikezele kum intliziyo yakho, mntwan' am; indlela endiziphethe ngayo mayibe semehlweni akho." 
Proverbs23:27 Kaloku ihenyukazi ngumhadi onzulu, nomfazi oziphethe kakubi liqula elimxinwa." 
Proverbs23:28 Ewe, uncathama oku kwesikrelemnqa, alongeze inani labakrexezi." 
Proverbs23:29 Nguwuphi umntu osezintsizini nonesingqala, osoloko esezingxwaba-ngxwabeni ekhalaza; nditsho ofumana enzakale nje ngelize, umntu ongafik' etyofu-tyofu amehlo?" 
Proverbs23:30 Lowo ke ngulo mntu ungafika ejikelezana newayini, esoloko ezingelana newayini exutyiweyo." 
Proverbs23:31 Inkangeleko ebomvu yewayini mayingakukhangi, noba ingade imenyezele endebeni – ewe, nditsho seyinambitheka, isihla kamnandi!" 
Proverbs23:32 Ekugqibeleni iwayini iluma njengenyoka, ibinza njengerhamba." 
Proverbs23:33 Ikutsho ubone izinto ezingekhoyo, ushwaqe ubhude yonk' into." 
Proverbs23:34 Ewe, ikutsho ube ngathi uphakathi elwandle, ube ngathi ujinga epalini ebamba iseyile yesikhephe." 
Proverbs23:35 Uya kubuza uthi: “Ingathi ndibethiwe nje phofu? Hayi suka, ndingakhange ndive nje! Akwaba bendinganako ukuphinda ndiphakame, khe ndithi nje intwana ndiziqabule!”" 
Proverbs24:1 Musa ukumonela abantu abakhohlakeleyo ngezinto zabo, ungakunqweneli ukuzibandakanya nabo." 
Proverbs24:2 Kaloku intliziyo yabo iyila ubundlobongela, nomlomo wabo uthetha ngokuvusa uqhushululu." 
Proverbs24:3 Indlu yona yakhiwa ngobulumko, izinziswe ngengqondo." 
Proverbs24:4 Lulwazi oluzalisa amagumbi endlu, itsho ivathiswe ngezinto ezintle nezixabisekileyo." 
Proverbs24:5 Umfo osisilumko unamandla; ewe, indoda enolwazi iya isomelela ngokomelela." 
Proverbs24:6 Phambi kokuba uye emfazweni hlala phantsi ucwangcise kuqala; uloyiso lungabakho xa unabacebisi abaninzi. 
Proverbs24:7 Ubulumko yintsokotha kumntu osisiyatha; yena uyalabalaba xa kuxoxwa kwindibano ngasesangweni. 
Proverbs24:8 Umntu osoloko eyila ukwenza ububi uya kwaziwa ngokuba nguSomayelenqe. 
Proverbs24:9 Amayelenqe esidenge ayafadalala; ke yena umntu osoloko egxeka abanye uthiyiwe ngabantu. 
Proverbs24:10 Ukuba unamathidala ngamaxesha eenkathazo, awunawo amandla okujongana nawo." 
Proverbs24:11 Bahlangule abantu abaqweqwediselwa ekufeni; basindise abo bagxadazelela ekubulaweni. 
Proverbs24:12 Mhlawumbi ungathi wena: “Besingazi nto ngale nto,” kodwa ke yena uThixo onganqatyelwa nto uyayibona inyaniso – ukujongile, yaye uyakwazi. Ke yena uvuza umntu ngokwezenzo zakhe." 
Proverbs24:13 Mfo wam, butye ubusi, kuba bumnandi; ewe, incindi inencasa emlonyeni wakho." 
Proverbs24:14 Bukwanjalo ukuyola kobulumko: ukuba uthe wabufumana lotsho liqiniseke ikamva lakho, nethemba lakho linganqanyulwa." 
Proverbs24:15 Sukufana nesikhohlakali ngokulalela indlu yomntu olilungisa, nomzi wakhe sukuwonakalisa." 
Proverbs24:16 Noba angawa kangaphi na umntu olilungisa ubuya avuke; ke zona izikhohlakali zikhubeka zitshabalale. 
Proverbs24:17 Sukuluvuyelela lwakuwa utshaba lwakho, ungavuyi xa ulubona lukhubeka," 
Proverbs24:18 hleze olo vuyo lwakho lube bububi emehlweni kaNdikhoyo, awurhoxise umsindo wakhe kulo." 
Proverbs24:19 Sukuvutha ngumsindo ngenxa yabantu abenza ubugwenxa, ungabamoneli abantu abakhohlakeleyo ngezinto abanazo." 
Proverbs24:20 Kaloku umenzi wobubi akanakamva; isibane sabantu abakhohlakeleyo siya kucinywa. 
Proverbs24:21 Mntwan' am, mhlonele uNdikhoyo, ngokunjalo nokumkani, ungadlelani nabavukeli." 
Proverbs24:22 Kaloku bona babhanga ngephanyazo, ibe ke akukho bani waziyo ukuba botshatyalaliswa nini na nguNdikhoyo okanye ngukumkani." 
Proverbs24:23 Nanga amanye amazwi ezilumko: Yinto embi ukuba umgwebi ajonge ubuso bomntu. 
Proverbs24:24 Xa esuka athi konetyala: “Umsulwa wena,” abantu bayamthuka, zimgxeke izizwe." 
Proverbs24:25 Kambe ke yena umgwebi omohlwayayo umntu owonileyo uba nentsikelelo kunye nenkqubela. 
Proverbs24:26 Impendulo ethe gca nqwa nokuncamisa umhlobo emlonyeni. 
Proverbs24:27 Qala ulungise ishishini lakho, ulime amasimi akho, emva koko wakhe indlu yakho." 
Proverbs24:28 Sukuthi kungekho sizathu unike ubungqina obumtshonisayo ummelwane, okanye ukhohlise ngomlomo wakho." 
Proverbs24:29 Musa ukuthi: “Ndiya kwenza kuye njengoko enzile kum; ndiya kumenzakalisa ngokwezenzo zakhe.” 
Proverbs24:30 Ndathi ndihamba ndagqitha entsimini yevila; ewe, ndadlula kwisidiliya somntu ongenangqondo." 
Proverbs24:31 Sasitshone lé elukhuleni, sifuthwe nayinkunzane; ke lona udonga olwalubiyele lwaludilikile." 
Proverbs24:32 Ndakha ndee nqumama ndawubukela loo mhlola, ndacinga nzulu ndaza ndafumanisa ukuba" 
Proverbs24:33 xa uthe: “Hayi noko, makhe ndithi qwaka, ndithi ntlithi kancinane, khe ndisonge izandla, ndiphumle,”" 
Proverbs24:34 ubuhlwempu bosuka bukuchwechwele njengomkhuthuzi. Ewe, ihambo-nzima iza kukuhlasela oku kwendoda exhobileyo." 
Proverbs25:1 Nezi ikwazizafobe zikaSolomon ezaqokelelwa ngamagosa kakumkani uHezekiya wakwaJuda: 
Proverbs25:2 Isihomo sikaThixo siphuhliswa zizinto eziyimfihlakalo; kambe ke sona isidima sokumkani kukuphengulula imicimbi. 
Proverbs25:3 Njengokuphakama kwesibhakabhaka nobunzulu bomhlaba, zikwanjalo ukungabi nakugocagocwa iingcamango zookumkani." 
Proverbs25:4 Wakuyicwenga isiliva, nengcibi itsho ikwazi ukuyisebenzisa;" 
Proverbs25:5 akukhiqwa amaphakathi aphuthileyo, ulawulo lokumkani lutsho ludume ngokuzinza." 
Proverbs25:6 Xa ukomkhulu musa ukuzigqatsa; sukuhlala endaweni yezikhulu. 
Proverbs25:7 Kaloku kubhetele ukuba yena athi: “Nyukela apha,” kunokuba akususe kwindawo yezikhulu amatshawe ebukele." 
Proverbs25:8 Sukungxamela enkundleni ngento oyibonileyo, hleze kuvele omnye umntu nabungqina bumbi, utsho uhlazeke ke wena." 
Proverbs25:9 Xa usematyaleni nommelwane wakho musa ukudiz' imfihlelo oyixelelweyo," 
Proverbs25:10 hleze uvelwe utsho uphoxeke, kuze ke ukuba negama elibi kwakho kuthane mbende nawe." 
Proverbs25:11 Amazwi afanelekileyo nqwa neeapile zegolide ezithiwe nca kwisiliva. 
Proverbs25:12 Isilumkiso esiwa kwindlebe evayo sifana necici legolide nesidanga segolide ecikizekileyo. 
Proverbs25:13 Umthunywa onyanisekileyo kwabo bamthumayo uhlaziya inkosi yakhe oku kwekhephu ngexa lokuvuna. 
Proverbs25:14 Umntu ozigwagwisa ngokupha omnye isipho angenaso ufana namafu anomoya angenamvula. 
Proverbs25:15 Umlawuli uyacengeka ngumntu onomonde, namazwi athambileyo amenza anikezele." 
Proverbs25:16 Wakufumana ubusi butye uzilinganisela, hleze bubuye wakubutya gqitha." 
Proverbs25:17 Malungaquqi gqitha unyawo lwakho kwammelwana, hleze akruquke nguwe, akucaphukele." 
Proverbs25:18 Umntu otshonisa ummelwana wakhe ngobungqina obubuxoki uyingozi nqwa negqudu, umkhonto, okanye utolo." 
Proverbs25:19 Ukuthembela ngomntu ongathembekanga xa usenkathazweni kufana nezinyo elonakeleyo nonyawo oluqhwalelayo. 
Proverbs25:20 Ukuculela umntu oneenzingo kufana nokumhambisa ze mhla kubandayo, okanye kunjengokonakalisa isoda ngokuyixuba neviniga." 
Proverbs25:21 Xa ufumana utshaba lwakho lulambile, luphe ukutya; lwakunxanwa, luphe amanzi." 
Proverbs25:22 Ngokwenjenjalo ke woba uluqhubela enguqukweni, *noNdikhoyo wokuvuza." 
Proverbs25:23 Umoya wasentla uzisa imvula, kodwa ke yona intlebendwane iza nengxabano." 
Proverbs25:24 Akunani kwaukuhlala wedwa noba kuphezu kwendlu, ndaweni yokuhlala ndlwini-nye nomfazi ongunogqwashu." 
Proverbs25:25 Iindaba ezimnandi ezivela kwelikude zihlaziya oku kwamanzi abandayo emntwini odiniweyo. 
Proverbs25:26 Akoyiswa sisikhohlakali umntu olungileyo loo nto ifana nequla eligxobhekileyo okanye nomthombo ongcolisekileyo. 
Proverbs25:27 Ukubutya kakhulu ubusi akulunganga; kukwanjalo ukuhlala uzifunela imbeko. 
Proverbs25:28 Umntu owoyiswayo kukuzilawula usesichengeni oku kwesixeko esindonga ziwileyo. 
Proverbs26:1 Ukuncoma isityhakala ngumhlola onjengokuba kusuke kukhithike ehlotyeni, okanye kune imvula ngexesha lokuvuna." 
Proverbs26:2 Isishwabulo kungekho sizathu asiphumeleli; sifana nokundanda kwamahlankomo neenkonjane ezingahlali phantsi. 
Proverbs26:3 Ihashe liyabethwa, ke yona idonki ilawulwa ngomkhala, kanti ke sona isinyabi sivuswa ngentonga." 
Proverbs26:4 Sukuphendulana nesiyatha, hleze nawe lo uzibhaqe sewufana naso." 
Proverbs26:5 Xa umntu ebuza umbuzo wobudenge mlinganisele, hleze azicingele ukuba usisilumko." 
Proverbs26:6 Ukuthemba isidenge somthunywa kukuzenzakalisa nqwa nokuzinqumla imilenze. 
Proverbs26:7 Iqhalo emlonyeni womntu ongaqondiyo lifana nomlenze ojingayo wesiqhwala. 
Proverbs26:8 Ukuncoma isityhakala nqwa nokubophelela ilitye *kwinkwitshi. 
Proverbs26:9 Iqhalo emlonyeni wesiyatha nqwa nesebe elinameva esandleni senxila. 
Proverbs26:10 Umntu oqesha isidenge okanye nabani na odlulayo akanankathalo, ufana nejoni elidubula nje nabani na." 
Proverbs26:11 Umntu ophinda-phinda into yobudenge nqwa nenja ebuyela emhlanzweni wayo. 
Proverbs26:12 Akunani kwaisityhakala kunomntu osisilumko kwawakhe amehlo. 
Proverbs26:13 Ivila lithi: “Kukho ingonyama endleleni! Ewe, ingonyama ihla inyuka ezitalatweni.”" 
Proverbs26:14 Oku kocango oluvula luvaleke kwiihenjisi oluxhonywe kuzo linjalo ivila ukuqika-qikeka emandlalweni walo. 
Proverbs26:15 Ivila liyakha esityeni, kodwa linqene ukufaka emlonyeni." 
Proverbs26:16 Umntu olivila usisilumko kwawakhe amehlo; kuye ngathi ungaphezulu nakumadoda asixhenxe akwaziyo ukuphendula ngengqiqo. 
Proverbs26:17 Umntu ogxuphuleka kwiingxabano zabanye ufana nomfo osuka athi nqaku inja ngeendlebe. 
Proverbs26:18 Ufana negeza elidubula ngeentolo zomlilo 
Proverbs26:19 umntu okhohlisa ummelwane wakhe aze ajike athi: “Hayi, bendiqhula nje.”" 
Proverbs26:20 Zakuphela iinkuni uyacima umlilo. Xa kungekho mntu uphixanisayo kuyaphela ukungevani. 
Proverbs26:21 Ziinkuni ezivuthisa umlilo kwanjengokuba iintlantsi ziwavuthisa amalahle; ukwanjalo ke nomntu onochuku ukuphembelela ingxabano. 
Proverbs26:22 Amazwi omntu ohlebayo anencasa; abantu basuka bawathi bimbilili. 
Proverbs26:23 Amazwi alalanisayo efihla inkohlakalo nqwa nesitya somdongwe esigqunywe ngesiliva ngaphandle. 
Proverbs26:24 Umntu onentiyo usenokuyifihla ngendlela athetha ngayo, kodwa ngaphakathi abe esabambelele enkohlakalweni." 
Proverbs26:25 Ewe, walumkele loo mazwi akhe amnandi, kuba intliziyo yakhe iyaphuphuma ngamanyondololo." 
Proverbs26:26 Nokuba angayifihla intiyo yakhe ngenkohliso, kodwa inkohlakalo yakhe yona iya kudandalaza esidlangalaleni." 
Proverbs26:27 Umntu owomba umngxuma kweyela kwayena kuwo. Lowo uqengqa ilitye losuka ligubungele kwayena. 
Proverbs26:28 Umntu onolwimi uyabathiya abo abenzakalisayo; umntu okhohlisayo udala intshabalalo. 
Proverbs27:1 Musa ukuqhayisa ngengomso, kuba akuyazi loo mini ukuba iya kukuphathela ntoni na." 
Proverbs27:2 Yeka ibe ngomnye okuncomayo, ingabi ngowakho umlomo; ewe, mayibe ngowasemzini, kungaphumi emilebeni yakho." 
Proverbs27:3 Amatye nesanti ngumthwalo onzima; kodwa kona ukucatshukiswa sisityhakala luxanduva olungaphezulu. 
Proverbs27:4 Umsindo unenkohlakalo, ingqumbo sisiphango; kodwa ke akakho onokumelana nobukhwele." 
Proverbs27:5 Akunani kwaisiluleko esisekuhleni kunothando olufihlwayo. 
Proverbs27:6 Isihlobo sinyanisekile noba singade sikwenzakalise; siyakugqitha ukwangiwa kaninzi lutshaba. 
Proverbs27:7 Umntu ohluthayo akabukhathalele nobusi, kanti ke olambayo ukufumana kunencasa nokutya okukrakrayo." 
Proverbs27:8 Umntu okude nekhaya unjengentaka elahlekene nendlu yayo. 
Proverbs27:9 Amafutha neziqholo zonwabisa intliziyo; ke lona ulonwabo oluzuzwa kumhlobo ziingcebiso ezinyanisekileyo. 
Proverbs27:10 Ungaze wahlukane nezihlobo zakho, ungazilibali nezakowenu. Xa usengxakini sukubalekela kumntakwenu – isenokuba ngummelwane osondeleyo onokukunceda ngaphezulu komntakwenu okude." 
Proverbs27:11 Yoba luvuyo kum, mfo wam, ukuba uthe waba sisilumko; ndotsho ndibe nako ukubaphendula abo bandigxekayo." 
Proverbs27:12 Umntu ondwebileyo uthi akuyibona ayicezele ingozi, kanti ke yena ongaqiqiyo uphoseka kuyo enzakale." 
Proverbs27:13 Zithathe izambatho zomntu omele ityala londwendwe; ewe, bambisa ngazo kuba umele umntu wasemzini." 
Proverbs27:14 Umntu okhahlela ummelwana wakhe ngemibuliso kwasekuseni kusenokuba ngathi uyamshwabulela. 
Proverbs27:15 Umfazi osoloko eqhwaya ingxabano ufana namathontsi emvula engumvimbi. 
Proverbs27:16 Unjengomoya wona ungenakunqandwa, nqwa namafutha wona angenako ukufunjathwa." 
Proverbs27:17 Iintsimbi ziyalolana; ngokunjalo ke nezihlobo ziyakhuthazana. 
Proverbs27:18 Umntu owukhathaleleyo umthi womkhiwane uyawafumana amakhiwane, nomntu oyibusayo inkosi yakhe uya kuwongwa." 
Proverbs27:19 Umfanekiso womntu emanzini ubonakalisa inkangeleko yakhe; ngokunjalo nentliziyo yomntu ibonakalisa into ayiyo. 
Proverbs27:20 Ingcwaba nelabafileyo alize lihlúthe; akwanjalo namehlo omntu. 
Proverbs27:21 Isiliva ivavanywa ngokuyinyibilikisa embizeni; igolide ivavanywa ngokuyinyibilikisa kwiziko lomlilo; ke yena umntu uvavanywa ludumo alufumana ebantwini. 
Proverbs27:22 Nokuba ungade usingqushe kunye nombona isityhakala, soze ubukhuphe ubutyhakala baso." 
Proverbs27:23 Qinisekisa ukuba uyayazi imo yemfuyo yakho, uyaluse ngononophelo imihlambi yakho." 
Proverbs27:24 Kaloku ubutyebi obu yinto edlulayo, nesithsaba sobukhosi asihlali sihleli kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Proverbs27:25 Xa uyisikile ingca, wayenza ifulu, lo gama enye isaqala ukuntshula, nditsho xa utyani lwasezintabeni luhlanganisiwe," 
Proverbs27:26 impahla yokunxiba ungayenza ngoboya beegusha, futhi uthengise iibhokhwe, ufumane ixabiso lentsimi." 
Proverbs27:27 Kwezi ziseleyo unganako ukusenga uyondle intsapho yakho, ude uzibonelele nezicakazana zakho." 
Proverbs28:1 Umntu okhohlakeleyo ubaleka kungekho mntu umsukelayo; ke wona amalungisa anobuganga njengeengonyama. 
Proverbs28:2 Xa ilizwe linovukelo baba baninzi abafuna ukuphatha, kodwa xa kukho ophatha ngengqiqo nolwazi uyazinza." 
Proverbs28:3 Umfo osweleyo otshutshisa amahlwempu uyafana nesikhukula esizitshabalalisayo izilimo. 
Proverbs28:4 Izaphula-mthetho ziyazincoma izikhohlakali, kambe ke bona abawuthobelayo umthetho bayazichasa izikhohlakali." 
Proverbs28:5 Abantu abagwenxa ababuqondi ubulungisa; kanti ke abo bazondelela uNdikhoyo baqonda zonke izinto. 
Proverbs28:6 Lilungile ihlwempu elihambo ingenabala ngaphezu komkhohlisi ondlela zimbaxa nokuba usisityebi. 
Proverbs28:7 Umntwana onengqondo uyawuthobela umyalelo; ke yena otshomana noongantweni ubaphathela ihlazo abazali bakhe. 
Proverbs28:8 Umntu ozuza ubutyebi kuba ebolekisa aze axhaphaze abantu ngenzala ayibizayo, obo butyebi abuqokelelayo busuka bufunyanwe ngumntu wumbi owazelelelayo amahlwempu." 
Proverbs28:9 Umntu ozivalayo iindlebe zakhe kuwo umthetho kaThixo kwaumthandazo wakhe uyanyanyeka kuThixo. 
Proverbs28:10 Umntu owexulela amalungisa ekwenzeni ububi uya kweyela kwakuloo mgibe wakhe, kanti ke bona abamsulwa baya kukudla ilifa okulungileyo." 
Proverbs28:11 Isinhanha silumkile kwawaso amehlo, kanti ke lona ihlwempu eliqiqayo liyasibona into esiyiyo." 
Proverbs28:12 Xa amalungisa athe aphumelela kuba yimivuyo nemincili, kodwa ke xa kuthe kwaphakama izikhohlakali abantu bayabaleka bazimele." 
Proverbs28:13 Umntu osifihlayo isono sakhe akabi nampumelelo; kambe ke yena osivumayo, ahlukane naso, wenzelwa inceba." 
Proverbs28:14 Unoyolo umntu ohlala ezoyikela; ke yena oqaqadekileyo uhlelwa ziinkathazo. 
Proverbs28:15 Isiphathamandla esikhohlakeleyo, esilawula abantu abangenakuzilwela, sinjengengonyama egragramayo, okanye ibhere ehlaselayo." 
Proverbs28:16 Umlawuli ongenangqondo uba ngumcinezeli; ke yena umlawuli oyithiyileyo inzuzo yobuqhetseba uba nexesha elide. 
Proverbs28:17 Umntu ongcungcuthekiswa lityala lokubulala woba ngumsabi ade afe; makungabikho bani umxhasayo. 
Proverbs28:18 Umntu ohamba ngengqibelelo uyakhuseleka ebomini; ke yena ondlela zimbaxa uyenzakala ngephanyazo. 
Proverbs28:19 Umntu owalimayo amasimi akhe akasweli kutya, kanti ke yena osukelana namampunge uvuna ubuhlwempu." 
Proverbs28:20 Umntu othembekileyo uyathamsanqeleka; kanti ke yena ongxamele ubutyebi akaze abe msulwa. 
Proverbs28:21 Ukujonga ubuso akulunganga; kodwa ke abanye abantu bangade bone nangenxa yeqhekeza eli lesonka. 
Proverbs28:22 Umntu oligqolo usukelana nobutyebi; akaqondi ukuba usenokufikelwa bubuhlwempu. 
Proverbs28:23 Omkhalimelayo umntu wothi kamva afumane ukuhlonitshwa kunalowo untetho ilalanisayo. 
Proverbs28:24 Umntu oxhaphaza uyise nokuba ngunina, kodwa abe esithi: “Akukho nto imbi kuloo nto,” akahluke nganto kwisikrelemnqa." 
Proverbs28:25 Umntu onyolukileyo uphemba uqhushululu; kambe ke yena okholosa ngoNdikhoyo uya kuphumelela. 
Proverbs28:26 Umntu ozithembileyo akanangqondo; kodwa yena ohamba ngendlela yobulumko ukhuselekile. 
Proverbs28:27 Umntu onezinwe kumahlwempu akasweli nto; ovala amehlo akhe kwiintswelo zawo wohlala eqalekiswa. 
Proverbs28:28 Xa kulawula izikhohlakali abantu bayabaleka bazimele, kodwa zakutshabalala amalungisa aba nempumelelo." 
Proverbs29:1 Umntu okhalinyelwa njalo, kodwa abe neenkani, wosuka aphalale ngephanyazo, angaze abe nabuyambo." 
Proverbs29:2 Wakuba sezandleni zamalungisa umbuso, batsho bavuye abantu; kambe ke kwakulawula isikhohlakali iba ziincwina zodwa." 
Proverbs29:3 Othanda ubulumko uvuyisa uyise, kodwa ke yena othene nca namahenyukazi uchitha impahla yakhe." 
Proverbs29:4 Xa ukumkani elawula ngobulungisa litsho lizinze ilizwe lakhe; kambe ke yena orhwiphiliza irhafu uyalibhuqa. 
Proverbs29:5 Umntu onyhwalaza ummelwana wakhe uzenzela umgibe iinyawo zakhe. 
Proverbs29:6 Umntu ogwenxa uthiyelwa sisono sakhe; kambe ke yena olilungisa uyaziculela onwabile. 
Proverbs29:7 Umntu olilungisa unemfobe ngâbo bahlelelekileyo, ke yena umntu okhohlakeleyo akayiqondi nokuyiqonda into enjalo." 
Proverbs29:8 Abagxeki baphembelela udushe esixekweni, kambe ke zona izilumko ziyawuthomalalalisa umsindo." 
Proverbs29:9 Umntu osisilumko xa emangalelene nesiyatha sisuka sivuke umnyele siphoxise, kungabikho mvisiswano." 
Proverbs29:10 Izibulala-mntu zimthiyile umntu onyanisekileyo, ke bona abathe ngqo bayamkhusela umntu onjalo." 
Proverbs29:11 Isiyatha asiwulawuli umsindo; kambe ke sona isilumko siyaphola sizibambe. 
Proverbs29:12 Ukuba umlawuli nguthoba-sikutyele, onke amaphakathi akhe oba ngoongcothoza." 
Proverbs29:13 Ihlwempu ndawonye nalowo ulingcungcuthekisayo bafana ngale nto yokuba bobabini banikwe amehlo abonayo nguNdikhoyo. 
Proverbs29:14 Ukumkani ogweba ityala lehlwempu ngokunyanisekileyo ulawulo lwakhe luya kuhlala luzinzile. 
Proverbs29:15 Uswazi lokululeka ludala ubulumko; kambe ke umntwana ongaqeqeshwayo umzisela ihlazo unina. 
Proverbs29:16 Xa kulawula izikhohlakali siyanda isono, kambe ke wona amalungisa aya kukubona ukuwa kwazo." 
Proverbs29:17 Umntwana olulekwayo uya kukunika ukuxola, aze ayivuyise intliziyo yakho." 
Proverbs29:18 Abantu abangenawo umbono kaThixo baba ziindlobongela; phofu ke unoyolo umntu owuthobelayo umthetho kaThixo. 
Proverbs29:19 Akuncedi nto ukulingxolisa ikhoboka, kuba nokuba liyaqonda aliyi kuphulaphula." 
Proverbs29:20 Uyambona na umntu othetha nje engaqiqanga? Akunani kwaisityhakala kunaye. 
Proverbs29:21 Ukuba uyalitefisa ikhoboka kwasebutsheni balo, ekugqibeleni liya kukudela." 
Proverbs29:22 Umntu ofan' acaphuke udala ingxabano; umfo onephuku uwa ewile esonweni. 
Proverbs29:23 Ikratshi liyamwisa umntu; kambe ke othobekileyo uba nesidima. 
Proverbs29:24 Ihlakani lomntu olisela lizibeka emngciphekweni; nakuba lisazi ukuba liza kohlwaywa nguThixo noko lithe cwaka. 
Proverbs29:25 Ukuxhalela abantu kusenokuba ngumgibe; kambe ke othembela kuNdikhoyo ukhuselekile. 
Proverbs29:26 Baninzi abazithandekisa kwiziphathamandla, kambe ke bona ubulungisa bufumaneka kuNdikhoyo." 
Proverbs29:27 Umntu onobuqhetseba uyacekiswa ngamalungisa; ngokunjalo nomntu othe ngqo uyacekiswa ngabakhohlakeleyo. 
Proverbs30:1 Nanga amazwi ka-Agure unyana kaYake, udaba olundilisekileyo. Yasuka yadanduluka indoda leyo, yathi kuItiyeli, ewe, uItiyeli noUkali:" 
Proverbs30:2 “Kaloku ndisesona sidenge ebantwini; kwaye ingqondo yomntu ayikho kum. 
Proverbs30:3 Zange ndabufunda ubulumko; andimazi lowo uyiNgcwele kanye. 
Proverbs30:4 Kanti ke, ngubani oselekhe waya ezulwini wabuya wehla; ingubani owakha wawubamba ngezakhe izanda umoya? Khona, ngubani owakha wabamba amanzi wawaqhinela ngesondo lengubo yakhe; ingubani khona owamisa imida yehlabathi? Khawutsho kaloku, ukuba unolwazi! Ngubani igama lakhe; ingubani unyana wakhe?" 
Proverbs30:5 “Yonke into ayithethayo uThixo ithembekile; ulikhaka kwabazimela ngaye. 
Proverbs30:6 Musa ukongeza kwintetho yakhe, hleze akukhalimele, budandalaze ubuxoki bakho.”" 
Proverbs30:7 Awu, Bawo, zimbini nje qha izinto endizicelayo kuwe; ewe, ndiphe zona ndingekafi!" 
Proverbs30:8 Ndikhwebule kubuqhetseba nokuxoka; mandingade ndibe sisityebi okanye ndihlwempuzeke, nto nje ndiqhekezele isonka sam semihla ngemihla," 
Proverbs30:9 hleze ndikukhanyele ndakuhlutha, ndisuke ndithi: “Kuxa engubani yena *uNdikhoyo?” Ukanti ke naxa ndihlwempuzekile ndingasuka ndibe, ndihlazise igama likaThixo wam." 
Proverbs30:10 Isicaka sukusigxeka enkosini yaso, hleze sikushwabulele ube nobutyala." 
Proverbs30:11 Abanye abantu bayamshwabulela uyise, bangamthamsanqelisi nonina." 
Proverbs30:12 Bona bazicingela ukuba banyulu, kodwa babe bengazange bahlambuluka." 
Proverbs30:13 Aba bantu bazicingela bhetele. Awu, baziphakamisile kambe!" 
Proverbs30:14 Basisizukulwana esimazinyo aziingxavula okwekrele, esimabamba abukhali okwemela, khon' ukuze baxhaphaze amahlwempu ehlabathini, ewe, nditsho abasweleyo phakathi kwabantu." 
Proverbs30:15 Ikhalane lineentombi ezimbini; zithi: “Ndiphe! Ndiphe!” Ewe, zintathu izinto ezingahluthiyo, gxebe, zine ezingasoze zithi: “Kwanele!”:" 
Proverbs30:16 elabafileyo; umfazi ongafumani bantwana; umhlaba onxaniweyo; nomlilo ongatshoyo ukuthi: “Kwanele!” 
Proverbs30:17 Amehlo omntu ophoxisa ngoyise nocekisa ukuthobela unina aya kuxholwa ngamahlungulu, anqwamzwe ngamaxhalanga." 
Proverbs30:18 Kukho izinto ezintathu eziyintsonkotha kum; gxebe, zine endingaziqondiyo:" 
Proverbs30:19 ukubhabha kokhozi esibhakabhakeni; ukurhubuluza kwenyoka elulwalweni; ukuhamba kwenqanawa enzulwini yolwandle; ukuthandana komfana nentombi. 
Proverbs30:20 Inje indlela yomfazi okrexezayo: Uyadla, asule umlomo, athi: “Andenzanga nto imbi!”" 
Proverbs30:21 Zintathu izinto ezilishukumisayo ihlabathi; gxebe, zine elingenako ukuzinyamezela:" 
Proverbs30:22 kukuba phantsi kwekhoboka eliye laba ngukumkani, okanye isiyatha xa sithe sahlutha kukutya;" 
Proverbs30:23 kukuba phantsi kwebhinqa ebelingafunwa elide latshata, okanye isicakazana xa sithe sathatha indawo yenkosikazi yaso." 
Proverbs30:24 Kukho izinto ezine ezincinane emhlabeni, kodwa zilumke gqitha." 
Proverbs30:25 Iimbovane ziluhlanga oluethe-ethe, kodwa ziqokelela ukutya ehlotyeni." 
Proverbs30:26 Iimbila zisisizwe esingenamandla, kanti zimisa izindlu zazo emaweni." 
Proverbs30:27 Iinkumbi azinankosi, kodwa zihamba amaqela ngamaqela." 
Proverbs30:28 Icikilishe yinto ongayibamba nangesandla sakho, kodwa liyafumaneka nakumabhotwe ookumkani." 
Proverbs30:29 Zintathu izinto ezibukelekayo xa zihamba; gxebe, zine ezichul' ukunyathela:" 
Proverbs30:30 yingonyama, igorha phakathi kwezilwanyana, yona ingahlehliyo nakweyiphi na into;" 
Proverbs30:31 ngumqhagi ondolosayo; yinkunzi yebhokhwe; ngukumkani ephahlwe ngumkhosi wakhe. 
Proverbs30:32 Ukuba wenze izinto zobudenge waziphakamisa, okanye ukuba uthe waceba ububi, khawuthi xha!" 
Proverbs30:33 Wakulucofa ucwambu kuvela ibhotolo, wakuyixhimfa impumlo isuka yophe, wakuxhokonxa umsindo kugqabhuka imbambano." 
Proverbs31:1 La ngamazi kakumkani uLemweli, udaba olundilisekileyo awaqeqeshwa ngalo ngunina." 
Proverbs31:2 “Awu, mtanam, sana lwesizalo sam, nyana wezibhambathiso zam," 
Proverbs31:3 amandla akho musa ukuwaqoba ngamankazana, iindlela zakho ungazilahleli kwabo babhangisa ookumkani!" 
Proverbs31:4 “Lemweli, iwayini ayibafanelanga ookumkani, ewe, ookumkani ayibafanelanga; iziphathamandla akulunganga zizinikele etywaleni." 
Proverbs31:5 Kaloku zakusela zitsho ziwulibale umthetho, zingabi sawakhathalela amalungelo abantu abahlelelekileyo." 
Proverbs31:6 Utywala bufanele abo kungasekho thuba kubo, abo baminxekileyo ziinzingo." 
Proverbs31:7 Kaloku bona bakusela bayabulibala ubuhlwempu babo, bangabi sazikhumbula neengxaki zabo." 
Proverbs31:8 “Thetha ubamele abantu abangakwaziyo ukuzithethelela; ncedisana nabo uwakhusele amalungelo eendwayinge. 
Proverbs31:9 Bamele ubabonelele ngokwasemthethweni; ncedisana nabo abahlelelekileyo nabasweleyo.” 
Proverbs31:10 Awu, akanqabe ngako umfazi onesidima! Lingaphezulu lee nakumatye anqabileyo ixabiso lakhe!" 
Proverbs31:11 Onjalo uthenjiwe mpela yindoda yakhe, futhi ke ayihlelelekanga nganto." 
Proverbs31:12 Uyiphatha kakuhle, kungabi kakubi, yonke imihla yobomi bakhe." 
Proverbs31:13 Uthatha umqhaphu newulu, asebenze ngenkuthalo ngezandla zakhe." 
Proverbs31:14 Uhamba njengeenqanawa zabarhwebi, efuna ukutya kosapho nakwelikude." 
Proverbs31:15 Uvuka kusathi qhekre ukusa, alungiselele usapho ukutya, anike izicakazana zakhe imiyalelo." 
Proverbs31:16 Uyayigqala intsimi, aze ayithenge, athathe kwimali ayisebenzeleyo, atyale isidiliya." 
Proverbs31:17 Usoloko ebhinqa omfutshane; iingalo zakhe zimelana nawo wonke umsebenzi. 
Proverbs31:18 Uyayiqwalasela inzuzo yokushishina kwakhe; isibane sakhe asicimi ebusuku. 
Proverbs31:19 Izandla zakhe aziyeki ukuphotha, neminwe yakhe ayisuki kumashini wokuluka." 
Proverbs31:20 Isandla sakhe sisoloko sivulekile kumahlwempu; ewe, izinwe zakhe zifikelela nakwabasweleyo." 
Proverbs31:21 Akanaxhala noba selikhithika, kuba kaloku usapho lwakhe lunezingayiwayo iimpahla zobusika." 
Proverbs31:22 Uzenzela iingubo zokwandlala ezihonjisiweyo kunene; unxiba ezelaphu elihle elimsobo. 
Proverbs31:23 Nendoda yakhe iyaziwa enkundleni ngasemasangweni, apho ihlala khona namadoda amakhulu elizwe." 
Proverbs31:24 Uthunga impahla entle yokunxiba, athengise ngayo; wenza imixwayo ayithengise kubarhwebi." 
Proverbs31:25 Uthiwe jize ngamandla nesidima, ibe ke akanaxhala ngengomso." 
Proverbs31:26 Xa evula umlomo uthetha ngobulumko; xa enika iziluleko oko ukwenza ngenceba. 
Proverbs31:27 Ulalusile ikhaya lakhe; akasidli isonka sobuvila. 
Proverbs31:28 Abantwana bakhe bayamhlonela, bathi unoyolo; nendoda yakhe ungayiva imncoma, isithi:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Baninzi abafazi abenza imisebenzi emihle; kodwa wena ubagqwesa bonke!” 
Proverbs31:30 Umfazi onomtsalane angakukhohlisa, ke bona ubuhle buyatshitsha; kuphela ngumfazi ohlonela *uNdikhoyo oya kubongwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Ncoma umwonge ngenxa yoko kwenziwa zizandla zakhe; ewe, makutyibelwe kudombozwe ngemisebenzi yakhe naphaya emasangweni." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Nanga amazwi eNgqondi, unyana kaDavide, ukumkani waseJerusalem:" 
Ecclesiastes1:2 “Ngamampunge awo amampunge;” itsho iNgqondi, “ewe, ngokupheleleyo ngamampunge; yonk' into ngamampunge!”" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Kumnceda ntoni umntu ukuzabalaza esebenza? Ude azuze ntoni ngokubulaleka kwakhe apha phantsi kwelanga? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Izizukulwana ziyafika, izizukulwana ziyemka, kodwa ke lona ihlabathi limi ngonaphakade." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Ilanga liyaphuma, kanti ke ilanga libuya litshone, lize ke likhawuleze liye apho liya kuphuma khona." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Umoya ubhudla ubhekisa ngasezantsi, ubuye ubhekise ngasentla; wenza loo njike-njike uthatha umjikelo wawo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Yonk' imilambo ingena elwandle, kodwa ke lona ulwandle aluzali; amanzi abuyela apho ebevela khona, aphinde asinge apho ebesiya khona." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Yonke into yindebelefele yendinisa engathethekiyo: iliso liyabona, kodwa alaneli; kanti nendlebe iyeva, kodwa ayihluthi." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Into eyakha yakho yophinda ibe khona. Le nto yenzekileyo iya kuphinda yenzeke kwakhona. Akukho nto intsha phantsi kwelanga. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Ungabeva besithi: “Uyabona ke, intsha le nto!” Ukanti ke ibikho kakade, ntlandlolo kwangaphambili." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Izinto zakudala azisakhunjulwa; ukanti ke nezi zanamhlanje izinto aziyi kwaziwa sisizukulwana esizayo. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ke mna Ngqondi ndandingukumkani wakwaSirayeli eJerusalem. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ndasuka ndazimisela ukuphicotha ndenze uphando ngobulumko ngazo zonke izinto ezenzekayo ehlabathini. Ewe, uThixo ubanike uxanduva lomzabalazo otyhafisayo abantu." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ndizibonile ke zonke izinto ezenziwayo phantsi kwelanga; zonke zingamampunge, nqwa nokusukelana nomoya." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Kaloku into egoso-goso ayinakolulwa; ukanti nento engekhoyo ayinakubalwa. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ndaziva sendisithi kum ngaphakathi: “Ngoku mna ndide ndabalasela ngobulumko kunaye nabani na owakhe walawula eJerusalem ngaphambi kwam. Ndinamava aphangaleleyo ngobulumko nolwazi. 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ndazimisela ukuzuza ulwazi nobulumko, ndibuqonde ubutyhakala nobudenge, kodwa ndafikelela kwelithi naleyo into ifana nokusukelana nomoya.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Ukukhula kobulumko kwandisa ukukhathazeka; kanti ke nokukhula kolwazi kongeza iinzingo. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ke kaloku ndagqiba kwelithi: “Makhe ndilinge iziyolo, ndizonwabise, ndive ukuba kunjani na!” Kodwa ke ndafumanisa ukuba naloo nto ngamampunge." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ukuhleka ndathi: “Bubuyatha;” iziyolo zona: “Ngaba zindizisela ntoni?” 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ndacamanga entliziyweni yam ukuba mandithi lo gama ndifuna ubulumko khe ndizilahlele kwiwayini, ndiziphathe okwesityhakala, ndide ndibone ukuba yeyiphi into ebalungeleyo oonyana babantu ukuba bayenze apha emhlabeni ngemihla embalwa yobomi babo." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ndenza imisebenzi emikhulu: ndazakhela izindlu, ndatyala izidiliya," 
Ecclesiastes2:5 ndalima izitiya, ndenza nemiyezo, kuyo ndatyala zonke iintlobo-ntlobo zeziqhamo." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ndemba ndenza amadama ukuze ndinkcenkceshele loo mithi isahlumayo. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ndandizithengela amakhoboka angamadoda nabhinqileyo, kwada kwakho namakhoboka azalelwa emzini wam. Ndandinemihlambi emininzi yeenkomo nempahla emfutshane ngaphezu kweyabo bonke abakhe bahlala ngaphambi kwam eJerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ndaqokelela imfumba yesiliva negolide, ndiyithatha kwindyebo yookumkani abaphantsi kwam, namazwe endiwalawulayo. Ndandineekwayala zokundonwabisa – amadoda nabantu ababhinqileyo. Kananjalo ndandinabafazi abaninzi ngokomnqweno wentliziyo yam." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ewe, ndandisisikhulu, ndimkhulu kunabo bonke abakhe bema eJerusalem ngaphambi kwam. Ngalo lonke eli xesha bendincedwa bubulumko bam." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Yonke into endandiyinqwenela ndandiyifumana, kungekho nasiyolo sakha sandiphosa. Ndandineqhayiya, ndizidla ngayo yonke imizabalazo yam; lowo yaba ngumvuzo wam ngoko kubulaleka." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ndathi ke ndakuwuphonononga wonke umsebenzi wezandla zam nokubulaleka endibulaleke ngako, ndafumanisa ukuba yonke loo nto ngamampunge nje, yimfeketho enjengokusukelana nomoya. Ewe, akukho nzuzo apha phantsi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ndaza ke ndaphicotha umahluko phakathi kobulumko kunye nobutyhakala nobudenge. Kakade yintoni anokuyenza ongena ezihlangwini zokumkani ebeyingasele yenziwa ngaphambili? 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ndabona ukuba ubulumko buyakhetheka kunobutyhakala, kwanjengokuba ukukhanya kungcono kunobumnyama." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Umntu osisilumko uyabona apho aya khona, kanti ke sona isityhakala sifathula emnyameni. Kambe ke ndafumanisa ukuba bebonke isiphelo sinye." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ndagqiba kwelithi: “Nam ngokwam ndiya kufa kwanjengesityhakala, ibe yintoni ke endiyizuzileyo ngobulumko?” Ndaza ndagqiba kwelithi: “Nale ke into ikwangamampunge." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Isilumko siyalityalwa, kanti nesityhakala asikhunjulwa. Ngemihla ezayo bobabini bayalityalwa, bangabi sakhunjulwa. Kukugqwesa ngantoni ke ukufa kwesilumko ukufa kwesityhakala?”" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ngoko ke ndatsho ndabucaphukela ubomi, kuba yonke into eyenziwa apha phantsi kwelanga yasuka yandiphathela inkxwaleko. Ewe, zonke izinto ngamampunge, nqwa nokusukelana nomoya." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ke kaloku ndasuka ndakucaphukela konke ukubulaleka kwam apha phantsi kwelanga, kuba ndisazi ukuba ndihlalelwe kukuzishiya kulowo undilandelayo zonke izinto endizenzileyo." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Kwazi bani ke ukuba woba sisilumko okanye isityhakala? Ukanti ke noba kunjalo konke ukubulaleka nobuchule bam apha phantsi kwelanga buya kuba semandleni akhe. Hayi suka, ngamampunge lawo!" 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ngoko ke ndatsho ndazisola ngokubulaleka kwam konke apha phantsi kwelanga. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Kaloku umntu ebesenokuwenza umsebenzi wakhe ngobulumko, ingqiqo, nobuchule, kanti yonke loo nto abulaleke ngayo uza kuyishiya emntwini ongayisebenzelanga mpela-mpela! Ngenene nale into ngamampunge; imbi kunene!" 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Kodwa-kodwa uzuza ntoni umntu ngemizabalazo nokubulaleka kwakhe apha phantsi kwelanga? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Yonke imihla yakhe yinkxwaleko, nokuzabalaza kwakhe ziinzingo. Nasebusuku uyaphuthelwa angaphumli. Ewe, yonke loo nto nayo ingamampunge." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Ayikho enye into angayenzayo umntu ngaphandle kokuba atye asele, ahlale anelisekile kukubulaleka kwakhe. Phofu ke naleyo ndafumanisa ukuba iphuma kwasesandleni sikaThixo," 
Ecclesiastes2:25 kuba kaloku ngaphandle kwakhe akukho mntu ungatyayo okanye onwabe. 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Kaloku uThixo umnika ubulumko, ingqiqo, nokonwaba, loo mntu umkholisayo; kambe ke bona abagwenxa abanike uxanduva lokusebenza nzima, beqweba beqokelela ubutyebi, ukuze ke babunikezele kwabo bakholisa uThixo. Ngenene nale into ngamampunge, ifana nokusukelana nomoya." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Yonke into inexesha layo; umbandela ngamnye unethuba lawo apha emhlabeni. 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Ukuzalwa kunexesha lako, nokufa kunexesha lako. Likho ixesha lokutyala, likwakho nexesha lokuncothula." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Likho ixesha lokubulala, kanti likho nexesha lokunyanga. Ukuchitha kunexesha lako, nokwakha kunexesha lako." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Ukulila kunexesha lako, nokuhleka kunexesha lako. Likho ixesha lokuzila, likwakho nexesha lemihlali." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Ukusarhaza amatye kunexesha lako, nokuqokelela amatye kunexesha lako. Likho ixesha lokuwolana, likwakho nexesha lokuyeka ukuwolana." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Ukufuna kunexesha lako, nokuncama kunexesha lako. Ukugcina kunexesha lako, nokulahla kunexesha lako." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Likho ixesha lokukrazula, likwakho nexesha lokuthunga. Ukuthi cwaka kunexesha lako, kanti nokuthetha kunexesha lako." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Uthando lunexesha lalo, nokucaphukela kunexesha lako. Likho ixesha lemfazwe, kanti likwakho nexesha loxolo." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Umntu uzuza ntoni ke ngemizabalazo yakhe? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ndilubonile uxanduva alunike uluntu uThixo. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Into yonke uyimisele ixesha layo. Umntu yena umnike ulangazelelo lokuqonda nangamaxesha angamiselwanga. Kodwa ke umntu akafikeleli ekuyazini into eyenziwa nguThixo ukususela ekuqaleni kuye esiphelweni. 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndifumanise ukuba akukho nto iyenye angayenzayo umntu ngaphandle kokuba ahlale onwabile, enze okulungileyo lo gama esaphila," 
Ecclesiastes3:13 kwanokuba wonke umntu atye asele aneliseke yimigudu yakhe. Kaloku sisipho esivela kuThixo eso. 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndiyazi ukuba yonke into eyenziwa nguThixo iya kuhlala ihleli; akukho nto inokongezwa kuyo, kungekho nto inokususwa kuyo. UThixo uyakwenza oku ukuze ahlonelwe ngabantu." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Into ekhoyo ibiselikho kakade, nento eya kubakho ibikho ngaphambili. UThixo uyakubuyisela obekusele kudlule." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ngaphezu koko ke ndifumanise ukuba apha phantsi kwelanga usuka ufumane inkohlakalo endaweni yokugweba ngokufanelekileyo, nditsho inkohlakalo endaweni yobulungisa." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ndagqiba kwelithi: “UThixo uza kugweba bonke, abalungileyo nabakhohlakeleyo, kuba umise ixesha layo yonke imicimbi nazo zonke izenzo.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndagqiba ngelithi: “UThixo uyaluvavanya uluntu, efuna ukuba luqonde ukuba alwahluke kuya phi ezilwanyaneni." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Kaloku isiphelo somntu siyafana nesesilwanyana. Ukufa kubabopha ngentambo enye ngokufanayo. Ewe, umoya mnye emntwini nasesilwanyaneni. Ke umntu akasidluli nganto isilwanyana. Yonke into ingamampunge." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Umntu ndawonye nesilwanyana baya ndaweni-nye; njengoko bephuma emhlabeni, babuyela kwasemhlabeni." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ngubani owaziyo ukuba umoya womntu uyenyuka ubheke phezulu, ingubani owaziyo ukuba umoya wesilwanyana uyehla ubheke emhlabeni?”" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ke kaloku ndabona ukuba into emfaneleyo umntu kukwanela, axhamle imigudu yakhe, kuba kambe eso sisabelo sakhe. Kakade ngubani onokumbonisa oko kuza kwenzeka za sele engekho?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Kwakhona ke ndathi ndakukhangela ndayibona ingcinezelo ekhoyo apha phantsi kwelanga. Awu, iinyembezi zabo bacinezelweyo; ibe ke kungekho namthuthuzeli! Ewe, akukho mntu ubathuthuzelayo, ibe ke bona abacinezeli baxhaswa ligunya." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ndafumanisa ukuba abo bangasekhoyo, abasele befile kakade, bakwimeko engcono kunabo baphilayo, abasahleliyo nangoku." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Kambe ke oyena ukwimeko engcono ngulowo ungekabikho, engekayiboni le nkohlakalo yenziwayo apha phantsi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Ndafumanisa ukuba into eyenza abantu babulaleke bazabalaze kangaka kukuxhalela abamelwane. Kambe ke naleyo ngamampunge, nqwa nokusukelana nomoya." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Isiyatha sisonga izandla, sizitshabalalise ngokwaso." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Phofu ke akunani kwaintwana engephi, oyifumana wonwabile, kunentabalala ezuzwa ngembulaleko kusukelwana nomoya." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Kwakhona ndawabona amampunge alapha phantsi kwelanga: 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Nanko umntu ohlala yedwa, kungekho owesibini: akananyana namntakwabo, kodwa uxhabashile, uyasebenza engaphezi; noxa kunjalo amehlo akhe akaneliswa bubutyebi bakhe. Ude athi: “Ngubani endibulalekela yena, ndide ndizivimbe ulonwabo kangaka?” Ewe, nale into ngamampunge; ngumzamo ophuthileyo!" 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Kungcono abasebenzi babe babini kunokuba abe mnye, kuba baba nengeniso eyiyo ngomsebenzi wabo." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Kaloku xa omnye ethe wawa omnye unokuphakamisa ugxa wakhe. Mawoo ke lowo uyedwa xa athe wawa! Akukho bani unokumphakamisa. 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Ewe, xa ababini belala ngangubo-nye abagodoli. Kodwa ke kunzima ukufudumala xa ulele wedwa." 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Oyedwa uyagaganyelwa, kodwa ababini banako ukumelana nohlaselo. Intsontelo ephindwe kathathu iqhawuka nzima." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Endaweni yokumkani owalupheleyo osisityhakala esingeva nacebiso lilunge kanye igatyana lomfana olihlwempu xa enobulumko," 
Ecclesiastes4:14 nangona angade abe wazalelwa ebuhlwempini phantsi kwaloo kumkani. Ewe, usenokuphuma nasentolongweni abe ngukumkani alawule." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ndibone ukuba bonke abadla ubomi besihla benyuka apha phantsi kwelanga basuke bamlandela umfana lowo ungene esikhundleni sokumkani lowo walupheleyo. 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Ewe, baba baninzi kakhulu abantu abamlandelayo kangangokuba bangabi nakubalwa. Kambe ke sona isizukulwana esilandelayo asibi saba namdla kuye. Ngenene nale ke into ikwangamampunge nokusukelana nomoya." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Lumka, ugqale ukunyathela kwakho xa usiya endlwini kaThixo. Xa usiya khona hamba ngeenjongo zokuphulaphula endaweni yokwenza amadini njengezityhakala ezingaziyo ukuba zenza ubugwenxa." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Qiqa phambi kokuba uthethe; musa ukungxama ukwenza izithembiso kuThixo. Kaloku yena usezulwini, ube ke wena ulapha emhlabeni; ngoko ke amazwi akho makabe mbalwa." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Ubuninzi bemicimbi bubanga amaphupha; ubuninzi bamazwi kuhamba nentetho yobutyhakala. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Xa wenze isifungo kuThixo, khawuleza usifezekise. Kaloku yena akavani nezityhakala; ngoko ke siphumelelise isifungo sakho." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Akunani kwaukungenzi sifungo kunokubhambathisa uze ungafezekisi. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Umlomo wakho mawungakukhokeleli esonweni, uze ke ube ubongoza isigidimi, usithi: “Ndiphazamile.” Ngani ukuba umkhathaze uThixo ngento oyithethileyo, ade atshabalalise umsebenzi wezandla zakho?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Intlaninge yamaphupha namazwi amaninzi ngamampunge. Kuphela hlonela uThixo! 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Sukumangaliswa xa ubona abantu abahlelelekileyo becinezelwa, bengazelelelwa kummandla othile, bengenzelwa ubulungisa nokufanelekileyo. Kaloku igosa ngalinye livelelwa lelinye, aze ke xa ewomabini avelelwe ngamanye angentla kuwo." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Kambe ke ilizwe lilungelwa yinto yonke xa ukumkani enyamekela ukulinywa kwamasimi akhe. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Umntu oyinyolukeleyo imali soze imanelise; kanti ke noxhinele ubutyebi akaze aneliswe yingeniso yakhe. Nale ke into ngamampunge. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Yakukhula ingeniso bayanda nabaxhomekeke kuyo, ibe yintoni ke ezuzwa ngumniniyo? Kuphela uyitya ngamehlo!" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Umntu ophangelayo ulala athi yoyi, noba utya kancinci, okanye ke uyahlutha. Ke bona ubunewu-newu besityebi busitsho siphuthelwe." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Apha phantsi kwelanga ndibone ububi obungcungcuthekisayo: umntu angaziqwebela ubutyebi, busuke benzakalise kwayena mnikazi wabo!" 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Omnye ke ufumba ubutyebi, alahlekelwe bubo ngenxa yentlekele, ze ke unyana ozelwe nguye angabi nanto ezandleni." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Mhla wavela umntu uzalwa ngunina ezé; mhla andulukayo uhamba kwangolo hlobo eze ngalo. Kuko konke ukubulaleka kwakhe umntu apha emhlabeni umka engaphathanga nto ngesandla sakhe. 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ewe ngenene, ibuhlungu le meko! Umntu umka eyiloo nto ebefike eyiyo. Kumncede ntoni ke ukusebenzela ilize?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Kananjalo imihla yobomi bakhe yonke uyidlela ebumnyameni, egutyungelwa ziinkathazo neenzingo nomsindo." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ke kaloku ndifumanise ukuba eyona nto ilungileyo nefanelekileyo ukuba umntu ayenze kukutya asele, akuxhamle enelisekile ukubulaleka kwakhe ngezi ntsukwana zimbalwa aziphiwe nguThixo apha phantsi kwelanga. Kaloku eso sisabelo sakhe." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ewe, umntu xa ephiwe ubutyebi nezinye izinto eziphathekayo, aze futhi uThixo amnike inyhweba yokuzixhamla ezo zinto, kufuneka akuxhamle enombulelo ukubulaleka kwakhe – kaloku eso sisipho esivela kuThixo." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Ngenxa yolo lonwabo aluphiwe nguThixo, umntu utsho angabi sazikhathaza ngobungakanani bobomi bakhe." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Nabu obunye ububi endibubonileyo apha phantsi kwelanga, yaye buthe zinzi phezu kwabantu:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 nditsho into yokuba umntu anikwe ubutyebi nguThixo, aze abe ngumfo omi kakuhle nohlonelwayo, ade angasweli nto ayinqwenelayo, kambe ke uThixo angamniki ithuba lokuzixhamla, ndaweni yaloo nto kuvele owasemzini azixhamle ezo zinto. Ewe, ngamampunge le nto; iyimeko ebuhlungu." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Umntu noba anganekhulu labantwana, aphile imihla emininzi, phofu angabuxhamli ubumnandi bobomi, angènzelwa umngcwabo onguwo, mna ndithi akunani kwaumntwana ovele engasekho kunaye." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Kaloku ukuzalwa akumphathelanga nto loo mntwana, usuke aduke ebumnyameni, negama lakhe ligutyungelwe bubumnyama." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Nakuba lo mntwana engazange walibona ilanga, futhi engazange wazi nto, kodwa ke yena ukufumene ukuphumla kunaloo mntu." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Ewe, umdlula kude lee umntu ongaxhamlanga luyolo ebomini, noba angade aphile iwaka eliphindwe kabini leminyaka. Andithi na kaloku bonke baya ndaweni-nye?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Kuyo yonke imizabalazo yakhe umntu usebenzela emlonyeni, kodwa akaze anele." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Umntu osisilumko usigqitha ngani isityhakala? Kulinceda ntoni ihlwempu ukuyazi indlela yokuziphatha phakathi kwabantu? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Masanele zezo zinto sinazo endaweni yokuzikhathaza ngokunqwenela le naleya. Hayi bo, ngamampunge lawo, nqwa nokusukelana nomoya!" 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Yonke into ekhoyo sekukudala ithiywe igama layo, nento ayiyo umntu selisaziwa kakade; umntu akanako ukumelana nalowo womeleleyo kunaye." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Okukhona intetho iba nde kokukhona iye ilambatha intsingiselo yayo, ize ke incede bani loo nto?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Umntu angayazi njani eyona nto imfaneleyo umntu kobu bomi bufutshane buphuthe kangaka? Ewe, obu bomi buthi phinzi njengesithunzi. Ngubani onokumxelela into eya kwenzeka apha phantsi kwelanga akuba engasekho yena?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Igama elihle lilungile ngaphezu kwamafutha aqholiweyo. Umhla wokufa ulungile kunomhla wokuzalwa. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kungcono uye emzini onesililo kunokuya emzini onetheko, kuba kaloku ukufa sisiphelo sabantu bonke. Ngoko ke abantu ngebeyithathela ingqalelo le nto." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kubhetele kwaiinzingo kunokuhleka, kuba ubuso obuthe rhubaxa buyayomeleza intliziyo." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Intliziyo yesilumko isendlwini yesijwili, ke intliziyo yesiyatha isendlwini yeziyolo." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kulungile ukuva ukukhalinyelwa sisilumko kunokuphulaphula ukombelelwa sisityhakala. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ukuhleka kwesityhakala kufana nqwa nokunqanqaza komlilo wameva phantsi kwembiza. Nale ke into ngamampunge! 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Isilumko esiphantsi kwezoyikiso silahlekelwa ziingqondo; umntu onyotywayo wonakala ingqiqo. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Isiphelo somcimbi sibhetele kunesiqalo sawo. Umonde ungcono kunekratshi. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Musa ukukhawuleza ucaphuke ngaphakathi kwakho; kaloku umsindo yinto yezityhakala. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Musa ukuthi: “Bekungani ukuba imihla yamandulo ibe ngcono kunale yangoku?” Kaloku ayibubo ubulumko ukubuza umbuzo onjalo. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ubulumko nqwa nelifa ngokulunga; bululutho kubo bonke abaphilayo; 
Ecclesiastes7:12 umntu bumenza akhuseleke njengokuba nemali isenjenjalo. Ewe, naku ukubalasela kolwazi: ubulumko buyabukhusela ubomi balowo unabo." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Khawucamngce ngemisebenzi kaThixo: Ngubani ongayolulayo into ayenze goso? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Ngamathuba obumnandi yonwaba; ngemihla yobubi qonda kakuhle ukuba kwale njengaleya yenziwe nguThixo. Ngoko ke akukho mntu uyaziyo into eza kwenzeka kamva. 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Kobu bomi bam bungamampunge ndizibonile zonke ezi zinto: Ndibone umntu olungileyo efela ebulungiseni bakhe, ngokunjalo ndabona nomntu okhohlakeleyo ephila ubomi obude benkohlakalo." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ngani ukuba uzenzakalise ngokusuka uzenze uchwenene welungisa, okanye ingcaphephe yesilumko?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ngani ukuba ufe phambi kwexesha lakho ngokusuka ubalasele ngenkohlakalo, okanye ugqwese ngobutyhakala?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Bambelela kwezi zinto zombini, kungabikho oyiyekelelayo. Umntu omoyikayo uThixo uya kuwaphepha omabini la macala." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ubulumko bumenza onabo abe namandla ngaphezu kwabalawuli besixeko abalishumi. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Emhlabeni akukho mntu ulilungisa owenza okuhle kuphela angoni. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Musa ukuphulaphula yonke into ethethwa ngabantu, hleze ude uve isicaka sakho sikunyemba." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Kaloku nawe ngokwakho uyazi ukuba kukaninzi ubanyelisa abanye abantu. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ngobulumko bam ndayivavanya yonke le nto, ndaza ndathi: “Ndizimisele ukuba sisilumko,” kodwa ke andafikelela kubo." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Oko kukude kakhulu – ndithi oko kunzulu gqitha – ngubani ongaze akubhaqe? 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ndazinikezela ke ukuba ndiphande ndifune ulwazi, ukuze ndibuzuze ubulumko bokubhaqa isizekabani sezinto, ndibuqonde nobutyhakala benkohlakalo nokuphutha kobudenge." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ndifumanise ukuba eyona nto ikrakra nangaphezu kokufa ngumfazi oliqili, ontliziyo inezabatha, ongalo zifana namakhamandela. Ke yona indoda ekholisa uThixo iyasinda kuye, kodwa ke yona engumoni uyayibambisa." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 “Khangel' apha,” itsho iNgqondi, “nantsi into endiyibhaqileyo: Ndakudibanisa enye nenye ukuze ndicacelwe zizinto –" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 lo gama umoya wam wawusaphengulula ndingekafumani nto – ndibhaqe indoda yanye kwiwaka ethe ngqo, kodwa yena umfazi onjalo andimfumananga phakathi kwabo bonke." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Kuphela kwendikufumeneyo kukuba uThixo uluntu waludala luthe ngqo, kodwa ke abantu basuke bayila ubuqili phezu kobuqili.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Yaz'ba ngubani eso silumko singaziqondayo ezi zinto? Ngubani ongayichazayo intsingiselo yezi zinto? Kaloku ubulumko buyabuswabulula ubuso bomntu, atsho ayeke ukumatsheka." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Mna ndithi mthobele ukumkani; kaloku wènze isifungo phambi koThixo. 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Musa ukungxama ukumka kukumkani. Futhi ke sukumela ububi, kuba kaloku yena angenza nantoni na athanda ukuyenza." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Ekubeni ilizwi lokumkani litshatshele akukho bani unokuthi kuye: “Yintoni le uyenzayo?” 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Lowo ugcina umthetho akayi kuhlelwa bububi; onobulumko uyakwazi amakakwenze ngexesha elifanelekileyo. 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Kaloku yonke into inexesha layo nendlela emayenziwe ngayo; kambe buninzi ububi obunokumhlela umntu – 
Ecclesiastes8:7 akazi ukuba kuya kwenzeka ntoni. Kakade ngubani onokuxela okuya kubakho? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Umntu akanalo igunya phezu komoya ukuba awuthintele; akukho bani uyilawulayo imini yokufa kwakhe. Njengokuba kungekho ukuphuncula emfazweni, kananjalo inkohlakalo ayibayeki abo bayenzayo." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Yonke le nto ndiyibone xa bendiphicotha izinto ezenziwa apha phantsi kwelanga – nditsho into yokuba umntu abe negunya phezu komnye, kube buhlungu kuye." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ewe, ndibabonile abantu abakhohlakeleyo bengcwatywa, bathi shwaka, kanti ke nâbo bangena bephuma endlwini kaThixo besenza ubulungisa, kwanabo bayalityalwa esixekweni. Ewe, kwanaloo nto ngamampunge!" 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Xa isohlwayo setyala singàphunyezwa msinya abantu baqhubela phambili ukwenza ububi. 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nakuba isikhohlakali singona nakalikhulu, siphile ixesha elide, noko ndiyazi ukuba izinto ziya kuhamba kakuhle kwabo bamoyikayo uThixo, abo bamhlonelayo." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Phofu ke, ngenxa yokuba izikhohlakali zingamoyiki uThixo, izinto aziyi kuzilungela, nemihla yazo ingòlulwa oku kwesithunzi." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Ewe, ikho into engamampunge eyenzekayo kweli hlabathi: maxa wambi amalungisa azuza isohlwayo sezikhohlakali, zize zona izikhohlakali zifumane indwe yamalungisa! Ndithi kwanaloo nto ngamampunge!" 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ngoko ke mna ndithi masonwabe, kuba ayikho enye into emfaneleyo umntu apha phantsi kwelanga ngaphandle kokuba atye asele azonwabele. Loo nto ke únokuyenza phakathi kwemizabalazo yakhe kobu bomi abuphiwe nguThixo kulo mhlaba." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Xa ndandizikisa ukucinga, ndifuna ukubazi ubulumko, ndiqwalasela ukubulaleka komntu kulo mhlaba – nditsho le nto yokuba amehlo akhe angabonani nokulala imini nobusuku –" 
Ecclesiastes8:17 ndide ndakubona konke akwenzayo uThixo. Akukho bani onako ukukuqonda okwenzekayo apha phantsi kwelanga; noba selesenza yonke imigudu yokuphengulula akangeze akufumane. Nezilumko noba zingade zithi ziyaqonda, azazi nto tu!" 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ke kaloku ndithe ndisakuwuphonononga lo mbandela ndafumanisa ukuba izenzo zamalungisa kunye nezezilumko zisesandleni sikaThixo, phofu kungekho namntu waziyo nokuba ulindelwe luthando okanye ukuthiywa na." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Abantu bonke isiphelo sabo sinye: amalungisa nezikhohlakali, abalungileyo [nabagwenxa], abahlambulukileyo nabanomlaza, abawenzayo amadini nâbo bangawenziyo. Umntu olungileyo ufaniswa nomoni, nalowo wenza isifungo afaniswe nowoyikayo ukwenza isifungo." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ezintweni zonke ezenzeka apha phantsi kwelanga eyona imbi yile yokuba kubo bonke isiphelo sabo sinye. Iintliziyo zoonyana babantu zizele bububi; bubugeza ezintliziyweni zabo lo gama besadla ubomi – ze kuthi kamva baye kwelabafileyo. 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Lowo usaphilayo usenethemba; kaloku nenja esaphilayo ibhetele kunengonyama efileyo. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Kaloku bona abaphilayo bayazi ukuba baseza kufa, kambe ke bona abafileyo abazi nto. Abasajonganga mvuzo, futhi ke sebelityelwe." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Uthando ndawonye nentiyo yabo, kunye neminqweno, kukonke nje kwafa kunye nabo. Abasoze babuye babe nenxaxheba kwizinto ezenzekayo apha phantsi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Hayi ke, yitya isonka sakho wonwabile, usele iwayini yakho uchwayitile entliziyweni, kuba ngoku lithuba elikholekileyo kuThixo lokuba wenze oko." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Maxa onke vatha ezimhlophe, nezithambiso zentloko ungaziyeki." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Hlala ngokonwaba nomfazi wakho omthandayo ngemihla yobomi bakho obungamampunge obunikwe nguThixo kulo mhlaba – nditsho zonke ezo ntsuku zingamampunge – kuba eso kuphela kwesabelo oya kusizuza ngokubulaleka kwakho apha phantsi kwelanga. 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Nawuphi na umsebenzi owubambileyo ngezandla zakho wenze ngamandla akho onke; kuba kaloku akwenziwa nto, akucingwa, kungekho lwazi nabulumko engcwabeni, apho wena uya khona." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Nantsi enye into endiyibonileyo apha phantsi kwelanga: ezona mbaleki zisenokungaphumeleli elugqatsweni, futhi namagorha avunyiweyo asenokoyiswa edabini. Ewe, izilumko zisenako ukuswela ukutya, kanti ke neengqondi zisenokuphulukana nobutyebi, kwanjengokuba neengcaphephe zisenokuphosana nezikhundla eziphezulu. Kaloku wonke umntu uba namaxesha namathuba akhe." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ke yena umntu akazi ukuba ithuba lakhe linini na. Njengentlanzi ebanjiswe ngomnatha ongenalusini, okanye intaka ebhajiswe ngumgibe, nathi bantu sisuka sixinwe yimin' embi esigubungela singayilindelanga." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Apha phantsi kwelanga ndibone omnye umzekelo wobulumko ondenze umdla. 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kwakukho idolophu ebantu bambalwa. Yahlaselwa yingangamsha yokumkani. Wayingqinga, wayakhela izikanisi ezayame iindonga eziyikhuselayo." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Kwalapho kuloo dolophu kwakukho umfo olihlwempu, phofu esisilumko, owathi ngobulumko bakhe wayihlangula loo dolophu. Kambe ke akukho mntu wamkhumbulayo loo mfo ulihlwempu." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ndaza ndathi ke mna: “Ubulumko bubhetele kunamandla.” Kambe ke ubulumko behlwempu budeliwe, namazwi alo akakhathalelwe." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Kungcono ukuphulaphula amazwi esilumko esithetha sizolile kunokuzikhathaza ngokukhwaza komlawuli wezityhakala. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Ubulumko bubaluleke ngaphezu kwezixhobo zemfazwe, kambe ke nomoni omnye nje angonakalisa lukhulu kwizinto ebezilungile." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Iimpukane ezifileyo zingasonakalisa isiqholo sitsho sibile sinuke, ngokunjalo nentwana nje yobutyhakala ingabutshabhisa ubulumko ndawonye nesidima." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Intliziyo yesilumko isitsho sibe namandla; kanti ke eyesityhakala isitsho sibe buthathaka. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Noba isityhakala sesihamba ngendlela, sibonakala kubo bonke ukuba simuncu. Umntu onjalo uzicacisa nakubani na ukuba usisiyatha." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Xa ekhathazekile umlawuli wakho musa ukurhoxa esikhundleni sakho – kaloku kukuzola into ewulungisayo umonakalo. 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Apha phantsi kwelanga kukho ububi endibubonileyo, impazamo eyenziwa ngophetheyo." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Izikhundla ezininzi eziphezulu zinikwa izityhakala, zize ke zona izityebi zinikwe ezisezantsi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ndiwabonile amakhoboka ekhwele amahashe, kodwa zona izikhulu zibhadaza ngeenyawo ngathi ngamakhoboka." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Umntu owomba umngxuma usenokweyela kuwo; otyhoboza eludongeni usenokulunywa yinyoka. 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Umntu owomba amatye usenokwenzakaliswa ngawo, nocanda iinkuni usenokuba sengozini." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Xa izembe libuthuntu, lingalolwanga, kufuneka ubethe ngamandla ngalo. Kodwa ke bubuchule into enika impumelelo." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Inyoka kufuneka ilalaniswe ngaphambi kokuba imlume umntu, kuba xa seyimlumile akusancedi lutho kumlalanisi wayo." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Anendili amazwi aphuma emlonyeni wesilumko, ukanti ke sona isityhakala sizitshabalalisa ngemilebe yaso." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Siqala ngokulavuza, size sigqibele sesiwanqa impambano." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Ewe, isityhakala sithetha singayeki. Akukho mntu uyaziyo into eza kwehla, kungekho namntu unokuyixela into eya kwenzeka kamva." 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Umntu ongenangqondo uzidinisa ngomsebenzi, aze ke akhohlwe nayindlela egodukayo isiya esixekweni." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Mawoo kwilizwe elikumkani ebesakuba likhoboka, elimatshawe enza amatheko kusekusasa." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Kambe ke linoyolo ilizwe elikumkani uzalwa zizikhulu, elimatshawe atya ngexesha elililo, efuna amandla, ingekuko ukunxila." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ngobuvila iyawa imiqadi; kozandla ziqhokriweyo indlu iyanetha. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Isidlo simenza onwabe umntu, ke yona iwayini iyabudlamkisa ubomi; kambe ke kuyo yonke into yimali ethethayo." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Ungaze umnyembe ukumkani, nditsho nangeengcinga; nesityebi sukusinyelisa, noba sewusesililini sakho, hleze kubekho ntakazana iphuma namazwi akho, into enamaphiko iyixele loo ntetho." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Kusebenzise oko unako; ngokuhamba kwexesha uya kufumana inzuzo. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Indyebo yakho yigcinise kwiindawo ezisixhenxe – ewe, noba zide zasibhozo – kuba kaloku akuyazi intlekele enokulihlela ihlabathi." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Amafu xa anemvula ayithulula emhlabeni; noba umthi uwela ngasezantsi okanye ngasentla, kodwa uhlala uthi ncwaba kuloo ndawo uwe kuyo." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ukuba ujonge imo ethile yezulu soze ulime; kanti ke ukuba uqwalasela amafu soze uvune. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Njengoko ungayazi indlela yomoya, ungamazi nokuba wenziwa njani na umntu esizalweni sonina, kananjalo soze ukuqonde nokusebenza kukaThixo onguMdali weento zonke." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Imbewu yihlwayele kusasa, nangokuhlwa ungasiphumzi isandla sakho. Kaloku akuyazi eya kuphumelela: isenokuba yile okanye leya, ukanti zisenokuphumelela zombini." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Kuyanambitheka ukukhanya; kulungile emehlweni ukulibona ilanga. 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Yixhamle ngokobungakanani bayo iminyaka yokudla kwakho ubomi, ukhumbule ukuba imihla yobumnyama xa ungasekhoyo iya kuba mininzi. Ewe, yonke into ezayo ingamampunge." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Wena mntu osemtsha, yonwaba ngethuba lobutsha bakho, intliziyo yakho ichwayite lo gama uselula. Yenze loo nto isentliziyweni yakho, nditsho leyo ibonwa ngamehlo akho, kambe ke ukhumbule ukuba uza kuziphendulela enkundleni kaThixo ngayo yonke into oyenzileyo." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Ngoko ke ligxothe ixhala entliziyweni yakho, ukuphephe okunokwenzakalisa umzimba wakho. Kaloku ubutsha namandla awo ngamampunge." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Mkhumbule uMdali wakho ngemihla yobutsha bakho, ngoku ingekafiki imihla yeenkathazo, ingekasondeli neminyaka apho uya kuthi: “Akukho nto imnandi ekudleni ubomi.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Ngelo thuba ke ukukhanya kwelanga, inyanga, neenkwenkwezi, kosuka kufiphale kuwe, nezulu lihlale lisibekele ngathi kungemva kwemvula." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Iingalo zakho ebezikukhusela ziya kuba nomkhinkqi; ngokunjalo nale milenze yakho yomeleleyo okwangoku iya kuba nengevane. Uya kuba ungasenako ukuhlafuna, kuba amazinyo embalwa, namehlo selemfiliba, ungasaboni kakuhle." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Iindlebe ziya kuba sezixinene, ungabi sayiva nengxolo esesitalatweni, nditsho nesandi selitye lokusila. Uya kuvuka kusasa zisantyiloza iintaka, noxa kungasekho nayiphi na ingoma onokuyiva." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Ngelo xesha uya kuzoyika iindawo eziphakamileyo, ngokunjalo uziphephe iingozi ezitalatweni. Iinwele zakho zosuka zibe mhlophe oku kom-amangile otyatyambileyo, nasekuhambeni ungabi nako nokuzirhuqa oku, ke yona iminqweno ingabi nako ukuvuseleleka. Kaloku umntu uhlalelwe kukuhamba aye ekhayeni lakhe laphakade, abazili behle benyuka ezitalatweni." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Ewe kaloku, umxokelelwana wesiliva uya kushunquka, nesibane segolide siwe saphuke; ukanti ke nentambo phaya equleni iya kuqhawuka, nomphanda utsho ukroboke." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Ke lona uthuli lwethu luya kubuyela emhlabeni, apho lwaluvele khona kakade, umoya ubuyele kuThixo njengoko wawuvela kuye." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Ewe, itsho iNgqondi ukuthi: “Ngamampunge akwampunge! Yonke into ngamampunge!”" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ke yona iNgqondi le ayibugcinanga nje ubulumko bayo, koko yathi rhoqo ukubaphakela abantu kubo. Yazikisa ukucinga, yenza uphando, yayila izafobe ezininzi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 INgqondi yazimisela ukufumana awona mazwi achanekileyo, inyaniso iyidandalazise njengoko injalo." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Amazwi ezilumko abukhali oku kwentonga enodalo, kanti ke yona ingqokelela yezafobe itshona lè oku kwesikhonkwane. Zizonke nje zivela kuThixo onguyena Malusi wethu sonke." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Ngaphezu koko, lutsha, nasi isilumkiso: Ukubhala iincwadi ezininzi yinto engaphele ndawo, kanti ke nokusoloko ufunda kuyawuqoba umzimba." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Ngoko ke ngoku nasi isishwankathelo salo mbandela: Mhlonele uThixo, uyithobele imimiselo yakhe, kuba oko luxanduva lomntu ngamnye." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Kaloku uThixo usaza kusimisa enkundleni ngenxa yazo zonke izinto esizenzayo, ngokunjalo nezo zifihlakeleyo, nokuba zilungile, nokuba zimbi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Nalu uncuthu lwengoma lukaSolomon. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Akwaba ubungakhe undiphuze, undincamise ngaloo mlomo! Aluyole ngako uthando lwakho; luhlasimlisa ngaphezu kwayo newayini!" 
SongOfSongs1:3 Isiqholo sakho sithi ndirhogole, negama lakho lifuz' eso siqholo. Yiyo le nto iintombi zithe phithi nguwe!" 
SongOfSongs1:4 Khawulezisa, ndithathe simke! Masiye entangeni yakho, kumkani! Siya kugcoba sivuye ngawe! Uthando lwakho luyancomeka ngaphezu kwewayini; iintombi zifanele ukuthi phithi nguwe." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ewe, zintombi zaseJerusalem, ndingunomdakazana, kodwa ndinomkhitha oku kweentente zaseKedare nemikhusane kaSolomon." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ndingade ndibe ngunomdakazana kodwa noko ke sukundidela; ndifiphele nje kungenxa yelanga. Oonyana bakama basuka bandiqumbela, baza bandenza umgcini wesidiliya, ndaza mna siqu ndaziyekelela." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Khawutsho ke, sithandwa sam, ngaba walusela phi kakade? Ziphumla phi iigusha zakho emini? Ngani ukuba ndibe ngogqubutheleyo ndikufune phakathi kwemihlambi yezihlobo zakho?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Awazi na kakade, nzwakazindini egqwesileyo? Hayi ke, landela umzila weegusha, uye kwalusa amatakane eebhokhwe kufutshane neentente zabelusi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Hayi ke wena, sithandwa sam, usuke wafana nethokazi lehashe elitsala inqwelo yokumkani waseJiputa." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Azizihle ngako ezo zidlele ziphahlwe ngaloo macicikazi, naloo ntamo yakho ivathiswe ngamaso." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Ndokwenzela amacici egolide aqhoqhonywe ngesiliva. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Ukumkani uthe esangqengqile ngasetafileni yakhe, isiqholo sam satsho ngevumba elimyoli." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Isithandwa sam ngathi yingxowana yesiqholo semore esithe nca phakathi kwamabele am. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Isithandwa sam ngathi sisipha seentyatyambo zehena, ezo zezidiliya zase-Engedi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Waza wamhle, sithandwa sam! Ewe, uyinzwakazi ke khona! Amehlo — hotyazana lakwabani!" 
SongOfSongs1:16 Ewe, uyinzwana ke khona, sithandwa! Hayi, umtsalane wakho! Umandlalo wethu uluhlaza yaka!" 
SongOfSongs1:17 Indlu yethu itsho ngemiqadi yemisedare, ngaphakathi yambathiswe ngemipayini." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ndiyintyatyambo yaseSharon, inyibiba yasentilini." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Njengenyibiba phakathi kwameva sinjalo isithandwa sam phakathi kweentombi. 
SongOfSongs2:3 Njengomthi weeapile ehlathini sinjalo isithandwa sam phakathi kwabafana. Akwaba bendingahlala emthunzini wawo; azimnandi ngako iziqhamo zawo! 
SongOfSongs2:4 Wandingenisa endlwini yombhiyozo, wandiphakamisela intshinga yothando." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Ndomeleze ngesixa seerasentyisi, kananjalo undihlaziye ngeeapile. Kaloku ndiyafa luthando." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Isandla sakhe sasekhohlo sixhasa intloko yam, esokunene sona siyandiwola." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Zintombi zaseJerusalem, ndiyanifungisa ngamabhadikazi namanxalakazi asendle: Sanukuluxhokonxa ningaluphembeleli uthando; luyekeni lude luzivukele ngokwalo." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Khanive, sisithandwa sam eso! Awu, naso ke sisiza: siza siqakatha ezintabeni; siyatsiba-tsiba ezindulini phaya." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Isithandwa sam ngathi linxala, sona sinjengetakane lebhadi. Naso simi emva kodonga lwakowethu, silolonga efestileni, sinyondla, sikroba emkhusaneni." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Isithandwa sam sibhekisa kum, sisithi: “Vuka kaloku, sithandwa sam. Awu, uyinzwakazi ke khona! Yiza kaloku, masihambe." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Kaloku bona ubusika budlule, kananjalo neemvula zigqithile." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Iintyatyambo ziqhakazile elizweni; ligalelekile ixesha lokuntyiloza. Nâlo ihobe lidumzela; ewe, liyavakala kweli lakowethu." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Ngoku namakhiwane okuqala ayavuthwa; ukudubula kwesidiliya kutsho ngesiqholo. Phakama uze, sithandwa. Ewe, nzwakazi yam, yiza kaloku, masihambe!”" 
SongOfSongs2:14 Uyintw' engathi lihotyazana lithe nca ezimfanteni zamawa; nditsho elizimela ezintabeni. Vela kaloku ndikubone, ukuze ndive nelo lizwi; nditsho elo liyole kunene. Ubuso bakho buthi ndijonge!" 
SongOfSongs2:15 Khawusibambele ezo mpungutye; ewe, iimpungutyana ezincinci, kuba ziyazonakalisa izidiliya, kanti izidiliya zethu zityatyambile." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Isithandwa sam sesam, kanti nam ngokwam ndingowaso. Sona salusa phakathi kweenyibiba." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Ide ke isangane imini, ke wona amathunzi anabe, jika ubuye, sithandwa sam. Ewe, khawube njengenxala; khawuxel' ithole lebhadi kuloo mixawuka yeentaba." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ubusuku bonke emandlalweni wam ndahlala ndimlindele olangazelelwa yintliziyo yam; ndaba ngamjonga kodwa andamfumana. 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ndosuka ndivuke ndihamba-hambe esixekweni, ndijikeleze ezitalatweni nasemabaleni; ndomzingela lowo ulangazelelwa yintliziyo yam. Ewe, ndaba ngathalaza andamfumana." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Ke bona abalindi bandibhaqa; bona babehamba-hamba bejikeleza isixeko: “Ngaba khange nisibone isithandwa sam?” 
SongOfSongs3:4 Ukubanje ndahlukane nabo suka ndagaxeleka kuye ndamfumana. Hayi ke, ndambamba andamyeka, ndaza ndaya naye endlwini kamama, kwigumbi lalowo ndakhawulwa nguye." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Zintombi zaseJerusalem, ndinifungisa amanxala namabhadi asemathambekeni: Sanukuluxhokonxa ningaluphembeleli uthando; luyekeni lude luzivukele ngokwalo." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ngubani na lo uthi gqi entlango, lo ngathi ngumqulu womsi? Nditsho lo uqholwe ngesiqhumiso nentlaka esiphuma kwiziqholo zabarhwebi." 
SongOfSongs3:7 Tyhini, yinqwelo kaSolomon! Ukhatshwa ngamashumi amathandathu amajoni, ezona ngcungela zamagorha akwaSirayeli." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Onke agaxel' amakrele; onke ngoompondo zihlanjiwe emfazweni. Ngalinye lixakath' ikrele; selilungel' izigigaba zobusuku. 
SongOfSongs3:9 Ukumkani uSolomon uzenzele inqwelo, eyenza ngamaplanga omthi waseLebhanon." 
SongOfSongs3:10 Iintsika zayo zityatyekwe ngesiliva, amazantsi ayo atyatyekwa ngegolide. Isihlalo sona sênziwa ngelaphu elimsobo; umphakathi ke wona uthungwe ngobunono zezo ntombi zaseJerusalem." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Phumani, zintombi zaseZiyon; khanikhangele nimbone ukumkani uSolomon. Nanko ethwele isithsaba sobukhosi, eso wasithweswa ngunina mhla zawelan' iindonga, mhla intliziyo yakhe yaphuphuma luvuyo!" 
SongOfSongs4:1 Awu ke wena, sithandwa sam, awusemhle ngako — uyinzwakazi enomkhitha! Loo mehlo angaphaya kwesigqubuthelo nqwa namahotyazana; iinwele ngathi ngumhlambi weebhokhwe xa zisihla kwiintaba zaseGiliyadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Loo mazinyo amhlophe qhwa, ngathi ziigusha ezisand' ukuchetywa, kanye xa zigqityw' ukuhlanjwa. Onke asenamaqabane awo, akukho lingumth' uzimele." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Imilebe ngathi ngumty' obomvu; hay' ukuthandeka kwaloo mlomo! Izidlele ngathi ngamaqhekez' erharnati, ngaphaya kweso sigqubuthelo." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Ntamo ngathi yinqaba kaDavide, yona yakhiwe ngezintlu zamatye; ithiwe gaxa ezo ntsimbi, ngathi liwaka lamakhaka amagorha." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Loo mabele ngathi ngamatakane amabini; nditsho amawele ebhadi, ethuku-thukuza phakathi kweenyibiba." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Ide ke isangane imini, ke wona amathunzi anabe, ndohamba-hamba kwiintaba zesiqholo semore, ndijikeleze kwiinduli zentlaka yesiqhumiso." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Awumhle ngako, sithandwa sam! Umhle ngenene, awunasiphako!" 
SongOfSongs4:8 Masihle eLebhanon, mtshakazi wam; ewe, masihle eLebhanon. Masihle kwincopho yeAmana, nditsho kumalenga-lenga eSenire, incopho yentaba iHermon, apho zinezikhundla zazo iingonyama, apho zihlala khona izingwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Ewe, uyithimbile intliziyo yam; nditsho wena, mtshakazi wam, dad' ethu. Ngenene intliziyo yam uyibile ngokundithi krwaqu kanye ngaloo mehlo akho, nangomxokelelwane nje omnye entanyeni yakho." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Awu, ndithe swii nguwe, mtshakazi wam, dad' ethu! Uthando lwakho lundanelisa ngaphezu kwewayini; nevumba lamafutha akho lingaphezulu kwazo zonke iziqholo." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Imilebe yakho, mtshakazi wam, ithontsiza incindi; phantsi kolwimi lwakho lubisi nobusi. Ivumba lezambatho zakho ngathi livumba laseLebhanon." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Mtshakazi wam, dad' ethu, wena ungumyezo ofihlakeleyo, ngathi ungumjelo obiyelweyo, umthombo ovingcelweyo." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Izityalo zakho ngathi ngumyezo weerharnati; umyezo oziqhamo zizezodidi: ihena nenadusi ngokwayo. 
SongOfSongs4:14 Ewe, ikho inadusi nesafroni, okuziikalamo noozisinamoni, iintlobo-ntlobo zemithi yentlaka yesiqhumiso. Asisathethi ke ngemore nekhala nezona-zona ndidi zeziqholo." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Ngumyezo onkcenkceshwa yimithombo; nditsho imithombo empompozayo, imithombo enkcenkceza kwiintaba zeLebhanon." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Vumbuluka, moya wasentla; vuthuza, moya wasezantsi! Phepheza emyezweni wam, ivumba lawo litsho lithi saa! Masingene emyezweni waso isithandwa sam, singcamle ezona ziqhamo." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ndingenile emyezweni wam, mtshakazi wam, dad' ethu. Ndiyifumene imore nezinye iziqholo, ndiyityile incindi nobusi, ndilusele ubisi newayini. Yityani nisele, nina zihlobo! Ewe, selani nide nincitheke, nina bathandanayo." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Bendilele, kodwa ingqondo yam iphaphile. Nâso isithandwa sam sinkqonkqoza sisithi: “Ndingenise kaloku, sithandwa sam, dad' ethu, hobe lam, cikizwa wam. Intloko yam imanzi ngumbethe, neenwele zam ngamathontsi asebusuku.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Awu, sendikhulule nje! Uthi mandinxibe kwakhona? Sendizihlambile neenyawo. Uthi mandizingcolise kwakhona?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Isithandwa sam solula isandla kwikroba lokuvula, yatsho yabetha intliziyo yam ngenxa yaso." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ndavuka ndisiya kuvulela isithandwa sam, izandla zam zivuza isiqholo semore, neminwe imanzi kwasiso. Ndasichukumisa ndinjalo isitshixo," 
SongOfSongs5:6 ndasivulela isithandwa sam. Kodwa phi kwaphi, sasimkile nje! Benditsho ndasilangazelela sakuthetha, ndaba ngathalaza andasibona, ndaba ngamemeza, tu impendulo!" 
SongOfSongs5:7 Ndade ndabhaqwa ngabalindi kwimijikelo yabo esixekweni. Hayi ke, bandibetha bandenzakalisa. Nâbo besimka nengubo yam abo bagada iindonga zesixeko." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Zintombi zaseJerusalem, ndiyanifungisa: Apho nisibone khona isithandwa sam ze nisixelele ukuba ndiyafa luthando!" 
SongOfSongs5:9 Nzwakazi yeenzwakazi, sibhetele ngani esakho isithandwa? Ngaba siyabedlula na abanye, le nto ude usifungise ngolu hlobo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Isithandwa sam yinzwana ekomelela; songama nakwishumi lamawaka. 
SongOfSongs5:11 Intloko yaso yeyona golide, iinwele sisihlwitha esimfaneleko, zimnyama ngathi lihlungulu." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Yintw' emehlo ngathi lihobe xa lisemithonjeni yamanzi. Ngathi ahlanjwe ngobisi, ahonjiswa okwamatye exabiso." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Izidlele ngathi ngumhlatyana wezityalo ovelisa iziqholo ezivumba limyoli. Imilebe ngathi yinyibiba, yona ivuza isiqholo semore." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Yintw' engalo ngathi ziintonga zegolide eziqhoqhonywe ngamatye exabiso. Umzimba ugude njengebamba lendlovu, uqhoqhonywe ngamatye esafire." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Yintw' emilenze ngathi ziintsika zemabhule ezimiliselwe kwizikhondo zeyona golide. Yingwanyalala ngathi ziintaba zeLebhanon naloo misedare ingayiwayo. 
SongOfSongs5:16 Hay' ukuyola komlomo wakhe; ngenene isithandwa sam sinomtsalane. Sinjalo ke esam isithandwa, zintombi zaseJerusalem!" 
SongOfSongs6:1 Nzwakazindini etshatsheleyo, siye ngaphi isithandwa sakho? Ngaba sibhekise ngaphi, khon' ukuze nathi sikufunise?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Simke saya emyezweni waso, apho kutyalwe iziqholo khona. Sizalusele khona emyezweni, kananjalo siqokelela iinyibiba." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Isithandwa sam sesam, nam ndingowaso; salusela phakathi kweenyibiba." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Awu, waza wamhle, sithandwa sam! Uyinzwakazi okwesixeko iTiza; umhle nqwa neJerusalem; unesihomo ngathi ngumkhosi onendwe." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Hayi, musa ukundijonga; amehlo akho ayandongamela. Iinwele ngathi ngumhlambi weebhokhwe zisihla kuloo mixawuka yaseGiliyadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amazinyo amhlophe qhwa, ngathi ziigusha zivela kuhlanjwa. Onke asenamaqabane awo; akukho lingumth' uzimele." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Izidlele ngaphaya kwesigqubuthelo ngathi ngamacala erharnati. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Amakhosikazi ngamashumi amathandathu, amaqadi ngamashumi asibhozo, ngokunjalo nentaphane yeentombi," 
SongOfSongs6:9 ke mna andiziva ngehobe lam, yena cikizwa wam onguye qwaba! Nguyedwazana kanina, yena ngumathandwa walowo umzeleyo. Zonk' iintombi ziyamdumisa zakumbona; unconywa ngamakhosikazi namaqadi." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ngubani lo uthi gqi ngathi ngumso, omkhitha ngathi yinyanga, oqaqambe ngathi lilanga, ondili ngathi ziinkwenkwezi zingumngcelele?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ndihle nday' emyezweni wemithi yeenati, ndaya kubuka izityalo entilini. Ndiye kukhangela ukuba imidiliya iyadubula na, nokuba ngaba imirharnati iyatyayamba na." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ndithe ndingaqondi ndazibhaqa sengathi ndilitshawe lamatshawe, ndiphethe iinqwelo zokulwa zabantu bakowethu." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Buya, buya, mShulemikazi! Buya, buya, ukuze sikubone! Nobona ntoni na kakade kumShulemikazi lo gama angqungqayo phakathi kwemikhosi?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Azintle ngako ezo nyawo zisezimbadadeni, nditsho wena ke, nkosazanandini. Naloo milenze ngathi ziintsimbi zokuhombisa, ngathi yenziwe zizandla zengcibi." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Inkab' engqukuva ngathi yingqayi ehlal' inewayini exutyiweyo. Isisu ngathi yingqumba yengqolowa, yona ijikelezwe ziinyibiba." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Amabele ngathi ngamawele, nditsho amatakane enxala." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Intamo injengenqaba yamabamb' endlovu. Amehlo anjengamachibi aseHeshbhon, lawo angasesangweni leso sixekokazi. Impumlo ngathi yinqaba yaseLebhanon, leyo ikhangelene neDamasko." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Intloko ithe cwa, ngathi yintaba iKarmele. Iinwele ngathi lilaphu elimfusa — buhle bazo buthimba nokumkani." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Yeka loo mfaneleko, awumhle ngako! Uthando lwakho luyahlasimlisa." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Yintw' eluthi ngathi lisundu, emabele ngathi zizihloko zeediliya." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ndosuka nditsiwule kwelo sundu, ndiqhawule kwezo ziqhamo. Amabele ngathi zizihloko zediliya; umphefumlo wakho livumba leeapile;" 
SongOfSongs7:9 umlomo ngathi yeyona wayini. Loo wayini mayiginywe sisithandwa sam, igqithe kuloo milebe naloo mazinyo." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Mna ndingowesithandwa sam; naso ke siyandilangazelela. 
SongOfSongs7:11 Yiza, sithandwa, siye emaphandleni, siye kulala ezilalini," 
SongOfSongs7:12 sivuke kwanini, siye ezidiliyeni, ukuze sihlole ukudubula kwazo, sibone ukuba azikatyatyambi na, siqonde nokudubula kwemirharnati. Khona ndokuvava ngothando." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Wofumana ivumba lemithuma nezimuncu-muncu zeziqhamo zisemnyango, nditsho ezidala nezitsha, ndizigcinele wena, sithandwa sam!" 
SongOfSongs8:1 Akwaba ubungumnakwethu, nditsho owancanca kumama. Bendiya kukuncamisa naphandle phaya, ndize ndingagxekeki noko." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Bendiya kukukhokela ndikuse endlwini kamama, yena wandifundisayo, ndikuseze iwayini edidiyelwe ngezinongo nencindi yeerharnati zam." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Isandla sakho sasekhohlo besiya kuxhasa intloko yam, esokunene sona sindiwole." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Zintombi zaseJerusalem, ndiyanifungisa: sanukuluxhokonxa ningaluphembeleli uthando; luyekeni lude luzivukele ngokwalo." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ngubani lo uvela ngasentlango, uqhogene nesithandwa sakhe? Ndakuvusa phantsi kom-apile, apho wakhawulwa khona ngunozala wakho, apho waba nenimba khona owakuzalayo." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Mayibe ndim kuphela osentliziywemi yakho oku komsesane wokutywina; ewe, mandibe ngumsesane wokutywina engalweni yakho. Lent' uthando lunamandla nqwa nokufa; ikhwele lalo aliqheliseli oku kwengcwaba. Ludangazela ngathi lidangatye, luvuthe ngathi ngumlilokazi." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Alungecinywa nangamanzi; alukhukuliseki naziimpuphuma. Xa unokulithenga ngobutyebi bonke bendlu yakho ungasuka ube sisigculelo. 
SongOfSongs8:8 Thina sinodade wethu; akakantshuli namabele. Kambe, singamenzela ntoni mhla acelwayo?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Ukuba ke ebeludonga ngesimakha abe yinqaba yesiliva. Nokuba ngaba ebelisango ngesimkhusela ngemivalo yomsedare. 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ewe, mna ndiludonga; la mabele ziinqaba. Yiloo nto emehlweni akhe ndingulowo umphathela ukwaneliseka." 
SongOfSongs8:11 USolomon unesidiliya eBhali-hamon; uqeshise ngaso kubalimi. Ngeziqhamo zaso bayarhuma: liwaka leengqekembe zesiliva. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Esam isidiliya sesam ke! Iwaka lesiliva lelakho, Solomon. Amakhulu amabini ngawabaqeshi." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Wena ohlala emiyezweni, osoloko engqongwe zizihlobo, mandilive ilizwi lakho." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Xhabasha, sithandwa sam! Yiba ngathi ulinxala, ube ngathi ulitakane lebhadi kwezo ntaba zeziqholo." 
Isaiah1:1 KwelakwaJuda ngemihla yookumkani u-Uziya, uYotam, uAhazi, noHezekiya, uIsaya unyana ka-Amozi wafumana isityhilelo esivela kuThixo, waza wadanduluka wathetha ngokubhekiselele kwisizwe sakwaJuda neJerusalem, wenjenje:" 
Isaiah1:2 Hoyi-i-i-na! Hoyina, mazulu! Bek' iindlebe, nawe hlabathi! Kaloku *uNdikhoyo uthethe wathi: “Ndakhulis' abantwana ndabondla, kodwa ke ngoku bajike bandivukela." 
Isaiah1:3 Kambe ke yona inkomo iyamaz' umniniyo, ngokunjalo nedonki iyasazi isibaya sayo. Ukanti ke yena uSirayeli uvalekile; ewe, abantu bam abazi nto tu!”" 
Isaiah1:4 Yeha ke, sizwe samanyundululu, abantu abasuntsubala bubugwenxa, nzalandini yamatshijolo, sizukulwanandini sonakalisayo! Kaloku nikreqile nina kuNdikhoyo, nisuke namdelela uYedwa kaSirayeli; ewe ngenene, nihlehlile namfulathela." 
Isaiah1:5 Anikaneli kwesingaka sona isohlwayo? Niya kurhoxa nini kolu vukelo? Mhawoo! Intloko seyide yaboko-boko; xa uwonke nomzimba uvikivekile. 
Isaiah1:6 Phantsi elunyaweni kuye entloko phezulu, hayi konke, kulityufu-tyufu nje! Kuziingongoma, kuziinduma; azicudiswanga, zingakhanyelwanga nangachiza; ewe, khange zikhathalelwe zibotshwe!" 
Isaiah1:7 Nâlo ilizwe lakowenu liyinkangala; okwakuzizixeko kutshe kwaluthuthu. Yonke ke loo nto nikho nibukele. Iintlanga ziwuphangile umhlaba wooyihlo; ewe, ziwubhukuqe zawuvuthulula." 
Isaiah1:8 Ke yona iJerusalem isele yodwa jwi! Seyifana nephempe esidiliyeni; seyingathi linqugwala emasimini, nqwa nesixeko esingqingiweyo." 
Isaiah1:9 Kambe ke uNdikhoyo uSomandla-onke, ukuba ebengasishiyelanga qaqobana, besiya kusuka sifane neSodom; ewe, ngesitshabalele njengeGomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Nalu udaba lukaNdikhoyo! Luveni, ziphathamandla zaseSodom; yiphulaphuleni imfundiso kaThixo, nani zima-mhlaba zaseGomora." 
Isaiah1:11 Kaloku uNdikhoyo uyakhala ngawe, Sirayeli; uthi: “Ngawani ke ngoko la madini angakanana? Mna ndidikiwe ziinkunzi zeegusha ezitshiswayo. Ndanele nangamanqatha enyama etyebileyo. Andisalifuni igazi leenkunzi zeenkomo, nditsho nelamaxhwane eegusha neebhokhwe." 
Isaiah1:12 Nide nize kum nje, nibizwe ngubani? Nisafuna ntoni apha kum? Hayi bo! Phezani ukuyixovula le nkundla!" 
Isaiah1:13 Andizifuni izipho namadini aphuthileyo, kwankqu nesiqhumiso senu siyanditsarha! Andinamdla kwiimbizo neentlanganiso zenu zokuthwasa kwenyanga *noMhla wokuPhumla; amatheko anobugwenxa andikruqule." 
Isaiah1:14 “Ndiyawenyanya onke amatheko enu; nditsho nala okuthwasa kwenyanga. Kaloku ngoku asuke aluxanduva, ndaye ke ndidiniwe kukuluthwala." 
Isaiah1:15 “Nakukhongozela ngezandla nizibika, mna ndosuka ndiwavale amehlo am. Noba ningade nibhomboloze, andiyi kunikhathalela mpela; kaloku izandla zenu zinkone ligazi." 
Isaiah1:16 Khanizicoce nibe nyulu! Yahlukanani nale mikhwa ingcolileyo; yekani ukwenza izinto ezinje; mandingaze ndiphinde ndizibone.
