Isaiah28:22 Ngoko ke, khawuthi cwaka, mgxeki, hleze akusinde amakhamandela akho; kuba sivakele kum isandi sentshabalalo, isaziso esimiselwe lonke ilizwe, siphuma kuMhlekazi uNdikhoyo onamandla onke." 
Isaiah28:23 Inzwi; yivani, maSirayeli! Khanibek' iindlebe, ndiyathetha!" 
Isaiah28:24 Mlimi wuphi olim' intw' engenasiphelo? Mlimi waphi ogelesha njalo? Hayi bo! Ngunotshe lowo! 
Isaiah28:25 Yena uyalima ade agqibe; egqibile ke uhlwayela idile noba yikumin, mhlawumbi atyale noba yingqolowa; kungenjalo ke ahlwayele ihabile, zonke ke ngeendawo zazo." 
Isaiah28:26 Kanene akaqeqeshwanga na nguThixo wakhe? Ewe, uwufundisiwe lo msebenzi." 
Isaiah28:27 Obhula idile akasebenzisi sileyi, engayibhuli nanganqwelo ikumin. Hayi, idile uyibhula ngesibhulo, ikumin ayibethe ngomchiza." 
Isaiah28:28 Andithi iyasilwa na ingqolowa? Hayi kaloku, akayibhuli okokoko, engayicoli nditsho nangenqwelo, kanti ke namahashe akayigrayi." 
Isaiah28:29 Obo bulumko ke buvela *kuNdikhoyo uSomandla-onke; kaloku yena yintshatsheli ngamacebo, ngenene yena ubalasele ngobulumko." 
Isaiah29:1 Kunyembelekile kuwe, Ariyeli, sixeko esathinjwa nguDavide! Mayijikeleze ihambe iminyaka; mayenjenjalo nemibhiyozo yonyaka." 
Isaiah29:2 Kodwa mna *Ndikhoyo ndokuhlasela, Ariyeli; yoba sisijwili nokuyayatheka, kum ube ngathi liziko elivuthayo." 
Isaiah29:3 Ndokuhlasela ndikungqinge ngeendonga, ndikujikeleze ngeemboniselo." 
Isaiah29:4 Uya kuthotyelwa eluthulini, uthethe ngelizw' elivumbuluk' emhlabeni, usebeze ngelezithunzela." 
Isaiah29:5 Kodwa ke iintshaba zakho zovuthululwa njengothuli, imikhosi eyomeleleyo itshayelwe njengomququ. Ngethuba elingephi, ngephanyazo," 
Isaiah29:6 uNdikhoyo uSomandla-onke uya kukuhlangula; uya kutsho ngentswahla yeendudumo nenyikima, ibe sisivungu-vungu esigquthezayo, umlilo nedangatye elilenyezayo." 
Isaiah29:7 Yonke imikhosi yezizwe ezihlaselayo, ezihlasela iAriyeli, izixhobo nezikrweqe zazo konke nje, koba njengephupha, njengombono wasebusuku." 
Isaiah29:8 Kofana nomfo olambileyo ephupha, engathi uyatya, kodw' akuvuk' usalambile; okanye umntu othe khothe lunxano, ophuph' esela, phof' avuke esanxaniwe. Koba njalo ke ukuphoxeka kwemikhosi yezizwe leyo ihlasela intaba yeZiyon." 
Isaiah29:9 Zithwangeni nitsho nibe zizityhakala; zimfamekiseni ke, nitsho nimfameke; nxilani, noba anikhange nibufake; gxadazelani, ningaselanga tywala." 
Isaiah29:10 *UNdikhoyo unitsho nangamayosi-yosi; unitsho nayeketheka bubuthongo. Kaloku amehlo enu avalekile, neentloko zenu zincithekile; ewe, abashumayeli benu ababoni, abaqiqi." 
Isaiah29:11 Intsingiselo yemibono iya kufihlakala kuni, ifane nencwadi ecikiweyo. Niya kuthi nakuyisa kwabo baziyo, nisithi: “Khanisifundele,” bathi: “Asinako, kuba itywiniwe.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Nothi ke nakuyinika umntu ongafundanga ukuba anifundele, aphendule athi: “Andikwazi ukufunda.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Suka ke iNkosi yathi: “Aba bantu basondela kum ngomlomo, bandihlonela ngalo umpaku-mpaku; iintliziyo zabo zona zikude lee, inkolo yabo imi ngeziqhelo kuphela." 
Isaiah29:14 Ngoko ke mna ndosuka ndiphinde ndibancithe ngesishiqi phezu kwesithwakumbe, nobulumko beengqondi butsho buthi shwaka, nobungcaphephe bamaqili butsho bunyamalale.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Asazi ke kwabo bazifihlayo – kunyembelekile kwabafihlela *uNdikhoyo iinjongo zabo, kwabo benza izinto ebumnyameni, besithi: “Ngubani oya kusibona? Ngubani oya kusazi?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Iinto zonke bona bayazibhukuqa: kukho udongwe nombumbi – yiyiphi eyona-yona? Into ebunjiweyo ingamsola na umbumbi isithi: “Andenziwanga nguye”? Udongwe lungatsho na kumxonkxi ukuthi: “Awunangqiqo”? 
Isaiah29:17 Kaloku kukho isimbo esithi: “Amahlathi aseLebhanon ojika abe ngumyezo weziqhamo, ke wona umyezo ube ngamahlathi.”" 
Isaiah29:18 Ngaloo mini ke nesithulu siya kuva; siya kuweva amazwi afundwa encwadini. Nemfama ehlala esithokothokweni sobumnyama ovuleka amehlo ayo, itsho ibone." 
Isaiah29:19 Nabo bangazelwe nto uNdikhoyo uya kubavuselela ngolonwabo; abahlelelekileyo boba nemihlali ngoYedwa kaSirayeli. 
Isaiah29:20 Eso soba sisiphelo seendlobongela, batsho banqamke abamgxekayo uThixo, nabaququzeleli bobubi batsho baphele." 
Isaiah29:21 Baya kutshabalala abaphixanisayo; konyembeleka kwabacupha abantu ngobugqwetha; abo bajika ubulungisa ngobuxoki, bacudulele abantu abamsulwa." 
Isaiah29:22 Ngoko ke ngoku uNdikhoyo owakhulula uAbraham uthi mayela nendlu kaYakobi: “UYakobi akaphindi abe semahlazweni, engasoze aphinde abuye anxube!" 
Isaiah29:23 Akubona inzala endiya kumpha yona, abantwana abangumsebenzi wam, uya kutsho avume athi mna ndinguYedwa kaYakobi. Ngenene, uya kundihlonela, akhahlele kum, mna Thixo kaSirayeli, alidumise igama lam elilodwa." 
Isaiah29:24 Nabo banxaxhileyo bofumana ingqiqo, nabo bambombozelayo bayamkele ingqeqesho.”" 
Isaiah30:1 *UNdikhoyo uthethe wenjenje: “Libhek' umoya kusapho olunenkani, abo benza izigqibo ngaphandle kwam, abenza izivumelwano ngaphandle kwam; izono zabo ziyelekelana." 
Isaiah30:2 Bona basuka babhenela eJiputa; abanaxesha lokubuzisa kum. Nto bayifunayo kukukhuselwa yiJiputa; nto bayingxameleyo liphiko lokumkani walapho. 
Isaiah30:3 Ukhuselo lweJiputa yimpoxo yodwa; nto ningayizuzayo kukuhlazeka kuphela. 
Isaiah30:4 Bona banawo amagosa eZowan, banabo noonozaku-zaku eHanes," 
Isaiah30:5 kambe ke wonk' umntu uya kuphoxeka ngenxa yesi sizwe singento yanto, isizwe esingenaluncedo nacebo ngaphandle kwamahlazo namanyondololo.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Nalu ke udaba olundilisekileyo mayela nezilo zentlango yasezantsi: Oonozaku-zaku bacanda kweleembandezelo neengozi, kwilizwe abakrotywa ziingonyama, apho kuphithizel' iinyok' ezinobuhlungu, zikwalapho nezitshu zamagongqongqo. Iidonki neenkamela zabo ziyasuntsubala yimithwalo ezizipho ezixabisekileyo, ziphiwa isizwe esingento yanto." 
Isaiah30:7 Kaloku iJiputa ize, ayinaluncedo mpela; yiyo loo nto ndiyibiza ngokuthi nguRahabhi ongenamsebenzi, nditsho ikhwang' elinqunyulwe neempondo." 
Isaiah30:8 UThixo wandiyalela wathi: “Krola ecwecweni, ubhale encwadini, obo ibe bubungqina obuhlala buhleli." 
Isaiah30:9 Aba ngabantu abangalawulekiyo, sisizukulwana esinenkohliso, abantu abangazimisele kuphulaphula, abayichasayo ingqeqesho *kaNdikhoyo." 
Isaiah30:10 Kubashumayeli bathi: ‘Yithini cwaka ngemibono! Sanukusifundekela ngeemfanelo zethu! Sithuthuzeleni sihlale sinje; siboneleni okungamampunge. 
Isaiah30:11 Sudukani, sanukuxaba endleleni; asifuni nokuva ngoYedwa uThixo kaSirayeli.’ ”" 
Isaiah30:12 Ngoko ke uYedwa kaSirayeli uthi: “Ngokuba ningaluvumanga olu daba, koko nisuke naqamela ngenkohliso nengcinezelo," 
Isaiah30:13 ngoko ke anikho lityala, nifana nqwa nodonga oluphakamileyo olunenkenkewula yethanda; ewe, sekulindeleke isithonga nanini na." 
Isaiah30:14 Losuka lupharhake ngathi yingqayi entlekeke yaba ziingceba ezingenakukha malahle eziko namanzi equleni.” 
Isaiah30:15 Utsho uMhlekazi uNdikhoyo, nditsho uYedwa kaSirayeli, uthi: “Nosinda ngenguquko nokuzinikezela kum; amandla enu kukuzola nokuthembela kum. Phi ke, nisala nje!" 
Isaiah30:16 Ndaweni yaloo nto nithi: ‘Sosuka sisabe ngamahashe.’ Ewe, kungaba njalo. Nithi: ‘Amahashe ethu angaphala gqitha.’ Ewe, amahashe enu angaphala nakangako kodwa nofunyanwa ngabanisukelayo." 
Isaiah30:17 Iwaka losukeliswa lijoni elinye; xa ninonke niya kugxothwa ngamajoni amahlanu qha, nibaleke nisabe nibe njengendwe emi yodwa entabeni phaya, nayo ke iyeyentlaba-mkhosi.”" 
Isaiah30:18 Kambe ke uNdikhoyo usanilindele, usazungula ukunibabala ngesisa. Kaloku yena nguThixo ongajika-jikiyo; hayi ithamsanqa labo bakholosa ngaye!" 
Isaiah30:19 Ewe, nina bemi baseJerusalem, anisayi kuphinda nilile. Kaloku *uNdikhoyo unenceba; ngoko ke nothi nakuzibika kuye asabele." 
Isaiah30:20 Nangona uMhlekazi eya kuniyekela ngamaxesha enkxwaleko, kodwa nguye ngokwakhe oya kunithundeza; niya kumqonda lowo uya kunifundisa." 
Isaiah30:21 Niya kuthi nakuphambuka abe selekhona; nimve esithi: “Yizani, nants' indlela.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Ke yona loo *mifanekiso yenu niyinqulayo ityatyekwe ngesiliva, naleyo ityatyekwe ngegolide, iya *kugqwaliseka oku kwesishuba somfazi, niyithathe niyilahle kude, niyichile nithi: “EMbo-o-o!”" 
Isaiah30:23 Ngexesha lokulima uNdikhoyo uya kuyivulela imvula, iphume imbewu eniyityalileyo, nezityalo zikhule zitsho ngesingayiwayo isivuno. Ngelo thuba ke neenkomo zenu ziya kudla kumadlelo abanzi ayokozelayo." 
Isaiah30:24 Ke zona iinkabi needonki enilima ngazo ziya kondliwa ngomxube wezidlo zodidi. 
Isaiah30:25 Kogqabhuka imithombo yamanzi ezintabeni nasezindulini ngaloo mini inkulu yokuhlaselwa nokuwa kweenqaba zeentshaba zenu, nazo ngokwazo zibulawe." 
Isaiah30:26 Inyanga yoqaqamba njengelanga, ke lona ilanga liqaqambe ngokuphindwe kasixhenxe, kube ngathi kubandakanywa ukukhanya kweentsuku ezisixhenxe ndawonye. Koba njalo ke mhla uNdikhoyo wawabopha amanxeba awenze kubantu bakhe, azihlambe neenduma zabo." 
Isaiah30:27 Nango amandla nobungangamsha, *obukaNdikhoyo buthi gqi kwelikude; intshinyela yomsi idiza ingqumbo yakhe, ubebezelis' imilebe ngumsindo, ulwimi lulatyuzelis' amalangatye." 
Isaiah30:28 Umphefumlo wakhe ukhukulisa njengomlambo, ngathi ngumlamb' ozele wada watyekeza, uhluz' izizwe ngentshabalalo, uzirhintyela ngomkhala wolahlekiso." 
Isaiah30:29 Ke nina niya kuchulumacha, nintyiloze nimemelele ngathi kungobusuku bamatheko amiselweyo. Niya konwaba ngathi ningabantu abaya endlwini kaNdikhoyo, bevuma bekhatshwa ngamaxilongo: uNdikhoyo ixhadi likaSirayeli." 
Isaiah30:30 Wonke umntu uya kukuva ukuhlokoma kwelizwi likaNdikhoyo, ngokunjalo azive nezabhokhwe zengqumbo yakhe. Kuya kubakho amadangatye nogqabhuko-mafu, isichotho nezandyondyo zemvula." 
Isaiah30:31 Ilizwi likaNdikhoyo liya kumrhwaqelisa uAsiriya, intonga yakhe imkhahlele phantsi." 
Isaiah30:32 Wothi ephindelela nje uNdikhoyo ukuwohlwaya ama-Asiriya ngaloo nduku yakhe yesohlwayo, babe bona abantu bakhe bentyiloza bengqungqa ngamagubu neekatala, abe yena esilwa nawo." 
Isaiah30:33 Kambe ke kudala lalungiswayo labaswa iziko, iziko ekuya kutshiswa kulo ukumkani waseAsiriya. Yinzongo-nzongo yomngxuma obanzi, iinkuni zifunjwe zayintaba. Ke yena uNdikhoyo wosuka avuthele atsho ngomlambo wedangatye, unqanqaze umlilo." 
Isaiah31:1 Kunyembelekile kwabo babhenela kuncedo lweJiputa; nditsho abo bathembela kumahashe, abo bakholosa ngeenqwelo eziyinyambalala, nabaqamele ngobukroti bamajoni, nditsho amajoni amahashe, abantu abangamjongele nto uYedwa kaSirayeli, nditsho abangasifuniyo isiluleko *sikaNdikhoyo." 
Isaiah31:2 Ukanti yena sisilumko, angasivulela nesithwakumbe; ewe, elakhe ilizwi alidliwa nja! Koko wosuka ayivukele indlu yezikhohlakali, abohlwaye abancedisana nabenzi bobubi." 
Isaiah31:3 La maJiputandin' asiThixo, koko ngabantu, namahashe awo asimhlola, koko zizilwanyana. UNdikhoyo wothi angaphakama ibe ziziqwenga, ke yena umncedisi atsho akhubeke, aze ke yena umncedwa awe bhaxa, bonke bavuthuluke batshabalale." 
Isaiah31:4 UNdikhoyo uthethe nam wenjenje: “Abelusi bangafanelana beqobisa ngemikhwazo, kodwa ngunotshe ukuba bayothuse ingonyama, ingakumbi xa seyilibambile ixhoba layo. Ngokunjalo nam ke akukho bani unokundinqanda ekuyikhuseleni kwam intaba iZiyon, mna Ndikhoyo uSomandla." 
Isaiah31:5 Njengentaka ikhusela amathole ayo, nam, mna Ndikhoyo onguSomandla-onke, ndiya kwenjenjalo ukuyihlanganisela iJerusalem. Ewe, ndoyikhusela ndiyikhulule; ndogqitha kuyo ndiyisindise.”" 
Isaiah31:6 UNdikhoyo uthethe wathi: “MaSirayeli, nonile ngokundifulathela. Ngoko ke ngoku buyani!" 
Isaiah31:7 Kaloku iyeza imini apho nonke niya kulilahla eli zothe liyile mifanekiso niyiqingqe ngesiliva nangegolide. 
Isaiah31:8 “UAsiriya ke yena wofela emfazweni. Phofu ke akayi koselwa krele lamntu: kovela krele limbi, lisuke limngxwelerhe. Kweso sithuba ke wosuka aswantsule, abafana bakhe ke bona benziwe amakhoboka." 
Isaiah31:9 Injengele yakhe yosuka ingenwe bubuphaku-phaku, nezinxiba-mxhaka zosuka zirhwaqele zoyike, zide zibaleke zilahle kanye nayo nembasa yomkhosi.” Etshilo nje ke uNdikhoyo utshilo, Ndikhoyo lowo omlilo uvuthayo eZiyon, omsi wamadini utsho ngomlembelele eJerusalem!" 
Isaiah32:1 Woze afike ukumkani olawula ngolungelelwano, izinxiba-mxhaka zitsho ziphathe ngemfezeko." 
Isaiah32:2 Zonke ngazinye zoba ngumqolomba mhla ligquthayo, zibe yinqaba yokuzimela mhla ngoqhwithela. Zofana nemijelo yamanzi kwelibharhileyo, zibe lithunzi lamawa kwilizwe eliyinkangala." 
Isaiah32:3 Zona ziya kuba namehlo, ziqonde iingxaki zoluntu. Ziya kuba neendlebe, zikuphulaphule ukuzibika kwabantu." 
Isaiah32:4 Yoqonda nengqiqo yezityhuthu-tyhuthu, nabathintithayo bathethe ngokucacileyo." 
Isaiah32:5 Isiyatha akusayi kuthiwa ngohloniphekileyo; neqhophololo akusayi kuthiwa ngonyanisekileyo. 
Isaiah32:6 Kaloku isiyatha sitheth' ubuyatha, nengqiqo yaso iqulunqa ubugwenxa. Sizixakekise ngenkohliso; *uNdikhoyo sihlala simcukuceza ngengcikivo. Simshiya enjalo umntu othezwa liphango, singamkhathalele nganto nokhotheke lunxano." 
Isaiah32:7 Umntu oyindlavini nezenzo zakhe zinenkohlakalo; uba soloko efutha ukwenza ububi, ezama ukubhubhisa amahlwempu ngenkohliso, khon' ukuze awavimbe amalungelo awo." 
Isaiah32:8 Ke yena onesidima uneengcingane ezizimasekileyo, nemisebenzi yakhe ingqinelana nento ayiyo." 
Isaiah32:9 Phakamani nindiphulaphule ke nani, nditsho nina, zimazi zingaxhalele nto; bekan' iindlebe nive xa ndithethayo, nina zintombi ezingáthi zikhuselekile." 
Isaiah32:10 Ningade nibe ngathi nanelisekile ngoku, kodwa kozayo unyaka nongcungcutheka, kuba idiliya yona yosuka iphunze, singabikho tu isivuno seziqhamo." 
Isaiah32:11 Xhalabani, zimazi ezihlala zingaxhalele nto; hlahlambani, zintombi ezingenaluvalo; khululani, nithi gatya ezenzila." 
Isaiah32:12 Yho-o-o amasimi! Kwakhe kwanje phi na? Awu! Sashiya senzeka ngeediliya! 
Isaiah32:13 Gixani ngenxa yomhlaba wabantu bam, kuba namhla sowugqunywe ngameva nobobo. Hlahlambani ngenxa yamakhaya avuyayo; ewe, silileleni isixeko esixokozelayo." 
Isaiah32:14 Kaloku nekomkhulu lokhal' ibhungane, nakwisixeko esinyakazelayo kuthi bhe! Kwandlunkulu koba ngamabhodlo kanaphakade; koba lapho adloba-dloba khona amaqwarha, kube lapho itya khona imihlambi," 
Isaiah32:15 ade uThixo asithululele uMoya wakhe, nentlango itsho ifane nomyezo weziqhamo, imiyezo yeziqhamo ifane namahlathi." 
Isaiah32:16 Nasentlango kuya kuphuphuma ulungelelwano, nemiyezo echumayo yambathiswe bubulungisa." 
Isaiah32:17 Ke ubulungisa bozala inzolo, ize ke ibe lulungelelwano nocwangco njalo-njalo." 
Isaiah32:18 Ke abantu bam bothi zava bahlale ngenzolo kwimizi ekhuselekileyo nephahlwe luxolo. 
Isaiah32:19 Nokuba amahlathi ebhululwe sisichotho, nesixeko sivuthuluke kwathi pam," 
Isaiah32:20 yoba luvuyo kuye wonk' ubani, ingengomanzi ingesosivuno, kuyinto nje, amadlelo enabe ethe tshitshilili, iidonki neenkomo zidakasa zikhuselekile." 
Isaiah33:1 Kunyembelekile kuwe, mtshabalalisi; wena ungatshatyalaliswanga! Yeha ke, wena tshijolondini; ke wena siqu awuqhathwa mntu! Uya kuze upheze ukutshabalalisa, ibe nguwe otshatyalaliswayo. Boze bupheze ubuqhophololo bakho, nawe ke ube lixhoba lokuqhathwa." 
Isaiah33:2 *Ndikhoyo, khawube nenceba kuthi; asisakulangazeleli ngako! Ntsasa zonke yiba ngamandla ethu; sihlangule sakungena enkathazweni." 
Isaiah33:3 Lakuzongoma izwi lakho batsho basabe; wakuphakama ziyasarhaka izizwe. 
Isaiah33:4 Izizwe zojika zibe ngamaxhoba, zixhatshazwe ngathi zingenelwe ziinkumbi." 
Isaiah33:5 Mkhulu kambe uNdikhoyo, yena umi kweliphezulu! IJerusalem woyizalisa ngolungelelwano nobulungisa." 
Isaiah33:6 Maxa onke uya kuba sisiseko esingahexiyo, isisele sosindiso, ubulumko, nolwazi. Umthombo wale ndyebo kukuhlonela uNdikhoyo." 
Isaiah33:7 Nango amagorha abo ezibika; oonozaku-zaku abaphath' uxolo nâbo besitsho ngesikrakra. 
Isaiah33:8 Ngoku koohola sekuthe bhe; abahambi abavakali ndawo konke. Izivumelwano ziyakrotyozwa; ke izixeko zideliwe, akusekho mntu uhlonitshwayo." 
Isaiah33:9 Umhlaba ulele, ngamafusi nje, amahlathi aseLebhanon atshazile; ngoku iSharon ifana nentili yasentlango, imithi ibunile eBhashan naseKarmele." 
Isaiah33:10 *UNdikhoyo uthi: “Ngoku ke ndosuka ndiphakame; niza kububona ubungangamsha bam; ewe kaloku, ndiza kuzimaseka." 
Isaiah33:11 Nikhawul' umququ, nizal' inkintshi-nkintshi; kaloku nizitshabalalisa kwangokwenu." 
Isaiah33:12 Izizwe ziya kutshiswa okwamatye ekalika; ziya kufakwa umlilo okwezihlahla zameva. 
Isaiah33:13 Nina bantu bakude, phulaphulani; ewe, yiveni into endiyenzileyo; nina bakufuphi, wavumeni amandla am.”" 
Isaiah33:14 Aboni baseZiyon bayagubha liphaphu, abangakhathalele Thixo bayangcangcazela. “Ngubani ke kuthi ongamelana nomlilo olenyayo? Ngubani onganyamezela umlilo ongacimekiyo?”" 
Isaiah33:15 Ngondlela zithe ngqo nothetha kakuhle, nongafuni kungenelwa ngengcinezelo, noyingcathu ongazamkeliyo izicengo, ongahambisaniyo nabafutha amayelenqe, umntu ongafunaniyo nezinto ezimbi." 
Isaiah33:16 Onjalo ke uza noloyiso; ukhuseleke ngathi usemqolombeni apho ukutya namanzi kuhlala kuhleli. 
Isaiah33:17 Ke amehlo enu oze ambone ukumkani ethiwe jize ngesihomo nesithozela; owakhe umhlaba uthe gabalala. 
Isaiah33:18 Ngeenkumbulo nocamanga ngehambo-nzima yamandulo: “Waya phi umphicothi-ncukacha; ephi ke yena umvavanyi? Kanti uphi yena umhloli weenqaba?” 
Isaiah33:19 Ezo ntlanga zidelelayo zophel' emehlweni, abantu abantetho ingacacanga, abapitiliza ulwimi eningaluqondiyo." 
Isaiah33:20 Khangelani iZiyon, isixeko samatheko amisiweyo; zisuka nje nokhangwa yiJerusalem, ikhaya lenzolo, umzi ongashukumiyo; ezawo izikhonkwane soze zancothuka, neentsontelo zawo soze ziqhawuke." 
Isaiah33:21 Apho ke uNdikhoyo woba nguThixo wethu onamandla, soba ngathi siphakathi kweentlambo nemilambo; kodwa akukho sikhephe siya kuhamba khona, kungekho nanqanawa ingangcambaza apho." 
Isaiah33:22 Kaloku umgwebi wethu nguNdikhoyo; ewe, uNdikhoyo yena uyasilawula. Ikumkani yethu nguNdikhoyo; nguye oya kusisindisa." 
Isaiah33:23 Zona iintambo zenqanawa ziyeke-yeke; azisenako ukuyibamba intsika yayo, zingenako ukuyiqinisa neseyile. Boxhaphaz' amaxhoba bazanelise; kuya kuhlomla nesiqhwala esi sembala." 
Isaiah33:24 EZiyon akusayi kubakho ugulayo; zonke izono zabemi bayo ziya kuxolelwa. 
Isaiah34:1 Sondelani, zizwe, niphulaphule; inzwi kaloku nakuni, zintlanga. Maliphulaphule ihlabathi nenzaliseko yalo; ihlabathi nemveliso yalo yonke malimamele." 
Isaiah34:2 Kalok' *uNdikhoyo ulwa nazo zonke izizwe, uxabene nayo yonk' imikhosi yazo. Wozibhubhisa xa zizonke, zonke azixhaxhe kuphele." 
Isaiah34:3 Izidumbu aziyi kungcwatywa; zothi xakalala ziqungquluze – mh-mh-mh! Iintaba zonyepha ligazi labo. 
Isaiah34:4 Iinkwenkwezi nemikhosi yazo zonke zosuka zisumke zinyamalale; isibhakabhaka sosongwa ngathi ngumqulu, iinkwenkwezi zivuthuluke okwamagqabi, zitshaze ngathi ngamagqab' omdiliya nomkhiwane." 
Isaiah34:5 Emazulwini umkhonto wam uxhaphile; nanko usihlela e-Edom, abantu abagwetyw' intshabalalo." 
Isaiah34:6 Umkhonto kaNdikhoyo wodad' egazini; ewe, utsho waxhapha ngamanqatha ngathi ligazi lamatakane neebhokhwe, namanqatha ezintso zenkunz' egusha. EBhozera uNdikhoyo uya kwenza idini; ewe, yoba ngamatyadidi kwaEdom." 
Isaiah34:7 Abantu baya kuwa njengenqu; bafane neenkunzi ezindala nezingamathole. Umhlaba uya kufuma ligazi, nothuli lunyephe ngamafutha." 
Isaiah34:8 Ngemini yakhe uNdikhoyo wophindezela, unyaka wembuyekezo ngenxa yeZiyon." 
Isaiah34:9 Imilamb' e-Edom yoba mnyama, umhlaba ufane nesalfure; umhlaba wofana netha evuthayo." 
Isaiah34:10 Wodangazela imini nobusuku, umsi utsho ngomlembelele othunquzayo, kube zizizukulwana ngezizukulwana libharhile, kungaze kunqumle mntu khona," 
Isaiah34:11 ilizwe limiwe sisikhova nesihulu-hulu, limiwe ngookhwalimanzi namahlungulu. UThixo wolibharhisa kwakhona elakwaEdom, libe njengelamandulo kungekadalwa nto." 
Isaiah34:12 Sobe kubekho kumkani ulawulayo; izinxiba-mxhaka zophel' emehlweni. 
Isaiah34:13 Izakhiwo zomila ameva nobobo, iinqaba zambathwe lutshungu nesinama. Yoba sisikhululo soodyakalashe, ibe likhaya lezikhova." 
Isaiah34:14 Koba lapho angqungqa khona amarhamncwa, zikhwazane khona neendimoni. Yoxhwarha khona nerhorho yobusuku, izula-zule iphathe kuphumla." 
Isaiah34:15 Isikhova siya kwakha sizalele khona; zofukama zide ziqandusele, ziwakhulisele khona amathole azo. Oontloyiya boqokelelana bonwabisane khona." 
Isaiah34:16 Khangela encwadini kaNdikhoyo ufunde: Kwezi zilo akukho singekhoyo, kungekho nesingenaqabane laso, kuba lowo ngumlomo kaNdikhoyo, nguMoya wakhe oya kuziqokelela." 
Isaiah34:17 Isekwanguye oya kuzabela azinike inxaxheba ngazinye ngazinye. Elo yoba likhaya lazo naphakade, zime khona izizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Isaiah35:1 Intlango nomqwebedu ziya kuchulumacha; elibharhileyo loba nemihlali liqhakraze njengentyatyambo. 
Isaiah35:2 Intlango yomemelela idlokove luvuyo; yoba yinzwakazi enjengeentaba zaseLebhanon, yochuma njengamasimi aseKarmele naseSharon. Bonke bobubona ubungangamsha *bukaNdikhoyo, bucace ubuhandiba nokomelela koThixo wethu." 
Isaiah35:3 Izandla ezinomkhinkqi mazomelele, namadolo anengevane atsho adlamke." 
Isaiah35:4 Thetha namagwala, uthi: “Qinani, ningabi nentaka! Kaloku uyeza uThixo wenu; uza epheth' impindezelo. Nank' egush' imbuyekezo; ewe, uza kunihlangula.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Kaloku ke kobona nemfama le yembala, zitsho zivuleke neendlebe zesithulu," 
Isaiah35:6 nesiqhwala sidlobe sitsiba-tsibe okwempunzi; nezimumu zomemelela ngemihlali. Kaloku kompompoza amanzi nasentlango, kugqabhuke imilambo nakwelibharhileyo." 
Isaiah35:7 Intlabathi evuthayo yojika ibe lichibi, umhlab' okhothekileyo uphanjwe yimithombo. Asisathethi ke ngeendawo zikadyakalashe, kuba zona zoba yimigxobhozo yemizi neengcongolo." 
Isaiah35:8 Apho ke kothi tyaba uhola; leyo ke kothiwa yindlela yobungcwele ekungekho namoni woze athi cakatha kuyo, nasiyatha solahlekisa mntu kuyo." 
Isaiah35:9 Kuyo soze kubekho ngonyama, ingasoze ihanjwe narhamncwa; kuphela ngabakhululwe nguNdikhoyo abaya kudakasa kuloo ndlela." 
Isaiah35:10 Abasindisiweyo nguNdikhoyo bobuyela eZiyon benemihlali, bengqungqa bememelela ngochulumacho. Soze babe sazana neentsizi nenkxwaleko; boxhamla ulonwabo naphakade." 
Isaiah36:1 Ngonyaka weshumi elinesine wokulawula kukakumkani uHezekiya kwelakwaJuda, ukumkani waseAsiriya uSenakeribhe wazihlasela wazithimba zonke izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zakwaJuda." 
Isaiah36:2 Ke kaloku wandulula ingqwayi-ngqwayi yakhe eLakishe, eyithumela eJerusalem nomkhosi omkhulu. Ingqwayi-ngqwayi leyo ke yema kwindlela ebheka apho kusetyenzwa khona amalaphu, ngakumjelo otsala amanzi kwiqula elingentla." 
Isaiah36:3 Yahlangatyezwa nguEliyakim unyana kaHilekiya umaqhuzu wakomkhulu, noShebhena unobhala wenkundla, ndawonye noJowa unyana ka-Asafu usiba-khulu." 
Isaiah36:4 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi yathetha nabo yathi: “Xelelani uHezekiya nithi: ‘Ithethe ngolu hlobo ingangalala ukumkani waseAsiriya: Njengokuba uzithembe kangaka nje, Hezekiya, uqamele ngantoni kanye?" 
Isaiah36:5 Akuzilibali unamacebo nobuchule bomkhosi onamandla. Awu, waza walavuza kambe! Ukholose ngabani undivukela nje?" 
Isaiah36:6 Jonga, ndiyazi ukuba uthembele ngeJiputa. Xa ingubani yona, umsimelelo ofana nengcongolo entlekekileyo, ojika uhlabe izandla zomntu osimelela ngawo, umtsho abe namanxeba. Ewe, unjalo ukumkani waseJiputa; ubenjenjalo bonke abakholosa ngaye." 
Isaiah36:7 Mhlawumbi ke uthi: “Hayi, thina sikholose *ngoNdikhoyo uThixo wethu.” Kanene lowo asingulo uHezekiya amdilizele iindawo eziphakamileyo zonqulo, wabhangisa namaqonga amadini akhe, esithi kuJuda neJerusalem: “Yizani kunqula kwiqonga eliseJerusalem kuphela”?" 
Isaiah36:8 “ ‘Hayi bo! Yiza kaloku, ukhe umiselane nenkosi yam, umhlekazi ukumkani waseAsiriya. Ndokunika amawaka amabini amahashe ukuba unganabo abakhweli." 
Isaiah36:9 Kuxa ungubani wena? Akunakuthelekiswa naso nesiveke-veke kumajoni aseAsiriya, noba ungade ukholose ngeenqwelo namahashe aseJiputa." 
Isaiah36:10 Kakade ke, uthi ndifane ndeza kuhlasela ukuze nditshabalalise ndibhuqe konke apha ndingayalelwanga nguNdikhoyo? Hayi, nguNdikhoyo ngokwakhe othe mandingene apha, ndilitshabalalise eli lizwe!’ ”" 
Isaiah36:11 Kwesi sithuba ke uEliyakim noShebhena noJowa babhekisa apho kwingqwayi-ngqwayi, bathi: “Khawuncede ukhumshe isiAram, mhlekazi; izicaka zakho ezi ziyasiqonda. Musa ukuthetha nathi ngesiHebhere, hleze kuve naba bantu baseludongeni.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Kambe ke loo ngqwayi-ngqwayi yaphendula yathi: “Yini le, nicinga ukuba la mazwi inkosi yam iwabhekisa enkosini yenu nakuni kuphela? Nithi ayiwabhekisi nakwaba bantu bahleli kolu donga? Andithi kaloku nabo kwanjengani baza kutya ilindle labo, basele umchamo wabo!”" 
Isaiah36:13 Yaphakama ke ingqwayi-ngqwayi leyo, yadanduluka ithetha ngesiHebhere, yathi: “Phulaphulani nive ekuthethayo ingangalala, ukumkani waseAsiriya!" 
Isaiah36:14 Ukumkani uthi: ‘Sanukukhohliswa nguHezekiya lo! Akanako ukunihlangula. 
Isaiah36:15 Sanukumvumela aniwexulele ekukholoseni ngoNdikhoyo, esithi: “Ngenene uNdikhoyo uya kusihlangula, nesi sixeko asiyi kuba lixhoba lokumkani waseAsiriya.” ’" 
Isaiah36:16 “Musani ukumphulaphula uHezekiya lo! Ukumkani waseAsiriya uthi: ‘Phumani nize kuzinikezela kum, sivisisane. Ukuba niyayenza loo nto, nonke ngabanye niya konwaba, ibe ngulowo nalowo atye iziqhamo zesidiliya sakhe namakhiwane akhe, esela amanzi equla lakhe," 
Isaiah36:17 ndide ndize kunithatha, ndinise kwilizwe elifana neli lenu, umhlaba onemveliso yeenkozo newayini, ilizwe lengqolowa neediliya.’" 
Isaiah36:18 “Sanukulahlekiswa nguHezekiya xa esithi: ‘UNdikhoyo uza kusihlangula.’ *Nguthixo wasiphi isizwe owakhe wasihlangula esandleni sokumkani waseAsiriya? 
Isaiah36:19 Baphi oothixo baseHamati nabaseArpadi? Baphi oothixo baseSefarvayim? Ngaba bakha bayihlangula iSamariya esandleni sam? 
Isaiah36:20 Nguwuphi kwaba thixo bezi zizwe xa bebonke owakha wanako ukuhlangula ilizwe esandleni sam? Ke, uNdikhoyo lowo yena angayihlangula njani iJerusalem esandleni sam?”" 
Isaiah36:21 Kodwa ke bona abantu abo bathula bathi cwaka, abaphendula, kuba kaloku ukumkani uHezekiya wayebayalile wathi: “Ze ningamphenduli.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Ke kaloku uEliyakim unyana kaHilekiya, umaqhuzu wakomkhulu, noShebhena unobhala wenkundla, kunye noJowa unyana ka-Asafu, usiba-khulu, bakhathazeka bazikrazula izambatho zabo, bahamba baya kuHezekiya, baza bamazisa loo mazwi athethwe yingqwayi-ngqwayi." 
Isaiah37:1 Ke kaloku wathi akuziva ezi ndaba ukumkani uHezekiya, suka wakhathazeka, wazikrazula izambatho zakhe, wanxiba ezirhwexayo zokuzila, waya endlwini *kaNdikhoyo." 
Isaiah37:2 Wathuma uEliyakim umaqhuzu wakomkhulu, noShebhena unobhala wenkundla, kunye nababingeleli abaphambili, bonke benxibe ezirhwexayo zokuzila, wathi mabaye *kumshumayeli uIsaya, unyana ka-Amozi." 
Isaiah37:3 Baya, bafika bathi: “UHezekiya uthi: ‘Lo ngumhla wenkxwaleko, impoxo, nehlazo. Sifana nomfazi ofikelwe lixesha lakhe lokuzala, kodwa engenawo amandla okujongana naloo meko." 
Isaiah37:4 Makube uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho uwevile onke amazwi athethwe yingqwayi-ngqwayi leyo ibithunywe yinkosi yayo ukumkani waseAsiriya ukuze ize kuphoxisa ngoThixo ophilayo. Ngamana yakhalinyelwa ngenxa yamazwi aweve ngokwakhe uNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. Ngoko ke nceda uthandazele amasalela asindileyo.’ ” 
Isaiah37:5 Athe ke akufika kuIsaya loo maphakathi kakumkani uHezekiya," 
Isaiah37:6 uIsaya wathi kuwo: “Yixeleleni inkosi yenu ukuba uNdikhoyo uthi: ‘Musa ukuxhalaba yiloo nto uyivileyo – loo mazwi athethwe ngamaphakathi kakumkani waseAsiriya endithuka. 
Isaiah37:7 Uyabona ke, mna ndiza kumfaka umoya wokuba athi akuva umingi-mingi lodaba oluthile, asuke abuyele kwelakowabo. Khona apho ke ndiya kwenza ukuba abulawe ngekrele.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:8 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi yomkhosi yathi yakuva ukuba ukumkani waseAsiriya umkile eLakishe, suka yarhoxa, yabuya umva, yaza yafika ukumkani esilwa neLibhena." 
Isaiah37:9 Ke uSenakeribhe wafumana udaba oluthi ukumkani uTiraka umKushe nanko ehlasela iAsiriya. Ngoko ke waphinda wathumela kuHezekiya esithi: 
Isaiah37:10 “Yithi kukumkani uHezekiya wakwaJuda: ‘Musa ukukhohliswa ngulo Thixo wakho umthembileyo. Uyakuxokisa xa esithi: “IJerusalem ayiyi kuthinjwa ngukumkani waseAsiriya.” 
Isaiah37:11 Kaloku sowuzivile izigigaba zokumkani waseAsiriya kwezinye izizwe; uyazi ukuba wazibhukuqa wazitshabalalisa tu. Ke wena uthi uya kusinda njani? 
Isaiah37:12 Babephi *oothixo bezizwe ezatshatyalaliswa ngoobawo-mkhulu? Abazihlangulanga ngani ke oothixo baseGozan, eHaran, eRezefe, nabo babantu baseIdeni ababeseTelasare?" 
Isaiah37:13 Uphi ngoku ukumkani waseHamati, owaseArpadi; ukumkani wesixeko saseSefarvayim? Yena owaseHena nowaseIva uphi?’ ”" 
Isaiah37:14 Ezo zigidimi zamnika loo leta uHezekiya, waza ke yena wayifunda wayithatha waya nayo endlwini *kaNdikhoyo, wafika wayandlala phambi koNdikhoyo." 
Isaiah37:15 Wathandaza kuNdikhoyo, wathi:" 
Isaiah37:16 “Ndikhoyo, Somandla-onke, Thixo kaSirayeli, wena osesihlalweni phakathi *kwezithunywa ezimaphiko, nguwe kuphela onguThixo olawula zonke izikumkani zehlabathi. Wena walidala izulu kwanehlabathi." 
Isaiah37:17 Kaloku ke, Ndikhoyo, khawubek' iindlebe uphulaphule. Vula amehlo akho ujonge, Ndikhoyo. Khawuweve onke la mazwi awathumeleyo uSenakeribhe, ethuka uThixo ophilayo." 
Isaiah37:18 Ngenene, Ndikhoyo, ookumkani baseAsiriya bazibhuqa bazitshabalalisa ezi zizwe zonke kunye nemihlaba yazo." 
Isaiah37:19 Oothixo bazo wabafaka emlilweni, wabatshabalalisa; kuba kakade babengethixo, koko yayiyimifanekiso eqingqwe zizandla zabantu ngomthi nangelitye." 
Isaiah37:20 Ngoko ke ngoku, Ndikhoyo Thixo wethu, khawusihlangule kulo mfo, khon' ukuze zonke izikumkani zehlabathi ziqonde ukuba nguwe wedwa uNdikhoyo.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Ke uIsaya unyana ka-Amozi wathumela umyalezo kuHezekiya, esithi: “*UNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli uthi: ‘Ndiwuvile umthandazo wakho mayela nokumkani waseAsiriya uSenakeribhe.’" 
Isaiah37:22 “Mayela naye ke uNdikhoyo uthi: ‘Okokwakho, wena Senakeribhe, isixeko iZiyon siyakugcolodela, isixeko iZiyon sihlekisa ngawe. Ewe, iJerusalem ihlunguzel' intloko xa ikubona wena uswantsula." 
Isaiah37:23 Ngubani lo umngcikiva ngezinyeliso ezinje? Uba uthetha nabani, ukhwaza nje? Ngubani lo umjonge ngekratshi? Lowo ke nguYedwa kaSirayeli!" 
Isaiah37:24 Wena uthumele izigidimi, uNdikhoyo wamfumba ngezithuko; kaloku ugcolode wathi: “Mna ndinenyambalala yeenqwelo; ngazo ndiqabel' iintab' eziphakamileyo, loo malenga-lenga aseLebhanon. Ndiyigawule imisedare yayo emide naloo mipayini yayo ingayiwayo. De ndafikelela nasekudeni, nditsho esitsikolweni sehlathi." 
Isaiah37:25 Ndimbe amaqula kumazwe eentlanga, ndaza ke ndasela amanzi khona. Ndingqishe ngonyawo kuphela, ngazo zona ezi nyawo zam, zatsho zoma zonk' iintlambo eJiputa.”" 
Isaiah37:26 “ ‘Ngaba awuzange uve na, ukuba le nto yamiselwa ndim, ukuba sekuntsuku ndayicwangcisayo le nto yenzekayo namhlanje, ukuba wena udilize izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo, uzivuthulule zitsho zibe ngamabhodlo?" 
Isaiah37:27 Abemi bazo baphelelwe ngamandla; bathe nkamalala, bayanyongoba. Nqwa nomfino emasimini phaya ngathi zizithombo ezithukuzayo; ngathi yingc' entshula phezu kwendlu, esuk' itshe ingakhulanga nokukhula." 
Isaiah37:28 “ ‘Kambe ke ndikwazi kakuhle; ndikwazi ukusuka nokuhlala namagwevu okundivukela kwakho. 
Isaiah37:29 Kaloku wena uzimisele ukulwa nam. Ndivile nangokundinyelisa kwakho. Ndiza kukuqhobosha impumlo, ndikufake umkhala emlonyeni, ndikubuyisele aph' ubuvela khona.’" 
Isaiah37:30 “Nanku ke umqondiso wakho, Hezekiya: “ ‘Kulo nyaka uza kutya ummilela, kowesibini utye ummilela wommilela, kowesithathu ke uhlwayele uvune, utyale izidiliya, utye iziqhamo zazo." 
Isaiah37:31 Ophinda ke amasalela endlu kaJuda amile; ewe, aya kuzinza, aqhelezele yinkqubela." 
Isaiah37:32 Kaloku amasalela ovela eJerusalem, lithi nyalulu kwintaba iZiyon iqela lâbo babhungcileyo. UNdikhoyo onekhwele, nditsho uSomandla-onke, nguye oya kuyenza loo nto.’" 
Isaiah37:33 “Ewe, uNdikhoyo uthethe ngolu hlobo mayela nokumkani waseAsiriya: “ ‘Akasoze angene kwesi sixeko, engayi kudubula lutolo apha. Akasoze eze phambi kwaso, engayi kusihlanganisela ngakhaka. Akasayi kwakha asingqinge esi sixeko." 
Isaiah37:34 Ewe, wobuya agoduke kwangendlela ebeze ngayo. Soze angene kwesi sixeko! Nditshilo nje mna Ndikhoyo nditshilo." 
Isaiah37:35 Ndiya kusihlanganisela esi sixeko; ewe, mna ndiya kusihlangula. Ngenxa yesidima segama lam, nangenxa yesicaka sam uDavide, yonke loo nto ndiya kuyenza.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:36 Ke kaloku isithunywa sikaNdikhoyo saya kumkhosi wama-Asiriya, safika sabulala ikhulu elinamashumi asibhozo anantlanu lamawaka amajoni. Bathe ke bakuvuka ngentsasa elandelayo bazibona izidumbu zithe gangalala!" 
Isaiah37:37 Ngoko ke uSenakeribhe, ukumkani waseAsiriya, wazichitha warhoxa, wabuyela eNiniva, wahlala khona." 
Isaiah37:38 Ngamhla uthile ke uthe esanqula kwindlu yothixo wakhe uNiseroki, suka oonyana bakhe uAdrameleki noSharezere bamhlasela, bambulala ngekrele, baza ke babalekela kwelaseArarati. Ke uEsaradoni, omnye koonyana bakhe, wangena esikhundleni sakhe, wangukumkani." 
Isaiah38:1 Ngelo thuba ke ukumkani uHezekiya wahlabeka, waza wagulela ukungabikho. *Umshumayeli uIsaya, unyana ka-Amozi, waya kumbona, waza wathi kuye: “*UNdikhoyo uthi: ‘Lungisa imicimbi yomzi wakho ime kakuhle, kuba uza kufa, awuzukuphila.’ ”" 
Isaiah38:2 Ke uHezekiya wasuka wafulathela, wajonga eludongeni, wathandaza kuNdikhoyo, wathi:" 
Isaiah38:3 “Khumbula kaloku, Ndikhoyo, ukuba oko ndakunqulayo ndikukhonza ngentembeko nokunyaniseka, ndaba soloko ndihamba ngokomyalelo wakho.” Suka ke wangqukruleka kabuhlungu." 
Isaiah38:4 UNdikhoyo wayalela uIsaya ngelithi: 
Isaiah38:5 “Xelela uHezekiya uthi: ‘Nali ilizwi elithethwa nguNdikhoyo uThixo kayihlo uDavide: Ndiwuvile umthandazo wakho, ndazibona neenyembezi zakho. Ndiza kubongeza ngeminyaka elishumi elinesihlanu ubomi bakho." 
Isaiah38:6 Futhi ndiza kukuhlangula wena kunye nesi sixeko kwisandla sokumkani waseAsiriya. Esi sixeko ndiza kusikhusela.’ ” 
Isaiah38:7 UIsaya uqhube wathi: “Nanku umqondiso kaNdikhoyo ocacisa ukuba yena uya kwenza ngokwesithembiso sakhe: 
Isaiah38:8 umthunzi welanga uza kuwuhlehlisa iinyawo ezilishumi, ubuye umva kulaa ndawo ukuyo kwisitupu sika-Ahazi.” Ngenene ke umthunzi welanga wahlehla iinyawo ezilishumi." 
Isaiah38:9 Ke kaloku akuphila uHezekiya, ukumkani wakwaJuda, wenza lo mbongo:" 
Isaiah38:10 “Phantse ndathi kanye xa ndiyindoda kwafuneka ndindwendwele kwelabafileyo, phofu ndingazukuphinda ndibuxhamle ubomi." 
Isaiah38:11 Besendisithi soze ndibe sambona apha *uNdikhoyo; besendimncamile kweli lizwe labaphilayo. Bendisithi ndahlukene noluntu mpela, kwanokuhamba-hamba kweli gada lomhlaba." 
Isaiah38:12 Besendifana nephempe labelusi, ndisithi ubomi bam bunqanyulwe. Njengelaphu lomsonti nam phantse ndasongwa; imini nobusuku bendisithi kum iphelil' intw' ebithethwa." 
Isaiah38:13 Bendizibamba ngeenkophe kude kuse; suka yena wandigramza njengengonyama. Imini nobusuku bendisithi kum iphelil' intw' ebithethwa. 
Isaiah38:14 Ilizwi lam belinkwiniza ngokwenkonjane, ndiphatha kubhonga njengehobe. Amehlo ade aluzizi ndijonge phezulu. Khawulamle, Mhlekazi, ndafa!" 
Isaiah38:15 “Yaz'ba ndingathetha ndithini na kodwa? Kuba lo ngumlomo wakho; ewe, oku kukwenza kwakho. Maxa onke ndohlala ndidakumbile ngenxa yokudandatheka komoya wam." 
Isaiah38:16 Ewe, Mhlekazi, kuphilwa ngolu hlobo; nomoya wam ngoku wanelisekile. Ndinyange nditsho ndibe ngumqaba-qaba, ngoko ke ndiphilele wena." 
Isaiah38:17 Ubukrakra bube lusizo kum; undihlangule kubo bonke ububi, waza ke wazixolela nezono zam." 
Isaiah38:18 Akukho bani ukudumisayo engcwabeni; nokufa akumemeleli kukubonge. Abafileyo abakholosanga nganto; abakunanzanga nokunyaniseka kwakho. 
Isaiah38:19 Kanti ke abaphilayo ngabo abakudumisayo, njengokuba nam ndisenjenjalo namhlanje; ooyise bona bagqithisela kubantwana, bebaxelela ngokunyaniseka kwakho." 
Isaiah38:20 Ewe, Ndikhoyo, undiphilisile. Ngoku ke songqungqa simemelele, sintyiloze sitsho ngezentambula; siya kukudumisa endlwini yakho ngayo yonke imihla yobomi bethu.”" 
Isaiah38:21 Kaloku uIsaya wayeyalele wathi: “Ithumba elo libekeleni ngentlama yomkhiwane, ukuze liphole, aphile umhlekazi.”" 
Isaiah38:22 UHezekiya wabuza kuIsaya wathi: “Woba yintoni na umqondiso wokuba ndophinda ndibe nako ukuya endlwini kaNdikhoyo?” 
Isaiah39:1 Ke kaloku ngelo xesha ukumkani waseBhabheli, uMerodaki-bhaladan unyana kaBhaladan, weva ukuba ukumkani uHezekiya ubekhe wagula wabuya wachacha. Ngoko wambhalela iileta, wazithumela ngezigidimi kunye nesipho." 
Isaiah39:2 Zifikile ke, uHezekiya wavuya, wazamkela, waza wazibonisa konke okwakukoovimba bakhe: isiliva, igolide, ubulawu, neziqholo, ngokunjalo nazo zonke izikrweqe zomkhosi. Wazingenisa kubo bonke oovimba bakhe, akwabikho nto zingayibonanga apho ebhotwe nakubukumkani bakhe buphela." 
Isaiah39:3 *Umshumayeli uIsaya ke waya kukumkani uHezekiya, wafika wabuza wathi: “La madoda ebevela phi, efuna ntoni khona?” UHezekiya uphendule wathi: “Aphuma kwelikude, eBhabheli, esiza kum.”" 
Isaiah39:4 “Ngaba kukho nto ayibonileyo ke apha komkhulu?” ubuzile umshumayeli. UHezekile uphendule ngelithi: “Akukho nto angayibonanga. Ndiwangenise kubo bonke oovimba bam.” 
Isaiah39:5 Waza ke uIsaya wathi kuHezekiya: “Nali ke ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo onamandla onke: 
Isaiah39:6 ‘Ngenene kuza ithuba apho yonke into elapha komkhulu nalo lonke ilifa elashiywa ngooyihlo ukuza kuthi gaa namhlanje, liya kuthinjwa, lifuduselwe eBhabheli.’ Ewe, uNdikhoyo uthi akukho nto iya kusala." 
Isaiah39:7 Abanye kubazukulwana besinqe sakho kanye baya kuthinjwa, baze benziwe amathenwa, babe zizicaka kwibhotwe lokumkani waseBhabheli.”" 
Isaiah39:8 “Eli lizwi likaNdikhoyo ulithethayo lifanelekile,” uphendule watsho uHezekiya. Kaloku wayesithi: “Noko kuya kubakho inzolo nokhuseleko ngemihla yokudla kwam ubomi.”" 
Isaiah40:1 “Thuthuzelani, bathuthuzeleni abantu bam,” utsho kaloku uThixo wenu." 
Isaiah40:2 “Thethani kakuhle neJerusalem; dandulukani niyixelele ukuba umzabalazo wayo ufezekile. Kaloku izono zayo zixolelwe; *uNdikhoyo uyibonelele ngaphezu kunobugwenxa bayo.” 
Isaiah40:3 Nâlo ilizwi lidanduluka lisithi: “UNdikhoyo mhlahleleni indlela entlango; uThixo wethu mgeceleni uhola kwelibharhileyo. 
Isaiah40:4 Zonke izigingqi mazidityelelwe, iintaba neenduli zidilizwe zibe ngamathafa, ke zona izixhobo zigqalwe zibe ziintili, amageduka aletyelwe abe zizithabazi." 
Isaiah40:5 Ke ubungangamsha bukaNdikhoyo buya kutyhileka, lonke uluntu lububone. Kaloku lowo ngumlomo kaNdikhoyo.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Ndeva ilizwi lisithi: “Suka udanduluke uthethe.” Ndibuze ndathi: “Ndithethe ndithini na?” “Yithi: ‘Bonke abantu banjengengca; ubomi babo bulingana nobeentyatyambo. 
Isaiah40:7 Kaloku ingca iyabuna, ivuthuluke intyatyambo yakubethwa ngumoya kaNdikhoyo. Ngenene uluntu nqwa nengca." 
Isaiah40:8 Ingca iyatshaza, yona ke intyatyambo ibune, ke lona ilizwi loThixo wethu lohlala lihleli.’ ”" 
Isaiah40:9 Phakama unyukele entabeni, wena Ziyon, sigidimi seendaba ezimnandi. Danduluka umemeze, wena Jerusalem, mvakalisi weendaba ezimnandi. Sukoyika, danduluka umemeze. Yithi kwiidolophu zelakwaJuda: “Nanko ke uThixo wenu.”" 
Isaiah40:10 Kaloku iNkosi uNdikhoyo iza ngokomelela; iya kutsho ngolawulo olungqongqo. Kananjalo iphethe neziqhamo zomsebenzi wayo; ewe, ihamba nebuyambo lemigudu yayo." 
Isaiah40:11 Yona njengomalusi iyawulondoloza umhlambi; amatakane iwaqokelela iwafunqule, ke zona ezanyisayo izithundeze." 
Isaiah40:12 Ngubani okhe alinganise amanzi ngethende lesandla, okanye olinganisa isibhakabhaka ngesandla? Mlinganiselo mni ongavalela uthuli lomhlaba, isisiphi isikali sokulinganisa iinduli neentaba?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ngubani ongaze amazi ncam uNdikhoyo, ingubani khona omcebisayo?" 
Isaiah40:14 Kakade uThixo lo ubhenela kubani, ingubani ongamfundisa okusesikweni? Ngubani ke omphokozela ulwazi, aze ambonise indlela yobulumko?" 
Isaiah40:15 Ngenene izizwe zifana nethontsi lamanzi ethungeni, nqwa nothuli azivakali nasesikalini; neziqithi ngokukwanjalo." 
Isaiah40:16 Amahlathi aseLebhanon akawanele umlilo, neenyamakazi zakhona azilanele idini elitshiswayo." 
Isaiah40:17 Izizwe zonke azinto kuThixo; yena akazazele nto konke-konke. 
Isaiah40:18 Angalinganiswa nabani na uThixo? Khona, angafanekiswa nantoni?" 
Isaiah40:19 Akafani nomfanekiso oqingqwa yingcibi, uze utyatyekwe ngegolide ngumnyibilikisi, uhonjiswe ngamakhonkco esiliva." 
Isaiah40:20 Ihlwempu elingenasiliva nagolide lithatha umthi ongàdliwayo yimpehla, lifune ichule lomchweli, lona loqingqa umfanekiso ongashukumiyo." 
Isaiah40:21 Ngaba anazi na? Ngaba zange nive na? Zange nixelelwe na kwamandulo? Anikuqaphelanga ukusekwa kwehlabathi? 
Isaiah40:22 Kaloku ladalwa ngulo ungqendeve esihlalweni emajukujukwini ngaphaya kwesibhakabhaka; kuye uluntu olu lunjengentothoviyane. Ngumtwabululi-sibhakabhaka njengomkhusane, asaneke njengentente yokuhlala." 
Isaiah40:23 Iinkosi uzitsho zigqush' eluthulini, izithwala-ndwe azivuthulule zingabi nto yanto." 
Isaiah40:24 Zithi zingekatyalwa nokutyalwa, ewe, zingekamili nokumila oku, suka azibhudle ngomoya zibune, isaqhwithi simke nazo njengomququ." 
Isaiah40:25 “Ngubani ke eningandilinganisa naye, ingubani endingade ndifane naye?” Uyabuza uThixo onguYedwa." 
Isaiah40:26 Khawujonge phezulu esibhakabhakeni; zidalwe ngubani ezi zinto? Lo uzikhokela njengomkhosi iinkwenkwezi yena uyalazi nenani lazo. Uzibiza ngamagama zonke ngazinye; ewe, akanganganto amandla akhe, ngoko akunakulahleka nob' ibe nye." 
Isaiah40:27 Ngani ke, Yakobi, ukuba ukhalaze, nditsho wena, Sirayeli, ukuba uthi: “UNdikhoyo akabuqondi ubume bam; uThixo wam akandazeleleli nganto”?" 
Isaiah40:28 Kanti ngaba awazi na? Ngaba zange uve na? UNdikhoyo nguThixo onguSonini-nanini; yena ngumdali wehlabathi jikelele. Yena soze adinwe atyhafe, nengqiqo yakhe ayiphengululeki." 
Isaiah40:29 Yena ngumhlaziyi wâbo batyhafileyo, umomelezi wâbo bangenamandla." 
Isaiah40:30 Kanti ke nolutsha luyadinwa lutyhafe, abafana bakhubeke bawe," 
Isaiah40:31 kambe ke bona abakholosa ngoNdikhoyo bosuka bahlaziyeke bomelele. Bosuka bantinge baxel' ukhozi; noba sebebaleka, soze badinwe; ewe, baya kuhamba bangaze batyhafe." 
Isaiah41:1 “Yithini cwaka niphulaphule, ziqith' ezikude; lungelani ukuxoxa, nina zizwe. Sondelani nizithethelele; yizani ke sihlangane, sinik' isigwebo." 
Isaiah41:2 “Ngubani lo uqhway' iqhaji empumalanga, lo ulinik' indwe konke nje jikelele? Nguban' olenza loyis' izizwe nezikumkani, omkhonto wakh' uzenza zifane nothuli? Iintolo zakhe zibatsho bathi saa, basarhake okomququ emoyeni." 
Isaiah41:3 Libasukelisa libaleqe lula nje. Asimendu! Ntaka yakwabani! 
Isaiah41:4 Yaz'ba ngubani na umphembi wale ntlekele? Ngubani owasimiselayo esi sishiqi? Mna *Ndikhoyo, yaba ndim kwasekuqaleni; ewe, yoba isendim nasekugqibeleni.”" 
Isaiah41:5 Iziqith' ezikude nazo zibonile; ewe, iziphelo zomhlaba zitsho zarhwaqela zangcangcazela. Nâzo ziqokelelana zisiza." 
Isaiah41:6 Ziyancedana esinye nesinye; ewe, zikhuthazana ngelithi: “Yomelelani!”" 
Isaiah41:7 Umchweli ukhuthaza umnyibilikisi, nàlo ugudisa umfanekiso ukhuthaza lo uwudibanisayo. Uthi: “Hayi, ngunonca!” Batsho babethelele isikhonkwane, uqine nkqi umfanekiso." 
Isaiah41:8 “Ke wena, sicaka sam Sirayeli, nditsho wena, ndlu kaYakobi, wena uluhlanga endilunyulileyo, uyinzala yesihlobo sam uAbraham." 
Isaiah41:9 Ndakulanda eziphelweni zehlabathi, ndakubiza kwiindawo ezisekudeni, ndaza ndathi: ‘Usisicaka sam.’ Andikubukulanga; ndakunyula." 
Isaiah41:10 Ngoko ke ndinawe, sukoyika; ndinguThixo wakho, sukuphakuzela. Ndiza kukomeleza ndikusize, amandla am asindisayo akuxhase akukhusele." 
Isaiah41:11 “Ke bona abo bakusunduzayo baya kuhlaziswa; ewe, abakulwayo soze babe nto." 
Isaiah41:12 Iintshaba zakho uya kuzifuna, kambe ke sobe uzifumane. Abalwa nawe bophel' emehlweni." 
Isaiah41:13 Mna ndinguNdikhoyo, uThixo wakho; ndokugcina ndikomeleze, ndithi kuwe: ‘Sukuphaphazela, ndiza kukunceda.’" 
Isaiah41:14 “Ewe, mna Ndikhoyo ndithi: ‘Ubuthathak' unjalo, Yakobi, nimbalwa ninjalo, Sirayeli, kodwa sukoyika, ndiza kukusiza. Mna Yedwa, Thixo kaSirayeli, ndim okukhululayo.’" 
Isaiah41:15 Ndokutsh' ube ngathi usisileyi sokubhula esinangayiway' amazinyo amatsha. Wozicol' iintaba uzivuthulule, iinduli uzicole zibe luthuli." 
Isaiah41:16 Uya kuzijiwuza emoyeni, ke won' umoya uzitsho ziphephetheke; uqhwithelo lozithatha lumke nazo. Ke wena utsho wonwatyiswe nguNdikhoyo, undidumise mna Yedwa kaSirayeli." 
Isaiah41:17 “Abahlelelekileyo bam bofuna amanzi bancame; sebekhothekile bona lunxano. Ke mna Ndikhoyo ndosisabela isikhalo sabo – mna Thixo kaSirayeli soze ndibalahle. 
Isaiah41:18 Ndogqabhuz' imilambo emqwebedini, kutsho kumpompoz' imithomb' ezintilini, intlango ndiyijike ibe yimigxobhozo, umqwebedu utsho unkcenkcez' amanzi." 
Isaiah41:19 Entlango kokhul' imisedare, ibe ngumngampunzi, umnquma, nemetile. Elibharhileyo lokhula ipayini, isipresi, nomgalagala." 
Isaiah41:20 Boyibona abantu le nto baqonde, baqaphele bazi, bathi nguNdikhoyo lo uyenzileyo. Ewe ngenene, botsho baqonde ukuba oku kudalwe nguYedwa kaSirayeli.”" 
Isaiah41:21 “Nina *zithixo zeentlanga, ethe ubungqina benu;” utsho *uNdikhoyo. Ewe, uKumkani kaSirayeli uthi: “Khaniyibeke apha ingxoxo yenu, sive." 
Isaiah41:22 Yizani kaloku, xelani izinto ezizayo; chazelan' inkundla iziganeko zamandulo; ewe, zichazeni nentsingiselo yazo." 
Isaiah41:23 Khanisixelele ngekamva kaloku; khona nathi sotsho sithi ningoothixo. Yenzani noba yentle okanye ebuhlungu; nathi sitsho sirhwaqele, soyike." 
Isaiah41:24 Okokwenu nina niyinkunkuma, nemisebenzi yenu yimfitshi-mfitshi. Bangamasikizi abo banichongayo." 
Isaiah41:25 “Ke mna ndixhokonxe umfo wasentla; uyeza – ondihloniphayo nanko evela empumalanga. Iziphathamandla uzixovula ngathi ludongwe, ngathi ngumbumbi exonxa udongwe." 
Isaiah41:26 Le nto ngubani oyazise kwantlandlolo kuni, owasilumkisayo ukuze siningqinele? Akukho namnye wakha wayixela, engekho nowakha wayithi thupha." 
Isaiah41:27 Ndim mna kuqala owayixelelayo iZiyon, ndathi: ‘Nâbo besiza.’ Ndathumela isigidimi eJerusalem, umvakalisi weendaba ezimnandi." 
Isaiah41:28 Ndakuzikhangela ke izithixo ezo zonke ndifika zisik' umlomo, kungekho nasinye sinako ukundiphendula." 
Isaiah41:29 Zonke ziyimfeketho nje. Hayi, azinakwenza nto mpela-mpela; ngamabhetye-bhetye nje emifanekiso.”" 
Isaiah42:1 *UNdikhoyo uThixo uthethe wathi: “Nasi isicaka sam endisixhasayo. Yena ngumnyulwa wam ondikholisayo; ndimthe jize ngoMoya wam, izizwe zonk' uziphakel' ubulungisa." 
Isaiah42:2 Yena akakhwazi amemeze; hayi, akadanduluki ezitalatweni." 
Isaiah42:3 Ingcongolo ecekethekileyo soze ayaphule, nesibane esilozisayo soze asicime, koko uphak' ubulungisa ngokunyaniseka." 
Isaiah42:4 Yena ke soze atyhafe adangale, de aphak' ubulungisa ehlabathini; nezizw' ezikude zilindel' umthetho wakhe.”" 
Isaiah42:5 Nalu udaba lukaThixo uNdikhoyo, umdali owatwabulula amazulu; nguye owalaneka ihlabathi nako konk' okwalo; abemi balo wabaphakel' ubomi, abantu balo wabanik' ukuphefumla:" 
Isaiah42:6 “Mna Ndikhoyo ndikubizile; ewe, ndingothembekileyo. Kaloku ndosoloko ndinawe, ndikulondoloze, ndikwenze umnqophiso nabantu bam, ube kukukhanya ezizweni." 
Isaiah42:7 Wena uza kuvula amehlo eemfama; nguwe oza kukhulula amabanjwa; nguwe oza kuvula intolongo emnyama. 
Isaiah42:8 “Mna *ndinguNdikhoyo – igama lam ncakasana. Ubungangamsha bam andinikisi ngabo; udumo lwam aluzuzwa *yimifanekiso enqulwayo. 
Isaiah42:9 Zinto endazixelayo zenzekile, futhi nezintsha ngoku ndiyazibhengeza; ewe, ndizixela zingekathungululi.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Ntyilozani niculele *uNdikhoyo ingoma entsha. Malimdumise limbonge ihlabathi jikelele; nditsho nani nonke abahamba phezu kolwandle. Mazingathi cwaka nezilwanyana zolwandle; nezikud' izizwe mazibonge zibongisele. 
Isaiah42:11 Mayidumise nentlango nezixeko zayo; nabaseKedare mabadumise uThixo; nabaseSela mabamemelele ngemincili; ewe, mabamemeze naphezu kweentaba." 
Isaiah42:12 Nabo bemi kwizizwe ezikude mabamdumise uNdikhoyo. 
Isaiah42:13 UNdikhoyo yena ufunza njengegorha; yena selequle wada waligangatha. Nankw' esitsho ngentlaba-mkhosi, nto leyo idiza ukutshatshela kwakhe." 
Isaiah42:14 *UNdikhoyo uthethe wathi: “Kaloku sekumzuzu ndithe cwaka; suka ndadl' imu ndazibamba. Ngoku ke okomfazi osikwa yinimba ndozibhija-bhija ndide ndibhonge. 
Isaiah42:15 Iinduli neentaba ndosuka ndizibhulule, okwakuyingca nemithi ndikomise. Imilambo ndoyibharhisa yome khonkqo, imigxobhozo nezadunge zitshe khothe." 
Isaiah42:16 Iimfama ndozihambisa ngeendlela ezingazaziyo; ewe, ndozikhokela ngomendo ongaqhelekanga. Kubo ubumnyama ndobujika bube kukukhanya; iingxondorha zojika zibe ngamathafa. Ezo zinto ndiya kuzenza; futhi ke soze ndizityeshele konke." 
Isaiah42:17 Ke bona abakholosa *ngemifanekiso, abo bayinqulayo besithi: ‘*Ningoothixo bethu,’ ngenene baya kuphoxeka bahlazeke.”" 
Isaiah42:18 *UNdikhoyo uthethe wathi: “Khaniphulaphule ke, nani zithulu; khangelani nibone, nani zimfama." 
Isaiah42:19 Kakade ngubani oyimfama kunesicaka sam? Sithulu saphi esidlula isigidimi sam? Ngubani oyimfama okwalowo ungowam; nditsho oyimfama njengesicaka sikaNdikhoyo? 
Isaiah42:20 Ewe, ubonile kambe, Sirayeli; nto nje ayikuncedanga nto loo nto; uvile kambe nangeendlebe zakho, kodwa suka awaphulaphula.”" 
Isaiah42:21 UNdikhoyo othembekileyo yena ulangazelel' ukunceda; imfundiso yakhe uyayiqaqambisa. 
Isaiah42:22 Kambe ke aba bantu zizisulu zokuxhatshazwa; sebatshixelwa kwamnyama-ndawo, bade baya kufihlwa ezintolongweni. Ziindwayi ezingamaxhob' ukuxhatshazwa; ziintw' ezingenabani wakuzihlangula. Akakho othi: “Godukani ngoku.”" 
Isaiah42:23 Yaz'ba ngubani na ozimiseleyo ukuphulaphula ukuze aqonde kwixa elizayo? 
Isaiah42:24 Nguban' ophise ngoYakobi kubaphangi, onikele ngoSirayeli kubaxhaphazi? IkwanguNdikhoyo lo sikreqe kuye, sisuke asahamba ngendlela yakhe, suka asaphulaphula simthobele." 
Isaiah42:25 Suka ke wavulela umsindo wakhe, ukuze thina sidad' emfazweni. Utsho ngomsind' odangazelayo, koko uSirayeli tu ukuqonda; suka wavaleka mpela-mpela, akahoya nokuhoya." 
Isaiah43:1 Ngoku ke *uNdikhoyo, umdali wakho, Yakobi, nombumbi wakho, Sirayeli, uthi: “Uze ungaxhali wena, ndikuhlawulele; ndikubize ngegama, ungowam ncakasana." 
Isaiah43:2 Noba sewucand' emanzini, mna ndiya kuba nawe; noba sowuwela imilambo, ayisoze ibe nako ukukukhukulisa; nditsho sowucand' emlilweni, soze urhawuke; amadangatye akanakukutshisa wena." 
Isaiah43:3 Kaloku mna Ndikhoyo ndinguThixo wakho, uYedwa kaSirayeli, uMhlanguli wakho. Ndinikezela ngeJiputa ukukuhlawulela; iKushe neSebha zothath' indawo yakho." 
Isaiah43:4 Kum uxabisekile ke kambe; yeka elo wonga, andikuthandi ngako! Ndincam' izizwe ngenxa yakho; ndinikezel' iintlanga, ndizuze wena." 
Isaiah43:5 Uze ungaxhali, ndinawe mna; inzala yakho ndoyiqokelela empumalanga, nina ndiniphuthume nasentshonalanga." 
Isaiah43:6 Kwelasentla ndothi: ‘Bakhulule bagoduke,’ kwelasezantsi ndithi: ‘Ungabathinteli.’ Oonyana bam babuyise kwelikude, neentombi zam eziphelweni zehlabathi," 
Isaiah43:7 nditsho wonke umntu obizwa ngegama lam, wonke endamdalela udumo lwam, wonke endambumbayo ndamenza.”" 
Isaiah43:8 Yiza nâbo bantu bangaboniyo benamehlo, uze nâbo bangaphulaphuliyo beneendlebe." 
Isaiah43:9 Zibizeni zonke izizwe; mazihlanganisane iintlanga. *Koothixo bazo nguwuphi owayixelayo le nto yenzekayo namhlanje, wasazisa nangezinto ezenzeke mandulo? Ewe, mazize nawazo amangqina, khon' ukuze abevayo bathi: “Axel' inyaniso.”" 
Isaiah43:10 “Ke nina ningamangqina am,” utsho uNdikhoyo, “izicaka zam endazinyulayo, ukuze nindazi nikholose ngam, niqonde ukuba ndinguye endinguye. Ngaphambi kwam akukhange kubekho thixo; ewe, yaye engasoze abekho." 
Isaiah43:11 Mna ndim uNdikhoyo, ndim ndedwa ohlangulayo." 
Isaiah43:12 Mna andingothixo wasemzini kuni. Kaloku ndaxela, ndahlangula, ndavakalisa. Nina ngokwenu ningamangqina am ukuba ndinguThixo,” utsho uNdikhoyo." 
Isaiah43:13 “Ewe, bendingokhoyo kwamandulo; akukho kuphuncuka esandleni sam; endikwenzayo akujikwa mntu.”" 
Isaiah43:14 *UNdikhoyo uMkhululi wenu, yena uYedwa kaSirayeli, uthi: “Ngenxa yenu ndothumela eBhabheli, atsho amaKaledi asabe ngezo nqanawa zawo zeqhayiya." 
Isaiah43:15 Mna ndinguNdikhoyo, uYedwa wenu, uMdali noKumkani wakho, Sirayeli.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Utsho uNdikhoyo, umavul' indlela enqumla elwandle, nditsho indlela ecanda kumsinga olephuzayo;" 
Isaiah43:17 umkhosi wamagorha wawurholela enzonzobileni, uwonke nje iinqwelo namahashe; wafadalala, soze uphinde uthini, wafuthaniselwa mpela njengekhandlela:" 
Isaiah43:18 “Kambe ke sanukubambelela kwisiganeko sezolo; hayi bo, sanukunokoza ezamandulo." 
Isaiah43:19 Khangelani ke, ngoku ndenza entsha; ewe, seyisenzeka, nani niyayibona. Ndiza kuvul' indlela enkangala, kutsho kuqukuqele imilambo entlango." 
Isaiah43:20 Neenyamakazi ngokwazo zondihlonela, oodyakalashe neenciniba zindincome, xa sendimpompozis' amanz' entlango, kubalek' imilambo enkangala, khon' ukuze lusel' usapho lwam, nditsho usapho olukhethiweyo," 
Isaiah43:21 bantu abo ke ndazidalelayo, khon' ukuze bandidumise.”" 
Isaiah43:22 *UNdikhoyo uthi: “Suka ke wena, Yakobi, akwandinqula; ewe, suka akwaziduba ngam, wena Sirayeli." 
Isaiah43:23 Akuwenzelanga mna amadini atshiswayo; ewe, akundiwonganga ngeminikelo. Phofu akuxhanyulwanga ndim ngamadini; andikukhathazanga nangaziqhumiso." 
Isaiah43:24 Akundenzelanga siqhumiso sivumba limnandi, ungandanelisanga nangamanqatha ezilwanyana; suka wandisinda ngezono zakho, wandikruqula ngemikhuba oyenzayo." 
Isaiah43:25 “Ukanti mna ndim ozisusayo izono zakho. Ndenjenjalo ngenxa yesidima sam; ukundivukela kwakho sobe ndibe sakukhumbula. 
Isaiah43:26 Yiza ke undimangalele; yiza kaloku sixoxe, ukuze kucace onetyala." 
Isaiah43:27 Kaloku ukhokho wenu wôna, neenkokheli zenu zandivukela." 
Isaiah43:28 Mna ndozihlazisa izithwala-ndwe zesibingelelo senu, ngoko ke uYakobi ndomzisela intshabalalo; ewe, amaSirayeli ndiwayekele abe sisigculelo.”" 
Isaiah44:1 “Phulaphula, Yakobi sicaka sam, wena Sirayeli endimnyulileyo," 
Isaiah44:2 uthi *uNdikhoyo, umenzi wakho owakubumba esizalweni, yena owahlala ekunceda: Ungabi naxhala, Yakobi sicaka sam; ungumnyulwa wam endimthandayo." 
Isaiah44:3 Ndowuphokozel' amanzi umhlaba onxaniweyo, kuqukuqele imilambo enkangala, inzala yakho ndiyithululele uMoya wam, intsikelelo yam ifukame phezu kwayo." 
Isaiah44:4 Iya kuhluma njengengca eludadeni, njengemingcunube phezu komlambo." 
Isaiah44:5 Uthile wothi: ‘NdingokaNdikhoyo;’ omnye azibandakanye nendlu kaYakobi; wumbi agximfizwe ‘Ndikhoyo’ esandleni, naye azibize ngokuba ngumSirayeli.”" 
Isaiah44:6 UNdikhoyo uKumkani kaSirayeli noMkhululi wakhe, nditsho uSomandla-onke, uthi: “Ndingowokuqala; ndikwangowokugqibela; akukho Thixo wumbi ngaphandle kwam." 
Isaiah44:7 Kakade ngubani onjengam? Makavele! Makakuvakalise kaloku okwênzekáyo okoko ndamisela abantu bam mandulo. Makazixele iziganeko ezizayo; ewe, makazixele!" 
Isaiah44:8 Sanukuphakuzela, musan' ukuxhalaba; kaloku ndatsho kwamandulo, unangoku ke. Kambe nina ningamangqina am. Ngaba kukho Thixo wumbi na? Ngaba likho na elinye iXhadi? Unotshe! Mna andizange ndilibone.”" 
Isaiah44:9 Akanto yanto umntu oqingqa *umfanekiso; naloo mfanekiso azidla ngawo yimfeketho. Abo bayithelelayo ziimfama; abaliqondi ihlazo labo. 
Isaiah44:10 Kunceda ntoni ukuqingqa umfanekiso uwenze *uthixo? 
Isaiah44:11 Wonke umntu owenza loo nto uhlazekile. Andithi na kaloku le mifanekiso iqingqwa ngabantu? Mabeze enkundleni kaloku, uya kubona bosuka barhwaqele – abakho lihlazo." 
Isaiah44:12 Umkhandi uthatha ubhedu, alusebenze ngomlilo. Ngezo zigalo zakhe uthatha isando, alukhande elulungisa. Esasebenza njalo uyanxanwa, uyalamba, uyadinwa, yonke loo nto." 
Isaiah44:13 Kanti ke umchweli uyawulinganisa umthi. Uzoba loo nto afuna ukuyenza ngetshokhwe; usebenzisa izixhobo zakhe ewukrola, aze ke akhuphe into efana nomntu (inzwana yomfo) ayithathe ayifake endlwini." 
Isaiah44:14 Ehlathini phaya uthatha nawuphi na umthi; ingangumsedare, um-oki, okanye ipayini. Kanti usengatyala nawuphi na umthi, awulinde ukhuliswe yimvula." 
Isaiah44:15 Inxalenye yomthi umntu uyayithatha abase enze umlilo, aze kwangaloo mthi enze umfanekiso awunqule. Ewe, wotha umlilo awubase ngomthi; aze kwalapho apheke isonka atye; kanti ngenxalenye yaloo mthi uza kwenza umfanekiso, awunqule esithi nguthixo." 
Isaiah44:16 Kwangaloo mthi uyabasa, ose inyama, atye ade adikwe. Ewe, wotha umlilo ade ancome athi: “Kutsho kwamnandi; kufudumele.”" 
Isaiah44:17 Kanti ke oseleyo umthi uza kweza umfanekiso ngawo, ajike akhahlele kuwo. Uzibika kuwo athi: “Nceda undihlangule, thixo wam!”" 
Isaiah44:18 Abantu abanjalo ke zizititsi ezingayaziyo into eziyenzayo. Amehlo nengqondo yabo ivaleke mba; abayazi inyaniso. 
Isaiah44:19 Umntu oqingqa umfanekiso aze awunqule uncitheke kangangokuba angabi nabuganga bakuthi: “Ikwangulo mthi lo ndiwubasayo ndipheke ngawo, ndize ngokunjalo ndose inyama ndiyitye. Ndingathini ukwenza kwangawo intw' enezothe, ndize ndikhahlele isikhuni somthi?”" 
Isaiah44:20 Ufana nomntu otya uthuthu. Ubhanxeke mpela; ngoku uyaphuphutheka, futhi akukho buyambo. Kaloku akavumi ukuba le nto ayiphetheyo ngamampunge." 
Isaiah44:21 Utsho *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Zikhumbule ezi zinto kaloku, Yakobi; kaloku wena usisicaka sam, Sirayeli. Ndakudalela ukuba ube sisicaka sam; ndaye ke andisoze ndikulibale." 
Isaiah44:22 Ukundivukela kwakho ndikuphuthisile; isono sakho sithe shwaka okwenkungu. Buyela kum; ndim umkhululi wakho.” 
Isaiah44:23 Memelelani ngemihlali, mazulu; mazidume kaloku neenzonzobila. Ngqungqani nisine, nani zintaba, ningqiyaze nani, mithi yamahlathi. Kaloku uNdikhoyo uzibonakalisile; ewe, ukukhulule, wena Yakobi; utyhile amandla akhe ngawe, Sirayeli." 
Isaiah44:24 UMkhululi wakho uNdikhoyo uyathetha; yena owakubumbayo kwasesizalweni uthi: “NdinguNdikhoyo uMenzi weento zonke; ndim owawatwabululayo amazulu, ikwandim owawolulayo umhlaba; ewe, zange ndincedwe bani." 
Isaiah44:25 Mna ndizitsho zibhanxeke izanuse, ndidlale ngabo ke oosiyazi; ubuciko bezilumko ndiyabutshitshisa, butsho budule ubutyhakala bazo." 
Isaiah44:26 Ndiyaluphumelelisa udaba lwezicaka zam, ndizifezekise izihlabo zabathunywa bam. IJerusalem ndithi isaza kumiwa, iidolophu zakwaJuda zibuye zakhiwe, kuvuke izixeko kuloo mabhodlo." 
Isaiah44:27 Mna ndithetha ngezwi kuphela neelwandle zitsho zome khonkqo. 
Isaiah44:28 Ke kuKoreshi ndithi: ‘Nguwe oza kundalusela; nguwe oza kufezekisa icebo lam. Wena uya kuyalela uthi: “Mayakhiwe iJerusalem.” Malunga nendlu kaThixo uya kuthi: “Mazimiswe iziseko zayo.” ’ ” 
Isaiah45:1 Wenjenje *uNdikhoyo ukuthetha nomthanjiswa wakhe uKoreshi, amthe jize ngegunya namandla oloyiso jikelele, khon' ukuze avuthulule ookumkani, avulelwe zonke iingcango, angathintelwa ngamasango esixeko:" 
Isaiah45:2 “Ndim ngokwam oya kukutshayelela; iinduli neentaba ndosuka ndizilebele, amasango enziwe ngobhedu ndiwakroboze, nemivalo yentsimbi ndiyivuthulule." 
Isaiah45:3 Ndokunika ubutyebi obunqatyisiweyo; ewe, obugcinwe kwiindawo ezifihlakeleyo. Uya kutsho uqonde ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli; ngenene ndim okubize ngegama." 
Isaiah45:4 Ngenxa yesicaka sam uYakobi, nditsho uSirayeli endimnyulileyo, ndikubize ngegama, ndakuthi jize ngesihomo nesithozela, nangona wena ungandazi nje." 
Isaiah45:5 “Ndim uNdikhoyo; akukho Thixo wumbi. Ndiya kukuxhobisa utsho uqine nangona wena ungandazi. 
Isaiah45:6 Le nto ndoyenza ukuze baqonde bonke, bazi emhlabeni wonke jikelele, baqonde ukuba mna ndinguNdikhoyo, bazi ukuba akukho Thixo wumbi." 
Isaiah45:7 Ndikudalile ukukhanya, kanti ke nobumnyama; ivela kum impumelelo, ngokunjalo neshwangusha; ndim mna Ndikhoyo ozenzayo ezi zinto." 
Isaiah45:8 Ndokuthobela ulungelelwano lune njengemvula, ke wona umhlaba uya kulwamkela kutsho kuthi qhakra inkululeko nobulungisa. Ndim mna Ndikhoyo unobangela wezi zinto.”" 
Isaiah45:9 Mawoo kulowo uphikisana noMenzi wakhe! Imbiza nje yomdongwe ingathini ukusuka iphikisane nombumbi wayo? Ungathini umdongwe ukuthi kumbumbi: “Wenza ntoni kodwa?” Ingakhalaza na imbiza ithi: “Uliqhithala, mbumbindini”?" 
Isaiah45:10 Umntwana angamkhalazela na uyise nonina, athi: “Nindizalele ntoni?”" 
Isaiah45:11 *UNdikhoyo, uThixo oYedwa kaSirayeli, umdali wakhe, uthi: “Ningathini na ukundithethisa ngekamva, nindinkqangise ngabantwana bam, nide nindixelele ngemfanelo yam?" 
Isaiah45:12 Ndim owalenzayo ihlabathi; ndim owadala uluntu kulo; ngezam izandla ndawatwabulula amazulu; ndiyayilawula inyambalala yawo. 
Isaiah45:13 Ngobulungisa bam ndim oxhokonxe uKoreshi; ndoyityeneneza indlela ayihambayo. Isixeko sam iJerusalem wobuya asivuse; uza kubakhulula abantu bam abathinjiweyo. Loo nto woyenza ngaphandle kwembuyekezo; kaloku uthethile uNdikhoyo uSomandla-onke.” 
Isaiah45:14 KuSirayeli utsho uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Ubutyebi beJiputa neKushe bobákhó, iingxilimbela zaseSebha ngamakhoboka akho. Zona ziza kulandela zikhonxiwe; zokhahlela kuwe zivuma zisithi: ‘Nini kuphela abanoThixo; akukho wumbi.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:15 Thixo kaSirayeli, uyabahlangula abantu bakho; wena unguThixo ofihlakeleyo." 
Isaiah45:16 Abaqingqi *bemifanekiso basehlazweni; ngenene ke bona bonyoshoza bephoxekile. 
Isaiah45:17 Ke yena uSirayeli wahlangulwa nguNdikhoyo; olwakhe usindiso lohlala luhleli; yena akasoze ahlazeke aphoxeke nanini nanini. 
Isaiah45:18 UNdikhoyo nguye umdali wamazulu; ngenene nguye oyena-yena Thixo. Ihlabathi eli labunjwa nguye; walenza waza walizinzisa. Akalenzanga laba ngumqwebedu obharhileyo; walenzela ukuze limiwe luluntu. Yena ke uthi: “Ndim uNdikhoyo; akukho Thixo wumbi. 
Isaiah45:19 Ewe, mna andithethanga ekusitheleni, nenjongo yam andizange ndiyifihle. Mna andiyixhamlanga indlu kaYakobi, ndingatshongo nokuba mayindifune enkqantosini. NdinguNdikhoyo; mna ndiyayithetha inyaniso, mna ndiyakuvakalisa oko kuqinisekileyo." 
Isaiah45:20 “Qokelelanani, nonke zizwe; nditsho nina, mingqandanda esindileyo. Yizani kaloku nizokuxoxa, bantundini bazizityhakala ezingazi nto, nina batyethe imifanekiso yomthi, nina banqula *oothixo abangento yanto." 
Isaiah45:21 Yizani kuxoxa enkundleni; mabathetha-thethane abamangalelwa. Ngubani owayixela kwamandulo le nto? Ngubani owayivakalisa ingekenzeki? Asindim na Ndikhoyo? NdinguThixo osindisayo, olilungisa; ngaphandle kwam akukho Thixo." 
Isaiah45:22 “Khangelani kum nisindiswe, nina zizwe zehlabathi liphela. Kaloku ndim uThixo, akukho wumbi." 
Isaiah45:23 Ngenene ndiyafunga, yaye esam isifungo sinyanisekile; ewe, sona soze siguquke: Zonk' iintlanga zokhahlela kum, zifunge ukuba zondithobela." 
Isaiah45:24 Zovuma zithi: ‘KukuNdikhoyo kuphela ukuzuzwa kosindiso namandla.’ ” Ke bona abamthiyileyo bohlazeka. 
Isaiah45:25 Kodwa ngenxa kaNdikhoyo yonk' inzala kaSirayeli yogwetyelwa ize imdumise. 
Isaiah46:1 “Namhlanje uBhele uthotyiwe; uNebho uwe bhaxa! *Oothixo ebenikade nijikeleza nabo namhlanje batyabula imiqolo yezilwanyana. Ngenene baluxanduva lomthwalo. 
Isaiah46:2 Nâzo izilwanyana zisiwa zivuka. Akukho kusinda kuzo; zithinjwa kunye nomthwalo wazo. 
Isaiah46:3 “I-i-i-nzwi ke wena, ndlu kaYakobi! Ndiphulaphuleni nina masalela endlu kaSirayeli, nina endanixhasa kwasekukhawulweni kwenu, ndaza ndanisingatha kwasekuzalweni kwenu." 
Isaiah46:4 Noda niguge nibe ziingwevu mna ndisengulowo unixhasayo. Nenziwa ndim, ngoko ke ndonisingatha; ewe, ndonigcina ndinihlangule." 
Isaiah46:5 “Kodwa-kodwa ndolinganiswa nabani? Ngubani na onjengam endinokufaniswa naye? 
Isaiah46:6 Abantu bakhupha igolide engxoweni, isiliva bayilinganisa esikalini, basuke baqeshe ingcibi, ibenzele uthixo; kamva ke basuka bee guqaqa bamnqule." 
Isaiah46:7 Bambeka emagxeni, bamtyathe; bambeke endaweni yakhe, eme bhuxe. Kaloku yena lutiniko olungashukumiyo. Udl' imu noba umntu uyazibika kuye; akakwazi kuhlangula mntu ezingxakini." 
Isaiah46:8 “Khumbulani le nto nizikise; khaniyiguqu-guqule, nina bavukeli." 
Isaiah46:9 Khanikhumbule iziganeko zamandulo, nivume ukuba mna ndinguThixo; ewe, akukho thixo ufana nam." 
Isaiah46:10 Isiphelo ndasixela kwasekuqaleni; kwamandulo ndazivakalisa izinto ezizayo. Ndatsho ukuba icebo lam soze liwe, koko ndokufezekisa oko ndikumisileyo." 
Isaiah46:11 Mna ndibize umfo empumalanga; sisitshu esiya kurhiwula njengokhetshe. Yena woyifezekisa yonke injongo yam; njengoko ndithethile kuya kuba njalo kanye. 
Isaiah46:12 Phulaphulani, bantundini baneenkani, nina banxaxhileyo elusindisweni." 
Isaiah46:13 Umhla wosindiso wona ndiyawusondeza; ngenene awukude kuya phi. Ukusindisa kwam akuyi kulibazisa; ewe, ndiza kuyihlangula iZiyon, uSirayeli ndimzisele isidima nesithozela.”" 
Isaiah47:1 *UNdikhoyo uthi: “Yihla esihlalweni, ntombindini Bhabheli; ewe, yiza nawe ukhe ugqush' eluthulini. Wena wakhe wayinzwakazi yentombi; oko kuguda nokuthamba ngoku kumkile." 
Isaiah47:2 Thath' ilitye, usil' ingqolowa; ewe kaloku, sikhulule isigqubuthelo; finyeza kaloku, uwel' imilambo." 
Isaiah47:3 Kaloku ngoku buza kudlula ubuze bakho; awukho kukuphoxeka nalihlazo. Kaloku mna ndiza kuziphindezela; ibe ke andizi kuba nalusini konke.” 
Isaiah47:4 UMkhululi wethu nguYedwa kaSirayeli; igama lakhe nguNdikhoyo uSomandla-onke. 
Isaiah47:5 UNdikhoyo uthi: “Yithi cwaka, ntombindini Bhabheli, uhlale ebumnyameni. Kaloku wena ngoku akusayi kuthiwa uyikumkanikazi yezizwe." 
Isaiah47:6 Besendinomsindo ngakubantu bam; ndide ndalishwabulela ilifa labo; suka ndabayekela esandleni sakho. Ke wena awubanga nanceba konke, neengwevu usuke wagadalala nakuzo." 
Isaiah47:7 Ubusithi wena woba sisimakade, uhlale uhleli uyikumkanikazi. Khange uzikhathaze nganto; khange uzidube nangokujonga isiphelo." 
Isaiah47:8 “Phulaphula ke, wena mthandi weziyolo; nditsho wena uzicingela ukuba ukhuselekile, nditsho wena uzilinganisa noThixo, wena othi nguwe okhoyo, akukho wumbi. Ubusithi wena soze ube mhlolokazi; soze ulahlekelwe bantwana." 
Isaiah47:9 Kodwa ngephanyazo nje – ngamini-nye – ilahleko yabantwana kunye nobuhlolokazi iza kukufikela nawe zikho ezo ngwebedla zakho, ekho loo makhubalo akho namaqwili; ewe, zofika ziphelelise." 
Isaiah47:10 Ubusithi uza kukhuselwa yinkohlakalo; usithi akukho bani ukubonayo. Ubulumko bakho nolwazi bukulahlekisile; usitsho nje ukuthi nguwe okhoyo, akukho wumbi." 
Isaiah47:11 Ngoku wena uzelwa sisithwakumbe, ibe nemilingo yakho ayinakuma ngaphambili. Uza kuqutyulwa sisibetho ongenakusingxengxezela, ufikelwe sisihelegu ongazange wasicinga." 
Isaiah47:12 “Bambelela kuloo makhubalo nezo ziphondo, njengoko kaloku walunyulelwa kuzo! Hleze kuthi kanti zisenokunceda; mhlawumbi ngazo ungazigrogrisa iintshaba." 
Isaiah47:13 Namacebiso lawo akuqobile; mabeze kaloku oosiyazi bakuhlangule, nditsho abo bacalula iinkwenkwezi, abo bazoba amazulu ngezigaba zawo, abo baphicotha ubume benyanga nganye, baze bambulule baxele izinto ezizayo." 
Isaiah47:14 Bona baza kufana nemvuthuluka yengca, kuze kuthi gqi umlilo ubatshise. Sobe babe nako nokuzihlangula; amadangatye onqanqaza batsho bathi shuu! Kaloku lowo asinguwo umlilo wokothiwa." 
Isaiah47:15 Usizo lwazo luphelel' apho ezo zazi zakho walunyulelwa kuzo. Zonke zophephetheka ngeendlela zazo, kube kungekho bani ungakuhlangulayo!”" 
Isaiah48:1 *UNdikhoyo uthi: “Khanibek' iindlebe, ndlu kaYakobi; nditsho nina babizwa ngoSirayeli, nina bomnombo kaJuda, nina bafunga igama likaNdikhoyo, nina bathi banqula uThixo kaSirayeli, kodwa ngenene nisitsho nje ngomlomo!" 
Isaiah48:2 Kanti kwanina niyazidla, niqhayisa ngokuthi nina ningabemi besixeko sikaNdikhoyo; nithi nina nixhomekeke kuThixo kaSirayeli, ogama linguNdikhoyo uSomandla-onke." 
Isaiah48:3 “Kudala-dala ndatsho kwangonoquku; ewe, ndazixela izinto eziza kuhla, kamva ke ndatsho suka zenzeka njengoko." 
Isaiah48:4 Kambe ke wena bendisazi ukuba uneenkani nqwa nesele, ntondini eqinis' intamo, lityendini lenyengane!" 
Isaiah48:5 Kungoko ndazibhengeza kwakudala ezi zinto, izehlo ndazixela ngaphambi kokuba zenzeke, khon' ukuze wena ungabi nako ukuthi leyo yimisebenzi *yezithixo ozinqulayo." 
Isaiah48:6 Konke endakuxelayo kwenzekile. Vuma kaloku! Kanti ke ngoku ndiza kuxela into entsha, imfihlakalo eningazange nayazi." 
Isaiah48:7 Ewe, ndiyidala ngoku; into enje zange yenzeke ngaphambili. Okanye ke ngowusithi ubuyazi kakade." 
Isaiah48:8 Zange uve uqonde nakuqonda, kuba ubungenako kakade. Bendikwazi ukuba wena awuthembekanga; ndiyakwazi ukuba ungumvukeli owaziwayo." 
Isaiah48:9 Ngenxa yegama lam ndibuya nganeno ngomsindo; ngenxa yodumo lwam ndiyazithibaza ukuze ndingakutshabalalisi. 
Isaiah48:10 Andinivavanyanga eziko okwesiliva, kodwa ndinivavanye ngehambo-nzima." 
Isaiah48:11 Kungenxa yam ukuba ndenjenje; soze ndiliyekele ngehlazo igama lam, kungekho bani wosizuza neso sihomo. Andinikisi ngaso; sesam ndodwa.”" 
Isaiah48:12 *UNdikhoyo uthi: “Bek' iindlebe uphulaphule, Yakobi, nditsho wena, Sirayeli endakubizayo. Mna ndinguNdikhoyo: ndingowokuqala, ndikwangowokugqibela." 
Isaiah48:13 Ndim owamisa iziseko zehlabathi; ndim lo owawatwabululayo amazulu. Ndithetha ngelizwi, zisuke zibekho." 
Isaiah48:14 Qokelelanani niphulaphule xa ninonke. Kakade sisiphi *isithixo esinokuvakalisa into enjengale? Ndinyule oza kuhlasela iBhabheli. Yena uza kwenza oko kufunwa ndim. 
Isaiah48:15 Kaloku ndim ngokwam endathethayo, ndim endambizayo, ndamthi jize ngempumelelo." 
Isaiah48:16 Khawusondele ke uphulaphule. Kwasekuqaleni ndathetha ngokuphandle, futhi nokufezeka kwazo kokwam.” Ewe, uMhlekazi uNdikhoyo undithumile, wandixhobisa ngoMoya wakhe." 
Isaiah48:17 Utsho ke *uNdikhoyo, uMkhululi wakho, uYedwa kaSirayeli: “Mna ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. Ndikufundisa nje kaloku ndiyakunceda; ndikufaka endleleni ekufaneleyo." 
Isaiah48:18 Akwaba wawuyiphulaphule imiyalelo yam. Ngelumpompoza njengamanzi uloyiso lwakho, budlobe okwamaza ubulungisa bakho." 
Isaiah48:19 Ngeba ke namhlanje inzala yakho yinyambalala engenakubalwa, lingaze linqanyulwe igama lakho, kananjalo lingaze litshabalale.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Phuman' eBhabheli; washiyeni amaKaledi! Bhengezani ngemihlali; ewe, memezani nazis' abantu bonke, nithi: “UNdikhoyo usihlangule isicaka sakhe uYakobi.”" 
Isaiah48:21 Ngokuya wayebakhokela kwinkqantosi ebharhileyo abantu bakhe zange bafe lunxano; wabakhuphela amanzi eliweni, suka waliqhekeza, aza ampompoz' amanzi!" 
Isaiah48:22 Ewe, uNdikhoyo uthi: “Akukho ukonwaba kwabakhohlakeleyo!”" 
Isaiah49:1 I-i-i-nzwi! Bekan' iindlebe, zizw' ezikude! Yivani ke, nina nto zihlal' ekudeni! *UNdikhoyo wandibiza ndingekaliboni ilanga; ewe, wandikhankanya ndingekazalwa." 
Isaiah49:2 Wawenza amazwi am ahlaba njengekrele; ewe, yena wandifumbatha ngesandla, wandicikiza ngathi uhombisa utolo, wandithi xhwa sendilind' umayenzeke." 
Isaiah49:3 Ke yena wathetha nam, wathi: “Wena usisicaka sam, Sirayeli; ngawe ndibhengeza ubungangamsha bam.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Ke mna ndithe: “Ndibulalekele ilize; umzabalazo wam ungamampunge. Kambe ke ibango lam likuNdikhoyo; nguThixo wam oya kundibuyekeza.” 
Isaiah49:5 UNdikhoyo owandibumba esizalweni, wandenza isicaka sakhe, ukuze ndibuyisele uYakobi kuye, ndiphuthume uSirayeli owabhacayo. Kaloku isidima ndisizuza kuNdikhoyo; amandla am ampompoza kuThixo wam." 
Isaiah49:6 UNdikhoyo uthethe wenjenje: “Njengesicaka sam akwanele okokuba ubuyisele ubuhandiba kwaYakobi, uphuthume amasalela kaSirayeli endiwalondolozileyo, koko ndikumisela ukuba ube lukhanyiso lweentlanga, ube lusindiso lwam olubandakanya ihlabathi jikelele.”" 
Isaiah49:7 UYedwa, uNdikhoyo, uThixo kaSirayeli, lowo unguMkhululi wakhe, uthi kulowo udelwe mpela-mpela, nditsho lowo ucatshukelwayo zizizwe, lowo usisicaka seziphathamandla: “Izikumkani ziya kukubona; ewe, ziya kuphakama zikhahlele, namatshawe aya kuvova ee guqaqa!” Yonke loo nto ke iza kwenzeka kuba uNdikhoyo ekunyule wena ukuze ube sisicaka sakhe, nditsho uThixo onguYedwa kaSirayeli othembekileyo." 
Isaiah49:8 *UNdikhoyo uthi: “Ayeza amathuba akholekileyo, imihla yokusindiswa. Ke mna ndiya kukusiza, ndisabele ndakuva uzibika. Ndiya kukwalúsa ndikukhusele, ngawe ndenze umnqophiso nabantu. Ngawe ndolibuyisela kubantu bam ilizwe, ndilabe eliyinkangala libe lilifa," 
Isaiah49:9 amabanjwa uwathethele uthi: ‘Yinkululeko; khululekani;’ uthi kwabo basebumnyameni: ‘Phumani, nize ekukhanyeni.’ “Bona baya kutya ngasezindleleni njengeegusha ezitya ezindulini." 
Isaiah49:10 Abayi kubuya balambe banxanwe; ilanga lentlango aliyi kubenzakalisa. Baya kwaluswa ngulowo unovelwano, abakhokelele kwimithombo empompozayo." 
Isaiah49:11 Ndogqobhoz' iintaba, ndivul' uhola, abantu bam ndibahlahlel' indlela." 
Isaiah49:12 Bona bothi gqi kwelikude – nditsho kwelasentla nasentshonalanga – bophum' eSinim kwelasezantsi.” 
Isaiah49:13 Memelelani ngovuyo, nina mazulu; yeyezela uhlahlambe, wena mhlaba; hlokomani nivume, nina zintaba! Kaloku uNdikhoyo uyabathuthuzela abantu bakhe; uhlabekile ziinkxwaleko zeentsizana zakhe." 
Isaiah49:14 Ke yena uZiyon uthi: “Hayi bo! UNdikhoyo undifulathele; iNkosi isuke yandilibala.” 
Isaiah49:15 Waphendula ke esithi: “Ngaba umfazi angalulibala na usana lwakhe, ade angavakalelwa ngowakhe umntwana? Noba ke yena angade amlibale, okokwam ke mna soze ndikufulathele," 
Isaiah49:16 kuba igama lakho ndilivambile, ndilithe tyaba esandleni sam; iindonga zakho zihlala zisemehlweni am." 
Isaiah49:17 Bayeza oonyana bakho; baza kuphinda bakuvuse; abakutshabalalisayo bayemka. 
Isaiah49:18 Khawulaqaze uqwalasele: nâbo oonyana bakho bexhontelana; nâbo bebuya begxalathelana. Ndiyafunga mna Thixo ophilayo, nawe wozingca ngoonyana bakho, uxel' umtshakazi ngobuyoko-yoko bakhe." 
Isaiah49:19 “Ngenene ilizwe lakho labhukuqwa lada labharha, kodwa ngoku loba lincinane kunabo, lingabalingani abo babuyela kulo; abo balibhukuqayo boba sebekude." 
Isaiah49:20 Abantwana obazalele ekuxhwalekeni ngeny' imini baya kuthi kuwe: ‘Lo mhlaba mncinane gqitha; sivulel' indawo, ukuze sime nathi!’" 
Isaiah49:21 Uya kwandula ke uthi: ‘Ndibathathe phi abantwana abangaka? Ndandingaphathi, ndiludlolo; kaloku ndathinjwa ndagxothwa. Kambe ke bakhuliswe ngubani aba? Mna ndasala ndiyimpula kalujaca, ngaba luphuma phi na usapho olungaka?’ ”" 
Isaiah49:22 UMhlekazi uNdikhoyo uthi: “Ndiya kuzikhweba iintlanga, ndiziphakamisele imbasa yam izizwe, zitsho zize nalo usapho lwakho, zibabeleke oonyana bakho, zizifunqule iintombi zakho." 
Isaiah49:23 Ookumkani boba ngabondli bakho, ookumkanikazi babe ziineni zakho; bothi vovololo, benik' imbeko kuwe, borhuqa phantsi ngentlonipho, utsh' uqond' ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo, soze badane abo bathembela ngam.”" 
Isaiah49:24 Ungalohlutha na ixhoba lejoni? Ungamkhulula na umthinjwa kulowo umthimbileyo? 
Isaiah49:25 Kambe yena uNdikhoyo uthi: “Yiloo nto kanye eza kwenzeka: amaxhoba othathwa kumajoni, abathinjwa bakhululwe kubathimbi. Baxabene nam abo balwa nawe; usapho lwakho lona ndiluhlangule." 
Isaiah49:26 Abakucinezelayo ndobatsho bavukelane; boqumba babe ngoomnqay' ulambile, noluntu lonke lutsho lundiqonde ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo okusindisayo, mna Mkhululi wakho, iNgangamsha kaYakobi.”" 
Isaiah50:1 *UNdikhoyo uthethe wathi: “Ùthi abantu bam ndabagxotha okomfo esahlukana nomfazi wakhe? Ziphi ke iincwadi zolo qhawukano? Ngaba ndanithengisa kubani njengomfo othengisa ngekhoboka lakhe? Hayi kaloku, nathengiswa ngenxa yezono zenu; nagxothwa wena nonyoko ngenxa yamatyala enu." 
Isaiah50:2 Ndakufika akubangakho bani undamkelayo; ndaba ngamemeza akwasabela mntu. Ngaba imfutshane na ingalo yam? Ngaba andinako na ukukukhulula? Mhlawumbi makube andinamandla na ukuze ndikusindise? Ndithi ndingakhalima lome qoko ulwandle, imilambo itsho ibharhe, iintlanzi zife kukunqaba kwamanzi; yeka ke elo phunga!" 
Isaiah50:3 Isibhakabhaka ndisivathisa ngobumnyama, amazulu anxibe ezokuzila.”" 
Isaiah50:4 UMhlekazi *uNdikhoyo undazisile into emandiyithethe, ukuze ndikhuthaze abo batyhafileyo. Ntsasa zonke undivusa ndiphulaphule njengalowo ufundiswayo." 
Isaiah50:5 UMhlekazi uNdikhoyo undivule ingqiqo; nam ke zange ndivukelane naye, ngenene zange ndirhoxe kuye." 
Isaiah50:6 Ndazinikezela kwabo bandibethayo, kwabo banditsala-tsalayo, bencothula intshebe yam, bephatha kunditshicela ebusweni bendinyelisa." 
Isaiah50:7 Kaloku uMhlekazi uNdikhoyo uyandisiza; ngoko ke andiyi kuhlazeka. Ndikulungele ukunyamezela; ewe, andisayi kudana." 
Isaiah50:8 UThixo ondithethelelayo ukufuphi nam; yena wosuka andigwebele. Ngubani ke ongade andimangalele? Makeze kaloku, siye enkundleni; makachaze izityholo andibeka zona." 
Isaiah50:9 Mna ndithethelelwa nguMhlekazi uNdikhoyo. Ngubani ke onako ukundigweba? Abandimangalelayo boguga njengengubo; nabo baya kumemethwa ngamanundu. 
Isaiah50:10 Ngoobani na abamnqula ngentlonelo uNdikhoyo, abasiphulaphulayo isicaka sakhe? Ofikelwa bubumnyama, ekude nokukhanya, makathembele ngoNdikhoyo; ewe, makakholose ngoThixo wakhe." 
Isaiah50:11 Nina baphembi bamayelenqe, isikhuni sobuya nomkhwezeli. NguNdikhoyo oya kuyenza loo nto, ke wena ufe ungcungcuthekile." 
Isaiah51:1 *UNdikhoyo uthi: “Phulaphulani, nina banxanel' ubulungisa, nina babongozana noNdikhoyo. Khangelani kwiliwa enathwetyulwa kulo, kuloo mqhokro navunjululwa kuwo." 
Isaiah51:2 Khanicinge ngoAbraham inyange, nangoSara yena ungumawokhulu. Ndambiza eyedwa kuphela, ndaza ndamsikelela waba sisizwe." 
Isaiah51:3 Inene uNdikhoyo woyithuthuzela iZiyon, akhathazeke ngenxa yamabhodlo ayo. Elibharhileyo wolijika libe ngumyezo, nentlango ibe njengomyezo waseIdeni, khona kulawule uvuyo nemincili, ibe yintsholo yengoma yokudumisa." 
Isaiah51:4 “Ndiphulaphuleni ke, bantu bam, nibek' iindlebe, sizwe sam. Mna ndowisa umthetho; ulawulo lwam lukhanyisele izizwe." 
Isaiah51:5 Ngokukhawuleza ndiza kuhlengahlengisa; usindiso lwam lusendleleni; izizwe zolawulwa ndim ngenkqu. Kaloku nezikude zindilindele; nazo zikholose ngamandla am. 
Isaiah51:6 Khanijonge amazulu phezulu, nijonge umhlaba phantsi. Amazulu othi pheselele njengomsi, umhlaba uguge njengengubo, abantu bafe njengeempukane. Ke lona usindiso lwam lohlala luhleli; ubulungisa bam soze buthini." 
Isaiah51:7 “Ndiveni, nina babaziyo ubulungisa, luhlangandini lunomthetho wam entliziyweni. Sanukuzihlupha ngâbo baninyelisayo, ningazidubi nangabo banithukayo." 
Isaiah51:8 Bonyamalala ngathi yingubo edliwe ngamanundu, ngathi buboya begusha obudliwe ngumbungu. Ubulungisa bam bona boma bumi; usindiso lwam lukwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Hoyina, Ndikhoyo! Sihlangule! Xhoba ngamandla akho usihlangule; makube njengemihla yamandulo. Kaloku nguwe owahlanganisela inabulele; nguwe owamqwenga-qwengayo uRahabhi." 
Isaiah51:10 Nguwe owalomisayo nolwandle; nguwe owavula indlela enzonzobileni, baza badlula abakhululwa bakho." 
Isaiah51:11 Abo bahlawulelweyo nguNdikhoyo baya kungena eJerusalem bechulumacha, bengqungqa bememelela ngemihlali, bathiwe jize ngovuyo ngonaphakade, bonwabe babe nemincili, bangaze babuye bazane neenzingo neenkxwaleko." 
Isaiah51:12 UNdikhoyo utsho ukuthi: “Mna ndingulowo ukuthuthuzelayo; ngani ke ukuba woyike umntu – into evuthuluka njengengca? 
Isaiah51:13 Kanti umlibele na uNdikhoyo uMenzi wakho, yena wawatwabululayo amazulu, yena walisekayo ihlabathi? Ngani ukuba uhlale ngedyudyu, usoyika ingqumbo yomcinezeli? Lowo uzungula ukukutshabalalisa soze abe nako ukukuchukumisa." 
Isaiah51:14 Abo babanjiweyo sebeza kukhululwa; abayi kufa, koko bodla ubomi obude, bangalambi, koko baxhamle intlutha." 
Isaiah51:15 Mna ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho; mna ndiyalushukumisa nolwandle, amaza alo atsho agragrame. Igama lam nguNdikhoyo uSomandla-onke." 
Isaiah51:16 Mna ndawatwabulula amazulu, ndazaneka iziseko zehlabathi. KwiZiyon ke ndithi: ‘Ke wena ungowam; imfundiso yam ndikunikile, futhi ke ndiyakukhusela.’ ”" 
Isaiah51:17 Vuka! Vuka, Jerusalem! Phaphama ude uphakame! Kaloku usizekile isohlwayo akuphathele sona *uNdikhoyo; usiqongqoloze sada sakunxilisa." 
Isaiah51:18 Ngoku ke akakho okukhokelayo – namnye kubantu bakho – engekho nakoonyana obazeleyo; tu umntu wokukurhuqa. 
Isaiah51:19 Kuwe ilishwa lishwabene ngokuphindiweyo: umhlaba wakho uvukuzeliswe yimfazwe; abantu bakho bamemethwa yindlala. Ngubani ke onokukuthuthuzela? 
Isaiah51:20 Oonyana bakho zizigede eziyobayo; bathe tywaa ezitalatweni phaya. Sebefana nenxala emgibeni. Batyakatywa yingqumbo kaNdikhoyo; umsindo woThixo wakho uphezu kwabo. 
Isaiah51:21 Yiva, Jerusalem ebandezelekileyo, wena ugxadazela ungaselanga." 
Isaiah51:22 Utsho uMhlekazi uNdikhoyo, nditsho uThixo wakho lo ukuthethelelayo: “Ngoku ndiyayisusa kuwe le ndebe, ingqumbo le ndakuseza yona, le isuke yakugxadazelisa; ngoku sobe ube sayixhamla." 
Isaiah51:23 Ndoyinika abakuphakele ingcinezelo, abo bakwenze umgaqo wokuhamba, abo bakuxangxathe ngeenyawo, abo bakuxovule njengomhlaba.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Vuka! Vuka, Ziyon! Khawuvath' amandla nokomelela; khawufak' ezingayiwayo ngokundileka. Awu, Jerusalem, sixekondini esingcwele, kula masango soze babe sangena abangalukanga nâbo *bagqwalisekileyo."
