Ezekiel11:12 Niya kuqonda ke ngoko ukuba mna ndinguNdikhoyo. Kaloku niyityeshele imimiselo yam, naphambuka kwimithetho yam, naza nazibeka mgangathweni mnye nezizwe eziningqongileyo.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Ndathi ndisashumayela njalo, wafa uPelatiya unyana kaBhenaya. Ndawa ngobuso, ndakhala ndadanduluka ndathi: “Awu, Nkosi Ndikhoyo! Ngaba uza kuyitshabalalisa tu nentsalela kaSirayeli?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Ilizwi likaNdikhoyo ndaliva lisithi: 
Ezekiel11:15 “Mntundini, abantakwenu – abantakwenu abaligazi lakho, nditsho bonke abendlu kaSirayeli abathinjiweyo – ngabo kanye ekuthethwa ngabo ngabemi baseJerusalem kusithiwa: ‘Nina nimele kude *kuNdikhoyo; lo mhlaba uwunikezele kuthi ukuba ube ngowethu.’ ”" 
Ezekiel11:16 “Ngako oko yithi: Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ndawagxothela kude emazweni, ndawasarhaza ezintlangeni, ndaza okwelo xeshana ndasisibingelelo sabo." 
Ezekiel11:17 “Ngoku ke yithi: Itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ndiya kuniqokelela ezintlangeni, ndinibuyise kuloo mazwe benithe saa kuwo, ndize ndiphinde ndininike umhlaba kaSirayeli." 
Ezekiel11:18 Abathinjwa baya kubuyela kuwo, bayisuse phakathi kwabo yonke imifanekiso engamasikizi kwanezithixo ezinezothe." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndiya kubenza bandikhonze bengenakumbi, ndibanike umoya omtsha; ndiya kuyikhupha kubo intliziyo eqaqadeke okwelitye, ndibanike intliziyo yentobeko." 
Ezekiel11:20 Baya kwenza ngokwemimiselo yam, bayithobele ngononelelo imithetho yam. Baya kuba ngabantu bam, nam ndibe nguThixo wabo." 
Ezekiel11:21 Kodwa abo bantliziyo zinamathele kwimifanekiso engamasikizi nakwizithixo ezinezothe baya kuvuna loo nto bayihlwayeleyo, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Zasuka izithunywa ezimaphiko namavili azo emi ngakuzo, zawatwabulula amaphiko azo, baza ubuqaqawuli boThixo kaSirayeli baphezu kwazo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ubuqaqawuli bukaNdikhoyo baphuma esixekweni, baya kuthi nqumama phezu kwentaba engasempumalanga kuso." 
Ezekiel11:24 Wandifunqula uMoya, waya kundibeka phakathi kwabathinjwa eBhabheli ngokombono ovela kuMoya kaThixo. Wandishiya umbono," 
Ezekiel11:25 ndaya ndabaxelela abathinjwa konke endikuboniswe nguNdikhoyo. 
Ezekiel12:1 Ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo ndaliva lisithi: 
Ezekiel12:2 “Mntundini, uhleli nabantu abangabavukeli. Banamehlo, kodwa ababoni; baneendlebe, kodwa abaphulaphuli; kuba kaloku bangabavukeli." 
Ezekiel12:3 “Ngako oko, mntundini, bopha konke okwakho, ulungiselele ukufuduka. Uze uthi emini, bekubona, unduluke, ufudukele kwenye indawo. Mhlawumbi ke bangaqonda, nakubeni bengabantu abangabavukeli." 
Ezekiel12:4 Emini njalo, bejongile, uze uwubeke phandle umthwalo wakho sewulungele imfuduko, uphume kwakuhlwa, bekukhangele njalo, ungene endleleni yemfuduko." 
Ezekiel12:5 Bekubukele njalo, gqobhoza eludongeni lwendlu, uphume nempahla yakho." 
Ezekiel12:6 Uze uyityathe bekujongile ngorhatya, ungene endleleni. Uze ubugqume ubuso bakho, ukuze ungaliboni ilizwe, kuba ndikwenze umqondiso kwindlu kaSirayeli.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Ndenza njengoko ndiyalelwe. Ndayikhupha emini impahla yam seyingumthwalo olungiselelwe imfuduko. Ndaza ngokuhlwa ndagqobhoza eludongeni ngezandla zam. Ngorhatya ndaphuma endijongile ndithwele impahla yam emagxeni. 
Ezekiel12:8 Kusasa ilizwi likaNdikhoyo ndaliva lisithi: 
Ezekiel12:9 “Mntundini, abakubuzanga na oonkanishe abayindlu kaSirayeli ukuba: ‘Wenza ntoni na?’" 
Ezekiel12:10 Uze uthi kubo: ‘Ithi iNkosi uNdikhoyo: Olu daba lundilisekileyo luqondene nenkosana eseJerusalem nayo yonke indlu kaSirayeli elapho.’ 
Ezekiel12:11 “Ewe, yithi: ‘Mna ndingumqondiso kuni. Nakuni kuya kwenzeka njengokuba kwenzekile kum.’ “Nâbo baseJerusalem baya kufuduswa." 
Ezekiel12:12 Inkosana yabo iya kuyithwala impahla yayo emagxeni, isabe ngorhatya. Iya kuvulelwa umngxuma emayiphume ngawo eludongeni. Iya kubugquma ubuso bayo, itsho ingaliboni ilizwe." 
Ezekiel12:13 Ndiya kuyithiyela ngezabatha, ize ibhajiswe zizo; ndiya kuyisa eBhabheli ilizwe lamaKaledi, kodwa yona ayisayi kulibona, yaye iya kufela apho." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ndiya kubasarhaza bonke abalandeli, nditsho nkqu amafanankosi nemikhosi. Ndiya kubaleqa ndiqhiwule ikrele." 
Ezekiel12:15 “Xa sendibenze baphalala ezintlangeni nasemazweni baya kundazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo. 
Ezekiel12:16 Kodwa ndiya kusindisa intsalela yabo ekutshatyalalisweni likrele, nendlala, nobhubhani, khon' ukuze izixele izenzo zabo ezimanyumnyezi kwezo ntlanga iya kuhamba phakathi kwazo. Xa kunjalo baya kundazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Ilizwi likaNdikhoyo ndaliva lisithi: 
Ezekiel12:18 “Mntundini, ngcangcazela xa usidla ukutya kwakho, udude kukoyika xa usela amanzi." 
Ezekiel12:19 Yithi kubantu beli lizwe: ‘Ngokuphathelele kubantu abahlala eJerusalem nakwilizwe lamaSirayeli itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ukutya kwabo baya kukutya bexhalabile, amanzi bawasele bephelelwe lithemba, kuba ilizwe labo liza kushiywa lize ngenxa yezenzo zobutshijolo zabantu balo." 
Ezekiel12:20 Izixeko ezinabantu ziya kuba ngamabhodlo, lize ilizwe libe sebugxwayibeni. Noqonda ngoko ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Ilizwi likaNdikhoyo ndaliva lisithi: 
Ezekiel12:22 “Mntundini, andibi kukho iqhalo kwaSirayeli elithi: ‘Ziyahamba zona iintsuku, wona umbono ungaphumi ntweni’?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Yithi ke kubo: ‘Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ndiza kuliphelisa eli qhalo, ukuze lingabuye livakale kwaSirayeli.’ Yithi kubo: ‘Sezisondele iintsuku zokuba yonke imibono izalisekiswe." 
Ezekiel12:24 Kaloku iza kuphela imibono elambathayo nokuhlatywa kwemihlola engento apha kwaSirayeli. 
Ezekiel12:25 Mna Ndikhoyo ndiza kuthetha endikuthethayo, kuze kuzaliseke ngokukhawuleza. Ithi iNgangalala enguNdikhoyo: Konke endikuthethayo phambi kwenu kozalisekiswa ngemihla yenu, ndlundini inenkani.’ ”" 
Ezekiel12:26 Ilizwi likaNdikhoyo ndaliva lisithi: 
Ezekiel12:27 “Mntundini, indlu kaSirayeli ithi: ‘Imibono ayibonayo yeyeminyaka ezayo, neentshumayelo zakhe zezexesha elizayo.’" 
Ezekiel12:28 “Yithi ke kubo: ‘Itsho iNgangalala enguNdikhoyo ukuthi: Akukho lizwi lam liza kulityaziswa; konke endikuthethileyo kuza kwenzeka! Nditshilo nje mna Nkosi Ndikhoyo nditshilo.’ ” 
Ezekiel13:1 Ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo ndaliva lisithi: 
Ezekiel13:2 “Mntundini, shumayela ngokuchaseneyo *nabashumayeli bakwaSirayeli abashumayela izinto abazikha engqondweni yabo, uthi kubo: Phulaphulani ilizwi likaNdikhoyo!" 
Ezekiel13:3 Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: ‘Yeha iziyatha zabashumayeli ezinkqubo ihamba ngokweentliziyo zabo, bengakhange babe nawo umbono.’" 
Ezekiel13:4 Abashumayeli bakho, Sirayeli, banjengempungutye enxiweni." 
Ezekiel13:5 Anizidubanga ngokuvingca iintanda, nilungisa udonga, nisenzela indlu kaSirayeli, khon' ukuze yomelele edabini ngomhla kaNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel13:6 Banemibono ephuthileyo; izihlabo zabo zibubuxoki. Bathi: ‘Utsho uNdikhoyo,’ kodwa engabathumanga; kanti kuyo yonke loo nto balindele ukuba udaba lwabo lufezekiswe." 
Ezekiel13:7 Anibangwa yimibono ephuthileyo nezihlabo zobuxoki xa nisithi: ‘Utsho uNdikhoyo,’ ndibe mna ndingathethanga?" 
Ezekiel13:8 “Ke ngoko ithi iNgangalala uNdikhoyo: Ngenxa yamazwi enu aphuthileyo, nemibono ebubuxoki, mna ndichasene nani, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel13:9 Isandla sam siya kuba gadalala kwabo bashumayeli babona imibono ephuthileyo, behlaba izihlabo ezibubuxoki. Abayi kuba ngamaphakathi equmrhu labantu, namagama abo akayi kubhalwa kwimiqulu yendlu kaSirayeli, bengayi kuvunyelwa ukuba banyathele kumhlaba kaSirayeli. Niya kuqonda ke ngoko ukuba mna ndiyiNkosi uNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel13:10 “Ngenxa yokulahlekisa abantu bam ngokuthi: ‘Luxolo,’ lube lona uxolo lungekho, nokuthi ziqatywe ngekalika iindonga ezakhiwe zaethe-ethe," 
Ezekiel13:11 mabaxelelwe abo baziqabileyo ukuba ziza kudilika. Ziza kufika zona iziphango ezinezichotho ezikhulu nezivondoviya zomoya. 
Ezekiel13:12 Xa ke sezidilika iindonga abantu baya kunibuza bathi: ‘Iphi ikalika ebeziqatywe yona?’ 
Ezekiel13:13 “Ngako oko ithi iNkosi uNdikhoyo: Emsindweni wam ndiza kwenza kubekho inkanyamba eya kuba nesichotho nezandyondyo zemvula eya kutshabalalisa. 
Ezekiel13:14 Ndiya kuludiliza udonga eniluqabe ikalika, nditsho luthi bhuma phantsi, kuvele isiseko salo. Luya kunityumza nife nina xa ludilikayo. Niya kwazi mhlophe xa kunjalo ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel13:15 “Umsindo wam ndiya kuwukhuphela kolo donga nakwabo baliqabe ngekalika. Ndiya kuthi kuni: ‘Ludilikile udonga; batshabalele nabo bebeliqabe ngekalika – 
Ezekiel13:16 nditsho abashumayeli bakwaSirayeli ababeshumayela eJerusalem, benemibono yoxolo kuyo, kanti kwakungekho xolo, itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo.’" 
Ezekiel13:17 “Ke ngoku, mntundini, zifulathele iintombi zabantu bakowenu ezishumayela intshumayelo eziyikha engqondweni. Zikhalimele" 
Ezekiel13:18 uthi: ‘Naku okuthethwa nguNdikhoyo iNgangalala: Yeha kwabo bafazi bafaka iintsimbi ezinyangiweyo ezihlahleni zabo, nabathwala izigqubuthelo zeendidi ngeendidi ezintloko, besenzela ukutsala abantu. Nithi ningabambisa abantu bam nize nina nisinde?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Nindinyelisile kubantu bam ngenxa yezityana ezimbalwa zerhasi neengqweqwe zesonka. Ngokubaxokisa abantu bam ababuphulaphulayo ubuxoki, nibulele ababefanele ukungafi, nasindisa abo babemele ukufa.’" 
Ezekiel13:20 “Ithi ke iNkosi uNdikhoyo: Ndichasene nezo zihombo zenu zinyangiweyo enibambisa ngazo abantu ngathi ziintaka, ndaye ndiza kuziqhawula ezingalweni zenu; ndiza kubakhulula abo bantu nibabambise okweentaka." 
Ezekiel13:21 Ndiya kuzikrazula izigqubuthelo zenu, ndibasindise abantu bam kuni, baze bangabuye baphinde babe phantsi kweempembelelo zenu. Noqonda ke ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel13:22 Ngenxa yokuwatyhafisa amalungisa ngobuxoki benu ngaphandle kwam, nangenxa yokukhuthaza kwenu abakhohlakeleyo ukuba bangaguquki kwinkohlakalo yabo ukuze businde ubomi babo," 
Ezekiel13:23 anisobe niphinde nibone imibono ephuthileyo, okanye nihlabe umhlola. Ndiya kubakhulula abantu bam kwiimpembelelo zenu. Xa kunjalo niya kundazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Amanye amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli eza kum, afika ahlala phambi kwam." 
Ezekiel14:2 Ndaza ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel14:3 “Mntundini, la madoda aqulathe *izithixo ezintliziyweni zawo, aza abeka izikhubekiso ezikhohlakeleyo phambi kobuso bawo. Ndiwavumele na ukuba abe nento ayibuzayo kum?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Ngako oko thetha nawo uwaxelele uthi: ‘Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Xeshikweni nawuphi na umSirayeli equlathe izithixo entliziyweni yakhe, waza wabeka isikhubekiso senkohlakalo phambi kwakhe, aze aye *kumshumayeli, uya kuphendulwa ndim Ndikhoyo siqu ngokunqula kwakhe izithixo okungaka." 
Ezekiel14:5 Oku ndiya kukwenzela ukubuyisa iintliziyo zabo bonke abantu bam bakwaSirayeli, abathe bandilahla ngenxa yezithixo.’" 
Ezekiel14:6 “Ngoko ke yithi kwindlu kaSirayeli: ‘Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Guqukani, nishenxe kwizithixo zenu, nahlukane nezenzo zenu zamanyundululu!’" 
Ezekiel14:7 “Xeshikweni nawuphi na umSirayeli okanye umngeneleli uthe wazikhwebula kum, waza waqulatha izithixo entliziyweni yakhe, wabeka nesikhubekiso senkohlakalo phambi kwakhe, asuke aye kubuza ngam kumshumayeli, mna Ndikhoyo ndiya kumphendula ngokwam." 
Ezekiel14:8 Ndoyichasa loo ndoda, ndiyenze umzekelo nondaba-mlonyeni. Ndiya kuyishenxisa ebantwini bam. Niya kuqonda ngoko ukuba mna ndinguNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Ukuba umshumayeli uthe walukuhlwa washumayela into engeyiyo, uya kuba ulahlekiswe ndim Ndikhoyo. Ke mna ndiya kusolula isandla sam, ndimtshabalalise angabikho phakathi kwabantu bam amaSirayeli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Baya kusithwala isono sabo – isono somshumayeli siya kulingana nesalowo ebeze kubuzisa. 
Ezekiel14:11 Xa kunjalo abantu bakwaSirayeli baya kukuyeka ukuphambuka ezindleleni zam, bahlukane nokuzityikila ngezikreqo zabo. Baya kuba ngabantu bam, nam ndibe nguThixo wabo, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel14:12 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel14:13 “Mntundini, xa lithe ilizwe landona ngokungathembeki, ndaza ndalohlwaya ngokuvalela ukuba lingakufumani ukutya, ukuze abantu balo nezilwanyana zalo zife yindlala," 
Ezekiel14:14 ngokwenene ke nokuba la madoda mathathu, uNowa, noDaniyeli, noYobi, bebenokuba kwelo zwe, bebeya kuzisindisa bona kuphela ngenxa yobulungisa babo, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Okanye ndingathi ndithe ndathumela amarhamncwa asendle kweli lizwe, aze akashiya nempunde kulo, atsho layindawo engahanjwayo ngenxa yamarhamncwa," 
Ezekiel14:16 ngokwenene ndiyafunga, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo, nokuba la madoda mathathu ebenokuba kwelo zwe ebengenakubasindisa oonyana neentombi zawo. Bekuya kusinda wona kuphela, libe lona ilizwe lisebugxwayibeni." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Okanye ndingathi ndiliphethele ikrele ilizwe, ndithi: ‘Ikrele malityakatye kulo lonke ilizwe,’ lize libulale abantu nemfuyo yabo," 
Ezekiel14:18 ngokwenene ndiyafunga, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo, nokuba la madoda mathathu ebenokuba lapho ebengayi kuba nako ukuzisindisa iintombi noonyana bawo. Bekuya kusinda wona odwa." 
Ezekiel14:19 “Kungenjalo ngendithumela ubhubhani kwelo zwe, ndiwukhuphele kulo umsindo wam, ndibulale abantu nemfuyo yabo ngempalalo-gazi." 
Ezekiel14:20 Ngokwenene ndiyafunga, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo, nokuba babelapho, ooNowa, noDaniyeli, noYobi, bebengenakuyisindisa nentsapho yabo. Bebeya kuzisindisa bona bodwa ngenxa yobulungisa babo." 
Ezekiel14:21 “Kaloku itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ukuthi: IJerusalem ndingayigweba ndiyithumele ngezibetho ezine, ezona zibi – imfazwe, nendlala, namarhamncwa, nobhubhani – ndibulale abemi bayo kunye nemfuyo yabo." 
Ezekiel14:22 Naxa kunjalo baya kubakho abasindayo – oonyana neentombi abaya kubhunca esixekweni. Baya kuphuma beze kuni, niyibone imikhwa yabo nezenzo zabo, nize nizibonele ngokwenu isizathu sokuba iJerusalem ndiyithumele ngentlekele – nditsho yonke intlekele endiyizisele yona." 
Ezekiel14:23 Ewe, niya kuzibonela ngokwenu, nixole yakubonakala kuni imikhwa yabo nezenzo zabo, niqonde ukuba andifumananga ndakwenza konke endakwenzayo kwiJerusalem, itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel15:1 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel15:2 “Mntundini, ngaba lubhetele ukhuni lomdiliya kunemithi yasehlathini?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Kukho lutho lwenziwayo na ngokhuni lomdiliya? Ngaba kukhe kwenziwe izikhonkwane zokuxhoma ngalo? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ukuba lubasiwe lwavutha macala, lwarhawuka umongo, ngaba kusekho lutho lungenziwa ngalo?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Xa belingenamsebenzi liselukhuni kubeka phi ke ngoku xa lurhawukile? 
Ezekiel15:6 “Ngako oko itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Kwimithi yehlathi ukhuni lwediliya ndilumisele ukuba lubaswe. Kuya kuba njalo nakubemi baseJerusalem. 
Ezekiel15:7 Ndiya kubachasa. Naxa sebephuma emlilweni basaya kutsha ngumlilo kwakhona. Xa sendibachasa baya kwazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo. 
Ezekiel15:8 Ndiya kuwubharhisa umhlaba kuba bengathembekanga, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel16:1 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel16:2 “Mntundini, yixelele iJerusalem ngezenzo zayo ezinezothe," 
Ezekiel16:3 uthi: Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo kwiJerusalem ukuthi: Imvelaphi nenkaba yakho ikwilizwe lamaKanana; uyihlo ngumAmori, unyoko engumHiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Ayisikwanga inkaba yakho mhla wazalwa; awuhlanjwanga nangamanzi ukuze ucoceke; awuhlikihlwanga nangetyuwa; awusongelwanga nangengubo. 
Ezekiel16:5 Akubangakho mntu uvelanayo nawe, ukuze abe nemfesane akwenzele ezi zinto. Kodwa suka walahlelwa phandle, kuba ubujongelwe phantsi mini wazalwa." 
Ezekiel16:6 “Ndathi ndidlula ndakubona ukhaba-khaba egazini lakho, ndaza ndathi, ulele njalo egazini lakho: ‘Phila!’" 
Ezekiel16:7 ndakukhulisa okwesihluma edlelweni. Wakhula wahluma waba njengelona litye lihle kumatye aqaqambileyo, antshula amabele akho, zakhula neenwele zakho, kodwa wawuze." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Ndadlula kwakhona emva kwexesha, ndathi ndakukujonga ndabona intombi eseyifikisile, ndaza ndakwambathisa ngesondo lengubo, ndabufihla ubuze bakho. Ndafunga ndenza umnqophiso nawe, waba ngowam ke ngoko, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel16:9 “Ndakufaka emanzini, ndalihlamba igazi kuwe, ndakuthambisa ngamafutha." 
Ezekiel16:10 Ndakunxiba ilokhwe ehonjisiweyo, ndakufaka iimbadada zothwathwa, ndakunxiba ilinen ecikiziweyo, ndakwambesa iingubo zexabiso." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ndakuhombisa ngamatye anqabileyo, ndakufaka izacholo ezingalweni nentsimbi yomqala entanyeni yakho." 
Ezekiel16:12 Ndaza ndakufaka amacici empumlweni nasezindlebeni zakho, ndakuthwalisa isithsaba esihle entloko." 
Ezekiel16:13 Ewe, wawuhombe ngegolide nesiliva; izinxibo zakho zizezelinen ecikiziweyo nelaphu lexabiso elihonjisiweyo. Ukutya kwakho ibingowona mgubo ucoliweyo, nobusi, namafutha omnquma. Waba mhle kakhulu ngokungathi ungukumkanikazi." 
Ezekiel16:14 Udumo lwakho lwaba ngundaba-mlonyeni ezizweni ngenxa yobuhle bakho, kuba ubuqheleqhele endikunike bona babenza babalasela ubuhle bakho, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Wasuka wathembela kubuhle bakho, lwaza udumo lwakho lwakwenza walihenyukazi. Waba lukhuko lwabahambi, baza ubuhle bakho bangobabo." 
Ezekiel16:16 Enye impahla yakho wenza ngayo isibingelelo sokunqula izithixo apho waqhuba khona izenzo zobuhenyukazi. Azenziwa ezo zinto, kungekho mfuneko yokuba zenzeke." 
Ezekiel16:17 Izihombiso zam endandikunike zona, zegolide nesiliva yam, wasuka wenza ngazo *izithixo ezingamadoda, wahenyuza nawo." 
Ezekiel16:18 Wazambathisa ngezinxibo zakho ezihonjisiweyo, wanikezela kuzo ngamafutha neziqhumiso zam." 
Ezekiel16:19 Kwanokutya endandikunike kona – owona mgubo ucoliweyo, amafutha omnquma, nobusi – wakwenza umnikelo ovumba limnandi kuzo. Ewe, kwenzeka oku, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Wathatha oonyana neentombi zakho obundizalele zona, wenza ngazo idini lokutya kwezithixo. Bebunganele na ubuhenyukazi bakho?" 
Ezekiel16:21 Wabaxhela abantwana bam, wenza idini lezithixo ngabo." 
Ezekiel16:22 Kuzo zonke izenzo zakho ezinezothe nobuhenyukazi bakho akuzikhumbulanga iimini zobutsha bakho xa wawuze ukhaba-khaba egazini lakho. 
Ezekiel16:23 “Yeha! Yeha, wena! Itsho iNgangalala iNkosi uNdikhoyo. Ngaphezu kwayo yonke inkohlakalo yakho" 
Ezekiel16:24 uzakhele ingqumba yamatye, waza wenza isibingelelo kuzo zonke iindawo eziphangaleleyo esixekweni." 
Ezekiel16:25 Ekungeneni kwesitalato ngasinye wakhe isibingelelo sakho, waza ngokwenjenjalo wabugqwalisa ubuhle bakho ngokunikezela ngomzimba wakho nakubani na odlula ngendlela." 
Ezekiel16:26 Ngaphezu koko uhenyuze namaJiputa angabamelwane bakho atshatshele ngobudoda, waza ngokwenjenjalo wandixhokonxa ngenxa yamanyala akho angaphele ndawo." 
Ezekiel16:27 Mna ke ndisolule isandla sam ndakohlwaya, ndawanciphisa amalungelo akho, ndakuyekela kwiminqweno yeentshaba zakho, nditsho iintombi zamaFilistiya ezaba nomothuko omkhulu bubufebe bakho." 
Ezekiel16:28 Uhenyuzile nawo nama-Asiriya; kaloku awaneli! 
Ezekiel16:29 Waphumela naseBhabheli, umhlaba wabarhwebi, nalapho awanela." 
Ezekiel16:30 “Hayi, ububhetye-bhetye bakho, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo. Xa usenza zonke ezi zinto uziphatha okwehenyukazi eliphoxekileyo." 
Ezekiel16:31 Xeshikweni usakha iingqumba zakho zamatye ekungeneni kwazo zonke izitalato, usenza nezibingelelo zakho kuzo zonke iindawo zesixeko eziphangaleleyo, ube wahlukile kwamanye amahenyukazi, kuba ubuyichasile intlawulo." 
Ezekiel16:32 “Mfazindini okrexezayo! Wena ufuna abahambi endaweni yomyeni wakho! 
Ezekiel16:33 Amanye amahenyukazi ahlawulwa umrhumo, kodwa wena ubapha izipho bonke abalala nawe, ubanyobe ukuze baphume kuzo zonke iindawo ukuza kulala nawe." 
Ezekiel16:34 Ke ngoko wahlukile kwamanye amahenyukazi; awulandelwa. Wahlukile wena, kuba uyahlawula endaweni yokunikwa umrhumo." 
Ezekiel16:35 “Ngoku ke, henyukazindini, phulaphula ilizwi likaNdikhoyo!" 
Ezekiel16:36 Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ekubeni ubutshiseka, waza wahamba ze xeshikweni usenza amanyala namadoda akho, ngenxa yezithixo zakho ezinezothe, othe wanikezela ngegazi labantwana bakho kuzo," 
Ezekiel16:37 ngoko ke ndiza kuwaqokelela onke amadoda akho abekuvisa ubumnandi ngokulala nawe, onke bethu, lawo ubuwathanda nalawo ubuwacaphukela. Ndiza kuwaqokelela kuzo zonke iindawo, ndize nawo phambi kwakho, ndikuhambise ze, abubone ubuze bakho." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ndiza kukugwebela isohlwayo sabafazi abakrexezayo nabaphalaza igazi; ndiza kuwukhuphela kuwe wonke umsindo wam wempindezelo yegazi nobukhwele. 
Ezekiel16:39 Emva koko ndiya kukunikezela kumakrexe akho; aya kuzidiliza ingqumba zakho zamatye, aziwise izibingelelo zakho. Aya kuyikhulula impahla yakho, azihluthe izihombo zakho zamatye anqabileyo amahle, akushiye uze ungenanto." 
Ezekiel16:40 Aya kukubizela isihlwele sikuxulube ngamatye, sikutyakatye ngamakrele." 
Ezekiel16:41 Siya kuzitshisa izindlu zakho, sikohlwaye, abanye abafazi bejongile. Ewe, ndiza kukwenza ukuyeke ukuhenyuza, uyeke nokuhlawula amakrexe." 
Ezekiel16:42 Uya kuthotha ke umsindo wam kuwe, ngokunjalo buphele nobukhwele. Ndiya kuthi cwaka ndingabi sakhathazeka." 
Ezekiel16:43 “Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ndiya kukwenza ulithwale ityala laloo nto uyenzileyo, kuba akuzikhumbulanga iimini zobutsha bakho, ngoko undenze ndaqumba ngenxa yoko ukwenzileyo. Akongezanga amanyala na phezu kwamanyundululu owenzileyo?" 
Ezekiel16:44 “Wonke umntu othanda ukuzekelisa ngamaqhalo uya kuzekelisa ngeli qhalo xa athetha ngawe: ‘Ufuzo luyegqithisa.’ 
Ezekiel16:45 Kaloku umfuzile unyoko, kuba yena wamdela umyeni wakhe kunye nabantwana bakhe; ukwangumgubo wengxowa enye noodade wenu abâthi bona babadela abayeni babo nabantwana babo. Unyoko wayengumHiti, uyihlo engumAmori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Udade wenu omkhulu wayenguSamariya owayehlala ngentla kwakho neentombi zakhe; udade wenu omncinci, owayehlala ngezantsi kwakho neentombi zakhe, wayenguSodom." 
Ezekiel16:47 Akwanelanga kukuhamba ekhondweni labo nokulinganisa amanyundululu abo, koko ubethe wegqitha kubo ngokwenza ububi." 
Ezekiel16:48 Ndiyafunga, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo, udade wenu uSodom akazenzanga izinto ozenzileyo wena neentombi zakho." 
Ezekiel16:49 “Nali ityala lodade wenu uSodom: Yena neentombi zakhe bebeziphakamisile bengaswele nto, bengakhathalele mntu; babengeloncedo kwabangamahlwempu nakwabasweleyo." 
Ezekiel16:50 Babezitsho, besenza amanyundululu phambi kwam. Ngoko ndabatshabalalisa njengoko nawe wabonayo." 
Ezekiel16:51 Izono zikaSamariya azisiso nesiqingatha sezakho; amanyundululu owenzileyo angaphezu kwawabo, into etsho oodade wenu babe ngamalungisa xa bethelekiswa nawe ngezinto ezimbi ozenzileyo." 
Ezekiel16:52 Lithwale ihlazo lakho, kuba kaloku utsho baxoleleka oodade wenu. Ngenxa yokokuba izono zakho bezizibi ngaphezu kwezabo, baba ngathi banobulungisa obungaphezu kobakho. Ngoko ke yiba neentloni, ulithwale ihlazo lakho, kuba kaloku utsho oodade wenu banjengamalungisa." 
Ezekiel16:53 “Kodwa ke noko ndiya kumbuyisela endaweni yakhe uSodom neentombi zakhe, ngokunjalo noSamariya neentombi zakhe, ngokunjalo nawe," 
Ezekiel16:54 ukuze ulithwale ihlazo lakho lokwenza izinto ezitsho bazibona bengamalungisa. 
Ezekiel16:55 Oodade wenu uSodom neentombi zakhe, noSamariya neentombi zakhe, baza kubuyela kwimbo yabo; nawe neentombi zakho uza kubuyela kwimbo yenu." 
Ezekiel16:56 Xeshikweni useneqhayiya ubucekisa nokuthetha oku ngoSodom," 
Ezekiel16:57 kuba kaloku ubugwenxa bakho babusafihlakele. Kodwa ngoku iintombi zase-Edom nabo bonke abamelwane bazo zikujongele phantsi, ngokunjalo iintombi zamaFilistiya nabo bonke abakungqongileyo." 
Ezekiel16:58 Uthi uNdikhoyo: Úza kulithwala ityala lamanyala namanyundululu akho. 
Ezekiel16:59 “Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ndiza kukuphatha ngendlela ofanele ukuphathwa ngayo, kuba kaloku uzibizele isiqalekiso ngokuwutyeshela umnqophiso." 
Ezekiel16:60 Kodwa ke noko ndiza kuwukhumbula umnqopiso endawenza nawe xa wawusemtsha, ndize ndenze umnqophiso nawe oya kuhlala uhleli." 
Ezekiel16:61 Uya kuthi ke uzikhumbule izenzo zakho, ube neentloni xa usamkela oodade wenu abakhulu kunawe nabancinane kunawe. Ndobanikela kuwe njengeentombi, naxa ndingayi kubabandakanya kumnqophiso wethu sobabini." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ndiza kuwuzinzisa umnqophiso wam nawe, ukuze wazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel16:63 Xa ndikuxolela ngako konke okwenzileyo uya kukhumbula, zikuphathe iintloni, uze ungabuye uwuvule nokuwuvula oku umlomo ngenxa yokuthobeka kwakho, itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel17:1 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel17:2 “Mntundini, thetha ngesafobe, wenzele indlu kaSirayeli umzekeliso." 
Ezekiel17:3 Yithi kubo: Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: ELebhanon kwakha kwafika into enkulu yokhozi emaphiko omeleleyo, eentsiba zinde zishinyeneyo zimabala-bala, laza lee ngcu phezu komsedare," 
Ezekiel17:4 lanqothula elona sebe liphezulu, lemka nalo, laya kwilizwe labarhwebi, laza lalityala kwesinye sezixeko zorhwebo." 
Ezekiel17:5 Lathatha imbewu kwilizwe lenu, laya kuyityala kumhlaba otyebileyo. Layityala okomngcunube kwindawo enamanzi amaninzi," 
Ezekiel17:6 yantshula yaba ngumdiliya omfutshane oxandileyo. Amasebe awo ajonga kulo ukhozi, kodwa zona iingcambu zahlala ngaphantsi. Yaba ngumdiliya oxandileyo ke, otsho ngamasebe ayokozela amagqabi." 
Ezekiel17:7 “Kodwa lalukho nolunye ukhozi olumaphiko omeleleyo neentsiba ezishinyeneyo. Ke ngoku iingcambu zomdiliya zanabela ngakulo ukusuka kule ndawo umdiliya utyalwe kuyo, namasebe axandela kulo ukufuna amanzi." 
Ezekiel17:8 Wawutyalwe kumhlaba otyebileyo, kufuphi namanzi amaninzi, ukuze uhlume, ukhule, uvelise iziqhamo, ube yinzwakazi yomdiliya." 
Ezekiel17:9 “Yithi kubo: Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ngaba lo mdiliya uza kuchuma na? Awusayi kuncothulwa na lukhozi lokuqala, lunqothule zonke iziqhamo zawo, uze ubune? Amahlumelo awo onke aya kubuna. Xa uncothulwe emhlabeni akuyi kubakho mfuneko yandoda isisigantsontso okanye iqela labantu." 
Ezekiel17:10 Khona ukuba uphinde watyalwa kwenye indawo uya kukhula na? Awukubuna mpela na xa kuthe kwavuthuza ulophu, ubune umi kuloo ndawo ubukhula kuyo?”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Ndeva ilizwi likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel17:12 “Yithi kwindlu yoonkanishe: ‘Ngaba aniyazi intsingiselo yezi zinto?’ Yithi kubo: ‘Ukumkani waseBhabheli waya eJerusalem, wamthimba ukumkani walapho nezinxiba-mxhaka zakhe, wabasa eBhabheli," 
Ezekiel17:13 waza wakhetha omnye kwabegazi, wenza isivumelwano naye, wamfungisa. Wawasusa amadoda amakhulu esizwe," 
Ezekiel17:14 khon' ukuze ubukumkani buhle, bungabi nakuphakama, bume buyiloo nto ngokugcinwa kwesivumelwano nokumkani waseBhabheli." 
Ezekiel17:15 Kodwa ukumkani waseJerusalem wamvukela owaseBhabheli, waza wathuma izithunywa eJiputa ukuba ancedwe ngamahashe nomkhosi omkhulu. Ngaba uya kuphumelela? Ngaba umntu owenza izinto ezilolu hlobo uyasinda; nditsho ofumana asikhabe isivumelwano?’" 
Ezekiel17:16 “Ndiyafunga, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo, úya kufela eBhabheli, kwilizwe laloo kumkani wayembekile waza wasidela isifungo asenze naye, wasaphula isivumelwano." 
Ezekiel17:17 Ukumkani waseJiputa nomkhosi wakhe oqinileyo oyinyambalala akasayi kumnceda nganto emfazweni, xeshikweni kusakhiwa izikanisi nezinye izixhobo zokungqinga ukuze kufe inyambalala yabantu." 
Ezekiel17:18 Usidelile isifungo ngokutyeshela umnqophiso. Akayi kusinda, kuba kaloku uzenza zonke ezi zinto ekubeni ebevumelene." 
Ezekiel17:19 “Ke ngoko ithi iNkosi uNdikhoyo: Ndiyafunga, ndiza kumohlwaya kuba uzibizele isiqalekiso ngokuwutyeshela umnqophiso." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ndiza kumthiyela ngezabatha zam, ndimbambise. Ndiza kuza naye eBhabheli, ndize ndimohlwayele apho, kuba engathembekanga kum." 
Ezekiel17:21 Wonke umkhosi wakhe osabayo uya kubulawa ngekrele, ize intsalela iphalale. Ngoko niya kundazi ukuba mna Ndikhoyo ndithethile." 
Ezekiel17:22 “INkosi uNdikhoyo ithi: Mna ngokwam ndiya kukha isebe eliphezulu lomsedare, ndilityale; ndiya kukha ingetye-ngetyana yesebe kwawona aphezulu emthini, ndilityale encotsheni yentaba ephakamileyo." 
Ezekiel17:23 Ndiya kulityala kweleentaba zakwaSirayeli; liya kutsho ngamasebe, livelise iziqhamo, libe ngumsedare wodidi. Iintlobo-ntlobo zeentaka ziya kwakha iindlwana zazo kuwo; ziya kuhlala emthunzini wamasebe awo." 
Ezekiel17:24 Yonke imithi yasendle iya kundazi ukuba mna Ndikhoyo ndiyawuwisa umthi omde, omfutshane ndiwenze ube mde. Ndiya wenza ubune umthi oluhlaza, ndiwuhlumise umthi obusowomile. “Ndithethile nje mna Ndikhoyo, ndiya kukwenza oko.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel18:2 “Bantundini, nithetha ukuthini ezweni lakwaSirayeli xa nicaphula kweli qhalo lithi: “ ‘Ooyise bâtya iidiliya ezikrwada, suka kwabuthelezi amazinyo abantwana’?" 
Ezekiel18:3 “Ndiyafunga, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo, anisayi kuphinda nicaphule kweli qhalo kwaSirayeli." 
Ezekiel18:4 Kaloku wonke ophilayo ngowam; nditsho uyise nonyana, bobabini ngabam ngokufanayo. Uya kufa umntu othe wona." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Nanku umfo olilungisa, owenza okulungileyo kwaphela:" 
Ezekiel18:6 akathathi nxaxheba kwizibingelelo zasezintabeni, okanye athembele *kwizithixo zendlu kaSirayeli; akamhlazisi umka-mmelwane, okanye alale nomfazi osexesheni;" 
Ezekiel18:7 akacinezeli mntu, kodwa uyakubuyisa oko bekubanjiswa ngako ebolekisa; akanguye umphangi, koko ubapha ukutya abalambileyo, abambese abahamba ze;" 
Ezekiel18:8 akaxhaphazi mntu xa ebolekisa, hayi, akabizi nzuzo igabadelayo; akavani nokwenza okungalunganga, ababambeneyo ubagwebela ngolungelelwano." 
Ezekiel18:9 Wenza ngokwemimiselo yam, anyaniseke ekugcineni imithetho yam. “Lowo ke ulilungisa; ngenene uya kubudla ubomi, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Mhlawumbi indoda le inonyana othanda ukulwa, aphalaze igazi, okanye ade enze nezinye izinto ezingatshongo khona," 
Ezekiel18:11 (naxa uyise engazange wazenza ezo zinto): “Uthatha inxaxheba kwizibingelelo zasezintabeni; uyamhlazisa umfazi wommelwane; 
Ezekiel18:12 uyawacinezela amahlwempu nabasweleyo; ungumphangi; akayibuyisi impahla abeyibanjiswe ngobolekayo; unqula izithixo; wenza amanyundululu; 
Ezekiel18:13 uyabaxhaphaza abantu xa ebolekisa, ewe, ubiza inzuzo engaphaya. “Ngaba uya kubudla ubomi umntu onjalo? Hayi! Ngokwenza onke la manyundululu umelwe kukufa, avune into abeyihlwayele." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Xa ngaba lo nyana unonyana obubonayo bonke ubugwenxa bukayise, aze athi kunjalo angahambi ekhondweni lakhe:" 
Ezekiel18:15 “Akathathi nxaxheba kwizibingelelo zasezintabeni, okanye anqule izithixo zakwaSirayeli; akamhlazisi umka-mmelwane;" 
Ezekiel18:16 akacinezeli mntu okanye abize isibambiso kulowo ubolekayo; akanguye umphangi, kodwa ubapha ukutya abalambileyo, abambese abahamba ze;" 
Ezekiel18:17 ubethela kude esonweni; akabaqhathi abo ababolekayo, hayi akababizi inzuzo engaphaya; uyayithobela imithetho, enze ngokwemimiselo yam. “Akayi kufa ngenxa yesono sikayise, koko uya kubudla ubomi." 
Ezekiel18:18 Kodwa yena uyise uya kufa ngenxa yesono sakhe, kuba ebaxhaphazile abantu, wamkhuthuza umntakwabo, wenza okungalunganga kumawabo." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Niyabuza ke nina: ‘Ngani ukuba unyana angalithwali ityala likayise?’ Kaloku unyana wenze ubulungisa, wahamba ngokwemiyalelo yam; yena uya kubudla ubomi." 
Ezekiel18:20 Ngumntu owonileyo oya kufa. Unyana akayi kulithwala ityala likayise, noyise akayi kulithwala ityala lonyana. Olungileyo uya kuvuzwa ngobulungisa bakhe, okhohlakeleyo ohlwaywe ngenkohlakalo yakhe." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Kodwa ukuba okhohlakeleyo uthe wazishiya izono zakhe, wahamba ngokwayo yonke imimiselo yam, wenza okulungileyo nobulungisa, akayi kufa, kodwa uya kubudla ubomi." 
Ezekiel18:22 Zonke izikreqo azenzileyo aziyi kuphinda zikhunjulwe. Uya kudla ubomi ngenxa yobulungisa abenzileyo. 
Ezekiel18:23 Nanku ke umlomo weNkosi uNdikhoyo: Ngaba kuyandikholisa na ukufa komntu okhohlakeleyo? Hayi bo, into endikholisayo kukuba azijike iindlela zakhe, aze adle ubomi." 
Ezekiel18:24 “Xa ilungisa libulahla ubulungisa, lize lingene enkohlakalweni, lenze amanyundululu abefudula esenziwa ngokhohlakeleyo, lingabudla njani ubomi? Bonke ubulungisa ebelifudula libenza abuyi kuba sakhunjulwa. Liya kufa kuba lingathembekanga, lifela izono zalo." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Ke nina nithi: ‘Inkqubo kaNdikhoyo ayinalungelelwano.’ Phulaphula, ndlu kaSirayeli: Ngaba inkqubo yam asiyiyo eyolungelelwano na? Yinkqubo yenu kaloku engenalo ulungelelwano." 
Ezekiel18:26 Ukuba ilungisa lithe laphambuka ebulungiseni, lenza isono, liya kufa ngenxa yesono eso." 
Ezekiel18:27 Kodwa ukuba okhohlakeleyo uthe wayilahla inkohlakalo yakhe, wenza ubulungisa, ngokwenjenjalo uya kubusindisa ubomi bakhe." 
Ezekiel18:28 Kuba eziqondile iziphoso zakhe, waza wazilahla, akayi kufa, koko uya kudla ubomi." 
Ezekiel18:29 Kodwa ke noko indlu kaSirayeli isatsho ukuthi: ‘Inkqubo kaNdikhoyo ayinalungelelwano.’ Ndlu kaSirayeli, inolungelelwano inkqubo yam. Ziindlela zenu ezingenalo ulungelelwano." 
Ezekiel18:30 “Ngako oko, ndlu kaSirayeli, umntu ngamnye kuni ndiza kumgweba ngokwezenzo zakhe, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo. Guqukani! Rhoxani kuzo zonke izikreqo enizenzayo, ukuze ningatshabalali ngenxa yenkohlakalo yenu." 
Ezekiel18:31 Yahlukanani nezikreqo ebenifudula nizenza, nizifumanele intliziyo entsha, nomoya omtsha. Ngani ukuba nife, ndlu kaSirayeli?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Andikholiswa kukufa kwakhe nabani na, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo. Guqukani, nidle ubomi!”" 
Ezekiel19:1 “Yitsho ngesililo ngenxa yeenkosi zakwaSirayeli," 
Ezekiel19:2 uthi: “ ‘Unyoko wayeyingonyama phakathi kweengonyama! Ubebuthuma phakathi kwamathole eengonyama, esanyisa amathole akhe." 
Ezekiel19:3 Walondla lakhula elinye ithol' iduna, languxholovane wengonyama. Yafund' ukudlavuz' ixhoba, yawathi nqwam-nqwam amadoda." 
Ezekiel19:4 Yaduma ezizweni, bayombela umgibe, yabanjiswa. Bayirhola ngamagwegwe, baya nayo eJiputa." 
Ezekiel19:5 “ ‘Akuphela amathemba kunina, lakuba iqhayiya lakhe limkile, wathabatha elinye kumathole akhe, walenza uxholovane wengonyama." 
Ezekiel19:6 Yanyalasa phakathi kweengonyama, kuba kaloku yayisisigantsontso sengonyama; yafunda ukudlavuza amaxhoba nokuwathi nqwam-nqwam amadoda." 
Ezekiel19:7 Yangena ezililini zawo, yenza iziqwenga ezixekweni. Yaduma larhwaqela lonke ilizwe kwanabo bangabemi balo." 
Ezekiel19:8 Zayivukela izizwe, nabantu bemimandla esondeleyo; bayithiyela ngezabatha, yabhajiswa emgibeni wabo." 
Ezekiel19:9 Bayirhola ngamagwegwe, bayifaka ehokweni; beza nayo kukumkani waseBhabheli, yavalelwa entolongweni. Awabe uphinde uviwe umgqumo wayo kwiintaba zakwaSirayeli." 
Ezekiel19:10 “ ‘Unyoko ubenjengomdiliya okuvelisileyo, otyalwe kufuphi namanzi, uqhamile uyokozela amasebe kuba emaninzi amanzi." 
Ezekiel19:11 Ebomelele amasebe awo, efanele intonga yabalawuli. Ubumde, ubuvelele utyani, ubalasele ngobude nangamasebe ashinyeneyo." 
Ezekiel19:12 Ngomsindo wancothulwa, wawiswa phantsi emhlabeni; wabuna lulophu, zavuthuluka iziqhamo; loma isebe elomeleleyo, labaswa emlilweni." 
Ezekiel19:13 Kungokunje utyalwe entlango, kumhlaba owome nko." 
Ezekiel19:14 Umlilo wanwenwela kwelinye lamasebe awo, zatsha iziqhamo. Akusekho sebe lomeleleyo elifanele intonga yabalawuli.’ “Sisililo esi; masibe sisililo ke.”" 
Ezekiel20:1 Ngosuku lweshumi kwinyanga yesihlanu ngonyaka wesixhenxe, kweza kum iqela lamadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, ahlala phambi kwam, eze kubuzisa *kuNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel20:2 Ndeva ilizwi likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel20:3 “Mntundini, thetha namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, uthi kuwo: Ithi iNgangalala uNdikhoyo: Nize kubuzisa kum na? Ngokwenene ndiyafunga andiyi kunivumela nibuzise kum, itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel20:4 “Mntundini, bagwebe! Ewe, bagwebe! Baxelele ngezenzo ezinezothe zooyise," 
Ezekiel20:5 uthi kubo: Naku okuthethwa yiNgangalala uNdikhoyo: Mhla ndazinyulela uSirayeli, ndafunga ndamisa izibhozo phambi kwesizukulwana sendlu kaYakobi, ndaza ndazityhila kubo eJiputa. Ewe, ndamisa isibhozo, ndathi kubo: ‘Mna ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu.’" 
Ezekiel20:6 Ngaloo mhla ndafunga kubo ndathi ndiya kubakhupha eJiputa, ndibase kwilizwe endibafunele lona, ilizwe eliphuphuma ubisi nobusi, elona lizwe lilibhongo emazweni." 
Ezekiel20:7 Ndaza ndathi kubo: ‘Omnye nomnye kuni makahlukane *nemifanekiso enezothe esenizimisele kuyo, niyeke ukuzigqwalisa *ngezithixo zaseJiputa. Ndim uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu.’" 
Ezekiel20:8 “Bandivukela, bala ukundiphulaphula, abayilahla imifanekiso enezothe ababezimisele kuyo, abazilahla izithixo zaseJiputa. Ndatsho ke ukuthi ndiya kuyikhuphela kubo ingqumbo yam; baya kuwuva umsindo wam eJiputa." 
Ezekiel20:9 Kodwa ngenxa yegama lam ndenza ngako konke ukuba lingabandakanywa nokungendawo zizizwe abahlala phakathi kwazo nendizityhile phambi kwazo kumaSirayeli xa ndandiwakhupha eJiputa. 
Ezekiel20:10 Ndawakhupha ke eJiputa, ndaza ndawazisa entlango." 
Ezekiel20:11 Ndawanika imimiselo yam, ndawabekela nemithetho yam, ngokuba umntu oyithobelayo uya kudla ubomi ngayo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Ndada ndawamisela *iMihla yam yokuPhumla njengomqondiso phakathi kwam nawo, ukuze azi ukuba mna Ndikhoyo ndiwenze abantu ababodwa." 
Ezekiel20:13 “Kodwa kuko konke oku abantu bakwaSirayeli bandivukela entlango, bayityeshela imimiselo yam, bayilahla imithetho yam – nakuba lowo uyithobelayo eya kudla ubomi ngenxa yayo – bayinyelisa kwaphela iMihla yam yokuPhumla. Ndatsho ukuthi ndiya kuyikhuphela kubo ingqumbo yam, ndibatshabalalise entlango." 
Ezekiel20:14 Kodwa ngenxa yegama lam ndenza ngako konke ukuba lingenyeliswa emehlweni ezizwe abahlala phakathi kwazo nezandibona xa ndadibakhupha. 
Ezekiel20:15 Kwakhona ndafunga entlango ndisithi andiyi kubasa kwilizwe endabanika lona, ilizwe eliphuphuma ubisi nobusi, ilizwe elilibhongo emazweni," 
Ezekiel20:16 kuba bayilahla imithetho yam, baza bayityeshela imimiselo yam, bayinyelisa iMihla yam yokuPhumla. Kaloku babethe swii zizithixo zabo." 
Ezekiel20:17 Kodwa ke noko ndaba nenceba kubo, ndaza andabatshabalalisa baphelele entlango." 
Ezekiel20:18 Entlango ndithe kubantwana babo: ‘Maze ningahambi ngemimiselo yooyihlo, okanye nithobele imithetho yabo, nizigqwalise ngezithixo zabo." 
Ezekiel20:19 Mna ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu; yenzani ngokwemimiselo yam, niyithobele imithetho yam ngononelelo." 
Ezekiel20:20 Yigcineni iyodwa iMila yam yokuPhumla, ukuze ibe ngumqondiso phakathi kwam nani. Kwakuba njalo niya kwazi ukuba mna ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu.’" 
Ezekiel20:21 “Kodwa nabo abantwana bandivukela, bayityeshela imimiselo yam, baza abayigcina imithetho, nakuba umntu oyithobelayo aya kudla ubomi ngayo, bayinyelisa iMihla yam yokuPhumla. Ngako oko ndathi ndiya kuyikhuphela kubo ingqumbo yam, uphelele kubo umsindo wam entlango apho." 
Ezekiel20:22 “Kodwa ke noko ndazibamba ngenxa yegama lam, ndenza ngako konke endinako ukuba linganyeliswa ezintlangeni abahleli phakathi kwazo nezandibonayo xa ndandibakhupha." 
Ezekiel20:23 Ndaza ke entlango apho ndafunga kubo ndiphakamise isibhozo ukuba ndiya kubacitha-chitha babe ziimbacu emazweni," 
Ezekiel20:24 kuba kaloku abayithobelanga imithetho yam, bayilahla nemimiselo yam, bayinyelisa neMihla yam yokuPhumla, balangazelela izithixo zooyise." 
Ezekiel20:25 Ndabayeka bahamba ngemimiselo engeyiyo, bathobela nemithetho abangenakudla ubomi ngayo;" 
Ezekiel20:26 ndabayeka bazigqwalisa ngeminikelo yabo – idini lezibulo – khon' ukuze batsho barhwaqele, ze bandazi mna ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Ngoko ke, mntundini, thetha nabantu bakwaSirayeli, uthi: Itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ooyihlo bandinyelisa ngokungathembeki." 
Ezekiel20:28 “Ndathi ndakufika nabo kumhlaba endandifungile ukuba ndiya kubanika wona, bona baba ngábona induli ephakamileyo okanye umthi oqhamileyo, basuka benza amadini neminikelo, into eyandixhokonxayo, bade banikela nangeziqhumiso ezivumba limnandi nangezinto ezithululwayo." 
Ezekiel20:29 Ndabuza ndathi kubo: ‘Sisiphi esi sibingelelo niquqela kuso?’ ” (Nanamhla oku kuthiwa sisibingelelo.) 
Ezekiel20:30 “Ke ngoko yithi kwindlu kaSirayeli: Itsho iNgangalala *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ngaba niza kuzigqwalisa nixele ooyihlo, nilangazelela *izithixo ezinezothe?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Xa ninikezela izipho zenu – idini elingoonyana benu emlilweni – niyazigqwalisa nangoku ngezithixo zenu. Ke, mzi kaSirayeli, nithi mandiniyeke nibuzise kum? Ndiyafunga, mna Nkosi Ndikhoyo, andisokuze ndiyivume loo nto." 
Ezekiel20:32 “Nina nithi: ‘Sifuna ukufana nezinye iintlanga, nabanye abantu behlabathi abanqula umthi nelitye.’ Kodwa ayisokuze ihle loo nto niyifunayo." 
Ezekiel20:33 Itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ndiyafunga, ndiza kunilawula ngesandla esigadalala, niyive ingqumbo yam." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ngamandla am amakhulu ndiya kuniphuthuma ezizweni, ndinibuyise emazweni ebenibhacele kuwo ngenxa yengqumbo yam." 
Ezekiel20:35 Ndiya kunibeka kwintlango yeentlanga, ndinigwebe sijongene ubuso ngobuso." 
Ezekiel20:36 “Itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ndiya kunigweba njengoko ndandenzile kooyihlo kwintlango yaseJiputa. 
Ezekiel20:37 Ndiya kunalusa nihambe phantsi komsimelelo wam, ndinifake phantsi kwembophelelo yomnqophiso." 
Ezekiel20:38 “Ndiya kubakhuphela ngaphandle abo banenkani bandivukelayo. Nakuba ndiya kubakhupha kwilizwe abaphambukele kulo, kodwa abayi kungena kwilizwe lakwaSirayeli. Niya kuqonda ngoko ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel20:39 “Kuni ke, ndlu kaSirayeli, itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Hambani nonke ngabanye, niye kunqula izithixo zenu ezinezothe. Kodwa kamva niya kundiphulaphula, nahlukane nokunyelisa igama lam elingcwele ngeminikelo nezithixo zenu." 
Ezekiel20:40 “Nanku umlomo weNkosi uNdikhoyo: Phezu kwentaba yam eyodwa, intaba ephakamileyo kaSirayeli, apho kanye elizweni, kulapho iya kundinqula khona indlu kaSirayeli iphela, nam ndoyamkela. Apho ndiya kuyifuna imirhumo yenu neminikelo yenu ekhethiweyo kwakunye namadini enu awodwa." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ndiya kunamkela okwesiqhumiso esivumba limnandi xa ndiniphuthuma ezizweni ndinihlanganisa kuloo mazwe nibhacele kuwo, ndize ndizityhile ubungcwele bam kuni, ezinye izizwe zibona." 
Ezekiel20:42 Niya kundazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo xa ndiningenisa elizweni lakwaSirayeli, ilizwe endafunga ndamisa isibhozo ukuba ndiya kulinikezela kooyihlo." 
Ezekiel20:43 Apho ke niya kuyikhumbula indlela ebeniziphethe ngayo, nezenzo zenu ezinigqwalisileyo, nize nizizonde ngobugwenxa benu." 
Ezekiel20:44 Niya kundazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo xa sendinibonelela egameni lam, ndingazinanze nganto iindlela zenu ezigwenxa nezenzo zenu zenkohlakalo, ndlu kaSirayeli. Nguwo lowo umlomo weNgangalala iNkosi uNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel20:45 Ndeva ilizwi likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel20:46 “Mntundini, bheka emzantsi, wenze intshumayelo echasene nomzantsi namahlathi awo." 
Ezekiel20:47 Yithi kwihlathi lomzantsi: Live izwi likaNdikhoyo. Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ndiza kukuntumeka ngomlilo oya kutshisa yonke imithi yakho eluhlaza neyomileyo. Akukho uya kulicima idangatye elivuthayo elosuka ligqatse bonke ubuso ngezantsi nangentla elizweni. 
Ezekiel20:48 Wonke umntu uya kuqonda ukuba ngumlilo ophenjwe ndim Ndikhoyo, kuba awuyi kucima.”" 
Ezekiel20:49 Ndithe ke mna: “Yini, Ngangalala Ndikhoyo, baza kuthi: ‘Úyantsonkotha kwakhona!’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel21:2 “Mntundini, bhekisa eJerusalem, usikhalimele isibingelelo kwanelizwe lakwaSirayeli." 
Ezekiel21:3 Yithi kulo: Utsho uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ndichasene nawe! Ndiya kulithi rhuthu ikrele lam esingxobeni salo, lidle kolilungisa nakokhohlakeleyo ngokufanayo." 
Ezekiel21:4 Njengoko ndiza kubulala olilungisa nokhohlakeleyo ikrele lam liza kugwaza bonke abantu ukusuka emzantsi kuye emntla. 
Ezekiel21:5 Baya kuqonda ngoko ke bonke abantu ukuba mna Ndikhoyo ndilikhuphile ikrele lam esingxobeni salo; kwaye alisokube liphinde libuyele. 
Ezekiel21:6 “Ngako oko, mntundini, yenza incwina! Yenze phambi kwabo incwina yentliziyo eyaphukileyo nokudandatheka okukhulu." 
Ezekiel21:7 Bakuthi bakubuza: ‘Yincwina yani na le uyenzayo?’ wophendula ngelithi: ‘Ndenziwa ludaba oluzayo. Luya kuzenza iintliziyo zibe nedyudyu, aphele amandla ezandleni; iya kudakumba imiphefumlo, agevezele amadolo.’ Luyeza! Luyeza, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel21:8 Ndive ilizwi likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel21:9 “Mntundini, shumayela uthi: Utsho uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Ikrele, ikrele, intshengeca ebengezelayo," 
Ezekiel21:10 eseyilungele ukugwaza, ibengezela okombane ulenyeza. Khawutsho, nyana, ngaba singavuya na umsimelelo ugeca yonk' imithi?" 
Ezekiel21:11 Ikrele selilungele ukusulwa ligude lize kuthiwa hlasi ngesandla; ewe, lilolwe labengezela, lilungele isandla somgwazi." 
Ezekiel21:12 Khala wenze isijwili, mntundini, kuba liza kudla kubantu bam, liza kudla ezinkosini zakwaSirayeli. Ziza kuba sisisulu sekrele zona nabantu bam. Hlunguzelisa intloko wena;" 
Ezekiel21:13 luyeza lona uvavanyo. Bekutheni ukuze uwudele umsimelelo? Hayi, alusayi kuba nampumelelo, itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel21:14 Ngako oko shumayela, mntundini, ude ubethe ngesandla. Ikrele maligwaze kabini, okanye kude kube kathathu. Likrele lokutshabalalisa; ewe, ikrele lokubhubhisa liza kuvela macal' onke." 
Ezekiel21:15 Ziya kugubha iintliziyo nabafayo baya kuba yinyambalala, kuba ikrele lentshabalalo liya kuba kumasango onke. Awu! Liya kumenyezela okombane, kuba lithiwe qhiwu ukuze ligwaze." 
Ezekiel21:16 Awu, krele, yidla kosekunene, udle kosekhohlo, nakuwo onke amacala." 
Ezekiel21:17 Nam ngokwam ndiya kubetha ngesandla, nengqumbo yam iya kuthotha. Ndithethile mna Ndikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Ndeva ilizwi likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel21:19 “Mntundini, khomba iindlela ezimbini eziya kukhokela umkhosi wokumkani waseBhabheli kweli lizwe. Zombini ezi ndlela maziphume ndawonye. Yenza umqondiso kuloo ndawo iphambuka khona indlela eya esixekweni." 
Ezekiel21:20 Umkhosi walathise indlela eya kwiRabha yama-Amon, uze uwalathise nendlela eya kwaJuda esixekweni esinqatyisiweyo saseJerusalem." 
Ezekiel21:21 Kaloku ukumkani waseBhabheli uya kunqumama ekudibaneni kweendlela zombini, afune umqondiso. Uya kwenza amaqashiso ngeentolo, avumise kwizithixo zakhe; uya kujonga nasesibindini." 
Ezekiel21:22 Iqashiso lesandla sasekunene liya kumalathisa eJerusalem, apho aya kumisa khona izigodo zokudiliza, ayalele ukuba ikrele malidle emntwini, ahlabe umkhosi wokudiliza amasango ngezigodo zakhe, akhe izikanisi ezayame iindonga zokunqabisa, asirhangqe isixeko." 
Ezekiel21:23 Umqondiso uya kuba ngathi yimpazamo kwabo baya kuba bephantsi kolawulo lwakhe eJerusalem. Kodwa uya kubakhumbuza ngobutyala babo, abathimbe." 
Ezekiel21:24 “Ke ngoko uthi *uNdikhoyo iNgangalala: Ngenxa yokuba, bantundini, ityala lenu nilibonakalise nazicacisa ukuba ningabavukeli, nazityhila nezono zenu ngazo zonke izenzo zenu, ngoko ke niya kuthinjwa." 
Ezekiel21:25 “Wena nkosana yakwaSirayeli ehlazekileyo nekhohlakeleyo, ifikile eyakho imini; ixesha lokohlwaywa lilo eli." 
Ezekiel21:26 Itsho iNgangalala iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Khulula iqhiya, uthule isithsaba. Izinto ziguqukile: obesezantsi uza kuphakanyiswa, aze athotywe ophakamileyo." 
Ezekiel21:27 Inxuwa! Inxuwa! Isixeko ndosenza sibe linxuwa – nxuwa elo lingayi kuvuswa de afike lowo ufanele ukulivusa. Isixeko ndiya kusinikela ezandleni zakhe ke. 
Ezekiel21:28 “Wena ke, mntundini, shumayela uthi: INgangalala uNdikhoyo ibhekisa kuma-Amon nezingcikivo zawo, ithi: “Ikrele, ikrele lokubulala, liyabengezela, lifuna emntwini, limenyezela okombane." 
Ezekiel21:29 Nakuloo mibono ingeyonyani, mibono leyo ingawe, xa kuvunyiswa ngawe, wozitsheca iintamo zabakhohlakeleyo abafanele ukubulawa; kuba imini yabo ifikile, ixesha lokohlwaywa kwabo ligalelekile." 
Ezekiel21:30 Libuyisele ikrele esingxobeni salo; mna ndiya kukohlwayela kuloo ndawo yokuvela kwakho; ewe, ndokugweba elizweni looyihlo-mkhulu." 
Ezekiel21:31 Ndiya kuyikhuphela kuwe ingqumbo yam, ndikuvuthulule ngoshushu wona umsindo. Ndiya kukwenza ixhoba lezikrelemnqa, amachule kanye okubhubhisa." 
Ezekiel21:32 Uya kutsha njengeenkuni emlilweni; igazi lakho liya kuphalala kwelakowenu. Uya kulityalwa ukuba wakha wakho. Kaloku ndithethile mna Ndikhoyo.” 
Ezekiel22:1 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel22:2 “Mntundini, sigwebe, ewe, sigwebe esi sixeko siphalaza igazi! Sixelele zonke izenzo zaso ezinezothe," 
Ezekiel22:3 uthi: Itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Yeha, sixekondini esizibizela intshabalalo ngegazi eliphalazwa phakathi kuso nesizigqwalisa *ngezithixo eziqingqiweyo," 
Ezekiel22:4 unetyala ngenxa yegazi oliphalazileyo, wazigqwalisa ngezithixo oziqingqileyo. Iintsuku zakho zifezekile, nesiphelo seminyaka yakho sesisondele. Ngako oko ndiza kukwenza into ephoxekileyo phakathi kweentlanga, ube yintlekisa emazweni onke." 
Ezekiel22:5 Uya kuphoxwa ngabakufutshane nabakude, sixekondini esidume kakubi, nesizele luqhushululu." 
Ezekiel22:6 “Khangela iinkosi zakwaSirayeli ezihlala kuwe zisebenzisa amagunya azo ukuze ziphalaze igazi. 
Ezekiel22:7 Kuwe, Jerusalem, abantwana ababenzeli imbeko ooyise noonina. Bayacinezelwa abangeneleli; ziphathwa kakubi iinkedama nabahlolokazi." 
Ezekiel22:8 Zideliwe izinto ezinikelwe kum, yaxajelwa *iMihla yam yokuPhumla." 
Ezekiel22:9 Apho kuwe kunyakazela amadoda anolwimi, azimisele ukuphalaza igazi; apho kuwe kuhlala abantu abadla kwizibingelelo zasezintabeni, benze neentlondi." 
Ezekiel22:10 Apho kuwe kuhlala amadoda alala nabafazi booyise, alala nabafazi abasexesheni, benomlaza ke ngoko." 
Ezekiel22:11 Apho kuwe kuhlala amadoda alala nabafazi babamelwane, noomolokazana bawo, noodade bawo ngokooyise." 
Ezekiel22:12 Apho kuwe kukho amadoda athengwayo ukuba abulale; kukho abadlela abanye ngokubabiza ingeniselo egqithileyo abamelwane ababolekise ngemali kubo. Mna undilibele, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel22:13 “Ngokwenene mna ndiya khamnqa ngenxa yengeniselo yakho yobuqhetseba nokuphalaza kwakho igazi. 
Ezekiel22:14 Ngaba uya kuba naso na isibindi kwanamandla mhla sahlangana? Nditshilo nje mna Ndikhoyo nditshilo, ndiya kuyenza loo nto." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ndiya kukusarhaza phakathi kweentlanga, utsho uphalale kwamanye amazwe; kunjalo nje ndiza kuwuphelisa umlaza onawo." 
Ezekiel22:16 Zakukubona uxabhelekile ezinye izizwe uya kutsho uqonde ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo.” 
Ezekiel22:17 Ndeva ilizwi likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel22:18 “Mntundini, indlu kaSirayeli xa iyonke kum seyinjengentlenge yobhedu, nenkcenkce, nesinyithi, nelothe. Ewe, injengentlenge yesiliva esele kwiziko lokunyibilikisa." 
Ezekiel22:19 Ke ngoko itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Njengoko niyintlenge ndiza kunibutha nonke, ndinibuthele eJerusalem." 
Ezekiel22:20 Ndiya kuxelisa amadoda xa ebutha isiliva, nobhedu, nesinyithi, nelothe, nenkcenkce, aze aziphose kwiziko lokunyibilikisa, awuvuthele umlilo. Nam emsindweni wam nakwingqumbo yam ndiya kuniphosa esixekweni, ndininyibilikise." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ndiya kunibutha ndinivuthele ngomsindo wam ovuthayo, ninyibilikele eJerusalem." 
Ezekiel22:22 Niya kunyibilikela kuyo nixele isiliva inyibilikela eziko. Xa kunjalo ke niya kwazi ukuba mna Ndikhoyo ndiwukhuphele kuni umsindo wam.” 
Ezekiel22:23 Kwakhona ndeva ilizwi likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel22:24 “Mntundini, yithi kweli lizwe: ‘Ungumhlaba ongafumananga zimvula namikhwitsho ngexesha lengqumbo.’" 
Ezekiel22:25 Kukho iyelenqe leenkosana zawo elifana noburhalarhume bengonyama egqumayo, iqwenga ixhoba. Ziyabaqwenga abantu, zibaphanga izinto zabo zexabiso, zitsho ilizwe lazala ngabahlolokazi." 
Ezekiel22:26 Ababingeleli balo mhlaba bayawugqwetha umthetho wam; bayazixabhela izinto ezinikelwe kum; abahluli phakathi kwento eyodwa nento nje; abawucacisi umahluko phakathi kwento enomlaza nenyulu; abakukhathalele ukuhlonitshwa *koMhla woPhumlo; ngoko nditsho ndanyeliseka phakathi kwabo. 
Ezekiel22:27 Amagosa alo mhlaba anjengeengcuka eziqwenga amaxhoba: aphalaza igazi, abulale abantu, asekeleze inzuzo yobutshijolo." 
Ezekiel22:28 Ezi zenzo abashumayeli bazihombisa ngemibono engeyonyani nangezihlabo zobuxoki, besithi: ‘Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo,’ abe uNdikhoyo engakhange athethe." 
Ezekiel22:29 Abantu balo mhlaba bayabaxhaphaza abanye; bayabakhuthuza nokubakhuthuza; bayawacinezela amahlwempu neembedlenge; bayabadlakathisa abangeneleli, babaphathe ngokungekho mthethweni." 
Ezekiel22:30 “Ndafuna phakathi kwabo indoda yokwakha udonga, ize ime esikrobeni phambi kwam, imele ilizwe, ukuze mna ndingalitshabalalisi; kodwa andiyifumani." 
Ezekiel22:31 Ngoko ke ndiza kuyikhuphela kubo ingqumbo yam, ndibatshabalalise ngobushushu bomsindo wam, bavune loo nto bayihlwayeleyo, itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel23:1 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel23:2 “Kwakukho abafazi ababini abâzalwa beziintombi zomfazi omnye. 
Ezekiel23:3 Babengamahenyukazi kwaseJiputa beselula. Apho kwelo zwe babephathwa-phathwa amabele, becofwa-cofwa iingono." 
Ezekiel23:4 Igama lalo mkhulu lalinguOhola, udade wabo omncinane inguOholibha. Yayingabam, baza bandizalela oonyana neentombi. UOhola yiSamariya, uOholibha yiJerusalem." 
Ezekiel23:5 “UOhola wabuqala ubuhenyukazi esengowam, wasemva kwezithandwa zakhe, ama-Asiriya, amadoda omkhosi," 
Ezekiel23:6 wona egaxele impahla yawo ezuba; ewe, abalawuli nabaphathi-mkhosi, onke ingamagatyana anomkhitha nomfaneleko xa ekhwele emahashini awo." 
Ezekiel23:7 Waba lihenyukazi lazo zonke izinxiba-mxhaka zaseAsiriya, wazenyelisa ngezithixo zabo bonke awayebabawela." 
Ezekiel23:8 Akabuyekanga ubuhenyukazi awayebuqale eJiputa ebutsheni bakhe, apho abafana babelala naye, bamphatha-phathe amabele, bemnyumbazela ukufeba." 
Ezekiel23:9 “Ndasuka ke mna ndamyekela kwizithandwa zakhe ama-Asiriya awayezilangazelela. 
Ezekiel23:10 Zamhluba, zabathatha oonyana neentombi, zaza yena zamtyakatya ngekrele. Waba ngundaba-mlonyeni kwabanye abafazi, waza wohlwaywa." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Udade wabo uOholibha wakubona konke oku, kodwa wagabadela kunodade wabo ngobufebe nobuhenyukazi." 
Ezekiel23:12 Naye wafeba nama-Asiriya, abalawuli nabaphathi-mkhosi, amadoda omkhosi egaxele impahla yawo, ekhwele emahashini awo, onke ingamagatyana anomkhitha." 
Ezekiel23:13 Naye ndambona ezinyelisa ngokuhamba ngekhondo lodade wabo. 
Ezekiel23:14 “Wade wagqithisa. Wabona imifanekiso yamadoda aseBhabheli izotywe eludongeni ngepeyinti ebomvu," 
Ezekiel23:15 ebhinqe iibhanti zawo, ethwele iiqhiya ezibhabha emoyeni, yaza yanga ngamagosa omkhosi weenqwelo zokulwa zaseBhabheli, amaKaledi ngokwawo." 
Ezekiel23:16 Uthe akuyibona le mifankeso wawalangazelela la madoda, wathumela izigidimi kuwo kwelamaKaledi." 
Ezekiel23:17 Agaleleka ke amadoda aseBhabheli, angena emandlalweni, alala naye. Kamva asuke aba nezothe kuye, wawalahla." 
Ezekiel23:18 Uthe akubuqhuba phandle ubuhenyukazi, wangumntu ongawukhathaleleyo umzimba wakhe, ewuhluba engenantloni, nam ndamlahla, ndaxelisa mini ndalahla udade wabo." 
Ezekiel23:19 “Wasuka waya ehambela phambili emanyaleni ngokungathi ukhumbula ubutsha bakhe bobuhenyukazi eJiputa. 
Ezekiel23:20 Wayefeba nezithandwa zakhe ezibudoda bufana nobedonki nezimchamela okwehashe. 
Ezekiel23:21 Kube njalo ke ukulangazelela iintlondi zobutsha bakho eJiputa apho wawuphathwa-phathwa amabele, ucofwa-cofwa iingono." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Ngako oko, Oholibha, iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ithi: Ndiza kuzifunza kuwe izithandwa zakho, eziya ubuzilahle kuba uzenyanya; ziza kuphuma macalana onke:" 
Ezekiel23:23 ezaseBhabheli namaKaledi, abafo basePekodi, eShowa, naseKhowa, nawo onke ama-Asiriya, amagatyana, abafana abanomkhitha, abalawuli, abaphathi-mkhosi, amagosa eenqwelo zokulwa, nezinye izithwala-ndwe, bonke bekhwele emahashini abo." 
Ezekiel23:24 Baza kukuhlasela ngezixhobo, ngeenqwelo zomkhosi, nezinye iinqwelo, kwakunye nesihlwele sabantu; uya kurhawulwa macalana onke ngabantu abaphethe amakhaka neengweletshetshe, benxibe iminqwazi yesinyithi. Ndiya kukunikezela kubo ukuze bakohlwaye ngokwesiko labo." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ndiya kuwukhuphela kuwe umsindo wobukhwele bam, nawe uya kuwuva umsindo wabo ovuthayo. Baya kukususa impumlo neendlebe, aze amasalela abulawe ngekrele. Baya kubathimba oonyana bakho neentombi, baze abaseleyo baphoswe emlilweni." 
Ezekiel23:26 Baya kukukhululisa impahla, bazihluthe izihombo zakho." 
Ezekiel23:27 Ndiya kuphelisa ubufebe nobuhenyukazi owabuqala eJiputa. Uza kuyeka ukuzilangazelela ezo nto, uyilibale neJiputa." 
Ezekiel23:28 “Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ndiza kukunikezela kwabo ubathiyileyo, abo ubafulathele kuba benezothe." 
Ezekiel23:29 Baza kuyikhuphela kuwe intiyo yabo, bazihluthe izinto ozibileleyo. Baya kukushiya uze, ihlazo lobuhenyukazi lakho litshiswe lilanga. Konke oku kungenxa yobufebe namanyala akho, kuba kaloku unqwenele ezinye iintlanga waza wazigqwalisa ngezithixo zazo." 
Ezekiel23:30  
Ezekiel23:31 Ulandele ikhondo lodade wenu; ngako oko uza kurhabula kwindebe yakhe. 
Ezekiel23:32 “Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Uya kurhabula kwindebe yodade wenu enomthamo omkhulu; iya kukuzisela ukuphoxeka, kuba ithwele lukhulu." 
Ezekiel23:33 Uya kunxila kube lusizi yindebe yokuphalala nembubho, indebe yodade wenu uSamariya." 
Ezekiel23:34 Uya kuyisela uyifince; uya kuyicumza ibe ziingceba, uwaphale amabele akho. Ndithethile, itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel23:35 “Ngoko ke itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Kuba usuke wandilibala, wandifulathela, uza kusithwala isono sokufeba nobuhenyukazi bakho.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Wathi kum uNdikhoyo: “Mntundini, bagwebe oo-Ohola no-Oholibha! Baxelele ngezenzo zabo ezibi," 
Ezekiel23:37 kuba bakrexezile, baza baphalaza igazi. Bakrexezile nezithixo zabo; bade benza amadini ngabantwana babo ababendizalele bona, batyisa izithixo." 
Ezekiel23:38 Naku abakwenzileyo kum: kwangelo xesha basigqwalisile isibingelelo sam, bawunyelisa *noMhla wam wokuPhumla." 
Ezekiel23:39 Kanye ngalo mhla benza idini ngabantwana babo kwizithixo zabo, bangena esibingelelweni sam, basigqwalisa. Nantso ke into abayenzileyo endlwini yam." 
Ezekiel23:40 “Bade bathumela izigidimi emadodeni, afika evela kude, aza athi akufika nahlamba umzimba, nisenzela wona, naqaba amehlo, nafaka izihombo zenu." 
Ezekiel23:41 Nahlala esofeni emfuma-mfuma, kwamiswa itafile phambi kwayo, ithwele iziqhumiso namafutha am." 
Ezekiel23:42 “Kwavakala intswahla yesihlwele sabantu abagcobileyo kuloo ndawo wayekuyo; amaSabheya entlango eza nomxukuxela, aza afaka izacholo ezingalweni zomfazi lowo nodade wabo, abathwalisa nezithsaba entloko." 
Ezekiel23:43 Ndaza ndathi ngalowo selegqityiwe kukukrexeza: ‘Ke ngoku mabamqhube njengehenyukazi, kuba kakade ulilo.’" 
Ezekiel23:44 Balala naye ke. Ngokwamadoda elala nehenyukazi balala nazo ezo zifebe zabafazi uOhola no-Oholibha. 
Ezekiel23:45 Kodwa wona amadoda angamalungisa aya kubohlwaya ngesohlwayo sabafazi abakrexezayo nabaphalaza igazi, kuba bengabakrexezi abazandla zibomvu ligazi.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Babizele imbizo barhwaqeliswe baphangwe. 
Ezekiel23:47 Imbizo iya kubaxuluba ngamatye, ibatyakatye ngamakrele; iya kubulala oonyana neentombi zabo, itshise izindlu zabo." 
Ezekiel23:48 “Ndiya kwenjenjalo ukuphelisa ubufebe kweli lizwe, khon' ukuze bonke abafazi balulekwe, bangahambi ekhondweni lenu." 
Ezekiel23:49 Niza kohlwaywa ngobufebe benu nangezono zenu zokunqula *izithixo. Kwakuba njalo ke niya kwazi ukuba ndiyiNkosi uNdikhoyo.” 
Ezekiel24:1 Ngomhla weshumi ngenyanga yeshumi yonyaka wesithoba ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel24:2 “Mntundini, wubhale phantsi lo mhla, kanye lo, kuba ngawo uyirhangqile iJerusalem ukumkani waseBhabheli." 
Ezekiel24:3 Benzele umzekeliso abendlu yabavukeli, uthi: Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Beka imbiza eziko; ugalele kuyo amanzi." 
Ezekiel24:4 Sikelela inyama, uyigalele kuyo, iindawo ezikhethiweyo zona zomlenze nomkhono. Mayizale ngawona-wona mathambo," 
Ezekiel24:5 eyona-yona mpahla isebuhlanti. Yibasele kakhulu imbiza yakho; de ibile, avuthwe namathambo akuyo. “Kuba itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi:" 
Ezekiel24:6 “Yeha sixeko sabagwinti, esiyintshela namhla embizeni; akuyi kubhungca nesuntswana! Iya kuphakwa ngezidungulwana, kungenziwanga maqashiso ngazo." 
Ezekiel24:7 Kuba igazi awaliphalazayo liyakhala. Kaloku waliphalazela etyeni, akaliphalazelanga emhlabeni apho beliya kutshona eluthulini." 
Ezekiel24:8 Ngenxa yokuxhokonxwa komsindo nempindezelo igazi lakhe ndoliphalazela etyeni, khon' ukuze lingafihlakali." 
Ezekiel24:9 “Ngako oko itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Yeha, sixekondini segazi! Nam ndiza kufumba iinkuni!" 
Ezekiel24:10 Fumba iinkuni, uphembe eziko, uwubase umlilo, uyiphekisise inyama, uyigalele izinongo, uyipheke ade atshe amathambo." 
Ezekiel24:11 Ndiya kuyibasela eziko imbiza ingasenanto, itshe ibe bomvu ngumlilo, ukuze kunyibilike izothe layo nentshela itshe iphele." 
Ezekiel24:12 Kaloku ayiva ukuhlala kwayo; intshela yayo ayisuki naxa seyifakwa umlilo. 
Ezekiel24:13 “Ngoku izothe lakho bubufebe. Ngexesha endandizama ukuba ndikwenze ucoceke, akufunanga. Ke ngoko akuyi kucoceka de ingqumbo yam kuwe ithothe." 
Ezekiel24:14 “Ndithethile mna Ndikhoyo. Lifikile ixesha lokuba ndenze. Andiyi kulibazisa. Andizi kuba nanceba, ndingayi kubuya mva. Uza kohlwaywa ngokwesimilo sakho nezenzo zakho. Nguwo lowo umlomo weNgangalala uNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel24:15 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel24:16 “Mntundini, ngesithonga nje esinye ndiza kukuhlutha lowo umthanda kunene. Maze ungakhali, okanye wenze isililo, okanye ube nyembezana." 
Ezekiel24:17 Uze ungqukruleke nje, kodwa ungamzileli lowo ufileyo. Uze uwuthwale umnqwazi wakho, neembadada zakho ungazikhululi, ungazigqumi iindevu zakho, ungakutyi ukutya kwesiqhelo komntu ozilileyo.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Kusasa ke ndathetha nabantu, yaza inkosikazi yam yasweleka ngokuhlwa. Ngentsasa elandelayo ndenza ngokomyalelo." 
Ezekiel24:19 Baza abantu bandibuza bathi: “Khawusixelele, thina singena phi apha?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Ndaza ndathi kubo: “Ndive ilizwi likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel24:21 Xelela indlu kaSirayeli uthi: Itsho iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Ndiza kusixabhela isibingelelo sam – inqaba yenu yeqhayiya, leyo ithi kuni: ‘Ndijonge,’ into eniyithanda kunene. Oonyana neentombi zenu enizishiyileyo ziza kubulawa ngekrele." 
Ezekiel24:22 Niya kuxelisa mna: aniyi kuzigquma iindevu zenu, ningayi kukutya nokutya kwabazili njengesiqhelo." 
Ezekiel24:23 Niya kuhlala niyithwele iminqwazi yenu, neembadada nosoloko nizinxibile. Aniyi kuzila, aniyi kulila, kodwa nosuka niye niphela ngokuphela emzimbeni ngenxa yesono senu; niya kungqukruleka nje kuphela." 
Ezekiel24:24 Uya kuba ngumqondiso kuni uHezekile; niya kuxelisa yena. Xa kunjalo niya kwazi ukuba mna ndinguNdikhoyo iNkosi. 
Ezekiel24:25 “Ke wena, mntundini, mhla ndayisusa inqaba yabo, uchulumanco nozuko lwabo, uvuyo lwamehlo abo, eyona nto ithe ngco ezintliziyweni zabo, kwanoonyana neentombi zabo," 
Ezekiel24:26 uya kufika kuwe obhungcileyo ekuphathele iindaba. 
Ezekiel24:27 Umlomo wakho uya kuvuleka ngoko nangoko; uya kuthetha naye kuba ungenakuthula. Ke ngoko uya kuba ngumqondiso kubo, baze baqonde ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel25:2 “Mntundini, bhekisa kuwo ama-Amon, uwakhalimele," 
Ezekiel25:3 uthi: Yivani izwi leNkosi uNdikhoyo: Ithi iNgangalala uNdikhoyo: Ngenxa yokuba nathi: ‘Tshotsho!’ kwisibingelelo sam mhla saxajelwa, nakwilizwe lakwaSirayeli mhla labhukuqwa, nakwisizwe sakwaJuda mini sathinjwa," 
Ezekiel25:4 ke mna ndiza kuninikezela kwisizwe sasempuma, nize nibe sezandleni zaso. Baya kumisa iikampu zabo, beme phakathi kwenu; baya kuzitya iziqhamo zenu, bawatye amasi eenkomo zenu." 
Ezekiel25:5 IRabha ndiya kuyenza ibe lidlelo leenkamela; yona iAmon yoba ligquba leegusha. Xa kunjalo ke niya kundazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo. 
Ezekiel25:6 Kaloku itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Naqhwaba izandla, nadyusha ngenxa yemincili, nalivuyelela izwe lakwaSirayeli." 
Ezekiel25:7 Ngenxa yoko ndiza kusolula isandla sam, ndinenze nibe lixhoba leentlanga. Ndiya kuninqamla kwezinye izizwe, ubuzwe benu bufadalale. Ndiya kunibhubhisa nitsho nazi ukuba uNdikhoyo ndim.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Itsho iNkosi *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “IMowabhi neSeyire zithi: ‘Jonga, indlu kaJuda ifana nezinye izizwe ngoku.’" 
Ezekiel25:9 Ngenxa yoko ndiza kuliyekela ngeentshaba ilizwe laseMowabhi, nditsho iqhayiya layo, izixeko zayo ezisemdeni, iBhete-yeshimoti, iBhali-meyon, neKiriyatayim." 
Ezekiel25:10 IMowabhi kwakunye nama-Amon ndiza kuyinikezela ibe lilifa lezizwe zasempuma, khon' ukuze ama-Amon angaze akhunjulwe ezimbalini zezizwe." 
Ezekiel25:11 Ndiza kuyohlwaya iMowabhi. Iya kutsho indazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo!” 
Ezekiel25:12 Itsho iNkosi *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “IEdom ikhuphe isixhiba kwindlu kaJuda, yaza ngokwenjenjalo yanetyala elikhulu." 
Ezekiel25:13 Ngenxa yoko iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ithi: Isandla sam ndiya kusolulela e-Edom, ndibulale abantu nemfuyo yabo. Ndiya kuyitsho ibharhe, ndibabulale ngekrele ukusuka eTeman kuye kutsho eDedan." 
Ezekiel25:14 IEdom ndiya kuyiphindezela ngesandla sabantu bam amaSirayeli, abaya kwenza kwiEdom ngokwengqumbo nomsindo wam. Baya kuyazi impindezelo yam, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel25:15 Itsho iNkosi *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “AmaFilistiya aziphindezele ngenzondo, kuba iintliziyo zawo zithe minxi yinkohlakalo ezalwa bubutshaba obudala, bezimisele ukumtshabalalisa uJuda." 
Ezekiel25:16 Ngenxa yoko iNgangalala *uNdikhoyo ithi: Ndiza kusolula isandla sam side sifike kumaFilistiya, ndiwatshabalalise amaKrete, ndide ndigqogqe nalawo emi phezu konxweme lolwandle." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndiya kuziphindezela ngamandla kuwo, ndiwohlwaye ndinomsindo. Xa sendiziphindezela baya kundazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Ngomhla wokuqala enyangeni ngonyaka weshumi elinanye, ndeva izwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi kum:" 
Ezekiel26:2 “Mntundini, iTire ihlekise ngeJerusalem yathi: ‘Tshotsho uvuleke, sangondini eliya ezizweni! Iingcango zakho zivulelwe mna. Njengoko sewulinxuwa wena ndiza kuchuma mna.’" 
Ezekiel26:3 Ngenxa yoko mna Ndikhoyo iNkosi ndithi: Ndikuchasile, Tire, ndaye ndiza kukufunza ngentlaninge yezizwe, zibe ngathi ngamaza olwandle olulwayo." 
Ezekiel26:4 Ziya kuzidiliza iindonga neenqaba zaseTire. Ndiya kukutshayela ke konke okudiliziweyo, iTire isale ilulwalwa," 
Ezekiel26:5 ibe yindawo yeminatha yabalobi beentlanzi. Kaloku ndithethile mna, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo. Iya kuba lixhoba lezizwe," 
Ezekiel26:6 nezithanga zayo ezithe qelele nolwandle zitshabalale likrele. Xa kunjalo ke baya kundazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo.” 
Ezekiel26:7 Kaloku iNgangalala uNdikhoyo ithi: “ITire ndiya kuyithumela ngoNebhukadenezare ukumkani waseBhabheli – ewe, ikumkani yeekumkani. Uya kuvela ngasentla namahashe neenqwelo zakhe zemfazwe, nebubu lomkhosi olunamadoda akhwele emahashini." 
Ezekiel26:8 Uya kuzingena ngekrele izithanga zakho ezimgama nolwandle. Uya kukungqinga, azayame ngezikanisi iindonga zakho, azikhusele." 
Ezekiel26:9 Iindonga zakho uya kuzingquzula ngezidilizi zakhe, itsho iwe phantsi imibhontshontsho yakho." 
Ezekiel26:10 Amahashe akhe aya kuba maninzi kangangokuba aya kutsho likugubungele uthuli. Izingqi zamahashe emfazwe nengxolo yeenqwelo zokulwa iya kutsho zishukume iindonga zakho xa engena emasangweni akho ngokwamadoda engena esixekweni esindonga ziqhekekileyo. 
Ezekiel26:11 Amanqina amahashe akhe aya kuzixobonga zonke izitalato; abantu bakho úya kubabulala ngekrele; zize ezo ntsika zomeleleyo ziwe bhuma emhlabeni. 
Ezekiel26:12 Ubutyebi bakho buya kuba lixhoba labo, bayithimbe nempahla orhweba ngayo. Baya kuzidiliza iindonga zakho, namapoma ezindlu zakho zokuhlala, baze bawaphose elwandle amatye nemithi nenkunkuma." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ndiza kuyiphelisa intsholo yeengoma kuwe, kwaye ayisokube iphinde iviwe intsholo yezikhalisi zakho." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ndiya kukwenza ufane nolwalwa olungenakuhluma nto, uze ube yindawo yeminatha yabalobi beentlanzi. Akusokuze uphinde uvuswe, kuba kaloku kuthethe mna Ndikhoyo iNkosi.”" 
Ezekiel26:15 Ithi iNgangalala uNdikhoyo kwiTire: “Ngaba bebengangcangcazeli na sisandi sokuwa kwakho abemi phezu konxweme, naxa isitsho incwina yeengxwelerha xa ikrele lisidla kuwe?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Ngelo xesha zonke iikumkani zamazwe onxweme lolwandle ziya kuhla ezihlalweni zazo, ziyithi xibilili iminweba yazo, zizikhulule neengubo zazo ezihonjisiweyo. Ziya kuhlala phantsi zizel' ululoyiko, zingcangcazela ngalo lonke ixesha ngenxa yomothuko wento eziyibona kuwe." 
Ezekiel26:17 Ziya kwenza isililo ngawe, zithi kuwe: “ ‘Yehaa! Watshabalala, sixekondini sodumo, ikhaya lamadoda aselwandle! Ubunegunya elwandle, wena nabemi bakho, ngenxa yakho bebethuthumela bonke abahlala apho." 
Ezekiel26:18 Abemi baselunxwemeni bayangcangcazela ngalo mhla wokuwa kwakho; abaseziqithini bayagubha ngenxa yokuwa kwakho.’ ” 
Ezekiel26:19 Ithi iNkosi uNdikhoyo: “Ndiya kukutshabalalisa ube linxuwa, kungabi sabakho bani uhlala kuwe; ndiya kukuntywilisela enzonzobileni yamanzi olwandle;" 
Ezekiel26:20 ndiya kukutshonisa emhadini, ndikuhlalise ekhayeni lamanyange. Ndiya kukwenza uhlale emathunjini omhlaba, nawe Tire ufane namanxuwa ezixeko zamandulo. Kwanjengazo awusoze ubuye uluxhamle udumo kumhlaba wabaphilayo." 
Ezekiel26:21 Isiphelo sakho siya koyikeka, kuba uya kubhujiswa kuphele. Uya kufunwa, kodwa ungaze ufunyanwe, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel27:2 “Mntundini, yitsho isililo ngenxa yeTire." 
Ezekiel27:3 Xelela iTire elisango laselwandle, yona erhweba neentlanga eziselunxwemeni, uthi: Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Wena Tire, uthi: ‘Andimhle, ndincamisile!’" 
Ezekiel27:4 Imida yakho ibiselwandle; ubuhle bakho obuyimbalasane benziwe ngabakwakhileyo. 
Ezekiel27:5 Baxoze imipayini yaseSenire, bakha wena ngayo; bagawule imisedare yaseLebhanon, baxhoma amalaphu enqanawe kuyo." 
Ezekiel27:6 Baxoze imioki yaseBhashan, benza ngayo amaphini okugwexa; imisipresi yonxweme lwaseKiti luphahla lwakho lwenqanawe, oluhonjiswe ngomxhaka weendlovu." 
Ezekiel27:7 Intshinga eluphawu owaziwa ngalo yilinen ecikizekileyo yaseJiputa ekuphehlayo; amaphempe akho azuba ngawelaphu lonxweme lwase-Elisha. 
Ezekiel27:8 Abagwexi-nqanawe zizigantsontso zaseSidon naseArvadi; iincutshe zoomatiloshe baselwandle ziphuma kuwe, Tire." 
Ezekiel27:9 Amachule aseGebhali ahlala ekho kuwe, elindele ukutywina iindawo ezivuzayo. Zonke iinqanawe noomatiloshe zingqonga wena, ziko lorhwebo." 
Ezekiel27:10 “Umkhosi wakho unezixhipholo zamadoda, nditsho awasePeshiya, eLidiya, nasePuti. Axhome amakhaka neminqwazi ekhuselayo ezindongeni zakho, aphuhlisa ubuqaqawuli bakho." 
Ezekiel27:11 Macala onke eendonga zokhuselo kumi amadoda aseArvadi naseHeleki; kwimibhontshontsho yookhala ngamadoda aseGamade. Amakhaka awo axhonywe ezindongeni zakho, batsho bayimbalasane ubuhle bakho." 
Ezekiel27:12 “AbaseTashishe barhweba nawe ngenxa yentaphane yempahla, bakuphathele isiliva, isinyithi, itini, nelothe, ukuze bazuze impahla orhweba ngayo." 
Ezekiel27:13 “Barhwebile nawe abelamaGrike, abaseTubhali nabaseMesheki; bakuphathele amakhoboka nempahla yesinyithi ukuze bafumane into orhweba ngayo." 
Ezekiel27:14 “Amadoda aseBhete-togarma azise amahashe okusebenza nawemfazwe, neemeyile, ukuze azuze impahla yakho yorhwebo." 
Ezekiel27:15 “Amadoda aseDedan arhwebile nawe, waza wathengisela namazwe amaninzi aselunxwemeni; akuhlawule ngeempondo zeendlovu nangomthi omnyama oxatyisiweyo." 
Ezekiel27:16 “Uthengiselene neAram ngenxa yenkitha yemveliso yakho. Yona ikunike itekoyisi, ilaphu elimsobo, imbroda, ilinen ecikiziweyo, ikhorali, neerubhi, ukuze izuze impahla orhweba ngayo." 
Ezekiel27:17 “Barhwebile nawe abakwaJuda nabakwaSirayeli; bakuphathele ingqolowa yaseMiniti nezimuncu-muncu, ubusi, amafutha, namachiza, bazuza izinto orhweba ngazo." 
Ezekiel27:18 “Ngenxa yentaphane yemveliso yakho nobutyebi bakho abaseDamasko bathengise ngewayini yaseHelbon noboya baseZaware. 
Ezekiel27:19 “Ayithengile impahla yakho amaDan namaGrike aseUzali. Akuphathele intsimbi, ikasiya, nekalamo." 
Ezekiel27:20 “IDedan irhwebe ngezingqwashu. 
Ezekiel27:21 “Babengabathengi bempahla yakho abelama-Arabhu nazo zonke iinkosi zaseKedare. Bakuzisele amatakane eegusha, neenkunzi zeegusha nezeebhokhwe." 
Ezekiel27:22 “Uthengiselene nabarhwebi baseShebha nabaseRama. Ukuze bafumane impahla yakho bathengise ngezona-zona zinongo, nawona-wona matye anqabileyo, nangegolide." 
Ezekiel27:23 “Uthengiselene nabarhwebi baseHaran, Kane, Eden, Sheba, Ashure, nabaseKilmadi." 
Ezekiel27:24 Phaya emarikeni nirhwebe ngezambatho ezihle, ilaphu elizuba, imbroda, izicangca ezimabala-bala ezimitya iphothiweyo yanamanquma." 
Ezekiel27:25 “Izithuthi zempahla yakho yorhwebo ziinqanawe zaseTashishe. Uyasindeka ngumthwalo enzonzobileni yolwandle. 
Ezekiel27:26 Abagwexi-nqanawe bakho bacanda iilwandle ngawe. Kambe umoya wasempumalanga wokuqhekeza phakathi elwandle. 
Ezekiel27:27 Ubutyebi bakho, impahla orhweba ngayo, oomatiloshe neencutshe zolwandle, namagcisa okuvala iintanda, abarhwebi namajoni akho, nabo bonke abangaphakathi, baya kuzika enzonzobileni yolwandle mhla waqhekeka." 
Ezekiel27:28 Ziya kunxunguphala izizwe ezima ngaselunxwemeni, zisothuswa sisijwili soomatiloshe bakho." 
Ezekiel27:29 Bonke abagwexi baya kusaba enqanaweni; oomatiloshe namachule eenqanawe baya kuma bhuxe elunxwemeni. 
Ezekiel27:30 Baya kukhala ngezwi elikhulu, besenza isijwili esikrakra ngenxa yakho. Intloko yabo baya kuyigalela uthuli, baziqika-qike eluthuthwini." 
Ezekiel27:31 Ngenxa yakho baya kucheba iinwele zabo, banxibe irhonya. Baya kukulilela ngomoya owonakeleyo, bazile bekrakra." 
Ezekiel27:32 Baya kwenza isijwili, bazile ngenxa yakho. Baya kwenza isililo ngawe, bathi: ‘Ngubani na owakhe wathuliswa njengeTire emi elwandle?’" 
Ezekiel27:33 Wawuzanelisa izizwe ezininzi ngexesha owawurhweba phesheya kolwandle; ubutyebi bakho, nempahla yakho yatsho zatyeba iikumkani zehlabathi." 
Ezekiel27:34 Ngokunje lukuqhekezile ulwandle, usenzonzobileni yamanzi; impahla yakho namahlakani akho bazike kunye nawe." 
Ezekiel27:35 Bonke abemi bonxweme ubothusile; iikumkani ziyathuthumela, zitsho zaxweba kukoyika." 
Ezekiel27:36 Abarhwebi bezizwe bayakunyevulela; usuke waba sisoyikiso, watsho ngesiphelo esibi.”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel28:2 “Mntundini, yithi kumlawuli waseTire: Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Ikratshi lakho litsho uthi: ‘Ndinguthixo; ndihlala esikhundleni soothixo enzonzobileni yolwandle.’ Kodwa ungumntu, akungothixo, nokuba wena uzicingela ukuba unguthixo." 
Ezekiel28:3 Ngaba ulumke ngaphezu koDaneli? Akukho nto ifihlakeleyo kuwe? 
Ezekiel28:4 Ubulumko bakho nolwazi lwakho lukwenze waba nobutyebi; oovimba bakho bazele yigolide nesiliva. 
Ezekiel28:5 Ubuchule bakho ngorhwebo bukwenze wasisityebi, yaza loo nto yakubangela ikratshi." 
Ezekiel28:6 “Ke ngoko ithi iNkosi uNdikhoyo: “Ngenxa yokuba uzicingela ukuba unguthixo," 
Ezekiel28:7 ndiza kukuthumela ngabasemzini, ezona zizwe zinoburhalarhume. Ziya kubugqutha-gqutha ngekrele ubuhle nobulumko bakho, zibuxabhele ubuqaqawuli bakho." 
Ezekiel28:8 Ziya kukutshonisa emhadini. Apho enzonzobileni yolwandle uya kubulawa ngezikhali. 
Ezekiel28:9 Uya kuba satsho ukuthi: ‘Ndinguthixo,’ xa sewuhlangene nâbo bakubulalayo? Uya kuba ngumntu, ungabi nguthixo, xa usezandleni zabakugwintayo." 
Ezekiel28:10 Uya kufa njengodelekileyo, sewuphethwe ngabasemzini. “Nditshilo nje, nditshilo, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo.”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Ndeva ilizwi likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel28:12 “Mntundini, yitsho isililo ngokumkani waseTire, uthi kuye: Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Ubungumzekelo wemfezeko, usisilumko, ufezekile ngobuhle." 
Ezekiel28:13 UbuseIdeni, isitiya sikaThixo. Ubuhombe ngawo onke amatye anqabileyo: irubhi, itopazi, ne-emeraldi; ikrisolite, ionirhe, nejaspa, isafire, itekoyisi, nebherile. Ebegqagqele egolideni; alungiswa kwamhla wadalwa." 
Ezekiel28:14 Wathanjiswa *okwesithunywa esimaphiko esilondolozayo, kuba ndakumisela njalo. Ubuhleli entabeni eyodwa kaThixo; ubuhamba-hamba phakathi kwamatye abomvu ngumlilo." 
Ezekiel28:15 Ukususela kumhla wadalwa wawunesimo esisulungekileyo, suka waba lixhoba lenkohlakalo." 
Ezekiel28:16 Urhwebo lwakho olugqibe lonke ilizwe lwakwenza waba sisikrelemnqa wada wona. Ke mna ndakugxotha entabeni kaThixo, waza wahlazeka. Ewe, ndakugxotha, wena sithunywa esimaphiko, wemka kuloo matye abomvu ngumlilo." 
Ezekiel28:17 Wasuka wangenwa likratshi ngenxa yobuhle; bade bonakala nobulumko bakho, ngenxa yokuziqhayisa ngobunzwakazi. Ndaza ke mna ndakubhuqa-bhuqa emhlabeni, ndakwenza intlekisa yeekumkani." 
Ezekiel28:18 Uzixabhele izibingelelo zakho ngenkitha yezono zakho nokurhweba ngamaqhetseba. Ke mna ndakwenza wavutha, watsho waba luthuthu emhlabeni, kubukelwe ngababoneli." 
Ezekiel28:19 Zonke izizwe ebezikwazi zikhwankqisiwe nguwe. Usuke wasisoyikiso; kaloku awusoze uphinde uvuke.” 
Ezekiel28:20 Ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi: 
Ezekiel28:21 “Mntundini, bhekisa kwiSidon, uyikhalimele" 
Ezekiel28:22 uthi: Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Ndiyalwa nawe, Sidon. Udumo lwam ndolubonakalisa ngawe. Abantu baya kwazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo xa ndiyohlwaya iSidon, ndibonisa ubungcwele bam ngayo." 
Ezekiel28:23 Ndiya kuyithumela ngobhubhani, nditsho izitalato zayo zibaleke igazi; iya kuzala zizidumbu zabafe ngekrele, ikrele eliya kuvela macalana onke. Baya kundazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel28:24 “Abantu bakwaSirayeli baya kuyeka ukuba nabamelwane abahlekisayo ngabo, abahlaba njengohlololwane neengcangula zameva. Baya kwazi ukuba mna ndiyiNkosi uNdikhoyo." 
Ezekiel28:25 “Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Xa ndibabutha abantu bakwaSirayeli kwezo zizwe babebhacele kuzo, ndiya kuzityhila kubo phambi kwezizwe, bandazi ukuba ndinguThixo oyedwa. Baya kuhlala ezweni labo endandilinike isicaka sam uYakobi." 
Ezekiel28:26 Baya kuhlala apho bekhuselekile, baze bakhe izindlu, batyale nezidiliya. Baya kuba bekhuselekile xa mna ndisohlwaya abamelwane babo ababehlekisa ngabo. Baya kwazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wabo.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Ngosuku lweshumi elinambini kwinyanga yeshumi kunyaka weshumi, ndeva ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lisithi:" 
Ezekiel29:2 “Mntundini, bhekisa kukumkani waseJiputa, umkhalimele yena nayo yonke iJiputa." 
Ezekiel29:3 Yithi: Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Ndiyalwa nawe, kumkani waseJiputa, gongqongqo elikhulu elilele tywaa kwiintlambo zeNayile. Uthi: ‘INayile yeyam; ndazidalela mna ngokwam.’" 
Ezekiel29:4 Kodwa ndiya kukufaka igwegwe phakathi kwemihlathi, ndizitsho iintlanzi zeentlambo zakho zinamathele emaxolweni akho. Ndiya kukurhola ndikukhuphe emlanjeni zijinga njalo iintlanzi emaxolweni akho." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ndiya kukuphosa entlango wena nezo ntlanzi zasentlanjeni. Uya kuwa elubala, ungaqokelelwa bani. Ndiya kukunikela kwizilwanyana zasendle neentaka zezulu, ube lixhoba lazo." 
Ezekiel29:6 “Xa kunjalo bonke abahlala eJiputa baya kwazi ukuba mna ndinguNdikhoyo. “Ubusoloko ungumsimelelo wengcongolo wendlu kaSirayeli. 
Ezekiel29:7 Bathe bakukubamba ngezandla, wasuka wakroboka, wabahlaba amanxeba emakhwapheni; bathe bakusimelela ngawe, wasuka wee shwaqa, baza bakruneka imiqolo." 
Ezekiel29:8 “Ngako oko ke ithi iNkosi uNdikhoyo: Ndiza kukuthumela ngekrele, abulawe onke amadoda nemfuyo yakho." 
Ezekiel29:9 IJiputa iya kuba lilizwe elisebugxwayibeni. Baya kundazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo. “Kaloku uthe: ‘INayile yeyam; ndazidalela mna ngokwam.’ 
Ezekiel29:10 Ndiyalwa nawe ke ngoko, wena nemisinga yomlambo wakho. Ndiza kulitshabalalisa izwe laseJiputa, libe yinkangala ukusuka eMigidoli naseAswan kuye kuthi gaa ngemida yaseKushe." 
Ezekiel29:11 Akusayi kucanda mntu nasilo kulo; akusayi kuhlala mntu iminyaka engamashumi amane. 
Ezekiel29:12 Ilizwe laseJiputa ndiya kulenza libe bubugxwayiba phakathi kwamazwe abubugxwayiba, nezixeko zalo ziya kuba ngamanxuwa njengezinye iminyaka engamashumi amane. Wona amaJiputa ndiza kuwenza abhacele ezizweni, agqibe onke amazwe." 
Ezekiel29:13 “Kanti itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Emva kweminyaka engamashumi amane ndiya kuwaqokelela amaJiputa ezizweni ebebhacele kuzo. 
Ezekiel29:14 Ndiya kuwaphuthuma ekuthinjweni, ndiwabuyisele ePatro, ilizwe lookhokho bawo. Apho aya kuba sisizwana nje." 
Ezekiel29:15 Aya kuba sesona sizwana siphantsi esingasokuze sibuye sibaluleke kwezinye izizwe. Ndiya kusibetha kangangokuba singaze siphinde sizilawule ezinye izizwe. 
Ezekiel29:16 IJiputa ayisoze iphinde ibe yindawo azigwagwisa ngayo amaSirayeli, kodwa iya kuhlala isisikhumbuzo sesono sawo sokucela uncedo kuyo. Baya kundazi ngoko ukuba mna ndinguNdikhoyo iNgangalala.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Ngomhla wokuqala wenyanga yokuqala yonyaka wamashumi amabini anesixhenxe wathi kum uNdikhoyo: 
Ezekiel29:18 “Mntundini, uNebhukadenezare ukumkani waseBhabheli wawufunza ngamandla umkhosi wakhe kwimfazwe yaseTire. Atsho amadoda akhuthuka iintloko, atyabuka amagxalaba. Kodwa umkhosi wakhe zange uzuze nto kuloo mfazwe yaseTire." 
Ezekiel29:19 Ngako oko itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: IJiputa ndiza kuyinikezela kuNebhukadenezare ukumkani waseBhabheli, ukuze abuthimbe bonke ubutyebi bayo. Uya kuthimba yonke into enexabiso kwelo zwe, ibe ngumvuzo wokubulaleka komkhosi wakhe." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ndimnike iJiputa ukuze ibe yimbuyiselo yomzabalazo wakhe wokundinceda ekunye nomkhosi wakhe, itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo."
