Hosea2:8 Kaloku yena akaqondi ukuba yayindim omnikayo ingqolowa newayini namafutha, ndimvava ngesiliva negolide, waza wanqula *uBhali ngayo." 
Hosea2:9 Ngoko ke ndoyihlutha ingqolowa ngexesha layo, newayini ngethuba elimisiweyo; ewe, ndomhlutha uboya kunye nelinen, izinto afihla ubuze bakhe ngazo." 
Hosea2:10 Ndosuka ke mna ndilityhile ihlazo lakhe phambi kwezithandwa zakhe, angahlangulwa bani kum." 
Hosea2:11 Ndoyinqamla imibhiyozo yakhe – nditsho amatheko enyanga entsha, kananjalo *nawoMhla wokuPhumla – yonke imisitho yakhe emisiweyo." 
Hosea2:12 Ndoyibharhisa imithi yediliya nekhiwane, le athi yena ukuyibiza: ‘Ngumvuzo endiwunikwe zizithandwa zam.’ Ndoyenza ibe lihlathi, idliwe ziinyamakazi zasendle." 
Hosea2:13 Ewe, ndiya kumohlwaya ngenxa yemihla awayenqula uBhali emenzela iziqhumiso, ezihombisa ngamaso nemisesane, esukelana nezithandwa zakhe, esuke wandilibala ke mna.” Lowo ke ngumlomo *kaNdikhoyo." 
Hosea2:14 “Ndosuka ke mna ndicenga-cengane naye; ndomthundezela entlango, ndithethe naye kakuhle." 
Hosea2:15 Ukususela apho ndombuyisela izidiliya zakhe, yona iNtili yeAkore ndiyenze ibe lisango lethemba. Yena uya kundamkela, azinikezele kum njengakwimihla yobutsha bakhe, mhla waphuma kwelaseJiputa." 
Hosea2:16 “Ngaloo mini wondibiza uthi: ‘Myeni wam,’ ungabi sathi: ‘Bhali wam.’” Utsho umlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Hosea2:17 “Ndosusa kwa-amagama athi: ‘Bhali,’ angabi sabikho emlonyeni wakhe, angabi saphinda akhunjulwe." 
Hosea2:18 Ngaloo mini ndobenzela umnqophiso namarhamncwa asendle, kunye neentaka zezulu, nezinto ezirhubuluza emhlabeni. Isaphetha nekrele nemfazwe ndozinqamla kweli hlabathi, ukuze konke nje kube luxolo." 
Hosea2:19 Ndiya kukungeja, ndimanyane nawe ngonaphakade; ewe, ndokungeja ngobulungisa nangokusemthethweni, ngokunyaniseka nangenceba." 
Hosea2:20 Ndokumanya nam ngentembeko, khon' ukuze undazi mna *Ndikhoyo." 
Hosea2:21 “Ngaloo mini ndophendula; ndowaphendula amazulu, nawo awuphendule umhlaba.” Lowo ngumlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Hosea2:22 “Nawo umhlaba uya kuphendula, uvelise ingqolowa newayini namafutha, zona eziyimpendulo kwiYizereli." 
Hosea2:23 Ndozihlwayelela yena emhlabeni, ndimenzele inceba lowo bekusakuthiwa nguAkenzelwanga-nceba. Kwabo kuthiwa: ‘Asibantu bam,’ ndiya kuthi: ‘Ningabantu bam,’ bona bathi kum: ‘Wena unguThixo wethu.’ ”" 
Hosea3:1 *UNdikhoyo wathi kum: “Phinda umthande umfazi wakho nangona engumkrexezikazi othandana nandoda yimbi, kuba nam ndisamthanda uSirayeli nakubeni ngoku selethabathekile ngabanye oothixo, ethanda amaqebengwana anerasentyisi.”" 
Hosea3:2 Ngoko ke ndamhlawulela ngeshumi elinesihlanu leesiliva nangerhasi ebunzima buziikhilogram ezilikhulu mashumi mahlanu. 
Hosea3:3 Ndathi kuye: “Uzuzigcinele mna imihla emininzi, ukuyeke ukuhenyuza oku, ungabi ngowandoda yimbi. Nam ke ndokwenjenjalo.”" 
Hosea3:4 Kuba kaloku amaSirayeli oba nethuba elide engenakumkani natshawe, kungekho dini litshiswayo nalitye linqulwayo, *engenasidanga *namilondekhaya." 
Hosea3:5 Kamva ke amaSirayeli aya kubuya amfune uNdikhoyo uThixo wawo, nokumkani wawo uDavide. Ngemihla yokugqibela aya kuza kuNdikhoyo ngoloyiko, efuna iintsikelelo zakhe." 
Hosea4:1 Hoyina; hoyina, maSirayeli! Phulaphulani ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo! Kaloku uNdikhoyo unesikhalazo, umangalela abemi beli lizwe: “Akukho tu ukunyaniseka nokuthembeka; akazelwe nto uThixo kweli lizwe." 
Hosea4:2 Intw' ekhoyo kukuqalekisa, ukuxoka, ukubulala, ukûba, nokukrexeza. Kugquba ubugebenga; igazi liphalala liphalele." 
Hosea4:3 Ngenxa yoko ilizwe lingumqwebedu, nabo bonke abemi balo bayankolonkoza, ngokunjalo oozilwanyana noozintaka; nkqu neentlanzi elwandle phaya ziyafa.”" 
Hosea4:4 “Akafumani amangalelwe umntu, asuke nje atyholwe ngomnye, kodwa mna ndiza kuwamangalela amawenu, mbingelelindini!" 
Hosea4:5 Ùza kukhubeka uwe emini wena, nomshumayeli akhubeke awe kunye nawe ebusuku; ewe, nkqu nonyoko ndomcim' igama." 
Hosea4:6 Kaloku abantu bam bayatshabalala ngenxa yokuswela ulwazi ngam. “Kaloku uyalubukula ulwazi ngam; nawe ke ndiyakukhiqa kububingeleli bam. Wena uwutyeshele umthetho woThixo wakho; andiyi kubakhathalela ke noonyana bakho. 
Hosea4:7 “Okukhona baye besanda ababingeleli, kokukhona kwandayo nokundona kwabo. Ke lona olo dumo lwabo ndolujika lube lihlazo." 
Hosea4:8 Bona batya ngezono zabantu bam; eyona nto bayifunayo kukuba makwenziwe ubugwenxa. 
Hosea4:9 Ngoko ke mna ndobopha ngentamb' enye, ndingakhethi mntu nambingeleli, ndibohlwaye bonke ngenxa yeendlela zabo, ndibabuyekeze ngenxa yeentlondi zabo." 
Hosea4:10 Boba ngatya, banganeli noko; boba ngahenyuza, bangandi kodwa; kuba bakuyekile ukumphulaphula uNdikhoyo," 
Hosea4:11 basuka bazilahlela ekuhenyuzeni.” “Entsha nendala iwayini iyithimba kuthi tu ingqondo 
Hosea4:12 yabantu bam. Bade babuzise nakumfanekiso womthi; bafun' ukutyhilelwa nayintonga yembala. Kaloku balahlekiswa ngumoya wobuhenyu; bakrexezile bamlahla uThixo wabo. 
Hosea4:13 Benz' amadini kwiincopho zeentaba, baqhumisele ezindulini, phantsi kwemioki, iipampiri, nemiterebhinte, apho kukho imithunzi epholileyo. Zisuke ke iintombi zenu zihenyuze; basuke oomolokazana bakrexeze." 
Hosea4:14 “Andiyi kuzohlwaya iintombi zenu, nakuba zingenwa luhenyuzo nje, ngokunjalo noomolokazana benu, noba bangade bakrexeza, kuba namadoda ngokwawo ayahenyuza, enza iminikelo kunye namahenyukazi asezindlwini zonqulo-zithixo. Awu, bantundini bangaqondiyo, anikho yintshabalalo!”" 
Hosea4:15 “Nangona ukrexeza nje, Sirayeli, uJuda yena makangazibizeli ityala. Mus' ukuya eGiligali, Juda, ungayi naseBhetaven, ungenzi zifungo zilambathayo, usithi: ‘Ekho nje uNdikhoyo!’" 
Hosea4:16 “Hayi, kamb' iinkani zakhe uSirayeli, nqwa nethokazi elidlokovayo! Ke uNdikhoyo angamalusa njani okwetakane edlelweni?" 
Hosea4:17 UEfrayim uthene nca nezithixo. Suka, myeke enjalo!" 
Hosea4:18 Zithi zingahlutha yiwayini iinkokheli zisuke zingene ekuhenyuzeni; ndaweni yokukhusela zikheth' ihlazo. 
Hosea4:19 UEfrayim wosuka aphephetheke nomoya, amadini akhe amzisele ihlazo.”" 
Hosea5:1 “Bekan' iindlebe nive, babingeleli! Khaniphulaphule, ndlundini kaSirayeli! Qwalaselani niqiqe nani, makomkhulu, kuba kaloku ngoku zidla kuni. Kaloku nibe sisirhintyelo eMizpa, suka nina nangumgibe eTabhore," 
Hosea5:2 suka nemba umhadi eShitim. Ukanti ke ndiza kunohlwaya xa ninonke. 
Hosea5:3 Kaloku ndiyanazi, ndlundini kaEfrayim; ewe, Sirayeli, awufihlakalanga apha kum. Wena Efrayim, usahenyuza nangoku! Mh-mh-mh! Urhono-rhono, Sirayeli!" 
Hosea5:4 “Izenzo zabo zisuke zaxaba, zayivala indlela yokubuyela kuThixo wabo. Kaloku bathiwe fithi luhenyuzo; abamkhathalele nganto *uNdikhoyo!" 
Hosea5:5 Ikratshi likaSirayeli liyamjikela; uSirayeli noEfrayim baza kukhubeka bawe ngenxa yobugwenxa babo, kwanoJuda atsho akhubeke awe kunye nabo." 
Hosea5:6 Baxhakazela behamba nemihlambi yabo, befuna uNdikhoyo ngamadini, kodwa soze bamfumane; kaloku yena urhoxile kubo." 
Hosea5:7 Kaloku bona bayamphamba uNdikhoyo; ewe, bade bazale nemigqakhwe. Ke amatheko abo okuthwasa kwenyanga obaqwenga kunye namasimi abo." 
Hosea5:8 “Hlokomisan' isigodlo eGibheya, nihlab' umkhosi ngexilongo eRama. Ze niwuvakalise naseBhetaven. Phakath' emsini, wena Bhenjamin!" 
Hosea5:9 Yeka ke ngomhla wesohlwayo: uEfrayim yena ndomvuthulula. Nonke nina zindlu zikaSirayeli, yazini, kuba oku kuqinisekile." 
Hosea5:10 Kaloku wona amatshawe akwaJuda selefana nâbo bahlehlisa umlimandlela. Ndosuka ndibagalele ngomsindo wam, babe ngathi bafikelwe ziimpuphuma." 
Hosea5:11 Ewe, uEfrayim ubandezelekile; suka wamvikiva umgwebo, kuba yena usukelana nezithixo ezingento yanto." 
Hosea5:12 Ndoba njengenundu kumaEfrayim, ndibe njengombolisa kwaJuda." 
Hosea5:13 UEfrayim wasibona isifo sakhe, noJuda wazibona iinduma zakhe. Suka uEfrayim wabhenel' eAsiriya, wazibika apho kukumkani uYarebhi; kodwa yena nkqi ukunyanga, soze aziphozise ezo nduma." 
Hosea5:14 Ke kuEfrayim ndoba njengengonyama; ewe, ndibe lirhamncwa kwindlu kaJuda. Ndobaqwenga-qwenga ndibashiye, ndibafuduse bangahlangulwa bani;" 
Hosea5:15 ndize ke ndibuyele endaweni yam, bade basivume isono sabo, banqwenele ukububona ubuso bam. Ewe, bondizingela bendifuna ngenxa yokuminxwa ziimbandezelo." 
Hosea6:1 “Yizani kaloku, sibuyele *kuNdikhoyo. Ewe, yena usidlakazile, kodwa usenako ukubuya asinyange. Ngenene yena usenzakalisile, ukanti ke angabuya asibophe." 
Hosea6:2 Emva kweentsuku ezimbini wosidlisa ubomi, ngolwesithathu ke asivuse, sitsho siphile phambi kwakhe." 
Hosea6:3 Hayi ke, masimvume uNdikhoyo; ewe, masikuxunele ukumazi. Ukubonakala kwakhe kuqiniseke njengokuphuma kwelanga. Uya kusifikela njengemvula yasebusika – njengeemvula zentlakohlaza ezinyakamisa umhlaba.”" 
Hosea6:4 “Mandikuthini na kodwa, Efrayim? Mandenze ntoni na ngawe, Juda? Uthando lwenu lunjengenkungu yakusasa, nqwa nombethe othi shwaka kwangoko." 
Hosea6:5 Ngoko ke ndaninqunqa ngabashumayeli bam; ewe, ndinixhelile ngamazwi am, isigwebo silenya njengombane phezu kwenu." 
Hosea6:6 Kaloku ndithanda inceba, andithandi minikelo. Ndinonelele ukwazi uThixo ngaphezu kwamadini atshiswayo." 
Hosea6:7 EAdam bawaphula umnqophiso; ewe, khona basuka baqhankqalaza." 
Hosea6:8 IGiliyadi sisixeko sabenza ububi, umzila weenyawo zayo umtyibilizi ligazi." 
Hosea6:9 Njengezihange ezilalel' umntu nababingeleli sisigqubu esikwanjalo, nasendleleni eya eShekem kulapho bagwinta khona. Ewe, benza izinto ezimanyumnyezi." 
Hosea6:10 Kwindlu kaSirayeli ndibone into enkwantyisayo; kulapho ahenyuza khona uEfrayim. Awu, yeka ukuxabheleka kukaSirayeli!" 
Hosea6:11 Nakuwe kambe, ndlundini kaJuda, uyeza umhla wesivuno. “Ndakuba ndizimisele ukubabuyisela kundalashe abantu bam," 
Hosea7:1 xa ndandifuna ukumnyanga uSirayeli, suka badandalaza ubugwenxa bukaEfrayim, batyhileka ububi beSamariya. Kaloku bahleli ngobuqhophololo. Ngamasela aqhekezayo ebe; basisigqubu sezikrelemnqa esiphanga phandle." 
Hosea7:2 Ewe, bona abaqondi tu, kanti izenzo zabo zithe thaa kum. Ngoku bajikelezwe zizenzo zabo; ziluzenge-zenge oluphambi kwam." 
Hosea7:3 “Inkohlakalo yabo iyamvuyisa ukumkani; inkohliso yabo iyawavuyisa namaphakathi. 
Hosea7:4 Bakrexeza bonke bephela; batshisa njengomlilo wokubhaka oyekwayo ungakhwezelwa ngumbhaki ukusukela ekuxovuleni kwakhe de inyuke intlama. 
Hosea7:5 Ngomhla wetheko lokumkani suka amaphakathi ashushu yiwayini, naye wabambana izandla nabahlekisi." 
Hosea7:6 Kaloku iintliziyo zabo zinjengeziko; ewe, zona zivutha ngamayelenqe. Ingcwangu yabo ilala ubusuku bonke, kusasa idangazele njengomlilo." 
Hosea7:7 Bonke banobushushu oku kweziko lokubhaka, abalawuli babo babathi lenye. Iikumkani zikhahleleka phantsi, kungekho bani ubhenela kum." 
Hosea7:8 “UEfrayim uxubana neentlanga; ewe, yena ufana nesonka esingaguqulwanga." 
Hosea7:9 Abasemzini bawaxhaphazile amandla akhe; ke kuye kurhidiwe, akaqondi. Kaloku yena ngoku iinwele zakhe zixubile, ibe ke phofu engaqondi." 
Hosea7:10 Ikratshi likaSirayeli liyamkhonkotha, kodwa nkqi kubo ukubuya beze kuNdikhoyo uThixo wabo; ewe, abazidubi nangokumfuna." 
Hosea7:11 “UEfrayim ukhamisile, nqwa nehobe; yena usisimathane esingaqondiyo. Uphatha kubhenela eJiputa, maxa wambi abalekele eAsiriya." 
Hosea7:12 Ndobabekela umgibe endleleni, ndibanqakule njengeentaka. Xa ndibeva bexhontelana ndobabambisa." 
Hosea7:13 Mawoo, ngokuba banxaxhile kum! Yintshabalalo kubo, ngokuba bemkile bandishiya! Mna ndiyafuna ukubahlangula, koko suka baxoka ngam." 
Hosea7:14 Xa bekhala abatsho ngomxhelo wabo; basuka bazibhuqa-bhuqe emandlalweni. Baqokelelana ngenxa yokutya newayini, kodwa mna bandichasile." 
Hosea7:15 Ndabaqeqesha ndabomeleza, kodwa ngoku bandijikeleza ngobubi." 
Hosea7:16 Ababuyeli kuPhezukonke; bafana nesaphetha esinenkohliso. Iinkokheli zabo zohlatyaniselwa likrele, kuba imilomo yazo iphokoza ububi. Ewe, boba sisigculelo kwilizwe laseJiputa.”" 
Hosea8:1 “Yitsho ngomtyangampo wesigodlo! Nal' ixhalanga lirhiwula abantu *bakaNdikhoyo. Kaloku bawaphule umnqophiso wam, suka bawuvukela umthetho wam." 
Hosea8:2 Ewe, ngoku uSirayeli uyazibika kum; uyandivuma esithi: ‘Thixo wam endimaziyo!’" 
Hosea8:3 Ngokutshikilela kwakhe okulungileyo uSirayeli wathiwa mbende lutshaba. 
Hosea8:4 Bazikhethele ookumkani ngaphandle kwam, bamisa namaphakathi ndingakwazi oko. Ngesiliva negolide yabo bazenzele izithixo; nto leyo iyintshabalalo kubo." 
Hosea8:5 Mh-mh-mh, ndiyalenyanya ithole laseSamariya! Ingqumbo yam iyavutha ngakubo; koda kube nini benyhuku-nyhuku?" 
Hosea8:6 Tholendini lenziwe yingcibi yakwaSirayeli! Hayi, asiThixo le nto iyenzileyo. Ngenene elo thole laseSamariya liya kuntlekeka libe ziingceba." 
Hosea8:7 “Bona bahlwayela umoya, kanti bavuna isaqhwithi. Ingqolowa ziziphunzi ezingathwalanga; ngoko ke tu isivuno. Enoba besingade sifumaneke bezingafikayo iintlanga zizenzele." 
Hosea8:8 USirayeli uthiwe bimbilili. Utshone phakathi kwezizwe; unjengesitya ekungekho yaso mpela. 
Hosea8:9 Usuke wanyukela eAsiriya, wanjengeqwarha elibhadulayo; uEfrayim uzithengisile kwizithandwa zakhe." 
Hosea8:10 Angade aziqeshise, nditsho nakwiintlanga, kodwa ndosuka ndimqokelele. Phofu ke uya kuncipha, ingcinezelo yokumkani imthi nca." 
Hosea8:11 KwaEfrayim andisiwe amaqonga – nditsho awokungxengxezela isono. Ngoku angamaqonga okwenza isono. 
Hosea8:12 Ndaba ngababhalela imithetho, nayo ke ingembalwa iyintaphane, suka nayo leyo bayikhaba, bayithatha njengento yasemzini." 
Hosea8:13 Ewe, bona amadini bayandenzela; inyama yona bajika bayitye. *UNdikhoyo ke akanelisekanga ngabo, engabulibalanga nobugwenxa babo. Ewe, yena uza kubohlwaya; baza kuphindela kwaseJiputa." 
Hosea8:14 USirayeli umlibele umenzi wakhe, suka wazakhela amabhotwe. UJuda wazandisa izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo – zixeko ezo ndozithumela ngomlilo, ulenye konke, nditsho nezo nqaba.”" 
Hosea9:1 Musa ukonwaba, Sirayeli; ewe, sukuvuya njengezinye izizwe. Kaloku wena umphambile uThixo wakho; wena usuke wamfulathela. Uthe phithi yimali yokuzithengisa kuzo zonke izanda zokubhula." 
Hosea9:2 Izanda nezixovulelo aziyi kuvelisa nto, newayini entsha yosuka inqongophale." 
Hosea9:3 Awuzukuhlala kulo mhlaba *kaNdikhoyo. Ewe, úza kuphindela eJiputa uEfrayim; uya kutya ukutya okunomlaza eAsiriya." 
Hosea9:4 Ewe, uNdikhoyo abayi kumenzela iminikelo yewayini; ayiyi kumanelisa iminikelo yabo. Kubo lo mnikelo wofana nesonka sabazili – abawutyileyo baya kuba nomlaza. Ukutya kwabo kolungela bona kuphela – akuyi kunikelwa kwindlu kaNdikhoyo." 
Hosea9:5 Hee, niya kwenza ntoni ke ngemihla yemibhiyozo emisiweyo, ngomhla wetheko likaNdikhoyo?" 
Hosea9:6 Xa bangasindiyo ekutshatyalalisweni iJiputa yofika yona ibaqokelele, ke yena uMemfisi abangcwabe. Ubutyebi besiliva buya kukhulelwa lukhula, imizi yabo ibhijelwe yimithana enameva." 
Hosea9:7 Iyeza imihla yesohlwayo – nditsho imihla yembuyekezo – noSirayeli ke uza kuqonda. Ngenxa yokwanda kobugwenxa benu, nobunzulu bentiyo yenu, *umshumayeli nithi sisityhakala, umntu onefuthe likaMoya uphambene." 
Hosea9:8 Umshumayeli ngumlindi kaEfrayim, bantu abo bangaboThixo wam, kodwa ubekelwa izabatha, kuliwe naye endlwini yoThixo wakhe." 
Hosea9:9 Ewe, bonakele ngokungathethekiyo; kunjengaloo mihla yaseGibheya. UThixo akabulibalanga ubugwenxa babo, yaye ke uza kubohlwaya ngenxa yezono zabo." 
Hosea9:10 Ndathi mhla ndamfumana uSirayeli kwanga ndibhaqe iidiliya entlango; mhla ndabafumana ookhokho benu yaba ngathi ndibhaqe amakhiwane, makhiwane ke alulibo. Bathe bakufika eBhali-pehore suka bazinikela kuBhali, baza bagqwaliseka njengaye kum." 
Hosea9:11 Udumo lukaEfrayim lothi shwaka, luntinge lumke njengentaka. Akukho mfazi uya kukhulelwa; ewe, akukho mfazi uya kubeleka." 
Hosea9:12 Naxa benabo abantwana abakhulayo ndobatshayela kuthi tu. Mawo-o-o! Yeka mhla ndabafulathela! 
Hosea9:13 Ndambona uEfrayim enjengeTire, emi kwisithabazi somhlaba. Kambe abantwana bakhe baya kuzingelwa, bona boba zizisulu zokubulawa." 
Hosea9:14 Azi ndothini na *kuNdikhoyo? Mandithi banike ntoni na kodwa? Izizalo ezingaphathi nto; amabele awomileyo. 
Hosea9:15 Ngenxa yezono abazenza eGiligali mna ndatsho ndabacaphukela. Ngenxa yezenzo zabo ezigwenxa ndiza kubagxotha endlwini yam. Ukubathanda kwam kwaphusile; kaloku iinkokheli zabo zindivukele. 
Hosea9:16 Ngenene uEfrayim uphanzile, womile ukususela ezingcanjini; ewe, akathwali ziqhamo. Noba angade azale ndoyibhubhisa loo nzala ayithandayo." 
Hosea9:17 UThixo wam wabalahla kwesinomhlwa; kaloku bona abamphulaphulanga. Ngoko ke boba ziimbacu ezizweni. 
Hosea10:1 USirayeli wayenjengomdiliya othe xazalala, ovelisa iziqhamo ngexesha lazo. Kanti ngokwanda kwezo ziqhamo wenjenjalo nokwandisa amaqonga. Ngokwanda kwenkqubela yelizwe wenjenjalo ukuzihombisa neentsika zakhe." 
Hosea10:2 Intliziyo yabo iyinkohliso! Ngoku baza kuvuna leyo bayilimileyo. *UNdikhoyo wowadiliza amaqonga abo, azisiphule ezo ntsika zabo." 
Hosea10:3 Kaloku ngoku baza kuthi: “Thina asinaye ukumkani, kuba kaloku asimhloneli uNdikhoyo. Ukuba besinaye ke, angasenzela ntoni ukumkani?”" 
Hosea10:4 Ewe, bathetha amazwi alambathayo; benza izibhambathiso zelize; bangena kwiminqophiso ephuthileyo. Suka ke ukubambana kwabo ezinkundleni kwafana nokhula oluyityhefu oluhluma emasimini alinyiweyo." 
Hosea10:5 AbaseSamariya ke bayangcangcazela ngenxa yethole laseBhetaven. Abemi bakhona botsho ngesijwili; nababingeleli balo baya kulililela ngenxa yokutshitsha kwesidima salo. 
Hosea10:6 Loqweqwediselwa eAsiriya; liya kuba ngumrhumo kukumkani uYarebhi. UEfrayim uya kuhlaziswa, uSirayeli abe neentloni ngecebo lakhe." 
Hosea10:7 Ukumkani waseSamariya wonqanyulwa; wothi shwaka ngathi luluthi emanzini. 
Hosea10:8 Asisathethi ke ngamaqonga asezindulini, kuba wona aya kutshatyalaliswa. Angundoqo wesono sikaSirayeli. Kokhula ameva kunye nenkunzane, atsho angabonakali amaqonga abo. Ngoko bosuka bathi ezintabeni: “Siweleni, nisifihle!” ezindulini bathi: “Sigqumeleleni!”" 
Hosea10:9 Kusukela kwimihla yaseGibheya uthe rhoqo ukona, Sirayeli. Ewe, awushenxanga kulo mkhwa. Kwenzeka ntoni na eGibheya? Andithi bagutyungelwa yimfazwe?" 
Hosea10:10 Ndosuka ndibohlwaye abanxaxhayo, nditsho olu hlanga lonayo. Izizwe ziya kuluhlanganyela; ewe, zona ziya kulukhonkxa ngesi sono siphinda-phindeneyo." 
Hosea10:11 UEfrayim yena nqwa nethokazi lenkomo – nditsho ithokazi eliqeqeshiweyo, elo libhula ngentumekelelo. Ke ndolifaka edyokhweni, ndiyibeke kuloo ntamo yalo. Ewe, ndomqhuba uEfrayim, uJuda ndimfake ekulimeni. Ewe, uYakobi uza kuyerha." 
Hosea10:12 Khanizihlwayelele ubulungisa, nixhamle iziqhamo zobubele. Ewe, khaniwukhubele umhlaba. Eli lixesha lokufunana noNdikhoyo, ade ke yena afike, anithululele amathamsanqa." 
Hosea10:13 Kambe ke nihlwayele inkohlakalo, naza ke navuna kwayona. Nizixhamle iziqhamo zokukhohlisa. Kaloku suka nakholosa ngobugorha benu, naqamela ngobuninzi bamajoni." 
Hosea10:14 Anikho sisidube-dube semfazwe; zonk' iinqaba zenu zotshatyalaliswa njengoShalman mhla ngedabi, mini wavuthulula iBhetarbhele, abadlezana bagileka bawa neentsana zathi geqe phaya." 
Hosea10:15 Bantundini baseBhetele, nakuni kuya kuba njalo ngenxa yobukhulu benkohlakalo yenu. Ewe, ukuthwasa kwaloo mini ukumkani kaSirayeli wotshabalala." 
Hosea11:1 “USirayeli ndamthanda kwasebuncinaneni bakhe; ndambiza ukuba aphume eJiputa unyana wam. 
Hosea11:2 Ndaba ngakhwaza ndimbiza uSirayeli, suka waya ebhekela kum. Baphikela ukunikela *kooBhali; imifanekiso eqingqiweyo bayenzela iziqhumiso." 
Hosea11:3 Kodwa ndim ofundise uEfrayim ukucathula; ndim owamthi chu ngengalo. Kodwa abaqondi ukuba ndim obanyangileyo. 
Hosea11:4 Bona ndabakhokela ndinovelwano; ewe, ndandiyimvuze-mvuze bububele. Ndabathula idyokhwe ebatyabulayo, ndaza ndathoba ndabafunzela." 
Hosea11:5 Kambe ke abayi kubuyela kwaseJiputa, kodwa uAsiriya uya kubalawula. Kaloku abavumi ukubuyela kum." 
Hosea11:6 Ezixekweni zabo komenyezel' ikrele. Lowanqunqa amanqwanqwa amasango, liwaphanzise namacebo abo." 
Hosea11:7 Abantu bam bazimisele ukundishiya. Noba bangade bakhale kOphezu-konke yena soze abaphakamise. 
Hosea11:8 “Kodwa ndingathini ukukulahla, Efrayim? Ndingathini ukukuncama, Sirayeli? Ndingathini ukukuphatha njengeAdama, ndikwenze ufane neZebhoyim? Intliziyo yam iguqukile ngakuni; imfobe yam itsho yavuseleleka." 
Hosea11:9 Andiyi kubuphumeza ubushushu bomsindo wam; andiyi kuphinda ndimbhubhise uEfrayim. Kaloku andimntu, ndinguThixo, uYedwa othe zwabha phakathi kwenu. Andiyi kuza ndinobushushu bomsindo." 
Hosea11:10 Bosuka bamlandele *uNdikhoyo. Yena wovungama njengengonyama. Ke kaloku akubhavumla usapho lwakhe loza lungcangcazela; ewe, luya kuza ngasentshonalanga." 
Hosea11:11 Boza benkwantya okweentaka bevela eJiputa; boba njengamahobe bevela eAsiriya. Ndobabuyisela emakhayeni abo.” Lowo ngumlomo kaNdikhoyo. 
Hosea11:12 UEfrayim undijikeleza ngobuxoki; indlu kaSirayeli indithe nca ngenkohliso. UJuda yena uvukelana noThixo, nditsho uYedwa lowo uthembekileyo." 
Hosea12:1 UEfrayim walusana nomoya; usukelana nolophu lwasempuma; imini yonke wandisa ubuxoki nobubhoja. Yena unqophisana neAsiriya; nango amafutha omnquma ewasa eJiputa. 
Hosea12:2 *UNdikhoyo umangalela uJuda; uYakobi womohlwaya ngezono zakhe, ambuyekeze ngezinto azenzileyo." 
Hosea12:3 Engekaveli wabamba umntakwabo, wamthi nqaku ngesithende. Ebudodeni wabambana noThixo," 
Hosea12:4 wajijisana nesithunywa woyisa, wakhala ecela inceba. Wahlangana noThixo eBhetele, waza wathetha-thethana naye khona apho –" 
Hosea12:5 uNdikhoyo uThixo uSomandla. Gama lakhe ke nguNdikhoyo; uthuthwa ngalo xa enqulwa. 
Hosea12:6 Ngoko ke buyela kuThixo wakho; gcina uthando nobulungisa, uhlale uthembele kuThixo wakho." 
Hosea12:7 Isikali somrhwebi sesobuqhophololo; yena uthanda ukuxhaphaza. 
Hosea12:8 Kodwa uEfrayim uthi: “Ndimi kakuhle, ndisisinhanha. Ekuzityebiseni kwam akukho bugwenxa nasono esinokufunyanwa.”" 
Hosea12:9 “NdinguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho owakukhuphulula kwelaseJiputa. Ndophinda ndinihlalise ezintenteni njengakwimihla yamatheko amisiweyo. 
Hosea12:10 Ndim owathetha nabashumayeli, ndabathi jize ngemibono, ndathetha ngemizekeliso ngemilomo yabo.”" 
Hosea12:11 IGiliyadi ibimi kakuhle, kodwa ngoku ayisento yanto. Koba njalo naseGiligali – noxa kwakubingelelwa ngeenkunzi khona amaqonga ayo ofana neengqumba zamatye, nditsho ezo zikumasimi alinyiweyo." 
Hosea12:12 UYakobi wabhacela kwa-Aram, uSirayeli wamsebenzela umfazi – ukuze amlobole walusa iigusha." 
Hosea12:13 UNdikhoyo wasebenzisa *umshumayeli ukukhupha uSirayeli eJiputa; ewe, wabalondoloza ngomshumayeli." 
Hosea12:14 Kodwa uEfrayim umcaphukise gqitha. Ngoko ke ityala legazi liza kumfumana, iNkosi yakhe imbuyekeze ngehlazo alenzileyo." 
Hosea13:1 Fudula esithi akuthetha uEfrayim abantu bona bangcangcazela; ewe, yena wayehlonelwa kwaSirayeli. Kodwa ke suka wazixabhela; suka wanqula uBhali waphutha." 
Hosea13:2 Ngoku wongeza isono phezu kwesono; uzenzela imifanekiso etyhidiweyo ngesiliva, izithixo ezenziwe ngokweembono zakhe. Ewe, bubuchule bezandla zomntu. Ngoku ke sekusithiwa: “Ofuna ukwenza idini makawange la mathole.”" 
Hosea13:3 Ke ngoko bothi shwaka njengenkungu yakusasa, njengombethe osuka uvuthuluke. Bofana nomququ ophetshethwa ngumoya, umququ wesanda ophel' emehlweni, ngathi ngumsi otyhoboza ngefestile." 
Hosea13:4 “Ukanti ke *ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wakho. Mna ndakukhuphulula eJiputa. AwunaThixo ngaphandle kwam, kungekho namsindisi ingendim." 
Hosea13:5 Ndim owakulondolozayo entlango, ndakugcina kwilizwe lembalela." 
Hosea13:6 Ndanondla natsho nahlutha, nathi ningahlutha nakhukhumala; ewe, nasuka nandilibala." 
Hosea13:7 Ndosuka ndinihlasele njengengonyama; ndosuka ndinilalele njengengwe. 
Hosea13:8 Ndohlasela njengebhere eyohluthwe amathole ayo; ewe, ndosuka ndiniqwenga-qwenge. Ndonidlavula njengemazi yengonyama, ndiniqwenge ngathi nihlaselwa lirhamncwa." 
Hosea13:9 “Ngenene uzonakalisile, Sirayeli, ngokundichasa kwakho, mna luncedo lwakho." 
Hosea13:10 Uphi khona loo kumkani wakho ukuba angakusindisi ezixekweni zakho zonke? Ziphi kaloku iinkokheli zakho? Ngani zingakuncedi nje? Kaloku nankqangaza nisithi: ‘Sinike ookumkani nabalawuli.’ 
Hosea13:11 Ewe kaloku, ndasuka ngomsindo, ndaza ndaninika ookumkani. Kwangomsindo ndisuke ndabohlutha.”" 
Hosea13:12 “Ubugwenxa bukaEfrayim budityanisiwe babotshwa; izono zakhe zigcinwe kuvimba. 
Hosea13:13 Uyapena-pena ziintlungu zenimba; kambe sisiyatha sosana – lakufika ixesha lokuzalwa aluvumi ukuvela. 
Hosea13:14 Ndomhlawulela na kwigunya lengcwaba? Ngaba ndomhlangula na ekufeni? Wena kufa, siphi isibetho sakho? Nawe ngcwaba, luphi ulwamvila lwakho? Ngenene andisayi kuba nanceba mpela!" 
Hosea13:15 “Noba uEfrayim angaba nempumelelo phakathi kwezizalwane zakhe, uya kufikelwa lulophu lwasempuma, umoya kaNdikhoyo ovela entlango, utshe umthombo wakhe, amaqula akhe ome qoko. Oovimba bakhe baya kuphangwa nabo bonke ubuncwane babo buthathwe." 
Hosea13:16 ISamariya yona iza kohlwaywa; kaloku bavukelene noThixo wabo. Baza kuba zizigede likrele; iintsana zophihlizwa emhlabeni, nabakhulelweyo baya kuqangqululwa.”" 
Hosea14:1 Khanibuye kaloku, maSirayeli; buyelani *kuNdikhoyo, kuThixo wenu. Kaloku niwile ngenxa yezono zenu." 
Hosea14:2 Thathani la mazwi nibuyele kuNdikhoyo, nithethe naye nithi: “Sixolele bonke ubugwenxa bethu, uze wamkele okulungileyo; endaweni yeenkunzi zeenkomo sinikela kuwe ngamazwi emilebe yethu." 
Hosea14:3 Akanakusisindisa uAsiriya; asiyi kukhwela mahashe emfazwe. Asiphindi sithi: ‘Thixo wethu,’ entweni esiyenze ngokwethu, kuba kukuwe apho inkedama ifumana inceba khona.”" 
Hosea14:4 “Ndiza kukunyanga ukunxaxha kwabo, ndibavave ngesisa sothando, kuba kaloku andisabaqumbelanga." 
Hosea14:5 KuSirayeli ndoba njengombethe, atsho aqhakaze njengenyibiba, endele azike emhlabeni, afane nomsedare waseLebhanon." 
Hosea14:6 Amasebe akhe aya kunaba, abe nomkhitha njengomnquma, aqhole njengomsedare waseLebhanon." 
Hosea14:7 Abaphila phantsi kwephiko lakhe baya kuchuma njengengqolowa, badubule njengediliya, badume njengewayini yaseLebhanon." 
Hosea14:8 Efrayim, andinanto yakwenza *nezithixo. Ndim osabelayo akukhathalele; ndifana nompayini ohlal' uluhlaza. Kungenxa yam uneziqhamo nje.”" 
Hosea14:9 Osisilumko uya kuziqonda ezi zinto; oqaphelayo uya kukwazi oku. Iindlela *zikaNdikhoyo zithe ngqo. Ke amalungisa ahamba ngazo; ke bona abakreqi ziyabakhubekisa. 
Joel1:1 Nali ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo elafika kuJoweli unyana kaPetuweli. 
Joel1:2 Hoyina, zingwevu zakowethu! Yivani, nonke bemi beli lizwe! Nikhonje nakha nayibona into enje? Khona kwimihla yamanyange yakhe yakho phi?" 
Joel1:3 Ke, yixeleni kubantwana benu; nabo ze bayixelele abantwana babo, ukuze nabo bayixelele isizukulwana esizayo." 
Joel1:4 Oko kushiywe ngumqikela kudliwe yinkumbi; okushiywe yinkumbi kudliwe ngumkhothululi; ukanti okushiywe ngumkhothululi kudliwe ngumnqunquthi! 
Joel1:5 Vukani, nitshw' esofelweyo, manxila; lilani nonke nigixe, baseli bewayini. Ewe, bhombolozani ngenxa yewayini entsha – kaloku sobe nibe saphinda niyirhabule." 
Joel1:6 Kaloku eli lizwe lihlaselwe ngumkhosi; ewe, ziingwanyalala eziyinyambalala. Ngenene zizinto ezimazinyo angxavula okwengonyama. Ngonyamakazi yakwabani emabamba anje?" 
Joel1:7 Isidiliya sam usibhuqe bhuqiyane, imithi yam yomkhiwane wayitshabalalisa. Ewe, uyixoze wada wayixobula, wageqa noomaxolo ejuba phaya. Ewe, iziphunzi zasala zimhlophe wee." 
Joel1:8 Ngoko ke hlahlambani nixel' umfazana ozilayo eswelekelwe ngumyeni wakhe. 
Joel1:9 Okokwayo iminikelo yeenkozo, ngokunjalo neminikelo yewayini, inqamkile endlwini *kaNdikhoyo. Ngoko ke ababingeleli bayagixa; nditsho abo bangabalungiseleli bakaNdikhoyo." 
Joel1:10 Kaloku nanko amasimi eze, nomhlaba ngokwawo uyabhomboloza. Kaloku ingqolowa itshabalele, newayini yembala inqamkile. Asisathethi ke ngamafutha omnquma." 
Joel1:11 Ewe, ncamani, nina balimi, nihlahlambe, batyali bomdiliya, nangenxa yengqolowa nerhasi. Ngenene isivuno samasimi sitshatyalalisiwe." 
Joel1:12 Umdiliya usuke woma khwahla; kanti wona umkhiwane uswamile. Oomirharnati, isundu, nom-apile, suka yabharha yonk' imithi. Nasebantwini imivuyo iphelile." 
Joel1:13 Ke nina, babingeleli, fakan' ezokufelwa nizile; bhombolozani, balungiseleli baseqongeni. Yambathani ezokuzila nasebusuku, nditsho nina, balungiseleli bakaThixo wam, ngenxa yeminikelo yeenkozo nethululwayo. Kaloku yona inqamkile endlwini yoThixo wenu." 
Joel1:14 Bhengezani ithuba lokuzila; ewe, miselani imbizo eyodwa. Waqokeleleni amadod' amakhulu; xa bebonke abemi beli lizwe mabeze endlwini kaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, bakhale kuye." 
Joel1:15 Hay' ukoyikeka kwaloo mini! Ewe, imini kaNdikhoyo isemnyango! Yogaleleka ipheth' intshabalalo evela kuSomandla." 
Joel1:16 Kaloku kona ukutya suka kwanqanyulwa phambi kwamehlo ethu. Asisathethi ke ngemivuyo nolonwabo – alusekho nasendlwini kaThixo wethu. 
Joel1:17 Imbewu isuka ingunde phantsi kwamagade. Udladla ngokwalo seludlakadlaka, noozisele ngokwazo zidibekile. Kaloku ingqolowa itshile." 
Joel1:18 Nâzo izilwanyana zigxwala, imihlambi yeenkomo ikhohliwe. Kaloku amadlelo azo akaphethe nto, ukanti ke neegusha zixhwithekile." 
Joel1:19 Ewe, Ndikhoyo, ndibhenela kuwe. Kaloku amadlelo ethu atshile; nemithi yonke irhawuke yaphela, kwanga ilenywa lidangatye." 
Joel1:20 Abhenele kuwe amarhamncwa nezilwanyana. Kaloku imithombo yamanzi itshe qoko; ewe, amadlelo asuke abharha." 
Joel2:1 Hlokomisan' ixilongo eZiyon; hlaban' umkhosi kwintaba yam engcwele. Mabankwantye bonke abemi beli lizwe. Kaloku imini kaNdikhoyo isemnyango; ayifikanga, koko igalelekile." 
Joel2:2 Ngumhla othi thsu, imini yesithokothoko; lusuku olurhuqis' amafu, nditsho amafu amnyama, imini enjengongcwalazi phezu kwentaba. Nank' umkhosi omkhulu owomeleleyo! Nowamanyange awuzange ube nje; nowezizukulwana awusoze ube njalo." 
Joel2:3 Phambi kwawo kulenyez' umlilo; ngasemva kudangazel' idangatye. Phambili phaya umhlaba ngathi ngumyezo we-Eden, kodwa emkhondweni wawo yinkangala. Ubetha kungasindi nto konke-konke." 
Joel2:4 Mbonakalo yawo ngathi ngamahashe; ewe, uphala oku kwawomkhosi." 
Joel2:5 Nanko utsiba-tsiba ezintabeni. Yingxokolo engathi kukugaxaza kweenqwelo zokulwa, ngathi kukunqanqaza komququ otshiswa ngumlilo. Unqwa nomkhosi oqulele imfazwe." 
Joel2:6 Ewe, wona nguvela-barhwaqele; phambi kwawo ubuso bezizwe buyambatsha." 
Joel2:7 Uhlasela okwamagorha; ugwencel' iindonga okwamajoni; ungqala phambili ungajika-jiki. 
Joel2:8 Ewe, awugxalathelani, uhlala uthe mbo; nokuba sewubulawa loo nto ayiwuthibazi." 
Joel2:9 Usuka uphoseke phakath' esixekweni, uqakathe phezu kwezo ndonga. Usuka utsho phakathi ezindlwini nangeefestile ngathi ngamasela." 
Joel2:10 Wakuvela suka kunyikim' umhlaba; ke sona isibhakabhaka singcangcazele, ilanga nenyanga zijike zibe mnyama, ke zona iinkwenkwezi zitsho zifiphale." 
Joel2:11 UNdikhoyo uzongomisa ngelo lizwi, endolosa phambi komkhosi wakhe. Awakhe amabutho yinkungu nelanga; ewe, yena uthotyelwa ngamagorha. Hay' ubukhulu bemini kaNdikhoyo! Awu, hay' ukoyikeka kwayo! Yaz'ba ngubani na onokumelana nayo?" 
Joel2:12 Ewe kaloku, utsho uNdikhoyo, yena uthi: “Qalisani kwangoku. Buyelani kum ngamxhelo mnye ngokuzila, ngeenyembezi, nangesingqala.”" 
Joel2:13 Ndithi sanukuzikrazula izinxibo, koko zisoleni kukrazuk' iintliziyo. Buyelani kuNdikhoyo uThixo wenu; kaloku yena unesisa kwanemfobe, uza kade umsindo, yimvuze-mvuze ngobubele; ewe, unebuyambo, akananqala." 
Joel2:14 Ngubani ke owaziyo? Noko mhlawumbi angabuya asivele, asithululele iintsikelelo – umnikelo weenkozo kunye nothululwayo uziswe kuNdikhoyo uThixo wakho." 
Joel2:15 Khanihlokomise ixilongo eZiyon. Bhengezani umhla owodwa wokuzila; ewe, qokelelan' ibandla ibe yimbizo." 
Joel2:16 Bahlanganiseni abantu, niyihlambulule loo ntlangano. Waqokeleleni amadoda amakhulu; kananjalo qokelelani nabantwana, nize naye nalowo usebeleni. Nomyeni makalishiye igumbi lakhe, aze nomtshakazi aphume entangeni." 
Joel2:17 Ababingeleli abalungiselela kwaNdikhoyo mabantywizise; ewe, mabalile phakathi kwegumbi lokungena neqonga, bathi: “Khawube nebuyambo, Ndikhoyo! Abantu abalilifa lakho mabangabi sisigculelo. Mabangabi ngundaba-mlonyeni wezizwe. Abantu mabangathethi ngabo besithi: ‘Ud' abe phi na lo Thixo wabo?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 *UNdikhoyo woba nekhwele ngelizwe lakhe, abenzele inceba abantu bakhe." 
Joel2:19 UNdikhoyo wobaphendula athi: “Ewe, ndiza kuninika ingqolowa, newayini entsha, namafutha omnquma. Ngenene niya kutya nihluthe, ndingaze ndiphinde ndinenze intlekisa phakathi kwezizwe." 
Joel2:20 Ndosigxotha isibetho esivela ngasentla, ndisidudulele kwinkangala yentlango. Amabutho aphambili ndiwase kulwandle lwasempuma, asemva wona ndiwase kolwasentshonalanga. Hayi ke ukubopha kwevumba lazo! Kuba kambe iziphakamisile ngokwenza izinto ezinkulu." 
Joel2:21 Musa ukoyika, mhlabandini; ewe, yiba nemihlali wonwabe ngenxa yemisebenzi emikhulu ayenzayo uNdikhoyo." 
Joel2:22 Sanukoyika nani, zilwanyana zasendle. Kaloku amadlelo asentlango ayahluma, imithi nayo ithwala iziqhamo zayo, ngokunjalo umkhiwane nomdiliya uyavuza zizo." 
Joel2:23 Vuyani nani, bemi baseZiyon. Yonwabani kuNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, kuba uninike ngobulungisa imvula yasekwindla, wanithululela izandyondyo zomvimbi ekwindla nasentlakohlaza, natsho nadla ngendeb' endala." 
Joel2:24 Izanda ziya kuzala yingqolowa, iifatyi ziphuphume yiwayini entsha namafutha omnquma." 
Joel2:25 Mna ndiya kunibuyekeza ngelahleko yeminyaka yeenkumbi – nditsho umkhothululi, nomqikela, nomnqunquthi, loo mkhosi wam omkhulu ndanithumela ngawo." 
Joel2:26 Niya kutya nizibethe zibe bomvu, nitsho nilidumise igama likaNdikhoyo uThixo wenu onenzele imimangaliso engaka. Soze baphinde badeleke abantu bam nanini na." 
Joel2:27 Niya kuqonda ukuba ndinaye uSirayeli, nazi ukuba ndinguNdikhoyo uThixo wenu, niqonde ukuba akukho wumbi. Ewe, soze baphinde badeleke abantu bam nanini na.”" 
Joel2:28 “Kothi ke emva koko ndithulule uMoya wam kulo lonke uluntu, bashumayele oonyana neentombi zenu, amaxhego aphuphe amaphupha, abafana babone imibono." 
Joel2:29 Ewe, nezicaka nezicakazana ndiya kuzigalela ngoMoya wam ngaloo mihla." 
Joel2:30 Ndiya kwenza imiqondiso esibhakabhakeni nasemhlabeni, kube ligazi, umlilo, nentshinyela yomsi." 
Joel2:31 Ilanga liya kujika libe bubumnyama, inyanga ibe bomvu njengegazi, phambi kokufika kwaloo mhla mkhulu woyikekayo kaNdikhoyo." 
Joel2:32 Kananjalo nabani na othe wabiza igama likaNdikhoyo uya kusindiswa, kuba kaloku kwintaba iZiyon naseJerusalem kuya kubakho ukuhlangulwa, njengoko atshiloyo uNdikhoyo – nditsho ukuhlangulwa kwâbo babiziweyo nguNdikhoyo.”" 
Joel3:1 “Ke kaloku ngaloo mihla, ngalo kanye elo xesha, ekuyibuyiseleni kwam iJerusalem noJuda kwimeko yayo yangaphambili," 
Joel3:2 ndoziqokelela zonke izizwe, ndizithobele kwintili kaYoshafati, apho ke ndozigweba khona ngenxa yelifa lam abantu bam amaSirayeli. Kaloku bawasarhaze aziimbacu ezizweni, bawahlula-hlula umhlaba wam." 
Joel3:3 Benze *amaqashiso ngabantu bam; ngenxa yamahenyukazi bathengisa ngamakhwenkwe, ngenxa yewayini bathengisa ngamantombazana, khon' ukuze babe nento yokusela." 
Joel3:4 “Kambe ke niya kundenza ntoni na, nina Tire neSidon nemimandla yaseFilistiya? Ngaba nizama ukuphindisa ngenxa yesenzo sam? Xa kunjalo ke mna ndokhawuleza ndinibuyekeze kwangoko." 
Joel3:5 Kaloku nayithimba isiliva negolide yam, nabuthatha nobona buncwane bobutyebi bam, nabuthimba nabusa ezindlwini zoothixo benu." 
Joel3:6 AbakwaJuda nabaseJerusalem nithengise ngabo kumaGrike, nabasa kude lé kwelakowabo." 
Joel3:7 Ngoku ke ndiza kubaphuthuma kwezo ndawo wabathengisa kuzo, ndiphindise ngenxa yezinto owazenza kubo." 
Joel3:8 Oonyana neentombi zenu ndobathengisa kumaJuda; aze wona abathengise kwisizwe esikude, amaShebha.” Lawo ke ngamazwi kaNdikhoyo." 
Joel3:9 Le nto yivakaliseni ezizweni. Ndithi hlaban' umkhosi. Ewe, waxhokonkxeni amajoni. Onke amadoda emfazwe makasondele ahlasele." 
Joel3:10 Amakhuba wajikeni abe ngamakrele, izitshetshe zokuthena imithi zibe yimikhonto. Negwala malithi: “Ndilikroti.”" 
Joel3:11 Phuthumani, yizani nonke, zizwe ezijikelezileyo; yizani niqokelelane apho. Thoba umkhosi wakho, Ndikhoyo." 
Joel3:12 “Ke zona izizwe mazishukunyiswe zingene kwintili kaJoshafati. Ke mna ndohlala khona, ndizigwebe iintlanga ezijikelezileyo." 
Joel3:13 Ewe, khawufake irhengqe; kaloku isivuno sivuthiwe ngoku. Ngena uxovule iidiliya; sona isixovulelo sizele, kananjalo nemiphanda iyaphuphuma. Kaloku inkohlakalo yabo inkulu.”" 
Joel3:14 Nâbo beyinyambalala yesihlwele phaya kwintili yesigqibo. Kaloku imini kaNdikhoyo isemnyango; ewe, iyifikele intili yesigqibo." 
Joel3:15 Loba mnyama ilanga nenyanga; iinkwenkwezi zosuka zifiphale. 
Joel3:16 UNdikhoyo wobhavuma eZiyon, izwi lakhe lizongome eJerusalem, umhlaba nesibhakabhaka utsho ungcangcazele. Ke abakhe bazimela ngaye uNdikhoyo; ewe, yena ulixhadi labantu bakhe amaSirayeli." 
Joel3:17 “Ke kaloku nina notsho niqonde ukuba mna *Ndikhoyo ndinguThixo wenu. Ndaye ke ndihlala eZiyon, ndawo leyo iyintaba yam engcwele. IJerusalem yoba sisixeko esingcwele, ingaze iphinde yoyiswe ziintlanga." 
Joel3:18 “Ngaloo mihla iintaba zovuz' iwayini entsha, ke zona iinduli ziphalale ubisi, iintlambo zonke zakwaJuda zimpompoze amanzi. Kwindlu kaNdikhoyo kogqabhuk' umthombo, kunkcenkceshelwe intili yaseShitim." 
Joel3:19 IJiputa yojika ibe yintlango, iEdom ibe yinkangala ebharhileyo, kuba zisuke zamgonyamela uJuda, ezweni lakhe zaphalaza igazi elingenatyala." 
Joel3:20 UJuda uya kumiwa naphakade, iJerusalem imiwe zizizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Joel3:21 Ityala labo legazi endilibambileyo mna ndiya kulixolela.” Kaloku uNdikhoyo umi eZiyon. 
Amos1:1 La ngamazwi ka-Amos, owayengomnye wabafuyi baseTekowa, abhekiselele koko wakubonayo ngokuphathelele kumaSirayeli, ngexesha u-Uziya wayengukumkani kwaJuda, yena uJerobhowam unyana kaJowashe engukumkani kwaSirayeli, iminyaka emibini phambi kwenyikima." 
Amos1:2 Wathetha wenjenje uAmos: “*UNdikhoyo angabharhumla kwintab' iZiyon, iziwi lakhe lingazongoma livela ngaseJerusalem, amadlelo atsho abharhe, yona incopho yentaba iKarmele itshaze.”" 
Amos1:3 Utsho *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Nokuba iDamasko yayone izihlandlo zazithathu ngendingasirhoxisanga isohlwayo sam. Kambe ke suke yagqithisa ngokona isihlandlo sesine. Kaloku ibhule iGiliyadi ngesileyi sokubhula esimazinyo ayintsimbi. 
Amos1:4 Ngoko ke ndiza kulintumeka ngomlilo ibhotwe likaHazayeli, zitshe ziphele nqu iinqaba zikaBhenadadi." 
Amos1:5 Ndiza kuwadiliza amasango aseDamasko, ndibasiphule neengcambu abemi bentili yaseAven kunye nezo ziphathamandla zaseBhete-eden. Ama-Aram aya kuthinjwa, asiwe eKire.” Utsho uNdikhoyo." 
Amos1:6 Utsho *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Nokuba iGaza yayone izihlandlo zazithathu ngendingasirhoxisanga isohlwayo sam. Kambe ke suke yagqithisa ngokona isihlandlo sesine. Kaloku bona bathimba isizwe siphela, basithengisa saba ngamakhoboka kwaEdom." 
Amos1:7 Ngoko ke ndiza kuluntumeka ngomlilo udonga lwaseGaza, zitshe ziphele nqu iinqaba zalapho," 
Amos1:8 ndibasiphule neengcambu abemi baseAshdode kunye nezo ziphathamandla zaseAshkelon, ndiziphanzise iidolophu zase-Ekron, kungasali nempunde le kumaFilistiya.” Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo." 
Amos1:9 Utsho *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Nokuba iTire yayone izihlandlo zazithathu ngendingasirhoxisanga isohlwayo sam. Kambe ke suke yagqithisa ngokona isihlandlo sesine. Kaloku bona bathimba isizwe siphela, basithengisa saba ngamakhoboka kwaEdom, suka bawutyeshela umnqophiso wobuzalwana." 
Amos1:10 Ngoko ke ndiza kuluntumeka ngomlilo udonga lwaseTire, zitshe ziphele nqu iinqaba zalapho.”" 
Amos1:11 Utsho *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Nokuba amaEdom ayone izihlandlo zazithathu ngendingasirhoxisanga isohlwayo sam. Kambe ke suke agqithisa ngokona isihlandlo sesine. Kaloku wona awaqweqwedisa ngekrele amawabo, ayitsho yaphela tu imfobe yokuzalana, awaqwenga enomsindo ongapheliyo, umsindo ongathibazekiyo." 
Amos1:12 Ngoko ke ndiza kuyintumeka ngomlilo iTeman, zitshe ziphele nqu iinqaba zaseBhozera.”" 
Amos1:13 Utsho *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Nokuba ama-Amon ayone izihlandlo zazithathu ngendingasirhoxisanga isohlwayo sam. Kambe ke suke agqithisa ngokona isihlandlo sesine. Kaloku wona aqangqulula abafazi abakhulelweyo baseGiliyadi ukuze bandise imida yabo. 
Amos1:14 Ngoko ke ndiza kuluntumeka ngomlilo udonga lwaseRabha, zitshe ziphele nqu iinqaba zalapho. Kovakala intlaba-mkhosi mhla ngedabi, kuvuthuze umoyakazi ngemini yesaqhwithi." 
Amos1:15 Uya kuthinjwa ukumkani wawo, yena kunye namaphakathi akhe.” Utsho uNdikhoyo." 
Amos2:1 Utsho *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Nokuba amaMowabhi ayone izihlandlo zazithathu ngendingasirhoxisanga isohlwayo sam. Kambe ke suke agqithisa ngokona isihlandlo sesine. Kaloku wona awatshisa aluthuthu amathambo kakumkani wase-Edom. 
Amos2:2 Ngoko ke ndiza kulintumeka ngomlilo elakwaMowabhi, zitshe ziphele nqu iinqaba zaseKeriyoti. Aya kufa kuloo mbodamo amaMowabhi, kuvakala intsholo yentlaba-mkhosi nezigodlo." 
Amos2:3 Ndiya kuzicim' igama iziphathamandla zalapho, nezinxiba-mxhaka zabo zife kunye nabo.” Utsho uNdikhoyo." 
Amos2:4 Utsho *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Nokuba amaJuda ayone izihlandlo zazithathu ngendingasirhoxisanga isohlwayo sam. Kambe ke suke agqithisa ngokona isihlandlo sesine. Kaloku wona awulahlile umyalelo kaNdikhoyo, akayigcina imimiselo yakhe, suka alahlekiswa ngamampunge, nditsho amampunge awayelandelwa ngooyise." 
Amos2:5 Ngoko ke ndiza kulintumeka ngomlilo elakwaJuda, zitshe ziphele nqu iinqaba zaseJerusalem.”" 
Amos2:6 Utsho *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Nokuba amaSirayeli ayone izihlandlo zazithathu ngendingasirhoxisanga isohlwayo sam. Kambe ke suke agqithisa ngokona isihlandlo sesine. Kaloku wona azuza imali ngokuthengisa ngabantu abathembekileyo, ihlwempu lona ananise ngalo ngeembadada." 
Amos2:7 Iindwayi azinyhasha iintloko zibe luthuli, zona iimpula-kalujaca azitsho ziphume endleleni. Unyana noyise babolekisana ngenkazana enye, benyelisa igama lam elingcwele." 
Amos2:8 AmaSirayeli ahamba ezandlala kumaqonga ngamaqonga, etsho ngezambatho azithimbileyo, endlwini yothixo wawo asele iwayini ayithathe kubantu abadliweyo." 
Amos2:9 “Ndim kaloku owawatshabalalisayo ama-Amori phambi kwamaSirayeli – nditsho eziya ngxilimbela zibude bunga ngumthi womsedare, nokomelela kunga ngum-oki, ndazitshabalalisa iziqhamo zawo phezulu, ndazisiphula iingcambu ezantsi." 
Amos2:10 Ndim owanikhupha eJiputa, ndanikhapha amashumi amane eminyaka nisentlango, nada naya kuhlutha umhlaba wama-Amori." 
Amos2:11 Ndim owenza abanye boonyana benu baba *ngabashumayeli, abanye baba ngamalolo kaNdikhoyo? Akunjalo yini na, bonyana bakaSirayeli?” Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Amos2:12 “Loo malolo nina niwangxale iwayini, *kubashumayeli nathi: ‘Musani ukushumayela.’" 
Amos2:13 “Mna ke ndiza kunenza nixinge apho nikhoyo, oku kwenqwelo exinga kukuzala zizithungu." 
Amos2:14 Akuyi kusinda noyena unamendu umntu, nezigantsontso ziya kutsho ziphelelwe ngamandla, ikroti lingabi nako ukusindisa ubomi balo," 
Amos2:15 kunkwantye nkqu neencutshe zeentolo, imbaleki ingabi nakuphuncuka, kungasindi nokhwele ehashini." 
Amos2:16 Ewe, nelona laziwayo igorha liya kuswantsula zé ngaloo mini.” Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Amos3:1 Liveni eli lizwi alibhekisa kuni *uNdikhoyo, bantu bakwaSirayeli, kuni nalo lonke usapho lwakhe awalukhuphayo eJiputa:" 
Amos3:2 “Nini kuphela abantu endabanyulayo kwizizwe zonke zehlabathi; yiyo ke loo nto ndiza kunohlwaya ngenxa yobugwenxa benu bonke.” 
Amos3:3 Bakha bahamba kunye na ababini bengavani? 
Amos3:4 Kanene, ikhe igqume ehlathini ingonyama ingenalo ixhoba? Khona, ikhe irgargame ingonyama entsha esikhundleni sayo ingabambanga nto?" 
Amos3:5 Yona intaka ikhe ingene kwisabatha apho kungabekwanga mgibe khona? Sona isigu khe sifane sibambise nje, kungekho nto ibanjiweyo?" 
Amos3:6 Kanene, khe kubekho intlaba-mkhosi ingabothusi abantu esixekweni? Hee, khe kuvele ishwangusha esixekweni lingasuki kuNdikhoyo?" 
Amos3:7 Ukanti ke yona iNkosi uNdikhoyo ayenzi nto ingathanga ilityhile icebo layo kwizicaka zayo *abashumayeli. 
Amos3:8 Yakugquma ingonyama, ngubani ongakhwankqiyo? Yakuthetha iNkosi uNdikhoyo, ngubani ongalayo ukushumayela?" 
Amos3:9 Luvakalise olu daba kumabhotwe aseAshdode; luxele nakumabhotwe aseJiputa, uthi: “Buthelani ezintabeni zaseSamariya, niye kubona imbudumbudu ekweso sixeko, niyijonge ingcinezelo elapho.”" 
Amos3:10 Utsho uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Abo bantu abazani tu nobulungisa; amabhotwe abo azele zizinto abazizuze ngobugebenga nangokuxhaphaza.” 
Amos3:11 Yiyo ke loo nto iNkosi uNdikhoyo itshoyo ukuthi: “Umhlaba wenu uza kurhawulwa ziintshaba, zinaphule iimpondo, zithimbe naloo mabhotwe enu.”" 
Amos3:12 Utsho uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Kuloo maSirayeli athe zava kwezo sofa zaseSamariya, ehleli kwezo zihlalo zitofo-tofo, kosinda nje imbinana, ngathi yimilenze yegusha okanye isijungqe sendlebe efane yaxhwilwa ngumalusi emlonyeni wengonyama.”" 
Amos3:13 Nguwo lo umlomo kaNdikhoyo uThixo onamandla onke: “Yivani, nize niyilumkise inzala kaYakobi." 
Amos3:14 Kaloku ngaloo mini ndomohlwaya uSirayeli ngenxa yeziphoso zakhe, ndiwadilize amaqonga aseBhetele, nezo mpondo zawo ndizinqumle ziwe phantsi." 
Amos3:15 Ndozichitha izindlu zasebusika nezasehlotyeni, ndiwatsho abe ngamabhodlo loo mabhotwe ahonjiswe ngamabamba eendlovu, aphele amapomakazi alapho.” Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Amos4:1 Liphulaphuleni eli lizwi, bafazindini basezintabeni zaseSamariya, zintondini ezityebe okweemazi zeenkomo zaseBhashan, nina nicinezela iindwayi, niwaxhaphaze amahlwempu, ezi zinto zithi kumadoda azo: “Thungani sisele!”" 
Amos4:2 Ifunge ubungcwele bayo iNkosi *uNdikhoyo, yathi: “Seyinifikele imini yokuqweqwediswa kwenu nirhuqwa ngamagwegwe, abantwana benu betsalwa ngomlobothi." 
Amos4:3 Niya kukhutshwa ngeemfanta zeendonga ezilungelelene nani; niya kulahlwa kweziya ntaba zaseHarmon.” Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo. 
Amos4:4 “Yiyani eBhetele, none; niye naseGiligali, nigabadele ukona; nivuke mihla le nisondeze amadini; nizise izishumi qho ngosuku lwesithathu!" 
Amos4:5 Zitshiseni izonka ezinegwele zibe ngumnikelo wombulelo, nibhengeze iminikelo yenu yokuqhutywa yintliziyo, nihambe niqhayisa ngaloo nto. Nantso ke into enikholwa yiyo, nina maSirayeli.” Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Amos4:6 “Ndanizisela indlala ezixekweni zenu zonke, akwabikho nesuntswana eli lesonka emizini yenu, kodwa anibuyelanga kum.” Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Amos4:7 “Ndim ozise imbalela iinyanga ezintathu phambi kwesivuno, ndanisa imvula kule dolophu, ndayishiya leya; yanetha kule intsimi, enye ndayishiya ibharhile." 
Amos4:8 Basuka kule dolophu baya kuleya abantu, befuna amanzi okusela, suka akabanela. Kodwa phezu koko anibuyelanga kum.” Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Amos4:9 “Ndahlisa ulophu olutshisayo nomngundane, zazitsho zee waca izityalo nezidiliya zenu, iinkumbi zawanqunqutha amakhiwane enu nemithi yeminquma. Phezu koko anibuyelanga kum.” Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Amos4:10 “Ndanihlisela isibetho esifana nesaseJiputa, oonyana benu bawa ngekrele edabini kunye namadoda akhwela amahashe. Zanuka phu iikampu zenu liphunga lezidumbu zabo, suka nina anabuyela kum.” Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Amos4:11 “Abanye benu ndababhubhisa ngalaa ndlela ndabhubhisa iSodom neGomora ngayo. Nina nasinda ngathi sisikhuni sixwilwe emlilweni, kodwa anifuni kude nibuyele kum.” Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Amos4:12 “Ke ngoko, Sirayeli, ndophinda ndikwenze konke oku. Ke, njengoko ndiza kwenjenjalo, zilungiseleleni, maSirayeli, ukuhlangana noThixo wenu.”" 
Amos4:13 Ulodala iintaba, adal' umoya, ulozityhilayo iinjongo zakhe eluntwini, ulojik' umsobomvu kuvel' urhatyazo, ulonyathela imimango ephakamileyo yomhlaba, nguNdikhoyo uThixo onamandla onke igama lakhe." 
Amos5:1 Liveni ilizwi lam, ndlu kaSirayeli; nditsho esi sililo ndisenzayo ngenxa yenu:" 
Amos5:2 “Iwile bhaxa, ayiyi kube ivuke intombi enguSirayeli! Ithe qungqululu yodwa kumhlaba wakowayo, kungekho bani wokuyiphakamisa.”" 
Amos5:3 Itsho kaloku iNkosi *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Kuya kusinda ikhulu kuloo dolophu ithumela iwaka edabini, kusinde ishumi lamaSirayeli kuleyo ithumela ikhulu lamadoda.”" 
Amos5:4 Utsho ke *uNdikhoyo kwindlu kaSirayeli ukuthi: “Quqelani kum, niphile." 
Amos5:5 Musani ukuquqela eBhetele, ningayi naseGiligali, ningatyeleli eBheshebha, kuba abantu baseGiligali baza kuthinjwa, iBhetele ingabi nto yanto.”" 
Amos5:6 Quqelani kuNdikhoyo, niphile, kungenjalo uya kuza evutha, ayitshise iphele indlu kaJosefu, kungekho nabani eBhetele ongawucimayo loo mlilo." 
Amos5:7 Nina nigqwetha ubulungisa bube krakra njengekhala, nibukhahlele phantsi eluthulini." 
Amos5:8 Ulomenzi woomakroza noozilimela, ulojik' isithokothoko sobumnyama sibe ngumsobomvu, nemini ibe yintsunguzi yobusuku, ulovulela amanz' olwandle ankcenkceshe ngawo umhlaba, nguNdikhoyo igama lakhe." 
Amos5:9 Nguye umtshabalalisi wezigantsontso; nguye umdilizi weenqaba zazo. 
Amos5:10 Niyamcaphukela umntu othanda ubulungisa ezinkundleni, nilithiye ingqina elidandalazisa inyaniso." 
Amos5:11 Njengoko niwacinezela amahlwempu, niwarhumisa nangengqolowa ayivunileyo, anisobe nizihlale ezo zindlu zenu zamatye aqingqiweyo, ningasobe niyisele newayini evela kwezo zidiliya zenu zinqwenelekayo." 
Amos5:12 Ndiyabazi kaloku ubuninzi bobugwenxa benu nobukhulu bezono zenu. Nitshutshisa abantu abamsulwa; niyakuthanda nokunyotywa. Amahlwempu niyawavala angeviwa ezinkudleni zenu. 
Amos5:13 Yiyo ke loo nto zona izilumko zisuka ziwuvale owazo zingathethi, kuba eli lixesha lezinto ezimanyumnyezi." 
Amos5:14 Quqelani kokulungileyo, ingekuko okubi, khon' ukuze niphile, naye uNdikhoyo, uThixo onamandla onke, abe phakathi kwenu, njengoko nizingca ngaloo nto." 
Amos5:15 Inkohlakalo yithiyeni, nithande ukwenza okuhle, nivuselele ubulungisa ezinkundleni zenu, mhlawumbi uNdikhoyo, uThixo onamandla onke, angaba nenceba kumasalela endlu kaJosefu." 
Amos5:16 Ngoko ke utsho uNdikhoyo, uThixo onamandla onke, iNkosi, ukuthi: “Koba sisijwili kwiindawo zonke zembutho; ezitalatweni zonke ibe ngooyoo-yoo zizikhalo. Kobizwa kwanabalimi ukuza kulila, kumenywe nabazili ukuza kubhomboloza." 
Amos5:17 Koba seso sijwili nakwizidiliya zenu, kuba ndobe ndize kunohlwaya.” Utsho uNdikhoyo." 
Amos5:18 Mawoo kwabo balangazelela imini *kaNdikhoyo! Ngaba kanene kuni loo mini yoba yimini enjani? Imini kaNdikhoyo yoba sisithokothoko sobumnyama, ingabi kukukhanya." 
Amos5:19 Koba ngathi umntu ubaleka ingonyama, aye kugagana nebhere. Koba ngathi umntu ungena endlwini, abambelele eludongeni, suka alunywe yinyoka kweso sandla." 
Amos5:20 Imini kaNdikhoyo iya kuba bubumnyama, ingabi kukukhanya. Yoba sisithokothoko sentsunguzi engenalitha." 
Amos5:21 “Ndiwathiyile, ndiwacekisa amatheko enu, andinamdla konke yimisitho yenu." 
Amos5:22 Loo madini atshiswayo niwenzayo, kunye naloo minikelo yenu yeenkozo, andiyi kuyamkela; andiyi kuyisa so konke iminikelo yenu yobudlelane yeenkomo ezityetyisiweyo." 
Amos5:23 Niyandifundekela ngezo ngoma zenu; andifuni nokusiva isandi sezo hapu zenu. 
Amos5:24 Makuqukuqele ukunyaniseka njengomlambo, nobulungisa njengomsinga ongatshiyo." 
Amos5:25 “Ndlu kaSirayeli, yayingendim enanimxhelela, nimenzela amadini iminyaka emashumi mane entlango." 
Amos5:26 Ngoku ke niza kuyithwala loo mifanekiso kaSikuti, loo kumkani wenu, kunye nokaKiyuni, inkwenkwezi yothixo wenu enazenzelayo," 
Amos5:27 kuba ndizimisele ukunigxothela kude lee ngaphaya kweDamasko, apho niya kuba ngabathinjwa khona.” Utsho uNdikhoyo. NguThixo onamandla onke igama lakhe." 
Amos6:1 Mawoo! Lusizi okwenu, nina bantundini bathe zava eZiyon, nina nizicingelayo ukuba nikhuselekile kwintaba yaseSamariya – nditsho nina, zindwalutho zesizwe, nina kuziwa kuni ngabantu bakwaSirayeli." 
Amos6:2 Khanenjenjeya niye kuvelela iKalene, nidlule apho niye kwesaa sixekokazi iHamati, nihle nibheke eGati isixeko samaFilistiya. Ngaba loo mimandla iyidlula ngantoni eyenu? Ngaba kanene loo mihlaba mikhulu kuneyenu na?" 
Amos6:3 Nina niwubekela kude umhla weshwangusha, kanti nisondeza ukulawulwa lugonyamelo." 
Amos6:4 Nithe zukumfa kwiibhedi ezihonjiswe ngamabamba eendlovu, nee ngqendevu kwezo sofa zenu, nisitya eyona nyama ikhethiweyo yegusha nenkomo." 
Amos6:5 Nivukwa yinkenkqe yakutsho ihapu, niqambe ingoma nixelise uDavide." 
Amos6:6 Nizibetha zichuchumale iindebe yiwayini, niziqhole ngawexabiso amafutha, ningabi nantlungu ngokutshabalala kwendlu kaJosefu." 
Amos6:7 Ngoko ke kuya kuqala kuthinjwe nina, aphele loo matheko enithe zava kuwo." 
Amos6:8 INkosi *uNdikhoyo ifunge igama layo; ewe, nguwo lo umlomo kaNdikhoyo, uThixo onamandla onke, uthi: “Ndiyalicekisa ikratshi lenzala kaYakobi; ndithiye nkqu loo mabhotwe bahlala kuwo. Ke ngoko isixeko nako konke okukuso ndiza kusinikela kwiintshaba.”" 
Amos6:9 Kumzi ekukho ishumi lamadoda kuwo, aya kufa." 
Amos6:10 Siya kuthi isizalwana esingcwabayo xa siphakamisa isidumbu sisikhuphela ngaphandle ukuze sitshise amathambo, sakubiza umntu osengontsini yendlu sisithi: “Ngaba uwedwa apho?” aze athi: “Ndindedwa!” isizalwana eso sithi: “Yithi cwaka; igama likaNdikhoyo malingakhankanywa kule nto.”" 
Amos6:11 Niyabona, uthethile uNdikhoyo; umzi omkhulu uwudiliza ube ngamabhodlo nomncinane ube ziintanda." 
Amos6:12 Akhe aphale na amahashe emaweni? Ngaba ukho olima apho ngeenkabi zeenkomo? Kodwa nina ubulungisa nibujike baba yityhefu, nokunyaniseka nakutsho kwaba likhala elikrakrayo." 
Amos6:13 Nivuyiswa kukuthimba iLodabhare, futhi niqhayisa ngokuthi iKarnayim nayoyisa ngamandla enu." 
Amos6:14 Nguwo lo umlomo kaNdikhoyo, uThixo onamandla onke, uthi: “MaSirayeli, ndinizisela isizwe! Siza kuniphatha gadalala ukususa kulaa ngxingwa yaseHamati kude kuye kutsho kulaa ntili ingaseArabha.”" 
Amos7:1 Naku eyandibonisa kona iNkosi *uNdikhoyo. Ndabona idala umqikela weenkumbi xa kanye ingca yayiqala ukuntshula emva kokuba imfuyo kakumkani yayisikelwe utyani. 
Amos7:2 Ndazibona xa seziza kulugqiba lonke uhlaza, ndathi: “Tarhu, Nkosi yam Ndikhoyo, baya kuphila yintoni kodwa abantu bakwaYakobi, beziindwayi nje?”" 
Amos7:3 UNdikhoyo wasijika isigqibo sakhe. “Ayiyi kuba senzeka loo nto,” utshilo uNdikhoyo." 
Amos7:4 Naku eyandibonisa kona iNkosi *uNdikhoyo. Ndayibona ilungiselela ukohlwaya uluntu ngomlilo. Loo mlilo waqala ngokutshisa amanzi enzonzobila, wabuya usiza kubhubhisa umhlaba." 
Amos7:5 Ndaza ndathi: “Nceda, Nkosi Ndikhoyo; pheza ngoku. Abantu bakwaYakobi baya kuphela, beziindwayi nje!”" 
Amos7:6 UNdikhoyo wasijika isigqibo sakhe malunga nalo mba. “Ayiyi kuba senzeka loo nto,” itshilo iNkosi uNdikhoyo." 
Amos7:7 Naku eyandibonisa kona. INkosi yayimi ngaseludongeni olwalwakhiwe lumpuluswa, iphethe isixhobo sokulungelelanisa." 
Amos7:8 Uthe ke kum *uNdikhoyo: “Amos, ubona ntoni?” Ndathi: “Ndibona isixhobo sokulungelelanisa.” Yathi iNkosi: “Uyabona, ndiza kubalinganisa ngesixhobo sokulungelelanisa abantu bam amaSirayeli. Ke andiyi kubuya ndijike ndingabohlwayanga." 
Amos7:9 Zonke eziya ndawo ziphakamileyo banqula kuzo abendlu kaIsake ziza kubhanga. Ziza kuba ngamabhodlo zonke izibingelelo zamaSirayeli. Indlu kaJerobhowam ndiza kuyibhangisa ngekrele.” 
Amos7:10 UAmaziya owayengumbingeleli eBhetele wathumela kukumkani uJerobhowam wakwaSirayeli, wathi: “UAmos ukwenzela iyelenqe apha kanye kwaSirayeli. Ilizwe alingekhe liwanyamezele onke amazwi akhe." 
Amos7:11 Kaloku uAmos uthi: ‘UJerobhowam uza kufa likrele, amaSirayeli wona athinjwe afuduswe emke kweli lizwe.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Waza wabhekisa kuAmos uAmaziya, wenjenje: “Hamb' umke, mbonindini! Hamba ubuyele kwilizwe lakwaJuda, uphangele uzuze isonka sakho ngokushumayela apho." 
Amos7:13 Uzungabuye uphinde ushumayele apha eBhetele. Le yindawo yokunqulela ukumkani; esi sisibingelelo sakomkhulu.” 
Amos7:14 Wathi uAmos ukuphendula uAmaziya: “Mna andinguye umshumayeli, ndingenguye noweqela labashumayeli abahlawulwayo. Ndingumfuyi mna, ndaye ndilima amakhiwane." 
Amos7:15 Ndisuswe *nguNdikhoyo koko kufuya. UNdikhoyo uthe kum: ‘Yiya ushumayele kubantu bam amaSirayeli.’ 
Amos7:16 Phulaphula ke, ulive ilizwi likaNdikhoyo. Wena uthi: ‘Musa ukushumayela kuwo amaSirayeli, ungathethi lizwi lichaseneyo nendlu kaIsake.’" 
Amos7:17 Ke yena uNdikhoyo utsho kuwe ukuthi: ‘Umkakho uza kuhamba ehenyuza esixekweni. Oonyana bakho neentombi zakho baza kufa likrele. Umhlaba wakho uza kwabelwa abanye abantu. Wena uza kufela ezweni elicekisekileyo. Andisathethi ke ngawo amaSirayeli; wona aza kususwa kowawo umhlaba, asiwe ekuthinjweni.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Naku eyandibonisa kona iNkosi *uNdikhoyo. Ndabona ingobozi ezele ziziqhamo ezivuthiweyo. 
Amos8:2 Yathi: “Amos, ubona ntoni?” Ndathi mna: “Ndibona ingobozi ezele ziziqhamo ezivuthiweyo.” Uthe kum uNdikhoyo: “Sesifikile isiphelo kubantu bam amaSirayeli, oku kwesiqhamo esivuthiweyo, yaye andiyi kubuya ndiphinde ndibaxolele." 
Amos8:3 Ngaloo mini iingoma zasebhotwe ziya kujika zibe sisijwili. Kuya kujuba izidumbu ngapha nangapha, kuthi nzwanga. Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo.”" 
Amos8:4 Phulaphulani, nina niwacinezelayo amahlwempu, nizama ukuzicim' igama iindwayi." 
Amos8:5 Nina nithi: “Yaz'ba iya kuphela nini le misitho yentwasa-nyanga, side size kuthengisa isivuno sethu? Iya kuda idlule nini yona le mihla yokuphumla, khon' ukuze sananise ngengqolowa?” Ibe kanti umlinganiselo niza kuwucutha, ixabiso lona nilinyuse, nenze ubuqhetseba ngezikali ezinganyanisekanga." 
Amos8:6 Amahlwempu niza kuwathenga ngesiliva, abasweleyo nibafumane nokuba kungeembadada, nithengise nkqu nangomdlungu wengqolowa." 
Amos8:7 UNdikhoyo, iqhayiya likaYakobi, ufunge esithi: “Ndikhonje, andisobe ndizilibale nanini na izenzo zabo!" 
Amos8:8 Aliyi kunyikima na ilizwe ngenxa yoku, baze benze isijwili bonke abemi balo? Awuyi kuphakama na umhlaba uxele iNayile, uphinde uthothe njengaloo mlambo waseJiputa?”" 
Amos8:9 Nguwo lo umlomo weNkosi uNdikhoyo: “Ngaloo mini ilanga liya kutshona emini emaqanda, kube sisithokothoko emhlabeni ngexesha lasemini." 
Amos8:10 Amatheko enu aya kujika abe yinzila, iingoma zenu zibe sisililo. Niya kuzibhijela amarhonya nizile, iintloko zenu zibe nenkqayi. Kuya kuba ngathi ningumntu ozilele umntwana okuphela kwakhe. Loo mini yesiphelo iya kuba krakra.”" 
Amos8:11 Nguwo lo umlomo weNkosi uNdikhoyo: “Seyisondele imihla yokuba ndihlise indlala ehlabathini, ingabi kukulambela ukudla okanye ukunxanelwa amanzi, koko ibe kukufuna ukuva amazwi kaNdikhoyo." 
Amos8:12 Baya kubhadula abantu, bebheka ngapha nangapha, bathi bengasentla babe bengasempumalanga, bezingela ilizwi likaNdikhoyo. Kambe ke abasayi kulifumana." 
Amos8:13 “Ngaloo mini iinzwakazi neenzwana ziya kuyoba lunxano. 
Amos8:14 Abo bafunga loo nto ilihlazo laseSamariya, besithi: ‘Ekhonje uthixo wakho, Dan,’ besithi: ‘Ikhonje indlela abanyuka ngayo abantu ukuya kunqula eBheshebha,’ bona baya kuwa, bangabi sabuya bavuke.”" 
Amos9:1 Ndayibona iNkosi imi ngaseqongeni lamadini, yaza yathi: “Betha ezo ntsika phezulu kude kushukume umgubasi. Zaphule, ziwele phezu kwabo bantu balapho. Bonke abantu abaseleyo ndiza kubabulala ngekrele. Akukho namnye uya kubaleka; akukho bani uya kusinda konke." 
Amos9:2 Nokuba bangade bazembele baye kutsho kwelabafileyo, ndiya kubakhupha apho. Nokuba bangade banyukele phezulu ezulwini, ndiya kubathula nalapho." 
Amos9:3 Ndithi nokuba bangade baye kuzimela phezu kwentaba iKarmele, ndiya kubazingela nalapho, ndibakhuphe. Bangade baye kuzimela ezantsi elwandle, bazifihle kum, nalapho ndobathumela ngenyoka yaselwandle, ibadle." 
Amos9:4 Nokuba bangade basiwe ekuthinjweni ziintshaba, nalapho ndothi mababulawe ngekrele. Ndowatsolisa amehlo am phezu kwabo, kungenganjongo yakubenzela okuhle, kodwa kungenjongo yokubenzela ububi.”" 
Amos9:5 Itsho linyibilike yakulichukumisa ihlabathi iNkosi uNdikhoyo onamandla onke, kube sisijwili kubo bonke abemi balo. Ihlabathi liya kuphakama lixele iNayile, liphinde lithothe njengaloo mlambo waseJiputa." 
Amos9:6 Ulobhotwe lakhe lakhiw' ezulwini, amis' uphahla lwesibhakabhaka phezu komhlaba; ulobiz' amanz' olwandle awagalele phezu komhlaba – nguNdikhoyo igama lakhe." 
Amos9:7 Nguwo lo umlomo kaNdikhoyo: “Kum nina maSirayeli anahlukanga nganto kumaKushe. Andithi kanene ndim lo wakhupha amaSirayeli eJiputa, amaFilistiya ndawakhulula kumaKrete namaSiriya eKire?" 
Amos9:8 Inene, ndiyiNkosi uNdikhoyo nje, ndibuqwalasele ubukumkani obonayo, ndaye ndiza kubususa ehlabathini. Phofu andiyi kuyicima kuphele indlu kaYakobi.” Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Amos9:9 “Ukususela ngoku ndiza kuthi makahlukuhlwe ahlelwe amaSirayeli phakathi kwezizwe, kanye njengokuba ingqolowa ihlukuhlwa ihlelwe esefini, kambe akuyi kubakho lukhozo luwa emhlabeni." 
Amos9:10 Bonke aboni phakathi kwabantu bam baza kufa ngekrele, nditsho nkqu abo bathi: ‘Intlekele ayikusihlela; ewe, ngekhe isifikele.’ ”" 
Amos9:11 “Ngaloo mini ndiya kuwuvusa umzi kaDavide ongamanxiwa. Ndozityabeka iimfanta zeendonga zawo, ndiwavuse loo mabhodlo, abe njengoko ayenjalo ngaphambili." 
Amos9:12 Abantu bam baya kuthatha umhlaba wamaEdom oseleyo, nalowo wezizwe ezazikade zibizwa ngegama lam.” Nguwo lowo umlomo kaNdikhoyo, yena oya kukwenza konke oku." 
Amos9:13 Ewe, nguwo lo umlomo kaNdikhoyo: “Kuza imihla ekuya kuthi kusavunwa kube sekulinywa kwakhona, kuthi isatyalwa imbewu yediliya kube sekuxovulwa. Ewe, iintaba ziya kuvuzisa incindi yeediliya, iinduli zitsho zinyibilike." 
Amos9:14 Ndiya kubabuyisa ekuthinjweni abantu bam amaSirayeli, bawavuse amanxiwa ezixeko zabo, bahlale kuzo, balime izidiliya, basele iwayini yazo, balime izitiya, badle iziqhamo zazo." 
Amos9:15 Ndiya kubazinzisa emhlabeni wabo, bangabe babuye basuswe kuwo umhlaba endibanike wona.” Utsho uNdikhoyo uThixo wenu." 
Obadiah1:1 Nanku umbono kaObhadiya. Ngokuphathelele kwiEdom iNkosi *uNdikhoyo itsho ukuthi: Luvakele udaba oluvela kuNdikhoyo; sigalelekile ezizweni isigidimi, sisithi: “Vukani, siye kulwa naye uEdom!”" 
Obadiah1:2 UNdikhoyo uthi kwiEdom: “Uyabona, ndokwenza ube mncinane phakathi kwezizwe; uya kusuka udeleke mpela." 
Obadiah1:3 Ikratshi elisentliziyweni yakho likukhohlisile. Wena uhlala ezimfanteni zamawa, wena ukhaya likweliphezulu, xa uzithethela uman' usithi: ‘Ngubani oya kundithula andise emhlabeni?’" 
Obadiah1:4 Noba ungade untinge njengokhozi, ewe, noba usezinkwenkwezini umzi wakho, nalapho mna ndiya kukuthoba.” Lowo ke ngumlomo kaNdikhoyo." 
Obadiah1:5 “Xa ufikelwe ngamasela, ewe, nokuba zizihange ebusuku, aya kûba kangangoko anako, akushiyele kodwa. Nabavuni beediliya bavuna bagqibe, kushiyeke umkhwahlazo. Kodwa eyakho intshabalalo iya kugqithisa." 
Obadiah1:6 Kaloku, wena Esawu, uya kugqogqwa uphengululwe, konke okwakho okunexabiso kuthinjwe." 
Obadiah1:7 Oogxa bakho bokududulela emideni. Izihlobo zokukhohlisa utsho woyisakale. Abo ubusidla kunye nabo bokugcayisela, kodwa sobe uyiqonde loo nto.”" 
Obadiah1:8 Nguwo lo umlomo kaNdikhoyo: “Mhla ndamohlwaya uEdom ndozitshabalalisa izilumko zakhe, kungabikho mntu uqiqayo kwezo ntaba zakwaEsawu." 
Obadiah1:9 Ke wona amadoda omkhosi waseTeman osuka arhwaqele; bonke abakwiintaba zakwaEsawu baya kunqunyulwa babulawe. 
Obadiah1:10 Ngenxa yobundlobongela obenze kumntakwenu, nditsho umninawe wakho onguYakobi, ihlazo liya kukugubungela, utshatyalaliswe ngonaphakade.”" 
Obadiah1:11 “Ngaloo mini wena wema bhuxe ngeli xesha utshaba luthath' ubutyebi. Iintlanga zangena emasangweni, zenza *amaqashiso ngeJerusalem, suka wena waba njengomnye wazo." 
Obadiah1:12 Akwaba ubungamdelanga umntakwenu, nditsho ngemini yakhe yelishwa. Akwaba ubungagcobanga ngenxa kaJuda ngemini yakhe yentshabalalo. Akwaba ubungaqholosanga mhla lalibhek' umoya kuye." 
Obadiah1:13 Ngewungangenanga kumasango abantu bam ngomhla wabo wesithwakumbe. Ngewungabajongelanga phantsi ngenkxwaleko yabo ngemini yentlekele yabo. Ngewungabuxhaphazanga ubutyebi babo ngomhla weshwangusha labo. 
Obadiah1:14 Akwaba ubungemanga eziphambukeni ukuze unqakule iimbacu zabo. Amasalela ngewungawanikelanga elutshabeni mhla kwakugos' okwaphukayo.” 
Obadiah1:15 “Ewe, kuzo zonke izizwe imini *kaNdikhoyo isondele. Loo nto uyenzileyo, wena Edom, iya kubuya yenziwe nakuwe; isikhuni siya kubuya nomkhwezeli." 
Obadiah1:16 Njengoko nina nayisezwayo ibhekile yesohlwayo entabeni yam engcwele, ngokunjalo nezinye izizwe ziya kuyisezwa, phofu ziyisele zingayeki. Ewe, ziya kusela zibimbilize, zide zibe ngathi zange zabakho.”" 
Obadiah1:17 “Ke kwintaba iZiyon kuya kubakho abasindileyo; yona yobuya ibe yindawo engcwele. Indlu kaYakobi iya kulixhamla ilifa layo, libe sezandleni zayo." 
Obadiah1:18 Indlu kaYakobi iya kuba ngumlilo, indlu kaJosefu ibe lidangatye. Ke yona ekaEsawu ibe ngumququ, bayintumeke umlilo itshe iphele. Akusayi kubakho masalela kule ndlu kaEsawu mpela-mpela.” Etshilonje *uNdikhoyo, utshilo." 
Obadiah1:19 “Ke zona iintaba zakwaEsawu zomiwa ngabantu belasezantsi; ke bona abakumazantsi eentaba beme kumhlaba wamaFilistiya. Bowuthatha umhlaba kaEfrayim nowaseSamariya, abakwaBhenjamin beme eGiliyadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Iimbacu zamaSirayeli ziya kuyithimba iKanana ziye kutsho eZarefa, iimbacu zaseJerusalem eziseSefaradi zithimbe iidolophu zelasezantsi." 
Obadiah1:21 Abahlanguli bophuma eZiyon, bazilawule iintaba zakwaEsawu, ubukumkani bube bobukaNdikhoyo.”" 
Jonah1:1 Ke kaloku ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo lafikela uJona unyana ka-Amitayi, lisithi:" 
Jonah1:2 “Hamba uye kweso sixekokazi siyiNiniva, usishumayeze, kuba inkohlakalo yaso seyide yaza kufika nakum.”" 
Jonah1:3 Kambe ke yena uJona wambaleka uNdikhoyo, wasabela eTashishe. Wehla waya eJopa, apho wafumana inqanawa eya eTashishe. Akuba ke eyihlawule imali yendlela, wakhwela wasinga eTashishe, ebaleka uNdikhoyo." 
Jonah1:4 Ke kaloku uNdikhoyo wathumela umoyakazi omkhulu apho elwandle; yaba sisaqhwithi esayitsho yasemngciphekweni wokuqhekeka inqanawa leyo. 
Jonah1:5 Abaqhubi benqanawa leyo baphakuzela, yangulowo nalowo wakhala *kuthixo wakhe. Umthwalo wenqanawa bawuphungulela elwandle, bezama ukuba ibe khaphukhaphu. Ke yena uJona wayesuke wehla wangena kumagumbi asezantsi, walala obentlombe." 
Jonah1:6 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi yenqanawa leyo ke yaya kuye, yafika yathi: “Ngani ukuba ulale, thongorhandini? Vuka, ubize uThixo wakho! Mhlawumbi angasikhumbula, size singatshabalali.”" 
Jonah1:7 Ke bathi omnye komnye: “Yizani senze *amaqashiso ukuze sibhaqe lo mntu ungunobangela wale ntlekele.” Benjenjalo ke, laza iqashiso laphuma noJona." 
Jonah1:8 Baza ke bathi kuJona: “Khawutsho! Ngubani unobangela wale ntlekele? Uzokwenza ntoni apha? Khona, uvela phi? Liphi ikowenu? Ungumni kakade?”" 
Jonah1:9 UJona waphendula wathi: “Mna ndingumHebhere. Ndinqula uNdikhoyo uThixo wamazulu, lo udale ulwandle kunye nomhlaba.”" 
Jonah1:10 Ke kaloku loo madoda othuka gqitha, kuba uJona wawachazela ukuba elapho nje ubaleka uNdikhoyo, aza athi kuye: “Yintoni na le uyenzileyo?”" 
Jonah1:11 Ke lona ulwandle lwaqhubela phambili ukulwa. Baza ke bathi kuJona: “Masenze ntoni ngawe ukuze ulwandle luzole?” 
Jonah1:12 UJona waphendula wathi: “Ndifunquleni nindiphose elwandle, ukuze luzole. Kaloku ndiyaqonda ukuba ndim lo unizisele olu qhwithela.”" 
Jonah1:13 Kambe ke abaqhubi bazama kangangoko ukuyisa elunxwemeni inqanawa leyo. Kodwa ke nelo icebo lafadalala kuba ulwandle lwaya luthatha unyawo ngokulwa. 
Jonah1:14 Badanduluka kuNdikhoyo ke bathi: “Awu, Ndikhoyo, uze ungasohlwayi ngenxa yokufa kwale ndoda. Uze ungalibizi kuthi igazi elimsulwa. Kaloku yonke le nto ikholeke kuwe, Ndikhoyo.”" 
Jonah1:15 Amfunqula ke uJona, amphosa elwandle, lwaza ke ulwandle olulwayo lwadamba." 
Jonah1:16 Le nto ke yawatsho amhlonela uNdikhoyo loo madoda, aza amenzela idini, enza nezibhambathiso kuNdikhoyo." 
Jonah1:17 Kambe ke uNdikhoyo wayalela intlanzi enkulu, yaza yamginya uJona. Wahlala apho kuyo ke iimini ezintathu nobusuku bazo." 
Jonah2:1 Elapho embilinini waloo ntlanzi uJona wathandaza *kuNdikhoyo uThixo wakhe," 
Jonah2:2 wathi: “Ekubandezelekeni kwam ndakhala kuNdikhoyo, waza ke yena wandiphendula. Ndakhala ndisemathunjini engcwaba, waza ke wena waliva ilizwi lam." 
Jonah2:3 Wena wandiphosa enzonzobileni, phakath' enzulwini yolwandle, yaza ke imisinga yandigubungela, amaza akho alatyuza andisibekela." 
Jonah2:4 Ndathatha ndibeka ndisithi: ‘Ndigxothiwe phambi kwakho.’ Noko ke ndobuya ndiyikhangele indlu yakho engcwele. 
Jonah2:5 Andigubungela phants' andirhaxa amanzi, ndathi zwabhabha enzonzobileni. Izityalo zolwandle zayithandela intloko yam." 
Jonah2:6 Ndatshona ndehla mpela, ndee xhaxhe ngeengcambu zeentaba. Ndafika nakwelo lizwe elivalwe mfamlibe ngemivalo. Ke wena, Ndikhoyo Thixo wam, wandibuyisa ndiphilile kwelo ngcwaba." 
Jonah2:7 “Ndithe ndakubona ukuba ubomi bam buyacutheka, suka ndakukhumbula wena, Ndikhoyo, umthandazo wam wanyukela kuwe, waya kutsho endlwini yakho engcwele." 
Jonah2:8 Kambe ke, abazilibazisa ngezithixo ezingento yanto, balahlekana nenceba yakho." 
Jonah2:9 Ke mna ndonikela kuwe ngedini, ndihlabele iculo lokukudumisa. Ndosifezekisa isibhambathiso sam. Usindiso lukuNdikhoyo.”" 
Jonah2:10 Ke kaloku uNdikhoyo wayiyalela intlanzi, yaza yamhlanza uJona emhlabeni owomileyo." 
Jonah3:1 Liphinde lafika ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo kuJona, lisithi:" 
Jonah3:2 “Hamba uye kweso sixekokazi siyiNiniva, ufike ushumayele olu daba ndikunike lona.”" 
Jonah3:3 Ke uJona walithobela ilizwi likaNdikhoyo, waya eNiniva. INiniva le ibisisixeko esikhulu gqitha. Bekumthatha umntu iintsuku ezintathu ukuphumela kuyo." 
Jonah3:4 Ke kaloku uJona waluqala uhambo lwakhe kweso sixeko. Akuba ehambe imini yonke wadanduluka wathi: “Yoba ziintsuku ezimashumi mane kuphela, itshatyalaliswe iNiniva.”" 
Jonah3:5 Abo bantu baseNiniva balwamkela olo daba lukaThixo. Ngoko ke bamisela inzila, baza bonke abantu, kuqalela komdala kuye komncinane, bavatha ezenzila." 
Jonah3:6 Akuyiva le nto ukumkani wakhona waphuma ebhotwe, umnweba wakhe wawuthi tya phaya, wanxiba ezenzila, wahlala eluthuthwini." 
Jonah3:7 Waza ke wakhupha isaziso esithi: “Nasi isaziso esigunyaziswe ngukumkani namaphakathi: Makuzilwe, kungabikho mntu okanye silwanyana ongcamla nantoni na, nditsho iinkomo nempahla emfutshane. Ewe, makungatyiwa nto, kungàselwa namanzi." 
Jonah3:8 Abantu nemfuyo mabavathe ezenzila. Bonke mabakhale kuThixo ngamandla, bahlukane neendlela zabo ezimbi nogonyamelo lwabo." 
Jonah3:9 Mhlawumbi uThixo angayijika ingqondo yakhe, abuye nganeno ngengqumbo yakhe, size ke thina singatshabalali.”" 
Jonah3:10 Ke kaloku uThixo wasibona isenzo sabo nokwahlukana kwabo neendlela zabo ezimbi. Ngoko ke uThixo wayijika ingqondo yakhe, akabi sabatshabalalisa njengoko wayezimisele." 
Jonah4:1 Ke kaloku esi sehlo samkhathaza uJona, wacaphuka gqitha." 
Jonah4:2 Wathandaza *kuNdikhoyo esithi: “Kwowu, Ndikhoyo, le nto yileya ndayithethayo kwandisesekhaya. Kwakungenxa yayo ndakhawulezayo ukubalekela eTashishe. Bendisazi ukuba wena unguThixo onesisa nenceba, uThixo oza kade umsindo nonobubele obukhulu, uThixo oyijikayo ingqondo yakhe asiyeke isohlwayo." 
Jonah4:3 Ngoko ke ndiyakubongoza, Ndikhoyo, buthathe ubomi bam, kuba kum ukufa kungcono kunokudla ubomi.”" 
Jonah4:4 UNdikhoyo waphendula wathi: “Unaso na isizathu sokuba uqumbe?” 
Jonah4:5 Ke kaloku uJona waphuma waya empuma yeso sixeko, waza ke wahlala phantsi. Wazakhela iphempe, waza wahlala emthunzini walo ukuze ayibukele kakuhle loo nto yayiza kwehla apho eNiniva." 
Jonah4:6 Ke uNdikhoyo uThixo wamisela umthi ukuba ukhule apho ecaleni kwakhe ukuze umenzele umthunzi, ukhusele intloko yakhe, iyenze ibe bhetele imeko yakhe. Ke uJona wawuvuyela gqitha loo mthi." 
Jonah4:7 Kambe ke ekuseni ngengomso uThixo wawuthumela ngombungu loo mthi, wawugrenya watsho wabuna." 
Jonah4:8 Lithe ke lakuphuma ilanga uThixo wathumela umoya wasempuma onolophu, laza lanqanqaza ilanga phezu kwentloko kaJona. Kwanzima kuye; phantse wayoba. Watsho wanqwenela ukufa, wathi: “Kungcono ukuba ndife kunokuba ndidle ubomi.”" 
Jonah4:9 Ke kaloku uThixo wathi kuye: “Unaso na isizathu sokuba uqumbe ngenxa yalo mthi?” UJona wathi: “Ndifanele ukuvutha ngumsindo, nditsho onokude undise ekufeni!”" 
Jonah4:10 UNdikhoyo wathi kuye: “Lo mthi uwukhathalele ngani, ungakhange ubulaleke nje ngawo, futhi ungakhuliswanga nanguwe? Lo mthi ukhule ngobusuku, wabuya wafa kwangobusuku." 
Jonah4:11 Ke, uthi kukangakanani kum mayela nesi sixekokazi siyiNiniva? Uthi mandingavelani naso ngoku sinabantu abangaphezu kwekhulu elinamashumi amabini lamawaka, abangekawazi umahluko phakathi kwesandla sasekunene nesasekhohlo, kwakunye ke nemfuyo eninzi?”" 
Micah1:1 Nali ilizwi *likaNdikhoyo elafikela uMika waseMoreshete ngemihla kaJotam noAhazi noHezekiya, ookumkani bakwaJuda, awalibonayo ngokusingisele kwiSamariya neJerusalem:" 
Micah1:2 Yivani, nina nonke zizwe; phulaphulani, mhlaba nabo bonke abemiyo kuwo. *UNdikhoyo uSomandla unika ubungqina ngawe; yena uthetha esendlwini yakhe engcwele." 
Micah1:3 Nanko ephuma ekhayeni lakhe; ewe, nanko esiza ehamba ezindaweni eziphakamileyo." 
Micah1:4 Uya kunyathela iintaba zitsho zinyibilike, zibe ngathi ngumthwebeba emlilweni. Uya kunyathela iintili zitsho zimke, kube ngathi kuhl' iimpuphuma zamanzi ethambekeni –" 
Micah1:5 nto leyo ihla ngenxa yobugwenxa bukaYakobi; ewe, le nto ingenxa yesono sendlu kaSirayeli. Bubugwenxa buni obu bukaYakobi? AsingoSamariya na? Yiyiphi indawo ephakamileyo yokukhonza *izithixo kwaJuda? AsiyoJerusalem na?" 
Micah1:6 “Ngoko ke iSamariya ndoyitsho ibe yimbuqe, ibe yintili yokutyala isidiliya. Loo matye ayo ndowaphosa entilini, iziseko zayo zisale zize." 
Micah1:7 Imifanekiso eqingqiweyo yezithixo zakhona yoba ziingceba; iminikelo kwindlu yokunqula yotshiswa ngomlilo. Ndoyitshabalalisa imifanekiso yezithixo. Kaloku izuzwe ngobuhenyu; yophinda ke ibuyele kwakubuhenyu bengqesho.” 
Micah1:8 Ngesi ke isizathu ndobhomboloza ndikhale; ndohamba ndinganxibanga zihlangu, ndizé, nditsho ngomkhulungwane ngathi ngudyakalashe, ndigqumshele ngathi yinciniba." 
Micah1:9 Kaloku inxeba leSamariya alinyangeki, ngoku selisosulela noJuda lo. Selikumasango abantu bam; ewe, kwiJerusalem ngenkqu." 
Micah1:10 Le nto ze ningayibiki eGati; ze ningakhe nigixe konke-konke. Ze nizibhuqa-bhuqe eluthulini eBhete-leafra. 
Micah1:11 Dlulani nihamba zé nilihlazo, nina bemi baseShafire. AbaseZanan abacingi baphume. IBhete-ezele ikwinzilo; akukho ndawo isondele kuyo yokuzikhusela." 
Micah1:12 AbaseMaroti bayapena-pena ziintlungu, belangazelela okulungileyo, kuba isithwakumbe sivele *kuNdikhoyo, sathi gaxa kumasango eJerusalem." 
Micah1:13 Nina bemi baseLakishe, bophelan' amahash' enqwelweni. Yaba nini abangcamli besono, neZiyon nayikhokelela kwakuso; ubugwenxa bukaSirayeli bufunyenwe kuni." 
Micah1:14 Nangoku nab' izipho zokwahlukana, ninikezele kwiMoresheti yaseGati. IAkezibhi yona ngumkhohlisi; ibagqibile ookumkani bakwaSirayeli." 
Micah1:15 Ke nina, bemi baseMaresha, ndiya kunizisela oya kunidla ilifa. Yena lowo usisidima sikaSirayeli uza kufika eAdulam." 
Micah1:16 Zilani nigugule nitsho ngeenkqayi ngenxa yabantwana enibathandayo. Chengezelisani ngeempandla ngathi lixhalanga; kaloku baza kuthathwa basiwe ekuthinjweni. 
Micah2:1 Mawoo ke, nina baceba ububi – nditsho nina bayila inkohlakalo kwiimandlalo zenu! Kwakusa benza loo nkohlakalo, kuba kaloku isemandleni abo." 
Micah2:2 Bakunqwenela intsimi bayayohlutha; bakubawela indlu bayayoxutha. Umzi womntu bawuthatha ngobuqili, ilifa lomfo liphelele kubo." 
Micah2:3 Ngoko ke utsho *uNdikhoyo ukuthi: “Ndiniqulunqela isithwakumbe, bantundini; aningekhe nibe nako ukusinda kuso. Soze nibe sahamba ngebhongo, kuba koba kugos' okwaphukayo." 
Micah2:4 Ngaloo mini niya kuba sisigculelo, baphoxise ngani ngelenzila iculo, besithi: ‘Basivuthulule satshabalala mpela; balahlula-hlule ilifa labantu bam. UNdikhoyo ulithathile kuthi walinikela kwabo bangabavukeli.’ ”" 
Micah2:5 Ngoko ke akuyi kubakho mntu, nditsho ebandleni likaNdikhoyo, oya kwaba umhlaba *ngeqashiso." 
Micah2:6 Abashumayelayo bathi: “Hayi, musa ukushumayela! Sukushumayela ngayo le nto; akukho hlazo liya kusihlela.”" 
Micah2:7 Ndlu kaYakobi, ngani ukuba kuthiwe: “Ngaba uMoya kaNdikhoyo ukhathazekile? Uthi angazenza izinto ezinjalo?” “Akazali buhle na amazwi am kwabo bahamba ngokuthe ngqo?" 
Micah2:8 Abantu bam basand' ukundivukela oku kotshaba. Abo badlulayo bengacingele nto, oku kwamajoni avela emfazweni, nibahluba izambatho zabo ezingayiwayo." 
Micah2:9 Niyabagxotha abafazi bakowethu, bemke emizini elibhongo labo. Abantwana babo nibohlutha intsikelelo yam, bangaze bayifumane naphakade." 
Micah2:10 Yithi thwas' uhambe, kuba le asiyondawo yakuphumla. Ewe, le ndawo ixabhelekile; ifikelwa yintshabalalo engenakunqandwa." 
Micah2:11 Ukuba kufika ixoki lomkhohlisi lisithi: ‘Mna ndishumayela indyebo; yoba yindyikityha yewayini notywala;’ yena woba ngoyena *mshumayeli ulungileyo kwaba bantu!” 
Micah2:12 “Ngenene ndoniqokelela nonke, nzala kaYakobi; ewe, ndowahlanganisela ndawonye amasalela kaSirayeli. Ndonidibanisela ndawonye ngathi ziigusha esibayeni. Oku komhlambi osedlelweni baya kuxokozela ngokuba baninzi kwabo abantu." 
Micah2:13 Uvulindlela wohamba phambi kwabo; botyhoboza baphume esangweni. Ukumkani woba yena ekhokele, *uNdikhoyo ngokwakhe abe yintloko yabo.”" 
Micah3:1 Suka ke mna ndathi: “Phulaphulani, zinkokheli zakwaYakobi, nani balawuli bendlu kaSirayeli. Beningafanele na ukubuqonda ubulungisa?" 
Micah3:2 Kambe ke, nibuthiyil' ubulungisa, nithand' ububi. Abantu bam nibahlubulula ulusu, nibabhunyule inyama emathanjeni." 
Micah3:3 Ewe, abantu bam nibadla ngathi bayinyama, nibahlube ulusu lwabo, amathambo abo niwakroboze, nibanqunqe oku kwenyama elungele imbiza, ngathi yinyama eza kuphekwa ngongxawu.”" 
Micah3:4 Boba ngakhala ke *kuNdikhoyo asuke yena angabaphenduli. Ngelo xesha yena uya kubafulathela ngenxa yobubi ababenzileyo. 
Micah3:5 Ngokusingisele *kubashumayeli abalahlekisa abantu bakowethu, abalilisela ngoxolo kwabo babanika ukutya, ukanti kwabo bangabanikiyo sele bequlele imfazwe, utsho uNdikhoyo ukuthi:" 
Micah3:6 “Ngoko ke ubusuku buya kunigubungela, ningabi namibono; kuya kuba mnyama, ningabi satyhilelwa nto. Abashumayeli botshonelwa lilanga, nemini isuke ixubayele." 
Micah3:7 Iimboni ke zona ziya kuhlazeka, oosiyazi baphoxeke. Baya kuba zizishwayimbana, babufihle ubuso, kuba bengaphendulwa nguThixo.”" 
Micah3:8 Ke mna okokwam ndomelele; uMoya kaNdikhoyo uyandongamela, undithe jize ngobulungisa namandla, ukuze ndixelele uYakobi ubugwenxa bakhe, uSirayeli ndimbonise isono sakhe." 
Micah3:9 Yivani, zinkokheli zendlu kaYakobi, nani balawuli bendlu kaSirayeli, nina babuthiyileyo ubulungisa, nina bagqwethi bolungelelwano." 
Micah3:10 IZiyon niyakha ngobutyadidi begazi; iJerusalem niyiseka ngenkohlakalo. 
Micah3:11 Iinkokheli zayo zisebenza ngenxa yokunyotywa; ababingeleli basebenzela inzuzo, nabashumayeli benza izityhilelo khon' ukuze bazuze imali, kodwa bayame ngoNdikhoyo besithi: “UNdikhoyo ukho phakathi kwethu. Ngekhe sihlelwe bububi mpela.”" 
Micah3:12 Ngoko ke, ngenxa yenu, iZiyon yolinywa njengentsimi, iJerusalem yona ibe ngamabhodlo; ke yona intaba yendlu kaThixo ibe ngummango wamahlathi." 
Micah4:1 Ke kaloku ngemihla yokugqibela intaba emi kuyo indlu *kaNdikhoyo iya kuba yeyona ibalaseleyo, izikrobele zonke iinduli; nabantu baya kugxalathelana ukuya kuyo." 
Micah4:2 Ewe, izizwe ezininzi ziya kuza zithi: “Yizani siye entabeni kaNdikhoyo, endlwini kaThixo kaYakobi. Yena wosifundisa iindlela zakhe, ukuze thina sihambe ngazo.” Kaloku umthetho wophuma eZiyon, liphume eJerusalem ilizwi likaNdikhoyo." 
Micah4:3 Nguye oya kugweba phakathi kwabantu, abe ngumlamli phakathi kwezizwe ezikude nezomeleleyo, wona amakrele awenze amakhuba, yona imikhonto ibe zizitshetshe zokuthena imithi. Kaloku izizwe soze ziphinde ziqulelane ngamakrele, zingasayi kuze ziphinde ziqeqeshelwe imfazwe." 
Micah4:4 Bonke ngabanye bophumla phantsi kwemidiliya yabo, umntu ahlale phantsi komkhiwane wakhe, kungekho namntu uya kuboyikisa. Kaloku uthethile uNdikhoyo uSomandla." 
Micah4:5 Zonke izizwe ziya kuhamba emagameni *oothixo bazo; ke thina siya kuhamba egameni likaNdikhoyo uThixo wethu nanini nanini. 
Micah4:6 Umlomo *kaNdikhoyo uthi: “Ngaloo mini ndiya kuziqokelela neziqhwala, neembacu ngokwazo ndizihlanganise, ngokunjalo nâbo ndibabandezeleyo." 
Micah4:7 Iziqhwala ndozenza amasalela, iimbacu zibe sisizwe esomeleleyo, uNdikhoyo abalawule kwintaba iZiyon kusukela ngaloo mini kuse ephakadeni." 
Micah4:8 Ke wena, nqaba yemboniselo yomhlambi, wena nduli, ntombindini eyiZiyon, wowubuyiselwa umbuso wamandulo; ewe, ubukhosi bobuyiselwa kwintombi eyiJerusalem.”" 
Micah4:9 Ngani ke ukuba ubhomboloze? Ngaba akunaye ukumkani? Ngaba akusenalo na iphakathi, sowupena-pena nje ngoku ngathi ngumfazi efunyenwe yinimba?" 
Micah4:10 Pinyalaza uncwine, ntombindini eyiZiyon, ube ngathi ngumfazi mhla ngenimba, kuba uyaphuma ngoku kwesi sixeko. Uza kuhlala empenge-mpengeni. Uza kuya kwelaseBhabheli apho uya kuhlangulwa khona. Uya kukhululwa nguNdikhoyo khona, akukhuphe esandleni seentshaba zakho." 
Micah4:11 Ngoku ke zininzi izizwe ezihlanganisene ngawe. Zithi: “Ewe, mayixabheleke iZiyon, amehlo ethu akubone oko.”"
